She must somehow secretly pose for the crucial painting without the knowledge of Vermeer's wife, avoid Van Ruijven's grasp, and protect herself from the cruel gossip of the world of a 17th century servant.

cirque du freak: the vampire's assistant.naslov_orig: Cirque du Freak: The Vampire's Assistant
cirque du freak: the vampire's assistant.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja najstnika, ki nevede razdre 200-letno premirje med sprtima vampirskima klanoma.

Skozi fantastično življenje skrivnostnih nakaz in grotesknih cirkuških likov se iz varnosti dolgočasnega življenja najstnik poda na pot usode v kraj iz nočnih mor.
cirque du freak: the vampire's assistant.opis_omdb: Teenager Darren Shan is an excellent student and the pride and joy of his perfect middle-class family, but his best friend is the reckless Steve. When they receive a flyer with an advertisement for a freak show, they sneak to the theater to see the attractions. The star attraction is a vampire called Larten Crepsley, who performs with a colorful yet very lethal spider. After the show, Darren tarries to see the spider and overhears Steve unsuccessfully trying to convince Larten to transform him into a vampire. Darren steals Larten's spider, which later bites Steve. In seeking an antidote from Larten, Darren accepts a deal to become his half-vampire assistant.

angels & demons_2009.opis_neo:
Harvardski simbolog Robert Langdon z jedrsko fizičarko rešuje umor in skuša preprečiti teroristični napad na Vatikan med pomembnim cerkvenim dogodkom.

Profesor Langdon je tokrat na sledi novi srhljivi zaroti svetovnih razsežnosti. Po skrivnostnem umoru znanstvenika, se Langdon zaplete v labirint nevarnih katakomb, zapuščenih katedral in nasilnih umorov kardinalov. Medtem, v osrčju Vatikana tiktaka grozljivo orožje maščevalne bratovščine Illuminatov, ki želijo za vedno spremeniti tok človeške zgodovine.
angels & demons_2009.opis_omdb: Following the murder of a physicist, Father Silvano Bentivoglio, a symbolist, Robert Langdon, and a scientist, Vittoria Vetra, are on an adventure involving a secret brotherhood, the Illuminati. Clues lead them all around the Vatican, including the four altars of science, Earth, Air, Fire and Water. An assassin, working for the Illuminati, has captured four cardinals, and murders each, painfully. Robert and Vittoria also are searching for a new very destructive weapon that could kill millions.

sex tape_2014.opis_neo:
Zakonski par mrzlično išče izginuli video posnetek svojega ljubljenja, ki sta ga posnela prejšnji večer.

Jay in Annie sta zakonca, ki se jima ponudi prilika za noč brez otrok, zato nameravata znova oživeti strast, ki se je z leti ohladila. Odločita se posneti med maratonskim triurnim ljubljenjem, toda naslednjega jutra ugotovita, da je bil posnetek distribuiran po mreži digitalnih naprav, katere morata sedaj izslediti, če želita posnetek izbrisati.
sex tape_2014.opis_omdb: When Jay (Jason Segel) and Annie (Cameron Diaz) first got together, their romantic connection was intense - but ten years and two kids later, the flame of their love needs a spark. To kick things up a notch, they decide - why not? - to make a video of themselves trying out every position in The Joy of Sex in one marathon three-hour session. It seems like a great idea - until they discover that their most private video is no longer private. With their reputations on the line, they know they're just one click away from being laid bare to the world... but as their race to reclaim their video leads to a night they'll never forget, they'll find that their video will expose even more than they bargained for.

hannibal_2001.opis_neo:
V prejšnjem delu filma "Ko jagenjčki obmolknejo" dr. Lecter pobegne iz norišnice in se skrije v Italiji. V ZDA stara doktorjeva žrtev kuje maščevanje.

Deset let po tem, ko je dr. Hannibal Lecter pobegnil iz pripora, ta sedaj v Italiji uživa svojo veličastno zmago. Njegov zastrašujoč glas v sanjah še vedno preganja Clarice, prav tako pa si doktorja iz glave ne zmore izbiti Mason Verger, njegova šesta žrtev, ki pa je napad preživela. Verger je pripravljen zapraviti vse svoje premoženje za maščevanje.
hannibal_2001.opis_omdb: The final chapter of the Dr. Hannibal Lecter quadrilogy, the murdering cannibal. He is presently in Italy, and works as a curator at a museum. Clarice Starling (Julianne Moore), the F.B.I. Agent who he aided to apprehend a serial killer, was placed in charge of an operation, but when one of her men botches it, she's called to the mat by the Bureau. One high ranking official, Paul Krendler (Ray Liotta) has it in for her. But she gets a reprieve because Mason Verger (Gary Oldman), one of Lecter's victims who is looking to get back at Lecter for what Lecter did to him, wants to use Starling to lure him out. When Lecter sends her a note, she learns that he's in Italy, so she asks the Police to keep an eye out for him. But a corrupt Policeman, who wants to get the reward that Verger placed on him, tells Verger where he is, but they fail to get him. Later, Verger decides to frame Starling, which makes Lecter return to the U.S., and the race to get Lecter begins.

hanna_2011.opis_neo:
Najstnico Hanno, ki jo je oče vzgojil v popolno morilko, pošljejo na misijo po Evropi. Na sledi so ji obveščevalna agentka in njeni detektivi.

Hanna (Saoirse Ronan) je zelo posebna najstnica. Ima moč, vzdržljivost in razmišljanje vojaka. Oče (Eric Bana), nekdanji uslužbenec CIE, jo je tako vzgajal v finski divjini. Njeno življenje je tako precej drugačno od življenja drugih najstnikov; polno je trdega dela in treninga, zaradi česar je dekle postalo popolna morilka. V odraščanju jo čaka tudi težka prelomnica: oče jo pošlje na misijo. Skrivaj odpotuje po Evropi, neusmiljena obveščevalna agentka (Cate Blanchett) pa za njo pošlje svoje može. Ko se Hanna približa svoji zadnji tarči, se mora soočiti s pretresljivim razkritjem o svojem obstoju in z nepričakovanimi vprašanji o svoji človečnosti.
hanna_2011.opis_omdb: Hanna (Saoirse Ronan) is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the skills of a soldier. These come from being raised by her father, Erik Heller (Eric Bana), an ex-C.I.A. man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by ruthless intelligence operative, Marissa Wiegler (Cate Blanchett), who has secrets of her own. As she nears her ultimate target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

inferno_2016.opis_neo:
Harvardski profesor in poznavalec simbolov Robert Langdon v osrčju Italije naleti na strašljivi svet, ki ga opisuje Dantejev Inferno.

Robert Langdon se zbudi v bolnišnični sobi v Firencah v Italiji brez spominov na zadnjih nekaj dni in nenadoma ugotovi, da je tarča zasledovalcev. S pomočjo svojega poznavanja simbolov in dr. Sienne Brooks skuša ubežati, hkrati pa rešuje tudi najbolj zapleteno uganko, kar jih je kdaj videl.
inferno_2016.opis_omdb: A famous symbologist on a trail of clues tied to the great Dante himself. When Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia, he teams up with Sienna Brooks, a doctor he hopes will help him recover his memories. Together, they race across Europe and against the clock to stop a madman from unleashing a global virus that would wipe out half of the world's population.

layer cake_2004.opis_neo:
Uspešni preprodajalec kokaina načrtuje zgodnjo upokojitev, a ga nazaj v posel povlečeta ljubezen in mednarodna narkomafija.

Uspešni preprodajalec kokaina načrtuje zgodnjo upokojitev, a ga nazaj v posel povleče ljubezen in mednarodna narkomafija.
Naš junak (Daniel Craig), uglajen, eleganten in vljuden moški, je obogatel s prodajo kokaina in ekstazija, ne da bi si zares umazal roke. Rad bi se upokojil dokler je še dovolj mlad, da bo užival v svojem nepošteno pridobljenem bogastvu. Toda mafijski šef Jimmy Price (Kenneth Cranham) potrebuje dve uslugi. Hoče, da poišče izginulo hči mafijskega kralja, ki je zasvojena z mamili. Price si želi tudi posrednika, ki bi kupil veliko pošiljko ekstazija od nevarnega goljufa, imenovanega The Duke (Jamie Foreman). Sliši se dovolj jasno. Toda stvar ni tako preprosta. Ko se vključi še prebegli srbski vojaški poveljnik in množica nevarnih podležev, ki mu pomagajo, naš junak kmalu ugotovi, da ga lahko upokojitev bogato stane. Plača jo lahko tudi s svojim življenjem.
layer cake_2004.opis_omdb: A successful cocaine dealer, who has earned a respected place amongst England's Mafia elite, plans an early retirement from the business. However, big boss Jimmy Price (Kenneth Cranham) hands down a tough assignment: find Charlie Ryder (Nathalie Lunghi), the missing rich Princess daughter of Jimmy's old pal Eddie Temple (Sir Michael Gambon), a powerful construction business player and gossip papers socialite. Complicating matters are two million pounds' worth of Grade "A" ecstasy, a brutal Serbian gang, and a whole series of double crossings. The title "Layer Cake" refers to the layers or levels anyone in business goes through in rising to the top. What is revealed is a modern underworld where the rules have changed. There are no "codes", or "families", and respect lasts as long as a line. Not knowing who he can trust, he has to use all of his "savvy", "telling", and skills which make him one of the best, to escape his own. The ultimate last job, a love interest called Tammy (Sienna Miller), and an international drug ring threaten to draw him back into the "cake mix". But, time is running out and the penalty will endure a lifetime.

panic room_2002.opis_neo:
Ločena mati in njena hči se zatečeta v sobo za paniko, potem ko v njuno hišo vdrejo roparji.

Meg se s hčerko Sarah vseli v novo hišo, v katero je prejšnji lastnik vgradil 'sobo za paniko', v katero se ne da vdreti. Še isti večer v hišo vdrejo trije moški, med njimi tudi vnuk prejšnjega lastnika, ki se želijo dokopati do bogastva v sefu, ki je v sobi za paniko. Meg in Sarah se pred vlomilci zatečeta v sobo, v katero trojica skuša vdreti na vse mogoče načine.
panic room_2002.opis_omdb: Recently divorced Meg Altman and her daughter Sarah have bought a new home in New York. On their tour around the mansion, they come across the panic room. A room so secure, that no one can get in. When three burglars break in, Meg makes a move to the panic room. But all her troubles don't stop there. The criminals know where she is, and what they require the most in the house is in that very room.

ghostbusters_1984.opis_neo:
Trije brezposelni parapsihologi se začnejo ukvarjati z odstranjevanjem duhov.

Trojica univerzitetnih parapsihologov ostane brez denarja za raziskave in sklene začeti lasten posel. Mestne oblasti jih pokličejo, da bi preverili nenavadno dogajanje v stanovanju nad Centralnim parkom.
ghostbusters_1984.opis_omdb: Peter Venkman, Ray Stantz and Egon Spengler work at Columbia University. where they delve into the paranormal and fiddle with many unethical experiments on their students. As they are kicked out of the University, they really understand the paranormal and go into business for themselves. Under the new snazzy business name of 'Ghostbusters', and living in the old firehouse building they work out of, they are called to rid New York City of paranormal phenomenon at everyone's whim. - for a price. They make national press as the media reports the Ghostbusters are the cause of it all. Thrown in jail by the EPA, the mayor takes a chance and calls on them to help save the city. Unbeknownst to all, a long dead Gozer worshiper (Evo Shandor) erected a downtown apartment building which is the cause of all the paranormal activity. They find out the building could resurrect the ancient Hittite god, Gozer, and bring an end to all of humanity. Who are you gonna call to stop this terrible world-ending menace?

fun with dick and jane_2005.opis_neo:
Premožen par izgubi vse svoje premoženje zaradi niza nespametnih odločitev, zato za preživetje posežeta po kriminalnih dejanjih.

Srednji menedžer in njegova žena uživata v udobnem življenju, dokler ga direktor podjetja ne naredi za grešnega kozla poslovne katastrofe. Brez službe in prihrankov se par poda na kriminalno pot.
fun with dick and jane_2005.opis_omdb: And just like that, Globodyne Corporation--the big media institution where the affluent suburbanite and the company's Vice President, Dick Harper, works--collapses in a grand scandal, Enron-style. To make matters worse, in the worst possible time, Dick's stressed-out travel agent wife, Jane, decides to quit her job--and if this isn't enough--their savings are gone, and nothing can stop Dick and Jane's downward spiral. Now, after a series of failed attempts to keep a job, the desperate and impoverished couple has only one method to stay afloat: to summon up the nerve and steal their way out of misery. However, are Dick and Jane cut out for a life of crime?

about last night_2014.opis_neo:
Romantična komedija spremlja dva para spogledljivcev na poti od nočnega bara do spalnice in nazadnje skozi veliko življenjsko preizkušnjo.

Modernizirana pripoved klasične romantične komedije iz leta 1986 govori zgodbo o paru, ki začenja romantično afero, ter o njuni poti od bara do spalnice in naprej v resnični svet. Ob strani jima stojita prijatelja, med katerima se ravno tako iskri od strasti.
about last night_2014.opis_omdb: Hot Tub Time Machine's Steve Pink directed this contemporary adaptation of David Mamet's play Sexual Perversity in Chicago, about two new couples who find that their sexually charged relationships may not have the substance to thrive in the cold, hard light of day..

american hustle_2013.opis_neo:
Prevarant Irving Rosenfeld in njegova sodelavka Sydney Prosser sta prisiljena sodelovati z agentom FBI, ki ju pahne v svet mafijcev iz New Jerseyja.

Mojster prevar Irving Rosenfeld in njegova zapeljiva britanska partnerka Sydney sta prisiljena sodelovati s podivjanim agentom FBI, Richiem DiMasom. Ta ju popelje v svet vplivnežev in mafije v Jerseyju, kjer ne manjka zabav in denarja, pa tudi ne laži in smrtonosnih nevarnostih. Ujet med njimi se znajde nepredvidljivi politik Polito, Irvingova neuravnovešena žena pa v rokavu nosi skritega asa.
american hustle_2013.opis_omdb: A fictional film set in the alluring world of one of the most stunning scandals to rock our nation, American Hustle tells the story of brilliant con man Irving Rosenfeld (Christian Bale), who along with his equally cunning and seductive British partner Sydney Prosser (Amy Adams) is forced to work for a wild FBI agent Richie DiMaso (Bradley Cooper). DiMaso pushes them into a world of Jersey powerbrokers and mafia that's as dangerous as it is enchanting. Jeremy Renner is Carmine Polito, the passionate, volatile, New Jersey political operator caught between the con-artists and Feds. Irving's unpredictable wife Rosalyn (Jennifer Lawrence) could be the one to pull the thread that brings the entire world crashing down.

the shallows_2016.opis_neo:
Ko 180 metrov od obale deskarico Nancy napade veliki beli morski pes, njena kratka pot na varno postane skrajni preizkus volje.

Nancy se odloči, da bo sama uživala v deskanju na samotni obali in tako pozabila na skrbi. Ko pa se poda med valove, v vodi kmalu opazi velikega belega morskega psa. Da bi se rešila, spleza na skalo, kjer ostane ujeta, saj jo na poti do varne plaže čaka zver.
the shallows_2016.opis_omdb: In the taut thriller The Shallows, when Nancy (Blake Lively) is surfing on a secluded beach, she finds herself on the feeding ground of a great white shark. Though she is stranded only 200 yards from shore, survival proves to be the ultimate test of wills, requiring all of Nancy's ingenuity, resourcefulness, and fortitude.

ghostbusters ii_1989.opis_neo:
Odkritje ogromne reke ektoplazme in ponovni pojav duhov omogočita ekipi Izganjalcev duhov, da ponovno odprejo svojo dejavnost.

Izganjalci duhov odkrijejo, da New York spet oblega nadnaravno zlo. Pod mestom vre velikanska reka sluzaste ektoplazme, starodavni čarodej pa skuša zapeljati Daninega otroka in se skozenj na novo roditi v življenje.
ghostbusters ii_1989.opis_omdb: Having lost their status and credibility five years after covering New York City with gooey roasted marshmallows in Ghostbusters (1984), the city's former heroes and once-popular spirit-hunters struggle to keep afloat, forced to work odd jobs. However, when Dana and her baby have yet another terrifying encounter with the paranormal, it is up to Peter Venkman and his fearless team of supernatural crime fighters to step up and save the day. Once more, humankind is in danger, as rivers of slimy psycho-reactive ectoplasm, paired with the dreadful manifestation of evil sixteenth-century tyrant Vigo the Carpathian, threaten to plunge the entire city into darkness. Is the world ready to believe? Can the Ghostbusters save us for the second time?

julie & julia_2009.opis_neo:
V filmu spremljamo mlado Julie, ki se odloči skuhati prav vsako jed, ki je v slavni kuharski knjigi njene soimenjakinje Julie Child.

Zgodba kuharskih začetkov Julie Child je prepletena z izzivom Julie Powell, v katerem poskuša skuhati vse jedi iz njene znane kuharske knjige, ter hkrati dokumentirati postopek na njenem blogu. Kar se začne kot nenavaden izziv, se konča kot izkušnja, ki spremeni življenje mlade Julie.
julie & julia_2009.opis_omdb: Julia Child and Julie Powell - both of whom wrote memoirs - find their lives intertwined. Though separated by time and space, both women are at loose ends... until they discover that with the right combination of passion, fearlessness and butter, anything is possible.

burlesque_2010.opis_neo:
Dekle iz majhnega mesta se odpravi v Los Angeles. Tam najde svoje mesto v klubu burleske, ki ga vodi nekdanja plesalka.

Dekle iz malega mesta (Christina Aguilera) odpotuje v Los Angeles in se znajde v klubu, ki ga vodi nekdanja plesalka (Cher). Muzikal "Burleska", ki ga je napisal in režiral Steven Antin, je dobil nagrado zlati globus.
burlesque_2010.opis_omdb: The Burlesque Lounge has its best days behind it. Tess, a retired dancer and owner of the venue, struggles to keep the aging theater alive, facing all kinds of financial and artistic challenges. With the Lounge's troupe members becoming increasingly distracted by personal problems and a threat coming from a wealthy businessman's quest to buy the spot from Tess, the good fortune seems to have abandoned the club altogether. Meanwhile, the life of Ali, a small-town girl from Iowa, is about to change dramatically. Hired by Tess as a waitress at the Lounge, Ali escapes a hollow past and quickly falls in love with the art of burlesque. Backed by newfound friends amongst the theater's crew, she manages to fulfill her dreams of being on stage herself. Things take a dramatic turn though when Ali's big voice makes her become the main attraction of the revue.

12 years a slave_2013.opis_neo:
ZDA v predvojnem obdobju: Solomona Northupa, svobodnega temnopoltega moškega s severa zvezne države New York, ugrabijo ter ga prodajo v suženjstvo.

Neverjetna resnična zgodba o svobodnem temnopoltem Američanu Solomonu, ki so ga ugrabili in prodali v suženjstvo. Kljub vsem krivicam ne obupa in išče način, kako bi se vrnil k svoji družini. Prejemnik oskarjev za najboljši film, prirejen scenarij in stransko žensko vlogo.
12 years a slave_2013.opis_omdb: Based on an incredible true story of one man's fight for survival and freedom. In the pre-Civil War United States, Solomon Northup, a free Black man from upstate New York, is abducted and sold into slavery. Facing cruelty personified by a malevolent slave owner, as well as unexpected kindnesses, Solomon struggles not only to stay alive, but to retain his dignity. In the twelfth year of his unforgettable odyssey, Solomon's chance meeting with a Canadian abolitionist will forever alter his life.

don't breathe_2016.opis_neo:
Na prvi pogled enostaven rop slepega moškega se za tri tatove spremeni v smrtonosno past.

Tatiči Rocky, Alex in Money vlomijo v hišo slepega moškega in pričakujejo lahek plen. A kmalu po vstopu se znajdejo ujeti v strašen boj za lastna življenja.
don't breathe_2016.opis_omdb: Rocky, a young woman wanting to start a better life for her and her sister, agrees to take part in the robbery of a house owned by a wealthy blind man with her boyfriend Money and their friend Alex. But when the blind man turns out to be a more ruthless adversary than he seems, the group must find a way to escape his home before they become his latest victims.

grown ups 2_2013.opis_neo:
Lenny se s svojo družino preseli nazaj v mestece, kjer so odraščali on in njegovi prijatelji. Tokrat so odrasli tisti, ki se učijo od svojih otrok.

Tri leta po zabavnem poletju s svojimi starimi prijatelji, se Lenny z družino preseli nazaj v rojstni kraj. Med starimi in novimi nasilneži, norimi vozniki avtobusa, pijanimi policisti na smučeh in štiristo nepovabljenimi gosti na zabavi v maskah, Lenny odkrije, da mu norosti iz mladosti sledijo kamorkoli se obrne.
grown ups 2_2013.opis_omdb: After having the greatest time of his life three summers ago, Lenny (Adam Sandler), decides he wants to move his family back to his hometown and have them grow up with his gang of childhood friends and their kids. But between old bullies, new bullies, schizophrenic bus drivers, drunk cops on skis, psycho grade school girlfriends and 400 costumed party crashes he finds out that sometimes crazy follows you.

memoirs of a geisha_2005.opis_neo:
Ženska pripoveduje zgodbo o tem, kako je iz dekleta iz ribiške vasi postala ena najbolj slavnih gejš na Japonskem.

Pri devetih letih družina proda mlado Chiyo v hišo za gejše. Glavna gejša grdo dela z novinko in od nje zahteva trdo delo, preden se bo odločila ali je sploh primerna za stik s strankami - moškimi, ki plačajo za pogovor in ples. Ko Chiyo pod svoje okrilje vzame najbolj uspešna gejša, se njeno življenje začne obračati na bolje, vse do izbruha druge svetovne vojne.
memoirs of a geisha_2005.opis_omdb: In the 1920s, 9-year-old Chiyo gets sold to a geisha house. There, she is forced into servitude, receiving nothing in return until the house's ruling hierarchy determines if she is of high enough quality to service the clientele -- men who visit and pay for conversation, dance and song. After rigorous years of training, Chiyo becomes Sayuri, a geisha of incredible beauty and influence. Life is good for Sayuri, but World War II is about to disrupt the peace.

couples retreat_2009.opis_neo:
Na dopustu v letovišču na tropskem otoku štirje pari sčasoma spoznajo, da tam niso zaradi zabave, temveč zato, da bi popravili svoj odnos.

Jason in Cynthia želita rešiti svoj zakon, zato povabita še tri druge pare, da se jima pridružijo v luksuznem letovišču za odrasle. A šele ob prihodu ugotovijo, da je sodelovanje na skupinskih terapijah obvezno za vse pare, tudi tiste, ki nimajo težav. Oziroma le mislijo, da jih nimajo.
couples retreat_2009.opis_omdb: Dave and Ronnie, Jason and Cynthia, and Joey and Lucy are close. The group used to include Shane and Jennifer, but they divorced and she's gone. Jason and Cynthia announce that their marriage is in trouble, and they beg their friends (and Shane's young girlfriend) to join them on a couples' retreat, at the package rate, on a tropical island. The others reluctantly agree, planning to play while Jason and Cynthia work on their marriage with an island psychologist. To everyone's surprise, the package is inflexible: each couple must participate in the couples' exercises. Soon fault lines appear in all four relationships. What's in store for each couple?

atonement_2007.opis_neo:
Film o mladeniču, ki je po krivem obtožen zločina in se pridruži vojski, da bi se izognil zaporni kazni.

Cecilia in Robbie sta mlada ljubimca, katerih ljubezen propade zaradi laži Cecilijine mlajše sestre, ki napak razume dogajanje, ki mu je priča. Robbieja obtoži zločina, ki ga ni zagrešil, zato je ta poslan na bojišče druge svetovne vojne. Se bosta stara zaljubljenca po dogodkih, ki so imeli dolgoročne posledice na številna življenja, še lahko srečala?
atonement_2007.opis_omdb: When Briony Tallis (Saoirse Ronan), thirteen-years-old and an aspiring writer, sees her older sister Cecilia (Keira Knightley) and Robbie Turner (James McAvoy) at the fountain in front of the family estate, she misinterprets what is happening, thus setting into motion a series of misunderstandings and a childish pique that will have lasting repercussions for all of them. Robbie is the son of a family servant toward whom the family has always been kind. They paid for his time at Cambridge and now he plans on going to medical school. After the fountain incident, Briony reads a letter intended for Cecilia and concludes that Robbie is a deviant. When her cousin Lola (Juno Temple) is raped, she tells the Police that it was Robbie she saw committing the deed.

blood simple_1984.opis_neo:
Lastnik bara v Teksasu odkrije, da se je eden od njegovih zaposlenih zapletel v razmerje z njegovo ženo.

Marty je lastnik restavracije v bogu pozabljeni vasi, ko ugotovi, da ga njegova žena Abby vara z natakarjem. Marty se odloči, da bo obema skrajšal življenje.

Za ta svoj podvig najame sluzavega privatnega detektiva Lorena Visserja. Toda pohlepni detektiv ima v mislih svojo igro.

Toda to je le začetek zapletene zgodbe, ki je polna nesporazumov, prevar in goljufij. Umor je za protagoniste te zgodbe edina zanimiva stvar, ki se jim je kadar koli zgodila. Film je napet, brutalen, bizaren, srhljiv in seksi.
blood simple_1984.opis_omdb: Texas bar owner Julian Marty, who is generally regarded as not a nice person, hires shady private detective Loren Visser, who is able to obtain what Marty requests evidence - in this instance, photographic - that his wife, Abby, and one of his bartenders, Ray, are having an affair. As Ray and Abby realize that Marty has found out about them, it allows them to plan for their future away from Marty, while being up front with Marty about the situation. Marty, in turn, decides to hire Visser once again, this time to kill Abby and Ray, and dispose of their bodies so that they won't be found. The out-in-the-open affair and the contract hit lead to some actions based on self-interest and a standoff of sorts between the four players, which is compounded in complexity by some wrong assumptions of what has happened, with an innocent bystander, another of the Marty's bartenders, Meurice, potentially, and unwittingly, adding to the scenario.

13 going on 30_2004.opis_neo:
Na svoj 13. rojstni dan si Jenna zaželi, da bi bila starejša. Naslednje jutro se zbudi kot 30-letna ženska s sijajno službo in lastnim stanovanjem.

Na svoj 13. rojstni dan si Jenna zaželi, da bi bila starejša. Naslednje jutro se zbudi kot 30-letna ženska s sijajno službo in lastnim stanovanjem. Le nekaj manjka: njen nekdanji najboljši prijatelj Matt.
13 going on 30_2004.opis_omdb: After total humiliation at her thirteenth birthday party, Jenna Rink wants to just hide until she's thirty. Thanks to some magic wishing dust, Jenna's prayer has been answered. With a knockout body, a dream apartment, a fabulous wardrobe, an athlete boyfriend, a dream job, and superstar friends, this can't be a better life. Unfortunately, Jenna realizes that this is not what she wanted. The only one that she needs is her childhood best friend, Matt, a boy that she thought destroyed her party. But when she finds him, he's a grown up, and not the same person that she knew.

marie antoinette_2006.opis_neo:
Film Sofie Coppole se osredotoča na razkošno in burno življenje avstrijske princese, ki je še kot najstnica postala francoska kraljica.

Kirsten Dunst igra vlogo mlade avstrijske princese, ki je še kot najstnica postala francoska kraljica.
marie antoinette_2006.opis_omdb: "All eyes will be on you," says the Austrian Empress, Maria Theresa to her youngest daughter Marie Antoinette. The film, marketed for a teen audience, is an impressionistic retelling of Marie Antoinette's life as a young queen in the opulent and eccentric court at Versailles. The film focuses on Marie Antoinette, as she matures from a teenage bride to a young woman and eventual queen of France.

birdman_2014.opis_neo:
Nekdanji filmski junak upa, da bo s postavitvijo ambiciozne nove drame na Broadwayu osmislil svojo družino in oživil svojo usihajočo igralsko kariero.

Zmagovalec štirih oskarjev nam predstavi komično zgodbo igralca, ki je znan po svojih nastopih v vlogah superjunaka. Zgodba nas popelje v dneve pred premiero, v katerih se igralec bojuje z svojim egom, v poskusu rešitve svojega zakona, kariere in samega sebe.
birdman_2014.opis_omdb: A portrait of Robert, a troubled but poetic soul struggling with his purgatorial existence in a hackney scrapyard.

papillon_2017.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o Henriju Charriereju, ki je bil obsojen na dosmrtni zapor na zloglasnem Hudičevem otoku. Bil je odločen, da si bo izboril svobodo.

Henri 'Metulj' Charriere je mali lopov, ki ga po krivici obsodijo na dosmrtni zapor zaradi umora. Zaprejo ga v zloglasno kazensko kolonijo v Francoski Gvajani, iz katere je odločen pobegniti, zato združi moči s čudaškim ponarejevalcem Louisom, ki v zameno za zaščito financira njegov beg. Toda vsak poskus bega se konča s prijetjem in vsakič hujšo kaznijo.
papillon_2017.opis_omdb: Based on the international best-selling autobiographical books "Papillon" and "Banco", PAPILLON follows the epic story of Henri "Papillon" Charrière (Charlie Hunnam), a safecracker from the Parisian underworld who is framed for murder and condemned to life in the notorious penal colony on Devil's Island. Determined to regain his freedom, Papillon forms an unlikely alliance with quirky convicted counterfeiter Louis Dega (Rami Malek), who in exchange for protection, agrees to finance Papillon's escape.

rendel_2017.opis_neo:
Junak brez obraza Rendel se je spustil v odkrito vojno proti VALI neusmiljeni evropski zločinski organizaciji.

Mesto Mikkeli zamrznjeni mračno mesto v bližnji finski prihodnosti. Mesto kjer so ulice mrzle sence pa skrivajo ogabne nevarnosti. Junak brez obraza Rendel se je spustil v odkrito vojno proti VALI neusmiljeni evropski zločinski organizaciji.
rendel_2017.opis_omdb: The Rendel movie is a story of a man blinded by his desire for revenge and hatred. Even though Rendel can be considered as a super hero, he is somewhat darker than the traditional representatives of the genre. The movie takes place in the fictionalized version of a Finnish city, Mikkeli.

halal police d'etat_2011.opis_neo:
V najnovejši komediji najuspešnejših francoskih komikov, para Eric & Ramzy, serijski morilec terorizira Pariz.

V najnovejši komediji najuspešnejših francoskih komikov, para Eric & Ramzy, serijski morilec terorizira Pariz, ampak dnevi so mu šteti, ko postane ena od njegovih žrtev alžirska diplomatka. To pomeni, da se iz Alžirije v francosko prestolnico odpravita najsposobnejša moža najuspešnejše državne policije v vsej Afriki: inšpektor Nerh-Nerh (Ramzy Bedia) in njegova desna roka Kabyle (Eric Judor). S svojimi neortodoksnimi preiskavami zmedeta francoske kolege in na vsakem koraku širita kaos, zaradi svojih nevsakdanjih talentov pa sta tudi vse bliže zmešanemu morilcu, ki ga prisilita v končni, nori obračun, kjer nihče ne izbira sredstev. je 15 uživala v prestižni vlogi čudovite, zveste pomočnice svojega ljubeznivega in umetniško nadarjenega soproga.
halal police d'etat_2011.opis_omdb: Someone is killing Parisians of Arab ethnicity. When an Algerian diplomat is murdered by the same assailant, two Algerian detectives are sent to help the French with the investigation and they have their own ways of doing things.

the english teacher_2013.opis_neo:
Življenje učiteljice srednjih let se obrne na glavo, ko se domov v njeno majhno mesto vrne njen nekdanji učenec.

Linda Sinclair je 40-letna neporočena srednješolska učiteljica angleščine. Njeno življenje doživi nepričakovan obrat, ko se nekdanja dijaška zvezda Jason Sherwood vrne v Kingston po neuspelem poskusi, da bi v New Yorku postal dramski pisatelj.
the english teacher_2013.opis_omdb: Linda Sinclair (Julianne Moore) is a forty-year-old unmarried high school English teacher in the small town of Kingston, Pennsylvania. She shares a small apartment with two Siamese cats and her rich collection of great literature. She maintains no close personal relationships aside from those she has with her favorite authors and stories. Her life is far less complicated than the dramas she devours on the page, and she likes it that way. But Linda's simple life turns an unexpected page when former star pupil Jason Sherwood (Michael Angarano) returns to Kingston after trying to make it as a playwright in New York. Now in his 20s, Jason is on the verge of abandoning art, pressured by his overbearing father, Dr. Tom Sherwood (Greg Kinnear), to face reality and go to law school. Linda can't stand the thought of Jason giving up on his dreams so she decides to mount his play - a dark, angst-ridden, ambitious work - as a Kingston High School production, with flamboyant drama teacher Carl Kapinas (Nathan Lane) directing. As Linda, now well out of her normal comfort zone, takes further risks in life and love, the stage is set for highly comic downfall. With the play, her reputation, and her teaching career on the line, Linda finds an unlikely ally in herself. Amidst the ruins of her formerly perfect life, can she find a way to her own unique storybook ending?

zbornica_2021.opis_neo:
Nova šolska svetovalna delavka se poskuša izogniti dinamiki moči, ki jo vsiljujejo ravnateljica, učitelji in starši.

Soočena z omejitvami šolskega sistema ter obdana z obupanimi učitelji se nova in zagnana osnovnošolska pedagoginja Anamarija spusti v svoj boj s problematičnim profesorjem zgodovine, ne zavedajoč se, da ravno s tem postaja počasi podobna svojim kolegom v zbornici.
zbornica_2021.opis_omdb: A new school counsellor tries to stay out of power dynamics imposed by the Headmistress, teachers and parents.

the last witch hunter_2015.opis_neo:
Zadnji lovec na čarovnice je edini, ki lahko reši človeštvo pred združenimi silami najstrašnejših coprnic v zgodovini.

Bojevniku Kaulderju je uspelo ubiti vsemogočno kraljico čarovnic, toda tik pred smrtjo ga je preklela in naredila nesmrtnega, s čimer ga je za vedno ločila od žene in hčerke. Danes je Kaulder zadnji lovec na čarovnice, ki že stoletja opravlja svoje težaško delo. Pred njim je odločilna bitka, od katere je odvisno preživetje človeške vrste.
the last witch hunter_2015.opis_omdb: The modern world holds many secrets, but the most astounding secret of all is that witches still live amongst us; vicious supernatural creatures intent on unleashing the Black Death upon the world. Armies of witch hunters battled the unnatural enemy across the globe for centuries, including Kaulder, a valiant warrior who managed to slay the all-powerful Queen Witch, decimating her followers in the process. In the moments right before her death, the Queen curses Kaulder with her own immortality, forever separating him from his beloved wife and daughter in the afterlife. Today Kaulder is the only one of his kind remaining, and has spent centuries hunting down rogue witches, all the while yearning for his long-lost loved ones. However, unbeknownst to Kaulder, the Queen Witch is resurrected and seeks revenge on her killer causing an epic battle that will determine the survival of the human race.

mass_2021.opis_neo:
Po grozljivi tragediji se dva para srečata za boleč in surov pogovor.

Leta po tem, ko jim je grozljiva tragedija uničila življenje, se dva para staršev (Isaacs i Plimpton, Birney in Dowd) dogovorita, da se bodo pogovorili na samem, da bi lahko poskusili živeti dalje. Ta film po scenariju Frana Kranza je tudi njegov režijski prvenec, v katerem temeljito spremlja njihovo pot skozi žalovanje, bes, zanikanje in strinjanje s soočenjem iz oči v oči s tistimi, ki so ostali.
mass_2021.opis_omdb: The parents of both the shooter and one of the victims of a school shooting tragedy agree to meet and talk in an attempt to move forward.

horizon line_2020.opis_neo:
Par, ki na majhnem letalu leti na poroko, se mora boriti za življenje, potem ko njihov pilot doživi srčni napad.

Za bivša zaljubljenca naj bi bil to le kratek let do tropskega otoka na poroku njunih prijateljev. Na polovici poti pa pilot umre zaradi infarkta in pusti Sarah in Jacksona izgubljena nad širnim oceanom.Radijske povezave ni, pa tudi pilotirati ne znata. Nikjer ni ničesar, razen brezmejne modrine v vseh smereh in srhljive nevihte, ki ji ne moreta ubežati.
horizon line_2020.opis_omdb: A couple flying on a small plane to attend a tropical island wedding must fight for their lives after their pilot suffers a heart attack.

the sunlit night_2019.opis_neo:
Študentka slikarstva Frances se odpove prestižnemu stanovanju za slikarje, da se pridruži svojemu fantu na njegovi nalogi na Japonskem.

Študentka slikarstva Frances se odpove prestižnemu stanovanju za slikarje in se pridruži fantu na njegovi odpravi na Japonskem. Kmalu pa je po hudem prepiru primorana vrniti domov. Brez pravih priložnosti za delo, sprejme službo pripravnice v umetniškem studiu, na norveškem otoku.
the sunlit night_2019.opis_omdb: Set between New York City and the far north of Norway, The Sunlit Night follows American painter Frances and émigré Yasha as an unlikely pair who find each other in the Arctic circle. Frances has arrived to jumpstart her career while Yasha has come to bury his father in the land of the Vikings. Together under a sun that never quite sets, they bury the past and discover the future, and family, they didn't know they had.

killing them softly_2012.opis_neo:
Trije lopovi oropajo mafijsko igro pokra in povzročijo kolaps lokalne zločinske ekonomije. Najeta morilca skušata popraviti nastalo škodo.

Trojica oropa kvartopirsko partijo, ki je pod zaščito mafije. S tem povzročijo sesutje zločinskega gospodarstva. Brad Pitt je izterjevalec, ki ga najamejo, da najde roparje in spravi poslovanje nazaj v red.
killing them softly_2012.opis_omdb: Three amateurs stickup a Mob protected card game, causing the local criminal economy to collapse. Brad Pitt plays the hitman hired to track them down and restore order.

operation mincemeat_2021.opis_neo:
Piše se leto 1943. Zavezniki so odločeni zaustaviti Hitlerjev nadzor nad okupirano Evropo, zato načrtujejo popoln napad na Sicilijo.

Pri obrambi pred Hitlerjem se zavezniki soočijo z nemogočim izzivom - kako zaščititi masovno invazijo pred potencialnim pokolom. Dva izjemna obveščevalna častnika, Ewen Montagu (Colin Firth) in Charles  Cholmondeley (Matthew Macfadyen), sta tako edino upanje, da si domislita najbolj neverjetno dezinformativno strategijo v vojni, ki je osredotočena na na najmanj verjetnega tajnega agenta: mrtveca. 

Operacija Mincemeat je izjemna vendar resnična zgodba o ideji, ki je želela spremeniti potek vojne, kljubovati logiki, tvegati nešteto življenj in preizkušati živce svojih ustvarjalcev do meje razuma.
operation mincemeat_2021.opis_omdb: In the context of WW2 narratives, the story of Operation Mincemeat is unique a bizarre and seductive cinematic blend of high-level espionage and ingenious fiction, where the stakes could hardly be higher. Michelle Ashford's script fuses multiple strands and moods: tense, romantic, thrilling, unexpectedly funny, and endlessly surprising. It tells a richly human story of the soldiers we seldom see, who fight a different kind of war in shadows and deception, haunted by the knowledge that certainty and guarantee of success are nowhere to be found.

angélique_2013.opis_neo:
Mlado lepotico Angeliko oče, stric in bratranec proti njeni volji poročijo z veliko starejšim in zelo vplivnim plemičem.

Čudovita filmska priredba prvega v nizu romanov Anne Golon, v kateri spoznamo glavno junakinjo, mlado lepotico Angeliko, ki jo njen oče, stric in bratranec proti njeni volji poročijo z veliko starejšim in zelo vplivnim plemičem. Usoda lepe in uporniške Angelike je nenavadna, saj jo je ljubezen do moža Joffreyja de Peyraca opogumila, da se v času 17. stoletja, zaznamovanega z bitkami za premoč, neenakostjo in represijo, bojuje proti takratnim krivicam in izkoriščanju.
angélique_2013.opis_omdb: In France, prior to Louis XIV ascending the throne, a young baroness is forced to marry against her will and is caught up in a web of treachery and murder, threatening her and her husband, whom she has come to love deeply.

presque_2021.opis_neo:
Dva moška z zelo različnima življenjskima zgodbama in osebnostma skupaj odpotujeta proti jugu Francije.

Beautiful minds je navdihujoč, a topel francoski film, ki je bil posnet po resničnih izkušnjah izjemno cenjenega avtorja, režiserja, scenarista in igralca, Alexadra Jolliena. Zgodba predstavlja Igorja, moškega s celebralno paralizo, ki na svojem triciklu dostavlja ekološko zelenjavo. Pot mu nekega dne prekriža Louise, pogrebni direktor. Sledi neverjetno potovanje in nepričakovano prijateljstvo. Med potovanjem namreč Igor in Louise začudeno spoznata, da konec koncev nista tako zelo različna.
presque_2021.opis_omdb: Marie sets off on El Camino, and while motivated and driven, with no training whatsoever or band-aids. Unwillingly, through pain and encounters, she will live an unexpected journey. She was just going hiking.

sunshine cleaning_2008.opis_neo:
Družina. Rose in Norah sta v otroštvu izgubili mamo.

Rose je mati samohranilka, ki v želji, da bi prišla do denarja, da bi lahko vpisala sina v dobro šolo, svojo neambiciozno sestro Norah nagovori, naj se ji pridruži v nenavadnem poslu, pri katerem se da dobro zaslužiti – čiščenju krajev zločinov.
sunshine cleaning_2008.opis_omdb: A family. Rose and Norah, in Albuquerque, lost their mother when they were young. Rose is responsible - a housecleaner, raising her seven-year-old son Oscar. She's also having an affair with Mac, a married cop, her high-school sweetheart. Norah can't hold a job. Their dad, Joe, is quirky. When Oscar is expelled for odd behavior, Rose wants to earn enough to send him to private school. Mac suggests she clean up after crime scenes, suicides, and deaths that go undiscovered for awhile. Rose enlists Norah, and Sunshine Cleaners is born. Norah bonds with the dead, Rose finds out that it's a regulated business, and complications arise. Can a family marked by tragedy sort things out?

mortdecai_2015.opis_neo:
Trgovec z umetninami Charles Mortdecai išče ukradeno sliko, ki je domnevno povezana z izgubljenim bančnim računom, polnim zlata iz časa nacizma.

Da bi pretentala skupino jeznih Rusov, morata občasni sodelavec britanske obveščevalne službe, mednarodni terorist, sodobni trgovec z umetninami in goljuf Charlie Mortdecai ter njegova dolgonoga žena na drug konec sveta, oborožena le s svojo lepoto in očarljivostjo, da bi se prva dokopala do ukradene slike, ki prinaša bogastvo.
mortdecai_2015.opis_omdb: Juggling some angry Russians, the British Mi5, his impossibly leggy wife and an international terrorist, debonair art dealer and part-time rogue Charlie Mortdecai must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks and special charm in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to a lost bank account filled with Nazi gold.

the courier_2020.opis_neo:
Na podlagi neverjetne resnične zgodbe o poslovnežu, ki je postal vohun.

Zgodba se odvija v času Hladne vojne temelji pa na resničnih dogodkih iz življenja Grevillea Wynnea, britanskega poslovneža, ki je zaradi svojih pogostih potovanj postal zanimiv obveščevalni službi MI6, ki ga je s časom rekrutirala v enega izmed kurirjev za najbolj zaupne informacije.
the courier_2020.opis_omdb: In the shadow of the Cold War a letter from Oleg Penkovsky (Merab Ninidze) an agency of the Soviet Union received by MI6 stating the concern of Penkovsky about world safety and his anxiety about a nuclear war, So Emily Donovan (Rachel Brosnahan) a CIA Agent reached out to MI6 Agent Dickie Franks (Angus Wright) , who recruited British salesman Greville Wynne (Benedict Cumberbatch) to be their spy.

can you keep a secret?_2019.opis_neo:
Romantična komedija o dekletu, ki na letalu popolnemu tujcu zaupa vse svoje največje skrivnosti, saj je prepričana, da ga ne bo nikoli več videla.

Romantična komedija o dekletu, ki na letalu popolnemu tujcu zaupa vse svoje največje skrivnosti, saj je prepričana, da ga ne bo nikoli več videla. Seveda je popolnoma šokirana in presenečena, ko ga ponovno sreča v svoji novi službi in to v vlogi svojega šefa. Spoznajte Emmo Corrigan, mlado žensko z velikim srcem in nekaj majhnimi skrivnostmi. Mami ni nikoli povedala, da je izgubila nedolžnost z Dannyem Nussbaumom med tem ko sta ona in oče v spodnjem nadstropju gledala televizijo. Ali da Sammy, zlata ribica, ni ista, kot tista, za katero je skrbela preden sta z očetom šla na potovanje v Egipt. Connor, njen fant, ne ve koliko kil ima v resnici in ne ve, da ga Emma obravnava kot Kena, tistega od Barbie. Potem so še tukaj prijatelji, ki ne vejo, da jo živcirajo in nekaj skrivost, ki jih ne bi delila z nobenim na svetu. Emma namreč ne mara tangic, ne ve kaj je NATO in niti za kaj se zavzema. Toda vse se spremeni, ko na letalu sreča neznanca in mu zaupa vse te skrivnosti. Za kaj pa ne? Saj ga tako ali tako ne bo nikoli več videla. Toda v ponedeljek, ko se vrno v službo, Emma izve, da ima novega sodelavca - Jacka Harpera in Emma Jacka pozna. Jack je tisti neznanec, ki mu je zaupala vse svoje skrivnosti. Ali lahko dan postane še hujši? Seveda lahko.
can you keep a secret?_2019.opis_omdb: Emma's flight home from Chicago is very bumpy, making her believe that they're going to crash. About to "die", she spills all her inner secrets to the tall, handsome stranger sitting next to her. Next day at work at the NYC ad agency, she discovers he's the top guy in the company. As he doesn't want anyone to know he's been to Chicago, they promise each other to take the secrets to their graves. Emma shares apartment with a coworker and another woman. She's not ready to move in with her jazz loving coworker boyfriend.

never let go_2024.opis_neo:
Ko eden od dečkov začne dvomiti o resničnosti zla, se vezi, ki jih držijo skupaj, začnejo trgati, kar sproži srhljivo bitko za preživetje.

Ko zlo začne prevzemati svet zunaj njihovega praga, je edina zaščita za mater (dobitnica oskarja Halle Berry, glavna igralka, 2001 – Monster’s Ball) in njena sinova dvojčka njihov dom in neomajna družinska povezanost. Da bi preživeli, morajo ostati povezani v vsakem trenutku – celo s pomočjo vrvi – tako povezani z drug drugim si vlivajo pogum, da se nikoli ne izpustijo. Vendar, ko eden od dečkov začne dvomiti o resničnosti zla, se vezi, ki jih držijo skupaj, začnejo trgati, kar sproži srhljivo bitko za preživetje.
never let go_2024.opis_omdb: A family that has been haunted by an evil spirit for years. Their safety and their surroundings come into question when one of the children questions if the evil is real.

what women want_2000.opis_neo:
Vase zagledani šovinist doživi elektrošok in lahko nenadoma sliši ženske misli.

Mel Gibson in Helen Hunt sta zvezdnika v tej odlični romantični komediji o moškem, ki misli, da mu ves svet leži pod nogami. Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson) je ločenec, ki hitro napreduje v eni najboljših marketinških agencij v Chicagu. Toda Nickovo napredovanje je pod vprašajem, ko namesto njega postavijo za kreativno direktorico lepo Darcy Maguire (Helen Hunt. Nickova perspektiva ni več tako bleščeča, toda vse se spremeni, ko v nesreči dobi novo moč: da lahko posluša, kaj ženske mislijo. Nick poskuša s svojo novopridobitvijo ukrasti Darcyjini ideje. Vendar pa se vse spremeni – kajti naenkrat sliši svoj notranji glas, ki mu govori, da se je zaljubil!
what women want_2000.opis_omdb: Advertising executive Nick Marshall is as cocky as they come, but what happens to a chauvinistic guy when he can suddenly hear what women are thinking? Nick gets passed over for a promotion, but after an accident enables him to hear women's thoughts, he puts his newfound talent to work against Darcy, his new boss, who seems to be infatuated with him.

the good lie_2014.opis_neo:
Ganljiva in po resničnih dogodkih posneta drama o Američanki, ki se ji življenje spremeni na bolje, ko v svoj dom sprejme tri mlade sudanske begunce.

Film pripoveduje zgodbo, ki temelji na resničnih dogodkih, ko klepetava Američanka v svoj dom sprejme tri sudanske begunce. Njeno življenje se popolnoma spremeni - na bolje. Trk kultur prinese vrsto smešnih situacij, pa tudi eno povsem resno, katere cilj je pripeljati na varno sestro enega od novih prišlekov.
the good lie_2014.opis_omdb: Four Sudanese children are orphaned after their village is massacred in the Second Sudanese Civil War. Consequently, they make an arduous and dangerous trek through the plains, enduring hardship, death and sacrifice all the way until they reach safety in a refugee camp in Kenya. Years later, these youths are among 3600 selected for resettlement in America, only to have the one girl among them sent to Boston, while the three boys must to make a new life in Kansas City. Together, these young men must adjust to an alien culture even as the emotional baggage of their past haunts them. However, these newcomers, and their new friends like employment counselor Carrie Davis, strive to understand each other in this new home, as they make peace with their histories in a challenge that will change all their lives.

my mom's new boyfriend_2008.opis_neo:
Po terorističnih napadih 11. septembra 2001 Amerika dobi novo organizacijo za boj proti terorizmu.

Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) je mladi agent FBI-ja, pred katerim je težka naloga. Vohuniti mora za lastno mamo (Meg Ryan), ki se je, medtem ko je bil sin na usposabljanju, iz obilne gospodinje spremenila v pravo lepotico. Tu je tudi njen novi frajer (Antonio Banderas), za katerega predvidevajo, da je vodja tople, ki krade umetnine.
my mom's new boyfriend_2008.opis_omdb: Henry is a young FBI agent. During a three-year absence from his home in Shreveport, his mother Marty loses more than 100 pounds, looks great, and to Henry's embarrassment, has become a party animal. Within a day of Henry's returning home with his fiancée, Emily, who's an FBI profiler, Marty meets Tommy, a suave foreigner. He's posing as a consultant, but he's an international art thief, in town to steal "Mother and Son," a Bernini sculpture. Henry is detailed to head a team keeping his mom's new boyfriend under surveillance. Love, law enforcement, and filial devotion are set to collide.

sur la piste du marsupilami_2012.opis_neo:
Ko poročevalca Dana Geralda v lovu za novicami pošljejo v Palombijo, ne pričakuje, da bo tam odkril nenavadno bitje.

Ko pride poročevalec Dan Geraldo (Alain Chabat) v Palombijo v lovu za novicami, ni pričakoval, da bo prišel do nepričakovanega odkritja. S svojim lokalnim vodičem Pablitom (Jamel Debbouze) doživlja presenečenje za presenečenjem sredi te napete pustolovščine, ki mu daje možnost, da svetu prinese spektakularno novico: marsupilami, mitska in izmuzljiva žival, je resnična! Tudi vi boste začeli verjeti v kosmate repe!
sur la piste du marsupilami_2012.opis_omdb: When reporter Dan Geraldo (Alain Chabat) arrives in Palombia to hunt for a scoop, he never suspects that he is about to make an incredible discovery... With his resourceful local guide Pablito (Jamel Debbouze), Dan has one surprise after another during a thrilling adventure that allows him to bring the world some spectacular news: the Marsupilami, a mythical and mischievous animal, really does exist! You too will believe in furry tails!

qu'est-ce qu'on a tous fait au bon dieu.naslov_sl: Bog, le kaj smo še enkrat zagrešili?
qu'est-ce qu'on a tous fait au bon dieu.naslov_orig: Qu'est-ce qu'on a tous fait au Bon Dieu ?
qu'est-ce qu'on a tous fait au bon dieu.opis_neo:
Claude in Marie Verneuil bosta kmalu praznovala 40. obletnico poroke.

Ob priložnosti praznovanja obletnice poroke so se Mariejine in Claudejeve štiri hčerke - Isabelle, Odile, Ségolène in Laure - odločile organizirati veliko zabavo presenečenja v družinski hiši. Claude in Marie še vedno težko prenašata zakone svojih hčerk z moškimi različnega porekla in veroizpovedi, zato jima vabilo tudi njihovih staršev na zabavo, ne sede najbolje.
qu'est-ce qu'on a tous fait au bon dieu.opis_omdb: Claude and Marie hardly bear marriages of their first three daughters with men of different origin and religion. Their last hope is in fourth, youngest daughter, which declares she has a Catholic fiancé.

the fifth element_1997.opis_neo:
Smo v 23 stoletju in zlo ogroža vesolje. Edini način, kako rešiti človeštvo, je peti element, ki se pojavi vsakih pet tisoč let.

Piše se leto 2259 in svet kot ga danes poznamo se je popolnoma spremenil: vozila vozijo po zraku in vertikalno po stenah, človeštvo pa se je razširilo tudi na druge planete. Paziti se je potrebno na vsakem koraku. Opozorilo pa velja predvsem za tri junaške sovražnike zla.
the fifth element_1997.opis_omdb: In the twenty-third century, the universe is threatened by evil. The only hope for mankind is the Fifth Element, who comes to Earth every five thousand years to protect the humans with four stones of the four elements: fire, water, Earth and air. A Mondoshawan spacecraft is bringing The Fifth Element back to Earth but it is destroyed by the evil Mangalores. However, a team of scientists use the DNA of the remains of the Fifth Element to rebuild the perfect being called Leeloo. She escapes from the laboratory and stumbles upon the taxi driver and former elite commando Major Korben Dallas that helps her to escape from the police. Leeloo tells him that she must meet Father Vito Cornelius to accomplish her mission. Meanwhile, the Evil uses the greedy and cruel Jean-Baptiste Emanuel Zorg and a team of mercenary Mangalores to retrieve the stones and avoid the protection of Leeloo. But the skilled Korben Dallas has fallen in love with Leeloo and decides to help her to retrieve the stones.

before midnight_2013.opis_neo:
Jesseja in Celine spoznamo njuno deveto leto v Grčiji. Minili sta skoraj dve desetletji, odkar sta se spoznala na vlaku za Dunaj.

Nominacija za oskarja 2014 za najboljši prirejen scenarij! Opis vsebine: Jesse in Celine sta se spoznala v svojih dvajsetih, se ponovno združila v tridesetih, tokrat pa se soočata s preteklostjo, sedanjostjo in prihodnostjo, ter družino, romantiko in ljubeznijo.
before midnight_2013.opis_omdb: It has been nine years since we last met Jesse and Celine, the French-American couple who once met on a train in Vienna. They now live in Paris with twin daughters, but have spent a summer in Greece on the invitation of an author colleague of Jesse's. When the vacation is over and Jesse must send his teenage son off to the States, he begins to question his life decisions, and his relationship with Celine is at risk.

come to daddy_2019.opis_neo:
Moški v tridesetih letih potuje do odročne koče, da bi se ponovno povezal z odtujenim očetom.

Vse Norvalovo življenje (Elijah Wood) je bilo, blago rečeno, razmeroma težavno. Frustrirani mladenič živi doma z materjo in se skuša znebiti alkoholne zasvojenosti. Ko prejme pismo svojega odtujenega očeta, ki ga prosi za obisk, se Norval z avtobusom odpravi v slikovito odmaknjeno obmorsko domovanje. Morda mu bo vnovično zbližanje z očetom prineslo nekaj čustvenega zadoščenja, ki ga je pogrešal. Vendar kmalu po svojem prihodu opazi, da je z očetom nekaj narobe. Polasti se ga občutek nelagodja zaradi neprimernih opazk in slutnje o njegovi odvisnosti od alkohola. Norval se naposled prepriča, da z njegovo željo o iskrenem snidenju očeta in sina ne bo nič, namesto družinske sprave ga čaka prava nočna mora.
come to daddy_2019.opis_omdb: Norval's life has been, to put it lightly, difficult. Currently living home with his mother, the troubled young man is coming off alcohol-related struggles. So when he receives an unexpected letter from his estranged father requesting a visit, Norval catches a bus up to his dad's secluded and scenic waterfront home. Maybe reconnecting with his father will give Norval the emotional fulfillment he's been lacking. Before long, though, he notices something off about his dad, an uneasy feeling triggered by inappropriate comments and a possible over-dependence on booze. Norval quickly realizes that his hope of father/son bonding is doomed. Instead of a family reunion, he finds himself in waking nightmare.

beau is afraid_2023.opis_neo:
Paranoičen moški se odpravi na epsko odisejado, da bi prišel domov na materin pogreb, pri tem pa se sooči s svojimi največjimi strahovi.

V tem pogumnem in genialno odštekanem novem filmu Arija Asterja, je Beau uspešni podjetnik, ki se odpravi na epsko odisejado, da bi prišel domov k materi, pri čemer se sooči s svojimi največjimi strahovi.
beau is afraid_2023.opis_omdb: Following the sudden death of his mother, a mild-mannered but anxiety-ridden man confronts his darkest fears as he embarks on an epic odyssey back home.

d'artacán y los tres mosqueperros_2021.opis_neo:
P'Estanian je mladi mečevalec, ki sanja, da bi se pridružil legendarnim Smrčketirjem.

Potem, ko je dokazal svoje spretnosti in si pridobil njihovo zaupanje slavnih Smrčketirjev, mora P'Estanian z njimi braniti kralja pred skrivno zaroto zlobnega kardinala, ki želi prevzeti oblast. Ker ni nikogar drugega, ki bi rešil dan, se P'Estanian in njegovi novi prijatelji, nadarjeni mečevalci, podajo na pustolovščino, da bi rešili kralja in osvobodili regijo.
d'artacán y los tres mosqueperros_2021.opis_omdb: France, 17th century. D'Artacán is a brave and idealist but young and innocent swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary King Luis XIII's Muskehounds to restore his father's honor after he was blamed by a crime he didn't committed, forcing him to leave Paris and his job as captain of the Muskehounds. When he arrive to the city, a series of unfortunate events cause not only that D'Artacán meets the beauty Juliette, Queen Ana's personal assistant, but greedy and money lover Pom so the most famous and skilled Muskehounds: Amis, Dogos and Ponthos, accepting a sword duel with all them one behind the other to solve their disagreements. Unaware for D'Artacán, he listened a talk in a tavern between evil Count Rochefort and Milady de Winter about topple Luis XIII as part of powerful and cruel Cardinal Richelieu's masterplan to unleash the war against England. Fearing that D'Artacán reports the king, Richelieu orders Rochefort and his particular guards to kill him, making that D'Artacán, Amis, Dogos and Ponthos leave his misunderstanding behind to fight together. When Amis, Dogos and Ponthos learn about Richelieu's plan the three joins D'Artacán to save France from the war helped by Juliette, but not knowing that Pom has been cheated by Richelieu to report him about D'Artacán actions for receiving much money. When Luis XIII organizes a royal ball as meeting with King of England, Richelieu manipulates the King Luis to force Queen Ana to carry on a special collar in the ball for that Milady steal it and King of England declares war against France by the missing collar. Realizing the Richelieu's plan, D'Artacán, Amis, Dogos and Ponthos turns in the only hope to save the country and stop Richelieu before he succeed in his ambition. Based on the beloved animated TV series originally created by Claudio Biern Boyd, and inspired by the famous novel by Alexandre Dumas.

nature calls_2012.opis_neo:
Ob lastni nesposobnosti razočarani vodja tabornikov Randy Stevens na zabavi svojega brata Kirka ugrabi skupino dečkov.

Ob lastni nesposobnosti razočarani vodja tabornikov Randy Stevens na zabavi svojega brata Kirka ugrabi skupino dečkov in jih z zvijačo odpelje na nedovoljeni izlet – skupaj z njihovimi starši, ki so jim za petami.
nature calls_2012.opis_omdb: Polar-opposite brothers Randy and Kirk never saw eye-to-eye, but their rivalry is taken to a new level when Randy hijacks Kirk's son's sleepover, taking the boys on a Scout Trip to remember.

red_2010.opis_neo:
Ko upokojenemu tajnemu agentu začnejo streči po življenju, skliče svojo staro ekipo, da bi se skupaj postavili po robu smrtonosnim napadalcem.

Frank (Bruce Willis), Joe (Morgan Freeman), Marvin (John Malkovich) in Victoria (Helen Mirren) so bili nekoč pomembni agenti Cie, zaradi skrivnosti, ki jih poznajo, pa so postali glavna tarča Agencije. Ker jih želijo zdaj ubiti, so prisiljeni uporabiti vso svojo pretkanost, izkušnje in skupinsko delo za to, da ostanejo korak pred svojimi preganjalci in si rešijo kožo. Moštvo se loti nemogoče naloge - vdreti v sedež Cie, kjer bodo odkrili eno največjih zarot prikrivanja v zgodovini.
red_2010.opis_omdb: Frank (Bruce Willis) is retired, bored, and lonely living off of his government pension in a nondescript suburb in an equally nondescript house. The only joy in Frank's life is his calls to the government pension processing center when he gets to talk to his case worker, Sarah (Mary-Louis Parker). Sarah is as bored and lonely as Frank and marks her conversations with the unknown Frank and her spy novels as the only things fun in her life. When something in Frank's past forces him back into his old line of work and puts an unwitting Sarah in the middle of the intrigue, Frank and Sarah begin a journey into his past and the people with whom he used to work. Like Frank they are all "R.E.D." - Retired Extremely Dangerous.

red 2_2013.opis_neo:
Tri leta po dogodkih iz prvega dela mora ekipa upokojenih agentov Cie znova združiti moči, ko jih oblasti obtožijo terorističnega napada.

V tem napetem nadaljevanju akcijsko-komične svetovne uspešnice upokojeni agent CIE za tajne operacije Frank Moses znova združi moči s svojo nenavadno ekipo elitnih nekdanjih operativcev, saj morajo poiskati izginulo jedrsko napravo. Da bi jim uspelo, morajo preživeti vojsko neusmiljenih morilcev, nesramnih teroristov in z oblastjo obsedenih vladnih uslužbencev, saj se hočejo vsi polastiti orožja. Naloga pripelje Franka in njegovo ekipo v Pariz, London in Moskvo, kjer jih čakajo številni in dobro oboroženi sovražniki, ki se jih zoperstavijo s svojo iznajdljivostjo in preizkušenimi veščinami, zanesejo pa se tako lahko samo drug na drugega, medtem ko rešujejo svet in skušajo mimogrede še ostati živi.
red 2_2013.opis_omdb: Retired C.I.A. Agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) is in love with Sarah Ross (Mary-Louise Parker) and enjoying their normal life. Out of the blue, Marvin Boggs (John Malkovich) meets Frank in the supermarket and tells that Wikileaks has released the information that they had participated and know the whereabouts of the Nightshade, a portable nuclear weapon that was smuggled in pieces and hidden in Russia. Now the top agents in the world are under contract to seek them out to discover where Nightshade is. The trio travels to Paris and teams-up with the Russian Katja (Catherine Zeta-Jones) to track down the former Russian Agent "The Frog" (David Thewlis) to get more information about the operation. They learn that the brilliant inventor Dr. Edward Bailey (Sir Anthony Hopkins) might know where the weapon is. They discover that Bailey has been interned in an asylum in London by the MI6 for thirty-two years and the British Victoria (Dame Helen Mirren) joins the team. They rescue Bailey and find that the nuclear device is hidden in the Kremlin. Soon, the dangerous South Korean Han Cho Bai (Lee Byung-hun) joins the group expecting to retrieve the weapon. But dangerous killer Jack Horton (Neal McDonough) is hunting Frank down and will not stop until he recovers the nuclear bomb.

book of love_2022.opis_neo:
Dva pisatelja se znajdeta na knjižni turneji v Mehiki.

Zadnji roman mladega angleškega avtorja Henryja je v bistvu polom. Henry je prav zato zelo navdušen, ko izve, da je njegova knjiga v Mehiki presenetljivo veliki hit. Odpravi se tja na promocijo in hitro ugotovi, kaj se pravzaprav dogaja. Prevajalka Maria je prevedla njegovo dolgočasno knjigo in jo prilagodila v vroč erotičen roman.
book of love_2022.opis_omdb: Young, uptight and unsuccessful English writer Henry's novel sells to no one. But when his book is suddenly a surprise hit in Mexico, his publicist insists he travel there on a promotional tour. Upon arrival, a confused Henry discovers the reason behind his novel's popularity - Mexican translator Maria has rewritten his dull book as a steamy erotic novel. Henry, furious, and Maria, reluctant, must now travel together on a book tour across Mexico. As tempers flair and sparks begin to fly, the two begin to find love and lust despite themselves.

21 bridges_2019.opis_neo:
Chadwick Boseman v napetem trilerju v vlogi odločnega in brezkompromisnega policista, ki se na Manhattnu poda na lov za morilci svojih kolegov.

Rop sredi Manhattna gre po zlu in za seboj pusti osem mrtvih policistov. V lovu za osumljenci so uporabljene vse, tudi izredno ekstremne metode, ki bi preprečile, da bi morilci pobegnili z otoka, preko enega izmed 21. mostov. V dolgi noči se linije med tem, koga pravzaprav lovijo, počasi zabrišejo, odkrivajo pa se nepričakovane resnice.
21 bridges_2019.opis_omdb: Thrust into a citywide manhunt for a duo of cop killers, NYPD detective Andre Davis begins to uncover a massive conspiracy that links his fellow police officers to a criminal empire and must decide who he is hunting and who is actually hunting him. During the manhunt, Manhattan is completely locked down for the first time in its history - no exit or entry to the island including all 21 bridges.

w.e._2011.opis_neo:
Leta 1998 dražba zapuščine vojvodinje in vojvode Windsorskega dvigne veliko prahu.

V času, ko so imeli škandali resne posledice, sta se odločila ostati skupaj, ne glede na ceno. Razmerje med kraljem Edwardom VIII. in dvakrat ločeno meščanko Wallis Simpson je v svojih časih izzvalo neverjeten škandal ter spravilo Britansko kraljestvo na kolena in ohranilo svoj zloglasni sloves do današnjih dni. Toda ta film ponuja drugačni pogled in sodobni vidik na takratna burna dogajanja.
w.e._2011.opis_omdb: In 1998, an auction of the estate of the Duke and Duchess of Windsor causes great excitement. For one woman, Wally Winthrop, it has much more meaning. Wally becomes obsessed by their historic love story. As she learns more about the sacrifices involved, Wally gains her own courage to find happiness.

riddick_2013.opis_neo:
Potem ko so ga Nekrozori izdali in pustili umreti na oddaljenem planetu, se je Riddick primoran boriti za življenje z nezemeljskimi grabežljivci.

Potem, ko so ga Nekrozori izdali in ga pustili umreti na oddaljenem planetu, se je Riddick primoran boriti za svoje življenje z nezemeljskimi grabežljivci, pri tem pa postaja še močnejši in nevarnejši. Kmalu na planet prispejo lovci na glave, prepričani, da je Riddick njihov naslednji plen, v resnici pa jih nekdo izkorišča za svoje maščevanje.
riddick_2013.opis_omdb: The infamous Riddick has been left for dead on a sun-scorched planet that appears to be lifeless. Soon, however, he finds himself fighting for survival against alien predators more lethal than any human he's encountered. The only way off is for Riddick to activate an emergency beacon and alert mercenaries who rapidly descend to the planet in search of their bounty. The first ship to arrive carries a new breed of merc, more lethal and violent, while the second is captained by a man whose pursuit of Riddick is more personal. With time running out and a storm on the horizon that no one could survive, his hunters won't leave the planet without Riddick's head as their trophy.

i met a girl_2020.opis_neo:
Nadebudni glasbenik se poda na epsko potovanje čez deželo, da bi našel žensko svojih sanj - ki morda obstaja le v njegovi glavi.

Impulzivni glasbenik, ki se bori s shizofrenijo, se zaljubi v skrivnostno žensko, ki je morda obstaja le v njegovi glavi. Ko nenadoma izgine, se odpravi na popotovanje po Avstraliji, da bi jo našel, zaradi česar je njegov brat prisiljen, da ga poskuša rešiti.
i met a girl_2020.opis_omdb: An aspiring musician embarks on an epic, cross-country journey to find the woman of his dreams - who may be all in his head.

lichožrouti_2016.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja tolpo majhnih, simpatičnih, ljudem nevidnih bitij, ki kradejo in žrejo po eno nogavico v paru.

Lihožerci so majhna, nevidna bitja, ki imajo prste vmes pri izginjanju nogavic, saj od vsakega para pojedo po eno. Mali Lihožerec Hugo živi s svojim dedkom Lamorjem, čigar življenje se počasi izteka. 

Hugo mora premagati strah, oditi iz stanovanja, kjer sta živela, ter se odpraviti na lov za stricem, za katerega do nedavnega sploh še ni slišal.
lichožrouti_2016.opis_omdb: The Oddsockeaters are small creatures, who live alongside us humans and are responsible for socks that go missing when we only have one left from a pair - the odd sock. They eat socks, but only one from each pair.

taken_2008.opis_neo:
Bivši agent Cie mora uporabiti svoje poklicne spretnosti, da reši svojo hčer, ki so jo na izletu v Parizu ugrabili trgovci z belim blagom.

Brian (Liam Neeson) je nekdanji tajni agent, ki živi v Ameriki. Je ločen in ima 17-letno hčer Kim (Maggie Grace), ki živi z mamo in njenim novim možem. Med počitnicami želi Kim s prijateljico na izlet po Evropi. Ker se boji, da ji oče ne bi dovolil, mu reče, da gre samo v Pariz. A žal dekleti nimata sreče. Ob prihodu v Pariz se zadeva zaplete, saj ju ugrabijo preprodajalci z belo robo. Je za očeta kaj hujšega od čakanja na klic ugrabiteljev? Mu bo uspelo poiskati hčer v 96 urah?
taken_2008.opis_omdb: Seventeen year-old Kim is the pride and joy of her father Bryan Mills. Bryan is a retired agent who left the Central Intelligence Agency to be near Kim in California. Kim lives with her mother Lenore and her wealthy stepfather Stuart. Kim manages to convince her reluctant father to allow her to travel to Paris with her friend Amanda. When the girls arrive in Paris they share a cab with a stranger named Peter, and Amanda lets it slip that they are alone in Paris. Using this information an Albanian gang of human traffickers kidnaps the girls. Kim barely has time to call her father and give him information. Her father gets to speak briefly to one of the kidnappers and he promises to kill the kidnappers if they do not let his daughter go free. The kidnapper wishes him "good luck," so Bryan Mills travels to Paris to search for his daughter and her friend.

taken 2_2012.opis_neo:
Bivšega agenta Cie Bryana Millsa in njegovo ženo v Istanbulu ujame oče ugrabitelja, ki ga je Mills ubil med reševanjem hčerke v prvem delu.

Liam Neeson se vrača kot Bryan Mills, upokojeni agent Cie s posebnim znanjem, ki mu nihče ni mogel preprečiti, da bi rešil hčer Kim iz rok albanskih ugrabiteljev. Ko oče enega od ugrabiteljev, ki ga je Bryan ubil, priseže, da se bo maščeval, ujame Bryana in njegovo ženo v času družinskih počitnic v Istanbulu. Bryan pokliče svojo hčer Kim, naj mu pomaga pobegniti ter uporabi vse svoje posebne veščine in znanje, da spravi svojo družino na varno ter enega za drugim odstrani ugrabitelje.
taken 2_2012.opis_omdb: The retired CIA agent Bryan Mills invites his teenage daughter Kim and his ex-wife Lenore, who has separated from her second husband, to spend a couple of days in Istanbul where he is working. Meanwhile, the patriarch of the community of the Albanian gang of human trafficking, Murad Krasniqi, seeks revenge for the death of his son and organizes another gang to kidnap Bryan and his family. Bryan and Lenore are abducted by the Albanians, but Kim escapes and is the only hope that Bryan has to escape and save Lenore.

taken 3_2014.opis_neo:
Bivši agent Cie Bryan Mills se znajde na drugi strani zakona, ko ga po krivem obtožijo umora. Tokrat mora svoje spretnosti uporabiti, da si opere ime.

Miroljubni družinski mož in oče Bryan Mills (nekdanji agent z zanimivo in bogato preteklostjo) ne beži več pred najhujšimi zločinci zdajšnjih časov, temveč pred policijo Los Angelesa, Cio in FBI-jem. Te vodi Franck Dotzler (Forest Whitaker), potem ko Mills (Liam Neeson) med aretacijo pobegne policiji. Kajti Bryanu je nekdo podtaknil umor nekdanje soproge (Famke Jansen), v nevarnosti pa je tudi njegova hči Kim (Maggie Grace), ki je zdaj uspešna študentka na univerzi UCLA.
taken 3_2014.opis_omdb: Liam Neeson returns as ex-covert operative Bryan Mills, whose long awaited reconciliation with his ex-wife is tragically cut short when she is brutally murdered. Consumed with rage, and framed for the crime, he goes on the run to evade the relentless pursuit of the CIA, FBI and the police. For one last time, Mills must use his "particular set of skills," to track down the real killers, exact his unique brand of justice, and protect the only thing that matters to him now - his daughter.

last vegas_2013.opis_neo:
Štirje ostareli prijatelji se podajo v Las Vegas, da bi priredili fantovščino še zadnjemu neporočenemu kolegu.

Billy (Michael Douglas), Paddy (Robert De Niro), Archie (Morgan Freeman) in Sam (Kevin Kline) so najboljši prijatelji in upokojenci, ki se poznajo že vse od otroštva. Ko zapriseženi samec Billy svoje tridesetletno dekle končno zaprosi za roko, se vsi štirje odpravijo v Las Vegas, kjer naj bi podoživeli svoje mladostne dni. Ko prispejo v mesto greha, pa ugotovijo, da se je to v zadnjih desetletjih zelo spremenilo, zaradi številnih dogodivščin in potegavščin pa se v nevarnosti znajde tudi njihovo prijateljstvo. Včasih je v Las Vegasu kraljeval Frank Sinatra, danes cirkuška zasedba Cirque du Soleil, zdaj pa bodo vsaj za nekaj dni glavno besedo tam imeli naši štirje junaki.
last vegas_2013.opis_omdb: Billy (Michael Douglas), Paddy (Robert De Niro), Archie (Morgan Freeman) and Sam (Kevin Kline) have been best friends since childhood. So when Billy, the group's sworn bachelor, finally proposes to his thirty-something (of course) girlfriend, the four head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days. However, upon arriving, the four quickly realize that the decades have transformed Sin City and tested their friendship in ways they never imagined. The Rat Pack may have once played the Sands and Cirque du Soleil may now rule the Strip, but it's these four who are taking over Vegas.

hot seat_2022.opis_neo:
Hekerja posadijo na bombo in prisilijo, da na daljavo ropa bančne ustanove, bivši specialec pa se mora prebiti mimo pasti v stavbi in ga rešiti.

Reed in Orlando morata sodelovati, da bi pretentala zločinski načrt in skušala rešiti hekerja in mesto.
hot seat_2022.opis_omdb: An ex-hacker is forced to break into high-level banking institutions, another man must try to penetrate the booby trapped building to get the young man off the hot seat.

bad moms_2016.opis_neo:
Tri preobremenjene mame začasno zanemarijo svoje obveznosti in si privoščijo malo težko zaslužene zabave.

Scenaristi filma Prekrokana noč so znova ustvarili noro komedijo o tekmovalnem svetu mam, v kateri blestijo Mila Kunis, Kristen Bell in Christina Applegate. Amy Mitchell živi na videz popolno življenje – urejen zakon, uspešna otroka, čudovita hiša in zavidljiva kariera. A njen otročji mož, zahtevna otroka in nesposobni šef jo jemljejo povsem za samoumevno. Ko jo alfa mame v šoli dokončno spravijo s tira, se Amy uporniško prelevi iz pridne v poredno mamo. Skupaj z dvema enako preobremenjenima mamama se osvobodi pretiranih pričakovanj in poda v divjo, sproščujočo pustolovščino, ki se ostro zoperstavi svetu “popolnih” mam.
bad moms_2016.opis_omdb: Amy has a seemingly perfect life - a great marriage, over-achieving kids, a beautiful home and a career. However, she's overworked, over-committed and exhausted to the point that she's about to snap. Fed up, she joins forces with two other over-stressed moms on a quest to liberate themselves from conventional responsibilities - going on a wild, un-mom-like binge of long overdue freedom, fun and self-indulgence - putting them on a collision course with PTA Queen Bee Gwendolyn and her clique of devoted perfect moms.

midsommar_2019.opis_neo:
Ameriški par obišče osamljeno švedsko vas v času praznovanja poletnega enakonočja. A idila se kmalu spremeni v grozo zaradi vaškega poganskega kulta.

Vizionarski režiser Ari Aster, znan po napetem hororju Hereditary, je priljubljeno skandinavsko tradicijo spremenil v z grozo prežeto filmsko zgodbo, kjer se groza odvija sredi belega dne. Dani in Christian sta mlad ameriški par na robu slovesa. Ko pa zaradi družinske tragedije ostaneta skupaj, se Dani pridruži Christianu in njegovim prijateljem na potovanju v osamljeno švedsko vas na nenavaden praznik poletnega enakonočja in praznovanje, ki se odvija le vsakih 90 let. Sprva brezbrižne poletne počitnice v deželi večnega sonca doživijo zlovešč preobrat, ko prebivalci otoka povabijo goste, naj sodelujejo pri slavju, zaradi katerega se zdi ta pastirski raj vse grozljivejši in vznemirljiv. Na videz idilična lokacija in čudovit začetek poletja se bo spremenilo v grozo, za katero bodo poskrbeli člani poganskega kulta v vasi.
midsommar_2019.opis_omdb: Dani (Florence Pugh) and Christian (Jack Reynor) are a young American couple with a relationship on the brink of falling apart. But after a family tragedy keeps them together, Christian invites a grieving Dani to join him and his friends on a trip to a once-in-a-lifetime midsummer festival in a remote Swedish village. What begins as a carefree summer holiday in the North European land of eternal sunlight takes a sinister turn when the insular villagers invite their guests to partake in festivities that render the pastoral paradise increasingly unnerving and viscerally disturbing.

100 metros_2016.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba Ramona Arroye, 44-letnika, ki je kljub multipli sklerozi postal legendaren športnik. V tem navdihujočem filmu spremljamo njegovo pot.

Izjemna resnična zgodba španskega športnika Ramona Arroya, ki mu pri petintridesetih letih postavijo diagnozo multiple skleroze in napoved, da kmalu ne bo več hodil, kaj šele tekel. Kljub diagnozi se Ramon odloči tekmovati v najzahtevnejšem športnem izzivu na svetu, v triatlonu Ironman, ki obsega 42 km teka, 3,8 km plavanja in 180 km kolesarjenja.
100 metros_2016.opis_omdb: Based on true events, a Spanish man with multiple sclerosis who tried to finish an Iron-Man competition despite he was told that he could not make 100 meters.

angel_2007.opis_neo:
Anglija med koncem 19. stoletja in začetkom 20. stoletja.

Angelica Deverell (R. Garai) piše v že od zgodnje mladosti. Čeprav je učiteljica v šoli ne razume in tudi doma ne najde podpore, se uspe prebiti do znanega londonskega založnika, ki izda njeno knjigo. Knjiga doseže nepričakovan uspeh, prav tako tudi nekaj njenih naslednjih romanov. Angelica, ki jo vsi kličejo Angel, postane slavna pisateljica, vzornica mnogim ženskam in ljubljenka svojih bližnjih, posebej Esméja (M. Fassbender), ambicioznega, a ne preveč nadarjenega slikarja. Pa je mogoče hkrati gojiti uspeh, slavo in ljubezen? Njenemu bleščečemu vzponu sledi neizogibni padec.
angel_2007.opis_omdb: Angel Deverell comes of age in Edwardian Cheshire knowing she will be a great writer. Rising above her class (her widowed mother has a grocery shop), Angel finds a publisher and a wide audience for her frothy romances. With royalties, she buys an estate, then she's smitten by Esme, a rake from local aristocracy and an artist of dark temperament.
