She hires Esme's sister Nora, who dotes on her, as a personal assistant, and pursues Esme. Angel is grandly self-centered, coloring her world as if it were one of her novels. When the Great War breaks out and reality begins to trump her will, can Angel hold on to her man and her public?

jackie & ryan_2014.opis_neo:
Naključno srečanje nekdanje country zvezdnice Jackie in potepuha ter nadobudnega glasbenika Ryana vodi v romanco.

Potepuh, ki potuje z vlakom in želi postati uspešen glasbenik, in mati samohranilka, ki se bori za skrbništvo nad svojo hčerko, se vsak po svoje soočata z življenjskimi izzivi. Ko se spoznata in zaljubita, dobita priložnost da njun odnos obema korenito spremeni življenje.
jackie & ryan_2014.opis_omdb: A modern day train hopper fighting to become a successful musician, and a single mom battling to maintain custody of her daughter, defy their circumstances by coming together in a relationship that may change each others lives forever.

the lincoln lawyer_2011.opis_neo:
Ko sprejme na videz enostaven primer se Mickey Haller odvetnik, ki zagovarja zločince nenadoma znajde v smrtonosni igri, v kateri se bori za svoj obstanek.

Mickey Haller je odvetnik, ki zagovarja zločince, njegova pisarna pa se nahaja
na zadnjem sedežu njegovega lincolna. Ko sprejme na videz enostaven primer, se ta nenadoma spremeni v smrtonosno igro, v kateri se Haller bori za svoj obstanek.
the lincoln lawyer_2011.opis_omdb: Mick Haller is a defense lawyer who works out of his Lincoln. When a wealthy Realtor is accused of assaulting a prostitute, Haller is asked to defend him. The man claims that the woman is trying to get some money out of him. But when Haller looks at the evidence against him, he learns that this case might be linked to an old case of his.

the forger_2014.opis_neo:
V napetem in ganljivem trilerju John Travolta igra umetnika, ki je svojo nadarjenost vse življenje zapravljal za nezakonite podvige.

Raymond je umetnik, ki je svojo nadarjenost vse življenje zapravljal za ponarejanje umetniških del. Ko njegov sin zboli za rakom, z zločinskim kartelom sklene tvegan dogovor. V zameno za rešitev iz zapora mora iz strogo varovanega muzeja ukrasti sliko znanega impresionista Clauda Moneta in jo nadomestiti z repliko. Dedek, oče in sin tako pričnejo priprave na krajo svojega življenja.
the forger_2014.opis_omdb: The world's best art forger (John Travolta) makes a deal with a crime syndicate to get an early release from prison, but in return he must pull off an impossible heist - he must forge a painting by Claude Monet, steal the original from a museum, and replace it with a replica so perfect that no one will notice. He enlists the help of his father (Christopher Plummer) and son (Tye Sheridan) and together they plan the heist of their lives!

a dog's purpose_2017.opis_neo:
Pes odkriva smisel svojega življenja, ko se večkrat reinkarnira in zamenja več lastnikov.

Človekov najboljši prijatelj, zlati prinašalec Bailey, želi ugotoviti smisel svojega življenja. Ali so izkušnje in lekcije, ki se jih je naučil v obdobju različnih življenj in z različnimi lastniki povezane, ter morda v sebi skrivajo globlji pomen?
a dog's purpose_2017.opis_omdb: Lasse Hallström "The Hundred-Foot Journey" directed this adaptation of the best-selling novel of the same name by W. Bruce Cameron, which follows a dog voiced by Josh Gad as he is reincarnated as different breeds belonging to various owners. Over the course of multiple lifetimes, the canine's existence intersects with that of a young boy who rescued him in 1962.

deepwater horizon_2016.opis_neo:
Eksplozija naftne ploščadi povzroči največje razlitje nafte v ameriški zgodovini in s tem najhujšo katastrofo človeškega izvora.

Neverjeten prikaz največje ekološke katastrofe v zgodovini ZDA, ki se je kot posledica človeške napake zgodila aprila leta 2010. Na naftni ploščadi Deepwater Horizon v Mehiškem zalivu je prišlo do eksplozije ter hudega onesnaženja zaradi izliva nafte, ker ploščad ni bila vodena po strogih predpisih.
deepwater horizon_2016.opis_omdb: In April 2010, there is no oil exploration operation in the Gulf of Mexico to compare with the Deepwater Horizon oil rig with its size or sheer depth of its drilling. However, the project for the BP oil company is beset with technical difficulties to the point where the general operational supervisor, Jimmy Harrell, and his Chief Electrical Engineer, Mike Williams, are concerned potentially dangerous trouble is brewing. Unfortunately, visiting BP executives, frustrated by the project's long delays, order curtailed site inspections and slanted system tests to make up for lost time even as Harrell, Williams and his team helplessly protest for the sake of proper safety. On April 20, the workers' fears are realized in the worst possible way when the rig's various structural and system flaws spark a catastrophic cascade of failures that would create a massive blowout and explosion that threatens them all, even as it also begins the worst environmental disaster in US history.

love, rosie_2014.opis_neo:
Rosie in Alex sta najboljša prijatelja.

Rosie in Alex sta od malih nog najboljša prijatelja. Ko se Alex odpravi na študij v Ameriko, je Rosie brez njega izgubljena, zato se odloči iti za njim. Namero ji prepreči novica, ki za vselej spremeni njeno življenje ter zaradi katere ostane doma na Irskem. Leta minevajo, Rosie pa določena vprašanja ne dajo miru.
love, rosie_2014.opis_omdb: From the age of 5 Rosie Dunne and Alex Stewart have been best friends, as they take on life they just end up getting separated time and time again. When it comes to love it's just everyone else but each other.... But when will they realise they are meant to be together?

semper fi_2019.opis_neo:
Cal je policist, ki gre komaj iz meseca v mesec in je rezervist marinec v svoji divji skupini prijateljev iz otroštva.

Cal je policist, ki gre komaj iz meseca v mesec in je rezervist marinec v svoji divji skupini prijateljev iz otroštva. Ko Calov mlajši polbrat Oyster po nesreči ubije tipa v gostilniškem pretepu in skuša pobegniti, ga Cal prisili, da se sooči s posledicami. Po krivem obsojeni Oyster se v zaporniškem sistemu bori za preživetje, Cala pa z vso ekipo pošljejo v Irak. Cal se vrne domov in reši brata.
semper fi_2019.opis_omdb: The story sees Courtney as Cal, a by-the-book police officer who makes ends meet as a Marine Corps reservist along with his rowdy and inseparable group of childhood friends. When Cal's younger, reckless half-brother Oyster (Wolff) accidentally kills a guy in a bar fight and tries to flee, Cal forces him to face the music. After an unfair sentence, Oyster fights for survival in a dangerous Pennsylvania prison system while Cal and his friends are deployed to fight the lethal insurgency in Iraq. Overseas, Cal's world is shaken, and after he barely makes it home alive, he resolves to break Oyster out of prison - no matter the cost.

trois souvenirs de ma jeunesse_2015.opis_neo:
Paul razmišlja o svojih mladostniških letih.

Paul se pripravlja na odhod iz Tadžikistana, medtem, ko razmišlja o dogodkih, ki so zaznamovali njegovo otroštvo in najstniška leta. Spominja se mamine norosti, zabav s prijatelji, potovanja v Sovjetsko zvezo, kjer je izgubil nedolžnost, prijatelja, ki ga je izdal in ljubezni svojega življenja.
trois souvenirs de ma jeunesse_2015.opis_omdb: Paul is preparing to leave Tajikistan, while thinking back on his adolescent years. His childhood, his mother's madness, the parties, the trip to the USSR where he lost his virginity, the friend who betrayed him and the love of his life.

haute couture_2021.opis_neo:
Ester zaključuje svojo kariero v ateljeju hiše Dior, ene najpomembnejših in najvplivnejših francoskih modnih znamk.

Ester zaključuje svojo kariero v ateljeju hiše Dior, ene najpomembnejših in najvplivnejših francoskih modnih znamk. Nekega dne ji neko dekle na podzemni izmakne torbico; a namesto da bi poklicala policijo, se Esther odloči, da za dekle - ime ji je Jade - poskrbi, saj v njen vidi priložnost, da svoje veščine, krojaško obrt in bogastvo prenese na nekoga drugega. V vročičnem svetu visoke mode bo Esther Jade omogočila, da doseže svoj potencial.
haute couture_2021.opis_omdb: Esther is at the end of her career as Head Seamstress at Dior Avenue Montaigne workshop. One day, she gets her handbag stolen in the metro by a 20 year old woman, Jade. Instead of calling the police she decides to take care of Jade. She sees in her the opportunity to pass on her skills, the craft of dressmaking, her only wealth. In the frenetic world of Haute Couture, Esther will give Jade la beauté du geste, a way to reach beyond herself.

she's funny that way_2014.opis_neo:
Izzy se preživlja kot dekle na poziv. Nato pa ji življenje spremeni avdicija za gledališko igro, še posebej, ker je režiser njena nekdanja stranka.

Izzy je mlada, brezposelna igralka, ki se občasno preživlja kot spremljevalka. Klic na broadwaysko avdicijo pa ji popolnoma spremeni življenje, ko se izkaže, da je režiser, ki išče glavno igralko, ena izmed njenih rednih strank. Da je situacija še bolj napeta, je on poročen, ona pa na avdiciji blesti pred ostalo ekipo.
she's funny that way_2014.opis_omdb: On the set of a playwright's new project, a love triangle forms between his wife, her ex-lover and the call-girl-turned-actress cast in the production.

a dog's journey_2019.opis_neo:
Nadaljevanje filma Pasji smisel življenja spremlja nove reinkarnacije psička Baileyja in njegovo odkrivanje smisla lastnega obstoja.

Bailey, ki je doživel že štiri reinkarnacije v štiri različne pasme, sedaj uživa na kmetiji v Michiganu, s svojim Ethanom, njegovo ženo Hanno in vnukinjo CJ. Ko se pripravlja zapustiti to življenje obljubi Ethanu, da bo spremljal CJ celo njeno življenje in jo čuval za vsako ceno. S CJ najde svoje novo poslanstvo in ustvari nepretrgano vez.
a dog's journey_2019.opis_omdb: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

run_2020.opis_neo:
Nekaj zloveščega in nadnaravnega je v odnosu matere Diane in hčerke Chloe.

Nekaj zloveščega in nadnaravnega je v odnosu matere Diane in hčerke Chloe. Preveč zaščitniška Diane je od rojstva vzgajala hčer v popolni osami od sveta. Ko Chloe odraste in postane mlada ženska, začne odkrivati, da stvari v njunem domu niso takšne, kot se zdijo.
run_2020.opis_omdb: Chloe, a teenage wheelchair user, is home schooled by her mother, However, her mother's strange behavior doesn't go unnoticed and when Chloe pries into some private papers, she discovers a Change of Name Certificate document with her mother's name, Diane Sherman, on it. When Chloe googles "Diane Sherman," the internet suddenly disconnnects. Chloe becomes suspicious of all that her mother does, suspecting her of something sinister. She decides to go on the run in her wheelchair in a desperate attempt to get away from her.

en attendant bojangles_2021.opis_neo:
Ko se Garyjeva očarljiva in nepredvidljiva mati izgubi v globinah svojega uma, jo morata z očetom Georges zaščititi.

Deček živi v pariškem stanovanju s svojima posrečenima staršema Louise in Georgeem. Pred sinovim občudujočim pogledom vsak večer plešeta na klasike Nine Simone. Njuna ljubezen je čarobna, vrtoglava, večno zabavna. Ob njiju je prostor le za smeh, fantazije in prijatelje. Vsaj tako se zdi na prvo pogled. Dokler nekega dne ne razkrijeta, da nosijo nekateri od najčudovitejših ljudi najtežje osebno breme.
en attendant bojangles_2021.opis_omdb: In front of their little boy, Camille and Georges dance on their favorite song "Mr Bojangles". With them, there is only place for fun and fantasy. The one who shows the way is the mother, an unpredictable wisp. She leads them into a whirlwind of poetry so that the party continues again and again, no matter what happens. Mad love has never lived up to its name so well.

cellar door_2024.opis_neo:
V tej napeti kriminalki se želi par, ki živi v mestu, preseliti v predmestje Portlanda.

V tej napeti kriminalki se želi par, ki živi v mestu, preseliti v predmestje Portlanda. Med obiskom pri skrivnostnem Emmetu, ki zna povezati pravo posest s pravimi ljudmi, dobi par nepričakovano sanjsko hišo pod pogojem, da ne smeta nikoli odpreti vrat v klet. Čas teče in par spozna, da so stare hiše red podobne ljudem - tudi one imajo globoke temačne skrivnosti.
cellar door_2024.opis_omdb: Looking for a fresh start after a miscarriage, a couple find themselves being gifted the house of their dreams with one caveat - they can never open the cellar door. Whether they can live without knowing triggers shocking conseque...

poolhall junkies_2002.opis_neo:
Z biljardom obsedeni Johnny (Mars Callahan) bi lahko postal eden najboljših.

Z biljardom obsedeni Johnny (Mars Callahan) bi lahko postal eden najboljših. Toda njegov mentor in "trener" Joe (Chazz Palminteri), sumljivi slepar, ki odloča, kako in s kom bo Johnny igral, mu preprečuje uresničiti sanje. Ko končno napoči dan, se Johnny poslovi od Joeja, kar pripelje do nasilja. Johnnyjevi prijatelji prebutajo Joeja kot sporočilo, naj ga pusti pri miru, s tem zadnjim dejanjem pa Johnny zapusti svet biljarda. Po ultimatu svojega dekleta Tare ('Alison Eastwood') se Johnny končno posveti "pravemu" delu v gradbeništvu, toda kmalu se počuti bedno. Večino časa je s svojim mlajšim bratom Dannyjem (Michael Rosenbaum), ki gre po njegovih stopinjah proti življenju, ki se mu je Johnny odpovedal po slovesu od Joeja.
poolhall junkies_2002.opis_omdb: Obsessed by the world of pool, Johnny (Mars Callahan) could be one of the best. But his mentor and "trainer" Joe (Chazz Palminteri), a shady hustler who decides how and who Johnny plays, is holding him back from his dream. When the day finally comes, Johnny breaks from Joe, which leads to only one thing -- violence. Joe is beaten up by some of Johnny's buddies as a sign to leave him alone, and with this final act of freedom, Johnny leaves the world of pool-sharking. After an ultimatum from his girlfriend Tara ('Alison Eastwood'), Johnny finally commits to a "real" job in the construction business, but is soon miserable there. He finds himself spending most of his time with his younger brother Danny (Michael Rosenbaum) who it seems is following in his footsteps on the road to a life Johnny left when he broke from Joe. As for Joe, he is bent on revenge for the beating he took, and soon he has a new protégé Brad (Rick Schroder) who is just as good if not better then Johnny. And he's got his eye on Johnny's brother. The two play a high-stakes game of pool which ends in a huge debt owed to Joe, and soon Johnny finds that his brother is in jail for trying to steal the money he owes. The only way out for Johnny is to play Brad, which results in a "race to nine" showdown that pits two of the greatest players against each other for large sums of money, and Johnny and Danny's lives.

réparer les vivants_2016.opis_neo:
Francosko-belgijski film, ki se ukvarja s problematiko darovanja človeških organov.

Vse se začne ob zori s tremi mladimi deskarji na divjih valovih. Nekaj ur pozneje se na poti domov zgodi nesreča. Simon je zdaj priklopljen na aparate, ki ga umetno vzdržujejo pri življenju, medtem, ko so možgani klinično mrtvi. Medtem pa v Parizu mati dveh odraslih sinov čaka na presaditev organa, ki ji bo vdihnil novo življenje.
réparer les vivants_2016.opis_omdb: Early in the morning three surfers draw out to sea to brave the waves. On the road they get an accident. The nineteen-year-old Simon Limbres is transported to the hospital in a comatose state, where the doctor finds that his brain is dead. He is kept alive by machines. His parents must quickly make a difficult decision about possible organ donation.

and so it goes_2014.opis_neo:
Oren mora nepričakovano poskrbeti za vnukinjo, ki jo prvič vidi. Osupli samec za pomoč zaprosi sosedo Leah, s katero je bil ves čas na bojni nogi.

Nepriljubljen nepremičninski agent Oren se želi upokojiti, da bi užival v miru in tišini. Pred njegovimi vrati se nenadoma prikaže odtujeni sin, ki ga prosi, da bi nekaj časa skrbel za svojo vnukinjo, za katero sploh ni vedel, da jo ima. Nepripravljen na vse to, skrb zanjo prepusti kar sosedi Leah.
and so it goes_2014.opis_omdb: Oren Little has turned his back on all his neighbors and shunned the notion of being kind to others after the death of his wife. Next door neighbor Leah has put her soul, and her tears, into her stagnant singing career after the death of her husband. But then Oren's son shows up needing Oren to take care of his daughter Sarah. Oren has no patience for children, Leah never had any of her own, but 9-year-old Sarah just might be the spark that allows these two lonely souls to turn their home into a Little Shangri-La.

tenderness_2009.opis_neo:
Detektiv Cristofuoro preiskuje umor družine in mora ugotoviti, ali je za to kriv nasilen najstnik.

Tri življenja. Detektiv iz Buffala, poročnik Cristofuoro, čigar katatonična žena je v bolnišnici, se začne zanimati za Erica Komenka, mladoletnika, ki je ubil svoje starše in bo ob 18. rojstnem dnevu izpuščen na prostost. Zanj se zanima tudi Lori Cranston, ki ima 16 let in je že povsem razvita, zaradi česar je predmet poželenja svojega šefa in materinega novega fanta. O Ericu ima spominsko knjigo, ko pa ga izpustijo, se skrije na zadnji sedež njegovega avta in vztraja, da jo odpelje s sabo v Albany, kjer namerava spoznati dekle. Cristofuoro je siguran da će Eric ponovno ubiti pa ga slijedi. Jasno je da je Cristofuoro u pravu, ali što motivira Lori?
tenderness_2009.opis_omdb: Three lives. Buffalo detective Lt. Cristofuoro, whose catatonic wife is in hospital, takes a special interest in Eric Komenko, a juvenile who killed his parents and will be freed on his 18th birthday. So does Lori Cranston, 15 or 16, her body fully developed and the object of lust by her boss and her mother's new boyfriend. She keeps a scrapbook about Eric, and when he's released from custody, she hides in the backseat of his car, insisting he take her with him on a trip toward Albany where he's planning to meet a girl. Cristofuoro is certain Eric will kill again, so he follows. It's clear early on that Cristofuoro's probably right, but what's Lori's motivation?

ryû to sobakasu no hime_2021.opis_neo:
Zadržana srednješolka, ki pred resničnostjo beži v virtualni svet, se znajde pred pustolovščino, v kateri bo našla svoj pravi jaz.

Suzu je sramežljiva srednješolka, ki živi na podeželju. Leta je senca same sebe. Ko pa vstopi v "U", masovni virtualni svet, beži v svojo spletno osebnost Belle, svetovno znano pevko. Nekega dne prekine njen koncert pošastno bitje, ki ga preganjajo maščevalci. Ker je njihov pregon vse hujši, se Suzu odpravi na čustveno in epsko iskanje prave identitete skrivnostne "zveri", da bi odkrila njen "pravi jaz" v svetu, v katerem si lahko kdor koli.
ryû to sobakasu no hime_2021.opis_omdb: Suzu is a shy, everyday high school student living in a rural village. For years, she has only been a shadow of herself. But when she enters "U", a massive virtual world, she escapes into her online persona as Belle, a gorgeous and globally-beloved singer. One day, her concert is interrupted by a monstrous creature chased by vigilantes. As their hunt escalates, Suzu embarks on an emotional and epic quest to uncover the identity of this mysterious "beast" and to discover her true self in a world where you can be anyone.

the expendables_2010.opis_neo:
Cijin uslužbenec najame ekipo plačancev, da bi se znebili južnoameriškega diktatorja in odpadniškega agenta Cie.

Neizprosna akcijska srhljivka o skupini plačancev, ki jih najamejo, da se vtihotapijo v neko južnoameriško državo in strmoglavijo tamkajšnjega krutega diktatorja. Kmalu se jim posveti, da zadeve niso, kot se zdijo, in znajdejo se v nevarni mreži prevar in izdaje. V nevarnosti so nedolžna življenja, poleg tega pa plačancem grozi tudi, da bo njihova bratovščina razpadla …
the expendables_2010.opis_omdb: Barney Ross leads the "Expendables", a band of highly skilled mercenaries including knife enthusiast Lee Christmas, martial arts expert Yin Yang, heavy weapons specialist Hale Caesar, demolitionist Toll Road and loose-cannon sniper Gunner Jensen. When the group is commissioned by the mysterious Mr. Church to assassinate the merciless dictator of a small South American island, Barney and Lee head to the remote locale to scout out their opposition. Once there, they meet with local rebel Sandra and discover the true nature of the conflict engulfing the city. When they escape the island and Sandra stays behind, Ross must choose to either walk away and save his own life - or attempt a suicidal rescue mission that might just save his soul.

the expendables 2_2012.opis_neo:
Na videz preprosta naloga se tragično konča, zato plačanci prisežejo maščevanje in se podajo na nevarno odpravo na sovražnikovo ozemlje.

Plačance najame g. Church za navidez preprosto nalogo. Toda stvari gredo po zlu, ko sovražna skupina kruto ubije enega od njih in se po pravico odpravijo na sovražno ozemlje. Odločeni poravnati račune za seboj puščajo kaos, ko naletijo na nepričakovano grožnjo - tri kilograme plutonija, primernega za izdelavo jedrskega orožja.
the expendables 2_2012.opis_omdb: Barney Ross is approached by CIA man Church, who wants him and his guns for hire to go to the former Soviet Union to retrieve something that was on a plane that crashed. Church doesn't tell him what he is getting. And Church sends a woman, Maggie with him to make sure he gets it. They find the plane and get the thing but some men take one of Barney's people hostage and the leader tells him to give him what they got or he'll kill his hostage. They give it to him but he kills his hostage anyway. Barney asks Maggie what was so important about that thing. She says that it showed the location of a Russian plutonium storage mine. Barney decides to track the man down and deal with him. They track them down and discover that the man they seek is Vilain who leads a group known as The Sangs and that they have taken all the men from the surrounding villages to work the mine.

the age of adaline_2015.opis_neo:
Adaline Bowman se po nenavadni avtomobilski nesreči preneha starati in tako v telesu devetindvajsetletnice preživi skoraj celotno 20. stoletje.

V tridesetih letih prejšnjega stoletja je mlado Adaline doletela nenavadna usoda. Po avtomobilski nesreči se je prenehala starati in je tako ostala ujeta v telesu 29-letnice. Svojo skrivnost uspešno skriva skoraj osem desetletij, dokler eno od njenih preteklih razmerij ne trči s sedanjo priložnostjo za ljubezen.
the age of adaline_2015.opis_omdb: After miraculously remaining 29 years old for almost eight decades, Adaline Bowman has lived a solitary existence, never allowing herself to get close to anyone who might reveal her secret. But a chance encounter with charismatic philanthropist Ellis Jones reignites her passion for life and romance. When a weekend with his parents threatens to uncover the truth, Adaline makes a decision that will change her life forever.

a private war_2018.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o Marie Colvin, legendarni poročevalki, ki se je podajala na najbolj nevarne kraje na svetu, da bi dala glas tistim, ki so brez njega.

Biografska drama o tragično preminuli vojni poročevalki Marie Colvin, spremlja njena poročanja iz vojnih območij, od Čečenije do Šrilanke, kjer je leta 2001 izgubila oko. Njeno poslanstvo je bilo, skupaj z vojnim fotografom Paulom Conroyem, pokazati pravo ceno vojne. Leta 2012 je med napadom v Siriji izgubila življenje.
a private war_2018.opis_omdb: In a world where journalism is under attack, Marie Colvin (Rosamund Pike) is one of the most celebrated war correspondents of our time. Colvin is an utterly fearless and rebellious spirit, driven to the frontlines of conflicts across the globe to give voice to the voiceless, while constantly testing the limits between bravery and bravado. After being hit by a grenade in Sri Lanka, she wears a distinctive eye patch and is still as comfortable sipping martinis with London's elite as she is confronting dictators. Colvin sacrifices loving relationships, and over time, her personal life starts to unravel as the trauma she's witnessed takes its toll. Yet, her mission to show the true cost of war leads her -- along with renowned war photographer Paul Conroy (Jamie Dornan) -- to embark on the most dangerous assignment of their lives in the besieged Syrian city of Homs.

blair witch_2016.opis_neo:
Eden najstrašnejših filmov v zadnjih desetletjih!

Eden najstrašnejših filmov v zadnjih desetletjih! Zgodba spremlja skupino študentov na taborjenju, ki kmalu odkrijejo, da se v gozdu skriva veliko zlo. Čarovnica iz Blaira je napet in izjemno grozljiv horor. Nekateri ga imenujejo klasično nočno môro.
blair witch_2016.opis_omdb: After unearthing a DV tape containing intriguing raw footage in Burkittsville's Black Hills Forest, Lane and Talia upload the video on YouTube. Then, James stumbles upon the video, and--believing that he saw an image of his missing sister, Heather, who disappeared in 1994 in the same woods while investigating the legend of the Blair Witch--he assembles a team of friends in search of answers. Convinced that she is still alive, he heads into the gloomy forest accompanied by his friend Peter; Peter's girlfriend, Ashley; the film student, Lisa, and the pair of uploaders, only to go astray in the heart of a green maze. Now, more and more, as James and his team find themselves trapped in the epicentre of the evil activity, the blood-curdling legend of the wicked sorceress seems real. Can they escape from the wrath of the demonic Blair Witch?

fatima_2020.opis_neo:
Trije mladi pastirji v Fátimi na Portugalskem poročajo o videnjih Device Marije. S tem navdihnejo vernike ter razjezijo Cerkev in oblasti.

Leta 1917 v kraju Fátima na Portugalskem, trojica otrok priča o viziji Device Marije, ki napove, da se prva svetovna vojna lahko konča le z molitvijo in trpljenjem. Prerokba navdihuje vernike, toda jezi vlado in cerkev, ki želi otroke utišati. Na kraj priroma več deset tisoč vernikov v upanju, da bodo priča čudežu. Kar tam doživijo, jim spremeni življenje.
fatima_2020.opis_omdb: A powerful and uplifting drama about the power of faith, this movie tells the story of a 10-year-old shepherdess and her two young cousins in Fátima, Portugal, who report seeing visions of the Virgin Mary. Their revelations inspire believers but anger officials of both the Church and secular government, who try to force them to recant their story. As word of their prophecy spreads, tens of thousands of religious pilgrims flock to the site in hopes of witnessing a miracle. What they experience will change their lives forever.

kaamelott : premier volet_2021.opis_neo:
No, ali pa se bo Artur zares vrnil v Kaamelott, da bi še enkrat pomagal tem butljem in znova osvojil prestol, ki mu pripada?

Deset let je minilo, odkar se je Artur odrekel prestolu in izginil, ko je vladanje prepustil nekdanjemu prijatelju Lancelotu, ki je od takrat tiransko vlada. Viteze okrogle mize je razpustil, ti pa so se nekajkrat poskusili borno upreti Lancelotu. Vsi se sprašujejo, kaj se je dejansko zgodilo z Arturjem, od Lancelota (ki mu želi smrt) do trpinčenih podložnikov (ki želijo, da se vrne). No, ali pa se bo Artur zares vrnil v Kaamelott, da bi še enkrat pomagal tem butljem in znova osvojil prestol, ki mu pripada?
kaamelott : premier volet_2021.opis_omdb: The sequel on the big screen to the cult series of Alexandre Astier, an offbeat version of the legend of the Knights of the Round Table. Hidden in Rome, King Arthur plans his comeback to oppose the army of his former friend Lancelot.

after_2019.opis_neo:
Tessa začne dvomiti v vse, kar je verjela in začne se spraševati, kaj sploh hoče od življenja.

Tessa Young je predana študentka, vzorna hči in zvesta punca svoji srednješolski ljubezni. V prvem semestru kolidža pa se Tessin varni svet poruši, ko spozna skrivnostnega in motečega upornika. Dvomiti začne v vse, kar je verjela in začne se spraševati, kaj sploh hoče od življenja.
after_2019.opis_omdb: Based on Anna Todd's novel, AFTER follows Tessa (Langford), a dedicated student, dutiful daughter, and loyal girlfriend to her high-school sweetheart, as she enters her first semester in college armed with grand ambitions for her future. Her guarded world opens up when she meets the dark, mysterious Hardin Scott (Tiffin), a magnetic, brooding rebel who makes her question all she thought she knew about herself and what she wants from life.

maya the bee: the honey games - dubbed_2.naslov_orig: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games - dubbed
maya the bee: the honey games - dubbed_2.opis_neo:
Maja združi moči s skupino odpadniških žužkov, da bi tekmovala na medenih igrah in z zmago rešila med svojega panja.

V Majinem panju tokrat vlada veselo razburjenje. Poletja je konec in prišel je dostojanstvenik iz Buzztropolisa s pomembnim sporočilom za kraljico. Bodo njen panj končno povabili na Medene igre? Maja se bo skozi zabavne prigode učila o pomembnosti skupinskega reševanja zapletov, enakopravnosti, raznolikosti in prijateljstva.
maya the bee: the honey games - dubbed_2.reziser: Noel Cleary, Sergio Delfino, Alexs Stadermann
maya the bee: the honey games - dubbed_2.opis_omdb: When an overenthusiastic Maya accidentally embarrasses the Empress of Buzztropolis, she is forced to unite with a team of misfit bugs and compete in the Honey Games for a chance to save her hive.

after we collided_2020.opis_neo:
Nadaljevanje velike uspešnice o ljubezni in strasti dveh mladostnikov, ki ne pozna meja, posnete po knjižni uspešnici pisateljice Anne Todd.

Po burnem začetku zveze in šokantnim odkritjem, morata Tessa in Hardin najti način, kako nadaljevati s svojo ljubezensko zgodbo. Ali lahko preživi ljubezen, ki ne pozna meja? Tessa počasi začne spoznavati, da lahko vse izgubi. Hardin pa ugotavlja, da nima kaj izgubiti – razen nje. Ali se je zares pripravljen spremeniti zaradi ljubezni? Koliko je ona pripravljena oprostiti in še bolj pomembno, ali ji je slika prihodnosti s Hardinom všeč? Tessa in Hardin po ločitvi živita različni življenji. Medtem, ko Hardin zahaja na pota slabih razvad, se Tessa, oborožena z novo samozavestjo prijavi na pripravništvo pri založbi Vance. Na novem delovnem mestu pritegne pozornost postavnega sodelavca Trevorja, ki je prav takšen tip fanta, s kakšnim bi morala biti: pameten, smešen, čeden in odgovoren, vendar Tessa ne more spraviti Hardina iz glave. Navsezadnje je on ljubezen njenega življenja. Kljub vsem njunim nesporazumom in stiskah, Tessa ne more zanikati privlačnosti, ki jo vleče k njemu. Želi si, da bi lahko odšla stran … a to ni tako enostavno. Tessa in Hardin se bosta skozi vzpone in padce morala boriti , da bosta lahko skupaj. Tudi če si vesolje želi, da sta narazen.
after we collided_2020.opis_omdb: Tessa has everything to lose. Hardin has nothing to lose. - except her. After We Collided - Life will never be the same. After a tumultuous beginning to their relationship, Tessa and Hardin were on the path to making things work. Tessa knew Hardin could be cruel, but when a bombshell revelation is dropped about the origins of their relationship - and Hardin's mysterious past - Tessa is beside herself. Hardin will always be - Hardin. But is he really the deep, thoughtful guy Tessa fell madly in love with despite his angry exterior - or has he been a stranger all along? She wishes she could walk away. It's just not that easy. Hardin knows he made a mistake, possibly the biggest one of his life. He's not going down without a fight. But can he change? Will he change - for love? Yes, yes he will.

molly's game_2017.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o pokeraški princesi Molly Bloom (Jessica Chastain), ki je kar celo desetletje vodila najekskluzivnajše nezakonite igre.

Resnična zgodba o pokeraški princesi Molly Bloom, ki je celo desetletje vodila najbolj ekskluzivne nezakonite igre na srečo. Nekdanja smučarka je po neuspešnih kvalifikacijah za olimpijske igre postala natakarica, nato pa ustanovila ilegalno igralnico, ki so jo redno obiskovale filmske zvezde, slavni športniki, poslovneži in ruska mafija.
molly's game_2017.opis_omdb: Molly Bloom, a beautiful young Olympic-class skier, ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by 17 FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans, and finally, unbeknownst to her, the Russian mob. Her only ally was her criminal defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learned that there was much more to Molly than the tabloids led us to believe.

the case for christ_2017.opis_neo:
Zagnani novinar Lee Strobel je bil ravno tam, kje je poslovno tudi pričakoval: v službi.

Nagrajeni raziskovalni novinar je pred kratkim napredoval v urednika Chicago Tribuna. Vendar ni šlo vse kot po maslu in doma, kjer je bila na novo odkrito verovanje v Kristusa s strani njegove žene Leslie v nasprotju z vsemi Leejevimi prepričanji, ki jih je imel kot ateist. S svojo novinarsko in pravno izobrazbo je Lee začel razkrivati krščanske trditve, da bi rešil svoj propadajoči zakon. V iskanju največje zgodbe svoje kariere pa se Lee sooči z neverjetnimi rezultati, ki bi lahko postavili na glavo vse, kar je imel za resnico.
the case for christ_2017.opis_omdb: An award-winning investigative journalist -- and avowed atheist -- who applies his well-honed journalistic and legal skills to disprove the newfound Christian faith of his wife... with unexpected, life-altering results.

grabbers_2012.opis_neo:
Policistka Lisa Nolan pride na otok Aran v Irski, da bi prevzela službo med kolegovim dvotedenskim dopustom.

Policistka Lisa Nolan pride na otok Aran v Irski, da bi prevzela službo med kolegovim dvotedenskim dopustom. Hkrati pridejo na mirni otok tudi krvi željni stvori, da bi se razmnožili. Ker so se na obali pojavili mrtvi kiti, ljudje pa izginjajo, policija in nekaj meščanov počasi odkrivajo nevarnost in edino varno obrambo - visoko vsebnost alkohola v krvi, ki ga ti stvori ne prenesejo. Bliža se neurje, lačni mladiči pa pridejo po meščane. Bo slednjim uspelo s pomočjo policije ustaviti invazijo teh stvorov?
grabbers_2012.opis_omdb: Police officer Lisa Nolan comes to Aran Island, Ireland, to take charge during a colleague's two-week holiday. Simultaneously, blood-thirsty, sea-dwelling aliens arrive at the quiet island to propagate. As dead whales wash up on shore and people start mysteriously disappearing, officers and a few locals slowly discover their peril along with one sure defense - high blood alcohol levels, which the aliens can't stomach. As a storm approaches, enabling hungry hatchlings access to the locals, an open bar kicks off a desperate bid for survival as inebriated police and friends stagger to remain cognizant long enough to thwart the alien invasion.

nos femmes_2015.opis_neo:
Simon zadavi svojo ženo in prosi svoja najboljša prijatelje, naj mu zagotovita lažen alibi.

Max, Paul in Simon so prijatelji že 35 let. Nekega večera naj bi se dobili pri Maxu na kvartopirskem večeru. Simon pride in pove, da se je sprl z Estello in jo zadavil. Max in Paul sta zgrožena. Še posebej, ko ju začne Simon prositi za alibi, da ne bi šel v zapor. Max in Paul oklevata. Lagati ali prijaviti prijatelja.
nos femmes_2015.opis_omdb: Max, Paul and Simon have been friends for 35 years. They take great pleasure in their one vacation a year together without their partners and meet-up regularly to spend evenings drinking or playing cards. Each has a successful career and they all appear to have perfect lives until the night Simon announces to his friends that he has just strangled his wife, Estelle after a blazing row. Max and Paul are horrified by Simon's confession, but worse is to come when Simon asks them to lie and provide him with an alibi for the time Estelle was killed. Both men are torn between lying or turning over their best friend to the police.

fack ju göhte 3_2017.opis_neo:
V zadnjem delu nemške trilogije se v srednji šoli bliža zaključni izpit.

Nekdanji ropar, ki se je v šoli zaposlil le zato, ker se je v njej skrival njegov nakraden denar, se tokrat s svojimi učenci približuje obdobju zaključnih izpitov. Spodbuja jih k učenju, toda 'razred kaosa' ga ne jemlje resno. Od tega ali bo uspel motivirati učence je odvisna njegova služba, ugled šole in prihodnost uporniških najstnikov.
fack ju göhte 3_2017.opis_omdb: A bank robber becomes a teacher after being released from prison and finds himself at the center of a number of crazy adventures.

seraphim falls_2006.opis_neo:
Po koncu ameriške državljanske vojne polkovnik Konfederacije preganja častnika Unije, do katerega goji globoko zamero.

Ameriške državljanske vojne je konec, poveljnik Morsman Carver pa si je zadal še zadnjo nalogo: za vsako ceno poiskati in ubiti Gideona. Po petih letih ga je končno našel, toda to je šele začetek dolgega in neusmiljenega lova na človeka, v katerem bodo mnogi izgubili življenje, preden se bosta Carver in Gideon končno srečala iz oči v oči.
seraphim falls_2006.opis_omdb: In the 1860s, five men have been tracking a sixth across Nevada for more than two weeks. They shoot and wound him, but he gets away. They pursue, led by the dour Carver, who will pay them each $1 a day once he's captured. The hunted is Gideon, resourceful, skilled with a knife. Gideon's flight and Carver's hunt require horses, water, and bullets. The course takes them past lone settlers, a wagon train, a rail crew, settlements, and an Indian philosopher. What is the reason for the hunt; what connects Gideon and Carver? What happened at Seraphim Falls?

maya the bee 3: the golden orb_2020.naslov_orig: Maya the Bee 3: The Golden Orb
maya the bee 3: the golden orb_2020.opis_neo:
Nova pustolovščina, v kateri Maja in njen najboljši prijatelj Vili zapustita Makov travnik in se podata novim zapletom in zmagam naproti.

Mala Maja je živahna in radovedna čebelica, ki ne mara pravil in najnovejši film je ponovno pustolovščina, v kateri Maja in njen najboljši prijatelj Vili zapustita Makov travnik in se podata novim zapletom in zmagam naproti. Kraljica ji je odločno prepovedala kakršnokoli novo pustolovščino. Seveda je Maja ne posluša in se poda na zelo pomembno nalogo - dostaviti zlato jajce nazaj k svojim lastnikom v kolonijo mravelj, saj se ne more upreti, da ne bi pomagala še enemu žužku v težavah. Ko pa se \"jajček\" izvali, se morata Maja in Vili soočiti z največjo odgovornostjo do sedaj - s prekrasno, ljubko, malo mravljico, ki pa je v resnici prava mravlja princesa.
maya the bee 3: the golden orb_2020.opis_omdb: When Maya, a headstrong little bee, and her best friend Willi, rescue an ant princess they find themselves in the middle of an epic bug battle that will take them to strange new worlds and test their friendship to its limits.

after we fell_2021.opis_neo:
Ravno ko Tessa sprejme najpomembnejšo odločitev v svojem življenju, se vse spremeni.

Nadaljevanje velike uspešnice franšize o ljubezni in strasti dveh mladih, ki ne poznata meja, film posnet po knjižni uspešnici pisateljice Anne Todd, ki je bila razglašena za svetovno senzacijo. Ljubezen med Tesso in Hardinom je bila vedno kompleksna, a sta sedaj sta prišla v fazo, kjer izhod ni več mogoč. Ravno ko mora Tessa sprejeti najpomembnejšo odločitev v svojem življenju, se vse spremeni. Hardin se še vedno ne zna kontrolirati in Tessi se zdi, kot da svet okoli nje razpada na koščke. Nikomur več ne more verjeti in nihče ni več kot se je sprva zdel. Ne družina, ne prijatelji. Nikome ne može vjerovati, nitko nije onakav kakav se čini. Ni obitelj, ni prijatelji.
after we fell_2021.opis_omdb: Just as Tessa makes the biggest decision of her life, everything changes. Revelations about her family, and then Hardin's, throw everything they knew before in doubt and makes their hard-won future together more difficult to claim.

the exorcism_2024.opis_neo:
Težaven igralec se med snemanjem grozljivke začne vesti moteče.

Film se poglablja v potovanje Anthonyja Millerja (Russell Crowe), igralca, ki se znajde v težavah med snemanjem nadnaravne grozljivke. Ko njegovo vedenje postane vedno bolj nenavadno, se njegova odtujena hči sprašuje, ali so njegove težave znak ponovne odvisnosti ali pa nanj vpliva bolj zlovešča sila. S številnimi preobrati film raziskuje kompleksnost družinske dinamike, odvisnosti in zabrisane meje med resničnostjo in nadnaravnim.
the exorcism_2024.opis_omdb: A troubled actor begins to exhibit a disruptive behavior while shooting a horror film. His estranged daughter wonders if he's slipping back into his past addictions or if there's something more sinister at play.

the post_2017.opis_neo:
Film opisuje resnično dogajanje okoli škandala ''pentagonskih dokumentov'' oz. okoli tega, kakšno vlogo so v tem škandalu odigrali ameriški časniki.

Zgodba sledi resničnim dogodkom škandala, ki ga je sprožil časopis Washington Post, kot je objavil dokumente iz Pentagona, s pomočjo katerih je bila leta 1971 razkrita resnica o vietnamski vojni. Dotični dokumenti so niz uradnih zapisov ameriškega obrambnega ministrstva, ki jih je novinarjem takrat predal vojni analitik Daniel Ellsberg.

catch .44_2011.opis_neo:
Tri plačanke se odpravijo v zakotje Louisiane prestreči veliko izmenjavo denarja in mamil.

V slogu filma Stekli psi. Oskarjevec Forest Whitaker (Zadnji škotski kralj), Bruce Willis, Malin Akerman (Varuhi), Nikki Reed (Somrak) in Deborah Ann Woll (nadaljevanka Prava kri) so zvOskarjevec Forest Whitaker (Zadnji škotski kralj), Bruce Willis, Malin Akerman (Varuhi), Nikki Reed (Somrak) in Deborah Ann Woll (nadaljevanka Prava kri) so zvezde te hude, seksi zgodbe o treh plačankah, ki se odpravijo v zakotje Louisiane prestreči veliko izmenjavo denarja in mamil. Ko pa pridejo v skoraj prazno okrepčevalnico ob cesti, jih ne čaka preprosta naloga, temveč začnejo na vse strani leteti krogle. Morda gre za ogromen vražji nesporazum ali pa je to smrtonosna past. Shea Whigham (nadaljevanka Imperij pregrehe) in Brad Dourif, nominiran za oskarja (Let nas kukavičjim gnezdom) prav tako igrata v tem napetem trilerju z ubijalskim preobratom.
catch .44_2011.opis_omdb: For Tes (Akerman) and her two cohorts Kara (Nikki Reed) and Dawn (Deborah Ann Woll), the job sounded simple enough: intercept a double-cross drug shipment for their crime boss Mel (Willis) at an isolated diner. But when an unstoppable chain of events unfolds, everyone soon realizes no one is who they seem and the job may be something other than eliminating the competition. What started as simple instructions has now turned into a deadly cat-and-mouse game - with large guns pointed at everyone.

a simple wedding_2019.opis_neo:
Noushi Hassani je sanjala o poroki s popolnim perzijskim soprogom iz popolne perzijske družine.

Noushi sanja o poroki s popolnim fantom iz popolne perzijske družine. Toda načrti se izjalovijo, ko se zaljubi v biseksualnega umetnika Alexa. Ko njeni starši odkrijejo, da par skrivaj živi skupaj, vztrajajo pri poroki. Družini se spoznata na veliki perzijski poroki, toda ves konec tedna se prevesi v katastrofo.
a simple wedding_2019.opis_omdb: NOUSHA HASSANI wants to marry the perfect Persian husband for her perfect Persian family. But her plans are derailed when she falls in love with ALEX TALBOT, an eccentric artist. When her traditional Muslim parents discover the two living together as domestic partners, they insist they officially get married. Nousha reluctantly agrees and the TALBOTS and the HASSANIS come together for a big Persian wedding. Over the course of one weekend, buried family wounds come rocketing to the surface, disaster ensues, and the couples relationship is tested.

devil's knot_2013.opis_neo:
Krut umor treh osemletnikov sproži še bolj okruten sodni proces proti trem najstnikom, ki so obtoženi brez materialnih dokazov.

Film Skrivnost jezera Devil's Den je posnet po resničnih dogodkih iz leta 1993 in istoimenski knjigi Mare Leveritt. Okrutni umor treh dečkov je ovit v srhljivo skrivnost. Za umore so brez materialnih dokazov in zgolj na podlagi pričanja dvomljivih prič obtožili tri tam živeče najstnike, ki naj bi bili satanisti. Spoznanje, da bi lahko po nepotrebnem uničili še tri mlada življenja, zasebnega detektiva Rona Laxa (Colin Firth) motivira, da začne pomagati odvetnikom, ki branijo obtožene najstnike.
devil's knot_2013.opis_omdb: Based on the actual events of the West Memphis Three, where three young boys were savagely murdered in West Memphis, Arkansas in 1993. Spurred on by the demand from a grieving town, the local police act quickly to bring three "devil-worshipping" teenagers to trial. With their lives hanging in the balance, investigator Ron Lax is trying to find the truth between the town's need for justice and the guilt of the accused.

šegrt hlapić_2013.opis_neo:
Družinski film o dogodivščinah vajenca Hlapića po knjigi Ivane Brlić Mažuranić.

Potem, ko mu mojster Mrkonja stori krivico, se vajenec Hlapić odpravi na pot, kjer spozna deklico iz cirkusa Gito. Brez hrane, prenočišča in primernih oblačil se pogumno podata na pustolovščino. V noči polnega meseca pa se zgodi nekaj groznega, kar spremeni čisto vse ...
šegrt hlapić_2013.opis_omdb: Apprentice Lapitch,the little shoemaker sets off on a journey after experiencing injustice from the cruel Master Scowler. Just 18 days were enough to make the movie 'The Brave Adventures of a Little Shoemaker' (Segrt Hlapic), by production company 'Maydi film' to become the most watched Family movie since Croatia gained its independence.

le tour du monde en 80 jours_2021.naslov_orig: Le Tour du monde en 80 jours
le tour du monde en 80 jours_2021.opis_neo:
Čudaški izumitelj se v družbi kitajskega služabnika in francoskega umetnika za stavo poda na potovanje okoli sveta, ki ga mora zaključiti v 80 dneh.

Nekega dne sreča Phileasa, lahkomiselnega in pohlepnega žabca, ki stavi, da bo v 80 dneh obkrožil svet in pri tem zaslužil 10 milijonov školjk. Da bi izkoristil življenjsko priložnost za raziskovanje sveta, se Passeparout s svojim novim prijateljem poda na noro in vznemirljivo pustolovščino, polno preobratov in presenečenj.
le tour du monde en 80 jours_2021.opis_omdb: Passepartout, a young, well-studied monkey, dreams of exploring the world, but his overprotective mother is intent on keeping him safe at home. When he crosses paths with the smooth-talking con-artist Phileas Frog, he finds himself caught up in a bet worth millions; to travel around the world in a record-setting 80 days.

the electrical life of louis wain_2021.naslov_orig: The Electrical Life of Louis Wain
the electrical life of louis wain_2021.opis_neo:
Angleški umetnik Louis Wain je konec 19. stoletja zaslovel s svojimi nadrealističnimi slikami mačk, za katere se je zdelo, da odražajo njegovo upadajočo duševno zdravje.

Življenjska zgodba ekscentričnega britanskega umetnika Louisa Waina, katerega razigrane in včasih psihološke slike so za vedno uspele spremeniti dojemanje in percepcijo mačk. V filmu sledimo neverjetni pustolovščini tega nepoznanega junaka, ki je uspel razkriti skrivnosti sveta in na ta način bolje razumeti lastno življenje in globino ljubezni.
the electrical life of louis wain_2021.opis_omdb: The true story of eccentric British artist Louis Wain (Benedict Cumberbatch), whose playful, psychedelic pictures transformed the public's perception of cats forever. Set in the early 1900s, we follow Wain as he seeks to unlock the "electrical" mysteries of the world and, in so doing, to better understand his own life and the profound love he shared with his wife Emily Richardson (Claire Foy).

the hateful eight_2015.opis_neo:
Z oskarjem nagrajeni vestern Quentina Tarantina o potnikih kočije, ki se zatečejo v gorsko postojanko, kjer jih pričaka skupinica sumljivih tujcev.

Deset let po ameriški državljanski vojni, spremljamo Marquisa Warrena, bivšega vojaka in sedanjega lovca na glave, ki zaradi hude snežne nevihte obtiči v Koloradu. Ko po spletu naključij spozna Johna Rutha, ki spremlja zapornico Daisy, in peterico bolj ali manj nestrpnih kavbojev, se dolgočasno čakanje na lepše vreme prelevi v krvav obračun brez primere.
the hateful eight_2015.opis_omdb: Some time after the Civil War, a stagecoach hurtles through the wintry Wyoming landscape. Bounty hunter John Ruth and his fugitive captive Daisy Domergue race towards the town of Red Rock, where Ruth will bring Daisy to justice. Along the road, they encounter Major Marquis Warren (an infamous bounty hunter) and Chris Mannix (a man who claims to be Red Rock's new sheriff). Lost in a blizzard, the bunch seeks refuge at Minnie's Haberdashery. When they arrive they are greeted by unfamiliar faces: Bob, who claims to be taking care of the place while Minnie is gone; Oswaldo Mobray, the hangman of Red Rock; Joe Gage, a cow puncher; and confederate general Sanford Smithers. As the storm overtakes the mountainside, the eight travelers come to learn that they might not make it to Red Rock after all...

the founder_2016.opis_neo:
Biografska drama o moškem, ki je inovativno okrepčevalnico bratov McDonald spremenil v enega od največjih gostinskih imperijev na svetu.

Biografska zgodba Raya Krocka, prodajalca, ki je inovativno okrepčevalnico bratov McDonald spremenil v enega največjih gostinskih poslov na svetu. Zahvaljujoč svojim visokim ambicijam, vztrajnosti in neusmiljenosti, je McDonald's postal to, kar je danes - mednarodna veriga hitre prehrane, ki jo obišče 68 milijonov kupcev na dan.
the founder_2016.opis_omdb: 1954. Having worked as a salesman most of his adult life, Ray Kroc has been a hustler in most senses of the word. That hustling has made him the target of derision among certain circles for peddling what have ended up being more novelty or faddish than useful products, but it has also placed more than a comfortable roof in Arlington Heights, Illinois over his and his wife Ethel's heads. Ethel, however, wishes that he placed as much effort into being at home with her as he does in selling; his current job of peddling five-spindle milkshake makers for Prince Castle which has him constantly on the road going from one drive-in restaurant to another. It is because of the beefs he has with the whole drive-in experience (bad food, bad service) in constantly eating at such establishments while on the road that he becomes enthralled with the concept of McDonald's Restaurant in San Bernardino, California, owned and operated by brothers Richard McDonald and Maurice McDonald - Dick and Mac. Unlike most of Ray's customers who will only require one five-spindle milkshake maker at any given time, the McDonald brothers end up purchasing eight machines for their single restaurant. Primarily on Dick's initiative, the brothers have redesigned the whole concept of the drive-in restaurant to focus on quality food through a smaller menu of only the most popular items (hamburgers, fries, sodas), consistency in product so that customers know what to expect from time to time, change in the target market from lounging teenagers to families, and perhaps most importantly speed in having any order ready within seconds, many of these goals achievable through assembly line styled production. They had tried franchising previously, but failed in that they lost control over many of those aspects which made their San Bernardino restaurant successful. Despite believing Ray a bit off kilter (in other words, crazy), the McDonald brothers somewhat hesitantly enter into a contract with him to be their head of franchising. Ray's experience in the job is not without its problems, especially as his franchisees seem to be making more money than he is, he who is only breaking even. He is not averse to advancing ideas provided to him to get ahead - original ideas which are not his forte - he seeing the brothers as his biggest problem in they thinking small. These differences lead to a standoff between Ray and the brothers, the former who has a different goal for "his" business in profit and stoking his own ego seemingly his main priorities.

strange darling_2023.opis_neo:
Odličen psihološki triler se poglobi v intenzivno igro mačke in miši med mlado žensko in serijskim morilcem.

Varnost je tisto, kar odloča med življenjem in smrtjo... Ko začneš razmerje s serijskim morilcem, je varnost vprašljiva.
strange darling_2023.opis_omdb: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer's vicious murder spree.

conversations with other women_2005.opis_neo:
Po udeležbi na poroki se moški in ženska odločita, da bosta v hotelski sobi pokramljala.

Ko se moški in ženska spogledujeta na praznovanju poroke, se zdi seksualna napetost spontana. Toda vedno globlji pogovor pa razkriva njuno življenje. Z zabave se odpravita v hotelsko sobo in spogledovanje preraste v strastno noč, polno obžalovanja.
conversations with other women_2005.opis_omdb: A man runs into a woman at a wedding. They start to flirt and talk and find that they get along. Throughout their discussion, the man talks about certain memories as if they were common to the two of them. We gradually learn that there may have been a previous connection between these two when they were younger. This just leaves more questions as their past is slowly revealed.

la mécanique de l'ombre_2016.opis_neo:
Duval začne se odmotavati klopčič nevarne zarote, ki vodi vse do vrha francoske vlade.

Duval je samotar srednjih let, ki po živčnem zlomu ugotovi, da kljub temu, da je dober delavec, ni preprosto najti nove službe. Ko mu skrivnostni poslovnež ponudi delo, se Duval pretvarja, da ne opazi ekscentričnosti novega šefa in morebitne nezakonite narave dela. Opravljati začne prepise zasebnih telefonskih pogovorov. Ko se eden takih konča z umorom, Duval ne želi več molčati.
la mécanique de l'ombre_2016.opis_omdb: The unemployed Duval is contacted by a mysterious organization to transcribe intercepted calls. He accepts the job with no suspicions, since it restores stability to his life, but it will soon result in political shenanigans of all kinds.

diminished capacity_2008.opis_neo:
Novinar po izgubi spomina vzame dopust in se vrne v domači kraj, kjer obnovi stike s stricem in bivšo ljubeznijo.

Čikaški urednik časopisa (Broderick), ki zaradi pretresa možganov trpi za izgubo spomina, si vzame dopust in se vrne v rodni Misuri. Tam se poveže s svojim senilnim stricem, ki je zbolel za Alzheimerjevo boleznijo, Rolliejem (Alda), ki je tik pred tem, da izgubi svoj dom, ter s svojo staro ljubeznijo (Madsen). Trio kmalu skuje načrt in se odpravi v mesto na kongres spominkov, kjer naj bi Rollie prodal redko bejzbolsko kartico, ki je pritegnila pozornost lokalnih tatov z namero, da bi starcu izmamili možno bogastvo.
diminished capacity_2008.opis_omdb: Cooper is a Chicago journalist with post-concussion memory loss. His mother wants help moving Uncle Rollie, who's facing his own fading memory, into a care home. Cooper's boss tells him to take a few days, so Cooper drives home. Rollie doesn't want to move, and his salvation may be a rare baseball card of a 1908 Chicago Cub. Maybe they can sell it in Chicago for enough for Rollie to live at home with help. Cooper teams up with Charlotte, his recently-divorced high-school flame, and her son; they take Rollie to a memorabilia market. Rollie insists on keeping the card in his pocket, while more than one rascal wants to divest the old man of his treasure. Can the underdogs carry the day?

200% wolf_2024.opis_neo:
Nepremišljena želja spremeni Freddyja v volkodlaka in pošlje nagajivega duha Lune na Zemljo in Freddy mora povrniti kozmični red, preden bo prepozno.

Nepremišljena želja spremeni Freddyja v volkodlaka in pošlje nagajivega duha Lune na Zemljo in Freddy mora povrniti kozmični red, preden bo prepozno. S svojimi pasjimi prijatelji mora najti nevarno čarovnico, ki ima osebne zamere proti volčjemu krdelu in to mora storiti preden njegov novi prijatelj z Lune ostane brez življenjske energije in izgine. Če ekipi uspe preprečiti, da bi se spremenili v žabe-volkodlake, in če Freddy lahko premaga privlačnost prepovedane zemeljske magije, morda lahko pošlje duha domov in reši svet. Nekaj pa je zagotovo – Freddy nikoli več ne bo dvomil v to, da je pudelj.
200% wolf_2024.opis_omdb: When Freddy Lupin's wayward wish transforms him into a werewolf and deposits a mischievous moon spirit on Earth, Freddy must restore the cosmic order before the earth and moon collide.

the shack_2017.opis_neo:
Žalujoči moški prejme skrivnostno osebno povabilo, da se sreča z Bogom na kraju, imenovanem Koliba.

Mack je oče male Missy, ki na družinskem izletu izgine v neznano, vse kar ostane za njo pa je okrvavljena obleka, najdena v zapuščeni kolibi sredi oregonske divjine. Štiri leta pozneje Mack dobi nenavadno vabilo, naj obišče to isto kolibo, kjer ga čaka srečanje z Bogom oziroma Sveto trojico.
the shack_2017.opis_omdb: After the abduction and presumed death of Mackenzie Allen Phillips' youngest daughter, Missy, Mack receives a letter and suspects it is from God, asking him to return to The Shack where Missy may have been murdered. After contemplating it, he leaves his home to go to The Shack for the first time since Missy's abduction and an encounter that will change his life forever.

the last voyage of the demeter_2023.naslov_orig: The Last Voyage of the Demeter
the last voyage of the demeter_2023.opis_neo:
Posadka, ki pluje iz Varne (Bolgarija) po Črnem morju v Anglijo, ugotovi, da prevaža zelo nevaren tovor.

Zgodba govori o trgovski ladji, po imenu Demeter, ki pluje v London in prevaža zasebni tovor – petdeset neoznačenih lesenih zabojev. Na potovanju se ladijski posadki, ki poskuša preživeti že tako naporno čezoceansko potovanje, dogajajo izredno nenavadne stvari, ki jih vsako noč spremlja neusmiljena zlobna prisotnost na krovu. Ko Demeter končno doseže obale Anglije, je to le še zoglenela, zapuščena razbitina, na kateri ni sledu o posadki.
the last voyage of the demeter_2023.opis_omdb: Based on a single chapter, the Captain's Log, from Bram Stoker's classic 1897 novel Dracula, the story is set aboard the Russian schooner Demeter, which was chartered to carry private cargo - twenty-four unmarked wooden crates - from Carpathia to London. The film will detail the strange events that befell the doomed crew as they attempt to survive the ocean voyage, stalked each night by a terrifying presence on board the ship. When it finally arrived near Whitby Harbour, it was a derelict. There was no trace of the crew.

book club_2018.opis_neo:
Filma spremlja življenje štirih prijateljic, katerih življenja se spremenijo po branju knjige 50 odtenkov sive v njihovem knjižnem klubu.

Slavne oskarjevke Jane Fonda, Diane Keaton, Candice Bergen in Mary Steenburgen nam bodo v novi, noro zabavni komediji, pokazale, kako je lahko življenje v tretjem življenjskem obdobju še kako zanimivo. Zgodba filma se dogaja v Kaliforniji, spremlja pa življenje štirih prijateljic, katerih življenja se spremenijo po branju knjige 50 odtenkov sive v njihovem knjižnem klubu. Trilogija 50 odtenkov sicer ni primerna literatura, ki jo imajo navado brati te uspešne in inteligentne dame, vendar pa se njihovo življenje korenito spremeni po tem, ko preberejo slavni razvpiti erotični roman.
book club_2018.opis_omdb: Four longtime friends and book club members--Diane Keaton, Jane Fonda, Candice Bergen and Mary Steenburgen--have their lives upended when they aim to spice up their mundane routines by reading the provocative bestseller Fifty Shades of Grey. With newfound confidence, they each begin to come alive as exciting romances are ignited and old flames are rekindled. Through it all, the ladies inspire one other to make this next stage of their lives the best and steamiest thus far.

busanhaeng_2016.opis_neo:
V Južni Koreji izbruhne virus, zaradi katerega se ljudje spreminjajo v zombije. Potniki na vlaku od Seula do Busana poskušajo preživeti.

Medtem ko se neznani virus širi po državi, so korejske oblasti razglasile izredno stanje, toda situacija kmalu uide z vajeti. Peščica tistih, ki so se v tistem trenutku znašli na hitrem vlaku Seoula do Busana, mesta, ki se je uspešno obranil virusne epidemije, se mora zdaj boriti za lastno preživetje, da ne bi prišli do želenega cilja, preden bo prepozno.
busanhaeng_2016.opis_omdb: Sok-woo, a father with not much time for his daughter, Soo-ahn, are boarding the KTX, a fast train that shall bring them from Seoul to Busan. But during their journey, the apocalypse begins, and most of the earth's population become flesh craving zombies. While the KTX is shooting towards Busan, the passenger's fight for their families and lives against the zombies - and each other.

bando_2020.opis_neo:
Vojak in njegova ekipa se spopadata s hordami postapokaliptičnih zombijev na opustošenem Korejskem polotoku.

Zgodba nas popelje nazaj na korejski polotok štiri leta pred apokalipso zombijev. Področje, ki je bilo nekoč Koreja, je zdaj povsem izolirano od sveta in v karanteni, da so apokalipso zombijev uspeli omejiti samo na tistem območju. Nihče ne hodi tja, Jung-seok, ki se v Hongkongu preživlja kot majhen kriminalec, pa dobi nalogo vrnitve na nevarno območje.
bando_2020.opis_omdb: A radio program with video featuring Morfonica.

deux moi_2019.opis_neo:
Mlada Rémy in Mélanie živita v isti pariški četrti. Oba trpita zaradi osamljenosti v velikem mestu. Ju usoda lahko pripelje skupaj?

Mlada Remy in Melanie živita nedaleč eden od drugega, v isti pariški četrti. Ona že izgublja zaupanje v afere za eno noč prek Tinderja, on si komajda še uspe najti zmenek. Tako blizu, a tako ne zavedajoč se eden drugega; tako sama v velikem mestu. Ju usoda lahko privede na prvi zmenek?
deux moi_2019.opis_omdb: Rémy, a young Parisian with an unskilled job, lives alone in his apartment. Mélanie, a young Parisienne who works in scientific research, lives alone in her apartment. Two solitary, depressive moods living in close proximity but strange to each other. Will they ever meet?

colossal_2016.opis_neo:
Glorijino življenje je prava katastrofa in kmalu ugotovi tudi, da je nenavaden način povezana s pošastjo, ki straši po Seulu.

Gloria izgubi službo, hkrati pa jo fant vrže iz stanovanja, zato se je prisiljena iz New Yorka vrniti v svoj rodni kraj. Medtem velikanski stvor uničuje mesto Seul v Južni Koreji in Gloria počasi spoznava, da je na nek način povezana s tem oddaljenim fenomenom. Ugotoviti mora zakaj je njen obstoj tako pomemben za usodo človeštva.
colossal_2016.opis_omdb: Gloria (Anne Hathaway) is an out-of-work girl who, after getting kicked out of her apartment by her boyfriend, is forced to leave her life in New York and move back to her hometown. When news reports surface that a giant creature is destroying Seoul, South Korea, Gloria gradually comes to the realization that she is somehow connected to this far-off phenomenon. As events begin to spin out of control, Gloria must determine why her seemingly insignificant existence has such a colossal effect on the fate of the world.

les inséparables_2023.opis_neo:
Zabavna družinska animirana sinhronizirana pustolovščina, ki govori o pomembnosti pravega prijateljstva.

Zgodba spremlja nezgode in prigode zapuščene plišaste igrače po imenu DJ PASJI PES in lutke z neomejeno domišljijo z imenom DON, ki se ponesreči srečata v Centralnem parku in se odpravita na nepozabno epsko pustolovščino. Eden od njiju ima brezmejno domišljijo in brezsramno raziskuje svoje najbolj divje fantazije, drugi pa je brez navdiha in negotov glede lastnega stila. Svoje potovanje bosta s kupom drugih sanjačev, spremenila v pravo zgodbo o junakih.
les inséparables_2023.opis_omdb: A runaway puppet with boundless imagination and an abandoned stuffed animal toy in need of a friend cross paths in Central Park and pair up against all odds for an epic adventure of friendship in New York City.

paddington_2014.opis_neo:
Družinska animirano-igrana komedija o priljubljenem liku iz otroških knjig Michaela Bonda, počlovečenem medvedku Paddingtonu.

Film spremlja komične pustolovščine mladega perujskega medvedka, ki pripotuje v London iskati dom. Izgubljen in sam na postaji Paddington se boji, da mestno življenje le ni takšno, kot si ga je predstavljal. Dokler ne spozna družine Brown. Zdi se, da se mu je sreča končno nasmehnila, a kmalu zanj izve muzejska preparatorka živali.
paddington_2014.opis_omdb: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realize that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kind Brown family, who read the label around his neck ('Please look after this bear. Thank you.') and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

paddington 2_2017.opis_neo:
Medvedek Paddington mora ujeti tatu, ki je ukradel darilo za njegovo teto Lucy iz Peruja.

Priljubljeni lik kultne angleške knjižne zbirke slikanic, medvedek Paddington, se vrača na velika platna z novimi pustolovščinami. Zdaj, ko se je medvedek Paddington srečno udomačil pri družini Brown, kjer je postal priljubljen član skupnosti, širi veselje in ljubezen, kamor koli pride. V iskanju popolnega darila za 100. rojstni dan svoje tete Lucy, naleti Paddington v starinarnici na ravno pravšnjo knjigo, zato se bo moral lotiti vrste del, da bi jo lahko kupil. Ko pa odkrije, da je knjiga dejansko ukradena, se bo Paddington skupaj z Brownovimi odpravil na lov za lopovom.
paddington 2_2017.opis_omdb: Paddington is happily settled with the Brown family in Windsor Gardens, where he has become a popular member of the community, spreading joy and marmalade wherever he goes. While searching for the perfect present for his beloved Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, Paddington spots a unique pop-up book in Mr. Gruber's antique shop, and embarks upon a series of odd jobs to buy it. But when the book is stolen, it's up to Paddington and the Browns to unmask the thief.

arkansas_2020.opis_neo:
Kyle in Swin živita po ukazih arkansaškega narko šefa Žabca, ki ga nista nikoli spoznala. Toda ko gre predaja po zlu, so poledice smrtonosne.

Kyle in Swin živita po navodilih Arkansaškega narko šefa Froga, ki ga še nikoli nista spoznala. Čez dan je njuna krinka delo v parku, zvečer pa sta mamilarska kurirja pod budnim očesom šefovih pooblaščencev. Ko gre ena izmed predaj po zlu, so poledice smrtonosne, Kyle in Swin pa sta ožigosana za grožnjo Frogovemu imperiju.
arkansas_2020.opis_omdb: Kyle and Swin live by the orders of an Arkansas-based drug kingpin named Frog, whom they've never met. But when a deal goes horribly wrong, the consequences are deadly.

100 dinge_2018.opis_neo:
Prijatelja se za 100 dni odrečeta vsem svojim stvarem. Vsak dan dobita nazaj eno stvar, a kmalu ugotovita, da je najbolj pomembno njuno prijateljstvo.

Najboljša prijatelja Toni in Paul se odločita, da se bosta za 100 dni odrekla vsem svojim stvarem in vsak dan vzela eno stvar nazaj. Med tem izzivom spoznata, da je prijateljstvo edina stvar, brez katere ne moreta biti.
100 dinge_2018.opis_omdb: Best friends Toni and Paul decide to relinquish all of their belongings for 100 days, taking back one item per day. During this challenge, the two realize that the only thing they cannot be without is their friendship. A story about contemporary materialism and the quest for the truly important things in life.

sanctum_2011.opis_neo:
Skupino podvodnih raziskovalcev v najlepšem in najtežje dostopnem jamskem sistemu na svetu neurje potisne globlje pod zemljo.

Ekipa jamarskih potapljačev na nevarni odpravi v največji, najlepši in najtežje dostopen sistem jam na svetu. Ko ekipo v jami zalije tropski vihar, se morajo znajti v podvodnem labirintu in poiskati izhod. Borijo se proti naraslim vodam, nevarnemu terenu in paniko, ko iščejo še neodkriti izhod v morje.
sanctum_2011.opis_omdb: The 3-D action-thriller Sanctum follows a team of underwater cave divers on a treacherous expedition to the largest, most beautiful and least accessible cave system on Earth. When a tropical storm forces them deep into the caverns, they must fight raging water, deadly terrain and creeping panic as they search for an unknown escape route to the sea. Master diver Frank McGuire has explored the South Pacific's Esa-ala Caves for months. But when his exit is cut off in a flash flood, Frank's team-including 17-year-old son Josh and financier Carl Hurley are forced to radically alter plans. With dwindling supplies, the crew must navigate an underwater labyrinth to make it out. Soon, they are confronted with the unavoidable question: Can they survive, or will they be trapped forever?

danny collins_2015.opis_neo:
Zgodba, navdihnjena z resničnimi dogodki o glasbeniku, kateremu bi se življenje spremenilo, če bi pred leti prejel pismo, ki mu ga je poslal Lennon.

Danny Collins je ostareli roker, ki niti v sedmem desetletju življenja ne odstopa od svojega posebnega načina življenja. Ko njegov manager odkrije pismo Johna Lennona, staro 40 let, ki ga Danny ni nikoli prejel, glasbenik popolnoma spremeni svoje življenje in se ponovno zbliža s svojo družino.
danny collins_2015.opis_omdb: Inspired by a true story, Al Pacino stars as aging 1970s rocker Danny Collins, who can't give up his hard-living ways. But when his manager (Christopher Plummer) uncovers a 40 year-old undelivered letter written to him by John Lennon, he decides to change course and embarks on a heartfelt journey to rediscover his family, find true love and begin a second act.

goliath_2022.opis_neo:
Njihove poti se srečajo, ko se na tisoče ljudi upre uporabi pesticidov, ki ogrožajo človeška življenja, korporacija pa se tudi za vsako ceno skriti resnico.

France je učiteljica in okoljevarstvena aktivistka, ki se je za aktivizem odločila po tem, ko je ljubljena oseba zbolela zaradi prevelike izpostavljenosti in zastrupitve s pesticidi. Patrick je odvetnik, specializiran za okoljevarstveno pravo, Mathias pa je ambiciozni lobist, ki dela za mednarodno kemično korporacijo. Njihove poti se srečajo, ko se na tisoče ljudi upre uporabi pesticidov, ki ogrožajo človeška življenja, korporacija pa se tudi za vsako ceno skriti resnico.
goliath_2022.opis_omdb: France, sports teacher by day, worker by night and activist; Patrick, obscure and lonely Parisian lawyer specializing in environmental law; and Mathias, lobbyist and man in a hurry, will see their destinies turned upside down and intertwined by the terrible act of a desperate farmer.

dragonkeeper_2024.opis_neo:
Temni časi v starodavnem kitajskem cesarstvu: zmaje, nekdaj prijatelje in modre zaveznike, že leta preganjajo in jih mečejo v ujetništvo.

Temni časi v starodavnem kitajskem cesarstvu: zmaje, nekdaj prijatelje in modre zaveznike, že leta preganjajo in jih mečejo v ujetništvo. Nekje v gorah mlada služkinja pomaga zadnjemu preživelemu zmaju, da pobegne, in se z njim poda v lov na dragoceno zmajevo jajce, ki ga je ukradel zli čarodej in skuša z njim doseči nesmrtnost. Pri tem nenavadni par preganja cesarjeva vojska…
dragonkeeper_2024.opis_omdb: The fate of ancient China rests on the shoulders of one young girl, who must find the last remaining dragon egg and fulfill her destiny.

little accidents_2014.opis_neo:
V ameriškem mestecu, ki še vedno živi pod vplivom tragične rudarske nesreče, neznano kam izgine najstniški sin direktorja rudnika Billy Doyla.

V ameriškem mestecu, ki še vedno živi pod vplivom tragične rudarske nesreče, v kateri je umrlo deset rudarjev, neznano kam izgine najstniški sin direktorja rudnika Billy Doyla. Medtem ko Billy čaka na sojenje zaradi malomarnosti, ki naj bi povzročilo nesrečo v rudniku, se njegova žena Diana trudi najti izginulega sina. Obenem se zaplete v intimen odnos z rudarjem, ki je preživel tragično nesrečo. Toda strastnejši ko je njun odnos, zapletenejša postaja mreža skrivnosti, v kateri se znajdejo Billy, Diana in preživeli rudar.
little accidents_2014.opis_omdb: A recent coal mining accident has killed several miners and left the small town community scarred and traumatized. The wealthy mining executive responsible for the accident, Bill Doyle, wants to pretend that it never happened, referring to the mining families as "trailer trash". His wife Diana and son JT know better, though. Diana is drowning in guilt and feels socially awkward around the other rich snobs she used to be friends with. She copes with it by having an affair with Amos, the lone survivor of the mining accident who now walks with a limp and lives with his dying father. JT is worried that his father will go to prison, and takes out his anger on the mining families' children, especially Owen Briggs. Owen is a young boy who lost his father in the disaster. He lives with his bad-tempered aunt, his grieving mother, and his little brother James, who has Down's Syndrome. One day Owen is in the woods with James, and he gets into a fight with JT, accidentally going too far...

land of bad_2024.opis_neo:
Med misijo padejo vojaki v zasedo, njihovo edino preostalo upanje pa je oddaljeni upravljavec dronov.

Land of Bad spremlja elitno ekipo za ekstrakcijo, ki se mora prebiti za sovražnikovo linijo, da bi rešila vrhunsko opremo in talce. Vsaka minuta filma nam ponuja akcijo, poleg Rusella Crowa pa je v njem kar nekaj znanih imen – Liam Hemsworth, Milo Ventimiglia in drugi.
land of bad_2024.opis_omdb: A Delta Force team fights for survival as an Air Force drone pilot becomes its eyes in the sky.

the love punch_2013.opis_neo:
Ločeni lastnik podjetja srednjih let Richard Jones (Pierce Brosnan) se veseli brezbrižnemu življenju v pokoju.

Richard še pred zadnjim delovnim dnem ugotovi prevaro novih lastnikov, zaradi katere je podjetje bankrotiralo in ostalo brez pokojninskega sklada, torej tudi sam ostane brez pokojnine. Nekdanjo soprogo Kate (Emma Thompson) prepriča, da mu pomaga raziskati zadevo in skupaj odkrijeta, da je za vsem francoski poslovnež Vincent Kruger. 
Nekdanja zakonca se kmalu znajdeta sredi igre mačke in miši, ki se odvija po vsej Evropi, norih pregonov in kraje dragocene ogrlice, dogodki pa povzročijo, da se znova razplamtijo stara čustva.
the love punch_2013.opis_omdb: Richard (Pierce Brosnan) and Kate (Dame Emma Thompson) are a divorced couple who have an amicable relationship. Richard, who's about to retire, learns that his company's assets have been frozen because it's under investigation, and that includes the pension fund. When the owner goes out of the country, Richard decides to pursue him and Kate goes with him. When they learn the man doesn't care about the employees, they decide to get the money some other way - by stealing the diamond he gave his girlfriend. So they follow them and Kate gets close to the girlfriend.

elephant white_2011.opis_neo:
Poslovnež najame morilca Curtieja Churcha, da bi maščeval hčer, ki so jo na Tajskem ubili trgovci z ljudmi.

Curtie išče Angleža Jimmyja, preprodajalca orožja, in se pri njem oboroži. Nato sproži vojno med tolpami, da bi odstranil večji del trgovcev z ljudmi.
elephant white_2011.opis_omdb: In Bangkok, the assassin Curtie Church (Djimon Hounsou) is hired by a businessman to kill six men. Job done, the employer proposes another contract to Curtie to kill the lord of the traffickers that had addicted, prostituted and murdered his daughter. Curtie seeks out the Englishman Jimmy that is an arm dealer and he rents heavy weapons. Then Curtie provokes a war between gangs to eliminate the greatest number of white slave traders. Meanwhile, the young prostitute Mae meets Church and helps him to release other girls. When Mae vanishes, Curtie seeks her out and finds the truth about Mae.

the taking_2014.opis_neo:
Včasih se zdi, da kdo izgublja svoj razum in tako je tudi v sledečem filmu.

Včasih razum naseli neželeni podnajemnik - zlo, ki sčasoma ne le prevzema naš um, temveč tudi telo in vse življenje. Ravno to se je zgodilo prijazni gospe Deborah Logan, že danes pa bi se lahko zgodilo vsakomur od nas!
the taking_2014.opis_omdb: What starts as a poignant medical documentary about Deborah Logan's descent into Alzheimer's disease and her daughter's struggles as caregiver degenerates into a maddening portrayal of dementia at its most frightening, as hair-raising events begin to plague the family and crew and an unspeakable malevolence threatens to tear the very fabric of sanity from them all.

the fifth estate_2013.opis_neo:
Ustanovitelj strani WikiLeaks Julian Assange pridobi ogromno tajnih podatkov o korupciji oblasti po svetu in povzroči svetovni škandal.

V filmu spremljamo dogajanje povezano s spletno stranjo Wikileaks, od njenih začetkov, pa do niza objav spornih podatkov, ki so spremenili zgodovino. Medtem ko je njen globalni vpliv naraščal, je med ustanoviteljema Danielom Domscheit-Bergom in Julianom Assangeom nastajal ideološki razkol.
the fifth estate_2013.opis_omdb: The story begins as WikiLeaks founder Julian Assange (Benedict Cumberbatch) and his colleague Daniel Domscheit-Berg (Daniel Brühl) team up to become underground watchdogs of the privileged and powerful. On a shoestring, they create a platform that allows whistle-blowers to anonymously leak covert data, shining a light on the dark recesses of government secrets and corporate crimes. Soon, they are breaking more hard news than the world's most legendary media organizations combined. But when Assange and Berg gain access to the biggest trove of confidential intelligence documents in U.S. history, they battle each other and a defining question of our time: what are the costs of keeping secrets in a free society-and what are the costs of exposing them?

mongol_2007.opis_neo:
Film Mongol je epska zgodba o mladih letih Džingiskana, enega največjih vojaških osvajalcev, ki je bil suženj, preden je leta 1206 osvojil pol sveta.

Neznana zgodba o velikem Džingiskanu! Film nagrajenega ruskega režiserja Sergeja Bodrova svetli življenje legendarnega Džingiskana. Zgodba pripoveduje o vladarju Temučinu, ki se je rodil leta 1162, o njegovem zgodnjem otroštvu, bitkah, ki so določile njegovo usodo, o neustrašnem vizionarju, osvajalcu in vodji. Film »Mongol« prikazuje razvoj izjemnega človeka in temelj, na katerem sloni njegova veličina, odnos z ženo, njegovo največjo ljubeznijo ter najzvestejšo zaveznico.
mongol_2007.opis_omdb: The epic story of a young Genghis Khan and how events in his early life led him to become a legendary conqueror. The 9-year-old Temüjin is taken on a trip by his father to select a girl as his future wife. He meets Börte, who says she would like to be chosen, which he does. He promises to return after five years to marry her. Temüjin's father is poisoned on the trip and dies. As a boy Temüjin passes through starvation, humiliation, and even slavery, but later with Börte's help he overcomes all of his childhood hardships to become one of the greatest conquerors the world has ever known.

mia and me: the hero of centopia_2022.naslov_sl: Mia in jaz: Mijin prihod v Centopijo
mia and me: the hero of centopia_2022.naslov_orig: Mia and Me: The Hero of Centopia
mia and me: the hero of centopia_2022.opis_neo:
Mio znova povabijo v čudoviti svet enorogov Centopijo, kjer spozna vilinca, ki nujno potrebuje njeno pomoč.

Pošastni zlobnež v žabji podobi je prevzel oblast na otoku ter s čarovnijo prebivalce spremenil v vojsko brezvoljnih sledilcev. Mia gre s starimi prijatelji po sledi legendarne junakinje, da bi združila tri starodavne čarobne kamne in rešila deželo.
