Med svojo pustolovščino bo srečala posebnega enoroga in ko se bo velika bitka za otok spremenila v reševanje, bo Mia spoznala, kaj pomeni vloga junakinje. Na koncu jo čakal odločitev, ki ji bo za vselej spremenila življenje.
mia and me: the hero of centopia_2022.opis_omdb: Mia discovers her magic stone is part of an ancient prophecy and embarks on a thrilling journey to the farthest islands of Centopia to face a great evil, and shape her own destiny.

fall_2022.opis_neo:
Najboljši prijateljici Becky in Hunter se znajdeta na vrhu 600 metrov visokega radijskega stolpa.

Vzpon na visok komunikacijski stolp se spremeni v borbo za preživetje.
fall_2022.opis_omdb: When a high-rise climb goes wrong, best friends Becky and Hunter find themselves stuck at the top of a 2,000-foot TV tower.

miller's girl_2024.opis_neo:
Nadarjena srednješolka se poda na ustvarjalno odisejado, ko ji njen profesor dodeli projekt, ki ju oba zaplete v kompleksno čustveno mrežo.

Nadarjena srednješolka (Jenna Ortega) se poda na ustvarjalno odisejado, ko ji njen profesor (Martin Freeman) dodeli projekt, ki ju oba zaplete v kompleksno čustveno mrežo. Medtem ko se meje brišejo in se njuni življenji prepletata, se morata soočiti s svojimi najtemnejšimi skrivnostmi, medtem ko poskušata ohraniti stvari, ki jima v življenju največ pomenijo.
miller's girl_2024.opis_omdb: A creative writing assignment yields complex results between a teacher and his talented student.

far from heaven_2002.opis_neo:
V petdesetih letih prejšnjega stoletja se gospodinja iz Connecticuta sooča z zakonsko krizo in naraščajočimi rasnimi napetostmi v zunanjem svetu.

Cathy Whitaker in njen mož Frank imata na videz popoln zakon. Živita v prijetni četrti v Hartfordu, v Connecticutu, imata lepo hišo ter dva srečna in zdrava otroka. Njen popoln svet se začne podirati, ko moža zaloti med poljubom z drugim moškim.
far from heaven_2002.opis_omdb: Cathy is the perfect 50s housewife, living the perfect 50s life: healthy kids, successful husband, social prominence. Then one night she stumbles in on her husband Frank, kissing another man, and her tidy world starts spinning out of control. In her confusion and grief, she finds consolation in the friendship of their African-American gardener, Raymond - a socially taboo relationship that leads to the further disintegration of life as she knew it. Despite Cathy and Frank's struggle to keep their marriage afloat, the reality of his homosexuality and her feelings for Raymond open a painful, if more honest, chapter in their lives.

righteous kill_2008.opis_neo:
Manhattan pretresajo serijski umori, morilec pa žrtve izbira med zločinci, ki so se izmuznili roki pravice. Preiskavo prevzameta veteranska detektiva.

Oskarjevca Robert De Niro in Al Pacino igrata newyorška policijska veterana, ki sta na sledi serijskemu morilcu. Po ulicah Manhattna se namreč sprehaja morilec, katerega tarče so zločinci, ki so se izmuznili skozi luknje v sodnem sistemu.
righteous kill_2008.opis_omdb: Turk and Rooster, two aging NYPD detectives and longtime partners, are hunting a serial killer who is murdering sociopathic criminals. They both have personal issues, and when they start working with a younger investigative team, Perez and Riley, tensions between the two teams is inevitable, especially since Turk is now living with Perez's ex-girlfriend, also a homicide detective.

shut in_2015.opis_neo:
Napeta srhljivka o umsko zmedeni ženski, ki se znajte potisnjena v kot in skuša izgnati svoje demone, da sploh lahko preživi.

Anna Rook (Beth Riesgraf) je domala v vseh pogledih povsem izolirana od ljudi. Trpi zaradi agorafobije in lahko ljudi v svojem življenju našteje na dva prsta: svojega na smrt bolnega partnerja (Timothy McKinney) in očarljivega dostavljalca hrane Dana (Rory Culkin). 

Ko Conrad umre, Anna ne zmore na pogreb. Trojica nepomembnih kriminalcev - JP (Jack Kesy), Perry (Martin Starr) in Vance (Joshua Mikel) - vdre v njeno hišo, da bi jo oropali. Anna, ki ne more pobegniti, se jim je prisiljena zoperstaviti, zadeve pa se še poslabšajo, ko se na vratih pojavi Dan, da bi preveril, kako se počuti …
shut in_2015.opis_omdb: In the near future a young journalist enters virtual reality to interview a man who has been living in a virtual reality version of London for 7 years, and brings up a secret from his past.

down a dark hall_2018.opis_neo:
Težavno najstnico pošljejo v skrivnostno šolo Blackwood. Tam jo kmalu začnejo ogrožati temačne sile, ki obdajajo skrivnostno ravnateljico gospo Duret.

Mlado in težavno najstnico Kit zaradi neobvladljivega značaja pošljejo v skrivnostno šolo z internatom, imenovano Blackwood. Ob prihodu spozna ravnateljico ter druge dijakinje, štiri prav tako težavne punce. Med raziskovanjem hodnikov šole, ki se zdijo kot labirint, Kit s sošolkami odkrije, da Blackwood za štirimi stenami skriva starodavno skrivnost.
down a dark hall_2018.opis_omdb: After the death of her father when she was a child, Kit Gordy has grown up as a troubled teen for disgust of her mother Ginny and her stepfather Dave Dabrowski. Called to the principal's office of her high school and accused of a failed attempt to burn it, Kit is expelled from the high school, but Dr. Heather Sinclair, member of the staff of the Blackwood Boarding School, appears to offer her a place in the next school year. Ginny enlists Kit against her will in a try to correct her daughter, and Kit travels Blackwood, an old, isolated and dark mansion in the middle of a forest outside the city. There she meets her companions: nice Izzy, shy Ashley, reluctant Sierra and borderline Veronica, so troubled teens as her own. In the dinner presentation, Kit and the other girls meet Madame Duret, Blackwood's headmistress, and the rest of the staff: Pr. Farley (maths), Jules Duret (music), Heather Sinclair (arts) and Mrs. Olonsky, Madame Duret's rude right-hand to keep the peace in Blackwood. Locked in a place without internet, cell phones and all trace of modern technology, Kit watches as all change in a weird way: Izzy develops an extreme obsession for mathematics, Sierra for painting, Ashley for writing and herself for piano, meanwhile that Veronica keeps out from this obsession. Trapped between her love interest for Jules, Madame Duret's son, and strange memory losses, Kit asks help Veronica to discover the reason of their different changes. Investigating the ruined and forbidden wing of Blackwood at the same time that the works of Izzy, Ashley, Sierra and the own Kit, this last one and Veronica realize not only that all them have one secret in common, but the previous students suffered a horrible fate caused by the Blackwood's supernatural forces, that it will be too their own unless they find a way to avoid it.

the host_2013.opis_neo:
Človeštvu grozi neviden sovražnik, ki zavzame telesa ljudi ter zbriše njihove spomine. A mlada ženska bo žrtvovala vse, da bi zaščitila svoje bližnje.

Kaj, če bi vam bilo vse tisto, kar imate radi, vzeto v hipu? Ko nevidni sovražnik zapreti človeštvu, da bo zavzel njihova telesa in izbrisal spomine, se Melanie Stryder odloči, da bo žrtvovala vse, da zaščiti ljudi, za katere ji je največ mar.
the host_2013.opis_omdb: A body-snatching alien takes possession of a young woman who refuses to surrender her mind, and together they seek out the man they both love as Writer and Director Andrew Niccol (Gattaca (1997), In Time (2011)) adapts Twilight author Stephenie Meyer's New York Times best-seller. The majority of the human race have been possessed by unseen invaders, leaving only small pockets of "wild" humans like Melanie Stryder (Saoirse Ronan) scattered throughout the world. Upon being captured by the invaders, Melanie finds her body claimed by Wanderer, a spirit that has been warned of the difficulties that come with claiming a human host. In the process of inhabiting Melanie, Wanderer is deeply affected by her vivid dreams and memories. And when Melanie fights to maintain control of her mind even as Wanderer possesses her body, the sympathetic entity joins her on a journey that will reveal the unfathomable depths of human love and compassion.

albert - dubbed_2015.opis_neo:
Albert živi v danskem podeželskem mestecu Kallebyju in vedno ušpiči kaj podlega, za nameček pa je izredno neroden.

Albert je nastal po literarni predlogi priljubljenega pokojnega danskega avtorja za otroke in mladino, Oleja Lunda Kirkegarrda, ki je bil znan po tem, da je za svoje knjižne junake vedno izbral antijunake. Tudi Albert ni izjema. Živi namreč v danskem podeželskem mestecu Kallebyju in vedno ušpiči kaj podlega, za nameček pa je izredno neroden. Ko nekega dne po nesreči razbije mestni spomenik, domačini niso niti najmanj navdušeni nad njegovo novo podlostjo. Ker se želi odkupiti, se Albert s svojim najboljšim prijateljem Egonom odpravi v širni svet in s tem na nepozabno pustolovščino, sredi katere se morata soočiti s tatovi in drugimi nepridipravi ter z največjim diamantom na svetu.
albert - dubbed_2015.opis_omdb: Albert who lives in the small Danish provincial town Kalleby. Albert is always up to no good, but he's also really clumsy. One day he comes to overturn the city's landmarks - a statue of a balloon captain. The townspeople are mildly not happy with his recent accident, so with his best friend, Egon, Albert takes off on an adventure to find a real balloon. On their trip postponed friends of both robbers, gypsies and the world's largest diamond.

the best of me_2014.opis_neo:
Zaljubljena srednješolca okoliščine ločijo za dvajset let. Odrasla se znova srečata v rojstnem mestu, kamor se vrneta zaradi smrti ljubega prijatelja.

Filmska priredba romana, priljubljenega pisatelja Nicholasa Sparksa, nas popelje po življenjski poti dveh popolnoma različnih srednješolcev, ki ju po strastni ljubezenski zvezi okoliščine ločijo za 20 let. Zdaj sta odrasla in se znova srečata v rojstnem mestu, kamor se vrneta zaradi smrti ljubega prijatelja.
the best of me_2014.opis_omdb: Amanda and Dawson are soul mates who met as teens and were from different backgrounds. But circumstances would force them to part ways. 20 years later they are brought back together by the passing of a mutual friend. So they go back home to fulfill his final wishes and they run into each other. While Amanda is married, albeit unhappily, she still has feelings for Dawson but can't forgive him for pushing her away.

the hitman's bodyguard_2017.opis_neo:
Najboljši telesni stražar na svetu mora pospremiti poklicnega morilca kot pričo na sodišče in ga obvarovati pred vsemi, ki ga hočejo utišati.

Darius Kincaid je med najbolj iskanimi plačanimi morilci na svetu, vrhunski agent Michael Bryce pa dobi nalogo, da ga ščiti kot pričo. Seveda nič ne gre po načrtu. Kincaid je namreč Brycev zapriseženi nasprotnik. Leta sta se gledala prek svojih pištol, zdaj pa morata sodelovati in med drugim preživeti srečanje s krvi željnim diktatorjem.
the hitman's bodyguard_2017.opis_omdb: With his reputation in tatters after the painfully unsuccessful delivery of a distinguished Japanese client, the former triple-A protection agent, Michael Bryce, is now reduced to a mere second-class bodyguard for hire, two years after the disgraceful incident. Under those circumstances, Bryce would do anything to prove his worth, and, before long, he accepts an offer from Interpol to escort the international assassin, Darius Kincaid, from Manchester to the Hague. The task seems simple: Bryce needs to transport him from point A to point B; nevertheless, the trip to the Netherlands is long and hazardous, and Kincaid--as the only one with the guts and enough hard evidence to testify against a tyrannical Belarusian dictator--is an obvious target. Undoubtedly, it's a tough job, as the mismatched duo will have to put aside their grudges, and race against the clock in a non-stop concerto for bullets. Can the hitman's bodyguard carry through the most important mission in his career?

the man who knew infinity_2015.opis_neo:
Samouki indijski matematik leta 1913 pripotuje na fakulteto v Cambridgeu. Bori se proti predsodkom, pri tem pa odkriva svojo matematično genialnost.

Zgodba o življenju in akademski karieri indijskega matematika Srinivasa Ramanujana, ki je leta 1913, na povabilo profesorja in kasneje mentorja G.H. Hardyja, pripotoval na fakulteto v Cambridgeu. Tam je odkrival svojo matematično genialnost. Ramanujanu na čast je Indija njegov rojstni datum razglasila za narodni dan matematike.
the man who knew infinity_2015.opis_omdb: In the 1910s, Srinivasa Ramanujan is a man of boundless intelligence that even the abject poverty of his home in Madras, India, cannot crush. Eventually, his stellar intelligence in mathematics and his boundless confidence in both attract the attention of the noted British mathematics professor, G.H. Hardy, who invites him to further develop his computations at Trinity College at Cambridge. Forced to leave his young wife, Janaki, behind, Ramanujan finds himself in a land where both his largely intuitive mathematical theories and his cultural values run headlong into both the stringent academic requirements of his school and mentor and the prejudiced realities of a Britain heading into World War One. Facing this with a family back home determined to keep him from his wife and his own declining health, Ramanujan joins with Hardy in a mutual struggle that would define Ramanujan as one of India's greatest modern scholars who broke more than one barrier in his worlds.

from paris with love_2009.opis_neo:
Mlad uradnik z ameriške ambasade v Parizu mora združiti moči s tajnim agentom in preprečiti teroristični napad.

Režiser Pierre Morel, ki se nam je lansko leto predstavil z veliko akcijsko uspešnico "Ugrabljena", in eden najuspešnejših filmskih producentov današnjega časa Luc Besson nam ponujata svojo novo umetnino - akcijski triler "Iz Pariza z ljubeznijo". Charlie Wax je tajni agent s hudo vedenjsko motnjo, ki rešuje vse težave na najzloglasnejši in najnasilnejši način. James Recce pa je njegovo čisto nasprotje - neopazen uradnik na ameriški ambasadi v Franciji, vljuden, odgovoren in šele pred kratkim zaročen. Po naključju bosta skupaj s Charliejem skušala ustaviti teroristično organizacijo Pakistancev sredi Pariza, položaj pa se bo še bolj zapletel, ko bosta odkrila, kdo je eden glavnih pripadnikov te organizacije.
from paris with love_2009.opis_omdb: James Reece is an ambitious aide to the U.S. Ambassador in Paris, doing little jobs for the CIA and hoping to get into black ops. On the night he and his girlfriend, Caroline, become engaged, he's told to pick up Charlie Wax at Orly. Charlie is an unorthodox government employee - large, bald and bearded, foul-mouthed and eccentric. Charlie immediately takes James on a wild ride of murder and mayhem, through ethnic enclaves. As bodies pile up, the purpose remains opaque to James. Caroline, unhappy that James has been out of touch for a day, tells him to bring Charlie for dinner. Charlie can be charming - where will it lead? Does the chess-playing James have what it takes?

prey for the devil_2022.opis_neo: Sestra Ann verjame, da je bila poklicana, da postane prva ženska izganjalka hudiča … Toda kdo, ali bolje rečeno, kaj jo je poklicalo?
prey for the devil_2022.opis_omdb: According to real-life Vatican reports, occurrences of demonic possession have increased significantly in recent years. In response, the Catholic church has secretly reopened exorcism schools to train priests in the sacred rite. The Devil's Light immerses you into the world of one of these schools; humanity's last line of defense against the powers of everlasting evil. Jacqueline Byers ("Roadies," "Salvation") stars as Sister Ann, who devoutly believes that performing exorcisms is her calling, despite the fact that historically only priests - not sisters - are allowed to perform them. When one professor senses her special gift, allowing her to be the first nun to study and master the ritual, her own soul will be in danger as the demonic forces she battles reveal a mysterious connection to her traumatic past.

the lovers_2015.opis_neo:
Potem ko je hotel iz morja rešiti ženo, s katero sta raziskovala razbitine potopljene ladje, čedni morski arheolog Jay leži v bolnišnici v Bostonu.

Veliki koralni greben leta 2020. Potem ko je hotel iz morskih globin rešiti svojo ženo, s katero sta raziskovala razbitine potopljene britanske kolonialne trgovske ladje, čedni morski arheolog Jay Fennel leži v bolnišnici v Bostonu. Jay je možgansko mrtev, kljub temu pa nas v komi popelje v preteklost, natančneje v Pune v Indiji leta 1778. Britansko kolonialno Vzhodnoindijsko podjetje si prilašča tamkajšnje palače, mladi stotnik James Stewart, ki je na las podoben Fennelu, pa se pravkar odpravlja na nevarno misijo. Med potjo je priča umoru, prevari, izdaji in maščevanju, za nameček pa se zaljubi v indijsko bojevnico Tulajo. Njuna ljubezen je v danih okoliščinah nemogoča, zato se mora Stewart boriti zanjo. Le moč prstana je tista, ki lahko preseže časovne omejitve in reši življenje.
the lovers_2015.opis_omdb: Great Barrier Reef, 2020. After a dangerous dive to save his wife Laura trapped while exploring a colonial British merchant ship wreckage, Jay Fennel, a rugged and attractive marine archaeologist lies comatose in a Boston hospital. Fennel's dream-like coma takes us back in time to Pune, India in 1778. The British East India Company is invading the palaces and a young captain named James Stewart, who bears a striking resemblance to Fennel, is about to embark on a dangerous mission. Along the way he encounters murder, deceit, betrayal and revenge. He falls deeply in love with an Indian She-warrior named Tulaja, an impossible love which he must fight for. Only the power of a ring can transcend time and save a life.

timecrafters: the treasure of pirate's c.naslov_orig: Timecrafters: The Treasure of Pirate's Cove
timecrafters: the treasure of pirate's c.opis_neo:
Pirati potujejo skozi čas in skušajo dobiti nazaj zemljevid do zaklada. Njihovi nasprotniki pa so otroci, ki si pomagajo z moderno tehnično opremo.

Ko blisk zadene ukradeno ladjo med begom, ta izgine skupaj s posadko in njihovim dragocenim zemljevidom o zakladu, ki je bil na ladji. Vržena v vorteks se posadka zbudi 300 let pozneje na obali Gusarskega zaliva. Kmalu odkrijejo, da je zemljevid izginil in da je zdaj v rokah nekih mestnih otrok. Medtem ko gusarji v sodobnem času tudi z novimi tehnologijami pljujejo po morju, se morajo potuhniti v mestu in narediti vse potrebno, da bi znova prišli do zemljevida. Vodja zapelje mamo enega od otrok, vdovo, ki je pred petimi leti na morju izgubila soproga.
timecrafters: the treasure of pirate's c.opis_omdb: While searching for lost treasure, time traveling pirates end up in the modern day and do battle with unlikely foes: a group of kids with the latest in techy gadgetry.

kursk_2018.opis_neo:
V filmu smo priča eni najhujših pomorskih tragedij. V času te tragedije je bilo na krovu 118 mornarjev in častnikov; večina je bila mlajša od 30 let.

Ruska podmornica K-141 Kursk je bila ponos ruske flote in simbol moči njihove mornarice. Splovili so jo leta 1994, 154 metrov dolgo plovilo na jedrski pogon pa je svoje delo opravljalo le šest let. Dokler se ni zgodila ena najhujših pomorskih tragedij, v času katere je bilo na krovu 118 mornarjev in častnikov. Medtem, ko se je posadka borila za preživetje, so se njihove družine bojevale s političnimi preprekami, ki so ovirale reševanje.
kursk_2018.opis_omdb: Kursk is inspired by the unforgettable true story of the K-141 Kursk, a Russian flagship nuclear-powered submarine that sank to the bottom of the Barents Sea in August 2000. As 23 sailors fought for survival aboard the disabled sub, their families desperately battled bureaucratic obstacles and impossible odds to find answers and save them.

max steel_2016.opis_neo:
Najstnik Max si želi po smrti očeta najti malce miru, toda odkritje skrivnostnih očetovih raziskav ga usmeri na pot super junaka z neverjetnimi močmi.

Nenapovedanim in čedalje močnejšim izbruhom energije Max ni kos, zato se je prisiljen oddaljiti od ljudi, ki ga obkrožajo. Pred usodnim izbruhom energije ga reši robotek Jekleni, ki skrivno nadzoruje Maxov razvoj. Max in Jekleni odkrijeta, da lahko če sta skupaj nadzorujeta energijo jo s pridom izkoriščata in dobita nadčloveško moč. Za petami jima je sovražnik, ki ima z njima grozljive načrte. Max in Jekleni ne vesta, komu naj zaupata in morata sodelovati, da bi odkrila resnico
max steel_2016.opis_omdb: When teenage Max McGrath discovers his body can generate the universe's most powerful energy, he must bond with the only being able to contain it - a mysterious techno-organic extraterrestrial named Steel. United as the superhero Max Steel, the two friends must combat an alien menace and unlock the secrets of their past.

captive state_2019.opis_neo:
Mladenič sodeluje v zaroti, da bi se uprl nezemeljski rasi, ki je napadla Zemljo in prisilila človeštvo v sprejetje strogih vojaških zakonov.

Svet je skoraj desetletje po okupaciji zunajzemeljske sile popolnoma spremenjen. Organizacija imenovana 'Captive State' raziskuje življenje na obeh straneh konflikta – pri prebivalcih, ki so z nezemljani sodelovali in disidenti, ki se jim upirajo še danes.
captive state_2019.opis_omdb: Nearly a decade after occupation by an extraterrestrial force, the lives of a Chicago neighborhood on both sides of the conflict are explored. In a working-class Chicago neighborhood occupied by an alien force for nine years, increased surveillance and the restriction of civil rights have given rise to an authoritarian system - and dissent among the populace.

2:22_2017.opis_neo:
Življenje Dylana Bransona ubere nepričakovano pot, ko se znamenja napovedi zloveščih dogodkov začnejo ponavljati vsak dan ob isti uri.

Življenje Dylana Bransona ubere nepričakovano pot, ko se znamenja napovedi zloveščih dogodkov ponavljajo iz dneva v dan in ogrožajo varnost in življenje njegovega dekleta. Dylan mora razbiti vpliv preteklosti in prevzeti nadzor nad dogodkom, ki ga vsak dan ob 2:22 skrivnostno zvabi na postajo Grand Central.
2:22_2017.opis_omdb: A clever, rollercoaster thriller that centers on Dylan, an air-traffic controller who is given a jolt when he narrowly escapes being responsible for a mid-air collision between two passenger planes, caused by a mysterious blinding light that happened at 2:22. These strange occurrences continue and lead Dylan to meet Sarah, with whom he feels inexplicably linked. Together they discover uncanny similarities with their current predicament and a double murder committed a generation ago. With a grim fate looming, Dylan must solve the mystery of 2:22 to preserve a love whose second chance has finally come.

see for me_2021.opis_neo:
Ko se slepa Sophie nastani v osamljenem dvorcu, trije tatovi vdrejo po skriti sef. Njena edina obramba je mobilna aplikacija.

Sophie, mlada slepa ženska, pazi vilo na samem, ko jo ponoči napadejo roparji, ki iščejo skriti sef. Za obrambo ima novo aplikacijo, imenovano Bodi moje oči. Z njo se poveže s prostovoljko na drugi strani države, ki ji pomaga preživeti, saj ji govori, kaj vidi namesto nje.
see for me_2021.opis_omdb: When blind Sophie cat-sits a secluded house, thieves break in. Her defense is Kelly, an army vet, who helps her survive.

unleashed_2005.opis_neo:
Danny (Jet Li) je fizično izjemno močan, a čustveno precej okorna oseba, poleg tega je tudi neizobražen.

Ko je imel Danny štiri leta, ga je z ulice rešil Bart, ki je z njim od samega začetka ravnal kot s psom in ga uril v borilnih veščinah. Danny je postal njegovo tajno orožje, sposoben napasti v trenutku, ko dobi ukaz, njegova tarča pa nima najmanjše možnosti za preživetje. 

Izoliran od preostalega sveta Danny nima druge izbire, kot da sprejme življenje živali, dokler nekega dne ne sreča Sama, slepega uglaševalca klavirjev. Sam in njegova posvojenka Viktorija bosta Dannyju pokazala človečnost, ki je ni imel priložnosti spoznati in ki mu je bila do tega trenutka prepovedana. Toda njegova nasilna preteklost bo zahtevala svoj davek.
unleashed_2005.opis_omdb: Two men cut off from the world in different ways become unlikely friends and protectors in this offbeat action drama. Danny (Jet Li) is a physically powerful but emotionally stunted man; never given any sort of proper education, Danny has learned little in his lifetime but how to fight, and his minder, Bart (Bob Hoskins), treats him more like a guard dog than anything else, using him in illegal no-holds-barred brawls that earn Bart plenty of money but only reinforce Danny's violent alienation. When Bart is injured in an auto accident, Danny is left to fend for himself, and stumbles upon Sam (Morgan Freeman), an elderly piano tuner who has lost his sight. Sam is the first person to treat Danny with kindness, and the music he plays soothes the troubled soul of the fighter. However, Danny's fighting skills soon come in handy when Sam runs afoul of a pack of small-time crooks who believe he knows too much about their operations.

corbin nash_2018.opis_neo:
Preiskoval je svet teme zaradi resnice, na katero ni bil pripravljen.

Preiskoval je svet teme zaradi resnice, na katero ni bil pripravljen. Odpadniški detektiv je umorjen samo zato, da se znova rodi kot vrhunski morilec. Sprejme svojo usodo, priseže na maščevanje vsemu, kar je uničilo njegovo družino. Je Corbin Nash, lovec na demone.
corbin nash_2018.opis_omdb: Set in a bloodthirsty Los Angeles, California, rogue detective Corbin Nash's (Dean Jagger's) obsessive search for the truth behind his parents' murders leads him to confront a monstrous duo of Queeny (Corey Feldman) and Vince (Richard Wagner), who drag him into a Hellish nightmare for which he was never prepared. Lost to an underworld of horrors dating back to the dawn of time, he soon discovers that he is actually the last surviving member of the Nash family, a historic clan of demon hunters. As he is forced to acknowledge a foreboding destiny, he is attacked and brutally left for dead, only to be recovered by Macy (Fernanda Romero), a pure soul who is led by the mysterious Blind Prophet (Malcolm McDowell). At last, Detective Nash is reborn the ultimate killer. Seeking vengeance, he wages a violent war on the beasts that roam the darkness of this world, finally embracing his true legacy - Corbin Nash, Demon Hunter.

iron sky: the coming race_2019.opis_neo:
Jekleno nebo 2 je finsko-nemška znanstveno-fantastična akcijska komedija in nadaljevanje popularnega filma Jekleno nebo iz leta 2012.

Leto 2047. Pred 29 leti je nuklearna vojna med Zemljo in nacisti na Mesecu uničila pogoje za življenje na Zemlji. Poslednji preživeli Zemljani napadejo Neomenijo, bivšo nacistično bazo na temni strani Meseca. Motivirani po napadu, se nacisti v drugi fazi mirovanja pripravljajo na osvajanje sveta.
iron sky: the coming race_2019.opis_omdb: Twenty years after the events of Iron Sky, the former Nazi Moonbase has become the last refuge of mankind. Earth was devastated by a nuclear war, but buried deep under the wasteland lies a power that could save the last of humanity - or destroy it once and for all. The truth behind the creation of mankind will be revealed when an old enemy leads our heroes on an adventure into the Hollow Earth. To save humanity they must fight the Vril, an ancient shapeshifting reptilian race and their army of dinosaurs.

miracle on the mountain_2017.opis_neo:
Eric LeMarque želi izkusiti osamo, vznemirjenje in višino, ko za celih osem dni obtiči v zamrznjeni divjini.

Podhlajen in sestradan se je Eric v divjini soočil s volkovi, skoraj bi zmrznil, dehidriral in podlegel halucinacijam. V tej čudoviti, toda smrtonosni pokrajini, se Eric bori tudi sam s seboj, ko je soočen s sebičnimi in uničujočimi odločitvami, zaradi katerih je pristal v zamrznjeni tundri. Njegova mati je za njim poslala reševalce. Eric se mora vzpeti proti njim, preden bo prepozno.
miracle on the mountain_2017.opis_omdb: An adrenaline seeking snowboarder gets lost in a massive winter storm in the back country of the High Sierras where he is pushed to the limits of human endurance and forced to battle his own personal demons as he fights for survival...."

voyagers_2021.opis_neo:
Skupina mladih moških in žensk se odpravi na kolonizacijo oddaljenega planeta.

V bližnji prihodnosti, v kateri je človeška vrsta ogrožena, pošljejo okoli 30 mladeničev in mladenk poslala na odpravo v vesolje, da bi naselili novo odkriti planet. Skupina je predhodno izurjena v ta namen, z umetnimi zaviralci hormonov in vsi nadpovprečno inteligentni. Toda ko posadka odkrije vznemirljive skrivnosti o odpravi, se uprejo urjenju in začnejo raziskovati svoje prvinske naravne nagone in impulze. Medtem ko se življenje na ladji spreminja v kaos, jih prežemajo strah, strast in lakota po moči.
voyagers_2021.opis_omdb: Set in the near future, the film chronicles the odyssey of 30 young men and women who are sent deep into space on a multi-generational mission in search of a new home. The mission descends into madness, as the crew reverts to its most primal state, not knowing if the real threat they face is what's outside the ship or who they're becoming inside it.

clara_2018.opis_neo:
Med astronomom Isaacom in umetnico Claro se oblikuje globoka vez, ki vodi do ključnega znanstvenega odkritja.

Astronom Isaac Bruno (Patrick J. Adams) je obseden z iskanjem sledi življenja v vesolju. Ko ta neomajna strast ogrozi njegovo kariero, se ne meni za prijateljev nasvet o tem, naj si uredi življenje, temveč se bolj posveti svojim raziskavam – tudi zato, da bi tako pobegnil pred tragedijo iz preteklosti, ki ga muči. Ko spozna umetnico Claro (Troian Bellisario), ki je enako navdušena nad astronomijo in ima izostren čut za zaznavanje vzorcev, njuno sodelovanje pri obdelavi zvezdnih podatkov vodi v globoko zvezo in potem do ključnega znanstvenega odkritja.
clara_2018.opis_omdb: Dr. Isaac Bruno, an astronomer and astrophysics professor at Ontario University in Toronto, has been obsessed with needing to discover that there is life in the cosmos besides on Earth. This obsession has been a negative Catch-22 in his life: he has needed this focus to fill a void in his personal life following a tragedy that partly led to the dissolution of his marriage to fellow astronomer Dr. Rebecca Jenkins, while the frustration he has felt in such a discovery not yet having been made has resulted in him acting inappropriately in all aspects of his life. That professional behavior has in turn led to he being indefinitely suspended from the university, which also means no access to university resources or equipment hindering that search. It is bad timing as advances in telescope technology, such as TESS, not only provides much data to the community, but any evidence as to the possibility of life would provide access to that technology. Desperate for help without many resources, he advertises for an unpaid assistant, beyond the provision of room and board. The only application he receives is from Clara, an artist not only with no astrophysics background but little education let alone at a post-secondary level, she who he suspects is more interested in the room and board in being seemingly homeless. Beyond her dog Eeva, her prized possessions are a collection of rocks she carries with her everywhere, obtained most from her world travels, one from and indicative of each continent. Isaac ends up hiring her on her plea of hard work and learning fast. Regardless of what Isaac may or may not find with Clara's help, she, who has a keen sense of observation being an artist, may provide him with something more valuable for his life in a holistic sense.

cold pursuit_2019.opis_neo:
Žalujoči voznik snežnega pluga se želi maščevati preprodajalcem drog, ki so ubili njegovega sina.

Nels Coxman je skromen voznik pluga v odročnem smučarskem središču, v Skalnem gorovju. Njegovo življenje se sesuje, ko v skrivnostnih okoliščinah izgubi sina. Čeprav Nels med iskanjem resnice pride navzkriž z mamilarsko združbo in zaneti vojno med dvema tolpama, se njegovo brezkompromisno iskanje odgovorov nadaljuje.
cold pursuit_2019.opis_omdb: Quiet family man and hard-working snowplow driver Nels is the lifeblood of a glitzy resort town in the Rocky Mountains because he is the one who keeps the winter roads clear. He and his wife live in a comfortable cabin away from the tourists. The town has just awarded him "Citizen of the Year." But Nels has to leave his quiet mountain life when his son is murdered by a powerful drug lord. As a man who has nothing to lose he is stoked by a drive for vengeance. This unlikely hero uses his hunting skills and transforms from an ordinary man into a skilled killer as he sets out to dismantle the cartel. Nels' actions ignite a turf war between a manically unpredictable gangster known as Viking and a rival gang boss. Justice is served in one final spectacular confrontation that will leave (almost) no one unscathed.

burn out_2017.opis_neo: Tony je nadarjen dirkač v svetu superbike motošporta. Vse je podredil hitrosti, njegov cilj - pridružiti se elitni profesionalni ekipi - pa je že skoraj dosežen. A vse se podre, ko izve, da je njegova nekdanja punca zašla v dolg pri nevarnem mafijcu. Da bi rešil mater svojega sina, mora Tony svoj dirkaški talent uporabiti za tvegane prevoze drog in se podati v svet, iz katerega se morda ne bo več vrnil.
burn out_2017.opis_omdb: Head burned, addicted to thrills, Tony lives for one thing: become a professional motorcycle super-bike driver. Until the day he discovers that his son's mother is linked to the gypsy underworld. The only way out of this gear: put his talents at the service of mobsters. Circuit driver during the day, go-faster at night, Tony is plunged into an infernal spiral that leads him to the brink of rupture.

one ranger_2023.opis_neo:
Britanska obveščevalna služba najame teksaškega rangerja, da bi izsledil in ustavil nevarnega terorista, ki grozi Londonu.

Britanska obveščevalna služba sreča v tej kriminalki teksaško pravico. Teksaški mož postave (Thomas Jane) sledi bančnemu roparju (Dean Jagger) čez puščavo, da bi odkril, da gre v resnici za mednarodnega terorista, ki namerava sprožiti bombo v središču Londona. Ko mu ubijejo partnerja, mora sodelovati z britansko obveščevalno agentko (Dominique Tipper) in njenim šefom (John Malkovich), da bi odpadnika privedli pred roko pravice - živega ali mrtvega.
one ranger_2023.opis_omdb: Recruited by British intelligence, a Texas Ranger must track down and stop a dangerous terrorist from attacking London.

power rangers_2017.opis_neo:
Priredba serije, ki je bila priljubljena v 90. letih prejšnjega stoletja in prikazuje skupino najstniških super junakov s posebnim orožjem in močmi.

Pet običajnih najstnikov izve, da je njihovo mestece Angel Grove skupaj s svetom na robu uničenja, saj jim grozi invazija nezemljanov. Kmalu odkrijejo, da so prav oni tisti, ki lahko Zemljo rešijo pred uničenjem. Da bi jim to uspelo, pa morajo premagati svoje osebne težave in združiti moči kot superjunaki Power Rangerji, preden bo prepozno.
power rangers_2017.opis_omdb: High school outcasts stumble upon an old alien ship, where they acquire superpowers and are dubbed the Power Rangers. Learning that an old enemy of the previous generation has returned to exact vengeance, the group must harness their powers and use them to work together and save the world.

the matador_2005.opis_neo:
Na šestmesečnem potovanju skozi štiri države in ob številnih margaritah film Matador obrača žanr filmov o plačanih morilcih na glavo.

Osamljeni plačani morilec Julian Noble in prodajalec, ki ga je zapustila sreča, Danny Wright, se začneta nepričakovano družiti zatem, ko se povsem slučajno srečata v baru v Mehiki.
the matador_2005.opis_omdb: A chance encounter between a travelling salesman and a lonely hitman triggers a strangely profound relationship which provokes each to act in ways neither would have imagined possible. Fate steps in to form a friendship between two men from irreconcilable worlds that will alter the lives of both forever.

now you see me_2013.opis_neo:
Dva kriminalista preiskujeta skupino iluzionistov, ki so med eno svojih predstav oropali banko, denar pa podarili občinstvu.

Štirje čarovniki odgovorijo na skrivnostno povabilo na obskurni naslov, ki marsikaj skriva. Leto dni pozneje so Štirje jezdeci uspešni čarovniki, katerih vrhunec razprodane predstave v Las Vegasu je resnični rop banke v Parizu. FBI-jev agent Dylan Rhodes ter Interpolova agentka Alma Vargas dobita nalogo razrešiti ta primer ter kako so čarovniki to izvedli. Toda naloga je vse prej kot lahka kljub pomoči profesionalnemu pojasnjevalcu čarovniških trikov Thaddeusu Bradleyju. Sledi nenavadna preiskava, v kateri ni nič tako, kot se zdi, iluzije, mračne skrivnosti in skriti načrti pa se končno razkrijejo na najnenavadnejši način.
now you see me_2013.opis_omdb: Four magicians each answer a mysterious summons to an obscure address with secrets inside. A year later, they are the Four Horsemen, big time stage illusionists who climax their sold-out Las Vegas show with a bank apparently robbed for real. This puts F.B.I. Agents Dylan Rhodes and Interpol Agent Alma Dray on the case to find out how they did it. However, this mystery proves to be difficult to solve, even with the insights of professional illusion exposer Thaddeus Bradley. What follows is a bizarre investigation where nothing is what it seems to be, with illusions, dark secrets, and hidden agendas galore as all involved are reminded of a great truth in this puzzle: the closer you look, the less you see.

now you see me 2_2016.opis_neo:
Štirje jezdeci se vračajo v nadaljevanju napetega trilerja, ki je navdušil občinstvo po vsem svetu!

Štirje jezdeci" (Jesse Eisenberg, Woody Harrelson, Dave Franco, Lizzy Caplan) se vračajo v nadaljevanju napetega trilerja, ki je navdušil občinstvo po vsem svetu! Leto dni po tem, ko so prelisičili FBI in se priljubili javnosti s svojim robinhoodovskim slogom, se iluzionisti pripravljajo na vrnitev na prizorišče. Vrnejo se, da bi razkrili neetično delovanje tehnološkega mogotca, ki jih je prisilil v rop. Njihovo edino upanje je izvesti še en spektakularni trik, s katerim bodo odkrili, kdo dejansko stoji za vso zgodbo.
now you see me 2_2016.opis_omdb: One year after outwitting the F.B.I. and winning the public's adulation with their Robin Hood-style magic spectacles, The Four Horsemen resurface for a comeback performance in hopes of exposing the unethical practices of a tech magnate. The man behind their vanishing act is none other than Walter Mabry, a tech prodigy who threatens the Horsemen into pulling off their most impossible heist yet. Their only hope is to perform one last unprecedented stunt to clear their names and reveal the mastermind behind it all.

poker face_2022.opis_neo:
Zgodba je postavljena v svet pokra z visokimi stavami.

Zgodba je postavljena v svet pokra z visokimi stavami. Spremljamo tehnološkega milijarderja in hazarderja, ki svojim najboljšim prijateljem privošči noč, ki je ne bodo nikoli pozabili – priložnost, da zadanejo več denarja, kot so kadarkoli sanjali.
poker face_2022.opis_omdb: Crowe plays Jake, a tech billionaire who gathers his childhood friends to his Miami estate for what turns into a high stakes game of poker. Those friends have a love hate relationship with the host, a master game-player/planner, and he has concocted an elaborate scheme designed to bring a certain justice to all of them. However, Jake finds himself re-thinking his strategy when his Miami mansion is overtaken by a dangerous home invader whose previous jobs have all ended in murder and arson.

colombiana_2011.opis_neo:
Razburljiv akcijski triler z Zoe Saldana v vlogi profesionalne morilke, ki se želi maščevati mafijcem, odgovornim za smrt njenih staršev.

Leto 1992, Kolumbija. Devetletna Cataleya je priča umoru svojih staršev. Sama komaj ubeži pokolu in se skrije v Združenih državah pri svojem stricu, ki je profesionalni morilec. Petnajst let pozneje tudi sama dela kot plačanka. Njena vizitka je orhideja, narisana na prsih žrtev, sporočilo morilcem njenih staršev.
colombiana_2011.opis_omdb: A young woman grows up to be a stone-cold assassin after witnessing her parents' murder as a child in Bogota. She works for her uncle as a hitman by day, but her personal time is spent engaging in vigilante murders that she hopes will lead her to her ultimate target - the mobster responsible for her parents' death.

saw x_2023.opis_neo:
Dogajanje je postavljeno v obdobje med Žago in Žago II, prikazuje pa Ugankarjevo najbolj osebno igro Žage do sedaj.

Dogajanje je postavljeno v obdobje med Žago in Žago II, prikazuje pa Ugankarjevo najbolj osebno igro Žage do sedaj. John Kramer je takrat namreč odpotoval v Mehiko, kjer se je udeležil tveganega eksperimentalnega medicinskega postopka.
saw x_2023.opis_omdb: A sick and desperate John travels to Mexico for a risky and experimental medical procedure in hopes of a miracle cure for his cancer only to discover the entire operation is a scam to defraud the most vulnerable.

seven psychopaths_2012.opis_neo:
Scenarist Marty se pomotoma znajde sredi losangeleškega podzemlja, ko njegova prijatelja ugrabita pasjega ljubljenčka psihopatskega gangsterja.

Neuspešni scenarist Marty išče navdih za novo zgodbo, zato se poveže s prijateljem Billyjem in njegovim zločinskim partnerjem, ki ugrabljata domače ljubljenčke in jih nato vrneta v zameno za bogato nagrado. Stvari se zapletejo, ko ujamejo psa nepredvidljivega gangsterja ...
seven psychopaths_2012.opis_omdb: A struggling screenwriter (Colin Farrell) inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his friends (Christopher Walken and Sam Rockwell) kidnap a gangster's (Woody Harrelson) beloved Shih Tzu.

de l'autre côté du périph_2012.opis_neo:
Policista Ousmane in François imata povsem različna značaja in način življenja, vendar sta partnerja pri preiskavi dvojnega zločina v Parizu.

Policista Ousmane in François imata povsem različna značaja in način življenja, vendar sta partnerja pri preiskavi dvojnega zločina v Parizu. Čeprav sta na videz nemogoča kombinacija, ju preiskava primera zbliža na nadvse zabaven način, z veliko divjimi pustolovščinami.
de l'autre côté du périph_2012.opis_omdb: Two mismatched cops team up to investigate the murder of a business mogul's wife.

ender's game_2013.opis_neo:
V priredbi mladinskega futurističnega romana se neverjetno nadarjen dvanajstletnik poda na urjenje, da bi postal največji vojaški poveljnik na Zemlji.

Zemlja je pretrpela dva uničujoča napada zunajzemeljske vrste, ki je odločena uničiti svet. Ender je tih strateški genij, ki lahko postane rešitelj človeštva, zato ga odpeljejo v vojaško šolo v Zemljini orbiti. Tam se skozi urjenje spremeni v ubijalca, ki samega sebe prezira, vendar pa vsi polagajo vanj upe, da bo rešil Zemljo in človeštvo.
ender's game_2013.opis_omdb: The Earth was ravaged by the Formics, an alien race seemingly determined to destroy humanity. Fifty years later, the people of Earth remain banded together to prevent their own annihilation from this technologically superior alien species. Ender Wiggin, a quiet but brilliant boy, may become the savior of the human race. He is separated from his beloved sister and his terrifying brother and brought to battle school in orbit around earth. He will be tested and honed into an empathetic killer who begins to despise what he does as he learns to fight in hopes of saving Earth and his family.

midway_2019.opis_neo:
Epski spektakel o bitki za Midway, preobratu na pacifiški fronti v drugi svetovni vojni.

Pomorska bitka za Midway je v drugi svetovni vojni potekala med mornaricama Japonske in ZDA ter velja za odločilno bitko vojne na Pacifiku, za zaustavitev japonske invazije, ki se je začela z napadom na Pearl Harbor. V bitki so ključno vlogo odigrala letala in letalonosilke, Japoncem pa je Midway predstavljal odskočno desko za zavzetje Havajev.
midway_2019.opis_omdb: MIDWAY centers on the Battle of Midway, a clash between the American fleet and the Imperial Japanese Navy which marked a pivotal turning point in the Pacific Theater during WWII. The film, based on the real-life events of this heroic feat, tells the story of the leaders and soldiers who used their instincts, fortitude and bravery to overcome the odds.

12 strong_2018.opis_neo:
Zgodba o ameriških vojakih, ki so po terorističnih napadih leta 2001 odpotovali v Afganistan, kjer jim je uspelo iztrgati regijo iz pesti talibanov.

Zgodba sledi resničnim dogodkom po napadu 11. septembra 2001, ko je CIA sprožila tajno akcijo v Afganistanu. Agenti Cie in pripadniki posebnih enot ameriške vojske so uspeli poraziti talibanske nasprotnike in končno osvoboditi drugo največje afganistansko mesto, kar je bilo ključno za osvoboditev celotne regije iz pesti Talibanov.
12 strong_2018.opis_omdb: The True Story of the Army's Special Forces "Green Berets", who within weeks responded to the 9-11 attack. Green Berets, with the help of the 160th SOAR(A), took over the country and allowed other Special Forces and the rest of the conventional military to begin the more publicly visible war.

black site_2022.opis_neo:
Skupina policistov v tajnem zaporu se mora boriti za življenje proti Hatchetu, briljantnemu in zloglasnemu priporniku.

Policisti na strogo tajni lokaciji se v igri mačke z mišjo borijo za svoje življenje. Borijo se proti Hatchetu, izjemnem zloglasnem zaporniku, ki pobija enega za drugim. Njegov skrivnostni in smrtonosni načrt ima grozljive daljnosežne posledice.
black site_2022.opis_omdb: A group of officers based in a labyrinthine top-secret must fight for their lives against Hatchet, a brilliant and infamous high-value detainee. When he escapes, his mysterious and deadly agenda has far-reaching and dire consequences.

hostage_2005.opis_neo:
Nekdanji strokovnjak za pogajanja mora uporabiti svoja znanja in veščine, da bi rešil družino, ki je postala talka najstniških roparjev.

POZOR: Pred izposojo preverite delovanje HD vsebin na vašem priključku z ogledom brezplačne risanke Big Buck Bunny. Opis vsebine: Zaradi ponesrečenih pogajanj, katerih rezultat je bila smrt matere in otroka, pogajalec losangeleške policije Jeff Talley zapusti Los Angeles.
hostage_2005.opis_omdb: Jeff Talley, a former LAPD hostage negotiator, has moved himself away from his failed career outside of Los Angeles, and away from his wife and daughter when three perpetrators move in on an unsuspecting family. But the family's father has a secret which might compromise his kin, and one of the criminals is about to jump over the edge. Jeff Talley has to get everybody to survive the night......if he can.

the foreigner_2017.opis_neo:
Zgodba o skromnem londonskem podjetniku Quanu, ki se hoče maščevati, ko njegova edina hči umre v terorističnem napadu.

Quan, londonski podjetnik s temačno preteklostjo, išče maščevanje za hčerko, ki je umrla v politično motiviranem terorističnem napadu. V neutrudnem iskanju hčerinega morilca se zaplete v konflikt z irskim vladnim uradnikom, čigar preteklost bi ga lahko pripeljala do razkritja identitete morilca.
the foreigner_2017.opis_omdb: The story of humble London businessman Quan (Chan), whose long-buried past erupts in a revenge-fueled vendetta when the only person left for him to love - his teenage daughter - is taken from him in a senseless act of politically-motivated terrorism. In his relentless search for the identity of the terrorists, Quan is forced into a cat- and-mouse conflict with a Irish government official (Brosnan), whose own past may hold clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

g.i. jane_1997.opis_neo:
Jordan O'Neil dobi možnost, da kot prva ženska v ameriški zgodovini opravi urjenje, ki so ga deležni vojaki elitne mornariške enote.

Jordan O’Neil (Moore) je častnica ameriške vojske. Ker je ženska, ji niso pustili, da bi se borila v zalivski vojni, sedaj pa ji kljub temu ponudijo možnost, da se kot prva ženska v zgodovini, udeleži urjenja, ki so ga deležni vsi najbolj sposobljeni specialci iz posebne elitne mornariške enote Tjulenji. Tako dobi Jordan možnost, da dokaže, da niso samo moški žilavi in usposobljeni za trd boj. Ostriže si lase in začne s trdnimi pripravami in treningom. Pred njo je skoraj nemogoča naloga, kjer večina, sicer moških udeležencev, že pred koncem urjenja obupa in zapusti enoto. Kmalu spozna, da si pravzaprav nihče, od vplivnih politikov do njenih moških tovarišev, ne želi, da bi ji njen podvig tudi uspel. Vprašanje je, ali ji bo uspelo prestati tako naporen in nepojmljiv test poguma in odločnosti.
g.i. jane_1997.opis_omdb: When a crusading chairperson of the military budget committee pressures the would be Navy secretary to begin full gender integration of the service, he offers the chance for a test case for a female trainee in the US Navy's elite SEAL/C.R.T. selection program. LT. Jordan O'Neill is given the assignment, but no one expects her to succeed in an inhumanly punishing regime that has a standard 60% dropout rate for men. However, O'Neill is determined to prove everyone wrong.

my spy_2020.opis_neo:
Prekaljeni agent CIE se znajde v nemilosti zrele 9-letne deklice, ko pod krinko nadzoruje njeno družino.

Film sledi strogemu agentu CIE (Dave Bautista), ki je poslan na skrito misijo, da bi zaščitil družino 9-letne deklice Sophie (Chloe Coleman), ki pa mu naloge nikakor ne olajša. Ko Sophie v svojem domu odkrije skrite kamere, uporabi vse svoje veščine in trike, da bi ugotovila, kdo jih nadzira. V zameno, da JJ-ja ne razkrinka, želi, da z njo preživi čas in jo nauči, kako postati vohunka.
my spy_2020.opis_omdb: A hardened CIA operative finds himself at the mercy of a precocious 9-year-old girl, having been sent undercover to surveil her family.

16 blocks_2006.opis_neo:
Utrujeni detektiv Jack, ki ima zlomljeno nogo in težave z alkoholom, nekega jutra sprejme na videz lahko nalogo, ki pripelje do velikega zapleta.

Ni hotel drugega, kot priti domov in si privoščiti kozarec pijače. Toda zjutraj so, po nočni izmeni, mačkastemu detektivu Jacku Mosleyju, proti njegovi volji, dodelili navidez preprosto nalogo.
16 blocks_2006.opis_omdb: Jack Mosley, a burnt-out detective, is assigned the unenviable task of transporting a fast-talking convict from jail to a courthouse 16 blocks away. However, along the way he learns that the man is supposed to testify against Mosley's colleagues, and the entire NYPD wants him dead. Mosley must choose between loyalty to his colleagues and protecting the witness, and never has such a short distance seemed so long...

blacklight_2022.opis_neo:
Vladni agent odkrije zaroto, zaradi katere se znajde navzkriž z ljudmi, za katere je nekoč delal.

Problematični Travis Blok je vladni operativec, ki je zadolžen za reševanje tajnih agentov iz nevarnih situacij. Ko odkrije zaroto, namenjeno ameriškim državljanom, se znajde na tarči ljudi, za katere v bistvu dela. Takrat se odloči, da bo sledil agentu in prišel resnici do dna. Resnici, ki bo postavila pod vprašaj tudi njegov moralni kodeks.
blacklight_2022.opis_omdb: Travis Block is a government operative coming to terms with his shadowy past. When he discovers a plot targeting U.S. citizens, Block finds himself in the crosshairs of the FBI director he once helped protect.

weekend in taipei_2024.opis_neo:
Agent DEA John Lawlor se med tajno nalogo zaljubi v Josephine "Joey" Kwang, eno najboljših tajpejskih voznic.

George Huang in Luc Besson predstavljata nov, z adrenalinom in visokimi oktani nabit akcijski spektakel. Vikend misija: Tajpej sledi zgodbi Johna Lawlorja, neustavljivega DEA agenta, in Joey Kang, neustrašne “prevoznice” v Tajpeju. Petnajst let po strastni romanci, ki jo je uničilo kriminalno podzemlje, se znova srečata. V času, ko ju obdajajo nove nevarnosti, morata John in Joey uskladiti svoja ponovno prebujena čustva z nalogo, ki bi jima lahko spremenila življenje. Na živahnih ulicah Tajpeja ta akcijska drama raziskuje, ali se srci, ki sta bili nekoč zlomljeni, lahko znova združita.
weekend in taipei_2024.opis_omdb: A former DEA agent and a former undercover operative revisit their romance during a fateful weekend in Taipei, unaware of the dangerous consequences of their past.

underworld_2003.opis_neo:
Vampirska bojevnica se znajde sredi spora med vampirji in volkodlaki, pri tem pa se zaljubi v človeka, ki ga iz neznanih razlogov lovijo volkodlaki.

V ozadju nevidene stoletne vojne med prefinjenim vampirskim klanom in brutalnim klanom likantropov, Likanov, je smrtonosno mamljiva vampirska morilka in članica elitne enote "Trgovcev s smrtjo" Selena, posvetila svoje življenje uničenju preostalih volkodlakov. S smrtjo likanskega vrhovnega gospodarja Luciana se zdi zmaga vampirjev na dosegu roke; a ko začne njihovega največjega sovražnika zanimati na videz nepomembni človeški zdravnik Michael Corvin, bo Selena razkrila dolgoletno zaroto. Izdaja, prevara in protislovni občutki stojijo na poti do resnice, kar jo prisili v kršitev protokola za dobrobit vampirske rase. Bi lahko prepovedana zveza ogrozila njeno plemenito nalogo? Je to začetek nove dobe in povse drugačne vojne?
underworld_2003.opis_omdb: Against the backdrop of an unseen centuries-old war between the sophisticated Vampire clan and the brutish clan of lycanthropes, the Lycans, the lethally alluring vampire assassin and member of the elite "Death Dealers" squad, Selene, has devoted her existence to eradicating the earth's scattered pockets of remaining werewolves. With the death of the Lycans' supreme overlord, Lucian, the vampires' victory seems near; however, when their arch-enemy takes a special interest in the seemingly harmless human doctor, Michael Corvin, Selene will unearth a long-standing conspiracy. Now, treason, deceit, and conflicting feelings stand in the way of truth, forcing Selene to break protocol for the sake of the vampire race. Can a forbidden relationship put in jeopardy her noble quest? Is this the beginning of a new era, and an entirely different war?

underworld: evolution_2006.opis_neo:
Vampirska bojevnica Selene in Michael, pol človek, pol volkodlak, iščeta namige, ki bi jima pomagali pri odkrivanju zgodovine njunih ras.

Strašno krvno maščevanje je nenehno prisotno v tem nadaljevanju filma o vampirjih. Zgodba se začne tam, kjer se je končala v prvem delu. Med spopadom volkodlakov z vampirji.
underworld: evolution_2006.opis_omdb: As the war between the vampires and the Lycans rages on, the beautiful vampire, Selene, a former member of the Death Dealers, and Michael, the werewolf hybrid, work together in an effort to unlock the secrets of their respective bloodlines. In this ancient feud between the two tribes, they try to unlock the secrets, in a modern tale of action, intrigue, and forbidden love, which takes them into the battle to end all wars, as the immortals must finally face their doom.

wire room_2022.opis_neo:
Zvezni agent na delovnem mestu v nadzorni sobi posluša, kako morilec napade tarčo v njenem domu.

Zvezni agent na delovnem mestu v nadzorni sobi posluša, kako morilec napade tarčo v njenem domu. Zaščititi mora preiskavo in življenje tarče iz prostora, ki je 80 km oddaljen od nje. Bo njegov prvi delovni dan tudi zadnji?
wire room_2022.opis_omdb: While on wire room duty, a federal agent listens in as the target is attacked in his home by a hit squad. Without burning the wire, he must protect the investigation and the target's life from the confines of a room fifty miles away.

fukushima 50_2020.opis_neo:
Medtem ko je svet v grozi opazoval dogajanje, so se delavci v japonski nuklearki sami borili za svoje rojstno mesto in za svoje družine.

Najmočnejši potres v zgodovini Japonske sproži orjaški cunami, ki pogoltne jedrsko elektrarno Fukušima-Daiči. Ker je zmanjkalo elektrike, se jedrski reaktorji niso hladili, kar je povzročilo eksplozijo. Če zapustijo nuklearko, je Japonska uničena. Ker gre za življenje in smrt, delavci ostanejo v elektrarni. Medtem, ko je svet v grozi opazoval dogajanje, se borijo za rojstno mesto in za svoje družine.
fukushima 50_2020.opis_omdb: A tsunami is triggered when a magnitude 9.0 earthquake hits the Pacific Ocean near Japan. A plant manager risks everything and stays put to handle the pending disaster once a reactor begins to leak. He is in contact with the parent utility TEPCO. The Japanese army moves in. The Americans also show up to command the situation. The plant employees fight on.

oss 117 : rio ne répond plus_2009.opis_neo:
Izgubljen v Riu je zaenkrat zadnji film v nizu filmov o agentu de la Bathu.

Zgodba se dogaja leta 1967, ko pošljejo agenta v Latinsko Ameriko, kjer mora poiskati visokega nemškega častnika in nacističnega zločinca, ki je po koncu II. svetovne vojne zbežal nekam v Latinsko Ameriko. Preiskavo prične v Riu de Janeiru in potem ga sledi vodijo preko vse Brazlije do prestolnice Brazilia in slapov Iguazu. Da bi bila njegova naloga še bolj težavna išče vojnega zločinca tudi privlačna agentka Mossada, ki hoče OSS 117 na vsak način prehiteti. In ko se njuni poti križata se iz rivalov spremenita v strastna ljubimca, ki pa seveda na svojo nalogo ne moreta pozabiti.
oss 117 : rio ne répond plus_2009.opis_omdb: Hubert Bonisseur de la Bath, A.K.A. OSS 117, is the French spy considered by his superiors to be the best in the business. The year is 1967 - he's been sent on a mission to Rio de Janeiro, to find a former high-ranking Nazi who went into exile in South America after the war. His eventful investigation takes him all across Brazil, from Rio to Brasilia and the Iguazu Falls, accompanied by a charming Mossad agent who is also looking for the Nazi. The man is charming, and so is the young woman. Set to the strains of bossa nova, their tale is by turns an adventure and a love story.

replicas_2018.opis_neo:
Film obravnava vprašanje vrnitve mrtvih v življenje ter načenja dileme, ki jih prinaša možnost kloniranja človeških bitij.

Priznan nevroznanstvenik William Foster v prometni nesreči izgubi ženo in tri otroke. S pomočjo najboljšega prijatelja in znanstvenika Eda se odloči za tvegan eksperiment – kopiranje njihovih pokojnih teles. Odločen je, da nič ne bo ustavilo njegove namere, tudi če se bo moral po robu postaviti vladnemu laboratoriju, policiji in predvsem zakonom fizike.
replicas_2018.opis_omdb: A daring synthetic biologist, after a car accident kills his family, will stop at nothing to bring them back, even if it means pitting himself against a government-controlled laboratory, a police task force and the physical laws of science.

lakewood_2021.opis_neo:
Amy Carr je na jutranji telovadbi, ko jo pokliče prijateljica z grozljivo novico: policija išče strelca, ki je streljal na srednji šoli.

Policija išče oboroženega napadalca, ki je izvedel streljanja na srednji šoli, katero obiskuje Noah, Amyjin. Globoko sredi gozdnih poti, ki obkrožajo njen dom, kilometre od mesta in v popolni paniki se Amy poskuša čim prej prebiti do šole, da bi se prepričala, ali je njen sin preživel strelni napad ali ne.
lakewood_2021.opis_omdb: Recently widowed mother Amy Carr is doing her best to restore normalcy to the lives of her young daughter and teenage son in their small town. As she's on a jog in the woods, she finds her town thrown into chaos as a shooting takes place at her son's school. Miles away, on foot in the dense forest, Amy desperately races against time to save her son.

killing season_2013.opis_neo:
Robert De Niro in John Travolta v akcijskem trilerju režiserja Nevidnega jezdeca o dveh veteranih vojne v Bosni in Hercegovini.

De Niro igra vojnega veterana Benjamina Forda, ki se je boril v vojni v Bosni in Hercegovini, Travolta pa Srba Emila Kovača. Po vojni se srečata v zakotnem predelu Amerike.
killing season_2013.opis_omdb: Killing Season tells the story of two veterans of the Bosnian War, one American, one Serbian, who clash in the Appalachian Mountain wilderness. FORD is a former American soldier who fought on the front lines in Bosnia. When our story begins, he has retreated to a remote cabin in the woods, trying to escape painful memories of war. The drama begins when KOVAC, a former Serbian soldier, seeks Ford out, hoping to settle an old score. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game in which Ford and Kovac fight their own personal World War III, with battles both physical and psychological. By the end of the film, old wounds are opened, suppressed memories are drawn to the surface and long-hidden secrets about both Ford and Kovac are revealed.

novembre_2022.opis_neo:
5 dni v osrčju francoskih protiterorističnih služb med lovom na osumljence po napadih v Parizu 13. 11. 2015.

Film spremlja francoske protiteroristične službe med lovom na osumljence po terorističnem napadu v Parizu 13. novembra 2015.
novembre_2022.opis_omdb: On November 13, 2015, ten months after the attacks on Charlie Hebdo and the Hyper Cacher at the Porte de Vincennes, three jihadist commandos, divided between the Stade de France, the Bataclan and the terraces of the 10th and 11th ...

donnie darko_2001.opis_neo:
Zgodba se dogaja v majhnem ameriškem mestecu oktobra leta 1988.

Narejen v tradiciji filmov "Stir of Echoes" in "Final Destination" je Donnie Darko močan psihološki triler o najstniku iz predmestja, ki se znajde iz oči v oči s svojo mračno prihodnostjo. Jake Gyllenhaal vodi zasedbo polno zvezd (med SO njimi Drew Barrymore, Noah Wyle, Jena Malone, Patrick Swayze in Mary McDonnell) v vlogi srednješolca, ki ima halucinacije, v katerih ga obiskuje demonski zajec z zloveščimi vizijami preteklosti in prihodnosti. Ta razburljiva stvaritev, ki prItegne s svojo originalnostjo, vas bo držala na robu in vas potem popeljala še korak dlje ...
donnie darko_2001.opis_omdb: Donnie Darko doesn't get along too well with his family, his teachers, and his classmates; but he does manage to find a sympathetic friend in Gretchen, who agrees to date him. He has a compassionate psychiatrist, who discovers hypnosis is the means to unlock hidden secrets. His other companion may not be a true ally. Donnie has a friend named Frank, a large bunny which only Donnie can see. When an engine falls off a plane and destroys his bedroom, Donnie is not there. Both the event, and Donnie's escape, seem to have been caused by supernatural events.

the prodigies_2011.opis_neo:
Peterico izredno nadarjenih mladostnikov s posebnimi močmi sredi Central Parka v New Yorku napadejo neznanci.

Peterico izredno nadarjenih mladostnikov s posebnimi močmi sredi Central Parka v New Yorku napadejo neznanci. Jasnovidni deček Jimbo jim poskuša pomagati, toda ko začne peterica po napadu razmišljati o maščevanju, se Jimbo znajde v moralni dilemi.
the prodigies_2011.opis_omdb: NYC, Central Park, 2010. Five young teenagers are violently assaulted. But they're not your average teenagers - they're prodigies. The trauma of the assault incites them to lash out against the world in a cold and calculating way. The five chillingly brilliant minds come together to concoct a perfect revenge. The only person aware of the pending doom is Jimbo Farrar, a sixth prodigy, who has gathered them. As long as he fights against his five counterparts with all his might, there's hope for the world. But should he turns over to their side, it's only a matter of time before a disaster of apocalyptic proportions ensues.

la ragazza nella nebbia_2017.opis_neo:
Dekle v megli je osupljiv in napet triler, kjer so na koncu vsi liki osumljenci.

Šestnajstletna Anna Lou izgine v zakotnem in osamljenem mestu Avechot, sredi Alp. Policijski inšpektor Vogel, znan po tem, da s svojimi primeri vedno pritegne veliko medijske pozornosti, dobi nalogo, da razišče primer pogrešanega dekleta in ugotovi, ali se med mirnimi prebivalci mesta skriva volk v ovčji preobleki.
la ragazza nella nebbia_2017.opis_omdb: On her way to church in the hazy alpine village of Avechot, the quiet 15-year-old, Anna Lou, daughter of a religious couple, vanishes into thin air, never to return home. To aid in the investigation of this puzzling case is summoned the fastidious Detective Vogel with the questionable methods; however, amidst a full-scale media storm and half-baked leads, no one is above suspicion, villagers and newcomers alike. But is Anna Lou's troubling disappearance a case of an adolescent tantrum only days before Christmas, or is there a wolf in sheep's clothing, hiding in the otherwise peaceful community?

people i know_2002.opis_neo:
Eli Wurman je zelo inteligenten in iznajdljiv novinar, ki zna lepo urejati publicistično življenje bogatim, slavnim in vplivnim, skozi svojo kariero.

Newyorški novinar se znajde sredi boja, ko se njegova najboljša stranka znajde sredi škandala. Kmalu se zave, da ve preveč.
people i know_2002.opis_omdb: Eli Wurman is a decadent drug addicted New Yorker public relation, who is promoting a social event on behalf of Afro-Americans. Along two days of his crazy life, the day of the event and the day before, he makes contacts and favors, 'kissing asses', using drugs etc. Victoria Gray is his widow sister-in-law and passion in the past. Cary Launer is an Oscar winner actor and principal client of Eli. On the day before of the event, Eli finds out secrets that evolve powerful men of America.

terminator 3 : rise of the machines_2003.opis_neo:
John Connor se mora soočiti s terminatorko, ki nadzira vse stroje, pri čemer mu na pomoč ponovno priskoči terminator iz prihodnosti.

Deset let po zadnjem srečanju s terminatorjem John Connor (Nick Stahl) živi kot potepuh, da ga stroji ne bi našli. Toda Skynet v preteklost pošlje novega, izpopolnjenega in še učinkovitejšega terminatorja po imenu T-X (Kristanna Loken), da bi Johna eliminiral.

Istočasno ljudje v preteklost pošljejo terminatorja T-101 (Arnold Schwarzenegger), ki pa v boju s T-X-om nima pretiranih možnosti. Skynet prevzame nadzor nad civilnimi in vojaškimi računalniki in s tem Zemljo prepušča na milost in nemilost strojem, ki počasi prevzemajo nadzor.

Medtem John spozna svojo bodočo ženo Kate Brewster (Claire Danes), katere oče je poveljnik letalskih sil ZDA. Kmalu izbruhne jedrska vojna in boj proti strojem se začne.
terminator 3 : rise of the machines_2003.opis_omdb: More than 10 years after 'Terminator 2', John Connor now exists only as a drifter - living 'off the grid', so no more Terminators from the future can hunt him down. Unfortunately, SkyNet does send another one back - and this one is called the T-X, even more powerful & advanced than the dreaded T-1000. However, another CSM-101 Terminator is also sent back to protect John against the T-X. Now, Skynet is patiently assuming control of civilian computer systems, under the guise of a computer virus. John has also met his future wife, Kate Brewster, whose father - a U.S. Air Force General - is in charge of the military computer systems & is leery of up linking SkyNet. However, when the SkyNet virus infects the U.S military computers & leaves the country open to attack, the machines begin their horrific takeover. Soon a nuclear war will result - and the war against the machines will begin. Can the outdated CSM-101 Terminator eliminate the highly advanced T-X - or will a darker future await man following the nuclear attack?

solace_2015.opis_neo:
FBI agent se pri zapletenem primeru obrne na pomoč jasnovidnega zdravnika, da bi ugotovil zakaj je morilec vedno korak pred pravico.

Preiskava umorov serijskega morilca bega FBI agenta Joeja, zaradi morilčeve nenavadne metode neboleče smrti. Na pomoč pokliče starega prijatelja, upokojenega zdravnika in jasnovidca Johna Clancyja. Ko se vse bolj približujeta zločincu ugotovita, da je tudi ta jasnoviden, in zato vedno korak pred oblastmi.
solace_2015.opis_omdb: A psychic doctor, John Clancy (Sir Anthony Hopkins), works with an F.B.I. Special Agent (Jeffrey Dean Morgan) in search of serial killer Charles Ambrose (Colin Farrell). After having lived in isolation for two years since the death of his daughter, Clancy is asked by his friend Joe, an F.B.I. Special Agent, to help him solve several murders committed by a serial killer. The problem is that Ambrose is also psychic and far ahead of Clancy.

mary_2019.opis_neo:
Družina želi začeti posel s čarterskimi ladjami, zato kupi ladjo, ki pa skriva grozno skrivnost. Te pridejo na plan na odprtem morju.

David je kapitan, ki želi svoji družini omogočiti boljše življenje, zato se odloči začeti posel s čarterskemi plovbami. Na dražbi kupi zapuščeno ladjo, za katero ne ve, da je povezana z grozljivo skrivnostjo. Ta pride na plan na odprtem morju, kjer zlo preži tik pod gladino in začne terorizirati družino, ladjo pa voditi po svoje.
mary_2019.opis_omdb: A family looking to start a charter-boat business buys a ship that holds terrifying secrets once out on isolated waters.

mesrine i: killer instinct_2008.opis_neo:
Zgodba o zloglasnem francoskem državnem sovražniku v sedemdesetih, Jacquesu Mesrinu.

Prvi od obeh delov biografske drame o Jacquesu Mesrinu (1936-1979) prinaša viharni vpogled v življenje karizmatičnega kriminalca, dobro znanega francoskim oblastem. Kljub odsekanemu slogu pripovedi se epizode Mesrinovega življenja odvrtijo dovolj tekoče, da dajo vtis povezane celote. Vincent Cassel, ki je zaradi zahtev vloge dobil in spet izgubil 20 kilogramov, da bi bil podoben Mesrinu v času dveh desetletij, je odličen v službi akcijske pripovedi ter svojega nasilnega in odločnega lika. 

Prvi del filma prinaša neizprosen prikaz Mesrina v njegovem zgodnjem obdobju, ko se zaplete v politične motive in se vdaja uživaškemu življenju, ki ga vleče neizogibni usodi nasproti. Krvavi strelski obračuni, drzni pobegi (iz sodne dvorane sredi zaslišanja, iz zapora ter pred neusmiljenimi preganjalci) in nastopaštvo pred novinarji dokazujejo Mesrinovo samozavest in objestnost.
mesrine i: killer instinct_2008.opis_omdb: Mesrine: Killer Instinct -- the first of two parts -- charts the outlaw odyssey of Jacques Mesrine (Vincent Cassel), the legendary French gangster of the 1960s and 1970s who came to be known as French Public Enemy No. 1 and The Man of a Thousand Faces. Infamous for his bravado and outrageously daring prison escapes, Mesrine carried out numerous robberies, kidnappings and murders in a criminal career that spanned continents until he was shot dead in 1979 by France's notorious anti-gang unit. Thirty years after his death, his infamy lives on. Mesrine was helped along the way by beautiful and equally reckless Jeanne Schneider (CÃ©cile de France), a Bonnie to match his Clyde. Mesrine made up his own epic, between romanticism and cruelty, flamboyance and tragedy.

mesrine ii: public enemy no. 1_2008.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o Jacquesu Mesrinu, najbolj slavnim francoskem gangsterju iz 60-ih in 70-ih let prejšnjega stoletja.

Nadaljevanje biografskega trilerja o največjem gangsterju vseh časov. Za časa življenja je bil Jacques Mesrine proglašen za državnega sovražnika številka ena. Ne zamudite drugega dela zgodbe o človeku s tisoč obrazi, ki nadaljuje svoje neverjetno zločinsko življenje z manipulacijo medijev, vlade in policije. Predvsem je ljubil ženske, orožje in slavo. Ker bi rad zapustil Francijo, načrtuje svoj zadnji in največji beg, tudi od podobe, ki jo je ustvaril sam.
mesrine ii: public enemy no. 1_2008.opis_omdb: The story of Jacques Mesrine, France's public enemy No. 1 during the 1970s. After nearly two decades of legendary criminal feats - from multiple bank robberies and to prison breaks.

this poison will remain (part 1)_2019.opis_neo:
Umor v Parizu nepričakovano prekine Adamsbergovo delo na Islandiji in ga pripelje v Nîmes. Tam so trije starejši moški umrli po ugrizu strupenega pajka. A hitro se pojavi vprašanje, ali je pajkov ugriz res dovolj, da bi razložil njihove smrti.

V muzeju Adamsberg spozna upokojenca, ki mu pove, da sta se dva od umrlih poznala že iz otroštva, ko sta živela v tamkajšnji sirotišnici. Takrat sta bila del majhne, nasilne skupine fantov.

Nato se pojavi še več nejasnosti: tretji moški, ki je umrl zaradi istega strupa, ni bil del njihove skupine, poleg tega pa se ne ujema niti količina strupa, ki bi jo moral pajek vnesti, da bi bil smrtni.

Ko po teh treh smrtih zaradi ugrizov umre še več nekdanjih članov skupine, se Adamsberg loti iskanja resnice o tem, kaj se je v resnici dogajalo v sirotišnici.
this poison will remain (part 1)_2019.opis_omdb: After three elderly men are bitten by spiders, everyone assumes that their deaths are tragic accidents. But at police headquarters in Paris, Inspector Adamsberg begins to suspect that the case is far more complex than first appears.

this poison will remain (part 2)_2019.opis_neo:
Umor v Parizu nepričakovano prekine Adamsbergovo delo na Islandiji in ga pripelje v Nîmes. Tam so trije starejši moški umrli po ugrizu strupenega pajka. A hitro se pojavi vprašanje, ali je pajkov ugriz res dovolj, da bi razložil njihove smrti.

V muzeju Adamsberg spozna upokojenca, ki mu pove, da sta se dva od umrlih poznala že iz otroštva, ko sta živela v tamkajšnji sirotišnici. Takrat sta bila del majhne, nasilne skupine fantov.

Nato se pojavi še več nejasnosti: tretji moški, ki je umrl zaradi istega strupa, ni bil del njihove skupine, poleg tega pa se ne ujema niti količina strupa, ki bi jo moral pajek vnesti, da bi bil smrtni.

Ko po teh treh smrtih zaradi ugrizov umre še več nekdanjih članov skupine, se Adamsberg loti iskanja resnice o tem, kaj se je v resnici dogajalo v sirotišnici.
this poison will remain (part 2)_2019.opis_omdb: Adamsberg is in the Camargue, visiting his brother Raphaël. He discusses his terror attacks and the lack of progress in his investigation. Raphaël reminds him of a story from their childhood: an elderly solitary woman who lived so...

point break_1991.opis_neo:
Agent FBI pod krinko poskuša uloviti tolpo surferjev, ki bi lahko bili bančni roparji.

Johnny Utah je FBI agent, ki mu dodelijo primer tolpe roparjev, za katere je njegov partner prepričan, da so deskarji. Johnny se vtihotapi v njihovo druščino, kjer spozna Bodhija, adrenalinskega odvisnika, ki je za malo vznemirljive akcije pripravljen narediti vse, mogoče celo ropati banke.
point break_1991.opis_omdb: In Los Angeles, California, a gang of bank robbers call themselves The Ex-Presidents. commit their crimes while wearing masks of ex-Presidents Reagan, Carter, Nixon, and Johnson. The F.B.I. believes that the members of the gang could be surfers, and send young Agent Johnny Utah undercover at the beach to mix with the surfers and gather information. Utah meets surfer Bodhi, and gets drawn into the lifestyle of his new friend.

lockout_2012.opis_neo:
Bivšemu agentu Cie, obtoženemu veleizdaje ZDA, ponudijo pomilostitev, če reši predsednikovo hčer iz vesoljskega zapora, kjer divja vstaja.

Agentu CIE Snowu, ki ga po krivici obtožijo zarote in vohunjenja proti ZDA, dajo priložnost prislužiti si nazaj svobodo, ko v zaporu, ki kroži na orbiti 80 km od Zemljinega površja, izbruhne upor. V njem je 500 najnevarnejših zapornikov, uspavanih s posebnim postopkom, toda eden izmed njih se prebudi in organizira vsesplošni upor.
lockout_2012.opis_omdb: In 2079, in Washington, the ex-CIA Operative Snow is brutally interrogated, accused of treason against the United States. The chief of the secret service Scott Langral believes that he shot the agent Frank in a hotel room. Meanwhile, the idealistic daughter of the president of the USA, Emilie Warnock, is visiting MS One, a maximum security prison in outer space expecting to find evidence that the prisoners are actually guinea pigs of a huge corporation. When one of her bodyguards loses a hidden pistol to the dangerous prisoner Hydell, he subdues the staff in the central control room and releases the prisoners, including his brother Alex who becomes the leader of the riot. Now the veteran agent Harry Shaw offers freedom to Snow if he succeeds in rescuing the president's daughter. But the idealistic Emilie does not want to leave MS-One without the hostages.

survivor_2015.opis_neo:
Vladni operativki so za petami plačani morilec, pokvarjena ameriška vlada in policija.

Kate Abott je agentka vladnega oddelka za varnost, ki poskuša preprečiti prihod teroristov na tla ZDA, a postane tarča plačanega morilca. Obenem je obtožena bombnega napada na ameriško veleposlaništvo v Londonu. Vsi njeni zavezniki jo zapustijo in naposled ostane prepuščena sami sebi.
survivor_2015.opis_omdb: A State Department employee newly posted to the American embassy in London is charged with stopping terrorists from getting into the U.S. That puts her right in the line of fire and she is targeted for death and framed for crimes. Discredited, she is forced to go on the run while she tries to clear her name and stop a large-scale terrorist attack set for New Year's Eve in Times Square.

the gift_2000.opis_neo:
Annie, žensko z jasnovidnimi sposobnostmi, moški prosi za pomoč pri iskanju njegove zaročenke, ki je izginila brez sledi.

Že od otroštva ima Annie Wilson (Cate Blanchett) poseben dar napovedovanja prihodnosti, po 20 letih pa njena telepatska sposobnost postane hkrati blagoslov in prekletstvo. V arkansaškem mestecu, v katerem živi, sta neznanje in strah nekatere ljudi prisilila, da jo imajo za čarovnico. Napovedovanje prihodnosti sosedom, ki jo cenijo in razumejo, pa pomeni za mater samohranilko edini vir zaslužka, s katerim lahko skrbi za svoje tri sinove. Po umoru mladega in čednega moškega njegova zaročenka in šerif poprosita Annie za pomoč pri reševanju zločina. Annieine vizije se kmalu spremenijo v hude more. Vidi mrtvo žensko, obešeno na drevesu, in morilca: človeka brez obraza in imena. Annie policijo privede do jezera, kjer najdejo truplo ženske in aretirajo lastnika zemljišča, saj postane glavni osumljenec: nori kmet, ki je že večkrat divjaško pretepel ženo in pretil ter teroriziral Annie. Potem, ko se je kot glavna priča udeležila spektakularnega sojenja, Annie ponoči ne more spati. Naučila se je verjeti svojim občutkom. Prepričana je, da so zaprli napačnega človeka, zato prosi namestnika okrožnega tožilca, naj znova odpre primer. On jo opozori, da bi na ta način lahko sama postala tarča. Možnih osumljencev je veliko, Annie pa je prepuščena samo svojim psihološkim sposobnostim. Nadnaravno postane zastrašujoče resnično, saj se je morilec osredotočil na edino pričo ...
the gift_2000.opis_omdb: When Jessica King goes missing, all eyes turn to Annabelle Wilson. Not as a murder suspect, but as a clairvoyant. Many of the towns folk go to Annabelle for help, and Jessica's fiancée, Wayne Collins, turns to Annabelle for possible guidance. Annabelle feels that she can't help, but this doesn't stop her from constantly getting visions of Jessica's fate.

maggie moore(s)_2023.opis_neo:
Policijski načelnik Sanders preiskuje nenavadna umora dveh žensk z istim imenom in razkrije mrežo malomeščanskih laži.

Zgodba se odvija v prašnem puščavskem mestecu, kjer se nič ne dogaja, dokler ne doleti policijskega načelnika soočenje z umoroma dveh žensk z enakim imenom. "En umor je zločin. Dva umora sta misterij."
maggie moore(s)_2023.opis_omdb: Police Chief Sanders investigates the bizarre murders of two women with the same name and unravels a web of small-town lies. He meets and quickly falls for Rita, a nosy neighbor who is eager to help solve the mystery.

gremo mi po svoje 2_2013.opis_neo:
Taborniki iz rodu Zvitega svizca s svojim tečnim Starešino spet taborijo v Posočju, kjer se zapletejo v nove prepire, norčije in dogodivščine.

Idilično taborjenje zmoti prihod štajerskih tabornikov in njihovega tekmovalno nastrojenega Šefa, ki si je takoj v laseh s Starešino.
