Toda ko najdeta skupnega sovražnika, drobnjakarsko Inšpektorico, obsedeno z novimi evropskimi taborniškimi pravili, hitro združita moči. Ko se izgubi skupina najmlajših tabornikov, postane vse skupaj še živahnejše.
gremo mi po svoje 2_2013.opis_omdb: Going Our Way 2 follows the adventures of young scouts spending summer at a camp in the middle of the idyllic Slovene Alps. Because the heroes from the first film, Aleks, Jaka and Sleepyhead, are almost grown up now, the scout leader charges them with new responsibilities and assignments that also involve taking care of a group of mischievous 10-year-olds, which proves to be quite a feat. sequel of Going Our Way.

captain corelli's mandolin_2001.opis_neo:
Ljubezen se rodi med častnikom italijanske vojske Antoniom Corellijem in trmasto Grkinjo Pelagio

Nicolas Cage in Penelope Cruz bosta predstavila ljubezensko zgodbo, postavljeno v čas 2. svetovne vojne, med italijansko okupacijo Grčije. 

Ko se Corelli in njegovi možje izkrcajo na neokrnjenem grškem otoku, jih Pelagia in domačini sprva zavračajo. Vendar italijanski šarm in strast do življenja naredita svoje. 

Še posebej Corelli s svojo prijaznostjo in z igranjem na mandolino osvoji srca domačinov. A tudi na idiličnem otoku se kmalu razbesni vojna, ki mir med domačini in italijanskimi vojaki postavi na preizkušnjo.
captain corelli's mandolin_2001.opis_omdb: In 1941, Italy allies with Germany and ruthlessly conquers the much weaker country of Greece. On a remote Greek island, an Italian artillery garrison is established to maintain order. One Italian officer, Captain Corelli, adopts an attitude of mutual co-existence with the Greeks and engages in such activities as music festivals and courting the daughter of a local doctor. In 1943, however, after Italy surrenders to the Allies and changes sides in the war, Captain Corelli must defend the Greek island against a German invasion.

sreča na vrvici_1977.opis_neo:
Sreča na vrvici je legendarni mladinski film.

Glavni junak filma je Matic, ki sam z mamo živi v blokovskem naselju v Ljubljani, oče pa je službeno v tujini. Matičevo življenje se nenadoma spremeni, ko ga k sodelovanju povabijo filmarji. Izberejo ga za glavno vlogo, z njim pa zaigra tudi velik dresiran novofundlanec Jakob. 

Jakob in Matic se tako navežeta eden na drugega, da Maticu psa na koncu kar podarijo. Takrat pa se začnejo težave. Jakob v bloku zaradi lajanja in razgrajanja ni priljubljen, zato sosedi vztrajajo, da mora oditi. Še bolj se zaplete, ko Matičeva mama da oglas v časopis, da prodaja psa. Zato morajo Matic in njegovi prijatelji ukrepati.
sreča na vrvici_1977.opis_omdb: This film takes place in Ljubljana, the capital of Slovenia. Matic lives in a large neighbourhood of concrete blocks of flats with his mother. As his father is temporarily working in Libya, they live alone. Matics' otherwise monotonous life changes dramatically when he is chosen to feature in a film. At the shooting he meets Milena, a girl his own age whom he begins to like. When the shooting is over, the film company gives him a present, a huge black Newfoundlander. Although his mother is not really pleased about it, Matic brings the dog home. And that is just the beginning of their adventures...

estrellita_2007.opis_neo:
Dora Fabiani je učiteljica klavirja, ki je bila trideset let poročena z uspešnim violinistom Mihaelom Fabianijem.

Po moževi nepričakovani smrti pa odkrije, da ni bila edina ženska v njegovem življenju, kar jo globoko prizadane. Kmalu potem se v njenem življenju pojavi Amir iz revne delavske družine, ki bi rad vsaj enkrat zaigral na Fabianijevi dragoceni violini. 

Dora v njem začuti pravega naslednika za ta instrument. Poskrbi za njegovo glasbeno šolanje in budno spremlja njegov razvoj. A potem Dorinega sina Julijana zamika velika vrednost stare italijanske violine, zato zahteva svojo polovico.
estrellita_2007.opis_omdb: A widow grieves, discovers her deceased spouse's secret, and builds a relationship with a talented boy who used to play the violin with her husband in a local bar.

šepet metulja_2023.opis_neo:
Mladinski film Šepet metulja govori o sanjah, vztrajanju in premagovanju ovir.

Jan je 17-letni navdušenec mehatronike in najstnik avtist. Pridruži se razredu, ki za podelitev štipendije v mednarodnem podjetju tekmuje v razvoju programske opreme sodobnega prezračevalnega sistema s pogonom na umetno inteligenco.

Razred vodi neizprosni učitelj Frenk, ki ne odobrava posebnih potreb učencev in hodi po robu z drugačnimi metodami pouka. Jan kljub vsem oviram učitelja in sošolcev dokaže, da zmore. 

S pomočjo ambiciozne svetovalne delavke Zarje počasi napreduje v šoli in se zbliža tudi z direktorjem podjetja, ki ga vzame pod svoje okrilje.
šepet metulja_2023.opis_omdb: Jan is an 18-year-old mechatronics enthusiast and autistic teenager. He joins a class competing for a scholarship in an international company in the development of software for a modern system powered by artificial intelligence.

le loup et le lion_2021.opis_neo:
V osrčju kanadske divjine mlado dekle reši volčjega mladiča in izgubljenega levčka.

Po dedkovi smrti se sklene 20-letna Alma vrniti v nekdanji dom iz otroštva, na otoček sredi kanadske divjine. Tam iz ostankov letala reši levčka, poleg tega pa se v njenem varstvu znajde tudi mladiček volka. 

Alma volka poimenuje Mozart, leva pa Dreamer. Vse bi bilo idilično, če ne bi bil lev namenjen cirkusu, volk pa znanstveniku, ki želi ohraniti redko polarno vrsto … Bo Almi uspelo obdržati oba živalska prijatelja in ju zaščititi?
le loup et le lion_2021.opis_omdb: A wolf pup and a lost lion cub are rescued by a girl in the heart of the Canadian wilderness. Their friendship will change their lives forever.

just go with it_2011.opis_neo:
Da bi prikril laž, ki jo je povedal svojemu dekletu, Danny prepriča svojo asistentko, da igra vlogo njegove žene, od katere se ločuje.

Estetski kirurg Danny (Adam Sandler) se zaljubi v mlajšo učiteljico in prosi asistentko Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), da bi zaigrala njegovo skorajšnjo nekdanjo ženo, da bi tako zakril svoje nesramne laži.
just go with it_2011.opis_omdb: Danny (Adam Sandler) must engage Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his faithful assistant, to pretend to be his soon to be ex-wife. Danny must pretend that he is married, because he lied to his dream girl, Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) the most gorgeous woman in the world. To keep the woman he loves, covering up one lie soon turns into many lies.

blue streak_1999.opis_neo:
Gobezdavi Logan je pred dvema letoma komaj ušel smrti, ko je šel po zlu njegov skrbno načrtovan rop več milijonov dolarjev vrednega diamanta.

Tat nakita Miles sanja o velikem plenu, ki mu bo omogočil beg daleč stran v Mehiko in razkošno življenje. Ko gre skrbno načrtovani rop 20 milijonov vrednega diamanta po zlu, Miles komaj odnese celo kožo. Ko ga pohlepni Deacon izda, Miles zbeži v bližnjo zgradbo in tam skrije dragoceni kamen, preden ga primejo. Ne ve, da je to nova postaja losangeleške policije. Ko dve leti pozneje pride iz zapora, se Miles predstavi kot detektiv Malone, da bi prišel do diamanta, ki ga je skril v prezračevalnem jašku na moškem stranišču. Slučajno ujeme osumljenca na begu in navduši policijskega poveljnika, ki ga poviša in mu dodeli partnerja, mladega detektiva Carlsona. Stvari se še bolj zapletejo, ko se pojavi Milesov nekdanji pajdaš in zahteva svoj delež.
blue streak_1999.opis_omdb: Miles Logan is a jewel thief who just hit the big time by stealing a huge diamond. However, after two years in jail, he comes to find out that he hid the diamond in a police building that was being built at the time of the robbery. In an attempt to regain his diamond, he poses as an L.A.P.D. detective...

the devil's own_1997.opis_neo:
Frankie Maguire je mlad terorist, pripadnik Irske republikanske armade, ki pobegne v Ameriko, kjer mora nakupiti mora orožje in ga dostaviti na Irsko.

V Ameriki se Frankie zateče k simpatizerju IRE Petru Fitzsimmonsu, ta pa ga pripelje k Tomu O'Mearu, ki je pošten newyorški policist irskega rodu. Tom fantu na stežaj odpre vrata svojega doma, čeprav ne ve nič o njegovi preteklosti. 

S Frankiejem nepričakovano postaneta dobra prijatelja. Toda njuno prijateljstvo je zaradi Frankiejevih laži, njegove skrivne naloge in nasilnega sveta, ki mu pripada, obsojeno na propad. Ko Tom izve resnico o svojem novem prijatelju, ga čaka težka odločitev.
the devil's own_1997.opis_omdb: A thriller about an IRA gunman who draws an American family into the crossfire of terrorism. Frankie McGuire is one of the IRA's deadliest assassins. But when he is sent to the U.S. to buy weapons, Frankie is housed with the family of Tom O'Meara, a New York cop who knows nothing about Frankie's real identity. Their surprising friendship, and Tom's growing suspicions, force Frankie to choose between the promise of peace or a lifetime of murder.

the taking of pelham 123_2009.opis_neo:
Denzel Washington igra newyorškega odpravnika podzemske železnice Walterja Garberja.

Walter je delavec na podzemni železnici v New Yorku. Ko neko popoldne štirje oboroženi moški na Manhattnu ugrabijo enega od vlakov, je Walter tisti, ki mora komunicirati z njihovim vodjo.
the taking of pelham 123_2009.opis_omdb: In early afternoon, four armed men hijack a subway train in Manhattan. They stop on a slight incline, decoupling the first car to let the rest of the train coast back. Their leader is Ryder; he connects by phone with Walter Garber, the dispatcher watching that line. Garber is a supervisor temporarily demoted while being investigated for bribery. Ryder demands $10 million within an hour, or he'll start shooting hostages. He'll deal only with Garber. The mayor okays the payoff, the news of the hostage situation sends the stock market tumbling, and it's unclear what Ryder really wants or if Garber is part of the deal. Will hostages, kidnappers, and negotiators live through this?

marauders_2016.opis_neo:
FBI preiskuje niz smrtonosnih bančnih ropov in kmalu ugotovi, da imajo storilci še drugotne namene.

Ko visoko usposobljeni in nasilni roparji oropajo banko Hubert National Bank, ne vzamejo le treh milijonov dolarjev, ampak hkrati razkrijejo ozadje ugrabitve Alexandra, brata lastnika banke Jeffreyja Huberta. Rop preiskuje skupina zveznih agentov pod vodstvom Jonathana Montgomeryja, ki odkrije, da se za bančnim ropom skriva velika zarota.
marauders_2016.opis_omdb: As several branches of Cincinnati's Hubert National Bank are hit by a string of brutal and well-orchestrated bank robberies, FBI's special agent, Jonathan Montgomery, along with his partner, Stockwell, and the inexperienced operative, Wells, try to shed light on a seemingly straightforward case of armed robberies. However, little by little--as the sparse evidence point to the organisation's powerful CEO, Jeffrey Hubert--it becomes obvious that a mysterious and well-connected player will do anything in his power to keep his guilty secrets safe. Does the secretive banker know more than he is letting on?

salt_2010.opis_neo:
Evelyn Salt, vrhunska agentka Cie, se znajde v smrtonosni igri, ko prebegli ruski vohun v zameno za zaščito razkrije pomembno novico

Agentka CIE postane tarča na lovu lastnih delodajalcev, potem ko jo obtožijo vohunstva za rusko stran. Na begu mora uporabiti vso spretnost, da zavaruje družino in najde pravega izdajalca, preden agencija odstrani njo samo.
salt_2010.opis_omdb: Evelyn Salt is a CIA agent and highly respected by all, including her boss, Ted Winter. Out of the blue, a Russian spy walks into their offices and offers a vital piece of information: the President of Russia will be assassinated during his forthcoming visit to New York City to attend the funeral of the recently deceased U.S. Vice President. The name of the assassin: Evelyn Salt. Concerned about the safety of her husband, who she cannot contact, she goes on the run. Winter refuses to accept that she is a mole or a double agent but her actions begin to raise doubts. Just who is Evelyn Salt and what is she planning?

the marine 6: close quarters_2018.opis_neo:
Zvezdnik rokoborbe Mike Mizanin se vrača v novi napeti pustolovščini marinca Carterja.

Bivša marinca Jake Carter in Luke Trapper sta prisiljena združiti svoje smrtonosne veščine, da bi rešila ugrabljeno dekle iz rok tolpe mednarodnih teroristov.
the marine 6: close quarters_2018.opis_omdb: Jake Carter and another former Marine, Luke Trapper, join forces to rescue a kidnapped girl from a gang of international criminals.

world war z_2013.opis_neo:
Na čisto običajen dan se nekdanji preiskovalec OZN Gerry Lane z družino znajde v prometni gneči in kmalu zasluti, da se dogaja nekaj sumljivega.

Uslužbenec Združenih narodov in družinski človek Gerry, mora po izbruhu skrivnostne okužbe, ki ljudi spreminja v žive mrtvece, potovati po svetu, da bi zaustavil pandemijo zombijev. Ti namreč rušijo vojske in vlade, ter ogrožajo obstoj človeštva. Medtem, ko Gerry išče rešitev za človeštvo, se v neposredni nevarnosti znajde tudi njegova družina.
world war z_2013.opis_omdb: Life for former United Nations investigator Gerry Lane and his family seems content. Suddenly, the world is plagued by a mysterious infection turning whole human populations into rampaging mindless zombies. After barely escaping the chaos, Lane is persuaded to go on a mission to investigate this disease. What follows is a perilous trek around the world where Lane must brave horrific dangers and long odds to find answers before human civilization falls.

raw deal_1986.opis_neo:
Nekdanji agent FBI, ki je postal šerif majhnega mesta, se strinja, da bo šefu FBI, ki so mu ubili sina, pomagal prodreti v čikaško mafijo.

Arnold Schwarzenegger igra bivšega FBI agenta Marka Kaminskyja, ki je izgubil službo, potem ko se je znesel nad osumljencem zlorabljenega dekleta. 

Toda ko se šef FBI-ja odloči obračunati z mafijo, v strelskem obračunu izgubi sina, ki ga umori kruti mafijec Luigi Patrovita. Da bi se maščeval, Marku obljubi nekdanjo službo, če bo opravil z mafijci.
raw deal_1986.opis_omdb: Dishonoured and forcibly retired from the FBI on grounds of excessive brutality, the former agent Mark Kaminski, is now reduced to a small-town Sheriff. However, when Chief Harry Shannon, an old friend from the bureau whose son Blair Shannon was murdered by the mob, turns to Mark for help, the tough Sheriff who is always ready for action, will see this offer as a chance to his reinstatement. In this deadly and unofficial assignment, Mark has to infiltrate Luigi Patrovita's powerful mob family to tear it apart, while forcing his way through the crime organization as the mysterious Joseph P. Brenner. Now, he has to stay away from the law without blowing his cover, but is it wise to give Mark a raw deal?

volcano_1997.opis_neo:
Los Angeles. Tu niste varni ne pred potresi, ne pred požari, ne pred plazovi.

Los Angeles. Marsikdo ob njem pomisli na filmske zvezde in bleščeče zabave, le malokdo pa na to, da je mesto tudi epicenter skoraj vseh naravnih katastrof. Tu niste varni ne pred potresi, ne pred požari, ne pred plazovi. 

Mesto čaka nova katastrofa apokaliptičnih razsežnosti. Izbruhne vulkan, ki med nič hudega slutečimi prebivalci nenadoma povzroči pravi kaos. Tommy Lee Jones poskuša v zmešnjavo vnesti nekaj reda, a nima lahke naloge, saj vroča lava zalije ceste in mesto spremeni v pravi goreči pekel.
volcano_1997.opis_omdb: Something unspeakably chilling is ultimately starting to heat up at The City of Los Angeles! Beneath the famed La Brea Tar Pits, a raging volcano has formed, raining a storm of deadly fire bombs and an endless tide of white-hot lava upon the stunned city!

old_2021.opis_neo:
V nadnaravni drami scenarista in režiserja M. Nighta Shyamalana se nekaj družin med počitnicami na skrivnostni plaži srhljivo hitro stara.

Družina na počitnicah odkrije samotno rajsko plažo. A začnejo se dogajati strašne stvari, ko ugotovijo, da so ujeti in se nekako postarajo za eno leto vsakih trideset minut.
old_2021.opis_omdb: This summer, visionary filmmaker M. Night Shyamalan unveils a chilling, mysterious new thriller about a family on a tropical holiday who discover that the secluded beach where they are relaxing for a few hours is somehow causing them to age rapidly - reducing their entire lives into a single day.

d-tox_2002.opis_neo:
Agent FBI Jake Malloy nikakor ne more priti na sled serijskemu morilcu, ki pobija njegove kolege policiste.

Ko zločinec ubije tudi njegovo zaročenko Mary, Malloy tega ne more preboleti, zato tolažbo poišče v alkoholu. Ker tako ne gre več naprej, ga kolega, detektiv Hendricks, odpelje na zdravljenje na kliniko v zasneženi Wyoming, kjer se zdravijo policisti. 

A morilec se vtihotapi tja in policisti so ponovno v nevarnosti. Malloy se tako spet znajde sredi nočne more in odločen je, da bo temu naredil konec.
d-tox_2002.opis_omdb: FBI agent Jake Malloy just can't nail a serial killer who's been targeting cops. The killer has already killed nine cops. Not only does the killer despise policemen, but he also has a grudge against Malloy for pursuing him during a string of prostitute murders four years ago. The killer finally decides to hit Malloy where it hurts, killing one of Malloy's friends on the force, and brutally killing Malloy's fiancé Mary. The grief sends Malloy off the deep end and causes him to become alcoholic, forcing Malloy's colleague, Detective Hendricks, to sign Malloy up at a remote detox clinic in a snow-covered part of Wyoming. The clinic specializes in rehabilitating alcoholic cops. But the killer murders another patient and assumes the patient's identity at the clinic. While Malloy participates in group therapy sessions, the killer starts killing the patients. Among the endangered patients are Jaworski, Slater, Noah, Conner, and a dozen others, one of whom must be the killer. One by one, the patients start falling prey to the killer and, starting with the facility's director, Doc, the killer starts targeting the staff as well.

lost treasure of jesse james_2020.opis_neo:
Ko nepremičninarji ogrozijo njihove družinske domove, se skupina otrok odpravi iskat skrivnostni zaklad bratov James.

V družinski pustolovščini mora skupina otrok iz zakotja Misurija razrešiti stoletno skrivnost o zakladu Jesseja Jamesa, da bi rešili svoje družine, prijatelje in okrožje Ford. Prebiti se morajo skozi starodavne jame in ubežati lovcem na zaklade, ki so jim tik za petami, ali pa bodo za vedno pogubljeni.
lost treasure of jesse james_2020.opis_omdb: A backwoods team of Missouri kids race to solve a 100 year old mystery and save their friends in this family friendly action adventure. Chased deep into ancient caves they must escape treasure hunters hot on their trail or be lost forever.

miami supercops_1985.opis_neo:
Obsojeni bančni ropar takoj po izpustu iz zapora postane žrtev morilca. Agenta FBI se pod krinko lotita preiskave.

Bivši zapornik se po sedmih letih zaporne kazni zaradi kraje 20 milijonov dolarjev vrne v Miami - kjer ga kmalu zatem umorijo. Dva agenta FBI nato odpotujeta v Miami, da bi primer preiskala pod krinko policistov.
miami supercops_1985.opis_omdb: In 1978, $20 million was stolen from a Detroit bank. One of the robbers was caught, one was found dead, and the third disappeared. The money was never found. Seven years later, the robber who was caught was released from jail. He immediately went to Miami, only to be found dead the next day. Now FBI agents Doug Bennet and Steve Forest have been called in to investigate the case while posing as Miami police officers. Somewhere in Miami the third robber is hiding with his $20 million, and he has a seven-year head start on the authorities.

my one & only_2019.opis_neo:
Stephanie in Oliver iščeta ljubezen v resničnostni oddaji "Tisti pravi". Kaj pa njun čedni vodič Alex?

Stephanie in Oliver skušata ugotoviti, ali sta si usojena. Medtem pa preskočijo iskrice med Stephanie in Alexom, postavnim lastnikom ranča, ki je njun vodnik.
my one & only_2019.opis_omdb: The One," Stephanie (Hutton) and Oliver try to determine if they're fated to be together. Meanwhile, sparks fly between Stephanie and Alex (Page), the handsome ranch owner who acts as their guide.

clifford, the big red dog_2021.opis_neo:
Osnovnošolka dobi v dar rdečega kužka Clifforda, ki čez noč zraste v orjaškega psa in vse mesto zaplete v napeto dogodivščino.

Ko si osnovnošolka Emily Elizabeth zaželi, da bi njen mali, rdeči kužek zrasel v velikega in mogočnega psa, ne pričakuje, da bo v svojem malem stanovanju v New Yorku našla tri metre visokega psa. V prizadevanju, da bi obdržala svojega ljubljenčka, se Emily odloči poiskati čarobnega oskrbnika živali, za katerega upa, da bo lahko Clifforda vrnil v normalno velikost.
clifford, the big red dog_2021.opis_omdb: As middle schooler Emily Elizabeth struggles to fit in at home and at school, she discovers a small red puppy who is destined to become her best friend from a magical animal rescuer. When Clifford becomes a gigantic red dog in her New York City apartment and attracts the attention of a genetics company who wish to supersize animals, Emily and her clueless Uncle Casey have to fight the forces of greed as they go on the run across New York City and take a bite out of the Big Apple. Along the way, Clifford affects the lives of everyone around him and teaches Emily and her uncle the true meaning of acceptance and unconditional love. Based on the beloved Scholastic character, Clifford will teach the world how to love big.

southside with you_2016.opis_neo:
Zgodba o nekem popoldnevu, ko je Barack Obama, bodoči predsednik ZDA, osvojil srce bodoče žene Michelle na njunem prvem zmenku v južnem delu Chicaga.

Poleti leta 1989 Barack Obama, novinec na pravni fakulteti Harvard, dobi službo v odvetniški pisarni v Chicagu, kjer dela tudi mlada Michelle Robinson. Po nekaj obotavljanja Michelle sprejme Obamovo povabilo na potovanje, ki ji bo za vedno spremenilo življenje.
southside with you_2016.opis_omdb: Chronicles the 1989 summer afternoon when the future President of the United States, Barack Obama, wooed his future First Lady, Michelle Obama, on a first date across Chicago's South Side.

gamer_2009.opis_neo:
V prihodnosti so obsojenci na smrt prisiljeni služiti kot marionete igralcem v strelski videoigri, da bi si priborili svobodo.

V bližnji prihodnosti najbolj priljubljena računalniška strelska igra poteka s pomočjo zapornikov, obsojenih na smrtno kazen, katerih telesa nadzorujejo bogati igralci. S 27 zmagami vodi ujetnik Kable, toda uporniki, ki nasprotujejo zlorabam ljudi, mu uspejo sporočiti, da konca igre ne bo dočakal živ. Kable se upre in uspe pobegniti, toda ob tem odkrije temačno zaroto, ki utegne ogroziti prihodnost človeštva, zato se odloči uporabiti svoje bogate uničevalske izkušnje in ustaviti negativce.
gamer_2009.opis_omdb: Ken Castle is extremely rich, popular, and powerful since he invented and started exploiting the virtual online parallel reality games. In these games, people can either pay to be a user or get paid to be an 'actor' in a system of mind-control. In the ultimate version, Slayers, death row convicts act as gladiators in a desperate dim bid for survival, which no one has achieved yet. The champion, John 'Kable' Tillman, is scheduled to die just before he'd gain release, but he persuades his teenage 'handler' to hand over the reins so he can fully use his talents and experience. Kable escapes to freedom, but Castle's men chase him. Kable has to fight his way back to Castle's headquarters to challenge his hidden evil plans.

fast five_2011.opis_neo:
Brian in Dom načrtujeta krajo stotih milijonov pokvarjenemu brazilskemu poslovnežu, medtem ko ju preganja agent diplomatske varnostne službe.

Dom (Vin Diesel) je zbral ekipo najboljših dirkacev na svetu, a policija jim je za petami. Ko se policija pribluje, morajo Dom in ekipa poraziti mocnega preprodajalca, da bi si oprali ime.
fast five_2011.opis_omdb: Former cop Brian O'Conner partners with ex-con Dom Toretto on the opposite side of the law. Since Brian and Mia Toretto broke Dom out of custody, they've blown across many borders to elude authorities. Now backed into a corner in Rio de Janeiro, they must pull one last job in order to gain their freedom. As they assemble their elite team of top racers, the unlikely allies know their only shot of getting out for good means confronting the corrupt businessman who wants them dead. But he's not the only one on their tail. Hard-nosed federal agent Luke Hobbs never misses his target. When he is assigned to track down Dom and Brian, he and his strike team launch an all-out assault to capture them. But as his men tear through Brazil, Hobbs learns he can't separate the good guys from the bad. Now, he must rely on his instincts to corner his prey... before someone else runs them down first.

mr. & mrs. smith_2005.opis_neo:
Zdolgočasen par ugotovi, da sta ju najeli različni agenciji, da umorita drug drugega.

Johnu in Jane Smith postaja zakonsko življenje na smrt dolgočasno, kar pa ne velja za njuno poklicno življenje. Oba sta namreč profesionalna morilca, a tega drug o drugem ne vesta. Ne zavedata se niti tega, da delata za sovražni strani. Ko dobita novo nalogo odkrijeta, da sta drug drugemu naslednja tarča.
mr. & mrs. smith_2005.opis_omdb: John and Jane Smith are a normal married couple, living a normal life in a normal suburb, working normal jobs...well, if you can call secretly being assassins "normal". But neither Jane nor John knows about their spouse's secret, until they are surprised to find each other as targets! But on their quest to kill each other, they learn a lot more about each other than they ever did in five (or six) years of marriage.

the black dahlia_2006.opis_neo:
Zasebno in poklicno življenje dveh policistov visi na nitki, ko začneta preiskavo umora, imenovano Črna dalija.

Črna dalija je izmišljena zgodba o obsedenosti, ljubezni, korupciji, pohlepu in izprijenosti, spletena okrog resnične zgodbe o krutem umoru vzhajajoče hollywoodske zvezdice, ki je leta 1947 šokiral in fasciniral državo in ostaja do danes nerazrešen.
the black dahlia_2006.opis_omdb: In 1946, the former boxers Dwight "Bucky" Bleichert and Lee Blanchard are policemen in Los Angeles. Lee has a good relationship with his chief and uses a box fight between them to promote the department and get a raise to the police force. They succeed and are promoted to homicide detectives, working together. Bucky becomes a close friend of Lee and his girlfriend Kay Lake, forming a triangle of love. When the corpse of the aspirant actress Elizabeth Short is found mutilated, Lee becomes obsessed to solve the case called by the press Black Dahlia. Meanwhile, Bucky's investigation leads him to a Madeleine Linscott, the daughter of a powerful and wealthy constructor that resembles the Black Dahlia. In an environment of corruption and lies, Bucky discloses hidden truths.

s.w.a.t._2003.opis_neo:
Nova ekipa specialcev mora prepeljati mamilarskega kralja, ki ponuja 100 milijonov dolarjev, če ga kdor koli osvobodi.

V napetem akcijskem trilerju - ki temelji na uspešni televizijski nanizanki iz 70-ih – mora nova ekipa specialcev zveznim agentom izročiti razvpitega preprodajalca, ki ponuja 100 milijonov dolarjev vsakomur, ki bi ga uspel rešiti. Jim Street (Colin Farrell – "Govorilnica", "Dom na koncu sveta") je nekdanji pripadnik specialcev, ki so ga po sporni odločitvi med ropom, kjer je bilo v nevarnosti življenje številnih talcev, izključili iz ekipe. Street dobi priložnost, da se ponovno izkaže, ko komandir Dan Harrelson – "Hondo" (oskarjev nominiranec Samuel L. Jackson - "Šund") dobi nalogo rekrutirati in izuriti pet najboljših policistov za novo paravojaško enoto za specialno orožje in taktiko. Drugi člani posebne enote so še Deacon Kaye – "Deke" (James Todd Smith oz. LL Cool J – "Za vsako ceno"), Chris Sanchez (Michelle Rodriguez – "Valovi smrti"), Michael Boxer (Brian Van Holt – "Glavni v hiši") in T.J. McCabe (Josh Charles – "O kot Othello"). Po več tednih zahtevnega telesnega urjenja se nova ekipa S.W.A.T. kmalu znajde sredi vročega dogajanja, ko razvpit preprodajalec mamil (Olivier Martinez – "Nezvesta", "Preden se znoči") ponudi 100 milijonov dolarju vsakomur, ki bi ga uspel osvoboditi iz pripora.
s.w.a.t._2003.opis_omdb: Based off of a one time T.V. show, two Los Angeles S.W.A.T. officers Jim Street and Brian Gamble were sent in to foil an extremely violent bank robbery. Although they thwarted the robbery, they shot a hostage in the process. Street was suspended from S.W.A.T. while Gamble was fired altogether. After 6 months, a veteran S.W.A.T. officer, Daniel Harrelson or "Hondo", is told to assemble a S.W.A.T. team for his division. He chooses other S.W.A.T. officers as well as 3 rookies. However, after they pass the S.W.A.T. training, they receive a message that a French crime boss, known as Alex Montell is trying to escape from prison. This will not be easy to prevent, especially after Montell promises $100 Million to his rescuers.

pay it forward_2000.opis_neo:
Deček skuša izboljšati svet, ko mu učitelj ponudi to možnost.

Pridno hodi v šolo, kjer ga učitelj Eugene Simonet spodbudi, naj najde idejo, kako bi spremenil svet. Seveda mora svojo zamisel uresničiti, zato si Trevor izmisli nekaj preprostega, a učinkovitega. Za naključno izbrane ljudi začne izvajati dobra dela. V svoj načrt vplete tudi Simoneta, ki se mu zdi pravi moški za njegovo mamo. A kljub vsej dobroti Trevor spozna, da prijaznost in dobri nameni včasih nimajo najboljšega učinka.
pay it forward_2000.opis_omdb: Young Trevor McKinney, troubled by his mother's alcoholism and fears of his abusive but absent father, is caught up by an intriguing assignment from his new social studies teacher, Mr. Simonet. The assignment: think of something to change the world and put it into action. Trevor conjures the notion of paying a favor not back, but forward--repaying good deeds not with payback, but with new good deeds done to three new people. Trevor's efforts to make good on his idea bring a revolution not only in the lives of himself, his mother and his physically and emotionally scarred teacher, but in those of an ever-widening circle of people completely unknown to him.

jerry maguire_1996.opis_neo:
Ko športni menedžer doživi moralno razsvetljenje in ga odpustijo, se odloči preizkusiti svojo novo filozofijo z edinim športnikom, ki ostane z njim.

Športnega agenta odpustijo. S svojo najmanj pomembno stranko in edino osebo iz nekdanjega podjetja, ki še verjame vanj, mora Jerry začeti na novo.
jerry maguire_1996.opis_omdb: Jerry Maguire (Tom Cruise) is a successful sports agent. The biggest clients, the respect, a beautiful fiancée, he has it all. Until one night he questions his purpose. His place in the world, and finally comes to terms with what's wrong with his career and life. Recording all of his thoughts in a mission statement, Jerry feels he has a new lease on life. Unfortunately his opinions aren't met with enthusiasm from his superiors and after dishonorably being stripped of his high earning clients and elite status within the agency, Jerry steps out into the sports business armed with only one volatile client, Rod Tidwell (Cuba Gooding, Jr.), and the only person with belief in his abilities, Dorothy Boyd (Renée Zellweger), with the impossible task of rebuilding what he once had. Along the way, he faces the harsh truth which he'd ignored in the past and a host of hardships that he'd never faced before.

guess who_2005.opis_neo:
Sarkastičen oče ima marsikaj za povedati o svoji hčerki, ki se želi poročiti z belcem.

Percy in Marilyn Jones pripravljata zabavo ob 25. obletnici svoje poroke, njuna hči Theresa pa ob tej priložnosti pripelje domov svojega fanta Simona. A Jonesova, ki sta Afroameričana, ne vesta, da je fant njune hčerke belec. Theresa in Simon prav tako načrtujeta oznanitev zaroke, o čemer starša ne vesta nič.

Percy, ki je tudi sicer vedno nezaupljiv do katerega koli hčerinega fanta, začne vohuniti za Simonom in izve, da je mladenič nedavno ostal brez službe ...
guess who_2005.opis_omdb: Percy and Marilyn are renewing their vows for their anniversary, and their daughter Theresa brings her boyfriend Simon for them to meet. Unbeknownst to her parents, the kids plan to announce their engagement during the weekend. The Jones family is Black; Theresa neglects to tell them Simon is White. Race complicates Percy's general mistrust of any boyfriend, so he instigates an investigation of Simon, discovering he's recently lost his job and hasn't told Theresa. Mistrust rears its ugly head, and in the process of Theresa and Simon's argument, Marilyn and Percy fall out. What can the men do to cross the divide between each other and between men and women? Will anyone be exchanging vows?

little black book_2004.opis_neo:
Da bi izvedela več o preteklosti svojega fanta, ženska izmakne njegov dlančnik in v njem najde številke vseh njegovih bivših.

Sally Holt brska po fantovih stvareh in slučajno najde seznam vseh njegovih bivših punc, kar jo prisili, da skupaj s sodelavko Barb razišče, zakaj njen novi fant skriva svoje bivše.
little black book_2004.opis_omdb: Trentonian Stacy Holt's life has been guided by two general items. One is her father abandoning the family when she was young, leading to her and her mother turning to the music of Carly Simon to cope, and she having had a history of unsatisfying romantic relationships in not having a suitable male role model. The other is her idolization of Diane Sawyer, who she has long wanted to work alongside as a serious journalist. Her personal life seems to have finally overcome the issue of her father with the entrance of Derek into her life, he, a scout for the New Jersey Devils, her boyfriend who she knew was her soul mate when they met, they now living together. Things are not going as well on the professional front, she having just left a dead end job to work among the large stable of associate producers on the syndicated Trenton-based daytime talk show "Kippie Kann Do!!", whose show topics are outrageous, the more outrageous the better. Stacy's tenure with the show is even more tenuous as Kippie herself has been the fodder for the tabloids, Stacy further learning that someone on staff has been feeding the tabloids those stories in trying to push Kippie out with cause as there is five years left in her contract. When Stacy learns that Derek once dated supermodel Lulu Fritz, who has appeared on the talk show circuit, including on Kippie's show, in discussing her bulimia, Stacy begins to wonder what else about his dating past Derek has failed to mention. This item comes to a head when Stacy has access to Derek's palm pilot to discover that he has been in recent contact with at least two former girlfriends, both equally as successful as Lulu, and neither which Derek had ever mentioned let alone about this recent contact. In general discussion with her work colleagues in a show idea of snooping in a significant other's little black book to discover what secret life that person may be leading, Stacy, with her two confidantes among those colleagues, Barb Campbell-Dunn and Ira Nachlis, by her side, goes about delving further into Derek's proverbial little back book - his palm pilot - by contacting those former girlfriends under an assumed name to find out more information about their relationship with Derek under the guise of possible appearances on Kippie's show about their work lives. Beyond the issue of if the secrets Derek may be keeping are a bigger picture of the doomed fate of their relationship, Stacy may discover more about herself and her life in general, partly in relation to the issue of the old quote, "luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity".

murder in charentes_2022.opis_neo:
Cyrila med vadbo tai chija v tilnik zadene palica za golf in ga ubije. Preiskavo zaupajo noseči vdovi Maud Arthuis.

Cyril, star 38 let, izvaja svoj Tai-Shi v kotu parka posestva Manoir. Golf palica udari Cyrila po tilniku in ga v trenutku ubije. Preiskava je zaupana Maud Arthuis.
murder in charentes_2022.opis_omdb: Cyril is doing his Taï-Chi in a corner of the Domaine du Manoir. A golf club slams into the back of his neck, killing him with a deadly blow. The investigation is entrusted to Maud Arthuis, who is more than 8 months pregnant but w...

an easter bloom_2024.opis_neo: Vrtnarka tekmuje na Velikonočnem cvetličnem tekmovanju, da bi rešila družinsko kmetijo. Pastor pa ji pomaga najti upanje, ki ga je skoraj izgubila.
an easter bloom_2024.opis_omdb: A young gardener sets out to save her family farm by entering a floral competition for Easter. She meets a local pastor along the way who helps her restore the hope she lost.

the magic of lemon drops_2024.opis_neo: Natakarica Lolly upa na lepše življenje in ponovno srečanje s sosedom Roryjem. Čarobne sladkarije tete Gerte pokažejo Lolly drugačno življenje.
the magic of lemon drops_2024.opis_omdb: When Lolly's Aunt Gert gives her four magical lemon drops, she gets to experience what her life would have been like if she had made different choices and lived those unfulfilled dreams.

with love, your sweetly salted_2023.opis_neo: Da bi se odkupila, pošlje urednik ocenjevalko restavracij Alison pod krinko delat za chefa, ki mu je neupravičeno očrnila restavracijo.
with love, your sweetly salted_2023.opis_omdb: Alison remains notoriously anonymous when critiquing restaurants. But when she accidentally goes viral for trashing a new restaurant, her editor insists she make amends by going undercover as a prep cook for the chef she maligned.

legend of the lost locket_2024.opis_neo: Britanska starinarka Amelia pride v mestece v Novi Angliji, ker išče obesek, ki naj bi lastniku prinesel resnično ljubezen, in kmalu najde oboje.
legend of the lost locket_2024.opis_omdb: When an antiques expert takes on a quest to find a long-lost locket that promises to bring the wearer true love, she finds herself in conflict with, but also attracted to, the town sheriff.

butlers in love_2022.opis_neo:
Ko Emma in Henry tekmujeta, se med njima zaiskrijo romantične iskre, medtem ko se urita za kraljeva butlerja na prestižni akademiji.

Na prestižni akademiji, kjer se učijo za kraljeve služabnike, se iskri med marljivo Emme Conroy in upornim Henryjem Walkerom.
butlers in love_2022.opis_omdb: Follows Emma and Henry as they train to become royal butlers; the competition is fierce and sparks fly.

les mystères de la chorale_2020.opis_neo: 18-letno Kurdinjo Sabryo umorijo na njeni poti domov po pevskem zboru. Caroline Jeune, žandarska kapitanka, prevzame svoj prvi primer umora.
les mystères de la chorale_2020.opis_omdb: Caroline Jeune, a gendarme captain, takes on her first murder. An 18-year-old Kurdish woman, Sabrya, was murdered on her way home from the choir she sang in.

love in bangkok_2020.opis_neo: Ko mlado francosko arhitektko Lauro Brunel pošljejo v Bangkok, da bi pripravila načrte za nakupovalno središče, sreča Marca in se vanj noro zaljubi.

love, take two_2019.opis_neo: Lily sodeluje v resničnostni TV oddaji na temo poroke, vendar mora ponovno pretehtati svoje odločitve, ko je njen bivši izbran za naslednjega ženina.
love, take two_2019.opis_omdb: Reality TV show runner, Lily, heads to her small College town to film her latest show. She soon finds that one contestant is her ex-boyfriend, Scott. Even if he's supposed to be married on television, they can't deny their chemistry.

les mystères des majorettes_2019.opis_neo: V majhnem mestu pride do tragedije, ko v bližini posestva gospe Li, kitajske vinogradnice, ki tam živi že 15 let, najdejo truplo mažoretke.
les mystères des majorettes_2019.opis_omdb: In a small town in the south-west of France tragedy strikes. The body of a young majorette is found near the property of Mrs Li, a Chinese wine grower settled in the region for 15 years.

love in andalusia_2019.opis_neo: Ko Laurina sestra Claire izgine en teden pred svojo poroko, Laura združi moči z ženinom, da bi jo našla, a stvari ne gredo po načrtih.

the wedding cottage_2023.opis_neo: Ustvarjalka poročnega vodiča mora prepričati lastnika zapuščene poročne hišice, da jo prenovi in v njej organizira sanjsko poroko zmagovalnega para.
the wedding cottage_2023.opis_omdb: A wedding guide creator must convince an uninspired artist and owner of a special wedding cottage to renovate the run down cottage to host a contest winning couple for their dream wedding.

meurtres au mont-saint-michel_2022.naslov_sl: Umor v Mont-Saint-Michelu: Umori na Mont-Saint-Michelu
meurtres au mont-saint-michel_2022.opis_neo:
Zaradi primera umora se kapitanka Sophie Maliquot vrne v kraj, kjer je odraščala, in kmalu posumi, da lokalni duhovnik ve več, kot želi povedati.

Kapitanica Sophie Maliquot preiskuje umor z mističnim prizoriščem. Sreča očeta Florentina, karizmatičnega duhovnika, ki izvaja izganjanje hudiča in noče izdati svojih vernikov. Ta duhovnik jo izjemno intrigira, vendar si niti ne predstavlja, da ju povezuje težka skrivnost ...
meurtres au mont-saint-michel_2022.opis_omdb: A seemingly mystical murder takes Captain Sophie Maliquot back to the Mont-Saint-Michel region where she spent part of her childhood and where her father, who died years earlier, is buried.

love in focus_2023.opis_neo: Ko njeno oddajo ukinejo, se Jenna odloči umakniti se v gorsko kočo. A zaradi zapleta jo mora deliti s čednim fotografom.
love in focus_2023.opis_omdb: Jenna after finding out her hit show has been canceled, retreats to a mountain cabin where due to a mix up, must share it with a handsome nature photographer. After initially colliding they make the most of it and end up falling i...

passport to love_2024.opis_neo: Potopisca se spreta zaradi najema hiše na plaži, toda ko raziskujeta otok, se med njima zaiskri. Bo njuna ljubezen preživela pritisk službe?
passport to love_2024.opis_omdb: A successful international travel writer, Nicole, has scored a dream seaside rental to research her newest vacation article only to discover it has accidentally been booked also by Kade, a marketing rep for a competing travel maga...

matchmaker mysteries: the art of the kil.naslov_orig: Matchmaker Mysteries: The Art Of The Kill
matchmaker mysteries: the art of the kil.opis_neo:
Angie Dove, njen oče Nick in detektiv Carter v muzeju preiskujejo umor, krajo, izsiljevanje in goljufijo.

Organizatorka zmenkov slavnih Angie Dove (Danica McKellar) se znajde sredi še enega primera umora – tokrat v muzeju, kjer njen oče, upokojeni policijski detektiv Nick Columba (Bruce Boxleitner), preiskuje serijo majhnih tatvin. Žrtev umora, Clinton Jennings, je bil priznani arheolog, ki ga je muzej najel, da bi potrdil verodostojnost in izvor nekaterih nedavnih muzejskih pridobitev, etruščanskih kipov. Medtem ko detektiv Kyle Carter (Victor Webster) preiskuje primer njegove smrti, tudi Angie neuradno sodeluje v preiskavi s svojimi neprekosljivimi sposobnostmi opazovanja človeškega vedenja, da bi Carterju pomagala priti do resnice in ga vodila do storilca.
matchmaker mysteries: the art of the kil.opis_omdb: Angie Dove, her father, and Detective Carter investigate murder, theft, blackmail and fraud at the museum.

ruthless realtor_2020.opis_neo:
Trdosrčna nepremičninska posrednica Andrea Crowley poskuša raziskovalcu nadnaravnega naprtiti hišo, v kateri naj bi strašilo, a jo čaka presenečenje.

Annie in Ralph se preselita v hišo svojih sanj, vendar njuno srečo zmoti nepremičninska agentka Meg, ki se zdi, da je obsedena z njima in jima povzroča vedno več nelagodja, trdi, da ju nekdo želi ubiti. Program je podnaslovljen na strani 777 TLV.
ruthless realtor_2020.opis_omdb: A young couple unknowingly buy a house from a seemingly benign, but manipulative, estate agent, putting their lives in danger.

love and jane_2024.opis_neo: Lilly je tekstopiska in strastna bralka, ki doživi presenečenje, ko se njena najljubša avtorica, Jane Austen, nenadoma pojavi v njenem življenju.
love and jane_2024.opis_omdb: Lilly, a hopeless romantic and literary enthusiast, is surprised when her wish to talk to her favorite author comes true and Jane Austen herself appears in her life.

paging mr. darcy_2024.opis_neo: Dr. Eloise Cavendish se udeleži plesa Jane Austen, da bi spoznala dr. Victorio Jennings, ki bi ji lahko pomagala do službe na Princetonu.
paging mr. darcy_2024.opis_omdb: A love of Jane Austen's stories helps two people to overcome their pride and admit to their belief in love.

made for you, with love_2019.opis_neo:
Amanda ima podjetje z rabljenimi poročnimi oblekami, ki revnejšim nevestam pomaga uresničiti sanje. Zaradi spodletele zaroke je previdna pri ljubezni.

Amanda je lastnica trgovine z rabljenimi poročnimi oblekami, ki jim vdihne novo življenje in jih proda nevestam, ki si ne morejo privoščiti dragih oblek. Ker je Amanda dobrega srca, se pogosto spoprijatelji s svojimi strankami, včasih jim obleke celo podari. 

Zato se kmalu znajde v finančnih težavah, izhod pa ji ponudi James, poročni fotograf, ki se ponudi, da bo njen butik fotografiral za revijo. Čeprav si ne želi publicitete, Amanda nima izbire in privoli. Kmalu se z Jamesom zbližata. 

Amanda spozna, da je veliko več kot ciničen fotograf, ki ga zanima samo zaslužek. Ko se uredniki revije odločijo Amando izkoristiti za poceni publiciteto, od vsega dvigne roke. Amanda in James spoznata, da sta zaljubljena in Amanda kmalu dobi priložnost preizkusiti svojo poročno obleko.
made for you, with love_2019.opis_omdb: A used-wedding-gown-business owner breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

the professional bridesmaid_2023.opis_neo: Maggie Bailey, profesionalno družico, najamejo za poroko. Svojo identiteto mora skrivati pred vsemi, tudi pred privlačnim novinarjem.
the professional bridesmaid_2023.opis_omdb: When a Professional Bridesmaid books a high-profile wedding, she must keep her true identity a secret, not only from the wedding party but also from the handsome reporter covering the event.

love in mauritius_2020.opis_neo: Doria, mama in žena prešuštniškega moža odpotuje na Mavricij, da bi pobegnila stresu vsakodnevnega življenja in nepričakovano najde ljubezen.
love in mauritius_2020.opis_omdb: Doria lives in Paris with Alexis and their daughter Alba.Today Doria has gone to her job and her boss doesn't want to give her the duty of the promotion of a new product.In the night there is her birthday party, all friends have c...

meurtres sur les îles du frioul_2021.naslov_orig: Meurtres sur les îles du Frioul
meurtres sur les îles du frioul_2021.opis_neo:
Priznani literarni urednik organizira kulturni dogodek na otočju Frioul v počastitev Alexandra Dumasa - med igro ga najdejo mrtvega na odru.

Sredi gledališke predstave "Grof Monte Cristo" je marsejski založnik najden mrtev na otokih Frioul. Victor Mariani, poveljnik policije v Marseillu, vodi preiskavo, medtem ko se sooča z drugo uganko: prisotnostjo svojega očeta, Pierra Marianija, med gledalci. Igralska zasedba: Francis Huster (Pierre Mariani), Jeremy Banster (Victor Mariani), Myra Bitout (Yasmine Cherfaoui), Avy Marciano (Sylvain Verdier), Nathalie Roussel (Françoise Verdier) Žanr: kriminalka
meurtres sur les îles du frioul_2021.opis_omdb: A famous editor from Marseille hosts a cultural event about Alexandre Dumas on the Frioul islands, with a play based on The Count of Monte-Cristo as the highlight of the day. In the middle of the show, the editor's body is found o...

love in monaco_2020.opis_neo: Potem ko zadene precej denarja, Mehdi, ki živi z mamo, odpotuje v igralnico v Monako in se predstavlja za maroškega princa.
love in monaco_2020.opis_omdb: Mehdi lives with his mother in the suburbs of Paris. He plays poker online. After a lucky strike he decides it is time to risk it all in Montecarlo.

murder in marie-galante_2021.opis_neo: Na otoku Marie-Galante v Gvadelupu lokalna policija začne preiskavo, ko najdejo utopljenega vzgojitelja, ki je delal s težavno mladino.
murder in marie-galante_2021.opis_omdb: The body of Roméo Saldes, an educator for troubled teenagers, is found drowned in the Punch Pond. Captain Ophélie Villedieu is in charge of the case, assisted by Alban, her young Guadeloupean subordinate.

love in vienna_2018.opis_neo:
Melodie je pomočnica produkcije, ki ji šef naloži, da mora najti pianista, ki je pred 10 leti izginil, in ga prepričati, naj zaigra na koncertu.

Mélodie je mlada vdova, katere šef želi, da ji pripelje pianista, ki je pred leti bil na vrhuncu svoje slave. Za to nalogo pa ima na voljo le tri dni.
love in vienna_2018.opis_omdb: Mélodie, a production assistant hounded by a tyrannical boss, is tasked with hunting down pianist Michaël Grimaud, who fell off the radar ten years ago. If the young widowed mother can find Michaël and convince him to perform at a...

les mystères de l'école de gendarmerie_2.naslov_orig: Les Mystères de l'École de Gendarmerie
les mystères de l'école de gendarmerie_2.opis_neo: Emma in Adrien morata preložiti svoj romantični pobeg, ko je Adrien poklican, da razišče smrt inštruktorja na žandarmerijski akademiji.
les mystères de l'école de gendarmerie_2.opis_omdb: Emma and Adrien are all set for a romantic getaway. But then Adrien is called to investigate a murder, after an instructor is found hanged at the gendarme academy.

the whole nine yards_2000.opis_neo:
Življenje zobozdravnika se postavi na glavo, ko izve, da je njegov novi sosed Jimmy poklicni morilec, ki se skriva pred nevarno mafijsko družino.

Življenje nesrečnega zobozdravnika se obrne na glavo, ko njegov sosed postane znani gangster. Po ženinem prigovarjanju zloglasnega mafijskega šefa obvesti, kje se omenjeni gangster nahaja.
the whole nine yards_2000.opis_omdb: Montreal, Canada. A down-on-his luck dentist, "Oz" Oseransky (Matthew Perry), discovers that his new neighbor is Jimmy "The Tulip" Tudeski (Bruce Willis), former mob-contract-killer-turned-police-informant upon whose head the Hungarian mob has put a steep price. Egged on by his loathsome wife, Sophie (Rosanna Arquette), Oz sets off to Chicago to let the mob know where The Tulip is and hopefully claim part of the reward.

the hunted_2003.opis_neo:
Zasledovalec iz FBI skuša ujeti izurjenega morilca, ki se preizkuša v lovu na ljudi.

Nekdanji trener vojaških specialcev, ubijalcev, L.T. Bonham, se je umaknil v samoto, na sever Amerike, v divjino, daleč od sveta.

Ko se zgodi nenavaden, kulten umor dveh nedeljskih lovcev, način uboja močno spominja na metode vojaških specialcev. Zaradi tega poiščejo L.T.-ja, ki naj bi pomagal izslediti storilca. Tudi L.T.-ju je jasno, da gre za njegovega človeka, in v zaraščenem gozdu odkrije Aarona, ki je bil med najbolj nadarjenimi vojaki. Zvezna policija hoče Aarona privesti pred sodišče, toda vojska se temu upre, saj gre vendar za njihovega človeka, ki pa se ni mogel upreti sli po ubijanju.

Med prevozom v vojaški zapor uspe Aaronu pobegniti in spet je L.T. tisti, ki se odpravi na lov za podivjanim ubijalcem.
the hunted_2003.opis_omdb: After a spate of grisly murders performed in an almost ritualistic way, the experienced survival expert and former military instructor, L.T. Bonham, is summoned to track down the elusive and shockingly familiar killer: one of his best pupils, Aaron Hallam. Holed up in the wet and tangled wilderness of Oregon's Silver Falls State Park, Aaron--now a tormented and delusional killing machine--will soon come face-to-face with his grizzled mentor, in a no-holds-barred hand-to-hand combat. Suddenly, age; experience; strength, and the feral will to survive, blur the line between a hunter and his prey. Now, who is the hunted?

blade runner 2049_2017.opis_neo:
Mladi iztrebljevalec K odkrije dolgo zakopano skrivnost, zato poišče nekdanjega iztrebljevalca Ricka Deckarda, ki je že 30 let pogrešan.

Mlad iztrebljevalec odkrije dolgo zakopano skrivnost, ki ga vodi v iskanje nekdanjega iztrebljevalca Ricka Deckarda, ki je izginil pred 30 leti.
blade runner 2049_2017.opis_omdb: Thirty years after the events of Blade Runner (1982), a new Blade Runner, L.A.P.D. Officer "K" (Ryan Gosling), unearths a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge what's left of society into chaos. K's discovery leads him on a quest to find Rick Deckard (Harrison Ford), a former L.A.P.D. Blade Runner, who has been missing for thirty years.

les aventures de rabbi jacob_1973.opis_neo:
Fanatični Francoz se znajde na begu pred skupino morilcev - in policijo. Izdajati za mora za priljubljenega rabina.

Francoz se znajde v nenavadni situaciji: med begom pred morilci in policijo mora oponašati znanega rabina.
les aventures de rabbi jacob_1973.opis_omdb: In this riot of frantic disguises and mistaken identities, Victor Pivert, a blustering, bigoted French factory owner, finds himself taken hostage by Slimane, an Arab rebel leader. The two dress up as rabbis as they try to elude not only assasins from Slimane's country, but also the police, who think Pivert is a murderer. Pivert ends up posing as Rabbi Jacob, a beloved figure who's returned to France for his first visit after 30 years in the United States. Adding to the confusion are Pivert's dentist-wife, who thinks her husband is leaving her for another woman, their daughter, who's about to get married, and a Parisian neighborhood filled with people eager to celebrate the return of Rabbi Jacob.

beowulf_1999.opis_neo:
V oblegani deželi se mora Beowulf boriti proti grozljivemu bitju Grendelu in njegovi maščevalni mami.

Beowulf osvobodi princeso Pendro in se skupaj z njo odpravi v boj proti zli pošasti Grendelu in njegovi materi, ki želi krvavo maščevati usodo sina. Grendela podpira tudi zloglasni kralj Hrothgar, ki želi izkoristiti Grendelovo moč, da bi zavladal deželi. Zato se morata Beowulf in Pendra boriti s Hrothgarjem in njegovimi bojevniki z nevarnim borcem Rolandom na čelu ter s Hrothgarjevo hčerko Kyro, ki je hladnokrvna in kruta morilka.
beowulf_1999.opis_omdb: This post-apocalyptic future story is based on the 8th century Saxon epic poem about the knight who battled a monster in a medieval castle. In this story, Beowulf is a wanderer who learns about a man-eating creature called Grendel which comes in the night to devour warriors trapped at the Outpost. The Outpost is ruled by Hrothgar. He has a daughter, whose husband may have been murdered by the Outpost's master of arms.

mr. bones 3: son of bones_2022.opis_neo: Prerok poskusi svojo modrost prenesti na sina.
mr. bones 3: son of bones_2022.opis_omdb: A seer attempts to pass on his wisdom to his son.

waterworld_1995.opis_neo:
V prihodnosti je Zemlja pokrita z vodo in mutirani Mariner se mora boriti proti lakoti in odpadnikom, ženski in deklici pa pomaga poiskati kopno.

Led na tečajih se je stopil in tako je Zemljo povsem prekrila voda. Tisti, ki so preživeli, plujejo po širnem morju in poskušajo preživeti. Preostanek človeštva se je razdelil na različne združbe. Pomorščak, osamljeni popotnik, je bil navajen na samotarsko življenje na svojem, za življenje na odprtem morju prirejenemu plovilu. Po napadu zlobnega Deacona in njegovih divjih mož na eno od človeških kolonij, pa pomorščak dobi družbo, saj se mu na njegovem plovilu pridružita ženska in malo dekle, za kateri mora sedaj skrbeti. A za petami so jim tudi Deacon in njegovi možje. Ti so namreč prepričani, da jih bo mala deklica s svojim zemljevidom, vtetoviranim na hrbtu, pripeljala do kopnega, ki se skriva nekje sredi širnih morij.
waterworld_1995.opis_omdb: The polar ice caps have melted, and the earth is covered by water. The remaining people travel the seas, in search of survival. Several different societies exist. The Mariner falls from his customary and solitary existence into having to care for a woman and a young girl while being pursued by the evil forces of the Deacon.

grown ups_2010.opis_neo:
Ko jim umre srednješolski košarkarski trener, pet dobrih prijateljev in bivših soigralcev skupaj preživi praznični vikend ob dnevu neodvisnosti.

Ob smrti srednješolskega košarkarskega trenerja, se pet bivših soigralcev in prijateljev ponovno sestane po tridesetih letih. Dogovorijo se, da bodo praznik neodvisnosti preživeli skupaj in svojim otrokom pokazali dogodivščine iz njihove mladosti.
grown ups_2010.opis_omdb: In 1978, five 12-year-olds win a CYO basketball championship. Thirty years later, they gather with their families for their coach's funeral and a weekend at a house on a lake where they used to party. By now, each is a grownup with problems and challenges: Marcus is alone and drinks too much. Rob, with three daughters he rarely sees, is always deeply in love until he turns on his next ex-wife. Eric is overweight and out of work. Kurt is a househusband, henpecked by wife and mother-in-law. Lenny is a successful Hollywood agent married to a fashion designer with three kids and his two sons take their privilege for granted. Can the outdoors help these grownups rediscover connections or is this chaos in the making?

van helsing_2004.opis_neo:
Sloviti lovec na pošasti gre v Transilvanijo ustavit grofa Drakulo, ki uporablja odkritja dr. Frankensteina in volkodlake za svoje zle namene.

Van Helsing je lovec na pošasti, ki dobi od tajne organizacije nalogo, da v mračni Transilvaniji porazi zle sile. Tam prepozna svet, ki še vedno tiči v preteklosti in v katerem so legendarna bitja nekaj povsem običajnega.
van helsing_2004.opis_omdb: Van Helsing is in the world to rid all evil, even if not everyone agrees with him. The Vatican sends the monster hunter and his ally, Carl, to Transylvania. They have been sent to this land to stop the powerful Count Dracula. Whilst there they join forces with a Gypsy Princess called Anna Valerious, who is determined to end an ancient curse on her family by destroying the vampire. They just don't know how!

robin hood_2010.opis_neo:
V Angliji 12. stoletja se Robin s svojo tolpo spopada s korupcijo v domačem kraju in vodi upor proti kralju, ki bo za vedno spremenil ravnovesje moči.

Robin Hood, vojaški lokostrelec in zaščitnik revnih ter izkoriščanih, se po dolgoletnih bojih v tujini vrne v domači kraj, ki ga terorizira zlobni nottinghamski šerif. S pomočjo somišljenikov se odloči osvoboditi ljudi, a naleti na srdit vojaški odpor, ki vodi v krvavo bitko.
robin hood_2010.opis_omdb: Birth of a legend. Following King Richard's (Danny Huston's) death in France, archer Robin Longstride (Russell Crowe), along with Will Scarlet (Scott Grimes), Allan A'Dayle (Alan Doyle), and Little John (Kevin Durand), returns to England. They encounter the dying Sir Robert Loxley (Douglas Hodge), whose party was ambushed by treacherous Godfrey (Mark Strong), who hopes to facilitate a French invasion of England. Robin promises the dying knight he will return his sword to his father Sir Walter Loxley (Max von Sydow) in Nottingham. Here, Sir Walter encourages him to impersonate the dead man to prevent his land being confiscated by the crown, and he finds himself with Marion (Cate Blanchett), a ready-made wife. Hoping to stir baronial opposition to weak Prince John (Oscar Isaac) and allow an easy French take-over, Godfrey worms his way into the Prince's service as Earl Marshal of England and brutally invades towns under the pretext of collecting Royal taxes. Can Robin navigate the politics of barons, royals, traitors, and the French?

hellboy_2004.opis_neo:
Demon, ki so ga kot majhnega rešili iz rok nacistov, ki so ga priklicali na svet, odraste v zaščitnika pred temačnimi silami.

Ob koncu druge svetovne vojne se nacisti poslužijo še zadnjega upanja – uporabe črne magije. Med njihovim eksperimentom, majhen demon prestopi iz onostranstva v trenutku, ko zavezniki vdrejo v taborišče. Hellboy se nato pridruži zavezniškim silam in sčasoma odraste v polnoletnost, ter postane borec proti temnim silam.
hellboy_2004.opis_omdb: At the end of World War II, Nazi officers Karl Ruprecht Kroenen and Ilsa Haupstein start an experiment to raise the forces of Hell trough Russian dark mystic Rasputin on a Scottish island, but it's interrupted by an allied commando guided by professor Trevor "Broom" Bruttenholm. He prevents killing the human-demonic half-blood, which was accidentally created and raises this "Hellboy", while rising to head of a secret C.I.A.-linked U.S. agency Bureau of Paranormal Research, which secretly studies and uses the occult, including supernatural freaks. As "father" Broom is aging, he hand-picks brilliant, sensitive Agent John Myers as new minder-companion, as regular "warrior" Agent Clay can't empathize and lacks flexibility mental. Hellboy is quite a handful, regularly spotted by worried civilians on unauthorized excursions, especially to pyro-telekinetic freak friend in a mental asylum. Johnny, Hellboy, and Clay team up on missions against paranormal threats with aquatic-bionic freak Abe Sapien. Their task proves to be daunting, as monster Sammael multiplies every time it "dies", while Rasputin and the Nazis reemerge, armed for revenge.

blood and bone_2009.opis_neo:
Bivši zapornik se pridruži losangeleškemu podtalnemu pretepaškemu svetu, da bi izpolnil obljubo, ki jo je dal mrtvemu prijatelju.

Skrivnostni mojster borilnih veščin pride v center Los Angelesa in se vključi v svet uličnih dvobojev, ki jih vodi nevarni vodja tolpe. To je film o urbanem samuraju, ki združuje nevarni svet skrivnostnih borb pod nadzorom mafijcev, ki se odvijajo v zakotnih ulicah Los Angelesa z zavidljivo vizualno akcijo in zgodbo, ki bo gledalce ponesla v svet borilnih veščin. Nihče ne ve, od kod prihaja Isaiah Bone, niti kje se je učil veščin. Vedo le, da so prvič srečali takšnega borca in verjetno tudi zadnjič. Ko pride Bone na ulice Los Angelesa, kmalu izve, da James, mestni gospodar mamil in prostitucije, vlada trdosrčno in z nasiljem s kultom brutalnih uličnih borb za denar in brez pravil.
blood and bone_2009.opis_omdb: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

first blood_1982.opis_neo:
Veterana zelenih baretk krut šerif in njegovi namestniki prisilijo, da zbeži v gore in se sam spusti v boj proti svojim zasledovalcem.

John Rambo je vietnamski veteran, eden izmed najboljših med Zelenimi baretkami.
first blood_1982.opis_omdb: John J. Rambo is a former United States Special Forces soldier who fought in Vietnam and won the Congressional Medal of Honor, but his time in Vietnam still haunts him. As he came to Hope, Washington to visit a friend, he was guided out of town by the Sheriff William Teasel who insults Rambo, but what Teasel does not know that his insult angered Rambo to the point where Rambo became violent and was arrested. As he was at the county jail being cleaned, he escapes and goes on a rampage through the forest to try to escape from the sheriffs who want to kill him. Then, as Rambo's commanding officer, Colonel Samuel Trautman tries to save both the Sheriff's department and Rambo before the situation gets out of hand.

terminator 2: judgment day_1991.opis_neo:
Terminator se tokrat vrača na Zemljo s povsem drugačnim motivom - rešiti Johna Connorja.

Kiborg, enak tistemu, ki mu ni uspelo ubiti Sarah Connor, mora zdaj varovati njenega desetletnega sina Johna pred še naprednejšim in močnejšim kiborgom.
terminator 2: judgment day_1991.opis_omdb: Over ten years have passed since the first machine called The Terminator tried to kill Sarah Connor and her unborn son, John. The man who will become the future leader of the human resistance against the Machines is now a healthy young boy. However, another Terminator, called the T-1000, is sent back through time by the self-aware computer system, Skynet. This new Terminator is more advanced and more powerful than its predecessor and its mission is to kill John Connor when he's still a child. However, Sarah and John do not have to face the threat of the T-1000 alone. Another Terminator (identical to the same model that tried and failed to kill Sarah Connor in 1984) is also sent back through time to protect them. While John teaches the Terminator about humanity, Sarah tries to prevent the creation of Skynet and the Machines.

thirteen days_2000.opis_neo:
Oktobra 1962 Kennedyjeva administracija skuša zajeziti kubansko raketno krizo.

Oktobra leta 1962 so ameriška vohunska letala fotografirala namestitev sovjetskih jedrskih raket na Kubi. Jedrski arzenal zbran na otoku pred ZDA bi lahko v nekaj minutah uničil vzhodne in južne države ameriške federacije. Bela hiša s predsednikom John F. Kennedyjem in njegovimi svetovalci mora nemudoma poskrbeti za obrambo. 

Pentagonski jastrebi mu svetujejo napad na Kubo, kar bi omogočilo ponovno invazijo na otok. Kennedy nasprotuje takšni operaciji, saj bi se Sovjeti lahko maščevali nad Evropo, ki je znotraj dometa njihovih jedrskih raket in tako popolnoma izpostavljena. Zdi se, da je jedrski spopad neizogiben. Ga lahko še kaj prepreči? Je med glavnimi akterji dovolj razuma, da ustavijo svetovno morijo?
thirteen days_2000.opis_omdb: In October, 1962, U-2 surveillance photos reveal that the Soviet Union is in the process of placing nuclear weapons in Cuba. These weapons have the capability of wiping out most of the Eastern and Southern United States in minutes if they become operational. President John F. Kennedy and his advisors must come up with a plan of action against the Soviets. Kennedy is determined to show that he is strong enough to stand up to the threat, and the Pentagon advises U.S. military strikes against Cuba--which could lead the way to another U.S. invasion of the island. However, Kennedy is reluctant to follow through, because a U.S. invasion could cause the Soviets to retaliate in Europe. A nuclear showdown appears to be almost inevitable. Can it be prevented?

rat race_2001.opis_neo:
Igralniški magnat v Las Vegasu je odločen, da bo našel novo pot za stave - začne se lov za denarjem.

Lasvegaški igralniški magnat, Donald Sinclair, se je odločil, da bo osrečil svoje najbolj zveste kockarje, zato si izmisli nov, kvazi-legalen športni dogodek - Divjo dirko.
rat race_2001.opis_omdb: Donald P. Sinclair has placed six separate gold coins in different slot machines in his casino. The lucky six who find these coins discover an opportunity of a lifetime: the chance to own $2 million, locked up in a locker in New Mexico. These six contestants must now race each other to be the first to the cash. There are no rules in place and everything that could possibly happen, does. Whilst, behind the scenes, Sinclair's associates are placing their bets.

la boum 2_1982.opis_neo:
Ranljiva in občutljiva najstnica se še naprej sooča s tegobami in radostmi odraslega življenja.

V nadaljevanju francoske mladinske uspešnice je Vic stara 15 let in pol in obiskuje srednjo šolo, kjer se kot vsako drugo dekle druži z najboljšo prijateljico. Njeni starši so spet skupaj, njena zaveznica in babica Poupette sanjari o poroki z dolgotrajnim fantom, Vic pa je še vedno samska. A ljubezen jo, prav tako kot vse člane njene družine, kljub temu dohiti. Na vrat na nos se zatreska v Phillipa, očarljivega mladeniča, s komer razmišlja o naslednjih pomembnih korakih v ljubezenskem življenju.
la boum 2_1982.opis_omdb: Two years after the first "Boum", Vic - now 15 and a half years old - has a very calm love life, actually no boyfriend at all. Her parents are happily together again, Grandma Poupette thinks about finally marring her long-term boyfriend. But then Vic meets Philippe and is overcome by his charm. She's in heaven again and considers going all the way this time - a step, that her girlfriend Penelope already has taken.

les sous-doués_1980.opis_neo:
Skupina falotskih dijakov skuša opraviti maturo z iznajdljivostjo in potegavščinami namesto z učenjem.

Zgodba se osredotoča na zadnji letnik "manj nadarjenih" dijakov zasebne srednje šole v Versaillesu. Le čudež je te dijake pripeljal tako daleč. Ko se jim ponesreči potegavščina in razstrelijo celo šolo, se dijaki znajdejo v resnih težavah. Zglasiti se morajo na sodišču in dodeljena kazen zanje ne bi mogla biti hujša: če ne bodo opravili mature, bodo šli v zapor!
les sous-doués_1980.opis_omdb: Baptiste 'Bebel' Lavalle and his classmates in Versailles' private high-school Louis XIV enjoy their carefree life enough to deliberately fail the exams, a national record of zero graduating pupils. Permissive headmaster Léon Jumaucourt's bitchy wife Lucie takes charge, determined to make them pass. She's no match for Bebel's tricks, despite cruel abuse, but the gang also annoys the public, including the dumb police commissioner. After a mix-up between their bomb-alert prop and a real terrorist group's African embassy attack, Bebel's bunch is condemned to pass their exams or go to jail, and the commissioner, charged with supervision, is in no mood to let them off easily.

samson_2018.opis_neo:
Mož z nadnaravno močjo se mora pravilno odzvati, ko mu bog naroči, kaj mora storiti, da bo osvobodil svoje ljudstvo.

Potem ko je zaradi okrutnega filistejskega princa izgubil ljubezen svojega življenja, mladi Hebrejec z nadnaravno močjo brani svoje ljudstvo in žrtvuje vse, da bi maščeval svojo ljubezen, svoje ljudstvo in Boga.
samson_2018.opis_omdb: A Hebrew with an unusual gift of strength must respond properly to the call of God on his life in order to lead his people out of enslavement. After his youthful ambition leads to a tragic marriage, his acts of revenge thrust him into direct conflict with the Philistine Army. As his brother mounts a tribal rebellion, only Samson's (Taylor James') relationship with a Philistine seductress and his final surrender - to the Philistines and to God - turns imprisonment and blindness into final victory.

jumanji: welcome to the jungle_2017.opis_neo:
Štiri najstnike povleče v magično videoigro, pobegnejo pa lahko samo tako, da sodelujejo in pridejo do konca igre.

Štirje najstniki odkrijejo staro konzolo za videoigre. Povleče jih v džungelsko okolje igre, kjer postanejo odrasli avatarji, ki so si jih izbrali.
jumanji: welcome to the jungle_2017.opis_omdb: In a brand-new Jumanji adventure, four high-school kids discover an old video-game console and are drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the adult avatars they chose. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji--you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they must go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alex Vreeke left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves --or they'll be stuck in the game forever, to be played by others without break.

underworld: blood wars_2016.opis_neo:
Vampirska delivka smrti Selene (Kate Beckinsale) se bori, da bi končala vojno med klani likanov in vampirsko ločino, ki jo je izdala.

Ubijalka vampirjev selena (Kate Beckinsale) si prizadeva za konec večne vojne med klanom Lycan in ločino vampirjev, ki so jo izdali.
underworld: blood wars_2016.opis_omdb: The next installment in the blockbuster franchise, UNDERWORLD: BLOOD WARS follows Vampire death dealer, Selene (Kate Beckinsale) as she fends off brutal attacks from both the Lycan clan and the Vampire faction that betrayed her. With her only allies, David (Theo James) and his father Thomas (Charles Dance), she must stop the eternal war between Lycans and Vampires, even if it means she has to make the ultimate sacrifice.

rambo: first blood part ii_1985.opis_neo:
Rambo se vrne v džungle Vietnama, da bi se infiltriral v sovražni tabor in rešil ameriške vojne ujetnike, ki jih še vedno zadržujejo tam.

Potem ko je v prvem filmu vrgel v zrak pol mesta in zagodel številnim posameznikom, so Ramba na koncu le ujeli. Sedaj ga srečamo v celici, kako z lahkoto lomi verige okoli sebe. 

Njegov nekdanji oficir iz Vietnama, Trautman, mu ponudi nalogo, da bi v jugovzhodni Aziji našel pogrešane Američane. Čeprav je vietnamske vojne že konec, tam kar mrgoli tujih vojakov.

 Resnični problem v Vietnamu pa Rambu ne predstavljajo tuji vojaki, ampak predvsem tisti, ki so mu nalogo naložili.
rambo: first blood part ii_1985.opis_omdb: Only a few years after the all-out guerrilla war in First Blood (1982), John Rambo's former commanding officer, Colonel Sam Trautman, pulls him out of jail, only to send him back to a place he swore never to return: the impenetrable jungles of Vietnam. Entrusted with the dangerous task of collecting evidence that American POWs are still being held captive, Rambo agrees to infiltrate the unknown zone, and before long, he finds himself double-crossed, marooned behind the enemy lines. Once, John fought for his country. Now, the government has left him for dead in a Soviet-infested land. Can Rambo fulfil his suicide mission? Will he deliver his lethal justice?

resident evil: afterlife_2010.opis_neo:
V svetu, opustošenem zaradi virusa, ki svoje žrtve spremeni v žive mrtvece oziroma v nemrtve, se bojevnica Alice še naprej trudi najti preživele.

Pet let je minilo, odkar je virus izbrisal večino svetovnega prebivalstva. Neustrašna bojevnica Alice nadaljuje svojo pot brezupnega boja z dvolično organizacijo Umbrella in se pridruži ostalim preživelim, ki se želijo zateči v navidezno varno zatočišče Arcadia.
resident evil: afterlife_2010.opis_omdb: In a world ravaged by a virus infection, turning its victims into the Undead, Alice (Jovovich), continues on her journey to find survivors and lead them to safety. Her deadly battle with the Umbrella Corporation reaches new heights, but Alice gets some unexpected help from an old friend. A new lead that promises a safe haven from the Undead takes them to Los Angeles, but when they arrive the city is overrun by thousands of Undead - and Alice and her comrades are about to step into a deadly trap.

frederick forsyth's icon i_2005.opis_neo:
Ko na predvečer volitev v Rusiji izbruhne skrivnostna bolezen, Britanci pošljejo tajnega agenta, da bi zadevo raziskal.

Na večer volitev v Rusiji izbruhne skrivnostna bolezen. Britanci bi radi izvedeli, kaj se dogaja, zato morajo tja nekoga poslati. Uradnik nekoga pozna, Jasona Monka, ameriškega agenta, ki je v Rusiji v času hladne vojne delal pod krinko. Približa se Monku, ki najprej ne sodeluje, potem pa Monku reče, da mu lahko pomaga poravnati stare zamere in priti do hčere, ki jo je zapustil, ko so ga odpeljali na varno. Monk vzpostavi stik s starim prijateljem in rusko policistko. Ugotovijo, da bi nekdo rad vplival na volitve.
frederick forsyth's icon i_2005.opis_omdb: On the eve of the elections in Russia, there's an outbreak of a mysterious disease. The British are curious to find out what's going on, so they need to send someone. An official knows someone--Jason Monk, an American agent who worked deep cover in Russia during the Cold War. He approaches Monk who initially refuses till he tells Monk that he can help him settle some old scores and to see his daughter whom he left when he was pulled out. So Monk goes and makes contact with an old friend and a Russian policewoman. They learn that someone is trying to manipulate the election.

icon_2005.opis_neo:
Ko na predvečer volitev v Rusiji izbruhne skrivnostna bolezen, Britanci pošljejo tajnega agenta, da bi zadevo raziskal.

Na večer volitev v Rusiji izbruhne skrivnostna bolezen. Britanci bi radi izvedeli, kaj se dogaja, zato morajo tja nekoga poslati. Uradnik nekoga pozna, Jasona Monka, ameriškega agenta, ki je v Rusiji v času hladne vojne delal pod krinko. Približa se Monku, ki najprej ne sodeluje, potem pa Monku reče, da mu lahko pomaga poravnati stare zamere in priti do hčere, ki jo je zapustil, ko so ga odpeljali na varno. Monk vzpostavi stik s starim prijateljem in rusko policistko. Ugotovijo, da bi nekdo rad vplival na volitve.
icon_2005.opis_omdb: On the eve of the elections in Russia, there's an outbreak of a mysterious disease. The British are curious to find out what's going on, so they need to send someone. An official knows someone--Jason Monk, an American agent who worked deep cover in Russia during the Cold War. He approaches Monk who initially refuses till he tells Monk that he can help him settle some old scores and to see his daughter whom he left when he was pulled out. So Monk goes and makes contact with an old friend and a Russian policewoman. They learn that someone is trying to manipulate the election.

desperado_1995.opis_neo:
V mehiško mestece prispe skrivnosten tujec s kovčkom za kitaro, v katerem prenaša orožje, s katerim se hoče maščevati preprodajalcu mamil.

V legendarnem nadaljevanju filma "El Mariachi", Antonio Banderas igra bivšega mariachija, ki se hoče maščevati šefu preprodajalcev mamil, ker je ta ubil njegovo ljubljeno.
desperado_1995.opis_omdb: Director Robert Rodriguez picks up where his successful independent debut El Mariachi left off with this slam-bang South of the Border action saga. Bucho (Joaquim DeAlmeida) is a wealthy but casually bloodthirsty drug kingpin who rules a seedy Mexican border town. Bucho and his men make the mistake of angering El Mariachi (Antonio Banderas), a former musician who now carries an arsenal in his guitar case. Bucho was responsible for the death of El Mariachi's girlfriend and put a bullet through his fretting hand, making him unable to play the guitar. Bent on revenge, the musician-turned-killing machine arrives in town to put Bucho out of business, though he finds few allies except for Carolina (Salma Hayek), who runs a bookstore that doesn't seem to attract many readers. Desperado features supporting performances from Cheech Marin as a cynical bartender, Steve Buscemi as the cantina patron who sets up the story, and Quentin Tarantino as a man with a really terrible joke to tell.

the prince & me ii: the royal wedding_20.naslov_orig: The Prince & Me II: The Royal Wedding
the prince & me ii: the royal wedding_20.opis_neo:
Princ in jaz 2 se nadaljuje točno tam, kjer se je končal prvi film, princa Edwarda in Paige pa od poroke loči le še nekaj tednov.

Kraljeva poroka princa Edvarda in njegove ameriške izbranke Paige je oddaljena le nekaj tednov, ko zlobni norveški princ Albert odkrije starodavni zakon, ki lahko ogrozi njuno zvezo in dansko monarhijo. Ta zakon namreč pravi, da se mora prestolonaslednik poročiti z žensko plemenitega rodu ali pa se prestolu odreči. Prince Albert zato skuša doseči, da bi se Edvard poročil z njegovo dvolično hčerjo, toda Paige se ne bo pustila pregnati tako zlahka. To za dekleti pomeni vojno.
the prince & me ii: the royal wedding_20.opis_omdb: With just weeks before their royal wedding, Paige and Edvard find their relationship and the Danish monarchy in jeopardy when an old law is brought to light, stating that an unmarried heir to the throne may marry only a woman of noble blood or else he must relinquish his crown.

fantômas_1964.opis_neo: Najboljša moža Francije - pogumni novinar in izjemno energični inšpektor - se podata na sled skrivnostnemu in pretkanemu zločincu.
fantômas_1964.opis_omdb: Criminal mastermind Fantômas, a man of a thousand faces, is unhappy with Fandor, a journalist who's written a fictive interview of him. He kidnaps Fandor, threatens to kill him, but first goes about ruining the journalist's reputation by committing a sensational crime in Fandor's guise. Hot on the trail is police Commissaire Juve, so Fantômas commits a crime looking like him. Soon, our intrepid heroes, Fandor and Juve, with the help of Fandor's girlfriend Hélène, are on the mastermind's trail, but who's in control?

george and the dragon_2004.opis_neo:
Vitez, ki se vrača iz križarskih vojn, premaga zmaja in postane legenda.
