Prve križarske vojne je konec. Množica utrujenih vitezov, oprod, vojakov in duhovnikov se vrača domov v Evropo, kjer se je marsikaj spremenilo. Mlad angleški vitez George, ki ga preganjajo spomini na dogodke v Palestini, se namerava ustaliti na severu Anglije, kjer sredi rodovitne zemlje majhnemu številu prebivalcev vlada prijazni kralj Edgaar. Ko George prispe na cilj, izve, da je izginila kraljeva hči, princesa Lunna. Skupaj z Edgaarjevim zvestim služabnikom Elmendorfom se George odpravi iskat princeso in tako počasi odkriva razloge za njeno izginotje.
george and the dragon_2004.opis_omdb: The first crusade to free the Holy Land has ended. A mass of weary knights, squires, soldiers of fortune and Priests are making their way home across a Europe that has changed forever. George (James Purefoy), a handsome English knight, unsettled by the horrendous bloodletting he witnessed in Palestine, desires to hang up his sword and settle down to a quiet, peaceful life. On returning to England, he heads north where he's heard the land is good and the population sparse, and of a kindly King named Edgar (Simon Callow). He finds King Edgar in a terrible state. His beautiful daughter, Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo) has recently disappeared. In return for a small plot of land, George agrees to search for Princess Lunna. With Edgar's faithful servant, Elmendorf (Bill Treacher), George sets out. George discovers the Princess and the truth behind her strange disappearance. The quest now set before them ends in a love, a lie, and a legend that has lasted for a thousand years.

k-911_1999.opis_neo:
Policijski detektiv Mike Dooley dela na oddelku za narkotike v San Diegu in trenutno poskuša razkriti dilerja, čeprav bi moral iti v pokoj.

V nadaljevanju akcijske komedije Pasji policist detektiv Mike Dooley in njegov zvesti pasji spremljevalec Jerry Lee dobita nova partnerja - dobermana Zevsa in njegovo novo vaditeljico.
k-911_1999.opis_omdb: Mike Dooley has been teamed up with Jerry Lee, a German Shepherd dog, for nearly ten years, but Jerry Lee isn't as young as he once was, and Dooley's superiors suggest that maybe it's time that Jerry Lee was retired from the force. But there is a stalker who wants Dooley dead. The stalker, disgruntled crime novelist Devon Lane, became obsessed with Dooley's wife after she rejected his book, and he blames Dooley for her death. When Jerry Lee can't keep up with chasing Devon during a shootout, Captain Byers teams Dooley and Jerry Lee with a younger K9 team -- aggressive female detective Welles and her dog Zeus, a young, strong Doberman Pincher. After Dooley futilely investigates a convict he once busted, the dogs get him back on track by sniffing out Devon's storage locker. The room reveals Devon's identity to Dooley, and one of Devon's manuscripts reveals that he intends to make Dooley suffer for his words. When Devon makes a bold move by invading the precinct and taking Welles hostage, it's Dooley and Jerry Lee to the rescue. But can Jerry Lee pull off this rescue?

paul blart: mall cop_2009.opis_neo:
Varnostnik Paul Blart dobi priložnost za prikaz svojih veščin, ko banda okrutnih kriminalcev zavzame trgovski center, v katerem dela.

Edina stvar, ki je večja od srca Paula Blarta, je njegov trebuh. Mislili bi, da ne more poškodovati niti muhe. Vendar si domišlja, da je trdoživ fant, in sanja, da bi postal motoristični patruljant. Do takrat dela kot varnostnik. In namesto da bi se s svojim Harley-Davidsonom vozil po avtocestah, se z električnim skuterjem vozi po lokalnem nakupovalnem središču. Najbolj žalostno pri vsem tem je, da nihče razen njega ne jemlje resno njegovega odgovornega dela. Ko tolpa roparjev napade trgovino ter so vključeni tudi talci, Paul meni, da je prišel njegov čas.
paul blart: mall cop_2009.opis_omdb: Paul Blart is a mild-mannered man who works as a security guard in a New Jersey mall. For years, he has applied to become a cop, but he always fails the physical exam because he has hypoglycemia and tends to pass out when his blood sugar is low. One day, a gang of organized criminals put the mall under siege and take hostages. Blart becomes trapped inside, and because of his sense of duty, refuses to leave. He thus becomes the police department's eyes on the inside and attempts to stop the criminals on his own.

the librarian: return to king solomon's.naslov_orig: The Librarian: Return to King Solomon's Mines
the librarian: return to king solomon's.opis_neo:
Flynn Carsen, knjižničar, ki je postal pustolovec in nadzoruje zbirko legendarnih artefaktov, se poda na odkrivanje rudnikov kralja Salomona.

Ko je Flyyn sprejel vlogo knjižničarja je vedel, da njegova služba ne bo lahka. Po težki nalogi iz prvega dela, ko je moral rešiti kopje usode ter preprečiti črni bratovščini prevlado nad svetom, ga tudi v drugem delu ne čaka nič lažjega.
the librarian: return to king solomon's.opis_omdb: After retrieving the Crystal Skull in Utah, Flynn Carsen receives a map in the mail with the secret location of King Solomon's Mines. When the scroll is stolen, Judson explains the power of the Key of Solomon's book and assigns Flynn to retrieve the map. The map is useless without the legend piece to decipher it, which is located in Volubilis near the Roman ruins in Morocco. Flynn heads to Casablanca to the ruins where he is chased by a group of mercenaries leaded by General Samir. They too want to find the location of King Solomon's mines. Flynn teams-up with Professor Emily Davenport working in the dig and they escape from General Samir and his men. While traveling to Gedi, they save the local Jomo from death and the trio faces a dangerous journey through the wild Africa.

elysium_2013.opis_neo:
Medtem, ko se ljudje z Zemlje trudijo priti na Elizij, jim njegovi prebivalci želijo to preprečiti, nekdo pa se odpravi na misijo z namenom, da bi prinesel enakopravnost v ta razdeljeni svet.

Leta 2154 bogati živijo na prestižni vesoljski postaji imenovani Elizij, medtem, ko ostala populacija živi na uničeni in prenaseljeni Zemlji. Medtem, ko se ljudje z Zemlje trudijo priti na Elizij, njegovi prebivalci pa jim želijo namero preprečiti, se nekdo odpravi na misijo z namenom, da bi prinesel enakopravnost v ta razdeljeni svet.
elysium_2013.opis_omdb: In the year 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, who live on a pristine man-made space station called Elysium, and the rest, who live on an overpopulated, ruined Earth. Secretary Delacourt, a government official, will stop at nothing to enforce anti-immigration laws and preserve the luxurious lifestyle of the citizens of Elysium. That doesn't stop the people of Earth from trying to get in by any means they can. When unlucky Max is backed into a corner, he agrees to take on a daunting mission that, if successful, will not only save his life but could bring equality to these polarized worlds.

life_1999.opis_neo:
Leta 1932 sta dva neznanca krivo obsojena in v zaporu se med njima razvije tesno prijateljstvo, ki traja vse do konca 20. stoletja.

New York, leta 1932. Prevarant Ray Gibson si v nočnem klubu izbere tarčo, ki ji bo pobral ves denar, s katerim bo odplačal svoje dolgove. Na piko vzame bodočega bančnega uslužbenca Clauda Banksa, vendar razočaran spozna, da je tudi on brez prebite pare.

Gangster, ki mu Ray dolguje denar, že ve, kako se mu bosta fanta odkupila. Zanj bosta tihotapila alkohol. Ko se Ray in Claude odpeljeta v Misisipi, se znajdeta ob napačnem času na napačnem kraju.

Po krivem ju obtožijo umora in obsodijo na dosmrtno ječo. V naslednjih šestdesetih letih fanta za rešetkami doživita veliko težkih trenutkov.
life_1999.opis_omdb: In the mid-1990s, two inmates bury the burned bodies of two lifers at Mississippi's infamous Parchman Farm; a third old-timer relates their story. They'd served 65 years for a murder they didn't commit, framed by a local sheriff while buying moonshine whiskey for a Manhattan club owner to whom they owed money. In flashbacks we see this odd couple thrown together (Ray is a fast-talking con man, and Claude is a serious man about to start work as a bank teller), the loss of Ray's watch (sterling silver, from his daddy), the murder and trial, the hardships of Parchman, and the love-hate relationship of Claude and Ray as they spend 65 years bickering and looking for a way to escape.

snatch_2000.opis_neo:
Brezobzirni boksarski promotorji, nasilni pobiralci stav, ruski gangster, nesposobni roparji in židovski zlatarji iščejo neprecenljiv ukraden diamant.

Brezkompromisni organizatorji boksarskih dvobojev, nasilni lastniki stavnic, ruski gangster, nesposobna roparja in judovski draguljarji se v kriminalnem londonskem podzemlju znajdejo v boju za ukraden diamant.

kindergarten cop 2_2016.opis_neo:
Robati agent FBI pod krinko dela kot vzgojitelj v vrtcu, težko pa se spoprime s popustljivim in politično korektnim vzdušjem v vrtcu.

Reed je agent stare šole pri FBI, ki je na sledi vzhodnoevropskemu zločincu Zoguju. Reed ve, da se želi Zogu polastiti ključka s skrajno tajnimi podatki, ki se skriva nekje v učilnici vzgojitelja, ki je umrl v skrivnostnih okoliščinah. Da bi Zoguju preprečil načrte in se prvi dokopal do dragocenega predmeta, mora Reed pod krinko kot nadomestni vzgojitelj v vrtcu. 

Toda naloga je težja, kot se zdi, saj mora robati Reed obvladati kup razposajenih otrok in vzpostaviti avtoriteto na liberalen način, ki ga narekuje šola. Mu bo uspelo pravočasno pridobiti zaupanje otrok in obvarovati tajne podatke?
kindergarten cop 2_2016.opis_omdb: Hot on the trail of the Eastern-European criminal kingpin, Zogu, unexpectedly, the old-school F.B.I. Agent, Reed, finds himself at a well-organised elementary school. Knowing that Zogu is after a tiny flash drive containing highly sensitive information, Reed has to pose as a substitute kindergarten teacher to stand a chance of retrieving the precious item that is hidden somewhere in the classroom of a mysteriously deceased instructor. Now, like a fish out of water, Reed needs to take control of the class without blowing his cover; however, this is easier said than done. Can tough officer Reed gain the classroom's confidence before it's too late?

ni vu, ni connu_1958.opis_neo:
V majhni francoski vasici bi bilo vse mirno, če se lokalnemu lovskemu čuvaju ne bi posmehoval spreten lovec na divjad.

Življenje v francoski vasi bi bilo mirno, če lokalnega čuvaja lovcev ne bi ves čas zasmehovali ...
ni vu, ni connu_1958.opis_omdb: In a small French village, everything would be quiet if the local wildlife cop was not being ridiculed by a smart poacher.

the animal_2001.opis_neo:
Po tem, ko je prejel organe različnih živalskih darovalcev, moški ugotovi, da je prevzel tudi njihove značilnosti.

Marvin Mange bo kmalu gibčen kot puma, poskočen kot šimpanz in čustven kot ... kozel. Zaradi nenavadnega poskusa, s katerim bo spoznal svojo divjo plat, se bo njegovo življenje spremenilo v zverinjak.
the animal_2001.opis_omdb: From the producers of the comedy smash Deuce Bigalow comes The Animal, about a small, wimpy Marvin, who doesn't have what it takes to fulfill his lifelong dream to be a cop. But his luck changes when he's critically injured in a car accident and a deranged scientist secretly uses animal organs to rebuild him. Energized by his new parts, Marvin leaves his weakness behind and achieves instant fame as a supercop. Now a hero, life is going great for Marvin until his animal instincts start taking over his body at all the wrong times. Marvin struggles to remain civilized and be a perfect gentleman with his new love, Rianna in a series of hilarious situations that would drive any animal crazy.

the mask of zorro_1998.opis_neo:
Mladega tatu, ki se hoče maščevati za bratovo smrt, uri nekdaj veliki, a zdaj starajoči se Zorro, ki ga žene lastna sla po maščevanju.

Na začetku devetnajstega stoletja se Mehika bori za samostojnost, saj ji z železno roko vlada španska oblast. Edini, ki je ves čas na strani siromašnega mehiškega prebivalstva, je skrivnosti neznanec Zorro. Kadar Zorro ni zamaskiran, ga vsi poznajo kot spoštovanega Diega de la Vego. Ko guverner Montero odkrije Zorrovo identiteto, v burnem srečanju tragično umre Diegova žena. Diega zapre v ječo, njegovo hčerkico Eleno pa vzame za svojo. Dvajset let kasneje Diego pobegne iz zapora. Na begu spozna mladega bandita Alejandra iz katerega naredi novega Zorra, ki bo enkrat za vselej obračunal z Monterom.
the mask of zorro_1998.opis_omdb: In 1821 Old California, mysterious black-caped masked avenger of the oppressed, Don Diego de la Vega--Zorro--lands in jail after once again humiliating the evil Spanish governor Don Rafael Montero. With his only daughter raised by Don Rafael as his own, the grizzled swordsman makes a daring escape nearly two decades later, and takes under his wing the unrefined outlaw Alejandro Murietta to teach him the ropes and hopefully become the next Zorro. Now, the stage is set for a ferocious final confrontation, as the new young rapier-wielder prepares to thwart the despicable governor's sinister plans. Can Alejandro live up to legendary Zorro's name?

the blue lagoon_1980.opis_neo:
Po potopu ladje ostaneta živa samo otroka, ki si na osamljenem otoku ustvarita preprosto življenje.

Dva otroka, Emmeline in Richard, sta brodolomca na odročnem otoku skupaj z ladijskim kuharjem, ki kmalu umre, zato se morata znajti sama, brez izkušenj in znanja, nepripravljena na duševne in telesne izzive odraščanja. Naučita se preživeti na otoku, ki je edini dom, ki ga poznata. Ko prideta v najstniška leta, se začneta prepirati in izzivati, a na koncu se vzljubita. Naravna naklonjenost preraste v ljubezen, ki privede v nosečnost. Sčasoma se odločita spopasti z nevarnostjo odhoda z otoka.
the blue lagoon_1980.opis_omdb: On a journey to San Francisco, Richard, his father and cousin Emmeline find themselves on a ship about to explode. Rushed to a lifeboat with Paddy Button, the two children escape while their father (and uncle) are on another lifeboat. In the chaos following, the lifeboats are separated. Paddy, Richard and Emmeline find themselves with no food and no water stuck in the middle of nowhere. After some time, the three come across an uncharted paradise, where Paddy quickly teaches the children fishing, hunting and building. After maybe a month or two, Paddy gets very drunk off a barrel of rum found on the island when they first arrive, and drowns in the middle of the night. Emmeline and Richard, now alone and very scared, move location and rebuild their island home. Many years later, the two young teenagers have developed a very real home, but hormones and feelings between the two strain their friendship, until Richard, who is still very determined to reach San Francisco, is let down by Emmeline when a ship passes by the island and she does not light the signal fire. Throwing her out of the home they had built together, Emmeline attempts to survive on her own but is hurt. After Richard finds her dying, he realizes how he really feels for her and manages to save her. Nature runs its course and their friendship turns into love as the couple learn about the facts of life, when Emmeline has a baby and does not understand why.

paul blart: mall cop 2_2015.opis_neo:
Po šestih letih varovanja trgovskih centrov se Paul Blart odpravi na zasluženi dopust. S hčerjo obiščeta Las Vegas, a tudi tam zločin ne počiva.

Po šestih letih varovanja nakupovalnih centrov si Paul Blart privošči počitnice. S hčerko se odpravita v Las Vegas, na konvencijo varnostnikov. Ta se ne odvija po njegovih pričakovanjih, težave pa ima tudi s hčerko Mayo, ki ne želi biti pod nenehnim nadzorom. Ko dekle pristane v rokah zlikovcev, Paul vzame pravico v svoje roke.
paul blart: mall cop 2_2015.opis_omdb: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart has earned a well-deserved vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter before she heads off to college. But safety never takes a holiday and when duty calls, Blart answers.

men in black_1997.opis_neo:
Posebna agenta tajne službe morata ustaviti zloglasnega medgalaktičnega terorista, preden bi ta uničil človeštvo.

Možje v črnem so skrivna vladna organizacija, ki je zadolžena za nadzorovanje in razreševanje vesoljskih aktivnosti na Zemlji. Agent Kay pod okrilje vzame novega rekruta Jaya, s katerim se znajdeta sredi smrtonosne zarote, izpod rok intergalaktičnega terorista. Dvojec dobi prvo skupno nalogo - zlobnemu vesoljcu prepečiti namero, ki bi lahko uničila svet.
men in black_1997.opis_omdb: Based off of the comic book. Unbeknownst to other people, there is a private agency code named MiB. This agency is some kind of extra terrestrial surveillance corporation. Then, one of the agency's finest men only going by the name "K" (Tommy Lee Jones) , is recruiting for a new addition to the agency. He has chosen James Edwards (Will Smith) of the N.Y.P.D. Then, one day, a flying saucer crashes into Earth. This was an alien a part of the "Bug" race. He takes the body of a farmer (Vincent D'Onofrio) and heads to New York. He is searching for a super energy source called "The Galaxy". Now, Agents J and K must stop the bug before it can escape with the galaxy.

doom_2005.opis_neo:
Marince, ki raziskujejo težave v bazi na Marsu, napadejo grozljivo mutirana bitja.

Odprava vesoljskih marincev preiskuje nenavadne dogodke na raziskovalni ustanovi na Marsu, vendar se zdi, da so prepuščeni na milost in nemilost genetsko izpopolnjenim ubijalskim strojem.
doom_2005.opis_omdb: Something has gone wrong at a remote scientific research station on Mars. All research has ceased. Communication has failed. And the messages that do get through are less than comforting. It's a level 5 quarantine and the only souls allowed in or out are the Rapid Response Tactical Squad - hardened Marines armed to the teeth with enough firepower to neutralize the enemy...or so they think.

k-19: the widowmaker_2002.opis_neo:
Prva ruska podmornica se na krstni vožnji pokvari. Posadka mora ladjo rešiti pred uničenjem, da bi preprečila jedrsko katastrofo.

Film je navdihnil dogodek iz leta 1961, ko sta Sovjetska zveza in ZDA kopičili zaloge jedrskega orožja v pričakovanju, kdo bo prvi udaril. Zgodba govori o junaštvu kapitana podmornice K-19, Alekseja. Postavljen je pred resno preizkušnjo, ko okvara podmornice lahko povzroči nuklearno katastrofo.
k-19: the widowmaker_2002.opis_omdb: The story of USSR's first nuclear ballistic submarine, which suffered a malfunction in its nuclear reactor on its maiden voyage in the North Atlantic in 1961. The submarine's crew, led by the unyielding Captain Alexi Vostrikov, races against time to prevent a Chernobyl-like nuclear disaster which threatens not only the lives of his crew, but has the potential to ignite a world war between the super powers.

dan in real life_2007.opis_neo:
Vdovec izve, da je ženska, v katero se je zaljubil, bratova punca.

Vdovec Dan za vsako težavo v življenju pozna pravi nasvet, a le ko piše svojo časopisno kolumno, saj je njegov vsakdanjik povsem druga zgodba.
dan in real life_2007.opis_omdb: Single father Dan Burns dedicates his life to his children, but one day he meets Marie at a bookstore. They get to know each other, but then Dan finds out that Marie is actually dating his brother, Mitch.

legionnaire_1998.opis_neo:
Boksar ne preda prirejenega dvoboja, kot mu je naročil mafijski šef, zato zbeži in se pridruži tujski legiji.

Boksar Alain Lefevre mora po naročilu gangsterja izgubiti pomemben dvoboj. Ker se temu upre in zmaga, se znajde v nevarnosti. Zbežati namerava v Ameriko, vendar nazadnje pristane v francoski tujski legiji v Afriki, kjer se mora spet boriti za preživetje.
legionnaire_1998.opis_omdb: Alain Lefevre is a boxer paid by a Marseille mobster to take a dive. When he wins the fight he attempts to flee to America with the mobster's girlfriend Katrina. This plan fails and he seeks escape by joining the foreign legion. As part of the legion he tangles with abusive lieutenant Steinkampf and bonds with legionnaires Luther, Mackintosh and Rosetti. The mobster discovers his whereabouts and enrolls two hit men to finish him off. With their fort under siege and enemies within, Lefevre finds that second chances are difficult to come by in the Legion.

sudden death_1995.opis_neo:
Nekdanji gasilec se spopade s skupino teroristov, ki so ugrabili podpredsednika in druge talce med sedmo tekmo finala Stanleyjevega pokala lige NHL.

V nabito polni dvorani v Pittsburghu se odvija napeta hokejska tekma. Med gledalci je tudi ameriški podpredsednik in nihče ne sluti, da se bo veselje že čez nekaj trenutkov spremenilo v pravo grozo, saj jim skupina teroristov pripravlja neprijetno presenečenje.

Teroristi zajamejo talce, med katerimi je tudi Emily, hčerka gasilca Darrena McCorda. Darren se seveda takoj poda v reševalno akcijo in se zaplete v smrtonosno igro z vodjo teroristov.
sudden death_1995.opis_omdb: Darren McCord takes his two kids to a Pittsburgh Penguins National Hockey League play-off game, unknowing that the sports arena has been taken over by terrorists, who are holding the Vice President of the United States, as well as many other high-ranking officials hostage. Darren later becomes the only one who is aware of the situation. And, the stakes are raised when the terrorists announce that they will blow-up the building at the end of the game. Therefore, Darren must not only subdue the terrorists, but postpone the game and send it to overtime.

hibernatus_1969.opis_neo:
Bogat poslovnež naleti na čudno težavo - dedka njegove žene so oživili s pomočjo znanosti. Ne zaveda pa se, da je minilo veliko desetletij.

Med odkopavanjem na Arktiki francoska skupina najde zamrznjeno truplo moškega. Zdi se, da moški ni imel več kot 25 let. Ker je truplo popolnoma ohranjeno, na inštitutu moškega uspejo oživeti.
hibernatus_1969.opis_omdb: The frozen body of Paul Fournier is discovered in Greenland where he had disappeared during a scientific expedition in 1905. Perfectly conserved he is brought back to life in the 1960s. His descendants take care of him: to spare him the cultural shock they behave so to make believe it's 1905 and they are his cousins, uncle...

saphirblau_2014.naslov_sl: Trilogija dragih kamnov: Moder kot safir
saphirblau_2014.opis_neo:
Nadaljevanje serije filmov o Gwen, najstnici, ki je podedovala gen, s pomočjo katerega lahko potuje skozi čas.

Gwen je ravno odkrila, da je zadnja članica tajnega Kroga dvanajstih, ki potuje skozi čas. Zdaj mora nekako najti ravnovesje med nenehnimi potovanji v preteklost in vzdrževanjem odnosa z Gideonom, poleg tega pa poskuša odkriti temne skrivnosti, ki obkrožajo Krog.
saphirblau_2014.reziser: Felix Fuchssteiner, Katharina Schöde, Lev L. Spiro
saphirblau_2014.opis_omdb: Gwen has just discovered that she's the final member of the secret time-traveling Circle of Twelve. Now she must juggle with constant trips to the past, her relationships with Gideon, and figuring out dark secrets surrounding the Circle.

cliffhanger_1993.opis_neo:
Ko se rop v zraku ponesreči, različne skupine po Skalnem gorovju iščejo kovčke, polne denarja.

Ko gre ena od njegovih reševalnih akcij po zlu in umre dekle njegovega najboljšega prijatelja, Gabe za nesrečo krivi sebe, zato službo obesi na klin in zapusti domače mesto. 

Nekaj mesecev kasneje se vrne, da bi prepričal svoje dekle Jessie, naj se mu pridruži v drugem kraju in si tam skupaj z njim ustvari novo življenje. 

Med njegovim obiskom pa reševalci prejmejo klic na pomoč in Gabe se še zadnjič pridruži kolegom, da bi rešili skupino nemočnih ljudi. Nihče pa ne ve, da gre v resnici za nevarne ugrabitelje.
cliffhanger_1993.opis_omdb: Whilst crossing a ledge, 4000 feet above the earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails to work and she slips out of his hand, falling to the ground. Almost a year later, Gabe is asked to go back to the same mountain range and rescue a group of 'stranded' people. The only catch is that these so called 'stranded' people are in fact looking for three boxes filled with $100,000,000 and they need a mountain ranger to lead them to them!!

underworld awakening_2012.opis_neo:
Ko ljudje odkrijejo obstoj vampirjev in likanov, se začne vojna za iztrebljenje obeh vrst. Vampirska bojevnica Selene vodi boj proti človeštvu.

Vampirka Selene pobegne iz ujetništva, v katerem so jo zadrževali 12 let. V tem času so ljudje izvedeli za obstoj nesmrtnih bitij in skoraj iztrebili vse vampirje in volkodlake. Selene želi združiti razkropljene vampirske klane, ki bi ji pomagali pri uporu, toda svoj pohod na oblast načrtujejo tudi volkodlaki, zato se vname vsesplošna vojna.
underworld awakening_2012.opis_omdb: Mankind discover the existence of the Vampire and Lycan species and begin a war to annihilate the races. When Selene meets with Michael, they're hit by a grenade. 12 years later, Selene awakens and meets the vampire, David. She learns she had been the subject of scientist Dr. Jacob Lane, and the Vampire and Lycan species have been practically eradicated from Earth. Now, Selene and David must protect a 12-year-old girl against the Lycans who intend to use her.

smaragdgrün_2016.naslov_sl: Trilogija dragih kamnov: Zelen kot smaragd
smaragdgrün_2016.opis_neo:
Adaptacija zadnjega dela slavne trilogije o potovanju skozi čas.

Gwendolynino srce je zlomljeno, bo spet kdaj zaupala Gideonu? A časa za pretakanje solz ni. Zgodi se nekaj neverjetnega in Gwendolyn se mora podvizati.
smaragdgrün_2016.opis_omdb: After the events of Sapphire Blue, Gwen is heartbroken and confused about who she is and what the real powers of the Raven are. Not knowing who they can trust anymore, Gwen and Leslie try to figure out what nefarious plots the Count has up his sleeve with help from a sassy gargoyle. Using her personal chronograph, Gwen attempts to discover the tightly-knit secrets the Lodge has been keeping. Will Gwen be able to turn to Gideon in her time of need, or is her mistrust in him justified enough to separate them forever?

la folie des grandeurs_1971.opis_neo:
V Španiji v 17. stoletju finančni minister skuša očrniti kraljico z nadvse zapletenim načrtom.

Don Salluste zlorabi funkcijo ministra za finance in se gmotno okoristi. Kraljici, ki ministra prezira, uspe doseči, da ga preženejo z dvora. Užaljeni Don Salluste poskusi kraljico osramotiti, zato si izmisli zapleteno maščevanje. A doseže le to, da se v njegovega služabnika Blaza, ki naj bi zapeljal kraljico, zaljubi grda kraljičina spremljevalka.
la folie des grandeurs_1971.opis_omdb: Don Salluste, a petty tyrant in his own home and minister of the King of Spain, falls from grace. Wanting revenge, he tries to compromize the Queen with his valet Blaze, introduced as his cousin. But poor Blaze gets stuck with a rather repulsive duenna, who is madly in love with him and very keen on getting her way. This wild comedy takes off at a dashing pace set by the De Funes, Montand and Sapritch trio.

the legend of zorro_2005.opis_neo:
Čeprav se izogibata pustolovstvu, morata Don Alejandro de la Vega in njegova žena Elena ukrepati, ko je ogrožena pridružitev Kalifornije Uniji.

Zamaskirani junak se poda na najnevarnejšo misijo v svojem življenju.
the legend of zorro_2005.opis_omdb: In 1850--against the backdrop of political unrest, as the scheming Jacob McGivens tries to stop California from joining the Union--the mysterious black-caped masked swordsman, Alejandro de la Vega, aka Zorro, finds himself in an unavoidable predicament. Having spent almost a decade protecting his people and fighting injustice, Alejandro's wife, Elena, insists that he gives up the black mask, and become a true father to their eight-year-old son, Joaquin. However, when Elena leaves him for the French count, Armand, it becomes evident that the conceited aristocrat is up to no good. Can Zorro, the legendary defender of the innocent, save both his marriage and the country?

hitch_2005.opis_neo:
Prepričljiv mož se zaljubi v izkušeno kolumnistko, medtem pa plahemu računovodji pomaga zapeljevati lepo dedinjo.

Hitch je ljubezenski terapevt, čigar posebnost je, da pomaga 'manj srečnim' pri iskanju partnerja. A njegove veščine mu ne pomagajo pri lastnem ljubezenskem življenju. Ko poskuša osvojiti Saro, se mora tudi sam soočiti s težavami, ki jih je poprej jemal tako zlahka.
hitch_2005.opis_omdb: Pivoting around the eternal game of love, the suave matchmaker and New York City's finest date-doctor, Alex "Hitch" Hitchens, can guarantee that any man can get the girl of his dreams if he overcomes his fears and follows his infallible advice. However, when the timid accountant, Albert Brennaman, enlists his help to catch the attention of the rich and beautiful heiress, Allegra Cole, Hitch will unexpectedly discover his perfect match: the inquisitive gossip columnist, Sara Melas. Now, the self-assured charmer finds himself in need of his services to save his relationship. But, can the silver-tongued expert of romance survive the delicate complications of love?

out of reach_2004.opis_neo:
Bivši tajni agent odkrije, da program za rejence ne pomaga otrokom, temveč gre za mrežo trgovine z ljudmi.

Billy Ray Lancing (Steven Seagal) je bivši agent, ki živi umirjeno življenje. Pogosto si dopisuje z mlado Poljakinjo Ireno, ki ji finančno pomaga skozi program posvojitve. Ko pisma prenehajo prihajati, se Billy odpravi poiskati odgovore.
out of reach_2004.opis_omdb: Vietnam veteran Billy Ray Lancing, a former CSA agent who now works on a wildlife refuge in Northern Alaska, has been exchanging letters in a pen-pal relationship with Irina Morawska, a 13-year-old orphaned girl in Poland that he's helping out financially. When the letters suddenly stop coming, Billy heads to Poland to figure out why -- only to discover that the orphanage that Irena was staying in, which is financed by honest -- and unsuspecting -- good-intentioned Samaritans, is a cover for a human trafficking network. Run by a man named Faisal, the operation is worth billions -- girls are sold and traded to the highest bidders from all over the world. Through Billy's letters to Irina, Billy has taught Irina how to use secret codes, which she uses to keep Billy updated on where Faisal is taking her to. That's how Billy stays on Faisal's trail as Billy teams up with local cop Kasia Lato to rescue Irina and the other girls, and bring down Faisal's human trafficking network.

dead again in tombstone_2017.opis_neo:
Guerrero se vrača od mrtvih, da bi spet obvaroval ukradeno relikvijo, ki ne sme priti v roke skupini vojakov, kar bi povzročilo pravi pekel na Zemlji.

Revolveraš Guerrero (Danny Trejo) se vrača v nadaljevanju grozljivke, v kateri mora varovati starodavno knjigo temačnih urokov.
dead again in tombstone_2017.opis_omdb: Guerrero returns from the dead once more to protect a stolen relic from getting into the hands of a gang of soldiers, which will ultimately cause hell upon earth.

she's the man_2006.opis_neo:
Viola se naseli v študentski dom, kjer se izdaja za svojega brata, tam pa se zaljubi v nogometaša iz njegove ekipe.

Viola (Amanda Bynes) se začne preoblačiti v svojega brata dvojčka Sebastiana (James Kirk) in prevzemati njegovo mesto v internatski šoli Illyria Prep. Njen brat je namreč zaradi poskusa preboja na glasbeno sceno dlje časa odsoten. Vendar ni računala na to, da se bo zaljubila v svojega oz. bratovega čednega cimra Duka (Channing Tatum), ki pa je zaljubljen v prelepo Olivio (Laura Ramsey). 

Zadeva se še bolj zaplete, ko se Olivia zaljubi v Sebastiana, ki je ravno prav čustven fant, kakršnega si je od nekdaj želela spoznati. Toda to še ni konec. Pravi Sebastian se vrne iz Londona dva dni prej, ne da bi vedel, da ga je zamenjala njegova sestra dvojčica.
she's the man_2006.opis_omdb: Here's the thing! Viola's soccer team at Cornwall gets cut. She wants to join the boys' team, but they do not allow girls. So she thinks, "If you can't beat them, join them". So she does! She disguises herself as her twin brother, Sebastian and goes out for the rival school, Illyria Boys' Soccer Team and makes it. Unfortunately, she didn't plan falling in love with her roommate Duke. But Duke has his eyes on Olivia. What makes matters worse is that Olivia starts to fall for Sebastian because he/she has a sensitive side. If things couldn't get more problematic, the real Sebastian (who was in London working on his music) comes home early. He arrives on campus and has no clue that he was replaced by his twin sister.

ace ventura: when nature calls_1995.opis_neo:
Živalski detektiv se po vrnitvi z duhovnega popotovanja loti preiskave izginotja redkega belega netopirja, ki je sveta žival nekega afriškega plemena.

Detektiv za pogrešane živali Ace Ventura se v tokratni pustolovščini napoti v afriško džunglo. Tam mora poiskati skrivnostno izginulega svetega belega netopirja, ki je simbol nekega afriškega plemena. S svojo pojavo Ace povzroči pravi kaos in kot za šalo pomete s komerkoli, ki mu pride na pot. Seveda mu pri tem pomagajo kosmati in pernati ter novi človeški prijatelji.
ace ventura: when nature calls_1995.opis_omdb: Ace Ventura, emerging from self-imposed exile in a remote Himalayan hideaway, travels to Africa with explorer Fulton Greenwall to find a sacred bat which is told will avert a war between with Wachootoo and Wachati tribes. Of course, when Ace gets involved, all hell breaks loose...

terminator salvation_2009.opis_neo:
Leta 2018 pride skrivnostno novo orožje - pol človek, pol stroj - k Johnu Connorju na predvečer napada na Skynet. Na čigavi strani je? Mu lahko zaupa?

John Connor je zadnje upanje človeštva v vojni proti strojem, zato organizira odporniško gibanje, s katerim bi uničili Skynet, inteligentno računalniško omrežje, ki iztreblja človeštvo. Pri tem spozna svojega očeta Kyla Reesa in skrivnostnega neznanca Marcusa, ki bi lahko odigral pomembno vlogo v boju, toda le če si pridobi Connorjevo zaupanje.
terminator salvation_2009.opis_omdb: In 2003, in the Longview State Correctional Facility, the criminal Marcus Wright is on death row, and is convinced by the cancerous Dr. Serena Kogan to donate his body to her research and he accepts. In 2018, after an unsuccessful attack to a Skynet facility, only John Connor survives, but he discovers that Skynet is developing the powerful new model T-800. Out of the blue, Marcus appears naked and with amnesia in the location. Marcus befriends the teenager Kyle Reese and the girl Star who help him to survive the lethal machines and they travel together in a Jeep. Meanwhile the resistance discovers a signal that might turn-off the machines and John offers to test it. When Kyle is captured by a machine and brought to the Skynet headquarters, Marcus decides to help the youngster and heads to Skynet; on the way, he saves Blair Williams who suggests to him that he should meet John Connor first. But Marcus steps on a mine and is submitted to surgery, when a secret about his origins is disclosed.

tears of the sun_2003.opis_neo:
Poveljnik specialnih enot povede vojake v nigerijski pragozd, da bi rešili zdravnico. Ta se jim bo pridružila le, če s seboj vzamejo še 70 beguncev.

Poročnik Waters dobi nalogo, da izvleče ameriško zdravico iz okupirane Nigerije. Dr. Lena Kendricks noče zapustiti ranjencev, za katere skrbi, zato Watersa in njegovo ekipo prepriča, naj jim omogočijo pot skozi nevarno džunglo, ki je pod nadzorom upornikov.
tears of the sun_2003.opis_omdb: Navy SEAL Lieutenant A.K. Waters and his elite squadron of tactical specialists are forced to choose between their duty and their humanity, between following orders by ignoring the conflict that surrounds them, or finding the courage to follow their conscience and protect a group of innocent refugees. When the democratic government of Nigeria collapses and the country is taken over by a ruthless military dictator, Waters, a fiercely loyal and hardened veteran is dispatched on a routine mission to retrieve a Doctors Without Borders physician, Dr. Lena Kendricks. Dr. Kendricks, an American citizen by marriage, is tending to the victims of the ongoing civil war at a Catholic mission in a remote village. When Waters arrives, however, Dr. Kendricks refuses to leave unless he promises to help deliver the villagers to political asylum at the nearby border. If they are left behind, they will be at the mercy of the enormous rebel army. Waters is under strict orders from his commanding officer Captain Bill Rhodes to remain disengaged from the conflict. But as he and his men witness the brutality of the rebels first-hand, they are won over to Dr. Kendricks' cause and place their lives at risk by agreeing to escort the villagers on a perilous trek through the dense jungle. As they move through the countryside on foot, Waters' team, experts at evasion and concealment, are inexplicably and ferociously pursued by an army of rebels. They are confounded until they discover that, among the refugees, is the sole survivor of the country's previous ruling family, whom the rebels have been ordered to eliminate at all costs. Waters and his small band of soldiers must weigh the life of one man against their own and the refugees they feel obliged to protect.

ghost stories_2017.opis_neo:
Philip Goodman je slavni skeptik proti vsemu nadnaravnemu.

Profesor Philip Goodman je slavni skeptik proti vsemu nadnaravnemu. Ko dobi priložnost raziskati tri nepojasnjene paranormalne primere in odkrije misterije, kot si jih ni niti predstavljal, ga vse to pripelje do šokantnih in grozljivih spoznanj, ki obrnejo njegovo življenje ter pojmovanje sveta, na glavo.
ghost stories_2017.opis_omdb: After receiving a file with details of three unexplained cases of apparitions, skeptical professor Phillip Goodman embarks on a terrifying trip.

replicant_2001.opis_neo:
Film pripoveduje zgodbo o z ognjem obsedenem serijskem morilcu in nedavno upokojenem policistu, ki je odločen, da bo prvega zaustavil.

Seattle, eno izmed največjih mest na severozahodu ZDA, pretrese grozljiv val nasilja, ki ga je sprožil serijski morilec Garrotte z vzdevkom Bakla.
replicant_2001.opis_omdb: Jake Riley is working on the "Torch" case, a psycho serial killer, who kills women with kids and sets them on fire after they are dead. The killer calls Riley sometimes and now, that Riley retires, the killer has no person to play against anymore. The NSA comes into play here and offers a job to Riley. A replicant, or better a clone of the killer should help him find the real one, as kind of test if it works out. Now Riley is back on track, with a clone of the killer at his hand on the way to discover that nobody is born as murderer.

the offering_2022.opis_neo:
Družina, ki se spopada z izgubo, je prepuščena na milost in nemilost starodavnemu demonu, ki jo želi uničiti od znotraj.

Po izginotju mladega judovskega dekleta se sin hasidskega pogrebnega zavoda z nosečo ženo vrne domov v upanju, da se bo spravil z očetom. Ne vesta, da neposredno pod njima v družinski mrtvašnici v skrivnostnem truplu tiči starodavno zlo, ki ima zlovešče načrte z nerojenim otrokom.
the offering_2022.opis_omdb: A family struggling with loss find themselves at the mercy of an ancient demon trying to destroy them from the inside.

love potion no. 9_1992.opis_neo:
Znanstvenika izvajata eksperiment z učinkovino, s pomočjo katere se jima nasprotni spol ne bi mogel upreti. Pri poskusu naletita na težavo.

Paul Matthews je osamljen znanstvenik, ki dela v laboratoriju skupaj s prav tako sramežljivo Diane Farrow. Ker Paul nima preveč sreče pri osvajanju deklet, ga prijatelji nagovorijo, naj obišče jasnovidko, ki rada pomaga ljudem z ljubezenskimi težavami. Tako Paul pri njej dobi poseben ljubezenski napitek, ki ga preizkusita oba z Diane. Čeprav sta si Paul in Diane neverjetno podobna, saj poslušata enako glasbo, bereta iste knjige in že dolga leta nista bila na zmenku, šele s pomočjo napitka spoznata, da sta ustvarjena drug za drugega.
love potion no. 9_1992.opis_omdb: Two scientists who are hopeless with the opposite sex experiment with a substance that makes them irresistible to anyone who hears them speak.

trouble_2019.opis_neo:
Razvajen pes se mora naučiti živeti v resničnem svetu, hkrati pa poskuša pobegniti pred pohlepnimi otroki svoje nekdanje lastnice.

Že odkar je bil majhen kuža, Lumpek živi lagodno življenje, o kakršnem lahko navaden pes zgolj sanja. Prebiva v veliki vili, kjer mlati sočne zrezke in spi na najimenitnejši posteljnini. A ko njegova lastnica umre, se znajde na ulici, daleč od doma. Šele potem družina pokojne lastnice izve, da je Lumpek pomemben del oporoke, in ga začne iskati, medtem ko se on s pomočjo alfa psa z ulice Rouseyja in mlado glasbenico že uči, kako se znajti v »resničnem« svetu …
trouble_2019.opis_omdb: A pampered dog named Trouble must learn to live in the real world, while trying to escape from his former owner's greedy children.

the hunger games: catching fire_2013.opis_neo:
Katnis Everdeen se mora s Peeto Mellarkom po zmagi na 74. igrah lakote podati na "turnejo zmagovalcev" po okrožjih.

Leto zatem, ko sta postala zmagovalca smrtonosnih Iger lakote, se Katniss in Peeta pripravljata na slavnostno turnejo po okrožjih. Katniss med pripravami spozna, da so njena dejanja navdahnila navadne ljudi k uporništvu, kar pa ni povšeči predsedniku Snowu. Ta se boji vsesplošnega upora, zato Katniss postavi pred ultimat.
the hunger games: catching fire_2013.opis_omdb: Twelve months after winning the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her partner Peeta Mellark must go on what is known as the Victor's Tour, wherein they visit all the districts, but before leaving, Katniss is visited by President Snow who fears that Katniss defied him a year ago during the games when she chose to die with Peeta. With both Katniss and Peeta declared the winners, it is fueling a possible uprising. He tells Katniss that while on tour she better try to make sure that she puts out the flames or else everyone she cares about will be in danger.

double dragon_1994.opis_neo:
Dva brata imata polovico starega, a močnega kitajskega talismana.

V Kaliforniji bližnje prihodnosti silen potres združi San Diego in Los Angeles v eno samo mesto. Tu živita najstniška brata, ki imata v lasti polovico učinkovitega starodavnega kitajskega talismana. Drugo polovico ima milijonar Koga Shuko in je odločen, da se dokoplje do polovice, ki jo imata brata, sestavil medaljon in si tako pridobil popolno oblast nad magičnim talismanom, imenovanim Dvojni zmaj.
double dragon_1994.opis_omdb: Set 15 years in the future in post-earthquake California, where San Diego and Los Angeles are merged into one city, two teenage brothers have half of a powerful ancient Chinese talisman. Millionaire Koga Shuko (a.k.a. Guisman) has the other half and determines to get the brothers' half in order to have the complete medallion and the absolute power of the magical Double Dragon talisman.

an interview with god_2018.opis_neo:
Spremljanje vojne v Afganistanu je je dalo novinarju Paulu Asherju nekatere od najboljših zgodb njegove še mlade kariere.

Poročanje iz Afganistana bo novinarja Paula na koncu stal več, kot bi lahko kdaj koli izračunal. Po vrnitvi domov se mora Paul soočiti s posledicami svojih izkušenj, propadlega zakona in svoje umirajoče vere. Ker ne ve, na koga bi se obrnil, se Paul poglobi v življenjsko zgodbo - intervju s skrivnostnim moškim, ki trdi, da je Bog. 

Kaj bo radovedni novinar vprašal Boga? Kaj bi ga vprašali vi?
an interview with god_2018.opis_omdb: Paul Asher, an up-and-coming journalist, returns home from covering the war in Afghanistan and finds his life is falling apart - his marriage is failing and he's in the grips of a personal crisis he doesn't yet understand. Even more pressing, a soldier that Paul befriended in Afghanistan is struggling at home and Paul is desperately trying to help him. But, Paul's life takes a strange twist when he's offered an interview that he finds impossible to resist - an interview with someone who claims to be God.

the hunger games: mockingjay: part 1_201.opis_neo:
Potem ko Katniss uniči koncept Iger, se znajde v 13. okrožju. Ob pomoči prijateljev mora rešiti Peeto in narod, ki ga je ganila s svojim pogumom.

Mlada oskarjevka Jennifer Lawrence se vrača v vlogi, s katero je zaslovela. V filmu Igre lakote: Upor, 1. del je znova Katnis Everdeen, toda tokrat ni več neznano dekle, temveč vodja množičnega upora trpečega ljudstva proti vladajočemu Kapitolu.
the hunger games: mockingjay: part 1_201.opis_omdb: With the Games destroyed, Katniss Everdeen, along with Gale, Finnick and Beetee, end up in the so thought "destroyed" District 13. Under the leadership of President Coin and the advice of her friends, Katniss becomes the "Mockingjay", the symbol of rebellion for the districts of Panem.

cobweb_2023.opis_neo:
Osemletnega Petra teži nenehno skrivnostno trkanje v steni njegove otroške sobe, trkanje, za katerega pravijo starši, da si ga samo domišlja.

Osemletnega Petra teži nenehno skrivnostno trkanje v steni njegove otroške sobe, trkanje, za katerega pravijo starši, da si ga samo domišlja. Petrov strah raste in začne verjeti, da bi lahko njegovi starši skrivali grozljivo nevarno skrivnost, zaradi česar izgublja zaupanje vanju. In kaj je lahko za otroka grozljivejše?
cobweb_2023.opis_omdb: An eight-year-old boy tries to investigate the mysterious knocking sounds that are coming from inside the walls of his house, unveiling a dark secret that his sinister parents have kept hidden from him.

passion play_2010.opis_neo:
Izjemna igralska zasedba vas bo prevzela v tem edinstvenem, zapeljivem trilerju scenarista filma Velika pričakovanja.

Skoraj pozabljeni džez glasbenik Nate Poole (Mickey Rourke, nominiran za oskarja za film Rokoborec) res ni želel izzvati nevarnega mafijca Happyja Shannona (Bill Murray, nominiran za oskarja za film Izgubljeno s prevodom). Vendar je storil prav to in zdaj želi rešiti Lily (Megan Fox, Transformerji), čudovito in skrivnostno cirkuško zvezdo. Toda tveganje je preveliko za ljubimca, ki skušata pobegniti pred neusmiljenim morilcem, pripravljenim na vse, da bi obdržal Lily zase. Kelly Lynch (Drugstore Cowboy) in Rhys Ifans (Notting Hill) sta še drugi zvezdi te pogumne in nepredvidljive zgodbe o odrešitvi v resničnem slogu klasičnega film noira.
passion play_2010.opis_omdb: In Reno, the former successful trumpet player Nate Poole has a one night stand with the wife of the powerful and ruthless mobster Happy Shannon and one of his gangsters abducts Nate to kill him in the desert. Out of the blue, Nate is saved by Indians and he walks through the desert until he reaches a side show owned by Sam Adamo. Nate asks if Sam has a telephone to make a phone call to his friend Harriet, but he sees a beautiful woman with wings called Lily Luster and he asks a drink to her. Then he invites Lily to move with him to Reno. However Sam kidnaps Nate to kill him with a snake, but Lily rescues Nate with a truck and they head to Reno. Nate plots a scheme to raise some money, offering Lily to Happy. Along their journey back to Reno, Nate falls in love with her and he decides to call off the agreement with Happy. But the criminal finds Nate's hideout and abducts Lily and keeps the angel with him. Neverthless Nate is decided to rescue Lily from Hàppy's fortress.

the crucifixion_2017.opis_neo:
Zgodba se začne v Romuniji s srhljivim krikom v daljavi.

Zgodba po dogodkih iz resničnega življenja se začne v Romuniji, s srhljivim krikom v daljavi. Duhovnik Dimitru je zaprt zaradi umora nune, nad katero je izvajal obred izganjanja hudiča. Raziskovalna novinarka skuša odkriti, ali je duhovnik ubil duševno bolno osebo ali je preprosto izgubil boj z demonsko navzočnostjo.
the crucifixion_2017.opis_omdb: When Nicole comes in contact with Father Anton (Corneliu Ulici) more and more inexplicable events occur. The pair begin to believe that the priest lost the battle with a demon.

extra ordinary_2019.opis_neo:
Zabavna in strašljiva komedija o ženski z nadnaravnimi sposobnostmi, ki pomaga obupanemu očetu rešiti uročeno hčerko iz krempljev blaznega satanista.

Rose, prikupna in osamljena inštruktorica na irskem podeželju ima nadnaravne sposobnosti. Skuša se ne zmeniti za vztrajne prošnje domačinov, naj izžene duhove iz obsedenih smetnjakov ali uročenega proda. Toda, ko lokalna rock zvezda sklene zavezo s hudičem in začara mlado dekle, je Rose primorana premagati strah pred svojim darom in ji pomagati.
extra ordinary_2019.opis_omdb: Rose, a sweet, lonely driving instructor in rural Ireland, is gifted with supernatural abilities. Rose has a love/hate relationship with her 'talents' & tries to ignore the constant spirit related requests from locals - to exorcise possessed rubbish bins or haunted gravel. But! Christian Winter, a washed up, one-hit-wonder rock star, has made a pact with the devil for a return to greatness! He puts a spell on a local teenager- making her levitate. Her terrified father, Martin Martin, asks Rose to help save his daughter. Rose has to overcome the fear of her supernatural gift & work with Martin to save the girl, get the guy and be home in time for a light snack...maybe a yogurt or something...

marmaduke_2022.opis_neo:
Ko ena od Marmadukovih veličastnih polomij preplavi splet, posnetek pritegne pozornost znanega pasjega učitelja, ki sprejme izziv, da bo iz Marmaduka naredil prvaka na svetovni pasji razstavi.

Naš junak je simpatična (vendar neukrotljiva) nemška doga, ki je najsrečnejši, ko se zabava s svojo družino, Winslowimi, še posebej, ko se igra kavbojce z devetletnim Billyjem. Toda naj se še tako trudijo, zdi se, da Winslowi preprosto ne zmorejo preprečiti Marmaduku, da ne bi vedno znova zabredel v težave. Ko ena od Marmadukovih veličastnih polomij preplavi splet, posnetek pritegne pozornost znanega pasjega učitelja, ki sprejme izziv, da bo iz Marmaduka naredil prvaka na svetovni pasji razstavi. Sledi burna pustolovščina, čeprav ne takšna, kot bi pričakovali. Na koncu bodo Marmaduke in Winslowi dojeli, da v življenju ni najpomembneje zmagovati, temveč ostati zvest sebi in tistim, ki jih imaš rad.
marmaduke_2022.reziser: Mark A.Z. Dippé, Youngki Lee, Phil Nibbelink
marmaduke_2022.opis_omdb: A legendary dog trainer believes he can transform Marmaduke from an undisciplined, but lovable dog, into the first Great Dane to win the World Dog Championship.

space warriors_2013.opis_neo:
Skupina vesoljskih kadetov mora rešiti tri astronavte, katerih pokvarjena vesoljska ladja je ostala v vesolju.

Najstniški kadeti na letnem taboru v Vesoljskem središču dobijo nalogo, da pomagajo rešiti kritični položaj na Mednarodni vesoljski postaji.
space warriors_2013.opis_omdb: A group of kid space cadets must help in the rescue of three astronauts whose ship got stranded in space.

winchester_2018.opis_neo:
Ekscentrična dedinja Sarah Winchester je prepričana, da jo preganjajo duše ljudi, ki so jih ubile puške znamke Winchester.

Film predstavlja zgodbo, navdihnjeno z resnično Sarah Winchester (Helen Mirren) in prikazuje ekscentrično naslednico z orožjem pridobljenega bogastva, ki je prepričana, da jo preganjajo duše tisti, ki so bili ubiti z orožjem znamke winchester. Legenda pravi, da je Sarah Winchester verjela, da bo živa, dokler bo gradila svojo hišo. Film se je snemal na avtentični lokaciji, kar je bilo izjemno težko in zapleteno za filmsko ekipo zaradi stisnjene hiše. Sarah Winchester je neskončno dolgo in ves čas gradila to hišo v prepričanju, da če jo bo nehala, se bodo duhovi umrlih spravili nadnjo in jo na koncu ubili. Hišo je gradila celih 38 let. Toda njena gradnja je bila rahlo bizarna, glede na to, da se razna vrata in okna odpirajo v zidove ali pa preprosto ne vodijo nikamor.
winchester_2018.opis_omdb: Inspired by true events. On an isolated stretch of land fifty miles outside of San Francisco sits the most haunted house in the world. Built by Sarah Winchester (Dame Helen Mirren) heiress to the Winchester fortune, it is a house that knows no end. Constructed in an incessant twenty-four hour a day, seven day a week mania for decades, it stands seven stories tall and contains hundreds of rooms. To an outsider it looks like a monstrous monument to a disturbed woman's madness. But Sarah is not building for herself, for her niece Marion (Sarah Snook), nor for the brilliant Dr. Eric Price (Jason Clarke), who she has summoned to the house. She is building a prison, an asylum for hundreds of vengeful ghosts, and the most terrifying amongst them have a score to settle with the Winchesters.

the hunger games: mockingjay part 2_2015.opis_neo:
V zadnjem delu Iger lakote je Panem v vojni, Katniss pa se s skupino svojih najbližjih prijateljev v zadnjem obračunu sooči s predsednikom Snowom.

V velikem finalu epskega globalnega fenomena Igre lakote se Katniss Everdeen zave, da je na kocki veliko več kot zgolj preživetje - tokrat se bori za prihodnost. Medtem ko njen narod bije kruto vojno, se Katniss sooči s samim predsednikom Snowom. S svojimi zvestimi prijatelji organizira poskus atentata na predsednika, ki postaja čedalje nevarnejši in obseden z željo, da jo uniči. Smrtonosne pasti, številni sovražniki in težke moralne dileme bodo za Katniss predstavljale največji izziv doslej.
the hunger games: mockingjay part 2_2015.opis_omdb: After young Katniss Everdeen agrees to be the symbol of rebellion, the Mockingjay, she tries to return Peeta to his normal state, tries to get to the Capitol, and tries to deal with the battles coming her way...but all for her main goal: assassinating President Snow and returning peace to the Districts of Panem. As her squad starts to get smaller and smaller, will she make it to the Capitol? Will she get revenge on Snow or will her target change? Will she be with her "Star-Crossed Lover," Peeta, or her long-time friend, Gale? Deaths, bombs, bow and arrows, a love triangle, hope... What will happen?

bookworm_2024.opis_neo:
Ko gre Mildredina mama v bolnišnico, pride oče na Novo Zelandijo, da bi skrbel za hčer, ki jo bo zdaj srečal prvič.

Mildred je bistra 11-letnica. Ob mami samohranilki je pobegnila pred dolgočasjem v predmestju tako, da se je potopila v knjižne pustolovščine. Išče dokaz, da je mitološka zver resnična. Njen oče je Strawn Wise, bivši ameriški iluzionist, ki zdaj na zabavah izdeluje živali iz balonov. Ko gre Mildredina mama v bolnišnico, pride oče na Novo Zelandijo, da bi skrbel za hčer, ki jo bo zdaj srečal prvič.
bookworm_2024.opis_omdb: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

clown_2014.opis_neo:
Klovn je odpovedal prihod na Jackov 10. rojstni dan, toda njegov oče Kent najde klovnov kostum in reši zabavo.

Klovn je odpovedal prihod na Jackov 10. rojstni dan, toda njegov oče Kent najde klovnov kostum in reši zabavo. Pozneje pa nikakor ne more sleči klovnovega kostuma, zato ga čudno gledajo, saj gre v službo oblečen v klovna. Toda tudi drugače je nekaj hudo narobe. Spreminja se, toda kostum postaja del njegove kože. Išče način, kako bi ga slekel, medtem ko se sooča s srhljivo in pozabljeno legendo.
clown_2014.opis_omdb: A little boy's birthday party gets ruined when his entertainment (clown) cancels. His father finds a clown suit and becomes the new entertainment but something is weird about it, there is an evil curse and it won't come off. He specializes in eating little kids... everything after that goes down hill.

bad samaritan_2018.opis_neo:
Srhljivi horor triler s priljubljenim Davidom Tennantom v glavni vlogi, najbolj znanem po svoji inkarnaciji Doktorja v kultni nadaljevanki Dr. Who.

Prijatelja delata v dragi restavraciji in izvajata manjše tatvine v hišah premožnih gostov, medtem, ko ti obedujejo v restavraciji. Nekega večera se spravita na hišo nadležnega gosta, v kateri odkrijeta z verigami priklenjeno žensko. Potem, ko obvestita policijo in skušata rešiti žrtev razvpitega psihopata, še sama postaneta njegova tarča.
bad samaritan_2018.opis_omdb: In Portland, the amateurish photographer Sean Falco works with his best friend Derek Sandoval as valet at a fancy restaurant. His girlfriend Riley Seabrook studies in a university and he is estranged of his stepfather. Sean and Derek are also smalltime burglars, stealing from the houses of the customers while they are eating in the restaurant. One day, the obnoxious client Cale Erendreich arrives at the restaurant driving a Maserati and Sean drives his car back to his house using the computer and Derek watches Cale in the restaurant. While snooping around the house, Sean finds a locked room and when he opens the door, he stumbles upon a woman tied to a chair with chains and gagged. He unsuccessfully tries to release her but he is forced to return to the restaurant with the Maserati. Sean decides to call the police, but Cale fools the police officers and turns Sean's life upside-down.

barbaque_2021.opis_neo:
Zakonca skušata rešiti njuno propadajočo mesnico, tako da začneta loviti ljudi, ki prakticirajo veganstvo in prodajata njihovo meso.

Vincent in Sophie sta mesečnika, ki jima propadata posel in zakon. Nekega dne pa se njuno življenje za vselej spremeni, ko Vincent po nesreči ubije aktivista vegana, ki je uničil njuno mesnico. Da bi se znebil trupla, naredi iz njega šunko, ki jo njegova soproga po nesreči proda. Kupci niso še nikoli toliko povpraševali po kakšni šunki! Zdaj sta v skušnjavi, ali bi ponovno morila.
barbaque_2021.opis_omdb: Pascal and his wife Sophie have been running a small local butcher's shop for about twenty years. Sophie stands with great love for her customers at the cash register and Vincent cuts the carefully selected meat with just as much love. And they lived happily ever after, you might think. But then, as is the case with many small tradesmen, business went downhill and so did their relationship. After almost 30 years of marriage, the marriage bed is as alive as the sausages in the counter. Mutual irritation hinders any form of dialogue. Love, business - nothing works out, so Sophie seeks refuge in her great passion: TV shows about serial killers. Vincent unleashes all his love on Pépère, his gentle rottweiler.

les as de la jungle_2017.opis_neo:
V džungli red ohranja druščina živali, med katerimi je tigrica Natacha. Njen sin Maurice želi nadaljevati njeno delo, čeprav je v resnici pingvin.

Maurice je videti kot pingvin, v duši pa je pravi tiger! Vzgajala ga je mama tigrica in je najbolj štorasti kung fu mojster vseh časov. Skupaj s svojimi prijatelji namerava v džungli ohranjati red in mir, kot ga je pred njim njegova mama. Toda to ne bo lahka naloga, saj se zlobna koala želi maščevati in s svojo opičjo vojsko uničiti džunglo.
les as de la jungle_2017.reziser: David Alaux, Eric Tosti, Jean-François Tosti
les as de la jungle_2017.opis_omdb: Maurice may look like a penguin - but he's a real tiger inside! Raised by a tigress, he's the clumsiest Kung-Fu master ever. Along with his friends, The Jungle Bunch, he intends to maintain order and justice in the jungle, as his mother did before him. But Igor, an evil koala, wants to destroy the jungle once and for all, helped by his army of silly baboons... The Jungle Bunch - to the rescue.

ta'igara: an adventure in the himalayas_.naslov_orig: Ta'igara: An Adventure in the Himalayas
ta'igara: an adventure in the himalayas_.opis_neo:
Pustolovski družinski film, ki se odvija v tropskih gozdovih Himalaje.

V himalajski dolini osiroteli deček reši mladiča bengalskega tigra pred neusmiljenimi divjimi lovci, ki so tigrčku ubili mamo. Skupaj se odpravita v goro k samostanu Takcang v Butanu, ki mu pravijo tudi Tigrovo gnezdo, kamor so se budistični menihi umaknili pred kitajsko invazijo na Tibet leta 1950, da bi zaščitili te grandiozne velike mačke. Deček in tiger bosta morala skupaj prepotovati dolgo pot, se soočiti z nevarnostjo, ki preži v gorah, ter prenesti težke vremenske razmere, da bi prišla do tigrčkovega novega doma visoko v Himalaji. Skupaj bosta doživela svojo največjo pustolovščino: pravo prijateljstvo!
ta'igara: an adventure in the himalayas_.opis_omdb: Orphan Balmani rescues tiger cub Mukti from cruel hunters, and together they set off on an adventure to find a safe home for Mukti.

the new daughter_2009.opis_neo:
Do kam bi šel oče, da bi hči zaščitil pred starodavnim zlom, ki jo prevzema?

John se po ločitvi z otrokoma preseli na podeželje. Blizu nove posesti trojica najde skrivnostno gomilo, nad katero se navduši Johnova hči in vse več časa preživi na njej. Njeno vedenje začne postajati vse bolj čudaško. Do kam bi šel oče, da bi hči zaščitil pred starodavnim zlom, ki jo prevzema?
the new daughter_2009.opis_omdb: John James is a writer; his wife has left him. He moves with his middle-school aged daughter and young son to an isolated house off a dirt road in South Carolina. The property has an Indian burial mound, which fascinates his daughter, Louisa, who's entering puberty. Strange things: noises on the roof and in the woods, the cat missing, Luisa sleepwalking clutching a straw doll no one's seen before. She visits the mound often, staying late, coming home covered with mud. John's younger son, Sam, is frightened. John learns the house has a history and seeks out the previous owner. Louisa's behavior becomes more bizarre. Is there an explanation? An ant farm and a missing babysitter provide clues.

the strangers: chapter 1_2024.opis_neo:
Srhljiva serija celovečernih filmskih grozljivk.

Ko se njun avto pokvari sredi srhljivega mesteca, je mlad par (Madelaine Petsch in Froy Gutierrez) prisiljen prenočiti v oddaljeni koči sredi ničesar. Ko se na vratih pojavijo trije zamaskirani tujci in ju začnejo terorizirati, ju zagrabi panika. Njihov napad je neusmiljen in na videz brez motiva.
the strangers: chapter 1_2024.opis_omdb: After their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a young couple is forced to spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorized by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy and seemingly no motive.

brimstone_2016.opis_neo:
Epska zgodba o mladi ženski, ki se v Kanadi v času Divjega zahoda bojuje za svojo in za svobodo svoje družine.

Liz je borbena ženska, ki ji ne manjka poguma in odločnosti, kljub temu, da ne more govoriti. Ko v mesto prispe nov duhovnik se Liz zave, da je v nevarnosti, saj se ji psihopatski fanatik želi maščevati zaradi grehov, ki naj bi jih zagrešila v preteklosti. Toda Liz ne sprejme vloge žrtve in je pripravljena na boj za preživetje, v tem peklu na Zemlji.
brimstone_2016.opis_omdb: A triumphant epic of survival and a tale of powerful womanhood and resistance against the unforgiving cruelty of a hell on earth. Our heroine is Liz (Dakota Fanning), carved from the beautiful wilderness, full of heart and grit, hunted by a vengeful Preacher (Guy Pearce) - a diabolical zealot and her twisted nemesis. But Liz is a genuine survivor; she's no victim - a woman of fearsome strength who responds with astonishing bravery to claim the better life she and her daughter deserve. Fear not. Retribution is coming.

haute tension_2003.opis_neo:
Alexandre Aja, perspektiven mladi francoski režiser vpelje Cécile de France in Maïwenn v noč srhljive groze najstrašnejšega Philippa Nahona.

Alexandre Aja, eden najperspektivnejših mladih francoskih režiserjev, vpelje Cécile de France in Maïwenn v noč srhljive groze najstrašnejšega Philippa Nahona. Film oživi pomembno tradicijo filmov o nočnih morah in spremlja lov morilca, ki se ne ustavi pred ničimer, na dekleti, ki bosta prestopili svoje meje. Sledi groza. Kriminalka z obrati, ob katerih vam bo zamrznila kri v žilah.
haute tension_2003.opis_omdb: Alexia travels with her friend Marie to spend a couple of days with her family in their farm in the country. They arrive late and are welcomed by Alexia's father. Late that night, a sick, sadistic killer breaks into the farmhouse, slaughters Alexia's family--including their dog--and kidnaps Alexia. Marie hides from the criminal and tries to help terrified, hysterical Alexia, chase the maniac, and disclose his identity in the end.

frankenstein_2015.opis_neo:
Zgodba je umeščena v današnji Los Angeles in je v celoti povedana skozi oči pošasti, Adama. Tega ustvarita znanstvenika, a ga nato poskušata ubiti.

Zgodba filma je umeščena v današnji Los Angeles in je v celoti povedana skozi oči pošasti. Po tem, ko so ga umetno ustvarili in ko sta ga ekscentrična zakonca znanstvenika pustila umreti, se Adam sooča zgolj z agresijo in nasiljem sveta okoli sebe. To popolno bitje je postalo pošast, ki se mora soočiti s srhljivo človeško naravo.
frankenstein_2015.opis_omdb: Set in present day Los Angeles and told entirely from the perspective of the Monster. After he is artificially created, then left for dead by a husband-and-wife team of eccentric scientists, Adam is confronted with nothing but aggression and violence from the world around him. This perfect creation-turned disfigured monster must come to grips with the horrific nature of humanity.

the queen's corgi - dubbed_2019.naslov_sl: Korgi: Kraljevski kuža z velikim srcem
the queen's corgi - dubbed_2019.opis_neo:
Animirana pustolovščina o psičku korgiju, najboljšemu prijatelju kraljice Elizabete, od katerega se ne loči že od otroštva.

Rex je najljubši pes britanske kraljice. Nekega dne pa se izgubi v Londonu in kar naenkrat se znajde v družbi najrazličnejših psov, ki se med seboj borijo za preživetje. Na svojem epskem potovanju išče poti za vrnitev na dvor, poleg tega pa se tudi nepričakovano zaljubi in odkrije svojo pravo identiteto.
the queen's corgi - dubbed_2019.opis_omdb: This is about the adventure of Rex (Jack Whitehall), the British monarch's (Dame Julie Walters') most beloved dog, who loses track of his mistress and stumbles across a clan with dogs of all kinds confronting and fighting each other. During his epic journey to return to the Queen, Rex falls in love and discovers his true self.

the childhood of a leader_2015.opis_neo:
Ta strašna pravljica o nastanki avtoritarizma v 20. stoletju pripoveduje o dečku, ki živi v Franciji leta 1918.

Zgodba o nastanku avtoritarizma v 20. stoletju pripoveduje o dečku Prescottu, ki živi v Franciji, in čigar oče dela za ameriško vlado pri sestavljanju versajske mirovne pogodbe. Stvari, ki jim je priča, močno vplivajo na razvoj njegovih prepričanj - mi pa smo priče rojstvu strašnega ega. Navdahnjeno z dogodki iz zgodnjega otroštva številnih velikih diktatorjev 20. stoletja.
the childhood of a leader_2015.opis_omdb: A chronicle of the childhood of a post-World War I leader.

astérix & obélix contre césar_1999.opis_neo:
Prebivalci zadnje neosvojene vasi v Galiji uporabljajo čarobni napoj, da bi se obranili pred rimskimi napadalci.

Rimski cesar Gaj Julij Cezar se odpravi v edino Galsko vasico, ki se še upira njegovemu cesarstvu, kjer izve, da Galcem v boju proti Rimljanom pomaga poseben čarobni napoj. Debelušni Obelix, ki je kot majhen padel v kotel z napojem, je še posebej nepremagljiv. Rimljani, ki se želijo rešiti galske nadloge, načrtujejo ugrabitev zdravilca, ki ima recept za pripravo napoja, in najmočnejšega izmed vseh Galcev, simpatičnega Obelixa.

astérix et obélix : l'empire du milieu_2.naslov_orig: Astérix et Obélix : L'Empire du Milieu
astérix et obélix : l'empire du milieu_2.opis_neo:
Piše se leto 50 pr. n. št. In kitajska cesarica je zaprta po državnem udaru, ki ga je sprožil izdajalski princ.

S pomočjo feničanskega trgovca in svojega zvestega telesnega stražarja, cesaričina edina hči, princesa Sass-Yi pobegne v Galijo, da bi poiskala pomoč pri dveh pogumnih bojevnikih - Asterixu in Obelixu, ki sta zaradi svojega čarobnega napoja obdarjena z nadčloveško močjo. Naša dva nerazdružljiva junaka z veseljem sprejmeta prošnjo na pomoč in tako se na poti do Kitajske začne veliko popotovanje in pustolovščina. Proti Srednjemu kraljestvu pa se odpravlja tudi Cezar in njegova mogočna vojska, željna novega osvajanja…
astérix et obélix : l'empire du milieu_2.opis_omdb: The only daughter of the Chinese emperor Han Xuandi escapes from a strict prince and seeks help from the Gauls and the two brave warriors Asterix and Obelix.

a haunted house_2013.opis_neo:
Oglejte si za umret smešno parodijo na slovite grozljivke, kot so Paranormal Activity, The Devil Inside, Sinister in The Last Exorcism.

V parodiji na slovite grozljivke, se Malcolm in Keisha vselita v hišo svojih sanj, a kmalu spoznata, da se je v njej naselil tudi demon. Ta obsede Keisho, zato se Malcolm, odločen, da znova obudi njuno spolno življenje, po pomoč zateče k duhovniku, jasnovidcu in ekipi izganjalcev duhov. Mu bo uspelo demona izgnati iz svoje drage?
a haunted house_2013.opis_omdb: In October 2012 a video footage is found at the home of Malcolm Johnson and the recordings are still unexplained. Past this prologue a story in flashback form unfolds. During the summer of 2012, Malcolm and Kisha move in together and start a happy life. One night Kisha notices a few unexplained phenomena that convince her their house is haunted by ghosts. To allay her fears Malcom hires a camera crew to film inside the house day and night. A few nights later Malcom and Keisha have sex on camera, despite Keisha's protests at being filmed. Upon reviewing the sex tape the next day, Malcom and Keisha notice a few paranormal phenomena caught on tape. Malcom wants to sell the house but the housing market is slow. Therefore, Malcom decides to hire a psychic to come to the house and investigate. After Kisha confesses to making a deal with the devil for a pair of shoes things start to make sense but it doesn't solve the problems caused by the paranormal phenomena.

a haunted house 2_2014.opis_neo:
Noro odštekana komedija, ki vas bo nasmejala do solz.

Ko je z izganjanjem izgnal hudiča iz svoje nekdanje soproge, Malcolm zaživi na novo z novim dekletom in njenima otrokoma. Mladi zaljubljeni par se preseli v novo sanjko hišo in vse je, kot mora biti. Takrat pa začnejo Malcolma dajati nova paranormalna dogajanja. Nadaljevanje Paranenormalnega je še bolj odštekan, zabavnejši in paranenormalnejši od prvega dela!
a haunted house 2_2014.opis_omdb: After losing his beloved Kisha in a car accident, Malcolm starts anew, by remarrying Megan, a mother of two. When things begin to get back into their paranormal ways, targeting both the children and the property, things complicate even more when his back-to-life Kisha moves into the neighborhood.

terrifier 2_2022.opis_neo:
Potem ko ga je zlovešča entiteta obudila, se klovn Art vrne in se na noč čarovnic loti najstnice in njenega mlajšega brata.

Minilo je točno leto dni od zloglasnega masakra v okrožju Miles. Serijski morilec, klovn Art, se ponovno vrača, tokrat na noč čarovnic. Z demonsko vizijo tokrat preži na najstnico in njenega mlajšega brata. Ko se meje med resničnostjo in brutalno nočno moro zabrišejo, število razkosanih trupel narašča, brat in sestra odkrijeta temačno družinsko skrivnost, katera ju morda lahko reši in zaključi Artovo vladavino terorja.
terrifier 2_2022.opis_omdb: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorize a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

jeanne d'arc_1999.opis_neo:
Najstnica Ivana Orleanska je spremenila potek zgodovine. Navdihnili so jo glasovi, ki jih je slišala, in povsem je presenetila angleške okupatorje.

Leta 1412 se v francoskem mestecu Domrémy rodi mala Ivana. Časi so težki, stoletna vojna s Francijo traja že od leta 1337 in angleški vojaki brezsrčno pustošijo po deželi. Ivana odraste v skrajno pobožno dekle, k spovedi gre nekajkrat na dan. Pri trinajstih ima prvi privid in najde meč. Ob vrnitvi domov najde rodno vas požgano do tal. Leta 1428 se zave, da je njena naloga rešiti Francoze izpod angleškega jarma in se poda v glavno mesto, da se sreča z dofenom Karlom. Le-ta, sredi obupnega vojnega položaja, sprejme vsako pomoč, ki jo lahko dobi, in mladenki da priložnost, da dokaže svojo od boga dodeljeno nalogo. Po uspešni osvoboditvi Orléansa in Reimsa je dofen lahko po tradiciji okronan v katedrali v Reimsu in Ivane ne potrebuje več, saj so se mu izpolnile vse želje. Ivana Orleanska pade v njegovo zanko in postane ujetnica Burgundcev …
jeanne d'arc_1999.opis_omdb: 1429. While the war between France and England (the Hundred Years War) appeared settled in 1420, in England's favour, the death of King Henry V of England reignites it. England occupies large areas of France and appears set to take the whole of it. Into this moment of crisis rides legendary Joan of Arc, a teenage girl who claims to be lead by divine visions.

alpha gateway_2018.opis_neo:
Fizičarka, ki se ukvarja s kvantnimi delci, žaluje zaradi izgube soproga, ki je umrl v prometni nesreči.

Fizičarka, ki se ukvarja s kvantnimi delci, žaluje zaradi izgube soproga, ki je umrl v prometni nesreči. Odpotuje v vzporedno vesolje, da bi ga znova našla, a njena odločitev ima usodne posledice za njeno družino.
alpha gateway_2018.opis_omdb: A particle physicist grieving over the loss of her husband in a car crash travels to a parallel world to find him again, with dire consequences for her family.

hopper et le hamster des ténèbres_2022.naslov_orig: Hopper et le hamster des ténèbres
hopper et le hamster des ténèbres_2022.opis_neo:
Mladi junak Kokozajec je kljub svoji nerodnosti obseden s pustolovščinami.

Kokozajec, nekoliko nenavaden superjunak, posvojenec znanega pustolovca, kralja Peter, si želi - kljub svoji drugačnosti - biti del družbe in biti ljubljen,; obseden je s pustolovščinami, čeprav ni ravno najbolj spretne sorte. Ko iz zapora pobegne najhujši zločinec v kraljestvu - njegov lastni stric Lapin - in zagrozi, da bo s prestola vrgel njegovega očeta, se Kokozajec poda na dirko epskih razsežnosti, da prepreči njegove nakane. Njegovo iskanje Mračnega hrčka postane prava poučna dogodivščina, sploh ob prijateljih, kakršna sta želva Abe in dihurka Meg.
hopper et le hamster des ténèbres_2022.opis_omdb: Set in a lush fantasy world, the film follows the adventures of Chickenhare, a young hero born half chicken and half hare, who was adopted by King Peter, a famous hare adventurer. Eager to fit in and feel loved in spite of his differences, Chickenhare is obsessed with adventuring - no matter how clumsy he is. When the Kingdom's greatest villain - his own uncle - escapes from jail and threatens to overthrow his father, Chickenhare embarks on an epic and initiatory quest along with Abe, a sarcastic turtle, and Meg, a martial arts expert skunk, to stop him.

eliza graves_2014.opis_neo:
V 19. stoletju se mlad zdravnik zaposli v umobolnici in ugotovi, da so revolucionarne nove metode nečloveške ter da se tam dogaja nekaj nenavadnega.

Film je posnet po eni najbolj napetih zgodb genialnega Edgarja Allana Poeja! Zgodba tega srhljivega trilerja se dogaja v 19. stoletju. Umobolnica na samem Stonehearst Asylum je daleč od oči javnosti, v njej pa se zaposli mladi zdravnik Edward Newgate. Kmalu opazi, da se znotraj njenih zidov dogajajo čudne reči, pritegne pa ga tudi prelepa bolnica Eliza Graves.
eliza graves_2014.opis_omdb: A couple of days before 1899 Christmas, the Oxford new graduate Dr. Edward Newgate arrives at the Stonehearst Asylum to complete training for his specialty of asylum medicine. He is met by armed men who take him to Dr. Silas Lamb, who welcomes his help and takes him under his wing. Edward is shocked to see the methods that Dr. Lamb uses to run this asylum. He becomes infatuated with Eliza Graves, one of the patients who is a lady of status and does not seem to belong. One night, Edward overhears a knocking from the bowels of the facility and is shocked to find that everything is not as it seems in this place and that his uneasy feelings may be justified. What will Edward Choose?

valérian et la cité des mille planètes_2.naslov_orig: Valérian et la Cité des mille planètes
valérian et la cité des mille planètes_2.opis_neo:
Temačne sile grozijo metropoli, ki je dom bitjem iz tisočih planetov. Posebna agenta morata poiskati grožnjo ter rešiti mesto in celo vesolje.

Valerian in Laureline sta posebna vladna agenta, zadolžena za ohranjanje reda in miru v vsem vesolju v 28. stoletju. Potujeta skozi čas in dimenzije, da lahko ščitita galaksije in mir v vesolju. Poveljnik (Clive Owen) ju pošlje z ukazom na misijo v medgalaktično mesto Alfa, rastočo metropolo, ki jo sestavlja tisoče planetov. Alfa ima 20 milijonov prebivalcev, ki so združili svoje znanje, tehnologijo in vire za blaginjo vseh. Vendar pa nimajo vsi v Alfi enakih interesov in ciljev; nevidne sile namreč ogrožajo mesto.
valérian et la cité des mille planètes_2.opis_omdb: In the twenty-eighth century, space station Alpha is a city where beings from different planets live together exchanging their knowledge and culture. Peace is granted by a human force, including Major Valerian (Dane DeHaan) and his partner Sergeant Laureline (Cara Delevingne). They are assigned by the Defense Minister (Herbie Hancock) to retrieve the last species of converter in a dangerous mission. They succeed and back to Alpha, unknown humanoids abduct Commander Arun Filitt (Clive Owen) expecting to steal the converter. They head to a forbidden area that is infected, but Valerian and Laureline follow them and disclose a hidden secret about the race and the infected area.

the physician_2013.opis_neo:
Zgodba se odvija v 11. stoletju in spremlja Roba Cola, ki ima posebno moč, da začuti, kdaj človek umira.

Zgodba se odvija v 11. stoletju in spremlja Roba, ki ima posebno moč, da začuti kdaj človek umira. Postane pomočnik potujočega mazača, a ga želja po znanju vodi v Perzijo, v najslavnejšo šolo za zdravnike, ki jo vodi Ibn Sina. Da bi ga sprejeli v muslimanski svet, mora Rob skrivati svoje krščansko poreklo.
the physician_2013.opis_omdb: When nine-year-old Rob Cole felt the life force slipping from his mother's hand he could not foresee that this terrifying awareness of impending death was a gift that would lead him from the familiar life of 11th-century London to small villages throughout England and finally to the medical school at Ispahan. Though apprenticed to an itinerant barber surgeon, it is the dazzling surgery of a Jewish physician trained by the legendary Persian physician Avicenna that inspires him to accept his gift and to commit his life to healing by studying at Avicenna's school. Despite the ban on Christian students, Rob goes there, disguising himself as a Jew to gain admission. Gordon has written an adventurous and inspiring tale of a quest for medical knowledge pursued in a violent world full of superstition and prejudice.

knock knock_2015.opis_neo:
Ko predani mož in oče za konec tedna ostane sam doma, na njegova vrata nepričakovano potrkata izgubljeni dekleti, ki iščeta pomoč.

Prijazna gesta moškega se hitro spremeni v nevarno zapeljevanje in smrtonosno igro mačke z mišjo. V privlačnem trilerju režiserja Elija Rotha Keanu Reeves igra družinskega človeka, ki pade v skušnjavo, Lorenza Izzo in Ana de Armas pa zapeljivki, ki temačna sanjarjenja poročenega moškega spremenita v njegovo najhujšo nočno moro.
knock knock_2015.opis_omdb: When a devoted husband and father is left home alone for the weekend, two stranded young women unexpectedly knock on his door for help. What starts out as a kind gesture results in a dangerous seduction and a deadly game of cat and mouse.
