A sexy new thriller from director Eli Roth and written for the screen by Eli Roth & Nicolás López & Guillermo Amoedo and story by Anthony Overman and Michael Ronald, KNOCK KNOCK stars Keanu Reeves as the family man who falls into temptation and Lorenza Izzo and Ana de Armas as the seductresses who wreak havoc upon his life, turning a married man's dark fantasy into his worst nightmare.

unknown_2006.opis_neo:
Pet moških se zbudi v zaklenjenem skladišču in nobeden se ne spomni, kako so prišli tja niti kdo so.

Pet ljudi se prebudi v zapuščenem in zaprtem skladišču, ne da bi vedeli kdo so in kako so tja prišli. V novem in krutem okolju bodo morali preživeli, a potrebna bo velika mera previdnosti.
unknown_2006.opis_omdb: Five men wake up in a locked-down warehouse with no memory of who they are. They are forced to figure out who is good and who is bad to stay alive.

poker night_2014.opis_neo:
Ko v Indiani v mestu Warshaw postanete detektiv, se udeležite pokrskega večera, kjer igrate proti nekaterim najboljšim policistom.

V Indiani novim detektivom pripravijo pokrski večer, kjer se izbranec pomeri z najboljšimi policisti in posluša njihove anekdote iz službenega vsakdana. Ko se novinec Stan vrača domov s pokrskega večera, ga v roke dobi psihopat in ga zapre v klet. Z zgodbami, ki jih je slišal pri pokru mora preslepiti ugrabitelja ter rešiti sebe in mlado dekle, ki je prav tako zaprto z njim.
poker night_2014.opis_omdb: When you become a detective in Warsaw Indiana - you go to Poker Night, where you play against some of the best cops in the business. They tell you stories about their time on the job - their successes and failures. When new Detective Stan Jeter leaves the game, he is caught by a vicious psychopath and locked in a basement. Using the stories he heard at Poker Night, he must match wits against his captor - and save not only himself, but the young girl trapped in the basement with him. Like Seven and Usual Suspect, Poker Night combines thrills and twists and turns that will leave you guessing till the very end.

der kleine drache kokosnuss_2014.opis_neo:
Zmajček, ki ne zna leteti, se s prijateljema odpravi na pustolovščino, da bi skupaj rešili njihov otok.

Mali zmajček Kokos ni opravil izpita letenja in ne sme na izlet, ki ga organizira njegov razred. Kot da to ni dovolj, ga zadolžijo za čuvanje nasada ognjene trave, ki zmajem daje edinstveno moč. Kljub temu, da bo vložil veliko truda v nalogo, se ta ne bo izšla po načrtih. Toda vse to zaradi njegovega velikega srca.
der kleine drache kokosnuss_2014.opis_omdb: When Coconut, a young fire dragon, is charged with guarding the fire grass that bestows the unique gift of fire breathing upon his race, it is stolen from under his nose. Coconut sets off on a quest to retrieve the fire grass, joining forces with Oscar the gourmet dragon and Matilda the porcupine along the way. Coconut is surprised to find that other dragon races are unsympathetic to fire dragons. Their special gift seems to make the fire dragons extremely unpopular. When Dragon Island's dormant volcano "wakes up" and starts to spew molten lava, Coconut must brave the heat and fumes to bring back the fire grass. Yet does he really want the island to return to the way things were? Can he figure out a way to unite all the dragon races and save the island from destruction?

mary & max_2009.opis_neo:
Prisrčna zgodba o nenavadnem prijateljstvu.

Skozi 20 let in dve celini spremlja film dopisno razmerje med dvema nadvse različnima dopisovalcema: Mary Dinkle, polnejšo osamljeno osemletnico, ki živi v predmestju Melbourna v Avstraliji, in Maxom Horovitzem, izrazito debelim 44-letnim Židom z Aspergerjevim sindromom, ki živi v newyorškem kaosu. Spremljamo Maryjino odraščanje in Maxovo staranje ter odnos, ki preživi veliko več od vzponov in padcev povprečnega prijateljstva.
mary & max_2009.opis_omdb: In the mid-1970's, a homely, friendless Australian girl of 8 picks a name out of a Manhattan phone book and writes to him; she includes a chocolate bar. She's Mary Dinkle, the only child of an alcoholic mother and a distracted father. He's Max Horowitz, an overweight man with Asperger's, living alone in New York. He writes back, with chocolate. Thus begins a 20-year correspondence, interrupted by a stay in an asylum and a few misunderstandings. Mary falls in love with a neighbor, saves money to have a birthmark removed and deals with loss. Max has a friendship with a neighbor, tries to control his weight, and finally gets the dream job. Will the two ever meet face to face?

les aventures extraordinaires d'adele bl.opis_neo:
Zgodba, postavljena v zgodnje 20. stoletje, spremlja priljubljeno pisateljico in njene dogodivščine s snubci, policaji, pošastmi in drugimi motnjami.

Piše se leto 1922. Neustrašna mlada novinarka Adele Blanc-Sec bi naredila vse za svoj cilj, celo odplula v Egipt izkopavat mumije. Medtem ko odpira sarkofage, zajame Pariz panika - izleglo se je jajce pterodaktila, shranjeno v naravoslovnem muzeju, ki je staro 136 let! Mladi pterodaktil leti nad Parizom in straši meščane. Adele pa se ne pusti motiti. Omenjeni dogodki je sploh ne prestrašijo, njene pustolovščine pa razkrivajo še mnogo nenavadnih presenečenj!
les aventures extraordinaires d'adele bl.opis_omdb: Desperate to cure her near catatonic sister, intrepid authoress Adèle Blanc-Sec braves ancient Egyptian tombs and modern Egyptian lowlife to locate a mummified doctor and get him back to Paris. Her hope is that oddball Professor Espérandieu will then use his unusual powers to bring the doctor back to life so he, in turn, can use his centuries-old skills on the unfortunate sister. In Paris however Espérandieu is already causing mayhem, having brought to life what was a safe museum egg but is now a very active pterodactyl. Paris 1911 may not be the healthiest place to be.

robin hood: origins_2018.opis_neo:
Kot mladenič, poln idealov, se Robin odpravi v križarsko vojno.

Legendarni opevani lopov in bojevnik že celo stoletje spodbuja filmarje, da si o njem izmišljajo vedno nove zgodbe. Prizore za ta film so snemali v Dubrovniku na Stradunu, v trdnjavi Bokar in v pristanišču Posat – zahvaljujoč režiserju Ottu Bathurstu, ki je izmed desetih predlaganih lokacij izbral prav biser Dalmacije. Nova inačica Robina Hooda – vznemirljiva akcijska pustolovščina, polna eksplozij, norih prizorov bojevanj in brezčasne romantike – bo prikazala mladostna leta slovitega roparja in razkrila podrobnosti, ki so Robina spodbodle, da se zunaj zakona bojuje za pravice malega človeka. Kot mladenič, poln idealov, se Robin (Taron Egerton) odpravi v križarsko vojno. Tam doživlja eno razočaranje za drugim, a vseeno postane prekaljen bojevnik. Po povratku v rodno Anglijo mu voljo povsem vzame spoznanje, da je njegova dežela polna korupcije; temu se namerava zoperstaviti. S svojim poveljnikom (Jamie Foxx) sproži upor poti pokvarjenemu kralju.
robin hood: origins_2018.opis_omdb: Robin of Loxley, a lord living in Nottingham, enjoys a good life with his lover, Marian, before he is drafted by the corrupt Sheriff of Nottingham to fight in the Third Crusade against the Saracens. After four years away from England, Robin becomes disillusioned with the Crusades when he fails to prevent his commander, Guy of Gisbourne, from executing prisoners, namely a teenage boy, despite the pleading of the boy's father, which prompts Gisbourne to send Robin back home. When he returns to Nottingham, Robin learns from his old friend Friar Tuck that the Sheriff had him officially declared dead two years prior in order to seize Robin's land and wealth to continue funding the war effort at the behest of the corrupt Cardinal, kicking the citizens from the city and into the coal mine town across the river. Investigating 'the Slags', Robin witnesses the commoners planning to rise against the government that oppresses and exploits them and learns that Marian is now involved with their aspiring leader, Will Tillman. Robin is prevented from making contact with her by the Arab whose son he tried to save. The man introduces himself as Yahya - which he says can be translated to "John" - and proposes that he and Robin work to end the war by stealing the money taken from the people to fund the church's war. Marian seeks Robin upon learning that he is alive, but he chooses not to tell her of his plans for her own protection..

american carnage_2022.opis_neo:
Skupina najstnikov, ki so otroci priseljencev, se je prisiljena pridružiti programu oskrbe starejših ljudi in odkrije vladno zaroto.

Potem ko guverner izda ukaz o aretaciji otrok priseljencev brez dokumentov, lahko pridržani svoje obtožbe zavržejo tako, da skrbijo za starejše.
american carnage_2022.opis_omdb: After a governor issues an executive order to arrest the children of undocumented immigrants, the newly detained youth are offered an opportunity to have their charges dropped by volunteering to provide care to the elderly.

operation blood hunt_2024.opis_neo:
Po pogovorih z domačini pacifiškega otoka preiskovalci kmalu odkrijejo, da je izginule marince poklala skupina volkodlakov.

Prečastiti Conte, slovit strokovnjak za okultno in viski, na nek otok v južnem Pacifiku spremlja skupino mož, ki jih niso sprejeli v vojsko; tam naj bi raziskali izginotje več mornariških enot leta 1944, katerih člane naj bi jih v ujetništvu imela Japonska cesarska vojska. Po pogovorih z domačini kmalu odkrijejo, da je marince poklala skupina volkodlakov …
operation blood hunt_2024.opis_omdb: The Reverend, accompanies a ragtag group of military rejects to a remote South Pacific Island to investigate the disappearance of Marine units said to be at the hands of the Japanese Imperial Army.

faces in the crowd_2011.opis_neo:
Osnovnošolska učiteljica Anna Marchant je preživela napad razvpitega serijskega morilca.

Glavna junakinja Anna Merchant si po napadu psihopatskega serijskega morilca ne zapomni več obrazov. Še več, obrazi, ki jih gleda, se nenehno spreminjajo, tudi sebe v ogledalu vidi v različnih oblikah.
faces in the crowd_2011.opis_omdb: The elementary school teacher Anna Marchant lives with her boyfriend Bryce in a nice apartment and every now and then she meets her best friends Francine and Nina to drink and talk. When Anna is crossing a bridge to meet Bryce, she sees an infamous serial-killer killing a woman. Anna runs but she is attacked by the killer and she falls off the bridge and hits her head. Anna stays in coma for a week and when she awakes, she learns that she has brain damage followed by Prosopagnosia, a disorder of face perception where the ability to recognize faces is impaired, while the ability to recognize other objects may be relatively intact. The police detective Sam Kerrest unsuccessfully tries to force Anna to remember the face of the serial-killer. Now the serial-killer knows that Anna has seen his face, but she is incapable of even recognizing Bryce and her close friends.

muse_2017.opis_neo:
Samuel Solomon, profesor književnosti, je bil po tragični smrti svojega dekleta skoraj eno leto brez službe.

Samuel je imel nočne môre, v katerih so žensko brutalno ubili v čudnem obredu. Nenadoma isto žensko, ki jo vsako noč vidi v svojih sanjah, najdejo mrtvo v enakih okoliščinah. Samuel se pritihotapi na prizorišče zločina, kjer sreča Rachel, ki je prav tako sanjala o umoru. 

Skupaj se bosta trudila, da bi odkrila, kdo je skrivnostna ženska, pri čemer vstopita v srhljivi svet, ki ga vodijo figure, ki navdihujejo umetnike skozi vse čase: muze. 

Gre za zrel pristop k nadnaravnemu, prefinjeno vesolje groze, kjer se mora profesor književnosti boriti prti svoji največji ljubezni: poeziji.
muse_2017.opis_omdb: Samuel Salomon, a literature professor, has been off work for almost a year after the tragic death of his girlfriend. Samuel has been suffering from a recurring nightmare in which a woman is brutally murdered by a strange ritual. Suddenly, the same woman who appears every night in his dreams is found dead in exactly the same circumstances. Samuel sneaks into the crime scene and there he meets Rachel who has also dreamed about the murder. Together, they will do whatever they can to discover the identity of the mystery woman, entering a terrifying world controlled by the figures who have inspired artists throughout time: The Muses.

gnome alone - dubbed_2017.opis_neo:
Chloe odkrije, da so vrtni palčki v njenem novem domu nekaj posebnega. Odločiti se mora, ali naj jim pomaga v boju proti zlobnežem iz druge dimenzije.

Deklica Klara se z mamo preseli v staro hišo, kjer odkrije ljubke vrtne palčke. Nekega dne s sosedom Liamom ugotovita, da so palčki v resnici živa bitja, ki se že leta borijo proti zlobnežem iz druge dimenzije in tako ščitijo naš planet. Klara in Liam se povežeta z malimi palčki, da bi pomagala rešiti svet.
gnome alone - dubbed_2017.opis_omdb: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

the woman in black 2: angel of death_201.naslov_orig: The Woman in Black 2: Angel of Death
the woman in black 2: angel of death_201.opis_neo:
Maščevalni duh ženske v črnem se ponovno prikaže, ko zasliši otroke med igro.

Med 2. svetovno vojno so učenci v spremstvu ravnateljice in mlade učiteljice evakuirani iz Londona v zapuščeno vas. Njihov novi dom je stara hiša na otoku kjer v iskanju zavetja prebudijo zloveščo silo, ki je desetletja preganjala obiskovalce posesti. Ko zasliši glasove otrok med igro, se iz teme znova prikaže maščevalni duh Ženske v črnem.
the woman in black 2: angel of death_201.opis_omdb: 40 years after Arthur Kipps' experience at Eel Marsh house, a group of children under the care of two women, escaping from war-torn London, arrive to the house and become the next target for The Woman in Black. With the help of a fellow soldier, the women and children must fend off the spirit, and end her presence once and for all.

le grand bleu_1988.opis_neo:
Jacques in Enzo sta stara prijatelja, ki si delita strast do nevarnega športa, prostega potapljanja.

Kultni film o potapljanju, prijateljstvu in ljubezni, ki ga odlikujejo odlična igra, izjemna glasbena podlaga in Bessonovi prelepi posnetki morskih globin. Jacques in Enzo sta potapljača na dah. Njuno rivalstvo se je začelo že v otroštvu in se le še stopnjevalo, v nevarno in samoljubno tekmovanje.
le grand bleu_1988.opis_omdb: Enzo and Jacques have known each other for a long time. Their friendship started in their childhood days in the Mediterranean. They were not real friends in these days, but there was something they both loved and used to do the whole day long: diving. One day Jacques' father, who was a diver too, died in the Mediterranean sea. After that incident Enzo and Jacques lost contact. After several years, Enzo and Jacques had grown up, Johanna, a young clerk in an insurance office, has to go to Peru. There she meets Jacques who is being studied by a group of scientists. He dives for some minutes into ice-cold water and the scientists monitor his physical state that is more like a dolphin than human. Johanna can not believe what she sees and gets very interested in Jacques but she's unable to get acquainted with him. Some weeks later back in her office, she finds out that Jacques will be competing in a diving championship that takes place in Taormina, Sicily. In order to see Jacques again she makes up a story so the firm sends her to Italy for business purposes. In Taormina there is also Enzo, the reigning diving world champion. He knows that only Jacques can challenge and probably beat him. This time Johanna and Jacques get closer, but Jacques, being more a dolphin than man, cannot really commit and his rivalry with Enzo pushes both men into dangerous territory...

i am mother_2019.opis_neo:
Najstnico vzgaja pod zemljo robot "Mati" zasnovan tako, da ponovno naseli zemljo po izumrtju.

Osamljena najstnica, ki se je rodila iz ene od epruvet v jedrskem zaklonišču je prva iz nove generacije, ki jo vzgaja »Mati« – dobronamerni robot, ki naj bi poskrbel za ponovno poselitev Zemlje po iztrebljenju človeštva. Ko se na vratih zaklonišča nepričakovano pojavi okrvavljena ženska se najstnica znajde v precepu: dvomiti začne o vsem, kar ji je Mati povedala o zunanjem svetu, ne ve, komu naj sploh verjame, in začne raziskovati Materine nakane.
i am mother_2019.opis_omdb: In the wake of humanity's extinction, a teenage girl is raised by a robot designed to repopulate the earth. But their unique bond is threatened when an inexplicable stranger arrives with alarming news.

countdown_2019.opis_neo:
Napeta grozljivka spremlja medicinsko sestro, ki mora v treh dneh nekako rešiti svoje življenje.

Mlada medicinska sestra na telefon prenese aplikacijo, ki naj bi točno predvidela datum človekove smrti. Šokirana ugotovi, da ji aplikacija napoveduje le še tri dni življenja. Čas se ji izteka, njo pa preganja skrivnostna podoba. Dekle začne raziskovati načine, kako rešiti lastno življenje, preden ji zmanjka časa.
countdown_2019.opis_omdb: In a teenage party, a group of friends download the app Countdown that predicts when the user will die. The teenager Courtney sees that she has just a couple of hours to live and does not accept the ride of her drunken boyfriend Evan. She walks home but she is killed by a supernatural creature when the timer in her cellphone reaches zero. Meanwhile Evan crashes his car at the same time of her death and he goes to a hospital where the nurse Quinn Harris works. Evan discloses that he is afraid to go into surgery since the app Countdown predicts that he will die at the same time of the surgery. The doctors and nurses of the hospital decide to download the app and Quinn learns that she has only three days of life. When Evan mysterious dies in an accident at the hospital, Quinn buys a new cellphone and finds that the app is also installed. When she meets Matt Monroe at the parking lot of the store, she learns that his death is predicted for a couple of hours before her and they team-up to look for a means to break the curse.

2067_2020.opis_neo:
Leta 2067 je Zemlja na robu propada.

Leta 2067 je Zemlja na robu propada. Po letih, ko se ni skoraj nič ukrenilo glede podnebnih sprememb, je rastlinsko življenje izumrlo in kisika je vse manj, človeštvo pa pesti Bolezen. Zdravila ni na vidiku, človeštvo pa gleda v prihodnost z upanjem, da bodo ljudje lahko še naprej živeli in našli rešitev za pomanjkanje kisika. Chronicorp, ki je svetovni vodilni dobavitelj sintetičnega kisika, je naredil kvantni časovni stroj, s katerim lahko prideš v prihodnost in se povežeš s potomci. Iz prihodnosti so dobili sporočilo. Kdo ga je poslal? Je za človeštvo še upanje?
2067_2020.opis_omdb: A lowly utility worker is called to the future by a mysterious radio signal, he must leave his dying wife to embark on a journey that will force him to face his deepest fears in an attempt to change the fabric of reality and save humankind from its greatest environmental crisis yet.

porno_2019.opis_neo:
Štirje najstniki in strog operater, ki delajo v majhnem lokalnem kinu, odkrijejo tajno sobo za prikazovanje filmov, polno starinskih porno filmov.

Štirje naivni verni najstniki in strog operater, ki delajo v majhnem lokalnem kinu, leta 1992 odkrijejo tajno sobo za prikazovanje filmov, polno starinskih pornografskih filmov. Predvajanje ene od starih filmskih rol osvobodi privlačno demonko seksa Lilith (Katelyn Pearce), ki poskuša zapeljati vsakega od njih, da bi mu vzela dušo.
porno_2019.opis_omdb: Abe is a burgeoning perv with a guilty conscience. Todd is Abe's spazzed out BFF and partner in grime. Chaz is a girl with a boy's name who hides her feelings behind a thick layer of goth eyeliner. Ricky is the star jock with a secret in his pants he dare not expose. What these uptight dweebs could never have guessed is that the wholesome movie theater they work at used to have a lot more than just gum stuck to the seats. When a remnant of the theater's porno past surfaces, the kids are visited by a sex demon that gives them a taste of the dark side.

gallowwalkers_2012.opis_neo:
Preklet revolveraš, čigar žrtve vstajajo od mrtvih, najame mladega bojevnika za pomoč v boju proti zombijem.

Skupina odpadnikov umori Amanovo dekle, zato se ta odloči poiskati in ubiti morilce. Ko tudi sam umre, se njegova mama nuna odloči prekršiti svojo zaobljubo Bogu in sinu rešiti življenje. Bog jo obsodi na večno prekletstvo, v okviru katerega se Amanove žrtve vrnejo na Zemljo kot živi mrtveci.
gallowwalkers_2012.opis_omdb: A mysterious gunman, Aman, is the son of a nun who breaks her covenant with God to ensure his survival. This act brings a curse upon Aman - all those that die by his gun will return. Soon, he is hunted by a gang of his undead former victims, led by the vicious Kansa. Aman enlists Fabulos, a new young warrior, to fight by his side.

rock dog_2016.opis_neo:
Na zasneženi gori živijo ovce v sožitju, pes Brodi, ki bi jih moral paziti, pa raje igra rokenrol.

Na zasneženi gori živijo ovce v sožitju, pes Brodi, ki bi jih moral paziti, pa raje igra rokenrol. Ko pade z neba radio v roke temu tibetanskemu mastifu, se slednji odpravi od doma, da bi uresničil svoje sanje in postal glasbenik, mimogrede pa bo naletel na kup povsem nepričakovanih situacij.
rock dog_2016.opis_omdb: Teenage Tibetan Mastiff Bodi (Luke Wilson) is expected to be the next guard of the village of Snow Mountain, succeeding his father Khampa (J. K. Simmons), who years ago drove out a pack of gangster Grey wolves, led by the villainous Linnux (Lewis Black). Khampa has some local sheep disguised as Mastiffs to give the illusion the village has multiple guards to keep the wolves at bay, but Bodi has trouble perfecting his father's signature move the Iron Paw, which projects a powerful blast that can only happen if Bodi "finds the fire." Khampa has forbidden music in the village as it distracted Bodi from his duties when he was younger..

kina et yuk, renards de la banquise_2023.naslov_orig: Kina et Yuk, renards de la banquise
kina et yuk, renards de la banquise_2023.opis_neo:
Pustolovščina sledi lisicama, ki se pripravljata na to, da bosta prvič postala starša v času, ko globalno segrevanje spreminja pravila za vse.

Par polarnih lisic - Kina in Yuk - živi na ledeni gori in si želi osnovati družino. Zaradi čedalje toplejšega ozračja in pohajanja hrane mora Yuk ponjo vse bolj daleč. Pri tem nekega dne led poči, in lisici obtičita vsaka na svoji plošči. Vsaka zase se morata spopadati z nevarnostmi in raziskovati nove pokrajine v upanju na ponovno snidenje, da skupaj pričakata rojstvo svojih mladičev.
kina et yuk, renards de la banquise_2023.opis_omdb: The adventure following two foxes who are preparing to become parents for the first time at a time when global warming is altering the rules for everyone.

the himalayas_2015.opis_neo:
Film, posnet po resničnem dogodku, spremlja znanega alpinista, ki se je odpravil na Everest, da bi pripeljal domov truplo svojega prijatelja.

Prijatelja Hong-Gil in Mu-Taek dosežeta vrhunec svoje kariere, ko postaneta 14. moštvo, ki se povzpne na Himalajo, toda poškodba prisili Hong-Gila v upokojitev. Nekaj let pozneje se Mu-Taek med vzponom na Everest ponesreči, zato Hong sestavi ekipo, da bi spravil njegovo truplo z gore. Po resničnem dogodku alpinista, soočenega z največjim izzivom v življenju.
the himalayas_2015.opis_omdb: Following a grueling climb up Kanchenjunga, Hong-gil and Mu-taek become fast friends and partners in climb. The peak of their professional careers comes when they become the 14th team to scale the Himalayas. But the climb came at a price: both sustained injuries and Hong-gil was compelled to retire. Years later, Hong-gil is a renowned lecturer and Mu-taek takes up an assignment to go up Everest. When Hong-gil learns that Mu-taek has gone missing, he blames himself for encouraging the younger man's plans. Looking at a photo of Mu-taek's frozen corpse still trapped on the mountain, he decides to put together a rescue team to retrieve the body. Despite warnings, concerns over his injured leg and treacherous storms, Hong-gil leads the expedition.

paradise hills_2019.opis_neo:
V svetu prihodnosti se mlada ženska zbudi v na videz idilični šoli za prevzgojo mladih dam. A za njenimi zidovi se skrivajo temačne skrivnosti.

V provokativnem režijskem prvencu Alice Waddington se mlada ženska Uma (Emma Roberts) nekega dne zbudi v Paradise Hillsu, vrhunski ustanovi na osamljenem sredozemskem otoku, ki jo vodi Vojvodinja (Milla Jovovich), kamor pošiljajo bogataške družin svoje hčerke, da postanejo popolne različice sebe. Skozi prilagoditvene metode, kamor sodijo tudi bonton, vokalne tehnike, lepotni tretmaji, gimnastika in omejena prehrana, vse telesne in čustvene hipe odstranijo v dveh mesecih. Preobrazba je zajamčena. Uma najde tolažbo in prijateljstvo pri drugih stanovalkah - Chloe (Danielle McDonald), Yui (Awkwafina) in pop zvezdi Amarni (Eiza Gonzalez), vendar pa kmalu dojame, da se za vso to lepoto skriva mračna skrivnost. Začne se tekma s časom, ko skušajo Uma in njene prijateljice pobegniti in se rešiti.
paradise hills_2019.opis_omdb: In an undetermined future, society has divided into two sub-types: upper-class or "Uppers", and the rest of the world, mid and lower-class, named "Lowers". Uma is a privileged young woman who is adamantly against marrying another Upper, named Son. Instead, she falls in love with a working class young man named Markus. She is thus sent to Paradise Hills, a school for young ladies located in a remote island in the middle of the ocean. Waking up in Paradise not knowing how she arrived there, she soon meets other students: Amarna, a pop-star who was sent after she decided to sing her own songs against the will of the company that controls her records. Chloe, a plus-sized young lady those parents want to turn thin and compliant. And Yu, a Lower who was sent by her aunt and uncle after refusing to inherit her family business. Uma then meets the eccentric Duchess, Paradise Hills' headmaster. She tries to convince Uma to marry up, just as her mother wants her to. Uma soon suspects a hidden purpose behind all the facility's luxuries. Its elegant staging and the daily sessions of make-up, hairdressing, good manners and therapy are not working on any of her classmates, either. While Amarna and Uma concoct a plan to escape; the latter becomes shocked when Markus appears as part of the Paradise Hills' staff. Amarna, who had started to feel attracted to Uma, feels bitter about this. Finally, alerted by Amarna about their dinners being laced with a sleep-inducing substance, Uma manages to investigate Paradise Hills at night. Discovering the bone-chilling truth: the island is a giant control room to analyze the students' behavior and appearance, in order to be replicated by Lower women, hired to replace the Uppers after the original women are killed. With time running against her, Uma and the rest of her girl gang must find a way to survive before they are up next.

in the electric mist_2009.opis_neo:
V New Orleansu detektiv preiskuje serijske umore prostitutk, linčanje iz leta 1965 ter pokvarjenega poslovneža.

Nova Iberija, Louisiana. Detektiv Dave Robicheaux poskuša izslediti serijskega morilca, ki mesari mlade ženske. Ko se vrača z enega od prizorišč umorov, sreča hollywoodskega zvezdnika Elroda T. Sykesa…
in the electric mist_2009.opis_omdb: A detective in post-Katrina New Orleans has a series of surreal encounters with a troop of ghostly Confederate soldiers while investigating serial killings of local prostitutes, a 1965 lynching, and corrupt local businessmen.

kandisha_2020.opis_neo:
Legenda je resnična Kandisha je na morilskem pohodu.

Med poletnimi počitnicami se najboljše prijateljice družijo z najstniki iz soseščine. Ponoči si čas kratijo s pripovedovanjem srhljivih zgodbic. A ko Amélie napade njen nekdanji, se ona spomni na zgodbo o Kandishi, maščevalnem demonu. Naslednji dan njenega nekdanjega najdejo mrtvega. Legenda je torej resnična in Kandisha je zdaj krenila na ubijalski pohod.
kandisha_2020.opis_omdb: It is summer break and best friends Amélie, Bintou and Morjana hang together with the neighborhood teenagers. At night, they have fun sharing goosebumps stories and urban legends. But when Amélie is assaulted by her ex, she remembers the story of Kandisha, a powerful and vengeful demon. Afraid, upset, she summons her. The next day, her ex is found dead. The legend is true and now Kandisha in on a killing spree. The three girls will do anything to break the curse.

immortals_2011.opis_neo:
Potem ko so pred mnogimi leti bogovi dobili bitko proti Titanom, Zemlji grozi nova nevarnost.

Epska zgodba o maščevanju in usodi. Oblasti željni kralj Hiperion grozi z uničenjem vsega človeštva v svojem norem iskanju najmočnejšega orožja – legendarnega epirskega loka, ki daje moč, da vojno povzročiš tako na nebu kot na Zemlji.
immortals_2011.opis_omdb: Eons after the Gods won their mythic struggle against the Titans, a new evil threatens the land. Mad with power, King Hyperion (Mickey Rourke) has declared war against humanity. Amassing a bloodthirsty army of soldiers disfigured by his own hand, Hyperion has scorched Greece in search of the legendary Epirus Bow, a weapon of unimaginable power forged in the heavens by Ares (Daniel Sharman). Only he who possesses this bow can unleash the Titans, who have been imprisoned deep within the walls of Mount Tartaros since the dawn of time and thirst for revenge. In the King's hands, the bow would rain destruction upon mankind and annihilate the Gods. But ancient law dictates the Gods must not intervene in man's conflict. They remain powerless to stop Hyperion, until a peasant named Theseus (Henry Cavill) comes forth as their only hope. Secretly chosen by Zeus (Luke Evans), Theseus must save his people from Hyperion and his hordes. Rallying a band of fellow outsiders, including visionary Priestess Phaedra (Freida Pinto) and cunning slave Stavros (Stephen Dorff), one hero will lead the uprising, or watch his homeland fall into ruin and his Gods vanish into legend.

brighton rock_2010.opis_neo:
Zgodba o mladem gangsterju Pinkieju, ki se je za vsako ceno odločen povzpeti do najvišjih sfer organiziranega kriminala.

Kriminalna drama združi klasične elemente filma noir in britanske kriminalke v zgodbi o Pinkieju, mladem gangsterju, ki se je za vsako ceno odločen povzpeti do najvišjih sfer organiziranega kriminala.

Mlada in naivna natakarica Rose naleti na dokaze, ki ga nedvoumno povežejo z umorom zaradi maščevanja tekmecu, zato jo Pinkie sklene zapeljati in nazadnje oženiti, da bi si tako zagotovil njen molk.

V vlogi mladega para se pojavita britanska igralca Sam Riley in Andrea Riseborough; zvezdniška veterana Helen Mirren in John Hurt pa sta prijatelja, ki skušata rešiti Rose pred Pinkiejevimi mračnimi načrti.
brighton rock_2010.opis_omdb: An adaptation of Graham Greene's classic novel about a small-town hood who marries a waitress who deduced that he killed a rival thug in order to keep her quiet. As his gang begins to doubt his abilities, the man becomes more desperate and violent.

2012_2009.opis_neo:
Akademski raziskovalec vodi skupino ljudi v boju proti apokaliptičnim dogodkom, ki jih je napovedal starodavni majevski koledar.

Ko se svet začne uničevati, se človeštvo bori za preživetje. Jackson Curtis in njegova družina se trudijo ubežati udarcem meteoritov, potresom ter drugim naravnim nesrečam, ki se ena za drugo zgrinjajo nad Zemljo.
2012_2009.opis_omdb: Dr. Adrian Helmsley, part of a worldwide geophysical team investigating the effect on the earth of radiation from unprecedented solar storms, learns that the earth's core is heating up. He warns U.S. President Thomas Wilson that the crust of the earth is becoming unstable and that without proper preparations for saving a fraction of the world's population, the entire race is doomed. Meanwhile, writer Jackson Curtis stumbles on the same information. While the world's leaders race to build "arks" to escape the impending cataclysm, Curtis struggles to find a way to save his family. Meanwhile, volcanic eruptions and earthquakes of unprecedented strength wreak havoc around the world.

mrs. henderson presents_2005.opis_neo:
Zgodba o resničnem londonskem gledališču, ki ga tik pred drugo svetovno vojno odpre ovdovela gospa Henderson.

London leta 1937. Ga. Laura Henderson (Judi Dench), premožna ženska iz dobre družine, je pred kratkim pokopala ljubljenega moža. Zdaj ji je dolgčas. Pri 69-ih je preveč energična in vitalna, da bi se prepustila mirnemu življenju vdove. Prijateljica lady Conway ji predlaga, naj si omisli hobi. Morda bi zbirala diamante ali se ukvarjala z dobrodelnostjo. Toda na ogorčenje svojih prijateljic se Laura odloči kupiti gledališče Windmill v središču Soha. O upravljanju gledališča ne ve ničesar, zato najame Viviana Van Damma (Bob Hoskins). Ga. Henderson osupne tudi poklicnega zabaviščnika, saj je nesramna, provokativna in čudaška. Ter zelo neolikana.
mrs. henderson presents_2005.opis_omdb: Recently widowed well-to-do Mrs. Laura Henderson (Dame Judi Dench) is at a bit of a loose end in inter-war London. On a whim, she buys the derelict Windmill theatre in the West End and persuades impresario Vivian Van Damm (Bob Hoskins) to run it, despite the fact the two don't seem to get along at all. Although their idea of a non-stop revue is at first a success, other theatres copy it and disaster looms. Laura suggests they put nudes in the show, but Van Damm points out that the Lord Chamberlain, Lord Rowland Baring, 2nd Earl of Cromer (Christopher Guest), who licenses live shows in Britain, is likely to have something to say about this. Luckily, Mrs. Henderson is friends with him.

the last exorcism part ii_2013.opis_neo:
Ko Nell Sweetzer poskuša zgraditi novo življenje po vseh dogodkih, se zlobna sila, ki jo je nekoč obsedla, vrne s še bolj grozljivim načrtom.

Nell Sweetzer si skuša ustvariti novo življenje po dogodkih iz prvega filma. Nahaja se na varnem v New Orleansu, kjer se sooča z izgubo spomina. Spominja se le tega, da je edina preživela v družini in da je njeno življenje popolnoma uničeno. Ko se k njej začne vračati zla sila, ki jo je nekoč že imela v krempljih, Nell dojame, da je bila predhodna izkušnja še le začetek.
the last exorcism part ii_2013.opis_omdb: Seventeen year-old Nell Margaret Sweetzer is found completely insane when trying to explain her possession by the demon called Abalam. After medical and psychological treatment, she is sent to the Deveraux transition house in New Orleans managed by Frank Merle, who helps her to start a new life. She finds a job as a hotel housekeeper, befriends her new roommates, and develops a crush on her coworker, Chris. Soon, Nell comes to realize that she is haunted by people from her cult... and by the same evil force that once possessed her. When Nell meets Miss Cecile, she tells Nell that she has been following her since the hospital. Further, she discloses that she belongs to the sect Order of The Right Hand, and that they can protect her from the evil in an attempt to divert the prophecy of an apocalypse. Will Nell accept help, and be protected from the extremely powerful, evil force Abalam -- Or will she come to accept... herself?

unga astrid_2018.opis_neo:
To je zgodba, ko je mlada Astrid kljub pričakovanju tistega obdobja in verske vzgoje zavrgla družbene normative in poslušala svoje srce.

Ko je bila Astrid Lindgren zelo mlada, se je zgodilo nekaj, kar je globoko vplivalo nanjo; ta mešanica čudeža in nesreče je zaznamovala njeno življenje. Dogodek jo je spremenil v eno najbolj navdihujočih žensk našega časa, pripovedovalko, ki jo je vzljubil ves svet.
unga astrid_2018.opis_omdb: Biopic of Swedish writer Astrid Lindgren, the author of numerous children's books and creator of Pippi Longstocking.

then came you_2018.opis_neo:
Neozdravljivo bolna najstnica in 19-letni hipohonder drug drugemu pomagata uresničiti svoje sanje in se soočiti s strahovi.

Energična najstnica Skye je v zadnjem stadiju neozdravljive bolezni. Svoje popoldneve preživlja s prijateljem Calvinom, 19-letnim hipohondrom, ki ji pomaga pri uresničevanju želja z njenega ekscentričnega seznama stvari, ki jih želi izkusiti pred smrtjo. Medtem se tudi sam sooča s svojimi strahovi in zaljubljenostjo v lepo, toda na videz nedosegljivo Izzy.
then came you_2018.opis_omdb: A hypochondriac working as an airport baggage handler is forced to confront his fears when a British teenager with a terminal illness enlists him to help her carry out her eccentric bucket list.

woman in gold_2015.opis_neo:
Ko osemdesetletna Maria Altmann izve, da bi morala biti lastnica slavne mojstrovine Gustava Klimta, se z mladim odvetnikom odpravi na Dunaj.

Ko osemdesetletna Židinja Maria Altmann izve, da bi morala biti lastnica najslavnejšega portreta Gustava Klimta, se skupaj z mladim odvetnikom Randolom začne neusmiljeno boriti za svojo lastnino. Nenavadna dvojica se iz Amerike odpravi na Dunaj in dvigne na noge vso Avstrijo, saj se domov ne namerava vrniti praznih rok.
woman in gold_2015.opis_omdb: Maria Altmann (Dame Helen Mirren) sought to regain a world famous painting of her aunt plundered by the Nazis during World War II. She did so not just to regain what was rightfully hers, but also to obtain some measure of justice for the death, destruction, and massive art theft perpetrated by the Nazis.

adrift_2018.opis_neo:
Tami Oldham in njen zaročenec Richard Sharp se odpravita na potovanje prek oceana in ne slutita, da ju bo zajel najmočnejši orkan v zgodovini.

Resnična zgodba o Tami Oldham in njenem zaročencu Richardu Sharpu, ki sta se odpravila na potovanje prek oceana, nesluteč, da ju bo zajel najmočnejši orkan v zgodovini. Ko se Tami po orkanu prebudi in najde uničeno barko ter težko poškodovanega Richarda, mora najti moč, da ju brez navigacije ali drugih pripomočkov spravi na varno.
adrift_2018.opis_omdb: Starring Shailene Woodley and Sam Claflin, Adrift is based on the inspiring true story of two free spirits whose chance encounter leads them first to love, and then to the adventure of a lifetime. As the two avid sailors set out on a journey across the ocean, Tami Oldham (Woodley) and Richard Sharp (Claflin) couldn't anticipate they would be sailing directly into one of the most catastrophic hurricanes in recorded history. In the aftermath of the storm, Tami awakens to find Richard badly injured and their boat in ruins. With no hope for rescue, Tami must find the strength and determination to save herself and the only man she has ever loved. Adrift is the unforgettable story about the resilience of the human spirit and the transcendent power of love.

a hologram for the king_2016.opis_neo:
Lepa zdravnica in prebrisan taksist pomagata ameriškemu poslovnežu, ki skuša v Savdski Arabiji skleniti posel življenja.

Ko ostane brez službe in ga zapusti žena, Alan vse svoje upe položi v 'Ekonomsko mesto kralja Abdulaha', sodobno metropolo v arabski puščavi. Toda, ko prispe tja, se kralj ne udeleži sestanka. Alan se nato spoprijatelji z mladim šoferjem Jusefom, s katerim spoznava državo in vsa protislovja sodobnega in tradicionalnega sveta.
a hologram for the king_2016.opis_omdb: A failed American sales rep looks to recoup his losses by traveling to Saudi Arabia and selling his company's product to a wealthy monarch.

the expendables 3_2014.opis_neo:
Barney v svojo skupino plačancev sprejme svežo kri, da bi mu pomagala v osebni vojni s soustanoviteljem skupine, zdaj zapriseženim sovražnikom.

Barney Ross s svojo ekipo plačancev ugotovi, da je prekupčevalec z orožjem, ki ga zasledujejo, Conrad Stonebanks, njegov nekdanji partner in soustanovitelj plačancev. Ko jo v spopadu skoraj skupi veteranski član ekipe, se Barney odloči dolgoletne sodelavce zamenjati za skupino mladih zagnancev, ki so hitrejši in bolj tehnološko podkovani.
the expendables 3_2014.opis_omdb: Barney, Christmas and the rest of the team comes face-to-face with Conrad Stonebanks, who years ago co-founded The Expendables with Barney. Stonebanks subsequently became a ruthless arms trader and someone who Barney was forced to kill - or so he thought. Stonebanks, who eluded death once before, now is making it his mission to end The Expendables -- but Barney has other plans. Barney decides that he has to fight old blood with new blood, and brings in a new era of Expendables team members, recruiting individuals who are younger, faster and more tech-savvy. The latest mission becomes a clash of classic old-school style versus high-tech expertise in the Expendables' most personal battle yet.

expend4bles_2023.opis_neo:
Nova generacija zvezdnikov se pridruži najboljšim svetovnim akcijskim zvezdnikom, ki jih čaka adrenalinska pustolovščina.

Oboroženi z vsemi orožji, ki jih lahko dobijo in veščinami za njihovo uporabo, so Plačanci zadnja obrambna črta na svetu in ekipa, ki jo pokličejo, ko odpovejo vse druge možnosti. Toda novi člani ekipe z novimi slogi in taktikami bodo dali "novi krvi" povsem nov pomen, ko se zoperstavijo nevarnemu teroristu, ko ta poskuša zanetiti tretjo svetovno vojno.
expend4bles_2023.opis_omdb: A new generation of stars join the world's top action stars for an adrenaline-fueled adventure in Expend4bles. Reuniting as the team of elite mercenaries, Jason Statham, Dolph Lundgren, Randy Couture, and Sylvester Stallone are joined for the first time by Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson, Megan Fox, Tony Jaa, Iko Uwais, Jacob Scipio, Levy Tran, and Andy Garcia. Armed with every weapon they can get their hands on and the skills to use them, The Expendables are the world's last line of defense and the team that gets called when all other options are off the table. But new team members with new styles and tactics are going to give "new blood" a whole new meaning.

the machinist_2004.opis_neo:
El Maquinista že eno leto ne more spati, zato začne dvomiti v svojo prisebnost.

Trevor Reznik je človek, ki ne ve, če sploh še obstaja ali ne. Spal ni že več kot leto dni in tako je že koščen, da dobesedno izginja. Ve da pred nekom beži, a ne more dojeti pred kom. Prepričan je, da je žrtev zlobne zarote, zato ne verjame nikomur več. Edina svetla točka v njegovem življenju je prostitutka, ki je zaljubljena vanj. Ko najde v stanovanju skrivnostna sporočila in ga začne preganjati skrivnostni kolega, ki ga vidi le on, se Trevor odpravi poiskati resnico.
the machinist_2004.opis_omdb: Trevor Reznik is a machinist in a factory. An extreme case of insomnia has led to him not sleeping in a year, and his body withering away to almost nothing. He has an obsessive compulsion to write himself reminder notes and keep track of his dwindling weight, both scribbled on yellow stickies in his apartment. The only person he lets into his life in an emotional sense is Stevie, a prostitute, although he has an infatuation with Maria, a single mother waitress working in an airport diner. His co-workers don't associate with and mistrust him because of not knowing what is going on in his life that has led to his emaciated physical appearance. A workplace incident further alienates him with his coworkers, and in conjunction with some unfamiliar pieces of paper he finds in his apartment, Trevor believes that someone or some people - probably one or some of his coworkers - are out to get him, using a phantom employee named Ivan as their front. As Trevor goes on a search for evidence as to Ivan's schemes and whereabouts, Trevor may come to a true understanding of what has caused his insomnia.

aftershock_2012.opis_neo:
Prijatelji se zabavajo v čilskem podzemnem nočnem klubu, ko pride do hudega potresa, ki jih ujame pod zemljo.

Skupina turistov se znajde v čilskem podzemnem nočnem klubu, ko pride do hudega potresa. Ujeti pod zemljo izvedo, da je potres porušil tudi bližnji zapor, ter da je uspelo vsem zapornikom pobegniti. Kmalu odkrijejo, da edino kar je bolj grozljivo od matere narave, je človeška narava.
aftershock_2012.opis_omdb: After an earthquake erupts in Chile, tourists discover that a neighboring prison in the area collapsed in the event, and all of the surviving criminals managed to break free. Soon they learn that the most terrifying thing, more threatening than Mother Nature, is what she created.

the mortal instruments: city of bones_20.naslov_orig: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
the mortal instruments: city of bones_20.opis_neo:
Filmska upodobitev prve knjižne uspešnice avtorice Cassandre Clare iz serije Kronika podzemlja.

Clary Fray je običajno dekle, ki neke noči ob obisku nočnega kluba odkrije obstoj nadnaravnega sveta in spozna resnico o svojem poreklu. Ko zlobni demon ugrabi njeno mamo, je pripravljena storiti vse, da bi jo rešila. Clary sprejme svoje krvno nasledstvo in se poda na pustolovščino, kjer v boju med silami teme in svetlobe odkriva svoje nadnaravne moči.
the mortal instruments: city of bones_20.opis_omdb: Set in contemporary New York City, a seemingly ordinary teenager, Clary Fray, discovers she is the descendant of a line of Shadowhunters, a secret cadre of young half-angel warriors locked in an ancient battle to protect our world from demons. After the disappearance of her mother, Clary must join forces with a group of Shadow Hunters, who introduce her to a dangerous alternate New York called the Shadow World, filled with demons, warlocks, vampires, werewolves and other deadly creatures.

ballerina - dubbed_2016.opis_neo:
Čudovita zgodba o vztrajnosti in volji za uresničitev sanj, saj ni nič nemogoče. Nikoli ne obupaj nad svojimi sanjami, naj je še tako težko.

Čudovita zgodba o vztrajnosti in volji za uresničitev sanj spremlja enajstletno siroto Felicijo, katere največja želja je postati balerina v Pariški operi. S prijateljem Viktorjem skujeta genialen načrt, kako iz sirotišnice pobegniti v Pariz in se vpisati v baletno šolo, kljub temu, da se bo morala truditi dvakrat bolj, da bi uresničila svoje sanje.
ballerina - dubbed_2016.opis_omdb: Float like a butterfly, sting like a bee.

a family man_2016.opis_neo:
Medtem ko se Dane pripravlja na poslovni spopad življenja, izve, da so pri njegovem desetletnem sinu Ryanu odkrili raka.

Dane Jensen je zelo ambiciozen lovec na talente, uslužbenec vplivnega podjetja iz Chicaga. Ko Danov šef napove svojo upokojitev, se začne boj za nadzor podjetja. Medtem ko se Dane pripravlja na poslovni spopad življenja, izve, da so pri njegovem desetletnem sinu Ryanu odkrili raka. Dane je tako nenadoma razpet med poslovnimi sanjami in preživljanjem časa s soprogo ter sinom.
a family man_2016.opis_omdb: As the boss (Willem Dafoe) of a Chicago-based headhunter prepares to retire, Dane Jensen (Gerard Butler), who works at the Blackridge Recruiting agency arranging jobs for engineers, vies to achieve his longtime goal of taking over the company going head-to-head with his ambitious rival, Lynn Vogel (Alison Brie). However, Dane's 10-year-old son, Ryan (Maxwell Jenkins), is suddenly diagnosed with cancer and his professional priorities at work and personal priorities at home begin to clash with one another.

todos los nombres de dios_2023.opis_neo:
Po napadu eden od preživelih teroristov vzame taksista za talca.

Po terorističnem napadu na madridskem letališču taksist Santiago reši poškodovanega Hamzo, za katerega se izkaže, da je edini preživeli samomorilski napadalec, in ga ugrabi z naperjenim orožjem.
todos los nombres de dios_2023.opis_omdb: A taxi driver is taken hostage after a terrorist attack by one of the terrorist survivors.

burnt_2015.opis_neo:
Uspešen kuhar z dvema Michelinovima zvezdicama, slabimi razvadami in še slabšim slovesom, želi doseči še tretjo zvezdico, ki se mu nenehno izmika.

Kuharski mojster Adam Jones je imel vse, a je vse tudi izgubil. Uspešen kuhar z dvema Michelinovima zvezdicama, slabimi razvadami in še slabšim slovesom, želi vedno vse narediti po svoje. Da bi dobil še tretjo Michelinovo zvezdico, ki se mu nenehno izmika, mora marsikaj spremeniti in na svojo stran pridobiti najboljše v poslu.
burnt_2015.opis_omdb: Chef Adam Jones (Bradley Cooper) had it all - and lost it. A two-star Michelin rockstar with the bad habits to match, the former enfant terrible of the Paris restaurant scene did everything different every time out, and only ever cared about the thrill of creating explosions of taste. To land his own kitchen and that third elusive Michelin star though, he'll need the best of the best on his side, including the beautiful Helene (Sienna Miller).

the son of no one_2011.opis_neo:
Mladi policist (Tatum) je premeščen na policijsko postajo v Queensu, v soseski, kjer je odrasel.

Mladi policist dobi delo v soseki, v kateri je odraščal. Stara skrivnost grozi, da mu bo uničila življenje in družino.
the son of no one_2011.opis_omdb: A rookie cop is assigned to the 118 Precinct in the same district where he grew up. The Precinct Captain starts receiving letters about two unsolved murders that happened many years ago in the housing projects when the rookie cop was just a kid. These letters bring back bad memories and old secrets that begin to threaten his career and break up his family.

bleed_2016.opis_neo:
Nedolžni lov na duhove se spremeni v smrtonosno grožnjo, ko se šest prijateljev odpravi preiskovati požgani zapor.

Nedolžni lov na duhove se spremeni v smrtonosno grožnjo, ko se šest prijateljev odpravi preiskovati požgani zapor in se soočijo s strahotami tega sveta in tistega v onstranstvu.
bleed_2016.opis_omdb: It seemed perfect - a new marriage, a new house, and a child on the way. But when Sarah and Matt invite their friends to celebrate, an innocent ghost hunt turns deadly as they explore the remains of a burned-out prison. The ill-fated group encounters horrors of this world and beyond. No one is safe - not even the unborn.

the whole ten yards_2004.opis_neo:
Upokojeni plačani morilec Jimmy uživa v mirnem življenju v svoji hiši na mehiški obali. Kmalu pa nepovabljen gost zmoti mirno idilo.

Nekdanji plačani morilec Jimmy Tudeski se je umaknil iz posla in s svojo ženo živi umirjeno življenje ter se pri tem predaja malim užitkom, ki jih zanj predstavljata pospravljanje in kuhanje. Čeprav si njegova žena Jill želi nekaj starega, vznemirljivega in negotovega življenja plačanih morilcev — poklic, o katerem je tudi sama vedno sanjala, da bi ga opravljala — pa Jimmy vztraja pri tem, da se ne namerava odreči mirnemu življenju, ki mu ga je prinesla uprizoritev lastne smrti. 

Pri tem mu je pomagal njegov nekdanji sosed Nicholas Oseransky, zobozdravnik, ki pa se zdaj nekega dne nenadoma pojavi na njegovih vratih. Jimmyjev nasprotnik, zloglasni kriminalec Lazlo Gogolak, je ugrabil Nicholasevo ženo in ta ga prosi za pomoč. Pravzaprav si ga drzne celo spomniti na to, da se ima za sedanje mirno življenje zahvaliti prav njemu, zato bi mu moral uslugo pravzaprav vrniti. 

A Jimmyja tudi to ne prepriča povsem, da bi se odrekel temu prekrasnemu dolgočasnemu življenju in se soočil s surovežem, kakršen je Gogolak. Nadaljevanje priljubljene akcijske komedije Morilca mehkega srca.
the whole ten yards_2004.opis_omdb: Thanks to falsified dental records supplied by his former neighbor Nicholas "Oz" Oseransky (Matthew Perry), retired hit man Jimmy "The Tulip" Tudeski (Bruce Willis) now spends his days compulsively cleaning his house and perfecting his culinary skills with his wife, Jill, a purported assassin who has yet to pull off a clean hit. Suddenly, an uninvited and unwelcome connection to their past unexpectedly shows up on Jimmy and Jill's doorstep: it's Oz, and he's begging them to help him rescue his wife from the Hungarian mob. To complicate matters even further, the men, who are out to get Oz, are led by Lazlo Gogolak (Kevin Pollak), a childhood rival of Jimmy's and another notorious hit man. Oz, Jimmy and Jill will have to go the whole nine yards--and then some--to manage the mounting Mafioso mayhem.

7 days in entebbe_2018.opis_neo:
Film je navdihnila resnična zgodba o leta 1976 ugrabljenjem letalu, ki je bilo na poti iz Tel Aviva v Pariz, ter najbolj drzni reševalni misiji.

Ko 27. junija 1976 ugrabijo letalo Air Francea na poti iz Tel Aviva v Pariz, je 248 potnikov prisiljenih predati potne liste, medtem, ko ugrabljeno letalo pristane na letališču Entebbe v Ugandi, kjer ga pričaka zloglasni diktator Idi Amin. Približuje se rok za izpolnitev zahtev ugrabiteljev in napetost raste, ko elitna enota izraelskih komandosov hiti v Entebbe.
7 days in entebbe_2018.opis_omdb: In July 1976, an Air France flight from Tel-Aviv to Paris via Athens was hijacked and forced to land in Entebbe, Uganda. The Jewish passengers were separated and held hostage in demand to release many terrorists held in Israeli prisons. After much debate, the Israeli government sent an elite commando unit to raid the airfield and release the hostages.

gods of egypt_2016.opis_neo:
Po letih vladavine pravičnega boga Hora prestol zasede Set, ki deželi zavlada s trdo roko. Preživetje človeštva se znajde v rokah smrtnika Beka.

Preživetje človeštva je v rokah navadnega smrtnika, junaka Beka, ki združi moči z egipčanskim bogom Horom, da bi rešil svet. Vse odkar je ta v rokah neusmiljenega boga teme, se je nekoč mirno in bogato egipčansko cesarstvo spremenilo v prizorišče kaosa in bojev.
gods of egypt_2016.opis_omdb: Set, the merciless god of darkness, has taken over the throne of Egypt and plunged the once peaceful and prosperous empire into chaos and conflict. Few dare to rebel against him. A young thief, whose love was taken captive by the god, seeks to dethrone and defeat Set with the aid of the powerful god Horus.

hummingbird_2013.opis_neo:
Travmatiziran bivši vojak, ki se prebija skozi londonsko kriminalno podzemlje, prevzame identiteto drugega človeka.

Človeka na strahote vojne ne pripravi prav nič. Joey Smith, dezerter im zdaj brezdomec, odvisen o mamil, tava po ulicah Londona, a ga določeno odkritje postavi nazaj na noge: korak za korakom si Smith prizadeva urediti življenje, in pod ukradeno identiteto služi kot neustavljiva gorila kitajske mafije. A smrt ljube prijateljice ga primora v maščevalni pohod, pri čemer drsi vse globlje v temačen svet bolečine, krivde in trpljenja. Ima Bog med svojimi načrti tudi odrešenje za "Norega" Joeya?
hummingbird_2013.opis_omdb: The hummingbird dives and darts with great agility, representing fertility and joy. Huitzilopochtil is an expression of willpower, strength and survival carried forward through dance.

o lobo atrás da porta_2014.opis_neo: Napeta zgodba o ugrabljenem otroku in o grozi staršev, ki ostanejo brez njega.
o lobo atrás da porta_2014.opis_omdb: A child is kidnapped. At the police station Silvia and Bernardo, the parents of the victim and Rosa, the main suspect and lover of Bernardo, give contradictory evidence which will take us to the gloomiest corners of desires, lies, needs and wickedness in the relationship of these three characters.

spinning man_2018.opis_neo:
Srečno poročeni profesor, znan po številnih aferah s študentkami, postane glavni osumljenec, ko izgine mlada ženska.

Evan Birch je družinski človek in cenjen profesor na ugledni fakulteti, kjer so njegova predavanja iz filozofije zelo priljubljena. Ko nekega dne skrivnostno izgine študentka, Evanova žena podvomi v njegov alibi, detektiv Malloy pa odkrije dokaze, zaradi katerih Evan postane glavni osumljenec. Nenadoma njegove težave niso le akadamske in družinske, temveč gre za življenje ali smrt.
spinning man_2018.opis_omdb: Evan Birch is a family man and esteemed professor at a distinguished college, where his charm and reputation have made his philosophy class very popular. When a female student named Joyce goes missing, Evan's previous off-campus dalliances make his wife question his alibi. Gruff police Detective Malloy has even more reason to be suspicious when crucial evidence makes Evan the prime suspect in Joyce's disappearance. Suddenly, the questions Evan faces aren't merely academic - they're a matter of life or death.

texas chainsaw 3d_2013.opis_neo:
Mlada ženska odpotuje v Teksas, kjer jo čaka družinska dediščina. Ne sluti, da jo čaka tudi srečanje z morilcem z motorno žago.

Leta po grozljivem pokolu z motorko, ki je doletel pet mladih ljudi, se Heather Miller s prijatelji poda na pot domov, kjer jo čaka dediščina babice, katere ni nikoli poznala. Kmalu spozna svojega izgubljenega sorodnika, ki si želi le krvi ...
texas chainsaw 3d_2013.opis_omdb: After the first massacre in 1974, the townspeople suspected that the Sawyer family were responsible. A vigilante mob of enraged locals surrounded the Sawyer house, burning it to the ground and killing every last member of the family. Decades later, a young woman named Heather learns that she has inherited a Texas estate from her grandmother. She decides to bring her friends along on the road trip to investigate her inheritance. On arrival, she discovers she has inherited a mansion, but is yet to uncover the terrors that lurk in the basement underneath it.

odysseus and the isle of the mists_2008.naslov_orig: Odysseus and the Isle of the Mists
odysseus and the isle of the mists_2008.opis_neo:
Odisej je od doma že 20 let. Prvih deset jih je prebil v vojni za Trojo, drugih deset pa na popotovanju domov.

Odiseja 20 let ni bilo na Itaki. Prvih 10 let se je boril v Trojanski vojni, drugih 10 let je potoval domov. Med njegovimi pustolovščinami je zgodba, za katero je Homer mislil, da je pregrozljiva, da bi jo povedal; Otok megle. Odisej je s tovariši po neurju doživel brodolom na Otoku megle. Skušajo narediti splav in odpluti na otok, toda čeri molijo iz vode. Splav je uničen in ne vidijo izhoda.
odysseus and the isle of the mists_2008.opis_omdb: ODYSSEUS, The Warrior King, has been away from Ithaca for twenty years. The first ten he spent fighting the Trojan War; the last ten he spent fighting to get home. Among his adventures is the tale Homer felt was too horrific to tell; the missing book of The Odyssey known as... THE ISLE OF THE MISTS.

the zero theorem_2013.opis_neo:
V fantazijskem Londonu prihodnosti samotarski računalniški genij išče smisel življenja.

Prejemnik dveh oskarjev Christoph Waltz igra ekscentričnega računalniškega genija Qohena. Dela na projektu, katerega cilj je odkriti smisel življenja, ali enkrat za vselej dokazati, da smisla ni. Šele ko spozna moč ljubezni in poželenja, postane sposoben razumeti smisel življenja.
the zero theorem_2013.opis_omdb: A hugely talented but socially isolated computer operator is tasked by Management to prove the Zero Theorem: that the universe ends as nothing, rendering life meaningless. But meaning is what he already craves.

the end we start from_2023.opis_neo:
Ko se zaradi ekološke krize London znajde pod vodo, se mlada družina v kaosu loči.

Ko se zaradi ekološke krize London znajde pod vodo, se mlada družina v kaosu loči. Ko skušata žena z novorojenčkom najti pod domov, pride na plan močan materinski čut v tej intimni in pesniški upodobitvi boja za preživetje družine.
the end we start from_2023.opis_omdb: A woman tries to find her way home with her newborn while an environmental crisis submerges London in floodwaters.

secret headquarters_2022.opis_neo:
Med druženjem po šoli Charlie in njegovi prijatelji odkrijejo skrivni štab najmočnejšega superjunaka na svetu, ki je skrit pod njegovim domom.

V akcijski pustolovščini Charlie in njegovi prijatelji odkrijejo sedež najmočnejšega superjunaka na svetu, ki je skrit pod njegovim domom. 

Toda ko zlobneži izsledijo signal do njegovega skrivališča in napadejo, morajo prijatelji združiti moči, da obranijo skrivni štab in rešijo svet pred katastrofo.
secret headquarters_2022.opis_omdb: While hanging out after school, Charlie and his friends discover the headquarters of the world's most powerful superhero hidden beneath his home. When villains attack, they must team up to defend the headquarters and save the world.

roadhouse romance_2021.opis_neo: Callie se vrne iz vojaške službe in spozna, da se je mesto spremenilo, njen fant ima novo dekle in družinska restavracija je v težavah.
roadhouse romance_2021.opis_omdb: When Callie returns home, she finds her hometown has changed - her first love has a new girl and her family's BBQ restaurant has hit hard times. She clashes with a marooned bigshot director who might hold the key to saving the res...

meurtres en cornouaille_2018.opis_neo: Mlado žensko najdejo mrtvo, oblečeno v legendarno osebnost. Detektiva Marion in Tristan Legay se poglobita v lokalne mite in rivalstva.
meurtres en cornouaille_2018.opis_omdb: A young fisherman discovers the body of Morgane near the entrance to Douarnenez harbour. According to Celtic legend, this is the exact location of the sunken city of Ys.

barbara wood: das haus der harmonie_2005.naslov_orig: Barbara Wood: Das Haus der Harmonie
barbara wood: das haus der harmonie_2005.opis_neo:
Hči Kitajke in Američana se odpravi v Ameriko, kjer bi rada našla svojega očeta.

Lepo kitajsko dekle Meiling se v Singapurju zaplete v prepovedano ljubezensko razmerje z mladim Američanom. Ta zapusti Singapur in se nikoli več ne vrne. Meiling rodi hčerko, ki jo poimenuje Popolna harmonija. Ko odraste, Popolna harmonija odpotuje v Ameriko, da bi poiskala svojega očeta.
barbara wood: das haus der harmonie_2005.opis_omdb: A beautiful Chinese girl, Meiling, has a forbidden love affair with a young American man in Singapore. He leaves Singapore and never returns. Meiling gives birth to their Eurasian daughter whom she names Perfect Harmony. When she grows up, Perfect Harmony journeys to America to search for her father.

pitch black_2000.opis_neo:
Posadka vesoljske ladje obtiči na planetu, polnem krvoločnih bitij, ki se hranijo le ponoči. Potem pa izvedo, da se bo kmalu zgodil enomesečni mrk.

Ladja za komercialni prevoz je s posadko obstala na planetu, polnem krvoločnih bitij, ki se prihajajo hranit le ponoči. Potem pa izvejo, da se bo kmalu zgodil enomesečni mrk.
pitch black_2000.opis_omdb: The space transport vessel "Hunter-Gratzner" carrying 40 people on-board crashes on a desert planet when the ship is struck in a meteor storm. There are only 11 survivors, among them are pilot Carolyn Fry (Who has assumed command after the ship's captain is killed), bounty hunter William J. Johns, religious man Abu Al-Walid, Antiques dealer Paris P. Ogilvie, runaway teenager Jack, settlers John 'Zeke' Ezekiel and his lover Sharon 'Shazza' Montgomery, and Richard B. Riddick, a dangerous escaped convict. Marooned, the survivors discover the barren and hot desert-scape has sunlight from three suns. Not only must they find food and water and worry about Riddick, the survivors find themselves being hunted by the planet's flesh-eating alien inhabitants when the planet is engulfed in darkness, which happens every 22 years, as they emerge from underground to hunt and eat all signs of life. Fry and the survivors find Riddick is their best chance of survival, as Riddick has surgically-enhanced eyes that allow him to see in the dark as they set out to find a way of escaping from the planet and getting to an escape shuttle, before they all get eaten by the creatures on the surface.

rambo iii_1988.opis_neo:
Rambo se sam poda na reševanje prijatelja, polkovnika Trautmana, ki ga imajo v krempljih mogočne sovjetske okupacijske sile v Afganistanu.

Po vseh vojnih dogodivščinah se je Rambo prostovoljno umaknil na Tajsko, kjer živi v budističnem samostanu in goji borilne veščine. 
Medtem sovjetski general s svojo vojsko že devet let okupira odročni predel Afganistana. Da bi temu naredili konec, se tja najprej odpravi Trautman, nato pa še Rambo, da bi rešil prijatelja in nekdanjega vojaškega poveljnika.
rambo iii_1988.opis_omdb: Weary of the horrors of war, the expert in guerrilla tactics, John Rambo, has settled in exotic Thailand since the suicide rescue mission in Rambo: First Blood Part II (1985). However, John will return to action, when his grizzled mentor, Colonel Sam Trautman, gets trapped behind the enemy lines in Soviet-infested Afghanistan, after a botched attempt to aid the remaining rebel pockets. Now, there's no turning back--and as each minute counts--John must act fast before it's too late. Once more, the government will deny John's existence if the men of the ruthless Soviet Colonel, Zaysen, capture him. But, John shows no mercy, and, this time, he fights for his friend. Can Rambo save the only man who ever stood by him?

šelestenje_2002.opis_neo:
Šelestenje se ukvarja z zapletenostjo medsebojnih razmerij v generaciji tik pred tridesetim.

Luka se po hudem sporu z dekletom umakne na belokrajnsko podeželje. Katarina mu sledi v upanju, da bi rešila njuno razmerje, a se znajdeta v vrtincu približevanj in nasprotovanj, ki le poglobijo njuno krizo. Ko se Katarina spoprijatelji z vojakom Primožem, se ji odprejo nove možnosti in vsi trije so soočeni z odločitvijo o tem, kam jih bodo vodila njihova življenja.
šelestenje_2002.opis_omdb: Luka leaves for the countryside unhappy with the way his girlfriend Katarina has treated him. She follows him hoping that they could sort out their relationship. Despite the beauty and tranquillity of their surroundings they go through twists and turns that only intensify their crisis. When Katarina befriends the happy-go-lucky soldier Primoz, new dimensions and choices open up for her. Ultimately all three must decide where their own life will take them.

polsestra_2019.opis_neo:
Film o odtujenih polsestrah iz Izole, ki morata zaradi spremenjenih življenjskih okoliščin živeti skupaj v majhnem najetem stanovanju v Ljubljani.

Film govori o ljudeh, ki si ne znajo pokazati čustva naklonjenosti. Način, na katerega komuniciramo z drugo osebo, vedno izraža naše želje, strahove, frustracije. 

To je film o dveh ženskah, ki ne želita imeti nič skupnega in negirata vsako podobnost, vendar na koncu najdeta to, kar najbolj zanikata.
polsestra_2019.opis_omdb: Half-sisters from a small coastal town who were never that close are forced by circumstance to share a flat in Ljubljana.

infinite_2021.opis_neo:
Evan McCauley odkrije, da so njegove halucinacije v resnici spomini na pretekla življenja.

Na robu duševnega zloma Evan McCauley odkrije, da so njegove halucinacije v resnici spomini na pretekla življenja. Pahnjen v stoletno vojno med reinkarniranimi bojevniki, Evan spozna, da je ravno on ključ do rešitve človeštva pred nevarnim odpadnikom.
infinite_2021.opis_omdb: A sci-fi, action adaption that examines the concept of reincarnation through remarkable visuals and well-established characters who need to use their memories and past learnt skills to ensure the future is protected from Infinites that seek to end all life on the planet.

being john malkovich_1999.opis_neo:
Lutkar odkrije portal, ki vodi dobesedno v glavo filmskega zvezdnika Johna Malkovicha.

Razočaran nad birokratsko službo in enoličnim zakonom Craig odkrije portal, ki vodi v um igralca Johna Malkovicha. Zanj kmalu izvedo še drugi ljudje in zmeda je popolna.
being john malkovich_1999.opis_omdb: Puppeteer Craig Schwartz and animal lover and pet store clerk Lotte Schwartz are just going through the motions of their marriage. Despite not being able to earn a living solely through puppeteering, Craig loves his profession as it allows him to inhabit the skin of others. He begins to take the ability to inhabit the skin of others to the next level when he is forced to take a job as a file clerk for the off-kilter LesterCorp, located on the five-foot tall 7½ floor of a Manhattan office building. Behind one of the filing cabinets in his work area, Craig finds a hidden door which he learns is a portal into the mind of John Malkovich, the visit through the portal which lasts fifteen minutes after which the person is spit into a ditch next to the New Jersey Turnpike. Craig is fascinated by the meaning of life associated with this finding. Lotte's trips through the portal make her evaluate her own self. And the confident Maxine Lund, one of Craig's co-workers who he tells about the portal if only because he is attracted to her, thinks that it is a money making opportunity in selling trips into Malkovich's mind after office hours for $200 a visit. Craig, Lotte and Maxine begin to understand that anyone entering the portal has the ability to control Malkovich's mind, which also alters his entire being. This experience makes Maxine fall in love with a composite. This ability to control Malkovich's mind begs the question of the ultimate psychedelic trip for Malkovich himself, who begins to feel that something is not right in the world as he knows it.

what dreams may come_1998.opis_neo:
Chris umre in gre v nebesa, ki so osupljiva. A nekaj manjka - njegova žena Annie. Ta zaradi žalosti ob moževi smrti stori samomor in gre v pekel.

Chris Neilson umre in se znajde v nebesih, ki so osupljivejša kot v najbolj norih sanjah. Samo nekaj manjka - njegova žena Annie. Toda ta zaradi žalosti ob moževi smrti stori samomor in gre v pekel ...
what dreams may come_1998.opis_omdb: During a holiday in Switzerland, a young Chris Nielsen meets Annie Collins in a lake when their boats collide. Sharing a snack a few hours later, Chris and Annie fall in love. Marrying quickly, Chris works as pediatrician and Annie as artist painter and art dealer, and have two children, Ian and Marie. But their happy family life torn apart when Ian and Marie are in a car accident that kills them both and the nanny who was driving. Four years later, Chris and Annie try to restore their life despite the tragedy and celebrate their anniversary. When returning that night, Chris witnesses a car accident, after exiting the car in an attempt to help people, another car crashes into him, fatally hurting him. As he is dying in the hospital, Chris turns into a ghost in an attempt to tell Annie that he still exists and loves her, but his efforts cause more pain, and he decides to leave. Traveling Afterlife, Chris wakes up in Heaven, where he meets Albert Lewis, his former mentor. While Albert helps Chris to adapt to his new existence in Heaven. Annie falls into a deeper depression, tormented by the reminder of her husband and children. Unable to resist the suffering, Annie commits suicide, and Albert returns to Chris to explain him Annie's death. Determined to save Annie, Chris decides to travel to Hell to find her. As the travel advances, Chris' memories of his life with Ian and Annie put the mission in danger, making it harder to connect with Annie. Making a discovery about Albert's true identity, The Tracker splits them. But when they find her, Chris' memories of his life with Annie will make Chris question the success of the travel, having to make a decision that can change everything forever.

21 grams_2003.opis_neo:
Film o življenju treh ljudi, ki jim nesreča nepričakovano preplete usode ter jih popelje v svet ljubezni, maščevanja in obljubljene odrešitve.

Naomi Watts in Benicio Del Toro sta za to tragično pripoved o ljudeh s težavami, združenih v nenavadni nesreči, bila oba nominirana za oskarja. Sooigralec Sean Penn. 2003.
21 grams_2003.opis_omdb: Paul Rivers, an ailing mathematician lovelessly married to English émigré; Christina Peck, who's hiding a secret past; and Jack Jordan, an ex-convict who has found Jesus are brought together by a terrible accident which changes their lives.

zvizdan_2015.opis_neo:
V hrvaški drami Zenit se tri ljubezenske zgodbe v treh zaporednih desetletjih odvijajo v sosednjih vaseh na Balkanu.

Zenit je zgodba o prepovedani ljubezni, o njeni krhkosti in tudi o njeni moči. Ta filmska zgodba zajema tri desetletja, postavljena pa je v sosednji vasi, katerih zgodovina nosi breme spopadov, nestrpnosti in netolerance. Prva ljubezenska zgodba je umeščena v leto 1991 - prevojna vihra, prve barikade in napetost, ki med vasema doseže vrhunec, ki ni dobro okolje za kakršno koli ljubezen, kaj šele za ljubezen dveh mladih iz sosednjih vasi. Druga zgodba se odvija leta 2001, ko je vojne že konec, ni pa še pozabljena. Brazgotine so še vedno tu in nekatere rane se še niso zacelile. Tretja zgodba se dogaja leta 2011 - ne zlo ne napetost ne dvomi še niso izginili - toda zdi se, da je čas za novi začetek.
zvizdan_2015.opis_omdb: Three different love stories, set in three consecutive decades, in two neighbouring Balkan villages burdened with a long history of inter-ethnic hatred: this is a film about the dangers - and the enduring strength - of forbidden love.

colour me kubrick: a true...ish story_20.naslov_orig: Colour Me Kubrick: A True...ish Story
colour me kubrick: a true...ish story_20.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o človeku, ki se med produkcijo filma ''Široko zaprte oči'' predstavlja kot režiser Kubrick, a o njegovem delu ve zelo malo.

Sredi devetdesetih se ekscentrični londonski prevarant in homoseksualec Alan Conway (John Malkovich) odloči izkoristiti umik Stanleyja Kubricka iz medijske pozornosti in se, medtem ko sloviti režiser snema svoj poslednji film Široko zaprte oči, izdaja za kontroverznega filmskega umetnika. Zahvaljujoč človeški naivnosti, želji po slavi in dejstvu, da domala nihče ne ve, kako je Kubrick resnično videti, narcisoidni Conway začne z malimi prevarami mestnih taksistov, ambicioznih mladih režiserjev in rock glasbenikov ter počasi presedla na večje pomembneže. Podžiga ga spoznanje, da mu večina brez kakršnih koli dvomov verjame na sleherno besedo; počasi se prebije v elitne klube in dodobra spozna londonsko gejevsko prizorišče. Toda za njegovo zgodbo se kmalu začno zanimati mediji…
colour me kubrick: a true...ish story_20.opis_omdb: In London in the 1990s, a balding alcoholic with an unsteady American accent introduces himself in pubs and other social settings as Stanley Kubrick. Drinks and meals are suddenly on the house or paid for by an admiring person, usually a man, whose costumes, band, acting abilities or what have you, Stanley finds fascinating. He's actually Alan Conway (1934-1998): we watch him parlay a self-confident manner and a small amount of movie knowledge into a persona whom others immediately hang their dreams on. In exchange, Stanley asks only that they pay the bill. Will he be exposed? Do prosecution and prison await? Or has the National Health something else in mind?

la famille bélier_2014.opis_neo:
Dekle, ki živi z gluhimi starši ugotovi, da ima dar petja.

Vsi člani družine Bélier so gluhi, razen 16-letne Paule, ki svojim staršem pomaga kot prevajalka. Ko učitelj glasbe odkrije njen neverjetni pevski talent, se Paula odloči udeležiti avdicije za članico francoskega radijskega zbora. Toda, če želi prvič v življenju postaviti sebe na prvo mesto, bo prisiljena oddaljiti se od svoje družine in odrasti.
la famille bélier_2014.opis_omdb: The Béliers are ordinary people: Rodolphe and Gigi are married, have two children and run their farm for a living. Ordinary people? Well, almost... since three of them, Dad, Mum and their son Quentin, are deaf. Which is not the case of the boy's big sister, Paula. And not only can she speak but her music teacher scouts her beautiful voice as well. He offers her to sit for the entrance exam of the Maîtrise de Radio France, a vocal elite choir in Paris. Her parents, who rely on her as their ears and mouth in the outside world, take the news badly. Paula, who hates the idea of betraying her parents and her brother, goes through a painful dilemma...

3 days to kill_2014.opis_neo:
Tajni agent Ethan Renner je na smrt bolan ter skuša izkoristiti zadnje mesece življenja, da bi znova navezal stik z odtujeno najstniško hčerko.

Tajni agent Ethan Renner je na smrt bolan ter skuša izkoristiti zadnje mesece življenja, da bi znova navezal stik z odtujeno najstniško hčerko. Nepričakovano mu njegova nadrejena Vivi Delay v zameno za zadnjo nalogo ponudi poskusno zdravilo, ki bi mu lahko rešilo življenje.
3 days to kill_2014.opis_omdb: Dying of brain cancer, a dangerous international spy is determined to give up his high stakes life to finally build a closer relationship with his estranged wife and daughter, whom he's previously kept at arm's length to keep out of danger; but first, he must complete one last mission - even if it means juggling the two toughest assignments yet: hunt down the world's most ruthless terrorist and look after his teenage daughter for the first time in ten years while his wife is out of town.

midnight sun_2018.opis_neo:
Epska romantična drama pripoveduje o 17-letnemu dekletu Katie, ki zaradi redke bolezni ne sme biti izpostavljena soncu.

Sedemnajstletna Katie zaradi redke bolezni ne sme biti izpostavljena soncu. Dneve preživlja v hiši, ko pade tema pa začne svoj 'dan' in se odpravi proti lokalni železniški postaji, kjer igra kitaro mimoidočim potnikom. Nekega večera se vplete usoda in Katie spozna fanta, s katerim se spusti v poletno romanco.
midnight sun_2018.opis_omdb: Based on the Japanese film, Midnight Sun centers on Katie, a 17-year-old sheltered since childhood and confined to her house during the day by a rare disease that makes even the smallest amount of sunlight deadly. Fate intervenes when she meets Charlie and they embark on a summer romance.

fury_2014.opis_neo:
Brad Pitt v epskem vojnem spektaklu, posnetem po resnični zgodbi! Aprila 1945 so zavezniki bili zaključne bitke na evropskih tleh.

Aprila 1945 so zavezniki bili zaključne bitke na evropskih tleh. Narednik Wardaddy vodi enoto tanka z vzdevkom Bes, s katerim se skušajo prebiti prek sovražnih linij do srca nacistične Nemčije. Ta nenavadna peščica mož z malo možnostmi za uspeh bo naredila vse, da pride do cilja in opravi zadano nalogo.
fury_2014.opis_omdb: In April 1945, as the Allies make their final push in the European Theater, a battle-hardened Army sergeant named Wardaddy commands a five-man Sherman tank crew on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Outnumbered, out-gunned, and with a rookie soldier thrust into their platoon, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds in their heroic attempts to defend a field hospital from Waffen SS troops.

the iceman_2012.opis_neo:
V filmu navdinjen po resničnih dogodkih spremljamo zloglasnega poklicnega mafijskega morilca Richarda Kuklinskega.

Film posnet po resničnih dogodkih, spremlja zloglasnega mafijskega morilca Richarda Kuklinskega od njegove pridružitve mafiji do aretacije zaradi umora več kot sto ljudi. Ne soproga, ne njegovi hčerki niso vedele s čim se je zares ukvarjal na videz uspešen poslovnež ter predan mož in oče.
the iceman_2012.opis_omdb: In the 1960s, Richard Kuklinski is working as a porn film lab tech until his mob bosses persuade him to change his career into that of a contract killer. For years, Kuklinski gains a reputation for cold blooded professionalism even as he raises a family who are kept in the dark about his true career. Unfortunately, mob politics ultimately forces him to secretly work independently with the psychopathic Robert 'Mr. Freezy' Pronge. As much as Kuklinski tries to keep his lives separate, circumstances and his own weaknesses threaten a terrible collision as the consequences of his choices finally catch up to him.

van wilder 3: freshman year_2009.opis_neo:
Bruc Van skuša študente osvoboditi vojaškega režima, ki vlada na univerzi, in znova vzpostaviti veseljaško študentsko življenje.

V tem nadaljevanju uspešnice iz leta 2002 pride predrzni bruc Van Wilder (Jonathan Bennett) v kampus Coolidge kolidža, da bi odkril, da je daleč od nenehne zabave, ki jo je pričakoval, saj šolo z natančnostjo in vojaško disciplino vodi dekan Reardon (Kurt Fuller).
