Združi moči s svoji cimrom, uporabnikom marihuane, Farleyem (Nestor Aaron Absera) in neprilagojenim azijskim študentom na izmenjavi Jujem Dumom Fokom (Jerry Shea). Van izziva sistem, medtem ko osvaja nepokvarjeno Kaitlin (Kristin Cavallari).
van wilder 3: freshman year_2009.opis_omdb: Van Wilder starts his freshman year at Coolidge College and embarks on an adventure to land the campus hottie and liberate his school from sexual oppression and party dysfunction.

#jesuisla_2019.opis_neo:
Komedija nas bo spomnila, kako pomembno si je vzeti čas za sebe, se odpreti drugim in ceniti lepoto, ki nas obkroža.

Stéphane je izjemen kuhar, chef v Franciji, ki živi mirno življenje brez večjih težav. Prevzel je restavracijo svojega očeta, ima dva odrasla sinova in bivšo ženo. Življenje pa se mu obrne na glavo, ko se zaljubi v Soo, skrivnostno korejsko damo, ki jo spozna na Instagramu. Zelo impulzivno se Stéphane odloči, da bo Soo obiskal v Seulu, kjer pa bo nevede odkril popolnoma nov svet in samega sebe.
#jesuisla_2019.opis_omdb: Stéphane, an eminent French Chef, lives a quiet life between his 2 adult sons and his ex-wife. But one day he falls in love with Soo, a mysterious Korean lady he met on Instagram. On a whim, Stéphane decides to visit her in Seoul. There, he will discover a new world and maybe rediscover himself, too.

only the brave_2017.opis_neo:
Gasilska enota iz Prescotta v Arizoni se je junija 2013 borila s požarom v Yarnellu, v katerem je izgubilo življenje 19 gasilcev enote.

Resnična zgodba enote lokalnih gasilcev, ki je pod vodstvom Erica Marsha postala ena najpomembnejših, elitnih gasilskih enot v Arizoni. Njihovo urjenje za najhujše primere požarov je bilo dano na kruto preizkušnjo leta 2013, ko so bili soočeni z divjim požarom v Yarnellu, ki ni bil premagan brez žrtev.
only the brave_2017.opis_omdb: In 2007 Prescott, Arizona, Eric Marsh of the Prescott Fire Department is frustrated fighting forest fires when the Type 1 or "Hotshot" front line forest fire fighting crews from afar overrule his operational suggestions to his area's sorrow. To change that, Marsh gets approval from the Mayor to attempt to organize an unprecedented certified municipal-based Hotshot crew for Prescott. To that end, Marsh needs new recruits, which includes the young wastrel, Brendan McDonough, to undergo the rigorous training and qualification testing for the most dangerous of fire fighting duty. Along the way, the new team meets the challenge and the hailed Granite Mountain Hotshots are born. In doing so, all the men, especially McDonough, are changed as new experience and maturity is achieved in fire-forged camaraderie. All this is put to the test in 2013 with the notorious Yarnell Hill Fire that will demand efforts and sacrifices no one can ignore.

gracie and pedro: pets to the rescue_202.naslov_orig: Gracie and Pedro: Pets to the Rescue
gracie and pedro: pets to the rescue_202.opis_neo:
Greti in Petko sta ljubljenčka, ki nimata nič skupnega. Greti je vzvišena čistokrvna psička, Petko pa je predrzni maček, ki rad brska po smeteh.

Po selitvi družine med prepirom prijatelja pes in mačka pokvarita trak za prtljago in znajdeta se sama v neznanem svetu. Od družine ju loči zahtevno iskanje, polno pisanih likov in nevarnih pustolovščin. A tudi otroka objavita pesem o svojih ljubljenčkih, ki preplavi splet.
gracie and pedro: pets to the rescue_202.opis_omdb: A pampered show dog and a street-smart alley cat embark on a thrilling journey to find their family after being separated during a cross-country move.

the light between oceans_2016.opis_neo:
Svetilničar in njegova žena, ki živita ob zahodni obali Avstralije, vzgajata otroka, ki sta ga rešila iz naplavljenega čolna.

Nekdanji vojak Tom se zaposli kot svetilničar na osamljenem otoku. Tam se mu pridruži žena Isabel, s katero zaman poskušata osnovati družino. Nekega dne na obalo naplavi čoln z mrtvim moškim in jokajočim dojenčkom, za katerega Isabel uspe Toma pregovoriti, da ga obdržita. Leta kasneje ugotovita, da ima otrok mamo, ki ga išče.
the light between oceans_2016.opis_omdb: Tom, a war weary man takes a job as a lighthouse keeper on an island for the solitude. He meets a beautiful young woman, Isabelle and they eventually marry. One day they see a small dingy with an infant and man inside floating in the ocean. They rush to rescue them only to find the man is dead. They struggle over the decision to report it and whether to keep the baby. Heartbroken because she had already had miscarriages twice, Isabelle persuades Tom not to tell anyone about this and leave the girl to herself as if it were their child. He buries the man on the island, and the couple names the girl Lucy. He succumbs to her persuasion just to make her happy. It's only years later that they discover that the child still has a mother looking for her.

the nice guys_2016.opis_neo:
Detektiv in izterjevalec preiskujeta primer izginulega dekleta in navidezni samomor propadle porno zvezde ter nehote razkrinkata zaroto.

Detektiv March, ki mu sreča v življenju in poslu ni naklonjena, in izterjevalec Healy, nepričakovano postaneta partnerja. Najti morata izginulo dekle, za katero se zdi, da ima na hrbtu izrisano tarčo ter odkriti, kakšna je njena povezava s smrtjo pornografske zvezdnice. Med preiskavo odkrijeta zaroto, ki sega do vrha poslovnega sveta.
the nice guys_2016.opis_omdb: Set against the backdrop of 1977 Los Angeles, The Nice Guys opens when single father and licensed PI Holland March (Gosling) is hired to investigate the apparent suicide of famous porn star Misty Mountains. As the trail leads him to track down a girl named Amelia (Qualley), he encounters less licensed and less hands-off private eye Jackson Healey (Russell Crowe) and his brass knuckles, both hired by the young hippie. However, the situation takes a turn for the worse when Amelia vanishes and it becomes apparent that March wasn't the only party interested. As both men are forced to team up, they'll have to take on a world filled with eccentric goons, strippers dressed as mermaids and even a possible government conspiracy.

dear dictator_2017.opis_neo:
Ko politični nemiri prisilijo britansko-karibskega diktatorja, da zapusti svojo otoško državico, se zateče k uporniški najstnici.

Ko politični nemiri prisilijo britansko-karibskega diktatorja, da zapusti svoje otoško ljudstvo, poišče zavetje in skrivališče v ameriškem predmestju, pri uporniški najstnici Tatiani. K njej je prišel po pisemskem dopisovanju zaradi njene naloge 'Pismo slavni osebi'. Vendar ga mora skrivati pred mamo, medtem, ko jo bivši diktator poučuje, kako naj sproži revolucijo in premaga zlobne punce v šoli.
dear dictator_2017.opis_omdb: When political turmoil forces a British-Caribbean dictator to flee his island nation, he seeks refuge and hides with a rebellious teenage girl in suburban America, and ends up teaching the young teen how to start a revolution and overthrow the "mean girls" at her high school.

the three burials of melquiades estrada_.naslov_orig: The three burials of Melquiades Estrada
the three burials of melquiades estrada_.opis_neo:
Rančar Pete Perkins želi izpolniti obljubo svojemu nedavno preminulemu prijatelju in ga pokopati v njegovem rojstnem mestu v Mehiki.

Sredi teksaške puščave na hitro ustrelijo in zakopljejo moža. Vendar kasneje truplo najdejo in ga ponovno pokopljejo na pokopališču v Van Hornu. Lokalni rančer Pete ugrabi mejnega policista in ga prisili v izkop trupla. Z ujetnikom in truplom, zavezanim na mulo, se Pete odpravi na dolgo in nevarno pot v Mehiko. Film je režijski prvenec Tommyja Lee Jonesa, ki igra tudi glavno vlogo.
the three burials of melquiades estrada_.opis_omdb: A man is shot and quickly buried in the high desert of west Texas. The body is found and reburied in Van Horn's town cemetery. Pete Perkins, a local ranch foreman, kidnaps a Border Patrolman and forces him to disinter the body. With his captive in tow and the body tied to a mule, Pete undertakes a dangerous and quixotic journey into Mexico.

train_2008.opis_neo:
Skupina mladih ameriških rokoborcev se v vzhodni Evropi udeleži pomembnega tekmovanja.

Alana, 22-letna študentka Univerze v Indiani, želi postati zdravnica. Kot članica rokoborske ekipe po državah vzhodne Evrope sodeluje na prvenstvih, njen fant Todd pa je njihov kapetan in najboljši rokoborec. Po tekmovanju v Bolgariji jih nasprotna ekipa povabi na pijačo - a žurka se prelevi v divjo noč alkohola, seksa in skušnjav. Ko se Alana in Todd vrneta v hotel, ugotovita, da sta zamudila vlak za Odeso. Trener Harris, ki je ostal za ekipo, besni. Nadomestni vlak jim ponudi skrivnostna dr. Velislava, a kmalu se izkaže, da se dogaja nekaj nenavadnega: potniki se zde odsotni in neprištevni, vlak pa se poda na neposeljeno ozemlje, nakar še Toddd izgine … kot tudi vsak, ki se oddvoji. Bo sploh kdo preživel? Za kakšen vlak sploh gre?
train_2008.opis_omdb: In Europe, a group of American college athletes unknowingly boards a train that will become one deadly ride.

welcome to collinwood_2002.opis_neo:
Lopov Cosimo od sojetnika v ječi izve informacije o popolnem ropu. Zato se odloči, da mora čimprej priti iz zapora.

Nepomembni tat Cosimo od obsojenca na dosmrtni zapor v roke dobi načrt za popoln rop - za vrsto podviga, o kakršnem le sanja - in skuša čim prej priti iz zapora. A ker je obtičal za zapahi, mora žrtev najti njegovo dekle Rosalind. Nihče noče iti sedet za Cosimov zločin, zdi pa se, da čisto vsak pozna nekoga, ki bi bil voljan - in za delež plena so ga pripravljeni poiskati. Tako ima Rosalind kaj hitro okoli sebe pet ljudi, ki zahtevajo svoj delež …
welcome to collinwood_2002.opis_omdb: Cosimo gets a plan for a huge job from his cellmate. He asks his woman to find a patsy for his bungled car theft, offering $15,000. Suddenly, seven are involved.

divergent_2014.opis_neo:
Film je posnet po knjižni uspešnici Veronice Roth in se dogaja v svetu, v katerem so ljudje razdeljeni v pet ločin glede na značaj.

Zgodba se dogaja v svetu, kjer so ljudje razdeljeni v pet ločin glede na svoj značaj. Mlada Tris čuti, da ne sodi v skupino v katero je bila rojena, saj je ena izmed 'Razcepljenih'. Ker ji s testiranjem ne zmorejo določiti ločine, jo mora izbrati sama, hkrati pa skrivati, da je Razcepljena, saj le-ti ogrožajo takšno družbeno ureditev. Ko med urjenjem odkrije, da se Razcepljenim ne piše dobro, želi odkriti zakaj naj bi bili tako nevarni družbi, da se jih želijo znebiti.
divergent_2014.opis_omdb: Set in a futuristic dystopia where society is divided into five factions that each represent a different virtue, teenagers have to decide if they want to stay in their faction or switch to another - for the rest of their lives. Tris Prior makes a choice that surprises everyone. Then Tris and her fellow faction-members have to live through a highly competitive initiation process to live out the choice they have made. They must undergo extreme physical and intense psychological tests, that transform them all. But Tris has a secret that she is Divergent, which means she doesn't fit into any one group. If anyone knew, it would mean a certain death. As she discovers a growing conflict that threatens to unravel her seemingly peaceful society, this secret might help her save the people she loves... or it might destroy her.

insurgent_2015.opis_neo:
Tris Prior se mora spopasti s svojimi demoni in s pomočjo prijateljev nadaljevati boj proti tiranski oblasti, ki prikriva resnico o njihovem svetu.

Ko Beatrice Prior odkrije, da ne pripada niti eni ločini, mora izbrati svoje nadaljnje življenje. Razpeta med družbenimi pravili in svojemu načinu življenja, ki je zanjo edini sprejemljiv, bo dokazala, da razcepljenost ni več pomanjkljivost, temveč prednost.
insurgent_2015.opis_omdb: As she searches for allies and answers in the wake of the uprising, Tris and Four are on the run. Being hunted by Jeanine Matthews, the leader of the Erudite faction, Tris and Four will race against time as they try to figure out what Abnegation sacrificed their lives to protect, and why the Erudite leaders will do anything to stop them. Haunted by her past choices but desperate to protect the ones she loves, Tris faces one impossible challenge after another as she unlocks the truth about the past and ultimately the future of her world.

the divergent series: allegiant_2016.opis_neo:
Kaj, če ves tvoj svet temeljil na laži? Kaj, če lahko eno samo odkritje, podobno kot ena sama odločitev, spremeni vse?

Chicago je na robu državljanske vojne, zato Tris (Shailene Woodley) Štirico (Theo James), Christino (Zoë Kravitz), Petra (Miles Teller), Tori (Maggie Q) in Caleba (Ansel Elgort) popelje na mukotrpen pobeg iz obzidanega mesta. Za njimi pa se požene oborožena straža samooklicane voditeljice Evelyn (Naomi Watts). 
Skupini, ki se prvič v svojem življenju znajde zunaj mesta, je za petami tudi Edgar (Jonny Weston), ki jih preganja prek strupene pušče, dokler jih ne rešijo in pospremijo v tehnološko vrhunsko opremljeni kompleks Urada za gensko dobrobit. Tam vodja urada David (Jeff Daniels) naznani, da je Tris "genetsko čista", in jo izbere za pomočnico za svoj skrivnostni podvig. 
Medtem ko s Tris ravnajo v rokavicah in dobi dostop do "spominskih tablic", prek katerih lahko podoživi zgodovino lastne družine, se Štirica pridruži vojakom Urada na domnevno humanitarni nalogi reševanja otrok iz taborišča, ki ga je v pušči postavila svojat.
Tris odkrije, da namerava David izjemno tehnologijo Urada izkoristiti v nečloveške namene, zato ugrabi njegovo zasebno letalo in se s svojim moštvom vrne v Chicago. Čaka jih pretresljivo izdajstvo, in preprečiti morajo Evelyn, da celotnemu prebivalstvu mesta – med katerimi so tudi Povezani, uporniške sile pod vodstvom Johanne (Octavia Spencer) – s posebnim plinom ne izbriše celotnega spomina…
the divergent series: allegiant_2016.opis_omdb: After the earth-shattering revelations of INSURGENT, Tris must escape with Four and go beyond the wall enclosing Chicago. For the first time ever, they will leave the only city and family they have ever known. Once outside, old discoveries are quickly rendered meaningless with the revelation of shocking new truths. Tris and Four must quickly decide who they can trust as a ruthless battle ignites beyond the walls of Chicago which threatens all of humanity. In order to survive, Tris will be forced to make impossible choices about courage, allegiance, sacrifice and love.

ava_2020.opis_neo:
Smrtonosna poklicna morilka se znajde na nasprotni strani, ko gre naloga po zlu in se mora nenadoma ona boriti za svoje preživetje.

Ava je morilka vladne organizacije, ki potuje po svetu in likvidira visoko pomembne osebe. Ko gre eden izmed navidezno rutinskih poslov po zlu, se znajde sama v boju za svoj obstanek in življenje!
ava_2020.opis_omdb: Lethally beautiful and incredibly efficient in her dangerous line of work, Ava, a taciturn lone wolf and cold-blooded assassin, is starting to develop a conscience. Having beaten her alcohol and substance dependence with the help of Duke, her grizzled mentor of death and father figure, more and more, unstable Ava lets guilt get in the way of closing her "deals", attracting unwanted attention by breaking protocol. As a result, after a botched attempt to liquidate a high-profile target, Ava reunites with her estranged family after eight long years of absence, unaware that she has just signed her death warrant. Now, as Ava tries to settle old scores and reconnect with her loved ones, every killer in the business is after her. Can Ava rely on Duke to have her back?

escape plan_2013.opis_neo:
Ray Breslin (Sylvester Stallone) je vodilni strokovnjak za varnost zaporov, ki jih preverja tako, da skuša pobegniti iz njih, kar mu v glavnem uspe.

Ray Breslin (Sylvester Stallone) je vodilni strokovnjak za varnost zaporov, ki jih preverja tako, da skuša pobegniti iz njih, kar mu v glavnem uspe. Ko je od znotraj preveril vse strogo varovane kaznilnice ter razvil vrsto tehnik za preživetje med zaporniki, čaka njegove sposobnosti najtežja preizkušnja. Sprejme namreč ponudbo, da preveri najskrivnostnejši in najsodobnejši zapor na svetu, vendar pa kmalu postane jasno, da so ga tja poslali z namenom, da ne pride nikoli več na prostost. Breslin mora zato združiti moči s skrivnostnim zapornikom Emilom Rottmayerjem (Arnold Schwarzenegger) ter skupaj z njim skovati drzen in skoraj nemogoč načrt za pobeg.
escape plan_2013.opis_omdb: Ray Breslin is a man who has devoted his life to making prisons inescapable by going into a prison as an inmate and trying to see if he can break out. And he has done a good job so far. A woman who says she works for the CIA approaches Ray and says that a new maximum security prison where the worst criminals are to be incarcerated, is about to be launched. So she wants him to go and make sure no one can get out. He agrees. So they make the necessary preps but when Ray arrives at the prison, he discovers that someone doesn't want him to get out. He then tries to find a way out but he needs help. Another prisoner, Rottmeyer becomes friendly with him. And they decide to work together to get out.

bone tomahawk_2015.opis_neo:
Ko razbojnik Purvis prispe v mesto, sproži vrsto dogodkov, ki mestnega šerifa prisilijo, da se sooči s sovražnikom.

Daleč zunaj poseljenih meja starega zahoda zloglasna razbojnika ubijata in uničujeta sveto zemljo. Ko položaj postane nevzdržen, se razbojnik Purvis odloči pobegniti v najbližje mesto. S svojim prihodom sproži vrsto nesrečnih dogodkov, ki prisilijo mestnega šerifa da združi moči s kavboji in se sooči s sovražniki, ki v njem vidijo plen.
bone tomahawk_2015.opis_omdb: After an outlaw unknowingly leads a band of cannibalistic Troglodytes into the peaceful western town of Bright Hope, the monsters kidnap several settlers, including the wife of a local rancher. Despite his injured leg the rancher joins a small rescue party with the sheriff, his aging deputy and a strong-willed gunslinger. What follows is a journey into hell on earth as the posse comes to realize it is up against a foe whose savagery knows no bounds. The film takes place at the turn of the century around the border of what is now Texas and New Mexico.

bang bang baby_2014.opis_neo:
Najstnica iz majhnega mesta v 60-ih verjame, da se ji bodo uresničile sanje in bo postala slavna pevka, ko pride v mesto njen idol, rok zvezda.

Sanje najstnice se bodo spremenile v največjo grozo, ko pride v bližnji kemični tovarni do nesreče, ki bi lahko povzročila vrsto mutacij.
bang bang baby_2014.opis_omdb: A small town teenager in the 1960s believes her dreams of becoming a famous singer will come true when her rock star idol gets stranded in town. But a leak in a nearby chemical plant that is believed to be causing mass mutations threatens to turn her dream into a nightmare.

combat wombat_2020.naslov_sl: Zgodbe iz Skrivnega mesta: košatorepa tolpa
combat wombat_2020.opis_neo:
Maggie Diggins, vombatka, nenamerno postane mestna superjunakinja, ko pred gotovo pogubo reši novinca.

Na obrobju Skrivnega mesta živi razdražljiva osamljena vombatka v upanju, da bo nekoč našla svojega življenjskega partnerja. Med enim svojih nočnih pohodov se nevede ustavi med dvema sprtima tolpama in kmalu se znajde v središču pozornosti kot najnovejša mestna superjunakinja. Prevzame vodstvo znane Košatorepe tolpe, prijateljske, toda neusmiljene v boju proti zločinu.
combat wombat_2020.opis_omdb: Maggie Diggins, a wombat turned Wonder Woman, unintentionally becomes the city's superhero after she begrudgingly saves a rookie superhero sugar glider from certain doom.

kin_2018.opis_neo:
Napeti ZF triler producentov ultrapriljubljene serije Stranger Things.

Nekdanjega zapornika Jimmyja pred nevarno toplo reši mlajši brat, s pomočjo močnega zunajzemeljskega orožja, do katerega se je dokopal po naključju. Brata sta se primorana podati na beg pred zveznimi oblastmi, zunajzemeljskimi vojaki, ki iščejo svoje orožje in nevarno tolpo, ki želi poravnati stare račune.
kin_2018.opis_omdb: Co-directors Jonathan Baker and Josh Baker's sci-fi action thriller features James Franco, Zoe Kravitz, and Dennis Quaid. A young boy (Myles Truitt) finds a powerful otherworldly weapon, which he uses to save his older adoptive brother (Jack Reynor) from a crew of thugs. Before long, the two of them are also pursued by federal agents and mysterious mercenaries aiming to reclaim their asset.

valley of the gods_2019.opis_neo:
'Dolina bogov' združuje tri ločene zgodbe v epsko fantasično zgodbo.

Ločeni pisatelj John Ecas (Josh Hartnett) dobi posel napisati biografijo najbogatejšega človeka na svetu, zadržanega Wesa Taurosa (John Malkovich). John ne ve, da so tla, po katerih hodi, sveta in da je v sporu med bogatašem Wesom Taurosom (John Malkovich), čigar posest želijo minirati zaradi urana, in borbenim tamkajšnjim indijanskim plemenom Navajo. Taurosovo ravnanje razkrije bitja iz Navajo legend, ki so jih imeli zgolj za mit. 

Med sporom treh strani postajajo vse pomembnejše vrednote, ko stari bogovi stopijo na bojno pot proti želja sodobnega človeka.
valley of the gods_2019.opis_omdb: Starring Josh Hartnett and John Malcovich, Valley of the Gods juxtaposes abundance and poverty through the eyes of an anguished writer, a bizarre trillionaire, and a struggling Navajo community armed with only a now-imminent ancient legend.

a monster calls_2016.opis_neo:
Deček išče pomoč pri drevesni pošasti, da bi se spopadel z mamino boleznijo.

Ganljiva zgodba o dečku Conorju, ki prikliče drevesno pošast, da bi mu pomagala pri spoprijemanju z jezo, občutkom krivde in osamljenostjo; občutki, ki ga mučijo odkar je njegova mama hudo zbolela. Pošast se prikaže sedem minut po polnoči, toda ta ni takšna, kakršno je pričakoval deček, saj od njega zahteva nekaj najstrašnejšega - da se sooči z resnico.
a monster calls_2016.opis_omdb: The monster does not come walking often. This time it comes to Conor, and it asks for the one thing Conor cannot bring himself to do. Tell the truth. This is a very touching story about a boy who feels very damaged, guilty and mostly angry. He struggles at school with bullies, and pity looks from everyone, and at home with his mother's sickness. Will Conor overcome his problems? Will everything be okay? Will Conor be able to speak the truth?

under the silver lake_2018.opis_neo:
Ko Samova soseda izgine, se on odpravi na pohod po Los Angelesu, da bi raziskal njeno skrivnostno izginotje.

Sam je osamljeni in razočarani 33-letnik, ki spozna skrivnostno žensko Sarah, ki se zabava v bazenu pred svojim stanovanjem. Ko Sarah izgine, se Sam odpravi na pohod skozi Los Angeles z željo, da razkrije skrivnost za njenim izginotjem, kar pa ga pripelje v najkrvavejše globine škandalov in zarot v Mestu angelov.
under the silver lake_2018.opis_omdb: Sam (Andrew Garfield) is a disenchanted 33-year-old who discovers a mysterious woman, Sarah (Riley Keough), frolicking in his apartment's swimming pool. When she vanishes, Sam embarks on a surreal quest across Los Angeles to decode the secret behind her disappearance, leading him into the murkiest depths of mystery, scandal and conspiracy in the City of Angels.

the autopsy of jane doe_2016.opis_neo:
Brian Cox in Emile Hirsch igrata očeta in sina Tonyja in Austina, ki delata kot patologa.

Oče Tommy in sin Austin sta zaposlena kot patologa v mrtvašnici, kamor jima pripeljejo truplo neznanega, mladega dekleta, za katerega kljub dokazom, da se je z njo dogajalo nekaj bizarnega, ne moreta identificirati vzroka smrti. Lotita se iskanja odgovorov, ki ju pripeljejo so odkritja dekletovih temačnih skrivnosti.
the autopsy of jane doe_2016.opis_omdb: While investigating the murder of a family, Sheriff Sheldon and his team are puzzled with the discovery of the body of a stranger buried in the basement that does not fit to the crime scene. He brings the corpse of the beautiful Jane Doe late night to the coroner Tommy Tilden and requests to have the cause of death until the next morning to have an answer to the press. Tommy's son and assistant Austin Tilden is ready to go to the movie theater with his girlfriend Emma, but he decides to stay to help his father in the autopsy. Along the stormy and tragic night, they disclose weird and creepy secrets about Jane Doe.

the intern_2015.opis_neo:
V komediji spremljamo 70-letnega vdovca Bena, ki si želi pobegniti iz dolgočasnega upokojenskega življenja.

Odloči se, da se bo prijavil za pripravnika pri mladi podjetnici Jules, ki vodi spletno trgovino z modnimi dodatki. 

Njegova modrost, očetovska vloga in zdrav razum kmalu pomagajo ne le pri poslu, temveč tudi zasebnem življenju deloholičarke Jules.
the intern_2015.opis_omdb: A retired 70-year-old widower, Ben (played by Robert De Niro), is bored with retired life. He applies to a be a senior intern at an online fashion retailer and gets the position. The founder of the company is Jules Ostin (Anne Hathaway), a tireless, driven, demanding, dynamic workaholic. Ben is made her intern, but this is a nominal role - she doesn't intend to give him work and it is just window dressing. However, Ben proves to be quite useful and, more than that, a source of support and wisdom.

the cutting edge: fire & ice_2010.opis_neo:
Alex je nekdanja umetnostna drsalka, ki zdaj dela kot učiteljica. James Van Fehr je nekdanji hitrostni drsalec, ki so mu prepovedali drsanje.

Romantična zgodba o nekdanji drsalki, ki se vrne na led, pri tem pa najde tudi ljubezen. Alex je bivša umetnostna drsalka, ki po koncu kariere dela kot učiteljica. 

Ko spozna Jamesa, nekdanjega hitrostnega drsalca, se znova poda na led. Skupaj se začneta pripravljati na tekmovanje in kmalu se med njima začnejo kresati iskre ...
the cutting edge: fire & ice_2010.opis_omdb: In "The Cutting Edge: Fire & Ice," Francia Raisa reprises her role as Alexandra "Alex" Delgado in film franchise, whose figure skating career came to an abrupt halt after her partner (on and off the ice) became injured. As their love affair cooled, a heart-broken Alex stopped competing and turned to teaching. Enter James Van Fehr, the smoldering bad boy of speed skating, who has had fiery Alex in his sights as a skating partner ever since he was banned from speed skating. There aren't many girls who say no to James Alex may well be the first. However, James pushes her buttons, challenging her like no one else and her fighting spirit returns. She agrees to be his partner and they begin a grueling practice regimen fueled (and occasionally derailed) by their own tempestuous relationship which heats up as they get closer to competition. But will their passion destroy Alex's chance to bring home the gold again?

into the blue 2: the reef_2009.opis_neo:
Zakonca Sebastian in Dani sta izkušena potapljača in navdušena iskalca zakladov, ki sanjata o tem, da bosta nekega dne obogatela.

Profesionalnega potapljača Sebastiana in njegovo dekle Dani, ki od nekdaj sanja o najdbi podmorskega zaklada, najame bogat evropski par, Carlton in Azra, da bi jima pomagala poiskati potopljeno ladjo San Cristobal, na kateri naj bi bili dragoceni predmeti. Sebastian je sprva skeptičen in skuša sam poiskati izgubljeno ladjo, toda vseeno pristane, ko mu Carlton pove, da ima zemljevid, ki jih bo odpeljal do nje. Toda Sebastian in Dani ne vesta, da sta Carlton in Azra v resnici terorista z nevarnim načrtom...
into the blue 2: the reef_2009.opis_omdb: The Hills star Audrina Patridge makes her feature film debut in this sequel to the ocean-bound 2005 adventure starring Jessica Alba and Paul Walker. When happily married couple Sebastian (Chris Carmack) and Dani (Laura Vandervoort) is hired to search the ocean floor for Columbus' hidden treasure, they think they're about to become rich beyond their wildest dreams. Upon realizing that their wealthy employers have a terrifying hidden agenda, however, the two divers are forced to swim for their lives. ~ Jason Buchanan, Rovi

fast & furious 6_2013.opis_neo:
Agent Hobbs ponudi Domu Torettu in njegovi posadki polno pomilostitev v zameno za pomoč pri prijetju smrtonosnih in spretnih voznikov.

Agent Hobbs angažira Doma, da mu s svojo ekipo pomaga pri ujetju rivalske tolpe, ki jo vodi Owen Shaw. V zameno za izbris dosjeja, morajo oni prenehati s svojimi spletkami, ne glede na ceno.
fast & furious 6_2013.opis_omdb: Since Dom (Diesel) and Brian's (Walker) Rio heist toppled a kingpin's empire and left their crew with $100 million, our heroes have scattered across the globe. But their inability to return home and living forever on the lam have left their lives incomplete. Meanwhile, Hobbs (Johnson) has been tracking an organization of lethally skilled mercenary drivers across 12 countries, whose mastermind (Evans) is aided by a ruthless second-in-command revealed to be the love Dom thought was dead, Letty (Rodriguez). The only way to stop the criminal outfit is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks Dom to assemble his elite team in London. Payment? Full pardons for all of them so they can return home and make their families whole again.

a knight's tale_2001.opis_neo:
Po smrti njegovega gospodarja si podeželski posestnik, ki ga vodi hrepenenje po hrani in slavi, ustvari novo identiteto viteza.

Williamu (Heath Ledger), nizkega rodu, sinu revnega krovca, se je zdelo nepojmljivo, da bi se mu lahko kdajkoli izpolnile mladostne sanje, da bi postal vitez.
a knight's tale_2001.opis_omdb: Inspired by "The Canterbury Tales," as well as the early life of William Marshall (later First Earl of Pembroke), this is the story of William, a young squire with a gift for jousting. After his master dies suddenly, the squire hits the road with his cohorts Roland and Wat. On the journey, they stumble across an unknown writer, Chaucer. William, lacking a proper pedigree, convinces Chaucer to forge genealogy documents that will pass him off as a knight. With his newly-minted history in hand, the young man sets out to prove himself a worthy knight at the country's jousting competition, and finds romance along the way.

just add romance_2019.opis_neo:
Chefa Carly in Jason sta tekmeca na kuharskem tekmovanju, kjer je nagrada lastništvo restavracije. Bo par svoje sestavine sesiril ali premešal?

Carly (Meghann Fahy) in Jason (Luke Macfarlane) se spoznata v kulinarični šoli in med njima se razvije naklonjenost, medtem ko tekmujeta, kdo bo postal boljši kuhar. Jason nenadoma izgine, a se spet srečata tri leta pozneje v televizijski resničnostni oddaji Kitchen Showdown, kjer ima zmagovalec možnost lastne restavracije. Človeka, ki sta popolno nasprotje, si pred kamero izmenjujeta poželjive poglede in čeprav je njuno rivalstvo očitno, kljub vsemu podpirata drug drugega. A ko se tekmovanje prevesi v finale, se stvari zaostrijo in čustva zavrejo: Carly je prepričana, da Jason posnema njeno jed. Samo eden je lahko zmagovalec oddaje, a če bo to terjalo njun odnos in ljubezen, bosta nazadnje poražena oba.
just add romance_2019.opis_omdb: When Carly and Jason, exact opposites, compete on a famed cooking show for the chance at their own restaurant, what will matter more - their culinary careers or their potential love?

meurtres en lorraine_2019.opis_neo: Po regiji se širi niz na videz nepovezanih umorov. Rousseau jih preiskuje, a primer se obrne na slabše, ko sledi kažejo na temno skrivnost.

un novio para mi mujer_2022.opis_neo:
Mož najame ljubimca za ženo, da bi jo prepričal v ločitev.

Diego bi se rad ločil od Lucíe, a ne ve, kako ji to povedati, zato se po pomoč zateče h Cuervu Floresu, slavnemu zapeljivcu, ki se bo na vso moč potrudil, da se Lucía zaljubi vanj in sama zahteva ločitev.
un novio para mi mujer_2022.opis_omdb: Diego wants to get divorce from Lucía, but he doesn't know how to tell her. Unable to say it to her face, he turns to Cuervo Flores, a famous seducer who will try to make Lucía fall in love so that she will be the one to end her m...

k-9: p.i._2002.opis_neo:
Detektiv Dooley gre končno v pokoj in zapušča policijo. Toda na poti domov s psom Jerryjem odkrijeta rop laboratorija za sestavljanje čipov.

Ko Dooley in Jerry Lee še zadnjič uradno delata kot policijska agenta, prekineta krajo v računalniškem podjetju, to pa privede do najrazličnejših zapletov. Zdi se, da je Jerry Lee pogoltnil mikročip, ki so ga tatovi izgubili, čip pa je prva pomembna sled pri preiskavi tega primera.
k-9: p.i._2002.opis_omdb: Having spent many years in the police force, Detective Dooley, finally retiring. Although his colleagues organized an unforgettable farewell party, he was not particularly happy free time that awaits him. On the way home he and his partner Jerry dog will note robbery in the laboratory for assembling chips. In conflict with the burglars Jerry will swallow one of the stolen chips ...

the librarian: the curse of the judas ch.naslov_orig: The Librarian: The Curse of the Judas Chalice
the librarian: the curse of the judas ch.opis_neo:
Knjižničar Flynn je naveličan tega, da mu služba kvari osebne odnose, zato se odpravi na dopust, vendar pristane sredi nove dogodivščine.

Na smrtonosni misiji, da bi našel zgodovinski judežev kelih, Flynnu življenje reši Simone, osupljiva Francozinja, ki pa v sebi skriva veliko skrivnost. Ko se soočita z uglednim profesorjem in naletita na past neusmiljene tolpe, Flynn izve za Simonino skrivnost.
the librarian: the curse of the judas ch.opis_omdb: After retrieving the philosopher's stone at an auction but losing his girlfriend, The Librarian Flynn Carsen has a breakdown. Charlene and Judson ask him to spend some time on vacation. Flynn travels to New Orleans and he has a crush on a French singer (Simone Renoir). However he discloses that she is the guardian of a key to access the Judas Chalice that is capable to resurrect vampires. Meanwhile the former Russian Minister of Defense Sergei Kubichek is seeking the chalice to revive Vlad the vampire with the support of Professor Lazlo. Also to raise an army of undead to bring Russia back to the top of the world. When Simone reveals that she is a vampire, Flynn question whether she is not using him to reach the chalice and increase her power.

once upon a time in mexico_2003.naslov_orig: Once Upon A Time In Mexico
once upon a time in mexico_2003.opis_neo:
"El Mariachi" se zaplete v mednarodni vohunski incident, v katerega sta vpletena tudi psihotični agent Cie in pokvarjeni mehiški general.

Najeti morilec 'El Mariachi' se s psihotičnim CIA agentom in podkupljivim mehiškim generalom zaplete v mednarodno vohunsko spletko.
once upon a time in mexico_2003.opis_omdb: Return of the mythic guitar-slinging hero, El Mariachi (Antonio Banderas), in the final installment of the Mariachi/Desperado trilogy. The saga continues as El Mariachi makes his way across a rugged landscape on the blood trail of Barrillo (Willem Dafoe), a cartel kingpin with one last score to settle who is planning a coup d'etat against the president of Mexico. Enlisted by Sands (Johnny Depp), a corrupt CIA agent, El Mariachi demands retribution.

dziewczyny z dubaju_2021.opis_neo:
Emi je mlado, ambiciozno dekle, ki sanja o življenju zunaj svojega malega mesta.

Ko se pojavi priložnost, da postane elitna spremljevalka v Dubaju, brez pomislekov zagrabi priložnost. 

Kmalu se povzpne na lestvici in tudi sama za arabske šejke začne novačiti poljske misice, zvezdnice, estradnice in manekenke. Vendar razkošen in mamljiv svet sčasoma pokaže svojo temno plat ... Scenarij za film je napisal Mitja Okorn.
dziewczyny z dubaju_2021.opis_omdb: It follows a young woman who becomes an escort as a way of getting out of her small town, but she soon discovers she has no control over her situation.

moj ata, socialisticni kulak_1987.opis_neo:
Dogajanje komedije je postavljeno na slovensko podeželje, v čas po koncu druge svetovne vojne.

Jože Malek, ki je bil vpoklican v nemško vojsko, od tam pa je nato pobegnil k ruski, se vrne domov k ženi in otrokoma. 

Kot kmečki delavec brez zemlje v obdelavo dobi nekaj hektarov, a na koncu mu jih ista oblast, ki mu jih je dala, tudi vzame. 

Kratkotrajno lastništvo Jožeta spremeni, saj se počuti in obnaša bolj samozavestno. Postane socialistični kulak.
moj ata, socialisticni kulak_1987.opis_omdb: Year 1945. The second World War is over and the soldiers from the sisbanded army are returning home. Yet there is still no sign of Joze Malek. His wife Mimika and their children Tincek and olga know only that he had deserted the German army and gone over to the Soviet Red Army. Mimika works a a hired hand for the farmer, Medved, who givesher bread and milk for her child instead of regular wages. This is not at all to the liking of her relative Vanc. One fine day, father Malek comes home and the family is happilly reunited. Vanc tells Jozeabout the agrarian reform, through which the Maleks even get their own plot of land. In exchange of this, they have to remove all the religious symbols from their home. They stop going to the church, and must shout Tito's and Stalin's praises every day. Joze Malek changes completely. He tills his plot of kand as though obsessed, becomes greedy and begins to emulate the big landowners, calling himself a socialist kulak. Yet suddenly, the fact that Malek was a solider in Red Army is no longer acceptedable. He is suspected of being a collaborator with the Soviet Informbureau. Joze manages to clear his name at the hearing by acting stupid, but he shifts the blame to his relative Vanc, saying that he was only doing what he hadtold him to, and Vanc is arrested. Malek's land rights are taken away from him, as agricultural co-operatives will be established.

doctor dolittle_1998.opis_neo:
Dr. John Dolittle ima posebno lastnost, da razume živali in se lahko celo pogovarja z njimi.

Tako se nemalokrat zaplete v klepet s psi, mačkami, hrčki, morskimi prašički, podganami, sovami, kozami, ovcami, golobi, tigri in drugimi kosmatinci. 

Živalce pri njem velikokrat poiščejo tudi zdravniško pomoč ali praktičen nasvet. Čeprav se sliši nadvse zabavno, je zadeva tudi malce nerodna. John se po zaslugi žene Lise in kolegov kmalu znajde v umobolnici. Vsi so prepričani, da se mu je zmešalo!
doctor dolittle_1998.opis_omdb: Dr. John Dolittle has the world in his hands: A beautiful wife at his side, two adorable daughters and a career that could not go better. One night, he nearly runs over a dog with his car. The dog yells "bonehead" and disappears. From then on, his childhood ability is back: To communicate with animals. Unfortunately, the word of Dolittle's ability is spreading quickly. Soon, many animals from rat to horse flock to his place to get medical advice. But his colleagues suspect he's going mad, and as the clinic Dolittle used to work for is about to being taken over for a huge amount of money, many decisions have to be made. Believe him? Put him into a mental institution? Sell the clinic? But also his family is close to breaking apart. Until a circus tiger falls seriously ill.

rogue_2020.opis_neo:
Akcijski triler z zapeljivo Megan Fox v vlogi vodje plačancev na smrtonosni misiji v Afriki.

Samantha O'Hara je izkušena plačanka, ki kot vodja ekipe vodi enoto vojakov na drzno odpravo. Rešiti morajo talce iz odročnega predela Afrike. Odprava gre po zlu in ekipo ujeto v pasti čaka krvav in brutalen spopad z uporniki. Že tako resna situacija pa postane še bolj nevarna, ko naletijo na sestradane divje leve.
rogue_2020.opis_omdb: Megan Fox (Transformers franchise) tackles a thrilling new role as a battle-hardened mercenary in this explosive action saga. As team leader O'Hara, she leads a lively squad of soldiers on a daring mission: rescue hostages from their captors in remote Africa. But as the mission goes awry and the team is stranded, O'Hara's squad must face a bloody, brutal encounter with a gang of rebels - and the horde of ravenous, enraged lions they encounter.

off the menu_2018.opis_neo:
Romantična komedija nas popelje na avanturo z Joelom, dedičem mehiške verige restavracij s hitro prehrano.

Pot ga pripelje v majhno mehiško mestece, kamor gurmani iz vsega sveta prihajajo okušat kulinarične dobrote strastne kuharice Javiere. Joel kmalu spozna, da je najboljša jed tista, ki je začinjena z ljubeznijo.
off the menu_2018.opis_omdb: An unlikely heir to a Mexican fast-food franchise goes 'cuisine' hunting for the next culinary big thing, and finds himself in a small, dusty New Mexican town where foodies come from all over to salivate over the culinary treats of a local, authentic, and feisty female chef.

doctor dolittle 2_2001.opis_neo:
Dobri dr. Dolittle je pripravljen na novo misijo.

Tokrat mora rešiti gozd, ki ga namerava gozdarsko podjetje posekati do zadnjega drevesa. Obupani in prestrašeni prebivalci gozda se zato zatečejo k njemu po pomoč. 

Dolittle je seveda takoj pripravljen pomagati, pri tem pa se mora soočiti z zlobnim gospodom Potterjem.
doctor dolittle 2_2001.opis_omdb: Dr. John Dolittle the beloved doctor is back, but this time around he plays cupid to bumbling circus bear Archie as he's so smitten by a Pacific Western bear female, Ava. Dr. Dolittle must help a group of forest creatures to save their forest. But with the aid of his mangy, madcap animal friends, Dr. Dolittle must teach Archie the ways of true romance in time to save his species and his home before their habit is gone. So John held a meeting for every animal in the forest to not give up without a fight no matter what kind of animal expression they have and everyone agrees to do it and save their home.

big fish_2003.opis_neo:
Sin se skuša zbližati z umirajočim očetom, ki mu je o svojem življenju vselej pripovedoval neverjetne zgodbe.

Sin se skuša zbližati z umirajočim očetom, ki mu je o svojem življenju vselej pripovedoval neverjetne zgodbe. Skoznje bo nejeverni mladenič naposled spoznal pravo naravo očetovih junaških dejanj in razkril njegova nežna čustva.
big fish_2003.opis_omdb: United Press International journalist Will Bloom and his French freelance photojournalist wife Josephine Bloom, who is pregnant with their first child, leave their Paris base to return to Will's hometown of Ashton, Alabama on the news that his father, Edward Bloom, stricken with cancer, will soon die, he being taken off chemotherapy treatment. Although connected indirectly through Will's mother/Edward's wife, Sandra Bloom, Will has been estranged from his father for three years since his and Josephine's wedding. Will's issue with his father is the fanciful tales Edward has told of his life all his life, not only to Will but the whole world. As a child when Edward was largely absent as a traveling salesman, Will believed those stories, but now realizes that he does not know his father, who, as he continues to tell these stories, he will never get to know unless Edward comes clean with the truth before he dies. On the brink of his own family life beginning, Will does not want to be the kind of father Edward has been to him. One of those stories from Edward's childhood - that he saw his own death in the glass eye of a witch - led to him embracing life since he would not have to fear death knowing when and how it would eventually come. The question is whether Will will be able to reconcile Edward's stories against his real life, either directly from Edward before he dies and/or from other sources, and thus allow Will to come to a new understanding of himself and his life, past, present and future.

small soldiers_1998.opis_neo:
Ko uporabijo raketno tehnologijo, da nadgradijo akcijske figurice, igrače kmalu začnejo svoj program jemati preveč resno.

Govoreče visokotehnološke igrače z vgrajenimi vojaškimi čipi začnejo svoj bojni računalniški program jemati preveč resno. Satirična akcijska komedija režiserja "Gremlinov" Joeja Danteja.
small soldiers_1998.opis_omdb: Fifteen-year-old Alan Abernathy, the son of a toy store owner, tries out some new action figures: The Commando Elite versus The Gorgonites. But three months ago, a toy company believes it is onto something when it employs the latest government military technology in a series of action figures, enabling them to talk. They underestimate the power of the special micro chips they've employed, however, as the two opposing sides of the toy line start thinking for themselves and engaging in real combat! The Commando Elite vow to wipe out the Gorgonites in a suburban neighborhood. Alan, his neighbor Christy Fimple, (on whom he has a massive crush) with the help of the kind Gorgonites, must protect his home and family from the Commandos.

unbroken_2014.opis_neo:
Film prinaša neverjetno resnično zgodbo športnika in vojaka Louisa Zamperinija (Jack O'Connell).

Po strmoglavljenju letala med drugo svetovno vojno, olimpijec Louis Zamperini preživi sedeminštirideset mučnih dni na splavu z dvema članoma posadke, preden jih najde japonska mornarica, ter jih pošlje v taborišče za vojne zapornike.
unbroken_2014.opis_omdb: The life of Louis Zamperini, an Olympic athlete who joined the armed forces during the second world war. Only to be captured by the Japanese navy after a plane crash in the Pacific. During his capture, Louie must continue his fight by surviving through the war.

in bruges_2008.opis_neo:
Colin Farrell, Brendan Gleeson in Ralph Fiennes v odlični, s črnim humorjem podkrepljeni kriminalki o poklicnih morilcih na prisilnem oddihu.

Mesto Bruges, dobro ohranjeno srednjeveško mesto v Belgiji, je odlična destinacija za popotnike iz vsega sveta. Toda za poklicna morilca Raya in Kena je vse prej kot to. Vse namreč kaže, da je lahko to njuna zadnja destinacija.
in bruges_2008.opis_omdb: London based hit men Ray and Ken are told by their boss Harry Waters to lie low in Bruges, Belgium for up to two weeks following their latest hit, which resulted in the death of an innocent bystander. Harry will be in touch with further instructions. While they wait for Harry's call, Ken, following Harry's advice, takes in the sights of the medieval city with great appreciation. But the charms of Bruges are lost on the simpler Ray, who is already despondent over the innocent death, especially as it was his first job. Things change for Ray when he meets Chloe, part of a film crew shooting a movie starring an American dwarf named Jimmy. When Harry's instructions arrive, Ken, for whom the job is directed, isn't sure if he can carry out the new job, especially as he has gained a new appreciation of life from his stay in the fairytale Bruges. While Ken waits for the inevitable arrival into Bruges of an angry Harry, who feels he must clean up matters on his own, Ray is dealing with his own problems, not only with Harry, but with a Canadian couple and a half-blind thief named Eirik. Ray hopes he can count on both Chloe and Ken to help him carve out a new life for himself. In the end, Harry, involved in an incident with Jimmy, may have to keep to his own principles.

pixels_2015.opis_neo:
Ko nezemljani posnetke klasičnih arkadnih videoiger napačno razumejo kot napoved vojne, Zemljo napadejo po pravilih teh iger.

Ko nezemljani videoposnetke klasičnih arkadnih iger napačno razumejo kot vojno napoved, napadejo Zemljo z ogromnimi liki iz računalniških iger. Pacman in njegovi prijatelji povzročajo kaos, zato predsednik ZDA pokliče na pomoč prijatelja, nekdaj prvaka v arkadnih igrah, da se poda v boj z vsiljivci in reši človeštvo pred uničenjem.
pixels_2015.opis_omdb: Sam has been one of the best arcade gamers of his time. Once in an international tournament NASA sent the video recording of all the games to space for intelligent beings to find and know more about humans. However the aliens interpreted the games as a challenge and began attacking Earth using the video game data. It's now up to Sam and other old time arcade game champions to save the Earth from the video game alien invasion.

eastern promises_2007.opis_neo:
V Londonu porodničarki Ani pred očmi umre najstnica, za seboj pa pusti dojenčka in dnevnik, ki Ano privede do ruske mafije in skrivnostnega Nikolaja.

Tragična smrt noseče najstnice spodbudi porodničarko Anno, da s pomočjo pokojničinega dnevnika skuša odkriti sorodnike dekletovega dojenčka.
eastern promises_2007.opis_omdb: THIS SUMMARY CONTAINS SPOILERS. - In London, the Russian pregnant teenager Tatiana arrives bleeding in a hospital, and the doctors save her baby only. The Russian descendant midwife Anna Khitrova finds Tatiana's diary written in Russian language in her belongings and decided to find her family to deliver the baby, she brings the diary home and ask her uncle Stepan to translate the document. Stepan refuses, but Anna finds a card of a restaurant owned by the Russian Semyon inside the diary and she visits the old man trying to find a lead to contact Tatiana's family. When she mentions the existence of the diary, Semyon immediately offers to translate the document. However, Stepan translates part of the diary and Anna discovers that Semyon and his sick son Kirill had raped Tatiana when she was fourteen years old and forced her to work as prostitute in a brothel of their own. Further, Semyon is the dangerous boss of the Russian mafia "Vory v Zakone", jeopardizing the safety of Anna and her family. Meanwhile, Semyon's driver Nikolai Luzhin gets close to Kirill and Semyon, climbing positions in the criminal organization, but he helps Anna, her family and the baby.

zg80_2016.opis_neo:
Film spremlja hrvaško skupino navijačev zagrebškega Dinama "Bad Blue Boys" ter srbske "Delije", navijače Crvene zvezde iz Beograda.

Jugoslavija v 80. letih prejšnjega stoletja. Člani hrvaške navijaške skupine Bad Blue Boys se odpravijo v Beograd, kjer se bo njihovo moštvo, zagrebški Dinamo, pomerilo s svojimi rivali, beograjsko Crveno Zvezdo, Bad Blue Boys pa se nameravajo soočiti z Zvezdinimi navijači, Delijami. Med obema navijaškima tolpama se kmalu vname vrsta pretepov, ki jih poskuša ukrotiti tamkajšnja policija. Beograjske ulice se tako spremenijo v vojno območje, kjer poskuša vsak rešiti svojo glavo. Nihče ne ve, da se bo nekaj let kasneje vojna med nogometnimi navijači spremenila v vojno med bivšimi jugoslovanskimi narodi …
zg80_2016.opis_omdb: Zg80 is a prequel of Metastaze set in 1989. The movie brings back its characters to pre-war Yugoslavia where they, as part of Bad Blue Boys, go on a football match in Belgrade to see Dinamo play against Red Star. They encounter guest fans, their arch rivals Delije, in a series of events that lead to football fans war on the streets of Belgrade.

what happened to monday_2017.opis_neo:
Nekega dne se ena od sedmih identičnih sester, ki sme ven le ob ponedeljkih, ne vrne, zato druge sestre raziskujejo njeno izginotje.

V prihodnosti je vlada zaradi preštevilnega prebivalstva omejila družine na enega otroka. Sedem identičnih sester, poimenovanih po dnevih v tednu, živi skritih na varnem. Vsak dan ena izmed njih prevzame njihovo skupno identiteto in se poda v svet. Ko se sestra, ki sme ven ob ponedeljkih, ne vrne, druge sestre odidejo raziskovati njeno izginotje.
what happened to monday_2017.opis_omdb: In a not so distant future, where overpopulation and famine have forced governments to undertake a drastic One-Child Policy, seven identical sisters (all of them portrayed by Noomi Rapace) live a hide-and-seek existence pursued by the Child Allocation Bureau. The Bureau, directed by the fierce Nicolette Cayman (Glenn Close), enforces a strict family-planning agenda that the sisters outwit by taking turns assuming the identity of one person: Karen Settman. Taught by their grandfather (Willem Dafoe) who raised and named them - Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday and Sunday - each can go outside once a week as their common identity, but are only free to be themselves in the prison of their own apartment. That is until, one day, Monday does not come home.

norm of the north - dubbed_2016.opis_neo:
Severni medo Norm in njegovi trije prijatelji se bodo odpravili vse od njihovega doma na Arktiki v New York, kjer jih čakajo neverjetne pustolovščine.

Za klepetavega medveda Norma je nekaj povsem jasno: na Arktiki ni prostora za turiste. No, ko pa se zmešani gradbinec odloči na medovem dvorišču zgraditi luksuzna stanovanja, bo Norm naredil, kar bi naredil vsak pameten severni medved. Odpravi se v New York, da bi preprečil gradnjo. S pomočjo zmešanih lemingov na svoji strani se bo Norm udomačil v Velikem jabolku in skušal rešiti Arktiko pred poplavo turistov.
norm of the north - dubbed_2016.opis_omdb: Norm the polar bear is the son of the king of the Arctic. In his youth, he develops the ability to speak to humans, a trait shared by his grandfather. Because of this, he is made an outcast from the other animals, only being accepted by Socrates, a wise bird, and Elizabeth, a female polar bear whom Norm is in love with. Years later, Norm's grandfather has disappeared and human tourists are filling the Arctic. Socrates shows Norm and three Arctic lemmings a luxury condo that has been installed on the ice. Inside this condo is Vera, a representative for wealthy developer Mr. Greene. After Norm saves Vera from an avalanche, Mr. Greene tells her to find an actor to play a polar bear for their campaign. Socrates convinces Norm and the lemmings to stow away on a ship to New York City..

ribanje i ribarsko prigovaranje_2020.opis_neo: 16. stoletje. Pesnik, plemič Petar Hektorović zapusti gradnjo svoje počitniške rezidence in se odloči tri dni preživeti na morju v družbi dveh ribičev, Paskoja in Nikole. Lenari, sanjari in se spominja mladostne ljubezni. Ribarijo v uvalah Hvara, Brača in Šolte, dialogi pa včasih parafrazirajo antično tematik in ljudske modrosti. Trk ljudskega in načitanega s še vedno bolečimi spomini na boj med plemiči in kmeti v kmečkem uporu postane zgodba o odnosu dveh hvarskih stanov, ki na koncu v življenjski preizkušnji preraste v človeško solidarnost.
ribanje i ribarsko prigovaranje_2020.opis_omdb: Petar Hektorovic, a nobleman poet embarks on a boat trip with two local fishermen. As they hop the bucolic islands, the aging poet recalls his youthful tragic love, comes to terms with his artistic impotence and struggles with the uneasy relationship between the noblemen and the commons. Filmed on location in Adriatic, the film is an intricate patchwork of reality, memories, dreams and visions.

masterminds_2015.opis_neo:
Obupan, toda prepričan vase, bo skušal David v vrsti komičnih prizorov obrniti igro sebi v prid in se maščevati za podlo dejanje.

David (Zach Galifianakis) je voznik, ki je podlegel življenjski in delovni monotoniji. Dan za dnem prevaža milijone tujih dolarjev v bančni trezor. Ta vsakdan prekine zapeljiva kolegica Kelly (Kristen Wiig), ki ga prepriča, da z ekipo neumnih zločincev spelje absurdno slab načrt velikega ropa! 
Kljub več možnostim, da ga dobijo, kot da bi uspel, David le uspe ukrasti 17 milijonov dolarjev, ki jih njegovi zločinski pajdaši vzamejo zase, njega pa kot na pladnju prepustijo policiji.
masterminds_2015.opis_omdb: David Ghantt discovers the true meaning of adventure far beyond his wildest dreams. He is an uncomplicated man stuck in a monotonous life. Day in and day out he drives an armored vehicle, transporting millions of other people's money with no escape in sight. The only glimmer of excitement is his flirtatious work crush Kelly Campbell who soon lures him into the scheme of a lifetime. Along with a group of half-brained criminals led by Steve Chambers and an absurdly faulted heist plan, David manages the impossible and makes off with $17 million in cash...only problem is he foolishly hands the money over to this wild group of double crossers and has been set up to take the fall. With the bandits blowing the millions on lavish and ridiculous luxuries, they leave behind a glaring trail of evidence. Now on the lam and in over his head, David must dodge the authorities, evade a hilarious hit man, Mike McKinney, and try to turn the tables on the ones he trusted most.

draft day_2014.opis_neo:
Film Ivana Reitmana spremlja ob izboru igralcev za naslednjo sezono življenje Sonnyja Weaverja Jr., menedžerja Cleveland Brownsov.

Sonny Weaver je menedžer Cleveland Brownsov in izbira igralce za naslednjo sezono. Odloča se med obrambnim igralcem Vontaem Mackom in napadalcem Rayem Jenningsom. Hkrati skuša doseči očetove uspehe v poslu, obvladovati novega trenerja Penna, ter sprejeti dejstvo, da je njegova partnerka Ali noseča.
draft day_2014.opis_omdb: It's draft day in the NFL, and as General Manager of the Cleveland Browns, Sonny is forced to come up with a big move. After trading for the number one pick, Sonny has to choose between a lower-ranked linebacker with a questionable past, or a celebrated quarterback with a questionable future. All the while, Sonny is walking in the footsteps of his father, and personal complications force their way to the surface.

on the line_2022.opis_neo:
Radijski voditelj bo moral igrati igro preživetja in odkriti identiteto zločinca, da bi rešil svojo družino.

Elvis je radijski voditelj, ki probleme poslušalcev rešuje s svojim legendarnim glasom in ostrimi odgovori. Ima svoje mnenje o vsem in se spusti v vsako debato. Nekega večera prejme dramatični klic, ki bi mu lahko uničil kariero, družino in življenje.
on the line_2022.opis_omdb: A host takes a call, where an unknown person threatens to kill the showman's entire family on air. To save loved ones, the radio host will have to play a survival game and the only way to win is to find out the identity of the cri...

long shot_2019.opis_neo:
Brezposelni novinar postane pisec govorov za svojo nekdanjo simpatijo, ki je postala ena najvplivnejših žensk na svetu, in med njima preskoči iskra.

On je politični novinar, s talentom za vse, kar prinaša težave. Ona je najboljša diplomatka v državi s talentom za pravzaprav karkoli. Ko se Fred odloči, da se bo ponovno zbližal s srednješolsko simpatijo, jo navduši s humorjem in mladostniškim idealizmom. Žal pa lahko njegova brezskrbnost uniči njeno karierno pot, ki je tik pred pomembno prelomnico.
long shot_2019.opis_omdb: Fred Flarsky (Seth Rogen) is a gifted and free-spirited journalist with an affinity for trouble. Charlotte Field (Charlize Theron) is one of the most influential women in the world. Smart, sophisticated, and accomplished, she's a powerhouse diplomat with a talent for...well, mostly everything. The two have nothing in common, except that she was his babysitter and childhood crush. When Fred unexpectedly reconnects with Charlotte, he charms her with his self-deprecating humor and his memories of her youthful idealism. As she prepares to make a run for the Presidency, Charlotte impulsively hires Fred as her speechwriter, much to the dismay of her trusted advisors. A fish-out-of-water on Charlotte's elite team, Fred is unprepared for her glamorous lifestyle in the limelight. However, sparks fly as their unmistakable chemistry leads to a round-the-world romance and a series of unexpected and dangerous incidents.

while we're young_2014.opis_neo:
Življenje zakoncev v srednjih letih se obrne na glavo, ko spoznata mlajši par.

V komični drami "Dokler sva še mlada" režiserja Noe Baumbacha, igrata Ben Stiller in Naomi Watts Josha in Cornelio, poročeni par iz New York, pri 40-ih še brez otrok. Medtem ko njuni prijatelji zibajo otroke, se par zbliža z mlajšim parom Jamie (Adam Driver) in Darby (Amanda Seyfried). On je vzpenjajoči se režiser dokumentarcev, kot je nekoč to bil Josh. Starejši par začne uživati v energiji mlajšega naraščaja, vendar začne Josh sumiti, da njegov novi prijatelj ni tako iskren, kot je mislil.
while we're young_2014.opis_omdb: Josh Srebnick is 44. He is married to Cornelia, 43, the daughter of Leslie Breitbart, a respected documentary filmmaker. The couple lives comfortably in New York Village and gives the image of happiness. But things are not so rosy as they look: on a personal level, their relationships have been cooling down while they suffer from not having children. On a professional plane, things have deteriorated as well. Josh, who is also a documentary filmmaker like his father-in-law, has lost inspiration: he has been grappling with his last movie for eight years now without being able to complete it. To be true, Josh goes nowhere and his marriage is on the rocks. Things start changing when Josh and Cornelia meet another married pair: Jamie and Darby, a generation younger, express their admiration for Josh (Jamie wishing to become a documentary filmmaker himself). Plus, they are much cooler, smarter and more uninhibited than the two forty-odds. Could they help Josh and Cornelia to revive their couple? Could they give Josh an extra boost of energy to make a fresh start in his art?

apocalypto_2006.opis_neo:
V času zatona majevske kulture miroljubno pleme napadejo vojščaki, ki iščejo sužnje in ljudi, da jih bodo žrtvovali svojim bogovom.

Idiličnega življenja Jaguarjeve šape in njegovega plemena je konec, ko v vas vdrejo majevski lovci na glave. Moške prodajo za obredno žrtvovanje, ženske pa kot sužnje. Jaguarja odpeljejo, njegova noseča žena in sin pa ostaneta skrita v jami. Ko mu uspe pobegniti, se začne tekma s časom, da bi rešil svojo družino.
apocalypto_2006.opis_omdb: In the Maya civilization, a peaceful tribe is brutally attacked by warriors seeking slaves and human beings for sacrifice for their gods. Jaguar Paw hides his pregnant wife and his son in a deep hole nearby their tribe and is captured while fighting with his people. An eclipse spares his life from the sacrifice and later he has to fight to survive and save his beloved family.

norm of the north: keys to the kingdom_2.naslov_orig: Norm Of The North: Keys To The Kingdom
norm of the north: keys to the kingdom_2.opis_neo:
Daleč od svojega doma na Arktiki je severni medved Sven s tremi prijatelji v New Yorku, ki je postal njihov novi dom.

Daleč od svojega doma na Arktiki je severni medved Sven s tremi prijatelji v New Yorku, ki je postal njihov novi dom. Mesto pa se znajde v nevarnosti in Sven v težavah, obtožen zločina, ki ga ni zagrešil. Prijatelji so mu v oporo in mu pomagajo oprati svoje ime ter rešiti kraljestvo.
norm of the north: keys to the kingdom_2.reziser: Tim Maltby, Lisa Ortiz, Richard Finn
norm of the north: keys to the kingdom_2.opis_omdb: Norm, the newly crowned polar bear king of the arctic, must save New York City and his home. But Norm goes from hero to villain when he's framed for a crime he didn't commit. He must work with his friends to clear his good name and help save his kingdom in a winner-take-all hockey match.

intouchables_2011.opis_neo:
Po resničnih dogodkih navdahnjena zgodba o prijateljstvu med premožnim tetraplegikom in revnim temnopoltim priseljencem.

Življenji premožnega Philippa in revnega temnopoltega prestopnika Drissa se ne bi mogli bolj razlikovati, toda usoda nepričakovano preplete njuni poti. Invalidni Philippe išče negovalca in med prijavljenimi kandidati naleti na Drissa. Ta si službe v resnici ne želi, temveč hoče zgolj zadostiti pogojem za prejemanje socialnega nadomestila, zato se poskuša prikazati v najslabši luči. Toda Drissova spontanost je Philippu všeč, zato ga najame, njuno prvotno nezaupanje pa počasi preraste v iskreno prijateljstvo.
intouchables_2011.opis_omdb: Philippe, a wealthy quadriplegic, hires Driss, an ex-convict, as his caregiver. Despite cultural and social differences, the two form a deep friendship that transforms their lives. Through humor, empathy, and mutual respect, they navigate physical, emotional, and social challenges. The film explores friendship, personal growth, and human dignity, blending comedy and drama to highlight the transformative power of connection and understanding across divides.

lamborghini: the man behind the legend_2.naslov_sl: Lamborghini: Mož, ki je ustvaril legendo
lamborghini: the man behind the legend_2.naslov_orig: Lamborghini: The Man Behind the Legend
lamborghini: the man behind the legend_2.opis_neo:
Življenjska zgodba Ferruccia Lamborghinija, ustanovitelja Lamborghinija.

Film temelji na biografiji Ferruccia Lamborghinija in spremlja dolgo življenje slavnega podjetnika. Od začetka njegove kariere kot proizvajalca traktorjev, do proizvodnje vojaških vozil med drugo svetovno vojno ter nato do oblikovanja in proizvodnje legendarnih luksuznih športnih avtomobilov Lamborghini. Bil je eden najbogatejših ljudi v Italiji in je imel za vsak dan v tednu drug avto.
lamborghini: the man behind the legend_2.opis_omdb: This thrilling, high-speed biopic reveals one man's dream of making the world's fastest car-and beating rival Enzo Ferrari.

new in town_2009.opis_neo:
Poslovna ženska iz Miamija se privaja na novo življenje v majhnem mestu v Minnesoti.

Kar se je začelo kot povsem navadna službena naloga, postane najboljša stvar v njenem življenju. Zabavna romantična komedija je pravi dokaz, da lahko najtoplejše ljudi najdemo prav na najbolj hladnih mestih.
new in town_2009.opis_omdb: A high-powered consultant in love with her upscale Miami, Florida lifestyle is sent to New Ulm, Minnesota to oversee the restructuring of a blue collar manufacturing plant. After enduring a frosty reception from the locals, icy roads and freezing weather, she warms up to the small town's charm, and eventually finds herself being accepted by the community. When she's ordered to close down the plant and put the entire community out of work, she's forced to reconsider her goals and priorities, and finds a way to save the town.

to catch a killer_2023.opis_neo:
Baltimore. Silvestrovo. Nadarjenega, a težavnega policista zaposli glavni preiskovalec FBI, da bi mu pomagal sestaviti profil in izslediti množičnega morilca.

Zgodba spremlja Eleanor Falco, policistko, ki se znajde v nevarni situaciji, ko začne neznani ostrostrelec z visoke stolpnice naključno streljati na mimoidoče. Ko agent FBI-ja Geoffrey Lammark prispe na prizorišče zločina raziskat, kaj se je zgodilo, opazi nekaj posebnega na Eleanor in jo povabi, naj jim pomaga ujeti morilca.
to catch a killer_2023.opis_omdb: An intuitive but troubled police officer is recruited by an FBI expert to stop a relentless shooter who is terrorizing Baltimore.

the lost daughter_2021.opis_neo:
Izvrsten film z izjemno žensko igralsko zasedbo je posnet po tretjem romanu pisateljice Elene Ferrante.

Ženska v srednjih letih letuje v obmorskem mestecu, kjer postane nekoliko obsedena z mlado materjo in otrokom, ki ju nenehno opazuje - zaradi česar se njene počitnice sčasoma sprevržejo v temačno sago soočanja z demoni preteklosti in dvomi o lastnem materinstvu.
the lost daughter_2021.opis_omdb: A woman's beach vacation takes a dark turn when she begins to confront the troubles of her past.

a most violent year_2014.opis_neo:
Zgodba filma Leto nasilja je umeščena v leto 1881, ko je v Velikem jabolku zabeleženo največ kriminalnih dejanj v zgodovini mesta.

Zgodba je umeščena v leto 1881, ko je bilo v New Yorku zabeleženo največ kriminalnih dejanj v zgodovini mesta. V teh nevarnih časih skuša priseljenec Abel Morales razvejati svoj dobro utečen posel, vendar vsestransko nasilje in korupcija grozita, da bosta uničila vse kar je ustvaril, tudi njegovo družino.
a most violent year_2014.opis_omdb: A crime drama set in New York City during the winter of 1981, statistically one of the most violent years in the city's history, and centered on the lives of an immigrant and his family trying to expand their business and capitalize on opportunities as the rampant violence, decay, and corruption of the day drag them in and threaten to destroy all they have built.

life partners_2014.opis_neo:
Zgodba o prijateljstvu med dvema dekletoma: heteroseksualne Paige in homoseksualne Sashe, ki je na preizkušnji, ko Paige dobi resnega fanta.

29 letna odvetnica (Gillian Jacobs) in njena najboljša prijateljica lezbijka (Leighton Meester) sta soočeni z dramatično spremembo dolgoletnega prijateljstva, ko se ena od njiju spusti v resno zvezo.
life partners_2014.opis_omdb: Sasha and Paige's co-dependent friendship is tested as Paige gets serious with a guy for the first time.

broken english_2007.opis_neo:
Nora že leta nima sreče z moškimi. Dela v hotelu in nima možnosti napredovanja. Nato pa spozna Francoza Juliena.

Nora Wilder noei. Vsi okoli nje so v zvezi, poročeni ali imajo otroke. Nora je v tridesetih, samska in dela delo, ki ni več zanjo. Toda mama jo ves čas opominja na to. Da ne omenjamo "popolnega zakona" njene najboljše prijateljice Audrey. Toda po vrsti polomij na zmenkih nepričakovano spozna Juliena, nenavadnega Francoza, ki ji odpre oči za mnogo več stvari, kot je ljubezen.
broken english_2007.opis_omdb: Nora Wilder is freaking out. Everyone around her is either in a relationship, married, or has children. Nora is in her thirties, alone with job she's outgrown and a mother who constantly reminds her of it all. Not to mention her best friend Audrey's "perfect marriage". But after a series of disastrous dates, Nora unexpectedly meets Julien, a quirky Frenchman who opens her eyes to a lot more than love.

a fond_2016.opis_neo:
Družina se odpravi na počitnice, toda njihov novi avto se ne more ustaviti in zato se morajo izogniti stotinam avtomobilom, da bi preprečili nesrečo.

Družina se s svojim dedkom odpravi na počitnice, ko se njihov novi avto pokvari in ga nikakor ne uspejo zaustaviti. Ker se jim to zgodi med dirjanjem po avtocesti, jim ne preostane drugega, kot izogibanje stotinam avtomobilov, da ne bi prišlo do nesreče pri 160 kilometrih na uro. Teh počitnic zagotovo ne bodo pozabili!

ratchet & clank_2016.opis_neo:
Film o junaštvu, prijateljstvu in o tem, kako je nadvse pomembno dognati, kdo si.

Ragljač in Žvenko sta netipična junaka, ki se borita proti zlobnemu nezemljanu. Ta namerava uničiti vse planete v galaksiji Solana. Da bi rešila ozvezdje, bosta morala moči združiti z moštvom pisanih junakov iz vrst galaktičnih rangerjev. Pri tem pa se bosta naučila o junaštvu, prijateljstvu in pomembnosti odkrivanja svoje identitete.
ratchet & clank_2016.opis_omdb: Ratchet and Clank tells the story of two unlikely heroes as they struggle to stop a vile alien named Chairman Drek from destroying every planet in the Solana Galaxy. When the two stumble upon a dangerous weapon capable of destroying entire planets, they must join forces with a team of colorful heroes called The Galactic Rangers in order to save the galaxy. Along the way they'll learn about heroism, friendship, and the importance of discovering one's own identity.

a hidden life_2019.opis_neo:
Franz Jägerstätter je mlad moški, ki z ženo in tremi hčerami živi v vasici St. Radegund. Ko izbruhne druga svetovna vojna, Franza vpokličejo v vojsko.

Družina Jägerstätter živi mirno življenje v vasici St. Radegund v avstrijskih Alpah. Ko oče Franz odkloni vpoklic v Hitlerjevo vojsko, ki se ji je pridružilo mnogo Avstrijcev med drugo svetovno vojno, je poslan v berlinski zapor. V izgnanstvu čaka na sojenje, soproga Fani, katero imajo sovaščani za izdajalko, pa vodi kmetijo in skrbi za otroke.
a hidden life_2019.opis_omdb: Based on real events, A Hidden Life is the story of an unsung hero, Bl. Franz Jägerstätter, who refused to fight for the Nazis in World War II. When the Austrian peasant farmer is faced with the threat of execution for treason, it is his unwavering faith and his love for his wife, Fani, and children that keeps his spirit alive.

the company men_2010.opis_neo:
Zgodba o treh moških, ki se trudijo preživeti leto dni odpuščanj v velikem podjetju, ter o tem, kako to vpliva nanje, njihove družine in skupnost.

Bobby Walker živi ameriške sanje: odlična služba, čudovita družina, sijajni porsche v garaži. Ko s sodelavcema Philom Woodwardom in Geneom McClaryjem ostane brez službe, se morajo vsi trije soočiti s ponovno definicijo sebe kot moških, mož in očetov.
the company men_2010.opis_omdb: When the GTX Corporation must cut jobs to improve the company's balance sheet during the 2010 recession, thousands of employees will take the hit, like Bobby Walker (Ben Affleck). Bobby learns the real life consequences of not having a job. Not only does he see a change to his family lifestyle, and the loss of his home, but also his feelings of self-worth.

good luck to you, leo grande_2022.naslov_orig: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
good luck to you, leo grande_2022.opis_neo:
Nancy Stokes hrepeni po avanturi, zato najame mladega spolnega delavca po imenu Leo Grande.

Nancy Stokes je upokojena učiteljica verouka, ki zeli končno začiniti svoje življenje. Nancy je do zdaj živela nadvse umaknjeno. Soprog, ki je umrl pred dvema letoma, je bil njen edini spolni partner. Imel je omejen pogled na to, kaj si lahko privoščiš v spalnici. Nancy se zato odloči najeti spolnega delavca po imenu Leo Grande, da bi si izpolnila želje, ki jih je morala vse življenje tlačiti.
good luck to you, leo grande_2022.opis_omdb: Nancy Stokes, a retired school teacher, is yearning for some adventure, and some sex. And she has a plan, which involves hiring a young sex worker named Leo Grande.

zeros and ones_2021.opis_neo:
Ameriški vojak se poda na junaško pot, da bi odkril neznanega sovražnika, ki ogroža ves svet.

Ameriški vojak Jericho, ki služi v Rimu skuša najti svojega zaprtega uporniškega brata dvojčka, ki morda ve, kako odvrniti apokaliptičen napad. Italijanska prestolnica je v obsednem stanju in Jericho po temačnih ulicah polnih paranoje a tudi upanja išče način, kako teroristom preprečiti, da vržejo v zrak Vatikan.
zeros and ones_2021.opis_omdb: JJ is a soldier who's been tasked with preventing an imminent terrorist threat to the Vatican. While he's in Rome, though, he is also eager on finding his anarchist brother, a political prisoner who may or may not already be dead. In addition there's an obvious race against time and plenty of enemies.

blonde ambition_2007.opis_neo:
Katie se v iskanju novega začetka preseli v New York, a se znajde sredi igre za premoč med direktorjem gradbenega podjetja in njegovo namestnico.

Ko Katie Gregerstitch iz Mindna v državi Louisiana obišče svojega fanta Billyja, ambicioznega manekena v New Yorku, ga zaloti v postelji z drugo žensko. Billy pusti Katie, ki odide k dobri prijateljici Haley. Haley prepriča Katie, naj samostojno zaživi, namesto da sedi križem rok. Katie prevzame delo dostavljavke, ki mora dostaviti pošiljko velikemu gradbenemu podjetju. V spletu okoliščin postane Katie nevede žrtev dveh poslovnežev, ki skušata vreči direktorja mega koncerna.
blonde ambition_2007.opis_omdb: A young professional woman (Simpson) unwittingly becomes the pawn of two business executives in their bid to oust the head of a mega-conglomerate.

white fang_2018.opis_neo:
Beli očnjak se pri različnih lastnikih nauči neprecenljivih lekcij, ki mu pomagajo skozi življenje.

Ko ga kot mladička odvzamejo njegovi materi, se Beli očnjak na poti skozi življenje nauči pomembnih lekcij. Najprej ga vzgaja Sivi bober iz plemena Jukon. Ob njem se nauči biti spoštljiv do drugih in biti vodja. Ko ga prevzame zlobni trgovec, ga pahne v kruti svet pasjih spopadov. Naposled ga reši ljubeč par, pri katerem se nauči obvladati svoje divje nagone.
white fang_2018.opis_omdb: Based on the timeless novel by Jack London. A loyal wolfdog's curiosity leads him on the adventure of a lifetime while serving a series of three distinctly different masters.

race_2016.opis_neo:
Biografski film o temnopoltem atletu, ki je na poletnih olimpijskih igrah v Berlinu leta 1936 ovrgel teorijo o superiornosti arijske rase.

Posneto po resničnih dogodkih in življenju Jesseja Owensa, slavnega ameriškega športnika, legendarnega po njegovem štirikratnem zmagoslavju na olimpijskih igrah v Berlinu leta 1936. Hitler je nameraval olimpijske igre v Berlinu izkoristiti kot promocijo nacističnega režima in prikaz „arijske prevlade“ nad drugim svetom. Nemčija je bila na olimpijadi v Berlinu res najuspešnejša država, vendar pa je njihov uspeh zasenčil ne-arijec, Afroameričan, ki je s svojimi dosežki presegel vse nemške športnike.
race_2016.opis_omdb: In the 1930s, Jesse Owens is a young man who is the first in his family to go to college. Going to Ohio State to train under its track and field coach, Larry Snyder, the young African American athlete quickly impresses with his tremendous potential that suggests Olympic material. However, as Owens struggles both with the obligations of his life and the virulent racism against him, the question of whether America would compete at all at the 1936 Olympics in Nazi Germany is being debated vigorously. When the American envoy finds a compromise persuasive with the Third Reich to avert a boycott, Owens has his own moral struggle about going. Upon resolving that issue, Owens and his coach travel to Berlin to participate in a competition that would mark Owens as the greatest of America's Olympians even as the German film director, Leni Riefenstahl, locks horns with her country's Propaganda Minister, Josef Goebbels, to film the politically embarrassing fact for posterity.

heretic_2024.opis_neo:
Temačna psihološka igra, polna bogatih dialogov in intelektualnih debat.

Dve mladi mormonski misionarki sta prisiljena dokazati svojo vero, ko potrkata na napačna vrata in ju sprejme diabolični gospod Reed (Hugh Grant) ter ju ujame v svojo smrtonosno igro mačke in miši - temačna psihološka igra, polna bogatih dialogov in intelektualnih debat. Film žanrsko prepleta grozljivko in psihološki triler, saj Reed mladi vernici potegne v najtemnejše kotičke svojega uma in ju sooči s težko izbiro med vero in dvomom.
heretic_2024.opis_omdb: Two young religious women are drawn into a game of cat-and-mouse in the house of a strange man.

the rebound_2009.opis_neo:
Sveže ločena mamica pritegne zanimanje njenega veliko mlajšega soseda, ki ji pazi otroke.

Potem, ko je odkrila, da jo mož vara, se Sandy iz predmestja preseli v stanovanje v mestnem središču ter dobi sanjsko službo na televiziji. Kmalu spozna mladega Arama, ki pazi na njene otroke. Stvari se zapletejo, ko neke noči Aram in Sandy končata skupaj v postelji.
the rebound_2009.opis_omdb: Sandy, upon discovering her husband's infidelity while watching her son's birthday video, leaves the suburbs and moves into the city. She gets an apartment that's above a coffee house where she befriends one of the workers, Aram, a guy whose wife only married him so she could get a green card. Aram's family thinks he's wasting his life and education by working in the coffee house. Soon after moving into the apartment, Sandy hires Aram to be her nanny while she takes on work for the first time since her children were born. It isn't long when Aram and Sandy find they get along wonderfully and start to date. But the question is: is their relationship real or is it, in fact, just a rebound for both of them?

escape plan 2: hades_2018.opis_neo:
Nadpovprečni dvojec je pobegnil iz najnaprednejšega futurističnega in visoko tehnološkega zapora po krivični obtožbi in obsodbi na kazen.

Nadaljevanje akcijskega spektakla iz leta 2013. Nadpovprečni dvojec je pobegnil iz najnaprednejšega futurističnega in visoko tehnološkega zapora po krivični obtožbi in obsodbi na kazen. Več let po pobegu iz ultrasodobnega zapora, iz katerega ni mogoče pobegniti, Ray zbere novo vrhunsko moštvo. Toda ko en od članov izgine, se je Breslin prisiljen vrniti v pekel in znova pobegnit iz njega, da bi rešil svojega prijatelja, obsojenega na kruto borbo, znano kot Had.
escape plan 2: hades_2018.opis_omdb: Ray Breslin manages an elite team of security specialists trained in the art of breaking people out of the world's most impenetrable prisons.
