When his most trusted operative, Shu Ren, is kidnapped and disappears inside the most elaborate prison ever built, entirely computerized and constantly changing shape, Ray must track him down with the help of some of his former friends.

king of thieves: king of thieves_2018.naslov_orig: King of Thieves: King of Thieves
king of thieves: king of thieves_2018.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba neverjetne tolpe upokojencev, ki je organizirala spektakularni rop v Hatton Gardnu v Londonu za veliko noč leta 2015.

Film o neverjetni tolpi upokojencev, ki so organizirali spektakularni rop v Hatton Gardnu v Londonu za veliko noč leta 2015. V tolpi je oskarjevska elita, kot je Michael Cane, Jim Broadbent in Tom Courtenay. Neverjetna resnična zgodba o ropu diamantov v Hatton Gardnu, največji v britanski zgodovini. Skupina starejših moških, upokojencev v poznih 60-ih in 70-ih je iz sefa v Hatton Gardnu v Londonu ukradla za 200 milijonov funtov dragocenosti. Rop so dodelali do podrobnosti in v nekaj fazah. Prvič so v sef vstopili v četrtek zvečer in prišli ven naslednje jutri, znova so šli v sef v soboto zvečer in prišli ven na veliko noč.
king of thieves: king of thieves_2018.opis_omdb: Based on infamous true events, a famous thief, Brian Reader (Sir Michael Caine), pulls together a band of misfit criminals to plot the biggest bank heist in British history. The thieves manage to escape with allegedly over two hundred million British pounds worth of stolen jewels and money. When Police are called to the scene and the investigation starts, the cracks between the eccentric gang members begin to show as they row over how to share the goods and become increasingly distrustful of each other.

honest thief_2020.opis_neo:
Izkušen ropar se želi pokesati za svoje zločine, a mlada FBI agenta ukradeta njegov vrnjen denar in mu naprtita umor.

Tom Carter je v svoji karieri nakradel za 9 milijonov dolarjev premoženja, a njegova identiteta nikoli ni bila razkrita. Po tem, ko spozna Annie, si želi zapustiti življenje roparja, zato se odloči priznati grehe in vrniti ves denar. Toda mlada FBI agenta, katerima je dodeljen Tomov primer, se odločita denar zadržati zase, Tomu pa pripisati umor nadrejenega.
honest thief_2020.opis_omdb: They call him the In-and-Out-Bandit because meticulous thief Tom Carter (Liam Neeson) has stolen $9 million from small-town banks while managing to keep his identity a secret. But after he falls in love with the bubbly Annie (Kate Walsh), Tom decides to make a fresh start by coming clean about his criminal past, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

snowpiercer_2013.opis_neo:
V prihodnosti zaradi poskusa s spreminjanjem podnebja umrejo vsa bitja razen srečnežev, ki se vkrcajo na Snowpiercer. Pojavi se nov razredni sistem.

Zemlja je okovana v led in sneg. Edini preživeli so na vlaku, ki kroži okoli Zemlje po principu perpetuum mobila. Najbogatejši živijo v razkošnih prvih vagonih, najrevnejši pa se vozijo zadaj. Vodja revnega sloja sproži upor in se odpravi proti vladarju Wilfordu, a na poti odkrije nepričakovano.
snowpiercer_2013.opis_omdb: Set in 2031, the entire world is frozen except for those aboard the Snowpiercer. For seventeen years, the world's survivors are on a train hurtling around the globe creating their own economy and class system. Led by Curtis (Chris Evans), a group of lower-class citizens living in squalor at the back of the train are determined to get to the front of the train and spread the wealth around. Each section of the train holds new surprises for the group who have to battle their way through. A revolution is underway.

boss level: boss level_2020.opis_neo:
Roy podoživlja en in isti dan, ki se vedno znova konča z njegovo brutalno smrtjo s strani neznanih plačancev ali med begom pred njimi.

Upokojeni vojaški specialec Roy Pulver (F. Grillo) podoživlja en in isti dan, ki se vedno znova konča z njegovo brutalno smrtjo s strani neznanih plačancev ali med begom pred njimi. Z vsakim novim prebujenjem po likvidaciji Roy zbira posamezne informacije, ki bi ga morale pripeljati do odgovora, kdo ga želi ubiti ter zakaj se vedno znova vrača od mrtvih in podoživlja en in isti dan. Roy ima priložnost, da popravi stvari in tako postane najboljša različica samega sebe, da se lahko reši pred ponovno smrtjo.
boss level: boss level_2020.opis_omdb: Trapped in a time loop that constantly repeats the day of his murder, a former special forces agent must unlock the mystery behind his untimely demise.

the titan_2018.opis_neo:
Nekdanjega vojaškega pilota skupaj z njegovo družino izberejo za prelomen eksperiment na področju genetske evolucije in raziskovanja vesolja.

V bližnji prihodnosti, ko površje Zemlje ni več naseljivo, nekdanjega vojaškega pilota Ricka Janssena izberejo za vojaški poskus. Ustvariti želijo človeka, ki bo sposoben preživeti v neizprosnem okolju Saturnovega meseca Titana. Ko se z družino preseli na otok v Atlantskem oceanu, Rick ugotovi, da je poskus v resnici krinka za kolonizacijo Titana.
the titan_2018.opis_omdb: A military family takes part in a ground-breaking experiment of genetic evolution and space exploration.

sky kids_2008.opis_neo:
Fanta iz majhnega mesteca morata preizkusiti svoj pogum, ko po nesreči postaneta slepa potnika na letalu, ki ga imajo v lasti zločinci.

Jason in Kyle sta prijatelja, ki se znajdeta v največji pustolovščini v njunem življenju, ko odkrijeta skrivnostno letalo na lokalnem letališču. Fanta se potuhnjeno splazita na letalo. Na letalu se jima pridružita še dva moška, pred katerima se skrijeta v prtljažni del letala.
sky kids_2008.opis_omdb: Two kids from a small town accidentally stow away aboard an airplane owned by the mob.

das leben der anderen_2006.opis_neo:
Le pet let pred padcem berlinskega zidu spremljamo zadnje vzdihljaje represivnega sistema v Vzhodni Nemčiji.

Gerd Wiesler je uvaljavan in vpliven član Stasija v Vzhodni Nemčiji leta 1984. Njegov nadrejeni ga prosi, naj poskrbi za nadzor priljubljenega dramatika Georga Dreymana in njegove partnerke. Čeprav je na videz ubogljiv državljan pa sumijo, da živi dvojno žiljenje. Gerd se profesionalno loti dela, vendar pa se prvič zaplete v življenje ljudi, ki jih opazuje.
das leben der anderen_2006.opis_omdb: Gerd Wiesler is an officer with the Stasi, the East German secret police. The film begins in 1984 when Wiesler attends a play written by Georg Dreyman, who is considered by many to be the ultimate example of the loyal citizen. Wiesler has a gut feeling that Dreyman can't be as ideal as he seems, and believes surveillance is called for. The Minister of Culture agrees but only later does Wiesler learn that the Minister sees Dreyman as a rival and lusts after his partner Christa-Maria. The more time he spends listening in on them, the more he comes to care about them. The once rigid Stasi officer begins to intervene in their lives, in a positive way, protecting them whenever possible. Eventually, Wiesler's activities catch up to him and while there is no proof of wrongdoing, he finds himself in menial jobs - until the unbelievable happens.

kidnap_2017.opis_neo:
Mati se na lastno pest poda v tekmo s časom, da bi rešila ugrabljenega sina.

V ZDA vsakih 40 sekund izgine en otrok. Nikoli ne mislite, da bi se to lahko zgodilo vam. Sama in prestrašena Kate Mcoy ne želi prepustiti usode in življenja svojega sina ugrabiteljem, zato se odloči vrniti udarec. V napeti tekmi s časom je nič ne zaustavi, v neverjetnem lovu in reševanju sina.
kidnap_2017.opis_omdb: In the US, a child goes missing every 40 seconds. You never think it will happen to you. Until it does. Alone and scared, Karla Dyson (Halle Berry) is unwilling to leave the fate of her son's life in someone else's hands. When she catches a glimpse of the abductors speeding away, she decides to fight back. In a heart pounding race against time, Karla begins a high speed pursuit and will stop at nothing to save her son's life.

a simple favor_2018.opis_neo:
Napet in hkrati glamurozen duhovit triler, poln obratov in izdaj, skrivnosti in razkritij, ljubezni in zvestobe, umorov in maščevanja.

Mama samohranilka Stephanie se spoprijatelji z očarljivo in glamurozno Emily. Ta jo nekega dne zaprosi, naj pobere njenega sina iz šole, nato pa izgine brez sledi. Stephanie skuša odkriti resnico o izginotju prijateljice, zato združi moči z njenim soprogom. Med razkrivanjem informacij o njej se kmalu začne spraševati kako dobro sploh pozna Emily.
a simple favor_2018.opis_omdb: Stephanie, a widowed mother, who also runs a cooking vlog, befriends Emily, an upper-class secretive woman whose child goes to same elementary school as of Stephanie's. Suddenly Emily goes missing and Stephanie starts investigating, only to find dark secrets, which changes the life of Stephanie forever.

parker_2013.opis_neo:
Tat, ki ga je izdala lastna tolpa, skuje maščevalni načrt, kako jim bo izmaknil plen zadnjega roparskega podviga.

Profesionalni ropar Parker deluje v okviru dveh etičnih načel: ne kradi od tistih, ki nimajo in ne škoduj tistim, ki si tega ne zaslužijo. Zaradi svojih načel pade v nemilost svoje tolpe, ki se ga želi znebiti, a napad preživi in začne načrtovati maščevanje. Ker ne gre vse po njegovih načrtih, mora poseči po še bolj krutih metodah.
parker_2013.opis_omdb: Parker is a thief who has an unusual code. He doesn't steal from the poor and hurt innocent people. He is asked to join four other guys on a job. They pull it off flawlessly. They tell Parker that what they got can help them set up another job which will net them much more. But Parker doesn't want to join them and asks for his share. But they need it all so they try to kill him. They dispose of his body but someone finds him--he is still alive--and takes him to the hospital. After recovering he sets out to get back at the ones who tried to kill him, another one of his codes. Despite being told that they are working for a known mobster which he was not aware of, he still wants to go after them. He learns where they are and poses as a wealthy Texan looking to buy a house. So he hires a real estate agent, Leslie Rogers to show him around. He is actually trying to find out where they're holed up. And when he finds it, he sets out on his plan to get them. But when they learn he is alive, they contact the mobster to take care of him. So the mobster sends a killer to take care of him. And Leslie also finds herself intrigued with him so she follows him.

the informer_2019.opis_neo:
Akcijski triler o nekdanjem agentu in kaznjencu, ki se pod krinko infiltrira v strogo zavarovan zapor in tam opravlja naloge obveščevalca FBI.

Nekdanji posebni agent Koslow pristane v zaporu, a s tem reši svojo ženo. V zameno za sodelovanje z FBI se mu ponudi priložnost za predčasno izpustitev, če se infiltrira v newyorški krog trgovcev z drogami. Po spodleteli dostavi ga čaka najtežja naloga v njegovem življenju, za katero ima samo eno priložnost in tri sekunde časa, da reši svojo glavo.
the informer_2019.opis_omdb: An ex-convict working undercover intentionally gets himself incarcerated again in order to infiltrate the mob at a maximum security prison.

prisoners of the ghostland_2021.opis_neo:
Zloglasni zločinec mora prekiniti zlobno prekletstvo, da bi rešil ugrabljeno dekle, ki je skrivnostno izginilo.

V nevarnem obmejnem mestu, mestu samurajev reši bogati vojskovodja Guverner iz zapora neusmiljenega roparja bank. Guvernerjeva posvojena vnukinja Bernice je namreč izginila. Guverner ponudi zaporniku svobodo v zameno, da pripelje nazaj pogrešano vnukinjo. V usnjeni obleki, ki se sama uniči v roku pet dni, se razbojnik odpravi poiskat mladenko in svojo pot odrešitve.
prisoners of the ghostland_2021.opis_omdb: Set in the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town where a ruthless bank robber is sprung from jail by wealthy warlord The Governor, whose adopted granddaughter Bernice has gone missing. The Governor offers the prisoner his freedom in exchange for retrieving the runaway. Strapped into a leather suit that will self-destruct within three days, the bandit sets off on a journey to find the young woman and his own path to redemption.

lord of misrule_2023.opis_neo:
Gospodar kaosa je grozljivka, umeščena v angleško vasico, kjer Rebecca Holland prevzame župnijo.

Gospodar kaosa je grozljivka, umeščena v angleško vasico, kjer Rebecca Holland prevzame župnijo. Ko njena hči izgine ob praznovanju, jo iščejo policija in vaščani. A bliže so deklici, več temačnih skrivnosti prihaja na plan. Rebecca se bo morala odločiti, koliko je pripravljena žrtvovati, da bi hčer rešila pred silami zla.
lord of misrule_2023.opis_omdb: A desperate search for the young daughter of the town's new minister.

pil's adventures_2021.naslov_sl: Pogumna Pia in skriti zaklad Meglenega dola
pil's adventures_2021.opis_neo:
V poskusu, da bi rešila princa in kraljestvo, bo Pia celotno kraljestvo postavila na glavo in spoznala, da je plemenitost moč najti na najbolj nenavadnih krajih.

Pia je sirota, ki živi na ulicah srednjeveškega mesta. Družbo ji delajo tri udomačene podlasice, preživlja pa se tako, da jemlje hrano v dvorcu zlobnega Tristana. Nekega dne je zlobni namestnik Tristan preklel princa Rolanda. Pia se je s svojimi prijatelji podala na nepozabno dogodivščino Rolandovega reševanja, prestolonaslednika, ki se je zaradi prekletstva spremenil v nenavadno žival.
pil's adventures_2021.opis_omdb: Pil, a little orphan, lives in the streets of the city of Roc-en-Brume. With her three tamed weasels, she survives by going to steal food from the castle of the sinister regent Tristain, who usurps the throne. One fine day, to escape the guards chasing her, Pil disguises himself by putting on a princess dress. Here she is then embarked in spite of herself on a mad and delirious quest to save Roland, the heir to the throne victim of an enchantment and transformed into ... (catchicken) (half cat, half hen). An adventure that will turn the whole kingdom upside down and teach Pil that nobility can be found in all of us.

solomon kane_2009.opis_neo:
Stotnik Solomon Kane je učinkovit morilski stroj v 16. stoletju.

Solomon Kane je krut in učinkovit morilec iz 16. stoletja. Oborožen s samokresi in gusarskimi meči s svojo tolpo zadovoljuje slo po krvi med bojem Anglije na vseh celinah.
solomon kane_2009.opis_omdb: Once a mercenary of Queen Elizabeth I fighting Ottomans in Africa, Solomon met the Devil's Reaper and discovered he was bound for Hell. Barely escaping, he soon renounced violence to atone for his past sins, seeking out redemption in a life of peace. That is until the followers of the sorcerer Malachi kidnap a Puritan girl, Meredith Crowthorn, and brutally slaughter her family before his eyes, forcing Solomon to take up arms and return to his violent ways once more to rescue her.

imaginary_2024.opis_neo:
Alice in Chauncey začneta igrati igre, ki so na začetku igrive, vendar postajajo vse bolj zlovešče.

Ko se Jessica (DeWanda Wise) z družino preseli v svoj otroški dom, se njena najmlajša hči Alice (Pyper Braun) grozljivo naveže na plišastega medvedka Chaunceya, ki živi v kleti. Alice in Chauncey začneta igrati igre, ki so na začetku igrive, vendar postajajo vse bolj zlovešče. Ko Alicino vedenje postaja vedno bolj zaskrbljujoče, se vmeša Jessica in počasi spozna, da je Chauncey veliko več kot le plišasti medvedek.
imaginary_2024.opis_omdb: A woman returns to her childhood home to discover that the imaginary friend she left behind is very real and unhappy that she abandoned him.

memento_2000.opis_neo:
Moški ugotovi nenavaden sistem, ki mu pomaga pri spominjanju. Tako mu uspe brez kratkoročnega spomina najti ženinega morilca.

Memento govori o življenju, ki ga usmerjajo fotografije, mapa z dokumenti o preiskavi, na hitro zabeležena sporočila in tetovaže. Memento je pretresljiv in močan triler, v katerem igra Guy Pearce v vlogi Leonarda, človeka, ki se bori, da bi ponovno našel samega sebe med razbitimi delci preteklosti.

los cronocrímenes_2007.opis_neo:
Hector (Karra Elejalde) je povsem običajen možakar, ki se s svojo ženo vseli v novo hišo.

Nekega večera skozi daljnogled opazuje okolico in v gozdu opazi golo dekle. Odpravi se do nje, a tam ga zabode neznanec z rožnato prevezo prek obraza. Hector se zateče v laboratorij na vrhu hribu, kjer ga osamljeni stanovalec (režiser Nacho Vigalondo) vtakne v nenavadno znanstveno napravo …
los cronocrímenes_2007.opis_omdb: Hector is an ordinary man who's moving to a new house with his wife. One evening, while he's looking through his binoculars, he sees a naked girl in the woods. He decides to go there just to find that same girl laying on a rock. Suddenly, a man with a pink bandage covering his face, stabs Hector in his arm with scissors...

extinct_2021.opis_neo:
Op in Ed leta 1835 potujeta skozi čas: od Galapaških otokov, do sodobnega Šanghaja. Prideta do grozljivega odkritja, da je njuna vrsta izumrla.

Naša junaka po naključju potujeta skozi čas, s pomočjo časovnega cveta, iz leta 1835 v moderni čas v Šanghaju. Tu prvič vidita promet, trans maščobe in spoznata ljubkega psička z imenom Karli, ki jima pomaga razumeti kje in v katerem času se nahajata. Odloči se, da jima bo pomagal pri vrnitvi domov. Pelje ju v muzej, kjer na njuno grozo izvesta, da so Flamelčki izumrli leta 1835, takoj zatem, ko so padli v časovni cvet. Opi in Edi ugotovita, da se bosta morala vrniti v leto 1835 in od teh dveh nerodnih bitij je odvisen njun obstoj in preživetje celotne vrste… S tem pa morda spremenita tudi potek zgodovine.
extinct_2021.opis_omdb: When two Flummels (an adorable species of fluffy animals with holes in their center) are magically transported to the present day, they learn that their species are now extinct and forgotten. They must now travel back in time to try to save their race from disappearing forever.

le trésor du petit nicolas_2021.opis_neo:
Skupinica prijateljev si pravi Nepremagljivi, predvsem pa so neločljivi. Vsaj tako mislijo.

V popolni svet malega Nikca sodijo očka in mama, njegova šola in seveda najpomembnejše, kup njegovih prijateljev. A ko Nikčev oče v službi napreduje in družino obvesti, da se bodo morali vsi skupaj preseliti na jug Francije, začne Nikčev popolni mali svet razpadati. Kako naj živi brez svojih prijateljev? Brez Alexovih rogljičkov, Cuthbertovih očal, Matthewevih zvijač in daleč od njihovega priljubljenega igrišča?
le trésor du petit nicolas_2021.opis_omdb: What Nicholas (9) loves most is playing with his gang of middle school pals, The Invincibles. Adorable, yet mischievous, they have all sorts of adventures together and life could not be funnier. So when his dad gets promoted and announces that the family is relocating to the South of France, his world falls apart. Little Nicholas cannot live without his friends. But the pack has a plan to prevent this terrible relocation: a treasure hunt.

starve acre_2023.opis_neo: V Yorkshiru v '70 se Richard in Juliette preselita v Richardovo rojstno hišo v upanju, da bo idilično podeželje dobro vplivalo na njunega sinka. Toda nepričakovani tragični dogodek prinese v družino razdor, Richarda pa obsede lokalna legenda. Ta skrivnostna kriminalka raziskuje globoke rane izgube in ugank, ki se skrivajo v preteklosti.
starve acre_2023.opis_omdb: An idyllic rural family life of a couple is thrown into turmoil when their son starts acting out of character.

keepers_2018.opis_neo:
Trije svetilničarji na odročnem otoku najdejo skrito skrinjo zlata, kar privede do njihovega skrivnostnega izginotja.

Film po resničnih dogodkih, znanih kot Skrivnost Flannanskega otočja, največji uganki v škotski zgodovini, ki je strokovnjaki do danes niso docela razvozlali. Decembra 1900 je brez sledu izginila trojica svetilničarjev z otočja Flannan. Kljub obsežnim iskalnim akcijam jih nikoli niso našli, so pa naleteli na nekaj hudo nenavadnih sledi: na kuhinjski mizi v nedavno zgrajenem svetilniku je bilo pogrnjeno za večerjo, en stol je bil prevrnjen. Postelje so bile razmetane, ure so se ustavile. Žarnice so bile temeljito očiščene in pripravljene na svojo nalogo. Dveh od treh plaščev ni bilo v omari. In vhodna vrata so bila skrbno zaklenjena …
keepers_2018.opis_omdb: A Nederland, Colorado teen goes missing. In class the next day, a group of mismatched kids get into an argument about her whereabouts and are put on a team for a festival event. They decide to break into a shed to steal a part for their project where a body is kept on dry ice. Awakening an evil entity, they find out the true meaning of ice cold hell.

maid in manhattan_2002.opis_neo:
Marisa Ventura je mati desetletnega sina in marljiva sobarica v enem izmed luksuznih newyorških hotelov.

Marisa sanja o boljšem življenju, da bi napredovala v službi in spoznala svojega sanjskega moškega. Nekega dne naleti na čednega politika Chrisa Marshalla, ki se poteguje za mesto v senatu. 

Chris jo pomotoma zamenja za gostjo hotela in dogodki pripeljejo tako daleč, da skupaj preživita romantičen večer. Med njima se rodijo čustva, toda Mariso muči občutek, da zaradi svojega porekla ni dovolj dobra za svojo novo simpatijo.
maid in manhattan_2002.opis_omdb: Marisa Ventura is a single mother born and bred in the boroughs of New York City, who works as a maid in a first-class Manhattan hotel. By a twist of fate and mistaken identity, Marisa meets Christopher Marshall, a handsome heir to a political dynasty, who believes that she is a guest at the hotel. Fate steps in and throws the unlikely pair together for one night. When Marisa's true identity is revealed, the two find that they are worlds apart, even though the distance separating them is just a subway ride between Manhattan and the Bronx.

legends of the fall_1994.opis_neo:
Jesenska pripoved je ganljiva zgodba o vojni in ljubezni.

Upokojeni polkovnik William Ludlow je oče treh sinov. Spomladi leta 1913 najmlajši Samuel domov s seboj pripelje zaročenko Susannah. Vanjo se zagledata tako najstarejši Alfred kot srednji sin Tristan. 

Potem ko v Evropi izbruhne vojna in Samuel na bojišču izgubi življenje, Tristan in Susannah postaneta ljubimca. Tristan se odpravi na dolgo potovanje, od koder Susannah piše, naj ga ne čaka, zato se Susannah poroči z Alfredom.
legends of the fall_1994.opis_omdb: In early twentieth century Montana, Colonel William Ludlow (Sir Anthony Hopkins) lives in the wilderness with his sons, Tristan (Brad Pitt), Alfred (Aidan Quinn), and Samuel (Henry Thomas). Eventually, the unconventional, but close-knit, family encounters tragedy when Samuel is killed in World War I. Tristan and Alfred survive their tours of duty, but, soon after they return home, both men fall for Samuel's gorgeous fiancée, Susannah (Julia Ormond), and their intense rivalry begins to destroy the family.

99 homes_2014.opis_neo:
Na Floridi gradbinca Dennisa Nasha brez opozorila iz doma izseli brezobzirni nepremičninski posrednik Rick Carver.

Nash je osramočen in brez strehe nad glavo, z družino pa pristane v nevarnem motelu. Vse se zdi izgubljeno, dokler Nash ne dobi priložnosti za podpis pogodbe s hudičem - delati začne za Carverja in se znajde v brezobzirnem svetu goljufij, izsiljevanja in bogatenja na račun drugih. A cena za preživetje postaja vse višja.
99 homes_2014.opis_omdb: Around the world everyone knows that honest hard work gets you nowhere. In sunny Orlando, Florida, construction worker Dennis Nash learns this the hard way when he is evicted from his home by a charismatic, gun-toting real-estate broker, Rick Carver. Humiliated and homeless, Nash has no choice but to move his mom and nine-year old son into a shabby, dangerous motel. All is lost. Until an unexpected opportunity arises for Nash to strike a deal with the devil - he begins working for Carver in a desperate attempt to get his home back. Carver seduces Nash into a risky world of scamming and stealing from the banks and the government; he teaches Nash how the rich get richer. Living a double life, Nash hides his new boss and job from his family. He rises fast and makes real money; he dreams bigger. But there is a cost. On Carver's orders, Nash must evict honest families from their homes - just as it happened to him. Nash's conscience starts tearing him apart... but his son needs a home. In a dramatic high stakes climax, with a 1,000 home deal on the line, Nash will have to choose between destroying an honest man for the ultimate win or risking it all by going against Carver and finding redemption.

reprisal_2018.opis_neo:
Jacob Tasker je direktor banke, ki ga preganja spomin na nasilen rop, ki ga ni mogel preprečiti.

Bančnemu menedžerju Jacobu krati spanec krut rop, v katerem je umrl eden izmed njegovih sodelavcev. S pomočjo nekdanjega policista Jamesa namerava najti napadalca. Ko izjemno izurjeni zločinec ugrabi njegovo ženo in hčer, se Jacob poda na pot prelivanja krvi, ki izzove povračilne ukrepe in vse tri može pripelje povsem do konca.
reprisal_2018.opis_omdb: Jacob (Frank Grillo), a bank manager haunted by a violent heist that took the life of a coworker, teams up with his ex-cop neighbor, James (Bruce Willis), to bring down the assailant. While the two men work together to figure out the thief's next move, Gabriel (Johnathon Schaech), the highly-trained criminal, is one step ahead. When Gabriel kidnaps Jacob's wife (Olivia Culpo) and daughter, Jacob barrels down a path of bloodshed that initiates an explosive counterattack and brings all three men to the breaking point.

the 15:17 to paris_2018.opis_neo:
Biografska drama o treh mladih Američanih, ki so leta 2015 med potovanjem z vlakom po Evropi preprečili teroristični napad.

Zgodba sledi resničnim dogodkom. Leta 2015 so trije Američani z vlakom potovali po Evropi. Ko so vlak nenadoma napadli oboroženi neznanci, so trije dolgoletni prijatelji stvari prevzeli v svoje roke ter tvegali življenja, da bi rešili 500 potnikov na vlaku.
the 15:17 to paris_2018.opis_omdb: In the early evening of August 21, 2015, the world watched in stunned silence as the media reported a thwarted terrorist attack on Thalys train #9364 bound for Paris, an attempt prevented by three courageous young Americans travelling through Europe. This movie follows the course of the friends' lives, from the struggles of childhood through finding their footing in life, to the series of unlikely events leading up to the attack. Throughout the harrowing ordeal, their friendship never wavers, making it their greatest weapon and allowing them to save the lives of the more than five hundred passengers on-board.

medallion_2003.opis_neo:
Mojster borilnih veščin Jackie Chan bo nastopil v vlogi neizprosnega hongkonškega policista Eddieja Yanga.

Eddie je policist iz Hongkonga, ki je doživel smrtonosno nesrečo, v katero je bil vpleten skrivnostni medaljon, zaradi česar je pridobil neverjetne moči.
medallion_2003.opis_omdb: Eddie, an indomitable Hong Kong cop, is transformed into an immortal warrior with superhuman powers after a fatal accident involving a mysterious medallion. Eddie enlists the help of British Interpol agent Nicole to determine the secret of the medallion and face down the evil Snakehead who wants to use its magical powers for his own nefarious plans.

little crumb: race to the gold mine_2020.naslov_orig: Little Crumb: Race To the Gold Mine
little crumb: race to the gold mine_2020.opis_neo:
Drobtinico po vrnitvi k staršem ugrabi zlobni stari znanec, ki se želi dokopati do njihovega rudnika zlata.

Drobtinica, ki je ponovno pri svojih starših, se ne more privaditi novemu razkošnemu življenjskemu slogu. V vili, ki jo je oče kupil z zlatom, ki ga je našel v Ameriki, mu je dolgčas, zato večkrat zaide v težave. Odloči se, da bo pobegnil, potem pa ga ugrabi stari sovražnik, ki se želi polastiti zlata. Drobtinica mora uporabiti znanje tako iz svojega prejšnjega kot sedanjega življenja, da bi pobegnil in rešil starše.
little crumb: race to the gold mine_2020.opis_omdb: Reunited with his parents, Little Crumb is having trouble getting used to his new luxurious lifestyle. When he is abducted by an old enemy, he has to use the best of his new and his old life to escape and save his parents.

criminal_2016.opis_neo:
Akcijski kriminalni triler o umrlem agentu Cie, čigar um prenesejo v telo kaznjenca v upanju, da mu bo uspelo dokončati zadano nalogo.

Ryan Reynolds in Kevin Costner skupaj v akcijski srhljivki, v kateri ne manjka akcije, pregonov v avtomobilih, streljanja in spletk!

Dogajanje se vrti okrog nenavadnega projekta ameriške vlade, pri katerem okorelemu, nevarnemu in nepredvidljivemu obsojencu na smrt (Costner) presadijo spomine, skrivnosti in sposobnosti preminulega agenta Cie, da bi izpeljal pomembno nalogo, ki naj bi preprečila katastrofo svetovnih razsežnosti.
criminal_2016.opis_omdb: Bill Pope (Ryan Reynolds) is a CIA agent on a mission in London tracking down a shadowy hacker nicknamed "The Dutchman" (Michael Pitt). When he gets mysteriously ambushed and killed, an experimental procedure is used to transfer his memories into dangerous convict Jerico Stewart (Kevin Costner). When he wakes up with the CIA agent's memories, his mission is to find The Dutchman and make the deal with him before the hacker launches ICBM's and starts World War III. But complications soon arise and the mission turns personal.

rome in love_2019.opis_neo:
Igralka dobi pomembno vlogo v filmu, ki ga snemajo v Rimu, in tam spozna novinarja, ki o njej piše članek.

Čeprav se je Amelia Tate zaradi osebnih okoliščin že zdavnaj odpovedala želji, da bi postala profesionalna igralka, se na pobudo svoje mlajše sestre prijavi na svetovni odprti razpis za neznano igralko in dobi ponudbo za vlogo princese Anne v težko pričakovani predelavi filma Rimske počitnice. Ker mora do novinarske konference skrivati, da je bila izbrana za glavno vlogo, mora Amelia v Rimu ostati anonimna.

Medtem mora ameriški svobodni novinar Philip Hamilton, ki že eno leto v Italiji piše svoj prvi roman, opravljati več dodatnih služb v hotelu, da pride čez mesec. Urednica mu naloži nalogo, da izvoha, kdo je skrivnostna igralka, izbrana za vlogo v odmevni predelavi. Philip presenečeno ugotovi, da je ta neznanka mlada Američanka, ki jo je postregel v hotelu. Amelia je sprva zadržana glede svoje življenjske zgodbe, ko pa se zbližata, se mu začne odpirati. Philip mora presoditi, ali je pripravljen postaviti na kocko porajajočo se ljubezen zavoljo svoje kariere.
rome in love_2019.opis_omdb: A remake of "Roman Holiday" will be filmed in Rome and an unknown woman is chosen to play the lead. Once in Rome, she meets a reporter/porter/waiter/aspiring novelist, who gets the exclusive story on her. Roman romance?

timber the treasure dog_2016.opis_neo:
Deček s pomočjo svojega najboljšega pasjega prijatelja poskuša rešiti dom in družino.

Timber je energičen aljaški haski, ki se pojavi na pragu Mikeyja Jonesa, 12-letnega dečka, ki živi s 16-letno sestro in očetom na njihovem ranču v Montani. Timber, ki ga je Mikeyju zapustil njegov dedek, pride ravno ob pravem času, saj je družina v težavah. Casper Stonewall kupuje posesti vseh tistih, ki ne morejo odplačati dolgov. To grozi tudi družini Jones. Na srečo pa je prav Timber tisti, ki bo družini pomagal do denarja.
timber the treasure dog_2016.opis_omdb: Timber is an energetic Alaskan Husky who shows up at the doorstep of MIKEY JONES, a 12 year old boy living with his 16 year old sister, CLAIR and his father, EMMET at their ranch in Montana. Left to Mikey by his grandpa, Timber arrives just in time because this family needs his help and fast! CASPER STONEWALL, the local villain is buying up all the ranches that can't pay off their deeds to the bank and Emmet's ranch is one of them. Nobody wants to lose their home but unless they find a small fortune, there's nothing Emmet can do to stop him. Luckily, Timber holds a key clue to the local legend of a buried treasure that all but Mikey and BILLIE, a 12 year old tomboy girl and Mikey's best friend, believe to be just a myth. With nobody buying the story of the lost treasure of Cloud Peak, Mikey, Timber, their family bulldog; BARBEQUE, Billie and her pet Golden Lab; KAIA set off on an adventure of a lifetime in an attempt to save their homes! Unfortunately, Stonewall and his two bungling henchmen, MARCUS and PHIL, are also aware of story of the lost treasure. In fact, Stonewall is buying all the properties in the area so he can dig it up for himself. Mikey and Indy's hunt may just ruin his plan so they pursue our gang of treasure seekers to stop them before they locate the gold. By the time, Emmet, Clair, and Billie's mom; JAMIE, find out what's going on, they might not have enough time to save the kids and the adventure dogs from the ruthless Stonewall. However, they are sure going to try! Action, comedy, danger and romance ensue as riddles, booby traps, wolf attacks, underground caves, hidden waterfalls, a even a witch named ALICE are encountered along the way, providing help or hindrances for our intrepid adventurers! TIMBER THE TREASURE DOG is an adventure for the whole family that teaches the lesson: "Success isn't measured by the gold we have but by the people we love and the place we call home."

love and other disasters_2006.opis_neo:
Ameriška pripravnica pri britanski reviji Vogue pomaga prijateljem najti ljubezen.

Emily Jackon (Jacks), pomočnica urednice britanske revije Vogue, je zgovorno in čustveno dekle, ki rada drugim išče partnerje. Najbolj se trudi najti pravo ljubezen svojemu cimru, geju Petru. Vendar se toliko ukvarja s svojimi prijatelji, da je povsem pozabila - nase. Se bo Jacks uspelo osredotočiti na lastno ljubezensko življenje in ali bo Peter dojel, da je sanjarjenje o popolnem partnerju ovira na poti do sreče?
love and other disasters_2006.opis_omdb: Emily Jackson lives a fast-paced life. Always on the go, able to talk around the clock, with a sensitive soul she loves playing matchmaker for her friends. It's Emily's gay roommate and frequent companion Peter, who becomes again the subject matchmaking skills when handsome new photographer assistant Paolo arrives at the Vogue offices, where Emily works. She makes it her mission to bring the two men together. Unfortunately for her, she is so busy arranging a love connection between Peter and Paolo that she remains completely blind to the one suitor who longs to provide her with the loving companionship that she so cheerfully arranges for others. And so it does make sense that Peter, a screenwriter in the making, starts telling the story from his own point of view.

once upon a time in deadwood_2019.naslov_orig: Once Upon A Time In Deadwood
once upon a time in deadwood_2019.opis_neo:
Zloglasnemu strelcu dedinja podtakne počasi delujoč strup in mu reče, da ima tri dni časa, da izsledi in reši njeno sestro, ki jo je ugrabila tolpa.

Mlada dedinja podtakne zloglasnemu revolverašu počasen strup in mu pove, da ima tri dni časa, da najde njeno sestro, ki so jo ugrabili nepridipravi, saj je protistrup pri njej.
once upon a time in deadwood_2019.opis_omdb: A notorious gunslinger is slipped a slow-acting poison by an heiress and told he has three days to track down and rescue her sister, who has been kidnapped by a gang of hoodlums and holds the antidote.

gladiator_2000.opis_neo:
Epska drama o rimskem generalu in prestolonasledniku, ki ga ljubosumen cesarjev sin zasužnji in prisili, da postane gladiator.

Russell Crowe igra generala Maksima Decima Meridija, ljubljenca cesarja Marka Avrelija, ki ga je izdal in umoril lastni neuravnovešeni sin Komod (Joaquin Phoenix).
gladiator_2000.opis_omdb: Maximus is a powerful Roman general, loved by the people and the aging Emperor, Marcus Aurelius. Before his death, the Emperor chooses Maximus to be his heir over his own son, Commodus, and a power struggle leaves Maximus and his family condemned to death. The powerful general is captured and put into the Gladiator games until he dies. The only desire that fuels him now is the chance to rise to the top so that he will be able to look into the eyes of the man who will feel his revenge.

bicentennial man_1999.opis_neo:
Android se trudi postati človek, ko počasi začne razvijati čustva.

Kdo je rekel, da roboti in računalniki ne morejo nič čutiti, biti ustvarjalni ali ljubiti? To je nepotešena želja androida Andrewa, ki je sicer znan kot robot NDR-114, ki ga je kot hišno napravo kupil Richard Martin. Družina Martin z Andrewem ravna kot s pravim človekom, toda njegova vse večja ustvarjalnost in sočutje jih zmede. Je Andrew samo odlično programiran, ali se res spreminja v človeka? Po dvesto letih se Andrew poda na pot samoodkrivanja, da bi izvedel, kaj pomeni biti človek z vsemi šibkostmi, krhkostjo in smrtnostjo, ki je skupna vsem bitjem na Zemlji.
bicentennial man_1999.opis_omdb: This film follows the 'life' and times of the lead character, an android who is purchased as a household robot programmed to perform menial tasks. Within a few days the Martin family realizes that they don't have an ordinary droid as Andrew begins to experience emotions and creative thought. In a story that spans two centuries, Andrew learns the intricacies of humanity while trying to stop those who created him from destroying him.

groundswell_2022.opis_neo: Ko si po neuspehu opomore, ima kuharska mojstrica Emma novo priložnost, ko se prijavi na lekcijo deskanja na vodi z inštruktorjem Benom na Havajih.
groundswell_2022.opis_omdb: Emma, a chef, travels to Hawai'i and meets a surf instructor whose lessons help her to regain her footing on the heels of a personal and professional setback.

love in the limelight_2022.opis_neo: Summer se končno sreča z dopisovalcem Nickom, ki je zdaj pevec v fantovski skupini, ki ima koncert v mestu. Bo med njima vzklila ljubezen?
love in the limelight_2022.opis_omdb: Inspired by the real-life love story of Willie Aames and wife Winnie Hung.

matchmaker mysteries: a fatal romance_20.opis_neo:
Ženitna posrednica Angie Dove in detektiv Kyle Carter sta nazaj, da bi preiskala umor pisateljice ljubezenskih romanov. Jima bo uspelo prebrati sledi?

Cuori e Delitti Usodna romanca 1. predvajanje na Rai - TV FILM - Na literarni konvenciji Angie Dove ponovno sreča Ethana, bivšega fanta iz študentskih let. Med večerom uspešna pisateljica nenadoma doživi slabost in umre... - (2020) Kriminalka Režija: Terry Ingram Igrajo: Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner, Cory Lee
matchmaker mysteries: a fatal romance_20.opis_omdb: A romance writer is killed and you've got to read between the lines in order to find the killer.

snatched from mommy_2021.opis_neo: Novopečena mama Elizabeth začne pisati spletni dnevnik o življenju z dojenčkom, a radosti starševstva se spremenijo v nočno moro, ko otroka ugrabijo.
snatched from mommy_2021.opis_omdb: Elizabeth and her husband are basking in the glow of being new parents. When Elizabeth starts a mommy blog to document the experience, her baby Evan is kidnapped and she realizes danger lies much closer than she thought.

hidden gems_2022.opis_neo:
Potem ko je babičin prstan izgubila v morju na Havajih, Addie dobi več, kot je pričakovala, ko najame potapljača Jacka, da bi ji ga pomagal najti.

Addie pomaga svoji sestri Kate pri organizaciji njene poroke, ki bo potekala v razkošnem letovišču na Havajih. Med uro sup-joge Addie izgubi prstan, ki ji ga je podarila njena babica Helen. Prstan, simbol brezpogojne ljubezni starih staršev, ji je tako pomemben, da se odloči najeti mornarja in učitelja potapljanja Jacka, da ga poišče. Sprva med njima ni velikega razumevanja, a počasi se začneta bolje spoznavati in ugotovita, da imata veliko skupnega.
hidden gems_2022.opis_omdb: While prepping for her sister's wedding, Addie loses her grandmother's ring in the waters of Hawaii. She hires sailor Jack to scuba dive with her to find it and rediscovers her love of the sea.

two tickets to paradise_2022.opis_neo:
Potem ko ju oba zapustita partnerja, se poti Hannah in Josha nenehno križajo - skoraj, kot bi usoda imela zanju poseben načrt.

Hannah in Josh sta bila puščena pred oltarjem.
two tickets to paradise_2022.opis_omdb: Hannah Holt and Josh Wyatt have both just been stood up at the altar and meet each other at the park. They will keep crossing paths as they land on the same resort for their honeymoon.

everything puppies_2024.opis_neo: Ambiciozna izumiteljica pasjih igrač in priboljškov išče uspeh, najde pa nepričakovano podporo pri očarljivi stranki, ki ji pomaga uresničiti sanje.
everything puppies_2024.opis_omdb: A dedicated entrepreneur and inventor looking to make it big creating innovative dog toys and treats finds success with the support of a handsome client. Starring Pascal Lamothe-Kipnes, Stephen Huszar, and Kathryn Davis.

the baker's son_2021.opis_neo: Matt se je naučil peči odličen kruh, a ko testo noče vzhajati, domačini sumijo, da je krivo njegovo ljubezensko življenje.
the baker's son_2021.opis_omdb: Matt's passion transforms his bread from bland to brilliant. But when his bread loses its magic, the island locals turn to Annie - Matt's childhood friend and true love - for help.

kill chain_2019.opis_neo:
Življenje treh neznancev se zaplete v konflikt, na katerega niso pripravljeni.

Življenja treh popolnih neznancev se nenadoma prepletejo, ko se znajdejo sredi konflikta, katerega nobeden od njih ni pričakoval. Ko v hotelu pride do strelskega obračuna, trupla začnejo padati kot domine. V napeti akciji spremljamo pokvarjene policaje, gangsterje, plačane morilce, fatalno žensko ter nekdanjega plačanca, ki se morajo soočiti z umorom, izdajo, maščevanjem in odrešitvijo.
kill chain_2019.opis_omdb: A hotel room shootout between two assassins kicks off a long night of bodies falling like dominoes, as we follow a chain of crooked cops, gangsters, hitmen, a femme Fatale and an ex-mercenary through a confluence of murder, betrayal, revenge and redemption.

hercules and the amazon women_1994.opis_neo:
Herkul in Jolaj gresta na pomoč prebivalcem oddaljene vasi, ki jo napadajo pošasti.

Herkul in Jolaj si vzameta odmor od priprav na Jolajevo poroko, da bi pomagala odročni vasi, ki jo napadajo "pošasti". Ko prideta na cilj, ugotovita, da so pošasti dejansko Amazonke, ki jih nadzira Hera.
hercules and the amazon women_1994.opis_omdb: Hercules and Iolaus take time out from Iolaus' wedding preparations, to help a distant village under attack from "monsters". When they reach their destination, they find the monsters are in fact Amazonian women who are controlled by Hera.

fantômas se déchaîne_1965.opis_neo: Ko skrivnostno izgine slavni znanstvenik profesor Marchand, inšpektor Juve takoj osumi Fantomasa.
fantômas se déchaîne_1965.opis_omdb: When Professor Marchand, a famous scientist, mysteriously disappears, the commissioner, Juve, immediately suspects Fantomas. Meanwhile, the journalist disguised as Fandor Lefevre, Marchand's assistant, is removed by Fantomas. Commissioner Juve falls into the trap as Fantomas, too, is transformed into Lefevre and they are all found in Rome at a scientific meeting. Fantomas will prevail and stakeholders will gather in his den, and prisoners, it seems, without any possibility of escaping their fate. Accompanied by the music of an organ played by Fantomas.

monty python and the holy grail_1975.naslov_orig: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
monty python and the holy grail_1975.opis_neo:
Kralj Artur se s svojimi vitezi odpravi na nizkoproračunski lov za svetim gralom, pri tem pa naleti na številne smešne ovire.

Ko se kralj Artur v desetem stoletju odpravi po angleškem podeželju, kjer išče viteze, ki bi se mu pridružili ob okrogli mizi v Camelotu, se zgodovina na komičen način obrne na glavo.

Zgodba zase je že iskanje mož, ki se po zabavi v Camelotu v velikem številu odločijo grad zapustiti. Ustavi jih šele bog, ki jim zada nalogo najti sveti gral.

Ko se po nizu ločenih pustolovščin vitezi ponovno zberejo, se morajo soočiti s čarovnikom, ki sliši na ime Tim, morilskimi zajci in učnimi urami o uporabi svetih ročnih bomb. Tisto, kar na koncu konča njihov podvig, pa je posredovanje policije – preobrat, ki nas v filmu druščine Monty Python ne bi smel presenetiti.
monty python and the holy grail_1975.opis_omdb: History is turned on its comic head when, in tenth-century England, King Arthur travels the countryside to find knights who will join him at the Round Table in Camelot. Gathering up the men is a tale in itself but after a bit of a party at Camelot, many decide to leave only to be stopped by God, who sends them on a quest: to find the Holy Grail. After a series of individual adventures, the knights are reunited but must face a wizard named Tim the Enchanter, killer rabbits and lessons in the use of holy hand grenades. Their quest comes to an end however when the Police intervene - just what you would expect in a Monty Python movie.

men in black ii_2002.opis_neo:
Agent J je poslan, da najde agenta K in mu povrne spomin, potem ko se ponovno pojavi primer iz K-jeve preteklosti.

Štiri leta po tem, ko sta agenta J in K (Will Smith in Tommy Lee Jones) preprečila vesoljsko katastrofo, K uživa v udobju življenja navadnega občana, J pa je prevzel položaj bivšega kolega in tako postal najbolj zoprno učinkovit uslužbenec neuradne vladne agencije, ki nadzoruje dejavnosti Nezemljanov na Zemlji.

Zdaj J nekega dne čisto slučajno naleti na načrt zlobne Serleene (Lara Flynn Boyle), ki je v resnici pošast z drugega planeta. Ker namerava zapeljiva Serleena s pomočjo svojega dvoglavega pribočnika Scrada (Johnny Knoxville) uničiti Zemljo, se J zave, da pomoč govorečega psa Franka tokrat ne bo dovolj. Zato poišče svojega nekdanjega sodelavca, agenta K, ki pa so mu po koncu službe moža v črnem izbrisali spomin.

Zaradi tega K zdaj živi kot navaden civilist. Ker je edini, ki bi znal premagati Serleeno, mora dobiti nazaj svoje spomine ter veščine, s katerimi je včasih tako spretno lovil Nezemljane.
men in black ii_2002.opis_omdb: Kay and Jay reunite to provide our best, last and only line of defense against a sinister seductress who levels the toughest challenge yet to the MIBs untarnished mission statement: protecting the earth from the scum of the universe. It's been four years since the alien-seeking agents averted an intergalactic disaster of epic proportions. And now it's a race against the clock as Jay must convince Kay-who not only has absolutely no memory of his time spent with the Men In Black, but is also the only living person left with the expertise to save the galaxy-to reunite with the MIB before the earth submits to ultimate destruction.

anacondas: the hunt for the blood orchid.naslov_orig: Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid
anacondas: the hunt for the blood orchid.opis_neo:
Znanstvena ekspedicija se odpravi na Borneo, da bi poiskala cvet, ki bi lahko omogočil daljše življenje. Pri tem naletijo na kače in medsebojne spore.

Dr. Jack Byron je predstavnik farmacevtske družbe. Skupino znanstvenikov odpelje na ekspedicijo na Borneo, da bi skupaj poiskali skrivnostno črno orhidejo, ki vsebuje napoj mladosti. Ker se na Borneu znajdejo ravno sredi sezone monsunov, podkupijo ameriškega kapitana Billa Johnsona, da jih odpelje na nevarno pustolovščino po reki do kraja, kjer naj bi se nahajala orhideja. Na poti se druščina sooči z različnimi nevarnostmi, nobenemu pa se ne sanja, da bodo kmalu srečali ogromne anakonde, ki so zaradi uživanja orhideje pridobile še večjo moč in gibčnost. Čeprav se je večina ekipe pripravljena obrniti nazaj, je Jack odločen, da bodo nadaljevali grozljivo pot.
anacondas: the hunt for the blood orchid.opis_omdb: In New York, the ambitious Dr. Jack Byron and his associate Gordon Mitchell present the research of his assistant Sam Rogers to the CEO and board of directors of a corporation to sponsor a scientific expedition to Borneo. The objective is to find a flower, Blood Orchid, that flourishes for a couple of weeks every seven years and could be a fountain of youth, prolonging the expectation of life of human beings. They are succeeded and once in Borneo, they realize that it is the raining season and there is no boat available to navigate on the river. They pay US$ 50,000.00 to convince Captain Bill Johnson and his partner Tran to sail to the location. After an accident in a waterfall, the survivors realize that a pack of anacondas have gathered for mating and their nest is nearby the plantation of Blood Orchid, which made them bigger and bigger.

legions_2022.opis_neo:
Nekoč legendaren šaman mora pobegniti iz norišnice, da bi rešil svet in svojo hčer pred zlobnimi demonskimi silami.

Antonio Poyju je čarovnik iz mogočnega rodu. Proti svoji volji je zaprt v blaznici. Znak mu da vedeti, da se bliža velika nevarnost. Njegovo hčerko in naslednico Heleno bo žrtvovalo hudobno bitje. Helena je izgubila vero in ne zaupa več očetu. Antonio se mora zanesti na svojo čarovniško moč in pobegniti, da bi rešil hčerko. Zato mora okrepiti njuno vez in jo prepričati, naj verjame vanj in v svoje lastne sposobnosti.
legions_2022.opis_omdb: The forces of evil descend on Argentina. Mankind's best hope, a once-legendary shaman, is confined to an insane asylum from which he must escape when the battle against demonic resurrection becomes personal.

air america_1990.opis_neo:
Med vietnamsko vojno je mlad pilot nehote udeležen v Cijini skriti in pokvarjeni letalski operaciji na Laosu.

Pilotu Billyju Covingtonu vladni agentje ponudijo službo pri civilni letalski družbi Air America v Laosu. Billy si obeta veliko denarja, čeprav ne ve, da bo moral tovoriti mamila. V Laosu naleti na pilota Genea Ryacka in skupaj ugotovita, da stvar v resnici le ni tako zelo preprosta. Preko vrtoglavih akcij in čudovitega okolja korak za korakom uresničujeta svojo misijo.
air america_1990.opis_omdb: Air America was the CIA's private airline operating in Laos during the Vietnam War, running anything and everything from soldiers to foodstuffs for local villagers. After losing his pilot's license, Billy Covington is recruited into it, and ends up in the middle of a bunch of lunatic pilots, gun-running by his friend Gene Ryack, and opium smuggling by his own superiors.

the boondock saints_1999.opis_neo:
Katoliška brata iz Irske se okličeta za roki pravice in skušata v imenu boga uničiti bostonsko kriminalno podzemlje.

Irska brata Connor in Murphy MacManus sta prepričana, da jima je bog naložil posebno nalogo. Svet naj bi 'očistila' raznih morilcev in nemoralnežev, ki si po njunem mnenju ne zaslužijo živeti. Svoj krvavi pokol začneta pri članih ruske mafije, nadaljujeta pa v trgovini s pornografskimi filmi. Javnost, ki bi morala po vseh pričakovanjih biti nad njunimi dejanji ogorčena, je nad njima navdušena. Tudi agent FBI Paul Smecker, ki je na sledi njunemu krvavemu pohodu, si je primoran priznati, da fanta počneta ravno tisto, kar si je na skrivaj vedno želel. Lahko brata MacManus, ki ju kmalu začnejo častiti kot svetnika, sploh kdo ustavi?
the boondock saints_1999.opis_omdb: Two Irish brothers accidentally kill mafia thugs. They turn themselves in and are released as heroes. They then see it as a calling by God and start knocking off mafia gang members one by one. Willem Dafoe plays the detective trying to figure out the killings, but the closer he comes to catching the Irish brothers, the more he thinks the brothers are doing the right thing.

wc kaseta_2024.opis_neo:
Sprva majhna težava, postaja vse bolj resna in žena Pia postavi ultimat - če Niko do 12. ure naslednjega dne, ko morajo vrniti kamper, ne sprazni wc kasete, ne bo intimna z njim tri mesece. 

Niko se znajde ujet v kaotični dirki s časom in se v nizu smešnih in nelagodnih situacij trudi, da bi rešil težavo in ohranil svoj zakon.

valentine in the vineyard_2019.opis_neo:
Ponovno spremljamo vinarja, ki sta se združila tako v poslu kot v ljubezni.

Frankie in Nate imata dela čez glavo. Njuno vino je zelo iskano, zato se odločita razširiti vinarno, poleg tega sta se zaročila. Ko pa Lexi in Marco oznanita, da se bosta poročila čez en mesec, na valentinovo, se Frankie in Nate odločita prestaviti svojo objavo ter Lexi in Marcu ponudita, naj se poročita v njunem vinogradu. Trudita se hkrati načrtovati poroko in širiti vinarno. Pri tem na plan pridejo razlike med njima in začneta se spraševati, ali sta res ustvarjena drug za drugega ali pa sta si preveč različna.
valentine in the vineyard_2019.opis_omdb: Back for the third installment, Frankie and Nate manage life on the vineyard and plan a wedding in secret.

the 13th warrior_1999.opis_neo:
Trinajsti bojevnik je zgodovinski film, ki temelji na romanu Michaela Crichtona.

Zgodba govori o Ahmedu, ki ga preženejo iz rodnega mesta zaradi prepovedane ljubezni in postavijo za ambasadorja v tuji deželi. 

Na poti sreča severnjaške bojevnike, ki se odpravljajo v boj proti skrivnostnemu ljudstvu, o katerem nihče ne upa spregovoriti. Ker verjamejo, da je Ahmed po prerokbi trinajsti bojevnik, ki jim bo prinesel zmago, ga prisilijo, da se jim pridruži.
the 13th warrior_1999.opis_omdb: A cultured diplomat joins a band of savage warriors in time to meet an even more fearsome enemy in this historical adventure. In 922 A.D., Ibn Fadlan (Antonio Banderas) is a Muslim emissary from Baghdad en route to meet with the King of Saqaliba when he is captured by a gang of Vikings. While Ibn and his people are intelligent and well-mannered, the Vikings are a rowdy and sometimes unpleasant lot, with an unquenchable appetite for food, alcohol, and women. However, in time he develops an understanding and respect for the Viking warriors and is welcomed into their society by their leader, Buliwyf. However, Ibn must now join them as they return to their homeland once they receive word of an invasion by a huge pack of bloodthirsty invaders who will destroy and eat anything in their path -- including the flesh of the men they have killed.

legacy_2020.opis_neo:
Med izletom v divjini oče in sin postaneta tarči neusmiljenega napadalca in od neznanca izvesta šokantno resnico o dečkovem poreklu.

Od popolega neznanca izvesta šokantno resnico o dečkovem poreklu. V njunem boju za preživetje se jima nepričakovano pridruži tajni agent, ki fantu razkrije njegovo povezavo z mednarodnim kriminalcem. Zakaj je nekdanji vojni zločinec naročil njegov umor?
legacy_2020.opis_omdb: While on a hunting trip in the isolated wilderness, a father and his adopted teenage son are turned into the prey of unknown assailants. They are unexpectedly joined in their fight for survival by a stranger who reveals the disturbing truth about the son's biological father, an international crime lord, and why that crime lord has sent trained assassins to kill the teenager.

lana & toni_2023.opis_neo:
Črna komedija o paru, ki se v svoji zvezi znajde na prelomni točki.

Lana in Toni sta dolgoletni par. Lana si želi otroke in družino, Toni pa živi v svojem svetu in ne kaže znakov, da bi želel narediti korak naprej v njunem razmerju. 

Nekega dne se Lana in njena najboljša prijateljica Maja odpravita na grad, kjer naj bi potekala Tonijeva rojstnodnevna zabava, vendar na njuno presenečenje tam ni nikogar.

music_2020.opis_neo:
V muzikalu Glasba, pod katerega se je kot režiserka in scenaristka podpisala priljubljena glasbenica Sia, spoznamo zgodbo najstnice z avtizmom.

Spremljamo mlado dekle Kazu, ki okreva po odvisnosti od alkohola in drog in išče svojo pot v svetu. Po nenadni smrti babice izve, da bo postala skrbnica svoje polsestre Music, negovoreče avtistične najstnice. 

Ko se Kazu začne privajati na novo vlogo, kmalu spozna, da je življenje odtujene sorodnice en sam dolg in zahteven urnik. Njunemu kaotičnemu odnosu je priča sosed Ebo, prijazna in nežna duša, ki Kazu preseneti ne le s svojim sočutjem, temveč tudi z razumevanjem Music.
music_2020.opis_omdb: Once told they'd save the universe during a time-traveling adventure, two would-be rockers from San Dimas, California find themselves as middle-aged dads still trying to crank out a hit song and fulfill their destiny.

cop land_1997.opis_neo:
Predmestni šerif odkrije, da je njegovo mestece gnezdo mafije in pokvarjene policije.

Newyorški policist Murray Babitch ustreli dva fanta, za katera misli, da ga hočeta ubiti. Dvojni umor se znajde v središču preiskave, ki jo vodi Murrayjev stric.
cop land_1997.opis_omdb: Sometime in the 1970's, police officers from New York City wanted a safe haven to live, away from the dangers of the streets of New York City, this is when they established a "Cop Land" in the small New Jersey town of Garrison. Freddy Heflin who was always admired by the New York cops wanted to become one, but because he was deaf in one ear this prevents him from achieving his goal, but has become sheriff of Garrison. Recently there have been a dark omen surrounding the NYPD, and Freddy is now investigating on this case, then Internal Affairs officer Mo Tilden is also on the case and asks Freddy for help, but Freddy could not. Now Freddy suspects that a New York City cop named Ray Donlan might be one of the many cops who is corrupted by the mob and other criminals. Now, Freddy must find a cop who is nicknamed "Superboy" who can testify against Donlan and protect him, before Donlan finds Superboy and kills him.

die in a gunfight_2021.opis_neo:
V New Yorku se mladenič zaljubi v hčerko očetovega sovražnika.

Že leta se družini Rathcart in Gibbon borita na ulicah New Yorka. Ko pa se mlada Ben Gibbon in Mary Rathcart zaljubita, njuni družini najameta profesionalne morilce, da ubijejo njuno ljubezen.
die in a gunfight_2021.opis_omdb: The Rathcarts and the Gibbons are modern day Montagues and Capulets, two rival families who each control their own media empire in New York City. Their teenage kids ignore the feud and fall in love, despite their parents efforts to keep them apart. With hitman, corporate corruption, love, jealousy, revenge and lust, all of the characters and emotions come to a head at the wedding in this fast moving action filled love story.

four good days_2020.opis_neo:
Mati pomaga hčerki preživeti štiri ključne dni okrevanja od zlorabe mamil.

Čeprav sta z mamo že dolgo odtujeni, se Molly končno odloči, da jo prosi za pomoč pri odvajanju od jemanja mamil. Ker ju čakajo  štirje najbolj naporni dnevi odvajanja, se Molly in njema mama soočita z najbolj naporno bitko svojih življenj.
four good days_2020.opis_omdb: Bruised, abused, and on the verge of collapse, heroin-addled Molly shows up at the house of her heartbroken, long-suffering mother, Deb, seeking help. But ten painful years of estrangement, drug use, and addiction have taken a toll on the already fragile mother-and-daughter relationship. Because, so far, Molly has been through detox more than a dozen times, yet she still shows no signs of recovering. Now, a doctor offers Molly a shred of hope--a monthly shot of an opioid antagonist, a potent agent that prevents toxic substances from binding to the central nervous system. However, there's a catch: Molly must stay clean for four long, excruciating, faith-challenging days to receive the promising treatment. The question is, can Molly respond to Deb's tough love?

survive the game_2021.opis_neo:
Mirno življenje moškega na odročni kmetiji zmoti nepričakovan prihod dveh nevarnih kriminalcev in policista, ki jima je na sledi.

Policist David je ranjen med ponesrečeno policijsko akcijo. Njegov partner Cal medtem zasleduje dva kriminalca do odročne kmetije v lasti vojnega veterana Erica. 

Cal in Eric morata združiti moči in načrtovati svojo obrambo do prihoda policije, saj ju obkoli nevarna tolpa. Napet triler s Chadom Michaelom Murrayjem in Bruceom Willisom v glavnih vlogah.
survive the game_2021.opis_omdb: A cop (David) gets injured during a drug bust gone wrong. His partner Cal, pursues the two culprits to a remote farm owned by Eric, a distressed veteran. As Cal and Eric plan their defense, more of the mob arrives. Outnumbered, the three men must now use their brains and experience to take down the drug-dealing mob.

deep water_2022.opis_neo:
Premožni mož, ki ženi dovoli afere, da bi se izognil ločitvi, postane glavni osumljenec pri izginotju njenih ljubimcev.

Erotični triler, ki ga je navdihnil klasični triler Patricie Highsmith "Deep Water". 

Victor in Melinda Van Allen sta premožen par, ki živi v odprtem zakonu, da bi se izognila ločitvi. Vendar pa zapeljiva igra postaja vse bolj nevarna. Zaradi nepojasnjene smrti enega od ljubimcev začne ukrepati policija. 

Razmerje premožnega para Victorja in Melinde Van Halen je tik pred koncem. Da bi se izognila ločitvi, sta se dogovorila, da drug drugemu dovolita zunajzakonske afere. Vendar se domnevno razumevanje kmalu spremeni v nevarno igro. 

Ko enega od Melindinih ljubimcev najdejo mrtvega, Victor postane glavni osumljenec.
deep water_2022.opis_omdb: Vic and Melinda Van Allen are a couple in the small town of Little Wesley. Their loveless marriage is held together only by a precarious arrangement whereby, in order to avoid the messiness of divorce, Melinda is allowed to take any number of lovers as long as she does not desert her family. Vic becomes fascinated with the unsolved murder of one of Melinda's former lovers, Martin McRae, and, in order to successfully drive away her current fling, takes credit for the killing. When the real murderer is apprehended, Vic's claims are interpreted by the community as dark jokes.

monster house - dubbed_2006.opis_neo:
Trije najstniki odkrijejo, da je sosedova hiša v resnici čisto prava živa pošast, ki namerava za noč čarovnic pojesti vse otroke!

Trije najstniki odkrijejo, da je sosedova hiša v resnici živeča, strašna pošast.
monster house - dubbed_2006.opis_omdb: 13-year-old DJ is observing his neighbor Nebbercracker on the other side of the street in the suburb that destroys tricycles of children that trespass his lawn. When DJ's parents travel on the eve of Halloween and the abusive babysitter Zee stays with him, he calls his clumsy best friend Chowder to play basketball. But when the ball falls in Nebbercracker's lawn, the old man has a heart attack, and soon they find that the house is a monster. Later the boys rescue the smart Jenny from the house and the trio unsuccessfully tries to convince the babysitter, her boyfriend Bones and two police officers that the haunted house is a monster, but nobody believes them. The teenagers ask their video-game addicted acquaintance Skull how to destroy the house, and they disclose its secret on the Halloween night.

2 guns_2013.opis_neo:
Po spletu nenavadnih okoliščin se dva preiskovalca znajdeta v nepredstavljivi spletki mednarodnih razsežnosti.

Agent DEA in agent mornariške obveščevalne službe delata pod krinko, da bi razkrila vpliven mamilarski kartel. Ko gre misija po zlu in ju nadrejeni pustijo na cedilu, ugotovita, da se, čeprav nerada, lahko zaneseta le drug na drugega. Njuno pajdaštvo po sili razmer pa ima težavo: nihče od njiju ne ve, da je tudi drugi agent pod krinko.
2 guns_2013.opis_omdb: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea to rob a bank to bust him and a mob boss. However, it proves too successful with much more money seized than anticipated with Trench's forces not stopping the getaway. Complicating things still more, Stigman turns out to be a Naval Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes the money. The interservice debacle suddenly finds Trench and Stigman in a bloody web of corrupt clandestine rivalries as they are hunted, blackmailed and isolated for the money on both sides of the law. Now, the fugitives must work together to find a way out of this situation with no one to turn to but themselves.

bohemian rhapsody_2018.opis_neo:
Zgodba o legendarni britanski rock skupini Queen, pevcu Freddieju Mercuryju in slovitem nastopu na Live Aidu leta 1985.

Skozi legendarne pesmi rock skupine Queen spremljamo njihov neverjeten vzpon do slave. Freddie Mercury je kljuboval stereotipom in prestopal meje, toda sčasoma je njegov življenjski slog ogrozil obstoj skupine. Ta se je ponovno združila na večer Live Aida 1985, ko je Mercury, soočen s smrtonosno boleznijo, povedel bend v enega najveličastnejših nastopov v zgodovini rock glasbe.
bohemian rhapsody_2018.opis_omdb: Bohemian Rhapsody is a foot-stomping celebration of Queen, their music and their extraordinary lead singer Freddie Mercury. Freddie defied stereotypes and shattered convention to become one of the most beloved entertainers on the planet. The film traces the meteoric rise of the band through their iconic songs and revolutionary sound. They reach unparalleled success, but in an unexpected turn Freddie, surrounded by darker influences, shuns Queen in pursuit of his solo career. Having suffered greatly without the collaboration of Queen, Freddie manages to reunite with his bandmates just in time for Live Aid. While bravely facing a recent AIDS diagnosis, Freddie leads the band in one of the greatest performances in the history of rock music. Queen cements a legacy that continues to inspire outsiders, dreamers and music lovers to this day.

philomena_2013.opis_neo:
Drama prinaša resnično zgodbo o materi, ki je petdeset let iskala svojega izgubljenega sina.

Bivši BBC-jev novinar Martin Sixsmith, ki je nedavno izgubil službo pri laburistični vladi, razmišlja, kako bi spet spravil na noge svojo kariero. Na neki zabavi mu natakarica pove o svoji materi Philomeni, ki so ji katoliške nune pred petdesetimi leti vzele otroka in ga dale v posvojitev.
philomena_2013.opis_omdb: When former journalist Martin Sixsmith (Steve Coogan) is dismissed from the Labour Party in disgrace, he is at a loss as to what do. That changes when a young Irish woman approaches him about a story of her mother, Philomena Lee (Dame Judi Dench), who had her son taken away when she was a teenage inmate of a Catholic convent. Martin arranges a magazine assignment about her search for him that eventually leads to America. Along the way, Martin and Philomena discover as much about each other as about her son's fate. Furthermore, both find their basic beliefs challenged.

evil dead_2013.opis_neo:
Pet mladih prijateljev v odmaknjeni gozdni koči najde Knjigo mrtvih in nevede prebudi starodavne demone, ki spijo v gozdovih in se jih polastijo.

Pet prijateljev se odpravi v gozdno kočo, da bi prijateljici odvisnici pomagali skozi krizo. V kleti odkrijejo 'Knjigo mrtvih' in jo kljub zapisanim svarilom začnejo prebirati, ne vedoč, da s tem prebujajo starodavne duhove zlobnih mrtvecev. Ti hlepijo po najbolj okrutnih načinih mučenja, ki mladostnike pripeljejo do krvavega boja za preživetje.
evil dead_2013.opis_omdb: Five twenty-something friends become holed up in a remote cabin. When they discover a Book of the Dead, they unwittingly summon up dormant demons living in the nearby woods, which possess the youngsters in succession until only one is left intact to fight for survival.

riding in cars with boys_2001.opis_neo:
Najstnica Beverly D'Onofrio odrašča sredi šestdesetih let in sanja, da bo odšla na fakulteto ter nekega dne postala slavna pisateljica.

Pri petnajstih je zanosila, se poročila in se ločila; mlada Beverly je zdaj mati samohranilka. Oborožena zgolj z ambicijami, sanjami in 500 dolarji se s sinom odpravi v New York, kjer naj bi začela poslovno kariero in novo življenje.
riding in cars with boys_2001.opis_omdb: Seriocomic story based on the memoir by Beverly Donofrio, the movie follows a young woman who finds her life radically altered by an event from her teen years. Born in 1950, Beverly grew up bright and ambitious in a working-class neighborhood in Connecticut; her father was a tough but good-hearted cop who listened to his daughter's problems, and her mother was a nervous woman eager to imagine the worst. From an early age, Beverly displays a keen intelligence and an interest in literature, and dreams of going to college in New York and becoming a writer. However, she also develops an early interest in boys, and at 15 finds herself madly in love with a boy from her high school. However, an attempt to get his attention leads to an embarassing incident at a party, and Ray, a sweet but thick-headed 18-year-old, steps forward to defend her. Beverly and Ray end up making out, and after one thing leads to another, Beverly discovers she's pregnant. Telling Ray is only marginally less difficult than informing her parents, and at 16, Beverly is a wife and mother. Against the odds, Beverly is determined to still finish high school and go on to college, but that goal becomes more difficult with time, especially after Beverly's marriage begins to fall apart. Ray tries to do the right thing but has trouble holding a job, and becomes addicted to heroin.

baby driver_2017.opis_neo:
Mladi voznik, prisiljen v sodelovanje s kriminalnim šefom, se znajde sredi ropa, ki je od vsega začetka obsojen na propad.

Film režiserja Edgarja Wrighta. Voznik roparjev Baby (Ansel Elgort) ima težave s sluhom, a poslušanje glasbe mu omogoča, da je najboljši v poslu. Ko ga pregovorijo k sodelovanju pri nevarnem ropu, se Baby znajde v velikih težavah.
baby driver_2017.opis_omdb: Baby is a young and partially hearing impaired getaway driver who can make any wild move while in motion with the right track playing. It's a critical talent he needs to survive his indentured servitude to the crime boss, Doc, who values his role in his meticulously planned robberies. However, just when Baby thinks he is finally free and clear to have his own life with his new girlfriend, Debora, Doc coerces him back for another job. Now saddled with a crew of thugs too violently unstable to keep to Doc's plans, Baby finds himself and everything he cares for in terrible danger. To survive and escape the coming maelstrom, it will take all of Baby's skill, wits and daring, but even on the best track, can he make it when life is forcing him to face the music?

the dive_2023.opis_neo:
Globokomorsko potapljanje na enem najbolj oddaljenih krajev na svetu se za sestrI spremeni v boj za preživetje.

Sestri Drew in May se odločita za potapljanje na čudovitem umaknjenem kraju. Med potopom May nenadoma zadene skala in jo stisne 28 metrov globoko pod vodo. Z nevarno majhno količino kisika in v mrzli vodi se mora Drew boriti za sestrino življenje. Začne se boj za preživetje, ko Drew obupano išče pomoč v zakotni pokrajini. Drew uporabi svojo zvitost in odločnost, da bi sestro rešila pred gotovo smrtjo.
the dive_2023.opis_omdb: Two sisters go diving at a beautiful, remote location. One of the sisters is struck by a rock, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With dangerously low levels of oxygen and cold temperatures, it is up to her sister to fight for h...

the dinner_2017.opis_neo:
Dva para bogatih staršev se morata odločiti, kaj narediti z najstniškima sinovoma, ki sta zagrešila zločin.

Poletnega večera v Amsterdamu se v modni restavraciji srečata dva para. Med grižljaji hrane in žvenketanjem pribora se pogovor giblje v mejah prijetne vljudnosti – vsakdanje reči v službi, plehkost praznikov. Toda prazne besede skrivajo strašen boj in z vsakim prisiljenim nasmeškom in z vsako novo jedjo se brusijo noži.
the dinner_2017.opis_omdb: A former history teacher and his wife Claire meet at a fancy restaurant with his elder brother, a prominent politician and his wife Babette. The plan is to discuss over dinner how to handle a crime committed by their teenage sons. The violent act of the two boys had been filmed by a security camera and shown on TV, but, so far, they have not been identified. The parents have to decide on what to do.

un plan parfait_2012.opis_neo:
Nad ženskami v Isabellini družini visi prekletstvo. Vsem namreč propade prvi zakon in Isabelle skuje načrt, s katerim naj bi prekletstvo izničila.

Mlada Isabelle je zaljubljena v svojega popolnega fanta in kmalu namerava z njim pred oltar. Toda, v družini se ne morejo rešiti prekletstva, da čisto vsem ženskam propade prvi zakon. Isabelle ne želi tvegati, zato se domisli načrta, da bi se najprej poročila z neznancem, se nato takoj ločila in brez strahu stopila v zakon s svojim dragim. Njen začasni izvoljenec postane ekscentrični Jean-Yves in Isabellina pustolovščina zaide v nepričakovano smer.
un plan parfait_2012.opis_omdb: In Paris, Corinne "Coco" brings her chief Valérie to spend the Christmas Eve with her family. Valérie is depressed since she is newly divorced and Coco decides to tell the story of her sister Isabelle to Valérie to cheer her up. Isabelle is a dentist that has been living with and working in the same office of her boyfriend Pierre for ten years. When they decide to get married, Isabelle and Coco are worried about the family curse that every first marriage ends in divorce. Isabelle and Coco arrange a marriage for Isabelle with a student in Copenhagen so that she can immediately divorce to marry Pierre to live happily ever after. In the flight, Isabelle meets the inconvenient free-spirited tourism columnist Jean-Yves that is traveling to Kenya. When the student does not show up, Isabelle decides to travel to Kenya to marry Jean-Yves. She has the chance when they travel to visit a Masai people when they get married. Isabelle returns to Paris and when she goes to schedule her wedding with Pierre, she discovers that Jean-Yves has registered his Masai wedding certificate in Paris. Now Isabelle travels to Moscow expecting to force Jean-Yves to sign the divorce papers. Will she succeed in her intent?

taxi 3_2003.opis_neo:
Emilien in Daniel skušata ustaviti novo tolpo, ob tem pa tudi urediti težave v zasebnem življenju.

Skupina zločincev. ki samo sebe imenuje tolpa dedka Mraza, povzroča kaos po mestu, policija pa je nemočna. Šef policije Gilbert se ukvarja s kitajskim repertoarjem, ki piše članek o njegovi enoti, soproga detektiva Emiliena je pravkar noseča, ljubezenska zveza taksista Daniela pa je v hudi krizi. Po nizu policijskih napak, ki jih novinarji zvesto zabeležijo, prideta na pomoč Daniel in njegov super-taksi.
taxi 3_2003.opis_omdb: A gang of thieves calling themselves the Santa Claus Gang are wreaking havoc, and the police can't keep up. Police Captain Gilbert is distracted by a Chinese reporter writing a story on his squad, detective Emilien's wife has just announced that she's pregnant, and taxi driver Daniel is in the midst of a relationship crisis. After a string of mistakes in which the thieves outsmart the police time and time again with a reporter there to record it all, Daniel and his super-taxi pitch in.

point break_2015.opis_neo:
FBI sumi, da za prefinjenimi korporativnimi zločini stoji skupina ekstremnih športnikov, zato mednje pošlje svojega agenta.

Mladi agent FBI-ja se uspe vključiti v neverjetno ekipo ekstremnih športnikov, za katere sumijo, da so krivi za vrsto nepredstavljivih, prefinjenih korporativnih ropov. Na tajni nalogi, ki ga spravi v smrtno nevarnost, poskuša dokazati, da so športniki odgovorni za osupljive zločine, s katerimi uničujejo svetovne finančne trge.
point break_2015.opis_omdb: A young FBI agent infiltrates an extraordinary team of extreme sports athletes he suspects of masterminding a string of unprecedented, sophisticated corporate heists. Deep undercover, and with his life in danger, he strives to prove these athletes are the architects of the mind-boggling crimes that are devastating the world's financial markets.

poms_2019.opis_neo:
Ustvarjalci komedij Poredne mame in Klub zadovoljnih žensk prinašajo komedijo, ki govori o tem, da nikoli ni prepozno za uresničitev svojih sanj.

Skupina žensk v zrelih letih se odloči, da bodo v svoji skupnosti upokojencev ustanovile ekipo navijačic in dokazale, da nikoli ni prepozno slediti svojim sanjam. Dame so sprva vsem v posmeh, vendar se sreča kmalu obrne na njihovo stran in s svojo energijo počasi začenjajo osvajati srca okolice.
poms_2019.opis_omdb: 45 minutes outside of Phoenix lies a retirement community. A place where palm trees line the streets, the skies are always clear and the "taxi" (ambulance) drives by two or three times a day - a final destination for retirees. This is the story of America's first cheer-leading squad for women aged 60.

valerian and the city of a thousand plan.naslov_orig: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
valerian and the city of a thousand plan.opis_neo:
Temačne sile grozijo metropoli, ki je dom bitjem iz tisočih planetov. Posebna agenta morata poiskati grožnjo ter rešiti mesto in celo vesolje.

Valerian in Laureline sta vladna agenta, ki v 28. stoletju potujeta skozi čas in dimenzije, ter skrbita za ohranjanje reda in miru v vesolju. Njuna naslednja misija je potovanje v medgalaktično metropolo Alfa. Njenih 20 milijonov prebivalcev je združilo svoje znanje za skupno dobro, a zaradi posameznih zlih interesov, mesto začnejo ogrožati neznane sile.
valerian and the city of a thousand plan.opis_omdb: In the twenty-eighth century, space station Alpha is a city where beings from different planets live together exchanging their knowledge and culture. Peace is granted by a human force, including Major Valerian (Dane DeHaan) and his partner Sergeant Laureline (Cara Delevingne). They are assigned by the Defense Minister (Herbie Hancock) to retrieve the last species of converter in a dangerous mission. They succeed and back to Alpha, unknown humanoids abduct Commander Arun Filitt (Clive Owen) expecting to steal the converter. They head to a forbidden area that is infected, but Valerian and Laureline follow them and disclose a hidden secret about the race and the infected area.

dog_2022.opis_neo:
Vojak in njegov pes se odpravita na pot po pacifiški obalni avtocesti, da bi se udeležila prijateljevega pogreba.

Nekdanjemu vojaškemu čuvaju Briggsu je dodeljena skrb za vojaško izšolano psičko padlega vojaka. Njegova naloga je pripeljati psičko na drug konec države, da bi bila lahko prisotna na pogrebu svojega umrlega lastnika. Njuna pot ju prisili v prav posebno sobivanje, ki pa ni nič bolj enostavno zaradi nepredvidljivega obnašanja tega „kosmatega demona”. Vendar pa ravno te neverjetne situacija Briggsa potisnejo na rob svojih zmožnosti in ga spodbudijo, da ponovno razmisli o sebi in o svojem novem odnosu s pasjim sopotnikom.
dog_2022.opis_omdb: Two former Army Rangers are paired against their will on the road trip of a lifetime. Army Ranger Briggs (Channing Tatum) and Lulu (a Belgian Malinois dog) buckle into a 1984 Ford Bronco and race down the Pacific Coast in hopes of making it to a fellow soldier's funeral on time. Along the way, they'll drive each other completely crazy, break a small handful of laws, narrowly evade death, and learn to let down their guards in order to have a fighting chance of finding happiness.

the dawn_2020.opis_neo:
Matja in njegova družina se soočajo z nerazrešeno tragedijo.

V distopični prihodnosti se Matja in njegova družina soočata z nerazrešeno tragedijo. Kljub temu, da je izgubil vero in se trudi najti svojega pravega jaza, se mu posveti in razkrije, da je edini način za spopadanje s travmami in zlom soočenje.

yves saint laurent_2014.opis_neo:
Biografska drama o začetku kariere slavnega francoskega oblikovalca, čigar ime še danes velja za simbol inovativnosti in razkošja.

Biografska drama Yves Saint Laurent se osredotoča na začetek kariere slavnega francoskega oblikovalca, čigar ime še danes velja za simbol inovativnosti in razkošja. Spremljamo njegovo življenje od l. 1958, ko je spoznal svojega ljubimca in kasnejšega poslovnega partnerja Pierra Bergea.
yves saint laurent_2014.opis_omdb: A look at the life of French designer Yves Saint-Laurent from the beginning of his career in 1958 when he met his lover and business partner, Pierre Bergé.

envoyés très spéciaux_2009.opis_neo:
