Radijski novinar in njegov tehnik se spravita v hude težave, ko skujeta načrt, kako zaigrati svojo ugrabitev med uporom upornikov v Južni Ameriki.

Francoska radijska postaja pošlje novinarja Franka Bonnevilla in tonskega inženirja Alberta Poussina v Irak, da bi poročala o vojni. Milijoni poslušalcev spremljajo dogodivščine dveh novinarjev, ki po Poussinovi napaki (ta je letalske vozovnice in 20.000 evrov, namenjenih za potovanje pomotoma odvrgel v koš za smeti), v resnici nista nikoli zapustila Pariza.

Skrita v osrčju 18. okrožja se kljub temu trudita zagotoviti novice in črpata navdih iz mednarodnih informacij, da bi ustvarila lastna ''poročila''. Da bi bila njuna zgodba verodostojna, potegavščino razširita in zaradi velike publicitete se situacija zaplete.
envoyés très spéciaux_2009.opis_omdb: France mobilizes to gain the release of two kidnapped journalists in Iraq, but only the victims know the crime has been faked.

taxi 5_2018.opis_neo:
Marsejski policist mora ustaviti tolpo italijanskih roparjev v ferrarijih s pomočjo Danielovega nečaka, ki podeduje stričev legendarni beli taksi.

Peto nadaljevanje najslavnejše francoske akcijske komedije, ki jo je pred skoraj 20 leti režiral Luc Besson. Policijski uslužbenec, ki ga premestijo na policijsko postajo Marseilla, dobi nalogo prijeti skupino italijanskih roparjev v ferrarijih. Pregoni po ozkih ulicah in tudi po avtocesti bodo tudi tokrat v obilju, v tem nadaljevanju pa bo imel eno ključnih vlog legendarni beli peugeot 407.
taxi 5_2018.opis_omdb: A police officer who's transferred in the police of Marseilles gets assigned to take down a group of Italian robbers who drive the powerful Ferraris with the older nephew of Daniel, a terrible driver who gets the legendary white taxi.

stockholm_2018.opis_neo:
Film je posnet po resnični zgodbi o krizi s talci in ropu, ki se je leta 1973 odvil v Stockholmu.

Film je posnet po resnični zgodbi o krizi s talci in ropu, ki se je leta 1973 odvil v Stockholmu, o katerem so leto dni pozneje pisali v članku New Yorkerja pod imenom The Bank Drama, avtorja Daniela Langa. Oborožena roparja sta leta 1973 v Stockholmu pet dni imela za talce štiri zaposlene v banki. V tem času so se žrtve dobro spoznale z roparjema in so po koncu krize s talci že bili tako čustveno navezani nanju, da so ju celo branili. Dogodek je pritegnil pozornost takratne svetovne javnosti, ker so se talci zbližali z roparjema in se obrnili proti predstavnikom oblasti, kar je pripeljalo do psihološkega fenomena, danes znanega kot Stockholmski sindrom.
stockholm_2018.opis_omdb: A semi-fictional account, including most of the names of the players being changed, of the event that resulted in the creation of the term Stockholm Syndrome to describe people who feel empathy and sometimes more for their captor(s) is presented. In 1973, a lone armed man, thought to be American, storms the downtown Stockholm branch of Kreditbanken. Ultimately the authorities, led by Chief of Police Mattsson learn of his at-gunpoint demand: $1 million US, the release of convicted bank robber and murderer Gunnar Sorensson, and a Mustang Boss 302 like the one Steve McQueen drove in Bullitt (1968) as a getaway vehicle for the two of them. By the time Mattsson gets Sorensson to the bank - unknown to the gunman, who is thought to be well known robber Kaj Hansson, Sorenson having made a plea deal with Mattsson for his cooperation against the gunman - there are three hostages at the bank, all the others that were in the bank at the time let go. Arguably the most lucid of the three is bank clerk Bianca Lind, a wife and mother of two preschool aged children. Ultimately she is able to figure out that the gunman is not Hansson as Mattsson suspects, but rather Lars Nystrom, what she knowing of his past crimes chief being his humane treatment of people he held at gunpoint. Beyond what Sorensson decides to do with his ultimate goal not to go back to prison, what happens largely depends on Lind, who begins to trust Nystrom more than either Mattsson or Prime Minister Olof Palme whose actions and decisions she believes from what she can see are more of a potential physical detriment to her and her fellow two hostages than that of Nystrom.

little italy_2018.opis_neo:
Sin in hči dveh lastnikov picerij in dolgoletnih tekmecev se zaljubita, a na poti jima stoji spor med njunima družinama.

Mlada Nikki se iz tujine vrne v svojo domačo italijansko četrt v New Yorku, kjer ugotovi, da se je marsikaj spremenilo od časov, ko je odšla. Pa vendar prav tu najde ljubezen svojega življenja, toda v sovražnikovih vrstah. Ko očeta konkurenčnih picerij izvesta, da sta se njuna potomca zaljubila, se odločita prirediti kuharski obračun. Medtem pa mlada dvojica ni edina, ki mora skrivati svojo ljubezen.
little italy_2018.opis_omdb: Young adults Nikki Angioli and Leo Campo were staunch competitors and best friends growing up in the Little Italy neighborhood of Toronto. Their respective fathers, friends Sal Angioli and Vince Campo, ran Pizza Napoli, which made the best pizza in the neighborhood due to the combination of Nikki's paternal nona Franca Angioli's secret marinara sauce, and Leo's paternal nono Carlo Campo's secret thin crust pizza dough recipe. While Leo has stayed in Toronto working part-time at his father's pizzeria with the secret hopes of one day opening his own pizzeria, Nikki, who loved Leo while they were growing up, ran off to London five years ago hoping never to return to Toronto to get away from her past, which includes Leo himself, who she believes has turned into a ladies man solely trying to put notches in his bedpost, and Sal and Vince now in a feud of an unspecified nature following they winning best pizza in Little Italy several years ago, each subsequently having opened competing pizzerias next door to each other, which would preclude Nikki and Leo getting together even if either wanted. Nikki is working toward being a chef in her own right of anything but pizza, she at the cooking school of famed Michelin starred chef, Corinne, who seemingly has nothing nice to say about anyone, especially her students. Nikki learns that it is between her and another student, Gareth, who Corinne will choose to work at her new London restaurant, the two who will compete to produce the best menu. First, Nikki further learns that she has to deal with a visa issue, meaning that, whether or not she likes it, she has to return to Toronto for a few weeks. In inevitably running in Leo, she finds that there is still a sexual tension that exists between the two. They will have the many existing hurdles to overcome to get together, they each having to realize that they are hurdles worth overcoming, while learning some of those issues are truly non-existent.

the voices_2014.opis_neo:
Simpatičen mladenič skuša povabiti sodelavko na zmenek, a kaj, ko pri tem posluša nasvete svojih zlobnih govorečih ljubljenčkov.

Jerry (Ryan Reynolds) je tiste sorte veselega tipa, ki dela v tovarni od 9h-5h, pri tem pa ohranja nenavaden šarm človeka, ki bi mu prav prišlo nekaj prijateljev. S pomočjo sodnega psihiatra se nakani osvojiti simpatijo iz pisarne (Gemma Arterton), a njun odnos se hitro spremeni, ko dekle ne pride na zmenek. Pod vplivom svojega zlobnega mačka in dobronamernega govorečega psa se mora Jerry odločiti, ali bo še naprej vztrajal pri normalnosti ali pa se bo podal po precej bolj zlovešči poti.
the voices_2014.opis_omdb: Jerry (Ryan Reynolds) is that chipper guy clocking the 9-to-5 at a bathtub factory, with the offbeat charm of anyone who could use a few friends. With help from his court-appointed psychiatrist, he pursues his office crush (Gemma Arterton), but their relationship takes a sudden murderous turn after she stands him up for a date. Guided by his evil talking cat and benevolent talking dog, Jerry must decide whether to keep striving for normalcy or indulge in the sinister.

beautiful disaster_2023.opis_neo:
Študentka Abby se poskuša oddaljiti od svoje temačne preteklosti, hkrati pa se upira privlačnosti do slabega fanta Travisa.

Poredni mladenič Travis Maddox je točno tisto, česar se želi in mora nadobudna brucka Abby Abernathy izogniti. Ponoči se bori v podzemnih boksarskih dvobojih, podnevi pa je vrhunski osvajalec v kampusu. Ker Travisa Abbyjino upiranje še posebej privlači, ji ponudi stavo: če izgubi naslednji dvoboj, sam ne bo mesec dni seksal. Če pa zmaga, mora Abby mesec dni živeti v njegovem stanovanju.
beautiful disaster_2023.opis_omdb: College freshman Abby tries to distance herself from her dark past while resisting her attraction to bad boy Travis.

hacksaw ridge_2016.opis_neo:
Desmond T. Doss ni hotel nositi orožja ter je služil v vojski kot neoborožen bolničar, ki je rešil življenje mnogih, ne da bi izstrelil en sam naboj.

Spomladi 1945 so se ameriške vojaške sile znašle v najpomembnejšem in najnevarnejšem boju na Tihem oceanu, z enim od vojakov, ki je bil zelo drugačen od ostalih. Desmond T. Doss ni želel nositi orožja in ubijati ljudi, temveč je v vojski služil kot neoboroženi bolničar. Rešil je življenja mnogih in postal prvi Američan, ki je prejel 'Medaljo časti', ne da bi izstrelil en sam naboj.
hacksaw ridge_2016.opis_omdb: The true story of Desmond T. Doss, the conscientious objector who, after the Battle of Okinawa, was awarded the Medal of Honor for his incredible bravery and regard for his fellow soldiers. Following his upbringing and how this shaped his views (especially his religious view and anti-killing stance), Doss's trials and tribulations after enlisting in the US Army (trying to become a medic) begin, preluding the hell on Earth that was Hacksaw Ridge.

egon schiele: tod und mädchen_2016.opis_neo:
Egon Schiele (12.6.1890 – 31.10.1918) spada poleg Gustava Klimta in Oskarja Kokoschke med osrednje avstrijske umetnike zgodnjega 20. stoletja.

Na začetku 20. stoletja je bil Egon Schiele eden izmed najprovokativnejših umetnikov na Dunaju. Njegovo življenje in delo so zaznamovale lepe ženske. Dve sta imeli nanj trajni vpliv, njegova sestra in prva muza Gerti ter 17-letna Wally, nedvomno njegova edina prava ljubezen, ki jo je Schiele ovekovečil v svoji znameniti sliki "Smrt in dekle". Schielove radikalne slike so bile škandalozne za dunajsko srenjo, drzni umetniki, kot je Gustav Klimt, in umetniški agenti pa so čutili nekaj posebnega. Toda Egon Schiele je bil pripravljen preseči svojo bolečino ter žrtvovati ljubezen in življenje za svojo umetnost, ki nas navdihuje do današnjih dni.
egon schiele: tod und mädchen_2016.opis_omdb: Egon Schiele is one of the most provocative artists in Vienna at the beginning of the 20th Century. His life and work are driven by beautiful women and an era that is coming to an end. Two women will have a lasting impact on him - his sister and first muse Gerti, and 17 year old Wally, arguably his one true love, immortalized in his famous painting 'Death and the Maiden'. His radical paintings scandalize Viennese society while daring artists like Gustav Klimt and art agents alike are sensing the exceptional. But he is also prepared to go beyond his own pain and to sacrifice Love and Life for his art that inspires us up to this day.

radin !_2016.opis_neo:
Nadarjeni 40-letni violinist je stiskač! Ima točno določen čas, kako dolgo se prha, seveda z mrzlo vodo.

Nadarjeni 40-letni violinist François Gautier je stiskač! Ima točno določen čas, kako dolgo se prha, seveda z mrzlo vodo. Sobo si razsvetljuje s pomočjo ulične razsvetljave, televizor gleda pri sosedu - z daljnogledom, pripravi si točno določeno dolžino toaletnega papirja za prihodnjo uporabo. François nima družabnega življenja, njegov edini prijatelj pa je bančnik. Nakup pijače za kolege iz orkestra ga skoraj ubije, vabilo dame na večerjo je zanj mučenje, toda čelistka Valérie v njem ne vidi skopuha, temveč velikega virtuoza. A življenje se mu obrne na glavo, ko pride v njegovo življenje 16-letna Laura, ki trdi, da je njegova hči, prepričana, da je njen oče bogati dobrodelnik, ki skrbi za revne otroke v Mehiki. Kaj pa bo, ko bo odkrila resnico?

a country wedding_2015.opis_neo:
Romantična drama, v kateri se po več letih srečata dve osebi, ki sta se v otroštvu med igro poročila.

Bradley Suttons se bo poročil s Catherino Mann, vendar dobi pismo od otroške prijateljice Sare Standor. Spomni se, da ima še vedno hišo iz otroštva, zato odide v rojstno mesto in pripravi hišo za prodajo. Sarah ga je v esela in se zljubi vanj. Bradley načrtuje prijetno poroko v mestecu, Catherine pa v Hollywoodu načrtuje ogromno poroko, kar je ravno nasprotno od tistega, kar ima v mislih Bradley.
a country wedding_2015.opis_omdb: A country music star who's about to get married to an actress returns home to sell the house he grew up in. He reconnects with an old friend he proposed to when they were just kids. Soon, some old feelings between them begin to resurface.

the women_2008.opis_neo:
Film je inteligentna komedija na temo modernega pojmovanja ženskosti in odnosov med pripadnicami ženskega spola.

Ženske nas popeljejo v živahno družbo na Manhattnu, kozmetične salone, modne piste, tja, kjer je precej denarja. Mary Haines (Meg Ryan) je sodobna ženska, ki se mora nenadoma soočiti s klasično težavo: z možem, ki jo vara. Prijateljice ji stojijo ob strani, najbolj pa njena prijateljica Sylvie Fowler, dinamična urednica ženske revije. Ko pa Sylvie pod pritiskom službe izda podatke o Mary, je njuno prijateljstvo na preizkušnji. Ženski se morata zdaj soočiti z najbolj bolečo izgubo - z izgubo prijateljstva.
the women_2008.opis_omdb: Based on a very clever comedy by Claire Booth, wife of Time Publisher Henry Luce and later Ambassador to Italy. One of the surprises was an all-woman cast, novel in the 1930's. And although there were no men in the cast, most of the dialog was about them. The story is rather thin and depended on the fact that divorce, in the 1930's, was not only difficult but almost impossible in New York. Mrs. Stephen Haynes learns that her husband is seeing a salesgirl at Saks, and reluctantly divorces him, abetted by her friends, all of whom have romantic problems of their own. In the 1930's New York women who could afford it went to Nevada, where residency could be established quickly and divorce was relatively easy. The 1939 film, starring Norma Shearer, Paulette Goddard, Rosalind Russell, and Joan Crawford, was a hit. This one, with an even better looking cast, is definitely not, largely because someone tried to move a 1930's situation comedy into the present.

hypnotic_2023.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja detektiva Dannyja Rourkeja (Ben Affleck), ki išče svojo pogrešano hčer Minny.

Zgodba spremlja detektiva Dannyja Rourkeja (Ben Affleck), ki išče svojo pogrešano hčer Minny. Iskanje ga pripelje do spoznanja, da je njeno izginotje povezano s serijo ropov, ki jih vodi skrivnostni moški s hipnotičnimi močmi (William Fichtner). Med iskanjem svoje hčerke, se Rourke pogreza še globlje v neznano, medtem ko raziskuje vrsto ropov, ki spreminjajo resničnost in bodo na koncu pod vprašaj postavili vse, kar sestavlja njegov svet. S pomočjo Diane Cruz (Alice Braga), nadarjene prerokovalke, išče skrivnostnega moškega, ki mu bo pomagal najti njegovo pogrešano hči. Rodriguez pogumno premika meje, meša resničnost in iluzijo, pri čemer nas pusti zmedene, a hkrati navdušene. Film Hipnotiziran že s svojim imenom veliko obljublja, z odlično igralsko zasedbo pa stvari postanejo še bolj zanimive.
hypnotic_2023.opis_omdb: A detective investigates a mystery involving his missing daughter and a secret government program.

beautiful wedding_2024.opis_neo:
V nadaljevanju te vznemirljive romance izvemo, kako je Abby, junakinja filma Čudovita polomija, postala gospa Maddox.

Nadaljevanje napete ljubezenske zgodbe po istoimenskem romanu – med Abby, dekletom, ki beži pred svojo preteklostjo, in Travisom, fantom, ki ga spozna na fakulteti. 

V nadaljevanju te vznemirljive romance izvemo, kako je Abby, junakinja filma Čudovita polomija, opstala gospa Maddox. Oboževalci romance med Abby in Travisom bodo v tej vrtinčasti zgodbi dobili odgovore na vsa svoja vprašanja o dnevu (in noči!) njune poroke…
beautiful wedding_2024.opis_omdb: After a crazy night in Las Vegas, Abby and Travis discover that they're married, and they head to Mexico for a honeymoon with friends and family.

triangle_2009.opis_neo:
Prijatelji izplujejo na jahti, ki jo prevrne nenavadna nevihta. Reši jih skrivnostna ladja, a tega, kar se zgodi potem, ni mogoče pojasniti.

Potniki na jadrnici, ki križarijo po Atlantiku, naletijo na skrivnostne vremenske neprilike@ premestijo se na drugo plovilo, na katerem pa jih na odprtem morju čakajo še hujše preizkušnje…
triangle_2009.opis_omdb: When Jess sets sail on a yacht with a group of friends, she cannot shake the feeling that there is something wrong. Her suspicions are realized when the yacht hits a storm and the group is forced to board a passing ocean liner to get to safety, a ship Jess is convinced she's been on before. The ship appears deserted, the clock on board has stopped, but they are not alone... Someone is intent on hunting them down, one by one. And Jess unknowingly holds the key to end the terror.

search party_2014.opis_neo:
Prepričan, da bo prijatelj Nardo naredil življenjsko napako s poroko s Tracy, se Jason odloči zmešati njune načrte na zelo dramatičen način.

Zdelo se je, da bodo poročni zvonovi spremenili dolgotrajno prijateljstvo treh prijateljev, a vendar se to ne zgodi kar tako, kot bomo videli v režiserskem prvencu scenarista Scota Armstronga (Prekrokana noč 2, Modeli stare šole). Prepričan, da bo prijatelj Nardo (Thomas Middleditch) naredil življenjsko napako s poroko s Tracy (Shannon Wooodward), se Jason (TJ Miller) odloči zmešati njune načrte na zelo dramatičen način. Besna nevesta bo sama odpotovala na medene tedne, Nardo ji sledi in pri tem konča sam, brez denarja in oblačil sredi mehiške puščave. Na pomoč pokliče Jasona in Evana (Adam Pally), vendar se trio hitro znajde v kaosu z mojstri prevar, trgovcev z drogo in tudi s tako imenovanimi Federales.
search party_2014.opis_omdb: Convinced that his buddy Nardo (Thomas Middleditch) is making the mistake of a lifetime by marrying Tracy (Shannon Woodward), Jason (T.J. Miller) puts a dramatic end to their wedding. When the furious bride decides to take her Baja honeymoon solo, Nardo follows her-where the lovesick groom is carjacked and left stranded, naked and penniless in a remote part of the Mexican desert. Helpless, Nardo sends out an SOS to Jason and their pal Evan (Adam Pally), an up-and-coming ad exec slated for an important business meeting the next morning. During their ridiculous attempt to rescue Nardo, the trio embarks on a series of increasingly outrageous misadventures involving con artists, drug smugglers and even the Federales.

brillantissime_2018.opis_neo:
Ko jo zapusti mož, mora Angela začeti znova obkrožena s svojo najstniško hčerjo, tiransko mamo, histerično prijateljico in čudaškim psihologom.

V vedno sončni Nici, Angelo na božični večer zapusti mož, uporniška hči pa s fantom odide na podeželje. A v družbi ekscentrične prijateljice iz otroštva, temperamentne mame, prodajalca sadja z ulice in svojega očarljivega psihiatra, bo Angela skušala prebroditi svojo razvezo, ter se začela veseliti izzivov novonastale svobode.
brillantissime_2018.opis_omdb: After getting dumped on Christmas Eve, Angela must rebuild her life surrounded by her rebellious teenager, her tyrannical mother, her hysterical best friend, and a weird psychologist.

dreambuilders_2020.opis_neo:
Mlado dekle zlorabi novo pridobljeno sposobnost ustvarjanja in nadzorovanja sanj drugih ljudi, da bi svojo nadležno posvojeno sestro naučila lekcije.

Minnino življenje se postavi na glavo, ko se v njen dom vselita očetova zaročenka Helena in njena hči Jenny. Njena nova polsestra je neznosna. Neko noč Minna odkrije domišljijski svet, v katerem nenavadni gradbinci ustvarjajo naše sanje, in odkrije, kako lahko upravlja z njimi. A vmešavanje v sanje ima strašne posledice, in ko gre Minna nekoč predaleč, se Jenny ne more več prebuditi.
dreambuilders_2020.opis_omdb: Minna, a young girl, misuses her newfound ability to create and control other people's dreams to teach her bothersome stepsister a lesson.

barb and star go to vista del mar_2021.naslov_sl: Barb in Star na potovanju v Vista Del Mar
barb and star go to vista del mar_2021.naslov_orig: Barb and Star Go to Vista Del Mar
barb and star go to vista del mar_2021.opis_neo:
Najboljši prijateljici prvič v življenju zapustita svoje mesto in se odpravita na počitnice.

Najboljši prijateljici Barb in Star prvič v življenju zapustita svoje mestece Midwestern, da bi šli na počitnice v Vista Del Mar na Floridi, kjer se kmalu znajdeta sredi pustolovščine, ljubezenskih težav in zločincev, ki želijo pobiti vse mesto.
barb and star go to vista del mar_2021.opis_omdb: Best friends Barb and Star leave their small Midwestern town for the first time ever to go on vacation in Vista Del Mar, Florida, where they soon find themselves tangled up in adventure, love, and a villain's evil plot to kill everyone in town.

the girl on the train_2016.opis_neo:
Ko se v mirnem naselju zgodi zločin, Rachel dojame, da je vanj vpletena mnogo bolj, kot se zaveda.

Rachel vsako jutro potuje z vlakom, ki vozi mimo hiše v kateri je nekoč živela, in jo spominja na preteklost. Med množico hiš ji pogled vedno znova bega tja, kjer živita, na videz srečno zaljubljena, zakonca. Toda resničnost je daleč od idilične slike. Ko se v mirnem naselju zgodi zločin, Rachel dojame, da je vanj vpletena bolj, kot se zaveda.
the girl on the train_2016.opis_omdb: The Girl on the Train is the story of Rachel Watson's life post-divorce. Every day, she takes the train in to work in New York, and every day the train passes by her old house. The house she lived in with her husband, who still lives there, with his new wife and child. As she attempts to not focus on her pain, she starts watching a couple who live a few houses down -- Megan and Scott Hipwell. She creates a wonderful dream life for them in her head, about how they are a perfect happy family. And then one day, as the train passes, she sees something shocking, filling her with rage. The next day, she wakes up with a horrible hangover, various wounds and bruises, and no memory of the night before. She has only a feeling: something bad happened. Then come the TV reports: Megan Hipwell is missing. Rachel becomes invested in the case and trying to find out what happened to Megan, where she is, and what exactly she herself was up to that same night Megan went missing.

the promise_2016.opis_neo:
Kostumski spektakel, ki se skozi prizmo romantične drame dotakne tudi genocida nad Armenci v Otomanskem cesarstvu med prvo svetovno vojno.

Zgodba filma se odvija v zadnjih dneh Osmanskega cesarstva in spremlja ljubezenski trikotnik med Michaelom, odličnim študentom medicine, lepo in izobraženo Ano ter Aninim fantom Chrisom, znanim ameriškim političnim novinarjem, s sedežem v Parizu. Ker cesarstvo propada, se bodo morali upreti strastem, da bi svoje bližnje odpeljali na varno. Cesarstvo bo padlo, ljubezen pa bo preživela.
the promise_2016.opis_omdb: The film tells the story of Michael (Oscar Isaac), a young Armenian who dreams of studying medicine. When he travels to Constantinople to study, he meets Armenian Ana (Charlotte Le Bon) and falls in love with her, although she dates the American photographer Chris (Christian Bale), sent to Turkey to record the first genocide of the 20th century when the Turks exterminated the Armenian minority. A love triangle settles amidst the horrors of war.

leatherface_2017.opis_neo:
Film pripoveduje zgodbo pred Teksaškim pokolom z motorko.

Film pripoveduje zgodbo pred Teksaškim pokolom z motorko, ko medicinsko sestro ugrabijo in mučijo štirje nasilni najstniki, ki so pobegnili iz psihiatrične ustanove. Enemu izmed fantov je življenje, polno tragedij in grozot, uničilo zdrav razum in ga spremenilo v pošast. Tik za petami mu sledi moteni predstavnik zakona, željan maščevanja.
leatherface_2017.opis_omdb: A violent teen and three others kidnap a young nurse while escaping from a Texas mental institution. Pursued by a vengeful sheriff, the disturbed young man embarks on a murderous rampage that shapes him into a legendary killer known as Leather face.

a bras ouverts_2016.opis_neo:
Pisatelj pred kamero ponudi pomoč romski skupnosti in kmalu se pred njegovim domom pojavi romska družina.

Jean-Etienne je bogat pisatelj, ki živi daleč od vsakdanje resničnosti. Med promoviranjem svojega romana, ki spodbuja strpnost do drugih kultur, ga izzovejo naj pokaže, kako sam živi po teh pravilih. Jean pred kamero ponudi pomoč romski skupnosti in še istega večera se na njegovem pragu prikaže družina, ki bo njegova prepričanja postavila na preizkušnjo.
a bras ouverts_2016.opis_omdb: A French intellectual who writes about living with an open mind struggles to live up to his words when a Romani family begins to camp on his front yard.

walking out_2017.opis_neo:
Film spremlja najstnika Davida (Josh Wiggins), ki želi rešiti svojega odtujenega očeta Cala (Matt Bomer) iz surove divjine Montane.

Film je posnet po mojstrovini ameriških kratkih zgodb Davida Quammena. Spremlja najstnika Davida (Josh Wiggins), ki želi rešiti svojega odtujenega očeta Cala (Matt Bomer) iz surove divjine Montane. Davidovo življenje se za vselej spremeni, ko gre na lov, ki postane nepričakovano potovanje, kjer bo resnično spoznal očeta. Sredi te zgodbe je krhka, nepovedana vez med očetom in sinom. Davidova mati se je ločila od očeta, ker ni prenesla osamljenega življenja v Montani. Tudi Cala preganjajo nekatere reči iz preteklosti.
walking out_2017.opis_omdb: David (Josh Wiggins), an urban teenager, journeys to rural Montana to hunt big game with his estranged, "off the grid" father, Cal (Matt Bomer). As they ascend deep into the wilderness, father and son struggle to connect on any level, until a brutal encounter leaves them both with serious injuries, forcing them into a struggle to survive. Based on the American short story "Walking Out."

postman pat: the movie_2014.opis_neo:
Sinhronizirani celovečerni animirani film, posnet po priljubljeni risani seriji.

Najbolj znani poštar na svetu se odloči postati zvezdnik. Prijavi se na tekmovanje pevskih talentov, a mu slava hitro stopi v glavo. Nekoč skromen poštar se popolnoma spremeni, čeprav se je na tekmovanje prijavil le zato, da bi osvojil glavno nagrado in svojo ženo odpeljal na poročno potovanje. Pat resda uživa pod žarometi, toda obenem lahko ostane brez vsega, kar mu v življenju največ pomeni: družina, prijatelji in služba.
postman pat: the movie_2014.opis_omdb: A veteran postman finds his beliefs challenged after he enters a TV talent show competition.

truth_2015.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o moči raziskovalnega novinarstva.

Zgodba o kontroverznih Killianovih dokumentih, ki so povzorčili afero Rathergate, tik pred ameriškimi predsedniškimi volitvami leta 2004. Televizijski voditelj Dan Rather in producentka Mary Mapes se odločita objaviti poročilo o tem, kako se je predsednik Bush izognil služenju vojaškega roka v Vietnamu, s pomočjo očetovih političnih zvez.
truth_2015.opis_omdb: The story of The Killian Documents controversy (a.k.a. "Rathergate") in the days leading up to the 2004 presidential election. When veteran newscaster Dan Rather and CBS News head Mary Mapes choose to air a segment on 60 Minutes exposing how President Bush avoided being drafted to Vietnam through his father's political advantages, the resulting fallout ultimately costs them their jobs and reputations.

the artist_2011.opis_neo:
Veliki zvezdnik nemih filmov se ne želi sprijazniti z novico, da bodo snemali le še filme z zvokom, zato sam financira in posname nov nemi film.

5 OSKARJEV, 5 NOMINACIJ: Piše se leto 1927 in nahajamo se v Hollywoodu. George Valentin je eden glavnih zvezdnikov nemega filma. Zaposlen je pri studiu Kinograph in njegove uspešnice se kar ne nehajo vrstiti. Zdi se, da ima njegova kariera dolgo prihodnost.
the artist_2011.opis_omdb: Outside a movie premiere, enthusiastic fan Peppy Miller literally bumps into the swashbuckling hero of the silent film, George Valentin. The star reacts graciously and Peppy plants a kiss on his cheek as they are surrounded by photographers. The headlines demand: "Who's That Girl?" and Peppy is inspired to audition for a dancing bit-part at the studio. However as Peppy slowly rises through the industry, the introduction of talking-pictures turns Valentin's world upside-down.

after ever happy_2022.opis_neo:
Med burno preteklostjo in negotovo prihodnostjo Tesse in Hardina se skriva še zadnja priložnost. Jo bosta izkoristila?

Tessa in Hardin nista običajen par, ki bi mu šlo vse z lahkoto, vendar njuno zvezo vsak novi izziv še bolj utrdi. Ko pomembno razkritje iz preteklosti poruši Hardinovo navidezno samozavest, Tessa pa doživi tragedijo, se pojavi vprašanje, ali ju bo vse to spet združilo ali dokončno spravilo narazen. Po razkritju pretresljive resnice o njunih družinah, zaljubljenca odkrijeta, da si pravzaprav nista tako zelo različna. Med njuno burno preteklostjo in negotovo prihodnostjo, se skriva še zadnja priložnost. Jo bosta izkoristila? Prvič resnično srečna se začne, kjer se je film Prvič na robu, končal – V Londonu na poroki Hardinove mame Trish (Louise Lombard). Zaradi pretresljive novice, da je Christian Vance (Stephen Moyer) njegov oče, se Hardin ponovno bori s svojo jezo in odvisnostjo.
after ever happy_2022.opis_omdb: The relationship of Tessa Young (Josephine Langford) and Hardin Scott (Hero Fiennes-Tiffin) has gone through many difficulties that, on the other hand, have managed to strengthen their union and their love. When the truth about their families has come out, they have both discovered that they are not as different as they thought. Tessa is no longer that sweet, good girl who made it to college, and Hardin is no longer the cruel boy she fell in love with. She is the only person capable of understanding, understanding and calming Hardin, but the secret he hides is so great that it causes she to withdraw from absolutely everything. Even her soulmate.

un homme à la hauteur_2016.opis_neo:
Diane se zaljubi v uspešnega in bogatega arhitekta Alexandreja. A ker je nižje rasti, se začne spopadati s klišeji in opazkami ostalih ljudi.

Diane je znana odvetnica, ki je že tri leta ločena. Nekega dne izgubi mobilnik ter po tem sprejema klice najditelja. To je Alexandre, očarljivi moški in pravi kavalir. Prek telefona se hitro ujameta in se odločita za srečanje naslednji dan. Toda ko Alexandre prispe, je Diane presenečena, ko ugotovi, da meri komaj 137 cm. Od tistega trenutka naprej skuša Diane preseči družbene predsodke in lastne strahove ter se prepustiti in uživati v svoji novi ljubezni.
un homme à la hauteur_2016.opis_omdb: Diane is a well-known lawyer, divorced for three years. She loses her mobile telephone and receives a call from the person who finds it. That person is Alexandre, a charming man and the perfect gentleman. They make a connection over the phone and agree to meet up the following day. But when Alexandre arrives, there's a surprise in store when Diane discovers he is only 4' 6" tall. From that moment on, Diane tries to overcome the prejudices of society and her own fears to experience the best time of her life...

les as de la jungle 2 : opération tour d.naslov_orig: Les as de la jungle 2 : Opération tour du monde
les as de la jungle 2 : opération tour d.opis_neo:
Manj kot mesec dni pred deževnim obdobjem se začne dirka s časom.

Od Severnega tečaja do Daljnega vzhoda, čez gorovja, puščave in oceane bodo morali naši junaki daleč od svoje ljube džungle preiskati ves svet, da bi našli protistrup!
les as de la jungle 2 : opération tour d.reziser: Laurent Bru, Yannick Moulin, Benoît Somville
les as de la jungle 2 : opération tour d.opis_omdb: When a mysterious Super-Villain covers the jungle with a toxic pink foam that explodes on contact with water, the Jungle Bunch is called to the rescue. With less than a month before the rainy season, the race is on.

the fabulous four_2024.opis_neo:
Smeh, solze in nepozabni trenutki zagotovljeni v zgodbi o prijateljstvu in ljubezni.

Fatalne štiri je odštekana komedija o skupini prijateljic (Sarandon, Mullally in Ralph)ki gredo na Florido za družice na presenetljivi poroki najboljše prijateljice iz študentskih dni Marilyn (Midler). Obnovile bodo prijateljstvo, preteklost bo priplavala na površje, iskre, strast in romanca pa jim bodo nepričakovano spremenili življenje.
the fabulous four_2024.opis_omdb: It tells the story of two friends who travel to be bridesmaids in a surprise wedding of their college girlfriend.

churchill_2017.opis_neo:
Na obali Velike Britanije zbrane zavezniške sile so pripravljene na invazijo na od nacistov okupirano Evropo. Vojaki čakajo Churchillovo odločitev.

Na južni obali Velike Britanije zavezniške sile pripravljajo invazijo na od nacistov okupirano Evropo. Čakajo Churchillovo dokončno odločitev ali bo do invazije sploh prišlo. V strahu, da bi ponovil napake iz 1. svetovne vojne, je Churchill nenehno soočen s kritiko svojih političnih nasprotnikov. Edino podporo ima v svoji izjemni soprogi Clementine.
churchill_2017.opis_omdb: June 1944. Allied Forces stand on the brink: a massive army is secretly assembled on the south coast of Britain, poised to re-take Nazi-occupied Europe. One man stands in their way: Winston Churchill. Behind the iconic figure and rousing speeches: a man who has faced political ridicule, military failure and a speech impediment. An impulsive, sometimes bullying personality - fearful, obsessive and hurting. Fearful of repeating, on his disastrous command, the mass slaughter of 1915, when hundreds of thousands of young men were cut down on the beaches of Gallipoli. Obsessed with fulfilling historical greatness: his destiny. Exhausted by years of war and plagued by depression, Churchill is a shadow of the hero who has resisted Hitler's Blitzkrieg. Should the D-Day landings fail, he is terrified he'll be remembered as an architect of carnage. Political opponents sharpen their knives. General Eisenhower and Field Marshal Montgomery are increasingly frustrated by Churchill's attempts to stop the invasion. King George VI must intervene. Only the support of Churchill's brilliant, yet exasperated wife Clementine can halt the Prime Minister's physical and mental collapse. The untold story of Britain's most celebrated leader, uncovering the true nature of Churchill's herculean war-time status and his vital relationship with "Clemmie" - his backbone and total confidant...the love that inspired him to greatness.

anon_2018.opis_neo:
V svetu brez anonimnosti in kriminala detektiv naleti na neznano žensko, ki lahko ogrozi varnost njihovega sveta.

V bližnji prihodnosti zasebnost, anonimnost in nevednost ne obstajajo, saj so vsa človeška razmišljanja zabeležena, zato pada tudi stopnja kriminala. Ko policist Frieland spozna hekerko, znano pod psevdonimom Dekle, ki je brez identitete, zgodovine ali kakršnegakoli zapisa o njej, dojame, da to ni konec zločinov, temveč njihov začetek.
anon_2018.opis_omdb: ANON is set in a near-future world where there is no privacy, ignorance or anonymity. Our private memories are recorded and crime almost ceases to exist. In trying to solve a series of unsolved murders, SAL FRIELAND (Owen) stumbles onto a young woman (Seyfried) who appears to have subverted the system and disappeared. She has no identity, no history and no record. Sal realizes it may not be the end of crime but the beginning. Known only as THE GIRL, Sal must find her before he becomes the next victim.

legend_2015.opis_neo:
Skrivna zločinska zgodovina bratov dvojčkov Kray, ki sta postala legendi v 50. in 60. letih.

Brata dvojčka Ron in Reggie Kray, angleška gangsterja, ki sta v 50. in 60. letih terorizirala London, sta zavoljo svojih zloglasnih dejanj postala legendi. Zgodba razkriva skrivno zločinsko zgodovino bratov, ki sta si na zunaj na las podobna, njuni osebnosti pa ne bi mogli biti bolj različni.
legend_2015.opis_omdb: The true story of London's most notorious gangsters, twins Reggie and Ronnie Kray. As the brothers rise through the criminal underworld, Ronnie advances the family business with violence and intimidation while Reggie struggles to go legitimate for local girl Frances Shea. In and out of prison, Ronnie's unpredictable tendencies and the slow disintegration of Reggie's marriage threaten to bring the brothers' empire tumbling to the ground.

paparazzi_2004.opis_neo:
Zvezdnika Bo začnejo preganjati fotografi, zaradi katerih skoraj izgubi družino.

Filmski megazvezdnik Bo Laramie (Cole Hauser) ima na videz vse - čudovito ľeno, sina in vilo na Malibuju. Toda zaradi svoje slave je tudi tarča senzacij ľeljnih fotografov, ki bi radi izkoristili njegovo zasebno ľivljenje. S fotografom Rexom (Tom Sizemore) na čelu postajajo paparaci vse bolj vztrajni, dokler nekega večera zaradi njihovega preganjanja Bo skoraj izgubi druľino. Ko začnejo znova oblegati njegovo soprogo in sina, se Bo odloči za maąčevanje.
paparazzi_2004.opis_omdb: Bo Laramie is a movie star who has finally achieved success. But success comes at a price, in the form of four persistent photographers known as the paparazzi. Using their dishonest methods of getting the money shot regardless of what it takes, they'll stop at nothing in exploiting Bo for every last penny. But when one of their ventures nearly costs Bo's life and that of his family when they cause a car accident and do nothing afterwords except take photos, Bo has finally reached his breaking point. In doing so, Bo decides to exact a crafty and complex revenge on those four who have enjoyed making his life a living hell with his focus on the paparazzi's ring leader, Rex Harper.

kung-fu zohra_2021.opis_neo:
Zohra se zaradi hčere boji zapustiti nasilnega moža. Ko odkrije, da je hišnik v njeni telovadnici mojster kung fuja ga prosi, naj jo nauči osnov.

Prepričana, da bi ob ločitvi za vselej izgubila hčer, se Zohra kljub soprogovi nasilnosti ne more pripraviti do tega, da bi zapustila moža. V tišini trpi njegove udarce, vse pa se spremeni, ko spozna Čang Sue. Zohra je sprva zadovoljna s svojim zakonom z Omarjem, vse bolj pa prihaja na plan njegovo ljubosumje. Udari jo in se takoj začne opravičevati. In Zohra mu želi odpustiti, kot to počnejo mnoge žrtve družinskega nasilja. Šele ko gre soprog res predaleč, Zohra dojame, da mora za vselej proč od njega. Toda odločitev ni preprosta: imata hčer, ki ima rada svojega očeta. Zohri so od nekdaj všeč kung fu filmi, zato začne trenirati to borilno veščino. Pomaga ji skrivnostni varnostnik v telovadnici, kjer dela. Zohra gre korak po korak proti svoji svobodi.
kung-fu zohra_2021.opis_omdb: Convinced that a divorce would separate her from her little girl, Zohra cannot bring herself to leave her husband despite his violent behavior. She suffers his blows in silence. But all that changes when she meets Chang Sue.

the double_2011.opis_neo:
Po umoru senatorja se zdi, da za umorom stoji sovjetski atentator, ki pa naj bi bil mrtev. Upokojeni agent CIE združi moči z mladim agentom FBI-ja.

Ko ubijejo ameriškega senatorja, vsi dokazi kažejo na sovjetskega morilca z vzdevkom Kasij, za katerega so dolgo verjeli, da je mrtev. Da bi ga izsledila, moči združita upokojeni operativec CIE, ki je lovu nanj posvetil celotno kariero, in ambiciozni agent FBI-ja, ki je zadnja leta preučeval vsak Kasijev korak. Oba verjameta, da o morilcu vesta vse, a njune informacije niso enotne, čas pa se nezadržno izteka.
the double_2011.opis_omdb: A US senator's just been murdered, and it bears the marks of a Soviet assassin, who's long-thought to be dead. To hunt down the killer, a retired member of the CIA, who spent his career going toe-to-toe with his Soviet nemesis, is teamed with a young FBI agent.

detective knight: rogue_2022.opis_neo:
Bruce Willis je detektiv veteran James Knight, ki deluje na zahtevnih ulicah Los Angelesa v tem prvem napetem filmu filmske trilogije.

Medtem ko se Los Angeles pripravlja na noč čarovnic, maskirani in oboroženi roparji kritično ranijo partnerja detektiva Jamesa Knighta v strelskem obračunu po ropu.
detective knight: rogue_2022.opis_omdb: As Los Angeles prepares for Halloween, mask-wearing armed robbers critically wound detective James Knight's partner in a shootout following a heist.

killer joe_2011.opis_neo:
Ko je zaradi dolga ogroženo njegovo življenje, se mladenič odloči, da bo dal ubiti svojo zlobno mamo in pobral zavarovalnino.

Mladi preprodajalec mamil Chris se znajde v finančnih dolgovih, zato se odloči umoriti lastno mamo Sharlo in unovčiti njeno življenjsko zavarovanje. Pri načrtovanju mu pomaga tudi oče, ki se je pred leti ločil od Sharle in skupaj najameta morilca Joeja, sicer tudi lokalnega policista.
killer joe_2011.opis_omdb: Finding himself in considerable debt, Chris, a Texan drug dealer, decides the only solution is to murder his mother to collect the insurance money. Getting together with his father, the ex-husband of Chris' mother, they decide to hire Joe Cooper (a contract killer) who also happens to be a police detective. The plan is that the money will go to Chris' sister Dottie. However due to the size of the contract fee, Chris agrees that Joe can take Dottie as a retainer until the insurance comes through.

the possession of michael king_2014.opis_neo:
Michael King (Shane Johnson) ne verjame ne v Boga ne v hudiča.

Po nenadni smrti svoje soproge se je Michael odločil posneti svoje naslednji film o tem, ali nadnaravno obstaja in kjer bo sam glavni osebek v poskusu in bo drugim praktikom okultnega dovolil na sebi preizkusiti najgloblje in najtemačnejše obrede, kar jih poznajo, v upanju, da bo po njihovem neuspehu enkrat za vselej dokazal, da religija, spiritualizem in paranormalno niso nič drugega kot zgolj mit. Toda nekaj se le zgodi. In obsede Michaela Kinga. In noče ga izpustiti.
the possession of michael king_2014.opis_omdb: Michael King (Shane Johnson) doesn't believe in God or the Devil. Following the sudden death of his wife, Michael decides to make his next film about the search for the existence of the supernatural, making himself the center of the experiment - allowing demonologists, necromancers, and various practitioners of the occult to try the deepest and darkest spells and rituals they can find on him - in the hopes that when they fail, he'll once and for all have proof that religion, spiritualism, and the paranormal are nothing more than myth. But something does happen. An evil and horrifying force has taken over Michael King. And it will not let him go.

der hauptmann_2017.opis_neo:
Izjemna prilika o tem, kako obleka res naredi človeka. Osupljiva resnična zgodba, ki se je odvila v zadnjih tednih druge svetovne vojne.

V zadnjih obupanih trenutkih 2. svetovne vojne najde mladi nemški vojak, ki se bori za preživetje, zavrženo uniformo nemškega stotnika. Med igranjem častnika hitro prevzame neusmiljeno identiteto zločincev, pred katerimi skuša pobegniti.
der hauptmann_2017.opis_omdb: During the final weeks of the Third Reich, an army deserter stumbles across an abandoned Nazi captain's uniform. Newly emboldened by the allure of a suit which he stole only to stay warm, he discovers that many Germans will follow the leader, whosoever that happens to be.

tracers_2015.opis_neo:
Kurir iz New Yorka, ki ima težave s kitajsko mafijo, po srečanju z lepo neznanko pobegne v svet parkourja.

Cam je kurir na kolesu, ki se utaplja v dolgovih, za nameček pa mu je za petami še kitajska mafija. Ko se nekega dne s kolesom zaleti v lepo Nikki, mu ta predstavi svoje prijatelje, ki se ukvarjajo s parkourjem, telesno disciplino premagovanja urbanih ovir med tekom. Ti parkour uporabljajo za potrebe uličnega kriminala, v svoje vrste pa kmalu povabijo tudi Cama.
tracers_2015.opis_omdb: Wanted by the Chinese mafia, a young New York City bike messenger down on his luck, who just wants to do good, escapes into the world of parkour after meeting a beautiful stranger and her group of Parkour trainers that get him involved in a criminal delivery service for extra money.

timecop_1994.opis_neo:
Maxu so pred 10 leti ubili ženo, zdaj pa se bori proti zvitim kriminalcem.

Max Walker je zagrenjen varuh časa, najmočnejši pripadnik elitne enote za varovanje časa, ki so jo ustanovili za to, da bi uveljavila en sam zakon: nihče ne gre nazaj. Toda Walker naleti na sebi primernega nasprotnika, senatorja McComba (Ron Silver), pokvarjenega in neizprosnega politika, ki se je trdno odločil spremeniti preteklost, da bi obogatel in si kupil stolček v Beli hiši. Walker ga zasleduje v leto 1994, kjer se mora soočiti še z večjo težavo – s svojo lastno preteklostjo in zakonom z ženo Melisso (Mia Sara), ki ga prekine smrt. Se bo Walker lahko uprl izzivu, da bi spremenil svojo preteklost in se boriti proti zlu, ki grozi z uničenjem same časovne materije?
timecop_1994.opis_omdb: When the ability to travel through time is perfected, a new type of law enforcement agency is formed. It's called Time Enforcement Commission or TEC. A cop, Max Walker, is assigned to the group. On the day he was chosen, some men attack him and kill his wife. Ten years later Max is still grieving but has become a good agent for the TEC. He tracks down a former co-worker who went into the past to make money. Max brings him back for sentencing but not after telling Max that Senator McComb, the man in charge of TEC, sent him. Max has his eye on McComb.

nerve_2016.opis_neo:
Dijakinja se znajde sredi spletne igre resnice ali izziva, v kateri začne z vsakim njenim korakom manipulirati anonimna skupnost ''opazovalcev''.

Pridna in sramežljiva srednješolka Vee pod pritiskom prijateljev začne sodelovati v spletni igri 'Si upaš?', kjer igralci za denar in slavo izpolnjujejo izzive, ki jih določajo opazovalci. Adrenalin in tekmovalnost jo vlečeta vedno globlje, igra pa z vsakim izzivom postaja nevarnejša, ter jo sili, da pride do odločilnega finala.
nerve_2016.opis_omdb: 'Nerve' is about an online dare game, in which people give participants anonymous dares for money. The participants compete with each other to win the grand prize as the dares get tougher. Things get worse when the tasks get increasingly dangerous and lives are at stake.

renegades_2017.opis_neo:
Skupino marincev napotijo v od vojne razrušeno BiH, kjer naj bi na dnu jezera poiskali zlato, vredno stotine milijonov dolarjev.

Ekipa ameriških marincev poskuša razkriti že davno pozabljeno skrivnost, pri čemer na dnu bosanskega jezera odkrijejo več zabojev, napolnjenih z zlatimi palicami, v vrednosti kar 300 milijonov dolarjev. Med reševanjem zlata iz jezera jih po nesrečnem dogodku opazijo sovražniki in preostane jim le še 10 ur časa za dokončanje misije.
renegades_2017.opis_omdb: A team of Navy SEALs discover an underwater treasure of Nazi stolen gold in a Bosnian lake. An updated Kelly's Heroes.

detective knight: redemption_2022.opis_neo:
V priporu v New Yorku se Knight znajde sredi bega iz zapora, ki ga vodi Božični bombaš.

V priporu v New Yorku se Knight znajde sredi bega iz zapora, ki ga vodi Božični bombaš, brutalni fanatik, katerega Božičkovi učenci terorizirajo mesto. Zaradi obljube, da mu bo vrnil značko v zameno za obračun s teroristi, nakloni Knight usmiljenje pravičnim in neusmiljeno pravico vsem drugim.
detective knight: redemption_2022.opis_omdb: Detective James Knight is in the middle of an escape led by the Christmas Terrorist. Promising to return his badge in exchange for taking down the terrorists, he decides to give mercy to the righteous - and merciless justice to ot...

sabotage_2014.opis_neo:
Člani elitne enote Urada za droge se po raciji varne hiše mamilarskega kartela znajdejo na seznamu za odstrel in začnejo umirati drug za drugim.

Elitna enota tajnih agentov DEA v akciji vdora v hišo narko-kartela ukrade in skrije 10 milijonov dolarjev. Člani mislijo, da je njihova skrivnost na varnem in se veselijo dneva bogatega izplačila. Toda denar izgine, nekdo pa jih začne vse po vrsti pobijati. Nekdaj trdno enoto razdelita strah in preganjavica.
sabotage_2014.opis_omdb: An elite DEA team raids the safe house of a drug cartel and hide $10 million in the plumbing. When they go back to retrieve the money it is not there. The team is under investigation for the missing $10 million. Then after a couple months the investigation is lifted. The team trains together again and then celebrates at a strip club. Then one of the team is murdered. He wakes up in his RV on railroad tracks. Then a second team member is nailed to the ceiling. The third team member is gunned down at his remote cabin. There is a female City of Atlanta investigator in charge of the murders. After investigating the cartel angle, the twisted truth comes to light.

empire state_2013.opis_neo:
Po neuspešnem vpisu na policijsko akademijo postane Chris Potamitis (Liam Hemsworth) varnostnik v podjetju, ki se ukvarja s prevozom denarja.

Po neuspešnem vpisu na policijsko akademijo, Chris postane varnostnik v podjetju, ki se ukvarja s prevozom denarja. Kmalu sprevidi, da ima podjetje nadvse slabo poskrbljeno za varnost. Ko to omeni svojemu neobrzdanemu prijatelju Eddieju, se Chris proti svoji volji vplete v enega največjih ropov v zgodovini ZDA.
empire state_2013.opis_omdb: After failing to get into the police academy, Chris Potamitis (Liam Hemsworth), settles for a security guard job with the EMPIRE STATE Armored Truck Company. Chris makes the mistake of mentioning the company's lax security to his best friend, Eddie (Michael Angarano), and is soon unwittingly drawn into an elaborate scheme to rob the abundant amounts of cash being stored there - resulting in the largest cash heist in U.S. History. As the stakes continue to rise, Chris and Eddie must outwit Detective James Ransone (Dwayne Johnson), an NYPD veteran who is hot on their trail, as well as the local crime lords that want to know who pulled off a job on their turf, or suffer the consequences.

needle_2010.opis_neo:
Morilec pri ustrahovanju študentov uporabi posebno napravo iz 18. stoletja.

Nekaj dni kasneje, ko se fantje odpravljajo domov, naletijo na šokanten prizor, ko policisti iz reke potegnejo mrtvo Sito. David, Craig in Andrew kljub temu odpotujejo domov, kjer pa se jim začnejo dogajati čudne stvari.
needle_2010.opis_omdb: After the death of his father, archaeology student Ben Rutherford inherits an 18th century mechanical device known as "Le Vaudo Mort". At a college party he flaunts the machine in front of a group of his closest friends and later discovers that the machine has a sinister past and may harbor supernatural powers. After class he returns to his dorm room to find that the contraption has been stolen. One by one, Ben's friends begin to die in strange and horrific circumstances. Now he must reunite with his estranged half-brother, Marcus, a forensic photographer, and delve deeper into their father's past to work out who is behind the grisly murders. As the terror mounts and the clues seem to suggest the unthinkable, a surprising twist will reveal the true identity of the killer...

i still see you_2018.opis_neo:
V svetu, ki je po eksploziji v laboratoriju poseljen z duhovi umrlih v nesreči, mora srednješolka ustaviti morilca.

Devet let po apokaliptičnih dogodkih, v katerih je umrlo na milijone ljudi, svet preganjajo duhovi. Ko mlada Ronnie dobi grozeče sporočilo z druge strani, združi moči s skrivnostnim sošolcem Kirkom in se spusti v svet senc, ki zameglijo meje med živimi in mrtvimi. Čaka ju tekma s časom, da bi ustavila pretkanega morilca.
i still see you_2018.opis_omdb: Bella Thorne stars in this spellbinding and romantic supernatural thriller. Ten years after an apocalyptic event left the world haunted by ghosts, Roni (Thorne) receives a threatening message from beyond the grave. Joining forces with a mysterious classmate, Kirk, Roni descends into a shadow world that blurs the bounds of the living and the dead-and begins a desperate race against time to stop a cunning killer.

detective knight: independence_2023.opis_neo:
Naloga detektiva Jamesa Knighta v zadnji minuti izmene ob dnevu neodvisnosti se spremeni v tekmo s časom.

Naloga detektiva Jamesa Knighta v zadnji minuti izmene ob dnevu neodvisnosti se spremeni v tekmo, da bi preprečil vozilu nujne medicinske pomoči uničiti proslavo v mestu. Maščevalec, ki se igra policaja z ukradeno pištolo in uniformo, ima bančni trezor poln razlogov, da pripravi lasten ognjemet... ki bo udaril nevarno blizu Knightovega doma.
detective knight: independence_2023.opis_omdb: Detective James Knight's last-minute assignment to the Independence Day shift turns into a race against time to stop an unbalanced EMT worker who's posing as a cop.

marlowe_2022.opis_neo:
Zasebnega detektiva Philipa Marlowa najame glamurozna dedinja Clare Cavendish, da bi našel njenega pogrešanega ljubimca.

1938 v Los Angelesu. Zasebni detektiv Philip Marlowe je nemiren in kot vedno osamljen in brez dela. Takrat dobi novo mlado in lepo klientko v dragih oblekah, Clare Cavendish, hčer holivudske igralke in filmske ikone Dorothy Quincannon,ki želi, da Marlowe poišče njenega bicšega ljubimca in majhnega dilerja Nica Petersona. Preiskava ga pripelje do kluba Corbata, pokvarjeni brlog za bogataše in vplivneže, ki ga vodi Floyd Hanson, navidezni varuh družbe, v resnici pa vratar pokvarjenega podzemlja. Marlowe ne verjame zgodba o Nicovi naključni smrti. Izkaže se, da je bila zaigrana in je Nico še živ. Marlowa omrežijo čari zapeljive ge. Cavendish, vmeša pa se tudi v podzemlje rastočega filmskega sveta z eno najbogatejših družin Bay Cityja, ko odkriva, kako daleč so pripravljeni iti, da zaščitijo svoje bogastvo.
marlowe_2022.opis_omdb: In late 1930s Bay City, a brooding, down on his luck detective is hired to find the ex-lover of a glamorous heiress.

jigsaw_2017.opis_neo:
Osmi film v franšizi Žage z naslovom Jigsaw prinaša znano zgodb in še bolj znanega morilca.

Ena najuspešnejših horor franšiz vseh časov, Žaga, se vrača že osmič z naslovom Jigsaw. Osmi film v franšizi Žage z naslovom Jigsaw prinaša znano zgodb in še bolj znanega morilca. Po mestu se začnejo pojavljati trupla in vsaka žrtev je soočena z edinstveno kruto smrtjo. Med preiskavo kažejo dokazi na enega osumljenca: Johna Kramerja. Toda kako je to mogoče? Mož, znan kot Ugankar, je mrtev že dobro desetletje.
jigsaw_2017.opis_omdb: It has been over a decade since Jigsaw died. However, after a new series of murders occurs, police find themselves chasing after the original Jigsaw Killer - John Kramer. Could John Kramer still be alive or is another killer out there with a different motive?

les rivières pourpres_2000.opis_neo:
Policista naletita na srhljiv vezni člen med dvema preiskavama.

Izkušenega policijskega detektiva Niémansa pošljejo v univerzitetno mesto v Alpah, kjer so našli izmaličeno truplo. Poročnik Kerkérian, brezobziren mlad policist, je zadolžen za preiskavo skrunitve otroškega groba. Zgodilo se je še nekaj zločinov, in počasi se začneta ta dva primera navezovati. Niémans in Kerkérian združita moči in odkrijeta resnico, kakršne si ne bi mogla zamisliti niti v najbolj norih teorijah.
les rivières pourpres_2000.opis_omdb: Parisian murder detective commissioner Pierre Niemans is called to Guernon, a self-sufficient, prestigious university in a mountain valley, to investigate the murder on 32-year old professor and librarian Rémy Caillois, whose corpse was found 50 meters high on a steep mountain side, naked, horribly covered in bruises and bleeding wounds, the result of some five hours of bestial torture including quasi-surgical amputation of hands cauterized to prevent bleeding to death- and eyes. Guernon is a closed society of virtually incestuous scientists, de facto succeeding to their parents' posts; the eye-doctor, formerly on the staff, says hereditary genetic diseases are the price of such elitism, but in recent years spread to the simple farming families. Inspector Max Kerkerian examines two crimes in the town: a school break-in with theft of old photos and archive papers as well as a graveyard desecration of Judith Herault, the daughter of local nun Andrée, who lives in a dark cell since 15 years and mumbles the demons who made an attempt of both of their lives have returned to prevent the child endanger their secret. As both police investigations continue, the loner sleuths meet; secrets and other corpses are found, till it all ties together.

absolute zero_2006.opis_neo:
Klimatolog David Koch ima dokaze, da je bilo za zadnjo ledeno dobo krivo nagibanje Zemlje.

Klimatolog dr. David Kotzman, ki dela pri podjetju INTER SCI, ima dokaze, da je zadnjo ledeno dobo sprožil premik magnetnih polov … in to v enem samem dnevu. Zdaj se to spet dogaja, časa za pobeg pa ni. Temperature padajo in Miami ovija leden oklep. Davidu, njegovi dolgoletni simpatiji Bryn in še peščici preživelih preostane eno samo upanje: posebna komora v INTER SCI.
absolute zero_2006.opis_omdb: INTER SCI climatologist Dr. David Kotzman has evidence that a shift in the Earth's polarity triggered the last Ice Age...in a single day. Now, it's happening again, and there's no time to escape. As the temperature plummets, Miami is blasted with snow and ice. Evacuation routes are jammed. The only chance David, his old flame Bryn, and a few other hopeful survivors have is to hole themselves up in a special chamber at INTER SCI. A desperate race for survival is ignited as nature's fury rages and the temperature plunges toward -459.67° F...ABSOLUTE ZERO!

this beautiful fantastic_2016.opis_neo:
Mlada ženska, ki sanja, da bi postala otroška pisateljica, se spoprijatelji z zlovoljnim bogatim starim vdovcem.

Bella Brown je nenavadno dekle edinstvene preteklosti, ki dela v knjižnici, medtem ko skuša napisati knjigo za otroke. Sovraži rastline, ampak mora urediti vrt, saj je njen najemodajalec opazil, da zanemarja vrt in ji je dal mesec dni, da ga uredi, drugače se bo morala izseliti. Mimogrede sklene prijateljstvo z zlovoljnim sosedom, njegovim kuharjem/hišnikom in inovatorjem, ki prihaja v knjižnico.
this beautiful fantastic_2016.opis_omdb: A young woman who dreams of becoming a children's book author makes an unlikely friendship with a cantankerous, rich old widower.

chernovik_2018.opis_neo:
Mlad ruski programer Kiril ostane brez identitete, saj ga rekrutira skrivnostna sila, da bi bil varuh multidimnezionalnega portala.

Kirilovo življenje je popolno, je mlad, nadarjen, ima dobro plačano delo in čedno dekle. Dokler ga nekega dne ne pozabijo vsi, ki so ga poznali. V iskanju pojasnitve izve, da je izbran za varuha prehoda med vzporednimi svetovi ter da je v vesolju na desetine takšnih svetov. Ali je svet, v katerem živimo le 'začetni osnutek', ki dejansko ne obstaja?
chernovik_2018.opis_omdb: Under the reign of Napoleon, François Vidocq, the only man who escaped from the greatest penal colony of the country, is a legend of the low-Parisian fund. Left for dead after his last spectacular escape, the ex-penal colony prisoner tries to make him forget under the traits of a single trader.

the space between us_2017.opis_neo:
Prvi človek rojen na Marsu odpotuje na Zemljo, kjer se sooča s čudesi, ki so za ostale Zemljane popolnoma vsakdanja.

Na prvi misiji kolonizacije Marsa ena izmed astronavtk izve, da je noseča. Zaradi zapletov pri rojevanju prvega človeka na rdečem planetu astronavtka umre, ne da bi razkrila, kdo je otrokov oče. Danes si mladenič Gardner Elliot, po 16 letih življenja na Marsu, želi na Zemljo, da bi poiskal očeta in izkusil vse čudeže našega planeta. Pri odkrivanju kdo je in kam sodi mu pomaga mladenka Tulsa.
the space between us_2017.opis_omdb: In this interplanetary adventure, a space shuttle embarks on the first mission to colonize Mars, only to discover after takeoff that one of the astronauts is pregnant. Shortly after landing, she dies from complications while giving birth to the first human born on the red planet - never revealing who the father is. Thus begins the extraordinary life of Gardner Elliot - an inquisitive, highly intelligent boy who reaches the age of 16 having only met 14 people in his very unconventional upbringing. While searching for clues about his father, and the home planet he's never known, Gardner begins an online friendship with a street smart girl in Colorado named Tulsa. When he finally gets a chance to go to Earth, he's eager to experience all of the wonders he could only read about on Mars - from the most simple to the extraordinary. But once his explorations begin, scientists discover that Gardner's organs can't withstand Earth's atmosphere. Eager to find his father, Gardner escapes the team of scientists and joins with Tulsa on a race against time to unravel the mysteries of how he came to be, and where he belongs in the universe.

dredd_2012.opis_neo:
Futuristična zgodba, postavljena v 22. stoletje, ki nas popelje na ulice megalopolisa Mega City One.

Zemlja je hudo poškodovana v vrsti mednarodnih spopadov, ki so dober del planeta spremenili v radioaktivno puščavo, zato se prebivalstvo seli v orjaške megalopolise. Ti imajo na stotine milijonov prebivalcev in v njem kraljujejo vsi mogoči zločini, zato za ohranjanje reda skrbi elitna policijska enota, imenovana Sodniki. Med najbolj neusmiljene sodi Joe Dredd.
dredd_2012.opis_omdb: The future America is an irradiated waste land. On its East Coast, running from Boston to Washington DC, lies Mega City One - a vast, violent metropolis where criminals rule the chaotic streets. The only force of order lies with the urban cops called "Judges" who possess the combined powers of judge, jury and instant executioner. Known and feared throughout the city, Dredd is the ultimate Judge, challenged with ridding the city of its latest scourge - a dangerous drug epidemic that has users of "Slo-Mo" experiencing reality at a fraction of its normal speed. During a routine day on the job, Dredd is assigned to train and evaluate Cassandra Anderson, a rookie with powerful psychic abilities thanks to a genetic mutation. A heinous crime calls them to a neighborhood where fellow Judges rarely dare to venture - a 200 storey vertical slum controlled by prostitute turned drug lord Ma-Ma and her ruthless clan. When they capture one of the clan's inner circle, Ma-Ma overtakes the compound's control center and wages a dirty, vicious war against the Judges that proves she will stop at nothing to protect her empire. With the body count climbing and no way out, Dredd and Anderson must confront the odds and engage in the relentless battle for their survival.

color out of space_2019.opis_neo:
Padec nenavadnega meteorita na odročno kmetijo ima usodne posledice za tamkaj živečo družino in ves svet.

Nedavno vrnitev družine Gardner v življenje na vasi zmoti padec meteorita pred njihovo hišo. Zdi se, da je poniknil v zemljo in okužil vse naokoli. Pojavljati se začnejo deformirane živali in mutirano rastlinje. Gardnerjevi skušajo ubežati kužnemu oblaku, pri bitki z nerazumljivo entiteto pa jim pomagata prijatelj hidrolog in ekscentrični sosed.
color out of space_2019.opis_omdb: A story of cosmic terror about The Gardners, a family who moves to a remote farmstead in rural New England to escape the hustle of the 21st century. They are busy adapting to their new life when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. The mysterious aerolite seems to melt into the earth, infecting both the land and the properties of space-time with a strange, otherworldly color. To their horror, the Gardner family discover that this alien force is gradually mutating every life form that it touches...including them.

songbird_2020.opis_neo:
Da bi bila Nico in Sara končno skupaj, mora Nico najti način, kako varno priti do nje kljub svetovni pandemiji.

Dogajanje v filmu je umeščeno v leto 2022, ko je svet že nekaj let v pandemiji. Novi in brutalni zakoni so nekaj vsakdanjega, mesta so razdeljena na cone, zaradi strašnega virusa pa ljudje niso v bolnišnicah, temveč v posebnih karantenskih taboriščih. Nico in Sara sta par, ki se dejansko ni uspel nikoli dobro spoznati zaradi strogih prepovedi "lockdowna". Da bi bila končno skupaj, mora Nico najti način, kako naj varno pride do nje kljub policijskim ukrepom.
songbird_2020.opis_omdb: Over 4 years of lock-down in LA in 2024 and COVID-23 has mutated and has a 56% mortality rate. Only the few immune people can leave their homes. Nico is one of the few. He's a courier delivering packages on his bike. He has the LA streets to himself except a few checkpoints. People hate him as he's immune and can move around and they can't. He has a cute girlfriend but all communication is over cellphones. LA's Department of Sanitation forcefully collects infected people and their non-immune household members from their homes to take them to quarantine zones. Q zones are thought of as quick death zones.

shut in_2016.opis_neo:
Nominiranka za oskarja Naomi Watts ima glavno vlogo v napetem trilerju, v katerem igra vdovo, ki živi v odročnem podeželskem območju v Novi Angliji.

Ovdovela otroška psihologinja Mary živi na odročnem podeželju Nove Anglije in skrbi za svojega paraliziranega sina. Ko v oskrbo dobi žalujočega dečka Toma in ta med snežnim metežem izgine neznano kam, Mary pričnejo preganjati grozljive nočne more. Čeprav poskuša najti razumno razlago, se ji čedalje bolj dozdeva, da je Tom mrtev in njegov duh straši v njeni hiši.
shut in_2016.opis_omdb: Steven is a troubled kid from Maine being sent to boarding school. While his father, Richard Portman, is driving him there, they get into a bad argument, and the car swerves into oncoming traffic, killing Richard and putting Steven in a vegetative state. Six months later, Steven's stepmother, Mary, is taking care of him. Mary is a psychologist who works from home with children and adolescents. She is upset to learn that one of her patients, a deaf child named Tom, is to be transferred to a school in Boston. Later, Mary discusses Steven with her therapist, Dr. Wilson. While she feels guilty, she has decided to put Steven in a home to be cared for because he is unresponsive.

jue ji_2016.opis_neo:
Sirota postane učenec mogočnega čarovnika in se zaplete v hud spopad v svetu čarovniške elite.

Celina Odin je razdeljena na štiri države, v vsaki pa živijo mojstri, ki ščitijo svojo deželo s svojimi čarobnimi močmi. Najmočnejša sedmerica je poimenovana tudi Plemeniti lordi. Zgodba se začne v imperiju Aslan.

Qi Ling (Cheney Chen) že od otroštva dela v gostišču. Podzavestno je med bitko med mojstri ukrotil Ledenega čekana, legendarno čarobno pošast. Yin Chen (Kris Wu) po ukazu Srebrnega svečenika (Roy Wang) Qi Linga poišče, da bi postal njegov učenec. Z njegovo pomočjo se Qi Ling odpravi do Pokopališča duš, da bi poiskal svoje orožje. 

A ne upošteva navodil in namesto, da bi mirno počakal, vstopi na Pokopališče duš ter se tako zaplete v bitko med lordi. Medtem pa se v imperiju Aslan počasi razkrije še ena zarota.
jue ji_2016.opis_omdb: An orphan becomes the disciple of a powerful sorcerer and is drawn into a larger conflict among the world's magical elite.

scary movie 5_2013.opis_neo:
Par opazi nenavadno dejavnost, potem ko domov pripelje izgubljene nečake. S pomočjo nadzornih kamer izvesta, da ju zalezuje podli demon.

Dan in Jody sta srečno poročen par, ki pa opažata, da se okoli njiju dogajajo čudne stvari, sploh odkar sta posvojila Danovi nečakinji, ki sta nekaj časa preživeli sami v gozdni kolibi in sta postali rahlo divji. Zmeda se seli tudi na Jodyjino ukvarjanje z baletom in ogroža Danovo kariero raziskovalca opic, zato se vse bolj zavedata, da imata opravka z zlobnim demonom. S pomočjo različnih strokovnjakov in s postavljanjem številnih kamer morajo najti rešitev pred nadnaravnim stvorom prej, preden bo prepozno.
scary movie 5_2013.opis_omdb: Happily-married couple Dan and Jody begin to notice some bizarre activity once they bring their lost nieces and nephew home. But when the chaos expands into Jody's job as a ballet dancer and Dan's career as an Ape researcher, they realize their family is being stalked by a nefarious demon. Together, with the advice of a psychic and the aid of numerous surveillance cameras, they must figure out how to get rid of it before it's too late.

the collection_2012.opis_neo:
Arkin komaj pobegne zlobnemu morilcu, ki je znan kot Zbiralec in je v svojo "zbirko" že ujel prelepo Eleno.

A namesto da bi si v Arkin miru opomogel od šoka, ga iz bolnišnice ugrabijo plačanci Eleninega premožnega očeta. Ta ga izsiljuje in prisili, da plačancem pomaga najti z zankami zaščiteno Zbiralčevo skladišče in iz njega reši Eleno.
the collection_2012.opis_omdb: Arkin escapes with his life from the vicious grips of "The Collector" during an entrapment party where he adds beautiful Elena to his "Collection." Instead of recovering from the trauma, Arkin is suddenly abducted from the hospital by mercenaries hired by Elena's wealthy father. Arkin is blackmailed to team up with the mercenaries and track down The Collector's booby trapped warehouse and save Elena.

la befana vien di notte_2018.opis_neo:
Paola je podnevi navadna učiteljica, ponoči pa se spremeni v božično čarovnico, čudežno bitje, ki pridnim otrokom prinaša darila.

Podnevi gospodična Paola dela kot učiteljica v italijanskem mestu, toda vsako noč ob polnoči se spremeni v več kot 500 let staro Befano, čarovnico, ki vsako leto v noči iz petega na šesti januar prinaša darila lepo vzgojenim otrokom in nenavadna presenečenja porednim.
Eno leto pes prežveči seznam, ki ga uporablja za spremljanje otrok, in ji ne uspe pravočasno dostaviti darila fantu po imenu Giovanni Rovasio, ki jo nato krivi za vse svoje nadaljnje nesreče.
25 let kasneje se je Giovanni spremenil v gospoda Johnnyja, zlobneža, ki ugrabi Paolo. Riccardo, učenec iz njenega razreda, je priča ugrabitvi. S petimi sošolci razišče Paolino skladišče in odkrije njeno skrivno identiteto.
la befana vien di notte_2018.opis_omdb: During the day Paola is an ordinary primary school teacher, but at night, she turns into The Christmas Witch, a magical creature who brings gifts to the good kids.

chao ji de wo_2019.opis_neo:
Mladi scenarist začne prinašati dragocene predmete iz svojih nočnih mor, v katerih ga preganja demon. Z njihovo prodajo obogati.

Sang Ju je zelo izčrpan, ker se trudi ostati buden. Vsakič, ko zapre oči, ga v sanjah preganja demon, ki ga ubije. Sang neko noč ugotovi, da ima posebno moč: iz sanj lahko v resničnost prenese zaklad. Skoraj čez noč obogati. Toda njegovo bogastvi pritegne pozornost in neusmiljenega gangsterja. Film je bil v uradnem izboru Mednarodnega filmskega festivala Sitges leta 2019.
chao ji de wo_2019.opis_omdb: SANG Yu is so exhausted from trying to stay awake. Every time he closes his eyes, a demon chases and kills him in his dreams. One night SANG realizes he has a special power: he can bring treasures from his dreams into reality. Almost overnight, he becomes a rich man. But his wealth also attracts the attention of a ruthless gangster.

wendy_2020.opis_neo:
Wendy, izgubljena na skrivnostnem otoku, kjer sta se staranje in čas umaknila, se mora boriti, da bi rešila svojo družino pred nevarnostjo odraščanja.

Wendy pobegne od doma in z bratoma dvojčkoma konča v deželi Nije. Na čarobnem otoku, polnem Izgubljenčkov, otroci uživajo v svobodi. Po nepričakovani tragediji, ki prizadene Wendyjino družino, ta odkrije temačno plat ideje o tem, da nikoli ne odrasteš. Mora se boriti za ohranitev družine, svobode in mladostnega duha pred smrtonosno pogubo odraščanja.
wendy_2020.opis_omdb: The classic story of Peter Pan is wildly reimagined in a ragtag epic. Lost on a mysterious island where aging and time have come unglued, Wendy must fight to save her family, her freedom, and the joyous spirit of youth from the deadly peril of growing up.

premonition_2007.opis_neo:
Običajno življenje gospodinje Linde pretrga tragična smrt moža, a še večji šok sledi naslednje jutro, ko se znova zbudi ob njem.

Linda Hanson ima čudovito hišo, ljubečega moža in čudoviti hčerki. Njeno življenje se zdi popolno, dokler ne dobi grozljive novice, da je njen mož Jim umrl v prometni nesreči. Ko se prihodnje jutro zbudi, Jim pa jo pričaka živ in zdrav, misli, da je sanjala, vendar jo je pretresla resničnost domnevnih sanj. Vendar pa ji je kmalu jasno, da to niso bile sanje in da je njeno življenje obrnjeno na glavo, on nerealnih okoliščinah pa bo prisiljena dojeti, da njeno življenje le ni bilo takšno, kot se ji je zdelo.
premonition_2007.opis_omdb: Middle-class couple Linda and Jim Hanson exist in a rut with their two daughters in their comfortable suburban home. One Thursday morning, the local sheriff informs Linda that Jim died in a car accident the day before. When she awakens the next morning, she finds Jim safe and sound at home; the morning after that she awakens to find him dead. She realizes that her days are out of order; her family and friends believe that she's insane.

shark bait_2022.opis_neo: Skupina prijateljev uživa na poletnih počitnicah na mehiških peščenih plažah. Po zabavi, ki se je zavlekla dolgo v noč, se odločijo ukrasti nekaj vodih sani in z njimi tekmovati. Razuzdana zabava pa se konča z grozljivo nesrečo. Obtičijo kilometre proč od obale in prava groza se začne, ko dojamejo, da eden od prijateljev močno krvavi, prepuščeni pa so sami sebi v morju, kjer mrgoli morskih psov.
shark bait_2022.opis_omdb: A group of friends on vacation steal a couple of jet skis for fun and race them out to sea, ending up in a head-on collision. They struggle to find a way home with a badly injured friend, while from the waters below predators lurk.

jiu jitsu_2020.opis_neo:
Starodavni red izurjenih bojevnikov se mora vsakih šest let spopasti z nezemljani in se boriti za Zemljo.

Starodavni red izurjenih bojevnikov se mora vsakih šest let spopasti z nezemljani in se boriti za Zemljo. Bojevniki so tisoče let spoštovali nepisani dogovor in igrali po pravilih, toda stvari se spremenijo. En od zemeljskih bojevnikov Jake (Alain Moussi) se ne želi boriti z nepremagljivim vodjem nezemljanov, zaradi česar nastane vsesplošni kaos.
jiu jitsu_2020.opis_omdb: When Jake Barnes, a master Jiu Jitsu fighter, refuses to face Brax, an indomitable alien creature, the future of humanity hangs in the balance. Injured and suffering from severe amnesia, Jake is captured by a military squad unequipped to fight the merciless intruder who has descended upon the planet. Jake is rescued by Wylie, and an ancient order of Jiu Jitsu fighters who must help him recover his memory and regain his strength in order to band together and defeat Brax in an epic battle that will determine the fate of mankind.

the replacement killers_1998.opis_neo:
John Lee je kitajski priseljenec v Ameriki in eden najboljših poklicnih morilcev na svetu, ki poskuša svoji nasilni preteklosti obrniti hrbet.

Kitajski priseljenec John Lee ima nasilno preteklost morilca po naročilu. Prinesla mu je samo obžalovanje, vendar je tudi najboljši profesionalec, kar jih lahko najamete. V zameno za varnost svoje družine je John prisiljen sprejeti naročilo vplivnega lika kriminalnega podzemlja, azijskega zločinskega šefa Terenca Weija. Ta hoče, da bi Lee maščevalno poravnal njegov račun s policijskim detektivom Stanom Zedlovom tako, da bi ubil njegovega sedemletnega sina. Zadnji trenutek, ko se sooči z dečkom, se Lee odloči zoperstaviti Weiju, namesto da bi izpeljal naročeno nalogo. Wei je besen in za njim pošlje vojsko izurjenih morilcev, ki naj bi ga ubili in potem dokončali dano nalogo. Poleg Leeja sta zdaj v nevarnosti tudi njegova mati in sestra v Šanghaju. Sklene se vrniti na Kitajsko, zato si pri ponarejevalki dokumentov Meg Cobund priskrbi lažni potni list, vendar so mu Weijevi plačanci že za petami. Odvijeta se dolg pregon in usodni strelski obračun.
the replacement killers_1998.opis_omdb: John Lee is the best hitman money can buy. But when John refuses to kill because of the seven year-old son of his target, John's bosses send someone after John to kill him and then take his place in the ring of hitmen. John then teams up with Meg Coburn to help him escape these "Replacement Killers."

romance retreat_2019.opis_neo:
Novinarka Dana mora izbirati med kariero in srcem, ko se začne zaljubljati v skrivnostnega direktorja, ki je v središču njene raziskave.

Ambiciozna novinarka Dana privoli, da bo s fantom Jonom šla na počitnice, da bi rešila zvezo, vendar se razideta, takoj ko prispeta v letovišče. Zdaj je obtičala tu, brez povezave z zunanjim svetom, poleg tega je v tem času izbruhnil tehnološki škandal, ki bi ga sicer raziskovala. Kmalu spozna Stefana, ki si je prišel razbistrit glavo, Dana pa ugotovi, da je Stefan direktor podjetja, zaradi katerega je izbruhnil škandal. Približa se mu, da bi izvedela vse, kar jo zanima, vendar hitro ugotovi, da za škandal ni kriv Stefan, temveč mu nekdo podtika. Dana spozna, da jo Stefan privlači, in kmalu se mora odločiti med svojimi ambicijami in pravo ljubeznijo.
romance retreat_2019.opis_omdb: After a breakup, ambitious journalist Dana escapes the coverage of a massive scandal, only to find the tech guru at the center of the scandal at her retreat. As she falls for him, she has to choose between her career or her heart.

meurtres à toulouse_2020.opis_neo: Ko se pojavijo trupla, povezana z znano pesmijo Clauda Nougara, morata izkušen detektiv in novinka razvozlati morilčeve skrivnostne namige v mestu.
meurtres à toulouse_2020.opis_omdb: What do bodies found in the morning on different places in Toulouse have to do with the lyrics of a Claude Nougaro song?

marry go round_2022.opis_neo: Abby načrtuje poroko z Edwardom, ko ugotovi, da ločitev od nekdanjega moža in srednješolske ljubezni Luka ni ravno uradna.
marry go round_2022.opis_omdb: Abby is a successful executive with a perfect life: she's moving to Paris and planning to marry Edward. Then she discovers that her divorce from her high-school sweetheart Luke is not exactly official.

crime à ramatuelle_2022.opis_neo: Preiskovalki Elisabeth Richard in Caroline Martinez kmalu dodata osumljence na svoj seznam, ko preiskujeta umor lastnika vinskega posestva.
crime à ramatuelle_2022.opis_omdb: Sébastien Lacassagne, 35, owner of a wine estate, was assassinated with a statuette in his house. The investigation conducted by Prosecutor Elisabeth Richard and Captain Caroline Martinez reveals many gray areas in the victim's life.

notes of autumn_2023.opis_neo:
Prijateljici, ki sta zašli z življenjske poti, se odločita zamenjati domova in življenji, ob tem pa jeseni najdeta ljubezen.

Ellie in Leo zamenjata svoji stanovanji. Kmalu oba pridobita nove prijatelje, ki jim spremenijo življenje.
notes of autumn_2023.opis_omdb: Ellie, a pianist gave up her passion and works for a hotel. Leo, a famous author with writer's block who can't finish highly popular book series. They both decide to swap places ending up completely lost in new surroundings.

murder on omaha beach_2018.opis_neo: Kapitanka Eloïse Gentil po dvajsetih letih, kar ni govorila s svojim očetom Robertom, sodeluje z njim, da skupaj raziščeta smrt Jamesa Crawleyja.
murder on omaha beach_2018.opis_omdb: A 91-year-old former GI is found in his uniform tied to a pole, apparently executed.

frankenfish_2004.opis_neo:
Gensko spremenjena riba povzroča opustošenje v majhnem ribiškem mestu.

Pošastne ribe jedo ljudi. V mesto prihajajo znanstveniki in lovci, ki se podajo na lov za velikansko ribo.
