Lucy can't let Josh beat her at anything - especially when a huge new promotion to be Managing Director is up for grabs. They strike a deal that whoever does not get the promotion must quit. It's game-on - But as tensions reach boiling point and an innocent elevator ride turns into a steamy kiss, Lucy begins to realize just how fine a line there is between love and hate.

le comte de monte-cristo_2024.opis_neo:
Spektakularna visokoproračunska pustolovska zgodba, nastala po istoimenskem romanu Alexandra Dumasa, enemu najljubših klasikov filmske industrije.

Izdajalski prijatelji in pokvarjeni sodnik mladega mornarja Edmonda Dantèsa na dan njegove poroke obsodijo na dosmrtno ječo zaradi zločina, ki ga ni storil. Edmond je obtožen izdaje in brez sojenja vržen v zapor Château d'If. V zaporu preživi štirinajst dolgih let, med katerimi spozna starca Abbé Fario, ki mu pove za skriti zaklad na otoku Monte Cristo. Po spretnem pobegu iz otoškega zapora Edmond najde zaklad na otoku Monte Cristo, kar ga naredi neizmerno bogatega. Pod novim imenom - grof Monte Cristo - se vrne v družbo z namenom maščevanja.
le comte de monte-cristo_2024.reziser: Alexandre de La Patellière, Matthieu Delaporte
le comte de monte-cristo_2024.opis_omdb: After escaping from an island prison where he spent 14 years for being wrongly accused of state treason, Edmond Dantès returns as the count of Monte Cristo to exact revenge on the men who betrayed him.

we are your friends_2015.opis_neo:
Mladega DJ-ja pod svoje okrilje vzame starejši mentor, a se ta zaljubi v njegovo dekle.

Cole kot mladi DJ kuje načrte s prijatelji iz otroštva, ponoči pa sklada pesem, ki bo osvojila svet. Ko spozna Jamesa, starejšega DJ-ja, ki ga vzame pod svoje okrilje, se Cole zaljubi v njegovo mlado punco Sophie. Njun prepovedan odnos postaja vse intenzivnejši, zato mora izbrati med ljubeznijo, zvestobo in prihodnostjo, ki mu je usojena.
we are your friends_2015.opis_omdb: Cole is an aspiring DJ who spends his days scheming with his childhood friends and his nights working on the one track that will set the world on fire. All of this changes when he meets a charismatic but damaged older DJ named James, who takes him under his wing. Things get complicated, however, when Cole starts falling for James' much younger girlfriend, Sophie. With Cole's forbidden relationship intensifying and his friendships unraveling, he must choose between love, loyalty, and the future he is destined for.

unlocked_2017.opis_neo:
Agentka CIE in agent MI5 združita moči v boju proti teroristom, ki grozijo z biološkim orožjem.

Sredi Londona se pripravlja teroristični napad z biološkim orožjem. Agentka CIE Alice Racine dobi priložnost, da zasliši glavnega osumljenca, a nato ugotovi, da so pridobljeni podatki kompromitirani. Da bi izsledila teroristično celico in preprečila katastrofo, združi moči z agentom britanske obveščevalne službe MI5, Jackom Alcottom.
unlocked_2017.opis_omdb: A CIA interrogator is lured into a ruse that puts London at risk of a biological attack.

unleashing mr. darcy_2016.opis_neo:
V sodobni priredbi romana "Prevzetnost in pristranost" Elizabeth išče pravo pot v življenju in dobi priložnost, da pelje svojega psa na razstavo.

V tej sodobni različici kultne knjige "Prevzetnost in pristranost" Elizabeth išče pravo pot v življenju, ko dobi priložnost, da pelje svojega psa na uglajeno razstavo psov v New Yorku.
unleashing mr. darcy_2016.opis_omdb: In this modern day spin on "Pride and Prejudice," Elizabeth Scott is fishing for direction in her life and gets the opportunity to professionally show her Cavalier King Charles Spaniel in a fancy New York dog show. Dog show judge Donovan Darcy comes across as aristocratic and rude and a chain of misunderstandings unfold during the competition, complicating their mutual attraction. In true Jane Austen fashion, Elizabeth and Donovan begin to see the error of their ways and it turns out Mr. Darcy is far more kind and interesting than Elizabeth ever imagined.

giants of la mancha_2024.opis_neo:
11-letni Alfonz Kihot je potomec legendarnega Don Kihota z bujno domišljijo. Tako kot njegov sloviti prednik se sooča s predsodki in norčevanjem.

11-letni Alfonz Kihot je potomec legendarnega Don Kihota z bujno domišljijo. Tako kot njegov sloviti prednik se sooča s predsodki in norčevanjem. Poslovnež Karasco skuša družine v La Manči prepričati, da mu prodajo hiše in se preselijo v luksuzno skupnost; Alfonz podvomi v njegove nakane in se - prepričan, da so silne nevihte, ki mesto ogrožajo, del načrta - s prijatelji poda v boj proti tej pošasti.
giants of la mancha_2024.opis_omdb: 11-year-old Alfonso, heir of Don Quixote, and his 3 imaginary and musical rabbits join Pancho and Victoria, to save their beloved town of La Mancha from a huge storm.

koko 3: ljubav ili smrt_2014.opis_neo:
Ljubezen ali smrt, zadnji del trilogije o Koku, je ekranizacija velikih romanov za otroke Ivana Kušana.

Vsebina Zdi se, da Koku nogomet še vedno pomeni vse na svetu, prihajajoče srečanje zloglasnih "Gusarjev" in Kokovega moštva "Zeleni vrh" pa je vrhunec sezone. Zlatko še vedno vsak prosti trenutek preživi za knjigo, Koku pa teži, da je nezrel. Da bi mu dokazal nasprotno, mu Koko pove za svojo nesrečno ljubezen do Ane, skrivnostne punce, čarobne, kot so junakinje Zlatkovih romanov. Kokova razposajena sestra Marica, njena prijateljica Ema in predrzna Melita imajo svoj bend in Koko bo s prijatelji prišel na njihov koncert tako, kot bodo one prišle na njihove nogometne tekme. Ali fante res zanima glasba, dekleta pa nogomet, bomo izvedeli v novem filmu o Koku - "Ljubezen ali smrt".

the transporter refueled_2015.opis_neo:
V krogih zločinskega podzemlja francoske obale slovi kot najboljši šofer, čigar usluge lahko kupite z denarjem.

Frank v krogih zločinskega podzemlja francoske obale slovi kot najboljši šofer, ki za primerno ceno jamči dostavo vsakega paketa. Brez imen, brez vprašanj in brez pogajanj. Ko sprejme sodelovanje v genialno načrtovanem ropu banke, se nevede zaplete v maščevanje lepotice, ki namerava uničiti ruskega trgovca z ljudmi.
the transporter refueled_2015.opis_omdb: Frank Martin, played by newcomer Ed Skrein, a former special-ops mercenary, is now living a less perilous life - or so he thinks - transporting classified packages for questionable people. When Frank's father (Ray Stevenson) pays him a visit in the south of France, their father-son bonding weekend takes a turn for the worse when Frank is engaged by a cunning femme-fatale, Anna (Loan Chabanol), and her three seductive sidekicks to orchestrate the bank heist of the century. Frank must use his covert expertise and knowledge of fast cars, fast driving and fast women to outrun a sinister Russian kingpin, and worse than that, he is thrust into a dangerous game of chess with a team of gorgeous women out for revenge. From the producers of LUCY and the TAKEN trilogy, THE TRANSPORTER REFUELED is a fresh personification of the iconic role of Frank Martin, that launches the high-octane franchise into the present-day and introduces it to the next generation of thrill-seekers.

second act_2018.opis_neo:
Film govori o Mayi, trgovki, ki povsem spremeni svoj način življenja in navade - da dokaže, da naziv in diploma nista odločilni za uspeh v življenju.

Štiridesetletna Maya že petnajst let živi v Queensu in dela kot trgovka v tamkajšnjem supermarketu. Ko dolgo pričakovano napredovanje pred njenim nosom dodelijo nekomu drugemu, s pomočjo lažnega življenjepisa dobi svojo sanjsko službo. Odločena je dokazati, da naziv in diploma nista odločilna za uspeh v življenju, ter da nikoli ni prepozno za uresničitev svojih sanj.
second act_2018.opis_omdb: A big-box store worker reinvents her life and her life-story and shows Madison Avenue what street smarts can do.

peppermint_2018.opis_neo:
Mlada mati, ki je izgubila moža in otroka v nasilnem napadu, se odloči poravnati račune s krivci in sistemom, ki jih ni kaznoval.

Riley North je žena in mama, ki v obračunu vplivnega mafijskega kartela tragično izgubi moža in hčerko. Na peto obletnico njune smrti se vrne iz osame, kamor se je umaknila, da bi se izurila za smrtonosno maščevanje sovražnikom. Odločena je poravnati račune ne le z morilci njene družine, temveč tudi s tistimi, ki so morilce izpustili na prostost.
peppermint_2018.opis_omdb: An unidentified woman is engaged in a brutal fight with a man in a car and finally dispatches him with a shot to the head. Five years earlier, the same woman, Riley North, is working as a bank teller in Los Angeles struggling to make ends meet. Her husband Chris owns a failing mechanic shop. They have a ten-year-old daughter, Carly. Chris' friend tries to talk him into robbing Diego Garcia, a powerful drug lord. Chris turns him down, but not before Garcia has already discovered his involvement and ordered his men to make an example of him. Riley and Chris take Carly out for pizza and to a carnival for her birthday since no one showed up to her party. At the carnival, Carly orders peppermint ice cream. As the family walks to the car, Diego's men gun down her husband and daughter in a drive-by shooting. She is wounded, but survives.

sleeping with other people_2015.opis_neo:
Dobrosrčen ženskah in ženska, ki serijsko vara, oblikujeta platonsko razmerje, ki jima pomaga na poti do novih izkušenj.

Jack in Lainey v najstniških letih izgubita nedolžnost skupaj, nato pa gresta vsak svojo pot. Čez nekaj let se znova srečata na terapiji za odvisnike od seksa. Čeprav privlačnost med njima še ni ugasnila, skleneta, da bosta ostala le platonska prijatelja, z drugimi pa si bosta prizadevala za bolj zdrave ljubezenske odnose.
sleeping with other people_2015.opis_omdb: Can two serial cheaters get a second chance at love? After a one-night stand in college, New Yorkers Lainey (Alison Brie) and Jake (Jason Sudeikis) meet by chance twelve years later and discover they each have the same problem: because of their monogamy-challenged ways, neither can maintain a relationship. Determined to stay friends despite their mutual attraction, they make a pact to keep it platonic, a deal that proves easier said than done.

den of thieves_2018.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja legendarno ekipo bančnih roparjev, ki načrtujejo velik zaključni rop zveznih rezerv v Los Angelesu.

Najboljša ekipa bančnih roparjev načrtuje svoj zadnji in skorajda neizvedljiv rop Ameriške centralne banke, ki bi bil izpeljan tik pred nosom elitnih policijskih enot. Zgodba povezuje življenja roparjev in članov policijskih enot Los Angelesa, ki se trudijo biti tatovom tik za petami.
den of thieves_2018.opis_omdb: A gritty L.A crime saga which follows the intersecting and often personally connected lives of an elite unit of the LA County Sheriff's Dept. and the state's most successful bank robbery crew as the outlaws plan an impossible heist on the Federal Reserve Bank of downtown Los Angeles.

norm of the north: king sized adventure_.naslov_orig: Norm of the North: King sized Adventure
norm of the north: king sized adventure_.opis_neo:
S pomočjo svojih prijateljev se mora Norm podati na potovanje po svetu, da bi kitajskim ljudem pomagal vrniti artefakt.

Džin in Dejan, bivša sodelavca, ki restavrirata in zbirata kitajske starine, se spreta, ko Džin izve, da je Dejan kradel in preprodajal dragocene muzejske starine. Norm obljubi, da bo dobil nazaj najdragocenejšo kitajsko starino,pri tem pa mu bodo pomagali njegovi prijatelji, s katerimi se odpravi na novo pustolovščino v Peking. Norm naredi vse potrebno, da bi držal svojo obljubo, četudi to pomeni skakanje po gorah in zoperstavljanje neusmiljenemu arheologu.
norm of the north: king sized adventure_.opis_omdb: An ancient Chinese artifact has been stolen by a villainous archaeologist named Dexter. With the help of his Lemming friends, Norm must keep his word and embark on a journey across the world to help recover the artifact for the people of China.

uzbuna na zelenom vrhu_2017.opis_neo:
Ko odrasli ne znajo razrešiti skrivnosti, na pomoč priskočijo mali detektivi!

Koko in njegovi prijatelji preživljajo počitnice v igri in druženju na obali jezera ob idiličnem Zelenem vrhu. Pravljično podeželsko idilo zmotijo nenavadni dogodki, ki razburijo tudi otroke in vaščane: tatovi v zavetju noči vlamljajo v eno hišo za drugo ter odnesejo vse, kar jim pride pod roke. Ko zastrupijo Kokovega in Maričinega psa, policija pa se ne zmeni za prijave odraslih, se otroci odločijo vzeti zadevo v svoje roke in razkriti tatove.
uzbuna na zelenom vrhu_2017.opis_omdb: Koko and his friends are spending summer vacation on the shores of a lake near the idyllic Green Hill, hanging out and playing. The magical countryside is disturbed by unusual events which alarm the children as well as the locals: under cover of night, burglars break into one house after another, stealing anything valuable they can find. When the police turns a blind eye to denunciations by adults, the children decide to take matters into their own hands and unmask the burglars.

mother's day_2016.opis_neo:
Tri generacije se zberejo skupaj v tednu pred materinskim dnem. Preplet zgodb ljudeh, ki jim je skupnega nekaj zelo pomembnega: matere.

Ni boljšega načina, da praznujete materinski dan! Gre za tretjo iz serije komedij na temo praznikov (pred tem Valentinovo in Silvestrovo v New Yorku), s katerimi režiser Garry Marshall prinaša smeh, solze in filmske megazvezdnike. Zgodba sledi trem materam, ki dan pred materinskim dnem preživljajo različne reči. Prikupno, dovršeno, duhovito in ganljivo – kot so vse matere po vsem svetu. Marshall je tudi tokrat nabral šopek največjih zvezd: Jennifer Aniston, Kate Hudson, Julio Roberts in Jasona Sudeikisa.
mother's day_2016.opis_omdb: Follows the lives of different mothers on Mother's Day. Sandy (Aniston) is happily divorced until she learns that her ex-husband eloped with a much younger woman. Now she must learn to deal with big changes in her life as her two boys now have a stepmom. Sisters Jesse (Hudson) and Gabi (Chalke) get an unexpected surprise from their mother, who is not happy to find out Gabi is a lesbian and Jesse is married to a man of color. Miranda (Roberts) has no kids and is focusing on her career. Kristin (Robertson) is enjoying life as a new mother but feels pressure from her boyfriend to get married. Bradley (Sudeikis) is trying hard to be the best parent for his two girls since their mom passed away last year, but he wants to pretend that Mother's Day doesn't exist.

memory_2022.opis_neo:
Plačani morilec sam postane tarča, ko zavrne nalogo, ki mu jo naloži nevarna zločinska združba.

Na sočasnem begu pred zločinci in agenti se Alex bori z izgubo spomina, kar precej vpliva na njegove odločitve in mu onemogoči do konca opraviti posel.
memory_2022.opis_omdb: Alex Lewis (Liam Neeson) is an expert assassin with a reputation for discreet precision. Caught in a moral quagmire, Alex refuses to complete a job that violates his code and must quickly hunt down and kill the people who hired him before they and FBI agent Vincent Serra (Guy Pearce) find him first. Alex is built for revenge but, with a memory that is beginning to falter, he is forced to question his every action, blurring the line between right and wrong.

cash_2008.opis_neo:
Potem ko mu ubijejo brata, se Cash poveže s slavnim tatom, da bi izvedel največji rop v zgodovini.

Cash je prevarant. Očarljiv, drzen, ima vse ... celo smisel za družinske vrednote. Ko mu neki bednež ubije brata, se odloči maščevati na svoj način. Brez orožja ali nasilje, vendar v slogu. Ampak ni pravi trenutek. Casha bodo predstavili u bodočemu tastu, njegovo ekipo pa bo preverila policija. Medtem ko mora pred nosom policije speljati popolno prevaro, mora igrati še popolnega zeta. Mu bo uspelo? Mu bodo prijatelji pomagali? Nekaj je gotovo: ko bo vsega konec, bo nekdo opeharjen.
cash_2008.opis_omdb: After his brother is killed, Cash allies with a famous thief to pull of the biggest robbery in history.

the wedding video_2012.opis_neo:
Poročna priča Raif želi bratu Timu ob vstopu v zakonski stan s privlačno Saskio podariti poročni video, zato sledi mlademu paru na vsakem koraku.

Ko dobi malce divji, ampak očarljivi Raif vabilo, da bi bil priča svojemu bratu, ki se namerava poročiti, se odloči, da je najprimernejše darilo mladoporočencema posnetek priprav na njuno poroko. Ko se vrne domov iz tujine, odkrije, da se bo njegov malce zadrt brat poročil z dekletom iz bogate družine, ki pa je celo bolj divja od njega. Zdi pa se tudi, da bo načrtovana poroka najrazkošnejši in najbolj čudaški dogodek, kar ga je Chesire kdaj videl. Še sreča, da je Raif vse posnel!
the wedding video_2012.opis_omdb: Clumsy Raif Moyle returns to Cheshire for the wedding of his elder brother Tim to Saskia, their old school friend, who was something of a wild child in the past. To the mild consternation of Saskia's socially-conscious mother Alex, Raif proposes that, in addition to his duties as best man, he will make a video of events leading up to and including the wedding. This means he spends a lot of time with Saskia and begins to realize that, beneath the surface, the happy event may turn out to be less than happy for all concerned. Fortunately, a wedding does eventually take place with surprises all round.

ozzy_2016.opis_neo:
Ko gre njegova družina na počitnice, se kuža namesto v pasjem hotelu znajde v pasjem zaporu. Z novimi prijatelji se odločijo pobegniti.

Ozzyju, dobrosrčnemu beaglu, se življenje obrne na glavo, ko se njegova družina odloči za potovanje v daljne kraje. Težava je, da so psi tam prepovedani, zato Ozzyja prepustijo pasjem varstvu. Ozzy kmalu ugotovi, da to ni pasji hotel, temveč zapor, zato mora združiti moči z novimi prijatelji, da bi skupaj pobegnili iz varstva in se vrnili domov.
ozzy_2016.opis_omdb: When his family goes on vacation, a young dog finds himself at a dog prison where he must escape with the help of his new friends.

the fabelmans_2022.opis_neo:
Spielberg v vznemirljivem, novem, delno avtobiografskem filmu prinaša intimen vpogled v svoje otroštvo.

Zgodba sledi nežnim letom mladeniča, ki odkrije šokantno družinsko skrivnost, zaradi katere se potopi v svet filmov, ti pa mu pomagajo spoznati resnico o sebi in drugih. Spielberg je dejal, da je sprva upal, da mu bo ta film enostavno posneti, saj material in like pozna svoje celo življenje. Vendar pa se je izkazalo, da je bila to zanj grozljiva izkušnja, saj je poskušal rekonstruirati ogromen del svojega življenja.
the fabelmans_2022.opis_omdb: Loosely based on Spielberg's childhood growing up in post-World War II era Arizona, from age seven to eighteen, a young man named Sammy Fabelman discovers a shattering family secret, and explores how the power of movies help us see the truth about each other and ourselves.

fatale_2020.opis_neo:
Po avanturi za eno noč se uspešen poročen moški znajde zapleten in prevaran.

Dvakratna dobitnica oskarja Hilary Swank kot zapeljivka z nevarnim načrtom se v napeti in provokativni psihološki srhljivki spravi nad popolno življenje sicer poročenega športnega agenta Darrena, potem ko mu čedna policistka, s katero je preživel burno noč, podtakne umor.
fatale_2020.opis_omdb: After a one-night stand, a successful married man finds himself entangled in a cunning police detective's latest investigation.

act of valor_2012.opis_neo:
Potem ko teroristi ugrabijo vrhunskega Cijinega operativca, ameriške oblasti na reševalno akcijo pošljejo izurjeno skupino marincev.

Ko tajna misija reševanja ugrabljene agentke CIE odkrije srhljivo zaroto, mora elitna, visoko usposobljena ekipa ameriških mornariških tjulnjev drveti z enega prizorišča na drugega, da ustavijo smrtonosen teroristični napad.
act of valor_2012.opis_omdb: An unprecedented blend of real-life heroism and original filmmaking, Act of Valor stars a group of active-duty Navy SEALs in a powerful story of contemporary global anti-terrorism. Inspired by true events, the film combines stunning combat sequences, up-to-the minute battlefield technology and heart-pumping emotion for the ultimate action adventure. Act of Valor takes audiences deep into the secretive world of the most elite, highly trained group of warriors in the modern world. When the rescue of a kidnapped CIA operative leads to the discovery of a deadly terrorist plot against the U.S., a team of SEALs is dispatched on a worldwide manhunt. As the valiant men of Bandito Platoon race to stop a coordinated attack that could kill and wound thousands of American civilians, they must balance their commitment to country, team and their families back home. Each time they accomplish their mission, a new piece of intelligence reveals another shocking twist to the deadly terror plot, which stretches from Chechnya to the Philippines and from Ukraine to Somalia. The widening operation sends the SEALs across the globe as they track the terrorist ring to the U.S.-Mexico border, where they engage in an epic firefight with an outcome that has potentially unimaginable consequences for the future of America.

une famille a louer_2015.opis_neo:
Paul-André je bogat, a precej introvertiran štiridesetletnik, ki je močno nezadovoljen s svojim življenjem, zato meni, da potrebuje družino.

Paul-Andre je bogat, a precej introvertiran štiridesetletnik, močno nezadovoljen s svojim življenjem, zato meni, da potrebuje družino. Tudi Violette je štiridesetletnica, polna energije, a brez prebite pare, zaradi česar ji grozi izgubila strehe nad glavo. Paul ji ponudi, da se v zameno za odplačilo dolgov, pridruži njeni družini.
une famille a louer_2015.opis_omdb: Depressed by his loneliness, Paul-André, a shy and wealthy man, offers to rent the family of a good-natured woman with two kids in exchange for settling her debts.

pets united_2019.opis_neo:
Skupina razvajenih hišnih ljubljenčkov obtiči v luksuznem zbirališču, ko stroji, ki upravljajo moderno metropolo, v kateri živijo, prevzamejo oblast.

Roger je potepuški pes, ki skrbi za zapuščene živali v mestu Robo City. Pomaga jim tako, da bogatim krade hrano in jo nosi manj bogatim in revnim živalim. Med eno izmed kraj spozna Belle, bogato in razvajeno mačko, s katero hitro zapade v klasičen pes-mačka prepir. Takrat pa se zgodi največja nevarnost - roboti zavzamejo Robo City, pri tem pa jim pomaga župan, ki želi izseliti in iz mesta pregnati vse ostale stanovalce. Roger in Belle med bežanjem pred roboti naletita na mnoge druge hišne ljubljenčke, katere so lastniki izgubili med begom, s tem pa spoznajo, da bodo morali pozabiti na svoje razlike in stati drug ob drugem, če bodo želeli preživeti.
pets united_2019.opis_omdb: When Roger (a Robin Hood-esque, stray dog) and Belle (an elegant yet spoilt pet cat) are thrown together amidst the chaos of a robot take-over of their home city, they must push all their preconceptions aside in order to survive, as they embark on a high-stakes, action-packed adventure.

mystère à saint-tropez_2021.opis_neo:
Saint-Tropez, poletje 1970. Milijarder začne med bivanjem v svoji razkošni vili dobivati grozilna pisma, preiskavo pa vodi inšpektor Boulin.

Avgust 1970. Milijarder Claude Tranchant s soprogo Eliane kot vsako leto biva v razkošni vili v Saint-Tropezu. Očitno jima nič ne more pokvariti dobre volje. 

Ker pa verjame, da je žrtev poskusa umora, pokliče Tranchant prijatelja Chiraca, da najame najboljšega inšpektorja v Parizu. Toda sredi poletja je na voljo samo inšpektor Boulin, ki mu manjka le nekaj tednov do upokojitve. Z zelo posebnimi prijemi bo sledil osumljencu.
mystère à saint-tropez_2021.opis_omdb: France, 1970. The Yé-Yé age is at the top and everything is joy and happiness. However, the lives of Baron Claude Tranchant and his wife Baroness Élaine Tranchant are shocked after a Baron's close friend has an accident while he drives Baroness' car, discovering that the brakes had been cut. Convinced that someone is trying to kill Éliane, Claude calls his close friend and politician Jacques Chirac, who calls Commissar Maurice Lefranc for sending the best police of Paris to find the killer. When Lefranc asks for his detectives, he discovers that the only one available is the absent-minded, incredibly clumsy and absolutely disastrous Jean Boullin. Reluctant, Lefranc gives Boullin the case, he travels to the Baron's summer house in the French Riviera where each year the Baron organizes a party for him and his wife's relatives. After to know that Élaine has received death threat letters, Boullin tells Claude his plan: asking Claude not reveal to the rest the truth about the car crash and death threat letters, he will work disguised as a waiter of the staff, hearing any conversation of the guests that reveal to the killer. But each attempt to discover the killer ends of the worst way time and time again, causing not only the anger of Claude and the others, but Lefranc. Will can Boullin solve the case and save Élaine before his non-existent abilities for investigation cause more damage than he can handle?

subservience_2024.opis_neo:
Robot se kmalu odloči odstraniti tisto, kar se zdi resnična grožnja njegovi sreči: lastnikovo družino.

Medtem ko je soproga v bolnišnici, kupi mož robota hišno pomočnico za pomoč pri gospodinjskih opravilih. Toda robot, ki se zdi živ, je vse bolj navezan na novega lastnika in meja je prekoračena. Zato se kmalu odloči odstraniti tisto, kar se zdi resnična grožnja robotovi sreči: lastnikovo družino.
subservience_2024.opis_omdb: A struggling father purchases a domestic SIM to help care for his family, unaware she will gain self-awareness.

all the money in the world_2017.naslov_orig: All the Money in the World
all the money in the world_2017.opis_neo:
Mati ugrabljenega Johna Paula Gettyja III. skuša prepričati njegovega dedka, milijarderja Jeana Paula Gettyja, da bi plačal odkupnino.

Resnična zgodba o naftem mogotcu J.P. Gettyju, najbogatejšem človeku na svetu, čigar 16-letni vnuk je bil ugrabljen, z zahtevo po odkupnini. Getty med pogajanjem skopuško stiska vsak cent, ugrabitelji pa postajajo vse bolj nasilni. V tekmi med življenjem in smrtjo je vprašanje, ali bo zmagala ljubezen do vnuka ali do denarja.
all the money in the world_2017.opis_omdb: Rome, 1973. Masked men kidnap a teenage boy named John Paul Getty III (Charlie Plummer). His grandfather, Jean Paul Getty (Christopher Plummer), is the richest human in the world, a billionaire oil magnate, but he's notoriously miserly. His favorite grandson's abduction is not reason enough for him to part with any of his fortune. All the Money in the World (2017) follows Gail, (Michelle Williams), Paul's devoted, strong-willed mother, who unlike Getty, has consistently chosen her children over his fortune. Her son's life in the balance with time running out, she attempts to sway Getty even as her son's mob captors become increasingly more determined, volatile and brutal. When Getty sends his enigmatic security man Fletcher Chace (Mark Wahlberg) to look after his interests, he and Gail become unlikely allies in this race against time that ultimately reveals the true and lasting value of love over money..

how to plan an orgy in a small town_2015.naslov_sl: Kako načrtovati orgijo v majhnem mestu
how to plan an orgy in a small town_2015.naslov_orig: How to Plan an Orgy in a Small Town
how to plan an orgy in a small town_2015.opis_neo:
Cassie obišče domače mesto in dobi priložnost maščevati se nekdanjim prijateljem, ki so jo nekoč zasmehovali.

Cassie Cranston je danes uspešna kolumnistka, ki piše o seksu, v mladosti pa je bila ožigosana za mestno vlačugo, zaradi česar je zapustila svoje rodno mesto. Sedaj se med nekdanje sovražnike vrača zaradi pogreba svoje mame. Ko jo ti prosijo, da jim pomaga organizirati orgijo, Cassie pograbi priložnost za maščevanje.
how to plan an orgy in a small town_2015.opis_omdb: How to Plan an Orgy in a Small Town is about a group of friends who live in the picturesque town of Beaver's Ridge-the epitome of wholesomeness and strong family values. Their orderly life is interrupted by the homecoming of Cassie Cranston, whom they slut-shamed into leaving town when she was a teenager. Now a big-city sex writer, Cassie returns home to face an unwelcome reception by her former friends, and finds an opportunity to seek revenge by writing a book about them when they ask her if she'll help them plan an orgy.

daddy cool_2017.opis_neo:
Maude zapusti svojega nezrelega partnerja, ki se odloči za presenetljiv korak, da bi jo dobil nazaj.

Adrien ima 40 let in je popolnoma nezrel moški. Njegova 35-letna soproga Maud ga želi vreči iz stanovanja in si ustvariti novo družino. V poskusu, da bi znova osvojil ljubezen svojega življenja, se Adrien odloči doma odpreti otroški vrtec. To pa je presenetljiv začetek neverjetnega dozorevanja.
daddy cool_2017.opis_omdb: Adrien, 40 years old and totally immature, is dumped by Maude, 35 years old, eager to finally found a family. In an attempt to regain the love of his life, Adrien decides to move into the future ex-married apartment: a nursery home - The beginning, an improbable educational experience .

rescue dawn_2006.opis_neo:
Ameriški bojni pilot se mora boriti za preživetje, ko ga na misiji med vietnamsko vojno sestrelijo nad Laosom.

Dieter že od ranega otroštva sanja o tem, da bi nekoč poletel v nebo. Danes je po poklicu vojaški pilot, toda že med prvo tajno nalogo njegovo letalo strmoglavi nad Laosom. Dieter se znajde v džungli in pade v roke militantni skupini, ki ga zapre v svoje taborišče. Čeprav ve, da se je znašel v najtežjem položaju svojega življenja, ne misli popustiti niti za ped.
rescue dawn_2006.opis_omdb: In 1965, while bombing Laos in a classified mission, the propeller plane of the German-American US Navy pilot Dieter Dengler is hit and crashes in the jungle. Dieter is arrested by the peasants, tortured by the Vietcong and sent to a prisoner camp, where he meets five other mentally deranged prisoners and guards. He becomes close to Duane and organizes an escape plan; however, the unstable Gene opposes to Dieter's plan. When they discover that there is no more food due to the constant American bombings in the area and their guards intend to kill them, Dieter sets his plan in motion. However, an unexpected betrayal splits the group and Dieter and Duane find that the jungle is their actual prison.

a arca de noé_2024.opis_neo:
Noetova barka je zabaven in izviren pristop k eni najbolj znanih zgodb vseh časov s čudovito kombinacijo humorja, šarma in simpatičnih likov.

Film spremlja dve miški, karizmatičnega pesnika s strašno tremo ter nadarjenega in očarljivega kitarista. Ko se začne povodenj, smeta na Noetovo barko vstopiti le en samec in ena samica vsake vrste. S pomočjo pretkanega škripanja in sreče, ki se jima je nasmehnila, Vini in Titu uspe neopaženo vstopiti na barko in preprečiti spopad med mesojedci in rastlinojedci. Živali izvajajo niz klasičnih pesmi, ki jih je navdihnil slavni pesnik Vinícius de Moraes. Ali lahko naša skrivna potnika z glasbo razbijeta napetost in vsem zaprtim bitjem pomagata preživeti 40 dni in 40 noči?
a arca de noé_2024.opis_omdb: "Noah's Ark - A Musical Adventure" is a fun and original take on one of the most iconic and well-known stories of all time, with an endearing combination of humor, charm, and lovable characters. The film follows two mice: Vini, a charismatic poet with terrible stage fright, and Tito, a talented and charming guitarist. When the rains come, only one male and one female of each species is allowed on Noah's Ark. With the help of an ingenious cockroach and fate's good luck, Vini and Tito sneak their way onto the Ark and together avert a showdown among the ships carnivores and plant eaters. All the while, the animals perform a series of classic songs inspired by world renowned poet, Vinicius de Moraes. Can these talented stowaways use music to break the tension and help these cooped up creatures survive the 40 days and 40 nights together?

need for speed_2014.naslov_sl: Need for Speed: Želja po hitrosti
need for speed_2014.opis_neo:
Po krivem obsojeni dirkač po vrnitvi iz zapora kuje maščevanje. Račune želi poravnati na dirki, a njegov nasprotnik razpiše nagrado na njegovo glavo.

Poulični dirkač Tobey sodeluje v dirki prek celotnih ZDA, da bi se maščeval nekdanjemu sodelavcu Dinu, ki mu je naprtil krivdo za smrt najboljšega prijatelja in ga strpal v zapor. Hitrostna preizkušnja se sprevrže v neusmiljen avtomobilski obračun na življenje in smrt.
need for speed_2014.opis_omdb: Framed by an ex-partner for a murder he did not commit, Tobey Marshall, a financially struggling custom-car builder and street-racer, spends two years in jail thinking about one moment. Fresh out of prison he reacquires the fastest car his workshop ever built and sold, and seeks to enter a secretive and extremely high-stakes race known as The DeLeon. His purpose; redemption, recognition from the world of racing and to solve his problems. Yet all this fades in comparison to his driving reason. Revenge. Above all, revenge. This is a story about love, redemption, revenge and motor oil all swirled together

fear of rain_2021.opis_neo:
Mlado dekle z diagnozo zgodnje shizofrenije je prepričano, da sosed na podstrešju skriva ugrabljeno deklico.

17-letna Rain Burroughs je tipična najstnica z netipično boleznijo: zgodnji pojav shizofrenije. Ko se Rain vrne iz bolnišnice domov, spozna nenavadno lepega in moreče čudnega Caleba. Zdi se predober, da bi bil resničen. Pa bi še kako lahko bil. Metem ko se bori z zagledanostjo, mora zatreti tudi samouničujoče in manipulativne sile, ki ji razžirajo um. Toda tisti, ki je mnogo grozljivejši od človeka, ki jo obseda v sanjah, je resnični sosed, ki je po Raininem prepričanju ugrabil deklico in jo ima zaprto na svojem podstrešju. Bo Rain uspelo ločiti zapleteno mrežo dejstev in fikcije?
fear of rain_2021.opis_omdb: A girl living with schizophrenia struggles with terrifying hallucinations as she begins to suspect her neighbor has kidnapped a child. The only person who believes her is Caleb - a boy she isn't even sure exists.

lionheart_1990.opis_neo:
Nekdanji francoski vojak začne sodelovati v podtalnih uličnih bojih, da bi zaslužil denar za družino svojega brata.

Ko Lyon, francoski legionar, izve za bratovo smrt, pobegne iz legije tujcev v New York. Brez denarja je prisiljen vstopiti v podzemlje, v svet umazanega boksa, kjer ni pravil.
lionheart_1990.opis_omdb: To reunite with this dying brother in Los Angeles, the French Foreign Legion officer, Lyon Gaultier, abandons his unit. Penniless, yet determined to make those who harmed his brother pay, Lyon takes part in an illegal street fight and catches the eye of Cynthia Caldera, an unscrupulous organizer of underground fights. However, as Lyon becomes Lionheart, the unpaid medical bills of his sister-in-law, Hélène, start to pile up. Now, the odds are against Lyon, who desperately wants to help his brother's family. Can Lionheart defeat brutal Attila, the undisputed champion of Cynthia's underground fighting matches?

plush_2013.opis_neo: Potem ko so zaradi prevelikega odmerka mamil umre njen brat in član njene skupine Pliš, gre mladi rok zvezdnici Hayley (Emily Browning) vse narobe. Drugi album skupine kritiki povem raztrgajo in Hayley upanje najde v prijateljstvu z Enzom (Xavier Samuel), nadomestnim kitaristom, ki jo navdihne, da doseže nove ustvarjalne višave. A kmalu se zapleteta globlje in Hayley, ki ima soproga (Cam Gigandet) in dva otroka, se od Enza odmakne. Počasi začne odkrivati njegovo mračno in težavno preteklost ter spozna, da je morda v svoj dom spustila norca, zaradi česar bi utegnila biti v nevarnosti življenja njenih bližnjih.
plush_2013.opis_omdb: Mourning the loss of her brother/collaborator, a young rocker struggles to write music while juggling a husband, two kids, and a mysterious new guitarist who will stop at nothing to become the most important person in her life.

shotgun wedding_2023.opis_neo:
Gostje sanjske otoške poroke postanejo talci piratov in ženin in nevesta jih morata rešiti tako pred napadalci kot tudi pred njimi samimi.

V akcijski romantični in adrenalinski pustolovski komediji Darcy (Jennifer Lopez) in Tom (Josh Duhamel) za svojo sanjsko poroko zbereta svoji simpatični, vendar zelo vsiljivi in samozavestni družini ne prelepem otoku, kjer pa oba začenjata dobivati pomisleke. 

In če to ni dovolj velika grožnja nepozabnemu praznovanju, so nenadoma ogrožena življenja vseh, saj prav vsi postanejo talci terorističnih piratov.
shotgun wedding_2023.opis_omdb: Darcy and Tom gather their families for the ultimate destination wedding, but when the entire wedding party is taken hostage the bride and groom must save their loved ones--if they don't kill each other first.

zero dark thirty_2012.opis_neo:
Kronika desetletnega lova na terorista Osamo bin Ladna od napada 11. septembra 2001 do njegove smrti maja 2011.

Triler o lovu na Osamo bin Ladna razkrije ozadje in postopke skoraj desetletne operacije iskanja vodje Al Kaide. Kljub večletnemu neuspešnemu iskanju, agentka CIE Maya ne želi odnehati, kljub temu, da jo nečloveške metode pridobivanja podatkov večkrat pripeljejo do moralnih dilem. Ko zločincu končno pride na sled, mora prepričati nadrejene, da ji odobrijo vojaško operacijo.
zero dark thirty_2012.opis_omdb: Maya is a CIA operative whose first experience is in the interrogation of prisoners following the Al Qaeda attacks against the U.S. on the 11th September 2001. She is a reluctant participant in extreme duress applied to the detainees, but believes that the truth may only be obtained through such tactics. For several years, she is single-minded in her pursuit of leads to uncover the whereabouts of Al Qaeda's leader, Osama Bin Laden. Finally, in 2011, it appears that her work will pay off, and a U.S. Navy SEAL team is sent to kill or capture Bin Laden. But only Maya is confident Bin Laden is where she says he is.

security_2017.opis_neo:
Nekdanjega specialca je zapustila sreča in zdaj obupano išče službo, zato sprejme službo varnostnika v starem trgovskem centru v nevarnem delu mesta.

Nekdanji pripadnik specialne enote obupano išče službo, zato se zaposli kot varnostnik v trgovskem centru, sredi najnevarnejšega dela mesta. Prvo noč na dolžnosti odpre vrata prestrašeni deklici, ki je pobegnila policiji. Deklica je namreč priča pri sodnem primeru, zato ji sledi psihotični ugrabitelj, ki bo naredil vse, da se znebi vseh prič.
security_2017.opis_omdb: An ex-special services veteran (Antonio Banderas), down on his luck and desperate for work, takes a job as a security guard at a run-down mall in a rough area of town. On his first night on the job, he opens the doors up to a distraught and desperate young girl who has escaped and fled from a hijacking of the U.S. Marshal motorcade that was transporting her to testify as a trial witness. Hot on her heels is psychopathic hijacker (Sir Ben Kingsley), alongside his resourceful henchmen, who will stop at nothing to extract and eliminate their witness.

we own the night_2007.opis_neo:
New York v 80-tih letih. Newyorški policisti bijejo bridko vojno s čedalje vplivnejšo rusko mafijo.

Življenje bratov Josepha in Bobbyja je ubralo zelo različne poti, saj je prvi sledil očetu Albertu - policijskemu načelniku, med tem ko je drugi prekinil vse stike z družino in postal upravitelj razvpitega nočnega kluba.
we own the night_2007.opis_omdb: Brooklyn, 1988. Crime is rife, especially drugs and drug violence. A Russian thug is building his heroin trade, while everyone laughs at the cops. Brothers have chosen different paths: Joe has followed his father Bert into New York's Finest; he's a rising star. Bobby, who uses his mother's maiden name, manages a club. Bobby too is on the rise: he has a new girlfriend and a green-light to develop a Manhattan club. Joe and Bert ask him to help with intelligence gathering; he declines. Then, Joe raids Bobby's club to arrest the Russian. From there, things spiral out of control: the Russian puts out a hit on Joe, personal losses mount, and Bobby's loyalties face the test.

defiance_2008.opis_neo:
Leta 1941 so v Vzhodni Evropi pobili na tisoče Židov. Da bi ušli smrti, so trije bratje pobegnili v gozd, ki ga poznajo še od otroštva.

Po neverjetni resnični zgodbi posneto Kljubovanje je veličastna zgodba o družini, časti, maščevanju in rešitvi v 2. svetovni vojni. Leta 1941 so v Vzhodni Evropi pobili na tisoče Židov. Da bi ušli smrti, so trije bratje pobegnili v gozd, ki ga poznajo še od otroštva.
defiance_2008.opis_omdb: On the run and hiding in the deep forests of the then German-occupied Poland and Belorussia (World War II), the four Bielski brothers find the impossible task of foraging for food and weapons for their survival. They live, not only with the fear of discovery, contending with neighboring Soviet partisans and knowing whom to trust but also take the responsibility of looking after a large mass of fleeing Polish Jews from the German war machine. Women, men, children, the elderly and the young alike are all hiding in makeshift homes in the dark, cold and unforgiving forests in the darkest times of German-occupied Eastern Europe.

kidnapping mr. heineken_2015.opis_neo:
Zgodba o ugrabitvi Alfreda Freddya Heinekena, za katerega je bila plačana najvišja odkupnina v zgodovini v vrednosti 16 milijonov današnjih evrov.

Resnična kriminalna zgodba o načrtovanju, izvedbi, vznemirljivih posledicah in dokončnem propadu ugrabiteljev pivskega tajkuna Alfreda "Freddyja" Heinekena leta 1983 za katerega je bila plačana najvišja odkupnina, ki so jo kdaj plačali za posameznika.
kidnapping mr. heineken_2015.opis_omdb: The inside story of the planning, execution, rousing aftermath, and ultimate downfall of the kidnappers of beer tycoon Alfred "Freddy" Heineken in 1983, which resulted in the largest ransom ever paid for an individual.

john wick_2014.opis_neo:
Ko upokojenega plačanega morilca kruti ruski mafijec prisili, da se vrne v posel, se neusmiljeno spusti v lov na svoje nasprotnike.

Ko upokojenega plačanega morilca kruti ruski mafijec prisili, da se vrne v posel, se neusmiljeno spusti v lov na svoje nasprotnike. Njegova nepopustljivost je legendarna v svetu podzemlja, mi pa ji bomo priče v filmu John Wick, zgodbi o maščevanju in odrešitvi.Po nenadni smrti svoje ljubljene žene dobi John Wick (Keanu Reeves) od nje zadnje darilo - psičko Daisy s sporočilom, v katerem ga prosi, naj ne pozabi ljubiti. Johnovo žalovanje pa se prekine, ko njegov boss mustang letnik 1969 pritegne pozornost sadističnega kriminalca Iosefa Tarasova (Alfie Allen). Ko mu John noče prodati avta, se Iosef s svojimi pajdaši spravi nanj, mu vlomi v hišo, ukrade avto, pretepe Johna in ubije Daisy. Ne zavedajo se, da so s tem prebudili enega najkrutejših plačancev vseh časov v svetu zločina. Johnovo iskanje ukradenega avtomobila ga pripelje v dele New Yorka, ki jih turisti ne bodo videli - v podzemni svet zločina, ki mu je John nekoč vladal. John kmalu izve, da išče sina krutega ruskega mafijskega šefa bossa Vigga Tarasova (Michael Nyqvist), svojega nekdanjega naročnika, ki razpiše nagrado na njegovo glavo, da bi rešil sina. John mora za svoje preživetje znova postati neusmiljeni ubijalski stroj in se spusti v boj z Viggom in njegovimi vojaki, katerega morda ne bo preživel nihče.
john wick_2014.opis_omdb: With the untimely death of his beloved wife still bitter in his mouth, John Wick, the expert former assassin, receives one final gift from her--a precious keepsake to help John find a new meaning in life now that she is gone. But when the arrogant Russian mob prince, Iosef Tarasov, and his men pay Wick a rather unwelcome visit to rob him of his prized 1969 Mustang and his wife's present, the legendary hitman will be forced to unearth his meticulously concealed identity. Blind with revenge, John will immediately unleash a carefully orchestrated maelstrom of destruction against the sophisticated kingpin, Viggo Tarasov, and his family, who are fully aware of his lethal capacity. Now, only blood can quench the boogeyman's thirst for retribution.

john wick: chapter 2_2017.opis_neo:
Keanu Reeves se vrača v nadaljevanju filma in še vedno hudo zgleda v obleki, ima novega psa, zanesljivo zadene tarčo in se še vedno skuša upokojiti.

Najokrutnejši plačani morilec John Wick se znova vrača iz upokojitve, saj je s krvno prisego zavezan, da se sodelavcu oddolži za usluge iz preteklosti. Da bi mu pomagal pri prevzemu nadzora nad sumljivo mednarodno združbo, ki vodi delovanje najsmrtonosnejših plačanih morilcev na svetu, se odpravi v Rim, na morilski pohod.
john wick: chapter 2_2017.opis_omdb: Bound by an inescapable blood debt to the Italian crime lord, Santino D'Antonio, and with his precious 1969 Mustang still stolen, John Wick--the taciturn and pitiless assassin who thirsts for seclusion--is forced to visit Italy to honour his promise. But, soon, the Bogeyman will find himself dragged into an impossible task in the heart of Rome's secret criminal society, as every killer in the business dreams of cornering the legendary Wick who now has an enormous price on his head. Drenched in blood and mercilessly hunted down, John Wick can surely forget a peaceful retirement as no one can make it out in one piece.

maneater_2022.opis_neo:
Idilične počitnice na otoku se spremenijo v grozljivo in krvavo nočno moro.

Ni boljšega kraja za utapljanje žalosti od idiličnega rajskega tropskega otoka! V to so Jesse prepričali njeni prijatelji, po tem ko je razdrla zaroko s svojim partnerjem, ostali pa so ji le že v naprej plačani medeni tedni. Vendar pa njena žalost ne bo edina, ki se bo utopila na tem rajskem otoku, saj tik pod gladino morja, ki ga obdaja, preži morski pes ljudožerec in potrpežjivo čaka na svoj naslednji plen.
maneater_2022.opis_omdb: After an accident during their vacations on a paradisiac island, a group of friends is stalked by a large shark.

driven_2018.opis_neo:
Napet triler, v katerem trčijo politika, veliki posli in mamila.

Navdihnjeno z resničnimi dogodki je film Prekleta vožnja postavljen v Kalifornijo v 80-ih in spremlja vrtoglavi vzpon Johna DeLoreana in njegovega kultnega podjetja DeLorean Motor Company skozi njegovo prijateljstvo s šarmantnim nekdanjim zapornikom, ki je postal ovaduh FBI-ja, Jimom Hoffmanom. Leto 1974 in Jim Hoffman (Jason Sudeikis) je povprečni družinski človek - oče dveh otrok, odličen pilot, nežen soprog ženi Ellen (Judy Greer). Občasno tihotapi mamila, ko pa ga dobijo, kako na družinskem dopustu tihotapi kokain v ZDA, vidi ambiciozni agent FBI-ja Benedict J. Tisa (Corey Stoll) to kot priložnost, da prinese zmago FBI-ju, če izkoristi Jima za aretacijo njegovega neulovljivega dobavitelja. Jim ima priložnost za novi začetek v bogati četrti San Diega z državno plačo, toda nova služba ovaduha ne gre v najboljši smeri, ko se spoprijatelji s svojim sosedom, inženirjem in oblikovalcem avtomobilov Johnom DeLoreanom (Lee Pace).
driven_2018.opis_omdb: After he's busted for smuggling coke on his plane, Jim Hoffman has a chance to start over in a lush, affluent suburb of San Diego. Jim and his wife, Ellen are surprised to find maverick auto mogul John DeLorean lives in a glamorous house down the street. Soon an unexpected friendship forms between the two men, just as John's new venture--the DeLorean Motor Company--is taking off. But with the FBI pushing Jim to inform on his flashy former dealer, Morgan Hetrick and John's financing falling through the cracks, things are far from idyllic...and about to take a dark turn. Based on the real events that would become the celebrity scandal of its generation.

jue di tao wang_2016.opis_neo:
Hongkonški kriminalist združi moči z ameriškim kvartopircem v boju proti zloglasnemu kitajskemu mafijskemu šefu.

Detektiv iz Hongkonga Bennie Chan že dolgo spremlja razvpitega kitajskega zločinca Victorja Wonga. Ko se Bennijeva nečakinja zaplete v težave z Wongovimi zločinci, bo moral Bennie najti edinega človeka, ki mu lahko pomaga: ameriškega hazarderja Connorja Wattsa.
jue di tao wang_2016.opis_omdb: A retired bodyguard who has settled into a corner of the world where China, Russia and North Korea meet as he suffers from early dementia finds a new friend in a young girl. When her life is threatened by her father's connection with a local crime lord, .the bodyguard must call upon his long forgotten skills to save her.

john wick: chapter 3: parabellum_2019.opis_neo:
John Wick se zameri mednarodnemu združenju morilcev in postane tarča vseh poklicnih morilcev na svetu.

Poklicni morilec John Wick (Keanu Reeves) je, zaradi umora člana mednarodnega združenja atentatorjev, na begu. Nagrada za njigovo življenje je 14 milijonov dolarjev in tako postane tarča umora vseh moških in žensk na svetu.
john wick: chapter 3: parabellum_2019.opis_omdb: In this third installment of the adrenaline-fueled action franchise, skilled assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) returns with a $14 million price tag on his head and an army of bounty-hunting killers on his trail. After killing a member of the shadowy international assassin's guild, the High Table, John Wick is excommunicado, but the world's most ruthless hit men and women await his every turn.

charming - dubbed_2018.opis_neo:
Komedija o zaupanja polnem skoku v neznano, resnični ljubezni in dognanju, da srečni konci pravzaprav niso tako nemogoči, kot se včasih zdi.

Princ Šarmer je bil kot otrok potresen s čarobnim prahom za neustavljivi šarm, zaradi katerega se prav vsako dekle zaljubi vanj. Ko se princ zaroči s tremi dekleti hkrati, se odloči s pomočjo tujca vendarle poiskati pravo ljubezen. Toda tujec nosi s seboj veliko skrivnost.
charming - dubbed_2018.opis_omdb: Charming is an irreverent animated comedy about a young Prince with an irresistible appeal and one kick-ass maiden who wants him only for his money. Cursed as a child, Prince Philippe Charming compulsively proposes to every woman he encounters, leaving a trail of lovesick ladies and scorned lovers to wreak vengeful havoc on the Kingdom. Ultimately, Prince Philippe's exasperated father, King Charming, gives the young Prince an ultimatum... Find a true, true-love before his 21st Birthday or lose all claim to the throne.

the young and prodigious t.s. spivet_201.naslov_orig: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
the young and prodigious t.s. spivet_201.opis_neo:
Duhovita in ganljiva družinska drama o desetletnem geniju in njegovi čudaški družini.

Pustolovska družinska drama režiserja Jean-Pierra Jeuneta (Amélie) s Heleno Bonham Carter v stranski vlogi temelji na priljubljenem literarnem prvencu Izbrana dela T. S. Spiveta ameriškega pisatelja Reifa Larsena o bistrem desetletniku T. S. Spivetu, strastnemu izumitelju in kartografu, ki se oborožen s teleskopom in kompasi iz rodne kmetije v Montani odpravi v Washington, kjer mu bodo na inštitutu Smithsonian podelili pomembno nagrado.
the young and prodigious t.s. spivet_201.opis_omdb: T.S. Spivet lives on a ranch in Montana with his mother who is obsessed with the morphology of beetles, his father (a cowboy born a hundred years too late) and his 14 year-old sister who dreams of becoming Miss America. T.S. is a 10 year-old prodigy with a passion for cartography and scientific inventions. One day, he receives an unexpected call from the Smithsonian museum telling him that he is the winner of the very prestigious Baird prize for his discovery of the perpetual motion machine and that he is invited to a reception in his honor where he is expected to give a speech. Without telling anyone, he sets out on a freight train across the U.S.A. to reach Washington DC. There is also Layton, twin brother of T.S., who died in an accident involving a firearm in the family's barn, which no one ever speaks of. T.S. was with him, measuring the scale of the gunshots for an experiment, and he doesn't understand what happened.

the man who killed don quixote_2018.naslov_sl: Mož, ki je ubil Don Kihota
the man who killed don quixote_2018.naslov_orig: The Man Who Killed Don Quixote
the man who killed don quixote_2018.opis_neo:
Današnja Španija. Režiser Toby v Manči snema oglas in se znajde ujet v divjih iluzijah starega španskega čevljarja, ki verjame, da je don Kihot.

Cinični, a genialni režiser Toby v španski vasici posname film o Don Kihotu. V glavni vlogi se znajde lokalni čevljar, ki je med snemanjem prepričan, da je sam tudi v resnici Don Kihot. Leta kasneje se je Toby primoran soočiti s tragičnimi posledicami, ki jih je snemanje njegovega filma prineslo sodelujočim prebivalcem vasi.
the man who killed don quixote_2018.opis_omdb: Toby, a cynical but supposedly genius film director finds himself trapped in the outrageous delusions of an old Spanish shoe-maker who believes himself to be Don Quixote. In the course of their comic and increasingly surreal adventures, Toby is forced to confront the tragic repercussions of a film he made in his idealistic youth - a film that changed the hopes and dreams of a small Spanish village forever. Can Toby make amends and regain his humanity? Can Don Quixote survive his madness and imminent death? Or will love conquer all?

endless_2020.opis_neo:
Mladenič, ki je obtičal v vicah po smrti v prometni nesreči, preseže smrt in najde način, da se ponovno poveže s svojo ljubeznijo.

Ko noro zaljubljena maturanta Riley (Alexandra Shipp) in Chrisa (Nicholas Hamilton) loči tragična prometna nesreča, Riley krivi sebe za smrt svojega fanta, medtem ko Chrisovo življenje visi na nitki. Čudežno pa najdeta možnost, da se znova povežeta. V ljubezenski zgodi, ki preseže življenje in smrt, sta se Riley in Chris prisiljena naučiti najtežje lekcije od vseh: izpustiti ljubljeno osebo.
endless_2020.opis_omdb: When madly in love high school graduates Riley (Alexandra Shipp) and Chris (Nicholas Hamilton) are separated by a tragic car accident, Riley blames herself for her boyfriend's death while Chris is stranded in limbo. Miraculously, the two find a way to connect. In a love story that transcends life and death, both Riley and Chris are forced to learn the hardest lesson of all: letting go.

great white_2021.opis_neo:
V nenavadni nesreči se uniči letalo, pet ljudi pa se znajde na splavu.

Zabaven let do oddaljenega samotnega otoka se sprevrže v nočno moro za pet potnikov, ko se jim hidroavion pokvari v sumljivi nesreči in se znajdejo ujeti na splavu sredi oceana, 100 milj od obale, medtem, ko pod njimi prežijo veliki beli morski psi.
great white_2021.opis_omdb: Struggling to keep their small seaplane business afloat, Charlie, a retired marine biologist and shark-bite survivor, his girlfriend Kaz, and friend Benny, are delighted when they are commissioned by high-flying holidaymakers, Joji and his wife, Michelle. However, as soon as the seaplane lands on a sandy beach of remote Hell's Reef, disaster strikes, and the team find themselves trapped in a flimsy inflatable lifeboat with limited supplies. Now, the unfortunate crew drifts aimlessly in the dark, deep waters of the vast ocean, and they are not alone: a massive, stealthy great white shark has already picked up their scent, and it will stop at nothing to feed. Can they escape from the powerful jaws of the ultimate oceanic apex predator?

ironclad_2011.opis_neo:
Angleški baroni so se uprli osovraženemu kralju Ivanu in ga prisilili, da je podpisal Veliko listino svoboščin.

Zgodba se odvija leta 1215, ko so se angleški baroni uprli osovraženemu kralju Ivanu in ga prisilili, da je podpisal Veliko listino svoboščin, ki določa, da so vsi državljani svobodni, kralju pa so odvzete določene pravice. Nekaj mesecev kasneje kralj odstopi od obljube in namerava nadaljevati svojo tiransko vladavino, a na poti mu stojijo vitezi Templarji.
ironclad_2011.opis_omdb: It is the year 1215 and the rebel barons of England have forced their despised King John to put his royal seal to the Magna Carta, a noble, seminal document that upheld the rights of free men. Yet within months of pledging himself to the great charter, the King reneged on his word and assembled a mercenary army on the south coast of England with the intention of bringing the barons and the country back under his tyrannical rule. Barring his way stood the mighty Rochester castle, a place that would become the symbol of the rebels' momentous struggle for justice and freedom.

the lair_2022.opis_neo:
V Afganistanu sestreljena pilotka RAF-a odkrije globoko v odročnem gorovju skrito zapuščeno sovjetsko raziskovalno bazo.

V Afganistanu sestreljena pilotka RAF-a odkrije globoko v odročnem gorovju skrito zapuščeno sovjetsko raziskovalno bazo. Lovijo jo uporniki, zato nevede sprosti Uničevalce - na bazi DNK-ja narejen poskus, ki je šel po zlu. Rešijo jo ameriške čete in britanski specialci, ki ne verjamejo njeni zgodbi o pošastih, ki ponoči napadajo, podnevi pa se umaknejo.
the lair_2022.opis_omdb: When Royal Air Force pilot Lt. Kate Sinclair is shot down over Afghanistan, she finds refuge in an abandoned underground bunker where deadly man-made biological weapons - half human, half alien - are awakened.

13 sins_2014.opis_neo:
Po nenavadnem telefonskem klicu se za Eliotta začne nevarna in tvegana igra. Če mu uspe izpolniti vseh 13 nalog, ga čaka lepa nagrada.

Neworleanški trgovec Elliot Brindle se utaplja v dolgovih in čaka na napredovanje, da bi se lahko poročil s svojim nosečim dekletom Shelby; namesto tega dobi odpoved in zapade v obup, saj mora plačevati tudi zdravstveno zavarovanje za svojega bolnega brata Michaela. Poleg tega njegov oče - ki je rasist - naznani, da pride živet k njemu. Potem pa Elliot prejme telefonski klic z vabilom, naj sodeluje v igri, v kateri lahko osvoji kup denarja in postane milijonar, če izvrši trinajst nalog. Vendar pa je vsaka naslednja naloga bolj agresivna, nasilnejša in nevarnejša. Ko se odloči, da igro prekine, dojame, da zanj povratka ni …
13 sins_2014.opis_omdb: In New Orleans, the salesman Elliot Brindle is full of debts and expecting a promotion to get married with his girlfriend Shelby that is pregnant. However his unethical chief fires him and Elliot is desperate since he supports his intellectually disabled brother Michael Brindle with his health insurance. He reaches the rock bottom when his estranged racist father tells that he is going to live with him. Out of the blue, Elliot receives a phone call and a stranger invites him to participate in a game where he may win a large amount and become a millionaire provided he accomplishes thirteen tasks. Initially the skeptical Elliot needs to kill a fly and then eat it. After each task, Elliot finds the promised deposit in his bank account. He decides to accept the invitation, and the tasks become aggressive, gruesome, brutal and offensive. When Elliot decides to quit the game, he realizes that there is no return for him.

werewolves within_2021.opis_neo:
Med snežnim metežem ostanejo meščani ujeti v lokalni gostilni v strahu pred napadom volkodlaka.

Mestece Beaverfield je razdeljeno zaradi nestrinjanja okoli vodovoda. Med snežnim metežem pa ostanejo meščani ujeti v lokalni gostilni. Nova someščana Finn in Cecily skušata ohraniti mir in odkriti resnico, kdo ali kaj je skrivnostni stvor, ki trpinči majhno skupnost.
werewolves within_2021.opis_omdb: A proposed gas pipeline has created divisions within the small town of Beaverfield. When a snowstorm traps its residents together inside the local inn, newly-arrived forest ranger Finn (Sam Richardson) and postal worker Cecily (Milana Vayntrub) must try to keep the peace and uncover the truth behind a mysterious creature that has begun terrorizing the community.

the monster_2016.opis_neo:
Ostanite na svetlem.

Kathy je alkoholičarka in neresna mama mladi, a zreli najstnici Lizzy. Ko se jima ponoči sredi temnega gozda zgodi prometna nesreča, ostaneta ujeti na samotni cesti. Ob čakanju na pomoč zgroženi ugotovita, da v gozdu nista sami, saj tam živi bitje, ki ga človeško oko še ni videlo. Ni človek in ni žival. Verjamete v pošasti?
the monster_2016.opis_omdb: Kathy is the alcoholic and smoking addicted mother of the young, but mature teenager Lizzy. They live together since Kathy's husband Roy left her, and she neglects her daughter. Kathy is supposed to drive Lizzy to her father's home in the morning, but she sleeps until late afternoon and they have to travel during a rainy night. While driving through a lonely road through the woods, Kathy hits a wolf that breaks her car, leaving them stranded on the empty road. They call 911 and while waiting for the tow truck and an ambulance, the wolf disappears from the road. When the tow truck arrives, the mechanic Jesse tells that he needs to fix the axle and an oil leakage to tow her car. While repairing the vehicle, a monster attacks him but neither Kathy nor Lizzy note. When they seek Jesse out, they realize that they are not alone in the spot. Further, Kathy learns that monsters do exist. Will they be rescued on time?

leo da vinci: missione monna lisa - dubb.naslov_sl: Leo Da Vinci: Misija Mona Lisa - sinhronizirano
leo da vinci: missione monna lisa - dubb.naslov_orig: Leo Da Vinci: Missione Monna Lisa - dubbed
leo da vinci: missione monna lisa - dubb.opis_neo:
Po naključnem srečanju s skrivnostnim pripovedovalcem zgodb mlad Leonardo da Vinci s prijateljema poskuša najti skriti zaklad.

V mestu Vinci življenje teče mirno. Leonardo se ukvarja z novim, neverjetnim izumom, prijatelj Lorenzo mu pomaga, Lisa pa ju opazuje in se jima posmehuje. Ko od pripovedovalca zgodb izvedo za skriti zaklad, se trojica poda na lov za izgubljenim bogastvom. In velika avantura se prične!
leo da vinci: missione monna lisa - dubb.opis_omdb: In the late Middle Age's Italy, Leonardo "Leo" Da Vinci is a young boy lover to invent advanced machines who lives happy with his best friend Lorenzo and beauty Lisa, being secretly fall in love with her. After to test the first dive suit of his creation in a lake, tragedy appears when coming back to home Lisa realizes that her house and lands have been burned by a fire. Owner of the lands threats Lisa's father to marry her with his son if he doesn't give all money he debts as retribution by the fire, causing Lisa's sorrow. Trying to save her, Leo Da Vinci decides travel to Florencia to gain money and pay the debt with help of Lorenzo. Unable to keep the secret, Lorenzo reveals Lisa Leo's plans, and Lisa joins her friends to make the travel to the big city, where they meet a storyteller that explains in a plaza the story of a pirate ship sunken with a great treasure inside it. Believing it as a true event, Leo buys the treasure map to the storyteller, but it's stolen by a rogue and orphan little child called Agnes. Making a deal with her, Leo recovers the map and Agnes joins the group at the same time that Niccoló, a little child lover of science and astronomy who befriends with Lisa. All five arrive to Montecristo Island looking for the treasure, but not knowing that a pirates follow each step they make, waiting the right time to steal the treasure and eliminate Leo and his friends.

zodi et téhu, frères du désert_2023.naslov_orig: Zodi et Téhu, frères du désert
zodi et téhu, frères du désert_2023.opis_neo:
Zodi, dvanajstletni nomad, odkrije v puščavi zapuščenega kameljega mladiča. Vzame ga pod svoje okrilje, ga krmi in zanj postane najboljši prijatelj.

Zodi od veterinarja izve, da je njegova kamela izjemno hiter tekač, ki bi lahko njegovemu plemenu prinesel velik zaslužek. To pa spodbudi Tarekov pohlep, ki je na območju znan tihotapec. Da bi rešil svojega najboljšega prijatelja in sebe, se Zodi odloči pobegniti in prečkati puščavo, da bi prišel v Abu Dabi na največo kameljo dirko na svetu ter tako rešil prijatelja in svoje pleme.
zodi et téhu, frères du désert_2023.opis_omdb: It tells the story of a Berber boy who bonds with a camel as they cross the Sahara desert.

looper_2012.opis_neo:
Joseph pripada posebni skupini morilcev, ki delajo za zločinsko organizacijo v daljni prihodnosti, dokler nekega dne sam ne postane žrtev.

25-letni Joseph pripada skupini posebnih morilcev, ki svoje žrtve prejmejo iz prihodnosti in se jih diskretno znebijo. Toda nekega dne mafijski šefi iz prihodnosti pošljejo njega samega, trenutek obotavljanja pa je dovolj, da Joseph iz prihodnosti uide.
looper_2012.opis_omdb: Joe is classified as a "looper", a job in which his employers use time travel to send men from the future to be killed into the past, where Joe can properly dispose of their bodies. However, to tie up loose ends and erase the evidence of his ever being a looper, Joe knows that one day his future self will be sent back for him to kill. When this day comes, Joe's future self is prepared and escapes, and the two men struggle separately in the past trying to evade capture and attempting to fulfill their own personal agendas.

the devil wears prada_2006.opis_neo:
Mlada diplomantka dobi službo pomočnice Mirande Priestly, zahtevne urednice prestižne modne revije.

Andy Sachs je mlada novinarka s podeželja, ki bi rada dobila službo pri eni izmed znanih revij. V ta namen se preseli v New York in zaprosi za delo pri reviji Runway, najprestižnejši modni reviji v ZDA. 

Čeprav se Andy ne spozna na modo, je to edina revija, ki ponuja novo delovno mesto, in sicer mesto druge pomočnice urednice Mirande Priestly. 

Andy službo z veseljem sprejme, a obenem kaj hitro spozna, da je Miranda diva brez primere ter da se za njenim bleščečim videzom in zahtevno naravo skriva osamljena in zagrenjena ženska.
the devil wears prada_2006.opis_omdb: After graduating from college, Andy lands the dream job that "a million girls would kill for": assistant to Miranda - the chief editor of Runway, the top-selling fashion magazine in the industry. It is a job set to fast track her career in journalism if she can survive a year working for Miranda. From here, Andy, with no sense of fashion at all, begins a fish-out-of-water drama as she is thrown into a lifestyle full of the fast-paced, three-inch-minimum heel height, diet Coke and coffee substance abuse. Andy works really hard to deal with Miranda's endless unimaginable demands. She even becomes trendy and classy. However, she gradually finds she is working 24/7, and soon her life with boyfriend, Nate, and best friend, Lily, is slipping away from her. Then, she realizes that she is losing what really matters. She does not want to lose herself no matter how many pairs of Monolos and Jimmy Choos she can score along the way.

red sparrow_2018.opis_neo:
Jennifer Lawrence v napeti vohunski drami kot visoko izurjena ruska vohunka, ki svojo lepoto izkorišča za iskanje šibkih točk sovražnika.

Nekdanja ruska baletka Dominika Egorova se je zaradi nesrečnega spleta okoliščin prisiljena prijaviti v "šolo za Vrabce", tajno obveščevalno službo, v kateri jo izurijo, da svoje telo in um uporablja kot orožje. 

Po rekrutaciji Dominika postane najnevarnejši Vrabec kar jih je kdaj bilo. Toda ko mora zapeljati mladega agenta CIE Nathaniela Nasha, se znajde v nemogočem in nevarnem položaju ter ogrozi oba naroda. Smrtonosna agentka se ujame v svet, iz katerega si obupano želi pobegniti.
red sparrow_2018.opis_omdb: A young Russian intelligence officer is assigned to seduce a first-tour CIA agent who handles the CIA's most sensitive penetration of Russian intelligence. The two young officers collide in a charged atmosphere of trade-craft, deception, and inevitably forbidden passion that threatens not just their lives but the lives of others as well.

the boy in the striped pajamas_2008.naslov_orig: The Boy in the Striped Pajamas
the boy in the striped pajamas_2008.opis_neo:
8-letni Bruno je nesrečen, ko se mora iz Berlina preseliti na odročno lokacijo, kamor so premestili njegovega očeta, oficirja v Hitlerjevi Nemčiji.

Zdolgočaseni deček nekega dne odkrije nenavadno taborišče, kjer se prebivalci naokoli sprehajajo v črtastih pižamah. Ob ograji spozna fanta istih let, s katerim se hitro spoprijatelji. 

Toda sčasoma je Bruno priča vedno bolj zaskrbljujočim prizorom, ki se ne skladajo s tem, kar so mu o judih in taborišču povedali starši. Tako začne sumiti, da se na drugi strani ograje dogaja nekaj zloveščega, hkrati pa tudi prvič podvomi v dobroto lastnega očeta.
the boy in the striped pajamas_2008.opis_omdb: Bruno an eight-year-old boy from Berlin, Germany is moved with his mother, Elder sister, SS Commander father to a countryside in Europe where his father powers over a concentration camp for Jews. Bruno went "exploring" one day and befriended a child his age named Shmuel. Shmuel was a Jew. The boy became good friends until Bruno was scheduled to move to a new location.

serenity_2019.opis_neo:
Baker Dill je kapitan barke, ki prevaža turiste. Njegovo idilično življenje vznemiri nekdanja žena, ki ga prosi, naj ubije njenega nasilnega moža.

Vedrina je skrivnostna zgodba z nepričakovanimi zapleti. Baker Dill je kapitan ribiške ladje na idiličnem tropskem otoku. Nekega dne se pred njim z nevarno ponudbo pojavi bivša žena, ki ga prosi, naj v zameno za visoko vsoto denarja ubije njenega sedanjega moža, ki je do nje nasilen. Kmalu začne Baker odkrivati, da nič ni tako, kot je videti na prvi pogled …
serenity_2019.opis_omdb: Baker Dill (Matthew McConaughey) is a fishing boat captain leading tours off a tranquil, tropical enclave called Plymouth Island. His quiet life is shattered, however, when his ex-wife Karen (Anne Hathaway) tracks him down with a desperate plea for help. She begs Dill to save her - and their young son - from her new, violent husband (Jason Clarke) by taking him out to sea on a fishing excursion, only to throw him to the sharks and leave him for dead. Karen's appearance thrusts Dill back into a life he'd tried to forget, and as he struggles between right and wrong, his world is plunged into a new reality that may not be all that it seems.

the punisher_2004.opis_neo:
Frank Castle si po uspešni karieri agenta FBI želi le mirnega življenja z ženo in sinom.

Vendar na zadnji misiji ne gre vse tako, kot je treba, saj umre sin pokvarjenega poslovneža Howarda Sainta. Ta skupaj s svojimi podaniki vdre na družinsko srečanje Castlovih in pobije vse, ki so Franku kaj pomenili. 

Misleč, da so ubili tudi njega, je njihovo maščevanje zaključeno. Vendar Frank preživi in se odloči, da bo kaznoval vse, ki so bili vpleteni v maščevanje. Skuje načrt, za katerega je trdno prepričan, da ga bo izpeljal do konca.
the punisher_2004.opis_omdb: Special agent Frank Castle had it all: A loving family, a great life, and an adventurous job. But when his life is taken away from him by a ruthless criminal and his associates, Frank has become reborn. Now serving as judge, jury, and executioner, he's a new kind of vigilante out to wage a one man war against those who have done him wrong.

dad's army_2016.opis_neo:
Spremljamo skupino starejših britanskih vojakov, ki se v času druge svetovne vojne pripravljajo na invazijo nemcev.

Moderna priredba komične britanske serije iz leta 1968, o prostovoljnih domobrancih, ki so deželi služili kot sekundarna obramba pred morebitno nemško invazijo. Enoto v mestu Walmington-on-Sea ob zaključku II. svetovne vojne preseneti obisk novinarke, pa tudi nemškega vohuna.
dad's army_2016.opis_omdb: The Walmington-on-Sea Home Guard platoon deal with a visiting female journalist and a German spy as World War II draws to its conclusion.

jurassic park iii_2001.opis_neo:
Eden vodilnih svetovnih paleontologov, dr. Alan Grant, ki se je pred osmimi leti prvič srečal z dinozavri, ima velike finančne težave.

Leta po tem, ko je preživel napad dinozavrov, Dr. Grant (Sam Neill) živi mirno življenje. A nato je ukanjen, da pelje mlad par na oddaljen otok, kjer odkrije, da njegova bitka z dinozavri še ni končana. Nastopata tudi Tea Leoni in William H. Macy.
jurassic park iii_2001.opis_omdb: Dr. Alan Grant is now a happy man with the previous incidents of Jurassic Park now behind him. Grant is that happy that he announce in public, that nothing on Earth can persuade him back onto the islands. Maybe nothing, except Paul Kirby. Kirby and his wife, Amanda want a plane to fly them over Isla Sorna, with Dr. Grant as their guide. But not everything Kirby says is true. When the plane lands, Dr. Grant realizes that there is another reason why they are there, that he doesn't know of. Now, Dr. Grant is stuck on an island he has never been on before, with what was a plane journey now turned into a search party.

conan the barbarian_1982.opis_neo:
Arnold Schwarzenegger upodobi legendarnega bojevnika in junaka, barbara Conana, ki se odpravi na nevarno pot, da bi maščeval umor svojih staršev.

Arnold Schwarzenegger upodobi legendarnega bojevnika in junaka, barbara Conana, ki se odpravi na nevarno pot, da bi maščeval umor svojih staršev.
conan the barbarian_1982.opis_omdb: Beyond the mists of time, having witnessed the brutal death of his blacksmith father and the massacre of the entire village by the murderous followers of Thulsa Doom, the undead evil wizard and servant of the serpent-god, Set, Conan, the orphaned young Cimmerian, is condemned to a life of slavery. Chained to the perpetual Wheel of Pain, the helpless boy grows into a man, and after years of rigorous training as a fierce gladiator, Conan, now an unstoppable mountain of muscle, regains his precious freedom. But, with the image of the blood-soaked raid etched on his mind, Conan teams up with Subotai, the Hyrkanian thief, and Valeria, the Queen of the Bandits, and embarks on a peril-laden journey to the mysterious Mountain of Power, and the impregnable Snake Cult Temple. Will Conan avenge his parents?

premium rush_2012.opis_neo:
Napeta zgodba v ospredje postavi mladega kolesarskega kurirja Wileeja, ki nekega dne prejme skrivnostno pošiljko.

Wille je eden izmed tisoč petstotih kurirjev na kolesu, ki vsak dan drvijo po ulicah Manhattna in raznašajo nujne pošiljke. Ko nekega dne nič hudega sluteči raznašalec pobere ovojnico, ki pritegne pozornost pokvarjenega policista, mu ta sledi v nori dirki po mestu, da bi preprečil dostavo skrivnostnega pisma.
premium rush_2012.opis_omdb: Wilee is one of 1,500 bike couriers in Manhattan who rides on the edge by having a bike with no brakes. On this day, Wilee has a delivery that is so valuable that a corrupt NYC Detective, who needs the money, begins to chase Wilee throughout the city to get it before the envelope is delivered.

dora and the lost city of gold_2019.naslov_orig: Dora and the Lost City of Gold
dora and the lost city of gold_2019.opis_neo:
Najstniška raziskovalka Dora se v družbi opice in nerodnih vrstnikov odpravi na nevarno nalogo v džunglo, da bi rešila svoje starše.

Potem ko je Dora (Isabela Moner) večino svojega življenja s starši raziskovala džunglo, je nič ne more pripraviti na najnevarnejšo pustolovščino njenega življenja: srednjo šolo. Ko njena starša skrivnostno izgineta med iskanjem bajeslovnega mesta, se mora Dora preleviti v čisto pravo pustolovko in se skupaj s sošolci odpraviti v pragozd. Ker je bila po srcu vedno raziskovalka, se med raziskovanjem hitro znajde - in svojo prijateljico opico po imenu Škorenjc, bratranca Diega (Jeff Wahlberg), skrivnostnega prebivalca džungle (Eugenio Derbez) ter skupino najstnikov povede na pravo avanturo, v kateri bo rešila svoja starša (Eva Longoria in Michael Peña) ter odkrila nemogočo skrivnost o izgubljenem mestu zlata.
dora and the lost city of gold_2019.opis_omdb: Having spent most of her life exploring the jungle with her parents, nothing could prepare Dora for her most dangerous adventure ever: high school. Always the explorer, Dora quickly finds herself leading Boots, Diego, a mysterious jungle inhabitant, and a ragtag group of teens on a live-action adventure to save her parents and solve the impossible mystery behind a lost Inca civilization.

hearts under the olive tree_2023.opis_neo:
Slavna pisateljica ne najde navdiha za naslednjo knjigo, zato jo mama odpelje na kmetijo, da bi prebudila ustvarjalnost. Toda tam odkrije še nekaj.

Ko svetovno znana pisateljica ne najde navdiha za svojo naslednjo domišljijsko knjigo, jo njena mati odpelje na kmetijo, da bi prebudila ustvarjalnost. Tisto, kar odkrije, je še bolj čarobno ...
hearts under the olive tree_2023.opis_omdb: When a world-renowned author can't find inspiration for her next fantasy book, her over-bearing mother takes her to a farmland retreat to get her creative juices flowing, but what she finds is even more magical.

baby rex: der kleine kommissar_1997.opis_neo:
Otrok se spopada z nedavno ločitvijo staršev ob opori novega prijatelja, pasjega mladička Rexa.

Po boleči ločitvi staršev se mladi deček znajde v svetu negotovosti in žalosti. V iskanju tolažbe in novega začetka izbere pasjega prijatelja - pogumnega mladička pasme nemški ovčar po imenu Rex.

Ta prisrčna in ganljiva zgodba spremlja njuno edinstveno vez, ki se razvija skozi izzive, drobne zmage in neizmerno zvestobo. Rex ni le hišni ljubljenček - postane dečkova opora, zaščitnik in najboljši prijatelj.
baby rex: der kleine kommissar_1997.opis_omdb: A child chooses a German Shepherd puppy named Rex, to help him overcome the recent divorce of his parents.

it was always you_2021.opis_neo:
Ko se nepričakovano vrne domov brat Elizabethinega zaročenca, se začne Elizabeth spraševati o pravilnosti svojih življenjskih odločitev.

Elizabethini načrti za zaroko se zapletejo, ko se domov vrne svobodomiselni brat njenega zaročenca David. Ko se zaročna zabava vse bolj približuje in opravki kopičijo, Davidov nepričakovani vpliv spodbudi Elizabeth, da začne pomišljati o svojih življenjskih odločitvah.
it was always you_2021.opis_omdb: Elizabeth's engagement plans are thrown into disarray when her fiance's brother returns home. His unexpected influence prompts Elizabeth to question her life decisions.

crocodile dundee_1986.opis_neo:
Mick Dundee je neustrašen lovec na krokodile, ki se v avstralski divjini odlično znajde, malo slabše pa mu gre v betonski džungli.

Newyorška novinarka in milijonarjeva hči Sue se odpravi v avstralsko divjino po intervju z Dundeejem, ki za šalo obračuna s krokodili in je baje nekoč nekega krokodila pokončal kar z golimi rokami. Da bi podoživela dogodke svojega pisanja, se radovedna Sue z Dundeejem odpravi v divjino. Med njima se razvije vroča ljubezen in novinarka svojega junaka kot atrakcijo odpelje domov v Ameriko, kjer ga nastani v prestižnem hotelu. Avstralska divjina je za Dundeeja mačji kašelj, v mestni džungli Manhattna pa se znajde dosti slabše. Vse to je povod za neštete komične zaplete, ki se Dundeeju ne zdijo tako zelo smešni.
crocodile dundee_1986.opis_omdb: Intrigued by the near-death experience of the rugged hunter, Michael J. "Crocodile" Dundee, after a close encounter with a monstrous saltwater crocodile, the New York City reporter, Sue Charlton, travels to Australia, to meet the legend in person. There, in the dusty hamlet of Walkabout Creek and the formidable outback, dangerous situations and unforeseen romantic complications await; however, Sue already knows that nothing compares to the urban jungle of the great Big Apple. So, like a fish out of water, Mick leaves Australia for the first time in his life for Manhattan's concrete maze, where he comes face-to-face with the complexities of modern life. But, will the unpretentious bushman ever adapt to the big city?

furious 7_2015.opis_neo:
Deckard Shaw se hoče maščevati Dominicu Torettu in njegovi družini zaradi brata, ki je v komi.

Za tem, ko so porazili Owena Shawa ter njegovo ekipo, se vrnejo v Ameriko kjer zaživijo navidezno normalno življenje… Vsaj tako so mislili. Vendar se niso zavedali, da bo Owenov starejši brat iskal mašcevanje za smrt svojega brata, kar postavi Dominica in vso ekipo ponovno v nevarnost.
