furious 7_2015.opis_omdb: Dominic and his crew thought they'd left the criminal mercenary life behind. They'd defeated international terrorist Owen Shaw and went their separate ways. But now, Shaw's brother, Deckard Shaw, is out killing the crew one by one for revenge. Worse, a Somalian terrorist called Jakarde and a shady government official called "Mr. Nobody" are both competing to steal a computer terrorism program called "God's Eye," that can turn any technological device into a weapon. Torretto must reconvene with his team to stop Shaw and retrieve the God's Eye program while caught in a power struggle between the terrorist and the United States government.

lock, stock and two smoking barrels_1998.naslov_sl: Morilci, tatovi in dve nabriti šibrovki
lock, stock and two smoking barrels_1998.naslov_orig: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels
lock, stock and two smoking barrels_1998.opis_neo:
Prebrisani očarljivec in kvartopirski objestnež Eddy se znajde sredi največje podtalne igre s kartami v življenju.

Prirejena kvartopirska igra pahne v medsebojni obračun štiri prijatelje, pridelovalce marihuane, gangsterje in izterjevalce – v nizu čudaških dogodkov, povezanih s čedno vsoto denarja in dvema starinskima puškama.
lock, stock and two smoking barrels_1998.opis_omdb: Four friends become entangled in a chaotic scheme after a high-stakes card game goes wrong. They navigate London's criminal underworld, facing thieves, gangsters, and double-crosses. The film blends crime, dark comedy, and intricate plotting, exploring luck, friendship, deception, and the consequences of impulsive decisions within a morally ambiguous society.

the last samurai_2003.opis_neo:
Ameriški častnik, ki naj bi izuril japonsko vojsko v uporabi modernega orožja 19. stoletja, se znajde ujet v boju med dvema svetovoma.

Mlad japonski cesar najame ameriškega stotnika Algrena, da bi izuril prvo sodobno japonsko naborniško vojsko in izkoreninil samuraje. Algrenu pot kmalu prekriža Kacumoto, zadnji vodja samurajev. Ti na Algrena naredijo močan vtis in ga nepričakovano zaznamujejo.
the last samurai_2003.opis_omdb: In the 1870s, Captain Nathan Algren (Tom Cruise), a cynical veteran of the American Civil War, who will work for anyone, is hired by Americans who want lucrative contracts with the Emperor of Japan to train the peasant conscripts for the first standing Imperial Army in modern warfare using firearms. The Imperial Omura (Masato Harada) cabinet's first priority is to repress a rebellion of traditionalist Samurai, hereditary warriors, who remain devoted to the sacred dynasty, but reject the Westernizing policy, and even refuse firearms. Yet, when his ill-prepared superior force sets out too soon, their panic allows the sword-wielding samurai to crush them. Badly wounded, Algren's courageous stand makes the samurai leader Katsumoto (Ken Watanabe) spare his life. Once nursed to health, he learns to know and respect the old Japanese way, and participates as advisor in Katsumoto's failed attempt to save the Bushido tradition, but Omura gets repressive laws enacted. He must now choose to honor his loyalty to one of the embittered sides when the conflict returns to the battlefield.

albert nobbs_2011.opis_neo:
Albert Nobbs je ženska, ki se že 30 let pretvarja, da je moški, da lahko dela za preživetje in upa na boljše življenje.

Uglajeni in umirjeni strežnik Albert dolga leta služi v premožni hiši, vendar mora ob tem ves čas prikrivati resnico o sebi in zanikati lastna čustva. Ko se naposled odloči ustvariti samostojno življenje s prikupno služkinjo Helen, se znajde ujet v dolgoletnih spletkah lastnih laži in pretvarjanja.
albert nobbs_2011.opis_omdb: In 19th century Dublin, Albert Nobbs, an eccentric man in the latter part of middle age, works as a waiter in Morrison's Hotel run by the stingy and controlling Marge Baker. Albert is hard working and saves his money so that one day he will be able to eke out a better life for himself by owning his own business rather than work at the hotel. Beyond his work colleagues, he is all alone in the world. One day, a man named Hubert Page is hired by Mrs. Baker to paint one of the rooms in the hotel. She forces Hubert to share Albert's bed for the one night he is required to stay to complete the work, much to Albert's horror. Hubert discovers the reason Albert did not want to share a room with him. But rather than the issue being a problem, Hubert shows Albert that he can follow a slightly different life path than the one he envisioned for himself - one closer to the life that Hubert leads with his wife Cathleen - which includes getting married and having a wife to support him emotionally. Albert's choice as a bride is his younger flirtatious co-worker Helen Dawes, who, unknown to Albert, is already in a sexual relationship with the brusque and sly Joe Mackins, another co-worker recently arrived to Morrison's. As Albert, Helen and Joe play their respective games of courtship, Albert may find that what seemed to come naturally to Hubert may be more difficult for him.

multiplicity_1996.opis_neo:
Doug preveč dela in nima časa za svojo družino. Kloniranje se zato zdi popolna rešitev, dokler kloni ne prevzamejo njegovega življenja.

Kaj storite, če ima vaš delovnik premalo ur in vam kronično zmanjkuje časa za vse? Gradbeniku Dougu rešitev ponudi neka stranka: kloniranje. In če je z dvojnikom lažje, zakaj ne bi postopka ponovili še dvakrat?
multiplicity_1996.opis_omdb: Construction worker Doug Kinney finds that the pressures of his working life, combined with his duties to his wife Laura and daughter Jennifer leaves him with little time for himself. However, he is approached by geneticist Dr. Owen Leeds who offers him a rather unusual solution to his problems - cloning.

made of honor_2008.opis_neo:
Tom se zave, da je zaljubljen v svojo najboljšo prijateljico Hannah. A ona je medtem srečala svojega princa na belem konju.

Tom ugotovi, da je zaljubljen v svojo najboljšo prijateljico, ki se naslednji namerava poročiti. Ko ga ta prosi, da bi bil njena družica, se Tom odloči, da jo bo osvojil.
made of honor_2008.opis_omdb: Made of Honor revolves around Tom and Hannah, who have been platonic friends for 10 years. He's a serial dater, while she wants marriage but hasn't found Mr. Right. Just as Tom is starting to think that he is relationship material after all, Hannah gets engaged. When she asks Tom to be her "maid" of honor, he reluctantly agrees just so he can attempt to stop the wedding and woo her.

autumn at apple hill_2024.opis_neo:
Sveže ločena Elise začne prenavljati gostišče, ki ga je nedavno podedovala od svojih starih staršev, kar vzbudi zanimanje finančnika.

Elise prenavlja svojo gostišče in sreča Luka.
autumn at apple hill_2024.opis_omdb: Newly divorced Elise starts renovating the inn she inherited from her grandparents, catching the eye of Luke, the chief financial officer of a major hotel chain.

le prix de la trahison_2022.opis_neo: Marie Jourdan povabi prijatelja na zabavo v moževi restavraciji. A zabava je nenadoma prekinjena, ko njenega sina aretirajo zaradi umora.
le prix de la trahison_2022.opis_omdb: Captain Marie Jourdan invites her friend Commandant Paul Danceny to celebrate her 30th anniversary at the restaurant her husband Pierre just opened. The party is brutally interrupted when agents come to arrest their son Marc for m...

lease on love_2022.opis_neo:
Prodajalka Poppy želi napredovati in se pretvarja, da je zaročena s šefovim klientom, da bi mu ta prišel do sanjskega stanovanja, in najde ljubezen.

Življenje se strokovnjakinji za trženje postavi na glavo, ko odigra zaroko z direktoričinim čednim novim klientom.
lease on love_2022.opis_omdb: Poppy is a marketing specialist whose life is turned upside down when she fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo, to win over her strict building manager and get Milo the penthouse suite.

romance with a twist_2024.opis_neo: Nekdanja plesalka in akrobat na trapezu združita moči za nastop na lokalnem umetniškem festivalu. Bosta Luna in Bennet odplesala v ljubezen?
romance with a twist_2024.opis_omdb: Ex-dancer Luna pairs up with professional aerialist Bennet when he finds himself without a partner for his upcoming silks performance for the local arts festival. Soon she faces the challenge of a lifetime as they rehearse for the...

a killer engagement: matchmaker mysterie.opis_neo:
Angie, uspešna ženitna posrednica, poskuša dokazati, da je stranka nedolžna, potem ko njegovo zaročenko najdejo umorjeno in je on glavni osumljenec.

Angie je zelo presenečena, ko njenega prijatelja Aarona obtožijo, da je ubil žensko, ki jo je spoznal po njeni zaslugi. Kot hči upokojenega detektiva se Angie odloči, da bo primer podrobneje raziskala, vendar preiskovalec Cooper ni ravno navdušen, da ima ob sebi mlado detektivko.
a killer engagement: matchmaker mysterie.opis_omdb: When a woman is murdered, and her fiancé is the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case.

a killer in my family_2020.opis_neo: Avtorica resničnih kriminalk Carly gre na počitnice z možem Kevinom, ki upa, da se bosta tam znova povezala, a Carly bo raziskovala nerešen umor.
a killer in my family_2020.opis_omdb: True-crime author Carly and her husband Kevin take a vacation at a historical mansion on Crawford Island. Kevin thinks it will be a chance for them to reconnect, but Carly plans to research the puzzling unsolved murder of Diana Cr...

field day_2023.opis_neo: Jen se preseli v domači kraj, od koder je bil njen pokojni mož, da bo njena hči bliže obojim starim staršem, in nepričakovano najde ljubezen.
field day_2023.opis_omdb: Jen finds love when she joins the school parent-teacher organization after she moves back to her deceased husband's hometown.

game of love_2023.opis_neo:
Vivien in Roy obiščeta Royev dom zaradi prodaje družinskega premoženja. Njuno razmerje je v nevarnosti, ko na dan pridejo skrivnosti iz preteklosti.

Ženska in moški morata ustvariti novo igro, ki bo igralcem pomagala najti ljubezen, pri tem pa odkrijeta svojo skupno točko: o ljubezni nimata pojma.
game of love_2023.opis_omdb: It follows Audrey and Matthew. They are tasked with creating a new game to help players find romance. As they try to work together, they discover something they have in common: they each have a lot to learn about love.

falling together_2024.opis_neo: Natalie je nova stanovalka v bloku, ki je odločena spraviti sprte sosede, nepričakovanega zaveznika pa najde v hišniku.
falling together_2024.opis_omdb: Natalie tries to bring feuding neighbors together in her new condo building. Her unexpected ally is the building's super, who prefers to avoid getting involved.

an american in austen_2024.opis_neo:
Harriet, prepričana, da ni moškega, kot je gospod Darcy, se znajde v Prevzetnosti in pristranosti, da bi videla, ali je res tako popoln, kot se zdi.

Harriet Goodson, knjižničarka in oboževalka Jane Austen, se čudežno znajde v svetu "Prevzetnosti in pristranosti". V vlogi ameriške sestrične družine Bennet živi med plesi in družbenimi konvencijami tistega časa ter odkriva, ali čar Mr. Darcyja in njene predstave o ljubezni zdržijo v resničnosti.
an american in austen_2024.opis_omdb: Harriet, who thinks that no real man compares to Mr. Darcy, is transported into Pride and Prejudice and gets an unexpected chance to find out. Starring Eliza Bennett and Nicholas Bishop.

the musketeer_2001.opis_neo:
D'Artagnan se poskuša pridružiti članom elitne kraljeve straže, mušketirjem, hkrati pa išče morilca svojih staršev.

D'Artagnan iz svoje vasi v Gaskonji odide v Pariz, saj upa, da bo postal eden izmed elitnih kraljevih mušketirjev in našel človeka, ki je pobil njegovo družino. Ko najde slavne mušketirje, namesto junakov najde brezbrižne in zagrenjene ljudi brez cilja. Ko spozna lepo Francesco, skupaj poskušata rešiti kraljico pred spletkami hudobnega Febreja, toda mušketirji so vse nemirnejši in vse težje prenašajo krivico, ki sta jim jo naredila kardinal in Febre.
the musketeer_2001.opis_omdb: In 17th century Paris, a dashing swordsman named D'Artagnan finds himself at odds with the powerful forces taking over France. He sets out to avenge the murder of his parents and finds his country cleaved by chaos and civil unrest. His heart softens only for Francesca, a fiery peasant girl who claims D'Artagnan's heart on sight.

47 ronin_2013.opis_neo:
Samotni bojevnik Kai se pridruži Oishiju in njegovim 47 odpadniškim samurajem, da bi se maščevali izdajalskemu poveljniku.

Po krutem napadu neusmiljenega vojskovodje, 47 samurajev ostane brez svojega mojstra. Odločeni, da maščujejo smrt svojega voditelja, so ronini primorani poiskati pomoč pri 'nečistemu' izobčencu Kaiju, ki so ga nekoč že odslovili iz svojih vrst. Da bi povrnili čast svoji domovini, se bojevniki soočijo z vrsto izzivov, katerim običajni bojevniki niso kos.
47 ronin_2013.opis_omdb: While hunting in the forest, Lord Asano of Ako and his samurai find a young half-breed and take him with them to live in the castle. Several years later, Lord Asano holds a tournament to welcome the Shogun to Ako. The night after the tournament, Lord Asano is bewitched into hurting Lord Kira of Nagato, and is punished into committing seppuku by the Shogun. Realizing that it was a Lord Kira's evil plot, the samurais and the half-breed sets out for revenge against the Shogun's order.

the patriot_2000.opis_neo:
Zgodba se odvija leta 1776, v času ameriške revolucije.

Film pripoveduje o povsem običajnem človeku, ki je razpet med družino in dolžnostmi do domovine. Nekdanji vojak Benjamin Martin se je odrekel vojskovanju, da bi v miru vzgajal svojo številčno družino. Žena, ki je pred kratkim umrla, mu je rodila sedem otrok. Zdaj je na obzorju nova vojna in Benjaminu ni niti najmanj do tega, da bi se znova bojeval. Drugače je z njegovim najstarejšim sinom Gabrielom. Fant se brez pomislekov in kljub očetovemu nasprotovanju pridruži vojakom. Ko pa sovražnik ogrozi Benjaminovo družino, se Benjamin odloči, da stopi sinu ob bok in tudi sam ponovno obleče vojaško suknjo.
the patriot_2000.opis_omdb: It is 1776 in colonial South Carolina. Benjamin Martin, a French-Indian war hero who is haunted by his past, now wants nothing more than to live peacefully on his small plantation, and wants no part of a war with the most powerful nation in the world, Great Britain. Meanwhile, his two eldest sons, Gabriel and Thomas, can't wait to enlist in the newly formed "Continental Army." When South Carolina decides to join the rebellion against England, Gabriel immediately signs up to fight...without his father's permission. But when Colonel William Tavington, British dragoon, infamous for his brutal tactics, comes and burns the Martin Plantation to the ground, tragedy strikes. Benjamin quickly finds himself torn between protecting his family, and seeking revenge along with being a part of the birth of a new, young, and ambitious nation.

on the road_2012.opis_neo:
Film spremlja nenavadno prijateljstvo med pisateljem Salom Paradisom in nekdanjim kaznjencem Deanom Moriartyjem, ki se odpravita na potovanje po ZDA.

Generacija iz kultne knjige Jacka Kerouaca končno tudi na velikem platnu. Življenje mladega Sala pretrese prihod svobodomiselnega Deana in njegovega dekleta Marylou. Na vožnji po deželi srečujejo kopico različnih ljudi.
on the road_2012.opis_omdb: Shaken by the death of his father and discouraged by his stalled career, writer Sal Paradise goes on a road trip hoping for inspiration. While traveling, he is befriended by charismatic and fearless Dean Moriarty and Moriarty's free-spirited and seductive young wife, Marylou. Traveling across the American southwest together, they strive to break from conformity and and search the unknown, and their decisions change the very course of their lives.

fantômas contre scotland yard_1967.opis_neo:
Neuspešni preganjalci Fantomasa iz Francije se odpravijo na čudaško Škotsko, da bi drznega zločinca končno privedli pred roko pravice.

Pustolovska komedija. V tretjem in zadnjem nadaljevanju trilogije Fantômas uvede davek bogatim z grožnjo, da bo ubil tiste, ki ga ne sprejmejo.
fantômas contre scotland yard_1967.opis_omdb: Fantomas wants to collect money from scottish rich' for letting them live. The French inspector (Louis de Funes) comes to a scottish castle to protect the owner, and to catch Fantomas. There is a lot of funny trouble in the castle, espacially at one big evening party.

land of the lost_2009.opis_neo:
Časovni vrtinec posrka znanstvenika, njegovo pomočnico in strokovnjaka za preživetje. Znajdejo se v svetu dinozavrov in hudo počasnih bitij.

Dr. Marshalla skupaj z asistentko in še nekom potegne v časovni vrtinec. V vzporednem vesolju trojica spozna opičnjaka Chako, edinega zaveznika v svetu dinozavrov in drugih neverjetnih bitij
land of the lost_2009.opis_omdb: Palaeontologist Rick Marshall takes Will and Holly into a new world of danger, dinosaurs, and big bug-eyed lizard people while trying to find their way back home, save the universe, and save his reputation by doing so. The dinosaur with brains, brawn, and personality, and the adventure of scientific advancement and exotic beasts in a faraway land, all add up to time-traveling fun and frolics.

the villain_1979.opis_neo:
Bančnemu roparju grozijo vislice in da bi se jim izognil, se spajdaši s pokvarjenim bankirjem, da bi zanj opravil umazan posel.

Kavboj Handsome Stranger (Arnold Schwarzenegger) spremlja Miss Charming Jones (Ann-Margret), ki potuje z zajetno količino denarja od svojega očeta. Tega denarja se želi polastiti bogati Avery Simpson (Jack Elam) in zato najame lopova Cactusa Jacka (Kirk Douglas), da ju oropa. Vendar pa Cactus Jack ni najboljši v ropanju ljudi.
the villain_1979.opis_omdb: "Cactus" Jack Slade (Kirk Douglas) is the meanest bad man in the west, or so he thinks. When a bank robbery goes awry, he lands in jail facing a hangman's noose. When the corrupt owner of the bank offers him a job, Jack sees a chance to stay alive and get rich in the process. All he has to do is steal a strongbox full of money the banker lent to Mr. Parody Jones (Strother Martin) who needs it to keep his mining operation going. If he defaults on the loan, our "friendly" banker takes over the mine. Ms. Charming Jones (Ann-Margret) comes to town to collect the money and take it back to her father, Parody. To ensure the money makes it back home, Parody has called in a favor from a man who owes him a life debt. Enter Handsome Stranger (Arnold Schwarzenegger). The toughest and strongest hero in the west. As tough as a steel plate but, unfortunately, just as dense. As Charming and Handsome set off on their journey, Jack sets out after them. Using his trusty "Bad Men Of The West" handbook, Jack sets one trap after another only to have each one go awry in true Wile E. Coyote versus The Roadrunner fashion. With Looney Tunes-style sight gags in almost every scene, this movie will have you and your whole family laughing up a storm.

men in black iii_2012.opis_neo:
Agent J se vrne v zgodnje dni M.I.B., v leto 1969, da bi Nezemljanu preprečil, da bi ubil njegovega prijatelja agenta K, in spremenil zgodovino.

V Možeh v črnem 3 se agenta J. (Will Smith) in K. (Tommy Lee Jones) vračata ... v času nazaj. J. je pri svojem delu z Možmi v črnem v zadnjih 15 letih videl marsikaj, vendar ga prav nič, tudi vesoljci, ne spravlja tako ob živce kot njegov čemerni in zadržani sodelavec. Ko pa sta življenje K.-ja in usoda planeta v nevarnosti, mora agent J. odpotovati nazaj v času, da bi uredil stvari. J. odkrije, da mu nekaterih skrivnosti vesolja K. nikoli ni zaupal - zdaj pa se jima bodo razodele, ko se J. spajdaši z mlajšo različico agenta K. (Josh Brolin), da bi skupaj rešila tisto starejšo različico, agencijo in prihodnost človeštva.
men in black iii_2012.opis_omdb: After breaking out of LunarMax, a moon-based maximum security prison, Boris the Animal (Jemaine Clement) decides to go back in time and eliminate the person who arrested him - Agent K (Josh Brolin). When he does so, Agent J (Will Smith) realizes that the timeline has been changed and he too travels back to July 15, 1969, the day before Agent K is killed. After overcoming some disbelief, J manages to convince young K and others of just who he is and why he's there. With the help of Griffin (Michael Stuhlbarg), a being who can see all timelines, they track Boris down. J also learns a secret, something old Agent K (Tommy Lee Jones) had never told him.

resident evil_2002.opis_neo:
Posebna vojaška enota se bori proti neobvladljivemu superračunalniku in znanstvenikom, ki so po laboratorijski nesreči mutirali v ljudožerske pošasti.

Pod ulicami Raccoon Cityja podjetje Umbrella Corporation razvija smrtonosni virus v podzemnem laboratoriju. Ko virus izpustijo, mora ekipa vojakov ustaviti hordo lačnih zombijev.
resident evil_2002.opis_omdb: A virus has escaped in a secret facility called "The Hive," turning the staff into hungry zombies and releasing the mutated Lab "Animals" that they were studying. The complex computer shuts down the base to prevent infection. The parent corporation sends in an elite military unit, where they meet Alice, who is suffering from amnesia due to exposure to nerve gas. The military team must shut down the computer and get out, fighting their way past zombies, mutants, and the computer itself, before the virus escapes and infects the rest of the world. Alice must also come to terms with her slowly-returning memories.

life of brian_1979.opis_neo:
Zgodba o Brianu, rojenemu istega dne kot Jezus Kristus, ki so ga zamenjali za odrešenika.

To je zgodba o Brianu iz Nazareta, rojenemu istega dne kot Jezus, ki se poda na povsem drugačno življenjsko pot, ki pa pripelje do istega zaključka. 

Brian se pridruži skupini političnih upornikov, ki si želi iz Judeje pregnati Rimljane. Enega svojih svetlejših trenutkov doživi, ko mu uspe jeruzalemski mestni zid popisati s političnimi krilaticami. 

Četudi gibanje ni prav učinkovito, Brian kljub temu postane prerok s svojimi zvestimi privrženci. To pa hkrati zapečati njegovo usodo in mu občutno skrajša življenje.

happy gilmore_1996.opis_neo:
Zavrnjeni hokejist pokaže svoje sposobnosti na igrišču za golf, da bi rešil babičino hišo.

Happy Gilmore je zagret hokejist, ker pa ne zna dovolj dobro drsati, začne raje igrati golf. Ko ugotovi, da je zelo nadarjen in da bi lahko s tem športom dobro zaslužil, se pridruži profesionalcem. Če ne drugega, bo s prisluženim denarjem lahko rešil babico, ki ji hočejo zaradi neplačanih davkov zapleniti hišo. 

Toda golf je šport za urejene gospode, Happy pa izgleda, kot da bi ravnokar prišel z rockovskega koncerta. A prav zaradi tega fant postane medijska senzacija. Na igrišču se zna tudi hitro razjeziti in se ne sramuje niti kakšne kletvice. Ves pomp okoli Happyja gre močno v nos ošabnemu golfistu Shooterju McGavinu, ki zato proti njemu skuje zaroto. Medtem Happy sredi vsega kaosa spozna žensko svojega življenja.
happy gilmore_1996.opis_omdb: A Hockey player wannabe finds out that he has the most powerful golf drive in history. He joins the P.G.A. tour to make some money to save grandma's house. The downside is that his hockey player mentality doesn't really go on the P.G.A. tour. Especially with the favorite to win the championship.i

cloud atlas_2012.opis_neo:
Zgodba o raziskovanju, kako dejanja posameznih življenj vplivajo drugo na drugega v preteklosti, sedanjosti in prihodnosti.

Zgodba priznanih filmskih ustvarjalcev Lane Wachowski, Toma Tykwerja in Andyja Wachowskega raziskuje paradoks "metuljevega učinka", kjer dejanja v življenju posameznikov vplivajo na preteklost, sedanjost in prihodnost.
cloud atlas_2012.reziser: Tom Tykwer, Lana Wachowski, Lilly Wachowski
cloud atlas_2012.opis_omdb: Everything is connected: an 1849 diary of an ocean voyage across the Pacific, letters from a composer to his lover, a thriller about a conspiracy at a nuclear power plant, a farce about a publisher in a nursing home;, a rebellious clone in futuristic Korea, and the tale of a tribe living on post-apocalyptic Hawaii far in the future.

boogie_2021.opis_neo:
Medtem ko starši pritiskajo nanj, naj se osredotoči na pridobitev štipendije, mora Boogie najti način, kako preživeti novo dekle, srednjo šolo, tekmece na igrišču in breme pričakovanj.

Najstnik Alfred "Boogie" Chin sanja o tem, da bi nekega dne igral v ligi NBA. Kot  najstnik azijskega porekla, živeč v Queensu, se Boogie sooča s številnimi ovirami, vključno s svojimi strogimi starši. Pa lahko Boogie s trdim delom, strastjo in spretnostmi doseže uspeh?
boogie_2021.opis_omdb: The coming-of-age story of Alfred "Boogie" Chin, a basketball phenom living in Queens, New York, who dreams of one day playing in the NBA. While his parents pressure him to focus on earning a scholarship to an elite college, Boogie must find a way to navigate a new girlfriend, high school, on-court rivals and the burden of expectation.

bushwick_2017.opis_neo:
Bushwick je napet akcijski triler, kjer je vsak korak boj za preživetje.

Teksas se želi odcepiti od Združenih držav Amerike in New York se znajde posredi njihovih pogajanj. Dvajsetletna Lucy se znajde sredi smrtonosnega kaosa, ko teksaška vojaška sila okupira njeno brooklynsko sosesko. Skupaj z vojnim veteranom se odločita prečkati pet blokov Bushwicka, ki so polni nevarnih ljudi, da bi se prebila na varno.
bushwick_2017.opis_omdb: BUSHWICK tells the story of twenty-year- old Lucy (Snow) and war veteran Stupe (Bautista). Texas, and other states (mostly Southern) are trying to secede from the U.S., and NYC is being used as a negotiation tool. Lucy meets Stupe after coming up from the subway into the military invasion of Brooklyn. Together they decide to cross the treacherous five blocks of Bushwick - littered with looters, local militias and the invading forces, in order to get home and be reunited with Lucy's grandmother.

malignant_2021.opis_neo:
Madison mučijo prividi surovih umorov, ki so nekako povezani z njo. Še huje postane, ko odkrije, da so njene sanje srhljivo resnične.

Grozljivka o ženski, ki jo začnejo preganjati vizije pretresljivih umorov, dokler ne spozna, da ne gre le za privide. Madison verjame, da izgublja razum, toda kmalu odkrije, da njene vizije niso le plod domišljije, temveč grozljiva resničnost in da vidi dejanske umore med tem, ko se dogajajo.
malignant_2021.opis_omdb: Twenty-seven long years after the brutal Simion Research Hospital incident, abused Madison wakes up in a hospital in present-day Seattle. But with numbing visions of murder getting in the way of a normal life, more and more, Madison's obscure past emerges, baffling both herself and the local detectives. Are these explicitly violent killings figments of Madison's troubled imagination? Either way, someone, or better yet, something, links the past to the present, demanding closure and blood. Is the bogeyman real?

stepmom: stepmom_1998.opis_neo:
Susan Sarandon igra hudo bolno mamo, ki se mora kot mačeha sprijazniti z novo žensko v življenju bivšega moža. Nastopa tudi Julia Roberts. 1998.

Na smrt bolna ženska se mora sprijazniti z ljubico svojega bivšega moža, ki bo postala mačeha njenih otrok.
stepmom: stepmom_1998.opis_omdb: Anna and Ben, the two children of Jackie and Luke, must cope with the fact that their parents divorced and their father is now with successful photographer Isabel. She does her best to treat the kids in a way that makes them still feel at home when they're with their dad, but she also loves her work and doesn't plan to give it up. But full-time mother Jackie finds Isabel's efforts offensively insufficient and can't understand that work can be important to her as well as the kids. The conflict between them is deepened by the sudden diagnosis of cancer, which might be deadly for Jackie. They all have to learn a little in order to grow together.

serena_2014.opis_neo:
Najmočnejši igralski imeni današnjega dne, Jennifer Lawrence in Bradley Cooper, bosta dokazala, da ljubezen ni vedno dovolj za srečo.

George Pemberton je magnat, ki povsem obvladuje lesno industrijo v Severni Karolini. Pišejo se trideseta leta 20. stoletja, smo v času velike gospodarske depresije. Na prvi pogled se zaljubi v prelepo Sereno. Po poroki, ki hitro sledi, uživata v skupnem življenju in v vseh privilegijih, ki izhajajo iz njegovega družbenega statusa. 

Zveza se začne krhati, ko ugotovita, da Serena ne more imeti otrok. Položaj se še poslabša, ko Serena izve, da ima George nezakonskega sina, ki ji ga ni nikoli omenil. Počasi se začne razkrivati temna in nevarna plat Sereninega značaja.
serena_2014.opis_omdb: In Depression-era North Carolina, the future of George Pemberton's timber empire becomes complicated when he marries Serena.

the grey_2011.opis_neo:
Skupina naftnih delavcev se po strmoglavljenju letala v zakotni divjini Aljaske poda v boj za preživetje in se skuša vrniti v civilizacijo.

Ottway mora v hipu postati junak in popeljati skupino okorelih naftnih delavcev v boj za preživetje in vrnitev domov po strmoglavljenju letala v zakotni divjini Aljaske. Boriti se morajo s poškodbami in neusmiljenim vremenom, za nameček pa jim začne slediti še krdelo volkov na lovu, ki jih ves čas napada.
the grey_2011.opis_omdb: In Alaska, a team of oil workers board a flight home; however, they cross a storm and the airplane crashes. Only seven workers survive in the wilderness and John Ottway, who is a huntsman that kills wolves to protect the workers, assumes leadership of the group. Shortly after they learn that they are surrounded by a pack of wolves and Ottway advises that they should seek protection in the woods. But while they walk through the heavy snow, they are chased and attacked by the carnivorous mammals.

lucky_2020.opis_neo:
Noč za nočjo v njeno hišo prihaja nevaren moški, vendar ji nihče ne verjame.

Ženska iz predmestja se trudi, da bi verjeli njenim trditvam, da nanjo preži nevaren moški, ki noč za nočjo prihaja v njeno hišo. Ko ji ljudje iz okolice ne priskočijo na pomoč, je prisiljena vzeti stvari v svoje roke.
lucky_2020.opis_omdb: A suburban woman fights to be believed as she finds herself stalked by a threatening figure who returns to her house night after night. When she can't get help from those around her, she is forced to take matters into her own hands.

dirty grandpa_2016.opis_neo:
Odbita komedija o dedku, ki svojega vnuka prepriča, da ga odpelje na Florido, kjer se namerava udeležiti divjih študentskih zabav.

Film se vrti okoli pohotnega dedka s primernim imenom Dick, ki si želi po soprogini smrti spet žurirati in hoditi na zmenke. Pri tem mu mora proti svoji volji pomagati vnuk in pohlevni odvetnik Jason, ki ga igra Zac Efron, in ki naj bi se poročil s svojo zaročenko, ki pa se dedku ne zdi primerna ženska zanj. V vlogi dedka se je znašel en in edini Robert De Niro. Oba se kmalu odpravita na nepozabno potovanje po Floridi, kjer ju čakajo razuzdane zabave in lepe ženske.
dirty grandpa_2016.opis_omdb: Jason Kelly, the grandson of Dick Kelly, loses his grandmother about two weeks before his wedding to Meredith. He tries to assist his grandfather and console him for his loss, but was rather tricked into a spring break road trip; chasing youth once again. with the help of Shadia and Lenore, the two men go on an adventure they'll never forget.

general_2019.opis_neo:
Film o Anteju Gotovini, njegovi vlogi v domovinski vojni.

Junak. Vojak. Človek. Vznemirljiva življenjska zgodba generala Anteja Gotovine, enega od najvidnejših poveljnikov hrvaške domovinske vojne.
general_2019.opis_omdb: Follows the life of general Ante Gotovina.

tropa de elite 2: o inimigo agora é outr.naslov_orig: Tropa de Elite 2: O Inimigo Agora é Outro
tropa de elite 2: o inimigo agora é outr.opis_neo:
Trinajst let po njegovih junaških dejanjih je bivši stotnik Roberto Nascimento polkovnik v brazilski vojski.

Po krvavo zatrti vstaji v zaporu v Rio de Janeiru se polkovnik Robert Nascimento in stotnik Andre Matias znajdeta na udaru kritik aktivista za človeške pravice Dioga Frage; Matiasa premestijo v skorumpirano vojaško policijo, Nascimenta pa vržejo iz posebne enote policije BOPE. Toda Nascimento pridobiva na priljubljenosti, in ponudijo mu mesto v državni obveščevalni službi. Fraga, ki je poročen z Nascimentovo nekdanjo ženo, skozi leta postane poslanec v Državnem zboru, njegov pastorek, Nascimentov sin Rafael, pa se s svojim biološkim očetom ne razume najbolje.
tropa de elite 2: o inimigo agora é outr.opis_omdb: After a bloody invasion of the BOPE in the High-Security Penitentiary Bangu 1 in Rio de Janeiro to control a rebellion of interns, the Lieutenant-Colonel Roberto Nascimento and the second in command Captain André Matias are accused by the Human Right Aids member Diogo Fraga of execution of prisoners. Matias is transferred to the corrupted Military Police and Nascimento is exonerated from the BOPE by the Governor. However, due to the increasing popularity of Nascimento, the Governor invites him to team-up with the intelligence area of the Secretary of Security. Along the years, Fraga, who is married with Nascimento's former wife, is elected State Representative and Nascimento's son Rafael has issues with his biological father. Meanwhile Nascimento and the BOPE expel the drug dealers from several slums but another enemy arises: the militia led by Major Rocha and supported by the Governor, the Secretary of Security and politicians interested in votes. Nascimento is manipulated to help this group, vanquishing the criminals in the slums and poor communities; then the corrupt group of police officers is free to exploit the poor population.

stronger_2017.opis_neo:
Navdihujoča zgodba o moškem, ki je preživel bombni napad na bostonskem maratonu in v eksploziji izgubil obe nogi, ne pa tudi volje do življenja.

Biografska drama o zgodbi Jeffa Baumana, ki je preživel bombni napad na Bostonskem maratonu leta 2013 in v eksploziji izgubil obe nogi, ne pa tudi volje do življenja. Komaj 30 ur prej je bil obdan z množico na cilju maratona, nato pa se mu je življenje obrnilo na glavo. Med težkim okrevanjem in rehabilitacijo, je Jeff pomagal policiji ujeti napadalca.
stronger_2017.opis_omdb: Jeff Bauman is a well-intention-ed but underachieving Boston native who works at the deli counter of a Costco and lives in a small two-bedroom apartment with his alcoholic mother, Patty. One day at the local bar, Jeff runs into his ex-girlfriend Erin, who is attracted to his kindness and charm but finds herself constantly frustrated by his lack of commitment. After learning that Erin is running in the Boston Marathon to raise money for the hospital she works at, Jeff asks every patron in the bar to donate and then promises Erin he'll wait at the finish line for her with a big sign. The day of the Marathon, Jeff scrambles to make it to the finish line on time but reaches it just before Erin reaches the finish line. As she approaches a bomb goes off right where Jeff is standing. After being rushed to a hospital, both of Jeff's legs are amputated above the knee. When he regains consciousness, Jeff tells his brother that he saw the bomber before the explosion. Patty calls the FBI, and Jeff is able to give them a description of Tamerlan Tsarnaev. Local authorities capture Dzhokhar Tsarnaev days later, and Jeff is hailed as a hero.

jim knopf und lukas der lokomotivführer_.naslov_orig: Jim Knopf und Lukas der Lokomotivführer
jim knopf und lukas der lokomotivführer_.opis_neo:
Jim in Luke se podata na potovanje skozi fantastične svetove, da bi osvobodila ugrabljeno princeso in rešila skrivnost Jimovega skrivnostnega izvora.

Jim Button, njegov prijatelj Luke, strojevodja in lokomotiva Emma živijo na majhnem otoku Morrowland. Nekega dne se spustijo v veliko pustolovščino. Njihovo popotovanje jih pripelje do cesarstva carja Mandala, kjer se odločijo rešiti njegovo ugrabljeno hčer Li Si. Vsi trije se odpravijo v Mesto zmajev, da osvobodijo princeso in odkrijejo skrivnost Jimove rodbine.
jim knopf und lukas der lokomotivführer_.opis_omdb: Jim Button and Luke the Engine Driver embark on an adventurous journey through fantastic worlds to free the kidnapped Princess Li Si from the impenetrable Dragon City and solve the secret of Jim's mysterious origins.

an education_2009.opis_neo:
Najstnica iz londonskega predmestja je namesto tradicionalne izobrazbe deležna nečesa bolj zloveščega.

Jenny (Carey Mulligan) je izjemno bistra 17-letnica, odlična učenka srednje šole, ki se pridno pripravlja na sprejemne izpite za Univerzo Oxford. Še pred koncem srednje šole pa spozna mnogo starejšega Davida (Peter Sarsgaard), s katerim se spusti v burno ljubezensko zvezo, ob kateri dojame, da se ni le zaljubila vanj, temveč tudi v njegov življenjski slog, zato hitro pozabi načrte o študiju na Oxfordu. Vendar pa bo odkrila, da David le ni tako popoln, kot se zdi na prvi pogled, njegova strašna skrivnost pa jo bo prizadela bolj, kot si je kdaj koli mislila, in jo bo prisilila, da znova premisli o svojem življenju.
an education_2009.opis_omdb: In the early 1960's, sixteen-year-old Jenny Mellor (Carey Mulligan) lives with her parents in the London suburb of Twickenham. On her father Jack's (Alfred Molina's) wishes, everything that Jenny does is in the sole pursuit of being accepted into Oxford, as he wants her to have a better life than him. Jenny is bright, pretty, hard working, but also naturally gifted. The only problems her father may perceive in her life is her issue with learning Latin, and her dating a boy named Graham (Matthew Beard), who is nice, but socially awkward. Jenny's life changes after she meets David Goldman (Peter Sarsgaard), a man over twice her age. David goes out of his way to show Jenny and her family that his interest in her is not improper and that he wants solely to expose her to cultural activities which she enjoys. Jenny quickly gets accustomed to the life to which David and his constant companions, Danny (Dominic Cooper) and Helen (Rosamund Pike), have shown her, and Jenny and David's relationship does move on to becoming a romantic one. However, Jenny slowly learns more about David, and by association, Danny and Helen, and specifically how they make their money. Jenny has to decide if what she learns about them and leading such a life is worth forgoing her plans of higher education at Oxford.

moonfall_2022.opis_neo:
Ko luna iztiri iz svoje orbite postane največja grožnja planetu Zemlja. Trije junaki se podajo na misijo v vesolje, da bi rešili svet.

Skrivnostna sila vrže Luno iz orbite in jo pošlje naravnost v trk z življenjem, kot ga poznamo – naravnost v trk s planetom Zemlja. Samo nekoliko tednov pred napovedanim udarom z Zemljo, ko je svet v totalni paniki in na robu uničenja, je izvršna direktorica Nase in nekdanja astronavtka Jo Fowler (Halle Berry) prepričana, da ima ključ do rešitve. Žal pa sta edina, ki ji verjameta nekdanji astronavt Brian Harper (Patrick Wilson) in teoretik zarote K.C. Hauseman (John Bradley). Ti junaki se bodo podali na nemogočo misijo v vesolje, tam pa bodo odkrili, da naša Luna ni ravno to, kar smo mislili, da je.
moonfall_2022.opis_omdb: In Moonfall, a mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit around Earth and sends it hurtling on a collision course with life as we know it. With mere weeks before impact and the world on the brink of annihilation, NASA executive and former astronaut Jo Fowler is convinced she has the key to saving us all - but only one astronaut from her past, Brian Harper and a conspiracy theorist K.C. Houseman believe her. These unlikely heroes will mount an impossible last-ditch mission into space, leaving behind everyone they love, only to find that they just might have prepared for the wrong mission.

gold_2016.opis_neo:
Zlatosledec Kenny Wells združi moči z geologom Michaelom Acosto, da bi v neraziskani indonezijski džungli poiskala zlato.

Kenny Wells je slepar, sanjač in iskalec rude moderne dobe, ki obupno išče svojo veliko priložnost. Moči združi z enako zagnanim geologom Michaelom Acosto, da bi v doslej še neraziskani indonezijski džungli našla zlato. Ko se jima končno začne nasmihati sreča, se resne težave šele začnejo.
gold_2016.opis_omdb: With the sudden death of his father, fourth-generation prospector Kenny Wells sees the family business, Washoe Mining, rapidly decline and him out of business. But ambitious Kenny has a dream, a vivid vision that promises mountains of brilliant and pure gold in the lush jungles of remote Indonesia; an aspiration which the well-known, yet still unlucky geologist Michael Acosta shares. Before long, down-on-his-luck Kenny will convince the eager geologist to become his partner and set off on an adventure deep into uncharted territory, while in the meantime, he would hunt for investors. Unfortunately though, as the risky expedition begins without a single speck of gold or the promise of it on the horizon, disease and failure will begin to threaten the short-lived dream. However, is it indeed an intriguingly bold and reckless fantasy?

the ritual killer_2023.opis_neo:
Detektiv na pragu upokojitve skupaj s profesorjem izsledi serijskega morilca, ki izvaja starodavno prakso črne magije.

Detektiv Boyd, ki se ne more sprijazniti s smrtjo svoje hčerke, se poda na lov za serijskim morilcem, ki ubija v skladu z brutalnim plemenskim ritualom. Edina oseba, ki lahko pomaga Boydu, je profesor Mackles, antropolog, ki skriva neizrekljivo skrivnost. A globlje ko Boyd prodira v morilčev svet, se meja med razumom in norostjo vse bolj tanjša.
the ritual killer_2023.opis_omdb: A detective on the verge of retirement teams with a professor of African Studies to track down a serial killer who is performing the ancient black magic practice of Muti.

go fast_2008.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja policista Mareka, ki med operacijo zoper omrežje preprodajalcev z mamili izgubi kolega.

Policaj Marek (Roschdy Zem) je pred kratkim v akciji proti skupini preprodajalcev mamil izgubil partnerja in najboljšega prijatelja. Kmalu ga premestijo v posebno enoto tajnih operacij. Po intenzivnem urjenju se mora Marek vtihotapiti v mrežo zločincev, ki iz Španije tihotapi ogromne količine marihuane, da bi jo prodali v Franciji.
go fast_2008.opis_omdb: Marek, a crime squad officer, sets out to avenge the death of his partner and best friend, who was killed by drug traffickers. He asks for a posting to a new undercover unit created to infiltrate a drug gang that imports hashish from Morocco using the "Go Fast" method. A fleet of high-powered speedboats and cars races across the Mediterranean to Spain and then France, loaded with drugs.

vampire academy_2014.opis_neo:
Film predstavlja nesmrtno prijateljstvo med 17-letno pol-vampirko Rose in njeno varovanko, plemenito vampirko Lisso.

Dve leti po pobegu iz internata, pol-vampirko Rose in miroljubno vampirko Lisso znova pošljejo na vampirsko akademijo. Tam se morata na novo prilagoditi težavni hierarhiji med učenci, Rosina poglavitna naloga pa je zaščititi Lisso pred nevarno strujo zlobnih krvoločnih vampirjev.
vampire academy_2014.opis_omdb: Rose Hathaway is a dhampir, half-vampire and half-human, who is training to be a guardian at St Vladimir's Academy along with many others like her. There are good and bad vampires in their world: Moroi, who co-exist peacefully among the humans and only take blood from donors, and also possess the ability to control one of the four elements - water, earth, fire or air; and Strigoi, blood-sucking, evil vampires who drink to kill. Rose and other dhampir guardians are trained to protect Moroi and kill Strigoi throughout their education. Along with her best friend, Princess Vasilisa Dragomir, a Moroi and the last of her line, with whom she has a nigh unbreakable bond, Rose must run away from St Vladimir's, in order to protect Lissa from those who wish to harm the princess and use her for their own means.

paranoia: paranoia_2013.opis_neo:
Adam je mlad poslovnež, ki si želi napredovanja v službi. Po napaki ga šef prisili, da se infiltrira v drugo podjetje kot korporacijski vohun.

V trilerju z vrtoglavo visokimi vložki je Adam Cassidy (Liam Hemsworth) očarljivi mlajši poslovni moški, ki se trudi napredovati v novi službi v podjetju Wyatt Telecom. Po dragi napaki, ki jo je naredil, je soočen z nemilostnim lastnikom podjetja Nicholasom Wyattom (Gary Oldman). Ta ga ne želi uničiti, temveč izkoristiti: Adam se mora kot tehno-vohun zaposliti v konkurenčnem podjetju, ki ga vodi Wyattov zapriseženi tekmec Jock Goddard (Harrison Ford). Adam nenadoma dobi razkošno pisarno, vozi drage avtomobile, je v zvezi s čudovito Emmo (Amber Heard), niti pa vleče Wyatt, ki ga nihče ne more ustaviti v večmilijonski dirki, v kateri namerava zmagati.
paranoia: paranoia_2013.opis_omdb: The high stakes thriller Paranoia takes us deep behind the scenes of global success to a deadly world of greed and deception. The two most powerful tech billionaires in the world (Harrison Ford and Gary Oldman) are bitter rivals with a complicated past who will stop at nothing to destroy each other. A young superstar (Liam Hemsworth), seduced by unlimited wealth and power falls between them, and becomes trapped in the middle of the twists and turns of their life-and-death game of corporate espionage. By the time he realizes his life is in danger, he is in far too deep and knows far too much for them to let him walk away.

revenge_2017.opis_neo:
Neizprosen puščavski boj na življenje in smrt, v katerem se ranjena lepotica na novo rodi kot simbol maščevanja za moško izkoriščanje.

Trije podjetniki se odpravijo na vsakoletni lov, toda tokrat eden izmed njih s seboj pripelje tudi svojo ljubico Lolito. Ko gre situacija po zlu, prijatelji pustijo Lolito umreti sredi puščave, a se ta nepričakovano vrne in moški dopust spremeni v napet boj za življenje.
revenge_2017.opis_omdb: The story sees three wealthy, middle-aged CEOs - all married family men - get together for their annual hunting game in a desert canyon. It's a way for them to let off steam and affirm their manhood with guns. But this time, one of them has come along with his young mistress, who quickly arouses the interest of the two others. Things get out of hand and she is left for dead in the middle of this arid hell. However, the young woman is very much alive, and the hunting game turns into a ruthless manhunt.

foxtrot six_2019.opis_neo:
Intenzivne podnebne spremembe obrnejo svetovno ekonomijo na glavo.

Intenzivne podnebne spremembe obrnejo svetovno ekonomijo na glavo. Ob propadanju poljščin in dvigu cene je hrana zamenjala nafto kot najdragocenejšo dobrino. Med zelo malo državami, ki so še vedno plodne, se Indonezija hitro dviga kot naslednja gospodarska velesila, toda njeno vlado nenadoma prevzame priljubljena, a neusmiljena politična odpadniška stranka.
foxtrot six_2019.opis_omdb: When a rogue regime threatens Indonesia's food supply in a bid for power, a former marine assembles a team of ex-comrades to end the hostile takeover.

fallen_2016.opis_neo:
Film spremlja 17-letno dekle Lucindo Price, ki je živela na videz običajno življenje, dokler je niso obtožili za zločin, ki ga ni zagrešila.

Sedemnajstletna Lucinda živi na videz običajno življenje, dokler je ne obtožijo za zločin, ki ga ni zagrešila. Svojo kazen prestaja v prevzgojnem zavodu, kjer se zanjo zanimata skrivnostna dijaka, za katera se zdi, da sta na nenavaden način povezana z njo. Osamljena in zbegana zaradi čudnih vizij jima razkrije svojo preteklost in kmalu spozna, da sta fanta v resnici padla angela, ki se že stoletja borita za njeno ljubezen.
fallen_2016.opis_omdb: Lucinda "Luce" Price is a strong-willed seventeen-year-old living a seemingly ordinary life until she is accused of a crime she didn't commit. Sent off to the imposing Sword & Cross reform school, Luce finds herself being courted by two mysterious students to whom she feels oddly connected. Isolated and haunted by strange visions, Luce begins to unravel the secrets of her past and discovers the two men are fallen angels, who she learns have loved her for centuries.Luce must choose where her feelings lie, pitting Heaven against Hell in an epic battle over true love.

cypher_2002.opis_neo:
Nič hudega sluteč, razočaran moški znajde si želi, da bi delal kot vohun v nevarnem svetu korporativnega vohunstva.

V upanju na vsaj kanček bolj razburljivo življenje od tega, ki ga ima v predmestju, Morgan Sullivan sprejme službo industrijskega vohuna v mednarodni računalniški korporaciji Digicorp, ki mu naloži, da hodi po konvencijah širom ZDA in snema govore. A ko spozna skrivnostno žensko, začne dojemati, da njegovo delo ni, kar se zdi, saj pade v mračno podzemlje pranja možganov; začne se boriti za ohranitev lastne identitete.
cypher_2002.opis_omdb: Hoping for a more exciting life than the suburban drawl he currently inhabits, nerdy salary man Morgan Sullivan takes a job as an industrial spy at Digicorp, a global computer corporation. Digicorp assigns him the duty of flying to various conventions around America, recording the speeches that are made. But when Sullivan meets a mysterious woman he begins to realize that his job may not be what it seems, as he descends into a dark underworld of brainwashing and struggles to maintain his own identity.

equals_2015.opis_neo:
V utopični družbi, v kateri čustva niso dovoljena, se zaljubita moški in ženska, ki zaradi skrivnostne bolezni ponovno začneta čutiti.

Nia in Silas živita v futuristični družbi imenovani 'Kolektiv', v kateri ni kriminala in nasilja, niti človeških čustev, saj so bili izbrisani z genskim inženiringom, ljubezen pa je z zakonom prepovedana. Par kljub temu čuti prepovedano privlačnost, ki preraste v pravo strastno romanco, a sproži sumničavost njunih nadrejenih.
equals_2015.opis_omdb: A futuristic love story set in a world where emotions have been eradicated.

the thomas crown affair_1999.opis_neo:
Thomas Crown je zdolgočasen bogataš, ki si lahko privošči vse, kar si zaželi. Tudi ženske se mu ne morejo upreti.

Milijonar in ženskar se dolgočasi, ker nima dovolj vznemirjenja v svojem privilegiranem življenju, zato ukrade Cezannovo sliko iz muzeja.
the thomas crown affair_1999.opis_omdb: Self-made billionaire Thomas Crown is bored of being able to buy everything he desires. Being irresistible to women, he also does not feel any challenge in that area. But there are a few things even he can't get, therefore Thomas Crown has a seldom hobby: He steals priceless masterpieces of Art. After the theft of a famous painting from Claude Monet, the only person suspecting Thomas Crown is Catherine Banning. Her job is to get the picture back, no matter how she accomplishes her mission. Unfortunately, Catherine gets involved too deeply with Thomas to keep a professional distance to the case. Fortunately, Thomas seems to fall for her, too.

love in whitbrooke_2021.opis_neo:
Vodja projektov, ki je svoja zanimanja žrtvovala za kariero, sreča popolnega moškega in obudi svojo ljubezen do slikanja.

Vodja projekta dobi življenjsko priložnost v Londonu. Toda  ko se vrne v svoje domače mesto in spozna popolnega fanta, se znova razvijeta njena strast in talent za slikanje, tako pa dobi novi pogled na življenje in ljubezen.
love in whitbrooke_2021.opis_omdb: A project manager is offered the opportunity of a lifetime in London. But when she returns to her hometown and meets the perfect guy, her passion and talent for painting is rekindled, giving her a new outlook on life and love.

crime dans l'hérault_2019.opis_neo: Šefico nočnega kluba najdejo mrtvo v njeni pisarni, sef pa izropan. Toda sledi še drugi in nato tretji umor, ki primer zapleteta.
crime dans l'hérault_2019.opis_omdb: The boss of a Cap d'Agde nightclub is found murdered in her own office. Elisabeth Richard and Charles Jouanic get back together to investigate what looks like a crime with an obvious motive, since the safe has been emptied of its ...

anaconda iii_2008.opis_neo:
Plačanec skuša po naročilu milijarderja ujeti nevarno kačo, ki bi lahko pomagala pri zdravljenju smrtne bolezni.

Serija filmov Anakonda pomeni vrhunec afektiranih grozljivk. Na srečo tretji del kačje sage ni izjema. David Hasselhoff se vključi kot Hammet, priznani lovec na kače, ki bo imel polne roke dela, saj sta iz laboratorijskih kletk pobegnili gigantski anakondi, za katere njuna lepa znanstvenica Amanda (Crystal Allen) verjame, da sta ključ do zdravila za smrtno bolezen. Kači uničujeta vse pred sabo in spravljata domačine v obup, kmalu pa bo ena od njiju izlegla še več smrtonosnih živali. Pokvarjenega bogataša, ki sponzorira Amandine raziskave in je krivec za celotno katastrofo, igra sicer prisrčni John Rhys-Davies (Indiana Jones in lov za izgubljenim zakladom, Gospodar prstanov).
anaconda iii_2008.opis_omdb: Cancer-terminal tycoon Peter Murdoch's secret Wexel Hall Pharmaceuticals lab has developed a blood orchid extract cure. To examine why it works optimally in snakes, they also bread a super-anaconda strain. But the original pair escapes, leaving a bloody trail of corpses. Murdoch runs, instructing his staff to clean up. They keep failing and being eaten like unsuspecting locals, some alive, even after enlisting ruthless big game hunter Hammett. The fast-growing pregnant monster sheds its skin, thus disabling the only tracking device.

the ex_2006.opis_neo:
Lenuh je prisiljen delati za svojega tasta, potem ko se njegova noseča žena umakne z visoko plačane službe.

Tom Reilly se ne more ravno pohvaliti z uspešno kariero (pravzaprav je sploh nima), toda njegove žene Sofie, ki je izjemna odvetnica, ne moti, da ona služi za kruh v družini. Po rojstvu njunega prvega otroka se Sofia odloči, da bo ostala doma.
the ex_2006.opis_omdb: In Manhattan, Sofia's an attorney and Tom's a cook who has a hard time holding a job. When their first child is born, they agree that she'll be a full-time mom and he'll get a promotion. When he gets fired, he takes a job in Ohio working at the ad agency where her father is assistant director. Tom's assigned to report to Chip, a competitive, hard-driving guy who's in a wheelchair and who's Sofia's ex-boyfriend - from high school. Chip still carries a torch for her, so he connives to make Tom's work life miserable. As Tom's frustrations mount, it may be that Sofia will take Chip's side. Is Tom doomed to fail yet again?

the internship_2013.opis_neo:
Billy in Nick, okorela, tradicionalna trgovska potnika, katerih kariero je povozila digitalna doba, se prijavita v program za pripravnike pri Googlu.

Dva nedavno odpuščena štiridesetletnika poskušata uspeti kot pripravnika v uspešnem internetnem podjetju, kjer so njuni sodelavci, vključno s šefi, šele v njihovih dvajsetih letih.
the internship_2013.opis_omdb: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But, gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

spider-man 2_2004.opis_neo:
Petra Parkerja pestijo težave v neuspešnem zasebnem življenju, medtem pa se bori s sijajnim bivšim znanstvenikom Ottom Octaviusom.

Peter Parker se odloči končati svojo zgodbo super junaka, potem ko zaradi boja proti zločinu izgubi najboljšega prijatelja. A ko Doktor Octopus ogrozi življenja ljudi, ki so mu najbolj pri srcu, se mora Spider-man znova boriti.
spider-man 2_2004.opis_omdb: Peter Parker is an unhappy man: after two years of fighting crime as Spider-Man, his life has begun to fall apart. The girl he loves is engaged to someone else, his grades are slipping, he cannot keep any of his jobs, and on top of it, the newspaper Daily Bugle is attacking him viciously, claiming that Spider-Man is a criminal. He reaches the breaking point and gives up the crime fighter's life, once and for all. But after a failed fusion experiment, eccentric and obsessive scientist Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into super villain Doctor Octopus, Doc Ock for short, having four long tentacles as extra hands. Peter guesses it might just be time for Spider-Man to return, but would he act upon it?

nou fo_2021.opis_neo:
Kriminalist in njegov varovanec se znajdeta na nasprotnih bregovih.

Besneči ogenj Cheung Sung-bong je pripadnik regionalne kriminalistične enote, ki je vrsto let delal na terenu. Njegov varovanec Yau Kong-ngo ga spoštuje in uspeta se povezati. A usoda ju postavi na nasprotna bregova.
nou fo_2021.opis_omdb: I can't believe I suggest one of my best friends to watch this film with me tonight. What a bad film it is, but a lot of guys rate it high.The film is badly organized in terms of plot. You just watched them fighting for almost 65percent of time in this movie and can't get in to the plot and characters.

snatched_2017.opis_neo:
Samosvoja mladenka ostane brez fanta in namesto njega na dopust vzame svojo izjemno previdno mamo, a njun rajski dopust se nepričakovano zaplete.

Spontano tridesetletnico zapusti fant, zato prepriča svojo pretirano previdno mamo, da se ji pridruži na eksotičnih počitnicah v Ekvadorju. Na lovu za pustolovščinami se mati in hči nenadoma znajdeta v rokah ugrabiteljev. Dve povsem različni ženski sta prisiljeni najti skupen jezik, medtem, ko se skušata znajti v džungli in pobegniti na varno.
snatched_2017.opis_omdb: Freshly dumped by her musician boyfriend and fired from her job, all on the same day, suddenly, the rudderless thirtysomething, Emily Middleton, finds herself with two non-refundable tickets to Ecuador. Finding hard to swallow that she is about to lose the trip of a lifetime, Emily turns to the only person left to come with her: her idiosyncratic, phobic, and cat-loving mother, Linda. But, there, the dream holiday soon turns into an Equatorial nightmare when the mother-and-daughter duo ends up conned and abducted in broad daylight. Now, to stay alive, scaredy-cat Linda and impulsive Emily will need to set aside their differences, and like a fish out of water, navigate through dense jungle thickets. But, can they make it happen?

beneath her window_2003.opis_neo:
Duša je mlada plesalka in plesna učiteljica.

V razpetosti med dominantno mamo, odsotnim očetom in poročenim ljubimcem se zapleta v krizo tridesetih let, ki pa nima fatalnih posledic. Punca dozori, odloči se: odslovi polovičarskega ljubimca, čeprav pričakuje njegovega otroka. 

Celo super samozavestna in erotično radoživa mama se pripravlja na vlogo ljubeče babice. Vsega pa je v resnici kriv nekdo, ki že nekaj časa skrivaj prihaja pod njeno okno. 

Zaljubljeni opazovalec se iz anonimne nevarnosti in voajerske neokusnosti uspešno približuje njenemu srcu, vrača ji upanje v moško ljubezen in smisel življenja onkraj mladosti.
beneath her window_2003.opis_omdb: Dusha is a young dancer and dance instructor. Torn between a dominant mother, an absent father and a married lover, she is sinking into a typical crisis of the thirties, which gets worse when she starts suspecting that someone has been following her and invading her privacy.

kipchoge: the last milestone_2021.opis_neo:
Portret legendarnega tekača na dolge proge in svetovnega maratonskega rekorderja.

Portret legendarnega tekača na dolge proge in svetovnega maratonskega rekorderja. Eliud Kipchoge se pripravlja na enega zadnjih mejnikov v zgodovini športa: maraton bi rad pretekel v manj kot dveh urah. Film ponazarja njegov moto: noben človek ni omejen.
kipchoge: the last milestone_2021.opis_omdb: A man's struggle against himself and against time. Kenyan runner Eliud Kipchoge dreams of completing a marathon distance of less than two hours. An achievement that is considered unattainable for a human being. Here we follow him as he prepares to break the impossible record. Is he able to break the magical two-hour limit and write history?

friendsgiving_2020.opis_neo:
Molly in Abbey z ekipo bližnjih prijateljev in znancev priredita komično in kaotično večerjo za zahvalni dan.

Abby se veseli sproščenega Dneva zahvalnosti s svojo najboljšo prijateljic Molly. Toda načrti prijateljic za mirno praznično večerjo se zapletejo, ko se jima pridružita novi Mollyjun fant in njegova mama. V celotno zgodbo dodajte še nekaj žurerjev, Molyjine stare simpatije, šamana in trio Fairy Gay Mothers, in to je recept za komično in kaotično večerjo.
friendsgiving_2020.opis_omdb: Molly and Abbey, along with their crew of close friends and acquaintances, host a dysfunctional, comical and chaotic Thanksgiving dinner.

con air_1997.opis_neo:
Kaj se zgodi, ko letalo ugrabijo zaporniki? Na to v napetem trilerju odgovarjajo sloviti igralci, kot so Nicholas Cage, John Cusack in Steve Buscemi.

Cameron Poe je odlikovan ameriški vojak, ki se po služenju domovini vrne domov k noseči ženi Triciji.
con air_1997.opis_omdb: Cameron Poe, a highly decorated Army Ranger, comes home to Alabama to his wife Tricia, only to run into a few drunken regulars at the bar where she works. Cameron accidentally kills one of the drunks, and is sent to a federal penitentiary for involuntary manslaughter for seven years. He becomes eligible for parole and can now go home to his wife and daughter. Unfortunately, Cameron has to share a prison airplane with some of the country's most dangerous criminals, who take control of the plane and are now planning to escape the country. Cameron has to find a way to stop them while playing along. Meanwhile, United States Marshal Vince Larkin is trying to help Cameron get free and stop the criminals, led by Cyrus "The Virus" Grissom.

in darkness_2018.opis_neo:
V napetem psihološkem trilerju V temi spremljamo slepo pianistko Sofio, ki se nehote znajde v nevarnem svetu laži, korupcije in maščevanja.

Ko slepa glasbenica Sofia sliši umor, ki se zgodi v stanovanju nad njenim, postane ključna priča v kriminalistični preiskavi. Nezmožna prepoznati morilca po videzu, se znajde v nevarnem svetu Londonskega kriminalnega podzemlja, ne vedoč, komu lahko zaupa.
in darkness_2018.opis_omdb: A blind musician hears a murder committed in the apartment upstairs from hers that sends her down a dark path into London's gritty criminal underworld.

shutter_2008.opis_neo:
Mladoporočenca po tragični nesreči na fotografijah odkrijeta neprijetne in grozljive sence.

Nedavno poročeni par odkrije grozljive podobe na fotografijah, ki jih razvijeta po nepojasnjeni nesreči, ko sta prepričana, da sta z avtomobilom zbila mlado dekle.
shutter_2008.opis_omdb: A newlywed couple Ben and Jane move to Japan for a promising job opportunity - a fashion shoot in Tokyo. During their trip on a dark forest road they experience a tragic car accident, leading to the death of a young local girl. Upon regaining consciousness, they find no trace of her body. A bit distraught the couple arrives in Tokyo to begin their new life. Meanwhile Ben begins noticing strange white blurs in many of his fashion shoot photographs. Jane believes that the blurs are actually spirit photography of the dead girl who they hit on the road, and that she may be seeking vengeance.

40 days and 40 nights_2002.opis_neo:
Po bolečem razhodu z dekletom se mladenič zaobljubi 40-dnevnemu celibatu. Medtem spozna dekle svojih sanj, a ima zvezane roke.

Matt je star malce čez dvajset in se spušča v romantične avanture, ki mu ne prinašajo zadovoljstva. Na koncu skoraj vedno konča s strtim srcem. 

Nekega dne Matt najde zdravilo za svoje ljubezenske težave. Odloči se, da bo poskusil nemogoče ter 40 dni in noči zdržal brez seksa. Nobenega dotikanja, božanja, poljubljanja. Sprva mu prav dobro kaže, zaplete pa se, ker ravno sedaj spozna dekle svojih sanj. Ime ji je Erica in Matt se vanjo noro zaljubi. 

Med njegovimi kolegi hitro začnejo padati stave, kako dolgo bo zdržal. A Matt vseeno ni pripravljen prekršiti svoje zaobljube. Bo Erica pripravljena počakati 40 dni in 40 noči?
40 days and 40 nights_2002.opis_omdb: Nicole broke up with Matt months ago and is now engaged to someone else. He's very good-looking and has no trouble finding other lovers, but that doesn't help because he's still obsessed with wanting her back. Then he gets the inspiration that swearing off sex for Lent (all forms of sexual activity, even kissing or masturbation) will give him the perspective he needs. So of course a few days later he meets a woman and they fall in love. Now Matt sees his vow as a personal matter, and won't even tell her about it, but his friends think otherwise, and now the complications begin...

state of play: state of play_2009.naslov_orig: State of Play: State Of Play
state of play: state of play_2009.opis_neo:
Triler o častihlepnem kongresniku in preiskovalnem novinarju v primeru navidez nepovezanih, nasilnih umorov.

Russell Crowe je novinar iz Washingtona Cal McAffrey, ki se v filmu režiserja Kevina Macdonalda s prirojeno iznajdljivostjo loteva preiskovanja skrivnostnega umora in zarote med nekaterimi najvišjimi državnimi političnimi liki. 

Čeden in odločen kongresnik Stephen Collins (Ben Affleck) predstavlja prihodnost njegove stranke: častni mož je predsednik nadzornega odbora obrambnega proračuna. 

Vse oči so uprte v vzhajajočo politično zvezdo in resnega kandidata v naslednjih predsedniških volitvah – dokler ne umorijo njegove pomočnice in ljubice, ob čemer pridejo na plano nekatere temne skrivnosti. 

McAffrey je razpet med osebno prijateljstvo s Collinsom ter neusmiljeno urednico Cameron (Helen Mirren), ki mu naroči preiskavo. Ko s sodelavko Dello (Rachel McAdams) iščeta morilca, McAffrey naleti na poskus prikritja umora, ki bi lahko zatresel najvišje državne vrhove. Ob zavajajočih manipulantih in premožnih politikih bo odkril edino resnico: ko gre za milijarde, niso varni integriteta, ljubezen ali življenje nikogar.
state of play: state of play_2009.opis_omdb: A petty thief is gunned down in an alley and a Representative's assistant (Maria Thayer) falls in front of a subway, two seemingly unrelated deaths. But not to wisecracking, brash newspaper reporter Cal McAffrey (Russell Crowe), who spies a conspiracy waiting to be uncovered. With a turbulent past connected to the Representative and the aid of ambitious young rookie writer Della Frye (Rachel McAdams), Cal begins uprooting clues that lead him to a corporate cover-up full of insiders, informants, and assassins. But as he draws closer to the truth, the relentless journalist must decide if it's worth risking his life and selling his soul to get the ultimate story.

o brother, where art thou?_2000.opis_neo:
Trije odštekani kaznjenci se odločijo pobegniti v lepše življenje ter poiskati skriti zaklad, medtem ko jih preganja neusmiljeni mož postave.

Ulysses Everett McGill je bil zaradi nekaj drobnih zločinov poslan na težko in nesmiselno kazensko delo v Misisipiju. Zato skupaj z dvema sotrpinoma, ljubeznivim in preprostim Delmarjem ter neprilagojenim Petom, pobegne iz zapora.
Komična trojica se poda na življenjsko dogodivščino v iskanju svobode in skritega zaklada, ki si ga nameravajo razdeliti. Za petami jim sledi skrivnostni in zviti Cooley, ki jih hoče spraviti nazaj za rešetke.
o brother, where art thou?_2000.opis_omdb: Loosely based on Homer's "Odyssey," the movie deals with the picaresque adventures of Ulysses Everett McGill and his companions Delmar and Pete in 1930s Mississipi. Sprung from a chain gang and trying to reach Everett's home to recover the buried loot of a bank heist they are confronted by a series of strange characters--among them sirens, a cyclops, bank robber George "Baby Face" Nelson (very annoyed by that nickname), a campaigning governor and his opponent, a KKK lynch mob, and a blind prophet who warns the trio that "the treasure you seek shall not be the treasure you find."

breakfast on pluto_2005.opis_neo:
Neprilagojeni posvojenec zapusti irsko mestece in se spusti v vrsto divjih pustolovščin v živahnem Londonu 70-ih let prejšnjega stoletja.

Neprilagojeni posvojenec zapusti irsko mestece in se spusti v vrsto divjih pustolovščin v živahnem Londonu 70-ih let prejšnjega stoletja.
breakfast on pluto_2005.opis_omdb: A young transwoman, Patrick "Kitten" Braden, comes of age in the 1970s. She leaves her Irish town, in part to look for her mother and in part because her transgender nature is beyond the town's understanding. She's taken in by a rock band, falls for the lead singer, has brushes with the IRA, is arrested by the London police, works in a peep show, and poses as a survey researcher for the phone company. Throughout, her nationality and her nature put her at great risk. In her search for her mother, she makes surprising discoveries of friendship and family. But, will she survive?

american ultra_2015.opis_neo:
Mike, z na videz večno smolo, nenadoma doživi velik preobrat, ko dobi skrite sposobnosti za ubijanje, da bi preživel vladno operacijo.

Mike velja za mirnega soseda, ki brez prave motivacije živi v majhnem mestu, s svojim dekletom Phoebe. Čeprav se tega ne zaveda, je Mike izurjen CIA agent in pravi stroj za ubijanje. Ko agencija ukaže njegovo likvidacijo, Mikov nekdanji nadzornik aktivira njegove skrite sposobnosti. Tako mu je dana možnost, da preživi smrtonosno vladno operacijo.
american ultra_2015.opis_omdb: Small-town stoner Mike Howell (Jesse Eisenberg) spends most of his time getting high and writing a graphic novel about a superhero monkey. What Mike doesn't know is that he was trained by the CIA to be a lethal killing machine. When the agency targets him for termination, his former handler activates his latent skills, turning the mild-mannered slacker into a deadly weapon. Now, the utterly surprised Mike must use his newfound abilities to save himself and his girlfriend from getting wasted by the failed test subjects that are sent after him by the CIA.

carne trémula_1997.opis_neo:
Zgodba o tem, kako lahko en sam strel spremeni več življenj.

Mladi Victor se spre s Heleno, ki jo je spoznal pred nekaj dnevi. Ker je bila takrat pijana, zdaj noče slišati zanj. Zaradi prijave streljanja, s katerim je hotela Helena prestrašiti Victorja, prideta na prizorišče mladi detektiv David in starejši Sancho. Med prerivanjem se pištola sproži ... Štiri leta pozneje je David na invalidskem vozičku, vendar je košarkarska zvezda in poročen s Heleno. Victor pride iz zapora in usoda jim znova križa poti.

3 faces_2018.opis_neo: Znano iransko igralko Behnaz Jafari spravi ob pamet video klic na pomoč podeželskega dekleta, ki ji družina brani študij igre. Behnaz zapusti snemanje in prosi za pomoč režiserja Jafara Panahija. Odpravita se na severozahod na podeželje, kjer srečata očarljive in velikodušne prebivalce dekličine gorske vasi in vidita, kako stare tradicije še kar vztrajajo.
3 faces_2018.opis_omdb: Well-known actress Behnaz Jafari is left distraught when she comes across a provincial girl's video plea for help, after her family prevents her from taking up her studies at the Tehran drama conservatory. Behnaz abandons her shoot and turns to filmmaker Jafar Panahi to help with the young girl's troubles. They travel by car to the rural northwest, where they have amusing encounters with the charming and generous folk of the girl's mountain village. But Behnaz and Jafar also discover that old traditions die hard.

jesus henry christ_2011.opis_neo:
V zreli in nežni starosti desetih let se odloči Henry James Herman (Jason Spevack) uporabiti svoj legendarno visok IQ genija.

Henry James Hermin (Jason Spevack) je genij in že pri desetih letih obiskuje kolidž. A starejši kot je, bolj se sprašuje, zakaj nima očeta. Njegova mama je levičarska feministka Patricia (Toni Collette), in ko Henry odkrije, da je otrok iz epruvete, začne raziskovati svoje poreklo. 

Sled ga pripelje do profesorja na univerzi, strokovnjaka za vedenjske vzorce, dr. Slavkina O'Hare (Michael Sheen). Ta ima najstniško hči Audrey, ki je bila ta spočeta zato, da bi lahko njen oče napisal uspešnico z naslovom "Se kot homoseksualec rodiš ali to postaneš?".

Ko pozneje poskušata Henry in Audrey narisati družinsko drevo, se izkaže, da bo to zaradi zapletenih korenin izjemen izziv, počasi pa začne vznikati nova vrsta družine.
jesus henry christ_2011.opis_omdb: Henry is a precocious young boy, conceived in a petri-dish, raised by his single mother, Patricia, and is smarter than all of his peers. However, the one question he can't answer is, who is his father? Henry's attempts at locating his father lead him to Dr. Slavkin O'Hara, a university professor who has decided to raise his daughter, Audrey, as a psychology experiment in a world free of gender bias. Patricia starts fearing that she's losing her son, Audrey wishes she didn't have a father, Dr. O'Hara has no idea how to keep his daughter happy, and Henry may just have found the family he was looking for.

shine_1996.opis_neo:
Film je posnet po resnični zgodbi pianista Davida Helfgotta.

Po resnični zgodbi avstralskega pianista, Davida Helfgotta, posnet film prikazuje travmatična zgodnja leta in odraščanje. Vidimo ga kot čudežnega dečka, ko patriarhalni oče trpinči njega in sorojence, spomine na otroštvo v Evropi in izgubo družine v taboriščih. Zapusti očeta in gre študirat v tujino, se zlomi, vrne v Avstralijo in živi v ustanovi.
shine_1996.opis_omdb: As a child piano prodigy, David Helfgott's musical ambitions generate friction with his overbearing father, Peter. When Helfgott travels to London on a musical scholarship, his career as a pianist blossoms. However, the pressures of his newfound fame, coupled with the echoes of his tumultuous childhood, conspire to bring Helfgott's latent schizophrenia boiling to the surface, and he spends years in and out of various mental institutions.

les trois mousquetaires: d'artagnan_2023.opis_neo:
Neverjetna, junaška zgodba pripoveduje zgodbo o mladeniču po imenu D'Artagnan, ki odide od doma v Pariz, v upanju, da postane mušketir garde.

Kljub neuspešnemu novačenju D'Artagnan vendarle postane del treh najbolj impresivnih mušketirjev - Athosa, Aramisa in Porthosa - in se kmalu vklopi v njihov način življenja. V kraljestvu, razdeljenem zaradi verskih vojn in pod grožnjo britanske invazije, bo peščica moških in žensk prekrižala meče in svojo usodo povezala z usodo Francije.
les trois mousquetaires: d'artagnan_2023.opis_omdb: Young D'Artagnan joins the King's three musketeers as they work to ensure the future of France.

a dangerous method_2011.opis_neo:
Vpogled v zapleten odnos med Carlom Jungom in Sigmundom Freudom, iz katerega se je porodila psihoanaliza.

Zürich na začetku prejšnjega stoletja. Mladi Carl Jung se odloči, da bo preiskusil Freudovo kontroverzno metodo 'zdravljenja s pogovorom' na primeru Sabine Spielrein, mlade in izobražene ruske emigrantke s hudimi simptomi histerije.
a dangerous method_2011.opis_omdb: Suffering from hysteria, Sabina Spielrein is hospitalized under the care of Dr. Carl Jung who has begun using Dr. Sigmund Freud's talking cure with some of his patients. Spielrain's psychological problems are deeply rooted in her childhood and violent father. She is highly intelligent however and hopes to be a doctor, eventually becoming a psychiatrist in her own right. The married Jung and Spielrein eventually become lovers. Jung and Freud develop an almost father-son relationship with Freud seeing the young Jung as his likely successor as the standard-bearer of his beliefs. A deep rift develops between them when Jung diverges from Freud's belief that while psychoanalysis can reveal the cause of psychological problems it cannot cure the patient.

killer elite_2011.opis_neo:
Upokojeni član britanske elitne enote je prisiljen znova sodelovati v akciji, ko primejo njegovega mentorja.

Zgodba je nastala na podlagi resničnih dogodkov in sledi enemu najbolj izurjenih agentov za posebne naloge Dannyju; tega zvabijo iz prostovoljnega izgnanstva, da sestavi svoje moštvo operativcev, s katerimi se poda na domala nemogočo nalogo: rešiti nekdanjega mentorja in partnerja Hunterja.
killer elite_2011.opis_omdb: Loosely based on a true story, Killer Elite pits two of the worlds' most elite operatives - Danny, a ruthless killer-for-hire (Jason Statham) and Hunter, his longtime mentor (Robert De Niro) - against the cunning leader of a secret society of former Special Air Service operatives('Clive Owen'). Covering the globe from Australia to Paris, London and the Middle East, Danny and Hunter are plunged into a highly dangerous game of revenge and deception - where things are not always what they appear to be.

la flor de mi secreto_1995.opis_neo:
Leo Macias je slavna pisateljica, ki se znajde na dnu. Preostane ji le, da se zopet postavi na noge.

Leo Macias piše uspešne sentimentalne romane, vendar pod psevdonimom Amanda Gris. Nezadovoljna je s svojim poklicnim življenjem in tudi s svojim soprogom vojakom, ki dela v Bruslju in v Bosni, in ki ga ni nikoli doma. Naredila bo vse, da bi spremenila svoje življenje.

appetite for love_2016.opis_neo:
Mina se službeno vrne v domači kraj, da bi za svoje podjetje uredila prevzem okrepčevalnice. Izkaže se, da je lastnik njena srednješolska ljubezen.

Mina gre v majhno mesto zaradi strateškega prevzema restavracije, ki pa je v njenem rodnem kraju, v katerem ni bila več let. Lastnik restavracije je njena simpatija iz srednje šole.
appetite for love_2016.opis_omdb: Mina has everything going for her -- a boyfriend who has meticulously planned out their lives and a great job with International Corporate Brands. But her world is turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee where she must convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property. There is just one problem - the restaurant is now owned by her ex-boyfriend, Clay, who claims he will never sell. He resists her negotiations every step of the way, and all the while sparks fly.

heart of the champion_2023.opis_neo:
Ko najde zapuščenega konja, se 14-letna Charlie odloči, da bo skrbela zanj. Prijavi se na tekmovanje, kjer se sooči s svojo največjo tekmico v šoli.

Najstnica Charlie mora po ločitvi staršev v novo šolo, kjer nikakor ne najde novih prijateljev. Neprestano sanjari o konjih, zaradi česar jo učiteljica ves čas opozarja, saj ne sodeluje pri pouku. Njena mama Beth je v finančnih škripcih in za hčer nima kaj prida časa, pri tem pa je zanemarila tudi svoje ljubezensko življenje. Clint, prijatelj Charliejinega očeta, ima stajo konjev in začne dekle uriti v jahanju. Ko najdeta poškodovanega dirkalnega konja, se Charlie v hipu zaljubi vanj, čeprav jo mama opozarja, naj se ne naveže nanj. Clint opazi, da je morda Beth tista, ki jo je strah navezati se - in da morda sploh ne gre za konja.
heart of the champion_2023.opis_omdb: When a girl finds a lost horse she enters a barrel racing competition and becomes champion.

florence foster jenkins_2016.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o dedinji Florence Foster Jenkins, ki je sanjala, da bi postala operna pevka kljub slabemu posluhu in ne ravno opernem glasu.

Resnična zgodba o dedinji Florence Foster Jenkins, ki je sanjala, da bi postala operna pevka kljub slabemu posluhu in ne ravno opernem glasu. Izkoristila je zveze, vpliv in bogastvo, da bi počela tisto, kar ji pomeni največ, medtem pa njen partner in agent St. Clair Bayfield pred njo skriva slabe kritike, saj bi jo te preveč prizadele.
florence foster jenkins_2016.opis_omdb: Florence Foster Jenkins, an heiress from NYC, always wanted to be a concert pianist and play Carnegie Hall.
