An injury in her youth deterred that dream, so she sets out to sing her way to Carnegie Hall, knowing the only way to get there would be, "Practice, practice, practice". Her husband supports her venture, and Florence Foster Jenkins' performance at Carnegie Hall becomes a truly historic event.

prizefighter: the life of jem belcher_20.naslov_orig: Prizefighter: The Life of Jem Belcher
prizefighter: the life of jem belcher_20.opis_neo:
Jem Belcher je leta 1800 postal najmlajši svetovni prvak vseh časov. To je njegova neverjetna resnična zgodba.

Jem Belcher je leta 1800 postal najmlajši svetovni prvak vseh časov. To je njegova neverjetna resnična zgodba.
prizefighter: the life of jem belcher_20.opis_omdb: At the turn of the 19th century, Pugilism was the sport of kings and a gifted young boxer fought his way to becoming champion of England.

todo sobre mi madre_1999.opis_neo:
Čustvena mojstrovina o neuklonljivi ženski in njenih nenavadnih prijateljicah, ki se prebijajo skozi dramatične življenjske situacije.

Grški pregovor pravi, da lahko le ženska, ki ji solze izperejo oči, jasno vidi. To pa ne velja za Manuelo. Tiste noči, ko je avto povozil njenega sina Estebana, je Manuela jokala, dokler ni imela več solz. In daleč od tega, da bi bil njen pogled potem jasen.
todo sobre mi madre_1999.opis_omdb: Argentine Manuela Echevarria, an organ transplant coordinator at a Madrid hospital, ran off from her husband in Barcelona eighteen years ago upon learning that she was pregnant, their son, Esteban, who she has never told about his father despite his curiosity, and her husband who didn't know about the pregnancy when she ran off. An event coinciding with Esteban, an aspiring writer, turning seventeen leads to Manuela feeling the need to return to Barcelona to look for her husband. There, she ends up further acting as the maternal figure for people in need. One is a young nun named Sister Rosa, who she meets through her old friend, a transvestite prostitute who has assumed the name Agrado in her agreeable nature. Rosa has a strained relationship with her own conservative mother, as she is consumed with caring for her ill husband, who suffers from Alzheimer's. The other is actress Huma Rojo, currently appearing as Blanche Dubois in a stage production of A Streetcar Named Desire, which has long been a touchstone for Manuela in productions of it coinciding with milestone moments in her life, this production no different. Huma is in a troubled codependent relationship with her younger "Stella Kowalski" costar Nina Cruz, a closet junkie, hence Huma's emotional need for support. By the end of her stay in Barcelona, Manuela will have another non-relative for who she will feel the need to act as a mother figure.

notre-dame brûle_2022.opis_neo:
Zgodba o požaru, ki je več kot samo to. Je zgodba o pogumu, o neverjetnih izgubah.

Bilo je 15. aprila 2019 okoli 18. ure, ko se je zgodilo nekaj nepredstavljivega, in to pred očmi in kamerami vsega sveta. 

Pariško katedralo Notre-Dame so zajeli plameni. 400 gasilcev se je borilo z ognjem, da bi preprečili popolno uničenje znamenite katedrale Notre-Dame.

Ta napeti filmski spektakel slavnega francoskega režiserja Jeana-Jacquesa Annauda, znanega po kultni klasiki "Ime rože", je nastal predvsem za prikazovanje na velikih platnih kinodvoran. 

Režiser je uporabil številne dejanske posnetke, ki so jih posneli gasilci in pariška policija ter pričanja članov gasilskih brigad, stanovalcev in faranov.
notre-dame brûle_2022.opis_omdb: A film relating from the inside the Notre-Dame de Paris fire of April 2019.

harvie and the magic museum_2017.opis_neo:
Odpravite se na pustolovščino z Luko in njegovo druščino v pozabljene čarobne muzeje.

Odpravite se na pustolovščino z Luko in njegovo druščino v pozabljene čarobne muzeje. Luka je pameten, ampak preživahen deček z eno željo: končati zadnji nivo svoje računalniške igrice. Ko bo pristal na igričarskem zidu slavnih, bo njegov veliko odsotni oče končno ponosen nanj. Toda zaključek igrice bo šele začetek velike pustolovščine, ki bo popeljala Luko, njegovega psa in prijateljico Moniko v davno pozabljeni muzej lutk, kjer bodo oživili vse lutke in spoznali strašnega lutkarja! Zmaga nad zmešanim lutkarjem ne bi rešila zgolj njegovega očeta, temveč vse mesto pred strašno starodavno usodo.
harvie and the magic museum_2017.opis_omdb: Harvie is a smart but a bit too lively boy with one ambition, to finish the last level of his computer game. Once in the Gamers Hall of Fame, his absent-minded father, would finally be proud of him. But finishing the game turns out to be only the start of a real adventure that takes Harvie, his dog Jerry, and his friend Monica deep into the forgotten realms of the city's old puppet museum.

love & mercy_2014.opis_neo:
Glasbena biografska drama govori o Brianu Wilsonu, izjemnem glasbeniku, čigar glasba je zaznamovala celotno generacijo šestdesetih let.

Glasbena biografska drama govori o Brianu Wilsonu, izjemnem glasbeniku, čigar glasba je zaznamovala celotno generacijo šestdesetih let. Prvič razkrivamo kaos, norost in neverjetno zgodbo enega največjih glasbenih genijev naše dobe.
love & mercy_2014.opis_omdb: Brian Wilson is the creative soul of The Beach Boys, but he paid a heavy price for his talent. That especially shows during his peak artistic years in the 1960s, as his inner demons and obsessions trying to please his abusive father drive him to a mental breakdown that would plague him for years. In the 1980s, with Brian barely functional under the domination of the unscrupulous Dr. Landy, Brian meets and falls in love with Melinda Ledbetter. As their relationship grows, she observes Brian's crippling subservience to the abusive psychotherapist with growing alarm. Ultimately, she must take action with a love willing to stand up to oppression she cannot ignore.

the good mother_2023.opis_neo:
Po umoru odtujenega sina novinarka sklene malo verjetno zavezništvo z njegovo nosečo punco, da bi izsledila odgovorne.

Marissa, novinarka, od policistovega sina izve, da je njeni odtujeni sin odvisnik Michael mrtev. Strta se opija med gledanjem Michaelovih posnetkov. Na pogrebu opazi Paige, Michaelovo dekle. Pristopi k njej in ji prisoli klofuto v trenutku, ko Paige pove, da je noseča. Posumi, da je Paige odgovorna za sinovo odvisnost, toda Paige vztraja, da sta bila oba čista. Skupaj se soočita s svetom mamil in korupcije v podzemlju majhnega mesta.
the good mother_2023.opis_omdb: After the murder of her estranged son, a journalist forms an unlikely alliance with his pregnant girlfriend to track down those responsible. Together, they confront a world of drugs and corruption in the underbelly of a small city.

jackie_2016.opis_neo:
Biografska zgodba o Jackie Kennedy, vdovi ameriškega predsednika Johna F. Kennedyja, po njegovi smrti.

Prva dama Jacqueline Kennedy skuša po atentatu na ameriškega predsednika Johna F. Kennedyja ostati močna, in po travmatičnem dogodku, ki je zaznamoval njeno družino, znova obuditi vero, potolažiti otroke ter definirati zgodovinsko zapuščino svojega soproga. Zgodba spremlja njeno življenje od trenutka atentata do intervjuja za revijo Life.
jackie_2016.opis_omdb: This movie is a portrait of one of the most important and tragic moments in American history, seen through the eyes of the iconic First Lady, then Jacqueline Kennedy (Natalie Portman). Jackie places us in her world during the days immediately following her husband's assassination. Known for her extraordinary dignity and poise, here we see a portrait of the First Lady as she fights to establish her husband's legacy and the world of "Camelot" that she created and loved so well.

vuelven_2017.opis_neo:
Tretji film mehiške filmske ustvarjalke Isse Lopez naposled daje glas celotni generaciji otrok, ki jih je družba zapustila in nanje pozabila.

Estrella je stara 10 let in ima tri želje. Prva je, da bi se njena pogrešana mama vrnila in se to zares zgodi. Njena mati se vrne, vendar je mrtva in povsod sledi Estrelli. 

Okamnela Estrella ji poskuša pobegniti tako, da se pridruži tolpi otrok, ki so zaradi nasilja osiroteli. Kmalu spozna, da mrtvi nikoli ne pustiš za seboj in ko si sredi brutalnosti in nasilja, se želje nikoli ne uresničijo tako, kot si želiš.
vuelven_2017.opis_omdb: Laura and Miguel are a perfect couple. Who wouldn't want to live in their house?

struck by lightning_2012.opis_neo:
Domiselna in nesramna komedija o odraščanju in preživetju v srednji šoli.

Domiselna in nesramna komedija o odraščanju in preživetju v srednji šoli; ko te vrstniki ne razumejo, tvoji starši pa so zmešani – in vse, kar imaš, so tvoje sanje.
struck by lightning_2012.opis_omdb: A high school boy, desperate to escape the idiocy of the people in his hometown, tries to create a way in which he can move to New York, attend the college of his dreams and do something other than live in the footsteps of his drunken, divorced mother. Along the way he blackmails his fellow students into contributing to his literary magazine and discovers what it's like to feel accomplished. Does he get accepted into the college of his dreams? Is he going to make a difference and follow his life goal?

the wild life_2016.opis_neo:
Crusoejev ljubljenček papagaj Torek, ki sanja o odkrivanju sveta, nam bo povedal zgodbo o Crusoeju in njegovih nenavadnih prijateljih.

Avtorji svetovnih uspešnic Samova pustolovščina 1 in 2 ter Hiša velikega čarodeja nam prinašajo resnično zgodbo o brodolomcu nezlomljivega duha, Robinsonu Crusoeju, ki oživi na filmskih platnih. Njegov neprekosljivi ljubljenček papagaj Torek, ki sanja o odkrivanju sveta, nam bo povedal to zgodbo o Crusoeju in njegovih nenavadnih prijateljih.
the wild life_2016.opis_omdb: On a tiny exotic island, Tuesday, an outgoing parrot lives with his quirky animal friends in paradise. However, Tuesday can't stop dreaming about discovering the world. After a violent storm, Tuesday and his friends wake up to find a strange creature on the beach: Robinson Crusoe. Tuesday immediately views Crusoe as his ticket off the island to explore new lands. Likewise, Crusoe soon realizes that the key to surviving on the island is through the help of Tuesday and the other animals. It isn't always easy at first, as the animals don't speak "human." Slowly but surely, they all start living together in harmony, until one day, when their comfortable life is overturned by two savage cats, who wish to take control of the island. A battle ensues between the cats and the group of friends but Crusoe and the animals soon discover the true power of friendship up against all odds (even savage cats).

chaos walking_2021.opis_neo:
Dva nenavadna spremljevalca se podata na nevarno pustolovščino skozi nevarne dežele neraziskanega planeta.

V ne tako oddaljeni prihodnosti Todd Hewitt (Tom Holland) odkrije Violo (Daisy Ridley), skrivnostno dekle, ki strmoglavi na njegovem planetu, kujer so vse ženske izginile, moške pa muči „Hrup” – sila, ki prinaša razsvetljenje vsem njihovim mislim. V tej nevarni pokrajini je Violino življenje ogroženo in medtem, ko se Todd zaobljubi, da jo bo zaščitil, bo hkrati moral odkriti lastno moč in razkriti temne skrivnosti planeta.
chaos walking_2021.opis_omdb: In the not-too-distant future, Todd Hewitt (Tom Holland) discovers Viola (Daisy Ridley), a mysterious girl who crash lands on his planet, where all the women have disappeared and the men are afflicted by "the Noise" - a force that puts all their thoughts on display. In this dangerous landscape, Viola's life is threatened - and as Todd vows to protect her, he will have to discover his own inner power and unlock the planet's dark secrets. From the director of The Bourne Identity and Edge of Tomorrow and based on the best-selling novel The Knife of Never Letting Go, Daisy Ridley and Tom Holland star with Mads Mikkelsen, Demián Bichir, Cynthia Erivo, Nick Jonas, Kurt Sutter, and David Oyelowo in Chaos Walking.

jexi_2019.opis_neo:
Komedija o socialno nerodnemu moškem, ki mu življenje zagreni izjemno napredna in vsiljiva digitalna pomočnica na mobilnem telefonu.

Phil ima resen problem odvisnosti od telefona. Nima niti prijateljev ali dekleta. Življenje pa se mu obrne na glavo, ko je primoran svoj stari telefon zamenjati za nov model, ki ima nepričakovane napredne funkcije. Jexi, nova digitalna pomočnica, postane njegov življenjski partner in skrbi za vsa področja Philovega življenja. Dobesedno vsa področja!
jexi_2019.opis_omdb: Phil has a major dependency issue - he's addicted to his phone. He has no friends, he has a job writing pop culture "Top 10" lists, and his love life is non-existent. But his Facebook status is about to change. When he is forced to upgrade his phone, the latest model comes with an unexpected feature...Jexi - an A.I. life coach, virtual assistant and cheerleader. With her help, Phil begins to get a real life. But as he becomes less dependent on his phone, Jexi's artificial intelligence morphs into a tech nightmare determined to keep Phil all to herself, even if it means ruining his chances of finding success.

cuando acecha la maldad_2023.opis_neo:
Ko brata Pedro in Jimmy odkrijeta, da z demonom obsedeni sosed zastruplja živino, ga skušata pregnati s svoje posesti.

Ker se brata ne držita pravil izganjanja, z nepremišljenim ravnanjem sprožita epidemijo obsedenosti v vasi. Zdaj morata pobegniti pred zlom in poiskati "čistilca", ki lahko edini ustavi nadnaravno pošast.
cuando acecha la maldad_2023.opis_omdb: In a remote village, two brothers find a demon-infected man just about to "give birth" to evil itself. They decide to get rid of the body, only to end up unintentionally spreading chaos.

stark raving mad_2002.opis_neo:
Slepar potiho načrtuje maščevanje za svojega brata, ki ga je ubil njegov šef.

Ben (Seann William Scott) je fant, obseden z "National Geographicom", ki mora odplačevati dolg pokojnega brata lokalnemu gangsterju (Lou Diamond Phillips). Kmalu dobi pravo priložnost za poravnavo računov: organiziral bo najbolj noro rave zabavo v klubu ob banki, v čigar sefu se nahaja dragocen kipec. Načrt je sledeč: glasba bo izjemno glasna, Ben pa bo z druščino prebil zid in nemoteno prišel v banko. Toda na poti do uresničitve načrta je precej ovir: živčni lastnik kluba, kjer bo zabava, vodja nasprotnega gangsterskega klana, Benovo ogorčeno nekdanje dekle, nekaj agentov FBI in 16-letna nimfomanka
stark raving mad_2002.opis_omdb: Ben McGewan has a deal with Chinatown's non-Chinese gang boss, Gregory, to steal one of four mythical god statues reputed to give immense power. This theft, in exchange for wiping out his debt and a fortune to pay his team of frustrated experts. They organize a wild after hours party in a nightclub as cover to break into the vault of the bank next door. Alas, from the start things go wrong ever worse, for everyone.

le flic de belleville_2018.opis_neo:
Ko ubijejo njegovega prijatelja iz otroštva, se francoski policist odpravi v Miami in združi moči z ameriškim kolegom, da bi našel krivce.

Zvezdnik filma Prijatelja, Omar Sy, z Luisom Guzmanom nastopa v akcijski komediji Francoski kifeljc v Miamiju. Sy je Baaba Bouchard, ki vse svoje življenje prebiva v pariški četrti Belleville, v kateri njegova mati vlada kot kraljica. Zavrnil je vse mogoče ugodnosti v službi policije, da bi le ostal v tej četrti. Celo njegovo dekle se strinja s tem, da se ne premakne nikamor. A nekega dne iz Miamija pride njegov prijatelj iz otroštva, Roland, saj ga želi opozoriti na trgovanje z mamili, ki se odvija v soseski. Rolanda kmalu umorijo in Baaba se v želji za maščevanjem odpravi v Miami, kjer združi moči z ameriškim policajem Ricardom (Luis Guzman), kateremu nikakor ni všeč Baabov način dela.
le flic de belleville_2018.opis_omdb: When a childhood friend from Miami gets killed after he comes to warn of encroaching drug gangs, Baaba moves to Miami and teams up with a local officer to bring down the criminals.

the bling ring_2013.opis_neo:
Skupina najstnikov, obsedenih s slavo, po spletu sledi zvezdnikom, da jim lahko v njihovi odsotnosti oropa domove.

Film posnet po resnični zgodbi, spremlja skupino najstnikov, obsedenih z glamuroznim življenjem slavnih. Prek spleta zasledujejo svoje bodoče žrtve in iz njihovih domov kradejo luksuzne predmete. Med drugim so okradli Paris Hilton in Orlanda Blooma ter zasloveli kot 'Bling Ring' tolpa, ki si je prisvojila za dobre tri milijone dolarjev tujega premoženja.
the bling ring_2013.opis_omdb: Quiet teenager Marc Hall arrives as a new student at Indian Hills High School in Agoura Hills, California. He is befriended by fame-obsessed Rebecca Ahn. While at a party at Rebecca's house, the pair check unlocked vehicles on the street, taking valuables such as cash and credit cards. When Marc mentions that one of his wealthy acquaintances is out of town, Rebecca persuades him to join her in breaking into his house. Rebecca steals a handbag, mentioning that her idol, Lindsay Lohan, has the same one. She also steals cash and the keys to a Porsche, which the pair use to flee the scene. With the cash, the two go on a shopping spree, affording themselves the luxury lifestyle they admire in magazines. Marc visits a nightclub with Rebecca and her friends Nicki Moore, Nicki's adoptive sister Sam, and Chloe Tainer, where they rub shoulders with celebrities such as Kirsten Dunst and Paris Hilton. While researching Hilton on the Internet, Marc and Rebecca realize that she will be out of town. The pair go to her house, and finding the key under the doormat, they go through Hilton's belongings, taking some jewelry. Rebecca then flaunts a stolen bracelet to Nicki, Sam, and Chloe at a party..

xun long jue_2015.opis_neo:
Leta 1969 na Kitajskem moška preživita izkušnjo z nadnaravno grobnico. Leta kasneje morata z zaročenko enega izmed njiju ponovno poiskati to grobnico.

Leto 1988. Trije "mojini" - prenilci grobov - Hu Bayi, Wang Kaixuan in njegova zaročenka Shirley Yang se upokojijo in se preselijo v New York. Bayi in Shirley se posvetita svoji zvezi, Kaixuanu pa se zdi, da si veliki mojini zaslužijo kaj več kot finančne težave, ki ji jih pestijo v ZDA. Trojico skrivnosten poslovnež potegne nazaj v plenjenje grobov po osrednji Mongoliji in Kitajski, pri čemer skušajo razvozlati smrt Ding Sitian, Bayijeve prve ljubezni, ki je umrla leta 1969.
xun long jue_2015.opis_omdb: In 1988, the three Mojin(tomb raider), Hu Bayi, Wang Kaixuan, and Shirley Yang, retires and relocates to New York. While Bayi and Shirley have become romantically involved and Kaixuan feels that the great Mojin deserve more than the financial despair they've faced in the States, the trio are pulled back into a grave-robbing game in Inner Mongolia, China, to explore the reason behind the death of Ding Sitian, who was Bayi and Kaixuan's first love died back in 1969.

till death_2021.opis_neo:
Po romantičnem večeru v njuni samotni hiši ob jezeru se ženska zbudi vklenjena v lisice na svojega mrtvega moža.

Emma je v stagnirajočem zakonu z Markom, ki jo za 10. obletnico poroke pelje na osamljeno hišo ob jezeru, kjer naj bi preživela romantičen večer. Naslednje jutro se zbudi priklenjena z lisicami na Markovo mrtvo telo. Ne vedoč, kdo je ubil Marka in izolirana na samem v hudi zimi, Emma spozna, da je to samo začetek Markovega podlega plana. Da bi preživela, se mora boriti z najetimi morilci, ki jo želijo ubiti.
till death_2021.opis_omdb: Emma is stuck in a stale marriage to Mark and is surprised when he whisks her away to their secluded lakehouse for a romantic evening on their 11th anniversary. But everything changes the next morning when she finds herself handcuffed to Mark's dead body. Trapped and isolated in the dead of winter, for Emma to survive, she must fight the mysterious killers coming to finish her off.

revolver_2005.opis_neo:
Hazarder Jake Green je po zaslugi koruptivnega lastnika igralnice za sedem let pristal v zaporu. Po prestani kazni je čas za maščevanje.

Eden najslavnejših hazarderjev v Las Vegasu Jake Green ima le redko priložnost vstopiti v igralnico, saj vselej zmaguje. Priigral je že toliko denarja, da je postal edina stranka svojega brata knjigovodje Billyja.
revolver_2005.opis_omdb: After seven years in solitary, Jake Green is released from prison. In the next two years, he amasses a lot of money by gambling. He's ready to seek his revenge on Dorothy (Mr. D) Macha, a violence-prone casino owner who sent Jake to prison. He humiliates Macha in front of Macha's lieutenants, leaves, and keels over. Doctors tell him he has a rare disease and will die in three days; Macha also puts a hit out on him. Loan sharks, Zack and Avi, demand Jake's cash and complete fealty in return for protection. Jake complies, and through narration and flashbacks, we watch him through at least three days of schemes, danger, and redemption. Who is his greatest enemy?

random acts of violence_2019.opis_neo:
Pisatelj stripov začne opažati strašljive podobnosti med likom, ki ga je ustvaril, in grozljivimi dogodki iz resničnega življenja.

Tvorec stripov Todd Walkley, njegova soproga Kathy, pomočnica Aurora in najboljši prijatelj, lastnik prodajalnice stripov Ezra, se odpravijo na potovanje od Toronta do New Yorka in na stripovske konvencije, kjer se začnejo dogajati grozljive reči. Na poti se začnejo dogajati umori. Kmalu postane jasno, da uporablja nori oboževalec Toddov strip "SLASHERMAN" kod navdih za umore.
random acts of violence_2019.opis_omdb: A pair of comic book writers begin to notice scary similarities between the character they created and horrific real-life events.

streets of blood_2009.opis_neo:
Partner policista po uradnih podatkih izgubi življenje v hurikanu Katrina, a nato se pojavijo dvomi.

New Orleans je pravkar prizadela najhujša katastrofa v zgodovini mesta, orkan Katrina. Na tisoče prebivalcev je ostalo brez svojih ljubljenih, brez domov in lastnine. Zmeda, ki nastopi, je idealna priložnost za podkupljive policiste in razne kriminalce, ki skušajo vzpostaviti nadzor v mestnem podzemlju. Ko je partner policijskega veterana Andyja umorjen, poskuša psihologinja Nina Ferraro priti do dna resnici. Sumi, da sta tako Andy kot njegov novi partner Stan podkupljena.
streets of blood_2009.opis_omdb: In New Orleans after 'Katrina', the partner of Detective Andy Devereaux is found dead, so Devereaux is teamed up with Stan Green. During the investigation, an undercover DEA agent is murdered by two dirty police officers. A psychologist, Nina Ferraro, has successive interviews with Andy, Stan and the two detectives. Meanwhile, the FBI also investigates the corruption in the police force headed by Agent Brown.

find me guilty_2006.opis_neo:
Ko policija aretira 20 članov mafijske družine Lucchese, oblasti Jackieju DiNorsciou ponudijo dogovor.

Ko policija aretira dvajset članov mafijske družine Lucchese, ponudijo oblasti Jacku Dee DiNorsciou (Vin Diesel) kupčijo: krajše prestajanje kazni v zaporu, če bo pričal proti svojim. Toda prebrisana glava ima druge zamisli. Zavrne sodelovanje in se odloči, da se bo branil sam. Sodno dvorano postavi na glavo v zelo komičnih preobratih, ki vodijo k eni izmed najbolj šokantnih razsodb v sodni zgodovini. Film brez dvoma dokazuje, da ima pravica čuden smisel za humor.
find me guilty_2006.opis_omdb: The mobster Jackie DiNorscio is shot by his own cousin at home while on probation but survives. Later he is arrested dealing drugs and sentenced to thirty years in prison. The prosecutor Sean Kierney proposes a deal to Jackie, immediately releasing him if he testifies against the Lucchese family and other mafia families but Jackie does not accept to rat out his friends that he loves. When the trial begins, he asks the judge Finestein to defend himself without the assistance of a lawyer.

the signal_2014.opis_neo:
Tri študente, ki mislijo, da so konkurenčnega računalniškega hekerja izsledili do puščave v Nevadi, čaka presenečanje.

Tri prijatelje iskanje razvpitega računalniškega genija pripelje na območje, kjer se zgodi nekaj nerazložljivega. Ko se Nic zbudi, ga začne zasliševati moški v skafandru ...
the signal_2014.opis_omdb: On a road trip, Nic and two friends are drawn to an isolated area by a computer genius. When everything suddenly goes dark, Nic regains consciousness - only to find himself in a waking nightmare.

barely lethal_2015.opis_neo:
Najstniška posebna agentka uprizori lastno smrt in se vpiše v šolo. Hitro se zave, da je težje preživeti srednješolsko zahrbtnost kot pa vohunstvo.

Megan je najstniška posebna agentka, ki si vse bolj želi izkusiti normalno mladost, a ji agencija, ki jo je urila od malih nog, tega ne dovoli. Iznajdljiva najstnica zato priredi lastno smrt in se vpiše v predmestno srednjo šolo. Hitro se zave, da bo srednješolsko življenje še težje preživeti kot pa mednarodno vohunstvo.
barely lethal_2015.opis_omdb: Megan Walsh has been training to be an international assassin for Hardman. However, while she is on a mission, she notices how other teenagers her age seem to be having fun and enjoying their lives. Desiring a normal life, she bails out of a mission and enrolls in a student exchange program, while in the process of being adopted by a foster family. She soon becomes a part of the high school and is subjected to the pressures and life of being in its environment.

operation fortune: ruse de guerre_2023.opis_neo:
Super vohun Orson Fortune in njegova ekipa operativcev rekrutirajo eno največjih hollywoodskih filmskih zvezd, da jim pomaga pri tajni misiji.

Super vohun Orson Fortune mora izslediti in ustaviti prodajo nove tehnologije smrtonosnega orožja, ki jo uporablja milijarder, posrednik z orožjem Greg Simmonds. Fortune se združi z ekipo nekaterih najboljših svetovnih operativcev in zaposli največjega hollywoodskega filmskega zvezdnika Dannyja Francesca, da jim pomaga na tej svetovni tajni misiji reševanja sveta.
operation fortune: ruse de guerre_2023.opis_omdb: In the film, super spy Orson Fortune (Jason Statham) must track down and stop the sale of a deadly new weapons technology wielded by billionaire arms broker Greg Simmonds (Hugh Grant). Reluctantly teamed with some of the world's best operatives (Aubrey Plaza, Cary Elwes, Bugzy Malone), Fortune and his crew recruit Hollywood's biggest movie star Danny Francesco (Josh Hartnett) to help them on their globe-trotting undercover mission to save the world.

hell & back_2015.opis_neo:
Remy, Augie in Curt so dolgoletni prijatelji, katerih počitniško delo ne gre po načrtih, zato se Remy odloči vprašati za nasvet prerokinjo.

Njihova radovednost in zakrnela inteligenca osvobodi krvno zavezo Belcebubu - legendarni mit, ki dokaže svojo moč, ko Hudič zvleče Curta v pekel.
hell & back_2015.opis_omdb: Remy, Augie and Curt are best friends since birth who are working at a run down carnival. When they jokingly take a blood oath and break it, Curt is dragged to Hell to be sacrificed. Now Remy and Augie must risk everything to save their friend from a slew of misfit demons, Greek legends and the Devil himself.

lassie_2005.opis_neo:
Družina v denarni stiski je prisiljena prodati psičko, ta pa novemu lastniku pobegne in se poda na dolgo pot domov.

Družina je v težkih razmerah prisiljena prodati svojega najljubšega psa. Daleč od svoje prave družine se škotski ovčar levjega srca odpravi na dolgi beg proti domu. LASSIE je brezčasna zgodba o prijateljstvu med fantom in psom v rudarskem mestecu v pokrajini Yorkshire v Angliji. Za družino Carraclough (John Lynch in Samatha Morton) so nastopili hudi časi: nastopil je čas krize, zato so prisiljeni prodati Lassie, svojega najdražjega psa, vojvodi Rudlingu (Peter O'Toole), kar zlomi srce njihovemu devetletnemu sinu Joeju (Jonathan Mason). Lassie odhaja v 800 km oddaljeni vojvodov dvorec na severni obali Škotske, vendar je v svoje želji odločna vrniti se domov. Tako se začne neverjetna pustolovščina, v kateri potuje Lassie skozi nekatere od najlepših krajev Škotske in Anglije, sooča pa se s številnimi nevarnostmi, ki ji pretijo s strani tako ljudi kot narave, vendar naleti tudi na pomoč na najbolj nepričakovanih mestih. Njenega duha se ne da zlomiti: vrnila se bo domov, ravno pravi čas za skupno veselje celotne družine ob božiču.
lassie_2005.opis_omdb: Life is hard for Yorkshire miner's son Joe Carraclough (Jonathan Mason), who is beaten at school by a his teacher, his only consolation is his collie Lassie. It gets worse: when the mine is decommissioned, his father, Sam (John Lynch), is forced to sell the dog to The Duke (Peter O'Toole), who owns the local estate. The Duke's servant, Hynes (Steve Pemberton), scares the dog, who keeps running back, so the Carracloughs have to keep returning her, until the Duke moves to the Scottish Highlands for the holiday season. Lassie escapes, embarking on a desperate journey home, with daunting Glasgow dogcatchers and taken in by a circus performer. It looks like a miracle is needed, by Christmas.

le prince oublié_2020.opis_neo:
Omar Sy, zvezda filmov Prijatelja in Samba, ima glavno vlogo v novi pustolovski komediji z oskarjem nagrajenega režiserja.

V Djibijevem življenju se vse vrti okoli njegove sedemletne hčerke Sofije. Predan samohranilec nikoli ne zamudi branja pravljic pred spanjem, kjer je v pravljičnih pustolovščinah glavni junak prav on. Sofija je pet let pozneje najstnica, ki se ji očkove pravljice ne zdijo več zabavne, zato Djibi išče načine, kako za svojo hčerko za vselej ostati junak.
le prince oublié_2020.opis_omdb: Through a series of time and fate, a young con artist is faced with the decision on whether or not to preserve the legacy of motion picture and its original inventor.

ne le dis à personne_2006.opis_neo:
Alex žaluje za svojo ženo, ki je bila pred leti umorjena. Nato pa prejme posnetek, na katerem je živa in zdrava, ter sporočilo: ''Nikomur ne povej!''.

Pediater Alex Beck je še vedno pretresen zaradi krutega umora svoje soproge Margot - kmalu potem, ko sta se poročila. Ko prejme anonimno e-pismo, klikne na povezavo in na posnetku zagleda obraz ženske v množici. Margot? Je še živa? Zakaj mu govori, naj ne pove živi duši? Vprašanj je nešteto, a Alex ne bo imel časa razmišljati o njih, saj se znajde sred preiskave o njenem umoru izpred osmih let - kot osumljenec.
ne le dis à personne_2006.opis_omdb: Pediatrician Dr. Alexandre Beck (François Cluzet) misses his beloved wife Margot Beck (Marie-Josée Croze), who was brutally murdered eight years ago when he was the prime suspect. When two bodies are found near where the corpse of Margot was dumped, the Police re-open the case and Alex becomes suspect again. The mystery increases when Alex receives an e-mail showing Margot older and alive.

final storm_2010.opis_neo:
Tujec po imenu Silas beži pred uničujočo nevihto in se zateče na Tomovo in Gillianino kmetijo.

Tujec po imenu Silas beži pred uničujočo nevihto in se zateče na Tomovo in Gillianino kmetijo. Medtem ko Tom in Gillian poskušata kljubovati nevihti, se zdi, da je Silas edini, ki jima lahko pomaga preživeti. Toda nihče ne ve, da so na delu še nevarnejše sile, ki se bodo slej ko prej spravile tako na Silasa kot na Toma in Gillian.
final storm_2010.opis_omdb: A stranger named Silas flees from a devastating storm and finds refuge with Tom and Gillian on their farm. While struggling with the Storm, Silas seems to be the only one who can help Tom and Gillian weather it, but there are other more dangerous forces out there, that are waiting for the three.

tito e gli alieni_2017.opis_neo:
Samotno življenje znanstvenika, ki živi in dela v puščavi v Nevadi, vznemiri prihod nečaka in nečakinje iz Neaplja.

Profesor Biondi je znanstvenik, ki naj bi v Nevadi razvijal tajni projekt za vlado ZDA, dejansko pa preživlja dneve na kavču in posluša domnevne zvoke iz vesolja. Nekega dne izve, da mu brat na smrtni postelji zapušča skrbništvo za svoja otroka, najstnika Anito in Tita, ki pričakujeta luči Las Vegasa, znajdeta pa se sredi puščave, s čudaškim stricem.
tito e gli alieni_2017.opis_omdb: After his wife's death the Professor (Valerio Mastandrea) lives isolated from the world in the Nevada desert, near Area 51. He supposedly works on a top-secret project for the US government. He supposedly works on a top-secret project for the US government, but in actuality, he spends his days on the couch, listening to the sound of the Universe. His only contact with the outside world is Stella, who organizes alien-themed weddings for tourists on the prowl for extra-terrestrials. One day the Professor receives a message from Naples: his dying brother is entrusting him with his two children, so that they may live with him in America. Anita (16) and Tito (7) arrive expecting the legendary brightening lights of Las Vegas, but instead, they find themselves in the middle of nowhere, in the hands of their nutty uncle and in a weird, mysterious place where aliens are said to live.

the devil and daniel webster_2004.opis_neo:
Bodoči pisatelj Jabez Stone z Manhattna je popolna zguba.

Hudič je v detajlih. Pisatelj in čista zguba - to je Jabez Stone! Prodati ne more niti enega svojega romana, živi v bornem stanovanju in nima sreča z ženskami. Ko pa njegov prijatelj Julius Jenson proda svoj roman za 190 000 dolarjev, mu Jabez zavida uspeh in obljubi, da bi za tak uspeh prodal dušo samemu hudiču. Čisto slučajno ubije s svojim pisalnim strojem neko žensko in takrat se začnejo težave. Na vrata mu potrka sam Hudič, uredi zadevo in z Jabezom podpiše pogodbo. Njegovi hudo zanič romani postanejo knjižne uspešnice, obogati in ima uspeh pri ženskah, vendar pa malo časa za prijatelje. Sreča se z založnikom Danielom Websterjem, ki mu ponudi priložnost, da prekliče pogodbo s Hudičem.
the devil and daniel webster_2004.opis_omdb: Set in 1944, Valiant (Ewan McGregor) is a woodland pigeon who wants to become a great hero someday. When he hears they are hiring recruits for the Royal Homing Pigeon Service, he immediately sets out for London. On the way, he meets a smelly, but friendly pigeon named Bugsy (Ricky Gervais), who joins him, mainly to get away from clients he cheated in a game of find-the pebble, and helps him sign up for the war.

the turning_2020.opis_neo:
Mlado guvernanto najamejo, da bi skrbela za osirotelo dekle, a vrnitev dekličinega problematičnega brata razkrije skrivnosti iz njune preteklosti.

Varuška Kate prispe v sosesko Maineu, kjer naj bi skrbela za sve siroti, Floro in Milesa. Kmalu spozna, da je obnašanje otrok zelo nenavadno, prav tako pa se v hiši dogajajo čudne, paranormalne stvari. Ko Kate odkrije prepovedan del hiše in prebudi temačne sile, ki obsedejo otroka, se začne njena bitka za življenje.
the turning_2020.opis_omdb: A young woman quits her teaching job to be a private tutor (governess) for a wealthy young heiress who witnessed her parent's tragic death. Shortly after arriving, the girl's degenerate brother is sent home from his boarding school. The tutor has some strange, unexplainable experiences in the house and begins to suspect there is more to their story.

gunner_2024.opis_neo:
V napeti akciji se vojni veteran ne bo ustavil pred ničemer, ko njegova otroka padeta v roke nevarnih kriminalcev.

Vojni veteran Lee Gunner vzame sinova na kampiranje, a izlet se spremeni v nočno moro. Ko preprodajalci drog ugrabijo fanta, podcenijo njegove borilne sposobnosti. Toda Gunner je odločen, da reši sinova in se sooči z zloglasnim vodjem tolpe.
gunner_2024.opis_omdb: Lee Gunner tries to save his sons, Luke and Travis, from a dangerous drug gang.

daddy day camp_2007.opis_neo:
Charlie Hinton in Phil Ryerson sta mlada očeta, ki v poletnem času vsako leto organizirata poletni tabor za otroke.

Ker imata trenutno velike finančne težave, bosta letos težko ponovila takšen podvig, zato se odločita za dodatno pomoč. Da bi imela podivjane otroke pod nadzorom, Hilton na pomoč pokliče svojega vojaško izurjenega očeta, pa čeprav se ne razumeta najbolje. Otroci in očetje se tako znajdejo sredi nepozabne avanture, prek katere spotoma razrešijo še medsebojne težave.
daddy day camp_2007.opis_omdb: Seeking to offer his son the satisfying summer camp experience that eluded him as a child, the operator of a neighborhood day care center opens his own camp, only to face financial hardship and stiff competition from a rival camp.

falling like snowflakes_2024.opis_neo:
Fotografinja išče redko 12-strano snežinko za razstavo in združi moči s prijateljem iz otroštva. Podasta se na nepozabno pustolovščino.

Bivši ji nejevoljno pomaga, ko se Teagan odloči posneti fotografijo neulovljive snežinke, ki jo je menda mogoče videti v okoliških gorah. Kmalu se znajdeta v težavah in iščeta zavetje pred bližajočo se nevihto, ob tem pa začutita nepričakovano povezanost.
falling like snowflakes_2024.opis_omdb: A photographer determined to complete her exhibit by capturing a rare photo of a 12-sided snowflake, enlists the help of a childhood friend and they go on a mission they'll never forget.

crime dans le larzac_2020.opis_neo: Umor kmeta, ki je poskrbel, da je bil zelo nepriljubljen, predstavlja nov izziv za preiskovalki - celo vrsto potencialnih storilcev.
crime dans le larzac_2020.opis_omdb: In Saint-Affrique, Aveyron, big-shot farmer Pierre Loiseau is found murdered.

the real west_2024.opis_neo: Ovdovela profesorica Rebecca si želi stalno profesuro na univerzi, a ko na ranču spozna osamljenega kavboja Jaka, šolski cilji stopijo v ozadje.
the real west_2024.opis_omdb: A family vacation to a working Ranch introduces Professor Rebecca to Jake West. Rebecca is a widow chasing tenure and Jake is a handsome cowboy who never settled down.

les mystères du bois galant_2018.opis_neo: Policijska kapitanka Emma Theiler na dopustu najde truplo. Preiskavo vodi z moškim, s katerim je ravno preživela noč.
les mystères du bois galant_2018.opis_omdb: Police captains Emma and Adrien look for a killer who would use a silver bullet - on multiple victims.

las rojas_2021.opis_neo:
Dve ženski kljubujeta vsiljevanju materialističnega sveta, da bi obvarovali naravo in paleontološko najdbo.

Carlota (Mercedes Morán), priznana paleontologinja, v samotnem taboru v gorah straži najpomembnejšo najdbo v svoji karieri: fosilne ostanke hipogrifa, mitološkega bitja, ki je pol ptica, pol lev in katerega obstoj je vprašljiv. Prihod Constanze (Natalie Oreiro), biologinje z nalogo nadzorovati njeno delo, in Freddyja, tekmeca iz preteklosti s slabimi nameni, Carloto prisili, da se sooči z mogočnim sovražnikom, ki lahko uniči celotno ozemlje skupaj z naravnimi viri.
las rojas_2021.opis_omdb: Two women defy the impositions of a materialistic world. Two paleontologists on the warpath will join forces.

robin hood: prince of thieves_1991.opis_neo:
Ko se Robin in njegov mavrski spremljevalec vrneta v Anglijo in spoznata tiranijo šerifa Nottinghama, se odločita, da se mu bosta z izobčenci uprla.

Po tem, ko ga med križarsko vojno ujamejo Turki, Robin iz Locksleyja skupaj z Maorom Azeemom zbeži nazaj v Anglijo. Ko se vrne domov, Robin odkrije, da mu je Nottinghamski šerif ubil očeta, zato mu priseže maščevanje. Skrije se v Sherwoodski gozd, kjer sreča skupino odpadnikov. Postane njihov vodja in z njihovo pomočjo deželo reši pred šerifovo podlostjo.
robin hood: prince of thieves_1991.opis_omdb: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England, where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father, a nobleman loyal to King Richard the Lionheart, has been murdered by the brutal Sheriff of Nottingham, who helped install Richard's treacherous brother, Prince John, as King while Richard is overseas fighting the Crusades. When Robin returns home, he vows to avenge his father's death and restore Richard to the throne. Even though Maid Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help, he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

ji qi zhi xue_2017.opis_neo:
Posebni agent mora pred zloveščo tolpo zaščititi znanstvenika in njegovo stvaritev.

Med pregonom zloglasnega nevarnega zločinca Lin naleti na šokantno odkritje, ko ugotovi, da se je njegova pogrešana hčerka znašla v hudi nevarnosti, saj so v njeno telo kirurško vstavili biokemični izum. 

S pomočjo mladega hekerja Lin skuša ugotoviti povezavo med napredno napravo, zloveščo vojsko, ki mu je za petami, ter nenavadnim pojavom.
ji qi zhi xue_2017.opis_omdb: A special-force agent/police officer is assigned to protect a young woman involved in a science experiment of longevity, from a gangster with an army of advanced technology who desires to obtain her power, while also having connections with him.

tin lung baat bou_2023.opis_neo: Ko uglednega mojstra borilnih veščin obtožijo umora, hoče najti odgovor o lastnem skrivnostnem izvoru in neznanih sovražnikih, ki bi ga radi uničili.
tin lung baat bou_2023.opis_omdb: When a respected martial artist is accused of killing, he goes around in search of answers about his own mysterious origin story and the unknown enemies working to destroy him.

türkisch für anfänger_2012.opis_neo:
Lena se po letalski nesreči znajde na odmaknjenem otoku z najstniškim Turkom, ki ga razganja od hormonov, njegovo verno sestro in Grkom Costo.

Rahločutna in malce nevrotična najstnica Lena po zasilnem pristanku v Indijskem oceanu obtiči na samotnem otoku z možatim Turkom Cemom, njegovo pobožno sestro Yagmur in jecljavim Grkom Costo.
türkisch für anfänger_2012.opis_omdb: After a plane crash Lena Schneider finds herself on a remote Andaman island with a teenage turk Cem, full of hormones, his religious sister and Greek Costa.

the one_2001.opis_neo:
Prebegli agent Gabriel Yulaw potuje v vzporedne resničnosti, da bi ubil druge različice sebe in postal močno bitje, znano kot "Edini". 

Pokvarjeni agent v multiverzumu se odpravi na lov za alternativnimi različicami sebe in z vsakim ubojem postaja močnejši. Le zadnja različica njega samega, v obliki šerifa policijskega oddelka v L. A., lahko ustavi ta boj, preden postane "Edini".
the one_2001.opis_omdb: There is not one universe, but there are many, which is a multiverse. Supposing you are just one person, there are many other versions of you in the other universes, there are ways to travel, but only a police agency, MVA, can travel only for police procedures. Gabriel Yulaw is a former MVA agent, who killed another version of himself in self-defense. It made the other versions of him stronger. When Yulaw found out about this, he became power-hungry killing the 122 other versions for two years. After killing Lawless and getting captured by his former partner Roedecker and a new MVA agent Funsch, Yulaw managed to escape the prison and is trying to kill his last target, Gabe Law who is a police officer. He is also at Yulaw's strength. Roedecker and Funsch now have to arrest Yulaw before he can kill Gabe. There is a possibility that the universe could die or make Yulaw invincible. After encountering Yulaw for the first time, Gabe thought that it was his split personality, but it wasn't. Will Gabe be able to confront Yulaw before or after Yulaw ruins his life?

beowulf & grendel_2005.opis_neo:
Na Danskem v 6. stoletju danski kralj Hrothgar in njegovi bojevniki ubijejo trola, njegov sin Grendel pa se zaobljubi k maščevanju.

Sredi 6. stoletja danski kralj Hrothgar s svojimi bojevniki ubije trola. Njegov sin Grendel priseže maščevanje.
beowulf & grendel_2005.opis_omdb: The blood-soaked tale of a Norse warrior's battle against the great and murderous troll, Grendel. Heads will roll. Out of allegiance to the King Hrothgar, the much respected Lord of the Danes, Beowulf leads a troop of warriors across the sea to rid a village of the marauding monster. The monster, Grendel, is not a creature of mythic powers, but one of flesh and blood - immense flesh and raging blood, driven by a vengeance from being wronged, while Beowulf, a victorious soldier in his own right, has become increasingly troubled by the hero-myth rising up around his exploits. Beowulf's willingness to kill on behalf of Hrothgar wavers when it becomes clear that the King is more responsible for the troll's rampages than was first apparent. As a soldier, Beowulf is unaccustomed to hesitating. His relationship with the mesmerizing witch, Selma, creates deeper confusion. Swinging his sword at a great, stinking beast is no longer such a simple act. The story is set in barbarous Northern Daneland (Denmark).

basic instinct_1992.opis_neo:
Nasilen kriminalist preiskuje krut umor, v katerega je bila morda vpletena manipulativna in zapeljiva pisateljica.

Policist Nick Curran raziskuje skrivnostni umor rock zvezde, čigar bivša ljubica je Catherine Tramell. Pred kratkim je napisala roman, v katerem prav tako umorijo glasbeno zvezdo. Ali to dokazuje njeno krivdo ali je morilec hotel sum zvaliti na Catherine?

Že na prvem zaslišanju Nick spozna, da je Catherine zelo zapeljiva, skrivnostna, zvita in mogoče celo sposobna ubijanja. Preiskava ga pripelje na sled neulovljivi serijski morilki, ki svoje žrtve pokonča sredi vročih posteljnih igric.
basic instinct_1992.opis_omdb: A former rock star, Johnny Boz, is brutally killed during sex, and the case is assigned to detective Nick Curran of the SFPD. During the investigation, Nick meets Catherine Tramell, a crime novelist who was Boz's girlfriend when he died. Catherine proves to be a very clever and manipulative woman, and though Nick is more or less convinced that she murdered Boz, he is unable to find any evidence. Later, when Nilsen, Nick's rival in the police, is killed, Nick suspects of Catherine's involvement in it. He then starts to play a dangerous lust-filled mind game with Catherine to nail her, but as their relationship progresses, the body count rises and contradicting evidences force Nick to start questioning his own suspicions about Catherine's guilt.

swimming for gold_2020.opis_neo:
Navdihujoča drama Zlati plavalci spremlja mlado plavalko Claire.

Claire se po nesreči znajde pred izzivom - premagati strahove in znova najti strast do plavanja. 

Ko jo oče pošlje v Avstralijo, postane trenerka moške plavalne ekipe, ki dvomi o njenih sposobnostih. 

Odločna, da jim dokaže nasprotno, se spopade s predsodki in preseže lastne meje.
swimming for gold_2020.opis_omdb: When Claire Carpenter's dad sends her to Australia to coach an elite boys swim team, Claire finds herself face to face with long-time rival Mikayla Michaels, and the news that the camp will close if the team loses the next meet. To save the camp, Claire must overcome a secret fear, put aside her differences with Mikayla and rediscover her passion.

in the heights_2021.opis_neo:
Musical postavljen v živahno sosesko Washington Heights, New York.

Zgodba spremlja različne like, ki živijo v soseski Washington Heights. V središču predstave je Usnavi, lastnik trgovine, ki skrbi za ostarelo gospo v soseščini. Nasproti njega živi čudovito dekle, ki dela v kozmetičnem salonu in sanja, da bi zmagala na loteriji in pobegnila na obalo svoje rodne Dominikanske republike. Medtem se je Nina, Usnavijeva prijateljica iz otroštva že od prvega letnika šole vrnila v sosesko s presenetljivimi novicami za svoje starše.
in the heights_2021.opis_omdb: In the Heights centers on a variety of characters living in the neighborhood of Washington Heights, on the northern tip of Manhattan. At the center of the show is Usnavi, a bodega owner who looks after the aging Cuban lady next door, pines for the gorgeous girl working in the neighboring beauty salon and dreams of winning the lottery and escaping to the shores of his native Dominican Republic. Meanwhile, Nina, a childhood friend of Usnavi's, has returned to the neighborhood from her first year at college with surprising news for her parents, who have spent their life savings on building a better life for their daughter. Ultimately, Usnavi and the residents of the close-knit neighborhood get a dose of what it means to be home.

otac_2020.opis_neo:
Oče je zgodba o moškem, ki mu zaradi revščine odvzamejo otroke.

Festivalski film Liffe 2020. Presunljiv slavospev človeški vztrajnosti in starševski ljubezni. Po ženinem samomoru, Nikoli, ki živi v skromnih razmerah, po odločbi tamkajšnje socialne službe odvzamejo otroka. Da dokaže, kako krivična je bila ta birokratska odločitev in koliko mu pomenijo otroci, se odloči peš prepotovati tristo kilometrov dolgo pot do glavnega mesta in vložiti pritožbo.
otac_2020.opis_omdb: Father Arsenie, once a Belgradian cult figure from the '80s who has been living as a monk for the past 30 years, is engaged in restoring and creating a spiritual and cultural center in the Monastery of Ribnica, which had been destroyed by the Turks in the 19th century. Reminiscing on his complex past, Father Arsenie takes us into his daily activities as a monk: prayer, service, and culturing Orthodoxy come first. Yet, Father Arsenie is also a very talented painter, writer, and sculptor. As we listen to him answer questions on faith and finding love for God, we also discover his artistic creativity. Through Arsenie's meditative and artistic process, his journey towards Orthodoxy and his complete dedication to spiritual life unravels, bringing us to back his years as a young man in New York. This intimate portrait of a modern and unconventional monk with a higher cause is accompanied by the unparalleled beauty of the landscapes that surround the Monastery of Ribnica.

chloe_2009.opis_neo:
Ko uspešna zdravnica Catherine začne dvomiti o zvestobi svojega moža, svoje sume raziskuje s pomočjo zapeljive mladenke Chloe.

Zdravnica Catherine in profesor David sta na prvi pogled popoln par. Sta srečno poročena in imata najstniškega sina ter živita na videz idilično življenje. Ko pa David zamudi letalo in svojo rojstnodnevno zabavo, postane Catherine sumničava.
chloe_2009.opis_omdb: Catherine and David, she a doctor, he a professor, are at first glance the perfect couple. Happily married with a talented teenage son, they appear to have the perfect life. But when David misses a flight and his surprise birthday party, Catherine's long simmering suspicions rise to the surface. Suspecting infidelity, she decides to hire an escort to seduce her husband and test his loyalty. Catherine finds herself 'directing' Chloe's encounters with David, and Chloe's end of the bargain is to report back, the descriptions becoming increasingly graphic as the meetings multiply.

philadelphia_1993.opis_neo:
Pravnika z nasprotnih ideoloških in moralnih bregov združita moči v tožbi zoper prestižno pravno pisarno zaradi diskriminacije.

Tom Hanks in Denzel Washington upodobita pravnika z nasprotnih ideoloških in moralnih bregov – ki združita moči v tožbi zoper prestižno pravno pisarno zaradi diskriminacije. Njun pogum premaga predsodke in korupcijo njunih nasprotnikov.
philadelphia_1993.opis_omdb: Fearing it would compromise his career, lawyer Andrew Beckett hides his homosexuality and HIV status at a powerful Philadelphia law firm. But his secret is exposed when a colleague spots the illness's telltale lesions. Fired shortly afterwards, Beckett resolves to sue for discrimination, teaming up with Joe Miller (Denzel Washington), the only lawyer willing to help. In court, they face one of his ex-employers top litigators, Belinda Conine.

ouija_2014.opis_neo:
Skupina prijateljev se mora soočiti s svojimi najhujšimi strahovi, ko nehote prebudijo temne sile starodavne spiritistične plošče.

Dekle skrivnostno umre po igri s starodavno desko za klicanje duhov, zato njeni prijatelji začnejo raziskovati okoliščine njene smrti. Toda po tem, ko jo poskušajo kontaktirati s pomočjo deske, nevede odprejo prehod v demonski svet, kar jih prisili, da se soočijo s svojimi najtemnejšimi in najhujšimi strahovi.
ouija_2014.opis_omdb: A girl is mysteriously killed after recording herself playing with an ancient Ouija Board, which leads to a close group of friends to investigate this board. They later find out that some things aren't meant to be played with, especially the 'other side'.

clifton hill_2019.opis_neo:
Težavna mlada ženska se vrne v domači kraj Niagara Falls, kjer jo začne obsedati spomin iz otroštva, nasilna ugrabitev, ki naj bi ji bila priča.

Abby se po dolgi odsotnosti vrača domov v Niagara Falls na materin pogreb ter da uredi vse potrebno, vključno z razpadajočim motelom, ki sta ga podedovali z mlajšo sestro Lauro. Sestri imata napet odnos, ki je v glavnem takšen, ker je Abby patološka lažnivka, ki je prevečkrat lagala in za sabo podrla preveč mostov, da bi ji Laura še kdaj verjela. Ko skuša Abby ohraniti videz odgovorne odrasle osebe in obvladati svoje kompulzivno laganje, naleti na zbirko starih družinskih fotografij, ki jo spomnijo na nasilno ugrabitev, ki ji je bila priča kot otrok med družinskim ribarjenjem na reki Niagari.
clifton hill_2019.opis_omdb: When Abby (Tuppence Middleton) returns to her hometown of Niagara Falls after her mother dies, she becomes obsessed with a fragmented memory from her childhood, a kidnapping she believes she was witness to. She is reunited with her estranged younger sister, Laure (Hannah Gross), and they attempt to settle their mother's estate involving the sale of the family motel, but Abby's compulsive desire to reconcile her past grows increasingly out of control. Albert Shin's latest is an intense and taut psychological thriller that exposes the seedy underbelly of structural systems through the point of view of its dynamic female protagonists. Middleton delivers a stellar and complex performance as a woman obsessed with her troubled past while trying to uncover a crime to which she's convinced she was an accomplice. Shin and co-writer James Schultz craft a sharp, suspenseful drama, equipped with twists and turns, culminating with a climax that will leave you thinking for days.

mascarade_2022.opis_neo:
Bosta ljubimca šla tako daleč, da bi žrtvovala življenje nekdanje filmske zvezde (Isabelle Adjani) in nepremičninarja (François Cluzet)?

Adrien, privlačen plesalec, čigar kariero je uničila nesreča z motorjem, svojo mladost zapravi v brezdelju. Njegovo življenje se spremeni, ko spozna Margot, ki živi od prevar in ljubezenskih manipulacij.
mascarade_2022.opis_omdb: Adrien, an attractive dancer whose career was shattered by a motorcycle accident, squanders his youth in idleness. His life changes when he meets Margot, who lives off scams and amorous manipulations.

n'importe qui_2014.opis_neo:
Komik Rémi se odloči, da je čas da odraste in se zresni. A svoji pravi naravi bo težko ubežal.

Mednarodna slava, ki jo si jo je pridobil Rémi Gaillard s svojimi razvpitimi prispevki na YouTubu, traja že desetletje. Je zvezda, noro smešen, provokativen francoski Borat z 1,4 milijona ogledov njegovih posnetkov. Toda Rémijevo življenje je neurejeno. Ima 38 let, živi od socialne pomoči v majhnem stanovanju v Montpellieru in mora poslušati svoje dekle, ki kar naprej sitnari, da počne neumnosti, namesto da bi počel kaj resnega. Vsi njegovi prijatelji imajo družine in službe, zato se tudi Rémi odloči, da se bo zresnil. Poroči se s svojo punco, ki je v šestem mesecu nosečnosti, tast mu je dal službo, preseli v hiško v predmestju ... Toda novo, normalno življenje za novega Rémija, ki ne počne več neumnosti, izgubi tudi vso radost.
n'importe qui_2014.opis_omdb: Rémi Gaillard is the real character of the World network, troll, provocateur, one of the biggest-selling comic actor in Europe. One and a half milliards of viewing and millions of fans. A day came, and he decided to steady down: got married, settled down on work on a parking place, promised a pregnant wife, that also «goes away to the decree» and gives up the pranks. But how to deafen talent and disorderly conduct of fantasy?. Fans can not assume his care. Gaillard returns.

the ides of march_2011.opis_neo:
Mladi kampanjski svetovalec postane tarča političnih iger pred volitvami.

Z ostrimi in spretnimi dialogi v sodobnem svetu moči in politike so Marčeve ide napeta zgodba o ambicijah, zvestobi, prevari in maščevanju. Film spremlja mladega političnega svetovalca, ki postane žrtev spletkarske politike, zahrbtnih manipulacij in zapeljevanja.
the ides of march_2011.opis_omdb: Stephen Meyers is a young idealist who's brilliant at communications, is second in command of Governor Mike Morris's presidential campaign, and is a true believer. In the middle of the Ohio primary, the campaign manager of Morris's opponent asks Meyers to meet; he offers him a job. At the same time, Morris's negotiations for the endorsement of the man in third place, a North Carolina Senator, hit a snag. A young campaign intern, Molly Stearns, gets Stephen's romantic attention. Republicans have a trick up their sleeve; Stephen may be too trusting, and Molly has a secret. What's most important, career, victory, or virtue?

ola de crímenes_2018.opis_neo:
Leyre je pripravljena na vse, da zaščiti sina, s tem pa po naključju sproži kaotični val zločinov v Bilbau.

Leyre, dobro situirana, ločena in malce zmedena gospodinja, se mora soočiti s situacijo, na katero se ne da pripraviti: njen sin, najstnik težavnega vedenja, med napadom besa ubije očeta. Leyre je pripravljena na vse, da ga zaščiti, s tem pa sproži kaotičen val zločinov v Bilbau. V tem času nova soproga pokojnika poskuša prikriti primer korupcije.
ola de crímenes_2018.opis_omdb: Leyre is a forty-something woman who lives in Bilbao, Basque Country (north to Spain) that tries to open a cupcakes shop. Divorced of Cosme, a corrupt CEO who is married in second terms with Vanesa, her attempt to build a life for herself and her teen son Asier turns upside-down after to realize that the absent-minded Asier killed his father during a Cosme's visit when he started to despise openly his son. Trying to save Asier to going the jail, Leyre hides the corpse in Cosme's car and suggested by Asier, goes to a bar implying a taxi driver in a fake scene of harassment to pay attention and having an alibi. But Vanesa and her corrupt lawyer Susana start the searching of Cosme and specially of his cell phone, which it contains enough evidences to reveal an entire web of nefarious business implying other important Bilbao's CEOs. Things complicate after Julen, Asier's best friend who is falling in love with Leyre and he tries to seduce her at any cost, at the same time that Andoni and Juantxu, two agents of the Ertzaina (Basque Country's local police) find Cosme's car, with the own Cosme inside, that Asier and Julen have been move to a distant point while Leyre was sleeping. Adding a plus of troubles, Leyre's mother Paqui and her caregiver Evelyn moves where Leyre after a flood in Paqui's house. Looking for save their position and their business, Vanesa and Susana propose Andoni to accuse falsely Leyre, hoping to find the cell phone and avoid that Asier heirs the half of Cosme's money. But meanwhile Leyre balances between Julen's sexual propositions, Paqui's bad manners, locate Cosme's cell pone and divert any suspicion of crime committed by Asier, Susana and Vanesa think an alternative and more aggressive plan for Leyre to prevent that the cell phone lost be found and it destroys the company.

the gentlemen_2019.opis_neo:
Kriminalna komedija o Američanu, ki je v Londonu zgradil imperij trgovine z marihuano, a se želi upokojiti in posel prodati najboljšemu ponudniku.

Ameriški izseljenec Mickey Pearson je v Londonu ustvaril visoko donosen imperij marihuane. Ko se po mestu razširi beseda, da želi izplačati celoten posel in se upokojiti, njegovi konkurenti sprožijo niz spletk, podkupovanj in izsiljevanj v upanju, da bi del posla še pravočasno ukradli iz njegovih rok.
the gentlemen_2019.opis_omdb: A talented American graduate of Oxford, using his unique skills, and audacity, creates a marijuana empire using the estates of impoverished British aristocrats. However, when he tries to sell his empire to a fellow American billionaire, a chain of events unfolds, involving blackmail, deception, mayhem and murder between street thugs, Russian oligarchs, Triad gangsters and gutter journalists.

child 44_2014.opis_neo:
Degradiran član ruske vojaške policije preiskuje umore otrok v Sovjetski zvezi v času Stalinove vladavine.

Otrok 44 je prvi del napete trilogije, katere zgodba je umeščena v Sovjetsko zvezo leta 1952. V času največjih preganjanj, strogega izobraževalnega sistema in močnega delovanja tajne policije, brezbrižni vsakdan države, ki se hvali, kako v njej ni kriminala, pretresejo krvavi zločini serijskega morilca, znanega z vzdevkom Rostovski ubijalec.
child 44_2014.opis_omdb: Based on the first of a trilogy by Tom Rob Smith and set in the Stalin era of the Soviet Union. The plot is about an idealistic pro-Stalin security officer who decides to investigate a series of child murders in a country where supposedly this sort of crime doesn't exist. The state would not hear of the existence of a child murderer let alone a serial killer. He gets demoted and exiled but decides, with just the help of his wife, to continue pursuing the case.

back on the strip_2023.opis_neo:
Mladenič se preseli v Las Vegas, da bi uresničil svoje sanje o poklicu čarovnika, na koncu pa se pridruži moški striptiz skupini.

Ko Merlin izgubi žensko svojih sanj, se preseli v Las Vegas, da bi nadaljeval svoje čarovniške nastope, toda na koncu ga najamejo za vodjo ponovnega zagona ekipe temnopoltih slačifantov Čokoladni piškotki. Zdaj zlomljeni in brez ficka stari, umirjeni, daleč od forme Piškotki pod Lutherjevim vodstvom pozabijo stare spore in znova združijo moči, da bi rešili hotel, v katerem so nastopali, ko so Merlinu pomagali še enkrat osvojiti svoje dekle.
back on the strip_2023.opis_omdb: After losing the woman of his dreams, Merlin moves to Las Vegas to pursue work as a magician, only to get hired as the front man in a revival of the notorious black male stripper crew, The Chocolate Chips. Led by Luther - now broke and broken - the old, domesticated, out-of-shape Chips put aside former conflicts and reunite to save the hotel they used to perform in while helping Merlin win back his girl.

driving miss daisy_1989.opis_neo:
Zgodba o prijateljstvu med ostarelo judinjo in njenim temnopoltim šoferjem, ki na ameriškem jugu preseže rasne in razredne razlike.

Daisy Werthan (Jessica Tandy) je ostroumna, vendar ostarela Židinja, ki zakrivi lažjo prometno nesrečo, zato ji sin Boolie (Dan Aykroyd) najame zasebnega šoferja Hoka Colburna (Morgan Freeman). Starka se ne more sprijazniti z dejstvom, da je odvisna od drugih, zato se upira ob vsakem stiku s potrpežljivim Colburnom. Kljub vsemu se med njima razvije zaupanje, ki preseže socialne in rasne ovire ...
driving miss daisy_1989.opis_omdb: An elderly Jewish widow living in Atlanta can no longer drive. Her son insists she allow him to hire a driver, which in the 1950s meant a black man. She resists any change in her life but, Hoke, the driver is hired by her son. She refuses to allow him to drive her anywhere at first, but Hoke slowly wins her over with his native good graces. The movie is directly taken from a stage play and does show it. It covers over twenty years of the pair's life together as they slowly build a relationship that transcends their differences.

cats and peachtopia_2018.opis_neo:
Ko se njegov sin odpravi iskat čudežno mačjo deželo, mora maček Dekca premagati svoje strahove in se soočiti s preteklostjo, da bi ga našel.

Maček po imenu Dekca živi s sinom Puhkom v stanovanju prijazne ženske. Nič jima ne manjka, imata lepo in mirno mačje življenje. Oče je popolnoma zadovoljen, saj je sit in mu je zelo udobno na njegovi blazini. A vedoželjnega sina močno daje radovednost, kaj se skriva na drugi strani okna. Ko oče sinu pove za skrivnostno deželo Breskvopolis, je sin še bolj odločen, da gre na pot v to čudovito mačjo deželo. Izdela krila in poleti skozi okno v veliki svet. Oče in njun sostanovalec papagaj Mek se odpravita na pot za njim. Na poti srečajo tudi druge živali, zaidejo v marsikatero nevarnost in predvsem odkrijejo mnoge skrivnosti tako preteklosti, kot tudi sedanjosti.
cats and peachtopia_2018.opis_omdb: A cat named Blanket has long been living in a high-rise apartment in the city with his son, Cape. One day, curious about the outside world, Cape decides to leave home and embarks on an adventure to find the legendary cat's paradise. To find his son, Blanket must overcome his fear and reconcile with his past, with the help of a female Macaw.

unplugging_2022.opis_neo: Spoznajte Dana in Jeanine Dewerson. Edina iskra v njuni spalnici prihaja iz vtičnice. Najboljši prijatelj njune hčerke je iPad. Dan tega ne prenese več, zato se dogovori za miren, sproščujoč konec tedna v zakotnem gorskem mestu. Brez otrok, brez telefona, brez družbenih omrežij, samo čist sveži zrak in veliko romantike. Toda popolni konec tedna se kmalu sprevrže v polomijo.
unplugging_2022.opis_omdb: Think a rustic getaway with no cell service, Internet or social media is a romantic way to repair your marriage and sex life? Think again. Meet Dan and Jeanine Dewerson. The only spark in their bedroom is from the wall socket. Their daughter's best friend is her iPad. Dan's not going to take it anymore and plans a quiet, relaxing weekend in a remote mountain town. No kids, no phones, no social media, only clean fresh air and lots of romance. But what starts as the perfect weekend quickly becomes disastrous with unearthly encounters, strong edibles, cranky locals, and a pesky one-eyed dog. Without GPS to guide them or social media to stave off their boredom, Dan and Jeanine are forced to reconnect with each other. Can a "digital detox" really save their marriage and their sanity?

nightcrawler_2014.opis_neo:
Zmikavt, ki se skuša prebiti v svet kriminalnega novinarstva, postane zvezda lastne zgodbe, ko zabriše mejo med opazovalcem in udeležencem.

Ponoči, ko mesto spi, novinarske ekipe krožijo po Los Angelesu, v želji po dobri zgodbi. Svobodnjaki, znani kot nočni kroniki, lovijo nesreče, požare in umore v upanju, da bodo reportaže prodali lokalnim TV postajam. Brezposelni Louis v tem vidi odlično karierno priložnost, a za ceno slave počasi briše mejo med opazovanjem in sodelovanjem v zločinu.
nightcrawler_2014.opis_omdb: NIGHTCRAWLER is a thriller set in the nocturnal underbelly of contemporary Los Angeles. Jake Gyllenhaal stars as Lou Bloom, a driven young man desperate for work who discovers the high-speed world of L.A. crime journalism. Finding a group of freelance camera crews who film crashes, fires, murder and other mayhem, Lou muscles into the cut-throat, dangerous realm of nightcrawling - where each police siren wail equals a possible windfall and victims are converted into dollars and cents. Aided by Rene Russo as Nina, a veteran of the blood-sport that is local TV news, Lou blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story.

acts of violence_2018.opis_neo:
Trije bratje morajo združiti moči z legendarnim Bruceom Willisom, ko trgovci z ljudmi najmlajšemu bratu ugrabijo zaročenko.

Brendan, Deklan in Roman so bratje in vojaki, ki na prvo mesto vedno postavijo družino. Ko zaročenko najmlajšega izmed njih med dekliščino ugrabijo trgovci z ljudmi, morajo bratje uporabiti vse svoje vojaške sposobnosti in družinsko moč, da bi rešili dekle.
acts of violence_2018.opis_omdb: When his fiancee is kidnapped by human traffickers, Roman (Ashton Holmes) and his ex-military brothers set out to track her down and save her before it is too late. Along the way, Roman teams up with Avery (Bruce Willis), a cop investigating human trafficking and fighting the corrupted bureaucracy that has harmful intentions.

poslednji strelac_2024.opis_neo: Nenad Kuruzović je bivši pripadnik tajnih službi. Upokojen mirno živi s psom. Deset let prej je Nenadova žena umrla v zasedi, namenjeni njemu, ko je bil na sledi pomembnemu dilerju, ki je po zasedi pobegnil. Razočaran, ker je oblast kriminalcu omogočila beg, se je predčasno upokojil. Ko pa se vrne v Beograd, bivši šefi računajo na njegovo željo po maščevanju in pričakujejo od njega likvidacijo.
poslednji strelac_2024.opis_omdb: After his wife's murder, a former secret service agent is recruited by old colleagues to get revenge on drug dealer who killed his wife.

angel of mine_2019.opis_neo:
Ženska, ki žaluje zaradi smrti svoje hčerke, začne izgubljati stik z realnostjo. Vedno bolj je prepričana, da je deklica živa.

Lizzie je čustveno ranjena ženska, ki se bori za skrbništvo 11-letnega sina, medtem, ko žaluje za hčerko. Ko na rojstnodnevni zabavi spozna 7-letno Lolo, zatopljeno v svoj svet, v njej prepozna sebe. Spoprijatelji se z Lolino mamo, da bi lahko bila del njenega življenja, a začne izgubljati stik z realnostjo, saj verjame, da je njena hčerka še živa.
angel of mine_2019.opis_omdb: A woman grieving over the death of her daughter loses grip of reality when she begins to think her girl may still be alive.

nikita_1990.opis_neo:
Namesto da bi šla obsojenka Nikita v zapor, dobi novo identiteto in jo usposobijo za tajno vohunko in morilko.

Nikita Luca Bessona je čudovit triler izjemne umetniške vrednosti, ki je sprožil pravo revolucijo c akcijskem žanru – v glavni vlogi je ženska neizraženega seksipila, pravi mojster v rokovanju s strelnim orožjem. Po obsodbi za umor policista mora Nikita, ki je celo življenje preživela na ulici, izbirati med smrtno kaznijo ali treningu za morilko v tajni vladni organizaciji. Njen sadistični mentor Bob (Tcheky Karyo) ji da novo identiteto, jo poduči novih veščin in ji ponudi novo življenje kot "Josephine", zapeljiva, elegantna –enska, ki je pravzaprav krut in izjemno učinkovit ubijalski stroj.
nikita_1990.opis_omdb: An urgent life-or-death dilemma befalls Nikita--the feral street girl and violent drug addict--after killing a police officer at point blank. Hopeless, Nikita is given a new lease of life, when she reluctantly exchanges her doomed fate for a secret government program that promises to mould her into a cold-blooded assassin under the wing of her sadistic mentor, Bob. Now--with a new set of skills, a new identity, and lethally sophisticated looks--Nikita is the ultimate weapon and the perfect puppet for doing the government's dirty work; however, what happens if this trained killer chooses love over death?

supercell_2023.opis_neo:
Najstnik pobegne od doma, da bi šel po stopinjah svojega očeta, legendarnega lovca na nevihte Billa Brodyja.

William, sin legendarnega lovca na orkane Billa Brodyja, je kot otrok izgubil očeta v tornadu. Zdaj kot najstnik išče svojo identiteto in pobegne, da bi šel po očetovih stopinjah. Na svoji poti sreča družinsko ime polepljeno po izložbi turistične agencije, ki lovi orkane in ki izkorišča očetovo zapuščino, da bi si napolnila žepe. Vodi jo pohlepni in lahkomiselni Zane Rogers, ki izrablja Williama kot glavno atrakcijo in vodiča pustolovcev, ki se brezskrbno podajo nevarno blizu orkanom. Roy, stari partner Williamovega očeta, skuša fanta zaščititi pred nevarnostjo, medtem ko ga mama in dekle mrzlično iščeta, da bi ga odpeljali nazaj domov. Toda Mati Narava ima drugačne načrte.
supercell_2023.opis_omdb: A teenage boy runs away to follow in the footsteps of his father, legendary storm chaser Bill Brody.

anna and the apocalypse_2017.opis_neo:
Na božični večer je zombijevska apokalipsa ogrozila zaspano mestece Little Haven.

Na božični večer zombijevska apokalipsa ogrozi zaspano mestece Little Haven. Anna se s prijatelji bori, seka in poje za preživetje, ko se soočajo z nemrtvim Božičkom, peklenskimi sneženimi možmi in krvoločnimi vilinci, v tekmi s časom, da dosežejo ljubljene, skrite na srednji šoli. A kmalu spoznajo, da je največja grožnja prav človek.
anna and the apocalypse_2017.opis_omdb: When the zombie apocalypse hits the sleepy town of Little Haven - at Christmas - teenager Anna and her high school friends have to fight, sing and dance to survive, with the undead horde all around them. Teaming up with her best friend John, Anna has to fight her way through zombified snowmen, Santas, elves and Christmas shoppers to get across town to the high school, where they'll be safe. But they soon discover that being a teenager is just as difficult as staying alive, even at the end of the world.

the veil_2017.opis_neo:
V deželi, v kateri divja vojna in plemena živijo v strahu za svoj obstoj, se mogočni bojevnik podaja na uničujoče vojne pohode.

V deželi, v kateri divja vojna in plemena živijo v strahu za svoj obstoj, se mogočni bojevnik podaja na uničujoč vojni pohod. Ko ga člani lastnega plemena izdajo in zapustijo, prepričani, da mu ne bo uspelo uiti smrti, ga reši princesa skrivnostnega plemena. Bojevnika v novem plemenu sprejmejo odprtih rok, saj so prepričani, da je izbranec, ki jih bo povedel v poslednji boj.
the veil_2017.opis_omdb: Set in a war-torn land where tribal factions live in fear of annihilation, the film tells the story of a deadly warrior leading a destructive war campaign. When he is betrayed by his own and left for dead, he is healed by a mysterious princess and taken in by a hidden tribe that believes he was chosen to wage a final battle.

warriors gate_2016.opis_neo:
Skrivnostna skrinja odpre prehod skozi čas, ki najstnika Jacka popelje v starodavni imperij.

Jack pred težavami resničnega sveta beži v virtualni svet igric, kjer prevzame identiteto bojevnika Črnega viteza. Nekega dne v roke dobi skrivnostno kitajsko skrinjo, ki je v resnici portal v svet starodavne Kitajske, preko katerega ga obišče bojevnik Zhao in mu preda nalogo varovanja princese Sulin. Ko to ugrabijo, se mora bojazljivi Jack soočiti s svojimi strahovi in postati pravi bojevnik.
warriors gate_2016.opis_omdb: Accepting a gift from his Chinese-American boss, American teen Jack Bronson gains a portal to Ancient China, where he teams up with a royal bodyguard to rescue a feisty martial-arts-trained princess from an evil foe and a forced marriage. The journey (much like the video games he plays) boosts his confidence in dealing with bullies.

hotel artemis_2018.opis_neo:
V Los Angelesu bližnje prihodnosti, razklanem z nemiri, medicinska sestra vodi tajno urgentno bolnišnico za zločince.

Leto 2028. V Los Angelesu divjajo najhujši izgredi v zgodovini mesta. Privatizirana policija pretepa izgrednike, ki zahtevajo zgolj čisto vodo. Sredi kaosa štirim moškim spodleti rop banke. Po srditem boju s policijo se zatečejo v hotel Artemis, nezakonito bolnišnico za kriminalce, v kateri veljajo prav posebna pravila.
hotel artemis_2018.opis_omdb: On June 21, 2028, a riot breaks out in Los Angeles over the affordability and availability of water after it is privatized. Taking advantage of the distraction, a four-man crew of brothers Sherman and Lev and miscreants Buke and P-22 rob a bank. Unable to break into the vault, they steal from hostages at the bank, realizing that they were mainly staff of the wealthy sent to deposit valuables into the vault. Lev takes a male hostage's fancy pen despite being warned by the man not to. During their escape, an encounter with the police leaves P-22 dead and Buke and Lev critically wounded. They make their way to the nearby Hotel Artemis, a hotel/hospital that only treats criminals, run by Jean "the Nurse" Thomas. The Hotel only treats members who are paid-up in advance, so Sherman and Lev are allowed in while Buke as a non-member is kicked out by Everest, the Nurse's assistant. At the Hotel are two other guests. Code names for all guests are assigned based on the suite they are occupying. Sherman is code-named Waikiki, and Lev is code-named Honolulu. The other guests are code-named Acapulco, and Nice. The Nurse gets word from criminal Crosby Franklin that his father Orian "The Wolf King" Franklin, is en route and in need of immediate medical attention. Meanwhile, Waikiki catches up with Nice, who has moved on to work internationally while Waikiki has remained Stateside. When he reveals the pen his brother stole during the robbery, Nice explains that the pen is a mobile safe, and unlocks it to show it contains precious diamonds, saying they belong to the Wolf King, and reminding Waikiki that the Wolf King kills anybody who steals from him. To make matters worse, a wounded police officer named Morgan arrives outside begging for medical attention from Thomas..

the sentinel_2006.opis_neo:
Pete Garrison je izkušeni tajni agent, ki je v svoji dolgoletni karieri vedno uspešno varoval predsednika ZDA.

Njegov trud in izkušenost med drugim ceni tudi mladi agent David Breckinridge, ki ga je Garrison vzel pod svoje okrilje in ga naučil vsega, kar mora vedeti vladni agent. 

Ko obveščevalna služba posreduje podatke, ki kažejo, da se med agenti nahaja izdajalec, ki namerava na predsednika izvesti atentat, Garrison sproži preiskavo in prosi Breckinridgea, naj začne preiskovati na lastno pest. 

Toda po dokazih sodeč je prav Garrison tisti, ki načrtuje atentat, zato Breckinridgeu ne preostane drugega, kot da ga aretira.
the sentinel_2006.opis_omdb: A man who has devoted himself to serving the leader of the free world is accused of plotting against him in this thriller. Pete Garrison (Michael Douglas) is a veteran Secret Service agent who has had a long and distinguished career helping protect the president of the United States. David Breckinridge (Kiefer Sutherland) is a fellow Secret Service agent who learned most of what he knows from Garrison and holds him in great respect. When intelligence data suggests that there is a mole within the Secret Service who is part of a plot to assassinate President Ballentine (David Rasche), Garrison launches an investigation to ferret out the rogue agent, and asks Breckinridge to go over the evidence with a fine-toothed comb. Breckinridge is shocked when the clues point to Garrison as the traitor within the Secret Service, but his sense of duty compels him to see that his former mentor is placed under arrest. Garrison eludes his captors and struggles to prove his innocence while tracking down the real conspirator and eluding the agents who were once his colleagues. As Breckinridge leads the search for Garrison, another ranking agent, Jill Marin (Eva Longoria) plays devil's advocate, convinced that Garrison couldn't possibly be the rat in the house.

cupcakes_2013.opis_neo:
Šest prijateljev, razočaranih nad uradnim izborom pesmi za tekmovanje UniverSong, se odloči posneti svojo pesem v dokaz, da se da bolje.

V Tel Avivu šest prijateljev, zgroženih nad izraelsko pesmijo na tekmovanju UniverSong, na mobilni telefon posname svojo skladbo, nato pa šokirano izvejo, da je bil njihov posnetek izbran za izraelskega predstavnika na tekmovanju naslednje leto.
cupcakes_2013.opis_omdb: When a group of best friends in Tel Aviv gather to watch 'UniverSong', they are less than impressed by the official Israeli entry. Believing that they can do better, they spontaneously create and record their own song on a mobile phone. Little do they know, their performance is seen by the 'UniverSong' judges and soon they are reluctantly thrown into the spotlight as Israel's next official entry. After initial reservations about their new found celebrity status, they decide to just go for it and find themselves on the road to international stardom. They embark on a flamboyant journey that brings about hilarious end results as they go head to head with the Russian entry in the 'UniverSong' final. From director Eytan Fox comes this extravagant and unashamedly entertaining Eurovision parody featuring a feel-good soundtrack provided by Babydaddy from the Scissor Sisters.
