With bright styling, irresistibly catchy tunes and a gloriously uplifting storyline, this laugh-out-loud comedy is a refreshing ode to music, friendship and romance.

pumpkin everything_2022.opis_neo:
Ko se pisateljica Amy vrne domov, da bi poskrbela za trmastega, poškodovanega deda, odkrije, da v družinski trgovini dela znanec iz njene preteklosti.

Amy, uspešna pisateljica romanov, se vrne v svoje domače mesto, da bi poskrbela za svojega trmastega dedka Toma in njegovo trgovino z bučami. Med svojim bivanjem sreča moškega iz svoje preteklosti, kar obudi stare spomine in občutke. To srečanje jo prisili, da se sooči s svojo preteklostjo in sprejme nove odločitve za svojo prihodnost.
pumpkin everything_2022.opis_omdb: Amy a novelist returns to her hometown to look after her stubborn grandfather, Tom and his pumpkin themed store. While staying there she crosses paths with a man from her past.

le pont des oubliés_2019.opis_neo: V francoskih Alpah najdejo umorjenega pastirja. Sum pade na nekdanjo učiteljico z motivom. Marion Guichard sodeluje s strokovnjakom za divje živali.
le pont des oubliés_2019.opis_omdb: In the pastures of the Vercors, a shepherd has been murdered. The whole village suspects the former schoolteacher, because the herdsman ruined her career a few years previously, when he found out that she was dating his 17-year-ol...

ip man_2008.opis_neo:
Ko se mesto znajde v stiski, morajo prebivalci postati iznajdljivi, če želijo preživeti.

Premožni mojster borilnih veščin mora zapustiti svoje domače mesto med japonsko invazijo in okupacijo Kitajske. Ip Man in preostali prebivalci mesta morajo najti način, kako preživeti s pičlimi sredstvi.
ip man_2008.opis_omdb: In 1935 in Foshan, south China, there are martial arts schools on every street corner. Ip Man is the undisputed martial arts champion, yet he has not devoted himself to teaching. Despite this, it seems that all the kung fu masters of the city are eager to fight him to improve their reputation.

the last of the mohicans_1992.opis_neo:
Trije bojevniki želijo zaščititi hčerki britanskega polkovnika sredi francoske in indijanske vojne vihre.

Angleži in Francozi so se borili za kolonije novega sveta. Indijanci, takrat še v številni premoči, so samo nemo zrli na prišleke, ki so si jih poskušali pridobiti na svojo stran. Skozi zgodovinski prikaz nas bo popeljal belec Hawkeye, ki ga je posvojil Mohikanec Chingachgook in ga vzgojil v indijanskem duhu. Hawkeye se zaljubi v Coro, hčer angleškega oficirja, in odloči se, da jo bo skupaj z mlajšo sestro varno pripeljal nazaj k očetu. Na težavni poti se jim pridružita še Chingachgook in njegov sin Uncas, ki se zaljubi v mlajšo hčer angleškega oficirja. Vendar skupino na poti čakajo hude težave.
the last of the mohicans_1992.opis_omdb: The last members of a dying Native American tribe, the Mohicans -- Uncas, his father Chingachgook, and his adopted half-white brother Hawkeye -- live in peace alongside British colonists. But when the daughters of a British colonel are kidnapped by a traitorous scout, Hawkeye and Uncas must rescue them in the crossfire of a gruesome military conflict of which they wanted no part: the French and Indian War.

universal soldier_1992.opis_neo:
Vojake, ki so umrli v boju, v tajnem vojaškem poskusu spet oživijo in ustvarijo superčloveške bojevnike.

Leta 1969 so v popolni tajnosti zamrznili ubite elitne vietnamske komandose. Petindvajset let kasneje jih s pomočjo posebnih drog ponovno oživijo in tako s projektom UniSol postanejo nova supervojska ljudi-avtomatov. 

Kljub naporom nove tehnologije začnejo v zavest dveh supervojakov prodirati spomini iz Vietnama. Če temu dodamo še neubogljivo in radovedno televizijsko novinarko, je prizorišče za prvovrstno akcijo pripravljeno.
universal soldier_1992.opis_omdb: An elite team of soldiers has been used against terrorists where they use astounding physical capabilities to overcome them. Victoria, a reporter, follows them and discovers a part of their secret. When one of the team kills her cameraman she tries to escape. Luc, one of the soldiers begins to have flashbacks and turns sides and helps her as the remainder of the team follows to protect their secrets.

the lord of the rings: the fellowship of.naslov_orig: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
the lord of the rings: the fellowship of.opis_neo:
Ostareli hobit Bilbo Bisagin svojemu mlademu sorodniku Frodu zapusti Edini Prstan, najmočnejši in najnevarnejši čarobni prstan, ki ima absolutno moč.

Mlademu hobitu po imenu Frodo je zaupan Edini Prstan, ki ima neverjetno moč. Če bi se do njega dokopal Temni vladar Mordorja, bi lahko zavladal Srednjemu svetu in zasužnjil njegove prebivalce. Da bi ga uničil, se Frodo odpravi na potovanje epskih razsežnosti, na katerem ga spremlja in ščiti bratovščina prstana.
the lord of the rings: the fellowship of.opis_omdb: An ancient Ring thought lost for centuries has been found, and through a strange twist of fate has been given to a small Hobbit named Frodo. When Gandalf discovers the Ring is in fact the One Ring of the Dark Lord Sauron, Frodo must make an epic quest to Mount Doom in order to destroy it. However, he does not go alone. He is joined by Gandalf, Legolas the elf, Gimli the Dwarf, Aragorn, Boromir, and his three Hobbit friends Merry, Pippin, and Samwise. Through mountains, snow, darkness, forests, rivers and plains, facing evil and danger at every corner the Fellowship of the Ring must go. Their quest to destroy the One Ring is the only hope for the end of the Dark Lords reign.

frozen in love_2018.opis_neo:
V romantičnem filmu spoznamo Mary, lastnico majhne očarljive knjigarne, ki ji grozi zaprtje.

Mary je lastnica majhne očarljive knjigarne, toda posel ji ne gre najbolje. Adam je hokejist, ki ga zaradi spora na igrišču suspendirajo do nadaljnjega. Mary dobi priložnost spremeniti svojo podobo, vendar to pomeni, da mora sodelovati z Adamom, ki ju veže vzajemna nestrpnost. Ob nadzoru strokovnjakinje za PR se oba trudita izboljšati in sčasoma se med njima razvije privlačnost.
frozen in love_2018.opis_omdb: Bad boy hockey player Adam and struggling book-store owner Mary must work together to help rehabilitate each other's image. Their mutual animosity, and attraction, sees them struggle to achieve their goal.

the lord of the rings: the two towers_20.naslov_orig: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
the lord of the rings: the two towers_20.opis_neo:
Junaki se bodo morali tokrat zoperstaviti moči dveh stolpov: Sarumanovega in Sauronovega.

Frodo in Samo nadaljujeta pot proti Mordorju na misiji, da bi uničila Prstan. Medtem njuni prijatelji pridobivajo nove zaveznike ter gredo v napad na Isengard.
the lord of the rings: the two towers_20.opis_omdb: The continuing quest of Frodo and the Fellowship to destroy the One Ring. Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas, and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Saruman's deadly spell.

sivi kamion crvene boje_2004.opis_neo:
Beograd, poletje 1991, razpad Jugoslavije.

Bosanski daltonistični tat, ki se vozi v ukradenem kamionu, med potjo pobere štoparko - mlado mestno dekle iz Beograda, ki je na begu. Na poti, polni raznih pripetljajev, medsebojnih absurdnih etničnih soočenj in konfliktov, pa se jima zgodi ljubezen...
sivi kamion crvene boje_2004.opis_omdb: This movie is mainly a love story, and the scenery is the first day of the civil war in ex Yugoslavia (June 1991). The main character is Ratko, an ex con, from some Bosnian "never go there" place. His most important characteristic is that he is colorblind, which gives him, in a symbolic way, the ability to see things differently than 'majority around him' (that is also an explanation of the movie title). On the beginning of the movie, Ratko will meet a city girl, who is a completely different person than him. On their strange voyage they will fall in love with each other and find the way to beat all differences.

the lord of the rings: the return of the.naslov_orig: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
the lord of the rings: the return of the.opis_neo:
V zadnjem delu Tolkieneve trilogije "Gospodar prstanov" se sile dobrega in zla spopadejo v končni bitki, ki bo odločala o usodi sveta.

Bivša bratovščina prstana se pripravlja na zgodovinsko bitko proti Sauronu, ki napada človeško kraljestvo Gondor. To počasi izginja, zato obupno potrebuje novega kralja. Prihodnost Srednjega sveta je odvisna od Aragorna, dediča gondorskega kraljestva. Medtem se Frodo in Samo s prstanom prebijata skozi sovražnikovo ozemlje, pod vodstvom Goluma.
the lord of the rings: the return of the.opis_omdb: The final confrontation between the forces of good and evil fighting for control of the future of Middle-earth. Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the One Ring, while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Sauron's evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith.

a cure for wellnes_2017.opis_neo:
Poslovnež mora iz skrivnostnega zdravilišča pripeljati šefa. Kmalu odkrije, da terapija z vodo v starodavnem sanatoriju ni to, kar se zdi.

Ambiciozen mlad poslovnež mora svojega šefa pripeljati domov iz na videz idiličnega, a skrivnostnega velnes centra, v oddaljenih švicarskih Alpah. Kmalu posumi, da se za čudnimi postopki zdravljenja skriva še kaj drugega, kot le iskanje boljšega počutja. Ko tudi njemu postavijo diagnozo nenavadne bolezni, na lastni koži občuti terapijo, ki ga pripelje na rob razuma.
a cure for wellnes_2017.opis_omdb: An ambitious young executive is sent to retrieve his company's CEO from an idyllic but mysterious "wellness center" at a remote location in the Swiss Alps. He soon suspects that the spa's miraculous treatments are not what they seem. When he begins to unravel its terrifying secrets, his sanity is tested, as he finds himself diagnosed with the same curious illness that keeps all the guests here longing for the cure.

the purge_2013.opis_neo:
V 12-urnem obdobju očiščenja, ko je dovoljen vsak zločin, se bogata družina bori z morilsko tolpo, ki hoče ubiti ubežnika, ki so ga vzeli pod streho.

Če bi lahko enkrat letno naredili neki zločin brez posledic, kako bi to izgledalo? Neka družina se sooči s testom, kako daleč so pripravljeni iti, ko jim svet zlobe vdre v dom.
the purge_2013.opis_omdb: In an America wracked by crime and overcrowded prisons, the government has sanctioned an annual 12-hour period in which any and all criminal activity-including murder-becomes legal. The police can't be called. Hospitals suspend help. It's one night when the citizenry regulates itself without thought of punishment. On this night plagued by violence and an epidemic of crime, one family wrestles with the decision of who they will become when a stranger comes knocking. When an intruder breaks into James Sandin's (Ethan Hawke) gated community during the yearly lockdown, he begins a sequence of events that threatens to tear a family apart. Now, it is up to James, his wife, Mary (Lena Headey), and their kids to make it through the night without turning into the monsters from whom they hide.

spiderman 3_2007.opis_neo:
Spider-Man se prične spreminjati v temnega maščevalca, ki sicer premore neslutene moči, a cena je izguba stika z ljudmi, ki mu največ pomenijo.

Spider-Manov kostum se nenadoma spremeni in postane čisto črn, prav tako pa še poudari njegove moči. To spremeni tudi samega Petra in na plano pride njegova temačna, maščevalna stran, ki jo skuša nadzorovati.

red dragon_2002.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja agenta FBI Willa Grahama, ki prekine predčasno upokojitev, da bi ujel serijskega morilca.

Tretje nadaljevanje zgodbe o slavnem kanibalu je postavljeno v čas pred filmom 'Ko jagenjčki obmolknejo'. FBI agent Will se je upokojil zaradi skoraj usodnega srečanja z genialnim forenzičnim psihiatrom, dr. Hannibalom Lecterjem. Tri leta kasneje ga nekdanji šef zaprosi za pomoč pri izsleditvi novega morilca, a brez Hannibalovih nasvetov ne bo šlo.
red dragon_2002.opis_omdb: After escaping death by the skin of his teeth while on the hunt for the elusive madman, Dr Hannibal Lecter, the now-retired and emotionally scarred FBI agent, Will Graham, finds himself back in action. Reluctantly, as yet another monstrous serial killer known as "The Tooth Fairy" terrorises Baltimore, Graham turns to Lecter, the evil mastermind who's been under lock and key for three long years, to lend a hand in this challenging and time-sensitive case. But, to delve deep into the demented mind of a killer, one must first face his inner demons, and Will already knows that his insane imprisoned assistant is a gifted manipulator. Can Graham find the horrifying Red Dragon in time before another family suffers?

obsessed_2009.opis_neo:
Nedolžno spogledovanje vodi v niz srhljivih dogodkov, ko zapeljiva sodelavka postane nevarno obsedena s svojim uspešnim in srečno poročenim šefom.

Derek Charles je uspešen vodja, ki je pred kratkim napredoval, zadovoljen pa je tudi z zasebnim življenjem, saj je srečno poročen in oče sina. A vse obrne na glavo lepa honorarna sodelavka, ki ga prične zasledovati in nadlegovati na vsakem koraku.
obsessed_2009.opis_omdb: Derek Charles is a hard working man, employed as a asset manager in a private company. He is very happy with his beautiful wife, Sharon, and only son, and because of his hard work he just got a huge promotion. But suddenly he gets a temporary worker who is both attractive and smart, and Derek is understandably impressed with her and also finds himself physically drawn to her. However, this new girl is desperate to get close to him - at any cost.

ghostbusters_2016.opis_neo:
Trideset let po kultnem izvirniku režiser Paul Feig poskrbi za svežo in huronsko zabavno prenovo nadnaravne komedije.

Doktorica fizike Erin želi pred javnostjo skriti knjigo o obstoju duhov, ki jo je napisala skupaj s prijateljico Abby. Toda, ko New York preplavijo nadnaravni pojavi, morata dekleti znova združiti moči. Na pomoč jima priskočita čudaška Jillian in zgovorna Patty, toda zlohotni demoni so jim pripravili grozljiva, zlobna in sluzasta presenečenja.
ghostbusters_2016.opis_omdb: Paranormal researcher Abby Yates and physicist Erin Gilbert are trying to prove that ghosts exist in modern society. When strange apparitions appear in Manhattan, Gilbert and Yates turn to engineer Jillian Holtzmann for help. Also joining the team is Patty Tolan, a lifelong New Yorker who knows the city inside and out. Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, the four women prepare for an epic battle as more than 1,000 mischievous ghouls descend on Times Square.

spider-man: homecoming_2017.opis_neo:
Peter Parker poskuša živeti običajno življenje, a ga preganja misel, da se mora še dokazati kot pravi super junak. Kmalu se pojavi nova priložnost.

Po dogodkih filma Kapitan Amerika: Državljanska vojna (2016) skuša Peter Parker uskladiti svoje življenje srednješolca in kariero super junaka s pajkovimi mrežami Spider-Mana.
spider-man: homecoming_2017.opis_omdb: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his newfound identity as web-slinging superhero Spider-Man. Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, Peter returns home, where he lives with his Aunt May, under the watchful eye of his new mentor Tony Stark. Peter tries to fall back into his normal daily routine--distracted by thoughts of proving himself to be more than just your friendly neighborhood Spider-Man--but when the Vulture emerges as a new villain, everything that Peter holds most important will be threatened.

the man who wasn't there_2001.opis_neo:
Brivec izsiljuje ženinega šefa in ljubimca za denar, ki ga naj bi vložil v kemično čistilnico, vendar se njegov načrt hudo ponesreči.

Nesrečni brivec v Kaliforniji sredi 40. let odkrije, da mu je žena nezvesta in se domisli izsiljevanja njenega ljubimca in šefa. Vendar načrt razkrije temačne skrivnosti, še preden se zgodi umor.
the man who wasn't there_2001.opis_omdb: 1949, Santa Rosa, California. A laconic, chain-smoking barber with fallen arches tells a story of a man trying to escape a humdrum life. It's a tale of suspected adultery, blackmail, foul play, death, Sacramento city slickers, racial slurs, invented war heroics, shaved legs, a gamine piano player, aliens, and Heisenberg's uncertainty principle. Ed Crane cuts hair in his in-law's shop; his wife drinks and may be having an affair with her boss, Big Dave, who has $10,000 to invest in a second department store. Ed gets wind of a chance to make money in dry cleaning. Blackmail and investment are his opportunity to be more than a man no one notices. Settle in the chair and listen.

prizefighter: the life of jem belcher: l.naslov_orig: Prizefighter: The Life of Jem Belcher: La forja de un campeón
prizefighter: the life of jem belcher: l.opis_neo:
Jem Belcher je leta 1800 postal najmlajši svetovni prvak vseh časov. To je njegova neverjetna resnična zgodba.

Na prehodu iz 19. stoletja so se družbene spremembe in napredek počasi širili po britanskem imperiju. V angleških mestih in vaseh je bilo še ogromno revščine. V zakotnih bristolskih uličicah pa je živel junak v vzponu - Jem Belcher, ki je preobrazil primitivno mlatenje v kraljevski šport.
prizefighter: the life of jem belcher: l.opis_omdb: At the turn of the 19th century, Pugilism was the sport of kings and a gifted young boxer fought his way to becoming champion of England.

monsters: dark continent_2014.opis_neo:
Deset let po dogodkih iz prvega dela filmske uspešnice režiserja Garetha Edwardsa Pošasti so se "kužna območja" iz Mehike razširila po vsem svetu.

10 let po dogajanju v prvem filmu »Pošasti« se je okuženo območje razširilo po vsem svetu. Na Bližnjem vzhodu se je začel nov upor hkrati s proliferacijo Pošasti na tem področju. Vojska se odloči za pomoč.
monsters: dark continent_2014.opis_omdb: Ten years on from the events of "Monsters", and the 'Infected Zones' have now spread worldwide. In the Middle East a new insurgency has begun. At the same time there has also been a proliferation of Monsters in that region.

the big brass ring_1999.opis_neo: Blake Pellarin se poteguje za položaj guvernerja države Misuri in se je podal na kampanjo po volilnih okrajih. Na kratko se ustavi v St. Louisu, a naključno srečanje ga vrne v preteklost, ki ga še vedno preganja. Bo resnica uničila vse njegove upe za politični položaj, ali pa bo v Veliki areni zmagal?
the big brass ring_1999.opis_omdb: Blake Pellarin is on the campaign trail to become Governor of the state of Missouri. While making a stop in St. Louis, a chance encounter brings his past back to haunt him. Will the truth ruin his chances for office or will he land the "Big Brass Ring"?

the convenient groom_2016.opis_neo:
Strokovnjakinjo za razmerja pred poroko zapusti zaročenec. Da bi rešila svoj ugled, privoli v poroko s prijateljem, ki je skrivaj zaljubljen vanjo.

Mlada poročna svetovalka za slavne ostane sama pred oltarjem na razvpiti poroki. Ker hoče rešiti svoj ugled, privoli v poroko z Lucasom, ki je skrivaj zaljubljen vanjo.
the convenient groom_2016.opis_omdb: Dr. Kate Lawrence, a celebrity relationship expert, plans to publicly announce her engagement to Bryan, a handsome and perfectly polished businessman. As Kate prepares to share the news, Bryan shocks her by breaking up with her and calling off the wedding. Wanting to save her from humiliation and protect her public image, Lucas Wright, Kate's childhood friend steps in and pretends to be Kate's fiancé.

my old lady_2014.opis_neo:
Newyorčan odpotuje v Pariz, da bi prodal dragoceno stanovanje, ki mu ga je tam zapustil pokojni oče. A tam ga čaka neprijetno presenečenje.

Newyorčan odpotuje v Pariz, da bi prodal dragoceno stanovanje, ki mu ga je tam zapustil pokojni oče. Tam pa nepričakovano naleti na njegova trenutna stanovalca: živahno starejšo damo in njeno strupeno jezikavo hčer.
my old lady_2014.opis_omdb: Mathias Gold (Kevin Kline), a penniless fifty-odd-year-old New Yorker, lands in Paris. Cynical, and at the end of his tether, he looks forward to selling the mansion house his late father owned in the Marais district. But what he finds out there just appalls him: his secretive dad had never told him he had acquired the property as a life lease, a typically French custom of which he never heard. As a consequence, not only will poor Mathias be unable to sell the house into cash (at least as long as Mathilde Girard (Dame Maggie Smith) stays alive), but he will have to pay the old lady a pension as part of the bargain.

please stand by_2017.opis_neo:
Mlada avtistična ženska se s kužkom v torbi odpravi na pot, da bi oddala svoj scenarij za epizodo ''Zvezdnih stez'' in sodelovala v natečaju.

Wendy stvari vidi drugače od ostalih: je odločno neodvisna, sijajnega uma in ima nagajiv smisel za humor. Je tudi avtistična. Ljudje so zanjo nerešljive kode in svet jo nadvse bega. Lepega dne se odloči, da pobegne od svoje skrbnice in se poda v Los Angeles, da bi sodelovala na tekmovanju scenarijev za epizodo serije Zvezdne steze.
please stand by_2017.opis_omdb: The world is a confusing place for Wendy Welcott, a fiercely independent and brilliant young woman with autism. Wendy longs to leave her group home and return to living with her sister's family and new baby girl. She is sure that in order to reunite with her family, all she needs to do is convince them of her newfound competence and abilities. As a lover of all things Star Trek, Wendy writes in her free time; so when she hears about a Star Trek screenplay competition, she seizes the opportunity to submit her 500-page script and prove her worth. However, her only problem: if she doesn't hand in her 500-page script to Paramount Pictures in person, she will miss the deadline. Wendy sneaks out of her group home and travels hundreds of miles outside her protective boundaries and refuses to allow anything to stop her from achieving her goals.

radioactive_2019.opis_neo:
Film prinaša resnično zgodbo o znanstvenici, ki se je rodila leta 1867 v Varšavi, študirala pa je v Franciji, kjer je tudi spoznala svojega moža.

Resnična zgodba znanstvenice Marie Curie, ki se je rodila v Varšavi in študirala v Franciji. Z možem Pierrom sta skupaj odkrila radij in močno pretresla takratne znanstvene kroge. Leta 1903 sta prejela Nobelovo nagrado za odkritje radioaktivnosti. Po moževi smrti je Marie osvojila drugo Nobelovo nagrado za svoja odkritja, ki so spremenila svet.
radioactive_2019.opis_omdb: The incredible true story of Marie Sklodowska-Curie and her Nobel Prize-winning work that changed the world.

logan lucky_2017.opis_neo:
Zgodba je preprosta: brata načrtujeta spektakularen rop med legendarno avtomobilistično dirko Nascar.

Rudar Jimmy Logan prepriča svojega brata in sestro, da mu pomagata pri ropu dirkališča Motor Speedway, med avtomobilsko dirko zveze Nascar. Toda za izpeljavo njegovega načrta, morajo najprej iz zapora spraviti strokovnjaka za odpiranje sefov. Načrt se zdi popoln, če izvzamemo radovedno FBI agentko in urok nesreče, ki spremlja družino Logan.
logan lucky_2017.opis_omdb: When Jimmy Logan (Channing Tatum) gets fired, he convinces his brother Clyde (Adam Driver) and sister Mellie (Riley Keough) to help him rob the Charlotte Motor Speedway during a NASCAR Race. But they will need the help of Joe Bang (Daniel Craig), a convicted safe-cracker who is currently doing time. All they have to do is break Joe out, blow the racetrack vault, get away with the cash, return Joe to prison, and get Jimmy to his daughter's beauty pageant on time. What could possibly go wrong? Well, there is the Logan family curse .

pig_2021.opis_neo:
Lovec na tartufe, ki živi sam v oregonski divjini, mora obiskati Portland, da bi našel skrivnostno osebo, ki je ukradla njegovega ljubljenega prašiča.

Rob, osamljeni nabiralec tartufov živi v oregonskem gozdu s svojo svinjo, izurjeno za iskanje tartufov. Ko ga neko noč napade neznanec in mu ukrade svinjo, se Rob s pomočjo trgovca s tartufi odpravi rešit svojo zvesto prijateljico.
pig_2021.opis_omdb: With his only connection to the outside world lying in Portland businessman Amir, taciturn, meditative hermit Rob has found solace deep in the heart of the dense Oregon forests and the unique bond with his only companion: his beloved truffle-hunting pig. Tired of grappling with the profound sadness of prolonged grief, Rob relies on a simple daily routine to keep his sanity, self-respect, and dignity, utterly unaware that he has already caught unwanted attention. Now, his best friend is missing, and revenge can only make things worse. Indeed, strange as it sounds, inconsolable Rob only wants his pig back, and if he has to, he'll go to the edge of the world to find her. But first things first. Who has Rob's pig?

män som hatar kvinnor_2009.opis_neo:
Novinar s pomočjo hekerke išče žensko, ki je pogrešana ali mrtva že 40 let.

Prvi del trilogije Millennium: Harriet Vanger je pred štiridesetimi leti izginila med družinskim srečanjem na otoku. Njenega trupla niso nikoli našli, a njen stric je prepričan, da je šlo za umor.
män som hatar kvinnor_2009.opis_omdb: Forty years ago, Harriet Vanger disappeared from a family gathering on the island owned and inhabited by the powerful Vanger clan. Her body was never found, yet her uncle suspects murder and that the killer is a member of his own tightly knit but dysfunctional family. He employs disgraced financial journalist Mikael Blomkvist and the tattooed, ruthless computer hacker Lisbeth Salander to investigate. When the pair link Harriet's disappearance to a number of grotesque murders from almost forty years ago, they begin to unravel a dark and appalling family history; but, the Vangers are a secretive clan, and Blomkvist and Salander are about to find out just how far they are prepared to go to protect themselves.

gulliver returns_2021.opis_neo:
Svetovnega popotnika in pustolovca Guliverja povabijo, naj se vrne v Liliput.

Svetovnega popotnika in pustolovca Guliverja povabijo, naj se vrne v Liliput, mesto, ki ga je nekoč že rešil pred sovražnikovim ladjevjem sosednjega otoka Blefask. Ob prihodu ga pričakata nezadovoljstvo, panika in obupana množica, saj je liliputanski kralj svoj narod prepričal, da se vrača legendarni velikan Guliver. Namesto tega pa odkrijejo čisto navadnega možaka, medtem ko se je mesto pripravljalo in izdelovalo pohištvo za njim ljubega velikana.
gulliver returns_2021.opis_omdb: World traveler and adventurer Gulliver is invited to return to Lilliput, the town he previously saved from the enemy fleet of the neighboring Blefuscu. When he arrives, he only finds indignation, panic and a hopeless crowd, as the King of Lilliput made his people believe that the legendary Giant Gulliver was returning. Instead, they discover an ordinary man, when the whole town had been getting ready and building accommodation to welcome a giant. Disappointed, the King orders Gulliver's execution. Meanwhile, the invincible Blefuscu armada is at the gates of the city and threatening again.

destination wedding_2018.opis_neo:
Zgodba o dveh nesrečnih in neprijetnih poročnih gostih, Lindsay in Franku, med katerima se kljub vsemu razvije medsebojna naklonjenost.

Frank in Lindsay sta svata na poroki skupnih znancev, ki jima je skupno le to, da ne marata nikogar in ničesar. Vse ju moti in ne prebavljata družbe ljudi. Prav ta skupna nejevolja pa ju zbliža, kljub medsebojni nenaklonjenosti. Ali stalno pričkanje lahko vodi do ljubezni ali do le še večjega prepira?
destination wedding_2018.opis_omdb: Two talkative and bitter people, Frank and Lindsay, meet on the way to the same destination wedding. Frank is scarred from a bad family history, and Lindsay is heartbroken from a previous relationship. At first, they do not get along. However, isolated from the other wedding guests, the two spend a lot of time together. Despite their verbal sparring, they eventually form a connection and have to decide whether or not to stay with each other after their trip is over.

the girl who played with fire_2009.naslov_sl: Dekle, ki se je igralo z ognjem
the girl who played with fire_2009.naslov_orig: The Girl Who Played With Fire
the girl who played with fire_2009.opis_neo:
Med preiskavo zločinskega kroga zlorab, nasilja in trgovine z ljudmi, se Lisbeth zaradi obtožbe trojnega umora znajde na begu.

V drugem delu priljubljene zgodbe Stiega Larssona se radovedna raziskovalka Lisbeth znajde na begu pred oblastmi, ki jo krivijo umora dveh novinarjev. Na pomoč ji priskoči novinar Mikael in skupaj začneta odkrivati kriminalno zaroto.
the girl who played with fire_2009.opis_omdb: Mikael Blomkvist, publisher of Millennium magazine, has made his living exposing the crooked and corrupt practices of establishment Swedish figures. So when a young journalist approaches him with a meticulously researched thesis about sex trafficking in Sweden and those in high office who abuse underage girls, Blomkvist immediately throws himself into the investigation.

norm of the north: family vacation_2020.naslov_orig: Norm of the North: Family Vacation
norm of the north: family vacation_2020.opis_neo:
Normu, ki je preobremenjen s kraljevimi dolžnostmi, ukradejo krono, zato se odpravi na potovanje, da bi jo našel in hkrati popravil odnose s svojo družino.

Norm je preobremenjen s kraljevskimi dolžnostmi, zato je v precepu, kako imeti dovolj časa za kraljestvo, pa tudi za svojo družino. Ko pa mu sredi noči ukradejo krono, se mora Norm odpraviti na epsko pustolovščino, ki je zamaskirana v družinske počitnice, da bi izsledil tatu, našel svojo krono in se mimogrede naulil dragocene lekcije, da ni nič nemogoče, ko imaš ob sebi družino, ki ti je vedno pripravljena priskočiti na pomoč.
norm of the north: family vacation_2020.opis_omdb: Overwhelmed with his Kingly duties, Norm struggles to make time for both his kingdom and his family. When his crown is mysteriously stolen, he must embark on a journey to not only find the crown, but to also repair his relationship with his family.

madame_2017.opis_neo:
Premožen ameriški par prosi svojo služkinjo, naj se med razkošno večerjo na njunem pariškem domu pretvarja, da je španska plemkinja.

Bogat in vpliven ameriški par se preseli v prestižno vilo sredi romantičnega Pariza. Madame Anne prireja razkošno večerjo za svoje sofisticirane prijatelje, ko odkrije, da je povabljenih natanko 13 gostov. Ker ne želi imeti neparnega števila oseb za mizo, vztraja, da se jim pridruži služabnica Maria, pod pretvezo, da je španska plemkinja.
madame_2017.opis_omdb: Adding a little spice to a waning marriage, Anne and Bob, a wealthy and well-connected American couple, move into a manor house in romantic Paris. While preparing a particularly luxurious dinner for sophisticated international friends, our hostess discovers there are thirteen guests. Panic-stricken, Anne insists her loyal maid Maria disguise herself as a mysterious Spanish noble woman to even out the numbers. But a little too much wine, and some playful chat, lead Maria to accidentally endear herself to a dandy British art broker. Their budding romance will have Anne chasing her maid around Paris and finally plotting to destroy this most unexpected and joyous love affair.

what's love got to do with it?_2022.naslov_orig: What's Love Got to Do with It?
what's love got to do with it?_2022.opis_neo:
V Londonu nagrajena filmska ustvarjalka dokumentira potovanje svojega najboljšega prijatelja v dogovorjen zakon v skladu s pakistansko dediščino njegove družine.

Zoe je režiserka dokumentarnih filmov, ki živi v Londonu in je na lovu za naslednjim projektom. Na predstavitvenem sestanku zavrnejo njene zamisli o družbenih dokumentarcih kot preveč "turobne", dokler se ne spomni, da se je njen prijatelj iz otroških let in sosed Kaz odločil za poroko z nevesto, ki mu jo bosta izbrala starša.
what's love got to do with it?_2022.opis_omdb: In London, an award-winning film-maker documents her best friend's journey into an assisted marriage in line with his family's Pakistani heritage. In the process, she challenges her own attitude towards relationships.

law abiding citizen_2009.opis_neo:
Obupan moški, ki so mu ubili družino, sklene vzeti pravico v svoje roke in se maščevati tako morilcem kot tudi pokvarjenim pravnikom.

Clyde Shelton uživa v mirnem družinskem večeru, ko mu v hišo vdreta morilca, ki ubijeta njegovo ženo in hčerko. Deset let pozneje se ogorčen nad pravosodnim sistemom, ki se je pogodil z enim od morilcev, poda na maščevalni pohod, kot ga še ni bilo.
law abiding citizen_2009.opis_omdb: Clyde Shelton's family is brutally murdered. The ones responsible are caught. However, because of improper procedure, the D.A., Nick Rice only has circumstantial evidence. So he decides to get one of them to testify against the other. When Shelton learns of this, he is not happy. Ten years later, the one who was convicted is being executed but something goes wrong; his execution goes awry and he suffers. They learn that someone tampered with the machine. And the other one is found dead, killed in a gruesome manner. Rice suspects Shelton, so he has him picked up. At first, Shelton agrees to a plea agreement with Rice but changes his mind. It appears that Shelton is not done, it appears he blames the whole system and is declaring war on it going after everyone involved with his family's case. So Rice has to stop him but Shelton is way ahead of him.

missing link_2019.naslov_sl: Gospod Link: V iskanju izgubljenega doma
missing link_2019.opis_neo:
Dva metra visok, meter in pol čez prsi, teža okoli 350 kilogramov. To mora biti jeti!

Dva metra visok, meter in pol čez prsi, teža okoli 350 kilogramov. To mora biti jeti! Raziskovalec je odkril dolgo iskano bitje, sedaj pa mu bo pomagal najti še njegov dom! Gospod Link, velik in prijazen jeti, poskuša s pomočjo raziskovalca Lionela Frosta najti svoje dolgo izgubljene sorodnike v skriti deželi Shangri-La. Skupaj s pustolovko Adelino se zabavni trio odpravi na popotovanje po svetu, da bi svojemu novemu prijatelju pomagali najti njegov dom.
missing link_2019.opis_omdb: The charismatic Sir Lionel Frost (Hugh Jackman) considers himself to be the world's foremost investigator of myths and monsters. The trouble is none of his small-minded high-society peers seems to recognize this. Sir Lionel's last chance for acceptance by the adventuring elite rests on traveling to America's Pacific Northwest to prove the existence of a legendary creature. A living remnant of Man's primitive ancestry. The Missing Link (Zach Galifianakis).

knox goes away_2023.opis_neo:
Da bi rešil sina, mora Knox prehiteti policijo, ki mu je za petami, in hkrati hitrejši od hitrega propadanja svojega lastnega uma.

Ko plačani morilec zboli za hitro obliko demence, dobi priložnost pomagati odraslemu sinu in se mu odkupiti za svoj slab očetovski odnos in odsotnost. Da bi ga rešil, mora prehiteti policijo, ki mu je za petami, in hkrati hitrejši od hitrega propadanja svojega lastnega uma, ki so mu štete ure.
knox goes away_2023.opis_omdb: When a contract killer has a rapidly evolving form of dementia, he is offered an opportunity to redeem himself by saving the life of his estranged adult son.

i, tonya_2017.opis_neo:
Biografska zgodba o drsalki Tonyi Harding, dobitnici dveh olimpijskih kolajn, ki je sodelovala v enem največjih športnih škandalov v zgodovini športa.

Biografija umetnostne drsalke Tonye Harding, katere ime je postalo sinonim za enega največjih škandalov v zgodovini športa. Med pripravami na državno tekmovanje, preprosta Tonya, ki kljub talentu nikoli ni bila sprejeta v elitno družbo umetnostnega drsanja, in njen nekdanji mož najameta nekoga, da bi zlomil nogo njeni nasprotnici Nancy Carver.
i, tonya_2017.opis_omdb: From the proverbial wrong side of the tracks in Portland, Oregon, former competitive figure skater Tonya Harding was never fully accepted in the figure skating community for not inherently being the image of grace, breeding and privilege that the community wanted to portray, despite she being naturally gifted in the sport athletically. Despite ultimately garnering some success in figure skating being national champion, a world championship medalist, an Olympian, and being the first American woman to complete a Triple Axel in competition, she is arguably best known for her association to "the incident": the leg bashing on January 6, 1994 of her competitor, Nancy Kerrigan, who, unlike Tonya, was everything that the figure-skating community wanted in their representatives. Her association to that incident led to Tonya being banned from competitive figure skating for life. Tonya's story from the beginning of her figure-skating life at age four to the aftermath of the incident is presented. Besides Tonya herself, key people in her life give their perspective of their role in her life. Although they may agree on the broad issues at hand, such as that the incident did occur, they may vary widely in their recollection of the details. These people are: her waitress mother Lavona Golden, who despite having paid for her expensive figure-skating lessons, was abusive toward her physically and emotionally, never believing she being good enough in any aspect of the word, and who pulled her from school to focus solely on the figure skating; Diane Rawlinson, her first and longest serving coach, who, for good or bad, largely let Tonya be Tonya in the way she presented herself to the figure skating world; Jeff Gillooly, her first husband, the two who also had a turbulent relationship on a need to be loved perhaps without truly loving the other; Jeff's friend and Tonya's bodyguard Shawn Eckardt, a dim bulb who believed himself to be a bigger player in the big scheme of life than he actually was; and sports journalist Martin Maddox, a fictional character who provides general commentary of what the sports media as a collective wanted out of Tonya and the incident.

seal team_2021.opis_neo:
Quinn začne s svojo ekipo hitro uporabljati vse pretkane trike in sveže zamisli, da bi obranili svoj del morja pred vedno lačnim nasprotnikom.

Po izgubi svoje najboljše prijateljice neustrašni tjulenj Quinn zbere razposajeno ekipo, ki bo morskim psom vrnila udarec. Zato pokličejo izkušenega vojaka Claggarta in njegov vojaški um, da bi pomagal izuriti tjulnje prijatelje.
seal team_2021.opis_omdb: After his best friend is killed in a shark attack, Quinn, a lovable yet tenacious seal assembles a SEAL TEAM to fight back against a gang of sharks overtaking the neighborhood. But this merry band of international seals are not at all trained for such a mission. They seek the help of a much more skillful combatant, Claggart, but even his tricks and flips can't whip these guys into shape. However, with a little bit of ingenuity, intelligence and a lot of heart, our SEAL TEAM may actually be able to bring peace back to their undersea community.

borderlands_2024.opis_neo:
Akcijska pustolovska komedija sledi pisani ekipi izobčencev na misiji reševanja pogrešane deklice, ki ima v lasti ključ nepredstavljivih moči.

Akcijska pustolovska komedija, ki temelji na eni najbolj prodajanih videoiger Borderlands, sledi pisani ekipi izobčencev na misiji reševanja pogrešane deklice, ki ima v lasti ključ nepredstavljivih moči. V središču dogajanja je Lilith (Kate Blanchett) zloglasna upornica s skrivnostno preteklostjo. Vrača se na svoj rodni planet Pandoro v iskanju pogrešane hčerke zlikovca Atlasa (Édgar Ramirez). Med svojim potovanjem se Lilith združi z raznoliko skupino zaveznikov: vrhunskih plačancem Rolandom (Kevin Hart), mlado strokovnjakinjo za rušenje Tiny Tino (Ariana Greenblatt), nekonvencionalno znanstvenico Tannis (Jamie Lee Curtis) in robotom Claptrapom (Jack Black), ki slovi po svoji bistroumnosti. Ta eklektična skupina se poveže, da bi našli pogrešano deklico, kar ustvari nepričakovano koalicijo.
borderlands_2024.opis_omdb: Lilith, an infamous outlaw with a mysterious past, reluctantly returns to her home planet of Pandora to find the missing daughter of the universe's most powerful S.O.B., Atlas. Lilith forms an alliance with an unexpected team - Roland, a former elite mercenary, now desperate for redemption; Tiny Tina, a feral pre-teen demolitionist; Krieg, Tina's musclebound, rhetorically challenged protector; Tannis, the scientist with a tenuous grip on sanity; and Claptrap, a persistently wiseass robot. These unlikely heroes must battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to find and protect the missing girl, who may hold the key to unimaginable power. The fate of the universe could be in their hands - but they'll be fighting for something more: each other.

dallas buyers club_2013.opis_neo:
Teksačan Ron Woodroof je električar in spreten kavboj, znan po svojem zabavljaškem in brezbrižnem načinu življenja.

Navaden mož se v Ameriki bori za preživetje v negotovih časih. Film je navdihnjen z resničnimi dogodki zgodbe o moči in vztrajnosti Rona Woodroofa. Matthew McConaughey je v vlogi resničnega moža, čigar osebni interes je prerasel v nekaj mnogo večjega. Teksašan Ron Woodroof je električar in rodeo kavboj, znan po svojem zabavljaškem in brezbrižnem življenju, ki leta 1985 doživi šok, ko mu postavijo diagnozo aidsa ter mu povedo, da mu je ostalo komaj 30 dni življenja. Vendar pa ne sprejme te smrtne obsodbe. Film je dobil oskarja in zlati globus za glavno in stransko moško vlogo.
dallas buyers club_2013.opis_omdb: Dallas 1985. Electrician and sometimes rodeo bull rider Ron Woodroof lives hard, which includes heavy smoking, drinking, drug use (primarily cocaine) and casual sex. He is racist and homophobic. While in the hospital on a work related injury, the doctors discover and inform him that he is HIV+, and that he will most-likely die within thirty days. Ron is initially in angry denial that he would have a disease that only "faggots" have, but upon quick reflection comes to the realization that the diagnosis is probably true. He begins to read whatever research is available about the disease, which at this time seems to be most effectively treated by the drug AZT. AZT, however, is only in the clinical trials stage within the US. Incredulous that he, as a dying man, cannot pay for any drug which may save or at least prolong his life, he goes searching for it by whatever means possible. It eventually leads him to Mexico and a "Dr." Vass, an American physician whose license was revoked in the US because of his AIDS related work against US regulations. Dr. Vass leads Ron to a cocktail of other drugs, some vitamins, he believes are more effective in treating the symptoms, since the virus, as Ron learns, will always be in the system of those who have been exposed to it. Ron begins to smuggle these drugs not approved by the FDA into the US, not only for his own use but for sale to other HIV+ persons. In this venture, he goes into an unlikely partnership with a HIV+ transgender woman named Rayon, who he met in the hospital and who has greater contact with AIDS patients through the gay community. As they try to work both above ground to get the meds to those that need them and underground to avoid detection by especially the FDA, Ron comes up with an idea to circumvent the fact of selling the drugs - which are not considered drugs yet since they are not FDA approved - directly to the HIV+ population, which then should should not be against the law. Richard Barkley and Dr. Sevard, the FDA's lead man on the file and one of Ron's doctors respectively, the latter who sees clinical trials as the only way to determine the efficacy of drugs despite the fact that Ron and others would have probably died already without these drugs, try to stop Ron and Rayon at every turn. Caught in the middle is Dr. Eve Saks, another of Ron's doctors, who understands why policies are in place, but who can sympathize with Ron, Rayon and others - all her patients, directly or indirectly - in their situation.

waiting for the barbarians_2019.opis_neo:
Kolonialni uradnik v odročni mejni postojanki se upre sistemu, ko je priča nečloveškemu mučenju, ki ga nad domačini izvaja okruten polkovnik.

Upravnik izoliranega naselja na meji neimenovanega cesarstva se veseli mirne upokojitve, dokler ne prispe polkovnik Joll, čigar naloga je poročanje o delovanju barbarov in o varnostni situaciji na meji. Sadist Joll izvaja kruta zaslišanja in mučenje domorodcev, njegova ravnanja pa upravnika privedejo do krize vesti in donkihotskega dejanja upora.
waiting for the barbarians_2019.opis_omdb: At an isolated frontier outpost, a colonial magistrate of an unnamed empire suffers a crisis of conscience when an army colonel arrives looking to interrogate the locals about an impending uprising, using cruel tactics that horrify the magistrate.

fireheart_2022.opis_neo:
V želji, da bi pomagala očetu in rešila mesto, se Georgia preobleče v mladeniča z imenom "Joe" in se pridruži majhni skupini gasilcev, ki poskušajo ustaviti požigalca.

Šestnajstletna Georgia Nolan želi po očetovih stopinjah in sanja o tem, da bo prva poklicna gasilka na svetu. Ko skrivnostni požigalec na Broadwayu podtakne vrsto požarov, začnejo newyorški gasilci skrivnostno izginjati. Župan New Yorka pokliče upokojenega Georgijinega očeta, da bi vodil preiskavo o izginotjih. Ker si nadvse želi pomagati očetu in rešiti svoje mesto, se Georgia preobleče v fanta in si nadene ime Joe ter se pridruži majhni skupini pogumnih gasilcev, ki skušajo ustaviti požigalca.
fireheart_2022.opis_omdb: Sixteen-year-old Georgia Nolan dreams of being the world's first-ever female firefighter. When a mysterious arsonist starts burning down Broadway, New York's firemen begin vanishing. Georgia's father, Shawn, is called out of retirement by the Mayor of New York to lead the investigation into the disappearances. Desperate to help her father and save her city, Georgia disguises herself as a young man called "Joe" and joins a small group of misfit firefighters trying to stop the arsonist.

the united states vs. billie holiday_202.naslov_orig: The United States vs. Billie Holiday
the united states vs. billie holiday_202.opis_neo:
Džez pevka Billie Holiday postane tarča zveznega oddelka za narkotike s tajno operacijo, ki jo vodi črni zvezni agent Jimmy Fletcher, s katerim ima burno afero.

Film govori o sporu Zveznega urada za narkotike in džez pevke Billie Holiday, proti kateri je sprožil preiskavo. Čeprav so jo sprva želeli diskreditirati zaradi mamil, je njihova preiskava temeljila na rasizmu. V filmu je prikazana tudi njena zveza z Jimmyjem Fletcherjem, agentom, ki mu je začela zaupati, čeprav je delal za vlado.
the united states vs. billie holiday_202.opis_omdb: Follows Holiday during her career as she is targeted by the Federal Department of Narcotics with an undercover sting operation led by black Federal Agent Jimmy Fletcher, with whom she has a tumultuous affair.

breach_2020.opis_neo:
Na begu pred uničujočo kugo na Zemlji vesoljsko ladjo napade tuja sila, ki spreminja obliko in namerava uničiti, kar je ostalo od človeštva.

Leto 2242. Planet Zemlja umira. Sprejmejo sporen in krut načrt evakuacije proti Novi Zemlji: 50 milijonov izbrancev bo rešenih, drugi pa so obsojeni na smrt. NOAH (25 - Cody Kearsley) in HAYLEY (26), mlad zaljubljeni par, sta uspela priti na zadnjo vesoljsko ladjo z Zemlje, ki mu poveljujejo nekdanji in zdajšnji vojaki. Rešena sta, kot tudi otrok, ki ga pričakuje Hayley. ADMIRAL ADAMS (60 - Thomas Jane), Hayleyn oče, je zadolžen za vesoljsko ladjo s 300 000 potniki. Potovanje na Novo Zemljo bo trajalo pol leta, budna pa bo le skromna ekipa vojakov, inženirjev, zdravnikov in strežajev, vsi drugi pa bodo spali v svojih krio-komorah. Hayley je uspela dobiti ponarejene dokumente za Noaha. Medtem ko bo sama spala, bo on nadziral in delal. Toda njegov prvi stik z ekipo ni niti malo prijateljski. Gre za preživetje najmočnejših. Saj na ladji niso samo ljudje.
breach_2020.opis_omdb: On the cusp of fatherhood, a junior mechanic aboard an interstellar ark to New Earth must outwit a malevolent cosmic terror intent on using the spaceship as a weapon.

beyond the law_1993.opis_neo:
Dan Saxon, mlad policist, se infiltrira v tolpo motoristov, kjer postane prijatelj vodje Bloda in se zaljubi v Renee.

Dan Saxon, mlad policist iz Arizone, že vse svoje življenje beži pred temačnimi sencami iz preteklosti. Kot skrivnostni Sid se infiltrira se v tolpo motoristov Šakali, in si ob Virgilu, mehaniku, ki se preživlja s popravljanjem motorjev, tudi pridobi spoštovanje članov. 

A ne le to: postane prijatelj karizmatičnega in nasilnega vodje, Bloda, spozna pa še fotografinjo Renee, ki Šakale spremlja, in se vanjo zaljubi. Renee ve, da je Saxon policaj, in v tej varljivi druščini postane njegov glas razuma …
beyond the law_1993.opis_omdb: Dan Saxon (Charlie Sheen) is an undercover cop who infiltrates a biker gang to nail the scum behind a drug-smuggling operation. In order to maintain the trust of the gang's leader, Blood (Michael Madsen), he must commit ever more dangerous and heinous crimes. Just how far 'beyond the law' will Saxon go?

the wolf of wall street_2013.opis_neo:
Martin Scorsese je režiral biografsko zgodbo o borznem posredniku Jordanu Belfortu, ki je z manipulacijo trga in goljufijami zaslužil bajne denarje.

Resnična zgodba o ambicioznem borznem posredniku Jordanu Belfortu, ki ostane brez službe ter s svojim, na Wall Streetu pridobljenim znanjem, ustanovi lastno borzno podjetje. Njegovo poslovno življenje se začne s padcem borze v 80-ih in kmalu doseže velik uspeh, ki ga spremljajo ogromne količine denarja, mamil, žensk in razvrata. Težave pa se začnejo, ko se ga loti FBI.
the wolf of wall street_2013.opis_omdb: Jordan Belfort (DiCaprio) is Long Island penny stockbroker who serves almost two years in prison for refusing to co-operate in a huge 1990s securities fraud case that involved widespread corruption on Wall Street and in the corporate banking world, including mob infiltration.

bastille day_2016.opis_neo:
Mlad žepar in nenavaden agent Cie združita moči na protiteroristični misiji v Franciji.

Michael je lopov, ki se znajde na seznamu Cie, toda agent Briar kmalu dojame, da je Michael le figura v zaroti večjih razsežnosti. Sean kljub drugačnim ukazom rekrutira Michaela, zato oba v 24-urnem pregonu postaneta tarči vira korupcije. Prisiljena sta se zanesti drug na drugega, da bi razkrila in premagala skupnega sovražnika.
bastille day_2016.opis_omdb: Trapped in the labyrinths of time, Godefroy de Montmiral and his devoted footman are hurtled into an epoch of political and social upheavals: The French Revolution. And more precisely The Reign of Terror, during which the descendants of Jacquouille La Fripouille, enthusiastic revolutionaries, confiscate the castle and wealth of Godefroy de Montmirail's descendants, arrogant aristocrats who are trying to escape from France, where their lives hang in the balance.

northmen: a viking saga_2014.opis_neo:
Ko se skupinica Vikingov znajde na sovražnih tleh, se začne njihov boj za preživetje.

Zgodovinski spektakel, poln napetih prizorov bojev, ki se dogaja v nevarnem srednjem veku! 
Ko se skupinica Vikingov znajde na sovražnih tleh, se začne njihov boj za preživetje, v katerem bodo morali združiti moči in dati vse od sebe, da bi pobegnili številčno močnejšemu sovražniku in preživeli.
northmen: a viking saga_2014.opis_omdb: A band of Vikings are stranded behind enemy lines on the coast of Alba as their longboat goes down in a dreadful storm. Their only chance of survival is to find a path to the Viking settlement, Danelagh, traversing an unfamiliar and hostile land they have never known. The journey becomes a race for their lives when the King of Alba sends his most feared mercenaries after them. But when the Vikings meet a kind Christian Monk who preaches with his sword, the hunters become the hunted as the Vikings set deadly traps, mercilessly decimating their pursuers one by one, culminating in a final and deadly encounter.

thick as thieves_2009.opis_neo:
Izkušeni ropar, ki je do vratu zadolžen pri ruski mafiji, najame mlajšega tatu, da bi izvedel še zadnji roparski podvig.

Priznana režiserka Mimi Leder nam je z zvezdniško igralsko zasedbo z Morganom Freemanom, Antoniom Banderasom in Radho Mitchell na čelu postregla s filmom, polnem zablod, ropov in nepričakovanih obratov. Gabriel (Banderas) med krajo draguljev na podzemni železnici spozna Ripleyja (Freeman), legendarnega lopova, ki je želel ukrasti iste diamante. Kljub Gabrielovemu začetnem odklanjanju ga Ripley pregovori v nemogoč posel: rop dveh neprecenljivih jajc in strogo varovanega trezorja slavne draguljarne. Za Gabrijela in Ripleyja je vložek še višji, ko Ripleyjevo varovanko (Mitchell) ugrabi ruska mafija. Ves čas se trudita ostati korak pred policijo, FBI-jem, trgovci z diamanti in šefom ruske mafije, ki hoče jajca zase. Gabriel in Ripley morata nekako uspeti opraviti rop in ostati živa.
thick as thieves_2009.opis_omdb: Kidnapping, shootouts, explosions...girlfriends. It's just another day in this house when Dave (Bob Ferguson) unleashes his crew to take down a man from his past named "Kincaid" (B.R. Smith). But when the job goes south it's up to an outsider named Rob (James Ladd) to save their skins. Brought together at the wrong place at the right time, Rob and Holsten (Brandon Michaels) form a bond thick as thieves. But joining the rest of the crew (Kelli Smith & Terri Frye) may be more than Rob bargained for. Evading romance, bar-fights, jealous boyfriends, and being kidnapped can be dangerous to your health. When Dave's lair is infiltrated, the team has to clean house and track down their friend. In the end, someone has to take the fall. The only question is who?

rambo_2008.opis_neo:
John Rambo se je umaknil na Tajsko, da bi tam živel v miru, a se kmalu zaplete v novo pustolovščino.

Minilo je 20 let, odkar smo Johna Ramba zadnjič videli v akciji, saj se je odločni bojevnik umaknil v samoto tajske džungle. Nekega dne ga obiščejo misijonarji, ki skušajo priti v sosednjo Burmo, kjer že več kot 50 let divja državljanska vojna.
rambo_2008.opis_omdb: Vietnam veteran John Rambo has survived many harrowing ordeals in his lifetime and has since withdrawn into a simple and secluded existence in Thailand, where he spends his time capturing snakes for local entertainers, and chauffeuring locals in his old PT boat. Even though he is looking to avoid trouble, trouble has a way of finding him: a group of Christian human rights missionaries, led by Michael Burnett and Sarah Miller, approach Rambo with the desire to rent his boat to travel up the river to Burma. For over fifty years, Burma has been a war zone. The Karen people of the region, who consist of peasants and farmers, have endured brutally oppressive rule from the murderous Burmese military and have been struggling for survival every single day. After some inner contemplation, Rambo accepts the offer and takes Michael, Sarah, and the rest of the missionaries up the river. When the missionaries finally arrive at the Karen village, they find themselves part of a raid by the sadistic Major Pa Tee Tint and a slew of Burmese army men. A portion of the villagers and missionaries are tortured and viciously murdered, while Tint and his men hold the remainder captive. Concerned by their disappearance, the minister in charge of the mission gathers a group of mercenaries and pleas Rambo transport them with his boat, since he knows their last exact location. But Rambo can't stay behind: he joins the team where he belongs, to liberate the survivors from the clutches of Major Tint in what may be one of his deadliest missions ever

rambo: last blood_2019.opis_neo:
Rambo odpotuje v Mehiko, da bi rešil nečakinjo, ki jo je ugrabil kartel za belo blago.

John Rambo živi umirjeno življenje na družinskem ranču v Arizoni. Ko Gabriela, vnukinja njegove gospodinje, pri prečkanju mehiške meje izgine v neznano, se je Rambo primoran soočiti s preteklostjo in obnoviti svoje neusmiljene borilne veščine, ki mu bodo v pomoč na smrtonosnem potovanju zarot in maščevanja.
rambo: last blood_2019.opis_omdb: Almost four decades after they drew first blood, Sylvester Stallone is back as one of the greatest action heroes of all time, John Rambo. Now, Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission. A deadly journey of vengeance, RAMBO: LAST BLOOD marks the last chapter of the legendary series.

dogman_2023.opis_neo:
Deček, ki ga je življenje udarilo, najde odrešitev v ljubezni svojih psov.

Režiser filma Luc Besson je povedal, da je navdih za film črpal iz članka o francoski družini, ki je svojega otroka vrgla v kletko, ko je bil star pet let. Po prebranem članku, se mu je pojavilo vprašanje, kako takšen dogodek vpliva na psihično zdravje človeka. Kako nekdo tak sploh preživi in kako se spopada s svojim trpljenjem? To idejo je želel raziskati s filmom DOGMAN.  Trpljenje je skupno vsem ljudem in edini protistrup je ljubezen. Družba posamezniku ne bo v pomoč, je pa ljubezen tista, ki zdravi. In prav ljubezen, ki jo je Dogman prejel od svojih psov, mu bo pomagala. Dogman brez Caleba Landryja Jonesa ne bi bil to, kar je. Za tako zapleten lik je potreben nekdo, ki je zmožen izražati vsa čustva, žalost, želje, moč in kompleksnost lika.  Dogman je pretrpel veliko, a kljub temu še vedno ohranil svoje dostojanstvo.
dogman_2023.opis_omdb: A boy, bruised by life, finds his salvation through the love of his dogs.

the green knight_2021.opis_neo:
Fantazijska pripoved srednjeveške zgodbe o zelenem vitezu.

Zeleni vitez je pustolovščina posneta po brezčasni legendi kralja Arturja, pripoveduje pa o nesramnem in trmastem Arturjevem nečaku Gawainu, ki se odpravi iskat orjaškega zelenega tujca imenovanega Zeleni vitez. Gawain se bo na svoji poti zoperstavil duhovom, velikanom in tatovom ter s tem dokazal svoj pogum družini in kraljestvu.
the green knight_2021.opis_omdb: An epic fantasy adventure based on the timeless Arthurian legend, "The Green Knight" tells the story of Sir Gawain (Dev Patel), King Arthur's reckless and headstrong nephew, who embarks on a daring quest to confront the eponymous Green Knight, a gigantic emerald-skinned stranger and tester of men. Gawain contends with ghosts, giants, thieves, and schemers in what becomes a deeper journey to define his character and prove his worth in the eyes of his family and kingdom by facing the ultimate challenger. From visionary filmmaker David Lowery comes a fresh and bold spin on a classic tale from the knights of the round table.

the legend of hercules_2014.opis_neo:
Film o Herkulu (Kellan Lutz) ponuja redko videno ozadje slavne zgodbe.

Ko Herkulovo ljubezen Hebo obljubijo njegovemu bratu, se Herkul upre, zato ga oče pošlje zatreti upor v Egiptu, prepričan, da se ne bo vrnil. Herkul preživi nastavljeno past, a konča kot suženj, prodan za gladiatorja. Kmalu odkrije, da je polbog ter se vrne v Grčijo prevzeti kraljestvo.
the legend of hercules_2014.opis_omdb: In Ancient Greece 1200 B.C., a queen succumbs to the lust of Zeus to bear a son promised to overthrow the tyrannical rule of the king and restore peace to a land in hardship. But this prince, Hercules, knows nothing of his real identity or his destiny. He desires only one thing: the love of Hebe, Princess of Crete, who has been promised to his own brother. When Hercules learns of his greater purpose, he must choose: to flee with his true love or to fulfill his destiny and become the true hero of his time. The story behind one of the greatest myths is revealed in this action-packed epic - a tale of love, sacrifice and the strength of the human spirit.

snitch_2013.opis_neo:
Dwayne Johnson je v tej eksplozivni akciji odločen spraviti na kolena mehiški narkokartel.

John je podjetnik, ki izve, da njegovega sina namesto študija čaka deset let zapora zaradi posedovanja mamil. Edini način, da reši prihodnost svojega sina, je, da se kot ovaduh vtihotapi v neusmiljeni mehiški narkokartel. S tem tvega svoje življenje, saj mora razkriti prave zločince, preden slednji odkrijejo njega.
snitch_2013.opis_omdb: Construction company owner John Matthews learns that his estranged son, Jason, has been arrested for drug trafficking. Facing an unjust prison sentence for a first time offender courtesy of mandatory minimum sentence laws, Jason has nothing to offer for leniency in good conscience. Desperately, John convinces the DEA and the opportunistic DA Joanne Keeghan to let him go undercover to help make arrests big enough to free his son in return. With the unwitting help of an ex-con employee, John enters the narcotics underworld where every move could be his last in an operation that will demand all his resources, wits and courage to survive.

broken city_2013.opis_neo:
Režiser napetih trilerjev Iz pekla in Knjiga odrešitve prikazuje zgodbo newyorškega policista Billyja.

V podkupljenem mestu, kjer se bohoti korupcija, se želi nekdanji policaj Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) maščevati najvplivnejšemu človeku v mestu, ki mu je uničil življenje, županu Nicholasu Hostetlerju (Russell Crowe). Billyjevo neutrudno iskanje pravice, ki se lahko meri le z njegovo ulično vzdržljivostjo, naredi iz njega neustavljivo silo in županovo najhujšo grozo.
broken city_2013.opis_omdb: In New York City, detective Billy Taggart goes to court for the murder of the suspected rapist Mikey Tavarez, but the Mayor Nicholas Hostetler and the Chief of Police Carl Fairbanks make the important evidence vanish and the case against Billy is dismissed by the judge; however, he is forced to leave the police department. Seven years later, Billy is a private detective and lives with his girlfriend Natalie Barrow, who is an aspiring actress and the sister of Mikey's suspected victim.Billy's secretary Katy Bradshaw (Alona Tal) is trying to collect part of the debts to save their business. In the week of the elections, Hostetler summons Billy and offers $25,000 to investigate his wife, Cathleen Hostetler, whom he believes is having a love affair. Billy discovers that Cathleen is meeting Paul Andrews, who is the coordinator of the campaign for Jack Valliant, the opponent of Hostetler and favorite in the election. When Paul is found dead on the street, Billy thinks that he has been double-crossed by Hostetler and he decides to investigate the truth behind Paul's murder.

house of darkness_2022.opis_neo:
Film spremlja moškega, ki odpelje domov žensko, s katero sta se srečala na pijači v baru.

Ko se po srečanju v lokalnem baru vrača domov na svojo osamljeno posestvo, si lovec na ženske misli, da bo njegova lepa, skrivnostna spremljevalka le še ena priložnostna avantura. Med spoznavanjem postane njuno spogledovanje igrivo, seksi in zlovešče. V upanju, da bo imel srečo, se mu je ta morda pravkar iztekla.
house of darkness_2022.opis_omdb: Hap offers Mina a ride home with ulterior motives, but his night takes a turn when he learns she lives in a creepy American castle...and the shadowy figures in the corridors make it clear that he isn't welcome.

justin and the knights of valour_2013.naslov_orig: Justin and the Knights of Valour
justin and the knights of valour_2013.opis_neo:
Mlad fant odrašča v kraljestvu, v katerem vlada birokracija. On pa si kljub očetovem nasprotovanju želi postati vitez.

Jurij živi v velikem kraljestvu in sanja, da bo nekega dne pogumni vitez, kot je bil njegov ded. Po navdihujočem obisku pri babici, se odpravi na pot proti viteštvu. Čeprav Jurij ni najboljši kandidat za viteza, pa mora hitro dorasti izzivom, ko se izgnani nekdanji vitez Heraclio vrne z vojsko in zagrozi, da bo uničil kraljestvo.
justin and the knights of valour_2013.opis_omdb: Justin (Freddie Highmore) lives in a kingdom where bureaucrats rule and knights have been ousted. His dream is to be become one of the Knights of Valour, like his grandfather was, but his father Reginald (Alfred Molina), the chief counsel to the Queen (Olivia Williams), wants his son to follow in his footsteps and become a lawyer. After an inspiring visit to his beloved Gran (Dame Julie Walters) and bidding farewell to his supposed lady-love Lara (Tamsin Egerton), Justin leaves home and embarks on a quest to become a knight. Along the way, he meets the beautiful, feisty Talia (Saoirse Ronan), a quirky wizard called Melquiades (David Walliams), and the handsome Sir Clorex (Antonio Banderas), and is mentored by three monks; Blucher (James Cosmo), Legantir (Charles Dance), and Braulio (Barry Humphries), who teach and test him in the ancient ways of the Knights of Valour. While an unlikely candidate for knighthood, Justin must rise to the challenge quickly when banished former knight Sir Heraclio (Mark Strong) and his army, lead by Sota (Rupert Everett), return and threaten to destroy the Kingdom.

it's a boy girl thing_2006.opis_neo:
Nell rada bere Shakespeara in želi študirati književnost na univerzi Yale.

Zabavna najstniška komedija z novim pristopom k vedno zabavni temi. Čeprav sta soseda in obiskujeta isto šolo, se Woody in Nell ne prenašata. Toda usoda se okrutno poigra z njima: lepega jutra se zbudita v zamenjanih telesih. Z zamenjano identiteto nameravata eden drugemu uničiti sloves v šoli – potem pa se v zgodbo nepričakovano vmeša ljubezen …
it's a boy girl thing_2006.opis_omdb: The next door neighbors Nell Bedworth and Woody Deane have opposite behaviors and hate each other: the virgin geek Nell is polite, sensitive and well-prepared to go to Yale, while Woody is rude and his greatest expectation is to join a mediocre university due to his abilities playing football. When Nell and Woody are assigned to visit a museum together, they argue in front of a statue of an Aztec god. During the night, their souls swap bodies, bringing difficult situations to them. They first try to damage each other's reputation in high school, but soon they discover that their dream of joining college can only happen with mutual respect and support.

oldboy_2013.opis_neo:
V oglaševalskem poslu zaposleni Joe Doucett (Josh Brolin) je ženskar, pijanec in slab oče hčerki, ki živi z njegovo nekdanjo ženo.

Joe Doucett je ženskar in slab oče hčerki, ki živi z njegovo nekdanjo ženo. Nekega dne se prebudi v motelski sobi brez telefona, ki za naslednjih 20 let postane njegov zapor. Ko izve, da so mu ubili ženo in da je on glavni osumljenec, začne uriti svoje telo v smrtonosno orožje, pripravljeno na maščevanje.
oldboy_2013.opis_omdb: An advertising executive is kidnapped and held hostage for 20 years in solitary confinement. When he is inexplicably released, he embarks on an obsessive mission to discover who orchestrated his punishment, only to find he is still trapped in a web of conspiracy and torment.

[rec]²_2009.opis_neo:
Skupina specialcev z zdravnikom na čelu vstopi v stavbo v Barceloni, ki naj bi bila okužena z nevarnim virusom, ki se prenaša s krvjo in slino.

Komaj nekaj minut je minilo, odkar so oblasti izgubile stik z ljudmi, ujetimi v stolpnici, ki je v karanteni. Nihče ne ve, kaj se dogaja notri. Zunaj pa besni kaos. Za specialce se zdi naloga na videz jasna: vstopiti v stolpnico in oceniti situacijo. Toda kot vemo, ni nič tako, kot se zdi.
[rec]²_2009.opis_omdb: The medical Dr. Owen leads a three-men SWAT team inside the sealed off building to get blood sample from the girl Medeiros to develop an antidote. They are attacked by the zombie-like creatures and Dr. Owen locks a zombie inside a room using a crucifix. He discloses that the patient zero was possessed by the evil and the Vatican sent him to save mankind. Further, they will only leave the building under his voice command. Meanwhile, three teenagers follow a fireman and a man that breaks into the building through the sewage system to rescue his colleague and daughter respectively and they are trapped inside. They are lured and release the evil creature that was locked by Dr. Owen in a room. Out of the blue, the lead team meets the journalist Ângela Vidal hidden inside the building.

the nut job 2: nutty by nature - dubbed_.naslov_sl: Trd oreh 2: Še trši, še bolj nori - sinhronizirano
the nut job 2: nutty by nature - dubbed_.naslov_orig: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature - dubbed
the nut job 2: nutty by nature - dubbed_.opis_neo:
Sandi in njegovi prijatelji se vračajo v nadaljevanju risane uspešnice. Živali se zoperstavijo hudobnemu županu in rešijo park, v katerem živijo.

Veveriček Sandi skupaj s svojimi prijatelji odkrije, da želi župan mesta na njihovem prebivališču zgraditi gromozanski zabaviščni park. Da bi županu preprečili uničenje parka, ki je hkrati njihov dom, bodo morali združiti moči z drugimi prebivalci parka in tokrat še močneje pokazati zobe.
the nut job 2: nutty by nature - dubbed_.opis_omdb: Surly and his friends, Buddy, Andie, and Precious, discover that the mayor of Oakton City is cracking one big hustle to build a giant amusement park, which in turn will bulldoze their home. The animals must stop the mayor, his daughter, and a mad animal control officer in order to take back the city park.

odd thomas_2013.opis_neo:
V kalifornijskem puščavskem mestu sreča kuhar, ki ima nadnaravne sposobnosti, skrivnostnega moškega, povezanega s temačnimi silami.

Film, v katerem se prepleta več žanrov, govori o 20-letnem kuharju, ki živi mirno življenje sredi kalifornijske puščave in pred drugimi skriva svoje paranormalne sposobnosti. Povsod okrog sebe namreč vidi mrtvece, da je vse skupaj še huje, pa se v mestu nenadoma pojavi plenilski duh, ki se hrani s človeško bolečino. Thomas mora zato narediti vse, da mu prekriža račune in mu onemogoči, da bi se znesel nad tamkajšnjimi prebivalci. Film je posnet po istoimenski literarni uspešnici Deana Koontza, ki se je zavihtela na sam vrh New York Timesove lestvice najbolj prodajanih knjig, režiral pa ga je znani režiser Stephen Sommers (Mumija, Van Helsing, G.I. Joe: Vzpon Kobre).
odd thomas_2013.opis_omdb: Small-town fry cook Odd Thomas (Anton Yelchin) is an ordinary guy with a paranormal secret: he sees dead people, everywhere. When a creepy stranger shows-up with an entourage of ghostly bodachs - predators who feed on pain and portend mass destruction - Odd knows that his town is in serious trouble. Teaming up with his sweetheart Stormy (Addison Timlin) and the local sheriff (Willem Dafoe), Odd plunges into an epic battle of good vs evil to try to stop a disaster of apocalyptic proportions. Based on the best-selling thriller by Dean Koontz.

the hunger games_2012.opis_neo:
Katniss prevzame sestrino mesto v Igrah lakote, resničnostnem tekmovanju, v katerem se morajo naključno izbrani najstniki boriti do smrti.

Katniss živi v najsiromašnejšem okrožju Panema, ki ga je pred leti porazil Kapitol. Ob predaji je vsako okrožje pristalo, da pošlje fanta in dekle na vsakoletno tekmovanje Iger lakote. Teren in pravila se skozi igro spreminjajo, vedno pa velja: ubij ali bodi ubit. Ko žreb za udeleženko izbere njeno sestro, se Katniss javi namesto nje.
the hunger games_2012.opis_omdb: In a dystopian future, the totalitarian nation of Panem is divided into 12 districts and the Capitol. Each year two young representatives from each district are selected by lottery to participate in The Hunger Games. Part entertainment, part brutal retribution for a past rebellion, the televised games are broadcast throughout Panem. The 24 participants are forced to eliminate their competitors while the citizens of Panem are required to watch. When 16-year-old Katniss' young sister, Prim, is selected as District 12's female representative, Katniss volunteers to take her place. She and her male counterpart, Peeta, are pitted against bigger, stronger representatives, some of whom have trained for this their whole lives.

archenemy_2020.opis_neo:
Junak iz druge dimenzije, ki je padel skozi prostor in čas na zemljo nihče ne verjame njegovim zgodbam, razen mestnega najstnika Hamsterja.

Max Fist (Manganiello) trdi, da je junak iz druge dimenzije, ki je padel skozi prostor in čas na Zemljo, kjer nima moči. Nihče ne verjame njegovim zgodbam, razen mestnega najstnika Hamsterja. Skupaj se odpravita na ulice, da bi z njih pometla mestno zločinsko mrežo, ki prodaja mamila, ter njenega šefa, znanega kot Upravnika.
archenemy_2020.opis_omdb: Max Fist (Joe Manganiello) is a hard-drinking homeless man who claims to have been a superhero in a world called Chromium. He says that while he was battling his nemesis Cleo and trying to protect his world from her evil doomsday device, he slipped through an opening between time and space and crashed on Earth, where his powers are inert. Aspiring journalist Hamster (Skylan Brooks) interviews Max and slowly becomes his friend. Meanwhile, Hamster's sister Indigo (Zolee Griggs) works for a drug dealer called "The Manager" (Glenn Howerton), hoping to make a better life for herself and her brother. When Indigo tries to make a break, an all-out war starts, and Max must help his new friends.

[rec]³: génesis_2012.opis_neo:
Akcija se zdaj dogaja kilometre daleč od prvotne lokacije in delno na dnevni svetlobi, kar daje filmu povsem svežo, vendar vznemirljivo resničnost.

Okužba se je razširila. Zapleta prejšnjih dveh filmov se tu združujeta in ta tretji del sage deluje kot dekoder za odkrivanje informacij, skritih v prvih dveh filmih ter pušča odprta vrata za zaključni film, '[REC] 4: Apokalipsa.'

blinky bill the movie_2015.opis_neo:
Majhni Blinky Bill je po srcu pustolovec in sanja o odhodu iz majhnega mesteca, da bi poiskal pogrešanega očeta.

Ko koala Blinky Bill najde skrivnostno znamenje, ki bi lahko bilo očetovo, se odpravi na pot, ki ga popelje v divji in nevarni svet. Kmalu se spoprijatelji z Nustsyem, koalo iz živalskega vrta, in Jackom, nervoznim kuščarjem. Skupaj se morajo med begom pred maščevalnim mačkom naučiti sodelovati, če želijo preživeti v kruti divjini in najti Blinkyjevega očeta.
blinky bill the movie_2015.opis_omdb: An adventurous young koala embarks on a journey across the wild and dangerous Australian outback in the hope of finding his missing father, but he soon discovers that there is more to being a hero than meets the eye.

primer_2004.opis_neo:
Inženirji, ki delajo za veliko korporacijo, med razvijanjem najnovejšega projekta slučajno izumijo nekaj nepričakovanega.

Skupinica inženirjev dela podnevi za veliko korporacijo. Ponoči pa popivajo v svoji delavnici. Med razvijanjem svojega najnovejšega projekta slučajno odkrijejo nepričakovane možnosti. Lahko delajo in dobijo vse, kar si zamislijo. Prvi izziv je, kako izkoristiti to priložnost. Soočanje s posledicami pa bi lahko bil zadnji.
primer_2004.opis_omdb: Engineers Aaron, Abe, Robert and Phillip are working on an invention, the prototype being built in Aaron's garage. This project is beyond their day jobs. The project truly does belong to Aaron and Abe, as they use all their free time working on it, primarily trying to overcome the many engineering related problems they've encountered. It is during one of his tests with the invention running that Abe discovers that a protein inside the main unit has multiplied much more rapidly than it could in nature. Rather than the invention being a protein super incubator, Abe, using himself as a guinea pig, and a very meticulous one at that, discovers that the invention can be used as a time machine. In his self experiment, Abe was especially careful not to interfere with his own self in that time warp. Abe passes along this discovery to Aaron, who he expects will tell his wife Kara in what is the sanctity of their marriage, but he doesn't want to tell either Robert or Phillip. Much to Abe's surprise, Aaron does not want to tell Kara, it being a sole intellectual property of just the two of them, in the process moving the base of operation to a locked storage unit. Aaron's plan for the two of them is to use the invention to win big in the stock market by knowing through the time travel what has happened in the market. With two thoughts on the matter now instead of just one, Aaron and Abe may hit some logistical and philosophical roadblocks in how to move forward.

the rental_2020.opis_neo:
Izlet štirih prijateljev se spremeni v nočno moro, ko ugotovijo da lastnik vohuni za njimi.

Dva para se za konec tedna odpravita na izlet v prečudovito najeto hišo, kot iz pravljice. Njihov izlet se sprevrže v nočno moro, ko ugotovijo, da lastnik vohuni za njimi, na plan pa začnejo prihajati dobro očuvane skrivnosti, ki njihovo prijateljstvo postavijo na kocko. Vse skupaj se le še stopnjuje, zato se odločijo zapustiti hišo, a morajo prej preživeti noč.
the rental_2020.opis_omdb: Two couples on an oceanside getaway grow suspicious that the host of their seemingly perfect rental house may be spying on them. Before long, what should have been a celebratory weekend trip turns into something far more sinister, as well-kept secrets are exposed and the four old friends come to see each other in a whole new light.

legally blonde_2001.opis_neo:
Blondinka Elle Woods je odlična študentka, predsednica ženskega študentskega društva in sploh zelo priljubljena punca.

Njeno življenje je čudovito, nastopila celo v videospotu Rickyja Martina! Vendar Elle ni razvajena in neumna avša. Ima zlato srce in je srečno zaljubljena v Warnerja Huntingtona. Zdaj, ko je končala šolanje na kolidžu, pričakuje Warnerjevo snubitev. 

Toda Warner, ki ne skriva političnih ambicij in odhaja na Harvard študirat za pravnika, jo da na čevelj. Elle se mu zdi "preveč blond" in ne dovolj resna za njegovo bodočo ženo. 

Elle se še sama vpiše na Harvard in na presenečenje vseh postane najboljša študentka v razredu in tako se ji ponudi priložnost, da na sodišču sodeluje pri senzacionalnem primeru umora.
legally blonde_2001.opis_omdb: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) has it all. She's the President of her sorority, a Hawaiian Tropic girl, Miss June in her campus calendar, and, above all, a natural blonde. She dates the cutest fraternity boy on campus and wants nothing more than to be Mrs. Warner Huntington III. But, there's just one thing stopping Warner (Matthew Davis) from popping the question: Elle is too blonde. Growing up across the street from Aaron Spelling might mean something in Los Angeles, California, but nothing to Warner's East-Coast blue blood family. So, when Warner packs up for Harvard Law and reunites with an old sweetheart from prep school, Elle rallies all her resources and gets into Harvard, determined to win him back. But law school is a far cry from the comforts of her poolside and the mall. Elle must wage the battle of her life, for her guy, for herself and for all the blondes who suffer endless indignities everyday.

garfield: a tale of two kitties_2006.naslov_orig: Garfield: A Tale of Two Kitties
garfield: a tale of two kitties_2006.opis_neo:
Najpožrešnejši in najbolj leni maček na svetu, se tokrat z gospodarjem in psičkom Odiejem odpravi v London, kjer namerava Jon zasnubiti svoje dekle.

Garfield, najbolj priljubljeni maček na tem svetu, se je tokrat spravil na Veliko Britanijo in tam zakuhal celo zmedo. Čez lužo je odpotoval (s svojim pasjim pomočnikom Odiejem), da bi presenetil svojega gospodarja, Jona Arbuckla (Breckin Meyer), ki je prišel v London zasnubit svoje dekle, veterinarko Liz Wilson (Jennifer Love Hewitt). Garfield je prišel… videl… in zmagal. Uklonili so se mu Big Ben, Buckinghamska palača, Scotland Yard in tudi njegova nova najljubša jed: mesna pita (okej, ni lazanja, ampak vsega pač ne moreš imeti). V pustolovščini, vredni tako pomembnega mačka, Garfield zamenja svoje mesto s Princem, mačkom modre krvi, ki je ravno podedoval grad. Zdaj je grad Garfieldov - in kdo bi si ga bolj zaslužil?
