Na veliki posesti, ki ji Garfield zdaj pravi dom, zanj prav po kraljevsko skrbijo butler in mednarodna mešanica štirinožnih služabnikov in oboževalcev. Življenje, vredno kralja… Čeprav je včasih kraljevska krona na glavi še kako težka. Lord Dargis, ki je naslednji v vrsti za dedovanje, se hoče Princa/Garfielda znebiti. In Garfieldov veliki, boljši in popolnejši svet se v tej zgodbi o dveh mačkah postavi na glavo.
garfield: a tale of two kitties_2006.opis_omdb: Garfield (Bill Murray) is back and this time he and his canine sidekick Odie follow their owner, Jon Arbuckle (Breckin Meyer), to England, the U.K. may never recover, as Garfield is mistaken for a look-alike, regal cat who has inherited a castle. Garfield savors the royal treatment afforded by his loyal four-legged subjects, but his reign is in jeopardy. The evil nefarious stubborn Lord Dargis (Sir Billy Connolly) is determined to do away with Garfield, so he can turn the castle into a resort. Garfield's bigger, better, more perfect world is soon turned upside down in this tale of two kitties.

love again_2023.opis_neo:
Mlada ženska pošilja romantična sporočila na stari telefon svojega pokojnega fanta in nevede splete odnos z novim lastnikom te številke.

V romantični drami Mira, ki preboleva smrt svojega zaročenca, začne dobivati sporočila z njegove telefonske številke, nevedoč, da je operater številko pokojnika dodelil novemu službenemu telefonu novinarja Roba. Ko mora Rob napisati prispevek o zvezdnici Celine Dion, jo prosi za pomoč, saj bi rad osebno spoznal Miro in osvojil njeno srce.
love again_2023.opis_omdb: A young woman tries to ease the pain of her fiancé's death by sending texts to his old cell phone number, and forms a connection with the man the number has been reassigned to.

something's gotta give_2003.opis_neo:
Harry Sanborn je uspešen poslovnež in večni samec, ki živi na veliki nogi in hodi na zmenke le z zelo mladimi ženskami.

Harryjeva najnovejša ljubica je Marin, ki ga povabi v obmorsko počitniško hišo svoje mame, uspešne in ločene pisateljice Erice. Hiša naj bi bila prazna, vendar se izkaže, da Erica tam piše scenarij za novo predstavo. Ko si Marin in Harry privoščita nekaj romantičnih uric, Harry začuti bolečine v prsih. 

Ker mora Harry sedaj zaradi težav s srcem po nasvetu svojega mladega zdravnika Juliana Mercerja čim več počivati, obtiči v hiši skupaj z nejevoljno Erico. Kmalu Harry presenečen spozna, da ga Erica privlači. A istočasno se zanjo začne zanimati tudi Julian.
something's gotta give_2003.opis_omdb: Harry Sanborn is an aged music industry exec with a fondness for younger women like Marin, his latest trophy girlfriend. Things get a little awkward when Harry suffers a heart attack at the home of Marin's mother Erica. Left in the care of Erica and his doctor, a love triangle starts to take shape.

money monster_2016.opis_neo:
Televizijski finančni svetovalec Lee Gates in producentka Patty se znajdeta v skrajnih okoliščinah, ko besni investitor s pištolo zavzame njun studio.

Lee Gates je aroganten finančni strokovnjak z lastno televizijsko oddajo, v kateri gledalcem svetuje o trgovanju z delnicami. S producentko Patty se naenkrat znajde v skrajni situaciji, ko studio na silo zavzame pobesneli vlagatelj, ki je zaradi napačnih finančnih nasvetov izgubil vse življenjske prihranke. Oboroženi moški Leeja pred kamerami vzame za talca in zahteva odgovore. Lee in Patty morata pred milijoni gledalcev v pravi dirki s časom razvozlati finančno zaroto v nepredvidljivem svetu visokotehnoloških delniških trgov.
money monster_2016.opis_omdb: In the real-time, high stakes thriller Money Monster, George Clooney and Julia Roberts star as financial TV host Lee Gates and his producer Patty, who are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything (Jack O'Connell) forcefully takes over their studio. During a tense standoff broadcast to millions on live TV, Lee and Patty must work furiously against the clock to unravel the mystery behind a conspiracy at the heart of today's fast-paced, high-tech global markets.

the suicide squad_2021.opis_neo:
Umirajo, da bi rešili svet.

Superzločinci Harley Quinn, Bloodsport, Peacemaker in skupina norih zapornikov iz zaporu Belle Reve se pridružijo nadvse skrivni, nadvse sumljivi operativni enoti X. Izkrcajo jih na oddaljen otok Corto Maltese, polnem sovražnikov, kjer zlohotni projekt Starfish grozi celemu svetu.
the suicide squad_2021.opis_omdb: In exchange for lighter sentences, just like the anti-hero team in Suicide Squad (2016), a fresh batch of Belle Reve's meta-humans strike a deal with the cold head of Task Force X, Amanda Waller. This time, her ragtag band of super-powered convicts--Harley Quinn, Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Polka-Dot Man, and Ratcatcher 2--ventures into the dangerous South American island nation of Corto Maltese to find the Thinker, the evil scientist in charge of the mysterious Project Starfish. However, as the band joins forces with an old leader of the notorious team, humankind is on the verge of extinction. Can the new expendables stop a menace that could mean the end of the world as we know it?

don't tell a soul_2020.opis_neo:
Dvema tatovoma se prekrižajo poti s problematičnim varnostnikom, ki je obtičal na dnu pozabljenega vodnjaka.

Težavni najstnik Matt prepriča mlajšega brata, da mu pomaga oropati hišo za pomoč svoji bolni mami. A ko gre rop po zlu je Joey razcepljen med tem, da stori tisto, kar je prav in med svojim psihotičnim starejšim bratom.
don't tell a soul_2020.opis_omdb: Two thieving teenage brothers, stealing money to help their sick mom, match wits with a troubled security guard stuck at the bottom of a forgotten well.

christmas in evergreen_2017.opis_neo:
Veterinarka si ob snežni krogli zaželi, da bi imela najbolj romantičen božič v življenju, vendar se stvari ne odvijejo po njenih pričakovanjih.

Veterinarka iz majhnega mesta si ob snežni krogli zaželi, da bi bil to njen najbolj romantičen božič doslej - v upanju, da bo njen dolgoletni izbranec končno naredil odločilen korak.
christmas in evergreen_2017.opis_omdb: Hoping to spur her longtime beau to action, a small-town veterinarian wishes upon a snow globe that this will be her most romantic Christmas ever.

the perfect catch_2017.opis_neo:
Ko se v mesto vrne bejzbolski zvezdnik, nekdanji Jessicin fant, ta najde navdih, da povsem spremeni svojo neuspešno okrepčevalnico.

Ločena samohranilka Jessica vodi družinsko okrepčevalnico v mestecu Parker Falls v Ohiu. Ostati skuša zvesta prvotnemu konceptu, ki ga je zasnoval njen dedek, toda le stežka se prebija iz meseca v mesec.

Potem pa se domov vrne lokalni športni zvezdnik Chase, profesionalni igralec bejzbola, ki je v srednji šoli zapustil mesto in svoje dekle Jessico, da bi sledil svojim sanjam. Po 15 letih narazen sta oba pripravljena na spravo, morda pa med njima celo ponovno preskoči iskrica ...
the perfect catch_2017.opis_omdb: Jessica, a single parent, owner of a struggling diner, finds the inspiration she needed when her high school boyfriend, Chase, a professional baseball player returns to town.

christmas in evergreen: letters to santa.naslov_orig: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
christmas in evergreen: letters to santa.opis_neo:
Ob prazničnem obisku doma v Evergreen se Lisa znajde sredi izpolnjevanja želja preteklosti - in nepričakovane romance, polne božične čarobnosti.

Lisa se tik pred zdajci za božič odpravi v svoje rojstno mesto Evergreen, kjer ugotovi, da so staro trgovino z mešanim blagom zaprli. Odloči se, da bo uporabila svoje poslovne veščine in poskrbela za ohranjanje lokalne tradicije ter poskušala ponovno odpreti trgovino. Pri tem podvigu pa ji pomaga mojster Kevin, s katerim naletita na nemalo presenečenj pri obnavljanju trgovine. Med njima pa se začnejo spletati tudi čustvene vezi.
christmas in evergreen: letters to santa.opis_omdb: Lisa Palmer's trip home to Evergreen for the holidays finds her fulfilling the wishes of a Christmas Past and finding a romance full of Christmas magic. Stars Jill Wagner and Mark Deklin.

le gendarme de saint-tropez_1964.opis_neo:
Žandar Ludovic Cruchot je premeščen v letoviško mesto Saint-Tropez, kjer mu težave povzročajo mali lopovi in lastna hči.

Legendarna komedija zmešnjav z Louisom de Funèsom. Ambicioznega žandarja Cruchota premestijo v Saint-Tropez na francoski rivieri. Tam se spusti v vojno z nudisti na plaži in z najstniško hčerjo, ki se prijateljem zlaže, da je njen oče milijonar z jahto. Cruchot se zaplete v njeno laž in se predstavlja kot lastnik jahte. Ko se pojavijo pravi lastniki, pa se izkaže, da niti oni niso to, za kar se izdajajo!
le gendarme de saint-tropez_1964.opis_omdb: The ambitious police officer Cruchot is transferred to St. Tropez. He's struggling with persistent nude swimmers, but even more with his teenage daughter, who's trying to impress her rich friends by telling them her father was a millionaire and owned a yacht in the harbor. He gets drawn into it when he tries to cover for her when a friend 'lends' the car of her assumed father. It turns out that the real owners of the yacht aren't exactly what they pretend to be either...

crocodile dundee ii_1988.opis_neo:
Krokodil Dundee mora zaščititi svojo izbranko novinarko, ki so ji na sledi morilski kriminalci.

Mick Dundee je neustrašen lovec na krokodile, ki se je iz avstralske divjine preselil v New York. Tu živi z novinarko Sue, zaradi katere je tudi zapustil svoje naravno okolje. Medtem se Suejin nekdanji fant, fotoreporter Bob Tanner, potika po Kolumbiji, kjer zasleduje tamkajšnje preprodajalce mamil in njihove posle pridno beleži s fotoaparatom. Ko posname nekaj vročih fotk, jih pošlje Sue, Kolumbijci pa mu nato pridejo na sled in ga ubijejo. Sue se zdaj znajde v smrtni nevarnosti, saj se hočejo nepridipravi polastiti Bobovih fotografij. Mick jo zato odpelje v avstralsko divjino, ki jo pozna kot svoj žep in kjer mu nihče ne more do živega.
crocodile dundee ii_1988.opis_omdb: One short year after the life-changing adventure in Crocodile Dundee (1986), the rugged hunter from Down Under, Michael J. "Crocodile" Dundee, has managed to become a legend even in New York City. Living happily with Newsday's tenacious journalist, Sue Charlton, Mick will soon find himself neck-deep in trouble, when the love of his life becomes the target of the murderous Colombian drug cartel leader, Luis Rico. Now, from Manhattan's urban jungle to Walkabout Creek's dangerous wilderness, Mick will have to put to good use his unparalleled survival skills, to protect Sue from Rico's evil henchmen. But, do they know that they are no match for the Australian Crocodile Dundee?

the fate of the furious_2017.opis_neo:
Osmo nadaljevanje akcijske poslastice razkrije največjo grožnjo, ki je do sedaj pretila Dominicu in njegovi ekipi. Bo razdor med člani usoden?

Zdaj sta Dom (Vin Diesel) in Letty porocena, ostala ekipa pa vodi normalna življenja. A ko skrivnostna ženska zapelje Doma in ga zvlece nazaj v igro, se mora ekipa ponovno združiti. Z Dwaynom Johnsonom..
the fate of the furious_2017.opis_omdb: Now that Dominic Toretto (Vin Diesel) and Letty Ortiz (Michelle Rodriguez) are on their honeymoon, and Brian (Paul Walker) and Mia (Jordana Brewster) have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew has been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, and a betrayal of those closest to him, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, the elite force will crisscross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and to bring home the man who made them a family.

vertical limit_2000.opis_neo:
V adrenalinski pustolovščini spoznamo plezalca Petra Garretta, ki ga čaka nevarna reševalna akcija na zahtevni gori K2, drugem najvišjem vrhu sveta.

Mlad alpinist Pete Garrett v tekmi s časom tvega svoje življenje, da bi rešil svojo sestro in njeno ekipo pred K2, eno od najbolj zahrbtnih gora na svetu.
vertical limit_2000.opis_omdb: A high-adrenaline tale of young climber Peter Garrett, who must launch a treacherous and extraordinary rescue effort up K2, the world's second-highest peak. Confronting both his own limitations and the awesome power of nature's uncontrollable elements, Peter risks his life to save his sister, Annie, and her summit team in a race against time. The team is trapped in an icy grave at 26,000 feet - a death zone above the vertical limit of endurance where the human body cannot survive for long. Every second counts as Peter enlists the help of a crew of fellow climbers, including eccentric, reclusive mountain man Montgomery Wick, to ascend the chilling might of the world's most feared peak to save her.

gangs of new york_2002.opis_neo:
Leta 1863 se Amsterdam Vallon vrne v Five Points v New Yorku, da se maščuje Billu Klavcu, ki mu je ubil očeta.

Po več letih za rešetkami se mladi irski priseljenec Amsterdam vrne v mesto, da bi se maščeval vodji sovražne tolpe, ki mu je ubil očeta. Toda Amsterdamovo osebno maščevanje postane del vojne tolp, ki izbruhne, ko se s svojimi irskimi sonarodnjaki odpravi v boj, da bi si priborili prostor v svoji novi domovini.
gangs of new york_2002.opis_omdb: In the god-forsaken district of early-1860s Lower Manhattan known as the Five Points, the vicious Nativist, Bill "The Butcher" Cutting, is the supreme overlord of an area riddled with crime, prostitution, theft and murder, as the American Civil War still rages on. Sixteen whole years after the brutal murder of his father from Bill's blood-stained hands, an orphaned Irish-American, Amsterdam Vallon, returns to this melting pot of corruption to avenge his untimely death; however, a lot has changed since then. Who can remember the once-innocent boy and now a young man bent on revenge, who works his way up to the hierarchy of Five Points? Will Amsterdam ever taste the dangerous but sweet fruit of retribution?

we were soldiers_2002.opis_neo:
Zgodba govori o prvi veliki bitki v ameriški fazi v vietnamski vojni.

V nedeljo, 14. novembra leta 1965, so se polkovnik Hal Moore in njegova enota štiristotih vojakov spustili v dolino La Drang, ki je v Vietnamu znana kot 'Dolina smrti'. Na bojnem polju so obstali obkoljeni s približno 2000 severno-vietnamskimi vojaki, pod vodstvom polkovnika Ahna. Moore je vodil Prvi bataljon 7. konjeniške divizije - prav tiste, ki jo je vodil general George Custer sto let pred tem, v boju proti Indijancem. In prav tako Custer, se Moore znajde obkoljen z znatno številčnejšim sovražnikom.
we were soldiers_2002.opis_omdb: A telling of the 1st Battalion, 7 Cavalry Regiment, 1st Calvary Division's battle against overwhelming odds in the Ia Drang valley of Vietnam in 1965. Seen through the eyes of the battalion's commander, Lieutenant Colonel Hal Moore (played by Mel Gibson), we see him take command of the battalion and its preparations to go into Vietnam. We also see how the French had, years earlier, been defeated in the same area. The battle was to be the first major engagement between U.S. and N.V.A. forces in South Vietnam, and showed the use of helicopters as mobility providers and assault support aircraft.

seven pounds_2008.opis_neo:
Moški, ki nekaj skriva, se odpravi na nepozabno pot k odrešitvi tako, da za zmeraj spremeni življenje sedmih neznancev.

Davčni agent, ki nosi v sebi veliko skrivnost, se odpravi na naverjetno potovanje odrešenja, kjer za vedno spremeni življenja sedmih oseb.
seven pounds_2008.opis_omdb: Haunted by a secret, Ben Thomas looks for redemption by radically transforming the lives of seven people he doesn't know. Once his plan is set, nothing will be able to stop him. At least that's what he thinks. But Ben hadn't planned on falling in love with one of these people and she's the one who will end up transforming him.

you got served_2004.opis_neo:
Prijatelja David in Elgin hočeta odpreti snemalni studio, zato pa morata najprej zmagati na zahtevnem plesnem tekmovanju.

Elgin and David sta najboljša prijatelja in odlična ulična plesalca. V njunem svetu najboljše hip hop skupine tekmujejo za denar in ugled. Nekega dne se na tekmovanje prijavi skupina iz predmestja in kmalu nič več ni tako, kot je bilo. 
Spreta se, a se morata znova združiti, da bi sebi in drugim dokazala, da sta najboljša. Če zmagata na pomembnem tekmovanju, se jima obeta edinstvena življenjska priložnost.
you got served_2004.opis_omdb: In order to achieve their dream of opening a recording studio, two friends (Omarion, Houston) must first win their city's dance contest -- a fierce competition that pits them against a group of tough street dancers.

guarding tess_1994.opis_neo:
Nekdanja prva dama hoče, da je agent tajne službe njen telesni stražar, čeprav je on ne prenaša.

Po smrti moža in predsednika ZDA se prva dama Tess Carlise vrne v svoje rojstno mesto Ohio, da bi se umaknila pred vsem. S sabo vzame tudi zvestega telesnega stražarja, tajnega agenta Douga Chesnica. Doug je predan in ambiciozen agent, ki živi za nevarnost in akcijo, zato ga življenje v mestecu, kjer je njegova edina naloga, da prinese zajtrk v posteljo, niti malo ne veseli. Toda hitro začne tekmovati z nekdanjo tesno prijateljico.
guarding tess_1994.opis_omdb: Doug is a Secret Service Agent who has just completed his stint in charge protecting Tess Carlisle, widow of a former U.S. President, and close personal friend of the President. He finds that she has requested that he not be rotated but instead return to be her permanent detail. Doug is crushed. He wants off her detail. She is very difficult to guard and makes her detail crazy with her whims and demands. Doug returns with no idea of how to continue dealing with her.

making waves_2023.opis_neo: Amelia je glasbena vodja, ki gre na festival, da bi podpisala pogodbo z vzhajajočo skupino, nato pa spozna, da je frontman njena ljubezen iz otroštva.
making waves_2023.opis_omdb: When a music label executive goes to a festival on the Outer Banks to beat out the competition for an elusive new band, she discovers that the group is fronted by her childhood summer sweetheart.

meurtre à la pointe du raz_2020.naslov_orig: Meurtre à la Pointe du Raz
meurtre à la pointe du raz_2020.opis_neo:
Na plaži Pointe du Raz najdejo naplavljeno truplo starejše ženske. Kar je sprva videti kot naključna utopitev, se kmalu sprevrže v umor.

Na plaži najdejo naplavljeno truplo starejše ženske. Kar je sprva videti kot naključna utopitev, se kmalu sprevrže v umor.
meurtre à la pointe du raz_2020.opis_omdb: The body of an old woman is found washed up on the beach at the Pointe du Raz.

love's portrait_2022.opis_neo:
Lily je kuratorka v muzeju, ki odkrije naslikani portret, ki ji je čisto podoben. Odpotuje na Irsko, da bi našla umetnika.

Film sledi Lily, muzejski kustosinji, ki odkrije sliko, ki je videti tako kot ona. Odpravi se iskat, od kod je slika in kdo jo je naslikal.
love's portrait_2022.opis_omdb: It follows Lily, a museum curator who discovers a painting that looks just like her. She goes to find where the painting came from and who painted it.

love in the sun_2019.opis_neo: Ustvarjalec aplikacije za zmenke ima trdne poglede na ljubezen, toda potovanje na Florido grozi, da jih bo spremenilo.
love in the sun_2019.opis_omdb: A dating app creator finds her views on love challenged when she returns home to Florida and reconnects with her high school sweetheart.

crimetime: freefall_2024.opis_neo: Ko zapusti uspešno televizijsko kriminalko, da bi živela v majhnem mestu, mora igralka Hadley Warner pomagati policiji razrešiti resnično uganko.
crimetime: freefall_2024.opis_omdb: Crime series actress Hadley Warner retires to a small town where she encounters her first real case. Using her TV crime knowledge, she teams up with Detective Shawn Caden to solve the case. Starring Lyndie Greenwood and Luke Macfa...

would you kill for me? the mary bailey s.naslov_orig: Would You Kill for Me? The Mary Bailey Story
would you kill for me? the mary bailey s.opis_neo: Po tem, ko jih je isti moški dolga leta zlorabljal, se tri ženske - babica, hčerka in vnukinja - odločijo, da se ga enkrat za vselej znebijo.
would you kill for me? the mary bailey s.opis_omdb: After a lifetime of abuse from the same man, a grandmother, her daughter, and her granddaughter conspire to get rid of him once and for all.

a vineyard romance_2020.opis_neo:
Ko se vrne v domači kraj, da bi poročala o modni poroki, novinarka Samantha ugotovi, da je ženin njena ljubezen iz otroštva, vinogradnik Liam.

Samantha Hart je uspešna novinarka, ki piše za revijo o porokah. Njena nova naloga jo odpelje v njeno domače mesto, kjer naj bi poročala o poroki v slikovitem vinogradu. Nevesta je uspešna vplivnica, ko Samantha prispe na kraj poroke, pa ugotovi, da je ženin Liam njen bivši fant, ki vinograd tudi upravlja.

Ko mora nevesta oditi zaradi nujnih opravkov, Samantha in Liam skupaj preživita nekaj časa, saj ga mora ona intervjuvati za članek. V obeh se prebujajo stari spomini in tudi meščani ju spominjajo, da sta bila dober par. Poroka se bliža in Liam začne dvomiti o svoji odločitvi. Se bosta nekdanja ljubimca vdala svojim čustvom?
a vineyard romance_2020.opis_omdb: When Seattle magazine writer Samantha Hart is sent home to write an article about the wedding destination of Hawthorne Vineyards, she discovers the ex who broke her heart not only runs the vineyard, but he's about to get married t...

my dreams of you_2024.opis_neo: Nadobudna pisateljica Grace in glasbenik Michael se po naključju združita v svojih sanjah, potem pa še v resničnem življenju, kjer se zaljubita.
my dreams of you_2024.opis_omdb: Thanks to a mix-up at Dream Central, Grace has recurring dreams about a handsome stranger named Michael. When they finally meet in person, Grace is shocked to learn that he has no idea who she is.

fourth down and love_2023.opis_neo: Samska mama Erin na hčerinem treningu naleti na ljubezen iz srednje šole - nekdanjega igralca ameriškega nogometa, ki okreva po poškodbi.
fourth down and love_2023.opis_omdb: Follows a single mother and a pro football player as they meet again on her daughter's flag football field after his career is interrupted by an injury.

for love & honey_2024.opis_neo: Po odkritju starodavne freske se čebelarka Eva pridruži arheologu Austenu, ki se boji čebel, v iskanju še več zakladov in sladke ljubezni na Malti.
for love & honey_2024.opis_omdb: Beekeeper Eva uncovers an ancient fresco while rescuing a hive. Austen, a visiting archeologist, thinks it is key to his research, so he persuades Eva to help him on his quest across Malta.

hae-jeok: ba-da-ro gan san-jeok_2014.opis_neo: Gusarska tolpa in skupina banditov se trudita uloviti sivega kita, ki je požrl kraljevski žig.
hae-jeok: ba-da-ro gan san-jeok_2014.opis_omdb: A band of pirates and a group of bandits fight to catch a gray whale that has swallowed a royal stamp.

stauffenberg_2004.opis_neo:
Film prikazuje resnične dogodke, znane kot operacija Valkira.

Leta 1944 grozi Nemčiji popoln poraz. Skupina častnikov se zato odloči strmoglaviti Hitlerja. Eden od njih, Stauffenberg, na sestanku s firerjem podtakne bombo, a Hitler preživi in da upornike usmrtiti.
stauffenberg_2004.opis_omdb: In 1944, in fear of a complete German defeat in the World War II, a group of high command officers plot an attempt against Hitler, and one of the leaders of the conspiracy, Stauffenberg (Sebastian Koch), goes to a meeting with the Fuhrer in charge of exploding the place. However, Hitler survives and the officers are executed. This unsuccessful operation was called "Valkyrie Operation", and this realistic movie discloses this true event.

goosebumps_2015.opis_neo:
Najstnik v Madisonu v Delawaru združi moči s hčerko R. L. Stina, pisca mladinskih grozljivk, ko se osvobodijo pisateljevi namišljeni demoni.

Po preselitvi v majhno mesto Madison, se najstnica Zach spoprijatelji z novo sosedo Hanno. Ne ve, da je Hannahin oče slavni pisatelj grozljivk, R. L. Stine. Ko bodo Stineove pošastne kreacije spuščene v resnični svet, morata Zach in Hannah storiti vse, kar je potrebno, da ju pošljejo nazaj, kamor spadajo.
goosebumps_2015.opis_omdb: After moving to a new small town, teenage Zach Cooper (Dylan Minnette) meets the beautiful girl next door, Hannah (Odeya Rush). But every silver lining has a cloud, and Zach's comes when he learns that Hannah has a mysterious dad who is revealed to be R. L. Stine (Jack Black), the author of the bestselling Goosebumps series. It turns out that there is a reason why Stine is so strange - he is a prisoner of his own imagination - the monsters that his books made famous are real, and Stine protects his readers by keeping them locked up in their books. Zach unintentionally unleashes the monsters from their manuscripts and they begin to terrorize the town. It's up to Stine, Zach, Hannah, and Zach's friend Champ (Ryan Lee) to put all the monsters back in their books.

papillon_1973.opis_neo:
Moški se spoprijatelji z zločincem, s katerim skupaj služita kazen na groznem zaporniškem otoku, kar ga navdihne, da začne načrtovati pobeg.

Film je posnet po avtobiografiji Henrija "Papillona" Charrierea. V zgodbi spremljamo njegov beg iz ene najzloglasnejših kazenskih kolonij na Hudičevem otoku v Južni Ameriki. Charriere reši življenje kolegu zaporniku, ponarejevalcu Louisu Degi, ki mu v zahvalo pomaga načrtovati pobeg z otoka.
papillon_1973.opis_omdb: A semi-fictional account of Henri Charrière's time in the penal system in French Guyana - some of it spent on infamous Devil's Island - is presented. It's the early 1930s. Charrière - nicknamed Papillon because of his butterfly tattoo - and Louis Dega are two among many who have been convicted in the French judicial system, they now being transferred to French Guyana where they will serve their time, never to return to France even if they are ever released. A safe-cracker by criminal profession, Papillon is serving a life sentence for murdering a pimp, a crime for which he adamantly states he was framed. Dega is a wealthy counterfeiter, who expects his well-to-do wife eventually to get him released. At Papillon's initiative, the duo enters into a business arrangement: Papillon will provide protection for Dega, who, in turn, will finance Papillon's escape attempt. As the two men spend more time together than either had expected, their burgeoning friendship ends up being an important factor altering their original plans, needed as they work with and against others who are trying to achieve their own goals, sometime conflicting with those of Papillon and Dega.

monsters of man_2020.opis_neo:
Skupina bolničarjev se bori za preživetje, ko se zaplete v skrivno zaroto za testiranje morilskih robotov na lokaciji, kjer naj bi izdelovali mamila.

Podjetje, ki se ukvarja z robotiko, in agent Cie se zapleteta v nezakonito, neodobreno vojaško operacijo, v okviru katere v domnevni obrat za proizvodnjo drog v Zlatem trikotniku nastavita štiri prototipe robotov, ki jih nihče v podjetju ne bo pogrešal, da bi dokazala, da je podjetje dovolj dobro za podpis dobičkonosne vojaške pogodbe. Ko šest zdravnikov, ki so priča pomoru nedolžnih vaščanov, postane nova tarča, so prisiljeni vstopiti v smrtonosno igro mačke in miši.
monsters of man_2020.opis_omdb: A robotics company teams up with a corrupt CIA agent undergoing an illegal, unsanctioned military operation. Dropping four prototype robots into a suspected drug manufacturing camp in the Golden triangle that no one will miss. The mission is to prove the robotics company is worthy of winning a lucrative military contract. Six doctors on a good cause witness the brutal slaughter of an innocent village and are forced into a deadly game of cat and mouse as they become the new targets.

l.a. story_1991.opis_neo:
Prismuknjen vremenar skuša osvojiti srce angleške novinarke, ki se skuša znajti v čudaškem Los Angelesu zgodnjih 90. let.

Odštekani vremenar skuša s pomočjo govorečega obcestnega reklamnega panoja osvojiti srce angleške časopisne novinarke, ki skuša razumeti čudni svet Los Angelesa v 90. letih 20. stoletja.
l.a. story_1991.opis_omdb: Harris K. Telemacher is a "wacky weekend weatherman" for a local Los Angeles television station, who is searching for meaning in his otherwise cliché ridden Los Angeles life. With the help of an insightful and talkative Freeway sign, Harris embarks on a journey through Los Angeles in pursuit of Sarah, an English reporter who has been sent to the City of Angels to research an article for the London Times.

the illusionist_2006.opis_neo:
Na Dunaju čarovnik uporablja svoje sposobnosti, da bi si zagotovil ljubezen ženske, ki je daleč nad njegovim družbenim položajem.

V začetku 20. stoletja se mladi Eisenheim zaljubi v lepo Sophie, dekle daleč nad svojim družbenim položajem. Nekega dne pošljejo Eisenheima iz mesta. Čez vrsto let se kot iluzionist vrne na rodni Dunaj, ravno v času, ko krožijo govorice o Sophijini zaroki.
the illusionist_2006.opis_omdb: In late nineteenth century Vienna, renowned illusionist Eisenheim is reunited with the Duchess von Teschen when she is volunteered from the audience to participate in an illusion during one of his performances. Despite having not seen each other in fifteen years when they were teenagers, they almost immediately recognize each other as Eduard Abramovich and Sophie von Teschen, they who had a doomed romance at that time due to their class differences. The Duchess is soon to be wed to the Crown Prince Leopold in what would be for him a marriage solely in pursuit of power: overthrowing his father, the Emperor Leopold, as well as overtaking the Hungarian side of the empire. The Crown Prince is known to use violence against women if it suits his needs or purposes. As such, the Duchess, who realizes that she still loves Eisenheim and he her, can never leave the Crown Prince without it jeopardizing her life. After Eisenheim humiliates the Crown Prince at a private show which results in an incident between the Crown Prince and the Duchess, the battle between Eisenheim and the Crown Prince moves into the public performance realm, which many believe demonstrates Eisenheim's supernatural powers. Much of the work for the Crown Prince in the battle with Eisenheim is conducted by Chief Inspector Uhl, who would become the Chief of Police under the Crown Prince's reign. As such, Uhl may have ulterior motives in turning a blind eye to any unlawful act of the Crown Prince against Eisenheim or the Duchess.

out of death_2021.opis_neo: Pokvarjenemu šerifovemu uradu v ruralnem gorskem mestu načrte prekriža nenamerna priča, ki se vmeša v njihove sumljive posle.
out of death_2021.opis_omdb: A corrupt Sheriff's department in a rural mountain town comes undone when an unintended witness throws a wrench into their shady operation.

the wolfman_2010.opis_neo:
Ko se vrne v domovino, Američana ugrizne volkodlak in postane žrtev njegovega prekletstva.

Lawrence Talbot je plemič, ki se po izginotju brata vrne na posestvo k odtujenemu očetu, da bi pomagal najti bratovega morilca. Bratovi zaročenki obljubi, da bo skrivnosti prišel do dna, a se ne zmeni za očetova svarila o nevarnem bitju in starodavnem prekletstvu, ki prizadete ob polni luni spremeni v volkodlake.

Kmalu odkrije, da vaščane pobija nekaj izjemno močnega in krvoločnega ter da nezaupljivi inšpektor Scotland Yarda Aberline že preiskuje srhljive dogodke. Ko pa Talbota zver ugrizne, bo mož z mučno preteklostjo odkril svojo prvinsko stran in naletel na grozljivo usodo.
the wolfman_2010.opis_omdb: Lawrence Talbot's (Benicio Del Toro's) childhood ended the night his mother died. His father sent him from the sleepy Victorian hamlet of Blackmoor to an insane asylum, then he went to America. When his brother Ben's (Simon Merrells') fiancée Gwen Conliffe (Emily Blunt), tracks him down to help find her missing love, Talbot returns to his father's estate to learn that his brother's mauled body has been found. Reunited with his estranged father Sir John Talbot (Sir Anthony Hopkins), Lawrence sets out to find his brother's killer, and discovers a horrifying destiny for himself. Someone or something with brute strength and insatiable blood lust has been killing the villagers, and a suspicious Scotland Yard Inspector named Aberline (Hugo Weaving) comes to investigate.

johnny handsome_1989.opis_neo:
Po tem, ko ga prevarajo in konča v zaporu, dobi iznakaženi gangster nov obraz in gre na rehabilitacijo, a se ne znebi želje po maščevanju.

John Sedley je strašno neprijetnega videza. Rojen z zajčjo ustnico in iznakaženim obrazom že vse življenje životari in sodeluje v manjših kriminalnih akcijah. Tako pride v zapor, kjer s svojo iznakaženostjo pritegne pozornost prijaznega plastičnega kirurga Resherja. Po številnih bolečih operacijah Johnny dobi novo podobo, vendar mu to ne zadostuje. Hoče se maščevati vsem, ki so ga zaničevali in izkoriščali. Naveže stike z nekdanjimi gangsterskimi pajdaši, ki ga seveda ne prepoznajo, in z njimi načrtuje rop ladjedelnice. A Johnny ima v mislih vse drugo kot rop.
johnny handsome_1989.opis_omdb: Johnny Handsome is a deformed gangster who plans a successful robbery with a friend of his, Mikey Chalmette, and another couple (Sunny Boid and Rafe Garrett). During the heist, Johnny and Mikey are double-crossed by Sunny and Rafe---Mikey is killed and Johnny sent to prison. While in prison, Johnny is invited to a rehabilitation program, where Dr. Steven Fischer rebuilds Johnny's face and helps Johnny get paroled. Johnny starts working in a shipyard, where he meets Donna McCarty and starts a romance. Lt. A.Z. Drones is a skeptical detective who follows the rehabilitation of Johnny. Johnny's new life is consumed by the desire of payback.

hercules and the lost kingdom_1994.opis_neo:
Herkul pomaga beguncem ponovno zavzeti njihovo domače mesto Trojo.

Herkul pomaga mladenki, ki išče izgubljeno mesto Troja. Pelje jo v tabor beguncev iz mesta, ki so ga prevzeli Herini modri svečeniki. Herkul beguncem pomaga, da znova zavzamejo mesto.
hercules and the lost kingdom_1994.opis_omdb: Hercules is provoked till he has no other choice then fight Gargan, a giant who had absolutely no quarrel with him- and decks the mountain of aggression easily. Then the last survivor of a group of messengers, killed off one by one by Hera, dies after imploring him to come end her rule of terror in the 'lost city of Troy', which his father Zeus, who is once more unwilling to extend any more tangible help, discloses can only be found with the 'one true compass' last seen in the possession of queen Omphale. On his searching for her he frees -then against her will- Deianeira, the eager victim about to be sacrificed to the river god as virgin in the prime of her fertility to end a drought. He battles passed the 48 sons of the gate guardian and arranges to be sold at the annual slave market to the queen, who only wants him in her bed. After dealing with some protection racketeers and the devoted, happy palace slave Waylin he finally gets her late husbands compass from Omphale. He sets out on the journey with Deianeira; a sea monster swallows them, but is defeated. On land they find her father, the dying king of Troy who names her his heir, prepare an army of Trojans to reconquer the city and enter it unopposed, but then emerges an army of Heras minions, whose leader is about to sacrifice Deianeira and puts up a good fight against Hercules.

the mission_1986.opis_neo:
18. stoletje. Španski jezuiti poskušajo obvarovati indijansko pleme iz odročnega južnoameriškega območja pred portugalskim zasužnjevanjem.

1 OSKAR, 6 NOMINACIJ: Misijon govori v retrospektivni pripovedi in skozi kostumsko zgodbo o ognju in meču globalne politike, imperializmu in cerkveni preračunljivosti, pacifizmu in bojevitosti, pa tudi o sočutju, žrtvovanju in odrešitvi.
the mission_1986.opis_omdb: Jeremy Irons plays a Spanish Jesuit who goes into the South American wilderness to build a mission in the hope of converting the Indians of the region. Robert De Niro plays a slave hunter who is converted and joins the Jesuit in his mission. When Spain sells the colony to Portugal, they are forced to defend all they have built against the Portuguese aggressors.

se ying diu sau_1978.opis_neo: Osiroteli deček je odraščal v šoli kungfuja, kjer je bil učencem le za vadbeno tarčo. Življenje se mu korenito spremeni, ko pomaga brezdomnemu beraču.
se ying diu sau_1978.opis_omdb: Chien Fu (Jackie Chan) is a boy who is used as a janitor at his kung fu school. Fu can't fight and is always getting bullied by the teachers and pupils. One day, an old man helps Fu train in an art of kung fu called the "Snake's Fist". Fu doesn't get bullied again. Then Fu creates his own style and mixes it with the Snake's Fist. His style is based on the movement and actions of a cat. One day, the old man is in trouble by a man who does "The Eagle's Claw", and Fu helps the old man.

along came polly_2004.opis_neo:
V strogo urejeno življenje mladoporočenca se naseli kaos, ko se zaljubi v nekdanjo sošolko.

Reuben je vse življenje igral na karto varnosti in zanesljivosti; Polly pa je svobodna duša, ki živi za veselje tistega trenutka. Ko se spečata docela nesorodni duši, se zlasti Reubenov svet obrne na glavo.
along came polly_2004.opis_omdb: Reuben Feffer thinks he's found the love of his life but on his honeymoon he discovers her cheating on him with a scuba instructor. Reuben travels back home to get his life on track. On a night out with best pal, Sandy Lyle, Reuben discovers an old school friend, Polly Prince. Reuben feels a connection straight away, and tries constantly to get her to like him. But it's not going to be easy for Reuben, especially when he spends his days calculating risks, and when someone unexpected turns up.

nowhere to run_1993.opis_neo:
Pobegli zapornik se znajde na kmetiji neke vdove. Ko izve, da se hoče neusmiljen investitor dokopati do zemlje, vdovi pomaga v boju proti krivici.

Sam Gillen pobegne iz zapora in išče zatočišče. Tako spozna mlado vdovo Clydie. Njen sin Mookie se nekega dne odpravi iskat vesoljčka E.T.-ja, a naleti na Sama in se z njim spoprijatelji. Clydie z otrokoma živi na posestvu, od koder jo hočejo pokvarjeni občinski možje izgnati. Ker pa svoje zemlje za nobeno ceno noče prodati, postane tarča neprestanega ustrahovanja. Sam pri Clydie in njenih otrocih najde smisel življenja in je pripravljen narediti vse, da bi jih zaščitil.
nowhere to run_1993.opis_omdb: Sam, an escaped convict, lands up on a farmland owned by a widow. When he learns that a ruthless contractor is trying to take over her land, he helps her to fight against the injustice.

the man with the iron fists_2012.naslov_orig: The Man with the Iron Fists
the man with the iron fists_2012.opis_neo:
Bojevniki, morilci in odpadniški britanski vojak se v lovu za zakladom zgrnejo nad kitajsko vas, ki jo lahko reši le skromen kovač.

Na lovu za bajeslovnim zlatom se skupina bojevnikov, morilcev in britanski vojaški odpadnik znajdejo v vasici fevdalne Kitajske. Tam mora skromni kovač braniti sebe in svoje sovaščane pred zlimi silami.
the man with the iron fists_2012.opis_omdb: In Jungle Village, the leader of the Lion's clan Gold Lion is summoned by the Governor and assigned to protect his gold that will be transported through the village. However he is betrayed and murdered by the greedy Silver Lion and Bronze Lion. Gold Lion's favorite son Zen Yi, a.k.a. The X-Blade, seeks revenge and heads to Jungle Village, but he is defeated by Brass Body and rescued by the local Blacksmith Thaddeus. Meanwhile the Gemini Female and the Gemini Male protect the Governor's gold, but they are vanquished by the army of Silver and Bronze Lion. The Blacksmith is abducted by the Lions and has his arms severed by Brass Body. However he is saved by the British Jack Knife, who is the emissary of the Emperor, and he manufactures iron arms for Thaddeus. Meanwhile the Governor sends the Jackal army to fight against the Lions and they hide the gold in the brothel of Madam Blossom. However, Madam Blossom and her girls form an army of black widows and together with Jack, Zen Yi and The Blacksmith, they fight against the Lions.

finding you_2020.opis_neo:
Romantična drama o iskanju moči, da bi bili zvesti sami sebi.

Po ponesrečeni avdiciji na prestižnem glasbenem konservatoriju violinistka Finley Sinclair odpotuje v irsko obalno mestece, da bi začela študij v tujini. Kmalu se nepričakovano srečanje spremeni v neverjetno pustolovščino, ko spozna filmskega zvezdnika Becketta Rusha, ki tam snema nov del svoje franšize fantazijskih pustolovščin. 

Ko se med njima začne razvijati romanca, se Finley zaradi Becketta poda na pot odkrivanja, ki spremeni njeno srce, glasbo in pogled na življenje. Toda kmalu se bo morala Finley odločiti, kaj je pripravljena tvegati za ljubezen ...
finding you_2020.opis_omdb: Finley, a talented aspiring violinist, meets Beckett, a famous young movie star, on the way to her college semester abroad program in a small coastal village in Ireland. An unexpected romance emerges as the heartthrob Beckett leads the uptight Finley on an adventurous reawakening, and she emboldens him to take charge of his future, until the pressures of his stardom get in the way.

deep impact_1998.opis_neo:
Najstnik Leo Beiderman se pridruži šolskemu astrološkemu krožku v upanju, da ga bo opazila lepa sošolka Sarah.

Še najmanj pričakuje, da bo odkril nekaj, kar bo pretreslo svet. Fotografija, ki jo posname z malim teleskopom, prikazuje komet, za katerega znanstveniki zatrjujejo, da bo trčil z Zemljo. 

Zdaj vsi upi človeštva ležijo v posebnem vesoljskem plovilu, ki naj bi pristalo na kometu in ga uničilo, še preden bi prišlo do katastrofe. Toda bolj ko se bliža usodni dan, bolj napeti so odzivi ljudi.
deep impact_1998.opis_omdb: Journalist Jenny Lerner is assigned to look into the background of Secretary Alan Rittenhouse who abruptly resigned from government citing his wife's ill health. She learns from his secretary that Rittenhouse was having an affair with someone named Ellie but when she confronts him, his strange reaction leads her to reconsider her story. In fact, a comet, discovered the previous year by high school student Leo Biederman and astronomer Dr. Marcus Wolf, is on a collision course with the Earth, an Extinction Level Event. A joint US-Russian team is sent to destroy the comet but should it fail, special measures are to be put in place to secure the future of mankind. As the space mission progresses, many individuals deal with their fears and ponder their future.

the emoji movie_2017.opis_neo:
Med aplikacijami pametnega telefona je skrit Tekstopolis, živahno mesto, kjer živijo emojiji.

Globoko med aplikacijami pametnega telefona je skrit Tekstopolis, živahno mesto, kjer živijo vsi emojiji. V tem svetu ima vsak emoji le en izraz na obrazu - razen Genea, ki lahko na več načinov izraža svoje razpoloženje. Da bi postal podoben drugim emojijem, se Gene poda na vznemirljivo popotovanje.
the emoji movie_2017.opis_omdb: This movie unlocks the never-before-seen secret world inside your smartphone. Hidden within the messaging app is Textopolis, a bustling city where all your favorite emojis live, hoping to be selected by the phone's user. In this world, each emoji has only one facial expression, except for Gene, an exuberant emoji who was born without a filter and is bursting with multiple expressions. Determined to become "normal" like the other emojis, Gene enlists the help of his handy best friend Hi-5 and the notorious code breaker emoji Jailbreak. Together, they embark on an epic "app-venture" through the apps on the phone, each its own wild and fun world, to find the Code that will fix Gene. But when a greater danger threatens the phone, the fate of all emojis depends on these three unlikely friends who must save their world before it's deleted forever.

the invention of lying_2009.opis_neo:
Mark Bellison je scenarist pred odpustitvijo. Je majhen in debelušen, zato nima šans pri Anni, ki jo ljubi. A zdaj se mu obeta bogastvo.

V svetu, kjer vsi govorijo resnico, scenarist izumi "laž" ter spremeni filmsko panogo in postavi temelje za novo vero. Razen tega tudi dobi ljubljeno dekle.
the invention of lying_2009.opis_omdb: It's a world where everyone tells the truth - and just about anything they're thinking. Mark Bellison is a screenwriter, about to be fired. He's short and chunky with a flat nose - a genetic setup that means he won't get to first base with Anna, the woman he loves. At a bank, on the spur of the moment he blurts out a fib, with eye-popping results. Then, when his mother's on her deathbed, frightened of the eternal void awaiting her, Mark invents fiction. The hospital staff overhear his description of Heaven, believe every word, and tell others. Soon Mark is a prophet, his first inventive screenplay makes him rich, and he's basically a good guy. But will that be enough for Anna?

the humbling_2014.opis_neo:
Simon Axler, ostareli igralec, je sredi ustvarjalne krize. V življenju je odigral že toliko vlog, da težko ločuje med resničnostjo in predstavo.

Simon je igralec sredi ustvarjalne krize, ki je v življenju odigral že toliko vlog, da težko ločuje med resničnostjo in predstavo. Njegova duševna zmeda nazadnje pripelje do tega, da se na odru povsem osramoti in doživi živčni zlom. Po vrnitvi domov v Connecticut se zaplete v razmerje z lezbijko Pegeen, katere boter je, za nameček pa ga ženska, ki jo je spoznal na kliniki, roti, naj umori njenega moža.
the humbling_2014.opis_omdb: Simon is an aging actor who suffers from bouts of dementia. He is institutionalized after an incident during a Broadway play, then returns home, where he contemplates suicide in Hemingway style. When he embarks upon an affair with an ex-girlfriend's amoral bisexual daughter, Pegeen, his world starts to fall apart. It ends on stage, with even Axler's audience and fellow actors unsure what's real and what's not.

luftslottet som sprängdes_2009.naslov_sl: Dekle, ki je dregnilo v osje gnezdo
luftslottet som sprängdes_2009.opis_neo:
V zadnjem delu, posnetem po priljubljeni trilogiji Milenium Stiega Larssona, je samosvoja Lisbeth v velikih težavah.

Zgodba se začne tam, kjer se konča 'Dekle, k i se je igralo z ognjem': Lisbeth so živo zakopali Zala, Lisbethin oče, in pomočnik Niedermann. Preživela je, ker se je branila s sekiro, ko ji je streljal v glavo. Niedermann beži, ko prideta na prizorišče Mikael Blomkvist in inšpektor Bublanski. Lisbeth odpeljejo v bolnišnico. V glavi ima strelno rano, zato jo hitro operirajo. V isti bolnišnici operirajo Zala.
luftslottet som sprängdes_2009.opis_omdb: Lisbeth Salander is under close supervision in a hospital and is set to face trial for attempted murder on her eventual release. With help from journalist Mikael Blomkvist and his researchers at Millennium magazine, she must prove her innocence. In doing this she plays against powerful enemies and her own past.

a horse tail_2015.opis_neo:
Med reševanjem družinske dediščine bosta Michael in Chloe našla prihodnost, kot je nista pričakovala.

Računovodja Michael Thompson (Patrick Muldoon) se trudi sam vzgajati najstniško hčer Chloe (Mandalynn Carlson). Ko ga pokliče Cliff Harrison (Rick Herod), da bi mu pomagal rešiti družinsko stajo pred zaprtjem zaradi neusmiljenih bankirjev, se sprašuje, ali je podeželje pravi kraj, da bi s hčerko zaživela znova. 

Michael ugodi prošnji, čeprav kmalu ugotovi, da Cliffova hči (Charisma Carpenter) ni tako navdušena nad njegovo pomočjo kot drugi družinski člani (Dominique Swain, Jaren Lewison, Billy Tilk). Chloe se spoprijatelji s kobilo Holly, ki bi lahko rešila kmetijo. Toda ali se ji bo Chloe lahko odrekla?
a horse tail_2015.opis_omdb: Uptight city accountant, Michael Thompson (Patrick Muldoon), is struggling to raise his teenage daughter Chloe (Mandalynn Carlson) all on his own. So when he gets a call from Cliff Harrison (Rick Herod) to help save their family stables before ruthless bank managers shut them down, he wonders if the country life is just what they need to start over. Michael takes the job, even though he quickly finds out that Cliff's daughter (Charisma Carpenter) is not as keen as the rest of the family (Dominique Swain, Jaren Lewison, Billy Tilk) for his help. But as they search for ways to save the family's legacy, they find a future that they never expected.

east side sushi_2014.opis_neo:
Samska mama Juana se odloči spremeniti svoje življenje. Začne delati v japonski restavraciji in želi postati mojstrica priprave sušija.

Po letih v prehrambni industriji so postale Juanine roke nadvse hitre. Juana zna zelo hitro in natančno sesekljati na koščke ali kocke vse, kar ji prinesete. Ko se odpove prodaji sadja na premični stojnici, da bi našla dolgoročnejše delo, se zaposli kot pomočnica v kuhinji v lokalni japonski restavraciji. Tam odkrije povsem nov svet kuhinje in kulture, daleč od vsega, kar je poznala do tedaj. Ko Juana v restavraciji skrivaj opazuje suši mojstre, se na koncu tudi sama nauči pripravljati suši. Prebujena ustvarjalnost in znova prižgana strast do hrane jo silita, da želi od svojega življenja in dela več. Juana skuša na koncu postati suši mojstrica, vendar ji ne uspe, saj se drugim zdi, da je „napačne“ rase in spola. Kljub vsem oviram stopi Juana na pot samoodkrivanja in odločena, da ne bo nikomur dovolila, da jo ustavi pri uresničevanju svojih sanj.
east side sushi_2014.opis_omdb: Single mom Juana can slice and dice anything with great speed and precision. After working at a fruit-vending cart for years, she decides to take a job at a local Japanese restaurant. Intrigued by the food, she learns to make a multitude of sushi on her own. Eventually she attempts to become a sushi chef, but is unable to because she is the 'wrong' race and gender. Against the odds, she embarks on a journey of self-discovery, determined to not let anyone stop her from achieving her dream.

the spy who dumped me_2018.opis_neo:
Audrey (Mila Kunis) in Morgan (Kate McKinnon), tridesetletni prijateljici iz Los Angelesa, se nepričakovano zapleteta v mednarodno zaroto.

Audrey in Morgan, tridesetletni prijateljici iz Los Angelesa, se nepričakovano zapleteta v mednarodno zaroto, ko se Audreyjin bivši fant prikaže pri njiju s skupino smrtonosnih morilcev za petami. Prijateljici presenetita celo sebe in skočita v akcijo ter se podata v beg po Evropi, pred morilci in sumljivim, a očarljivim britanskim agentom.
the spy who dumped me_2018.opis_omdb: Audrey (Mila Kunis) and Morgan (Kate McKinnon), two 30-year-old best friends in Los Angeles, are thrust unexpectedly into an international conspiracy when Audrey's ex-boyfriend shows up at their apartment with a team of deadly assassins on his trail. Surprising even themselves, the duo jump into action, on the run throughout Europe from assassins and a suspicious-but-charming British agent as they hatch a plan to save the world.

plavi cvijet_2021.opis_neo:
Modri cvet je film o ženski, materi in hčeri, film, ki prebudi čustvene asociacije in nas prisili, da pogledamo globoko vase.

Modri cvet je dobitnik velike zlate arene za najboljši film 68. Puljskega filmskega festivala. Režiser Zrinko Ogresta je osvojil areno za režijo, medtem ko je Vanja Ćirić dobitnica zlate arene za glavno žensko vlogo. Modri cvet je osvojil tudi nagrado kritike za najboljši film v hrvaškem programu. Mirjana je delavka v zagrebškem podjetju sukancev. Na dan proslave ob 20. obletnici dela ji Mirjanina srečanja in pogovori z bližnjimi osvetlijo dele njenega življenja: tistega za njo, tistega, ki ga živi in tistega, ki jo še čaka. Modri cvet je film o ženski, materi in hčeri, film, ki prebudi čustvene asociacije in nas prisili, da pogledamo globoko vase.
plavi cvijet_2021.opis_omdb: On the eve of Mirjana's 20th work anniversary, when she is to receive an award at a celebration, her interactions with her loved ones illustrate parts of her life: the one behind her, the one she is living and the one that is yet to come.

danger close: the battle of long tan_201.naslov_orig: Danger Close: The Battle of Long Tan
danger close: the battle of long tan_201.opis_neo:
Po resničnih dogodkih posneta drama o avstralskih in novozelandskih vojakih, ki se borijo za svoja življenja proti močnejšim silam Severnega Vietnama.

Južni Vietnam, 18. avgusta 1966. Na plantaži kavčuka Long Tan se major Smith in njegovih 108 mladih, večinoma neizkušenih avstralskih in novozelandskih vojakov, bori z močnimi sovražnimi silami komunističnega severa. Skoraj brez streliva je mrtvih vse več, zato je vsak primoran rešiti sebe in zmagati častno, spoštljivo in pogumno.
danger close: the battle of long tan_201.opis_omdb: South Vietnam, late afternoon on August 18, 1966 - for three and a half hours, in the pouring rain, amid the mud and shattered trees of a rubber plantation called Long Tan, Major Harry Smith and his dispersed company of 108 young and mostly inexperienced Australian and New Zealand soldiers are fighting for their lives, holding off an overwhelming enemy force of 2,500 battle hardened Main Force Viet Cong and North Vietnamese Army soldiers. With their ammunition running out, their casualties mounting and the enemy massing for a final assault each man begins to search for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honor, decency and courage. The Battle of Long Tan is one of the most savage and decisive engagements in ANZAC history, earning both the United States and South Vietnamese Presidential Unit Citations for gallantry along with many individual awards. But not before 18 Australians and more than 245 Vietnamese are killed.

dinner in america_2020.opis_neo:
Punk roker na begu pred oblastmi in dekle, obsedeno z njegovo skupino, se odpravita na potovanje po zatohlih predmestjih ameriškega srednjega zahoda.

V zatohlem predmestju ameriškega srednjega zahoda se punk roker Simon (Kyle Gallner) po namernem požigu znajde na begu pred policijo. Naključno srečanje z živahno in sramežljivo Patty (Emily Skeggs) mu omogoči kritje. Dvojica se skupaj odpravi na nepričakovano epsko potovanje in skozi niz pustolovščin, ko bosta odkrila, da imata veliko več skupnega, kot sta mislila. Komična drama s sijajno glasbeno podlago prinaša spodbudno, divje doživetje pristnega vzdušja ameriških predmestij, z vsemi njihovimi nenavadnimi in čudaškimi značilnostmi.
dinner in america_2020.opis_omdb: An on-the-lam punk rocker and a young woman obsessed with his band unexpectedly fall in love and go on an epic journey together through America's decaying Midwestern suburbs.

jobs_2013.opis_neo:
Zgodba o vzponu Steva Jobsa od opustitve šolanja do enega najbolj cenjenih kreativnih podjetnikov 20. stoletja.

V biografskem filmu o Stevu Jobsu spremljamo kariero soustanovitelja podjetja Apple, od njegovih začetkov v garaži pa do obdobja, ko je Jobs veljal za enega od najbolj občudovanja vrednih  inovatorjev v računalniški industriji.
jobs_2013.opis_omdb: The film opens in 2001 with a middle-aged Steve Jobs (Ashton Kutcher) introducing the iPod at an Apple Town Hall meeting.[6] It then flashes back to Reed College in 1974. Jobs had already dropped out due to the high expense of tuition, but was still attending classes with the approval of Dean Jack Dudman (James Woods) who took him under his wing. Jobs is particularly interested in a course on calligraphy. He meets up with his friend Daniel Kottke (Lukas Haas) who is excited to see that Jobs is holding a copy of Be Here Now by Baba Ram Dass. Influenced by this book and his experiences with LSD, Jobs and Kottke spend time in India. Two years later, Jobs is back in Los Altos, California living at home with his adoptive parents Paul (John Getz) and Clara (Lesley Ann Warren). He is working for Atari and develops a partnership with his friend Steve Wozniak (Josh Gad) after he sees that Wozniak has built a personal computer (the Apple I). They name their new company Apple Computer, though there already is a company called Apple Records that is owned by The Beatles (Wozniak then teases Jobs that this is symbolic of his preference for Bob Dylan). Wozniak gives a demonstration of the Apple I at the Homebrew Computer Club. Jobs is later approached by Paul Terrell (Brad William Henke) who shows interest in the Apple I. Knowing that he and Wozniak will need a studio in which to build them, Jobs convinces his father Paul to allow them to use the family garage (set up as a carpentry/tool center) for his new company. Realizing that they cannot build these computers alone, Jobs also recruits Kottke, Bill Fernandez (Victor Rasuk), and Chris Espinosa (Eddie Hassell) to the Apple team..

rock dog 2_2021.naslov_sl: Hov Hov Zvezda 2: Žurka v parku
rock dog 2_2021.opis_neo:
Ko Bodi in njegova skupina True Blue zapustijo Snežno goro in se odpravijo na turnejo s pop senzacijo Lil' Foxy, spoznajo, da ima slava svojo ceno.

Bodi je tibetanski mastif, ki v domači vasi zaslovi s svojim rokenrol bendom! Ko pa jim glasbeni mogotec Lang ponudi priložnost turneje s pop zvezdnico Lisičko, Bodi s prijatelji dojame, da ima slava svojo ceno in da pomeni nekaterim le vpliv in zaslužek. Na koncu odkrijejo, da lahko moč rokenrola osvobodite le, če ste zvesti sebi in svoji glasbi!
rock dog 2_2021.opis_omdb: When Bodi and his band 'True Blue' leave Snow Mountain, to tour with pop sensation, Lil' Foxy, they learn that fame comes at a price.

honey girls_2021.opis_neo:
Mega pop zvezda Fancy G gosti natečaj za iskanje naslednjega velikega samostojnega izvajalca.

Tri dekleta, izbrana za avdicijo za tekmovanje talentov na skrivaj ustanovijo svojo dekliško skupino in postanejo takojšnja spletna senzacija. A ker s tem tvegajo svoje mesto v tekmovanju, so dekleta razpeta med slavo in prijateljstvom.
honey girls_2021.opis_omdb: Mega pop star, Fancy G (Ashanti), hosts a contest to find the next big solo artist. But the young contestants realize they are "better together" and secretly form a band called Honey Girls and become a huge hit cloaked in mystery.

the grand seduction_2013.opis_neo:
Prisrčna komedija o prebivalcih majhne ribiške vasi na Novi Fundlandiji, ki želijo za vsako ceno zaposliti mladega zdravnika.

Majhno ribiško naselje Tickle Head nujno potrebuje mestnega zdravnika, ki ga iščejo že osem let, saj je ta pogoj, da bi se lahko prijavili na razpis postavitve tovarne in rešili vas pred finančnim propadom. Ko župan preskoči njihov kraj, si Murray French osebno zada, da bo svoji vasi našel zdravnika.

Ko jim pade v naročje kandidat, dr. Paul Lewis, ga morajo "zapeljati", da bi pri njih ostal tudi po enomesečnem poskusnem roku. Domiselni Murray uporabi vsa sredstva. Prisluškuje Paulovem telefonu, vso vas prisili, da se naučijo igrati kriket, Paulov najljubši šport, vse to pa zato, ker bi od tovarne imel korist tudi sam.
the grand seduction_2013.opis_omdb: The small harbor of Tickle Cove is in dire need of a doctor so that the town can land a contract to secure a factory which will save the town from financial ruin. Village resident Murray French (Gleeson) leads the search, and when he finds Dr. Paul Lewis (Kitsch) he employs - along with the whole town - tactics to seduce the doctor to stay permanently.

the loft_2014.opis_neo:
Pet poročenih moških najame stanovanje za skrivne afere, toda ko v njem najdejo truplo ženske, je jasno, da je krivec eden izmed njih.

Pet poročenih prijateljev uporablja razkošno stanovanje za svoje prešuštniške avanture. Vse gre kot po maslu, dokler v njem ne najdejo trupla neznane ženske. Ker ima zgolj peterica ključe, začnejo za umor paranoično sumiti drug drugega. Skozi raziskovanje preteklih dogodkov se počasi izriše srhljiva nakana, ki je peterico usmerjala in ujela v past.
the loft_2014.opis_omdb: The architect Vincent Stevens; the psychiatrist Chris Vanowen; the real estate agents Luke Seacord and Marty Landry; and Chris' half-brother Philip Trauner are married and best friends. Vincent has designed a brand new building and proposes that he and his friends share one of the wonderful penthouse lofts. This would allow them to hook up with other women without worrying about hotel charges showing up on their credit cards. When they discover the body of a beautiful woman cuffed on the bed in the loft, they argue over whom is responsible and secrets are disclosed affecting their friendship.

the devil's double_2011.opis_neo:
Biografski triler o srhljivih prigodah dvojnika sina Sadama Husseina, Latifa Yahia.

Bagdad je za bogatega in zloglasnega Udaya, sina Saddama Husseina, igrišče, na katerem lahko za pravo ceno kupi prav vse. Njegovo življenje je polno razvrata in nemoralnosti; vzame si vse, kar ga zamika. Ko poročnika Latifa pokličejo v Saddamovo palačo, se znajde pred nemogočo izbiro: ali bo postal Udayev dvojnik ali pa bo njegova družina obsojena na smrt.
the devil's double_2011.opis_omdb: Baghdad, the playground for the rich and infamous, where anything can be bought - but for a price. This is Uday Hussein's world and with his depraved lust for debauchery and immorality, he helps himself to whatever turns him on. When army lieutenant Latif Yahia is summoned to Saddam's palace, he is faced with an impossible request - to be Uday's 'fiday' - his body double, or have his family condemned to death. In a world entrenched in betrayal and corruption, knowing who to trust becomes a matter of life or death for Latif, as he battles to escape from his forced existence.

inescapable_2012.opis_neo:
Adib Abdel Kareem se mora po dolgih letih, odkar je zapustil Damask, soočiti s tistim, kar je pustil za seboj. Njegova hčerka je namreč izginila.

Adib (Alexander Siddig), perspektivni mladi časnik sirijske vojaške policije, je pred 25 leti nenadoma zapustil Damask v sumljivih okoliščinah. Zapustil je ljubezen svojega življenja Fatimo (Marisa Tomei), odšel v Kanado in izbrisal preteklost. Ko njegova hči Muna nenadoma izgine v Damasku, mu grozi, da ga bo njegova preteklost nasilno dohitela. Adib združi moči s kanadskim odposlancem, saj se mora, da bi našel Muno, zdaj soočiti z vsem, kar je želel pustiti za seboj.
inescapable_2012.opis_omdb: One afternoon, on a typical day at work, Adib is confronted with devastating news: His eldest daughter, Muna, has gone missing in Damascus. Now Adib, who has not been back in over 20 years, must return to Syria and deal with his secret past in order to find her. "Inescapable" is a thriller about a father's desperate search for his daughter and the chaos of the Middle East he left behind.

léon_1994.opis_neo:
Kultna akcijska opera Luca Bessona o zavezništvu med deklico in morilcem.

Priseljenec Leon je imigrant, ki živi v miru in odmaknjeno od vseh pije zgolj mleko. V resnici je vrhunski poklicni morilec. V njegovi zgradbi živi mala Mathilda, katere družinsko življenje je skrajno žalostno. Njen oče je zločinec in za pokvarjenega policista Normana Stansfielda čuva mamila. Dekletce se življenja veseli samo zaradi mlajšega bratca. Ko se njen oče spre s Stansfieldom, slednji s svojimi gorilami pobije celotno družino. Mathilda preživi, ker je bila po naključju takrat v trgovini. Tolažbo poišče pri sosedu Leonu, a kmalu dojame, s čim se ukvarja. Naprosi ga, naj maščuje njenega brata. Leon ne ve, kako naj ukrepa, saj ni nikoli do nikogar gojil prijateljskih, kaj šele družinskih čustev. Mathildo skuša zaman pregovoriti, naj se odpove svojim namenom. Istočasno jo namerava pokvarjeni policist likvidirati kot edino pričo umora…
léon_1994.opis_omdb: After her father, step-mother, step-sister and little brother are killed by her father's employers, the 12-year-old daughter of an abject drug dealer manages to take refuge in the apartment of a professional hitman who at her request teaches her the methods of his job so she can take her revenge on the corrupt DEA agent who ruined her life by killing her beloved brother.

600 kilos d'or pur_2010.opis_neo:
Skupina pustolovcev se s 600 kg zlata odpravi v Gvajano, nato pa njihov helikopter strmoglavi v džungli. Takrat skupino zajame zlata vročica.

Skupina pustolovcev se odpravi na drzen rop zlate jame v osrčju Gvajane. A operacija ne gre po načrtih - med begom so prisiljeni zasilno pristati s helikopterjem sredi neizprosne džungle. S šeststo kilogramov zlata, ki ga morajo zdaj skozi sovražno divjino nositi na lastnih hrbtih. Plen postaja breme. Šest ubežnikov - štirje moški in dve ženski - se podajo globoko v pragozd, kjer jih čaka peklenska vročina, roji insektov, izčrpanost in nevarnost zasledovalcev. Zdi se, kot da se džungla zapira okoli njih, obenem pa jih razdirajo še pohlep, strah in zlata mrzlica, ki ogroža vsakršno povezanost med njimi.
600 kilos d'or pur_2010.opis_omdb: A group of adventurers sets out to rob a gold mine in the heart of French Guiana. But the operation does not go as planned, and, during their flight, their helicopter must land in disaster in the middle of the jungle. They got their hands on six hundred kilograms of gold - but now have to carry it on their backs in a very hostile environment. The booty becomes a burden. The seven fugitives, four men, two women, plunge into the jungle. The climate, insects, fatigue, the threat of pursuers - Everything contributes to making their long march impossible. The forest seems to be closing in on them. And the cohesion of the group is eaten away by the gold fever .

[rec] 4: apocalipsis_2014.opis_neo:
Miniko je nekaj ur od grozot uničenja stare zgradbe v Barceloni.

Miniko je nekaj ur od grozot uničenja stare zgradbe v Barceloni. Po prvih trenutkih kaosa se je vojska odločila poseči in elitna vojaška skupina je vstopila v zgradbo, da bi namestila sprožilce in bi enkrat za vselej pometla s to grozo. Naloga je uspela, hitro in natančno. Angela Vidal, mlada TV poročevalka, ki je komaj nekaj ur pred z gasilcem vstopila v zgradbo, je preživela; toda v sebi nosi seme čudne okužbe, zato mora za nekaj dni v zasilno karanteno. Ta pa je odlična lokacija za virus, ki bo sprožil resnično grozo, kot si je niti ne predstavljamo.
[rec] 4: apocalipsis_2014.opis_omdb: Ángela Vidal, the spunky young television reporter that entered the building in 2007 has exited with the swat team. Little do they know that she carries the seed of the strange demonic infection. She is taken to an oil tanker miles off shore which has been especially equipped for the quarantine...

gespensterjäger_2015.opis_neo:
Hudo zabavno in komična pustolovščina na podlagi mladinske knjižne uspešnice Cornelie Funke!

Hugo je poprečno srhljiv duh, a Tom ugotovi, da je pravzaprav povsem neškodljiv in da potrebuje pomoč. Ne more se namreč vrniti v svoj dvorec, saj ga je od tam pregnal strašen in nevaren duh, ki po vsem mestu razširja arktični mraz. 

Tom in Hugo poiščeta pomoč strokovnjakinje Hetty, ki je svojčas "lovila" duhove, a je zdaj ostala brez dela. Hetty ne mara ne otrok ne duhov, a jo Tom in Hugo uspeta nagovoriti, da jima priskoči na pomoč. Družno skušajo rešiti svet pred zlobnim duhom.
gespensterjäger_2015.opis_omdb: They couldn't be more different, the members of the trio that unite in the fight against an Ancient Ice Ghost (AIG): Tom, an easily-scared boy; Hetty, a professional ghosthunter; and loveable but slimy Hugo--a ghost. Will the team manage to save their town from the next Ice Age?

le visiteur du futur_2022.opis_neo:
Leto 2555. V uničeni prihodnosti grozi Zemlji apokalipsa. Zadnje upanje je edini, ki je še sposoben potovati skozi čas.

Naloga edinega, ki lahko reši apokalipso: vrnitev v prihodnost, kjer bi spremenil tek dogodkov. Toda časovna policija ga lovi v vsakem obdobju in tako se za obiskovalca iz prihodnosti začne tekma s časom.
le visiteur du futur_2022.opis_omdb: Alice, a young girl, protest against the construction of a nuclear plant created by her father, a deputy. It is then that a strange visitor take them in 2555, a future devastated by the explosion of the central.

tides_2021.opis_neo:
V daljni prihodnosti mora astronavtka, ki je doživela brodolom na opustošeni Zemlji, odločiti o usodi preostalega prebivalstva.

V daljni prihodnosti mora astronavtka, ki je brodolomka na zdesetkani Zemlji, odločiti o usodi preostalih prebivalcev puščave.

the hole in the ground_2019.opis_neo:
Sarah O'Neill se želi umakniti pred preteklostjo in si ustvariti novo življenje na robu podeželskega kraja s sinom Chrisom.

Sarah se s sinom Chrisom želi umakniti pred preteklostjo in si ustvariti novo življenje na podeželju. Grozljivo srečanje s skrivnostnim sosedom pa ogrozi njen občutek varnosti, zato jo začne mučiti preganjavica. Medtem, ko nikomur več ne zaupa, skuša odkriti, ali so čudne spremembe pri njenem sinu povezane z zloveščo luknjo globoko v gozdu.
the hole in the ground_2019.opis_omdb: Trying to escape her broken past, Sarah O'Neill is building a new life on the fringes of a backwood rural town with her young son Chris. A terrifying encounter with a mysterious neighbour shatters her fragile security, throwing Sarah into a spiralling nightmare of paranoia and mistrust, as she tries to uncover if the disturbing changes in her little boy are connected to an ominous sinkhole buried deep in the forest that borders their home.

the blessing bracelet_2023.opis_neo: Bliža se velika noč. Ženska ponovno najde zapestnico, ki jo je izdelala pred leti, vsaka perlica pa jo opominja, naj šteje blagoslove v življenju.
the blessing bracelet_2023.opis_omdb: As the Easter holiday approaches a woman rediscovers a blessing bracelet that helps restore her faith and renew her belief in love

ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.naslov_orig: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Winemaker
ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.opis_neo: Ko da svoj posel na stran, nekdanja kriminologinja Ainsley McGregor oživi svoje detektivske veščine, da bi razrešila umor v teksaškem mestu.
ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.opis_omdb: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor returns to her Texas hometown, opening a craft market. When a friend's winery sees a murder, Ainsley's crime-solving skills prove invaluable as she teaches criminology and investigates the case.

destination love_2021.opis_neo: Organizatorka dogodkov Madison se odloči prenoviti poročni paket za poroko najboljše prijateljice na Novi Zelandiji, kjer sreča vinarja Davida.
destination love_2021.opis_omdb: A woman teams up with a vineyard owner to create the perfect wedding for her friends.

sweeter than chocolate_2023.opis_neo: Ko se razširijo govorice, da ima pekarna skrivni recept, kako na valentinovo najti pravo ljubezen, gre poročevalec pod krinko, da bi zgodbo raziskal.
sweeter than chocolate_2023.opis_omdb: A TV reporter goes to investigate a local bakery which is rumored to have the secret recipe to finding true love on Valentine's Day.

love in bloom_2022.opis_neo: Nepričakovano se zaiskri, ko se sredi kaosa vnamejo srca, pa bo ljubezen ob trnih življenja zacvetela ali ovenela? Odkrit pogled na ljubezen.
love in bloom_2022.opis_omdb: When her soon-to-be-married little sister and fiancé become marooned at a mountain retreat days before their wedding, Amelia and the best man, Grayson Tanner, are tasked with stepping in to save the wedding.

seven years in tibet_1997.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o avstrijskem alpinistu Heinrichu Harrerju, ki se je v času tibetanske pripojitve Kitajski spoprijateljil z dalajlamo.

Resnična zgodba o Heinrichu Harrerju, avstrijskemu alpinistu, ki se je spoprijateljil z Dalajlamo v času, ko je Kitajska prevzela Tibet.
seven years in tibet_1997.opis_omdb: After the deaths of 11 climbers, Austrian Heinrich Harrer (Brad Pitt) decides to add glory to his country and to the Austrian pride by climbing Nanga Parbat in British India, and leaves his expectant wife behind. An egoist and a loner, he does not get along with others on his team, but must bend to their wishes after bad weather threatens them. Then WWII breaks out and they are arrested and lodged in Dehra Dun's P.O.W. Camp. He attempts to break out several times in vain, but finally does succeed along with Peter Aufschnaiter (David Thewlis), and they end up in the holy city of Lhasa--a place forbidden to foreigners. They are provided food and shelter, and Peter ends up marrying tailor Pema Lhaki, while Heinrich befriends the Dalai Lama. They meet regularly; while he satiates the child's curiosity about the world, including Jack the Ripper and 'yellow hair'; he is exposed to the teachings of Lord Buddha, He even constructs a movie theater, while getting news of the end of the war, his divorce, and his son's refusal to communicate. But nothing will prepare him for the devastation about to descend when Communist China decides to attack, leading to the deaths of over 1 million Tibetans, the destruction of over 6000 monasteries, and betrayal from their very own people.

resident evil: the final chapter_2016.opis_neo:
Alice se vrne tja, kjer se je njena mora začela, v Raccoon City, kjer Umbrella zbira sile za zadnji napad na vse, ki so preživeli apokalipso.

Pred leti je T-virus večino svetovnega prebivalstva spremenil v žive mrtvece. Po zadnjem uporu ljudi je preživela le Alice, ki je sedaj odločena, da bo enkrat za vselej uničila zlo korporacijo. Vrne se v Raccoon City, kjer se pripravlja zadnji krvoločni spopad proti človeku. Na poti ji stojijo horde zombijev in mutantskih pošasti, zato prostora za napake ni.

the hitman's wife's bodyguard_2021.opis_neo:
Nekdanji telesni stražar Bryce mora združiti moči z najemniškim morilcem in njegovo ženo, da bi ustavili blazneža, ki načrtuje napad v Evropi.

Drugi del akcijske komedije se nadaljuje štiri leta po dogodkih iz prvega dela. Potem ko sta morala najbolj iskani plačani morilec Darius Kincaid (Samuel L. Jackson) in telesni stražar Michael Bryce (Ryan Reynolds), ki sta največja nasprotnika, skupaj sodelovati, mora Bryce zaradi stresa in nočnih mor na prisilen oddih. Ko se končno privadi na misel, da ne bo več kot telesni stražar uporabljal orožja, ga pred atentatom reši morilčeva žena Sonia Kincaid (Salma Hayek), ki ga je poiskala, da bi rešil njenega moža. Ker Bryce ne sme uporabljati strelnega ali kakršnegakoli drugega orožja, bo moral Dariusa rešiti zgolj s svojo iznajdljivostjo in inteligenco.
the hitman's wife's bodyguard_2021.opis_omdb: The world's most lethal odd couple - bodyguard Michael Bryce and hitman Darius Kincaid - are back on another life-threatening mission. Still unlicensed and under scrutiny, Bryce is forced into action by Darius's even more volatile wife, the infamous international con artist Sonia Kincaid. As Bryce is driven over the edge by his two most dangerous protectees, the trio get in over their heads in a global plot and soon find that they are all that stand between Europe and a vengeful and powerful madman. Joining in the fun and deadly mayhem is Morgan Freeman as - well, you'll have to see.

line of duty_2019.opis_neo:
Frank Penny je osramočeni policaj, ki išče priložnost za odrešitev, potem ko je ubil ugrabitelja otrok.

Napet akcijski triler v realnem času prinaša vznemirljivo doživetje z Aaronom Eckhartom v glavni vlogi. Zgodba spremlja osramočenega policista Franka Pennyja (Aaron Eckhart) na odpadniški nalogi odrešitve, kjer mora v tekmi s časom rešiti ugrabljeno hčerko načelnika policije (Giancarlo Esposito). Možnosti, da je še vedno živa, je vse manj, in Penny naredu usodno napako, ko ubije blaznega ugrabitelja – edinega človeka, ki ve, kje je skrito dekle.
line of duty_2019.opis_omdb: Frank Penny is a disgraced cop looking for a shot at redemption after killing a child abductor. With the police chief's 11-year-old daughter's life on the line, Frank goes rogue to try and save her. But to find the girl Frank will need the help of vlogger Ava Brooks, whose live-streaming news channel is broadcasting Frank's every move. While a city watches, Frank and Ava race against time and not only do they have to face every daring obstacle but also the abductor' brother who's out for revenge.

lucy_2014.opis_neo:
Lucy je mlado dekle, ki se znajde ujeta v nevarnem kriminalnem podzemlju, in se postopoma preobrazi v neusmiljeno bojevnico.

Študentka Lucy se po nesrečnem naključju znajde ujeta v sumljiv posel azijske mafije, ki ji v trebušno votlino všije paket močne sintetične substance. Ko mamilo začne pronicati v Lucyjin krvni obtok in se njene možganske sposobnosti razvijejo v nadčloveške, dekle postane nepredstavljivo inteligentna in nevarna bojevnica, z željo po maščevanju.
lucy_2014.opis_omdb: It was supposed to be a simple job. All Lucy had to do was deliver a mysterious briefcase to Mr. Jang. But immediately Lucy is caught up in a nightmarish deal where she is captured and turned into a drug mule for a new and powerful synthetic drug. When the bag she is carrying inside of her stomach leaks, Lucy's body undergoes unimaginable changes that begins to unlock her mind's full potential. With her new-found powers, Lucy turns into a merciless warrior intent on getting back at her captors. She receives invaluable help from Professor Norman, the leading authority on the human mind, and French police captain Pierre Del Rio.

stay_2005.opis_neo:
Realnost in sanje se prepletejo, ko skuša psihiater preprečiti samomor pacienta...

Med hrepenenjem in strahom, med resničnostjo in iluzijo, med življenjem in smrtjo je drugačen svet, ki je oživel v srhljivki Ostani.  Pretresljivo dvojno zgodbo, ki seže pod površje vsakdana in vas popelje na vrtoglavo popotovanje skozi skrivnost identitete, sanj in iskanja bistva življenja je režiral nagrajeni režiser Marc Forster (Bal smrti in V iskanju dežele Nije). Ostani je napeta zgodba o newyorškem psihiatru Samu Fosterju (Ewan Mcgregor) ki skuša tihemu in nenavadnemu pacientu, Henryju Lethamu (Ryan Gosling), preprečiti načrtovani samomor na predvečer njegovega 21. rojstnega dneva. Za glavno zgodbo filma se skriva razburljiva in nenavadna skrivnost, ki med Hanryjevim zdravljenjem pritegne tudi Sama.
stay_2005.opis_omdb: A thought-provoking and haunting exploration of how reality and dream-states may combine to form complex interactions. The line between the imagination and reality blurs when an accomplished Psychiatrist takes on a patient that appears to be suicidal.

the producers_2005.opis_neo:
Piše se leto 1959 v New Yorku.

Producent, ki ga je zapustila sreča in njegov računovodja se lotita načrta, s katerim mislita na hitro obogateti. Toda vse pade v vodo, ko predstava, ki naj bi bila polomija, postane velika uspešnica.
the producers_2005.opis_omdb: New York, 1959. Max Bialystock was once the king of Broadway, but now all his shows close on opening night. Things turn around when he's visited by the neurotic accountant Leo Bloom, who proposes a scheme tailor-made for producers who can only make flops: raise far more money than you need, then make sure the show is despised. No one will be interested in it, so you can pocket the surplus. To this end, they produce a musical called Springtime for Hitler written by escaped Nazi Franz Liebken. Then they get the insanely flamboyant Roger De Bris to direct. Finally, they hire as a lead actress the loopy Swedish bombshell Ulla (whose last name has over 15 syllables). As opening night draws near, what can go wrong? Well, there's no accounting for taste...

the other boleyn girl_2008.opis_neo:
Zgodovinska romantična drama, posneta po literarni uspešnici, pripoveduje zgodbo sester Boleyn v času vladavine razvpitega kralja Henrika VIII.

Zgodba sester Boleyn nam prikazuje zgodovino angleškega prestola ob začetku 16. stoletja, v času vladavine razvpitega kralja Henrika VIII.
