Sestri Mary in Anne se na željo ambiciozne družine potegujeta za kraljevo naklonjenost in ljubezen, toda težave se pojavijo, ko se kralj čustveno naveže na Mary.
the other boleyn girl_2008.opis_omdb: A sumptuous and sensual tale of intrigue, romance and betrayal set against the backdrop of a defining moment in European history: two beautiful sisters, Anne (Natalie Portman) and Mary Boleyn (Scarlett Johansson), driven by their family's blind ambition, compete for the love of the handsome and passionate King Henry VIII (Eric Bana).

changeling_2008.opis_neo:
Christinin sin izgine. Policija najde dečka, ki trdi, da je njen sin. Christine se mora soočiti s podkupljivo policijo, da bi našla odgovore.

Christine Collins (Angelina Jolie) dobi nazaj svojega ugrabljenega otroka. Toda kmalu ugotovi, da otrok ni njen. Soočiti se mora s podkupljivo policijo in dvomljivo javnostjo, medtem ko obupano išče odgovore …
changeling_2008.opis_omdb: Los Angeles, 1928. Single mother Christine Collins (Angelina Jolie) returns from work to find her nine-year-old son Walter (Gattlin Griffith) gone. She calls the L.A.P.D. to initiate a search. Five months later, a boy is found in Illinois who fits the description, and he says he's her son. To fanfare and photos, the L.A.P.D. reunite mother and son, but she insists he's not her boy. The cops dismiss her as either a liar or hysterical. When she joins a minister in his public criticism of the Police, they in turn use government power to silence and intimidate her. Meanwhile, a cop goes to a dilapidated ranch to find a Canadian lad who's without legal status; the youth tells a grisly tale. There's redress for murder; is there redress for abuse of power?

the descent_2005.opis_neo:
Jamska ekspedicija se izjalovi in raziskovalci ostanejo ukleščeni v jami, sledi pa jim vrsta nenavadnih plenilcev.

»Uredniški izbor!« Ob vsakoletni skupni pustolovščini v naravi se šest žensk dobi v oddaljenem delu Apalačev, da bi raziskale jamo, skrito globoko v gozdu. Daleč pod zemeljskim površjem se začnejo težave, ko jim podor skal zapre izhod. »Izbor pripravil Klemen Černe.«
the descent_2005.opis_omdb: A woman goes on vacation with her friends after her husband and daughter encounter a tragic accident. One year later she goes hiking with her friends and they get trapped in the cave. With a lack of supply, they struggle to survive and they meet strange blood thirsty creatures.

there's only one jimmy grimble_2000.opis_neo: Sramežljiv dijak manchesterske šole zbere pogum in povede svojo šolsko nogometno ekipo do pokalnega finala.
there's only one jimmy grimble_2000.opis_omdb: Jimmy Grimble is a shy Manchester school boy. At school he is constantly being bullied by the other kids, and at home he has to face his mother's new boyfriend who he doesn't like. However, through football, and some special boots, he manages to gain the confidence to succeed and leads his school football team towards the final of the local schools cup.

the good shepherd_2006.opis_neo:
Edward Wilson verjame v Ameriko. Kot eden od ustanoviteljev Cie ima veliko idealov, toda sčasoma postane čedalje bolj sumničav.

To je domišljijska različica zgodovine, ki je natančna v skoraj vseh pogledih. Ker pa se filmarjem ni treba do zadnje podrobnosti držati zgodovinskih dejstev, so dosti bolj zvesto ujeli določeno bistveno resnico o tem nenavadnem obdobju obveščevalne, protiobveščevalne in vohunske dejavnosti ter izdajstva v času hladne vojne. To je zgodba o nastanku CIE, povedana skozi življenje moža, ki je verjel v Ameriko in je žrtvoval vse, da bi varoval svojo domovino.
the good shepherd_2006.opis_omdb: Laconic and self-contained, Edward Wilson (Matt Damon) heads C.I.A. covert operations during the Bay of Pigs. The agency suspects that Fidel Castro was tipped, so Wilson looks for the leak. As he investigates, he recalls, in a series of flashbacks, his father's death, student days at Yale (poetry; Skull and Bones), recruitment into the fledgling O.S.S., truncated affairs, a shotgun marriage, cutting his teeth on spy craft in London, distance from his son, the emergence of the Cold War, and relationships with agency, British, and Soviet counterparts. We watch his idealism give way to something else: disclosing the nature of that something else is at the heart of this movie's narration as he closes in on the leak.

solitary man_2009.opis_neo:
Benovo poslovno in zasebno življenje se znajde pred propadom zaradi njegove poslovne in ljubezenske nerazsodnosti.

54-letni nekdaj nadvse uspešni prodajalec avtomobilov Ben Kalmen se - potem ko ga je zdravnik opozoril, da ni najboljšega zdravja - poda na samouničevalno pot s prekomernim seksom, laganjem in slabimi poslovnih odločitvami, zaradi česar skoraj pristane v zaporu. Po letih varanja se od njega loči žena Nancy, edina oseba, ki ga pozna bolje, kot se pozna sam. A vseeno najde čas, da se druži s svojo hčerko Susan in čudovitim vnukom, a je tudi tega konec, ko se izkaže, da je Ben spal s hčerko svojega dekleta Jordan - kot je tudi konec sanj o tem, da bi se vrnil v avtomobilske posle, saj bi mu pri tem lahko pomagala prav Jordan …
solitary man_2009.opis_omdb: Ben Kalman is aging: he has heart problems, his marriage is over, he's lost a fortune after being caught cutting corners in his East Coast car business, and he's sleeping with as many women as possible - the younger the better. He's chosen his current girlfriend, Jordan, because her father can help him get a new auto dealership; she's asked him to escort her daughter, Allyson, 18, on a visit to a Boston college campus. He behaves badly, and there are consequences to his love life, his finances, and his relationship with his daughter and grandson. Is there anywhere he can turn?

my sassy girl_2008.opis_neo:
Charlie nekega dne na podzemni reši Jordan pred vlakom in lepo dekle me pošteno zaplete življenje. Zaradi težav pa se za nekaj časa razideta.

V tej netipični romanci je Charlie zadržan fant s skrbno načrtovanim življenjem. Zunaj svojega elementa v New Yorku sledi svojim sanjam, da bi našel službo v podjetju za kosilnice Tiller King. Jordan pa je predrzna in družabna prebivalka Upper East Sida, ki ima težave s pijačo in se zanaša na usodo, ne pa na svojo odgovornost, da bi določila svojo prihodnost. Za razliko od Charlieja živi Jordan po lastnih pravilih, dan po dan, ne razmišljajoč o posledicah, ki jih lahko prinesejo njene impulzivne odločitve. Je najskrivnostnejša, najseksapilnejša ženska, kar jih je Charlie spoznal in čuti, da je v njej nekaj več od nesmotrnega samouničujočega divjega otroka, kot se kaže navzven. Njuno srečanje je tipični primer, da se nasprotja privlačijo, Charlie pa še zdaleč ni pripravljen na dramo, ki jo prinese ženska kot Jordan. Varen predvidljivi mali svet, ki ga je Charlie ustvaril zase, bo kmalu izginil. Morda pa potrebuje prav to.
my sassy girl_2008.opis_omdb: My Sassy Girl is the tale of the first and last time Charlie Bello falls in love. From their initial meeting, trouble is the name of the game. Imagine an amorphous mass of dating disasters and you get an idea of the relationship between the young couple. Some mysterious force with the strength of gravity between two planets must be at play between Charlie and Jordan as the relationship truly makes no sense on the surface. Everything seems pitted against the two of them. Things suddenly come to a halt when the two write letters confessing their love for each other. Agreeing to meet a year later to read the love letters together, Charlie and Jordan go their separate ways.

a little chaos_2014.opis_neo:
Leto 1682. Sabine De Barra (Kate Winslet) je odločna in nadarjena krajinska arhitektka, ki si kruh služi z urejanjem francoskih vrtov in posesti.

Nekega dne arhitektko Sabine preseneti nepričakovano vabilo: Sabine je izbrana, da se prijavi na natečaj na dvoru kralja Ludvika XIV. (Alan Rickman), ki želi urediti okolico svoje plače v Versaillesu. 

Znani kraljevi arhitekt André Le Notre (Matthias Schoenaerts) je na začetku vznemirjen zaradi njenega ostrega očesa in naprednega razmišljanja, toda nazadnje je prav Sabine izbrana, da uredi enega izmed glavnih versajskih vrtov. Obremenjen s časovnimi roki in zaskrbljen zaradi Sabininega posebnega sloga Le Notre sčasoma vendarle prepozna vrednost malega kaosa, ki je značilen za njeno delo.
a little chaos_2014.opis_omdb: Famed builder Le Notre is tasked with building an ethereal palace for King Louis XIV (Rickman) that transcends beauty. Le Notre hires Sabine de Barra (Winslet) to design and construct the outdoor ballroom, and is soon captivated by her beauty. Sabine is equally enthralled by Le Notre though she is struggling to deal with her past. Through the trials of building the garden the two artists come together.

dopunska nastava_2019.opis_neo:
Besen sveže ločeni oče vdre v razred svoje devetletne hčerke, da bi skupaj praznovala njen rojstni dan.

Besen, sveže ločen oče vdre v razred svoje devetletne hčerke, da bi skupaj praznovala njen rojstni dan. Dejanje sproži krizo s talci, ki jo župan mesta skuša izkoristiti za nabiranje političnih točk pred volitvami, četudi to pomeni slab konec za zajete otroke. V razredu pa je tudi sin mladega policista, ki mora odgovoriti na nekaj dilem.
dopunska nastava_2019.opis_omdb: The recently divorced father of a nine-year-old, furious his daughter can't spend her birthday with him, bursts into her classroom with a birthday cake and a rifle. A hostage crisis ensues, and the mayor of the town in which the events take place will try to use the situation to gain advantage ahead of the elections, stopping at nothing. The son of a young policeman is in the same class, and before the events unfold, he'll have to answer a question as well.

the nıght eats the world_2018.naslov_sl: Noč, v kateri je izginil svet
the nıght eats the world_2018.opis_neo:
Sam se zbudi v stanovanju, kjer je bila prejšnjo noč zabava in komaj dojame, kaj se dogaja.

Pariškim ulicam so zavladali živi mrtveci. Zgrožen in prestrašen Sam se mora zateči v stavbo in najti način, kako preživeti to grozo. Pa je zares edini preživeli?
the nıght eats the world_2018.opis_omdb: After waking up in an apartment where only the night before a party was raging, Sam is forced to come to grips with reality: He is now alone and the living dead have invaded the streets of Paris. Petrified with fear, Sam is going to have to barricade himself inside the building and organize his survival. But is he really the sole survivor?

the trouble with bliss_2011.opis_neo:
Življenje nezrelega moškega sredi tridesetih se obrne na glavo, ko se zaplete s hčerko sošolca iz srednje šole.

Komična zgodba o 35-letnem Morrisu Blissu (Michael C. Hall), ki še ni povsem odrasel in ki želi potovati, a nima denarja. Potrebuje službo, toda nima dobrih možnosti, in kar je najhujše, še vedno živi pri vdovelem očetu. Ko se nenadoma znajde v romantični zvezi s prijateljevo 18-letno hčerko, Morris kmalu dojame, da se mu življenje nepričakovano spreminja čisto drugače, kot si je predstavljal.
the trouble with bliss_2011.opis_omdb: A comedy/drama about 35-year-old Morris Bliss, who is clamped in the jaws of New York City inertia: he wants to travel but has no money; he needs a job but has no prospects; he still shares an apartment with his widowed father; and perhaps worst of all the premature death of his mother still lingers and has left him emotionally walled up. When he finds himself wrapped up in an awkward relationship with the sexually precocious, 18-year-old daughter of a former classmate, Morris quickly discovers his static life unraveling and opening up in ways that are long overdue.

resistance_2020.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o pantomimiku, ki je med 2. sv. vojno s skupino skavtov in francoskim odporniškim gibanjem rešil življenja tisočih sirot.

Marcel Marceau (Jesse Wisebnerg) si želi umetniškega življenja. Čez dan dela v očetovi mesnici, a nadarjeni pantomimik bi rad uresničil svoje sanje na malem mestnem odru in osvojil srce politično aktivne Emme (Clemence Poesy). Da ji ustreže, Marcel privoli v nevarno nalogo, ki mu bo za vedno spremenila življenje: pred nemškimi Nacisti in krutim oficirjem SS Klausom Barbiejem (Matthias Schweighofer) skuša rešiti 123 židovskih sirot in jih prek meje prepeljati v Švico. Z Emmo se pridruži francoskemu odporniškemu gibanju, da bi se zoperstavil okrutnosti vojne, in njegova umetnost bo postala najboljše orožje proti vojnim strahotam …
resistance_2020.opis_omdb: The story of mime Marcel Marceau as he works with a group of Jewish boy scouts and the French Resistance to save the lives of ten thousand orphans during World War II.

arlington road_1999.opis_neo:
Nedolgo tega ovdoveli univerzitetni profesor Michael Faraday je vedno bolj prepričan, da v sosedovi hiši ni vse tako, kot se zdi na prvi pogled.

V predmestju v Restonu v Virginiji univerzitetni profesor ameriške zgodovine Michael Faraday po treh letih še vedno objokuje smrt svoje žene, agentke FBI-ja Leah Faraday. Njegovo poznavanje agencije doda barvo tistemu, o čemer predava na svojih predavanjih. Čeprav je v dobrih odnosih z Leinim nekdanjim partnerjem Whitom Carverjem in agencijo na splošno, pa želi, da bi agencija vsaj priznala odgovornost za njeno smrt na dolžnosti. Michael živi dalje svoje življenje. Je v resni zvezi z nekdanjo asistentko Brooke Wolfe. Čeprav mu je Brooke všeč, Michaelov in Leahin devetletni sin, Grant Faraday, morda še ni pripravljen, da postane Brooke stalni del njunega življenja. Zaradi pomoči najstniku Bradyju Langu, ki potrebuje zdravniško pomoč, spozna Michael nove sosede, Oliverja in Cheryl Lang, Bradyjeve starše. Michael in Brooke se spoprijateljita z Langovima, pa tudi Grant in Brady postaneta prijatelja ...
arlington road_1999.opis_omdb: In suburban Reston, Virginia, George Washington University American History professor Michael Faraday is still mourning the death of his wife, FBI agent Leah Faraday, after three years. His inside knowledge of the agency colors what he teaches in his classes. Although on good terms with Leah's ex-partner, Whit Carver, and the agency in general, Michael wants the agency at least to acknowledge their responsibility in her death in the line of duty. Michael is moving on with his personal life, he being in a serious relationship with his former teaching assistant Brooke Wolfe. Although he likes Brooke, Michael and Leah's nine year old son, Grant Faraday, may not yet be quite ready for Brooke to be a permanent part of their lives. It is only in helping adolescent Brady Lang who he sees in medical distress that Michael meets his new neighbors, Oliver and Cheryl Lang, Brady's parents. In the process, Michael and Brooke becomes friends with the Langs, as Grant and Brady become friends. However, the more time that he spends with them and catches discrepancies in their stories, Michael becomes suspicious that the Langs may not be everything they appear on the surface. As such, Michael, against Brooke's concerns of invasion of the Lang's privacy, begins his own investigation of Oliver in particular. What Michael discovers has serious national security implications, as well as possible life threatening dangers to him, Brooke and Grant.

mon chien stupide_2019.opis_neo:
Henri je pisatelj v krizi srednjih let v krizi. Ravno ko ocenjuje svoje življenje, se v njegovo življenje prikrade ogromen in nevzgojen siv pes.

Henri je pisatelj srednjih let, ki ga je zapustil navdih in ki že več let ni napisal ničesar omembe vrednega. Pri ženi in štirih odraslih otrocih nalezi le na nerazumevanje. Sanja, da bi zbežal in začel znova. A ko najde na vrtu grdega, nevzgojenega psa, se ga odloči posvojiti in rodi se nepričakovano prijateljstvo, ki jezi Henrijevo družino in sosede. Grenko-sladka in ganljiva komedija o ljubezni, ki kljubuje času, v kateri igra resnični par Charlotte Gainsbourg in Yvan Attal.
mon chien stupide_2019.opis_omdb: Henri is a middle-aged writer in crisis: married and father of four children, he obtained, many years ago, an editorial success that he has never repeated again. Just at a time when he assesses of his life, an enormous gray dog, impolite and smelly, sneaks into Henri's house. Despite the attempts of the whole family to throw him out, and that his wife's unconditional love begin to falter, this dog, whom they decide to call "Stupid," is going to become Henri's best friend.

grace of monaco_2014.opis_neo:
Uspešna hollywoodska igralka Grace Kelly (Nicole Kidman) se na višku svoje priljubljenosti leta 1956 odloči opustiti igralsko kariero.

Uspešna hollywoodska igralka Grace Kelly (Nicole Kidman) se na višku svoje priljubljenosti leta 1956 odloči opustiti igralsko kariero in se poročiti z monaškim princem Rainierjem Monaškim (Tim Roth). Šest let kasneje, ko Monaku in njenemu zakonu preti velika kriza, ji režiser Alfred Hitchcock ponudi priložnost, da se kot glavna igralka v njegovem filmu Marnie vrne v Hollywood. Grace se tako znajde na razpotju: naj izbere življenje, za katerega je vedno mislila, da si ga želi, ali naj sprejme dosmrtno vlogo monaške princese?
grace of monaco_2014.opis_omdb: 1961. Princess Grace, the former Grace Kelly, has been married to Prince Rainier of Monaco now for five years, they having two young children. Her transition from famed Oscar-winning Hollywood actress from a background as the daughter of a wealthy millionaire owner of a brickworks in Philadelphia to European princess of a small, exclusive and tight-knit principality has been a difficult one, the Monagasques who have been less than welcoming to her in her outspoken American nature. Even in her official charity work as head of a women's committee for the Red Cross, the other committee members largely grumble under their breath about her as their leader. Despite loving Rainier, their marriage is a largely distant one emotionally as he focuses on his role as monarch, now an especially difficult time in the on-going tension between Monaco and France under the leadership of Charles de Gaulle, who would, if he could, annex Monaco back under French control. She has a small entourage of trusted advisers who lead her through the maze of her life, including an American Catholic priest, Father Francis Tucker, currently based in Monaco, and she bringing back into the fold Rupert Allan, who worked as her Hollywood publicist. Despite the unofficial roles of the members of this entourage, Grace has never had official guidance into all that it means to be Princess of Monaco. She has always been courted by the Hollywood community to continue acting, the thoughts of doing so stronger now than ever in her general unhappiness, with a concrete high profile role offered to her by her oft late career collaborator Sir Alfred Hitchcock. She returning to acting would be seen by the Monagasques and probably Rainier as she turning her back on her royal duties. What Grace decides to do under the circumstances takes into account her own happiness, the welfare of their two children who nonetheless will inherit the throne, whether she loves Rainier enough especially in light of an action by France, and whether she sees herself as Princess, and what she can do for the monarchy, the principality, and its subjects in light of her relationship with Rainier.

pattie et la colère de poséidon_2022.naslov_orig: Pattie et la colère de Poséidon
pattie et la colère de poséidon_2022.opis_neo:
Mlada pametna miška, ki si od nekdaj želi postati junakinja, nas popelje na dolgo pot v starodavno Grčijo.

Skupaj z mačkom, starim junakom Jazonom in argonavti, junaki grške mitologije, se miška odpravi na pomembno odpravo, da bi prebivalcem Jolkosa pomagala postaviti kip grškemu bogu morja - Pozejdonu. Mesto že krasi spomenik Zevsu, ne pa tudi Pozejdonu, zaradi česar je slednji hudo ljubosumen in stresa bes na vse okoli sebe. V jezi vzame meščanom zlato runo, ki jim zagotavlja zadovoljno in lagodno življenje, hkrati pa jim postavi rok, do katerega mu morajo postaviti spomenik. Pogumna miška se v tej veličastni pustolovščini srečuje s čudnimi in najnevarnejšimi mitološkimi bitji. Zabavna pustolovska zgodba za vso družino.
pattie et la colère de poséidon_2022.opis_omdb: Pattie, an ambitious and daring mouse has big dreams to be an adventurer and a hero. When her homeland in Ancient Greece is threatened by Poseidon himself, Pattie is determined to save her city.

breathe_2017.opis_neo:
Navdihujoča zgodba o Robinu in Diani Cavendish, pustolovskem paru, čigar življenje se je spremenilo, ko so Robinu postavili diagnozo paralize.

Navdihujoča zgodba o Robinu in Diani Cavendish, pustolovskem paru, čigar življenje se je obrnilo na glavo, ko so Robinu pri 28-ih postavili diagnozo paralize. S pomočjo Dianinih bratov in revolucionarnega izumitelja Teddyja Halla, se zakonca začneta boriti za boljšo kvaliteto življenja, pri čemer vzgajata svojega sina ter potujeta in pomagata drugim bolnikom s podobno diagnozo.
breathe_2017.opis_omdb: When Robin (Andrew Garfield) is struck down by polio at the age of twenty-eight, he is confined to a hospital bed and given only a few months to live. With the help of Diana's (Claire Foy's) twin brothers (Tom Hollander) and the groundbreaking ideas of inventor Teddy Hall (Hugh Bonneville), Robin and Diana dare to escape the hospital ward to seek out a full and passionate life together, raising their young son, travelling, and devoting their lives to helping other polio patients.

canary black_2024.opis_neo:
Vrhunsko operativko Cie, Avery Graves, izsiljujejo teroristi, da bi izdala svojo domovino in s tem rešila ugrabljenega soproga.

Vrhunsko operativko Cie, Avery Graves, izsiljujejo teroristi, da bi izdala svojo domovino in s tem rešila ugrabljenega soproga. Ločena od enote se Avery obrne na stike v podzemlju, da bi preživela in čim prej našla, kar zahtevajo ugrabitelji. Izdana na vsakem koraku se mora zanesti na svojo izurjenost in borilne veščine v tej smrtonosni dirki, ki lahko sproži globalno krizo.
canary black_2024.opis_omdb: It follows Avery Graves as she is blackmailed by terrorists into betraying her own country to save her kidnapped husband.

spencer_2021.opis_neo:
Med prazniki s kraljevo družino se Diana odloči zapustiti zakon s princem Charlesom.

Diana Spencer se med božičnimi počitnicami s kraljevo družino na posestvu Sandringham v Norfolku v Angliji spopade z duševnimi težavami in se odloči prekiniti desetletni zakon s princem Charlesom.
spencer_2021.opis_omdb: The marriage between Princess Diana and Prince Charles has long since grown cold. Though rumors of affairs and a divorce abound, peace is ordained for the Christmas festivities at the Queen's estate. There's eating and drinking, shooting and hunting. Diana knows the game, but this year, things will be profoundly different.

the house of magic_2014.opis_neo:
Zapostavljena mačka Blisk se je zatekla pred nevihto v nenavadno hišo, polno čudnih naprav, ki so bile last starega čarovnika.

Muc Blisk se med selitvijo znajde sam na ulici in v iskanju zavetja po naključju zaide v čarobni dvorec upokojenega čarodeja, ki ga z veseljem sprejme v svojo čarobno skupnost. Čarodej namreč živi z nenavadnimi stvori, ki mu pomagajo pri čaranju, in vsi hitro sprejmejo novega prišleka. Le zajcu Jožku in miški Mici ni všeč, da nista več v središču pozornosti, in se trudita, da bi muca vrgli iz hiše. Ko stari čarodej pristane v bolnišnici, skuša njegov oholi nečak s prevaro prodati njegov dvorec. Stanovalci dojamejo, da je zadeva resna, in združijo sile, da prevaro preprečijo.
the house of magic_2014.reziser: Jérémie Degruson, Ben Stassen, Mimi Maynard
the house of magic_2014.opis_omdb: Thunder, an abandoned young cat seeking shelter from a storm, stumbles into the strangest house imaginable, owned by an old magician and inhabited by a dazzling array of automatons and gizmos. Not everyone welcomes the new addition to the troupe as Jack Rabbit and Maggie Mouse plot to evict Thunder. The situation gets worse when the magician lands in hospital and his scheming nephew sees his chance to cash in by selling the mansion. Our young hero is determined to earn his place and so he enlists the help of some wacky magician's assistants to protect his magical new home.

the bfg - dubbed_2016.opis_neo:
VDV je napeta zgodba o desetletni deklici Zofki in skrivnostnem velikanu, ki jo seznani s čudežnim in nevarnim svetom velikanov.

Čudovita zgodba Roalda Dahla o desetletni deklici Zofki, ki prebiva v sirotišnici in neke noči opazi skrivnostnega velikana. Dobrodušni mož jo odpelje v čudežno deželo velikanov, iz katere so ga izgnali, saj ne je otrok. VDV je odločen, da bo z Zofkino pomočjo ustavil ostale hudobne velikane.
the bfg - dubbed_2016.opis_omdb: Ten-year-old Sophie is in for the adventure of a lifetime when she meets the Big Friendly Giant. Naturally scared at first, the young girl soon realizes that the twenty-four-foot behemoth is actually quite gentle and charming. As their friendship grows, Sophie's presence attracts the unwanted attention of Bloodbottler, Fleshlumpeater, and other giants. After travelling to London, Sophie and the BFG must convince Queen Elizabeth to help them get rid of all of the bad giants once and for all.

lee_2023.opis_neo:
Zgodba fotografinje Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, manekenke, ki je med drugo svetovno vojno postala priznana vojna dopisnica revije Vogue.

Zgodba fotografinje Elizabeth “Lee” Miller, manekenke, ki je med drugo svetovno vojno postala priznana vojna dopisnica revije Vogue, ki jo igra oskarjevka Kate Winslet. Film je bil posnet v bližini Dubrovnika, na ostankih nekoč znanega letovišča Kupari, ki je bilo uničeno v hrvaški osamosvojitveni vojni.Lee je britanski biografski dramski film režiserke Ellen Kuras, posnet po scenariju Liz Hannah, Johna Colleeja in Marion Hume ter zgodbi Huma, Colleja in Lema Dobbsa. Prirejen po knjigi The lives of Lee Miller iz leta 1985, avtorja Antonyja Penrosea.
lee_2023.opis_omdb: War correspondent Lee Miller travels to the front lines of World War II to embark on a mission to uncover the hidden truths of the Third Reich. But in the wake of betrayal, a reckoning will come over the truths of her own past.

ghost in the shell_2017.opis_neo:
Osupljiva zgodba o morebitnem svetu prihodnosti, kjer se zabrišejo meje med človeštvom in umetno inteligenco.

Osupljiva zgodba o morebitnem svetu prihodnosti, kjer se zabrišejo meje med človeštvom in umetno inteligenco.
ghost in the shell_2017.opis_omdb: In the near future, human organs are enhanced by the cybernetics technology developed by the powerful Hanka Robotics Corporation owned by Cutter. Dr. Ouelet is responsible for the development of the secret project 2571 of a full mechanical body to be connected to a human brain. She uses the brain of a young woman that lost her parents in a cyber attack as subject of a prototype. One year later, the woman is ranked Major and has joined Section 9, an anti-terrorist division commanded by Chief Daisuke Aramaki, working with agents Batou and Togusa. She needs to use a medicine to help the integration of her brain with the mechanical body and has no recollections of her previous life. When Section 9 hunts down the terrorist Kuze, Major learns the secrets about Hanka Robotics and the experiment she was subjected. Now she faces her ultimate enemy: Kuze, a criminal who has managed to hack into the brains of androids and control them.

the rover_2014.opis_neo:
Deset let po propadu svetovnega gospodarstva skuša samotar v avstralski divjini izslediti moške, ki so ukradli njegovo edino lastnino: njegov avto.

V manjše mesto sredi puščave vdre banda zlikovcev in nejevoljnemu Ericu ukrade avto. Med srditim streljanjem za seboj pustijo ranjenega pajdaša, za katerega se kmalu izkaže, da je brat enega od storilcev. Eric je odločen, da bo ujel tatove, pri tem pa s svojim ujetnikom splete negotovo zavezništvo.
the rover_2014.opis_omdb: Ten years after a global economic collapse, a cold-blooded drifter traverses the scorched Australian outback on a mission to track down the men who stole his last remaining possession - his car. When he crosses paths with a badly wounded member of the gang, he takes the vulnerable, naïve young man along as his unwitting accomplice.

amigo undead_2015.opis_neo:
Kevin Ostrowski se skuša na taborjenju pobotati s svojim odtujenim bratom Normom. Z njima je nekaj Normovih nenavadnih prijateljev.

Kevin Ostrowski se na taborjenju skuša zbližati s svojim odtujenim in neuspešnim bratom Normom. Pridruži se jima tudi več Normovih nenavadnih prijateljev. Ko eden od njih umre v nezgodi, se ga odločijo pokopati v puščavi, kar pa povzroči nepredvidene nadnaravne posledice.
amigo undead_2015.opis_omdb: Amigo Undead is the story of Kevin Ostrowski as he attempts to reconcile with his estranged, underachieving brother Norm on a camping trip. They're accompanied by several of Norm's unusual friends. When one of these friends dies accidentally, the decision is made to bury him out in the desert with some very unforeseen supernatural consequences.

the bay of silence_2020.opis_neo:
Willov in Rosalindin sin umre in on je prepričan, da je ona nedolžna. A nato odkrije resnico o njeni preteklosti, ki jo povezuje z drugim zločinom.

Ko Will (Bang) odkrije, da so njegova soproga Rosalind (Kurylenko) in njuni trije otroci nenadoma izginili, se v paniki loti živčnega iskanja po Evropi. Končno jih najde v zakotni vasi na severu Francije, toda olajšanje de spremeni v grozo, ko Will odkrije, da je njegov sin nepojasnjeno umrl. Ne vedoč, komu sploh lahko zaupa, se loti Will odkrivati resnico o izginotju soproge in sinove smrti - ne glede na ceno.
the bay of silence_2020.opis_omdb: Will believes his wife Rosalind is innocent of their son's suspected murder, only to discover the devastating truth behind her past links her to another unsolved crime.

kiss of the dragon_2001.opis_neo:
V Pariz prispe kitajski policist Jian, da bi pomagal ujeti kitajskega zločinca, a se znajde v težavah.

Policist Liu Jian pride v Pariz pomagati kolegom prijeti kitajskega preprodajalca mamil. Pokvarjeni inšpektor Richard preprodajalca s katerim je sodeloval ubije, umor pa naprti Jianu. Ta pobegne s posnetkom zločinskega dejanja in za pomoč prosi Richardovo prostitutko Jessico ...
kiss of the dragon_2001.opis_omdb: Liu Jian, a police officer from China, comes to Paris to help the vice squad apprehend a Chinese drug lord and his unknown French connection. The French connection is Richard, the head of the vice squad, who intends to kill the drug lord then frame Jian. Jian ducks a bullet and escapes with a tape of what really happened. By chance, Jian turns to Jessica - a US farm girl who is one of Richard's hookers - for help. She has her own problems, including the fact that Richard has her daughter locked in an orphanage to keep Jessica on the streets and silent about his activities. Can Jian protect Jessica, rescue her daughter, and give Richard the kiss of the dragon?

lizzie_2018.opis_neo:
Lizzie Borden je globoko v ameriški podzavesti. Obtožena umora staršev postane ljudska zgodba, legenda, mit.

Lizzie Borden je globoko v ameriški podzavesti. Obtožena umora staršev postane ljudska zgodba, legenda, mit. Sodijo ji in jo oprostijo, vendar pa ne obtožijo nikogar drugega, zato umora v II. ulici 92 veljata za najzloglasnejše nerešene ameriške skrivnosti . Komaj nekaj tednov po očetovem in mačehinem umoru so otroci na ulicah začeli peti srhljivo pesmico, ki je postala Lizzien epitaf.
lizzie_2018.opis_omdb: In 1892, after the Borden family welcomes a new Irish maid called Bridget Sullivan (Kristen Stewart), she and Lizzie (Chloë Sevigny) become friends. The friendship between these women becomes something more, even as Lizzie's relationship with her own parents unravels at a frightening level.

red joan_2018.opis_neo:
Biografska vohunska kriminalka, v katerem dobitnica oskarja Judi Dench in Sophie Cookson upodabljata Joan Stenley, britansko KGB vohunko.

Red Joan je biografska vohunska kriminalka, v katerem dobitnica oskarja® Judi Dench in Sophie Cookson upodabljata Joan Stenley, britansko vohunko, ki je delala za KGB.Leta 2000 je Joan Stanley uživala v svojem domu v predmestju ob prehodu v novo tisočletje. Njeno mirno življenje pa se obrne na glavo, ko jo aretira britanska obveščevalna služba MI5, ki jo obtoži posredovanja obveščevalnih podatkov komunistični Rusiji. Zgodba filma nas popelje v čas, ko je Joan študirala fiziko na Cambridgeu. Med študijem se je zaljubila v mladega komunista Lea Galicha in zaradi njega začne drugače gledati na svet ter spremeni svoja prepričanja. Skozi delo v tajnem jedrskem raziskovalnem centru med 2. svetovno vojno Joan dojame, da je svet na robu medsebojnega uničenja in je prisiljena izbirati med izdajo svoje domovine, ljubljenih ali reševanjem njihovih življenj.
red joan_2018.opis_omdb: English-born Joan Stanley (Dame Judi Dench), a Soviet and Communist Party sympathizer, becomes employed as a British government civil servant, and gets recruited by the K.G.B. in the mid 1930s. She successfully transfers nuclear bomb secrets to Soviet Russia, which enables them to keep up with the west in the development of atomic weapons, and remains undetected as a spy for over a half a century.

sweethearts_2019.opis_neo:
Usoda in slabo izpeljan rop diamantov združita poklicno kriminalko Mel in njeno talko Franny, ki ima težave s paničnimi napadi.

Gre za dvojno težavo, ko se morata zaradi usode in sfižene kraje diamantov Mel in Franny boriti s časom. Mel, profesionalno zločinko in samohranilko, ki želi speljati svojo največjo krajo, in njeno lahkomiselno panično talko Franny, začne spremljati neusmiljena detektivka Ingrid, ki vedno dobi iskanega moškega ali ženski, in to za vsako ceno. Posrečeni par se na begu ves čas prepira, medtem pa morata razporediti plen po berlinskem podzemlju in tudi priti do njega. Preden ju obkoli policija, postane Mel Franny všeč in odloči se pomagati svoji ugrabiteljici. Mel ni tako navdušena, posebej ker Franny misli, da ji bo pomagala. Ker nimata možnosti, ta čudni par postane popolno moštvo. Ko pa doda Mel v svojo zbirko talcev še čednega policista Harryja, se Franny takoj zagleda vanj in nastane popoln kaos, srečnega konca pa ni nikjer na vidiku.
sweethearts_2019.opis_omdb: Forced together by fate and an ill-executed diamond robbery, professional criminal Mel and her easily-panicked hostage Franny are in a race against time. Soon pursued by a relentless detective and the greedy Berlin underworld, the mismatched pair are left with no other choice than to work together.

the boy 2_2020.opis_neo:
Nadaljevanje filma "Brahms: Utelešeno zlo 2" s Katie Holmes v glavni vlogi.

Ko se mlada družina, neseznanjena z zgodovino vile Heelshire, vseli v hišo na zapuščeni posesti, najde sin novega prijatelja - srhljivo lutko, ki jo kliče Brahms. Brahms je srhljiva lutka, ki se je morate bati. V njem živi zlo, v njegovi hiši pa je se treba držati njegovih pravil!
the boy 2_2020.opis_omdb: The story is about a family moves to a house in a countryside after a son (Jude) and mother (Liza) both traumatised from an unexpected burglary. Jude finds a dirty, dusty porcelain doll and calls it Brahms. Everything then change in a sinister way because of the doll.

there's something in the barn_2023.opis_neo:
Ameriški družini se uresničijo sanje o selitvi, ko podedujejo kočo v zakotju norveških gora.

Družina sanje o svoji koči deli z enim od pretkanejših mitoloških bitij skandinavske folklore: porednim vilincem iz štale. Pritlikavi Božiček bo družini zagrenil življenje. Pravila za preživetje so preprosta: brez močne svetlobe, brez glasnih zvokov in najpomembnejše - za božič morajo imeti skledo kaše.
there's something in the barn_2023.opis_omdb: An American family fulfills their dream of moving back to their roots after inheriting a remote cabin in the mountains of Norway, but there's a surprise waiting for them.

wickie und das zauberschwert_2019.opis_neo:
Viki je desetletni sin vikinškega poglavarja, ki živi daleč na severu v skromni vasici.

Sanje Vikija so, da bi se pridružil na pustolovščini z ekipo Vikingov. Ampak Halvar, njegov oče, meni, da je Viki še premlad, da bi bil del tako nevarnega popotovanja. Ko se Vikijeva mama zaradi Lokijevega čarobnega meča, po nesreči spremeni v zlati kip, nimajo Halvar in njegovi Vikingi druge izbire, kot da se podajo na na ekspedicijo onkraj sveta, z misijo vrniti meč Lokiju in tako oživiti mamo. Oče Halvar vzame Vikija s sabo na pot. Med tem epskim izletom, polnim presenečenj in nekaj nevarnosti, Viki ne zamudi nobene priložnosti, da bi svojemu očetu dokazal, da ima tisto, kar je potrebno za pravega Vikinga.
wickie und das zauberschwert_2019.opis_omdb: Vic is a young Viking like no other: not very strong but very clever. When his father, Halvar, the village chief, steals from his sworn enemy a magic sword that turns everything into gold, the lure of gain wreaks havoc among the Vikings

darkness_2002.opis_neo: Nekaj je v hiši ... Nekaj temačnega in zelo starega, ki ostaja negibno, skrito, tiho. Samo čaka. Leta in leta čepi v senci in snuje načrte. Njegov medij je tema ... Njegovo življenje je tema, v temi se giblje in deluje, le v temi se lahko prikaže.
darkness_2002.opis_omdb: There's something in this house - Something ancient and dark that remains still, hidden and silent. It can only wait, having been concealed in the shadows for years. In fact, its milieu is darkness.

stephen king: cell_2016.opis_neo:
Ko skrivnostni signal prek mobilnih telefonov povzroči apokalipso, je umetnik Clay odločen, da bo poiskal svojega mladega sina v Novi Angliji.

Zgodba spremlja Claya Riddella (John Cusack), umetnika iz Maina, ki se pripravlja na praznovanje ob sklenitvi pogodbe z založniško hišo. Na srečo ostaneta njegova soproga in sin v družinski hiši v drugem kraju. Na poti v založbo nekdo ali nekaj prek globalne mreže sproži skrivnostni signal, imenovan 'Pulz'. 

V enem dnevu bo prek mobilnega omrežja nepojasnjeni virus obnorel vse uporabnike telefonov ali pa jih bo prisilil k samomoru. Le tisti delček prebivalstva, ki nima mobilnih telefonov ali pa ima srečo, da se jim je izpraznila baterija, bo preživel kataklizmo globalnih razsežnosti.
stephen king: cell_2016.opis_omdb: Inspired by the work of Stephen King, and taken from his collection of short stories "The Night Shift". The film has been adapted for modern use. An unnamed narrator retells his experience at The University At Buffalo back in 2010...

borealis_2013.opis_neo:
Leta 2045 se topi led na polih in nekaj držav se bori za nadzor nad mestom Severni sij.

Vic (Ty Olssen), nekdanji borec ultimate fighta, postane vladni agent in vodi v mestu bar, do vpliva pa je prišel s podkupovanjem in manipulacijami, zato je Severni sij v njegovih rokah. Ko pošljejo ZN pokvarjene uslužbence, mora Vic vzeti stvari v svoje roke in se vrnitih koreninam. Izzove lokalno skupino Rusov v dvoboj v kletki, vložek pa je usoda mesta.
borealis_2013.opis_omdb: She is a young beautiful girl who lives life to the full. He is a man in his forties. They feel an unhealthy attraction for each other. The fact that they can not handle their emotions that will lead to a tragic ending, as climatic change increasingly deteriorates the planet.

mune, le gardien de la lune_2014.naslov_orig: Mune, le gardien de la lune
mune, le gardien de la lune_2014.opis_neo:
Ko postane favn z imenom Mun varuh Lune, z nerodno nesrečo ogrozi Sonce in Luno.

Zlobni titan Necross, ki hoče imeti Sonce samo zase, izkoristi nesrečo favna Muna, s čimer pa bi uničil ravnovesje med dnevom in nočjo. Zato se Mun s pomočjo prijateljice Glim in bojevnika Sohoneja, ki je hkrati varuh Sonca, odpravi na vznemirljivo pustolovščino, da bi Sonce in Luno znova postavil na njuno pravo mesto.
mune, le gardien de la lune_2014.opis_omdb: Mune, a young fawn, is chosen as the new Guardian of the Moon. Together with Glim, a girl made of wax, and Sohone, the new Guardian of the Sun, they must recover the sun from the evil Necross.

le dernier voyage_2020.opis_neo:
V svetu, kjer Rdeča luna grozi Zemlji, zadnji up predstavlja astronavt Paul WR.

V bližnji prihodnosti ekološkega opustošenja zaradi energije preizkoriščani skrivnostni Rdeči mesec nenadoma spremeni smer in se usmeri naravnost proti Zemlji. Paul W.R., edini astronavt, ki je sposoben rešiti človeštvo, izgine med misijo. Paul je namreč odkril skrivnost Rdečega meseca in zakaj ga ne sme uničiti. Neusmiljeno preganjani Paul naleti na Elmo, eksplozivno najstnico, ki mu sledi v iskanju resnice.
le dernier voyage_2020.opis_omdb: The red moon threatens our existence on earth. Our only hope is the enigmatic Paul WR, the most talented astronaut of its generation. But few hours before the start of the Great mission, Paul disappeared.

something in the dirt_2022.opis_neo:
V mislih pri dobrem zaslužku si ekscentrična neznanca poskušata dokazati nekaj nadnaravnega.

Mešanica prijateljske komedije in znanstvenofantastičnega trilerja ponuja izkrivljen odsev našega paranoičnega časa.
something in the dirt_2022.opis_omdb: When neighbors John and Levi witness supernatural events in their Los Angeles apartment building, they realize documenting the paranormal could inject some fame and fortune into their wasted lives. An ever-deeper, darker rabbit hole, their friendship frays as they uncover the dangers of the phenomena, the city and each other.

urban justice_2007.opis_neo:
Oče je odločen maščevati sinovo smrt.

Mladi policist na ulici izgubi življene pod streli neznanca, njegov oče, ki je nekdanji tajni agent, pa je odločen, da bo maščeval njegovo smrt.
urban justice_2007.opis_omdb: When a dedicated police officer is murdered, his father goes on a hunt for the people responsible.

in the line of fire_1993.opis_neo:
Tajnemu agentu Franku Horriganu služba pomeni vse na svetu, zanjo je žrtvoval celo zasebno življenje in družinsko srečo.

Franka še vedno preganjajo spomini iz leta 1963, saj si očita, da je zaradi njega pod atentatorjevimi streli padel predsednik Kennedy. Več kot trideset let kasneje se tedanji ameriški predsednik odpravlja na volilno kampanjo. 

Ker mu grozijo s smrtjo, je Frank odgovoren za njegovo varnost. Ko izve, da profesionalni morilec Mitch Leary načrtuje atentat na predsednika, se začne napeta igra mačke in miši.
in the line of fire_1993.opis_omdb: Frank Horrigan (Clint Eastwood) is a Secret Service Agent who keeps thinking back to November 22, 1963, when, as a hand-picked Agent by President John F. Kennedy, he became one of the few Agents to have lost a President to an assassin when Kennedy died. Now, former C.I.A. assassin Mitch Leary (John Malkovich) is stalking the current President (Jim Curley), who is running for re-election. Mitch has spent long hours studying Horrigan, and he taunts Horrigan, telling him of his plans to kill the President. Leary plans to kill the President because Leary feels betrayed by the government. Leary was removed from the C.I.A., and the C.I.A. is now trying to have him killed. After talking to Leary, Horrigan makes sure he is assigned to Presidential protection duty, working with fellow Secret Service Agent Lilly Raines (Rene Russo). Horrigan has no intention of failing his President this time around, and he's more than willing to take a bullet. White House Chief of Staff Harry Sargent (Fred Dalton Thompson) refuses to alter the President's itinerary, while Horrigan's boss, Secret Service Director Sam Campagna (John Mahoney), is supportive of Horrigan. As the election gets closer, Horrigan begins to doubt his own abilities, especially when Horrigan's colleague Al D'Andrea (Dylan McDermott) is killed by Leary. But Horrigan may be the only one who can stop Leary.

ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.naslov_orig: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Yarn Maker
ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.opis_neo: Na umetniškem dogodku Ainsleyjeva nemška doga George odkrije truplo posebnega gosta, Boginje preje. Ainsley se mora znova preleviti v detektiva.
ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.opis_omdb: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor returns to her Texas hometown, opening a craft market. When a friend's winery sees a murder, Ainsley's crime-solving skills prove invaluable as she teaches criminology and investigates the case.

savoring paris_2024.opis_neo:
Razočarana razvijalka receptov Ella se odpravi v Pariz iskat svoj najljubši sir iz otroštva. Namesto tega najde ljubezen s čednim sirarjem Sergeom.

Razočarana zaradi zamujene promocije, Ella pusti vse in odleti v Pariz, da bi ponovno našla samo sebe. V prestolnici romantike spozna dva očarljiva moška, ki ju povezuje strast do francoske kulinarike. Med okusi, čustvi in novimi odločitvami se lahko Ellino življenje za vedno spremeni. Kaj se bo zgodilo v objemu "Mesta luči"?
savoring paris_2024.opis_omdb: Disillusioned with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris where she navigates love, self-discovery and cheese in the enchanting backdrop of The City of Love.

baked with a kiss_2022.opis_neo: Omamne pite, čarovnija in sladko presenečenje ljubezni - slaščičarkina očarljivost (in ena napačna sladica) skuje recept za katastrofo … in ljubezen.
baked with a kiss_2022.opis_omdb: It tells the story of a baker who is known to put magic in her treats.

one perfect match_2023.opis_neo: Ko se srečata dve duši, ki sta si usojeni, se upirata ovinkom usode in krmarita skozi ljubezenski labirint, da najdeta svojo drugo polovico.
one perfect match_2023.opis_omdb: When matchmaker Lucy Marks meets businessman Finn Grayson she immediately feels a spark, but when he turns up at her office as her newest client, things get complicated.

ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.naslov_orig: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case For the Watchmaker
ainsley mcgregor mysteries: a case for t.opis_neo: Dediščina je morda razlog za umor v Sweet Riverju v Teksasu. Nekdanja kriminologinja in ljubiteljska detektivka Ainsley McGregor je na sledi.

caribbean summer_2022.opis_neo:
Producentka Jade se na Karibih znajde v težavah zaradi najemniške prevare; njena sreča se spremeni, ko dobijo počitnice romantični pridih.

Jade je izčrpana televizijska producentka in deloholik. Po neprijetnem incidentu pred kamerami je prisiljena vzeti dopust. Nerada si rezervira potovanje na Karibe. 

Na kraju pa z grozo ugotovi, da je postala žrtev prevare. Nastanitev, ki jo je rezervirala, je zasebna hiša, katere lastnik sploh ne ve, da naj bi jo oddajal. 

A Ford, pravi svobodnjak, ji vseeno dovoli, da ostane pri njem, in ji približa karibsko življenjsko filozofijo. Jade se nauči sprostiti in uživati v življenju. Tudi med njima se začnejo razvijati čustva.
caribbean summer_2022.opis_omdb: After an embarrassing event during a live broadcast, Jade is forced to take a vacation, but her trip gets off to a rocky start due to a snafu involving the house she rented.

hearts in the game_2023.opis_neo: Strast na igrišču se sreča s tekmeci zunaj igrišča. Bo ljubezen prenesla pritisk ali jima bo zmaga zlomila srce? Spleteta se akcija in ljubezen.
hearts in the game_2023.opis_omdb: Publicist Hazel has to rehab the image of MLB player Diego, who just so happens to be her former flame!

total recall_2012.opis_neo:
Moški želi, da mu v um vsadijo virtualne spomine na počitnice na Marsu, a ga nepričakovan niz dogodkov prisili, da zares obišče ta planet - ali pač?

V času, ko se državi Evroamerika in Novi Šanghaj potegujeta za prevlado, se začne tovarniški delavec Doug Quaid zavedati, da je morda vohun, vendar ne ve, za katero stran se bojuje. V podjetju Recall ljudem namreč vstavljajo umetno ustvarjene spomine, pri Dougovem postopku pa se zalomi, zato se ta znajde na begu pred policijo.
total recall_2012.opis_omdb: A remake of the film Total Recall (1990), author Philip K. Dick's classic Sci-Fi short story We Can Remember It for You Wholesale returns to the big screen starring Colin Farrell, Bryan Cranston, and Kate Beckinsale, and directed by Underworld's Len Wiseman. The planet has been decimated by chemical war in the late 21st century, leaving only two nations -- the United Federation of Britain and the Colony. Douglas Quaid (Farrell) is a factory worker with a stable job and a loving wife (Beckinsale), but upon learning that a company named Rekall could grant him the memory of the ultimate espionage adventure, he decides to take a virtual vacation. But in the midst of having the new memories implanted, something goes haywire. He's branded a spy, the authorities close in, and he quickly flees for his life. Later, Quaid discovers that his life and memories were implanted. He joins forces with rebel soldier Melina (Jessica Biel) on a mission to track down Matthias (Bill Nighy), the head of a resistance movement that's been labeled a terrorist organization by the tyrannical Chancellor Cohaagen (Bryan Cranston). Cohaagen seeks to control the entire free world. The harder Quaid fights to defeat him, the clearer it becomes that his memory had been altered long before he walked into Rekall.

the wedding planner: the wedding planner.naslov_orig: The Wedding Planner: The Wedding Planner
the wedding planner: the wedding planner.opis_neo:
Mary je ena najuspešnejših načrtovalk romantičnih in elegantnih porok v San Franciscu. Potem pa prekrši najpomembnejše pravilo – zaljubi se v ženina.

Uspešna načrtovalka porok Mary Fiore prekrši najbolj pomembno pravilo svojega poklica: ne zaljubi se v ženina.
the wedding planner: the wedding planner.opis_omdb: Mary Fiore is the wedding planner. She's ambitious, hard-working, extremely organized, and she knows exactly what to do and say to make any wedding a spectacular event. Bt when Mary falls (literally) for a handsome doctor her busy yet uncomplicated life is turned upside down - he's the groom in the biggest wedding of her career! Will she help him walk down the aisle with his internet tycoon girlfriend, or will Mary finally get to be the bride herself? When it comes to love, you can never plan what's going to happen.

a bronx tale_1993.opis_neo:
Oče postane zaskrbljen, ko se lokalni gangster spoprijatelji z njegovim sinom v Bronxu v 60. letih.

Njegov oče Lorenzo je pošten in zelo priljubljen človek. Prepričan je, da bo svojega sina naučil prav takih vrednot. Kljub očetovemu trudu pa se Calogero spoprijatelji s fanti z ulice. Ko je Calogero nekoč edina priča umora, ki ga zakrivi podzemni veljak Sonny, to dejstvo zamolči. Lorenzo prepričuje sina, da vsa pozornost soseske do Sonnyja izvira iz strahu, ne iz spoštovanja. Calogero odrašča in postane rasistični razgrajač, hkrati pa se zaljubi v temnopolto dekle Jane. Iz zmedene situacije mu pomaga prav Sonny. Od dveh popolnoma različnih oseb, očeta in Sonnyja, Calogero dobi najbolj poučne lekcije za življenje.
a bronx tale_1993.opis_omdb: The Bronx, New York, 1960. 9-year-old Calogero grows up admiring and fascinated by the local mob boss, Sonny. Calogero's father, Lorenzo, wants to have nothing to do with the mob and does his best to keep his son away from Sonny and mob business. However, it may prove a losing battle.

ostwind_2013.opis_neo:
Nesamozavestno dekle mora čez praznike ostati pri svoji babici v njeni konjušnici. Začne se zanimati za konje in spozna svoje talente.

Deklica Mika, ki misli, da ne zna ničesar narediti prav, se za počitnice odpravi k svoji babici, ki ima konje. Tam odkrije, da je zelo dobra v jahanju in številnih drugih stvareh. Ko spozna divjega žrebca Ostwinda, ugotovi, da ima tudi sposobnost šepetanja konjem, zato sklene, da bo z Ostwindom tekmovala na turnirju.
ostwind_2013.opis_omdb: East wind - Together we are free is the incomparably beautiful history of bad schoolgirl Mika, which not only learns in the summer holidays, that she is a good rider, but the language of the horse speaks. For whatever reason it is the only well that can ride the previously untamed east wind, and thereby learns to love above all else. East wind is for all horse lovers, whether large or small, to highly recommend it. The story captivates until the last second. Great nature shots make the film well worth seeing as many also often dramatic twists. Can one or the other critics despise the story to this friendship as cheesy and boring, I am of the opinion that they were not allowed to experience the magic between humans and animals from their own experience in their lives. East Wind - Together We Are Free.

sap ji sang ciu_2012.opis_neo:
Moški po svetu išče komplet mističnih predmetov. Gre za dvanajst bronastih glav živali iz kitajskega horoskopa.

"Azijski Jastreb" vodi ekipo plačancev, ki mora dobiti nazaj več izgubljenih relikvij, 12 živali kitajskega horoskopa, ki so se jih v 19. stoletju polastili tujci. Pri nalogi, za katero ne izbira sredstev, mu pomagata kitajski študent in pariška dama.
sap ji sang ciu_2012.opis_omdb: Asian Hawk (Jackie Chan) leads a mercenary team to recover several lost artifacts from the Old Summer Palace, the bronze heads of the 12 Chinese Zodiac animals which was looted by foreigners in the 1800s. Assisted by a Chinese student and a Parisian lady, Hawk stops at nothing to accomplish the mission.

unstoppable_2010.opis_neo:
Frank in Will sta zaposlena pri pensilvanski železnici.

Ko dolg tovorni vlak s strupenimi snovmi uide nadzoru in skozi podeželje drvi proti gosto naseljenem območju, se morata veteranski strojevodja in mladi novinec domisliti, kako naj ga ustavita.
unstoppable_2010.opis_omdb: A runaway train carrying a cargo of toxic chemicals puts an engineer and his conductor in a race against time. They're chasing the runaway train in a separate locomotive and need to bring it under control before it derails on a curve and causes a toxic spill that will decimate a town.

the fifth commandment_2008.opis_neo:
V akciji poklicni morilec, ki se želi izvleči iz primeža podzemlja, postane tarča elitnih pripadnikov svojega poklica.

Potem ko je Chance Templeton kot deček priča brutalnemu umoru svojih staršev, ga pod okrilje vzame neusmiljeni morilec in ga vzgaja, da bo nekoč šel po njegovih stopinjah. 

Vendar Chancea veže tesna vez s krušnim bratom Milesom, ki dela kot telesni stražar za vzvišeno pop zvezdnico Angel. Ko mora Chance ustreliti bratovo stranko, spozna, da te meje ne more prestopiti, zato se znajde na muhi elitnih sodelavcev.
the fifth commandment_2008.opis_omdb: In Bangkok, an assassin who turns down a job that hits too close to home finds himself targeted by the elite members of his profession.

operacija beograd_1968.opis_neo:
Skupina aktivistov mora rešiti sovjetskega oficirja, ki so ga po sestrelitvi njegovega letala zajeli Nemci.

Jeseni leta 1943 v bližini okupiranega Beograda sestrelijo ameriško letalo, na katerem je bil sovjetski oficir. 

Ko ga zajamejo Nemci, sledijo napeta zasliševanja, da bi se dokopali do pomembnih podatkov o prihajajoči zavezniški akciji v Teheranu. 

V Beograd pošljejo skupino aktivistov, ki jo sestavljajo delavci iz tovarne sladkorja in železniške postaje, da bi se dokopali do generala, preden ta spregovori. Znajdejo se v sila neenakopravnem boju z okupatorjem. 

Nepredvidene težave jim prinesejo težke moralne dileme: naj se žrtvujejo in rešijo enega človeka ali naj raje žrtvujejo njega, da bi tako rešili več drugih življenj?
operacija beograd_1968.opis_omdb: In Autumn of 1943 American plane carrying Soviet colonel is shot down near Nazi-occupied Belgrade. Germans capture the colonel and begin interrogations, because he knows everything about forecoming Allied summit in Tehran. Group of Yugoslav Partizans is sent to Belgrade in order to rescue the colonel before he starts talking.

space jam: a new legacy_2021.opis_neo:
Prevarantska umetna inteligenca ugrabi slavnega košarkarja LeBrona Jamesa.

Ko se LeBron James znajde v svetu Looney Tunesov, njegovega sina ugrabi zlobni računalniški program Al G. Rythm. Zdaj mora James s pomočjo Zajčka Dolgouščka in njegove ekipe odigrati neverjetno košarkarsko tekmo.
space jam: a new legacy_2021.opis_omdb: A algorithm named Al G Rhythm captures famed basketball player LeBron James and his son Dom. Al G challenges LeBron to a basketball game against Al's digitized champions. LeBron gets the help of Bugs Bunny and the Looney Tunes to win the basketball game and get his son back.

summer in the vineyard_2017.opis_neo:
V nadaljevanju filma Jesen v vinogradu sta Frankie in Nate postala par in solastnika vinograda.

Po začetnem sporu sta Frankie in Nate zdaj skupaj. Kot par vodita vinograd in se pripravljata na krajevno tekmovanje. V skupni želji, da jima uspe, se Frankie in Nate znajdeta v vrtincu nesporazumov, skrivnosti in ravnanja na svojo roko, kar ogrozi tako njun vinograd kot njuno ljubezen.
summer in the vineyard_2017.opis_omdb: The co-owners of a vineyard deal with the challenges of hosting a festival in addition to their own personal relationship.

under siege_1992.opis_neo:
Casey Ryback je bivši marinec, ki je kot kuhar zaposlen na največji ameriški bojni ladji USS Missouri.

Steven Seagal je nekdanji specialec, ki mora ustaviti skupino teroristov pod vodstvom Tommyja Leeja Jonesa, potem ko zasedejo ameriško bojno ladjo.
under siege_1992.opis_omdb: The battleship Missouri is about to be decomissioned. Casey Ryback is Captain Adam's personal cook. And Ryback is always butting heads with the ship's XO Commander Krill but the Captain always intercedes. One day, after the President visits the Missouri, which is also the Captain's birthday, the Captain learns that a helicopter has been cleared to land on the ship by Commander Krill, which he was not informed of. When questioned Krill tells the Captain that it's a surprise for his birthday, the Captain then allows it. Later after another one of their scuffles, Krill has Ryback locked in the freezer. During the party, the rock band reveals themselves to be mercenaries, led by William Stranix, a CIA operative, who is in league with Krill to unload all of the ship's nuclear warheads. They lock up all of the crew and make preparations to remove the warheads. And Krill remembers Ryback, Stranix sends two of his men to take care of Ryback, only thing is that Ryback took care of them. Upon discovering their bodies, Stranix deduces that Ryback is more than a cook. He then sends Krill to check on him, and Krill discovers that Ryback's a NAVY SEAL, who got busted down to a cook after an incident in Panama. And Ryback continues to create trouble for them, so Stranix tries to hunt him down. Along the way, Ryback meets Jordan, a former playmate, who was supposed to entertain at the party but was also forgotten.

under siege 2: dark territory_1995.opis_neo:
Casey Ryback svojo nečakinjo Sarah odpelje v Los Angeles in se mora na vlaku zoperstaviti teroristom, ki so prevzeli nadzor nad satelitskim orožjem.

Upokojeni vojaški specialec Casey Ryback se z nečakinjo vkrca na vlak za L.A., a se njuni načrti porušijo, ko vlak ugrabijo teroristi. Na njem postavjo mobilno poveljstvo, da jih ne bi odkrili. Satelit usmerjajo, da bi razstrelil stavbo na Kitajskem.
under siege 2: dark territory_1995.opis_omdb: Seal Team Commander Casey Ryback has retired from the Navy since the conclusion of the events in the first movie, and is now a chef at the Mile High Cafe in Denver, Colorado. Ryback is taking his niece Sarah Ryback on vacation, to reconnect and commiserate with her after the death of her parents. They board a train traveling westbound through the Rocky Mountains from Denver to LA. With the help of gun-for-hire Marcus Penn a couple dozen of his mercenaries, ex-CIA brain (and mentally unstable) Travis Dane commandeers the train, takes the passengers and crew hostage, and sets up a mobile control center. He hacks into the CIA database and gains control of a Top-Secret defence satellite he designed during his Agency days that has just been deployed. Funded by various foreign interests, he stands to make 1 billion dollars for using the space weapon to blow up the Eastern seaboard by targeting a nuclear reactor housed beneath the Pentagon. Dane taunts the Joint Chiefs in the Pentagon Situation Room by using it to blow up a Chinese chemical weapons plant and the two stealth planes sent to intercept him, secure in the knowledge that he cannot be stopped because his location can't be traced as long as the train keeps moving, his location can't be fixed. Ryback, aided by young porter Bobby Zachs, is the only ones who can take out the bad guys, rescue the hostages, and prevent the destruction of the eastern seaboard before Dane can realise his dastardly plans!

nekaj sladkega_2023.opis_neo:
Romantična komedija zmešnjav, polna preobratov in zabavnih zapletov.

Organizatorki Kaji kariera visi na nitki, ko njen gost, svetovno znan marketinški guru Ace Majstorovski, zamudi letalo na konferenco. 

Po naključju zagleda lokalnega slaščičarja, ki mu je na las podoben, zato ga postavi za dvojnika. Nekaj sladkega je komedija zabavnih zmešnjav in zapletov, s sladko noto romantike.
nekaj sladkega_2023.opis_omdb: "Something Sweet" is a romantic comedy of confusion.

petelinji zajtrk_2007.opis_neo:
Ljubezenski film o malih ljudeh, v katerih tlijo velike strasti in sanje, se dogaja v Gornji Radgoni.

Zgodba o malih ljudeh se odvija v Gornji Radgoni, kamor mladi avtomehanik Djuro pride za vajenca k mojstru Gaješu. V delavnico kmalu zanese lokalnega kriminalca Lepca in njegovo zapeljivo ženo Bronjo, ki hitro vname Djurovo srce.
petelinji zajtrk_2007.opis_omdb: After being fired, young car mechanic Djuro gets recommendation to look for another job in a remote village. His new boss is warm, old-fashioned, and naive--completely opposite from the world he's coming from. The peaceful atmosphere is shaken when Djuro falls for a regular customer's wife.

out of the blue_2022.opis_neo:
Moški, čigar dolgočasno življenje se zaradi zapeljive Marilyn spremeni v vznemirljiv domišljijski svet.

Connor Bates, ki je po obtožbi napada nekaj časa preživel v zaporu, zdaj dela v knjižnici, v prostem času pa teče, plava in poskuša znova sestaviti svoj svet. Ko spozna Marilyn Chambers, ženo premožnega poslovneža, se med njima začne intenzivno fizično in čustveno razmerje, ki se hitro sprevrže v prazne pogovore o moževem umoru.
out of the blue_2022.opis_omdb: Connor, a man whose dull life is transformed into a thrilling fantasy world thanks to the seductive Marilyn.

the descent: part 2_2009.opis_neo:
Edini preživeli tragične ekspedicije ne verjame zgodbi o jamskih pošastih. Znova se odpravi v jamo, tam pa ga čaka nenavadna dobrodošlica.

Sarah je zmedena in popolnoma iz sebe, a oblastem vseeno ne uspe razložiti, zakaj je na njen kri njenih prijateljev in kaj se je zgodilo v globinah. Prisiljena je, da se vrne nazaj v podzemlje in poskuša najti svoje prijatelje. Z vsakim spustom globlje v jamo se Sarah začne vračati spomin na grozote, ki jih je doživela, in zelo kmalu ugotovi, kako nevarne je misija, ki se ji je pridružila. Ker ji drugi ne verjamejo in sumijo, da je sama kriva za krvave madeže po svojih oblačilih, mora Sarah dokazati, da se motijo in rešiti svojo kožo.
the descent: part 2_2009.opis_omdb: Distraught, confused, and half-wild with fear, Sarah Carter emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system where she encountered unspeakable terrors. Unable to plausibly explain to the authorities what happened - or why she's covered in her friends' blood - Sarah is forced back to the subterranean depths to help locate her five missing companions. As the rescue party drives deeper into uncharted caverns, nightmarish visions of the recent past begin to haunt Sarah and she starts to realize the full horror and futility of the mission. Subjected to the suspicion and mistrust of the group and confronted once more by the inbred, feral and savagely ruthless Crawlers, Sarah must draw on all her inner reserves of strength and courage in a desperate final struggle for deliverance and redemption.

you don't mess with the zohan_2008.naslov_orig: You Don'T Mess With The Zohan
you don't mess with the zohan_2008.opis_neo:
Izraelski vojak specialnih enot zaigra svojo smrt, da bi znova zaživel v New Yorku kot frizer.

V komediji "Zohan je zakon", za katero so scenarij napisali Judd Apatow (»Napumpana«), Robert Smigel (Triumph the Insult Comic Dog) in Adam Sandler, Sandler igra Zohana, vrhunskega izraelskega komandosa, ki uprizori lastno smrt, da bi uresničil svoje sanje: postati frizer v New Yorku. Film je režiral Dennis Dugan.
you don't mess with the zohan_2008.opis_omdb: Harbouring an ardent desire to be the best in the cut-throat world of hairdressers, the Mossad's finest agent, Zohan, seizes the opportunity to call it quits by faking his death, after a fierce battle with his arch-nemesis, Phantom. In high hopes of making his dream come true in New York, the ambitious Zohan lands a job in the stylish hair salon of the beautiful Palestinian, Dalia, and things seem to work as planned; until a man from the past blows his cover. Now, the Zohan must fight tooth and nail to keep his new lifestyle, and in the meantime, try to win the heart of his boss. Can Zohan's dazzling hairstyling techniques save the world?

bridesmaids_2011.opis_neo:
Tekmovanje med družico in pričo, katera je nevestina najboljša prijateljica, ogrozi življenje brezposelnega slaščičarja.

Annie je razočarana nad svojim ljubezenskim življenjem in propadlo slaščičarsko kariero, ko se njena najboljša prijateljica zaroči in jo prosi, če bi prevzela vlogo častne družice. Obubožana Annie se s težavo prebija skozi drage dogodke povezane s poroko, hkrati pa mora za nevestino pozornost tekmovati z vedno popolno družico Helen.
bridesmaids_2011.opis_omdb: Annie (Kristen Wiig), is a maid of honor whose life unravels as she leads her best friend, Lillian (Maya Rudolph), and a group of colorful bridesmaids (Rose Byrne, Melissa McCarthy, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Ellie Kemper) on a wild ride down the road to matrimony. Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honor. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she'll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you'll go for someone you love.

the hole_2001.opis_neo:
Štirje najstniki odkrijejo skrito zaklonišče v kletnih prostorih britanske zasebne šole.

Producent, ki ga je zapustila sreča in njegov računovodja se lotita načrta, s katerim mislita na hitro obogateti. Toda vse pade v vodo, ko predstava, ki naj bi bila polomija, postane velika uspešnica.
the hole_2001.opis_omdb: One misty morning, Liz Dunn stumbles down the road to her school and screams for help. A police psychologist gets her to reveal her story: A month earlier: three rebellious teenagers - Mike, Frankie and Geoff are trying to ditch the school field trip to Wales. The school nerd Martin helps them out by allowing them to stay in an old war bunker for the three days on the condition that his friend Liz joins them. The teens go down, party and have great fun but Martin doesn't return to let them out and they hope and pray that someone will find them...

surf's up_2007.opis_neo:
Odkar je videl surfersko legendo Big Z-ja, je pingvin Cody obseden z jahanjem valov.

Medtem, ko drugi pingvini počnejo pingvinske stvari, Cody Maverick surfa. Odkar je videl surfersko legendo Big Z-ja, je obseden z jahanjem valov. Ko v mesto prispe iskalec talentov, dobi Cody priložnost potovanja na eksotični otok, kjer bi se udeležil svojega prvega tekmovanja v surfanju. Pa lahko Cody zmaga?
surf's up_2007.opis_omdb: This story follows a teenage rock hopper penguin named Cody Maverick from his hometown of Shiverpool, Antarctica, where all of the other penguins think he's nothing but a surfing fool, to the "Big Z Memorial Surf Off" on Pen Gu Island. Young Cody is determined to win the most important competition in the world of penguin surfing in honor of "Big Z," a deceased surfing legend whom he has idolized since childhood. But the waves in Pen Gu are different than in Shiverpool, and the competition is steep. The current champ, egotistical Tank Evans, isn't just about to let this little penguin knock him from first place without a fight. When Cody wipes out and encounters Geek, a recluse aging former surfer, living in the jungle, he learns some important lessons about life and surfing, and even teaches Geek a thing or two.

xxx_2002.opis_neo:
Vin Diesel nastopi v vlogi nekdanjega ekstremnega športnika, ki ga najamejo kot tajnega agenta za nevarno tajno misijo.

Xander Cage je adrenalinski navdušenec, znan po nevarnih in nezakonitih podvigih, ki vzbudijo pozornost agenta Gibbonsa, uslužbenca Agencije za državno varnost. Ta preiskuje tolpo kriminalcev, ki je ubila njihovega tajnega agenta in Xander je kot naročen za nalogo. Ko prejme novo identiteto se infiltrira v srce kriminalne organizacije, da bi prišel na sled nevarnemu vodji.
xxx_2002.opis_omdb: Xander "XXX" Cage is a thrill seeker who until now has been deemed untouchable by the law. NSA Agent Gibbons forces XXX to cooperate with the government to infiltrate an underground Russian crime ring, and avoid going to prison. Gibbons sends XXX to enter this world of crime undetected where others have failed, using his natural athletic prowess and a whole lot of attitude. Xander must combat an organization led by a clever, ruthless and nihilistic Yorgi whose first target is the city of Prague.

se, jie_2007.opis_neo:
Zgodba se dogaja med drugo svetovno vojno v Šanghaju v ospredje pa je mlado dekle, ki se zaplete v nevarno igro z mogočnim politikom.

Druga svetovna vojna, leto 1942. Nadaljuje se japonska okupacija kitajskega mesta Šanghaj. Gospa Mak, izobražena in dobro situirana ženska, vstopi v kavarno, opravi telefonski klic in čaka. Prevzamejo jo spomini … 

… vrnemo se v leto 1938. Gospa Mak je plaha Wong Chia Chi. Bliža se druga svetovna vojna, Wongin oče je zbežal v Anglijo. Kot brucka spozna študenta Kuanga Yu Mina, ki je kot izraziti patriot oblikoval dramsko društvo. Wong postane glavni ženski lik v gledališki skupini, v okviru katere lahko navdušuje in navdihuje občinstvo - in Kuanga. Slednji zbere skupino študentov, ki naj bi izvedla načrt za atentat na največjega kolaboranta, gospoda Yeeja. Vsak študent prejme svojo vlogo; Wong bo gospa Mak, ki se bo spoprijateljila z Yeejevo ženo, da bi pridobila njegovo zaupanje in ga zvabila v razmerje. Wong se popolno vživi v vlogo in vse se odvija po scenariju, nato pa pride do nepričakovanega in usodnega preobrata, zaradi katerega Wong zbeži. 

Šanghaj, leto 1941. Okupaciji ni videti konca. Wong, ki je pravkar pribežala iz Hong Konga, na svoje presenečenje znova sreča Kuanga, zdaj pripadnika odporniškega gibanja. Wong znova postane gospa Mak, ki naj bi ubila vodilnega kolaboranta Yeeja. Vse bliže je svojemu plenu, toda njena identiteta je vse bolj ogrožena.
se, jie_2007.opis_omdb: Frustrated in his attempts to assassinate Yee, who is an important official in Japanese-ruled Shanghai, Old Wu, who has lost his wife and two sons as well as two women who had attempted to seduce Yee, now recruits Kuang, Mai Tai Tai, and their troupe of drama students from Hong Kong University in yet another attempt to do away with Yee. Mai Tai Tai is chosen to befriend Yee, which she does by posing as the wife of Mak, befriending Yee's wife and her female friends, and then eventually befriending Yee himself. Even though both get together, they do end up going separate ways, only to meet again four years later. This time Mai is all set to entrap Yee at Chandni Chowk Jewellers which is owned by an East Indian man named Khalid Saiduddin. The question does remain: Will she and her troupe succeed?

the last exorcism_2010.opis_neo:
Evangeličanski pastor privoli, da snemalna ekipa posname dokumentarec o njegovem zadnjem obredu "izganjanja hudiča".

Cotton Marcus pripada četrti generaciji evangeličanskih pridigarjev in predanih vernikov, vendar pa pri slednjem šepa. Po letih in letih manipuliranja z verniki in služenjem z izganjanji si želi Cotton očistiti vest in vse razkrije kameram.
the last exorcism_2010.opis_omdb: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, the evangelical Reverend Cotton Marcus was raised by his father to be a preacher. He agrees that the filmmaker Iris Reisen and the cameraman Daniel Moskowitz make a documentary about his life. Cotton tells that when his wife Shanna Marcus had troubles in the delivery of their son Justin, he prioritized the doctor help to God and since then he questions his faith. Further, he tells that exorcisms are frauds but the results are good for the believers because they believe it is true. When Cotton is summoned by the farmer Louis Sweetzer to perform an exorcism in his daughter Nell, Cotton sees the chance to prove to the documentary crew what he has just told. They head to Ivanwood and they have a hostile reception from Louis's son Caleb. Cotton performs the exorcism in Nell, exposing his tricks to the camera, but sooner they learn that the dysfunctional Sweetzer family has serious problems.

the interpreter_2005.opis_neo:
Politične spletke in prevare preplavijo OZN, kjer agent tajne službe preiskuje trditve prevajalke, da je po naključju slišala za načrt za atentat.

Nicole Kidman je prevajalka pri ZN, ki nehote sliši pogovor v generalni skupščini o tajni zaroti, ki bi lahko strmoglavila vlado afriške države. Zdaj mora preživeti dovolj dolgo, da bo informacijo lahko zaupala oblastem.
the interpreter_2005.opis_omdb: Escalating events begin when U.N. interpreter Silvia Broome alleges that she has overheard a death threat against an African head of state, spoken in a rare dialect few people other than Silvia can understand. With the words "The Teacher will never leave this room alive," in an instant, Silvia's life is turned upside down as she becomes a hunted target of the killers. Placed under the protection of federal agent Tobin Keller, Silvia's world only grows more nightmarish. As Keller digs deeper into his eyewitnesses' past and her secretive world of global connections, the more suspicious he becomes that she herself might be involved in the conspiracy. With every step of the way, he finds more reasons to mistrust her. Is Sylvia a victim? A suspect? Or something else entirely? And can Tobin, coping with his own personal heartache, keep her safe? Though they must depend on one another, Silvia and Tobin couldn't be more different. Silvia's strengths are words, diplomacy and the subtleties of meaning, while Tobin is all about instinct, action and reading into the most primal human behaviors. Now, as the danger of a major assassination on U.S. soil grows and Silvia's life hangs in the balance, Silvia and Tobin play out a gripping dance of evasion and revelation that keeps them both guessing as they race to stop a terrifying international crisis before it's too late.

the others_2001.opis_neo:
Mati, ki živi v zatemnjeni stari hiši s svojima otrokoma, ki bolehata za redko alergijo na svetlobo, postane prepričana, da v hiši straši.

Nicole Kidman igra mlado ženo in mamo Grace, ki med drugo svetovno vojno izgubi moža. Tako po vojni sama z otrokoma živi v samotnem dvorcu na enem od otokov, ki ležijo med Anglijo in Francijo. Hčerka Anne in sin Nicholas imata nenavadno bolezen, saj ne smeta biti izpostavljena dnevni svetlobi. 

Ko v dvorec pridejo trije novi služabniki, jim Grace jasno pove, da mora biti hiša vedno zatemnjena. Nekega dne Anna mami pove, da v hiši niso sami. Z njimi živi še en otrok, Victor, bolje rečeno njegov duh. Kmalu se začnejo odvijati skrivnostni dogodki, ki postajajo vse bolj šokantni. Vse skupaj Grace pripelje na rob zdravega razuma.
the others_2001.opis_omdb: A woman named Grace retires with her two children to a mansion on Jersey, towards the end of the Second World War, where she's waiting for her husband to come back from battle. The children have a disease which means they cannot be touched by direct sunlight without being hurt in some way. They will live alone there with oppressive, strange and almost religious rules, until she needs to hire a group of servants for them. Their arrival will accidentally begin to break the rules with unexpected consequences.

pride & prejudice_2005.opis_neo:
Iskrice letijo, ko živahna, a revna, Elizabeth sreča bogatega in ponosnega gospoda Darcyja. Bosta lahko premagala svoj ponos in predsodke?

Ta zgodba o ljubezni in vrednotah se odvija v Angliji v poznem 18. stoletju. Mama je vseh pet sester Bennet vzgojila z enim ciljem: da najdejo moža. Posneto po noveli Jane Austen.
pride & prejudice_2005.opis_omdb: The story is based on Jane Austen's novel about five sisters - Jane (Rosamund Pike), Elizabeth (Keira Knightley), Mary (Talulah Riley), Kitty (Carey Mulligan), and Lydia Bennet (Jena Malone) - in Georgian England. Their lives are turned upside down when wealthy young Mr. Bingley (Simon Woods) and his best friend, Mr. Darcy (Matthew Macfadyen), arrive in their neighborhood.

source code_2011.opis_neo:
Vojak se zbudi v telesu neznanca in ugotovi, da je del poskusnega vladnega programa in mora v osmih minutah najti bombaša na vlaku v Chicagu.

Colter, vojak na posebni misiji, znova in znova doživlja zadnjih osem minut življenja učitelja Seana Fentressa, ki ga je razneslo na vlaku na poti v Chicago. Colter mora odkriti terorista, da bodo lahko ustavili naslednji, atomski napad.
source code_2011.opis_omdb: Army Captain Colter Stevens finds himself working on a special program where his consciousness can be inserted into another human being. The only catch is can only be there for 8 minutes at any given time. That morning, a bomb exploded on a commuter train just outside Chicago. He occupies the body of teacher going to work on that train and is confused as to what he is doing or why he is there as his last memory is of flying his helicopter on a combat mission in Afghanistan. Those in charge of the program explain to him that there is a bomb on the train, and that he must locate it. More importantly, he must identify the bomber as another bombing is expected later that day. He is also told however that he cannot change the past and can only gather information. As he develops a liking for his traveling companion Christina, he sets out to test that theory.

the child in time_2017.opis_neo:
Stephen Lewis, uspešen avtor knjig za otroke, se sooči z nepredstavljivim, ko mu ugrabijo hčer.

Zgodba po scenariju Stephena Butcharda, prirejenem po predlogi nagrajenega istoimenskega romana avtorja Iana McEwana, prinaša liričen in globoko pretresljiv motiv ljubezni, izgube in moči nedoumljivih stvari. Stephen Lewis (Benedict Cumberbatch), uspešen avtor knjig za otroke, se sooči z nepredstavljivim: v neki trgovini med nakupom izgubi svojo edinko, štiriletno Kate. V trenutku, ki se v naslednjih letih ponavlja vedno znova, se Stephen naposled sprijazni z grozljivim dejstvom: njegove ljubljene hčere ni več. Z milino in pronicljivostjo se zgodba loteva temačnega motiva zakonske zveze, ki jo skrha in uniči izguba otroka. Izguba Kate vse bolj razdvaja Stephena in njegovo ženo Julie (Kelly Macdonald), ki se borita z neznosno žalostjo. Čez čas se sicer vrne nekakšno ravnovesje, dokler se težka preizkušnja ne spremeni v nepričakovano zmagoslavje upanja.
the child in time_2017.opis_omdb: The life of a children's book author is turned upside down when his daughter goes missing.

boîte noire_2021.opis_neo:
Napet tehnološki triler o mladem analitiku črnih skrinjic iz agencije za raziskave letalskih nesreč.

Mathieu je nadarjeni mladi analitik črnih skrinjic, ki mora poiskati vzrok smrtonosnega strmoglavljenja čisto novega letala.
