A ko oblasti zaključijo primer, se Mathieu ne more otresti občutka, da z dokazi ni nekaj v redu. Med ponovnim poslušanjem posnetka začne odkrivati nadvse vznemirjujoče podrobnosti. Se lahko posnetek priredi? Kljub šefovemu ukazu začne Mathieu raziskovati na lastno pest. Spusti se v obsedeno in nevarno iskanje resnice, ki pa ne bo ogrozila zgolj njegove kariere.
boîte noire_2021.opis_omdb: Matthieu is a young and talented black box analyst on a mission to solve the reason behind the deadly crash of a brand new aircraft. Yet, when the case is closed by authorities, Matthieu cannot help but sense there is something wrong with the evidence. As he listens to the tracks again, he starts detecting some seriously disturbing details. Could the tape have been modified? Going against his boss' orders, Matthieu begins his own rogue investigation - an obsessional and dangerous quest for truth that will quickly threat far more than his career.

the moderator_2022.opis_neo: Po umoru njenih dveh prijateljic v Maroku vzame ruska blogerka stvari v svoje roke. Izve, da se za tem skriva cela zločinska mreža in da puščajo za sabo vrsto sadističnih umorov. Toda to je šele začetek. Ker ne bo odnehala, dokler se jim ne maščuje. Korak po korak.
the moderator_2022.opis_omdb: After the murder of her two Scandinavian friends in Morocco, a Russian blogger decides to do her own justice.

5 do 7_2014.opis_neo:
V New Yorku se mlad romanopisec spusti v razmerje s prelepo soprogo francoskega diplomata. A videvata se lahko le med peto in sedmo uro.

Slučajno srečanje na ulicah Manhattna pahne mladega pisatelja Briana v strastno zvezo s Francozinjo. Vendar je ona že poročena; dobita se lahko le na zmenkih v hotelski sobi – med peto in sedmo uro.
5 do 7_2014.opis_omdb: In New York, an aspiring novelist has a cinq-a-sept affair with the beautiful wife of a French diplomat. Cultures, world views, personal ethics and dietary preferences clash as love deepens, with remarkable results. Romance, drama and comedy.

contra_2020.opis_neo:
Služba profesorja Richarda Pohla je v nevarnosti, potem ko v predavalnici užali študentko prava Naimo Hamid.

Ena sporna pripomba je bila odveč: profesorju Richardu Pohlu grozi, da ga bodo vrgli iz službe, potem ko je užalil študentko prava Naimo Hamid pred nabito polno predavalnico. Ko videoposnetek o tem postane viralen, mu predsednik fakultete nameni še zadnjo priložnost: njegove možnosti pred disciplinsko komisijo bodo veliko boljše, če bo brucko Naimo uspel pripraviti za državno tekmovanje v debati. Pohl in Naima sta enako osupla nad tem, toda sčasoma se nenavadni par ujame – dokler Naima ne ugotovi, da večkulturna pravljica služi le enemu namenu: rešiti ugled fakultete.
contra_2020.opis_omdb: A university professor's ignorance is exposed when he must prepare a student for a debate.

delivery man_2013.opis_neo:
David izve, da je zaradi napake na kliniki za neplodnost oče 533 otrokom.

David Wozniak življenja ne jemlje preveč resno. Vsaj dokler ne izve, da je zaradi napake v kliniki za darovanje sperme, sedaj oče 533 otrokom. Del otrok grozi s tožbo klinike, da bi izvedeli, kdo je njihov oče. Davida pa poizvedovanje o življenjih otrok pripelje do spoznanja, kaj bi moral spremeniti v svojem.
delivery man_2013.opis_omdb: David Wozniak is a man who is irresponsible and unreliable which doesn't exactly endear him to his family and his girlfriend. And when she tells him that she's pregnant, she tells him, she plans to do it on her own because she can't count on him. One day a lawyer shows up and talks to him about the fact that twenty years ago he was a sperm donor for about a year and his sperm was used to father over 500 children. And now over 100 of them want to know who he is but because he signed a confidentiality agreement, they can't be told who he is. So they are going to court to try to get the confidentiality set aside. His lawyer tells him that they can win this. But when the lawyer who saw him gives him info on the ones who want to see him, he takes a peek at one and decides to go see him and not tell him he's the father. He then goes out and checks out some of his other children and doesn't tell them who he is and connects with them. His lawyer tells him it could jeopardize their case, especially since he can get a big settlement which he can use to pay back some people he borrowed from who "tell" him to pay or else.

the last full measure_2019.opis_neo:
Štiriindvajset let po njegovi smrti je William H. Pitsenbarger, Jr.  za svoja dejanja na bojišču odlikovan z najvišjo vojaško častjo države.

Resnična zgodba o Williamu Pitsenbargerju, vojnem heroju najvišjega reda, zdravniku padalcu, ki je lastnoročno rešil prek 60 ljudi, preden je sam padel v najbolj krvavi bitki v vietnamski vojni. Imel je priložnost, da pobegne s helikopterjem, a je ostal in skušal rešiti vse vojake, ki so obtičali tam. Na koncu ga je ubil sovražnikov strel, in tako je za svoje tovariše žrtvoval svoje življenje.
the last full measure_2019.opis_omdb: In 1999 an up-and-coming political staffer at the Department of Defence, Scott Huffman, is given the job of investigating a request to upgrade an award to the Medal of Honour. After conspicuous acts of gallantry Airman William H Pitsenbarger was killed in Vietnam in 1966. He was recommended for the MoH but his award was downgraded to the Air Force Cross. For over 30 years his comrades and family have been lobbying for him to receive the medal. Huffman cares more about his own career than this case but the more he looks into it, the more convinced he is that Pitsenbarger deserves the MoH and should have received it in 1966. Why didn't he then?

hellboy: rise of the blood queen_2019.naslov_orig: Hellboy: Rise of the Blood Queen
hellboy: rise of the blood queen_2019.opis_neo:
Ultimativni antijunak Hellboy se vrača v maščevalni misiji v Londonu, kjer se starodavni duh zlobne čarovnice (Nimue Krvava kraljica) vrne od mrtvih.

Ultimativni antijunak Hellboy se vrača v maščevalni misiji v Londonu, kjer se starodavni duh zlobne čarovnice (Nimue Krvava kraljica) vrne od mrtvih.
hellboy: rise of the blood queen_2019.opis_omdb: Hellboy is a supernatural being who is the son of a fallen angel. He came to our world in 1944 as a result of a mystical ritual. The Occultists of the Third Reich had long tried to gain an advantage in the war, hoping to attract the ideal soldier to the ranks of the fascist army. Hellboy was exactly the one they needed, but they never managed to make their plans a reality. The demon from hell fell into the hands of Americans and began to serve them, protecting the world from mysterious threats. This time he is sent to England to meet face to face with Merlin's wife. Just a battle with the Blood Queen will lead to the end of the world, which the monster tried to avoid all his life.

de nos frères blessés_2020.opis_neo:
Fernanda aretirajo ker naj bi podtaknil bombo. Njegova žena Hélène je zdaj poročena z "izdajalcem", vendar Fernanda noče prepustiti njegovi usodi.

Alžirija 1956. Fernand Iveton, 30-letni delavec, separatist in idealist, je aretiran zaradi podtaknjene bombe v elektrarni, kjer dela. Čeprav bomba ni nikogar ubila ne ranila, mu grozi smrtna kazen. Helena postane tako soproga "izdajalca", kar jih življenje obrne na glavo. Ne želi zapustiti Fernanda, ko se slednji sooča s svojo usodo. Film je posnet po resnični zgodbi ter prikazuje Helenine in Fernandove spomine. To je zgodba o ljubezni in političnem aktivizmu, ki ju zlomi doktrina 'državnega interesa', ki jo je zamajalo Fernandovo dejanje.
de nos frères blessés_2020.opis_omdb: Algiers, 1956. Fernand Iveton is arrested in his factory, accused of having planted a bomb. His wife Hélène is now married to a "traitor", but she refuses to abandon Fernand to his fate.

borg mcenroe_2017.opis_neo:
Zgodba o teniških legendah Borgu in McEnroeju se osredotoča na njuno rivalstvo, ki je vrhunec doživelo leta 1980, na slavnem finalu v Wimbledonu.

Leta 1980 je bil švedski prvak Björn Borg najboljši tenisač na svetu. Pred močnim in neverjetno discipliniranim športnikom je le ena ovira na poti k rekordni peti zaporedni zmagi na turnirju v Wimbledonu: nadarjeni, vendar prepirljivi, zahtevni in neznosno zoprni mladi ameriški igralec John McEnroe. Do tekmovanja so še trije dnevi in Borg marljivo trenira v svoji razkošni hiši v Monaku ob pomoči trenerja in dolgoletnega mentorja Lennarta ter podpori zaročenke Mariane. Vendar McEnroejeva eksplozivna samozavest in njegova vihrava osebnost vse bolj načenjata Borgovo ledeno zbranost in značilno zadržani značaj. Tenisača sta živi nasprotji drug drugega; vendar je oba zaznamovala težavna preteklost in spomini nanjo ju mučijo, ko se bliža turnir. Končni dvoboj je neznosni vrhunec pritiska, ki sta ga deležna: teniški obračun Borg - McEnroe se zapiše med najslavnejše dvoboje vseh časov in pomeni višek rivalstva "ognja" in "ledu" – ki se je nazadnje spremenilo v dosmrtno prijateljstvo.
borg mcenroe_2017.opis_omdb: It is the 1980 Wimbledon tennis championship. Bjorn Borg is the number 1 tennis player in the world and the undisputed king of Wimbledon. He has won the tournament four times in a row - a fifth consecutive time would be a world first. However, a new face has appeared in the tennis world and presents a serious threat to Borg's title hopes - John McEnroe.

dumb and dumber to_2014.opis_neo:
Harry in Lloyd se 20 let po prvi pustolovščini znova podata na pot, da bi našla Harryjevo na novo odkrito hčer, ki je bila posvojena.

Dvajset let je minilo, odkar je Mary zavrnila Lloyda, ta pa še vedno žaluje. Harry, ki nujno potrebuje novo ledvico izve, da mu pri tem lahko pomaga odrasla hčerka, za katero je ravnokar izvedel. Odloči se Lloydovemu žalovanju narediti konec, da bi se skupaj odpravila na pot po ZDA in našla hčerko, ki mu lahko reši življenje.
dumb and dumber to_2014.opis_omdb: It's been 20 years and Harry Dunn has found something out - he has a daughter! Lloyd Christmas, his equally dim-witted friend, takes one look at a picture of her, develops a crush, and insists the two track her down. What ensues when Harry finally agrees is a bizarre encounter with an old lady and more hilarity because of their sheer stupidity.

petit vampire_2020.opis_neo:
Med vampirjem, ki bo vedno star 10 let, ter osirotelim dečkom se splete prijateljstvo. ki pa je kmalu ogroženo, ko se pojavi sovražnik.

Kljub življenju v začarani hiši z veselo skupino pošasti, se vampirček nadvse dolgočasi. O čem sanja? Da bi šel v šolo, kjer bi spoznal druge otroke. Žal mi starši ne dovolijo iz vile, saj je za vampirje zunanji svet zelo nevaren! V spremstvu zvestega buldoga Fantomata se vampirček skrivaj izmuzne iskat nove prijatelje. Kaj hitro spozna dečka Michaela, toda njuno prijateljstvo pritegne pozornost srhljivega Gibbusa, starega sovražnika, ki vampirčka in njegovo družino preganja že stoletja.
petit vampire_2020.opis_omdb: A friendship forms between a never-aging 10-year-old vampire and an orphan schoolboy, but a moon headed monster throws obstacles in their paths.

brideshead revisited_2008.opis_neo:
Anglija v času dvajsetih let. Charlesu se z odhodom na Oxford prvič v življenju uspe rešiti svojih hladnih staršev.

Čeprav prihaja iz srednjega meščanskega razreda, se Charles na Oxfordu spoprijatelji z bogatim plemičem Sebastianom, čigar življenje se vrti okrog alkohola in zabave. Ko ga Sebastian povabi na posestvo, je Charles navdušen nad njegovo velikostjo in lepoto pa tudi nad Sebastianovo sestro Julio. Toda odnosi v družini so zelo napeti, ena od težav je Sebastianov alkoholizem, njegova mama pa upa, da bo Charles dobro vplival na Sebastiana. Kljub temu Sebastianova in Julijina mama nasprotuje poroki Charlesa in Julie, saj ji ni všeč, da je ateist. Kmalu oznani Julijino zaroko z bogatim Rexom. Po burnem praznovanju zaroke minejo štiri leta, v katerih je Charles postal znan in cenjen slikar, Julia je poročena z Rexom, Sebastian je v Maroku, njegova mama pa je na smrt bolna in prosi Charlesa, naj ga pripelje domov.
brideshead revisited_2008.opis_omdb: World War II. Charles Ryder (Matthew Goode), in his civilian life, rose out of his middle class London background, which includes being an atheist and having a distant relationship with his eccentric father, to become an up and coming artist. He is currently an Army officer, who is stationed at a makeshift camp set up at Brideshead estate before imminently getting shipped into battle. The locale, which is not unfamiliar to him, makes him reminisce about what ended up being his doomed relationship with Brideshead's owners, the Flytes, an ostentatiously wealthy family. Charles first met Sebastian Flyte (Ben Whishaw) when they both were students at Oxford, where Sebastian surprisingly welcomed Charles into his circle of equally wealthy, somewhat stuck-up, and flamboyant friends. Charles ended up getting caught up in Sebastian's family struggles, where Sebastian used excessive alcohol to deal with the pain resulting from his family relationships. Although Charles and Sebastian were more than just friends, Charles ultimately fell in love with Sebastian's sister, Julia Flyte (Hayley Atwell). But the biggest obstacle to Charles being intimately involved with anyone in the Flyte family was the family matriarch, Lady Marchmain (Dame Emma Thompson), a strict and devout Catholic who ruled the family with that adherence to a strict Catholic lifestyle. That was despite her and Lord Marchmain's (Sir Michael Gambon's) own marriage being in name only, as he lived in Venice with his mistress, Cara (Greta Scacchi).

olympus has fallen_2013.opis_neo:
Ko Belo hišo zavzamejo teroristi in zajamejo predsednika, se znajde osramočeni bivši predsednikov varnostnik Mike Banning zajet v zgradbi.

Belo hišo zavzamejo teroristi in zajamejo predsednika, bivši predsednikov varnostnik Mike Banning pa se znajde zajet v zgradbi. Državne varnostne agencije se morajo zanesti na Banningovo poznavanje Bele hiše, da bi jo ponovno zavzeli, rešili predsednika in se tako izognili še večji mednarodni krizi.
olympus has fallen_2013.opis_omdb: When the White House (Secret Service Code: "Olympus") is captured by a terrorist mastermind and the President is kidnapped, former Presidential Secret Service Agent Mike Banning finds himself trapped within the building. As our national security team scrambles to respond, they are forced to rely on Banning's inside knowledge to help retake the White House, save the President and avert an even bigger disaster.

everybody wants some!!_2016.opis_neo:
Leta 1980 se skupina univerzitetnih igralcev baseballa uči usklajevati svojo novo svobodo z odgovornostmi odraslega življenja.

Zadeti in zmedeni, ki prikazuje zadnji dan šole v teksaškem mestecu v sedemdesetih letih preteklega stoletja, upravičeno spada med najboljše najstniške filme vseh časov; Ta nora osemdeseta je nadaljevanje njegovega duha. Zgodba se dogaja v osemdesetih in sledi fakultetnim izkušnjam kopice likov - ti v mnogo čem spominjajo na mladostniške inačice tistih iz Zadeti in zmedeni - novopečenim študentom, igralcem baseballa, ki skušajo najti svojo svobodo in se zdaj, ko so naposled brez nadzora odraslih, obnašati "odgovorno".
everybody wants some!!_2016.opis_omdb: In Texas in the fall of 1980, college freshman Jake Bradford, a hotshot pitcher in high school, moves into an off-campus house with other members of the college baseball team. He meets several teammates, including his roommate Billy, who has been nicknamed "Beuter" because of his Deep Southern accent. He joins Finnegan, Roper, Dale, and Plummer cruising the campus by car, looking for women..

southpaw_2015.opis_neo:
Slavni boksar po nepopisni tragediji izgubi vse za kar je kdaj garal. Po borbi z depresijo se odloči znova pobrati.

Boksar Billy Hope ima vse, kar si je kadarkoli želel; izjemno kariero in lagodno življenje, ki ga deli z ljubečo ženo in hčerko. Ko na vrhuncu kariere doživi nepopisno tragedijo, zapusti pa ga tudi dolgoletni menedžer, Billy zapade v brezno depresije. Odločen, da se bo znova pobral, se po pomoč zateče k upokojenemu trenerju amaterskih boksarjev.
southpaw_2015.opis_omdb: Billy Hope (played by Jake Gyllenhaal) is the undisputed light-heavyweight boxing champion of the world. He is unbeaten over a career of 43 fights. He is happily married to beautiful Maureen (Rachel McAdams) and has a young daughter, Leila (Oona Laurence). His life seems perfect, but then, during a fracas with a rival boxer, his wife is shot and killed. They had known each other since they were 12 years old, and now the bottom has fallen out of his world. The death of his wife sends Billy into a downward spiral, resulting in him being barred from professional boxing for a year, the loss of his house and almost all his possessions and, most painfully, the loss of his daughter to the custody of Social Services. In order to gain back his daughter and restart his life, he seeks out a particular trainer, Tick Wills (Forest Whitaker). Now he is starting his life again, at the bottom.

time freak_2018.opis_neo:
Da bi pozdravil svoje strto srce, mladi genij izumi časovni stroj.

Najstniški genij Stillman je zaljubljen v Debbie, ki ga po letu dni zveze nenadoma zapusti. Da bi dobil še eno priložnost za ljubezen, izumi časovni stroj, saj bi se težave tako lotil vsak genij strtega srca. Vrne se leto dni v preteklost, da bi popravil slabe trenutke, ki bi lahko bili krivi za razpad njune ljubezni.
time freak_2018.opis_omdb: Physics prodigy Stillman (Butterfield) is destined for great things, only to be derailed when his girlfriend, Debbie (Turner) suddenly dumps him. But Stillman isn't beaten, he does what any heartbroken genius would do - he invents a time machine to get a second chance at love.

london has fallen_2016.opis_neo:
Vodja ameriške tajne službe mora v Londonu preprečiti zaroto, da bi pobili vse svetovne voditelje na pogrebu britanskega premierja.

Tajni agent Mike Banning ponovno prevzema nalogo varovanja predsednika ZDA. Spremlja ga na poti v London, kjer se bodo na pogrebu britanskega premierja zbrali vsi svetovni voditelji. Najbolje varovani dogodek v zgodovini se sprevrže v smrtonosno past, ko udarijo teroristi, ki načrtujejo masovni atentat in ugrabitev predsednika.
london has fallen_2016.opis_omdb: After the British Prime Minister has passed away under mysterious circumstances, all leaders of the Western world must attend his funeral. But what starts out as the most protected event on earth, turns into a deadly plot to kill the world's most powerful leaders and unleash a terrifying vision of the future. The President of the United States, his formidable secret service head and a British MI-6 agent who trusts no one are the only people that have any hope of stopping it.

angel has fallen_2019.opis_neo:
Mike Banning je obtožen poskusa atentata na predsednika, zato se mora izogibati lastni agenciji in FBI, ko poskuša odkriti pravo grožnjo.

Po zahrbtnem napadu je agent tajne službe Mike Banning obtožen poskusa atentata na predsednika Trumbulla. Banning, ki ga preganjajo njegovi sodelavci in FBI, začne dirko s časom, da bi očistil svoje ime.
angel has fallen_2019.opis_omdb: After the events in the previous film, Secret Service agent Mike Banning finds himself framed for an assassination attempt on the President. Pursued by his own agency and the FBI, Banning races to clear his name and uncover the real terrorist threat which has set its sights on Air Force One.

i care a lot_2020.opis_neo:
Prevarantka dela kot zakonita skrbnica in izčrpava prihranke ranljivih starejših ljudi, dokler ne spozna enakovredne nasprotnice.

Marla Grayson je zelo uspešna skrbnica, ki spretno manipulira z zakonom v svojo korist in na škodo svojih klientov, saj živi svoje luksuzno življenje na njihov račun. V trenutku, ko si izbere svojo naslednjo žrtev, na videz uglajeno starejšo gospo, se prepozno zave, da lahko izgled še kako vara.
i care a lot_2020.opis_omdb: Poised with sharklike self-assurance, Marla Grayson is a professional, court-appointed guardian for dozens of elderly wards whose assets she seizes and cunningly bilks through dubious but legal means. It's a well-oiled racket that Marla and her business-partner and lover, Fran, use with brutal efficiency on their latest "cherry," Jennifer Peterson - a wealthy retiree with no living heirs or family. But when their mark turns out to have an equally shady secret of her own and connections to a volatile gangster, Marla is forced to level up in a game only predators can play - one that's neither fair, nor square.

hachi: a dog's tale_2009.opis_neo:
Ganljiva resnična zgodba o univerzitetnem profesorju in njegovem psu, ki je ljudi naučil ljubezni in neomajne zvestobe.

Resnična zgodba o psu Hachiku, ki vsak dan spremlja svojega gospodarja do železniške postaje in ga po vrnitvi pričaka na istem mestu. Nekega dne se lastnik ne vrne več. Kljub temu bo Hachiko naslednjih devet let čakal na vrnitev svojega gospodarja.
hachi: a dog's tale_2009.opis_omdb: Commuting by train, music professor Parker Wilson finds an Akita puppy, whose cage broke unnoticed during shipping, leaving his destination unknown, and since the station can't care for it and the dog catcher warns even such cute ones may not be adopted in the two weeks allowed, he kindly takes it home. His bossy, jealous wife Cate initially makes Parker swear it won't stay, but by the time its' clear nobody will claim him and an adoption candidate is found, she agrees to keep the dog, who won over their daughter Andy and her fiance Michael at first sight. Parker's Japanese college friend Ken inspires naming the pup Hachi(ko), and is pleasantly surprised when Parker successfully tackles the challenge to get it to fetch, which Akitas don't usually do. Hachi makes a habit of waiting for his equally doting master at the station every evening, but after a cardiac crisis, Parker dies. Hachi refuses to accept this, being moved to Michael's home as Cate moves out, waiting for a master who can never come home again, by now collectively adopted by sympathizing town-folk. The story is told in flashbacks as class assignment 'my hero' by Michael's teen son Robbie, who also gets an Akita puppy.

one square mile_2014.opis_neo:
Nekdanji trener se odloči, da bo uril nadarjenega študenta. Toda tik pred najbolj pomembno tekmo njegovega življenja se zgodi tragedija.

Srednješolec Drew se trudi ubežati utesnjujočemu mestnemu okolju, ki grozi, da ga bo zadušilo. Ko je že videti brezupno, nekdanji trener opazi fantovo hitrost ter športno nadarjenost in ga sklene izuriti.
one square mile_2014.opis_omdb: A former track coach decides to train a student with natural athletic talent. Tragedy strikes, forcing the student to confront everything that has been holding him back.

two lovers_2008.opis_neo:
Depresiven samski moški je razpet med dvema ženskama, prijetno družinsko prijateljico, ki mu jo vsiljujejo starši, in divjo sosedo.

Karizmatični Leonard se po boleči razvezi vrne v rojstno mesto, kjer mu skušata zaskrbljena starša hitro najti novo ljubezen, zato ga predstavita prijazni in čuteči družinski prijateljici Sandri. Toda Leonard hkrati spozna tudi ekscentrično in zapeljivo novo sosedo Michelle.
two lovers_2008.opis_omdb: Leonard Kraditor is a burned-out case, living with his immigrant parents after his fiancée left him, helping out at their Brooklyn dry cleaners, taking photographs, at loose ends, suicidal. In quick succession, he meets two women: Sandra, the daughter of his parents' business associates, frank, direct, sensual, Jewish like Leonard; and, his neighbor Michelle, mercurial, rootless, fun, blond, unattainable. Michelle is in love with a married man and cries on Leonard's shoulder; Sandra wants to save him. Is Leonard willing to risk losing Sandra's fidelity for the moments Michelle's moods swing toward him? Can this end well?

wish man_2019.opis_neo:
Ko policist dečku izpolni zadnjo željo, se odloči stopiti na novo pot in pomagati, kjer le lahko.

Posneto po resnični zgodbi Franka Shankwitza, ustanovitelja sklada Zaželi si nekaj. Policist na motociklu s težko preteklostjo sreča smrtno bolnega dečka, ki ga ima kljub policistovim številnim hibam za junaka. To neverjetno prijateljstvo in preprosto dobro dejanje obema spremeni življenje. Ko policist dečku izpolni zadnjo željo, se odloči stopiti na novo pot in pomagati, kjer le lahko.
wish man_2019.opis_omdb: Frank Shankwitz, an Arizona motorcycle cop with a troubled past, survives a near-fatal accident during a high-speed pursuit. As part of Frank's rehabilitation, police chief Sgt. Eddie Newman asks him to spend time with a terminally ill little boy, Michael, whose dying wish is to be a Highway Patrol motorcycle officer. To Michael, Frank is his hero, and an unlikely friendship is born. The boy inspires Frank to follow a new path, which leads to the creation of the Make-A-Wish foundation.

monster family_2017.opis_neo:
V tej pustolovščini se družina zaplete v težave s pravimi pošastmi in s samim grofom Drakulo, ki Emmi izpove nesmrtno ljubezen.

Vesela pošastna družina je priredba istoimenske uspešnice z emmyjem nagrajenega pisatelja Davida Safierja ("Berlin, Berlin"), ki je prevedena v 18 jezikov in je izšla v več kot 40 državah. Družina Wishbone še zdaleč ne sodi med srečne družine. Mama Emma je lastnica zadolžene knjigarne. Oče Frank je hudo preobremenjen z delom in vsak dan trpi šefova poniževanja, hči Fay je samozavestna najstnica, prevzeta s prvo srednješolsko ljubeznijo, genija Maxa pa trpinčijo nasilneži. In tu še ni konec. Na maškaradi jih zlobna coprnica Jaga baba vse spremeni v pošasti! Ta pošastna družina zdaj po vsem svetu lovi coprnico, da bi odstranila urok. V tej pustolovščini pa se družina zaplete v težave s pravimi pošastmi in s samim grofom Drakulo, ki Emmi izpove nesmrtno ljubezen. V tem primeru je družinska pot do sreče prepredena s pastmi in ostrimi zavoji oziroma z ostrimi zobmi ...
monster family_2017.opis_omdb: Despite the title, the Wishbone family are far from happy. In an attempt to reconnect as a family, Mum Emma plan a fun night out. However, her plan backfires when an evil witch curses them, and they're all turned into Monsters.

big eyes_2014.opis_neo:
Biografska drama o slikarki Margaret Keane, ki se je v 60. letih na sodišču soočila z možem Walterjem, ker si je prisvojil njene umetnine.

Walter Keane je bil sredi 50-ih in v začetku 60-ih let prejšnjega stoletja eden najbolj priljubljenih slikarjev, znan po slikah, s katerih so žalostno gledali otroci z velikimi očmi. Najbrž ne bi nikoli izvedeli, da sploh ni bil avtor teh del, če se njegova soproga Margaret ne bi odločila javno spregovoriti o tem. Boj za dragocena dela in planetarno slavo je odkril veliko umazanih podrobnosti, ki jih je skrival njun na zunaj popoln zakon
big eyes_2014.opis_omdb: In San Francisco in the 1950s, Margaret was a woman trying to make it on her own after leaving her husband with only her daughter and her paintings. She meets gregarious ladies' man and fellow painter Walter Keane in a park while she was struggling to make an impact with her drawings of children with big eyes. The two quickly become a pair with outgoing Walter selling their paintings and quiet Margaret holed up at home painting even more children with big eyes. But Walter's actually selling her paintings as his own. A clash of financial success and critical failure soon sends Margaret reeling in her life of lies. With Walter still living the high life, Margaret's going to have to try making it on her own again and re-claiming her name and her paintings.

bombshell_2019.opis_neo:
Biografska drama o ženskah, ki so bile žrtve spolnega nadlegovanja izvršnega direktorja televizije Fox News Rogerja Ailesa.

Znane hollywoodske zvezdnice, dobitnici oskarja Nicole Kidman in Charlize Theron ter za oskarja nominirana Margot Robbie so glavni trio filma ONE SO BOMBE (Bombshell) – drami o zloglasnem slovesu glavnega obraza televizije Fox News in njegovih žrtvah. Roger Ailes je dolga leta brez posledic spolno napadal in nadlegoval ženske, ki so delale za Fox News. Po njihovih obtožbah za spolne napade jim je bilo za molk ponujeno veliko denarja. Vendar pa se je, kar se je začelo z molkom in tišino in nadaljevalo s šepeti kmalu razvilo v pravo bombo! Film One so bombe podrobno opisuje to morbidno resnično zgodbo in končen padec Rogerja Aliesa.
bombshell_2019.opis_omdb: When Gretchen Carlson slaps Fox News founder Roger Ailes with a lawsuit alleging sexual harassment, not a soul could predict what would happen next. Her decision leads to Fox News correspondent Megyn Kelly coming forward with her own story, as well as multiple other women, inciting a movement that reverberates around the world.

lion_2016.opis_neo:
Po petindvajsetih letih skuša moški z aplikacijo Google Earth poiskati svojo izgubljeno družino.

Drama Lev: Dolga pot domov režiserja Gartha Davisa je posneta po resnični zgodbi in knjigi Sarooja Brierleyja A Long Way Home. Petletni indijski deček se izgubi na ulicah Kalkute, tisoče kilometrov od doma. Preden ga posvoji par iz Avstralije, doživi marsikaj hudega. Petindvajset let pozneje skuša z aplikacijo Google Earth poiskati svojo izgubljeno družino.
lion_2016.opis_omdb: In 1986, Saroo was a five-year-old child in India of a poor but happy rural family. On a trip with his brother, Saroo soon finds himself alone and trapped in a moving decommissioned passenger train that takes him to Calcutta, 1000 miles away from home. Now totally lost in an alien urban environment and too young to identify either himself or his home to the authorities, Saroo struggles to survive as a street child until he is sent to an orphanage. Soon, Saroo is selected to be adopted by the Brierley family in Tasmania, where he grows up in a loving, prosperous home. However, for all his material good fortune, Saroo finds himself plagued by his memories of his lost family in his adulthood and tries to search for them even as his guilt drives him to hide this quest from his adoptive parents and his girlfriend. Only when he has an epiphany does he realize not only the answers he needs, but also the steadfast love that he has always had with all his loved ones in both worlds.

supercon_2018.opis_neo:
Še en konec tedna, še ena konvencija ljubiteljev stripov za nekdanjega TV igralca Keitha Mahara.

Še en konec tedna, še ena konvencija ljubiteljev stripov za nekdanjega TV igralca Keitha Mahara. Ta teden konvencijo vodi zahrbtni Gil Burkhaulter. Keith ima že tako grozen dan, teden, leto … In še huje je, ko pride na sprejem in ga večina obiskovalcev sploh ne pozna, čeprav je bil v 80-ih zvezdnik znane serije. Keith se nerado pridruži prijateljem Mattu Wheelerju, Allison McNealy in Brocku Hutchinsonu, ki so prav tako na konvenciji, a se zadeve še poslabšajo, ko jih Adam King vrže s konvencije. Se bodo maščevali?
supercon_2018.opis_omdb: A rag-tag group of former TV stars and comic book artists, who make their living working at conventions, decide to steal the loot from a crooked promoter and an overbearing former TV icon.

adult world_2013.opis_neo:
Amy mora živeti pri starših in sprejeti edino delo, ki ga lahko dobi - v trgovini, ki prodaja knjige in filme za odrasle.

Amy želi postati priznana pesnica, a mora zaradi študentskega kredita živeti pri starših ter sprejeti edino delo, ki ga lahko dobi - v trgovini, ki ponuja filme za odrasle. Med sanjarjenjem o pisanju poezije nadleguje težavnega pisatelja Rata, ki bi ga rada za mentorja, nad čimer pa samotarski pisatelj ni navdušen.
adult world_2013.opis_omdb: A naive college graduate, Amy, who believes she's destined to be a great poet, begrudgingly accepts a job in a shop while she pursues a mentorship with reclusive writer Rat Billings.

les enfants de timpelbach_2008.opis_neo:
Otroci iz majhne evropske gorske vasice postanejo njeni edini prebivalci, ko odrasli ne morejo več prenašati njihovega obnašanja.

Dobrodošli v Timpelbach, majhno mirno vasico. No, niti ne tako mirno. Ja, otroci že nekaj tednov kujejo potegavščine za druge otroke, večinoma pa se lotijo staršev. Razdraženi se odločijo zapustiti vas za en dan, kakor naivno mislijo. Toda nič ne gre po načrtih. Ob vrnitvi jih ujamejo vojaki. V Timpelbachu novica o vasi brez staršev razveseli Oskarja in njegovo tolpo! Toda ne toliko kot hudičke, ki se odločijo stopiti na stran Manfreda in Marianne in prevzeti vas v svoje roke.
les enfants de timpelbach_2008.opis_omdb: Welcome to Timpelbach, a small, serene village. Well, not really that serene... Indeed, for several weeks, the children have been playing multiple practical jokes and nasty tricks. The victims are, of course, other children... but also, and most of all, the parents. Overwrought, they decide to leave the village for what they think will only be one day. But nothing happens as planned: on the way back, they are taken prisoner by a group of soldiers. In Timpelbach, the news of a village without parents makes Oscar and his gang of thugs happy! But that isn't the case of a few daredevils who decide to side with Manfred and Marianne to regain control of the village.

monster family 2_2021.opis_neo:
Da bi rešili Jago babo in Renfielda iz krempljev Lovca, se člani družine ponovno spremenijo v vampirja, Frankensteinovo pošast, mumijo in volkodlaka.

Skupaj s svojimi tremi hišnimi ljubljenčki Wishbonovi ponovno potujejo po svetu, da bi rešili svoje prijatelje, navezali nova poznanstva s pošastmi in končno spoznali, da nihče ni popoln in da lahko tudi tisti z napakami najdejo srečo
monster family 2_2021.opis_omdb: To free Baba Yaga and Renfield from the clutches of Monster Hunter Mila Starr, the Wishbone Family once more transforms into a Vampire, Frankenstein's Monster, a Mummy and a Werewolf. Aided and abetted by their three pet bats, our Monster Family zooms around the world again to save their friends, make new monstrous acquaintances and finally come to the realization that 'Nobody's Perfect' - even those with flaws can find happiness.

room_2015.opis_neo:
Deček od rojstva živi v ujetništvu skupaj s svojo mamo in zunanjega sveta sploh ne pozna. Jima bo kdaj uspelo pobegniti?

Mama dneve posveča temu, da bi bil sin Jack srečen, kljub temu, da je njuno življenje daleč od običajnega, saj sta zaprta v prostoru brez oken, velikem le 9 kvadratnih metrov, ki mu Mama pravi 'Soba'. Jackova radovednost o njunem položaju je vse večja in ko pride Mamina vzdržljivost do skrajne meje, se spustita v beg proti svobodi.
room_2015.opis_omdb: ROOM tells the extraordinary story of Jack, a spirited 5-year-old who is looked after by his loving and devoted mother. Like any good mother, Ma dedicates herself to keeping Jack happy and safe, nurturing him with warmth and love and doing typical things like playing games and telling stories. Their life, however, is anything but typical--they are trapped--confined to a 10-by-10-foot space that Ma has euphemistically named Room. Ma has created a whole universe for Jack within Room, and she will stop at nothing to ensure that, even in this treacherous environment, Jack is able to live a complete and fulfilling life. But as Jack's curiosity about their situation grows, and Ma's resilience reaches its breaking point, they enact a risky plan to escape, ultimately bringing them face-to-face with what may turn out to be the scariest thing yet: the real world.

shorta_2020.opis_neo:
Jens in Mike, dva policista na rutinski patrulji, se znajdeta v labirintu zgradb, ko se širijo nemiri.

Policijska uslužbenca Jens in Mike sta v rutinski patrulji v getu Svalegardena, ko slišita prek radia novico o Talibovi smrti, ki podžge nenadzorovani bes med mladimi v getu, ki so željni maščevanja. Policistom priporočajo, naj se izogibajo področju, ker lahko njihova navzočnost poslabša že tako nestabilno situacijo. Kljub Jensovemu protestu se Mike odloči prezreti ukaze in ju odpelje do Svalegardena.
shorta_2020.opis_omdb: The exact details of what took place while Talib Ben Hassi (19) was in police custody remain unclear. Police officers, Jens and Mike, are on routine patrol in Svalegården's ghetto when news of Talib's death comes in over the radio, igniting uncontrollable, pent-up rage in the ghetto's youth, who lust for revenge. Suddenly, the two officers find themselves fair game and must fight tooth and claw to find a way out.

l'étudiante et monsieur henri_2015.opis_neo:
Ostareli moški neki študentki odda sobo v svojem stanovanju pod pogojem, da naredi vse, da uniči zakon njegovega sina.

Starejši zlovoljnež mladi študentki brezplačno izda sobo v svojem velikem stanovanju pod pogojem, v zameno pa mora ona za vsako ceno razdreti zakon njegovega sina.
l'étudiante et monsieur henri_2015.opis_omdb: An elderly curmudgeon lets out a room in his large apartment rent-free to a young student - on condition that she does everything in her power to ruin his son's marriage.

ainbo: spirit of the amazon_2021.opis_neo:
Epsko potovanje mlade junakinje Ainbo, ljubkega in duhovitega pasavca ter prismuknjenega tapirja, ki rešujejo njihov dom v amazonskem deževnem gozdu.

Ainbo je zgodba o deklici, ki se je rodila in odrasla v najgloblji džungli Amazonke v vasi Kolonia. Nekega dne ugotovi, da je njega dežela ogrožena in dojame, da so na svetu tudi drugi ljudje, razen njenega plemena. S pomočjo svojih duhovnih vodnikov se odpravi na pot ter prosi za pomoč najmogočnejšo Mater Amazonke, želvo "mamo Motelo". Z njenimi nasveti je Ainbo odločena rešiti Amazonko, svoj raj, pred pohlepom in prekomerno sečnjo dreves ter nezakonitim izkopavanjem, da bi rešila svoje ljudstvo, preden bo prepozno.
ainbo: spirit of the amazon_2021.opis_omdb: In the spirit of Moana and Frozen, 'Ainbo - Spirit of the Amazon' is the epic journey of a young hero and her Spirit Guides, "Dillo" a cute and humorous armadillo and "Vaca" a goofy oversized tapir, who embark on a quest to save their home in the spectacular Amazon Rainforest.

hellboy: the crooked man_2024.opis_neo:
Potopite se v mračni svet raziskovanja paranormalnega z mlajšim Hellboyem leta 1955.

Potopite se v mračni svet raziskovanja paranormalnega z mlajšim Hellboyem leta 1955. Hellboy (Jack Kesy) se pridruži raziskovalki Bobbie Jo Song pri transportu nevarnega pajka. Ko ta pobegne, ju lov pripelje skozi Apalaško gorovje do Toma Ferrella (Jefferson White), vešča, ki želi popraviti svoje grehe. Srečajo Tomovo bivše dekle in se soočijo z zloveščimi silami, ki grozijo njeni duši.
hellboy: the crooked man_2024.opis_omdb: Hellboy and a rookie B.P.R.D. agent in the 1950s are sent to the Appalachians, where they discover a remote community dominated by witches and led by the sinister local demon, the Crooked Man.

wonder_2017.opis_neo:
Auggie Pullman, 10-letnik, rojen z obsežno deformacijo obraza, gre prvič v šolo.

Desetletni Auggie se je rodil z iznakaženim obrazom in glavo. Po 28 operacijah, zaradi katerih ni mogel hoditi v šolo, ga pri desetih letih starša vpišeta v peti razred. Auggie se v šolo odpravi s strahom, da bi postal tarča norčevanja sošolcev. Tako on kot drugi začnejo odkrivati, da se ni potrebno zliti z okolico, če si rojen da izstopaš.
wonder_2017.opis_omdb: Based on the New York Times bestseller, WONDER tells the incredibly inspiring and heartwarming story of August Pullman. Born with facial differences that, up until now, have prevented him from going to a mainstream school, Auggie becomes the most unlikely of heroes when he enters the local fifth grade. As his family, his new classmates, and the larger community all struggle to discover their compassion and acceptance, Auggie's extraordinary journey will unite them all and prove you can't blend in when you were born to stand out.

st. vincent_2014.opis_neo:
Deček po ločitvi staršev najde nenavadnega prijatelja v ostarelem vojnem veteranu, ki živi v sosednji hiši.

Deček Oliver se z materjo preseli v novo hišo, tik ob domovanju nekdanjega vojnega veterana St. Vincenta de Van Nuysa. Kljub razliki v letih se nenavadna soseda spoprijateljita in postaneta trn v peti vsej soseski. Še posebej, ko se začne z njima družiti še jezikava vzhodnoevropska striptizeta.
st. vincent_2014.opis_omdb: Vincent is an old Vietnam vet whose stubbornly hedonistic ways have left him without money or a future. Things change when his new next-door neighbor's son, Oliver, needs a babysitter and Vince is willing enough for a fee. From that self-serving act, an unexpected friendship forms as Vincent and Oliver fulfill much of each other's needs. As Vincent mentors Oliver in street survival and other worldly ways, Oliver begins to see more in the old man than just his foibles. When life takes a turn for the worse for Vincent, both find the best in each other, while no one around them suspects.

grand isle_2019.opis_neo:
Nekdanji marinec Walter (Nicholas Cage), ki s svojo soprogo živi v viktorijanski hiši na tihem otoku v Louisiani, rad hitro pritisne na petelina.

Nekdanji marinec Walter rad pritisne na petelina. Ko ga sredi noči prebudi vsiljivec, ga Walter takoj ustreli, pri tem pa poškoduje ograjo. Najame Buddyja, da mu jo popravi. Ko mu ponudi nekaj, česar ne more zavrniti, se večer zaključi s pohlepom, nasiljem in neverjetnim odkritjem, ki Walterja privedejo do tega, da mladeniču naprti umor.
grand isle_2019.opis_omdb: A young father is charged with murder and must prove his innocence by recalling a very twisted and dark night of events.

friends with kids_2011.opis_neo:
Drzna in neizprosna komedija o krogu dobrih prijateljev, ki jim ustvarjanje družine in prihod otrok spremeni življenje.

Dolgoletna prijatelja Jason in Julie nikoli nista vzpostavila ljubezenskih čustev, vendar se kljub temu odločita, da bosta imela otroka, za katerega bi skupaj skrbela, brez medsebojne romantične navezanosti.
friends with kids_2011.opis_omdb: Julie and Jason have been best friends for years with no romantic interest in each other. He sleeps with someone new every few days, and she's looking for Mr. Right. Now in their thirties, they notice that their friends seem to lose all their good qualities when they have children - child rearing and the spark of Eros don't seem to co-exist. So, they decide to have a child together, share in child rearing, but pursue their own romantic lives. Things go well until he meets Mary Jane and she meets Kurt. Both seem like perfect mates. What could go wrong?

eyjafjallajökull_2013.opis_neo:
Drugi film Alexandra Coffreja spremlja nekdanja zakonca Valerie in Alaina, ki se ne prebavljata, na skupnem potovanju na poroko njune hčere.

Nekdanja zakonca Valerie in Alain ne zmoreta skriti medsebojnega sovraštva, a sreča njune hčerke, ki se pripravlja na poroko v Grčiji, je na prvem mestu. Ko po izbruhu islandskega vulkana Eyjafjallajökull odpovejo vse polete, sta ločenca primorana v Grčijo odpotovati skupaj. Stare zamere pa njuno pot hitro spremenijo v pustolovščino, polno pod kolena zmetanih polen.
eyjafjallajökull_2013.opis_omdb: For travelers around the world, the eruption of the Icelandic volcano Eyjafjallajökull is a downer. For Alain and Valerie, it's a catastrophe. For if they are to make it in time to the tiny Greek village where their daughter's wedding is taking place, the two divorcees have to swallow their pathological hatred for each other and hit the road together.

early man - dubbed_2018.opis_neo:
Prazgodovinska animirana pustolovščina spremlja jamskega človeka, ki skuša združiti svoje pleme v boju proti močnim sovražnikom.

Zabavna prazgodovinska pustolovščina se dogaja v času, ko so zemlji gospodarile nevarne zveri in kosmati mamuti, ter spremlja jamskega človeka Dolgega, ki skuša skupaj s svojim najboljšim prijateljem, divjim prašičem Pujsom,  združiti pleme v boju proti nasprotnikom, na nogometni tekmi, ki bo predstavljala spopad dveh civilizacij.
early man - dubbed_2018.opis_omdb: An asteroid collides with the prehistoric Earth, causing the extinction of the planet's dinosaurs, but sparing a tribe of cavemen living near the impact site. Finding a roughly spherical chunk of the asteroid that is too hot to touch, the cavemen begin to kick it around and invent the game of football. Many years later during the Stone Age, a young caveman named Dug (Eddie Redmayne) lives in the village with the chief Bobnar (Timothy Spall) and many other cavemen such as Asbo, (Johnny Vegas), Gravelle (Gina Yashere), Treebor (Richard Ayoade), Magma (Selina Griffiths), Barry (Mark Williams), Grubup (Richard Webber), Thongo (Simon Greenall) and Eemak (Simon Greenall). One day, Dug suggests to Bobnar that they should try hunting woolly mammoths instead of rabbits, but Bobnar brushes him off..

origin_2023.opis_neo:
Med raziskovanjem fenomena kast in njihovega mračnega vpliva na družbo se novinarka sooča z osebno izgubo ter odkriva lepoto človeške vzdržljivosti.

Med raziskovanjem globalnega fenomena kast in njihovega mračnega vpliva na družbo se novinarka sooča z osebno izgubo ter odkriva lepoto človeške vzdržljivosti. Odkrije lepoto in človečnost ljudi, ki so izkusili hudo bolečino, a tudi radost in ki niso klonili pred trpljenjem, ki so ga kaste prinesle svetu, od umorov, nacizma in barbarskega zasužnjevanja Afričanov.
origin_2023.opis_omdb: The unspoken system that has shaped America and chronicles how lives today are defined by a hierarchy of human divisions.

the way back_2010.opis_neo:
Leta 1939 poljskega vojaka Janusza Sovjeti obtožijo vohunstva, a on ne prizna krivde. Zato ga pošljejo v gulag.

Ob pomoči nočne snežne nevihte sedem zapornikov, prijetih med Stalinovo vladavino terorja, leta 1940 zbeži iz Gulaga. Zdaj so svobodni, vendar je pokrajina, ki jo morajo prehoditi do zaklonišča, neusmiljena.
the way back_2010.opis_omdb: In 1939, three men attempt to flee communist Russia, escaping a Siberian gulag. This movie tells their story and that of four others who escaped with them and a teenage girl, Irena Zielinska, who joins them in flight. The group's natural leader is Janusz Weiszczek, a Pole condemned by accusations secured by torturing his wife, spent much of his youth outdoors, and knows how to live in the wild. They escape under cover of a snowstorm: cynical American Mr. Smith, Russian thug Valka, comedic accountant Zoran, pastry chef Tomasz Horodinsky, who draws, Priest Andrejs Voss, and Polish Kazik, who suffers from night blindness. They face freezing nights, lack of food and water, mosquitoes, an endless desert, the Himalayas, as well as many moral and ethical dilemmas throughout the journey towards freedom.

arcadian_2024.opis_neo:
Zgodba bližnje prihodnosti, kjer je človeštvo skoraj uničeno.

Postapokaliptična grozljivka z Nicholasom Cageom v glavni vlogi. Zgodba bližnje prihodnosti, kjer je človeštvo skoraj uničeno. Oče s sinovoma živi podnevi mirno, ponoči pa skrajno travmatično, saj jih napadajo skrivnostni nasilni stvori. Ko se nekega dne sin ne vrne pred nočjo domov, se mora oče odpraviti v nevarnost. Sledi neusmiljen boj s časom, ki družino prisili v skrajni načrt za preživetje.
arcadian_2024.opis_omdb: A father and his twin teenage sons fight to survive in a remote farmhouse at the end of the world.

how to deter a robber_2020.opis_neo:
V zapuščenem mestu na severu Wisconsina se trmasta mlada ženska in njen naivni fant soočita z dvojico amaterskih vlomilcev.

Ob vrsti nesrečnih naključij zamaskirana roparja ujameta in zvežeta maturantko Madison Williams in njenega fanta. Toda pasti, ki sta jih postavila okoli hiše, da bi pregnale možne vsiljivce, samo poslabšajo situacijo.
how to deter a robber_2020.opis_omdb: In a desolate town in Northern Wisconsin, a stubborn young woman and her naïve boyfriend face off against a pair of amateur burglars.

attack of the unknown_2020.opis_neo:
Medtem ko svet okoli njih goltajo plameni, se moštvo specialcev, ki prevaža zlega šefa zločinskega organizacije, znajde ujeta v okrožnem priporu.

Medtem, ko svet okoli njih goltajo plameni, se moštvo specialcev, ki prevaža zlega šefa zločinskega organizacije, znajde ujeta v okrožnem priporu.
attack of the unknown_2020.opis_omdb: Throughout history there have been cases of entire cities disappearing overnight, but no one really knows why. It's happened throughout the world, as recently as one-hundred years ago in the United States, and it's also going to happen tonight. LOS ANGELES: a SWAT team transporting a high profile inmate find themselves trapped inside a county detention center as the world burns around them. They have no communication with the outside world, no radios, no television, and no working vehicles. Together they must put aside their differences and band together to escape the mysterious alien forces that are tracking them.

not forgotten_2009.opis_neo:
Vdovec Jack Bishop je priljubljen trener dekliškega šolskega nogometnega moštva.

V tej napeti srhljivki ima vsakdo svoje skrivnosti in prav nič ni, kot se zdi. Jack Bishop ima domala idealno življenje v Del Riu: stabilno službo, prekrasno soprogo in 12-letno hčerkico Toby, ki igra v nogometnem moštvu - tega po službi uri kar on. Nekoč po dolgem dnevu Jack zamudi na trening in vidi, da Toby sploh ni. Zjutraj sta se sporekla, in prepričan je, da se mu zgolj skriva. A ko najde njene reči, gre na policijo, kjer sprožijo preiskavo. Ker ni nobenih sledi, se zdi nemogoče, da jo bodo sploh našli. Mestna policija in FBI očitno nista dorasla nalogi, zato predani očka je primor zadeve vzeti v svoje roke …
not forgotten_2009.opis_omdb: Set in a Tex-Mex border town, Not Forgotten is a classic psychological thriller about Jack and Amaya Bishop, a couple who must come to terms with their tortured pasts in order to save their kidnapped daughter. It is a tale taut with intrigue and steeped in Latino mysticism, where the line between what's real and what's imagined becomes hopelessly blurred.

the good doctor_2011.opis_neo:
Zdravniški novinec dr. Blake (Orlando Bloom) se sooča z osamljenostjo, pomanjkanjem samozavesti in večnimi konflikti z vodjo medicinskih sester.

Martin Blake je ambiciozen, mlad zdravnik, ki si prizadeva narediti vtis na nadrejene in kolege. Ko v bolnišnico sprejmejo 18-letno Diane, se ji Martin neumorno posveča in njegova samozavest dobi zagon. Dogodki pa postajajo vse bolj mračni, ko zdravnikova zagnanost postane njegova obsedenost.
the good doctor_2011.opis_omdb: Dr. Martin Blake, who has spent his life looking for respect, meets an 18-year-old patient named Diane, suffering from a kidney infection, and gets a much-needed boost of self-esteem. However, when her health starts improving, Martin fears losing her, so he begins tampering with her treatment, keeping Diane sick and in the hospital right next to him.

little murder_2011.opis_neo:
Majhen umor je izvirna zgodba o nadnaravnem, postavljena v New Orleans po orkanu Katrina.

Mesto pretresa vrsta srhljivih umorov, kjer morilec obleče žrtve v karnevalske maske, nato pa jih brutalno zadavi. Spremljanje dežurnega osumljenca Hammermana (Terrence Howard) je zadnja priložnost za težavnega detektiva Bena Chaneyja (Josh Lucas), da zamenja pijančevanje in izgubo časa z nečim koristnim in obdrži službo. Hammerman ve, da ga nadzorujejo iz zapuščene hiše čez cesto in celo naveže stik z Benom, toda dogajanje se nepričakovano zaplete, ko se Ben sreča z bitjem iz onostranstva, ki pa mu da nov smisel.
little murder_2011.opis_omdb: In post-Katrina New Orleans, a disgraced detective encounters the ghost of a murdered woman who wants to help him identify her killer.

1917_2019.opis_neo:
Sam Mendes, z oskarjem nagrajeni režiser uspešnice Skyfall in Lepota po ameriško, prinaša svojo edinstveno vizijo z epom prve svetovne vojne - 1917.

Sam Mendes, z oskarjem nagrajeni režiser uspešnice Skyfall in Lepota po ameriško, prinaša svojo edinstveno vizijo z epom prve svetovne vojne - 1917. Na vrhuncu prve svetovne vojne je dvema britanskima vojakoma, Schofieldu in Blakeu, podana nemogoča misija - v tekmi s časom morata prečkati sovražnikovo ozemlje in prenesti sporočilo, ki bi lahko ustavilo smrtonosni napad na stotine vojakov, med katerimi je tudi Blakejev lastni brat.

homefront_2013.opis_neo:
Triler o nekdanjem agentu, ki se s hčerko preseli v mirno mestece, kjer se zaplete v spor z lokalnim proizvajalcem metamfetaminov.

Nekdanji agent Phil se v iskanju mirnega življenja s hčerko preseli na podeželje. Mladenka se je šoli prisiljena soočiti z nasilneži, kar Philu na glavo nakoplje zamero lokalnega kriminalca. Ta odkrije njegovo resnično identiteto in nanj naščuva stare sovražnike.
homefront_2013.opis_omdb: Phil Broker is a former DEA agent who has gone through a crisis after his actions against a biker gang went horribly wrong ,and it cost the life of his boss's son. He is recently widowed and is left with a 9 year old daughter, Maddy. He decides to quit the turbulent and demanding life of the DEA for Maddy's sake and retires to a small town. His daughter fights off a boy who is bullying her at school, and this sets in motion a round of events that end in his direct confrontation with the local Meth drug lord. His past with the biker gang also enters the arena, making matters more complex. But he has a mission in his mind to protect his daughter, and he is ready to pay any cost that it demands.

gringo_2018.opis_neo:
Vljudni ameriški poslovnež zaradi preobrata v življenju naenkrat postane zločinec.

Harold je nedavno poročen, omikan poslovnež, z deležem v farmacevtskem podjetju, ki načrtuje vstop na borzo. Ko se mu življenje zaradi incidenta v Mehiki spremeni v pekel, Harold naenkrat postane zločinec, na milost in nemilost prepuščen zahrbtnim kolegom doma, lokalnim mamilarskim šefom in tajnemu plačancu, medtem, ko se trudi le ostati živ.
gringo_2018.opis_omdb: An exhilarating mix of dark comedy, white-knuckle action and dramatic intrigue, Gringo joyrides into Mexico, where mild-mannered businessman Harold Soyinka (David Oyelowo) finds himself at the mercy of his back-stabbing business colleagues back home, local drug lords and a morally conflicted black-ops mercenary. Crossing the line from law-abiding citizen to wanted criminal, Harold battles to survive his increasingly dangerous situation in ways that raise the question: Is he out of his depth - or two steps ahead?

conan the barbarian_2011.opis_neo:
Kar se začne kot osebno maščevanje, se za neustrašnega kimerijskega bojevnika spremeni v epski boj zoper pošastne nasprotnike.

V priredbi kultnega filma iz leta 1982, se Konan po umoru svojega očeta in plemena odpravi na maščevalno misijo. Osebno maščevanje divjega bojevnika se kmalu spremeni v epski boj proti jeznim nasprotnikom, strašnim pošastim in drugim mitološkim bitjem, Konan pa dojame, da je on sam edino upanje za rešitev ljudstev Hiborije, pred grozečo vladavino nadnaravnega zla.
conan the barbarian_2011.opis_omdb: Many years ago, sorcerers crafted the Mask of Acheron and dark forces of Acheron conquered the world. However, the barbarians vanquished Acheron warriors and broke the Mask into pieces and divided among the tribes. The barbarian Cimmerian village of chief Corin is attacked by the evil warlord Khalar Zym that wants the last piece of bone of the Mask of Acheron to resurrect his wife. When his witch daughter Marique finds the hidden piece, he slaughters the villagers and the Corin's son Conan is the only survivor. Conan swears revenge against Khalar Zym. Years later, the warrior Conan is a pirate and he decides to release slaves from a field. When he is celebrating in a tavern with his friends, he sees a thief being chased by a guard and Conan recognizes him as Lucius, the Khalar Zym's soldier that he cut the nose out. Conan let the guards capture him and once in the prison, he forces Lucius to tell him where Khalar Zym is. Meanwhile Khalar Zym attacks a monastery where Marique believes that a pure-blood descent of Acheron lives. But the monk sent the descent Tamara back to her homeland. She is chased by Khalar Zym's soldiers, but Conan saves her. Now Conan intends to use Tamara to reach the evil Khalar Zym. Will he succeed in his intent?

the family_2013.opis_neo:
V akcijski komediji bomo spoznali zgodbo tipične ameriške mafijske družine, ki se znajde na razpotju življenja.

Robert De Niro, Michelle Pfeiffer in Tommy Lee Jones v akcijski komični kriminalki Luca Bessona o mafijski družini, ki se v okviru programa za zaščito prič preseli na francosko podeželje.
the family_2013.opis_omdb: A mafia boss and his family are relocated to a sleepy town in France under the witness protection program after snitching on the mob. Despite the best efforts of FBI Agent Stansfield (Tommy Lee Jones) to keep them in line, Fred Manzoni (Robert De Niro), his wife Maggie (Michelle Pfeiffer) and their children Belle (Dianna Agron) and Warren (John D'Leo) can't help but revert to old habits and blow their cover by handling their problems the "family" way, enabling their former mafia cronies to track them down. Chaos ensues as old scores are settled in the unlikeliest of settings.

patriots day_2016.opis_neo:
Akcijsko-dramatičnem trilerju o bombnem napadu na bostonski maraton, ki je leta 2013 na praznik domoljubov pretresel Američane.

Zgodba spremlja resnične dogodke, ki so se zgodili 15. aprila 2013, v času Bostonskega maratona, ko sta v bližini cilja eksplodirali 2 bombi. Bostonski policijski načelnik Ed Davis je odigral ključno vlogo v iskanju bratov Tsarnaev, krivcev za napad, v katerem je umrlo pet oseb, ranjenih pa je bilo več kot 260.
patriots day_2016.opis_omdb: On April 15, 2013 Boston, Massachusetts, Police Sgt, Tommy Saunders is pulling security duty on the annual Boston Marathon when the Tsarnaev brothers strike with their homemade bombs in an act of terrorism. In the resulting chaos as the wounded are cared for, Saunders and his comrades join forces with the FBI to get to the bottom of this attack. As the investigation continues, the Tsarnaev brothers realize that the authorities are close to identifying them and attempt to flee the city to continue their fanatical mayhem. To stop them, a police manhunt is performed that would have bloody confrontations and a massive dragnet shutting down the City of Boston to make sure there is no escape from the law.

hardcore henry_2015.opis_neo:
Vso srečo, Henry. Potreboval jo boš…

Ime ti je Henry. Streljali so nate in ti ugrabili ženo. Ugrabitelj Akan je mogočen nasprotnik z vojsko plačancev in peklenskim načrtom, da si podredi vse okoli sebe. Vsi te skušajo ubiti, razen skrivnostnega Jimmyja. Verjetno je na tvoji strani... prepričan pa nisi. Če zmoreš preživeti to norost, morda odkriješ resnico o svoji identiteti.
hardcore henry_2015.opis_omdb: Waking inside a laboratory on an airship, a man recalls bullies from his childhood. A scientist, Estelle, greets him and tells him his name is Henry, she is his wife, and that he has been revived from an accident that left him amnesiac and mute. After she replaces a missing arm and leg with cybernetic prostheses, mercenaries led by the psychokinetic Akan raid the ship, claiming all of Estelle's research is Akan's corporate property. He kills Estelle's scientists before attempting to murder Henry, but Henry and Estelle flee in an escape pod, landing in Moscow. Estelle is abducted by the mercenaries, who try to kill Henry..

end of watch_2012.opis_neo:
Mlada policista Taylor (Jake Gyllenhaal) in Zavala (Michael Pena) patruljirata po nevarnih ulicah Los Angelesa.

Mlada policista Taylor in Zavala patruljirata po nevarnih ulicah Los Angelesa. Med rutinskim pregledom vozila zaplenita članu zloglasnega kartela denar in orožje. Med nadaljnjo preiskavo pa postaneta policista tarči kartela, ki ju želi odstraniti.
end of watch_2012.opis_omdb: In South Central Los Angeles, street cops Brian and Mike are partners - balls-out cowboys patrolling the streets as Latino gangs are in a power struggle with Blacks. Brian and Mike get lucky a couple of times, making big drug and human-trafficking busts, so a Mexican cartel orders their deaths. We meet Mike's pregnant wife (whom he married out of high school) and watch Brian's search for a soul mate. There are internal squabbles within the ranks of the LAPD and lots of squad-car conversation. Can the lads escape the cartel's murderous reach?

black eagle_1988.opis_neo:
F-100, iz ameriških zračnih sil, z najbolj moderno oborožitvijo, ima nesrečo in pade v morje blizu Malte. Tam pa je prisotna tudi sovjetska vojska.

Na vrhuncu hladne vojne v vode blizu Malte – na območju, ki ga nadzorujejo sovjetske sile - pade ponos ameriškega letalstva, moderno letalo, opremljeno z laserskim vodenjem. CIA nemudoma pošlje svojega najboljšega agenta Kena Tanija (Sho Kosugi), ki naj bi preprečil, da tehnološko čudo pade v pest sovražniku. A da ne bo šlo vse kot po maslu, poskrbi agent KGB Andrei (Jean-Claude Van Damme).
black eagle_1988.opis_omdb: One of the US Air Force's most modern tactical aircraft, an F-111 Aardvark with a new laser guidance system, crashes into the sea near Malta - a region where the Soviet forces are highly present, too. The CIA immediately sends out their best secret agent, Ken Tami, to salvage the system before it falls into enemy hands. To ensure his loyalty, they bring his two young sons to a nearby hotel on the island. Ken Tami's tough opponent is KGB agent Andrei.

get the gringo_2012.opis_neo:
Gangster Driver na begu pred ameriško obmejno patruljo v vozilu dirja do mejne ograde, se dobesedno prebije v Mehiko in konča v zaporu.

Mel Gibson je ameriški gangster Driver, ki na begu pred ameriško obmejno patruljo v vozilu dirja do mejne ograde in se dobesedno prebije v Mehiko. Trčenje preživi, a se takoj znajde v mehiškem zaporu El Pueblito ...
get the gringo_2012.opis_omdb: On his way the dusty Mexican border with a loot of over $2 million hidden in the boot of his car, a getaway driver ends up in the infamous "El Pueblito" prison. As the only American inmate in the dangerous village of convicts, the driver quickly gets the nickname "The Gringo", and finds out firsthand how rough it is to be a stranger in a world of criminals. To stay alive in this pit where everyone knows about the grand prize, the Gringo will have to form a reluctant pact with an unlikely ally: a streetwise ten-year-old kid with a peculiar immunity in this mad place. Now, with a huge target on his head and knowing that his time is short, will the Gringo manage to save himself, and get the money?

doors_2021.opis_neo:
Brez pojasnila ali opozorila, se v vsakem kotičku Zemlje pojavijo skrivnostna zunajzemeljska 'vrata'.

Brez pojasnila ali opozorila, se v vsakem kotičku Zemlje pojavijo skrivnostna zunajzemeljska 'vrata'. Medtem ko so mnogi, ki so prišli v njihovo bližino, čutili čudno potrebo stopiti skoznje in jih niso videli nikoli več, so drugi videli grozečo nevarnost tistega, kar bi lahko prišlo skozi. Ko se človeštvo privaja življenju v senci zunajzemeljskih prehodov, vlada zbira prostovoljce, dovolj pogumne za prehod na drugo stran, da bi izvedeli več o njihovem izvoru ali namenu. A niti prostovoljci niso pripravljeni na tisto za vrati.
doors_2021.reziser: Saman Kesh, Jeff Desom, Dugan O'Neal
doors_2021.opis_omdb: Without warning, millions of mysterious alien "doors" suddenly appear around the globe. In a rush to determine the reason for their arrival, mankind must work together to understand the purpose of these cosmic anomalies. Bizarre incidences occurring around the sentient doors leads humanity to question their own existence and an altered reality as they attempt to enter them.

rare exports_2010.opis_neo:
V globinah gora Korvatunturi je globoko zakopana največja skrivnost božiča. Čas je, da pride na plan.

Teden dni pred božičem mladi pustolovec Pietari odkrije resnico o Dedku Mrazu: po legendi je veseli starček prej sovražnik kot prijatelj. Skupina ameriških znanstvenikov skuša odkriti nekaj dejstev v Pietarijevem tihem podeželskem mestecu na severu Finske. Izkaže se, da najbolj varovana skrivnost o božiču leži 500 metrov pod zemljo. Ta temačna skrivnost in Pietari sprožita neverjetne dogodke, po katerih božič nikoli več ne bo, kar je bil. Film ima vse sestavine popolnega božičnega kultnega filma, na kakršnega smo od nekdaj čakali: dovršen koncept, sijajne podobe, odlične igralce ter zgodbo, ki vsebuje črno komedijo in večplastno sporočilo.
rare exports_2010.opis_omdb: On Christmas Eve in Finland, Santa Claus is unearthed in an archaeological dig. Soon after, children start disappearing, leading a boy and his father to capture Santa and, with the help of fellow hunters, they look to sell him back to the corporation that sponsored the dig. And then there's Santa's elves, who are determined to free their leader...

the son of bigfoot - dubbed_2017.opis_neo:
Trinajstletni Adam se odpravi iskat davno izgubljenega očeta. Kmalu odkrije, da je njegov oče nič več in nič manj kot legendarni Bigfoot.

Trinajstletni Adam se odloči poiskati svojega davno izgubljenega očeta. Kmalu odkrije, da je oče v resnici legendarni Bigfoot, ki se že leta skriva globoko v gozdu, da bi zaščitil sebe in svojo družino pred korporacijo, ki želi raziskati njegov DNK. Med druženjem z očetom, Adam počasi odkriva, da ima tudi sam super moči.
the son of bigfoot - dubbed_2017.opis_omdb: Teenage outsider Adam sets out on an epic and daring quest to uncover the mystery behind his long-lost dad, only to find out that he is none other than the legendary Bigfoot! He has been hiding deep in the forest for years to protect himself and his family from HairCo., a giant corporation eager to run scientific experiments with his special DNA. As father and son start making up for lost time after the boy's initial disbelief, Adam soon discovers that he too is gifted with superpowers beyond his imagination. But little do they know, HairCo. is on their tail as Adam's traces have led them to Bigfoot!

alex cross_2012.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja detroitskega detektiva in psihologa Alexa Crossa (Perry), ki preiskuje srhljiv večkraten umor.

Detektiv Alex Cross raziskuje umore s pomočjo psihoanalize zločincev, toda njegove uspešne metode na preizkušnjo postavi serijski morilec, ki uživa v mučenju svojih žrtev.
alex cross_2012.opis_omdb: Dr. Alex Cross is on his last police duty to track down an assassin called Picasso, who's been torturing and killing rich businessmen in Detroit. Soon when the mission gets personal, Cross is pushed to the edge of his moral and psychological limits to end this once and for all.

one last call_2020.opis_neo:
Grozljiva zgodba o smrti, ki se je zgodila jeseni 1987.

Po tragični nesreči mora skupina prijateljev iz majhnega mesta preživeti noč v hiši zloveščega para. In začnejo se težave. Ena za drugo se začnejo uresničevati najhujše nočne more. 

Štirje prijatelji. En telefonski klic. 60 sekund. Ostanite živi.
one last call_2020.opis_omdb: In the fall of 1987, a group of small-town friends must survive the night in the home of a sinister couple after a tragic accident brings them to the couple's door.

still/born_2017.opis_neo:
Mlada Mary z možem živi idilično življenje, dokler ne rodi dvojčkov, od katerih preživi le eden

Mlada Mary z možem živi idilično življenje, dokler ne rodi dvojčkov, od katerih preživi le eden. Boj z izgubo enega otroka in ljubeznijo do drugega jo čustveno uničuje. Ko mož odide na službeno pot in v hiši ostane sama z otrokom, začne ob skrivnostnih glasovih in sumu, da se je njenega otroka polastila nadnaravna entiteta, vedno bolj izgubljati razum.
still/born_2017.opis_omdb: Mary, a new mother, gives birth to twins, but only one of them is alive. While taking care of her living child, Adam, she suspects that something, a supernatural entity, has chosen him and will stop at nothing to take him from her.

nine lives_2016.opis_neo:
Posvojen v svojo družino kot maček začne Tom gledati na svoje življenje in družino z drugačnimi očmi.

Tom Brand je milijarder in deloholik na višku kariere, zato zanemarja družinsko življenje. Bliža se 11. rojstni dan njegove hčerke, ki si za darilo želi mačko, čeprav jih Tom ne mara. Zaradi pomanjkanja časa se vseeno ustavi v trgovini s hišnimi ljubljenčki in kupi gospoda Fuzzypantsa. Na poti domov pride do čudne nesreče in Tom se znajde ujet v mačjem telesu. Posvojen v svojo družino kot maček, začne Tom na svoje življenje gledati z drugačnimi očmi.
nine lives_2016.opis_omdb: Tom Brand (Kevin Spacey) is a daredevil billionaire at the top of his game. His eponymous company FireBrand is nearing completion on its greatest achievement to date - the tallest skyscraper in the northern hemisphere. But Tom's workaholic lifestyle has disconnected him from his family, particularly his beautiful wife Lara (Jennifer Garner) and his adoring daughter Rebecca (Malina Weissman). Rebecca's 11th birthday is here, and she wants the gift she wants every year, a cat. Tom hates cats, but he is without a gift and time is running out. His GPS directs him to a mystical pet store brimming with odd and exotic cats- where the store's eccentric owner- Felix Perkins (Christopher Walken), presents him with a majestic tomcat, named Mr. Fuzzypants. En route to present his daughter with her dream pet, a bizarre turn of events finds Tom trapped inside the body of Mr. Fuzzypants. Adopted by his own family, he begins to experience what life is truly like for the family pet, and as a cat, Tom begins to see his family and his life through a new and unexpected perspective. Meanwhile, his family adjusts to life with an odd and stubborn cat, and his son David (Robbie Amell), steps up in ways Tom never expected. If any hope exists of returning to his family as the husband and father they deserve, Tom will have to learn why he has been placed in this peculiar situation and the great lengths he must go to earn back his human existence.

psycho goreman_2020.opis_neo:
Druščina zlobnežev in medgalaktičnih morilcev se zbere na robi majhnega mesta.

Brat in sestra, Luke (Owen Myre) in Mimi (Nita-Josée Hanna) nevede prebudita starodavnega zunajzemeljskega gospodarja (Matt Ninaber), ki je zakopan na njihovem dvorišču. Zlovešči stvor krstita za Psiho Goremana. .
psycho goreman_2020.opis_omdb: Siblings Mimi and Luke unwittingly resurrect an ancient alien overlord. Using a magical amulet, they force the monster to obey their childish whims, and accidentally attract a rogues' gallery of intergalactic assassins to small-town suburbia.

the abcs of death 2_2014.opis_neo:
Bodite pripravljeni na učenje abecede 26 režiserjev, ki so v tej grozljivki posneli najgrozljivejših 26 zgodb.

26 režiserjev, 26 načinov umiranja. Po vzoru otroških šolskih učbenikov je 26 kultnih avtorjev mlajše generacije dobilo po eno črko abecede, sami pa so morali izbrati besedo, ki se začne na to črko in ki je povezana s temo smrti. Med avtorji, ki so prispevali k 'abecedi smrti', so tudi Xavier Gens ("Meje"), Srđan Spasojević ("Srbski film"), Ti West ("Hudičeva hiša") in Ben Wheatley ("Seznam za odstrel").
the abcs of death 2_2014.reziser: Rodney Ascher, Julian Barratt, Robert Boocheck
the abcs of death 2_2014.opis_omdb: Another 26-chapter anthology that showcases death in all its vicious wonder and brutal beauty.

ooops! the adventure continues_2020.opis_neo:
Bližal se je konec sveta in obstajala je nevarnost, da bodo poplave uničile vsa bitja na planetu.

V poplavi se dva nesrečnika trudita združiti nenavadno družino, prelisičiti vulkan in skleniti mirovni sporazum na škripajoči barki.
ooops! the adventure continues_2020.opis_omdb: Noah's ark drifts on the open seas, with best friends Finny and Leah on board. But, after weeks with no land in sight, food stocks are running low. The fragile peace between carnivores and herbivores could break any second. After a series of unfortunate events, the kids find themselves inadvertently washed overboard - along with the last of the food supplies. Leah and fellow castaway, their new friend Jelly, are marooned on a remote island. While Finny wakes in a strange colony filled with oddly familiar creatures living in harmony - under the threat of a menacing volcano. In a race against time, tide and terrifying tremors, Finny must rescue his friends, reunite with his family and save a whole colony from total destruction.

immaculate_2024.opis_neo:
Cecilia, ženska pobožne vere, doživi topel sprejem na slikovitem italijanskem podeželju, kjer ji ponudijo novo vlogo v slovitem samostanu.

Cecilia, ženska pobožne vere, doživi topel sprejem na slikovitem italijanskem podeželju, kjer ji ponudijo novo vlogo v slovitem samostanu. Ceciliji kmalu postane jasno, da njen novi dom skriva temne in grozljive skrivnosti.
immaculate_2024.opis_omdb: Cecilia, a woman of devout faith, is warmly welcomed to the picture-perfect Italian countryside where she is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But it becomes clear to Cecilia that her new home harbors dark and horrifyi...

super_2010.opis_neo:
Potem ko njegova žena pade pod vpliv preprodajalca mamil, se Frank sprelevi v super junaka z dobrimi nameni, a brez junaških sposobnosti.

Življenje kuharja Franka razpade, ko ga njegova lepa žena Sarah zapusti zaradi Jacquesa, ki je karizmatičen lastnik striptiz-kluba in preprodajalec, ki je spet postal odvisen od mamil. Frank se tedaj odloči, da bo postal superheroj.
super_2010.opis_omdb: Frank Darrbo is a hapless fry cook. When his wife Sarah falls off the wagon and dumps him for Jacques, a drug dealer, Frank tries to get her back by reporting her kidnapped, grabbing her from Jacques' car, and wailing for her to return. After watching Christian TV and having a vision, he becomes a superhero to fight evil. He sews a costume, finds a weapon (a pipe wrench) and looks for crimes to stop. He has problems: his wrench inflicts real injury, so the cops want him for being a vigilante, his sense of boundaries is flawed, and Jacques' gang has guns. Libby, a clerk at a comic book store, becomes his sidekick, and it's time to go save Sarah. What chance do they have?

the devil's candy_2015.opis_neo: Metal glasba, slikanje in družina so strasti slikarja Jesseja, ki živi srečno s soprogo in hčerko. Najde ogromno staro hišo v podeželskem Teksasu, ki se prodaja po nizki ceni zaradi svoje skrivnostne preteklosti. Preselijo se vanjo in Jesse naredi v skednju studiu. Toda njegova dela postanejo mračnejša in vse postane še bolj zlovešče, ko se na pragu prikaže ogromen moteni sin nekdanjih lastnikov.
the devil's candy_2015.opis_omdb: Metal music, paint, and family are the passions of struggling painter, Jesse, who lives a happy life with his wife, and daughter. Things look brighter when Jesse finds a huge old house, in rural Texas, selling at a very low price, due to its mysterious past. They move in and Jesse converts the barn into a studio. But soon, his work starts taking on a new, darker flavour - and things get even more ominous when the hulking, unbalanced son of the former owners appears on the doorstep. Jesse's family won't be safe until they find a way to quiet the Devil himself.

the big trip_2019.opis_neo:
Štorklja mladička pande po nesreči pusti pri napačni družini. Prijatelji se odpravijo na dolgo pot do Kitajske, kjer prebivajo pandini pravi starši.

Zabavna pustolovščina scenaristov uspešnice Madagaskar s Cool Fotrom v vlogi prestrašenega volka Janusa. Bedasta štorklja po nesreči odda mladička pande pri vratih napačnega medveda. Druščina prijateljev - medved, los, tiger, zajec in volk, se odpravijo na naporno a zabavno pustolovščino skozi pragozd, da bi vrnili pandico v njen pravi dom.tigra…suočavaju se s puno izazova, ali na kraju dostave bebu njenoj porodici.
the big trip_2019.opis_omdb: A goofy stork mistakenly delivers a baby panda to the wrong door. A bear, a moose, a tiger and a rabbit set on an arduous but fun filled adventure through wilderness to return the panda to its rightful home.

10 minutes gone_2019.opis_neo:
Med neuspešnim ropom eden od tatov izgubi spomin. Zdaj mora najti izdajalca med njimi.

Kriminalec Rex najame Franka in njegovo ekipo, da ukradejo neprecenljive dragulje, toda nekdo obvesti policijo in naloga gre po zlu. Potem, ko Frank utrpi udarec v glavo, se zbudi in ugotovi, da draguljev ni več, kot tudi 10 minut njegovega spomina. Najti mora izdajalca, preden Rex zakrije svoje sledi z njegovim umorom.
10 minutes gone_2019.opis_omdb: A crime thriller that centers on a man whose memory has been lost due to a bank heist gone wrong. The character will need to piece together the missing 10 minutes from his memory in order to determine who sabotaged him.

bed rest_2022.opis_neo:
Po smrti prvega otroka je Julie Rivers končno v tretjem tromesečju druge nosečnosti.

o smrti prvega otroka je Julie Rivers končno v tretjem tromesečju druge nosečnosti. Njen soprog Daniel je sprejel mesto predavatelja na kolidžu, Julie pa nadzoruje obnovo njune na novo kupljene stare hiše, odmaknjene ob jezeru. Tam se želita še pred pomladjo z novorojeno hčerko greti ob ognju. A Julie pade po stopnicah in pristane v bolnišnici. Da bi preprečili prezgodnji porod, mora osem tednov strogo mirovati. Medtem ko je Daniel v službi, Julie vse bolj vznemirjajo nenavadni prizori in zvoki, ki jih zazna elektronska varuška v novi otroški sobi. Zdi se, da v njunem sanjskem domu straši, duh iz njene preteklosti pa ji skuša predati srhljivo opozorilo.
bed rest_2022.opis_omdb: A pregnant woman on bed rest begins to wonder if her house is haunted or if it's all in her head.

big bad wolves_2013.opis_neo:
Nekje v Izraelu se trije otroci igrajo v gozdu. Eno od deklet se skrije v omari v zapuščeni hiši, od koder jo ugrabi neznani storilec.

Serija nasilnih umorov združi življenja treh moških: očeta zadnje žrtve, ki se namerava maščevati, maščevalni policijski detektiv, ki se ne zmeni za zakone, in glavni osumljenec za umore, profesor verskih znanosti, ki ga aretirajo in nato izpustijo zaradi napake policije.
big bad wolves_2013.opis_omdb: After a little girl is brutally murdered, a suspect avoids arrest due to lack of evidence. Working separately, her father and a cop decide to do something about it.

upgraded_2024.opis_neo:
V romantični komediji ambiciozna pripravnica Ana na službeni poti v London nepričakovano dobi sedež v prvem razredu

Med udobjem prestižnega sveta spozna očarljivega Williama. Kar se začne kot nedolžna igra vlog, se hitro spremeni v romantično pustolovščino, kjer Ana tvega vse za priložnost, da doživi ljubezen svojih sanj.
upgraded_2024.opis_omdb: Ana, an ambitious intern at an art auction house in New York City, misrepresents herself to a handsome wealthy man as the director. As their romance develops, her deception creates challenges that threaten her career and relations...

garfield_2004.opis_neo:
Garfield je malo debelejši in len maček, ki ima najrajši lazanjo in gledanje televizije.

Življenje ne bi moglo biti lepše za Garfielda, najslavnejšega mačkona na svetu, ki cele dneve samo poležava na kavču, je lazanjo in uživa. Vendar se stvari zapletejo, ko ga njegov gospodar Jon odpelje k veterinarki, kjer Garfield spozna ljubkega psa Odija. Jon sprejme kosmatinca v svoj dom, kar pa Garfieldu niti malo ni všeč.
garfield_2004.opis_omdb: Garfield (Bill Murray), the fat, lazy, lasagna lover, has everything a cat could want. But when Jon Arbuckle (Breckin Meyer), in an effort to impress veterinarian and old high-school crush Liz (Jennifer Love Hewitt), adopts a dog named Odie and brings him home, Garfield gets the one thing he doesn't want. Competition. One night, Odie runs away and gets dog-napped after Garfield locks him outside. Garfield, in an out of character move, goes to search for and rescue Odie with the help of a variety of animal friends along the way.

as good as it gets_1997.opis_neo:
Melvin je neprijazen in z vsemi mogočimi fobijami obseden pisatelj, ki mu ni mar za nikogar.
