Trikratni dobitnik oskarja Jack Nicholson je čudaški Melvin Udall, nenehni nergač ter strupeno cinični pisatelj pogrošnih romanov z obsesivno-kompulzivno motnjo. Njegova varna in enolična vsakodnevna rutina se zasuka na glavo, ko mora Carol Connelly (Helen Hunt), edina natakarica iz krajevne obedovalnice, ki ga je pripravljena streči in prenašati njegove nestrpne izpade, doma poskrbeti za kronično bolnega sina. 

Da bi vsakdanja opravila spravil nazaj v običajne tirnice, ji Melvin ponudi pomoč in sinu s pomočjo poznanstev celo priskrbi dobrega zdravnika. Sinovo zdravje se korenito izboljša, vendar hvaležnost potisne Carol še globlje v kaotično življenje nesramnega ljudomrzneža. 

Ko vanj vstopita še njegov sosed, homoseksualni slikar Simon (Greg Kinnear) in njegov prisrčni kužek Verdell, začne trojica sopotnikov in prijateljev po sili odkrivati presenetljive stvari o samih sebi, o drug drugem in o vzajemnih odnosih, kakršnih nikoli niso pričakovali.
as good as it gets_1997.opis_omdb: New York City. Melvin Udall, a cranky, bigoted, obsessive-compulsive writer, finds his life turned upside down when neighboring gay artist Simon is hospitalized and his dog is entrusted to Melvin. In addition, Carol, the only waitress who will tolerate him, must leave work to care for her sick son, making it impossible for Melvin to eat breakfast.

a mother's terror_2021.opis_neo:
V napetem trilerju mora mati sprejeti nemogočo odločitev, potem ko izgine njena hčerka.

Alyssa je bila kot otrok ugrabljena, a se je uspela varno vrniti domov. Ko njeno hčerko Emmo ugrabijo v parku, je prepričana, da je krivec njen nekdanji ugrabitelj Miles. Ali lahko zaupa Milesu, da ji pomaga pri iskanju?
a mother's terror_2021.opis_omdb: Single mother Alyssa is a successful author who was kidnapped as a child before making a safe return seven years later. Given her past, she is overprotective of her young daughter Emma. When Alyssa has a panic attack, she visits h...

a dog's way home_2019.opis_neo:
Ganljiva pustolovščina psičke Belle, ki se odpravi na dolgo pot domov, potem ko se je ločila od lastnika. Med potjo spozna kopico novih prijateljev.

Kot mladiček se je psička Bella znašla pri Lucasu, dečku, ki ji ponudi varen, dober dom. A ko se nekoč loči od ljubljenega lastnika, se odpravi na več kot 600 kilometrov dolgo pot skozi koloradsko divjino, da bi se vrnila domov k Lucasu, od katerega je bila na silo ločena. Bella se dotakne številnih drugih izgubljenih duš, ki jih sreča na svojem epskem potovanju, ter v njihova življenja prinese uteho in veselje.
a dog's way home_2019.opis_omdb: As a puppy, Bella finds her way into the arms of Lucas, a young man who gives her a good home. When Bella becomes separated from Lucas, she soon finds herself on an epic 400-mile journey to reunite with her beloved owner. Along the way, the lost but spirited dog meets a series of new friends and manages to bring a little bit of comfort and joy to their lives.

robin hood: men in tights_1993.opis_neo:
Parodija na Robina Hooda na splošno, posebej pa na film Robin Hood: Princ tatov.

Zgodba o Robinu Hoodu in njegovi druščini mož in Sherwoodskega gozda povedana na način, kot jo vidi legendarni Mel Brooks. Robin iz Loxleyja se vrne iz križarske vojne, da bi Anglijo ubranil pred norim kraljem Johnom in njegovim podlim šerifom Rottinghamom. Nora komedija, v kateri zaščitnik revnih skuša premagati naivnega kralja Johna in šerifa Rottinghama, vrniti krono pravemu kralju in pri tem osvojiti srce svoje ljubezni, princese Marian.
robin hood: men in tights_1993.opis_omdb: Robin of Locksley, known as the most skilled archer of the land, has just returned to England after fighting in the Holy Crusades, where King Richard the Lionheart is also fighting. Robin finds that much of what he knew of England has gone to ruin, including his longtime family home having been taken away, all at the hands of the evil Prince John, Richard's brother who has assumed the throne in Richard's absence. Neurotic John is basically being controlled by the equally evil Sheriff of Rottingham, everything they do to fatten their own coffers at the expense of the commoners and peasants. As such, Robin recruits a band of merry men to help him battle Prince John and the Sheriff, they, who include: Blinkin, his blind longtime servant; Ahchoo, the misguided son of Asneeze, the man who helped him escape from prison while fighting in the Crusades; Little John, who seems to think that being called Little is only coincidental to the fact of he being a hulking man; and Little John's friend, Will Scarlet O'Hara, a master with daggers. In going to the palace, Robin falls in love at first sight with Marian of Bagelle, a maid of the court. Marian is looking for the man who has the figurative and literal key to unlock her heart (and private parts). The Sheriff has his own eyes on Marian, he who in turn is the object of desire of Latrine, a powerful hag of a sorceress of the court. Robin, and the Sheriff in particular, have a fight to the death mentality to achieve their end goals, which for both are protection of the throne for their trusted royal, and the heart and cherry of Maid Marian.

the marine_2006.opis_neo:
Marinec John se znajde pred svojo najtežjo nalogo, kjer bo moral pokazati ves svoj pogum.

Marinec John Triton je junak, ki se vrača domov, potem ko je bil odpuščen med vojno v Iraku. Ko pa se vrne v domovino, mora spet takoj v akcijo, saj izve, da je neusmiljena tolpa ugrabila njegovo ženo. Tako se John znajde pred svojo najtežjo nalogo, kjer bo moral pokazati ves svoj pogum.
the marine_2006.opis_omdb: John Triton is a heroic Marine who returns home after being discharged--against his will--from the Iraq War. Stateside, he finds himself back in action, when a group of murderous diamond thieves on the run led by a merciless criminal named Rome has kidnapped his wife and John goes on a chase through the South Carolinian wilderness to retrieve her. With everything on the line, the Marine will stop at nothing to carry out his toughest and most important mission.

max payne_2008.opis_neo:
Policist Max Payne je doživel svoj najhujši dan, ko so mu umorili ženo in otroka. Od tistega trenutka dalje se požvižga na pravila.

Na zasebnem poslanstvu, da bi maščeval smrt svoje žene in otroka, trpinčenega policista z oddelka za narkotike po krivem obtožijo umora – in naenkrat ga zasledujejo kolegi policisti, mafijci in neusmiljena korporacija.
max payne_2008.opis_omdb: Three years ago, NYPD detective Max Payne's wife and baby were murdered. Max gets himself transferred to the cold case office where he can continue searching for the killer who got away. He's a loner, but two people reach out to him during a fateful week: Alex, his ex-partner who may have found a clue, and BB, the security chief at the pharmaceutical company where Max's wife worked. Meanwhile, bodies are piling up, some as a result of a drug on the street that is highly addictive and, for many who take it, brings hideous hallucinations. When one of the bodies is a woman Payne was the last to see alive, her sister comes looking for him armed to the teeth; Max must move fast.

the quick and the dead_1995.opis_neo:
Zgodba je postavljena v ameriški divji zahod, leta 1878. Spoznamo skrivnostno Ellen, ki vkoraka v mestece Redemption, po naše Odrešitev.

Ellen ob svojem boku nosi nabito pištolo, v srcu pa gorečo željo po maščevanju. Poravnati mora stare račune, ki jih ima z vladarjem mesta Herodom. 

Ta pripravlja smrtonosen turnir v streljanju, ki se ga udeležijo revolveraši od daleč in blizu. Za najboljšega med njimi velja prav Herod, zato se Ellen v želji, da končno obračuna z njim, brez pomislekov prijavi na tekmovanje.
the quick and the dead_1995.opis_omdb: Ellen, an unknown female gunslinger rides into a small, dingy and depressing prairie town with a secret as to her reason for showing up. Shortly after her arrival, a local preacher, Cort, is thrown through the saloon doors while townfolk are signing up for a gun competition. The pot is a huge sum of money and the only rule: that you follow the rules of the man that set up the contest, Herod. Herod is also the owner, leader, and "ruler" of the town. Seems he's arranged this little gun-show-off so that the preacher (who use to be an outlaw and rode with Herod) will have to fight again. Cort refuses to ever use a gun to kill again and Herod, acknowledging Cort as one of the best, is determined to alter this line of thinking ... even if it gets someone killed ...

maratonci trče počasni krug_1982.opis_neo:
Po smrti glave družinskega pogrebnega podjetja se vname boj za nasledstvo, v katerem je dovoljeno vse.

Družina Topalović – sestavlja jo pet generacij moških, saj vsaka žena po porodu prvega sina tradicionalno umre – v majhnem srbskem mestu med svetovnima vojnama bogati s prodajo krst, ki jih zanje na pokopališču koplje Billy Piton sami jih le polakirajo in prodajajo kot nove.
maratonci trče počasni krug_1982.opis_omdb: The Topalovic family has been in the burial business for generations. When the old (150 yrs old) Pantelija dies, five generations of his heirs start to fight for the inheritance.

christmas in evergreen: tidings of joy_2.naslov_orig: Christmas in Evergreen: Tidings of Joy
christmas in evergreen: tidings of joy_2.opis_neo:
Medtem ko vse mesto išče domnevno božično časovno kapsulo, prispe v Evergreen skeptična pisateljica, da bi pisala o krajevnem navdušenju nad božičem.

Novinarka iz velikega mesta pride v Evergreen pisat o znamenitem božičnem duhu mesta, a najde veliko več kot le zgodbo. S pomočjo lokalnega knjigarnarja razkrivata skrivnost dolgo izgubljene božične časovne kapsule.
christmas in evergreen: tidings of joy_2.opis_omdb: A skeptical writer shows up in Evergreen to get the scoop on the town's famed passion for Christmas during a search for a long-lost time capsule.

the beach house_2018.opis_neo:
Caretta "Cara" Rutledge skuša pustiti težko preteklost za sabo, a se mora z njo znova soočiti, ko se vrne, da bi obnovila družinsko hišo ob plaži.

Zgodba sledi Caretti "Cari" Rutledge, ženski, ki poskuša preboleti težko preteklost, a se je prisiljena znova spoprijeti z njo, ko se vrne popravit družinsko hišo na plaži. Med uničujočo nevihto Cara in njena mati pred poginom rešita na stotine morskih želv in v tem času izvesta nekaj pomembnih resnic o življenju.
the beach house_2018.opis_omdb: Caretta "Cara" Rutledge tries to move beyond a difficult past but is forced to grapple with history head-on when she returns to fix the family beach house.

christmas next door_2017.opis_neo:
Znani avtor je med prazniki primoran skrbeti za nečakinjo in nečaka, ob pomoči sosede, ki obožuje božič, pa odkrije ljubezen in prazničnega duha.

Božični prazniki so za pisatelja Erica Redforda dobili grenek priokus, vse odkar ga je za božič zapustila njegova bivša. Tudi po selitvi v novo sosesko se še vedno izogiba družinskim tradicijam, pa tudi poskusom novega soseda, da bi ga vključil v praznično krašenje soseske.

Da bi ga izbezala iz osame, njegova mama nazadnje hlini bolezen, da je prisiljen popaziti na svojega nečaka in nečakinjo namesto nje. V tej novi družinski dolžnosti kmalu začne uživati, kar pa ni najbolj všeč njegovi novi punci Bridget. Na srečo mu na pomoč priskoči prikupna soseda April ...
christmas next door_2017.opis_omdb: A famous MGTOW author is forced to look after his niece and nephew over the holidays and, with the help of his Christmas-loving neighbor, he learns to find love and the Christmas spirit.

katie fforde: ein teil von dir_2012.naslov_orig: Katie Fforde: Ein Teil von dir
katie fforde: ein teil von dir_2012.opis_neo:
Prodajalka knjig Vivien nujno potrebuje novo ledvico. Z veliko iznajdljivosti poskuša organ dobiti na nekonvencionalen način.

Vodja knjigarne, Vivien Barner, ima hudo bolezen in nujno potrebuje presaditev ledvice. Sanje se ji uresničijo, ko se najde anonimni darovalec, ki ji je pripravljen dati življenjsko pomemben organ. Le nekaj minut pred posegom pa izve, da je odstopil od odločitve. Vivien je popolnoma uničena, vendar ne odneha. Odloči se, da bo raziskala, kdo je darovalec, in ga prepričala, da spremeni svojo odločitev.

love in store_2020.opis_neo:
Rivalska voditelja nakupovalnih oddaj morata sodelovati, medtem ko se potegujeta za napredovanje. Potem ugotovita, da se ne ujemata le pred kamerami.

Dva tekmovalna televizijska voditelja prodajnega programa sta med bojem za napredovanje prisiljena sodelovati. Medtem pa njuna kemija pred kamerami zaneti iskrico tudi zunaj studia.
love in store_2020.opis_omdb: Two rival home shopping hosts are forced together while competing for a promotion. Along the way they find their on-air chemistry kindles an off-air spark.

le gendarme à new york_1965.opis_neo:
Francoski žandar Cruchot po New Yorku išče svojo hčer in doživi kulturni šok.

Žandar v New Yorku je drugo nadaljevanje legendarne komedije zmešnjav z Louisom de Funèsom. Žandarji iz Saint-Tropeza so povabljeni v New York na policijsko konferenco. Njihov predstavnik je Cruchot. Na letalo pa se brez dokumentov vtihotapi tudi Cruchotova hči Nicole, ki želi obiskati New York. Mladenko, ki je v Ameriki nezakonito, reši novinar, ki želi o njej napisati senzacionalno zgodbo. Njen oče jo poskuša izslediti in pri tem ameriško velemesto obrne na glavo.
le gendarme à new york_1965.opis_omdb: After being chosen to represent France in an international congress, Cruchot and his troops must go to New York, and adapt to its social and cultural aspects.

jack hunter and the lost treasure of uga.naslov_orig: Jack Hunter and the Lost Treasure of Ugarit
jack hunter and the lost treasure of uga.opis_neo:
Svetovni popotnik in arheolog se v iskanju zaklada starodavnega ugaritskega kraljestva zaplete v spletke in nevarnost.

Jack Hunter, 28-letni domišljavi poklicni morilec, ki ga njegov mentor, prof. Schaeffer, pošlje v Francijo, kjer naj bi ukradel sliko starodavne plošče iz Ugarita, na kateri naj bi bile sledi izgubljenega zaklada in rajska zvezda starodavne kulture Ugarita. Jack iz zasebnega muzeja ukrade pravi artefakt in ga prinese v ZDA.

S Schaefferjem bereta starodavno pesem, a se ne strinjata o pomenu. Jack mora poslati sliko plošče dr. Aliju, arheologu v Siriji, Schaefferjevemu kolegu. Ko je Jack spremljal Schaefferjevo pomočnico Liz Johnson do njenega stanovanja, vsiljivec vdre v Schaefferjevo pisarno, ukrade ploščo in ubije Schaefferja.

Ko najde Jack mrtvega mentorja, priseže, da se bo maščeval. Njegova edina sled je dr. Ali, ki je edini vedel za ploščo. Zato se Jack odpravi v Sirijo.
jack hunter and the lost treasure of uga.opis_omdb: Jack Hunter, an archaeologist, planned only to take a picture of a cuneiform tablet from once unsurpassed Mesopotmian metropolis Ugarit in present Syria, but is caught and has to steal it from a private museum in France. He refuses to join his mentor, professor Frederic 'Freddie' Shaffer, who believes the poem is a coded treasure map, on a relic hunt, until his friend is murdered to steal it. Obvious suspect is Syrian artifact trader Ali, so Jack flies to Damascas. There he must accept working with local, US-educated colleague Nadia and her driver Tariq. Their lives are threatened during the long relic quest, for one by common nemesis Albert Littman, but another secret lurks too.

babylon_2022.opis_neo:
Epska pripoved o vzponu in padcu ambicioznih posameznikov, ki so poskusili srečo v Hollywoodu v obdobju prehoda z nemega na zvočni film v 1920. letih.

Film epskih razsežnosti izpod peresa in taktirke Damiena Chazella (Dežela La La) predstavlja zgodbo o prevelikih ambicijah in nezaslišanem ekscesu v obdobju nebrzdane dekadence 20. let prejšnjega stoletja v Los Angelesu. Spremljamo vzpon in padec več likov, predvsem pa dveh sanjačev – samooklicane filmske zvezde Nellie in ambicioznega asistenta Mannyja, ki se znajdeta sredi razvrata zgodnjega Hollywooda.
babylon_2022.opis_omdb: A tale of outsized ambition and outrageous excess, it traces the rise and fall of multiple characters during an era of unbridled decadence and depravity in early Hollywood.

fast & furious presents: hobbs & shaw_20.naslov_sl: Hitri in drzni: Hobbs in Shaw
fast & furious presents: hobbs & shaw_20.opis_neo:
Novi del franšize Hitri in drzni bo tokrat posvečen drugačnim obratom.

Leta po tem, ko sta si bila nasprotnika, morata ameriški varnostni agent Hobbs in bivši britanski operativec Shaw pozabiti na spore in združiti moči, da se zoperstavita genetsko izboljšanemu sovražniku Brixtonu. Ta ima nadzor nad zahrbtno biološko grožnjo, ki ogroža človeštvo, obenem pa doseže neustrašno agentko MI6 Hattie Shaw, ki je po naključju Shaweva sestra.
fast & furious presents: hobbs & shaw_20.opis_omdb: Lawman Luke Hobbs and outcast Deckard Shaw form an unlikely alliance when a cyber-genetically enhanced villain threatens the future of humanity.

alpha_2018.opis_neo:
Med ledeno dobo ranjen in izgubljen mladenič najde tovariša v izgubljenem volku in tako se začne prijateljstvo, ki bo spremenilo človeški rod.

Potem ko se mu pred 20.000 leti v Evropi, v obdobju paleolitika, izjalovi lovska ekspedicija, se mladi jamski človek bori z naravo, da bi našel pot domov, medtem pa gradi prijateljstvo z volkom.
alpha_2018.opis_omdb: An epic adventure set in the last Ice Age, Alpha is a fascinating, visually stunning story that shines a light on the origins of man's best friend. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and must learn to survive alone in the wilderness. After the young man reluctantly tames a lone wolf abandoned by its pack, the pair learn to rely on each other and become unlikely allies, enduring countless dangers and overwhelming odds in order to find their way home before winter arrives.

l'immortel_2010.opis_neo:
Upokojen mafijec gre na maščevalno misijo, potem ko ga je prijatelj iz otroštva pustil umreti z 22 naboji v telesu.

Upokojeni mafijaš Charly živi mirno družinsko življenje. Na zimsko jutro obleži na parkirišču z 22 kroglami v svojem telesu, a po čudežu preživi. Po okrevanju se poda na dolgo pot raziskovanja kdo je naročil njegov umor in maščevanja vsem vpletenim.
l'immortel_2010.opis_omdb: Charly Mattei has turned a new leaf on his past as an outlaw. For the past three years he's been living a comfortable life and devoting himself to his wife and two kids. However, one winter morning, he's left for dead in the underground parking garage of Marseille's Old Port with 22 bullets in his body. Against all odds, he will not die.

black hawk down_2001.opis_neo:
Gre za junaško pripoved o skupini elitnih ameriških vojakov, ki so jih leta 1993 kot del mirovne operacije poslali v somalsko glavno mesto Mogadiš.

Vojna drama v režiji Ridleya Scotta , ki temelji na resničnih dogodkih, je povzetek junaških akcij ob ameriški invaziji v Somaliji oktobra leta 1993, ki pa se je pogubno končala.
black hawk down_2001.opis_omdb: This Q&A took place December 14, 2001, and involved Ridley Scott, Jerry Bruckheimer, Mark Bowden, Ewan McGregor, Josh Hartnett, Jason Isaacs, and military advisor Col. Tom Matthews (Ret.). It provides a mix of new information and some bits we heard during earlier programs.

the danish girl_2015.opis_neo:
Umetnik Einar Wegener se prelevi v Lili Elbe, ko se pripravlja na operacijo spremembe spola.

Mlada Gerda in Einar sta srečno poročena umetnika, iz Kopenhagna na Danskem. Ko Einar nekega dne ženi pozira za portretno sliko, naličen in oblečen v žensko obleko, se začne zavedati, da je tudi v resnici ženska. Začne uporabljati ime Lili in s podporo žene začne potovanje, ki vodi do prve operacije spremembe spola v zgodovini.
the danish girl_2015.opis_omdb: Copenhagen, Denmark, 1926. Einar Wegener (played by Eddie Redmayne) and his wife Gerda (Alicia Vikander) are a happily married couple. Both are artists, Einar preferring landscapes and she portraits. One day Einar poses for a portrait of Gerda's while wearing a dress. This is initially done as a lark, as is the later attendance at a party dressed as a woman. However, Einar soon discovers that she is in fact a woman and over time prefers being Lili. At first she and Gerda try to have her situation "cured" but this leads nowhere (other than to many doctors trying to have Lili locked up as a pervert and/or lunatic). Her voyage of self-discovery will ultimately lead to her undergoing the first ever sex-change operation.

50 first dates_2004.opis_neo:
Ženskar Henry se zaljubi v učiteljico Lucy, ki pa ima nenavadno nevrološko okvaro, zaradi katere se njen spomin izbriše čez noč - vsako noč.

Henry Roth se boji zaljubiti, vse dokler ne spozna prelepega dekleta svojih sanj, Lucy. A kaj kmalu ugotovi, da ima Lucy okvaro kratkoročnega spomina, zato se ga že naslednji dan ne spominja več.
50 first dates_2004.opis_omdb: Henry Roth lives in a Hawaiian paradise with the company of endless women with no strings attached. This is until he meets Lucy Whitmore. Both Henry and Lucy enjoy the company of each other and feel the start of a serious relationship occurring. Approaching Lucy the next day, Henry is confused when Lucy fails to recognize him. This is the moment Henry discovers that Lucy actually suffers from short term memory loss and can't remember each individual day. Henry won't let this stop him and is prepared to make her fall in love with him all over again, each and every day.

love & other drugs_2010.opis_neo:
Partnerja spoznata, da je ljubezen močnejše mamilo kot katerokoli drugo zdravilo ali droga na svetu.

Čedni očarljivi farmacevtski predstavnik se zaljubi v svobodomiselno Maggie in povsem različni osebi ugotovita, da je njuna medsebojna privlačnost močnejša od kateregakoli zdravila.
love & other drugs_2010.opis_omdb: Maggie (Hathaway) is an alluring free spirit who won't let anyone - or anything - tie her down. But she meets her match in Jamie (Gyllenhaal), whose relentless and nearly infallible charm serve him well with the ladies and in the cutthroat world of pharmaceutical sales. Maggie and Jamie's evolving relationship takes them both by surprise, as they find themselves under the influence of the ultimate drug: love.

hannah swensen mysteries: one bad apple_.naslov_orig: Hannah Swensen Mysteries: One Bad Apple
hannah swensen mysteries: one bad apple_.opis_neo: Hannah je povabljena k poučevanju peke na lokalni šoli, ko umorijo enega od učiteljev, pa postane preiskovalka.
hannah swensen mysteries: one bad apple_.opis_omdb: Hannah Swensen has been asked to teach a baking class at the college in town, but her equipment is tampered with causing an explosion that the fire department rules an accident. Soon, a colleague ends up dead and Hannah begins to ...

a scottish love scheme_2024.opis_neo: Ko Lily z mamo odpotuje na Škotsko, naveže stik s prijateljem iz otroštva Loganom, a nobeden od njiju ne ve, da sta jima njuni mami to nastavili.
a scottish love scheme_2024.opis_omdb: Lily travels to Scotland with her mother and reconnects with Logan, a childhood family friend. Unbeknownst to Lily and Logan, their meddling mothers have come up with a plan to set them up.

a winning team_2023.opis_neo: Romantična komedija o profesionalni nogometašici Emily, ki se v igri ne znajde več in se poveže s sproščenim malomeščanskim trenerjem Ianom.
a winning team_2023.opis_omdb: It follows pro soccer player Emily as she finds herself no longer in the game and teams up with Ian, a laid-back small-town coach, to lead her niece's team to the playoffs.

a sprinkle of deceit: a hannah swensen m.naslov_orig: A Sprinkle of Deceit: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
a sprinkle of deceit: a hannah swensen m.opis_neo: Hannah in Chad ob flirtanju poskušata razrešiti umor in si prizadevata oprati ime nedolžnega sodelavca.
a sprinkle of deceit: a hannah swensen m.opis_omdb: Hannah and Chad flirt with their own paths to solve the same murder while working to clear a colleague who is implicated in the crime. Meanwhile, Delores gets her big break

just in time_2024.opis_neo: Hannah in Franklin si obupano želita otroka, vendar ga ne moreta spočeti. Nato jima neznanec podari starinsko uro in z njo lekcijo o potrpežljivosti.
just in time_2024.opis_omdb: A couple struggling to conceive receives an antique watch from a stranger, leading the wife to realize that the answers she seeks will come in due time.

south beach love_2021.opis_neo: V mladosti sta Sara in Tony načrtovala skupno restavracijo. Vendar sta se odtujila in se leta pozneje znašla v vlogi kulinaričnih tekmecev.
south beach love_2021.opis_omdb: Follows a story about rival quinceañeras, glorious Cuban cooking, friendship, family and romance.

montana mavericks_2025.opis_neo: Uspešna pisateljica Heather ima blokado. Ko podeduje ranč, zapusti mesto in se preseli na podeželje, kjer spozna postavnega veterinarja Cliffa.
montana mavericks_2025.opis_omdb: Heather is a New York City girl and a best-selling author on a mission to conquer writer's block and avoid paying back an advance on her next book. Her plans take a sudden swerve when she inherits a family ranch in Montana. With h...

love at sea_2018.opis_neo: Načrtovalka dogodkov Olivia je navdušena nad priložnostjo, da organizira križarjenje, dokler ne spozna programskega direktorja, ki ima svoje zamisli.
love at sea_2018.opis_omdb: Event-planner Olivia organizes a culinary cruise and has everything set to the last detail--until she learns that she's dealing with a rookie cruise director who has his own way of doing things.

ordinary girl in a tiara_2025.opis_neo: Modni navdušenki Caro in Philippa sta že dolgoletni sovražnici. Ko pa ju nepričakovano združijo okoliščine, ugotovita, da imata nekaj skupnih stvari.

reality bites: a hannah swensen mystery_.naslov_orig: Reality Bites: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
reality bites: a hannah swensen mystery_.opis_neo: Ko je umorjena Hannahina stranka, ki je obenem Deloresina tekmica v gledališču, mora Hannah najti njenega morilca, da zaščiti materin ugled.
reality bites: a hannah swensen mystery_.opis_omdb: Hannah's favorite reality show takes over The Cookie Jar. When the producer is found dead, Hannah and Norman team up to track down the killer. Chad invites Hannah to court.

love on safari_2018.opis_neo:
Ko Kira podeduje rezervat za divje živali v Južni Afriki, jo glavni ranger, ki je brez dlake na jeziku, poskuša prepričati, naj ga obdrži.

Spletna oblikovalka Kira odpotuje iz Chicaga v Južno Afriko, da bi tam mlademu hotelskemu mogotcu Artieju Harringtonu prodala naravni rezervat za divje živali, ki ga je podedovala od svojega prastrica. Vendar pa resnično rajske razmere v rezervatu in stik z zaposlenimi na kraju samem mlado žensko na koncu pripeljejo do tega, da ponovno premisli svojo odločitev.
love on safari_2018.opis_omdb: Web designer Kira of Chicago inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa. There she meets head ranger Tom. Will she sell it and return to her accountant boyfriend Brad or...?

mr. right_2023.opis_neo: Pisateljica ljubezenskih romanov je zaradi ljubezni do barista v precepu. Med usklajevanjem ljubezni in kariere se spoprijema s posledicami razmerja.
mr. right_2023.opis_omdb: When a romance writer catches feelings for her barista, she's conflicted. Is committing to a relationship worth losing a friend and possibly her job?

the wedding planner_2001.opis_neo:
Mary je ena najuspešnejših načrtovalk romantičnih in elegantnih porok v San Franciscu. Potem pa prekrši najpomembnejše pravilo – zaljubi se v ženina.

Nihče ne razume ljubezni in romantike tako kot Mary Fiore. Konec koncev je najbolj iskana načrtovalka porok v San Franciscu. Strokovnjakinja za izpolnjevanje tujih sanj je preveč zaposlena, da bi tudi zase poiskala ljubezen svojega življenja.
the wedding planner_2001.opis_omdb: Mary Fiore is the wedding planner. She's ambitious, hard-working, extremely organized, and she knows exactly what to do and say to make any wedding a spectacular event. Bt when Mary falls (literally) for a handsome doctor her busy yet uncomplicated life is turned upside down - he's the groom in the biggest wedding of her career! Will she help him walk down the aisle with his internet tycoon girlfriend, or will Mary finally get to be the bride herself? When it comes to love, you can never plan what's going to happen.

copie conforme_2010.opis_neo:
Britanski pisatelj v Toskani promovira knjigo. Tam spozna žensko, ki ga odpelje v vas Lucignano, kjer naključno vprašanje razkrije nekaj globljega.

Britanski pisatelj srednjih let v Toskani promovira svojo najnovejšo knjigo. Tam spozna Francozinjo, ki ga odpelje v vas Lucignano, kjer naključno vprašanje razkrije nekaj globljega.
copie conforme_2010.opis_omdb: James Miller has just written a book on the value of a copy versus the original work of art. At a book reading, a woman gives him her address, and the next day they meet and take a country-side drive to a local Italian village. Here, they discuss various works of art found in the town, and also the nature of their relationship - which gets both more revealed and concealed as the day progresses.

ip man 2_2010.opis_neo: V tem delu pobliže spoznamo Ip Manovo migracijo v Hongkong leta 1949, ko se je zavzemal za širitev svoje borilne veščine wing chun.
ip man 2_2010.opis_omdb: Ip Man 2 is a 2010 Hong Kong biographical martial arts film loosely based on the life of Ip Man, a grandmaster of the martial art Wing Chun. A sequel to the 2008 film Ip Man, the film was directed by Wilson Yip, and stars Donnie Yen, who reprises the leading role. Continuing after the events of the earlier film, the sequel centers on Ip's movements in Hong Kong, which is under British colonial rule. He attempts to propagate his discipline of Wing Chun, but faces rivalry from other practitioners, including the local master of Hung Ga martial arts.

the longest yard_2005.opis_neo:
Igralec ameriškega nogometa, ki se znajde za zapahi, sestavi ekipo zapornikov, ki se spopade z ekipo paznikov.

Paul Crewe je bil nekoč priljubljen igralec ameriškega nogometa. Nato je bil obtožen goljufanja in izgubil vse. Nezadovoljen s svojim življenjem se pijan usede za volan, njegovo neodgovorno vedenje pa se konča z medijsko odmevno prometno nesrečo. Ko pride v zapor, k njemu pristopi upravnik, ki ga hočeš nočeš prisili, da mu pomaga pri urjenju nogometne ekipe, ki so jo ustanovili pazniki. Paul nazadnje sestavi ekipo zapornikov, ki se bodo pomerili s pazniki. Za zapornike je to priložnost, na katero so ves čas čakali, saj se bodo končno lahko maščevali nasilnim paznikom. Skupaj zberejo največje in najbolj nore med njimi in paznikom postrežejo s tekmo, ki je ne bodo pozabili.
the longest yard_2005.opis_omdb: Paul "Wrecking" Crewe was a revered football superstar back in his day, but that time has since faded. But when a messy drunk driving incident lands him in jail, Paul finds he was specifically requested by Warden Hazen (James Cromwell), a duplicitous prison official well aware of Paul's athletic skills. Paul has been assigned the task of assembling a team of convicts, to square off in a big football game against the sadistic guards. With the help of fellow convict Caretaker, and an old legend named Nate Scarborough to coach, Crewe is ready for what promises to be a very interesting game. It's only the warden and the guards who have no idea who or what they're up against, with Paul the driving force behind the new team.

bram stoker's dracula_1992.opis_neo:
Stoletja stari vampir grof Drakula se poda v Anglijo, da bi zapeljal zaročenko svojega odvetnika, s tem pa povzroči razdejanje v tuji deželi.

Mladi odvetnik Jonathan Harker od zblaznelega kolega Renfielda prevzame primer Drakule in odpotuje v Transilvanijo, da bi se spoznal z zloglasnim grofom, ki bi rad kupil neke nepremičnine v Londonu. Ko Drakula vidi fotografijo Harkerjeve zaročenke Mine, je prepričan, da je njegova pokojna žena Elizabeta, ki je leta 1462 storila samomor, ko je dobila lažno novico, da je Drakula mrtev. Drakula zapre Jonathana v svoj dvorec in odpotuje v London, kjer zapelje Minino najboljšo prijateljico Lucy. Kmalu očara tudi Mino, ki se začne spominjati svojega nekdanjega življenja, v katerem je bila Elizabeta.
bram stoker's dracula_1992.opis_omdb: A documentary about the making of Coppola's 1993 film.

dances with wolves_1990.opis_neo:
Poročnika med državljansko vojno dodelijo v oddaljeno zahodno postojanko, kjer se spoprijatelji z volkovi in Indijanci.

Poročnik John Dunbar si želi spoznati življenje v ameriški preriji, preden ta popolnoma izgine. Premestijo ga v zapuščeno utrdbo, njegovi edini sosedje pa so Indijanci iz plemena Sujev. Čez čas premostijo jezikovne težave, medsebojne strahove ter nezaupanje in postanejo prijatelji.
dances with wolves_1990.opis_omdb: Lt. John Dunbar is dubbed a hero after he accidentally leads Union troops to a victory during the Civil War. He requests a position on the western frontier, but finds it deserted. He soon finds out he is not alone, but meets a wolf he dubs "Two-socks" and a curious Indian tribe. Dunbar quickly makes friends with the tribe, and discovers a white woman who was raised by the Indians. He gradually earns the respect of these native people, and sheds his white-man's ways.

felon_2008.opis_neo:
Družinski človek, obsojen zaradi umora nasilnega vsiljivca, se mora za svoje dejanje zagovarjati v nasilnem kazenskem sistemu.

Wade Porter je družinski človek, ki s partnerko Lauro in sinom Michaelom živi tipične ameriške sanje. Ko neke noči v njihov dom vlomi neznanec, Wadu ne preostane drugega, kot da brani svojo družino. Žal pri tem vlomilca ubije in obsodijo ga na tri leta zaporne kazni.

Ko med prevozom do zapora pride do incidenta, Wadu njegovi sotrpini naprtijo krivdo, zato pristane v strogo varovanem zaporu, v katerem s trdo roko vlada sadističen paznik.
felon_2008.opis_omdb: A family man, Wade Porter, is living the American Dream with his girlfriend Laura and their son Michael: they have a nice house, he has just raised a loan to make his company grow and they are going to get married. However their dream becomes a nightmare when Wade unintentionally kills a burglar that had broken into their house in the middle of the night on his lawn. He is sent to trial and accepts a deal proposed by the prosecutor, being sentenced to three years in prison. During the transportation, there is an incident in the bus and Wade is framed and sent to the maximum security wing under the command of the corrupt Lieutenant Jackson. His cell-mate John Smith that was sentenced to life after avenging the death of his family befriends Wade and gives helpful advice and instills hope in Wade that he will return to his family.

pacific rim: uprising_2018.opis_neo:
Jake, sin Stackerja Pentecosta, skupaj z Mako Mori vodi novo generacijo pilotov v boju proti novi grožnji.

Jake Pentecost, sin Stackerja Pentecosta, ponovno združi moči z Mako Mori, da bi uril novo generacijo pilotov jaegerjev, med katerimi je tudi njegov rival Lambert in 15-letna računalniška hekerka Amara, saj svetu ponovno grozijo nevarni Kaijuji.
pacific rim: uprising_2018.opis_omdb: It is 2035, ten years after the Battle of the Breach, in which the inter-dimensional portal created by the Precursors (through which they sent marauding Kaiju) was closed. Former Jaeger pilot Jake Pentecost - son of Battle of the Breach hero Stacker Pentecost - makes a living by stealing and selling Jaeger parts on the black market in the Los Angeles area. After he tracks part of a disabled Jaeger's power core to the secret workshop of fifteen year-old Jaeger enthusiast Amara Namani, both are arrested by the Pan-Pacific Defense Corps (PPDC) after an altercation between Amara's small, single-pilot Jaeger Scrapper and the Police Jaeger November Ajax. A holographic transmission of Jake's adoptive sister and PPDC Secretary General Mako Mori persuades him to return to PPDC as an instructor, with Amara as his recruit..

inglourious basterds_2009.opis_neo:
Skupina vojakov preži na naciste v okupirani Franciji, medtem ko lastnica kinematografa judovskega rodu načrtuje atentat na najvišje častnike SS.

Poročnik Aldo Raine vodi skupino ameriških vojakov judovske vere, ki v okupirani Franciji izvajajo hitre in nasilne maščevalne akcije nad nemškimi sovražniki. Ko dobijo nalogo odstraniti vodstvo tretjega rajha, načrtujejo atentat na premieri nemškega domoljubnega filma. Toda lastnica dvorane ima svoje načrte za maščevanje nacistom, ki so pobili njeno družino.
inglourious basterds_2009.opis_omdb: In German-occupied France, young Jewish refugee Shosanna Dreyfus witnesses the slaughter of her family by Colonel Hans Landa. Narrowly escaping with her life, she plots her revenge several years later when German war hero Fredrick Zoller takes a rapid interest in her and arranges an illustrious movie premiere at the theater she now runs. With the promise of every major Nazi officer in attendance, the event catches the attention of the "Basterds", a group of Jewish-American guerrilla soldiers led by the ruthless Lt. Aldo Raine. As the relentless executioners advance and the conspiring young girl's plans are set in motion, their paths will cross for a fateful evening that will shake the very annals of history.

hercules and the circle of fire_1994.naslov_orig: Hercules and the Circle of Fire
hercules and the circle of fire_1994.opis_neo:
Ko začnejo ugašati ognji po svetu, se Herkul odpravi iskat Prometeja, boga ognja.

Herkul in Dejanejra gresta iskat ogenj, da bi svet rešila pred mrazom. Vsi ognji na svetu hitro ugašajo. Herkulov oče Zevs jima pomaga (in ju včasih tudi ovira).
hercules and the circle of fire_1994.opis_omdb: Hercules and Deianeira go in search of fire to save the world from cold. All the world's fire are fast going out. Hercules' father, Zeus, is on hand to help (and sometime hinder) the two.

6 bullets_2012.opis_neo:
Nekdanjega plačanca, znanega po tem, da je našel izginule otroke, najame borec borilnih veščin, čigar hči je bila ugrabljena.

Spreobrnjeni plačanec Samson Gaul (Jean-Claude Van Damme) je specialist v reševanju ugrabljenih otrok, dokler zadnji poskus reševanja ne gre po zlu s preveč žrtvami. Zaradi hromeče krivde se Gaul odpove odprtju mestne trgovine. Ko pa ugrabijo Peggy Fayden, hčer nesrečnega poklicnega borca Andrewa Faydena, tik pred njegovim velikim dvobojem, mora Andrew s soprogo Monico prepričati Gaula, da znova začne delati. Toda Galov hitri in razpuščeni slog je lahko večja ovira, kot si predstavljata Faydena. Ko Gaul zagrozi mestnemu mafijskemu šefu, dobi trdno sled, kje je Peggy. Žal policija naslednji dan odkrije truplo mlade svetlolaske s Peggyno zapestnico. Ko je potrjen tudi DNK, Faydnova krivita Gaula in njegovo taktiku. Ker mu je tudi drugič spodletelo, Se Gaul znova umakne. Tokrat najde tolažbo v steklenici.
6 bullets_2012.opis_omdb: Veteran mercenary Samson Gaul (Jean-Claude Van Damme) knows that in the heat of battle, every bullet counts. He retired from combat when his actions resulted in the deaths of helpless victims, but now he's the last hope for a desperate father. Mixed Martial Artist, Andrew Fayden (Joe Flanigan, Stargate: Atlantis) knows how to fight, but alone he's unprepared to navigate the corrupt streets of a foreign city to find his kidnapped daughter. Together, these warriors will stop at nothing to tear apart a vile network of criminals that prey upon the innocent.

arlen faber_2009.opis_neo:
Priznanega avtorja duhovnih knjig prosita za nasvet mati samohranilka in sveže ozdravljen odvisnik.

Arlen Faber (Daniels) je samotarski avtor knjige Jaz in Bog, ki je celotni generaciji postavila nove temelje duhovnosti in je bila prevedena v več kot sto jezikov. Ob dvajseti obletnici izida je še vedno iskan kot guru, ki ima odgovore na vsa vprašanja.

Tako se sreča z Elizabeth (Graham), materjo samohranilko, ki ima sedemletnega sina, in s Krisom (Taylor Pucci), mladeničem, ki je pravkar prišel z zdravljenja zasvojenosti in išče smisel življenja. Oba upata, da jima bo Arlen ponudil odgovore, ki jih potrebujeta, a v resnici Arlen o njih nima pojma.
arlen faber_2009.opis_omdb: Everyone wants to meet Arlen Faber, the world famous author of the best-selling spiritual book "Me and God," but crotchety, disgruntled Arlen simply wants to be left alone - and so far he's been successful in keeping his identity a secret. But all that changes when troubled bookstore owner Kris Lucas discovers his home address and barters books for Arlen's words of wisdom, and a back injury leads the reclusive writer to begin dating chiropractor and overprotective single mother Elizabeth. As Arlen's relationships with his newfound friends begin to grow, he must come to terms with his past and the realization that he doesn't hold all the answers.

king kong_2005.opis_neo:
Pohlepen producent zbere filmsko ekipo in se odpravi posnet uspešnico na zloglasni Otok lobanj, kjer jih čaka marsikatero presenečenje.

Častihlepni filmski producent iz New Yorka leta 1933 organizira najemniško odpravo na skrivnostni Otok lobanj. Tam živi velikanski opičnjak King Kong, ki ga takoj prevzame lepota glavne igralke Ann Darrow.
king kong_2005.opis_omdb: Carl Denham needs to finish his movie and has the perfect location; Skull Island. But he still needs to find a leading lady. This 'soon-to-be-unfortunate' soul is Ann Darrow. No one knows what they will encounter on this island and why it is so mysterious, but once they reach it, they will soon find out. Living on this hidden island is a giant gorilla and this beast now has Ann is its grasps. Carl and Ann's new love, Jack Driscoll must travel through the jungle looking for Kong and Ann, whilst avoiding all sorts of creatures and beasts. But Carl has another plan in mind.

mercury rising_1998.opis_neo:
Sumljivi ljudje iz NSA hočejo ubiti devetletnega avtističnega genija, ki razvozla tajno kodo.

Vladni agent Art Jeffries mora preiskati izginotje devetletnega avtističnega dečka Simona, ki so mu umorili starše. Najde ga v stanovanju, kjer se je zgodil umor. Simon zaradi hude travme ne more govoriti.
Sicer sta oba osamljena in prežeta z bolečino, a za komuniciranje s Simonom se mora Art naučiti nežnosti in sposobnosti čustvovanja. Ker dečku ne nudijo pravega policijskega varstva, ga Art vzame v svojo oskrbo in z njim zbeži. Vendar Simon ni varen pred morilci, saj je nehote razvozlal strogo zaupno vojaško šifro, imenovano Merkur. Šifra služi za varovanje ameriških vohunskih operacij po svetu in naj bi jo bilo nemogoče dešifrirati.
Art in Simon se tako znajdeta nasproti mogočni Agenciji za nacionalno varnost, ki jo vodi polkovnik Nicholas Kudrow. Ta je za vsako ceno pripravljen zaščititi šifro, s katero si je zgradil ime in kariero. Art in Simon se morata na begu znajti po svoje, če hočeta ostati živa.
mercury rising_1998.opis_omdb: Bruce Willis is an outcast FBI agent who protects a 9 year old autistic boy who is the target for assassins after cracking a top secret government code.

this means war_2012.opis_neo:
Chris Pine in Tom Hardy sta vrhunska agenta CIE, sodelavca in nerazdružljiva prijatelja - dokler se ne zaljubita v isto dekle (Reese Witherspoon).

Vrhunska tajna agenta CIE in nerazdružljiva prijatelja, pričneta z vojno epskih razsežnosti, ko spoznata, da oba tekmujeta za naklonjenost iste lepotice.
this means war_2012.opis_omdb: CIA agents and best friends Tuck and FDR have been benched because someone's after them. Tuck is divorced and not close to his son; FDR is a ladies' man. Tuck places his profile on a dating site; Lauren sees it and goes out with him. She later bumps into FDR; he hits on her and she goes out with him. She's intrigued by both of them. When they learn they're both dating her, they agree to let her choose, but they can't help using their skills to keep tabs on her and each other, and sabotage each other's dates with her.

state of play_2009.opis_neo:
Triler o častihlepnem kongresniku in preiskovalnem novinarju v primeru navidez nepovezanih, nasilnih umorov.

Oskarjevec Russell Crowe in zvezdniška igralska ekipa v trilerju o častihlepnem kongresniku ter preiskovalnem novinarju v primeru navidez nepovezanih, nasilnih umorov.
state of play_2009.opis_omdb: A petty thief is gunned down in an alley and a Representative's assistant (Maria Thayer) falls in front of a subway, two seemingly unrelated deaths. But not to wisecracking, brash newspaper reporter Cal McAffrey (Russell Crowe), who spies a conspiracy waiting to be uncovered. With a turbulent past connected to the Representative and the aid of ambitious young rookie writer Della Frye (Rachel McAdams), Cal begins uprooting clues that lead him to a corporate cover-up full of insiders, informants, and assassins. But as he draws closer to the truth, the relentless journalist must decide if it's worth risking his life and selling his soul to get the ultimate story.

rent_2005.opis_neo:
Skupina newyorških boemov se v filmski inačici muzikala spopada z življenjem, ljubeznijo, umetnostjo in aidsom.

Skupina newyorških boemov se spopada z življenjem, ljubeznijo, umetnostjo in aidsom v filmski inačici muzikala, nagrajenega s Pulitzerjevo nagrado in tonyjem.
rent_2005.opis_omdb: This rock opera tells the story of one year in the life of a group of bohemians struggling in modern day East Village New York. The story centers around Mark and Roger, two roommates. While a former tragedy has made Roger numb to life, Mark tries to capture it through his attempts to make a film. In the year that follows, the group deals with love, loss, AIDS, and modern day life in one truly powerful story.

cloclo_2012.opis_neo:
Biografija francoskega pop zvezdnika Clauda Francoisa, najbolj znanega po sodelovanju pri nastajanju pesmi 'My Way'.

Zgodba spremlja njegovo življenje od otroštva v Egiptu do uspeha v Franciji ter do njegove prezgodnje smrti leta 1978 v Parizu.
cloclo_2012.opis_omdb: A biopic of French pop star Claude Francois, most famous for co-writing the song 'My Way'. Tracing his life from childhood in Egypt through success in France to his untimely death in Paris in 1978.

theater of life_2016.opis_neo:
Film pripoveduje močno zgodbo o nekaj beguncih in brezdomcih, ki so jedli v Refettoriju.

Ljudsko kuhinjo v Milanu - Refettorio Ambrosiano – vodi mednarodno znani kuhar Massimo Bottura in 40 najboljših svetovnih kuharjev, vključno s Ferranom Adrijom, Renejem Redzepijem, Alainom Ducassejem, Danielom Hummom in mnogih drugih. Vsa hranam ki jo strežejo, je pripravljena iz ostankov hrane z Expo Milana 2015. Film pripoveduje močno zgodbo o nekaj beguncih in brezdomcih, ki so jedli v Refettoriju.
theater of life_2016.opis_omdb: An extraordinary soup kitchen in Milan - the Refettorio Ambrosiano - run by internationally renowned chef Massimo Bottura and 40 of the world's best chefs including Ferran Adria, Rene Redzepi, Alain Ducasse, Daniel Humm and many others. All food served was made from the food waste of Expo Milano 2015. The film also tells the compelling story of several of the refugees and homeless the Refettorio served.

main street_2010.opis_neo:
Življenje prebivalcev se zasuka na glavo, ko skuša neznani prišlek rešiti njihovo propadajoče mestece.

Življenje prebivalcev južnjaškega kraja se zasuka na glavo, ko skuša neznani prišlek rešiti njihovo propadajoče mestece.
main street_2010.opis_omdb: Several residents of a small Southern city whose lives are changed by the arrival of a stranger with a controversial plan to save their decaying hometown. In the midst of today's challenging times, each of the colorful citizens of this close-knit North Carolina community, will search for ways to reinvent themselves, their relationships and the very heart of their neighborhood.

wind river_2017.opis_neo:
Gozdni čuvaj s pomočjo agentke FBI preiskuje umor mladenke v indijanskem rezervatu in se skuša odkupiti za pretekle grehe.

Zgodba se vrti okoli umorjene najstnice v indijanskem rezervatu, v Wyomingu. Ko stezosledec Cory Lambert odkrije truplo v divjini rezervata, FBI pošlje svojo agentko, da bi raziskala umor. Ker ni pripravljena na krute zimske pogoje, ji Cory pomaga pri preiskavi v staroselskem svetu, kjer veljajo posebna pravila in roka pravice do tja ne seže.
wind river_2017.opis_omdb: East of Boulder Flats, deep into the vast and unforgiving white territory of the Wind River Indian Reservation, the seasoned game tracker, Cory Lambert, discovers the frozen body of the young Native American, Natalie. As this is a federal crime, the F.B.I. dispatches the inexperienced but courageous agent Jane Banner to lead the investigation, however, the unprepared outsider will soon team up with Cory to unravel the mystery of Natalie's murder. Before long, Cory will inevitably have to face his own past, while at the same time, both he and Jane are thirsting to see justice done. In the end, will this be a fruitful alliance?

song to song_2017.opis_neo:
Zgodba o ljubezenskih trikotnikih, obsedenosti in izdaji je postavljena na glasbeno sceno v Austinu.

V ljubezenski zgodbi, ki se dogaja v Austinu v Teksasu se na glasbenem odru srečata dva para: mlada tekstopiska Faye in BV ter glasbeni mogotec Cook in natakarica, ki jo osvaja. Vsi štirje želijo uspeti na rokenrol sceni zapeljevanja in izdaje.
song to song_2017.opis_omdb: Two intersecting love triangles. Obsession and betrayal set against the music scene in Austin, Texas.

wild rose_2018.opis_neo:
Izvrstna glasbena drama o neukročeni mladenki iz Glasgowa, ki sanja o karieri v svetu country glasbe. V glavni vlogi blesti Jessie Buckley.

Dvaindvajsetletna Rose-Lynn po letu dni pride iz zapora in želi nadaljevati, kjer je ostala – torej postati country pevka. Nekako je pozabila, da ima dva otroka za katera skrbi njena mama, s katero se ne želi soočiti, saj ji govori, naj se zaposli kot čistilka, Rose pa si želi le peti.
wild rose_2018.opis_omdb: Fresh out of jail after one year imprisoned for narcotics possession, Rose-Lynn Harlan is a 23 years-old working-class girl from Glasgow, Scotland, who tries to rectify her chaotic life: foul-mouthed, streetwise, rebellious and free-spirited, Rose-Lynn reunites with her children, older Wynonna and younger Lyle, cared for during her imprisonment by their grandmother Marion, who openly despises her daughter's lifestyle. A worker in the bakery of a shopping center for twenty years, Marion struggles to understand her daughter, who becomes determined to travel Nashville, Tennesse (country music's cradle) to become a famous country singer. Due to a lack of resources and her poor academic studies, Rose-Lynn tries to return to her former job as a singer in the country bar Grand Ole Opry, having been fired by owners Jackie and Alan after they learn about her conviction. Thanks to Marion's good name, Rose-Lynn gets a job as a cleaning lady in the house of Susannah, an upper-class woman married to James, and mother of little children Rory and Nell. Blessed with talent, charisma, cheek, and a powerful voice, one day Rose-Lynn is discovered singing in her daily work by Susannah, who befriends Rose-Lynn and decides to help her to travel to Nashville by throwing a fund-raising party especially for her. Therefore, troubles are around the corner: Wynonna and Lyle are time and time again neglected by a mother unable to reconcile with them who hides their existence to Susannah, James mistrusts Rose-Lynn by the way that Susannah is interested in her, and Marion sends an ultimatum forcing her to make a choice between her dream to be singer, or her reality to be mother. Troubled, auto-destructive and badly influenced by her friend and occasional lover Elliot (a fan of alcohol, night and wild partying), Rose-Lynn finds herself trapped in a crossroads struggling against her worst enemy: herself.

les aventures de spirou et fantasio_2018.naslov_orig: Les aventures de Spirou et Fantasio
les aventures de spirou et fantasio_2018.opis_neo:
Spirou in Fantasio morata združiti moči, ko ugrabijo izumitelja grofa de Champignaca.

Ko Spirou, domnevni ženin v palači, spozna Fantasia, novinarja, ki išče zgodbo, ki jo bo objavil pred vsemi tekmeci, je to mogočen ... in precej klavrn začetek. Niti pod razno ne moreta postati prijatelja. A ko podaniki zloglasnega Zorgluba ugrabijo grofa Champignaca, izumitelja, se naša dva junaka takoj podata v iskanje: skupaj s Seccotine, novinarsko tekmico, in Spipo, neustrašno veveričko, se znajdeta na mrzličnem iskanju med Evropo in Afriko. Spirou in Fantasio bosta morala združiti moči, da rešita Champignaca … in skupaj z njim ves svet!
les aventures de spirou et fantasio_2018.opis_omdb: Spirou, a thief disguised as a hotel courier, familiarizes himself with Fantasio, a competitive journalist. Nothing prevents them from being friends. Over time, they join in Great adventures, but Count Pacôme de Champignac is kidnapped by Zorglub's men. Between Europe and Africa, both are launching the search for the eccentric inventor, with the help of Seccotine, the rival of Fantasio and Spip, a small captured squirrel.

queenpins_2021.opis_neo:
Gospodinji ustvarita goljufijo s kuponi v vrednosti 40 milijonov dolarjev.

Film je navdihnjen z resnično zgodbo o največji prevari s kuponi v ameriški zgodovini, v kateri sta gospodinji ukradli 40 milijonov dolarjev. Zgodba je posneta po resnični zgodbi o največji prevari s ponarejenimi kuponi v zgodovini ZDA. Kristen Bell je v vlogi nezadovoljne gospodinje iz predmestja, ki dela na „podjetniškem” projektu ustanavljanja nezakonitega kluba s kuponi, s katerimi s svojimi partnerji goljufajo velike prehrambne in druge verige, medtem ko članom kluba varčujejo milijone dolarjev.
queenpins_2021.opis_omdb: A pair of housewives create a $40 million coupon scam.

boneyard_2024.opis_neo:
Ko v puščavi Nove Mehike odkrijejo ostanke 11 ženskih okostnjakov, sprožijo obširno preiskavo.

Ko v puščavi Nove Mehike odkrijejo ostanke 11 ženskih okostnjakov, sprožijo obširno preiskavo. To srhljivo kriminalko so navdihnile resnične zgodbe in spremlja policijskega načelnika Carterja, detektiva Ortego in agenta Petrovicka v poskusu več agencij, da ujamejo morilca. A njihovi načrti in prijemi se ne ujamejo in zapletena mreža intrig meče sume v vse smeri.
boneyard_2024.opis_omdb: Inspired by the true events of a serial killer that may still be out there today.

the guernsey literary and potato peel pi.naslov_sl: Guernseyjsko društvo za književnost in pito iz krompirjevih olupkov
the guernsey literary and potato peel pi.naslov_orig: The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society
the guernsey literary and potato peel pi.opis_neo:
Po drugi svetovni vojni se pisateljica poveže s prebivalci otoka Guernsey, ko se odloči napisati knjigo o njihovih izkušnjah med vojno.

Na britanskem otoku Guernsey so v času 2. svetovne vojne ustanovili društvo s simpatičnim nazivom, 'Guernseyjsko društvo za književnost in pito iz krompirjevih olupkov'. Člani so iz knjig črpali življenjsko moč in tolažbo med vojno. Z delovanjem nenavadnega društva se nepričakovano seznani uspešna londonska pisateljica Juliet Ashton.
the guernsey literary and potato peel pi.opis_omdb: A correspondence begins between Juliet Ashton (Lily James) and members of The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, with them sharing their experiences of Nazi-occupied Guernsey Island. When an idea for a book catches Juliet, she goes to visit the island, making life-long friends and taking life changing steps along the way. This book is told by way of letters, and as the reader, you become enchanted by the writers of them and the love Juliet comes to feel for each of the Islanders; Dawsey Adams (Michiel Huisman), Amelia Maugery (Dame Penelope Wilton), Isola Pribby (Katherine Parkinson), Eben Ramsey (Sir Tom Courtenay), Kit (Florence Keen), and Elizabeth McKenna (Jessica Brown Findlay).

kite_2014.opis_neo:
Nikoli ne podcenjujte dekleta, ki nima česa izgubiti.

Nikoli ne podcenjujte dekleta, ki nima česa izgubiti. Ko mladi Sawi ubijejo mamo in očeta, se odpravi na lov za morilcem s pomočjo nekdanjega očetovega partnerja Karla in skrivnostnega prijatelja iz preteklosti. Postane neusmiljena morilka, ki se prebija skozi mračen svet trgovine z ljudmi, kjer odkrije srhljivo resnico.
kite_2014.opis_omdb: Never Underestimate a Girl with Nothing to Lose. Based on the groundbreaking, cult classic anime, KITE tells the story of Sawa (India Eisley,"The Secret Life of the American Teenager," Underworld: Awakening), a young woman living in a corrupt society where crime and gangs terrorize the streets. When Sawa's mother and policeman father are found victims of a grisly double homicide, she begins a ruthless pursuit for the man who murdered them. With the help of her father's ex-partner, Karl Aker (Samuel L. Jackson, Captain America: The Winter Soldier, The Avengers, Django Unchained), and a mysterious friend from her past (Callan McAuliffe, The Great Gatsby, I Am Number Four), she becomes a merciless teen assassin, blasting her way through the dark world of human trafficking only to uncover a devastating truth.

the skulls_2000.opis_neo:
Vsako leto se en odstotek najboljših ameriških študentov v svoji generaciji včlani v eno od prestižnih tajnih bratovščin.

Za Luka McNamaro je povabilo, naj se pridruži tajni študentski organizaciji Lobanje, izpolnitev njegovih sanj. Čeprav je iz revne družine, si je Luke s trudom in dobrimi rezultati, kot tudi vodstvom šolske veslaške ekipe, pridobil spoštovanje kolegov in profesorjev. 

S članstvom v tajni bratovščini najboljših, najpametnejših in najambicioznejših študentov bi mu bila odprta vsa vrata. Dobi dober avto, na bančnem računu pa se znajde več deset tisoč dolarjev. 

Po končanih nevarnih obredih iniciacije začne Luke s prijatelji, ki prezirajo tajne bratovščine, sumiti, da se v tej bratovščini dogajajo grozljive reči. Nepojasnjen samomor mladega novinarja, Lukovega prijatelja, sproži plaz nevarni situacij.
the skulls_2000.opis_omdb: Luke McNamara, a college senior from a working class background joins a secret elitist college fraternity organization called "The Skulls", in hope of gaining acceptance into Harvard Law School. At first seduced by the club's trapping of power and wealth, a series of disturbing incidents, such as his best friends suicide, leads Luke to investigate the true nature of the organization and the truth behind his friends supposed suicide. He starts realizing that his future and possibly his life is in danger.

red state_2011.opis_neo:
Zgodba je umeščena v Srednjo Ameriko. Najstnik Jarod povabi svoja prijatelja Travisa in Billy-Raya na seks v štiri z 38-letno žensko.

Zgodba je umeščena v Srednjo Ameriko. Najstnik Jarod povabi svoja prijatelja Travisa in Billy-Raya na seks v štiri z 38-letno žensko. Na poti k tej ženski se Travis zaleti v parkiran avtomobil na ulici. Ko se dobijo z žensko, jim slednja vrže v pivo mamila in izgubijo zavest. Ko se zbudijo, se zavedo, da so ujeti v fundamentalistični cerkvi Five Points Trinity zloglasnega pastorja Abina Cooperja ter da jih bodo ubili. Cerkev obkoli policija, ki jo vodi agent JosephKeenan. Ukazano jim je uničiti teroristično celico. Bo policija rešila najstnike?
red state_2011.opis_omdb: The teenager Jarod invites his best friends Travis and Billy-Ray to have a foursome with a thirty-eight year-old woman. While driving to meet the woman, Travis hit a car parked on the road. When they meet the woman, she gives spiked beer to them and they pass out. When the three friends wake up, they find that they are trapped in the fundamentalist Five Points Trinity Church of the infamous Pastor Abin Cooper and that they will be killed. Meanwhile the church is under siege by ATF agents led by Agent Joseph Keenan that have been ordered to destroy the terrorist cell. Will the teenagers be saved by the agents of the law enforcement agency?

dragon warriors_2015.opis_neo:
Mladi bojevnik v humorni fantazijski pustolovščini prosi brata za pomoč v boju z zlobnim čarodejem in njegovim zmajem, ki bruha ogenj.

Zlobni čarovnik lord Tensley hoče roko in srce lepe princese ledi Ennogard. Ko ga zavrne, jo zaklene in spusti smrtonosna zmaja, da trpinčita prebivalce. Prisegel je, da bosta njegova zmaja uničevala deželo, dokler ga ne sprejme. Obupana in v želji, da se ustavi trpinčenje, pošlje kačjega pastirja, da bi našel pravega zmajevskega bojevnika, ki bi jo osvobodil in ustavil uničenje. Medtem pa bojevnik Camilan odbija napade zmaja in se namerava poročiti s svojo pravo ljubeznijo, vilinko Larec. Toda njegovi starši mu ne dajo blagoslova, ker nista iste vrste. Camilan upa, da bo našel ženo za starejšega brata Ramicusa, lopovskega lovca na glave, kar pa zna biti precejšnji zalogaj. In takrat pride kačji pastir ledi Ennogard. Jima jo bo uspelo rešiti?
dragon warriors_2015.opis_omdb: The land of Altera has observed an uneasy peace for years among Humans, Elves and Evil beasts who are loyal to the legendary Black Dragon. But the Black Dragon begins to stir from its hibernation, sending the Beasts marching across Altera. With a beast conquest perilously close, a small group of Humans and Elves unite to try to find a secret hidden road to the Black Dragon's cave and destroy it. But the fate of all of them may be in the hands of the young warrior Lambert, who must summon the confidence and skill to face the Black Dragon himself just when all may be lost.

marrowbone_2017.opis_neo:
Jack se s sestro in bratoma po materini smrti skriva v stari hiši na skrivnostni kmetiji, po kateri tava grozljiva prikazen.

Leta 1969 na ameriškem podeželju živijo trije bratje in sestra, v stari hiši na ruševinah zapuščene kmetije. Z materjo so pobegnili pred nasilnim očetom, da bi si poiskali možnost za nov začetek, a je ta kmalu po prihodu v Marrowbone umrla. Otroci od tedaj živijo v osami, materina smrt pa je le ena izmed skrivnosti, ki jih skrivajo zidovi stare hiše.
marrowbone_2017.opis_omdb: Three brothers and a sister have just lost their mother. After her death they fear to be separated, so to protect themselves and prevent this from happening they decide to flee to an abandoned farm, a place that is not what it seems, because it hides a dark secret between its walls.

hitman: agent 47_2015.opis_neo:
Gensko spremenjeni morilec Agent 47 se poveže z žensko, ki je morda ključ do skrivnosti njegovega izvora, da bi ustavil svojega najhujšega sovražnika.

Hitman je genetsko ustvarjen agent, ki je zaradi svoje neprimerljive moči, hitrosti in inteligentnosti, popoln ubijalski stroj. Tarča Agenta 47 je mogočna korporacija, ki na podlagi njegove preteklosti oblikuje vojsko morilcev. Spajdaši se z mladenko, ki morda pozna šibko točko njunega sovražnika.
hitman: agent 47_2015.opis_omdb: HITMAN: AGENT 47 centers on an elite assassin who was genetically engineered from conception to be the perfect killing machine, and is known only by the last two digits on the barcode tattooed on the back of his neck. He is the culmination of decades of research and forty-six earlier Agent clones -- endowing him with unprecedented strength, speed, stamina and intelligence. His latest target is a mega-corporation that plans to unlock the secret of Agent 47's past to create an army of killers whose powers surpass even his own. Teaming up with a young woman who may hold the secret to overcoming their powerful and clandestine enemies, 47 confronts stunning revelations about his own origins and squares off in an epic battle with his deadliest foe.

a hannah swensen mystery #6: a pie to di.naslov_sl: Hannah Swensen preiskuje: Pita za umret
a hannah swensen mystery #6: a pie to di.naslov_orig: A Hannah Swensen Mystery #6: A Pie To Die For
a hannah swensen mystery #6: a pie to di.opis_neo: Ko je umorjena Hannahina stranka, ki je obenem Deloresina tekmica v gledališču, mora Hannah najti njenega morilca, da zaščiti materin ugled.
a hannah swensen mystery #6: a pie to di.opis_omdb: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

the journey ahead_2022.opis_neo: Razvajena hollywoodska zvezdnica Madeline in avanturistični svobodni duh Sarah se skupaj znajdeta na poti in spoznavata življenje in druga drugo.
the journey ahead_2022.opis_omdb: Madeline Stern; demanding, entitled, cranky movie star meets extrovert, adventurer and free spirit, Sarah; on the worst day of her life. She's been aged out of her dream role, finds her husband cheating on her with his assistant, hears from her doctor that the lump in her breast needs further exploration, and a daughter she gave up for adoption over 30 years ago wants to meet her birth mother - This all happens before lunch. Who wouldn't want to leave town? "The Road Ahead" is a light hearted comedy that follows two seemingly independent women as they discover that even the most successful people need someone on whom to depend, and the seemingly free spirit might not be "free", but actually afraid to stop running from a past that haunts her.

mr. pawsitively perfect_2023.opis_neo: Daisyjinega najljubšega rejniškega kužka posvoji oblikovalec pohištva, ki preživlja težke čase, a Daisy se boji, da si hoče samo izboljšati imidž.
mr. pawsitively perfect_2023.opis_omdb: An aspiring marketing designer's favorite foster dog is adopted by a famous but down on his luck furniture designer, whom she fears only wants the dog for his new image.

under pressure_1997.opis_neo:
Med vročinskim valom gasilskemu junaku (Charlie Sheen) zaradi nemirnih sosedov in drugih motečih dejavnikov prekipi.

Uglednemu gasilcu Lylu Wilderju se dogajajo same slabe stvari. Žena ga je skupaj s sinom zapustila, v nos pa mu gresta tudi soseda Catherine in Reese Braverton, ki uživata v sreči in ljubezni. Lyle je prepričan, da sta za njegovo nesrečo kriva prav soseda. Priseže jima maščevanje ter ju začne ustrahovati. Bravertonova se zatečeta na policijo, vendar naletita na gluha ušesa. To pa je zelo narobe.
under pressure_1997.opis_omdb: A decorated firefighter has his wife and son leave him because of his violent tendencies, including playing a game of Russian Roulette with his wife. Only trouble is he believes that the loving neighbor couple and their two children are to blame for them leaving by filling his wife's head with nonsense. He then sets out to discipline the family for their failings. But when the couple reports him to the police, the police will not believe the couple because of the fireman's status in the community. Things escalate until he kills a repairman, then the police and finally launches a totally terroristic attack on the family including again playing Russian Roulette with them.

les anges gardiens_1995.opis_neo:
Lastnik nočnega kluba in duhovnik se spustita v boj s kitajsko mafijo. Nenadoma se pojavita njuna angela varuha, ki nočeta, da tvegata življenji.

Gerard Depardieu igra prekanjenega lastnika pariškega nočnega kluba in nekdanjega detektiva, ki odleti v Hongkong, da bi rešil sina prijatelja, ki ga je umorila kitajska mafija. Dečka pusti v rokah dobrega duhovnika (Christian Clavier), ki ga pospremi nazaj v Pariz. Kmalu se Clavier in Depardieu spopadeta, vsak v senci svojega dobrega ali zlega angela varuha.
les anges gardiens_1995.opis_omdb: Gerard Depardieu plays a sleazy Paris nightclub owner and ex-detective who flies to Hong Kong to rescue the young son of a friend murdered by the Chinese mob. He leaves the boy in the hands of an earnest priest (Christian Clavier), who escorts him back to Paris. Soon Clavier and Depardieu are fighting it out, each shadowed by his good or evil guardian angel.

a sound of thunder_2005.opis_neo:
Podjetje, ki organizira popotovanja v prihodnost, v preteklosti stori napako, kar ima v prihodnosti uničujoče in nepredvidene posledice.

Prazgodovinski safari in lov na dinozavre s pomočjo časovnega potovanja je najboljši način zabave v bližnji prihodnosti, toda nekega dne po pomoti ubiti metulj sproži verižno reakcijo neljubih dogodkov, ki vodijo k uničenju človeštva.
a sound of thunder_2005.opis_omdb: Chicago, 2055. Charles Hatton has made a fortune by founding 'Time safari', which offers rich 'big game hunters' short time travels to kill off dinosaurs just before their natural death. When scientist Travis Ryer notices the weather and wildlife are not behaving as usual, he consults Dr. Sonia Rand, the contractually invisible inventor of the supercomputer which controls time. They soon face 'time waves', each worsening the effects in 2055 of evolutionary distortions, lower lifeforms first. They attempt to identify and rectify the past alteration, but each attempt gets harder in their distorted present.

the scorpion king_2002.opis_neo:
Puščavski bojevnik se upre zlobni vojski, ki uničuje njegovo domovino.

V starem Egiptu najamejo kmeta Matajusa, da se maščuje mogočnemu Memnonu in čarovnici Kasandri, ki sta pripravljena zavzeti Baltazarjevo vas. Med izdajstvi, tatovi, ugrabitvami in še čim si Mathayus prizadeva, da bi v svojem zapletenem svetu vzpostavil pravico.
the scorpion king_2002.opis_omdb: In ancient Gomorrah, thousands of years before the Pyramids, the remaining free nomadic tribes are forced to form an uneasy alliance to put an end to mighty King Memnon's reign of tyranny. One of the few survivors and the last of the Akkadians, the brave assassin, Mathayus, is entrusted with the impossible task of executing Memnon's fortune-telling sorceress, Cassandra, only to find himself up against a seemingly indestructible evil army. Now, with the help of his new powerful allies, including the great warrior, Balthazar, Mathayus returns to the legendary city to infiltrate Memnon's impenetrable fortress in the desert and exact his revenge. Is Mathayus destined to be the next Scorpion King?

dead in tombstone_2013.opis_neo:
Vodji, ki ga je ubila lastna tolpa, sam hudič ponudi priložnosti, da se izogne prekletstvu.

Neusmiljena tolpa rovari po mestecu in ubije šefa Guerrera Hernandeza. Guerrero je obsojen na pekel, kjer se mora soočiti s hudičem.
dead in tombstone_2013.opis_omdb: A gang overruns a small mining town murdering their own leader Guerrero (Trejo) in a cold-blooded power grab. Sentenced to eternity in hell he finds himself confronted by Satan himself (Rourke), offering a daring proposition: deliver the six souls of his former gang and he will escape damnation. With time running out, he sets out on a brutal rampage to avenge his own death.

the hunt for red october_1990.opis_neo:
Marko Ramius je najbolj spoštovan človek sovjetske podvodne mornarice.

Vojni veteran Ramius je ugleden član sovjetske podvodne mornarice, ki prevzame nadzor na podmornici imenovani Rdeči oktober. Ko Ramius dezertira, skušajo Sovjeti prepričati ameriško mornarico, da namerava napasti New York ali Washington. Ameriška vojska se tako poda na lov za Rdečim oktobrom, da bi podmornico uničili še pred napadom na ZDA.
the hunt for red october_1990.opis_omdb: In November 1984, at the height of the Cold War, the Soviet Union creates a new nuclear submarine that runs silent due to a revolutionary propulsion system. The Russian submarine Captain, Marko Ramius (Sir Sean Connery), defects. His goal is taking it to the U.S. to prevent the Russians from using it to start nuclear war against the U.S.

annabelle comes home_2019.opis_neo:
Demonologa Ed in Lorraine Warren lutko Annabelle zapreta v posebno sobo, ki jo je blagoslovil duhovnik. Ko lutka prebudi zle duhove v ostalih predmetih v sobi, se ti spravijo nad Warrenovo hči.

Po tem, o Anabelle terorizira nešteto nevednih žrtev, jo poskušata demonologa Ed in Lorraine Warren zapreti globoko v svoji hiši. A kljub župnikovemu svetemu blagoslovu, demonska lutka zopet širi grozo.
annabelle comes home_2019.opis_omdb: Determined to keep Annabelle from wreaking more havoc, demonologists Ed and Lorraine Warren bring the possessed doll to the locked artifacts room in their home, placing her "safely" behind sacred glass and enlisting a priest's holy blessing. But an unholy night of horror awaits as Annabelle awakens the evil spirits in the room, who all set their sights on a new target--the Warrens' ten-year-old daughter, Judy, and her friends.

flip that romance_2019.opis_neo:
Bivša zaljubljenca in poklicna tekmeca prenavljata vsak svojo polovico dvojčka, pri tem pa obudita tudi iskrico med njima.

Jules je oblikovalka, ki se odloči kupiti staro hišo, jo obnoviti in pozneje prodati. Presenečena je, ko odkrije, da je lastnik druge polovice njen bivši fant Lance, ki prav tako namerava prodati svoj del po obnovi. Kmalu obnova postane tekmovanje, urednica revije pa se odloči objaviti pomemben članek o zmagovalcu. Ker sta Jules in Lance prisiljena sodelovati pri obnovi, sčasoma postane jasno, da je mogoče obnoviti tudi njuno romanco.
flip that romance_2019.opis_omdb: Rival house flippers, Jules Briggs (Julie Gonzalo) and Lance Waddell (Tyler Hynes), renovate dual sides of a duplex and rekindle an old romance.

the talented mr. ripley_1999.opis_neo:
Film Nadarjeni gospod Ripley se lahko pohvali z odlično igralsko zasedbo, zanimivo zgodbo in petimi nominacijami za oskarja.

V petdesetih letih na Manhattnu si revni delavec Tom Ripley (Matt Damon) izposodi suknjič z logotipom univerze Princeton, da bi na neki vrtni zabavi goste kratkočasil z igranjem klavirja. Nagovori ga premožni ladijski mogotec, oče nedavnega diplomanta s Princetona; Tom se pretvarja, da pozna njegovega sina Dickieja Greenleafa (Jude Law), oče pa mu ponudi nagrado tisoč dolarjev, če bi odpotoval v Italijo in svojeglavega Dickieja prepričal, da se vrne domov. V Italiji se Tom s pretvezo pridruži Dickieju in njegovemu izobraženemu prijaznemu dekletu Marge (Gwyneth Paltrow) ter hlini navdušenje do jazzovske glasbe, da bi se prikupil novim prijateljem. Postopoma se pod krinko premožnega naslednika vtihotapi v brezskrbno življenje visoke družbe, kjer goji homoerotične želje in se predaja razkošju. Poleg prepričljivega laganja je Tom tudi mojster za poneverjanje podpisov in oponašanje glasov. Ko se čedni in samozavestni Dickie naposled naveliča dolgočasnega Toma, je ta odločen, da se ne bo zlahka odpovedal privilegijem bogatašev in namišljenemu svetu, ki si ga je ustvaril s pretvarjanjem: zaplete se v nevarno igro prevar, laži in umorov.
the talented mr. ripley_1999.opis_omdb: The 1950s. Manhattan lavatory attendant, Tom Ripley, borrows a Princeton jacket to play piano at a garden party. When the wealthy father of a recent Princeton grad chats Tom up, Tom pretends to know the son and is soon offered $1,000 to go to Italy to convince Dickie Greenleaf to return home. In Italy, Tom attaches himself to Dickie and to Marge, Dickie's cultured fiancée, pretending to love jazz and harboring homoerotic hopes as he soaks in luxury. Besides lying, Tom's talents include impressions and forgery, so when the handsome and confident Dickie tires of Tom, dismissing him as a bore, Tom goes to extreme lengths to make Greenleaf's privileges his own.

the kitchen_2019.opis_neo:
Žene mafijcev v New Yorku v 70. letih se odločijo nadaljevati z operativo svojih mož, medtem, ko so oni v zaporu.

New York, 1978. Po tem, ko skupina mafijskih mož pristane za zapahi, ostane njihov cvetoči mafijski posel v rokah njihovih žena. Soočene z velikim izzivom, dajo žene vse od sebe, da ostane posel v teku.
the kitchen_2019.opis_omdb: The wives of New York gangsters in Hell's Kitchen in the 1970s continue to operate their husbands' rackets after they're locked up in prison.

the debt_2010.opis_neo:
V napeti drami spremljamo oskarjevko Helen Mirren v vlogi tajne agentke izraelske obveščevalne službe Mosad.

Zgodba govori o Rachel Singer, nekdanji agentki Mosada, ki si prizadeva ujeti in pripeljati pred sodišče zloglasnega nacističnega vojnega zločinca - Kirurga iz Birkenaua - v tajni izraelski misiji, ki se konča z njegovo smrtjo na ulicah vzhodnega Berlina. 

Toda 30 let kasneje, se pojavi človek, ki trdi, da je zloglasni kirurg, zato se mora Rachel vrniti v Vzhodno Evropo, da odkrije resnico.
the debt_2010.opis_omdb: The espionage thriller begins in 1997, as shocking news reaches retired Mossad secret agents Rachel Singer (Dame Helen Mirren) and Stephan Gold (Tom Wilkinson) about their former colleague David Peretz (Ciarán Hinds). All three have been venerated for decades by their country because of the mission that they undertook back in 1965, when the trio (Jessica Chastain, Marton Csokas, and Sam Worthington) tracked down Nazi war criminal Dieter Vogel (Jesper Christensen) in East Berlin. At great risk, and at considerable personal cost, the team's mission was accomplished--or was it? The suspense builds in and across two different time periods, with startling action and surprising revelations.

ko to tamo peva_1980.opis_neo:
Potovanje potnikov na avtobusu je polno številnih preprek in nezgod, tako tragičnih kot komičnih.

Film je črna komedija. Dogaja se nekje v Srbiji na dan pred napadom na Jugoslavijo, 5. aprila 1941. Skupina potnikov čaka avtobus firme »Krstić in sin«, da bi prišli v Beograd.
ko to tamo peva_1980.opis_omdb: On April 5, 1941, a date Serbs will recognize, men on a country road board Krstic's bus for Belgrade: two Gypsies who occasionally sing about misery, an aging war vet, a Nazi sympathizer, a dapper singer, a consumptive, and a man with a shotgun. Krstic is a world-weary cynic, out for a buck; the driver is his son, the simple, cheerful Misko. En route they pick up a priest and young newlyweds going to the seaside. Along the way, mis-adventure strikes: a flat tire, a rickety bridge, a farmer who's plowed the road, a funeral, two feuding families, an army detail, and a lost wallet slow the bus and expose rifts among the travelers. On April 6, amid rumors of war, they reach Belgrade...

autumn in the vineyard_2016.opis_neo:
Ko Frankie in Nate odkrijeta, da sta solastnika vinograda, med njima sprva izbruhne spor, toda kmalu med njima preskoči iskrica.

Frankie dela v vinogradu svojega očeta. Ko oče nekoga drugega izbere za partnerja, se razočarana odloči kupiti svoj vinograd. Toda zaradi zapletene sodne odločitve ga je Frankie primorana deliti z Natom, svojim bivšim fantom iz konkurenčne vinarske družine. Ker se bliža tekmovanje vinarn, se Frankie in Nate odločita, da bo zmagovalec dobil lastništvo nad celim vinogradom. Ko drug ob drugem delata v vinogradu, se tekmeca zaljubita.
autumn in the vineyard_2016.opis_omdb: When Frankie Baldwin and Nate Deluca both have a claim to ownership of Sorrento Farm, they are forced to divide the vineyard right down the middle and work the fields alongside each other to bring in the harvest leading up to the Best Wine competition at the annual Autumn Harvest Festival - only this rivalry won't be settled in the fields, because in spite of their contentious bickering, the simplest way to settle this particular legal dispute is with a romance.

pokémon: detective pikachu_2019.opis_neo:
Animirana družinska pustolovščina, posneta po istoimenski videoigri, o detektivski dogodivščini prikupnega Pokemona Pikachuja.

Ko zasebni detektiv Harry Goodman skrivnostno izgine, se njegov 21-letni sin Tim odloči raziskati, kaj se je z njim zgodilo.

Pomoč mu ponudi očetov nekdanji partner, prikupno zmeden Pokemon Pikachu. Skupaj se podata na razburljivo detektivsko pustolovščino in razkrijeta pretresljivo zaroto.
pokémon: detective pikachu_2019.opis_omdb: The story begins when ace detective Harry Goodman goes mysteriously missing, prompting his 21-year-old son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding in the investigation is Harry's former Pokémon partner, Detective Pikachu: a hilariously wise-cracking, adorable super-sleuth who is a puzzlement even to himself. Finding that they are uniquely equipped to communicate with one another, Tim and Pikachu join forces on a thrilling adventure to unravel the tangled mystery.
