Chasing clues together through the neon-lit streets of Ryme City--a sprawling, modern metropolis where humans and Pokémon live side by side in a hyper-realistic live-action world--they encounter a diverse cast of Pokémon characters and uncover a shocking plot that could destroy this peaceful co-existence and threaten the whole Pokémon universe.

valentine ever after_2016.opis_neo:
V komični drami mlado odvetnico Julio preseneti nepričakovana snubitev njenega fanta.

Julia je mlada odvetnica, ki si je vedno želela delati v družinskem podjetju. Ko jo njen fant iz bogate družine zasnubi, privoli. Potem njegovi starši začnejo takoj načrtovati njeno življenje v visoki družbi, povsem drugačni od tistega, kar si želi. Da bi si zbistrila misli, gre s prijateljico Sydney na počitnice v divjino Kolorada. Ko se jima pokvari avto, jima na pomoč priskoči Ben. Ponudi jima, naj ostaneta na njegovem ranču, dokler ne popravijo avta. Ko Sydney po nesreči razbije krajevni spomenik, sodnik obe obsodi na družbeno koristno delo na ranču. Julia izve, da je ranč v dolgovih in se odloči prirediti veliko zabavo, na kateri bi zbirali denar. Vse pa se zaplete, ko se med Julijo in Benom prebudijo čustva.
valentine ever after_2016.opis_omdb: When socialites Julia and Sydney (early 30's) leave their cushy - if stagnant - lives in Chicago to embark on a road-trip, they end up on the wrong side of the law in a tiny town in Wyoming. Forced to serve 30 days community service, Sydney discovers there's more to life than can be purchased with a gold card and Julia learns that her "perfect" life back home might be a sham and what she thought she wanted isn't what she wants at all.

king arthur_2004.opis_neo:
Zgodba o kralju Arthurju, vitezu Lancelotu in vitezih okrogle mize, ki se borijo za svobodo.

Kralj Arthur je močno vplival na zgodovino Britanije v času, ko je Rimski imperij propadel in je otok potreboval voditelja v obrambi pred Saksonci. Bitke, ki jih izbojuje tako na bojnem polju kot na polju politike iz njega naredijo kralja, ki povede Britanijo v novo dobo in spremeni tok zgodovine.
king arthur_2004.opis_omdb: In 400 AD, the Roman Empire extends to Britain and the Romans become impressed with the fight skills of the warrior Sarmatian people, which are spared, but have to send their sons to serve Rome in the cavalry for fifteen years. Only after these services, these knights are free to return home. King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table have their last mission before achieving their freedom.

the matrix resurrections_2021.opis_neo:
Dobrodošli nazaj v Matrico.

Da bi ugotovil, ali je njegova resničnost prava ali miselni konstrukt, mora Neo spet slediti belemu zajčku. Zdaj že ve, kaj mora storit, ne pa tudi tega, da je Matrica zdaj močnejša in bolj nevarna kot kadarkoli doslej.
the matrix resurrections_2021.opis_omdb: Return to a world of two realities: one, everyday life; the other, what lies behind it. To find out if his reality is a construct, to truly know himself, Mr. Anderson will have to choose to follow the white rabbit once more.

into the sun_2005.opis_neo:
Nekdanji agent Cie, Travis Hunter, skupaj z mladim agentom Seanom preiskuje umor tokijskega guvernerja, ki so ga ubili med volilno kampanjo.

Travis je odraščal na Japonskem, pozna tamkajšnje podzemlje in obvlada borilne veščine. 

Kmalu se izkaže, da je umor povezan z japonsko mafijo, ki namerava skupaj s kitajsko mafijo zgraditi mrežo za preprodajo mamil. 

Ko nepridipravi umorijo Travisovo zaročenko, za Travisa primer postane oseben. Odločen je, da se maščuje za vsako ceno.
into the sun_2005.opis_omdb: When the governor of Tokyo is killed in his campaign for election, the former CIA agent Travis Hunter is assigned to find the responsible working together with the rookie FBI agent Sean. Travis was raised in Japan, has great connections with the underworld of the streets and is a master in sword and martial arts, trained by a former member of Yakuza. Travis discloses that there is a war between the old and traditional members of Yakuza and the new generation leaded by the deranged and sick Kuroda, who has associated to the Chinese Tong mobster Chen in a powerful drug dealing business. When his fiancée Nayako is brutally and cowardly murdered by one of Kuroda's men, the mission of Travis becomes a personal issue and he seeks revenge.

bandits_2001.opis_neo:
Drzna roparja Joe in Terry pobegneta iz zapora in hitro zasnujeta briljanten načrt, s katerim nameravata obogateti in začeti novo življenje.

Večer pred ropom namreč ugrabita bančne direktorje, jih zapreta in naslednji dan brez zapletov izpraznita bančni trezor. Tako postaneta zloglasna bandita. 

A stvari se zapletejo, ko naletita na razočarano gospodinjo Kate, ki se nepričakovano pridruži njunemu kriminalnemu pohodu ...
bandits_2001.opis_omdb: Two convicts, one charismatic (Willis) and the other a hypochondriac (Thornton), break out of prison and immediately start a bank robbing spree, kidnapping bank managers, spending the night with their families, then going with the managers in the morning to rob the banks. Using a dim-witted stunt man as their getaway driver and lookout, the three successfully pull off several jobs (even gaining the attention of a television show about American criminals), and become known as "The Sleepover Bandits." Things are going great until the bank managers begin to realize that the robbers are non-violent and therefore no threat to them or their employees, changing the game for the Bandits. To add to the complications, a bored & unhappy housewife (Blanchett) ends up in the hands of the criminals, and begins to have romantic feelings for both Willis and Thornton, causing a sticky love triangle.

the program_2015.opis_neo:
Biografska drama o življenju Lancea Armstronga.

Lance Armstrong se po borbi z rakom leta 1999 vrne na kolesarske steze, odločen, da osvoji zmago na dirki Tour de France. S pomočjo zdravnika Ferrarija in direktorja ekipe Bruyneela razvije najbolj sofisticiran dopinški program v zgodovini, ki mu je pomagal do kar sedmih lovorik. Novinar David Walsh je prvi podvomil v čistost Armstrongovih dosežkov in tvegal kariero, da bi razkrinkal eno največjih prevar našega časa.
the program_2015.opis_omdb: An Irish sports journalist becomes convinced that Lance Armstrong's performances during the Tour de France victories are fueled by banned substances. With this conviction, he starts hunting for evidence that will expose Armstrong.

final analysis_1992.opis_neo:
Dr. Isaac Barr je šarmantni psihiater iz San Francisca.

Njegova lepa pacientka Diana trpi zaradi travmatičnih dogodkov iz preteklosti. Diana mu predlaga pogovor z njeno sestro, da bi tako našla rešitev problema. 

Tako Isaac spozna privlačno Heather in se dokoplje do srhljivih skrivnosti iz otroštva obeh sester. Heather je tudi poročena z nasilnim gangsterjem Jimmyjem Evansom. 

Ker se Isaac in Heather neustavljivo privlačita, to sproži plaz dogodkov, ki nazadnje pripeljejo celo do umora.
final analysis_1992.opis_omdb: A psychiatrist (Gere) has an affair with his patient's sister (Basinger) who is married to a Greek mobster (Roberts). The mobster is a tyrant over his wife. The psychiatrist wants her to get a divorce, but she is afraid of what her husband would do. She has a medical condition that becomes apparent when she drinks. One night she drinks anyway and attacks her husband. The psychiatrist uses his professional pull to try and help her out of the consequences of her actions, but becomes uncertain if she is telling him the truth.

in good company_2004.opis_neo:
Dan Foreman pri 51. letih uživa življenje.

Igralec Dennis Quaid se nam bo tokrat predstavil v vlogi 51-letnega vodje prodaje tedenske športne revije. Obetavno mesto v službi mu spelje mladi, komaj 26-letni povzpetnik. Mu bo speljal tudi hčerko?
in good company_2004.opis_omdb: Dan is a 51 year old executive who learns that his company is being restructured and he is being demoted. Carter, who is 26, replaces him. Dan who has two teenage daughters with another on the way, decides to suck it up and work for Carter. Dan and Carter's working relationship is tested when Carter begins a relationship with Alex, who is Dan's daughter.

paydirt_2020.opis_neo:
Zakopani denar je napeta kriminalka o maščevanju.

Sveže izpuščeni tat Damien Brooks ponovno združi svojo staro ekipo, da bi našli zakopan plen iz spodletelega ropa. A na sledi so jim smrtonosni kartel in upokojeni šerif Tucker, ki išče maščevanje. 

Ko se lov na skrito bogastvo sprevrže v smrtonosno igro, sledi strelski obračun v puščavi, kjer bo zmagal najmočnejši.
paydirt_2020.opis_omdb: A parolee teams up with his old crew determined to find a buried bag of cash stolen five years ago from a DEA bust gone bad, while being tracked by a retired Sheriff.

safe haven_2013.opis_neo:
Kate se zaradi temačne preteklosti preseli v mestece Southport, a preteklosti tudi tam ne uspe ubežati.

Prihod skrivnostne mladenke Katie v mestece Southport v Severni Karolini, sproži kup ugibanj o njeni preteklosti.
safe haven_2013.opis_omdb: When a mysterious young woman named Katie appears in the small North Carolina town of Southport, her sudden arrival raises questions about her past. Beautiful, self-effacing Katie seems determined to avoid forming personal ties until a series of events draws her into two reluctant relationships: one with Alex, a widowed store owner with a kind heart and two young children; and another with her plainspoken single neighbor Jo. Despite her reservations, Katie begins to let down her guard, putting down roots in the close-knit community and becoming increasingly attached to Alex and his family. But even as Katie begins to fall in love, she struggles with the dark, haunting, terrifying secret that set her on a shattering journey across the country to the sheltered oasis of Southport. With Jo's empathetic, stubborn support, Katie eventually realizes that she must choose between a life of transient safety and one of riskier rewards . . . and that in the darkest hour, love is the only true safe haven.

hollywood homicide_2003.opis_neo:
V zabavni akcijski komediji Hollywoodski kifeljci moči združita Harrison Ford in Josh Hartnett.

Harrison Ford in Josh Hartnett sta nenavaden detektivski par v surovi akcijski komediji. Joe Gavilan je policijski veteran, ki mladega kolega K. C. Caldena uči te službe, medtem ko preiskujeta gangsterski umor celotne raperske skupine.
hollywood homicide_2003.opis_omdb: When not solving murders in Tinseltown, Detective Joe Gavilan and his rookie partner Kasey Calden both moonlight in other fields: Gavilan sells real estate (poorly), and Calden aspires to become an actor (Brando, namely). Assigned to the vicious in-club slaying of a promising young rap act, the two detective delve into the recording industry where they hope to find answers - ideally ones that also come with property buyers or auditions.

vendetta_2022.opis_neo:
Ko mu umorijo hčer, William Duncan vzame zakon v svoje roke in se odpravi na pot maščevanja.

Po brutalnem umoru njegove hčere in le malo verjetni zakoniti poti do pravice se William Duncan odloči, da bo zakon vzel v svoje roke. Loti se povračilnih ukrepov. Po umoru uličnega gangsterja, ki je bil neposredno odgovoren za njeno smrt, se znajde sredi vojne z gangsterjevim bratom, Roryjem Fetterjem, ter njegovo tolpo, ki je prav tako odločen, da se bo maščeval za padlega člana.
vendetta_2022.opis_omdb: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution. After killing the street thug who was directly responsible for her death, he finds himself in the middle of a war with the thug's brother, Rory Fetter, and his gang, who are equally hell-bent on getting even for their fallen member. What ensues is a tense back-and-forth game of one man's thirst for vengeance over another's. William comes to find that the quest for revenge always has the same ending.

svetat e golyam i spasenie debne otvsyak.naslov_sl: Svet je velik in odrešitev je blizu
svetat e golyam i spasenie debne otvsyak.naslov_orig: Svetat e golyam i spasenie debne otvsyakade
svetat e golyam i spasenie debne otvsyak.opis_neo:
Zgodba o Alexu, ki skuša najti svoj pravi jaz.

Po prometni nesreči se Alex, mlad Bolgarec, ki je odraščal v Nemčiji, ne spomni niti lastnega imena. Njegov dedek Bai Dan bi rad ozdravil njegovo amnezijo, zato pripravi duhovno potovanje v preteklost, v državo, od koder je prišel.
svetat e golyam i spasenie debne otvsyak.opis_omdb: What's in a game? For a young man, who has left his country behind, lost his memory and forgotten his love, the game might be the only way out. This is a story about a Bulgarian boy who grows up to be a German man. After a car accident Alex can't remember even what his name is. In an attempt to cure him from amnesia, his grandfather Bai Dan comes over to Germany and organizes a spiritual journey for his grandson back into his past, to the country where he came from. In changing places, time and transport, crossing half Europe, they play backgammon, the simplest, and yet the most complex of all games. That game leads Alex to the realizations of who he is, and that game is symbolic to the story. Destiny is the dice we hold in our own hands and life is a game on the edge between chance and skill.

reminiscence_2021.opis_neo:
Nick Bannister, zasebni raziskovalec uma krmari po privlačnem svetu preteklosti.

Zaradi vojne in dvigajoče se vodne gladine je svet opustošen, ljudje pa se v iskanju utehe vračajo v spomine. Po tem, ko odkrije način, kako potovati skozi čas, se znanstvenik odpravi na pot, da bi poiskal svojo izgubljeno ljubezen.
reminiscence_2021.opis_omdb: In a distant future in which Miami suffered severe consequences with global warming and became practically submerged, a particular Miami researcher is one of the highest references when it comes to recapturing lost or distant memories and return them to its contractors. But when he realizes a personal conflict with one of his clients, the situation becomes complicated.

when a stranger calls_2006.opis_neo:
Srednješolko pri čuvanju otrok terorizira neznanec z vrsto srhljivih telefonskih klicev. Strah preraste v grozo, ko izve, da klici prihajajo iz hiše.

Najstnica Jill naredi visok račun za telefon, ko jo fant prevara z najboljšo prijateljico Tiffany, zato jo oče prisili, da vrne dolg s čuvanjem otrok neke bogate družine. Ko pride v hišo, starša odideta ven, otroka pa spat. Kmalu Jill začne dobivati čudne telefonske klice. Prestrašena se odloči poklicati policijo, ki ji uspe odkriti, od kod kliče skrivnostni klicatelj. Medtem pride Tiffany, ki jo Jill prežene, toda ona ne more oditi zaradi slabega vremena.
when a stranger calls_2006.opis_omdb: Jill Johnson, a young teenager, is asked to baby sit for a rich family in a massive 3 story house. The kids are sleeping, giving her no company until she gets a mysterious unknown call. When she finds out the caller is in the house, she fights for freedom. Can she escape and save the kids in time?

dawn of the dead_2004.opis_neo:
Kako ubiti nekaj, kar je že mrtvo? To se sprašujejo junaki filma, ki so ujeti v trgovinskem poslopju, na vrata pa trkajo brezdušni zombiji.

Sarah Polley in Ving Rhames sta med zadnjimi preživelimi na zemlji, ki so jo opustošili ljudožerski zombiji. Skupaj s preostalimi preživelimi morata najti pot na otok, ki naj bi bil še varen.
dawn of the dead_2004.opis_omdb: Ana goes home to her peaceful suburban residence, but she is unpleasantly surprised the morning that follows when her husband is brutally attacked by her zombified neighbor. In the chaos of her once picturesque neighborhood, Ana flees and stumbles upon a police officer named Kenneth, along with more survivors who decide that their best chances of survival would be found in the deserted Crossroads Shopping Mall. When supplies begin running low and other trapped survivors need help, the group comes to the realization that they cannot stay put forever at the Shopping Mall and devise a plan to escape.

captain underpants: the first epic movie.naslov_orig: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
captain underpants: the first epic movie.opis_neo:
Družinska komedija prinaša zgodbo po stripovskih zgodbah o Kapitanu Gatniku avtorja in ilustratorja Dava Pilkeyja.

Prijatelja George in Harold sta prava šaljivca, z včasih kar preveč bujno domišljijo. Ko za novo potegavščino hipnotizirata ravnatelja svoje šole, ta prične verjeti, da je neumno navdušen in navdušujoče neumen superjunak, imenovan kapitan Gatnik.
captain underpants: the first epic movie.opis_omdb: George and Harold are two imaginative pranksters who make the depressing Jerome Horwitz School a better place. They hypnotize their nemesis, the mean-spirited principal Mr. Krupp. He transforms into the incredibly clueless yet kind-hearted and enthusiastic superhero named Captain Underpants. Even without the mean principal, they discover that having Captain Underpants comes at a steep price. Meanwhile, Professor Poopypants tries to eliminate laughter with the school snitch Melvin, and George and Harold discover that there may be more to Mr. Krupp than they had originally thought.

flushed away_2006.opis_neo:
Roddy je domač ljubljenček in izredno razvajena miš, ki dobi vse, česar si poželi.

Zgodba podgane iz elitnega dela mesta, ki jo v stranišču odplakne iz njenega stanovanja. Pristane v londonski kanalizaciji, kjer se mora naučiti novega in povsem drugačnega življenja.
flushed away_2006.opis_omdb: Roddy is a decidedly upper-crust "society mouse" who lives the life of a beloved pet in a posh Kensington flat. When a sewer rat named Sid comes spewing out of the sink and decides he's hit the jackpot, Roddy schemes to rid himself of the pest by luring him into the "whirlpool." Sid may be an ignorant slob, but he's no fool, so it is Roddy who winds up being flushed away into the bustling sewer world of Ratropolis. There Roddy meets Rita, an enterprising scavenger who works the sewers in her faithful boat, the Jammy Dodger. Roddy immediately wants out, or rather, up; Rita wants to be paid for her trouble; and, speaking of trouble, the villainous Toad - who royally despises all rodents equally, making no distinction between mice and rats--wants them iced... literally. The Toad dispatches his two hapless hench-rats, Spike and Whitey, to get the job done. When they fail, the Toad has no choice but to send to France for his cousin - that dreaded mercenary, Le Frog.

monsters vs. aliens_2009.opis_neo:
Ko Susan zadane meteorit in jo spremeni v velikanko, postane del ekipe pošasti, ki ji je vlada ukazala, naj ubrani Zemljo pred vesoljskim genijem.

Meteor iz daljnega vesolja zadene mladenko Susan in jo spremeni v velikanko. Odpeljejo jo v skrivno vladno ustanovo, kjer spozna mavrično skupino pošasti, ki so jih zbrali v vseh teh letih. Čeprav se zdi, da človeštvo pošasti zavrača, je prav Susan s svojimi novimi prijatelji edina, ki lahko Zemljo reši pred invazijo zlobnih nezemljanov.
monsters vs. aliens_2009.opis_omdb: When a meteorite from outer space hits a young California woman named Susan Murphy (Reese Witherspoon) and turns her into a giant monster, she is taken to a secret government compound where she meets a ragtag group of monsters also rounded up over the years. As a last resort, under the guidance of General W.R. Monger (Kiefer Sutherland), on a desperate order from President Hathaway (Stephen Colbert), the motley crew of Monsters is called into action to combat the aliens and save the world from imminent destruction.

the last house on the left_2009.naslov_orig: The Last House on the Left
the last house on the left_2009.opis_neo:
Če nekdo prizadene tiste, ki jih ljubite - kako daleč boste šli?

Po nasilnem napadu na mladi dekleti se tolpa pod vodstvom pobeglega kaznjenca zateče prav v hišo staršev ene od svojih žrtev, ti pa se domislijo posebej krvavih maščevalnih metod.
the last house on the left_2009.opis_omdb: After kidnapping and torturing two innocent teen girls, a group of people seek refuge in the home of the parents of one of the victimized girls. When the parents find out what happened to their daughter, they plot and carry out revenge on those that hurt her.

the curse of the were-rabbit_2005.opis_neo:
Wallace in njegov zvesti pes Gromit postaneta junaka po sili razmer pri zaustavitvi skrivnostnega zločinskega pohoda in reševanju mestnega korenja.

Ker se približuje vsakoletno tekmovanje v gojenju zelenjave, Wallace in Gromit pridno služita s podjetjem, ki z vrtov meščanov odstranjuje zajce na nenasilen način. Pri tem sta zelo uspešna, vse dokler ne začne soseske ustrahovati skrivnostna ''zelenjavojeda'' pošast. Našo dvojico pokliče lady Tottington, ki organizira pomemben dogodek. Vendar se v dogodek vmeša njen snubec Victor, ki bi zver najraje kar ustrelili in si tako zagotovil vlogo mestnega junaka. Ker je uspeh prireditve na nitki, lady Tottington na koncu popusti, ne ve pa, da ima Victor skrivne namere, ki imajo lahko zelo strašne posledice zanjo, za Wallacea in Gromita.
the curse of the were-rabbit_2005.opis_omdb: It's 'vege-mania' in Wallace and Gromit's neighborhood, and our two enterprising chums are cashing in with their humane pest-control outfit, "Anti-Pesto." With only days to go before the annual Giant Vegetable Competition, business is booming, but Wallace & Gromit are finding out that running a "humane" pest control outfit has its drawbacks as their West Wallaby Street home fills to the brim with captive rabbits. Suddenly, a huge, mysterious, veg-ravaging "beast" begins attacking the town's sacred vegetable plots at night, and the competition hostess, Lady Tottington, commissions Anti-Pesto to catch it and save the day. Lying in wait, however, is Lady Tottington's snobby suitor, Victor Quartermaine, who'd rather shoot the beast and secure the position of local hero-not to mention Lady Tottingon's hand in marriage. With the fate of the competition in the balance, Lady Tottington is eventually forced to allow Victor to hunt down the vegetable chomping marauder. Little does she know that Victor's real intent could have dire consequences for her ...and our two heroes.

spirit: stallion of the cimarron_2002.opis_neo:
Ujeti mustang je odločen, da se bo vrnil k svoji čredi, ne glede na vse ovire.

Divji in plemeniti mustang Spirit se med potovanjem po starem, divjem zahodu spoprijatelji z mladim indijanskim bojevnikom in najde pravo ljubezen v kobili Rosi. Kljub temu, da ga ljudje želijo držati v ujetništvu, Spirit vedno znova poišče pot na svobodo in skozi pustolovščino spozna prave življenjske vrednote.
spirit: stallion of the cimarron_2002.opis_omdb: A captured mustang remains determined to return to his herd no matter what.

love actually_2003.opis_neo:
Zgodba govori o različnih vidikih ljubezni na primeru desetih nepovezanih zgodb, ki se odvijajo v tednih pred božičem.

Zgodba "Pravzaprav ljubezen" je serija številnih ljubezenskih pripovedi o različnih ljudeh, od samskega predsednika vlade, pa do ostarele rock zvezde. Filmski dogodki se odvijajo v božičnem času v Angliji in Franciji.
love actually_2003.opis_omdb: Against the backdrop of aged has-been rock star Billy Mack's (Bill Nighy's) Christmas themed comeback cover of "Love Is All Around", which he knows is crap and makes no bones about it, much to his manager Joe's (Gregor Fisher's) chagrin as he promotes the record, several interrelated stories about romantic love and the obstacles to happiness through love for Londoners are presented in the five weeks preceding Christmas. Daniel's (Liam Neeson's) wife has just died, leaving him to take care of his adolescent stepson Sam (Thomas Brodie-Sangster) by himself. Daniel is uncertain how to deal with Sam and his problems without his wife present, especially in light of a potential budding romance within their household. Juliet (Keira Knightley) and Peter (Chiwetel Ejiofor) have just gotten married. They believe that Peter's best friend and best man Mark (Andrew Lincoln) hates Juliet, but won't say so to his or her face. Others looking at the situation from the outside believe Mark is jealous of Juliet, as he is in love with Peter. Jamie (Colin Firth), a writer, is taking a writing retreat by himself in rural France following catching his latest girlfriend (Sienna Guillory) in an indiscretion. Jamie ends up spending much time in France with Aurelia (Lúcia Moniz), the Portuguese woman hired as the housekeeper. The question becomes not only if they can communicate their day-to-day needs with each other as she speaks no English, he speaks no Portuguese, and neither speaks French very well, but communicate what seems to be their increasing mutual attraction to each other. Sarah (Laura Linney) has been in love with her co-worker Karl (Rodrigo Santoro) for the two years they have worked together, this attraction about which everyone in their workplace knows. Sarah has to decide if she can be forward enough to express this love directly to Karl, especially in light of what has been her personal priority of dealing with a family issue. Harry (Alan Rickman) and Karen (Dame Emma Thompson) have been in a stable long term marriage. His new assistant Mia (Heike Makatsch) drops hints to him that she would like them to be romantically involved. Harry has to decide whether to fall to the temptation, especially considering being married to a perceptive wife. Single and relatively young David (Hugh Grant) is the newly elected Prime Minister. At 10 Downing Street, he is attracted to one of the new household servants, Natalie (Martine McCutcheon), but isn't sure what to do about it seeing as to their respective positions, the probable public scrutiny, and an incident involving the visiting U.S. President (Billy Bob Thornton). Socially unaware Colin Frissell (Kris Marshall) believes that the lack of romantic love in his life is all the fault of standoffish British women. As such, he decides to take decisive albeit somewhat unusual geographic action. And John (Martin Freeman) and Judy (Joanna Page) are movie body doubles. They can communicate with each other straightforwardly while they are simulating sex filming a movie, but they may not be able to translate the feelings behind that simulation in real-life to each other.

shark tale_2004.opis_neo:
Ko po nesreči ubijejo sina gangsterskega morskega psa, se njegov nesojeni plen in njegov brat vegetarijanec odločita to izkoristiti sebi v prid.

V nesreči na lovu umre sin mafijskega morskega psa. Njegova nesojena žrtev Oscar in vegetarijanski brat Lenny se odločita, da bosta nesrečo izkoristila v svoj prid. Oscar se lažno predstavi kot iztrebljevalec morskih psov in postane junak koralnega grebena.
shark tale_2004.reziser: Bibo Bergeron, Vicky Jenson, Rob Letterman
shark tale_2004.opis_omdb: The sea underworld is shaken up when the son of shark mob boss Don Lino (Robert De Niro) is found dead, and a young fish named Oscar (Will Smith) is found at the scene. Being a bottom feeder, Oscar takes advantage of the situation and makes himself look like he killed the finned mobster. Oscar soon comes to realize that his claim may have serious consequences.

turbo_2013.opis_neo:
Nenavadna nesreča bi lahko navadnemu vrtnemu polžu pomagala uresničiti njegove največje sanje - zmagati na dirki Indy 500.

Polž Turbo sanja, da bi nekoč postal dirkač. S pomočjo nenavadne nesreče dobi nadnaravno hitrost in se odloči osvojiti dirko Indi 500. Kljub temu, da se mu vsi posmehujejo, Turbo kmalu dokaže svoje dirkaške spretnosti in vodstvo tekmovanja mu dovoli, da se udeleži dirke. Toda naduti šampion Guy je pripravljen poseči po najbolj zlobnih trikih, da bi Turba izločil iz tekmovanja.
turbo_2013.opis_omdb: After a freak accident infuses him with the power of super-speed, Turbo kicks into overdrive and embarks on an extraordinary journey to achieve the seemingly impossible: competing in the world's fastest race, the Indianapolis 500. With the help of his tricked-out streetwise snail crew, this ultimate underdog puts his heart and shell on the line to prove that no dream is too big, and no dreamer too small.

arrival_2016.opis_neo:
Na Zemlji pristanejo Nezemljani in ekipa strokovnjakov, vključno z jezikoslovko Louise, mora ugotoviti, ali predstavljajo nevarnost za človeštvo.

Svet je presunjen, ko se na 12 različnih lokacijah po svetu pojavijo ogromne vesoljske ladje. Ob grožnji vojne mora profesorica lingvistike najti način, kako komunicirati z vesoljskimi obiskovalci, preden bo prepozno.
arrival_2016.opis_omdb: Linguistics professor Louise Banks leads an elite team of investigators when gigantic spaceships touchdown in 12 locations around the world. As nations teeter on the verge of global war, Banks and her crew must race against time to find a way to communicate with the extraterrestrial visitors. Hoping to unravel the mystery, she takes a chance that could threaten her life and quite possibly all of mankind.

city by the sea_2002.opis_neo:
Vincent LaMarca je detektiv na oddelku za umore v New York Cityju. Toda v njegovi zadnji primer je vpleten tudi njegov odtujeni sin.

Vincent LaMarca je predan in spoštovan newyorški detektiv, ki je prehodil dolgo pot, da se je distanciral od svoje preteklosti. Pred štirimi desetletji je namreč njegov oče Angelo ubil mladega fanta, s tem pa sinu Vincentu zadal globoke čustvene rane, ki jih ta še vedno skriva pred svetom. Vincent živi sam v svojem majhnem stanovanju, pa čeprav ima intimno razmerje s svojo sosedo Michelle, ki živi pod njim.
city by the sea_2002.opis_omdb: New York City homicide detective Vincent LaMarca has forged a long and distinguished career in law enforcement, making a name for himself as a man intensely committed to his work. But on his latest case, the stakes are higher for Vincent--the suspect he's investigating is his own son. He and Joey have been painfully estranged ever since Vincent divorced his wife and left the decaying boardwalks of Long Beach, Long Island for the anonymity of Manhattan and a successful career with the NYPD. He lives his life in solitude, keeping his girlfriend at arm's length; the closest relationship he maintains is with his partner, Reg--and Vincent makes sure that stops at the precinct door. As long as Vincent lives in the protection of the present, he doesn't have to deal with the pain of his past--or his sorrow over his broken relationship with Joey. But this murder investigation is drawing Vincent home to Long Beach, the self-proclaimed City by the Sea, where the past has been waiting for him to return. The agonizing memory that has tortured him all his life--the death of his father, a convicted murderer who was executed when Vincent was just a boy--still plagues him. In the course of the investigation, he discovers that his own unresolved pain and failures as a father have deeply influenced Joey's life, and now his 18-month-old grandson may be fated to follow their self-destructive paths.

hotel transylvania summer vacation_2018.opis_neo:
Drakula se s prijatelji odpravi na križarjenje, da bi videli morske pošasti. A ne vedo, da je ladjo zasedla družina Van Helsing, ki sovraži pošasti.

V tretjem delu animirane uspešnice Manca preseneti Drakulo z družinskim potovanjem na razkošni križarski ladji, da bi se odpočil od napornega upravljanja hotela. Seveda se tudi njegovi prijatelji ne morejo upreti razkošnemu potovanju in oddihu, zato se mu navdušeno pridružijo. 
Pošasti se na ladji zabavajo in uživajo v vsem, kar je na voljo, od športnih dejavnosti do neverjetno okusnih jedi in eksotičnih izletov. Toda zabavo prekine nepričakovan ljubezenski zaplet: Drakula se do ušes zagleda v skrivnostno, čedno kapitanko Eriko. Zdaj bo morala Manca prevzeti zaščitniško vlogo in preprečiti, da se njen očka preveč zbliža z Eriko. 
Nihče namreč ne ve, da je Erika v resnici potomka zloglasnega lovca na pošasti Abrahama Van Helsinga, starodavnega sovražnika Drakule in vseh drugih pošasti.
hotel transylvania summer vacation_2018.opis_omdb: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family voyage on a luxury Monster Cruise Ship so he can take a vacation from providing everyone else's vacation at the hotel. The rest of Drac's Pack cannot resist going along. But once they leave port, romance arises when Dracula meets the mysterious ship Captain, Ericka. Now it's Mavis' turn to play the overprotective parent.

manchester by the sea_2016.opis_neo:
Lee Chandler je razdražljiv samotar, zaposlen kot hišnik v stanovanjskem bloku. Ko se je zaradi smrti brata prisiljen vrniti v domači kraj, ga tam čaka novo presenečenje.

Lee Chandler je razdražljiv samotar, zaposlen kot hišnik v stanovanjskem bloku. Ko se je zaradi smrti brata prisiljen vrniti v domači kraj, ga tam čaka novo presenečenje. Postal je skrbnik svojega 16-letnega nečaka. Kot da izguba brata in dvom v sposobnost vzgajanja najstnika nista dovolj, njegova vrnitev v preteklost zbudi nepopisno tragedijo.
manchester by the sea_2016.opis_omdb: Lee Chandler is a brooding, irritable loner who works as a handyman for a Boston apartment block. One damp winter day he gets a call summoning him to his hometown, north of the city. His brother's heart has given out suddenly, and he's been named guardian to his 16-year-old nephew. As if losing his only sibling and doubts about raising a teenager weren't enough, his return to the past re-opens an unspeakable tragedy.

megamind_2010.opis_neo:
Superzlobec Megaum končno pogubi svojega sovražnika, superjunaka Metromana. Zdaj mora ponovno poiskati smisel svojega življenja.

Super-zlobnež Megaum končno premaga svojega nasprotnika, junaka Metromana. A brez junaka, s katerim bi se boril, njegovo življenje nima smisla. Ko njegovemu mestu grozi nevarnost, Megaum skuje načrt.
megamind_2010.opis_omdb: After super-villain Megamind (Ferrell) kills his good-guy nemesis, Metro Man (Pitt), he becomes bored since there is no one left to fight. He creates a new foe, Titan (Hill), who, instead of using his powers for good, sets out to destroy the world, positioning Megamind to save the day for the first time in his life.

welcome home, roscoe jenkins_2008.opis_neo:
Uspešni voditelj pogovorne oddaje zapusti Los Angeles, da bi se ponovno združil s svojo družino na ameriškem jugu.

Njegova oddaja je najbolj gledana v ZDA, obenem pa ima RJ še lepo zaročenko in vedno polno denarnico. Ko se ob 50. obletnici poroke svojih staršev po dolgem času spet odpravi domov, njegovo arogantno obnašanje močno zmoti njegove domače, ki vztrajajo pri tem, da se RJ ponovno spomni na svoje korenine in malce pristriže svoje peruti. Če si jih ne bo pristrigel sam, pa mu bodo pri tem z veseljem pomagali svojci.
welcome home, roscoe jenkins_2008.opis_omdb: Dr. R.J. Stevens is a talk-show host who visits his family in the Deep South. While there he reunites with his brother Otis, his sister Betty, his cousin/rival Clyde, and his childhood love interest Lucinda Allen.

volki i ovtsy. beeezumnoe prevrashchenie.opis_neo:
Producenti filma Snežna kraljica predstavljajo čudovito zgodbo o prijateljstvu in ljubezni med volkom in ovco.

V daljni čarobni deželi leži slikovita vasica, obkrožena z zelenimi pašniki in gričevjem, v kateri živi čreda brezbrižnih ovac. Njihovo mirno in spokojno življenje vznemiri krdelo volkov, ki se utabori v njihovi bližini. Njihov vodja se odpravlja v pokoj, nasledil pa naj bi ga tisti volk, ki bo premagal svojega nasprotnika in s tem dokazal svojo vrednost. 

Edini, ki je pripravljen sprejeti izziv, je mogočni Gromki. Edini, ki se mu drzne zoperstaviti, je Griva, najbolj priljubljen volk v krdelu, ki pa je obenem tudi malce norčav in neresen. Ker bi rad vsem po vrsti, še posebej pa svoji zaročenki Bianci, dokazal, da si zasluži postati vodja krdela, se Griva odpravi v gozd, kjer naleti na tabor ciganskih zajcev. Njihova jasnovidka mu ponudi napoj za preobrazbo, s pomočjo katerega se Griva ob vrnitvi v svoje krdelo spremeni v … ovna!
volki i ovtsy. beeezumnoe prevrashchenie.reziser: Andrey Galat, Maksim Volkov, Haishun Xing
volki i ovtsy. beeezumnoe prevrashchenie.opis_omdb: In a magical faraway land, in a picturesque little village nestled among green meadows and rolling hills, lives a flock of carefree sheep. But their pastoral and stress-free life is interrupted when a pack of wolves sets up camp in the nearby ravine. In accordance with ancient traditions, the retiring pack leader Magra announces that his future successor must prove his right to lead by vanquishing his rivals. When the powerful and blood-thirsty Ragear steps forward, the only wolf brave enough to challenge him is Grey, the pack's favorite, but a hopeless goof ball. To become a leader and win back Bianca's love, Grey goes off into the woods, where he discovers a camp of Gypsy rabbits. The fortune-teller rabbit Mami gives him a magical "transmutation potion." Grey drinks the potion and goes back to the wolves' den, but finds out upon arrival that he has been transformed into... a ram!

the house with a clock in its walls_2018.naslov_orig: The House with a Clock in Its Walls
the house with a clock in its walls_2018.opis_neo:
Čarobna priredba mladinskega romana o siroti, ki po vselitvi v stričevo hišo ugotovi, da se v njej skriva ura, ki s tiktakanjem naznanja konec sveta.

Desetletni Lewis Barnavelt pride živet k svojemu stricu v staro in skrivnostno vilo, v kateri je nekoč živel zakonski par, ki je skušal uničiti svet. Tik pred smrtjo sta izdelala uro in jo vzidala v eno od sten. Vsak njen 'tik-tak' pomeni, da je konec sveta vse bližje. Ko se izkaže, da je njegov stric čarovnik, se Lewis znajde v središču nevarnih čarovnij, sploh ko odkrije v steno zazidano uro, ki je bila ustvarjena, da prikliče sodni dan.
the house with a clock in its walls_2018.opis_omdb: Lewis Barnavelt, after losing his parents, is sent to Michigan to live with his uncle Jonathan. He discovers his uncle is a warlock, and enters a world of magic and sorcery. But this power is not limited to good people: Lewis learns of Isaac Izard, an evil wizard who constructed a magical clock with black magic, as long as it exists it will keep ticking, counting down to doomsday. He died before he could finish the clock, but he hid the clock in his house, where Uncle Jonathan now lives. Now Lewis and Jonathan must find the clock before it finishes its countdown and ends the world.

the big wedding_2013.opis_neo:
Bližajoča poroka znova združi ločenca Dona in Ellie, ki želita pred oltar pospremiti posvojenega sina. Predporočni kaos kmalu zajame celotno družino.

Bližajoča se poroka znova združi ločenca Dona in Ellie, ki želita pred oltar pospremiti posvojenega sina. Ker na obisk prihaja njegova verna biološka mama iz Kolumbije, se morata Don in Ellie znova pretvarjati, da sta poročena.
the big wedding_2013.opis_omdb: Don and Ellie were once married and have two children, Lyla and Jared. They adopt a boy from Colombia, Alejandro. Eventually they would divorce, Ellie would move away and Don would hook up with Bebe, Ellie's best friend. When Alejandro is about to get married, he informs Don and Ellie that he never told his natural mother who is so traditional that they got divorced. And she is coming for the wedding so he asks them if they can pretend to still be married. Don and Ellie reluctantly agree to it and Bebe moves out who is also upset that Don doesn't want to commit. Lyla who is married is going through a rough patch in her marriage. And Jared who hasn't had much luck with women finds himself attracted to Alejandro's extremely sensual sister, Nuria.

the 355_2022.opis_neo:
Skrivno orožje pade v roke plačancev, agent Cie združi moči s tremi mednarodnimi agenti na skupni misiji. A jim na poti stoji skrivnostna ženska ...

Ko najbolj skrivnostno in uničujoče orožje pade v roke pohlepnega plačanca, mora drzna CIA agentka Mason \"Mace\" Brown (z oskarjem nominirana JESSICA CHASTAIN) združiti moči s konkurenčno nemško agentko Marie (Diane Kruger), bivšo MI6 zaveznico in računalniško specialistko Khadijah (dobitnica oskarja LUPITA NYONG'O) in poklicno kolumbijsko psihologinjo Gracielo (dobitnica oskarja PENÉLOPE CRUZ) ter se podati na usodno misijo, s katero bi orožje dobila nazaj, med tem pa jim je ves čas za petami skrivnostna Lin Mi Sheng (BINGBING FAN), ki sledi vsak njihov korak. Ko se akcija razprostira preko celotnega sveta, od lokalov na ulicah Pariza do tržnic Maroka in razkošnih hiš Shanghaia, četverica žensk med seboj splete zvestobo, ki bo lahko rešila svet, ali vse štiri stala življenja.
the 355_2022.opis_omdb: When a top-secret weapon falls into mercenary hands, wild card CIA agent Mason "Mace" Brown will need to join forces with rival badass German agent Marie, former MI6 ally and cutting-edge computer specialist Khadijah, and skilled Colombian psychologist Graciela on a lethal, breakneck mission to retrieve it, while also staying one-step ahead of a mysterious woman, Lin Mi Sheng, who is tracking their every move. As the action rockets around the globe from the cafes of Paris to the markets of Morocco to the wealth and glamour of Shanghai, the quartet of women will forge a tenuous loyalty that could protect the world-or get them killed.

the secret garden_2020.opis_neo:
Osirotela deklica odkrije čarobni vrt, ki se skriva na posestvu njenega strogega strica.

Mary je devetletna deklica, ki v epidemiji kolere v Indiji izgubi starša, zato je poslana v Anglijo, kjer naj bi ji dom ponudil sorodnik, gospod Craven. Vendar ta veliko potuje in Mary je v njegovi turobni graščini večinoma sama. Nekega dne v vrtnem zidu odkrije zaraščena vrata, za katerimi se skriva vrt, poln čarovnije, ki za vedno spremeni njeno življenje.
the secret garden_2020.opis_omdb: The main character Mary Lennox "Dixie Egerickx" is a spoiled 10-year-old girl of rich parents who grew up in India. After her parents die from cholera, Mary is sent to live in Misselthwaite Manor in Yorkshire with her uncle Archibald Craven "Colin Firth" and the housekeeper Mrs. Medlock "Julie Walters". Mary discovers that the house holds many secrets. There she finds a key that leads her to a garden held locked for years by her uncle after the death of his wife. Soon she finds a room in the manor where her sick cousin Colin "Edan Hayhurst" has spend his entire life in his bed, completely unable to walk. But with the help of her new friend Dickon "Amir Wilson" the children manage to bring the garden back to life. In the garden Colin learns to walk and he becomes a healthy and happy young boy. When Lord Craven one day sees the children playing in the garden, he is amazed by the sight of his son walking. He feels joy for the first time since years.

poolman_2023.opis_neo:
Čistilcu bazenov se niti ne sanja, da se je ujel v mrežo spletk, prevar in nevarnosti.

Darren Barrenman (Chris Pine) skrbi za bazen v nekdanjem motelu in zdaj stanovanjskem kompleksu v Los Angelesu. Ko ga neka fatalka (DeWanda Wise) prosi, naj razkrije, za kaj dejansko gre pri nekem sumljivem poslu člana mestnega sveta (Stephen Tobolowsky), Darrenu - ki se mu niti ne sanja, da se je ujel v mrežo spletk, prevar in nevarnosti - na pomoč priskočijo njegovi prijatelji iz kompleksa.
poolman_2023.opis_omdb: Darren Barrenman is an unwavering optimist and native Angeleno who spends his days looking after the pool of the Tahitian Tiki apartment block and fighting to make his hometown a better place to live.

quackerz_2016.opis_neo:
Med dvema jatama rac se začne hladna vojna. In ko se gredo odrasli vojno, se otroka vodij zaljubita in jima ni mar za spor njunih očetov.

Na majhnem otoku, izgubljenem v daljni Kitajski, se mirno življenje rac mandarink nenadoma spremeni v čisto zmešnjavo, ko vojska divjih rac, ki so na križarjenju do Havajev, po naključju pristane na njihovem otoku. Vodja divjih rac ne spoštuje njihove tradicije, cesar rac mandarink pa ne mara nepovabljenih gostov. Med dvema jatama se zaneti hladna vojna. In ko se gredo odrasli vojno, se otroka vodij zaljubita in jima ni mar za spor njunih očetov.
quackerz_2016.opis_omdb: On the little island lost in far sunny China the regular life of mandarin ducks in an instant turns into chaos: the flock of the military mallards are making a cruise to Hawaii, by mistake lands on the mandarine's island. The chief of mallards, Duckmus doesn't want to reckon with the local traditions, as well the mandarin's Emperor doesn't like uninvited guests. The Cold War breaks out between two clans . The heir of the of mandarin's Emperor, Longway is falling in love with charming Erica, the daughter of the mallards chief and kids don't care about the war between their dads. While leaders are trying to sort out their relationships, Longway gets into a trouble. Two stupid thieves from the human town, on the instructions of the Old Witch, start to hunt for Longway. It turns out, that Longway is the magic "Sun Duck", which, according to the legend, is endowed with superhuman abilities, and it allows him to get power from the sun. The Old Witch is ready for any crime for the sake of solar power and eternal youth...

1up_2022.opis_neo:
Potem ko Valerie zapusti univerzitetno ešportno ekipo, hitro ugotovi, da jo je odločitev stala štipendije.

Valerie s svojimi občudovanja vrednimi spretnostmi v igranju video igric dobi štipendijo na fakulteti in mesto v e-športni ekipi, v kateri prevladujejo fantje. Slednji jo z negodovanjem sprejmejo medse; a igra se mora nadaljevati.
1up_2022.opis_omdb: Follows a gamer who quits her college esports team due to sexism from her male counterparts.

better off zed_2018.opis_neo:
Kaj bi se zgodilo, če bi prišlo do apokalipse in bi bili srečni zaradi tega?

Letni tridesetletnik z veseljem presedi apokalipso zombijev v svojem utrjenem predmestnem domu, medtem ko njegova soproga to doživlja bolj pragmatično in v želji preživeti, zato ga sili, naj postane morilec zombijev, ki pa se jim sam trudi na vse pretege izogniti.
better off zed_2018.opis_omdb: What if the apocalypse came... and you were happy about it? Logline: A lazy thirty-something is happy to sit out the zombie apocalypse in his fortified suburban abode, until his wife acts on a more pragmatic strategy for survival, forcing him to become the zombie killer he was trying to avoid.

spark: a space tail_2016.opis_neo:
Pred trinajstimi leti je pohlepni general Zhong prevzel nadzor nad planetom Bana in ga povsem uničil. Zdaj mu vlada z železno pestjo.

Pred 13 leti je pohlepni general Zhong prevzel nadzor nad planetom Bana in ga povsem uničil. Zdaj mu vlada z železno pestjo. A najstniška opica Spark in njegovi prijatelji – na boj pripravljena lisica Vix in tehnično podkovani pujs Chuck – dojamejo, da Zhong po tihem načrtuje prevzeti nadzor nad celotnim vesoljem, in to tako, da bo ujel vesoljsko pošast po imenu Kraken, ki zmore ustvarjati črne luknje. Če se Zhong dokoplje Krakenovih sposobnosti, bo imel v rokah najbolj uničujoče orožje, kar jih je. Na Sparku in njegovih prijateljih je, da mu preprečijo nakano.
spark: a space tail_2016.opis_omdb: Thirteen years ago, the power-mad General Zhong seized control of Planet Bana and tore it to pieces in the process. Now splintered into hundreds of shards, Zhong is Bana's evil-overlord, ruling with an iron fist. Enter Spark, a teenage monkey and his friends, Vix, a battle-ready fox, and Chunk, a tech-savvy pig. Spark learns of Zhong's secret plan to take over the universe by capturing a giant space monster known as the Kraken, a beast that has the power to create black holes. If Zhong manages to harness the Kraken's power, he'll have history's deadliest weapon at his fingertips, and it's up to Spark and his friends to stop him. Spark's journey takes him to the farthest reaches of the universe, where he encounters great dangers and discovers the secret of his true identity. An action-packed space adventure full of humor and heart, this movie is the story of a boy who takes on great responsibility and in the process discovers his rightful place in the universe.

savannah_2013.opis_neo:
Savannah je resnična zgodba o Wardu Allenu, romantiku in nevsakdanji osebnosti ter njegovemu prijatelju, osvobojenemu sužnju Moultrieju.

Resnična zgodba o aristokratu Wardu, ki se odloči postati lovec na race, o njegovem prijateljstvu z osvobojenim sužnjem Christmasom in o ljubezni njegovega življenja Lucy. Ob spremembi zakona o lovu se mora nadarjeni, a problematični Ward boriti, da ohrani svoj način življenja na reki Savannah in da obdrži žensko, ki jo ljubi.
savannah_2013.opis_omdb: SAVANNAH is the true story of Ward Allen, a romantic and bombastic character who rejects his plantation heritage for the freedom of life on a river. Ward navigates the change of early 20th century America on the wrong side of the law and society, his loyal friend, a freed slave named Christmas Moultrie, at his side. Master of Shakespeare, and the shotgun that provides Savannah's markets with fowl, Ward fights for his rights as a hunter. His charisma and eloquent rhetoric win the heart of a society woman who defies her father to marry him. An elderly Moultrie tells the story of life on the river with his friend to a little boy, who passes the legendary Ward Allen down to the next generation.

les trois mousquetaires: milady_2023.opis_neo:
D'Artagnan je prisiljen združiti moči z Milady, da bi rešil ugrabljeno Constance.

Zaradi napovedane vojne so Athos, Porthos in Aramis že na bojišču, skrivnost iz preteklosti pa razbije stara zavezništva.
les trois mousquetaires: milady_2023.opis_omdb: The Musketeers decide to join forces with the mysterious Milady to put their enemies out of action, while the Kingdom of France is divided by religious wars and remains under British threat.

eye in the sky_2015.opis_neo:
Polkovnica Katherine Powell (Helen Mirren) vodi tajni podvig: zajeli naj bi člane teroristične skupine, ki živijo v varni hiši v Nairobiju v Keniji.

Polkovnica K. Powell vodi tajni podvig zajetja članov teroristične skupine, ki živijo v varni hiši v Nairobiju. Pilot Watts pripravi vse potrebno za uničenje hiše, ko vanjo vstopi devetletno dekle. Pred Powellovo je pomembna odločitev – nadaljevati ali prekiniti misijo, kar sproži mednarodni spor zaradi moralnih in političnih vprašanj vojskovanja.
eye in the sky_2015.opis_omdb: Colonel Katherine Powell (Dame Helen Mirren) is a U.K.-based military officer in command of a top secret drone operation to capture terrorists in Kenya. Through remote surveillance and on-the-ground intel, Powell discovers the targets are planning a suicide bombing and the mission escalates from "capture" to "kill". But as American pilot Lieutenant Steve Watts (Aaron Paul) is about to engage, a nine-year old girl enters the kill zone triggering an international dispute, reaching the highest levels of U.S. and British government, over the moral, political, and personal implications of modern warfare.

le petit nicolas: qu'est-ce qu'on attend.naslov_sl: Mali Nikec: Kako se je sploh začelo?
le petit nicolas: qu'est-ce qu'on attend.naslov_orig: Le petit Nicolas: Qu'est-ce qu'on attend pour être heureux?
le petit nicolas: qu'est-ce qu'on attend.opis_neo:
Nikec živi otroštvo, polno veselja in učenja med druženjem, prepiri, kaznimi, potegavščinami in igrami.

Nekje med Montmartrom in Saint-Germain-des-Présom Jean-Jacques Sempé in René Goscinny na velikem belem papirju oživita nagajivega prikupnega dečka Nikca. Nikec ima veselo in pestro otroštvo, od šolskih iger do druženja na poletnem taboru. Medtem ko so pustolovščine malega Nikca in njegovih prijateljev v polnem zamahu, pa fant prikoraka v studio svojih ustvarjalcev in ju brezbrižno zaslišuje. Sempé in Goscinny bosta povedala zgodbo o svojem prijateljstvu in karieri ter bosta razkrila otroštvo, polno upanja in sanj.

jfk revisited: through the looking glass.naslov_orig: JFK Revisited: Through the Looking Glass
jfk revisited: through the looking glass.opis_neo:
Tajni podatki, povezani z atentatom na predsednika Kennedyja v veliko širšem kontekstu, s ciljem osvetliti, kaj se je v resnici zgodilo leta 1963.

Ko je Warner Bros. decembra 1991 predstavil film »JFK« Oliverja Stona o atentatu na predsednika Johna F. Kennedyja, se je odprlo novo poglavje ene največjih ameriških skrivnosti. Ta dokumentarni film nadaljuje raziskovanje dramatičnega umora enega najvplivnejših politikov 20. stoletja in združuje pogovore s pisatelji, zgodovinarji, pričami ter forenzičnimi strokovnjaki, balisti in zdravniki iz Los Angelesa, Dallasa, Washingtona in San Francisca, da bi razkril resnico, ki je bila dolgo zakrita z napačnimi informacijami in teorijami. V svetu, kjer se meja med dejstvi in manipulacijo zabriše, film ponuja nov vpogled v sveže odkrite dokaze in odpira vprašanje, ki še danes ostaja brez odgovora: kaj se je v resnici zgodilo tistega dne v Dallasu. Resnica ni dokončna – in morda je nikoli ne bomo v celoti poznali.
jfk revisited: through the looking glass.opis_omdb: Declassified files related to President Kennedy's assassination in a far larger context, aiming to shine more light on what really happened in 1963.

winwin_2016.opis_neo: Ameriški naložbeni sklad kupi avstrijska podjetja, prevzame pa tudi politiko na Dunaju. Denar še naprej vrti svet.
winwin_2016.opis_omdb: American investment fund buys Austrian companies, but also takes over politics in Vienna. Money still makes the world go round.

die fälscher_2007.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o največji ponarejevalski akciji, ki so jo leta 1936 organizirali nacisti.

Resnična zgodba ponarejevalca Salomona Sorowitscha, ki je leta 1944 je v koncentracijskem taborišču pristal, da bo pomagal pri ponarejanju denarja.
die fälscher_2007.opis_omdb: The Counterfeiters is the true story of the largest counterfeiting operation in history, set up by the Nazis in 1936. Salomon "Sally" Sorowitsch is the king of counterfeiters. He lives a mischievous life of cards, booze, and women in Berlin during the Nazi-era. Suddenly his luck runs dry when arrested by Superintendent Friedrich Herzog. Immediately thrown into the Mauthausen concentration camp, Salomon exhibits exceptional skills there and is soon transferred to the upgraded camp of Sachsenhausen. Upon his arrival, he once again comes face to face with Herzog, who is there on a secret mission. Hand-picked for his unique skill, Salomon and a group of professionals are forced to produce fake foreign currency under the program Operation Bernhard. The team, which also includes detainee Adolf Burger, is given luxury barracks for their assistance. But while Salomon attempts to weaken the economy of Germany's allied opponents, Adolf refuses to use his skills for Nazi profit and would like to do something to stop Operation Bernhard's aid to the war effort. Faced with a moral dilemma, Salomon must decide whether his actions, which could prolong the war and risk the lives of fellow prisoners, are ultimately the right ones.

the neighbor_2016.opis_neo:
Jack živi v Cutterju v državi Misisipi s svojim dekletom Rosie. Imata srhljivega soseda Troya.

Rosie nekega dne z daljnogledom osupnjena vidi, kako sosed Troy v svojem dvorišču trpinči ranjenega moškega. Še bolj je osupnjena, ko se Troy obrne in pogleda naravnost vanjo. Pozneje istega večera ob prihodu domov John opazi, da Rosie ni. Ni vzela ne kovčkov ne denarja. 

Nekaj je narobe. Ko zagleda daljnogled, usmerjen v Troyevo hišo, logično sklepa in se odloči oditi k sosedu pogledat, ali jo bo našel tam. Niti ne sluti, kaj bo našel.
the neighbor_2016.opis_omdb: In the town of Cutter, most people keep to themselves. But when John comes home to find his girlfriend missing, he becomes suspicious and sneaks into his neighbor's house. What he finds there is unnerving, to say the least. Will he escape the house alive or become another victim?

come early morning_2006.opis_neo:
Lucy je delovna ženska, ki se izogiba resnim razmerjem. Te težave izvirajo iz družinske preteklosti.

﻿Lucy je marljiva, a tudi samodestruktivna ženska, katere življenje je dolg niz pijanih avantur za eno noč. Znova skuša vzpostaviti odnos s čustveno odtujenim očetom, kmalu pa spozna prišleka Cala, ki v njej vidi veliko več, kot je sama pripravljena priznati. Lucy - brez izkušenj z resnimi zvezami - ni sposobna preseči lastnega sramu in Cala odrine od sebe, ob čemer se sooči z dejstvom, da so porušeni in odtujeni odnosi v njeni družini privedli do tega, da je nesposobna intimnosti in osebne rasti.
come early morning_2006.opis_omdb: The sins of the fathers. In a town near Little Rock, Lucy Fowler works hard for a construction firm; on weekends she drinks, goes home with someone, and come early morning, wakes and leaves as fast as she can. She cares a lot about her father, newly back in town, a painfully shy man who has nothing to say to her. She does go to a Holy Roller church with him about the same time that she starts, fitfully, a relationship with Cal Percell, new in town and a good guy. She kisses him sober, but still has demons to confront. What's the source of her careless ways; can she turn coal into a diamond?

día de muertos_2019.opis_neo:
V postrevolucionarni Mehiki v mestu Santa Clara živi Salma, 16-letna sirota, ki se odpravi na pustolovščino, da bi našla svoje starše.

V mehiškem mestu Santa Clara živi Salma, 16-letnica, ki ni spoznala svojih bioloških staršev. Salma večino življenja posluša zgodbe, da sta jo starša zapustila. Iskala je kraje, kjer bi ju morda lahko našla, dokler ni odkrila posevne knjige, polne zanimivih zgodb o mestu, v katerem živi, in o zgodovini njenega ljudstva. S to posebno knjigo se Salma s svojima bratoma odpravi na pustolovščino, da bi našla manjkajoče člene, ki manjkajo v njihovi družinski zapuščini.
día de muertos_2019.opis_omdb: In the Mexican town of Santa Clara, lives Salma, a 16 year-old orphan who never got to meet her biological parents. The only story she's been told her whole life is that they abandoned her. Salma has spent most of her life dedicated to searching out clues for her parents' identity and their whereabouts with little to no luck, until she discovers a special book that is filled with stories of Santa Clara and the history of their people. With this new special book, Salma sets off onto an adventure with her two brave and heart-warming foster brothers, Jorge and Pedro, to find the missing links to her family's heritage in hopes to finally get to meet her long lost parents.

our friend_2019.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o družini, ki se spopada z materino neozdravljivo boleznijo in najde oporo v najboljšem prijatelju zakonskega para.

Pravi prijatelj je vedno ob tebi, v dobrem in slabem. Po novici, ki jim je spremenila življenje, najde družina Teague nepričakovano podporo v najboljšem prijatelju, ki da svoje življenje na čakanje, da bi jim lahko pomagal, ko je najnujneje. Učinek te nesebične, čeprav zapletene geste, se sčasoma pokaže mnogo globlji, kot bi si kdo lahko predstavljal.
our friend_2019.opis_omdb: After receiving life-altering news, a couple finds unexpected support from their best friend, who puts his own life on hold and moves into their family home, bringing an impact much greater and more profound than anyone could have imagined

fisherman's friends_2019.opis_neo:
Film temelji na resnični zgodbi o bendu iz Cornwalla. Sestavlja ga 10 ribičev, ki posnamejo uspešen album s tradicionalno glasbo.

Londonski glasbeni manager Danny se s prijatelji odpravi v zakotno cornwalsko vas na moški konec tedna. Na poti srečajo ribiški bend Fisherman's Friends, v šali pa šef naroči Dannyju, naj z njimi podpiše pogodbo. Čeprav Danny prepričuje ribiče, da sta slava in bogastvo enako pomembna kot prijateljstvo, v glasbi odkrije nekaj, kar nagovori njegovo dušo.
fisherman's friends_2019.opis_omdb: A fast living, cynical London music executive (Daniel Mays) heads to a remote Cornish village on a stag weekend where he's pranked by his boss (Noel Clarke) into trying to sign a group of shanty singing fishermen (led by James Purefoy). He becomes the ultimate "fish out of water" as he struggles to gain the respect or enthusiasm of the unlikely boy band and their families (including Tuppence Middleton) who value friendship and community over fame and fortune. As he's drawn deeper into the traditional way of life he's forced to reevaluate his own integrity and ultimately question what success really means.

fisherman's friends: one and all_2022.opis_neo:
Nadaljevanje uspešne britanske komedija iz 2019 in neverjetna, resnična zgodba.

Po nepričakovanem uspehu albuma spet spremljamo najstarejši "boy bend" na svetu, leto dni po boju s pritiski, pastmi in preizkušnjami, ki jih prinese slava. Spremljamo vzpone in padce, prijateljstva na preizkušnji, skupnosti pa vlada prekletstvo drugega albuma, ko si skupini uresničijo sanje z nastopom v Glastonburyju.
fisherman's friends: one and all_2022.opis_omdb: Following the success of their first album, the Fisherman's Friends struggle to adjust to their new-found fame and work towards a second album.

the paperboy_2012.opis_neo:
Provokativen triler režiserja Leeja Danielsa o preiskovalnem novinarju, ki raziskuje zgodbo na smrt obsojenega zločinca.

Raziskovalni novinar Ward Jansen in njegov sodelavec Yardley Acheman s pomočjo Wardovega mlajšega brata Jacka in privlačne oboževalke zapornikov Charlotte Bless raziskujeta senzacionalno zgodbo, na kateri bi lahko gradila svojo kariero.
the paperboy_2012.opis_omdb: Eldest son Ward Jansen is a star reporter for a Miami newspaper and has returned home with close friend Yardley to investigate a racial murder case. Younger brother Jack Jansen has returned home after a failed stint at university as a star swimmer. To help give his life some direction, Ward gives Jack a job on their investigation as their driver. But into the mix comes the fiancée of the imprisoned convict who stirs up confusing feelings of love and lust for the young Jack. Meanwhile, Ward and Yardley's investigation stirs up deep-rooted issues of race and acceptance which could cause serious consequences for everyone involved.

demonic_2021.opis_neo:
Mlada ženska osvobodi grozljive demone.

Ime režiserja te nove grozljivke, Neilla Blomkampa je širši publiki tega žanra že poznano. S svojim režijskim prvencem iz leta 2009 „District 9“ si je zaslužil vse slavospeve publike in kritikov ter osvojil nominacijo za nagrado Oskar. Njegov naslednji film „Elysium“ je prav tako pobral odlične kritike. Letos Blomkamp predstavlja film, ki je bil skrivnostno posnet tekom trajanja pandemije, ki govori o mladi ženski, ki osvobaja zastrašujoče demone, ki se razkrijejo v obliki nadnaravnih sil v desetletja trajajočem razkolu med mamo in hčerjo.
demonic_2021.opis_omdb: A young woman unleashes terrifying demons when supernatural forces at the root of a decades-old rift between mother and daughter are ruthlessly revealed.

spare parts_2015.opis_neo:
Štirje srednješolci brez izkušenj in financ tekmujejo v robotiki s prvaki iz tehnološkega inštituta Massachusetts.

Resnična zgodba o štirih ameriških srednješolcih, ki pod vodstvom učitelja osnujejo klub za robotiko. Brez izkušenj in zgolj z 800 dolarji, odsluženimi avtomobilskimi deli in velikopoteznimi sanjami, se moštvo spopade s prvaki na področju, tehnološkim inštitutom iz Massachusettsa. Izkušnja jih nauči tudi kako ustvariti vezi, ki bodo trajale vse življenje.
spare parts_2015.opis_omdb: Four Hispanic high school students form a robotics club under the leadership of their school's newest teacher, Fredi. With no experience, 800 bucks, used car parts and a dream, this rag tag team goes up against the country's reigning robotics champion, MIT. On their journey, they learn not only how to build a robot- they learn to build a bond that will last a lifetime.

miles ahead_2015.opis_neo:
Film je nadvse zanimiv portret enega od glasbenih genijev 20. stoletja, Milesa Davisa.

Vodilni predstavnik sodobnega jazza, Miles Davis, v cvetu svoje kariere za pet let izgine izpred oči javnosti. Zaradi hudih bolečin v kolku se zapre v svoj dom, kjer njegov ustvarjalni genij ohromijo zdravila, hkrati pa ga preganjajo neprijetni spomini na preteklost. Premeten glasbeni poročevalec Dave se uspe prebiti v Davisovo hišo in v naslednjih dneh se moža, ne da bi se tega zavedala, podata na pustolovščino. Najti morata ukradene posnetke Davisovih najnovejših skladb.
miles ahead_2015.opis_omdb: An exploration of the life and music of Miles Davis.

i still believe_2020.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba o glasbeniku Jeremyju Campu in njegovi poti ljubezni in izgube, ki dokaže, da tudi v najtežjih trenutkih obstaja upanje.

Resnična zgodba, posneta po avtobiografiji z istim naslovom, sledi Campovi ljubezni do svoje prve žene, s katero se je kljub njeni smrtni bolezni poročil oktobra 2000. Na medenih tednih sta izvedela, da se je Mellisin rak razširil, nakar je februarja leta 2001 umrla. Film prikazuje Campova najstniška leta, njegov vzpon v svetu glasbe in na koncu tudi srečanje s svojo drugo ženo, Adrienne.še bolj poglobila v delo in osvojila drugo Nobelovo nagrado za svoja odkritja, ki so spremenila svet.
i still believe_2020.opis_omdb: The true-life story of Christian music star Jeremy Camp and his journey of love and loss that proves that there is always hope.

baby phone_2017.opis_neo:
Ben, dedič uspešne tovarne zamaškov, ki pa nikakor ne želi zamenjati svojega očeta na mestu direktorja, se trudi uspeti kot skladatelj.

Ben, dedič uspešne tovarne zamaškov, ki pa nikakor ne želi zamenjati svojega očeta na mestu direktorja niti uporabljati družinskega denarja, ki ga ima na razpolago, se trudi uspeti kot skladatelj. Njegov dober prijatelj še iz otroštva je namreč glasbeni producent, drugi pa uspešen kirurg, zasvojen s seksom. Skupaj s svojimi starši ju povabi na večerjo v čast svoje hčerke. Ko gresta prijatelja pogledati spečega otroka, pa elektronska varuška, nameščena v sobi, razkrije pravo ozadje njihovih odnosov, ki posledično doživijo kataklizmo, ki lahko uniči prijateljstva in partnerske odnose.
baby phone_2017.opis_omdb: During a dinner, the revelations made through the baby-phone of a child's room will create a real cataclysm within a family and a group of friends ...

the current war_2017.opis_neo:
Dramatična zgodba o tekmovanju med Edisonom in Westinghouseom okoli tega, čigav električni sistem bo z elektriko oskrboval sodobni svet.

Zgodba o neusmiljenem tekmovanju čigav električni sistem bo z elektriko oskrboval sodobni svet. Thomas Edison vztraja pri svojem enosmernem toku, ki ga skuša vsem pomanjkljivostim navkljub, vpeljati na Manhattan. Načrt gre po zlu, ko v zgodbo vstopi Nikola Tesla s svojim izmeničnim tokom, katerega razvoj finančno podpira bogat poslovnež Westinghouse.
the current war_2017.opis_omdb: Three brilliant visionaries set off in a charged battle for the future in The Current War, the epic story of the cutthroat competition that literally lit up the modern world. Benedict Cumberbatch is Thomas Edison, the celebrity inventor on the verge of bringing electricity to Manhattan with his radical new DC technology. On the eve of triumph, his plans are upended by charismatic businessman George Westinghouse (Michael Shannon), who believes he and his partner, the upstart genius Nikola Tesla (Nicholas Hoult), have a superior idea for how to rapidly electrify America: with AC current. As Edison and Westinghouse grapple for who will power the nation, they spark one of the first and greatest corporate feuds in American history, establishing for future Titans of Industry the need to break all the rules. Directed by Alfonso Gomez-Rejon (Me and Earl and the Dying Girl) with Producer Timur Bekmambetov, Basil Iwanyk and Executive Producer Martin Scorsese, The Current War also stars Katherine Waterston, Tom Holland, Matthew Macfadyen and Tuppence Middleton.

taxi_2015.opis_neo:
Rumeni taksi vozi po živahnih in slikovitih ulicah Teherana. Stranke vstopajo vanj in vsak na svoj način odgovarja na vprašanja v pogovoru v voznikom.

Jafar Panahi v duhovitem, psevdodokumentarnem mozaiku sodobne iranske družbe. Berlinski zlati medved za najboljši film leta 2015. Taksi vozi po živahnih teheranskih ulicah. Za volanom je režiser filma osebno, v njegov avto pa vstopa mesto v vsej svoji raznovrstnosti: moški in ženska se pričkata, ali je obešenje primerna kazen za tatiče avtomobilskih gum, prodajalec piratskih devedejev v družbi slavnega taksista zavoha enkratno poslovno priložnost, poškodovani pešec v smrtnem strahu zdrdra svojo oporoko v kamero prenosnega telefona, dve nervozni ženički z ribo v skledi bežita pred grožnjo prekletstva, taksistova nečakinja pa na lastni koži ugotovi, da je resničnost sila muhasta reč, ki včasih ne uboga niti režiserja. Kljub prepovedi iranskih oblasti je Jafar Panahi ponovno poprijel za kamero, tokrat jo je pritrdil na armaturno ploščo taksija, in skozi duhovito, provokativno, psevdodokumentarno vožnjo po ulicah Teherana sestavil mozaik sodobne iranske družbe.
taxi_2015.opis_omdb: When you are a filmmaker and you are not allowed to direct movies any more, you have to retrain. So why not become a taxi driver? Or better, why not pretend you are a taxi driver and make a film despite everything? This is what Jafar Panahi has done. Now he invites you to get into his cab for the price of a cinema ticket, to ride through the streets of Tehran and discover its people in the persons of his various passengers.

f20_2018.opis_neo:
Dekletove sanje se sprevržejo v nočno moro.

Martina je mlado dekle, ki poleti razvaža pice v očetovi piceriji. Med svojim delom spozna sramežljivega fanta Filipa, ki ves čas igra video igrice in naroča pice. Ko Martina prepriča Filipa, da ukradeta denar njenemu očetu in pobegneta v Zrće, se njuna nedolžna poletna avantura sprevrže v krvavo nočno moro.
f20_2018.opis_omdb: Martina starts a relationship with Filip, a young man who spends most of his time playing video games. After Martina convinces Filip to steal her father's money to go to the Party Beach, everything turns into a bloody nightmare.

une année polaire_2018.opis_neo:
Anders zapusti rodno Dansko in gre učit na podeželju Grenlandije.

A takoj ko prispe tja, naleti na težave s precej tesno povezanimi vaščani. Zgolj skozi nespretne poskuse in polomije se bo lahko otresel svojih srednjeevropskih predsodkov in sprejel njihov snežni način življenja.
une année polaire_2018.opis_omdb: A teacher in Denmark takes a job in rural Greenland where he struggles to fit in with the locals.

shaun the sheep movie_2015.opis_neo:
Jon se s čredo odpravi v "veliko mesto", da bi rešil kmeta, ki se je tam znašel zaradi ene izmed njegovih vragolij.

Ko se Bacek Jon odloči vzeti prost dan, da bi si malce odpočil, pade v niz težav s svojo družino. Namesto lenarjenja mora s prijatelji najti pot domov iz velikega mesta, kjer so se znašli zaradi reševanja svojega kmeta, ki je po nesreči s prikolico izgubil spomin. Animirana pustolovščina je primerna tudi za mlajše otroke, saj nima dialoga.
shaun the sheep movie_2015.opis_omdb: Tired of working on the farm, the special sheep, Shaun, takes his flock and the farmer's dog, Bitzer, into his own "temporary escape plan" after an unexpected accident. Unfortunately, in the big city, the farmer is diagnosed with amnesia, that could possibly change their normal farm life forever, and the squad sets a plan in order to regain the farmer's memory and return to the farm. But, an animal control worker named Trumper intervenes in their plan.

three thousand years of longing_2022.opis_neo:
Osamljena akademska predavateljica na potovanju sreča džina, ki ji ponudi tri želje.

Uspešna, vendar osamljena akademska predavateljica dr. Alithea Binnie je zadovoljna s svojim življenjem, ki ga živi povsem razumsko. Na konferenci v Istanbulu pa nepričakovano sreča džina, ki ji ponuja tri želje v zameno za svojo svobodo. S tem pride do dveh težav. Učenjakinja namreč dvomi, da je sploh resničen, in drugič, ker je znanstvenica s tega področja, zelo dobro pozna vse zgodbe o "napačnih" željah. Džin jo vseeno poskuša prepričati o nasprotnem in ji pripoveduje neverjetne zgodbe o svoji preteklosti. Na koncu učenjakinja le pove željo, ki preseneti oba.
three thousand years of longing_2022.opis_omdb: A lonely scholar, on a trip to Istanbul, discovers a Djinn who offers her three wishes in exchange for his freedom.

a shaun the sheep movie: farmageddon_201.naslov_orig: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
a shaun the sheep movie: farmageddon_201.opis_neo:
Drugi del filma o Backu Jonu je še boljši, večji in zabavnejši, saj na kmetijo prihajajo nezemljani!

Ko v bližini kmetije strmoglavi vesoljska ladja z nezemljančkom izjemnih sposobnosti, se Bacek Jon poda na reševalno misijo. Svojega novega prijatelja iz druge galaksije želi čim prej spraviti domov, preden mu na sled pride zlobna organizacija. Animirana pustolovščina je primerna tudi za mlajše otroke, saj nima dialoga.
a shaun the sheep movie: farmageddon_201.opis_omdb: There is something strange going on in the peaceful town of Mossingham, right after the fantastic rescue mission in Shaun the Sheep Movie (2015). As mischievous Shaun orders in pizza for the woolly flock under the nose of the Farmer, and Bitzer, the ever-watchful sheepdog, a mysterious, fast-moving UFO enters the Earth's atmosphere and crash-lands near the verdant Mossy Bottom Farm. Now, Lu-La, the extraordinary friendly creature from the depths of the galaxy, is in grave danger, light-years away from home. Can Shaun, and the rest of the lambs, lend a helping hand, and protect their new extraterrestrial companion from the Ministry of Alien Detection, and its unstoppable leader, Agent Red?

the dressmaker_2015.opis_neo:
Nadarjena krojačica se iz Pariza vrne v domače mestece na avstralskem podeželju ter s svojim občutkom za visoko modo spremeni stil someščank.

To je zgodba o čudoviti in nadarjeni Tilly Dunnage. Ko je dolga leta delala kot krojačica v pariških hišah visoke mode, se Tilly vrne domov v Avstralijo, da bi se pobotala s svojo ekscentrično materjo Molly. Zaljubi se v dobrodušnega Teddyja, oborožena samo s šivalnim strojem in izjemnim občutkom za slog pa bo Tilly preobrazila someščanke in se tako sladko maščevala tistim, ki so se ji zamerili.
the dressmaker_2015.opis_omdb: Based on Rosalie Ham's best selling novel, The Dressmaker is the story of femme fatale Tilly Dunnage who returns to her small home town in the country to right the wrongs of the past. A stylish drama with comic undertones about love, revenge and haute couture.

the strangers: prey at night_2018.opis_neo:
Nadaljevanje uspešne grozljivke Tujci (The Strangers) iz leta 2008.

Zakonca Mike in Cindy se z otrokoma odpravita na izlet, ki se spremeni v njihovo najhujšo nočno moro, ko prispejo v zapuščeno naselje mobilnih hiš. Nad njimi se začne izživljati trojica zamaskiranih neznancev in jih prisili v krvavi boj za preživetje.
the strangers: prey at night_2018.opis_omdb: A family's road trip takes a dangerous turn when they arrive at a secluded mobile home park to stay with some relatives and find it mysteriously deserted. Under the cover of darkness, three masked psychopaths pay them a visit to test the family's every limit as they struggle to survive.

unhinged_2020.opis_neo:
Oskarjevec Russell Crowe v napetem akcijskem trilerju o psihično nestabilnem nasilnežu, ki se na cesti odloči maščevati nič hudega sluteči voznici.

Vsakodnevni odhod v službo se za Rachel spremeni v nočno moro, ko v prometni konici naleti na tujca, s katerim se spusti v prepir, ker se mu ne želi opravičiti.
unhinged_2020.opis_omdb: Academy Award winner Russell Crowe stars in Unhinged, a psychological thriller that takes something we've all experienced- road rage - to an unpredictable and terrifying conclusion. Rachel (Caren Pistorius) is running late getting to work when she crosses paths with a stranger (Crowe) at a traffic light. Soon, Rachel finds herself, and everyone she loves, the target of a man who feels invisible and is looking to make one last mark upon the world by teaching her a series of deadly lessons. What follows is a dangerous game of cat and mouse that proves you never know who you're driving next to.

the place beyond the pines_2012.opis_neo:
Kaskader postane bančni ropar, da bi preskrbel svojo družino, s tem pa pritegne pozornost stremuškega policista.

V filmu Dereka Cianfrancea igra Ryan Gosling Luka, popotnika, ki za življenje služi z izvajanjem akrobacij na motorju. Ko izve, da ima majhnega sina, se odloči, da mora poskrbeti zanj. Spozna bivšega zapornika, ki ga nauči, kako naj oropa banko in zatem tudi uspešno pobegne. Zaradi tega stopi v njegovo življenje policist Avery (Bradley Cooper), ki ga je po enem od ropov vklenil.
the place beyond the pines_2012.opis_omdb: A mysterious and mythical motorcycle racer, Luke, (Ryan Gosling) drives out of a traveling carnival globe of death and whizzes through the backstreets of Schenectady, New York, desperately trying to connect with a former lover, Romina, (Eva Mendes) who recently and secretly gave birth to the stunt rider's son. In an attempt to provide for his new family, Luke quits the carnival life and commits a series of bank robberies aided by his superior riding ability. The stakes rise as Luke is put on a collision course with an ambitious police officer, Avery Cross, (Bradley Cooper) looking to quickly move up the ranks in a police department riddled with corruption. The sweeping drama unfolds over fifteen years as the sins of the past haunt the present days lives of two high school boys wrestling with the legacy they've inherited. The only refuge is found in the place beyond the pines.

dead in a week: or your money back_2018.naslov_sl: Mrtvi v tednu dni: Drugače vrnemo denar
dead in a week: or your money back_2018.naslov_orig: Dead in a Week: Or Your Money Back
dead in a week: or your money back_2018.opis_neo:
Ko mu spodleti že deveti poskus samomora, William najame starejšega plačanega morilca Leslieja, da ga ubije.

William ima dovolj življenja. Ko mu spodleti že deveti poskus samomora, se zdi, da je mladi pisatelj zguba v smrti, tako kot je v življenju. Zato najame starejšega plačanega morilca Leslieja, da ga ubije. Leslie je navdušen. Ponudi mu izbiro načina smrti, od 'junaške' do 'hitro in brez bolečin'. Kaj pa se zgodi, če si fant premisli?
dead in a week: or your money back_2018.opis_omdb: After another failed attempt to commit suicide, hapless writer William addresses the services of hired assassin Leslie, the inexorable angel of death from the Killers Guild, an organization that is ready to help anyone who needs a quick and painless death. Leslie has a good heart, but an unsteady hand. The authorities want to retire him, and the contract that has turned up is the only chance to postpone the inevitable. However, the case intervenes in the fortuity. The fate suddenly smiled to William: he falls in love.

dheepan_2015.opis_neo:
Dheepan je tamilski bojevnik, ki iz Šrilanke prebegne v Francijo in postane čuvaj v predmestju Pariza.

Med državljansko vojno na Šrilanki se Dheepan odloči pobegniti v Evropo, s seboj pa odpelje mlado žensko in osirotelo deklico, v upanju, da mu bosta olajšali postopek pridobitve azila. Ko prispejo v Pariz, Dheepan dobi službo čuvaja zapuščenih zgradb v predmestju. Trudi se, da bi si ustvaril novo življenje, toda vsakodnevno soočanje z nasiljem odpre stare vojne rane in Dheepan je prisiljen obuditi svoj vojaški nagon, da bi zaščitil tiste, ki so njegova edina družina.
dheepan_2015.opis_omdb: Dheepan is a Tamil freedom fighter, a Tiger. In Sri Lanka, the Civil War is reaching its end, and defeat is near.
