Dheepan decides to flee, taking with him two strangers - a woman and a little girl - hoping that they will make it easier for him to claim asylum in Europe. Arriving in Paris, the 'family' moves from one temporary home to another until Dheepan finds work as the caretaker of a run-down housing block in the suburbs. He works to build a new life and a real home for his 'wife' and his 'daughter', but the daily violence he confronts quickly reopens his war wounds, and Dheepan is forced to reconnect with his warrior's instincts to protect the people he hopes will become his true family.

free state of jones_2016.opis_neo:
Dezerter konfederacijske vojske med ameriško državljansko vojno sestavi svojo ljudsko milico in jo povede v upor proti pokvarjeni oblasti.

Film posnet po resničnih dogodkih se dogaja v času državljanske vojne in spremlja zgodbo kmeta Newtona Knighta ter njegov upor proti južnjaški politiki in stanju v takratni Ameriki. Knight namreč pobegne z bojišča, združi moči z nekaj manjšimi kmeti in tamkajšnjimi sužnji ter okrožje Jones v Mississippiju razglasi za svojo državo.
free state of jones_2016.opis_omdb: Set during the Civil War, Free State of Jones tells the story of defiant Southern farmer, Newt Knight, and his extraordinary armed rebellion against the Confederacy. Banding together with other small farmers and local slaves, Knight launched an uprising that led Jones County, Mississippi to secede from the Confederacy, creating a Free State of Jones. Knight continued his struggle into Reconstruction, distinguishing him as a compelling, if controversial, figure of defiance long beyond the War.

wolfkin_2022.opis_neo:
Mati samohranilka Elaine, ki jo zmoti napadalnost edinca Martina, z njim obišče družino njegovega pokojnega očeta. Tam pa naleti na temno skrivnost.

Mati samohranilko Elaine skrbi nasilno vedenje sina Martina. Obiščeta družino njegovega pokojnega očeta v mestecu Luksemburg, ki skriva svojo srhljivo plat. Ko Elaine dojame, da bi lahko Martin postal kot oni, se je prisiljenja z vsemi močmi boriti za prihodnost svojega sina.
wolfkin_2022.opis_omdb: Single mother Elaine is disturbed by her son Martin's aggressive behaviour, she visits his late father's estranged family in small-town Luxembourg, which hides a much darker nature.

septembers of shiraz_2015.opis_neo:
Premožna judovska družina se znajde sredi iranske islamske revolucije leta 1979.

Kriminalka po knjižni uspešnici New York Timesa. To je resnična zgodba o sekularni židovski družini sredi islamske revolucije v Iranu in njihovi junaški poti proti smrtonosni tiraniji in končnem begu iz nje, ki je skoraj izbrisala njihovo državo in jim grozila, da jim bo na vsakem koraku uničila življenje.
septembers of shiraz_2015.opis_omdb: Prior to the Iranian revolution it was a place where people of all religions were allowed to flourish. This is the story of a prosperous Jewish family who abandon everything before they are consumed by the passions of revolutionaries.

brooklyn's finest_2009.opis_neo:
Trije policisti, ena krvava noč.

Usoda pripelje trojico moških na isto mesto ob istem času, v četrt v Brooklynu, kjer vsak od njih skuša prevzeti zakon v svoje roke. Tango, policist z oddelka narkotikov, je primoran izbrati med dolžnostjo ali odhodom. Detektiv Sal se ne more upreti priložnosti, ki jo ponuja korupcija. Eddie, policist pred upokojitvijo, pa ima težave z iskanjem smisla življenja.
brooklyn's finest_2009.opis_omdb: In Brooklyn, amid drug deals, violence, casual racism, poverty, housing projects, and corrupt cops, we follow three officers: Tango, African-American, working undercover, believing he's earned a promotion to a desk job but told he has to set up the bust of an ex-con who saved his life; Sal, who'll commit murder to get cash; and, Eddie, the precinct's oldest beat cop, a week to go before retirement, assigned to mentor an earnest rookie. Can this end well for any of the three?

wyrmwood: apocalypse_2021.opis_neo:
Rhys se na poti odrešitve obrne proti zlobnim šefom ter združi moči s skupino upornikov, da bi rešili dekle, ki naj bi imelo zdravilo proti virusu.

Postapokaliptični zombijski film spremlja vojaka Rhysa na poti odrešitve, ko se obrne proti svojim zlobnim šefom ter združi moči s skupino preživelih upornikov, da bi pomagali rešiti dekleta, ki bi lahko imelo zdravilo proti virusu.
wyrmwood: apocalypse_2021.opis_omdb: In a zombie-infested Australian wasteland, soldier Rhys has dedicated his life to tracking and capturing survivors for the Surgeon General in hopes of finding a cure.

you can't run forever_2024.opis_neo:
Najstnico, ki trpi za anksioznostjo zaradi tragičnega dogodka iz svoje preteklosti, po gozdu lovi sociopat, ki divja z morilci.

Wade potuje z motociklom po čudoviti gorski pokrajini. Ustavi se na črpalki, kjer opazi lajajočega psa in besnega lastnika. Wade stopi k lastniku, izvleče pištolo in ga ustreli v glavo ter se odpravi naprej. Oče in hči, Eddie in Miranda, gresta po zibelko. Pri znaku stop se srečata z Wadom in začne se smrtonosni pregon. Eddie je med pregonom večkrat ustreljen, a pomaga Mirandi pobegniti v gozd.
you can't run forever_2024.opis_omdb: A teenage girl suffering from anxiety due to a tragic event from her past finds herself hunted through the woods by a sociopath on a murderous rampage.

the wretched_2019.opis_neo:
Uporniški najstnik Ben obišče čez poletje svojega očeta in se sooči z grozljivim razkritjem.

Zlovešči stvor iz gozda zalezuje mlado družino, ki živi v soseski. Ko stvor ujame mamo, začne s srhljivo igro med lovljenjem mestnih otrok. Sam v svojih sumih se Ben odpravi na nevarni pohod, da bi ustavil zlo, preden slednje pogoltne vse, kar mu nekaj pomeni.
the wretched_2019.opis_omdb: A defiant teenage boy, struggling with his parents' imminent divorce, faces off with a thousand year-old witch, who is living beneath the skin of and posing as the woman next door.

american assassin_2017.opis_neo:
Ameriški morilec bo potreboval znanje in iznajdljivost, da bi preživel v od vojne razdejanem mestu med njegovimi smrtonosnimi terorističnimi ločinami.

Dve desetletji po hladni vojni je islamski terorizem v vzponu, ZDA pa zbirajo ekipo tajnih agentov, ki se bodo soočili z grozečo nevarnostjo. Nadarjeni športnik Mitch si želi maščevanja za teroristične napade in je pripravljen na intenzivno urjenje v morilca, ki bo za seboj puščal trupla od Istanbula prek Evrope, vse do Bejruta.
american assassin_2017.opis_omdb: Twenty three-year-old Mitch lost his parents to a tragic car accident at the age of fourteen, and his girlfriend to a terrorist attack just as they were engaged. Seeking revenge, he is enlisted by CIA Deputy Director Irene Kennedy as a black ops recruit. Kennedy then assigns Cold War veteran Stan Hurley to train Mitch. Together they will later on investigate a wave of apparently random attacks on military and civilian targets. The discovery of a pattern in the violence leads them to a joint mission with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative intent on starting a world war in the Middle East.

willy's wonderland_2021.opis_neo:
Tihi potepuh je prevaran v službo hišnika v zdaj zapuščeni Willyjevi čudežni deželi.

Ker ne more plačati popravila svojega avtomobila, ki se je pokvaril, se tihi potepuh (Cage) strinja, da bo očistil zapuščeni center za družinsko zabavo v zameno za popravilo. Willyjev zabaviščni park je poln animatroničnih lutk, ki so bile nekoč glavna atrakcija za otroke, zdaj pa imajo temačno skrivnost, ki jo bo kmalu razkril. Zvabljen v smrtonosno past, ali bolje rečeno v nočno moro, se je prisiljen boriti z eno pošastjo za drugo v boju, da bi preživel do jutra.
willy's wonderland_2021.opis_omdb: A quiet loner (Nic Cage) finds himself stranded in a remote town when his car breaks down. Unable to pay for the repairs he needs, he agrees to spend the night cleaning Willy's Wonderland, an abandoned family fun center. But this wonderland has a dark secret that the "The Janitor" is about to discover. He soon finds himself trapped inside Willy's and locked in an epic battle with the possessed animatronic mascots that roam the halls. To survive, he must fight his way through each of them.

rally road racers_2023.opis_neo: Počasni lori po imenu Či sodeluje v nesramni avtomobilski dirki po zgodovinski Svilni cesti ma Kitajskem, da bi rešil zadnjo vas lorijev (in s tem tudi babičin dom) pred rušenjem in razvojem, ki ga načrtuje psihotični žabjek z imenom Archibald Vainglorious.
rally road racers_2023.opis_omdb: Racers compete in a high-stakes rally along the famous Silk Road trade route.

terrifier 3_2024.opis_neo:
Terrifier 3 nadaljuje brutalno zgodbo serijskega morilca - klovna Arta, ki tokrat seje grozo med božičnimi prazniki.

Ho-ho-ho! Božična nočna mora ima novo dimenzijo groze. Vrača se klovn Art in tudi tokrat bo za sabo pustil ... razdejanje.
terrifier 3_2024.opis_omdb: Art the Clown is set to unleash chaos on the unsuspecting residents of Miles County as they peacefully drift off to sleep on Christmas Eve.

first date_2021.opis_neo:
Mikov načrt, da osvoji punco svojih sanj se spremeni v nočno moro.

Sramežljivi srednješolec Mike končno zbere pogum in povabi svojo hudo sosedo Kelsey na zmenek. Nato dojame, a mu manjka ključni element - avto. Paničen in skoraj brez denarja ga prepričajo, da kupi chryslerha iz ’65. Mikov načrt, da osvoji Kelsey, se spremeni v polomijo, ko se nehote znajdeta na muhi dveh policajev, zločinske tolpe in maščevalne ženske, ki obožuje mačke. Ob večeru, polnem želja, krogel in kadečih se gum se zdi vsak prvi zmenek mačji kašelj.
first date_2021.opis_omdb: After being conned into buying a shady '65 Chrysler, Mike's first date plans with girl-next-door Kelsey implode as he finds himself targeted by criminals, cops, and a crazy cat lady.

the little vampire - dubbed_2017.opis_neo:
Vampirček Rudi spozna dečka Tonija, ki ima rad stare gradove, pokopališča in vampirje. Rudiju pomaga v boju proti zloglasnemu lovcu na vampirje.

Priljubljeno čtivo dečka Tonija so srhljive zgodbice, posebej o vampirjih. Ko se spoprijatelji z vampirčkom Rudijem se izkaže, da je ta prav prijazen in ljubezniv deček. Toda kako staršem pojasniti čudne reči, povezane z Rudijem – zakaj nikoli ne sleče plašča, zakaj prihaja na obisk le ob večernih urah in zakaj si ves čas z roko pokriva usta.
the little vampire - dubbed_2017.opis_omdb: The story of Rudolph, a thirteen year old vampire, whose clan is threatened by a notorious vampire hunter. He meets Tony, a mortal of the same age, who is fascinated by old castles, graveyards and - vampires. Tony helps Rudolph in an action and humor packed battle against their adversaries, and together they save Rudolph's family and become friends.

survivre_2024.opis_neo: Par praznuje sinov rojstni dan na svoji barki sredi oceana. Rojstnodnevna zabava pa se spremeni v boj za preživetje, ko jih nenadoma zadene močna nevihta, ki prinese iz globin srhljiva in strašna bitja, ki hočejo preživeti.
survivre_2024.opis_omdb: A couple celebrates their son's birthday in the middle of the ocean on their boat. A violent storm hits and it brings up hungry creatures from the depths and they fight for their survival.

summer camp_2015.opis_neo:
Film vodi gledalca na adrenalinsko potovanje v tej inovativni igri mačke in miši v grozljivki s skupino najstnikov, ki s znajdejo sami v gozdu.

Film vodi gledalca na adrenalinsko potovanje v tej inovativni igri mačke in miši v klasični grozljivki s skupino najstnikov, ki s znajdejo sami v gozdu. V iskanju zabave in novih pustolovščin kot vodniki v evropskem poletnem taboru štirje mladi Američani niti ne slutijo, da bi lahko bilo njihovo prvo poletje v tujini tudi njihovo zadnje. Hitro širjenje ekstremnega besa, povzročenega z okužbo, sili skupino v temačni vrtinec groze in norosti in jih žene v tekmo s časom in med seboj, da bi našli izvor okužbe in se rešili.
summer camp_2015.opis_omdb: 4 young Americans travel to Europe to work as counsellors for a summer camp there. Before the kids arrive, a rage-inducing, demonic disease spread rapidly from animal to person, resulting in the counsellors desperately trying to escape the illness. The camp's in the wilderness, and with the phone service, not any cars , they're desperate too stay alive and get help.

the requin_2022.opis_neo:
Par na romantičnem oddihu obtiči na morju, ko tropska nevihta odnese njuno vilo. Da bi preživela, se morata boriti z morskimi psi, ki krožijo pod njima.

Zakonca Jaelyn in Kyle sta si za svoje romantično potovanje omislila z morjem obkrožen bungalov v čarobnem Vietnamu. A razbesni se silovit vihar, bungalov se spremeni v splav, in tokovi par odnesejo na odprto morje kjer se pojavi še ena nevarnost, jata belih morskih psov. Poškodovani Kyle lahko le nemočno opazuje, kako se Jaelyn sama spopada s krvoločnimi zvermi.
the requin_2022.opis_omdb: A couple on a romantic getaway find themselves stranded at sea when a tropical storm sweeps away their villa. In order to survive, they are forced to fight the elements, while sharks circle below.

the chameleon_2010.opis_neo:
Ko je bil Nicholas Barclay star trinajst let, je skrivnostno izginil iz svojega doma v Louisiani.

Pogrešani najstnik se skrivnostno prikaže več let po svojem izginotju. Zlomljena družina ga sprejme po več letih žalovanja. Na neprijetnem srečanju se pod površjem pokažejo tleče napetosti. Ljubljeni sin se je vrnil, toda nekaj je narobe. Vztrajni agent FBI-ja začuti, da je z dečkovo zgodbo nekaj narobe. Toda če je res ta, kot trdi, kaj potem skriva družina? Če pa ni, kdo je potem in zakaj vsi igrajo? Koščki sestavljanke počasi razkrivajo globoke in temačne skrivnosti. Film je posnet po resnični zgodbi.
the chameleon_2010.opis_omdb: Based on a true story, this film looks at what happens when a serial impostor in Europe passes himself off as a missing boy from Texas. The missing boy's family welcomes him as their son, but the FBI quickly realizes something is amiss. Does the family's eagerness to accept the impostor mean they are just happy to have their loved one back, or are they trying to hide a more sinister event - perhaps what happened to their boy? But even more - who is this impostor who has talked his way into the United States and a family's home?

bigfoot family_2020.opis_neo:
Oče Bigfoot uporabi svojo slavo za boj proti naftnemu podjetju. Ko izgine, se njegov sin, žena, rakun in medvedka odpravijo na sever, da bi ga rešili.

Očec Bigfoot uporabi svojo na novo pridobljeno slavo v boju proti naftnemu podjetju na Aljaski. Ko pa nenadoma izgine, se njegov sin, žena, rakun in medvedka odpravijo na sever, da bi ga rešili.
bigfoot family_2020.opis_omdb: Follow up to Son of Bigfoot: Father uses his new fame to fight against an Alaska oil company but when he disappears the son, the mother, a raccoon and a bear head North to rescue him.

faults_2014.opis_neo: Claire je pod nadzorom skrivnostnega kulta Hibe. Starši obupano iščejo hčer, zato najamejo Ansla Rotha, enega največjih strokovnjakov za kulte in nadzor uma. Vendar pa njegova strokovnost ni precizna znanost, pa še zadolžen je. Starše opozori pred svojimi tveganimi in dragimi metodami, a ga najamejo, da ugrabi in jim deprogramira hčer. Claire je veliki izziv. Je neomajna in njena logika nesporna.
faults_2014.opis_omdb: Washed-up and broke, an author whose books on mind control were once respected reluctantly helps a couple in deprogramming their daughter from the control of a cult named "Faults." But this assignment turns out to be more complicated than he had expected.

eshtebak_2016.opis_neo:
Zgodba o revoluciji v Kairu, iz zornih kotov protestnikov različnih političnih in socialnih pripadnosti.

Film se dogaja v osem metrskem policijskem kombiju, v katerega je strpana vrsta aretirancev iz različnih političnih in družbenih sredin, potem ko so se udeležili protestov ob zrušenju predsednika Morsija z oblasti.
eshtebak_2016.opis_omdb: Set entirely in an 8m police truck, a number of detainees from different political and social backgrounds are brought together by their inevitable fate, during the turmoil that followed the ousting of former president Morsi from power.

office uprising_2018.opis_neo:
Desmond mora preživeti v zgradbi, polni psihotičnih kolegov, oboroženih z najnovejšim orožjem.

Desmond, zaposlen v velikem orožarskem podjetju Ammotech, odkrije energijsko pijačo imenovano Zolt, ki jo je ustvarila vojska. Toda po tem, ko jo poskusijo njegovi sodelavci, se ti spremenijo v nasilne psihopate. Desmond mora sedaj najti način, kako preživeti v zgradbi polni psihotičnih kolegov, oboroženih z najnovejšim orožjem.
office uprising_2018.opis_omdb: Desmond is an underachiever working at Ammotech, a major weapons manufacturing firm. However, Desmond soon discovers Zolt, a popular energy drink created by the military, has turned his boss and coworkers into violent psychopaths. Now Desmond must finally rise to the challenge in order to survive a building full of psychotic coworkers armed with the newest weaponry.

poly_2020.opis_neo:
Desetletna Cécile se težko prilagaja življenju na podeželju. Prihod potujočega cirkusa ji končno nudi malo zabave.

Desetletna Cécile se težko prilagaja življenju na podeželju. Prihod potujočega cirkusa ji končno nudi malo zabave. Vsi hitijo gledat Poly, največjo atrakcijo. Cécile pa odkrije, da lastnik Brancalou trpinči ubogo žival in se jo odloči rešiti! Pred odraslimi skriva novo prijateljico in najde nepričakovane zaveznike v skrivnostnem Victorju in otrocih na vasi. Z Brancaloujem za petama, se Cécile in Poly odpravita na pustolovščino, polno nevarnosti in presenečenj.
poly_2020.opis_omdb: The adventures of Shetland pony Poly, in the South of France.

dragon rider_2020.opis_neo:
Mladi zmaj se s prijateljema odpravi iskat zadnje zatočišče zmajev. Ogroža pa jih brezdušna pošast, katere edini cilj je uničenje še zadnjega zmaja.

Srebrni mladi zmaj in njegov novi prijatelj se odpravita iskat zadnje zatočišče zmajev. Pred njima je vrsta neverjetnih pustolovščin, nenavadnih srečanj, izmed katerih bo eno usodno - srečanje z brezdušno pošastjo iz preteklosti, katere edini cilj je uničenje še zadnjega zmaja.
dragon rider_2020.opis_omdb: Firedrake is a young silver dragon, who has had enough of constantly having to hide in a wooded valley. He wants to show the older generations of dragons that he is a real dragon. When humans are about to destroy his family's very last refuge, Firedrake secretly sets off on an adventurous journey with forest brownie, Sorrel. He wants to find the "Rim of Heaven", the dragons' mysterious haven. On their quest Firedrake and Sorrel encounter Ben, an orphan and stray, who claims to be a dragon rider. While Ben and Firedrake make friends quickly, Sorrel becomes increasingly distrustful and tries to get rid of the orphan at every opportunity. But the unlikely trio have to learn to pull together, because they are being hunted by Nettlebrand, an evil, dragon-eating monster was created by an alchemist with the aim of tracking down and destroying every dragon on Earth.

inspector sun and the curse of the black.naslov_orig: Inspector Sun And The Curse Of The Black Widow
inspector sun and the curse of the black.opis_neo:
Zgodba se odvija v tridesetih prejšnjega stoletja na hidro-letalu.

Zgodba se odvija v tridesetih prejšnjega stoletja na hidro-letalu. Ko potniki kraljujejo v potniški kabini, pa je pod tlemi trup urejen kot luksuzno plovilo za žužke. Po večerji se zgodi zločin. Vplivni Hroščar Vrtavka je umorjen, za njim pa ostane prelepa črna vdova Arabela. Inšpektor Brk skupaj s svojo mlado pomočnico preiskuje zločin.
inspector sun and the curse of the black.opis_omdb: Inspector Sun boards a seemingly normal plane for a much-needed vacation, but when an enigmatic millionaire receives a threat on his life, Sun is back on the case. Trapped in a web of lies, Sun must find the culprit before it's to...

skjelvet_2018.opis_neo:
Norveški film katastrofe, ki pripoveduje zgodbo geologa, ki si prizadeva rešiti čim več ljudi.

Tri leta po uničujočem cunamiju je geolog Kristian osamljen in še vedno zaznamovan s preteklostjo. Ko njegov prijatelj, ki je raziskoval nenavadne vibracije pod Oslom, umre v skrivnostni nesreči, postane jasno, da Norveški grozi nova katastrofa. Tokrat je zaradi potresa ogroženo življenje več kot milijona ljudi, časa za opozorilo pa je vse manj.
skjelvet_2018.opis_omdb: In 1904 an earthquake of magnitude 5.4 on the Richter scale shook Oslo, with an epicenter in the "Oslo Graben" which runs under the Norwegian capital. There are now signs that indicate that we can expect a major future earthquake in Oslo.

ne joči, peter_1964.opis_neo:
Nič ni hujšega kot če preizkušenima partizanskima minerjema Danetu in Lovru komandant zaupa otročje lahko nalogo.

V glavnih vlogah nastopajo nekateri najbolj znani obrazi slovenskega filma: Lojze Rozman, Bert Sotlar, Majda Potokar, Zlatko Šugman, Polde Bibič in drugi. Malega navihanega Petra igra Bogdan Lubej. Zgodba je postavljena v čas 2. svetovne vojne. 

Dane in Lovro sta partizana, ki morata tri sirote iz nevarnega območja, kjer potekajo boji, prepeljati na osvobojeno ozemlje. Vojaka sta na začetku ponižana, da so jima dodelili takšno nalogo, a se kasneje z otroki spoprijateljita. 

Še posebej z najmlajšim Petrom, ob katerem doživita kar nekaj smešnih prizorov. Po naključju Lovru in Danetu kasneje celo uspe večja akcija, ko razstrelita nemško skladišče.
ne joči, peter_1964.opis_omdb: Two partisan coalminers need to take three orphan children away from dangerous area to the liberated land.

knight and day_2010.opis_neo:
Ko simpatična June Havens na letališču trči v čednega Roya, se ji še sanja ne, da je Roy vladni agent, ki deluje na lastno pest.

Po razburljivem letu in še razburljivejšem pristanku z letalom June naslednje jutro obiščejo vladni agenti, ki bi radi izvedeli vse o njenem skrivnostnem sopotniku z letala. 

Iz zagate jo reši Roy, ki jo hitro odpelje daleč stran pred nevarnostjo. Toda kaj želijo vladni agentje? In za koga dela Roy?
knight and day_2010.opis_omdb: Looking forward to attending her sister April's wedding, the commitment-shy tomboy and classic cars aficionado, June Havens, catches a plane to Boston. Then, out of the blue, she crosses paths with the handsome and charming stranger with the killer sense of humour, Roy Miller, and just like that, June's life will never be the same again. Now, as the dashing man of intrigue plunges June into an excitingly risky world of high-speed car chases, deadly man-to-man fights, and lethal stray bullets, dangerous, no-nonsense adversaries are after the mismatched duo, hell-bent on retrieving a tiny state-of-the-art device that's worth millions. But, who's this Roy Miller guy? Is he truly one of the good guys? Above all, could he be the one?

the voyeurs_2021.opis_neo:
Pippa in Thomas sta mlad par, ki se preseli v svoje sanjsko stanovanje.

Kmalu opazita, da njuno okno gleda direktno v sosednje stanovanje in začneta se zanimati za spolno življenje sosedov čez cesto. 

Kar se začne kot nedolžna radovednost, se spremeni v nezdravo obsedenost, ko odkrijeta, da ima eden od sosedov afero. Zaradi skušnjave in poželenja se njihova življenja prepletejo, kar privede do smrtonosnih posledic.
the voyeurs_2021.opis_omdb: Pippa and Thomas move into their dream apartment, they notice that their windows look directly into the apartment opposite - inviting them to witness the volatile relationship of the attractive couple across the street. But when they attempt to anonymously intercede in their lives, they unwittingly set in motion a chain of events that will lead to disaster.

dolina miru_1956.opis_neo:
Zgodba o dveh vojnih sirotah, nemški deklici Lotti in slovenskemu fantu Marku, ki iščeta 'dolino, v kateri ni vojne'.

Film pripoveduje zgodbo o dveh vojnih sirotah, nemški deklici Loti in slovenskemu fantu Marku, ki zbežita iz bombardiranega mesta in iščeta 'dolino, v kateri ni vojne'. Otroka se pogumno napotita tja, a sledijo jima Nemci. 

Kmalu se jima pridruži še temnopolti ameriški pilot Jim. Skupaj nadaljujejo pot in končno najdejo kraj, ki so ga iskali. Toda "dolino miru" napadejo Nemci in Jima ubijejo. Obupana otroka zbežita in nadaljujeta s svojim iskanjem.
dolina miru_1956.opis_omdb: A boy (9 years?) and a rather younger girl lost their families in an air raid. They have heard about a valley where there is always peace and fancy that this is the house of the boy's uncle. They start wandering for the valley. At the same time an airplane is shot down and the black American pilot jumped by parachute. He finds the children at a ford. There is absolutely no danger. But the girl is standing in the middle of the river, scared and crying and neither daring to go forth or back. The pilot cannot abandon the children although they will reduce his chance of escaping. Both the Germans and the partisans know that the pilot had survived. Who will find him first? Several things happen in rapid succession. The children and the pilot find the uncle's house, which had since a long time been abandoned. The Germans arrive and catch the pilot. The partisans attack and liberate the pilot, who joins them. But during the fight he is soon deadly wounded and orders the children to run away. Then the house explodes. The children conclude that this was the wrong valley and decide to continue to search for the right and peaceful one.

17 again_2009.opis_neo:
17-letni Mike živi sanje vsakega najstnika.

Mike je zvezda košarkarske ekipe, dobil bo štipendijo za kolidž, obenem pa hodi z najlepšo punco na šoli, Scarlet. Zaplete se, ko tik pred pomembno tekmo Mike izve, da je Scarlet noseča. 

Na vrat na nos se odloči zapustiti košarkarski parket in se poročiti z njo, toda kaj, ko leta kasneje obžaluje svojo odločitev. Ko se mu nekega dne ponudi priložnost, da zavrti čas nazaj in spet postane 17-letnik, se Mike odloči, da bo sprejel izziv.
17 again_2009.opis_omdb: At 17 Mike O'Donnell is on top of the world: he's the star of his high school basketball team, is a shoo-in for a college scholarship, and is dating his soul-mate, Scarlet. But at what's supposed to be his big game where a college scout is checking him out, Scarlet reveals that she's pregnant. Mike decides to leave the game and asks Scarlet to marry him, which she does. During their marriage, Mike can only whine about the life he lost because he married her, so she throws him out. When he also loses his job, he returns to the only place he's happy at, his old high school. While looking at his high school photo, a janitor asks him if he wishes he could be 17 again and he says yes. One night while driving he sees the janitor on a bridge ready to jump, and goes after him. When he returns to his friend Ned's house, where he has been staying, he sees that he is 17 again. He decides to take this opportunity to get the life he lost.

match point_2005.opis_neo:
Chris Wilton je mladenič iz skromnega ozadja s tradicionalnimi vrednotami.

Ko začne svoj družbeni vzpon, njegova ambicioznost pušča strašne posledice. Kmalu se znajde razpet med dvema ženskama. Ima ženo Chloe, a ko spozna igralko Nolo, si ne more pomagati, da ne bi mislil nanjo. 

Brhka Nola se točno zaveda vseh učinkov, ki jih ima na predstavnike moškega spola. Chloein bogati brat Tom kmalu postane kriv za številne tragične dogodke.
match point_2005.opis_omdb: From a humble background and with traditional values, Irish Chris Wilton (Jonathan Rhys Meyers) is still struggling financially despite being a recently retired high ranked tennis pro. He has taken a job as a tennis instructor at an upscale London tennis club, although he knows there is a better life for him somewhere down the road. He is befriended by one of his students, wealthy Tom Hewett (Matthew Goode). Chris starts to date Tom's sister, Chloe Hewett (Emily Mortimer), a girl-next-door type who is immediately attracted to Chris. Chloe quickly knows she wants to marry Chris, and through her businessman father, Alec Hewett (Brian Cox), tries to help Chris and their future by getting him an executive job in Alec's company. In his life with the Hewetts, Chris begins to enjoy the finer things in life. Through it all however, Chris cannot help thinking about Nola Rice (Scarlett Johansson), a struggling American actress who he meets at the Hewett estate and who is Tom's unofficial fiancée. Nola is vivacious, and she knows the effect she has on men, including Chris. Unlike Chris, Nola is not accepted by Tom and Chloe's mother, the outspoken Eleanor Hewett (Dame Penelope Wilton). Chris has to decide if he can give up what he has been able to achieve with Chloe and the Hewetts, or if the passion he feels for Nola is stronger than the finer things in life to which he is now accustomed. He may go to any length to have his cake and eat it too.

my secret valentine_2018.opis_neo:
Skrivna ljubezen vzcveti med Chloe in skrivnostnim moškim, s katerim si izmenjujeta ljubezenska sporočila.

Chloe je obupana, ko izve, da želi oče družinski vinograd prodati prebrisanemu trgovcu Sethu. 

Ob prvem srečanju ga zasovraži, ne da bi vedela, da je prav on skrivnostni moški, ki popravlja mamino staro brunarico in ji pušča romantična sporočila na tabli.
my secret valentine_2018.opis_omdb: A young woman takes advice from the chalkboard notes that her mysterious house rental tenant leaves when a slick sales rep arrives with plans to buy her family's prized winery.

meg 2: the trench_2023.opis_neo:
Jason Statham in njegova ekipa se vračajo, da bi nadalje raziskali Marianski jarek, kjer se bodo soočili z novimi grozljivimi bitji.

Ko zlonamerno rudarsko podjetje ogrozi njihovo misijo in jih prisili v bitko za preživetje, se njihovo potovanje spremeni v kaos. 

Z ogromnimi morskimi psi megalodoni na eni strani in neusmiljenimi ugrabitelji na drugi morajo v tekmi s časom prelisičiti neusmiljene plenilce.
meg 2: the trench_2023.opis_omdb: Get ready for the ultimate adrenaline rush this summer in "Meg 2: The Trench," a literally larger-than-life thrill ride that supersizes the 2018 blockbuster and takes the action to higher heights and even greater depths with multiple massive Megs and so much more. Dive into uncharted waters with Jason Statham and global action icon Wu Jing as they lead a daring research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal Megs and relentless environmental plunderers, our heroes must outrun, outsmart, and outswim their merciless predators in a pulse-pounding race against time. Immerse yourself in the most electrifying cinematic experience of the year with "Meg 2: The Trench" - where the depths of the ocean are matched only by the heights of sheer, unstoppable excitement.

get out_2017.opis_neo:
Chris je mlad fant, ki bo prvič spoznal starše svoje punce. Toda ni vse, kot se zdi.

Film spremlja temnopoltega fanta, ki obišče družinsko posestvo svojega belega dekleta, a pod toplo dobrodošlico njenih staršev se skriva srhljiva resnica. Chris se pripravlja, da bo prvič spoznal starše svojega dekleta Rose. 

Mladenič sluti, da obisk ne bo minil brez zapletov in po toplem sprejemu kmalu opazi, da se Afroameričani na posestvu obnašajo izjemno nenavadno, kar ga pripelje do šokantnega odkritja.
get out_2017.opis_omdb: Chris and his girlfriend Rose go upstate to visit her parents for the weekend. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries lead him to a truth that he never could have imagined.

the good neighbor_2022.opis_neo:
Temačen, napet triler o nevarnih skrivnostih, ki ne ostanejo dolgo skrite.

Usodna noč spremeni življenje sosedov Davida in Roberta, ko ju poveže smrtonosna prometna nesreča. Medtem ko Davida razjeda krivda, Robert v tragediji vidi priložnost za vseživljenjsko prijateljstvo. 

Toda ko sestra žrtve začne odkrivati resnico, se David bori za odrešitev, Robert pa je pripravljen storiti vse, da bi pokopal preteklost in obdržal svojega prijatelja.
the good neighbor_2022.opis_omdb: The budding friendship between two very different neighbours takes a tragic turn when David runs over a young woman and causes her death.

american reunion_2012.opis_neo:
V komediji Ameriška pita: Obletnica se vsi liki, ki smo jih spoznali pred dobrim desetletjem, vrnejo na obletnico mature.

Po več kot desetletju se s seksom obsedeni nekdanji sošolci spet srečajo in ugotavljajo, kaj se je medtem spremenilo in kaj ostaja enako.
american reunion_2012.opis_omdb: Over a decade has passed and the gang return to East Great Falls, Michigan, for the weekend. They will discover how their lives have developed as they gather for their high school reunion. How has life treated Michelle, Jim, Heather, Oz, Kevin, Vicky, Finch, Stifler, and Stifler's mom? In the summer of 1999, it was four boys on a quest to lose their virginity. Now Kara is a cute high school senior looking for the perfect guy to lose her virginity to.

heat_1995.opis_neo:
Film je zgodba o napetem boju med kriminalistom in skupino tatov.

Oskarjevca Robert DeNiro in Al Pacino z vrhunsko igralsko zasedbo igrata v tej psihološki drami o obsesivnem detektivu in izjemnem tatu. Njuni usodi sta prepleteni po ropu. Zločinec načrtuje zadnji rop, njuni poklicni življenji pa se razgalita, ko se igrata drug z drugim kot mačka z mišjo. Sovražnika se začneta obenem sovražiti in spoštovati.
heat_1995.opis_omdb: Hunters and their prey--Neil and his professional criminal crew hunt to score big money targets (banks, vaults, armored cars) and are, in turn, hunted by Lt. Vincent Hanna and his team of cops in the Robbery/Homicide police division. A botched job puts Hanna onto their trail while they regroup and try to put together one last big 'retirement' score. Neil and Vincent are similar in many ways, including their troubled personal lives. At a crucial moment in his life, Neil disobeys the dictum taught to him long ago by his criminal mentor--'Never have anything in your life that you can't walk out on in thirty seconds flat, if you spot the heat coming around the corner'--as he falls in love. Thus the stage is set for the suspenseful ending....

fortress_2021.opis_neo:
Upokojen Cijin agent se pred skupino maščevalnih kriminalcev zapre v visokotehnološki bunker.

Trdnjava je akcijski triler, v katerem spremljamo upokojenega agenta Cie Roberta, ki živi v skrivnem, strogo varovanem kompleksu sredi gozda, kjer ga obišče odtujeni sin. 

Njuno srečanje prekine prihod Robertovega starega sovražnika, ki išče maščevanje. Oče in sin se zatečeta v visokotehnološki bunker, kjer ju čaka neusmiljen boj za preživetje.
fortress_2021.opis_omdb: Robert, an ex-CIA agent, lives in a hidden woodland resort that serves as a retirement community for former spies. His estranged son Paul is a crypto currency entrepreneur who has run into trouble and needs to ask his old man for help. Unfortunately Paul's plans aren't as secret as his father's location.

the covenant_2023.opis_neo:
Napet akcijski triler Zaveza razkriva zgodbo o neomajni zvestobi in pogumu.

Spremljamo ameriškega narednika Johna Kinleyja in afganistanskega tolmača Ahmeda, ki v smrtonosni zasedi reši Kinleyjevo življenje. 

Ko se Kinley vrne domov in izve, da Ahmedu niso omogočili varnega prehoda v ZDA, se odloči poravnati dolg. Vrne se v vojno območje, da reši prijatelja, preden ga ujamejo talibani.
the covenant_2023.opis_omdb: During the war in Afghanistan, a local interpreter risks his own life to carry an injured sergeant across miles of grueling terrain.

hard target_1993.opis_neo:
Chance Boudreaux je bivši mornar, ki se je prisiljen preživljati s priložnostnimi deli.

Ko iz težav reši lepo Natasho Binder, mu punca v zameno ponudi delo. Pomagal naj bi ji najti očeta, brezdomnega vojnega veterana, ki je izginil neznano kam. Chance in Natasha se lotita raziskovanja in se nevarno približata resnici. Zdaj morata samo še preživeti, saj jima je morilec tik za petami.
hard target_1993.opis_omdb: Natasha Binder comes to New Orleans looking for her father, who has gone missing. In doing so, she meets a very hard man called Chance. He helps her find out that her father was killed by an organisation who sell the opportunity to hunt human prey. They are taking advantage of a police strike in New Orleans. Will the Muscles from Brussels win through?

walking tall_2004.opis_neo:
Chris Vaughn je upokojeni komandos, ki se po dolgoletni odsotnosti vrne domov, kjer bi si rad ustvaril novo življenje.

Upokojeni vojak Chris se vrne v svojo domače mestece, kjer na lastni koži občuti krivico novega reda, ki mu vladajo kriminal, droge in nasilje. Kmalu se odloči, da bo pravico vzel v svoje roke, s tem pa mora nase prevzeti tudi breme, da je poleg njegovega ogroženo tudi življenje njegovih najbližjih.
walking tall_2004.opis_omdb: The hard-boiled former U.S. Special Forces veteran and decorated sergeant, Chris Vaughn, is in for a rude awakening, as his peaceful hometown has changed radically. With the old cedar mill gone out of business for good--and a garish gambling house opened instead, promoting drugs and violence thanks to his old high-school nemesis, Jay Hamilton--Chris will have no other choice but to take matters into his own hands as the town's new sheriff. Now, Jay's murderous henchmen have no place to hide--and with a primitive and lethally efficient four-by-four fence post as his weapon of choice--Chris is determined to clean up the vice and the corruption in his beloved birthplace. Who will dare to stop Chris, the furious one-man-army?

skyscraper_2018.opis_neo:
Nekdanji agent FBI in vojni veteran se znajde sredi kaosa spletk in kriminala.

Will Sawyer je nekdanji agent FBI in vojni veteran, ki po hudi nesreči, danes dela kot gradbeni varnostni strokovnjak. Ko je povabljen v Hong Kong, da oceni varnost najvišjega nebotičnika na svetu, se zgodi katastrofa. Will se znajde sredi kaosa spletk in kriminala, medtem ko mora iz notranjosti nevarne stolpnice rešiti sebe in svojo družino.
skyscraper_2018.opis_omdb: FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world suddenly ablaze and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who are trapped inside the building - above the fire line.

the man from toronto_2022.opis_neo:
Zmešnjava pri najemu Airb'n'b stanovanja prisili običajnega moža, Teddyja, da se izdaja za neusmiljenega morilca, znanega kot Mož iz Toronta.

Zmešnjava pri najemu Airb'n'b stanovanja prisili običajnega moža, Teddyja, da se izdaja za neusmiljenega morilca, znanega kot Mož iz Toronta. A ko se iz oči v oči sooči z morilcem, za katerega se izdaja, Toronto uporabi Teddyja kot pomočnika.
the man from toronto_2022.opis_omdb: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other at an Airbnb rental.

elektra_2005.opis_neo:
Elektra je uspešna plačana morilka, ki velja za eno najboljših v svojem poklicu in ima celo svojega agenta.

Od Marvel Comics, kjer so ustvarili Može X in Spidermana, tokrat prihaja še „Elektra“, akcijski film leta. V odločilno bitko med dobrim in zlim se vmeša bojevnica in z eno potezo poruši njuno ravnovesje. Jennifer Garner nastopa v glavni vlogi kot močna, s
elektra_2005.opis_omdb: In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance. A strong, mysterious and a deadly sexy action heroine - a lethal synthesis of grace and power. Not long after recovering from seemingly mortal wounds, Elektra has severed all ties with the world, living only for her next assignment. But in an unexpected turn of events, she is forced to make a decision that can take her life in a new direction - or destroy her. Key players in Elektra's journey are Stick, a blind martial arts master responsible for Elektra's "resurrection," and Mark Miller and Abby Miller, a father and daughter on the run from The Hand, a powerful syndicate whose members practice the dark version of the martial art Kimagure.

in the key of love_2019.opis_neo:
Maggie kot fotografinja dela na poroki in tam naleti na svojega bivšega. Napeto je, dokler se ne spomnita, kako dobro pojeta skupaj.

Dve leti po odhodu iz domačega kraja se fotografinja Maggie ponovno sreča s svojim nekdanjim fantom Jakom, ko se njegova sestra pripravlja na poroko in želi, da Maggie fotografira njen veliki dan. Ko se Maggie in Jake strinjata, da bosta na poroki zapela nevestin najljubši duet, se med njima znova zanetijo iskrice.
in the key of love_2019.opis_omdb: Two years after leaving town, photographer Maggie is reunited with her ex-boyfriend Jake when his sister is getting married and wants Maggie to shoot the wedding. When she and Jake agree to sing the bride's favorite duet, the spar...

anche gli angeli mangiano fagioli_1973.opis_neo:
Sladoledar in rokoborec si pod pretvezo najdeta delo v mafiji, toda kmalu spoznata, da je zločinsko življenje prevelik zalogaj zanju.

V želji po boljšem življenjskem standardu nekdanji prodajalec sladoleda in rokoborec prepričata razvpitega mafijskega šefa, da ju zaposli. Kmalu pa spoznata, da življenje v kriminalnem podzemlju ni to, kar sta si predstavljala.
anche gli angeli mangiano fagioli_1973.opis_omdb: Two nice guys, a wrestler (Bud Spencer) and an Ice-cream vendor (Giuliano Gemma) are mistaken for dangerous killers by an important local gangster, whose nickname is "Sorriso". With the help of many funny coincidences they play along with Sorriso "working" for him, just to survive, but, when they receive the order to butcher the components of a very indigent family they are unmasked and...

her pen pal_2021.opis_neo:
Ko načrtovalka prireditev Victoria pomaga pri poroki prijateljice v Parizu, se nepričakovano vnovič zbliža z dopisnim prijateljem iz Francije.

Organizatorka dogodkov Victoria se veseli poti v Pariz, kjer bo pomagala pri organizaciji poroke svoje najboljše prijateljice. 

Ko izve, da bo njen nekdanji partner na poroko pripeljal novo spremljevalko, znova naveže stik s svojim francoskim dopisovalcem iz otroštva. 

Obujanje starih spominov kmalu prinese tudi nova čustva in nepričakovane zaplete.
her pen pal_2021.opis_omdb: Event planner Victoria can't wait to attend and plan her best friend's wedding in Paris. But when she finds out her ex is bringing a date, Victoria reconnects with her French childhood pen pal.

mystery 101_2019.opis_neo:
Profesorica književnosti, specializirana za detektivske romane, združi moči s kriminalistom pri preiskovanju umora študenta.

Profesorica na fakulteti, ki poučuje kriminalno literaturo, se zaplete v policijsko preiskavo kraje dragocenega raziskovalnega primerka, smrti študenta, izginotja ter domnevnega samomora.
mystery 101_2019.opis_omdb: A college professor teaching "Whodunnit" fiction gets involved in the police investigation of the theft of a mega dollar research plant, the death of a student, disappearance of another and an alleged suicide.

the 27-hour day_2021.opis_neo:
Deloholična podjetnica Lauren si končno vzame čas za oddih na podeželju. Bo tam v počasnejšem ritmu ljubezen našla pot v njeno življenje?

Podjetnica, ki vodi uspešno blagovno znamko s področja dobrega počutja, si vzame premor, da bi končno našla ravnovesje med delom in zasebnim življenjem. A kmalu ugotovi, da to ne bo tako preprosto. Ji bosta sproščujoč oddih in nova ljubezen za vedno spremenila življenje?
the 27-hour day_2021.opis_omdb: An entrepreneur takes a break from her wellness empire for some much-needed work/life balance but realizes it won't be easy. Will a relaxing retreat and new romance change her life forever?

mix up in the mediterranean_2021.opis_neo:
Kuhar se namesto poškodovanega brata dvojčka udeleži prestižnega kuharskega tekmovanja in se zagleda v organizatorko dogodka.

Medtem ko Josh Northrup ostaja v svojem domačem aljaškem mestecu in vodi tradicionalno družinsko restavracijo pokojnega očeta, se njegov dvojček Julian odpravi v veliko mesto, kjer s svojim možem Henrijem Vermeirenom odpre prestižno restavracijo. Ta sicer prejema odlične ocene, a finančno ne dosega pričakovanj.

Julian se uspe prijaviti na letno tekmovanje Escoffier, vrhunsko kuharsko svetovno tekmovanje, ki tokrat poteka na Malti v enem od luksuznih hotelov mogotca Prestona Wescotta, pod organizacijo njegove hčerke Meg, ki si želi z dogodkom zagnati svojo kariero v svetu prestižnih dogodkov. Julian prepriča Josha, da ga spremlja kot gost, a se stvari zapletejo, ko si Josh poškoduje hrbet. Julian se zato odloči, da bo na tekmovanju nastopil pod njegovim imenom, vendar ga zaradi sodobne zapestne naprave, ki nadzoruje udeležence, prisili, da vzdržuje prevaro, pri čemer mu pomaga nekdanji diskvalificirani zmagovalec Chester Peele.

"Lažni Julian" (pravzaprav Josh) se med tekmovanjem vse bolj poveže z Meg, ki se zaljubi v njegovo pristnost in značaj, vendar bi razkritje resnice lahko uničilo tako tekmovanje kot njun odnos. Situacijo dodatno zaplete nevarni francoski tekmovalec Etienne Leduc, ki prav tako pride do finala in odkrije prevaro.
mix up in the mediterranean_2021.opis_omdb: A small-town cook impersonates his big city chef twin to compete in a culinary contest and falls for the woman in charge of the event, who thinks he is the brother who is married.

same kind of different as me_2017.naslov_orig: Same Kind of Different as Me
same kind of different as me_2017.opis_neo:
Da bi rešil svoj zakon, se mora prodajalec umetnin na ženino željo spoprijateljiti z nevarnim brezdomcem, kar vsem trem za vedno spremeni življenje.

Uspešni preprodajalec umetnin Ron Hall (Greg Kinnear) in njegova žena Debbie (Renée Zellweger) imata navidez idealen zakon in popolno življenje. A ko je na preizkušnji njuna vera in obstoj družine, ju nepričakovani odnos z nenavadnim brezdomcem (Djimon Hounsou) popelje na življenjsko potovanje, ki bo vsem prineslo večno prijateljstvo. Ganljiva drama nam pokaže, kako lahko preprosto dejanje sočutja in prijaznosti spremeni vse in vsakogar.
same kind of different as me_2017.opis_omdb: Ron Hall (Greg Kinnear) lost track of what matters most in life. It took an affair, a confession, a dream and an unlikely friendship with a homeless man to help him remember. From the outside, Ron Hall's seemingly charmed life looked pretty perfect: He had a flourishing art business, a beautiful wife, Debbie (Renée Zellweger), two fine teen children, and an amazing fifteen thousand square foot house in Fort Worth, Texas. But appearances can be deceptive.

whiskey tango foxtrot_2016.opis_neo:
Po resnični zgodbi posnet film o ameriški novinarki, ki se je podala na nevarno poročevalsko misijo v vojni Afganistan.

Tina Fey nastopi v huronsko zabavni komediji o tem, kako samega sebe najdeš na najbolj nepričakovanih krajih. V dolgočasno pisarniško rutino ujeta novinarka Kim Baker (Tina Fey) si sklene popestriti poklicno in siceršnje življenje, zato se odpravi na nevarno poročevalsko nalogo v vojni Afganistan. Daleč od doma in udobja zahodnjaškega sveta jo po premaganem kulturnem šoku čaka srečanje s pustolovsko novinarko Tanyo Vanderpoel (Margot Robbie), strogim polkovnikom (Billy Bob Thornton) ter očarljivim fotoreporterjem (Martin Freeman), ki ji pomagajo, da se prebije skozi zmedo in norost tega drugačnega sveta. Sredi kaosa Kim v sebi najde moč, za katero ni vedela, da jo ima: tvega vse, da bi lahko domov prinesla pomembno novinarsko zgodbo.
whiskey tango foxtrot_2016.opis_omdb: 2003. After careful consideration, Kim Baker, a news copywriter, decides to leave the relative comfort of a New York desk job and serious boyfriend Chris to accept the assignment to work for three months as on-camera reporter in war torn Afghanistan, as her news agency is looking for anyone within their ranks to fill immediately the empty voids overseas. Her only experience of being in such an environment is going through hostile zone training a few years earlier. Immediately upon her arrival in Afghanistan, she realizes that she is ill-prepared emotionally for this assignment, not only enduring the dangers of the war itself, but also the conditions of everyday life, including largely been seen by men as only a "piece of ass" and a distraction despite her being considered average looking back home and not being overtly sexual, and being an individual with a small bladder who is nonetheless told to stay hydrated at all times. She is largely assisted in navigating this new life by Tanya Vanderpoel, a fellow female western correspondent, and Fahim Ahmadzai, her Afghan translator guide. As time goes on, Kim finds that she not only may have a specific and important voice within the press corps, but that she may be losing touch with her life back in the States for good or bad. In addition, she will have to decide how much she is willing to risk, not only for herself but that for her colleagues, to get that next important story. She also has to figure out how much of what she does truly is her, and how much is being as she and the other western press corps members state is being in the "Kabubble". What may also affect her life is how much the war in Afghanistan is overtaken by other world events for which the American public is wanting information, and thus if Afghanistan has a specific time span in her life regardless of how much she may want to stay to tell what she sees as its important stories.

season for love_2018.opis_neo:
Ločenka se vrne v domači kraj, da bi sodelovala na tekmovanju v peki na žaru, ko pa sreča staro ljubezen, postane zares vroče.

Po ločitvi se Taylor s hčerko za poletje vrne v domači kraj, kjer ponovno zaživi pod isto streho s svojo mamo. Na hčerkino spodbudo se prijavi na tradicionalno mestno tekmovanje v pripravi žara, kjer nepričakovano sreča svojo srednješolsko ljubezen. Med skupnim preživljanjem časa se začnejo prebujati stara čustva, vendar je odločena, da je ne bo nič zmotilo pri prizadevanju za zmago na tekmovanju. Kljub temu kmalu ugotovi, da se nekaterim stvarem preprosto ni mogoče upreti.
season for love_2018.opis_omdb: After her divorce, Tyler returns to Red Rock with her daughter. She helps her mother in the restaurant and signs up for the yearly BBQ cook-off, in which her old high-school sweetheart also competes.

assassin's creed_2016.opis_neo:
Moški raziskuje spomine svojega prednika iz 15. stoletja, da bi pridobil veščine tajne združbe in se spopadel z zatirajočo organizacijo v sedanjosti.

Kriminalec Callum Lynch dobi priložnost, da s pomočjo genske tehnologije razišče spomine svojega prednika Aguilarja, ki je v 15. stoletju živel v Španiji. Ko prejme njegove spomine odkrije, da je potomec skrivnega združenja Asasinov, ki so se stoletja borili proti zloveščim Templarjem, ki še danes ogrožajo svet. Odloči se dokončati boj svojih prednikov.
assassin's creed_2016.opis_omdb: Through a revolutionary technology that unlocks his genetic memories, Callum Lynch (Michael Fassbender) experiences the adventures of his ancestor, Aguilar de Nerha, in 15th Century Spain. Callum discovers he is descended from a mysterious secret society, the Assassins, and amasses incredible knowledge and skills to take on the oppressive and powerful Templar organization in the present day.

jason bourne_2016.opis_neo:
Jason Bourne, nekdanji agent in smrtonosno orožja CIE, je prisiljen stopiti iz sence in razkriti še ostale skrivnosti o svoji preteklosti.

Nekdanji agent CIE, Jason Bourne, ki se skriva že več kot desetletje, ponovno stopi iz senc, ko ga začne iskati njegova stara zaveznica Nicky Parsons. Čeprav se Bourne sedaj končno spominja svoje resnične identitete, je pred njim skritih še veliko tajnih podatkov, ki se jih z Nicky odločita raziskati, a jima pot prekrižata CIA agenta Dewey in Heather.
jason bourne_2016.opis_omdb: Jason Bourne is again being hunted by the CIA. It begins when Nicky Parsons a former CIA operative who helped Bourne, who went under and now works with a man who's a whistle blower and is out to expose the CIA's black ops. Nicky hacks into the CIA and downloads everything on all their Black Ops, including Treadstone which Bourne was a part of. And Heather Lee, a CIA agent, discovers the hack and brings it to the attention of CIA Director Dewey, the man behind the Black Ops. He orders Parsons be found and, hopefully, Bourne, too.

final destination 5_2011.opis_neo:
Ko začnejo preživeli po padcu mostu skrivnostno umirati, spoznajo, da Smrti ne moreš prevarati.

Peti del izjemno uspešne franšize grozljivk, v katerem smrt znova sistematično lovi skupino prijateljev, ki se poskušajo izmakniti njenemu neusmiljenemu pregonu.
final destination 5_2011.opis_omdb: While on a business retreat, Sam has a premonition that he, his co-workers, boss, and several other people will die in a horrific bridge collapse. When his premonition ends, he tries to make everyone get off the bus. Only some of his co-workers, along with his boss, leave. Shortly after, the bridge collapses. Everyone thinks that they are safe until the survivors start dying. It is now up to Sam to try to find a way to prevent anyone else from dying before it is too late.

holmes & watson_2018.opis_neo:
Humorna priredba klasičnih skrivnosti sira Arthurja Conana Doyla s Sherlockom Holmesom in doktorjem Watsonom.

Največji detektiv na svetu Sherlock Holmes in njegov zvesti pomočnik Dr. Watson, združita moči pri raziskovanju umora, ki se je zgodil v Buckinghamski palači. Sumita, da ima prste vmes zlobni profesor Moriarty, primeru pa morata priti do dna v le štirih dneh, če želita preprečiti atentat na angleško kraljico.
holmes & watson_2018.opis_omdb: A humorous take on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's classic mysteries featuring Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson.

the equalizer_2014.opis_neo:
Zgodba o nekdanjem specialcu, ki je v želji po mirnem življenju uprizoril lastno smrt. Toda stiska soljudi v njem prebudi željo po borbi za pravico.

McCall (Denzel Washington) je pustil svojo skrivnostno preteklost za seboj in se posvetil svojemu novemu, tihemu življenju. Ko pa spozna Teri (Chloë Grace Moretz), mladenko pod nadzorom izredno nasilnih ruskih gangsterjev, ne more stati ob strani. Oborožen je s skritimi veščinami, ki omogočijo maščevanje nad vsemi, ki so kruti do nemočnih. McCall se vrne iz upokojitve, saj se v njem ponovno prebudi želja po pravičnosti. Če je kdo v težavah, če mu usoda ni naklonjena, če se nima več kam obrniti, mu bo pomagal McCall. On je Izenačevalec.
the equalizer_2014.opis_omdb: Robert McCall is a former special service commando who faked his own death in hopes of living out a quiet life. Instead, he comes out of his self-imposed retirement to save a young girl, and finds his desire for justice reawakened after coming face-to-face with members of a brutal Russian gang. McCall becomes the go-to man when the helpless require the kind of vengeance they would never find without his skills.

national security_2003.opis_neo:
Earla Montgomeryja zaradi neprimernega obnašanja vržejo s policijske akademije.

Earl in Hank sta vse prej kot prijatelja, a imata dve skupni točki – službo varnostnika in zavrnitev s strani policijske akademije. Prvega so zaradi njegovega vedenja izključili, drugega pa nikoli niso sprejeli. Med običajnim delovnim dnevom prideta na sled kriminalni združbi in priložnost izkoristita, da se dokažeta kot policista.
national security_2003.opis_omdb: Earl and Hank have only one thing in common: they're both L.A.P.D. rejects. One just got kicked out, the other can't even get in. After confronting each other on opposite sides of the law during a traffic stop that escalates out of control, these two luckless individuals end up partnered as lowly security guards. Despite being damned to the lowest rung of the law enforcement ladder, Earl and Hank uncover a sophisticated smuggling operation led by Nash and his band of thugs. When Earl and Hank get their hands on some hot property, they go on the run from, first the bad guys, then the L.A.P.D.--led by Lt. Washington and Detective McDuff. What these two unlikely partners do to law enforcement is a crime, but they just might save the day. That is, if they don't kill each other first.

in time_2011.opis_neo:
V prihodnosti dosežejo ljudje 25 let, zatem pa dobijo življenje samo še za eno leto. Čas si lahko dokupijo na različne načine.

V prihodnosti, kjer je čas dobesedno denar in se staranje konča pri 25-ih letih, so edini način za preživetje zaslužek, kraja ali dedovanje časa. Will Salas in čedna dedinja se odločita uničiti pokvarjeni sistem.
in time_2011.opis_omdb: Welcome to a world where time has become the ultimate currency. You stop aging at 25, but there's a catch: you're genetically-engineered to live only one more year, unless you can buy your way out of it. The rich "earn" decades at a time (remaining at age 25), becoming essentially immortal, while the rest beg, borrow or steal enough hours to make it through the day. When a man from the wrong side of the tracks is falsely accused of murder, he is forced to go on the run with a beautiful hostage. Living minute to minute, the duo's love becomes a powerful tool in their war against the system.

i origins_2014.opis_neo:
Molekularni biolog in njegova laboratorijska partnerka prideta do odkritja, ki lahko bistveno spremeni družbo, kot jo poznamo.

Molekularni biolog preučuje evolucijo človeškega očesa in raziskuje hipotezo, da tako kot prstni odtis, dve osebi ne moreta imeti identičnega očesa. Po žalostni izgubi svojega dekleta, Ian z laboratorijsko partnerko odkrije dokaze, ki lahko popolnoma spremenijo družbo, kot jo poznamo. Da bi potrdil svojo teorijo, odpotuje na drugo stran sveta, v iskanju točno določenega para oči.
i origins_2014.opis_omdb: I Origins begins when graduate student, Ian Gray, is researching the evolution of human eyes with Karen and Kenny, in order to prove that eyes have evolved instead of "appeared" as creationists claim. His fascination with eyes takes him into areas that have profound personal and cultural consequences.

life_2017.opis_neo:
Posadka mednarodne vesoljske postaje naleti na največje odkritje v zgodovini človeštva: prvi dokaz življenja na Marsu.

Mednarodna ekipa astronavtov odkrije življenje na Marsu
life_2017.opis_omdb: Six astronauts aboard the space station study a sample collected from Mars that could provide evidence for extraterrestrial life on the Red Planet. The crew determines that the sample contains a large, single-celled organism - the first example of life beyond Earth. But..things aren't always what they seem. As the crew begins to conduct research, and their methods end up having unintended consequences, the life form proves more intelligent than anyone ever expected.

killers_2010.opis_neo:
Jen in Spencer živita idealno zakonsko življenje v predmestju. Dokler nekega jutra ne začnejo žvižgati krogle. Dobesedno.

Režiser komedij Blondinka s Harvarda in Grda resnica predstavlja nenavadno življenjsko dogodivščino umirjene Jen, ki med počitnicami spozna zabavnega in privlačnega Spencerja. Sledi neizbežna romanca in hitra poroka, po treh letih družinske idile pa sledi šokantno razkritje.
killers_2010.opis_omdb: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, government-hired super-assassin accustomed to a life of exotic European locales, flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a beautiful, fun-loving computer tech recovering from a bad break-up, he finds true love...and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss. Three years later, Spencer and Jen are still enjoying a picture-perfect marriage - that is, until the morning after Spencer's 30th birthday. That's when Spencer and Jen learn he's the target of a multi-million dollar hit. Even worse, the hired killers have been stalking the happy couple for years, and could be anyone: friends, neighbors, the grocery store clerk, even that crabby old guy shuffling across the street. Now Spencer and Jen are on the run for their lives. As their suburban paradise turns into a paranoid game of dodge-the-bullet, they must find out who wants Spencer dead and why, all the while trying to save their marriage, manage his in-laws, keep up neighborly appearances ... and just plain survive.

where the wild things are_2009.opis_neo:
Deček pobegne od doma, ker si želi pustolovščin. Odpluje na otok, poln bitij, ki ga sprejmejo za kralja.

Predelava otroške zgodbe pisatelja Maurica Sendaka, v kateri Max, neubogljivi fantek, ki ga starši pošljejo v posteljo brez večerje, ustvari svoj navidezni svet, kjer v gozdu prevladujejo divja bitja, ter je Max njihov vladar. Vladati mora velikanskim pošastim, kar ni tako preprosto, kot se morda zdi!
where the wild things are_2009.opis_omdb: A young boy named Max has an active imagination, and he will throw fits if others don't go along with what he wants. Max - following an incident with Claire (his sister) and her friends, and following a tantrum which he throws as a result of his Mother paying more attention to her boyfriend than to him - runs away from home. Wearing his wolf costume at the time, Max not only runs away physically, but runs toward a world in his imagination. This world, an ocean away, is inhabited by large wild beasts, including one named Carol who is much like Max himself in temperament. Instead of eating Max like they normally would with creatures of his type, the wild things befriend Max after he proclaims himself a king who can magically solve all their problems.

lady bird_2017.opis_neo:
Odločna najstnica Christine "Lady Bird" McPherson se sooči z ljubečo in bojevito materjo, ko sanja o vpisu na kolidž v New Yorku.

Režija Greta Gerwig. Christine MacPherson (Saoirse Ronan) bo kmalu vstopila v zadnji letnik srednje šole. Med obvladovanjem težavnega odnosa z materjo in svoje prve ljubezni, se mladenka uči, kako najti v življenju svojo pot.
lady bird_2017.opis_omdb: Christine "Lady Bird" McPherson is a high-school senior from the "wrong side of the tracks". She longs for adventure, sophistication, and opportunity, but finds little of that in her Sacramento Catholic high school. Her senior year improves: she finds her first romance, participates in the school play, and--most importantly--applies for college.

miss pettigrew lives for a day_2008.naslov_orig: Miss Pettigrew Lives for a Day
miss pettigrew lives for a day_2008.opis_neo:
Guinevere Pettigrew, londonsko guvernanto srednjih let, odpustijo. V iskanju nove službe se znajde v sijajnem svetu ameriške igralke in pevke.

Guinevere Pettigrew, guvernanta v srednjih letih, neupravičeno izgubi službo. Me iskanjem nove službe se znajde v elegantnem stanovanju priljubljene pevke Delysie Lafosse, ki išče pomočnico za eno samo nalogo - odganjati mora njene številne snubce.
miss pettigrew lives for a day_2008.opis_omdb: War threatens London as Miss Pettigrew, a destitute governess, filches a client's card from her agency and presents herself at the door. A singer named Delysia Lafosse wants a social secretary as she seeks a West End role by sleeping with a feckless producer in the bed of Nick, a smarmy nightclub owner with whom she also dallies. She ignores Michael, her piano player, who loves her and has tickets for New York on the Queen Mary. Miss Pettigrew's job is to make sure Delysia gets the part. Over 24 hours, Miss Pettigrew is also called upon to help an ambitious and unfaithful fashion editor patch things up with her older fiancé, a lingerie designer. Has Miss Pettigrew found her calling?

love in aruba_2021.opis_neo:
Sonce, pesek in samski oče! Službena pot na Arubo z očarljivo varuško se za zagrenjenega arhitekta spremeni v nepričakovano ljubezen.

Samski oče zaposli žensko za pomoč pri vzgoji hčerke na Arubi.
love in aruba_2021.opis_omdb: A romance movie that isn't sickly sweet and formulaic. The script is better than many and the dialog is natural, not formulaic and stylized. The two leads are good as are the rest of the cast. Don't know where it was filmed, I assume Aruba which is beautiful.

concrete evidence: a fixer upper mystery.naslov_orig: Concrete Evidence: A Fixer Upper Mystery
concrete evidence: a fixer upper mystery.opis_neo:
Ko v hiši novega Shannoninega fanta med obnovo odkrijejo kosti dekleta, Shannon prevzame stari primer.

Shannon začne obnovo Macove hiše, toda v stenah najdejo okostje Lilly, dekleta, ki je izginilo pred 20 leti. Shannon in Mac začneta novo preiskavo in sledi iščeta v starem Lillyjiem dnevniku. Zdi se, da je vse povezano s športnim oddelkom krajevne srednje šole.
concrete evidence: a fixer upper mystery.opis_omdb: When Mac-Shannon's new beau-first moved to Lighthouse Cove, he bought the historic lighthouse mansion that the town is named after. During renovation demolition, the bones of a teenage girl who went missing fifteen years ago were discovered. If Shannon has any chance of getting the renovation back on track, she'll need to tackle the cold case.

deadly deed: a fixer upper mystery_2018.naslov_orig: Deadly Deed: A Fixer Upper Mystery
deadly deed: a fixer upper mystery_2018.opis_neo:
Ko v stari viktorijanski vili, ki jo Shannon prenavlja, odkrijejo truplo, mora razrešiti skrivnostni umor, če hoče rešiti hišo.

Shannon in Mac organizirata prostovoljce pri obnovi stare hiše, ki bo postala dom revne družine. Toda ko direktorja banke, ki je dala posojilo za obnovo, najdejo mrtvega, Shannon in Mac začneta preiskovati. Zdi se, da so vsi imeli razlog, da sovražijo bankirja.
deadly deed: a fixer upper mystery_2018.opis_omdb: Shannon Hughes is renovating a Victorian mansion and when a banker is found murdered inside the house, she has to solve the mystery before the renovation becomes a demolition.

mr. manhattan_2025.opis_neo: Uspešni odvetnik Mason je osredotočen na kariero, dokler ne postane očim otrokom svojega pokojnega brata. Starševstvo mu da nov pogled na življenje.
mr. manhattan_2025.opis_omdb: Mason Bradley's life turns upside-down when he unexpectedly becomes the sole guardian of his late brother's kids after prioritizing his law career and ending his engagement.

caught by love_2026.opis_neo: Annie potuje v luksuzno letovišče v upanju, da bo našla samo sebe, a se znajde v vrtincu spletk in romance ter lova na ukraden dragulj.
caught by love_2026.opis_omdb: While on a journey of self-discovery, a resort guest gets swept into an undercover investigation for stolen jewels that turns into an unexpected and adventurous romance.

the perfect wedding match_2021.opis_neo:
Ženitna posrednica Maisie potrebuje spremljevalca za sestrino poroko, a jo njena aplikacija poveže z moškim, s katerim res ne more iti. Ali pač?

Maisie je programerka, ki razvija uspešno aplikacijo za iskanje partnerja. Ravno ko sama potrebuje novega partnerja, v aplikaciji pride do napake. Maisie odkrije, da Luke, čeprav ni njen popolni par, ima vse, kar njej manjka, in obratno. Maisie je priča na sestrini poroki, skozi vrsto nezgod pa ji bo skupaj z Lukom uspelo rešiti poroko in najti pravo ljubezen.
the perfect wedding match_2021.opis_omdb: Programmer for a matchmaking app Maisie Jacobs is single and dateless for her sister Ali's wedding. Maisie uses the app, but is sent the only person she would never date. Could the mix-up be her chance for true love?

to barcelona, forever_2025.opis_neo: V tem nadaljevanju To Barcelona, With Love se Anna vrne v špansko mesto, da bi proslavila Erikino zaroko z Nicom, a tam odkrije tudi svojo ljubezen.
to barcelona, forever_2025.opis_omdb: As Anna travels back to Barcelona, reuniting with Erica to celebrate her engagement to Nico, she meets a charming farmer and accidentally finds herself "engaged" to save his family's legacy.

sweet autumn_2020.opis_neo:
Maggie podeduje polovico tetinega podjetja za slaščice in si prizadeva izvedeti, zakaj je drugo polovico podedoval privlačen moški po imenu Dex.

Maggie je uspešna podjetnica, ki se vrne v rojstni kraj in odkrije, da ji je babica v oporoki zapustila polovico trgovine s sladkarijami. Maggie ne razume, zakaj je drugo polovico dobil Dex, pridelovalec javorjevega sirupa. Ker se v mestu bliža festival sladkarij, Maggie in Dex sodelujeta in spotoma skušata odkriti razlog za babičino odločitev. Kmalu najdeta vrsto babičinih pisem. Postopoma se Maggie in Dex zbližata, Maggie pa bo morala sprejeti odločitev, ali se bo vrnila v staro življenje.
sweet autumn_2020.opis_omdb: Aunt Dee splits her candy shop between her niece, Maggie, and maple farmer, Dex. Following letters Dee left, the two uncover the reason for her decision, during the Sweet Autumn festival.

second guessing fate_2025.opis_neo: Organizatorka dogodkov Gemma nima časa za ljubezen, dokler ji vedeževalka ne napove, da je le zmenek od prave romance. Je lahko pravi Nick ali Enzo?

branching out_2024.opis_neo: Mama išče hčerinega biološkega očeta, da bi izdelala družinsko drevo, kar jo pelje na pot zaupanja, ljubezni in razumevanja, kaj pomeni družina.
branching out_2024.opis_omdb: To help build a family tree, single mom Amelia tracks down her daughter's biological father. It becomes a journey of trust, love, and discovering the meaning of family.

a husband to die for_2025.naslov_sl: Mož za umret: Zgodba Lise Aguilar
a husband to die for_2025.opis_neo: Nosečo Lisa Aguilar napadejo in pustijo umirajočo med vlomom v hišo. Začne sumiti, da ima njen mož pri tem prste vmes.
a husband to die for_2025.opis_omdb: A pregnant woman learns her husband is cheating and doesn't want to be a father, pushing him to consider extreme actions to escape his obligations.

if i run_2025.opis_neo: Ko je njena najboljša prijateljica umorjena, se Casey znajde obtožena zločina. Zasebni detektiv in vojaški veteran Dylan začne sumiti, za kaj gre.
if i run_2025.opis_omdb: A woman flees after being framed for her best friend's murder. As she evades capture, Casey relies on her faith to navigate the challenges ahead.

one euro, one love_2025.opis_neo: Zavrnjena Liara pobegne v Italijo in impulzivno kupi vilo, kjer sta se njena starša spoznala in zaljubila. Za prenovo se obrne na mojstra Lea.
one euro, one love_2025.opis_omdb: A successful businessman travels to Italy to stop his daughter from spending all her money to restore an old villa, but Italy has other romantic plans.

a royal romance in ibiza_2026.opis_neo: Razvijalka Dylan (Caprice Bourret) si najde sanjsko službo pri ustvarjanju luksuznega spa centra na Ibizi. Upravitelj ima druge načrte - in je princ!
a royal romance in ibiza_2026.opis_omdb: After a painful breakup with her ex-business partner, Dylan Harper, a talented American developer, is determined to prove herself on her next big contract- creating a luxury wellness hotel for His Royal Highness King Eduard on the breathtaking island of Ibiza. The opportunity is a dream come true for Dylan- until she comes face to face with the king's son, Prince Nicolas, a dashing bachelor with his own ideas on how to execute the hotel project. Dylan wins over the prince with her poise and expertise as the two fall under the island's powerful healing energy, finding peace, clarity and true love when they least expect it.

eat, drink and be married_2019.opis_neo:
Jess in Max želita zaradi dvomov preklicati poroko, a si Jess premisli, ko Maxov brat prosi Billie, naj reši dan.

Tri dni pred poroko se Jess in Max odločita, da se ne bosta poročila. Billie vodi neprofitno organizacijo, ki hrano že s plačanih, vendar odpovedanih svatb, podari pomoči potrebnim. Ko Jess in Max v spremstvu Maxovega brata Charlieja prideta k Billie, jo Charile prepriča, da mu pomaga ponovno združiti Jess in Maxa. Skupaj pripravita številna srečanja, na katerih Jess in Max spoznata, da resnično spadata skupaj, medtem pa se njun odnos razvije v nekaj več.
eat, drink and be married_2019.opis_omdb: Three days from their wedding, Jess and Max are about to call it off. However, Jess starts to question her decision when Max's brother enlists the help of Billie to save the wedding, and in the process starts to fall for her.

the winter palace_2022.opis_neo:
Pisateljica Emily dela kot oskrbnica v prazni graščini, vendar so njeni načrti za dokončanje knjige prekinjeni, ko prispe lastnik, princ Henry.

Romanopiska Emily ima težave z iskanjem navdiha za pisanje. Dobi priložnost, da dokonča svojo knjigo ter da postane oskrbnica v praznem zimskem dvorcu. Presenečena je, ko dvorec obišče lastnik: princ, s svojim spremstvom. Še bolj je presenečena, ko izve, da njeno delo vključuje sprejemanje ukazov kraljeve skupine, medtem ko poskuša dokončati svojo knjigo.
the winter palace_2022.opis_omdb: A novelist with writer's block becomes the caretaker at an empty winter chateau to finish her book. The owner, a prince, suddenly shows up with his royal entourage, and her job as the caretaker includes taking orders from the roya...

curious caterer: fatal vows_2023.opis_neo: Gostinka in amaterska detektivka Goldy Berry poskrbi za hrano na veliki poroki. Nevesta je Jessamyn Cole, nekdanja žena detektiva Toma Schultza.
curious caterer: fatal vows_2023.opis_omdb: In the third movie of the series, Goldy Berry, a caterer and amateur detective, is recruited to provide food for a sizable wedding. Jessamyn Cole, the bride, is the ex-wife of Goldy's current love interest, detective Tom Schultz.

all for love_2016.opis_neo:
Sramežljiva pisateljica dela raziskavo za svojo najnovejšo knjigo in se nepričakovano zaljubi v pomorščaka, ki ga preučuje.

Jo je pisateljica ljubezenskih romanov, toda njen zadnji roman ni bil uspešen. V njem je navedla ogromno napačnih podatkov o gasilcih, zato njena urednica Diana vztraja, da se udeleži usposabljanja mornariških specialcev, ki ga vodi njen mlajši brat Colin. 

Na začetku se zdi, da se osebnostno nikakor ne ujameta, ko pa ju njeno raziskovanje zbliža, odkrije, da je na njem več, kot se zdi na prvi pogled. Bo ozdravila srce, ki ga je zlomil moški, za katerega je mislila, da ga ljubi, in tvegala tudi v resničnem življenju?

curious caterer: foiled plans_2024.opis_neo: Goldy skrbi za prigrizke na srednjeveški gostiji v gradu Hyde, ko slavje zmoti umor. Primera se loti s pomočjo detektiva Toma Shultza.
curious caterer: foiled plans_2024.opis_omdb: Goldy Berry's Medieval feast at Hyde Castle gets interrupted by a murder. She teams up with Detective Shultz to solve the mystery before the murderer strikes again.

the wedding contest_2023.opis_neo: Dva konkurenčna načrtovalca porok z različnimi zamislimi se potegujeta za dobičkonosno delo, a pri tem stketa nepričakovano vez.
the wedding contest_2023.opis_omdb: When a couple can't decide on a wedding theme, they hire two wedding planners, Taylor and Ben, to compete for the job by proposing two very different styles.

curious caterer: forbidden fruit_2024.opis_neo: Goldy je šokirana, ko glavnega pevca na rock koncertu, kjer skrbi za hrano, ubije elektrika. Primera se znova lotita z detektivom Tomom Shultzem.
curious caterer: forbidden fruit_2024.opis_omdb: A caterer's date turns awry when the singer at the event she's catering gets electrocuted, making it a crime scene she has to help investigate.

just add love_2022.opis_neo: Napeta kuharica zdrave hrane April potuje v Italijo, da bi prenovila svojo kuho, najde pa novo ljubezen in okus z očarljivim italijanskim kuharjem.
just add love_2022.opis_omdb: April's publisher wants her to rework her healthy cookbook. She travels to Italy to get new inspiration and joins a culinary tour led by Roberto to learn about Italian cooking.

a royal recipe for love_2023.opis_neo: Ko pekarico Emmo najamejo za kraljevo zabavo, njene upe, da bi izdala kuharsko knjigo, ogrozi njen pomočnik v kuhinji, nepredvidljivi princ Oliver.
a royal recipe for love_2023.opis_omdb: When Emma, a baker in NYC, is hired to bake for the King and Queen of Sanovia's anniversary party, she is convinced a good job will lead to her landing a cookbook deal.

to barcelona, with love_2025.opis_neo: Prevajalka Erica se znajde v zadregi zaradi svoje priredbe Annine knjige, ko se obe udeležita predstavitve romana na španskem prizorišču.
to barcelona, with love_2025.opis_omdb: Erica, an American translator, secretly rewrites a Barcelona-set novel. Complications arise when bookseller Nico invites Anna, the credited author, for a signing in the city.

junebug_2024.opis_neo: Štiridesetletna Juniper sreča sebe pri 8 letih. Njen mlajši jaz podvomi o življenjskih izbirah, vključno z neizpolnjenimi sanjami o pisanju zgodb.
junebug_2024.opis_omdb: Juniper, a book editor turning 40, is magically reconnected with an eight-year-old version of herself who questions her life choices, including the dream of writing her own stories.

a whirlwind wedding_2021.opis_neo:
Ko se načrtovalka dogodkov Darcy vrne domov, da bi načrtovala mamino poroko, očarljivi Kyle kmalu pritegne njeno pozornost. Bo vzcvetela ljubezen?

Cassie je računovodkinja, ki poskuša zavrniti napredovanje. Potem jo pokliče mama, ki se bo poročila, njen organizator porok pa ji je dal odpoved, zato ji Cassie priskoči na pomoč. Spozna kuharja Kyla, ki bo pripravil hrano za poroko. Cassie in Kyle odlično sodelujeta. Si bosta priznala čustva, ki so med njima, preden bo prepozno?
a whirlwind wedding_2021.opis_omdb: Former event-planner Cassie returns to her hometown to plan her mother's wedding. She enlists Kyle, the chef catering the event, to help with all the preparations, and the two get close.

paws in the city_2025.opis_neo: Upraviteljica družbenih omrežij Issa naredi napako, zaradi katere izgubi dobro službo. A rešitev se pojavi, ko skribi za prikupno jazbečarko Camilo.
paws in the city_2025.opis_omdb: How do you start over when the biggest mistake of your life has more than one million views? Find out, in The Dachshund wears Prada.

lost in paradise_2026.opis_neo: Sophia (Lacey Chabert), ustanoviteljica vrhunske modne hiše, nima česa obleči, ko se skupaj s svojim bivšim Maxom znajde na puščavskem otoku.
lost in paradise_2026.opis_omdb: When the founder of a high-end fashion company gets marooned on an "deserted" island with a chef, romance blossoms as they work together to survive.

when love springs_2023.opis_neo: Mladenka obišče gostišče za obnovo zaobljube svojih staršev in naleti na bivšega. Da bi se izognila zadregi, se pretvarja, da je lastnik njen fant.
when love springs_2023.opis_omdb: A junior PR professional arrives at a quaint B&B for her parents' vow renewals and runs into a former flame who broke her heart. Panicked and afraid of humiliation, she pretends the B&B owner is her new boyfriend.

alexander_2004.opis_neo:
Aleksander, makedonski kralj in eden od najboljših vojskovodij vseh časov, zavojuje večino znanega sveta.

Spektakel o življenju najslavnejšega vojskovodje vseh časov, ki je pred svojim 25. letom osvojil 90 odstotkov znanega sveta. Aleksander Veliki je vodil svojo nepremagljivo grško, makedonsko in kasneje tudi vzhodnjaško vojsko po 35.500 kilometrov dolgi poti osvajanj, v obdobju osmih let.
alexander_2004.opis_omdb: Conquering ninety percent of the known world by the age of twenty-five, Alexander the Great (Colin Farrell) led his armies through twenty-two thousand miles of sieges and conquests in just eight years. Coming out of tiny Macedonia, Alexander led his armies against the mighty Persian Empire, drove west to Egypt, and finally made his way east to India. This movie concentrated on those eight years of battles, as well as his relationship with his boyhood friend and battle mate, Hephaistion (Jared Leto).
