Alexander died young, of illness, at the age of thirty-two. Alexander's conquests paved the way for the spread of Greek culture (facilitating the spread of Christianity centuries later), and removed many of the obstacles that might have prevented the expansion of the Roman Empire. In other words, the world we know today might never have been if not for Alexander's bloody, yet unifying, conquest.

lake placid_1999.opis_neo:
Trije lovci poskušajo ustaviti ogromnega krokodila, ki naganja strah v kosti prebivalcem Black Laka v Mainu.

Lake Placid postane peklenski kraj, ko se začnejo širiti grozljiva poročila o krokodilu, ki ubija ljudi. Lastniki želijo govoricam priti do dna še pred začetkom turistične sezone, zato so najeli ekipo, ki bo rešila primere. Krokodil v gorah? Velemestni paleontologinji Kelly Scott (Bridget Fonda) pri iskanju pomaga lokalni trdorokec Jack Wells (Bill Pullman). Njihovo delo pa močno ovira pretiran ljubitelj živali, ki je morbidno zaljubljen v krokodile. Nova grožnja kmalu razburka mir majhnega mesta.
lake placid_1999.opis_omdb: Shortly after the horrifying underwater attack in Maine's Black Lake, the local Fish and Game officer, Jack Wells, enlists the help of the New York City palaeontologist, Kelly Scott, to investigate. With only a mangled body as their starting point, Jack and Kelly embark on a dangerous mission to find the mysterious creature, as Sheriff Hank Keough, a mythology professor, and an eccentric inhabitant all want to locate the elusive predator first. But, something deadly is lurking beneath the silent pond, and it's already taken a liking to the juicy human flesh. What is the secret of Lake Placid?

click_2006.opis_neo:
Michaelu v prostorih podjetja čudaški zaposleni ponudi daljinec, s katerim lahko upravlja več kot samo TV in naj bi spremenil njegovo življenje.

Deloholični arhitekt odkrije univerzalni daljinski upravljavec, s katerim lahko naprej ali nazaj previje različne dele svojega življenja.
click_2006.opis_omdb: Michael Newman (Sandler) is a hard-working family man who must please his boss (Hasselhoff) in order to get promoted. This gives him less time with his family, and he wishes for a remote with which to control his life. This soon comes true when he meets Morty (Walken), a crazy sales clerk who has the ultimate remote: a remote in which he can do anything, including muting, skipping, and dubbing his life. Michael finds this to be the opportunity in which he can not only skip every argument, but also skip to his promotion. He sees this as a good idea--until the remote goes horribly wrong.

double team_1997.opis_neo:
Mednarodni vohun združi moči s preprodajalcem orožja, da bi pobegnil iz kazenske kolonije in družino rešil pred teroristom.

Borec proti teroristom Jack Quinn bi rad zapustil svoj posel in se posvetil drugim rečem. Ker z ženo Kathryn pričakujeta otroka, bi rad več časa preživel doma in postal družinski človek. Vendar ne bo šlo brez zadnje naloge. Jack mora ubiti terorista Stavrosa, vendar se naloga ponesreči. Tako Kathryn postane tarča Stavrosovega maščevanja. Jack se v obupu po pomoč obrne na smrtonosnega preprodajalca z orožjem Yaza (Dennis Rodman). Skupaj bosta poskušala rešiti Kathrynino življenje.
double team_1997.opis_omdb: Counterterrorist officer, Jack Quinn misses his target, Stavros, on the eve of his final mission. From there, he is sent to the colon;y; a rebirth for presumed-dead assassins. He breaks free from there, and seeks the aid of Yaz, a weapons dealer, for his final battle with Stavros.

american outlaws_2001.opis_neo:
Ko baron kmetovalce prepodi z njihove zemlje, da bi zgradil železniško progo, Jesse James in Cole Younger vzameta zakon v svoje roke.

Ko pokvarjen baron kmetovalce prepodi z njihove zemlje, da bi na njej zgradil železniško progo, Jesse James in Cole Younger vzameta zakon v svoje roke in se lotita bančnih ropov in vandalizma, s čimer želita ohromiti železnico. Ob tem jima je ves čas tesno za petami legendarni detektiv Allan Pinkerton, ki ga je železnica najela, da bi fanta spravil pred sodnika.
american outlaws_2001.opis_omdb: When a Midwest town learns that a corrupt railroad baron has captured the deeds to their homesteads without their knowledge, a group of young ranchers join forces to take back what is rightfully theirs. In the course of their vendetta, they will become the object of the biggest manhunt in the history of the Old West and, as their fame grows, so will the legend of their leader, a young outlaw by the name of Jesse James.

my best friend's wedding_1997.opis_neo:
Ko ženska izve, da je njen dolgoletni prijatelj zaročen, ugotovi, da ga ljubi, in se ga odloči osvojiti le nekaj dni pred poroko.

Pred devetimi leti sta se Julianne Potter (Julia Roberts) in njen najboljši prijatelj ter bivši fant Michael O'Neal (Dermot Mulroney) dogovorila, da se bosta poročila, če do svojega 28. leta ne bosta našla ljubezni svojega življenja. Minilo je teh devet let in Michael je zasnubil drugo. Ko Julianne spozna, koga v resnici želi, odpotuje v Chicago s svojim pomočnikom Georgeem (Rupert Everett), da bi naredila vse, da prepreči 'poroko leta'.
my best friend's wedding_1997.opis_omdb: A woman who, by a promise made years earlier, is supposed to marry her best friend in three weeks, even though she doesn't want to. When she finds out that he's marrying someone else, she becomes jealous and tries to break off the wedding.

basic_2003.opis_neo:
Vojaška vaja v panamski džungli se konča s srhljivo tragedijo, zato pošljejo agenta, da izvede preiskavo.

Vojaška vaja v panamski džungli se konča s srhljivo tragedijo. Tornado, džungla, odred, ki gre na svoje, tajna agencija znotraj tajne agencije.
basic_2003.opis_omdb: Tom Hardy, an ex-Army Ranger turned DEA agent, is drawn into an ever-widening mystery surrounding the disappearance of the feared and often hated Sgt. Nathan West, as well as several of his elite Special Forces trainees on what appears, at first, to have been a routine training exercise during a hurricane in the jungles of Panama. Only two survivors are found, Dunbar, and a badly wounded Kendall, the son of a high-profile Joint Chiefs of Staff official. Neither is willing to cooperate with Capt. Julia Osborne's investigation. So base commander Col. Bill Styles calls in ex-Ranger Hardy, an old friend and a persuasive interrogator. Osborne disapproves of Hardy who is on leave from the D.E.A. after having come under suspicion of accepting bribes from local drug traffickers. She is also uneasy when she learns that Hardy once trained under West and hates him almost as passionately as his current recruits. With time running out, Hardy and Osborne call a temporary, if uneasy, truce. Hardy cajoles a confession out of Dunbar, who claims that Sgt. West and the missing Rangers have been murdered and their bodies blown away by the hurricane. When they later interview Kendall, he confirms that the other Rangers and West are dead. But, in almost every other way, his story contradicts Dunbar's. What happened to West and his Ranger team? And what were they really doing out there in the jungle? As each layer reveals more lies and greater deceptions, Hardy and Osborne inch towards the horrible truth about the fate of the missing Rangers.

total recall_1990.opis_neo:
Doug ima sanje o koloniji na Marsu, zato se odloči sanjam in skrivnostim priti do konca.

Ko neki moški želi, da mu v um vsadijo virtualne spomine na počitnice na Marsu, ga nepričakovan in grozljiv niz dogodkov prisili, da zares obišče ta planet - ali pač?
total recall_1990.opis_omdb: Douglas Quaid is haunted by a recurring dream about a journey to Mars. He hopes to find out more about this dream and buys a holiday at Rekall Inc. where they sell implanted memories. But something goes wrong with the memory implantation and he remembers being a secret agent fighting against the evil Mars administrator Cohaagen. Now the story really begins and it's a rollercoaster ride until the massive end of the movie.

viking quest_2015.opis_neo:
Preprost fant, ki se bori ob boku morskih roparjev, ki izhajajo iz bojevniškega klana, po boju z zmajem izve svojo pravo usodo.

Mladenič, ki so ga vzgajali Vikingi, potem ko so oplenili njegovo vas, spozna svojo usodo: ustaviti mora zmaja, ki je napadel njegov klan in namerava uničiti svet.
viking quest_2015.opis_omdb: Erick, a young Viking warrior, joins forces with a rival clan in order to rescue a kidnapped princess from the great Midgard Serpent. It's a perilous task with a risk far greater than merely their own lives; by rescuing the princess, they might cause Ragnarök - the end of the world.

serving sara_2002.opis_neo:
Vročevalec sodnih pozivov poskuša opraviti svojo službo pri izmuzljivi ženski.

Sara Moore je razvajena bogataševa soproga, Joe Tyler pa sodelavec v odvetniški pisarni. Sara Moore pride v odvetniško pisarno, da bi izročila ločitvene dokumente. Joe Tyler ni dobro zapisan pri svojem šefu Rayu in Sara je njegova zadnja priložnost, da se ponovno dokaže. Medtem, ko poskuša Joe najti Saro, se njen mož doma na ranču v Teksasu že zabava z novo ljubeznijo.

Sprva Joeju ne kaže najbolje, kajti ženski se v zadnjem trenutku vedno uspe izmuzniti. Vendar pa usoda nazadnje poskrbi, da se znajdeta na istem avtobusu, pričneta se pogovarjati in Joe ji pojasni, da po teksaških zakonih, kljub temu, da je ona solastnica velikega premoženja, ne bo od soproga dobila ničesar. Delitev na polovico pride v poštev le v primeru, da so dokumenti napisani in izročeni po newyorških predpisih.

Sara mu ponudi milijon dolarjev, da bi zadevo obrnil na glavo in dokumente izročil Gordonu. Kljub temu, da Joeju grozi, da bo izgubil službo, sprejme njeno ponudbo in odpravita se v Teksas. Tu pa se šele začne zares zapletati, nenazadnje tudi zato, ker se je Joe medtem v lepo Saro zaljubil ...
serving sara_2002.opis_omdb: A process server, Joe Tyler (played by Matthew Perry) is given the task of serving divorce papers on Sara Moore (Elizabeth Hurley), the wife of of a wealthy Texas businessman. To do so he needs to contend with her attempts at evasion and the attempts of a colleague to undermine him.

the lazarus project_2008.opis_neo:
Pogojno izpuščeni nekdanji zločinec se zaplete v podvig, ki ogrozi njega in njegovo družino, zato se znajde v novem življenju v psihiatrični ustanovi.

Življenje je zanesljivo pustilo na cedilu Bena Garveyja (Paul Walker). Kot nekdanji kaznjenec, obtožen tatvine, je marljivo in vztrajno delal, da bi pokopal preteklost in začel znova – z obetavno službo, čedno ženo (Piper Perabo) in očarljivo hčerjo. 

Žal ga preteklost preganja in mu odvzame službo, ko tam izvedo, kdo je. Položaj je še slabši, ko se odloči sodelovati pri ropu s svojim sleparskim bratom, a se navidez "preprosta in lahka" tatvina sprevrže v večkratni umor, Ben pa se znajde v celici obsojencev na smrt. 

Potem ko izvršijo kazen z injekcijo strupa, se Ben začuden zave, da je nekako preživel usmrtitev; znajde se v nekakšni psihiatrični ustanovi na podeželju, kjer nič ni tako, kakor je videti. Mučijo ga demonske pojave in zasleduje ga skrivnostni lik (Lambert Wilson). 

Eden redkih virov zaupanja je čedna psihiatrinja (Linda Cardellini), ki Benu pomaga, mu svetuje in ga spodbuja, da vztraja v tej bizarni in nerazložljivi resničnosti.
the lazarus project_2008.opis_omdb: A harrowing and frightening thriller about a man who has everything he's ever loved stripped away from him; and to earn his life and family back, he must face obstacles of mystical origins, endure countless tests of his faith, struggle with his own sanity, and explore the depth and the power of his soul..

shade_2003.opis_neo:
Skupina pokerašev naleti na "Dekana" in uspe jim dobra igra, zaradi česar jim je kmalu na sledi maščevalni gangster.

V svetu zavajanja in prevare je ekipa neizprosnih losangeleških goljufov, kvartopirskih prevarantov in sleparjev trdno odločena, da bo izvedla prevaro vseh prevar pri vnaprej dogovorjeni igri pokra. Njihov cilj je, da premagajo mojstra pokra - enega in edinega Deana. V pripravi na pomembno igro izvedejo zapleteno potegavščino in odnesejo 80 tisoč dolarjev, zadostno vsoto za njihov naslednji podvig. Edini problem je, da prisvojeni denar pripada nekomu drugemu. Zdaj so jim za petami nevarni zasledovalci, ki hočejo nazaj, kar jim pripada.
shade_2003.opis_omdb: Shade is set in the world of poker hustlers working the clubs and martini bars of Los Angeles. The tale unfolds as a group of hustlers encounter "The Dean" and pull off a successful sting that results in their pursuit by a vengeful gangster.

catch and release_2006.opis_neo:
Ženska poskuša ponovno zaživeti, a se ne more sprijazniti s smrtjo svojega zaročenca in skrivnostmi, ki jih je imel pred njo.

Po nenadni smrti zaročenca Gray Wheer išče uteho pri svojih prijateljih: vedno veselem in na šalo pripravljenem Samu, pretirano odgovornem Dennisu in starem prijatelju iz srednje šole Fitzu, ki je nekoč veljal za ženskarja in žurerja. Ko Gray začne brskati po svojem preteklem življenju, naleti na več skrivnosti, povezanih s pokojnim zaročencem, ki ga prikažejo v popolnoma novi luči.
catch and release_2006.opis_omdb: In Boulder, Colorado, Grady, who comes from an old money family but who has struck out on his own as a half owner of a fly fishing business, has just unexpectedly passed. Beyond her extreme grief, Gray, his loving fiancée, the two who were to be married in only a couple of days, is placed in a difficult position as they had no assets in their joint names, and without a will she is legally left with nothing of his except the engagement ring, one half of a family heirloom set along with the wedding ring she was about to receive, the engagement ring which his mother, Ellen, would like back. Gray cannot even afford to live in the rental house she and Grady were to live in, and as such, she, at least in the short term, moves into Grady's old room with his two roommates and best friends, Dennis, Grady's quiet, straight-laced business partner, and somewhat clueless Sam, a copywriter of sorts with Celestial Seasonings Tea. The fourth in that buddy friendship is Fritz, a Los Angeles based director of commercials, he who came in for the funeral and who is staying with Dennis, Sam and now Gray for as long as he is in town. Gray has never much liked seemingly self-absorbed Fritz, his current presence which only strengthens that notion as he displays no sense of anything about Grady, let alone grief. In the process of dealing with his estate, Gray discovers some hidden aspects of what was Grady's recent life, both of a financial nature and an associated personal nature. She turns in part to Grady's friends for answers and support, and while Dennis is the one who wishes she turned to in being secretly in love with her, Gray ends up bonding unexpectedly with Fritz as this information answers a lot of questions she had about his and Grady's friendship. Things within this grouping get even more complicated with the arrival into town from Los Angeles of a woman named Maureen and her preschool aged son Mattie, who are somewhat in the center of that hidden issue concerning Grady.

extraction_2015.opis_neo:
Nekdanjega operativca Cie ugrabi skupina teroristov. Ko njegov sin izve, da ni načrta za njegovo rešitev, sam začne z reševalno operacijo.

Harry Turner in njegov oče Leonard delata za CIO. Ko Harry izve, da je bil njegov oče ugrabljen med dostavo programa Kondor mu želi pomagati, a mu nadrejeni ne dovolijo. Ti v iskalno akcijo pošljejo agentko, ki je njegovo nekdanje dekle. Harry se odloči, da bo očetu pomagal na lastno pest in prepriča agentko, da se mu pridruži.
extraction_2015.opis_omdb: Harry Turner works for the CIA like his father Leonard. He wants to do fieldwork but he's constantly being denied. He is stationed in Prague and his father's good friend keeps an eye on him. Later they receive word that Leonard, who was in New Jersey making sure a piece of hardware called Condor arrives, that Leonard and the Condor's been taken. The Director tries to find it and Harry wants to help but won't let him. So he bolts and goes to New Jersey. The director decides to let one of their agents who is Harry's ex to find Leonard and the Condor. She was also told to find Harry and send him back to Prague. But when she finds him, he convinces her to let him find his father and the Condor.

a breed apart_2025.opis_neo: Violet, upornica, ki na odročnem otoku išče zapuščene pse, se znajde v strašni situaciji, polni groze, adrenalina in kaosa.
a breed apart_2025.opis_omdb: An English cattle breeder and his 9-year-old son struggle to connect while settling in 1850s Canada.

the birds_1963.opis_neo:
Premožna mladenka sledi potencialnemu fantu v njegov domači kraj. Popotovanje postane bizarno, ko ptice vseh vrst nenadoma začnejo napadati ljudi.

Premožna mladenka iz San Francisca zasleduje potencialnega fanta v majhno mestece v severni Kaliforniji. Popotovanje postane bizarno, ko ptice vseh vrst nenadoma začnejo napadati ljudi.
the birds_1963.opis_omdb: Melanie Daniels is the modern rich socialite, part of the jet-set who always gets what she wants. When lawyer Mitch Brenner sees her in a pet shop, he plays something of a practical joke on her, and she decides to return the favor. She drives about an hour north of San Francisco to Bodega Bay, where Mitch spends the weekends with his mother Lydia and younger sister Cathy. Soon after her arrival, however, the birds in the area begin to act strangely. A seagull attacks Melanie as she is crossing the bay in a small boat, and then, Lydia finds her neighbor dead, obviously the victim of a bird attack. Soon, birds in the hundreds and thousands are attacking anyone they find out of doors. There is no explanation as to why this might be happening, and as the birds continue their vicious attacks, survival becomes the priority.

white squall_1996.opis_neo:
Najstniki odkrijejo disciplino in tovarištvo na ponesrečenem jadranju.

Resnična zgodba o skupini bogatih najstnikov v elitni šoli, ki se podajo na potovanje na šolski jadrnici, da bi pridobili izkušnje in disciplino. Ko naletijo na tropsko nevihto, se šolski izlet spremeni v boj za preživetje.
white squall_1996.opis_omdb: A true story about a group of American teenage boys who crew a school sailing ship to gain experience, discipline, or whatever their parents feel they lack. The voyage is a true adventure for them all but it has its downs as well as ups.

striking distance_1993.opis_neo:
Tom Hardy se zameri policiji, ker obtoži napačnega človeka, a kmalu ugotovi, da je morda imel prav.

Tom Hardy, ki prihaja iz policijske družine, se spopade s svojim stricem po tem, ko je umorjen njegov oče. Tom verjame, da je morilec drug policist, in to javno izpostavi. Določijo ga za delo na reki, kjer ga morilec začne izzivati.
striking distance_1993.opis_omdb: Tom Hardy (Bruce Willis) is a maverick cop in pursuit of a sadistic serial killer. Demoted to river patrol after suggesting to the press the killer may be a police officer, he initiates an unauthorized investigation with his new partner (Sarah Jessica Parker).

lock up_1989.opis_neo:
Zaporniku Franku Leonu je za zapahi ostalo le še šest mesecev, a je premeščen v strogo varovan del zapora zaradi maščevalnega direktorja.

Zapornik Frank Leone mora odslužiti samo še šest mesecev kazni. Maščevalni paznik ga iz minimalno varovanega zapora pošlje v najstrožje varovano kazensko ustanovo.
lock up_1989.opis_omdb: Frank Leone is nearing the end of his prison term for a relatively minor crime. Just before he is paroled, however, Warden Drumgoole takes charge. Drumgoole was assigned to a hell-hole prison after his administration was publicly humiliated by Leone, and has now arrived on the scene to ensure that Leone never sees the light of day.

à coeur ouvert_2012.opis_neo:
Ko se v rutino vmeša nepričakovana nosečnost, se odnosi lahko zaostrijo.

Mila in Javier sta srčna kirurga, ki sta poročena že deset let. V življenju jima največ pomenita njuna ljubezen in njun poklic. Toda Milina nepričakovana nosečnost njun odnos vrže iz ravnovesja, Javierjeva ljubezen do alkohola pa postane resničen problem.

bermuda-dreieck nordsee_2011.opis_neo: V času podnebnih sprememb, ki jih povzroča ogljikov dioksid, ta plin pogosto skladiščijo pod Severnim morjem, kar je dobičkonosen posel. Je to varno?
bermuda-dreieck nordsee_2011.opis_omdb: BERMUDA-TRIANGLE NORTH SEA takes the audience into the dramatic world of Global Warming caused by Carbon dioxide emissions and its dumping under the North Sea seabed which is, in times of climate change, trend-setting and in terms of money, a lucrative business. But is it safe?

the karate kid_2010.opis_neo:
Mati samohranilka se mora s sinčkom zaradi službe preseliti na Kitajsko. Fantek se začne v novem domu učiti kung fu.

Mladi Dre je nesrečen, ker se mora z mamo preseliti na Kitajsko. Povrhu vsega, pa ga na novi šoli napade še tolpa nasilnežev. Ko Dre spozna skrivnostnega hišnika Hana ugotovi, da je ta v resnici mojster borilnih veščin. Han mu ponudi pomoč ter ga začne učiti umetnosti karateja, Dre pa spozna, da ne gre za nasilje ampak samoobrambo in miroljubnost.
the karate kid_2010.opis_omdb: 12-year-old Dre Parker has moved to China, and finds himself like a fish out of water. He befriends a fellow classmate, Mei Ying, only to make a rival, Cheng, who starts to bully and attack Dre. Soon, Mr Han, the maintenance man of Dre's apartment, fends off Cheng and his friends when they are attacking Dre and signs Dre up to fight in the Kung Fu tournament in return for the bullies laying off of Dre. Dre realizes Mr. Han is much more than a maintenance man, when he's revealed as a master of Kung Fu and Dre soon learns that Kung Fu is about self defense and peace, instead of violence and bloodshed.

the legend of awesomest maximus_2011.opis_neo: Nevedni trojanski general se mora spopasti z nepremagljivim grškim bojevnikom.
the legend of awesomest maximus_2011.opis_omdb: From the director of Revenge of the Nerds (1984) comes this outrageous sword and sandals spoof. Horny King Looney of Troy sends slacker general Awesomest Maximus to maintain peace with rival King Erotic of Greece. But when Prince Orlando, who's more into fashion than fighting, steals the King's wife Ellen to be his BFF, it's war.

meet prince charming_2002.opis_neo:
Jack in Samantha imata razmerje na daljavo, ne zavedata pa se, da se poznata tudi v živo in se v resnici ne prenašata najbolje.

Jonathan "Jack" Harris je natakar, ki upa, da bo v delu Manhattna, kjer živi, začel izdajati časopis The Tribeca Times. Med iskanjem oglaševalcev in zgodb se odloči, da bo oglaševal na spletnih straneh za zmenke. Prijavi se v enega od portalov in kmalu se zdi, da je morda našel popolno partnerko, morda celo sorodno dušo. Ne ve, da je to pravzaprav njegova soseda iz stanovanjskega bloka, 29-letna Samantha Feld, urednica revije, ki se je na portal registrirala le zato, ker njena prijateljica in sodelavka Jen meni, da potrebuje moškega.

Jen pri Samanthi pripravi zabavo, a Jack in Samantha se v vsakdanjem življenju ne prenašata najbolje, saj drug o drugem mislita, da sta hrupna in neuvidevna. Razmerje prek e-pošte jima lepo uspeva, vse dokler se ne odločita, da se želita spoznati v živo.
meet prince charming_2002.opis_omdb: Jonathan 'Jack' Harris is a waiter, who hopes to start a newspaper called The Tribeca Times, after the part of Manhattan where he lives, and while struggling to find advertisers and stories decides to do one on Internet dating services, so he joins one and seems to have found a great match, maybe even a soul-mate. He doesn't know it's actually his apartment block neighbor, 29-year old magazine editor Samantha Feld -who only rolled into the thing because her friend and co-worker Jen thinks she needs a man and threw a party at Samantha's place- with whom he clashed from the start in daily life as they consider each-other noisy and inconsiderate. Yet, when they meet after e-mail bliss together and nothing but failed dates with others...

every last one of them_2021.opis_neo:
Napeta akcija Vsi do zadnjega spremlja Jakea Hunterja, nekdanjega pripadnika specialnih enot, ki se trudi, da bi našel svojo pogrešano hčer.

Moški išče svojo pogrešano hčer, vendar njegovo iskanje razkrije večjo zaroto, ki vključuje velik kapitalistični posel v kitajski četrti zaradi pravic do vode.
every last one of them_2021.opis_omdb: A man looking for his missing daughter, but his search uncovers a larger conspiracy involving a Chinatown-derail big capitalism deal over water rights.

assault on precinct 13_2005.opis_neo:
Do konca leta je ostalo le še nekaj ur.

Na zasneženo silvestrsko noč se mora peščica obleganih policistov na odročni policijski postaji št. 13. spajdašiti z zaporniki, da bi se ubranili nenehnih napadov oborožene tolpe, ki skuša priti do zaprtega mafijskega botra.
assault on precinct 13_2005.opis_omdb: On New Year's Eve, inside a police station that's about to be closed for good, Officer Jake Roenick must cobble together a force made up of cops and criminals to save themselves from a mob looking to kill mobster Marion Bishop.

lager niš_1987.opis_neo:
Leta 1941 je sovražnik ustvaril prvo koncentracijsko taborišče v Jugoslaviji, imenovano Lager Niš.

V prvem koncentracijskem taborišču v Jugoslaviji so bili zaprti tako Judje, kot tudi politični zaporniki, talci in zajeti partizani. Med ujetniki sta tudi oče in sin iz Niša, ki tvorita osrednja lika ganljive pripovedi o upanju in preživetju. 

Ker Nemci podnevi in ponoči streljajo nemočne zapornike, se ujetniki odločijo, da bodo poskusili pobegniti. Njihov podvig se razvije v prvi množični pobeg iz kateregakoli nemškega koncentracijskega taborišča, saj jih je od 145 taboriščnikov uspešno pobegnilo več kot 100.
lager niš_1987.opis_omdb: The tragic story of a group of prisoners, ordinary people, were detained in the camp at Lager in Naise at the beginning of WWII, after that mighty torture and abuse by the Germans, will try escape from the camp. A few succeeded.

to so gadi_1977.opis_neo:
To so gadi je ena najbolj priljubljenih slovenskih komedij in sploh eden najbolj uspešnih slovenskih filmov.

Komedija o neugnanih primestnih fantih, ki grenijo življenje gospodinji Rozi, dokler se obupana zaradi obrekovanj Rozi ne odloči, da bo odšla. Kmalu po njenem odhodu se jim pridruži njena nečakinja Meri, ki očara celo družino, čeprav v kuhinji ni tako spretna kot njena teta.
to so gadi_1977.opis_omdb: In Ljubljana lives a bus driver Stebe. He's a widower. He lives with five sons and a maid Rozi. The boys are very naughty and keep annoying Rozi and, in fact all neighbourhood. One day Rozi in desperation declares that she is leaving them, because she cant stand it no more. And she does leave, although she is fond of the boys. Soon afterwards Rozi's niece Meri comes by, asking if she might stay because she wants to find herself a job in town. Meri is good girl but cannot cope with the kitchen work as successfully as her aunt. But the whole Steb family seems to be charmed by her. Even one of Stebe's own colleagues, Tone, begins to take interest in the girl. Meri likes him too. Stebe's boys feel quite disappointed because of it. But all's well that ends well: in full conspiracy Meri qualifies as bus driver while Rozi returns to the Stebe family.

traktor, ljubezen in rock'n'roll_2008.opis_neo:
Filmska zgodba je nastala po romanu Ferija Lainščka, Vankoštanc.

Kmečki fant iz zakotne prekmurske vasi želi s svojo električno kitaro nastopati na ljudskih veselicah. Uspe mu osvojiti le srce vaške lepotice, hčere premožnega gastarbajterja, ki jo je oče poslal v domače kraje, da bi si našla moža.
traktor, ljubezen in rock'n'roll_2008.opis_omdb:
Under the pressure of her father, Sylvia leaves Switzerland 
to go back to her village in Slovenia, in order to find herself a husband. 
The only record player in the village, and probably the only electric guitar in rural Slovenia of the late sixties,

over the hedge_2006.opis_neo:
Prebrisan rakun preslepi neusklajeno druščino gozdnih bitij, da mu pomagajo priskrbeti hrano za medveda Vincenta iz človeškega predmestnega naselja.

Spletkarski rakun ukane živopisano družino gozdnih bitij, da mu pomagajo poplačati hrano, ki jo dolguje. Oropati nameravajo novo predmestno naselje, ki se je pojavilo med njihovim zimskim spanjem. Pri tem pa se rakun nauči veliko o družini in prijateljstvu.
over the hedge_2006.opis_omdb: RJ, a raccoon who needs food, accidentally takes food from a hungry bear named Vincent and he wants his food to be found in exactly the same place in a week. He finally finds that an animal family, with a tortoise named Verne as their leader, could help him restore the food from the suburbia, the gateway to the good life. But little does RJ know, there is a woman who has recently hired an exterminator to try to hunt them down.

baby mama_2008.opis_neo:
Uspešna samska poslovna ženska sanja o tem, da bi imela otroka, vendar ugotovi, da ga ne more donositi sama.

Uspešna, samska poslovna ženska, ki sanja, da bi imela otroka, ugotovi, da je neplodna, zato najame žensko iz delavskega razreda za nenavadno nadomestno mater.
baby mama_2008.opis_omdb: Successful and single businesswoman Kate Holbrook has long put her career ahead of a personal life. Now 37, she's finally determined to have a kid on her own. But her plan is thrown a curve ball after she discovers she has only a million-to-one chance of getting pregnant. Undaunted, the driven Kate allows South Philly working girl Angie Ostrowiski to become her unlikely surrogate. Simple enough ... After learning from the steely head of their surrogacy center that Angie is pregnant, Kate goes into precision nesting mode: reading childcare books, baby-proofing the apartment and researching top pre-schools. But the executive's well-organized strategy is turned upside down when her Baby Mama shows up at her doorstep with no place to live. An unstoppable force meets an immovable object as structured Kate tries to turn vibrant Angie into the perfect expectant mom. In a battle of wills, they will struggle their way through preparation for the baby's arrival. And in the middle of this tug-of-war, they'll discover two kinds of family: the one you're born to and the one you make.

outlaw_2007.opis_neo:
Trije moški so bili oškodovani in zakon jim ne more pomagati.

Skupina ljudi, ki se počutijo izdane s strani vlade in so razočarani nad policijo, ustanovi sodobno tolpo izobčencev, ki naj bi popravila družbene krivice.
outlaw_2007.opis_omdb: A group of people who feel betrayed by their government and let down by their Police force form a modern-day outlaw posse in order to right what they see as the wrongs of society.

my big fat greek wedding_2002.opis_neo:
Grkinja se zaljubi v moškega, ki ni grškega porekla, in se bori, da bi ga njena ogromna družina sprejela.

Toula Portokalos je 30-letnica, Grkinja, in dela v družinski restavraciji Plešoči Zorba v Chicagu. Njen oče Gus si želi le, da se poroči z dostojnim Grkom. Toula pa si želi od življenja nekaj več. Njena mama prepriča očeta, da bi morala njuna hčerka na predavanje računalništva na kolidžu (prepriča ga, da je to njegova zamisel). Po končanih predavanjih začne Toula delati v tetini potovalni agenciji (ženske znova prepričajo očeta, da je to njegova zamisel). Tam spozna čednega Iana Millerja, srednješolskega profesorja angleščine, protestanta, pred katerim se je že nekoč osramotila v restavraciji. Nekaj časa se videvata skrivaj, nato pa ju razkrije njuna družina. Očetu ni po volji, da se hčerka videva z nekom, ki ni Grk, vendar pa mora na koncu Iana le sprejeti. Tudi Ian se mora navaditi Touline ogromne družine, Toula pa mora sprejeti samo sebe.
my big fat greek wedding_2002.opis_omdb: Toula Portokalos is 30, Greek, and works in her family's restaurant, Dancing Zorba's, in Chicago. All her father Gus wants is for her to get married to a nice Greek boy. But Toula is looking for more in life. Her mother convinces Gus to let her take some computer classes at college (making him think it's his idea). With those classes under her belt, she then takes over her aunt's travel agency (again making her father think it's his idea). She meets Ian Miller, a high school English teacher, WASP, and dreamboat she had made a fool of herself over at the restaurant; they date secretly for a while before her family finds out. Her father is livid over her dating a non-Greek. He has to learn to accept Ian; Ian has to learn to accept Toula's huge family, and Toula has to learn to accept herself.

my big fat greek wedding 2_2016.opis_neo:
Nadaljevanje romantične komedije, ki je osvojila svet! Film, ki je leta 2002 prevzel občinstvo po vsem svetu, je naposled dobil nadaljevanje.

Nadaljevanje romantične komedije, ki je osvojila svet! Film, ki je leta 2002 prevzel občinstvo po vsem svetu, je naposled dobil nadaljevanje. Moja obilna grška poroka se vrača z isto igralsko zasedbo, pa bogatejša za še nekaj novih članov. Glavne vloge zopet igrata Nia Vardalos in John Corbett, nova članica družine pa je njuna hči Paris. Potem ko sta večino svojega časa zapravila z osredotočanjem na svojo problematično hčer, se Toula in Ian začneta soočati z težavami v zakonu, pri tem pa ju čaka še eno grško poročno slavje – tokrat še večje in še bolj obilno.
my big fat greek wedding 2_2016.opis_omdb: Still working in her parents' Greek restaurant, Toula Portokalos' daughter, Paris, is growing up. She is getting ready to graduate high school and Toula and Ian are experiencing marital issues. When Toula's parents find out they were never officially married, another wedding is in the works. Can this big, fat, Greek event help to bring the family together?

side effects_2013.opis_neo:
Dr. Banks Emily predpiše poskusno zdravilo, ki pa izzove grozljive stranske učinke s smrtonosnimi posledicami.

Ko njenega soproga spustijo iz zapora, prične Emily trpeti zaradi groznih napadov tesnobe, zato poišče pomoč pri psihiatru dr. Banksu. Banks ji predpiše poskusno zdravilo, ki pa izzove grozljive stranske učinke s smrtonosnimi posledicami.
side effects_2013.opis_omdb: Despite being reunited with her husband from prison, Emily Taylor becomes severely depressed with emotional episodes and suicide attempts. After conferring with her previous doctor, her psychiatrist, Jonathan Banks, eventually prescribes an experimental new medication called Ablixa, but the drug's side-effects lead to Emily killing her husband while in a "sleepwalking" state. With Emily plea-bargained into mental-hospital confinement and Dr. Banks' practice crumbling around him, the case seems closed. However, Dr. Banks cannot accept full responsibility and investigates to clear his name. What follows is a dark quest that threatens to tear apart what's left of his life even as he discovers the diabolical truth of this tragedy.

military wives_2019.opis_neo:
Navdihujoča zgodba o prijateljstvu, ljubezni in podpori od doma.

Navdihujoča zgodba o prijateljstvu in medsebojni podpori v najtežjih trenutkih življenja. Skupina žensk, katerih partnerji služijo v Afganistanu, ustanovi pevski zbor vojaških žena, ki jim poleg sprostitve predstavlja podporno okolje, v katerem si pomagajo pri premagovanju strahu za svoje najbližje. Kmalu postanejo medijska senzacija in globalno gibanje.
military wives_2019.opis_omdb: Inspired by global phenomenon of military wives choirs, the story celebrates a band of misfit women who form a choir on a military base. As unexpected bonds of friendship flourish, music and laughter transform their lives, helping each other to overcome their fears for loved ones in combat.

tully_2018.opis_neo:
Marla je sprva negotova, ko ji pomoč nudi mlada varuška, a se počasi naveže na skrbno in presenečenj polno mlado Tully.

Mlada mati Marlo se ob treh otrocih, eden je še novorojenček, komaj prebija iz dneva v dan. Po celem dnevu pospravljanja, pranja, kuhanja in ostalih opravkov komaj dočaka večer, od moža pa tudi ni kaj prida pomoči. Ko se njen brat odloči, da ji najame nočno varuško, je Marla sprva negotova, a se počasi naveže na skrbno in presenečenj polno varuško Tully.
tully_2018.opis_omdb: The film is about Marlo, a mother of three, including a newborn. Marlo's brother gives her a night nanny as a gift. Hesitant with the extravagance at first, Marlo comes to form a unique bond with the thoughtful, surprising, and sometimes challenging young nanny named Tully.

der junge muss an die frische luft_2018.naslov_orig: Der Junge muss an die frische Luft
der junge muss an die frische luft_2018.opis_neo:
Zgodba o enem najbolj priljubljenem nemškem komediantu.

Film o otroštvu slovitega nemškega komika Hapeja Kerkelinga. Leto 1972. Devetletni debelušni Hans-Peter odrašča obdan z ljubečo družino in razposajenimi vrstniki. Resda se zdi, da ni ravno najbolj priljubljen, a zna druge pošteno nasmejati, kar vsako jutro tudi prakticira v babičini trgovinici. Potem pa na njegovo otroštvo padejo sence, saj njegova nekoč vesela in dobrodušna mati po operaciji sinusov zapade v hudo depresijo, in ker je garaški oče službeno precej zdoma, je fantič prepuščen vzgoji obeh dobrosrčnih babic. Obe imata močno osebnost, in njuna brezpogojna ljubezen Hansu-Petru vlije moč, da prebrodi čustvene viharje in zaceli svoje rane, hkrati pa razvija svoj komedijantski dar.
der junge muss an die frische luft_2018.opis_omdb: German queer TV comedian Hans Peter 'Hape' Kerkeling tells about his youth, in hindsight the root of his particular humor. His peasant parents were poor, so the family lived alternatively on the two farms of his grandparents. He was more mischievous then his older brother and drawn very young to pageantry and elements of show since he saw his first carnival parade. Fate cruelly knocked the family with repeated relatives' deaths, so humor became his weapon for self-preservation while he practiced at home how to entertain, years before he was discovered.

presence_2024.opis_neo:
Zgodba spremlja družino, ki se vseli v novo hišo, nato pa v svojem novem domu opazi srhljivo prisotnost.

Napet in grozljiv triler obeta edinstven preobrat v žanru ukletih hiš, še dodatno pa ga zaznamuje prepoznavni Soderberghov inovativni slog pripovedovanja. V igralski zasedbi so Lucy Liu, Chris Sullivan, Eddy Maday, Callina Liang in Julia Fox.

Zgodba spremlja družino, ki se vseli v novo hišo, nato pa v svojem novem domu opazi srhljivo prisotnost.
presence_2024.opis_omdb: A family becomes convinced they are not alone after moving into their new home in the suburbs.

secret in their eyes_2015.opis_neo:
Psihološki triler o nepojasnjenem umoru najstnice, katere mama je bila članica preiskovalne ekipe FBI.

Prijatelji Ray, Jess in Claire so del vrhunske ekipe preiskovalcev najhujših zločinov, a se njihove poti razidejo, ko se med žrtvami znajde Jessina hčerka. Ray po trinajstih letih naleti na otipljivo sled, toda medtem, ko želi Claire ravnati po črki zakona, si Jess želi takojšnjega, neusmiljenega maščevanja. Ray in Claire skušata najti zločinca pred Jess in jo tako obvarovati pred uničujočo maščevalnostjo.
secret in their eyes_2015.opis_omdb: 2002: Ray Kasten (Chiwetel Ejiofor) and Jess Cobb (Julia Roberts) are two investigators in a private police unit led by the DA. When they receive an anonymous tip about a girl raped and killed, they rush to the scene. Ray realizes it is Jess' daughter and the team falls apart due to the grief. In 2015, Ray comes back to LA, and says that after 13 years, he has found a lead and convinces the DA to reopen the case. They find clues and leads unknown to them, and secrets from the past come to light as they start discovering the real, chilling truth. Meanwhile, Jess, dissatisfied with the law, decides to take matters into her own hands and track down the killer, no matter what lengths she has to go to.

the guard_2011.opis_neo:
Gerry Boyle je policist iz majhnega irskega mesteca. Ima zajedljiv smisel za humor in raznežen odnos do prostitutk.

Narednik Gerry Boyle je irski policist iz majhnega kraja, ki je po naravi prepirljiv, prefinjeno duhovit, obožuje prostitutke in ga sploh ne zanima mednarodna veriga tihotapcev kokaina, zaradi katere je v njegovo zakotje prišel poštirkani agent FBI-ja, Wendell Everett.
the guard_2011.opis_omdb: Sergeant Gerry Boyle is a small-town Irish cop with a confrontational personality, a subversive sense of humor, a dying mother, a fondness for prostitutes, and absolutely no interest whatsoever in the international cocaine-smuggling ring that has brought straight-laced FBI agent Wendell Everett to his door.

it follows_2014.opis_neo:
S pomočjo svojih prijateljev poskuša Jay razvozlati skrivnost svojega prekletstva, ki ji je tik za petami, še preden bo prepozno.

Po strastni noči s svojim novim fantom Hughom začne 19-letna Jay doživljati nenavadne vizije. Obenem ima nenehno občutek, da ji nekdo ali nekaj sledi in jo poskuša ubiti. S pomočjo svojih prijateljev poskuša razvozlati skrivnost svojega prekletstva, ki ji je tik za petami.
it follows_2014.opis_omdb: For 19-year-old Jay, Autumn should be about school, boys, and weekends out at the lake. But after a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, she finds herself plagued by strange visions and the inescapable sense that someone, something, is following her. Faced with this burden, Jay and her friends must find a way to escape the horrors that seem to be only a few steps behind.

taxi_1998.opis_neo:
Da bi izbrisal grehe iz svoje policijske kartoteke, mora taksist prevažati zavoženega policijskega inšpektorja, ki sledi bančnim roparjem.

Daniel je nekdanji dostavljavec pic, ki trenutno dela kot taksist. Njegove sanje so, da bi postal voznik formule 1.S prehitro vožnjo nenehno jezi policijo, hkrati pa svojim potnikom omogoča nepozabno doživetje.
taxi_1998.opis_omdb: In Marseilles (France), skilled pizza delivery boy Daniel who drives a scooter finally has his dreams come true. He gets a taxi license. Caught by the police for a huge speed infraction, he will help Emilien, a loser inspector who can't drive, on the track of German bank robbers, so he doesn't lose his license and his dream job.

elopement_2010.opis_neo:
Drama, ki se začne z navidez brezizhodnim pobegom dveh zaljubljencev.

22-letna Jamie Butler (Pascale Hutton) in Mark Drummond (Chris Kramer) imata pravljično razmerje. Nameravata se poročiti, a jima to otežujejo spori med njunima družinama. Ker želita zaživeti skupaj, Mark prepriča Jamie, da si od njene bogate mame "sposodita" denar in se pobegneta poročit v Las Vegas. A ko njuno malo letalo strmoglavi v jezero in se Jamie zatakne varnostni pas, Mark razkrije svoj pravi obraz: iz letala osvobodi le sebe in odnese denar. Letala nikoli ne najdejo in vsi so prepričani, da sta oba umrla v nesreči…
elopement_2010.opis_omdb: In Chicago, Illinois, six year old Emily Howland requires a kidney transplant imminently or will die from kidney failure. Her parents, Sarah and Kirk Howland, the latter who owns a successful car lot, are not appropriate matches. As such, Kirk unilaterally decides to go back to a life that he abandoned eight years ago in Portland, Oregon, a life about which Sarah knows nothing and about which Kirk does not plan on telling her. Then, he, under his real name of Mark Drummond, and his then girlfriend, Jamie Butler, had rented a single engine plane to fly from Portland to Las Vegas to elope, as three of their four parents disapproved of them getting married, largely due to class differences. Mark at the time was floundering in life trying to figure out what to do with no savings. Mark and Jamie ended up stealing $200,000 of Mrs. Butler's money with every intention of paying it back when they could. However, in a raging storm, their plane crashed in a lake en route, the wreckage and bodies never having been found. Mark absconded with the money to start a new life, leaving Jamie strapped in the plane to die at the bottom of the lake. As Mark goes about enacting a plan to get a matching family member kidney, he is unaware that his police officer brother, now Detective David Drummond, has not let the case die, believing possibly that Mark and Jamie could be alive as the bodies were never recovered. Mark is also unaware of other things that happened that fateful day at the lake...

satanic panic_2019.opis_neo:
Samantha preživlja težke čase. Njen prvi dan v službi dostavljalke pic ne gre po načrtu.

Samantha preživlja težke čase. Njen prvi dan v službi dostavljalke pic ne gre po načrtu. Na koncu dolgega dne in premalo napitnin se izkaže, da je zadnja dostava namenjena skupini bogatih satanistov, ki iščejo deviško žrtev. Zdaj se mora Samantha v boju za svoje življenje obraniti čarovnic, zlih urokov in demonskih bitij, medtem ko poskuša ohraniti svoje telo - in dušo - nedotaknjeno.
satanic panic_2019.opis_omdb: Samantha is hired as a pizza delivery man. When, at the end of her first working day - at night - she delivers an order to a mansion in a wealthy neighborhood on his scooter, the jerk who receives the pizza does not tip her. Enraged by this, Samantha bursts into the house and finds herself in the coven, where a wealthy elite performs a mysterious ritual with her priestess (Rebecca Romijn). When Satanists discover that Samantha is still a virgin, they drug her and lock her in a room. They need a virgin to offer her up as a sacrifice. However, Samantha escapes, and then, dressed in ritual red clothes, the followers of Satan follow her in pursuit.

after life_2009.opis_neo:
Mladenka, ujeta med življenjem in smrtjo, pade v roke pogrebniku, ki želi pospešiti njen prehod na ono stran.

Ko se po grozljivi avtomobilski nesreči mlada žrtev Anna (Ricci) zbudi, pred seboj zagleda pogrebnika (Neeson), ki njeno truplo pripravlja za pogreb. Prestrašena, zmedena in prepričana, da je živa, ne more verjet, da je mrtva. Anni, ujeti med življenjem in smrtjo, grozi, da bo postala žrtev pogrebnika, za katerega se zdi, da je sposoben umirajoče prepeljati na drugo stran, ali pa morda namerava Anno živo pokopati.
after life_2009.opis_omdb: Sean, a young musician with a lust for life, falls in love with Evan, the girl at the coffee shop. After frequenting the coffee shop, he musters up the courage to ask her out. A tragic accident in their future brings him to an impossible choice: be with her and she will die or let her go to save her life.

the crown and the dragon_2013.opis_neo:
Starešine so od nekdaj govorili, da se bo spustila tema, senca, ki bo naščuvala brata proti bratu, pošast ognja in jekla.

Strašna pošast v podobi zmaja, ki ga lahko obvlada le ena oseba, mlada plemkinja, ki mora izpolniti svoje poslanstvo in postati prerokovani Paladin. S pomočjo svojega bojevnika svetlobe uspe premagati vse ovire do cilja.
the crown and the dragon_2013.opis_omdb: A young noblewoman must fulfill her calling to become the long foretold Paladin.

control_2022.opis_neo:
Materi zaklenjeni v sobi, neznani glas govori, katere izzive mora opraviti, če želi rešiti življenje svoje hčerke.

Eileen je zaklenjena v sobi, kjer jo vodi neznani glas, da mora opraviti nekaj nalog, da bi rešila hčerkino življenje. Čeprav se ji zaradi vsega zdi, da ji ne bo uspelo, Eileen odkrije pri sebi nepričakovane sposobnosti, dobi novo samozavest in občutek moči. Sama je proti vojski in načrtuje beg ...
control_2022.opis_omdb: A mother locked inside a stark room is tasked by an unknown voice to complete increasingly complex challenges if she wants to save her daughter's life.

the notebook_2004.opis_neo:
Na začetku zgodbe se odpravimo v Severno Karolino leta 1940.

Spoznamo mlada Allie Hamilton in Noaha Calhouna, ki se zaljubita in preživita skupaj brezskrbno poletje. Ob koncu poletja morata zaradi vojne in različnih obveznosti končati svojo romanco. 

Dolga leta kasneje srečamo Noaha, kako hodi v dom za ostarele, kjer Allie, ki izgublja spomin, bere zapiske iz beležnice. Pripovedovanje o noro zaljubljenem mladem paru v Allie obudi spomine na mladost in stara čustva.
the notebook_2004.opis_omdb: With almost religious devotion, Duke, a kind octogenarian inmate of a peaceful nursing home, reads daily a captivating story from the worn-out pages of his leather-bound notebook to a fellow female patient. To keep her company, Duke recounts the fascinating love affair between impecunious but poetic country boy Noah and Allie, an affluent city girl. And little by little, Duke unfolds a Southern, lumber-scented summer romance beneath the tall trees of late 1930s North Carolina. Indeed, it seems as if the silent manuscript possesses the unfathomable power to penetrate the opaque clouds that enclose the silver-haired dame; slowly but surely, the enchanted lady becomes immersed in the strangely alluring fairy tale of the young ardent lovers' highs and lows. But nobody knows what tomorrow holds. Are all summer loves doomed to fail?

did you hear about the morgans?_2009.naslov_orig: Did You Hear About the Morgans?
did you hear about the morgans?_2009.opis_neo:
Meryl in Paul Morgan sta premožna in privlačna newyorška zakonca, ki živita v izobilju in kroničnem pomanjkanju medsebojne ljubezni.

Njuno življenje se spremeni, ko sta priča mafijskemu umoru in pristaneta v programu za zaščito prič, v okviru katerega dobita novi imeni in novo življenje na ameriškem podeželju. 

Bo nov začetek v objemu narave pripomogel k razrešitvi njunih osebnih težav ali se bosta sredi divjine, daleč stran od velemestnih užitkov, Morganova dokončno razšla?
did you hear about the morgans?_2009.opis_omdb: Meryl and Paul Morgan have separated since his infidelity. He's a Manhattan lawyer, seeking forgiveness. She's moved on, focusing on real estate sales. As he walks her to an appointment one evening, pleading his case, they witness a murder, and the murderer sees them. The F.B.I. wants them in Witness Protection until the killer is caught. He's already hunting them. The F.B.I. sends them to Ray, Wyoming, a tiny ranch town, where they stay with the aging Sheriff and his gun-toting wife (who's his Deputy). Meryl and Paul must sort out their relationship while their New York City ways bump up against those of the West. Meantime, Meryl knows two things that Paul doesn't.

independence day: resurgence_2016.opis_neo:
Po 20 letih prihaja nadaljevanje legendarne znanstvenofantastične uspešnice Dan neodvisnosti.

Dve desetletji po prvi invaziji ob Dnevu neodvisnosti, se Zemlji približuje nova nevarnost. Vesoljcem je tik pred porazom uspelo poslati klic v sili, s katerim so priklicali okrepitve. Človeštvo je medtem razvilo nov vesoljski obrambni sistem, a sovražnik prihaja z novim orožjem, ki s spreminjanjem gravitacije uničuje celotna mesta.
independence day: resurgence_2016.opis_omdb: Two decades after the freak alien invasion that nearly destroyed mankind a new threat emerges. This Alien mothership is more than twice the size as the last one and once again, the world's armies must band together to save the world. Do they have enough firepower or will this battle change and will aliens take over?

damaged_2024.opis_neo:
V kriminalnem trilerju spremljamo detektiva iz Chicaga, ki odpotuje na Škotsko, da bi ujel neusmiljenega serijskega morilca.

Ko se na Škotskem pojavijo umori, ki spominjajo na nerešen primer serijskega morilca iz Chicaga, se detektiv Lawson vrne na sled zločincu, ki mu je pred leti uničil življenje. Skupaj z lokalnimi preiskovalci začne lov na morilca, a nove sledi razkrivajo, da nič ni tako, kot se zdi.
damaged_2024.opis_omdb: Chicago detective Dan Lawson travels to Scotland to link up with Scottish detective Glen Boyd following the resurgence of a serial killer whose crimes match an unsolved case he investigated 5 years previously.

i due superpiedi quasi piatti_1977.opis_neo:
Poskus ropa se nepričakovano spremeni v priložnost za zaposlitev, ko dva brezposelna moška po pomoti vlomita v policijsko pisarno namesto v trgovino.

Matt in Wilbur sta prevaranta, ki zaradi pomote postaneta policista. Njuno glavno delo postane nadzor nad tolpami, ki imajo nadzor nad mestom.
i due superpiedi quasi piatti_1977.opis_omdb: Through an improbable series of events and an impossibly bungled supermarket hold-up, down on their luck con men Matt and Wilbur find themselves working with the Miami police force. As they patrol the streets of the city, their main job becomes trying to break the hold of the city's street gangs, including one group of teens in old movie-gangster style clothes, led by a kid named Geronimo who dresses in full Indian warrior regalia.

harvest moon_2015.opis_neo:
Po družinskem bankrotu meščanka odpotuje na deželo, da bi rešila farmo buč, ki jo je kot naložbo kupil njen oče.

Ko mora njena družina razglasiti osebni stečaj, se mlada ženska (Jessy Schram) odpravi na podeželje, da bi pomagala obnoviti propadajočo bučno kmetijo, ki jo je njen oče (Willie Aames) kupil kot naložbo. V upanju, da bo družini pomagala ponovno finančno zaživeti, tam najde nov življenjski smisel in ljubezen.
harvest moon_2015.opis_omdb: After her family has to file for bankruptcy, a young woman moves to the country in hopes of fixing up a struggling pumpkin farm that her father bought as an investment. Hoping to get the family back on their feet financially, she finds purpose and love.

deuce bigalow: male gigolo_1999.opis_neo:
Povprečen čistilec akvarijev pazi na hišo odsotnega žigola in mora po sili razmer postati žigolo tudi sam.

Dobrosrčni čistilec akvarijev Deuce Bigalow sprejme delo v luksuznem stanovanju žigola Antoina, ko ta odpotuje v Evropo. Nerodnež med bivanjem razbije njegov 6000 dolarjev vreden akvarij, a nima denarja za popravilo škode. Ko po naključju dvigne Antoinov poslovni telefon, se zanj začne kariera žigola. Vstopi v svet, ki si ga niti v sanjah ni predstavljal.
deuce bigalow: male gigolo_1999.opis_omdb: Deuce Bigalow is a less than attractive, down on his luck aquarium cleaner. One day he runs into a male gigolo who asks him to look after his precious fish while he is away on business. However, he wrecks the house and needs quick money to repair it. The only way he can make it is to become a gigolo himself, taking on an unusual mix of female clients. He encounters a couple of problems, though. He falls in love with one of his unusual clients, and a sleazy police officer his hot on his trail.

about time_2013.opis_neo:
Film o mladeniču, ki lahko potuje skozi čas in si skuša tako zagotoviti popolno življenje, kar pa je težje, kot si misli.

Pri enaindvajsetih letih Tim odkrije, da lahko potuje v času in spreminja dogodke svojega življenja. Ko spozna simpatično Mary, z vračanjem v preteklost popravlja zabavne nezgode, ki se mu dogajajo in osvoji njeno srce. Ko med enim od časovnih skokov izbriše vse Maryjine spomine na njuno poznanstvo, se odloči znova, tokrat brez goljufanja, izboriti njeno naklonjenost.
about time_2013.opis_omdb: At the age of 21, Tim Lake (Domhnall Gleeson) discovers he can travel in time... The night after another unsatisfactory New Year party, Tim's father (Bill Nighy) tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. Tim can't change history, but he can change what happens and has happened in his own life-so he decides to make his world a better place...by getting a girlfriend. Sadly, that turns out not to be as easy as you might think. Moving from the Cornwall coast to London to train as a lawyer, Tim finally meets the beautiful but insecure Mary (Rachel McAdams). They fall in love, then an unfortunate time-travel incident means he's never met her at all. So they meet for the first time again-and again-but finally, after a lot of cunning time-traveling, he wins her heart. Tim then uses his power to create the perfect romantic proposal, to save his wedding from the worst best-man speeches, to save his best friend from professional disaster and to get his pregnant wife to the hospital in time for the birth of their daughter, despite a nasty traffic jam outside Abbey Road. But as his unusual life progresses, Tim finds out that his unique gift can't save him from the sorrows and ups and downs that affect all families, everywhere. There are great limits to what time travel can achieve, and it can be dangerous too.

love at lookout lake_2025.opis_neo: Novinarka Sierra se vrne v domači kraj, da bi raziskala skrivnostnega pisca. Ponovno se poveže s staro ljubeznijo Tylerjem - bi lahko bil on pravi?
love at lookout lake_2025.opis_omdb: Two people who fell in love as teenagers meet again in their hometown. Tyler still has strong feelings for Sierra, but she's too focused on her career to let love back in.

harmony from the heart_2022.opis_neo:
Glasbena terapevtka in reševalec Blake se spreta, ko skrbita za Blakovega deda, toda kmalu spoznata, da je lahko ljubezen najboljše zdravilo.

Ženska v lovu za sanjsko službo ugotovi, da najraje pomaga drugim.
harmony from the heart_2022.opis_omdb: Follows a woman chasing her dream job, not without getting a difficult task from her professor, she realizes that she loves helping people and her heart begins to open.

red water_2003.opis_neo:
Skupino naftnih delavcev na majhni naftni ploščadi zajame skupina gangsterjev ter jih zadrži za talce. Napade jih krvoločni morski pes.

John Sanders je kapitan ribiške ladje. Ker je tik pred bankrotom, se mora skupaj s prijateljem Emeryjem vrniti k poslu, ki ga je opravljal pred tem: podvodnemu vrtanju nafte. Nekega dne se prikaže Johnova bivša žena Kelli in jima ponudi denar za pomoč pri projektu, ki je povezan z bližnjo reko. Toda v reki se pojavijo morilski morski pes in trije kriminalci, ki v njej iščejo zalogo denarja.
red water_2003.opis_omdb: In the quiet waters of the Mississippi, body parts are being discovered. No one knows what is behind it all, until a huge man eating bull shark turns up. This bull shark is different, as it can breath in fresh water, making a deadly encounter between anyone who comes before it. John Sanders must now try and reach the surface, with his ex-wife and whilst being held hostage.

hercules in the maze of the minotaur_199.naslov_orig: Hercules in the Maze of the Minotaur
hercules in the maze of the minotaur_199.opis_neo:
Herkul priskoči na pomoč oddaljeni vasi, ki jo napada skrivnostna pošast.

Herkul se je ustalil z ženo in otroki, a pogreša dobre stare čase, ko je potoval okoli in doživljal pustolovščine. Nekega dne ga zvabijo iz upokojitve, da bi pomagal odmaknjeni vasi, ki jo napadejo.
hercules in the maze of the minotaur_199.opis_omdb: Hercules has settled down with his wife and children, but misses the good old days travelling around having exciting adventures. Then one day he is persuaded out of his farming "retirement" to help a distant village which is being attacked by an unseen monster.

the covenant_2006.opis_neo:
Štirje študentje z nadnaravnimi močmi se morajo boriti s petim, ki se je vrnil iz izgnanstva. Razjedata jih ljubosumje in dvom ter jih razdvajata.

Leta 1692 se je pet družin iz kolonije Ipswich v Massachusettsu zaobljubilo, da se bodo zavezali k molku in nikoli spregovorili o svojih nadnaravnih močeh. Toda ena izmed družin ni držala obljube, zato so jo za vedno izgnali iz dežele. Več kot 400 let kasneje, v novem tisočletju, mladi potomci omenjenih štirih družin z najstnikom Calebom na čelu obiskujejo prestižno šolo in tako kot njihovi predniki molčijo o svojih nadnaravnih sposobnostih. Toda prihod potomca izgnane družine napoveduje nov obračun. Štirje mladeniči morajo ustaviti zlo silo, spoprijeti pa se morajo tudi z ljubosumjem in sumničenjem, ki ogrožata njihovo prijateljstvo.
the covenant_2006.opis_omdb: Four best friends, young warlocks of the same coven who all share a same secret: a magic powers, suddenly have to protect themselves from a stranger-another warlock just like them who has come to town to destroy their coven after a 300 years old hate...

groundhog day_1993.opis_neo:
Narcističen vase zagledan vremenar se znajde v časovni zanki ob začetku pomladi.

Zloben, egocentričen (ampak zelo zabaven) vremenar je prisiljen vedno znova preživljati čuden dan, dokler ne naredi, kot je prav.
groundhog day_1993.opis_omdb: A weather man is reluctantly sent to cover a story about a weather forecasting "rat" (as he calls it). This is his fourth year on the story, and he makes no effort to hide his frustration. On awaking the 'following' day, he discovers that it's Groundhog Day again, and again, and again. First he uses this to his advantage, then comes the realisation that he is doomed to spend the rest of eternity in the same place, seeing the same people do the same thing every day.

daddy day care_2003.opis_neo:
Dva moška ne najdeta službe, zato ostajata doma, kjer je njuno delo samo eno - očetovstvo. To ju navdihne, da odpreta svoj vrtec.

Očka izgubita službo in ker ne najdeta nove, se odločita, da bosta odprla svoj lastni otroški vrtec.
daddy day care_2003.opis_omdb: In this movie, two fathers, Charlie Hinton (Eddie Murphy) and Phil Ryerson (Jeff Garlin), lose their jobs in product development at a large food company and are forced to take their sons out of the exclusive Chapman Academy and become stay-at-home fathers. With no job possibilities on the horizon, the two dads open their own day care facility, "Daddy Day Care", and employ some fairly unconventional and sidesplitting methods of caring for children. As "Daddy Day Care" starts to catch on, it launches them into a highly comedic rivalry with Chapman Academy's tough-as-nails director, Mrs. Gwyneth Harridan (Anjelica Huston), who has driven all previous competitors out of business.

pr' hostar_2016.opis_neo:
Film je komična zgodba o malih ljudeh in njihovem preprostem boju s škodoželjneži.

Majhni podeželski hotel Pr'Hostar se zaradi pogoltnosti direktorja znajde v rdečih številkah, na vrata pa že trka tuji kupec dvomljivega slovesa. Osebje hotela ne želi pristati na cesti, zato se odločijo preprečiti prodajo. Njihovi obupani poskusi se kot po tekočem traku izjalovijo in povzročijo popolno zmešnjavo, iz komičnega kaosa pa se lahko rešijo le z lastno iznajdljivostjo in obilico sreče.
pr' hostar_2016.opis_omdb: Due to poor business performance, a small hotel is being sold to an international buyer. Employees do not want to lose their jobs, so they take things into their own hands and try to sabotage the sale of the hotel.

cefurji raus!_2013.opis_neo:
Film predstavi monotono življenje mladih fužinskih domačinov Marka, Adija, Acota in Dejana, ki brezdelno posedajo pred domačin blokom.

Markov oče ima s sinom velike košarkarske načrte, toda konfliktni Marko se spre s trenerjem in preneha z igranjem. S prijatelji se zapleta vedno globlje v težave in se hkrati sooča s kulturnimi razlikami.
cefurji raus!_2013.opis_omdb: Marko, Adi, Aco, and Dejan hang out in front of a block of flats in Fuzine. Marko is pissed because he quit playing basketball, the sexy TV presenter doesn't notice him, and his father Radovan will beat him up for quitting basketball. Adi is irritated by the fact that his brother Sanel is a drug addict and his father Mirsad prefers to shag waitresses somewhere in Austria rather than deal with this. Aco is having a hard time with his girlfriend and wants to get revenge on bus driver Damjanovic. Dejan is anxious because his mother Sonia wants to move to Slovenske Konjice. Policemen stop the boys one night and their world starts to disintegrate.

those who wish me dead_2021.opis_neo:
Mladega fanta v divjini Montane zasledujeta dva morilca, pri čemer ga mora strokovnjak za preživetje zaščititi, gozdni požar pa grozi, da jih bo vse požrl.

Poslana v razgledni stolp nad divjino Montane, gasilko Hannah razjeda krivda po spodletelem poskusu reševanja. Ko pa se na njo po pomoč obrne mlad fant, ki ga lovita dva neusmiljena strelca, Hannah tvega vse, da bi ga zaščitila medtem, ko bežita pred pobesnelim požarom.
those who wish me dead_2021.opis_omdb: Stationed in a lonely fire lookout tower in the heart of Montana's green wilderness, guilt-ridden Hannah Faber, a daredevil smoke-jumper having a death wish, is still struggling to cope with her emotional trauma after a disastrous failure of judgement. Then, as if that weren't enough, Hannah crosses paths with utterly unprepared Connor, the young son of the forensic accountant, Owen Casserly, and catches the attention of a highly trained pair of assassins bent on silencing the boy for good. Now, to prevent them from finishing the job, Hannah must put her sharp survival skills to good use and stop the killers, who would do everything in their power to cover their tracks--including setting the forest ablaze. Can Hannah and Connor escape from those who wish them dead?

balls of fury_2007.opis_neo:
Agent FBI Ernie Rodriguez pošlje nekdanjega profesionalnega mojstra namiznega tenisa na tajno misijo.

Ravnodušni Randy je pravi mojster namiznega tenisa, toda po številnih sporih je opustil profesionalne vode in z neobičajnimi nastopi le še zabava ljudi. Nekega dne država znova potrebuje njegovo pomoč, da bi zaustavili zlobnega mafijskega šefa Fenga, ki pripravlja velik turnir namiznega tenisa.
balls of fury_2007.opis_omdb: In the unsanctioned, underground, and unhinged world of extreme Ping-Pong, the competition is brutal and the stakes are deadly. Down-and-out former professional Ping-Pong phenom Randy Daytona is sucked into this maelstrom when FBI Agent Rodriguez recruits him for a secret mission. Randy is determined to bounce back and recapture his former glory, and to smoke out his father's killer - one of the FBI's Most Wanted, arch-fiend Feng. But, after two decades out of the game, Randy can't turn his life around and avenge his father's murder without a team of his own. He calls upon the spiritual guidance of blind Ping-Pong sage and restaurateur Wong, and the training expertise of Master Wong's wildly sexy niece Maggie, both of whom also have a dark history with Feng. All roads lead to Feng's mysterious jungle compound and the most unique Ping-Pong tournaments ever staged. There, Randy faces such formidable players as his long-ago Olympics opponent, the still-vicious Karl Wolfschtagg. Can Randy keep his eye on the ball? Will he achieve the redemption he craves while wielding a paddle? Is his backhand strong enough to triumph over rampant wickedness?

the boat that rocked_2009.opis_neo:
Komedija o nezakoniti radijski postaji sredi Severnega morja v 60. letih.

Izbrana družba piratskih DJ-ev, ki je s svojo glasbo zaznamovala generacijo, se postavi po robu vladi, ki je na radijskih valovih želela slišati samo klasično glasbo in nič druga.
the boat that rocked_2009.opis_omdb: This movie is an ensemble comedy in which the romance takes place between the young people of the 1960s and pop music. It's about a band of rogue DJs that captivated Britain, playing the music that defined a generation and standing up to a government that wanted classical music, and nothing else, on the airwaves. The Count (Philip Seymour Hoffman), a big, brash, American god of the airwaves; Quentin (Bill Nighy), the boss of Radio Rock - a pirate radio station in the middle of the North Sea that's populated by an eclectic crew of rock and roll DJs; Gavin (Rhys Ifans), the greatest DJ in Britain who has just returned from his drug tour of America to reclaim his rightful position; Dave (Nick Frost), an ironic, intelligent, and cruelly funny co-broadcaster; and a fearsome British government official out for blood against the drug takers and lawbreakers of a once-great nation.

mr. peabody and sherman_2014.opis_neo:
Film spremlja pametnega psa in njegovega posvojenega sina na potovanju skozi čas, ko si prizadevata popraviti časovno razpoko, ki sta jo ustvarila.

Gospod Peabody je genialni izumitelj, ki je po naključju tudi pes. S svojim človeškim sinom Shermanom se poda na izjemno pustolovščino, da bi popravila časovno luknjo, ki sta jo nehote ustvarila.
mr. peabody and sherman_2014.opis_omdb: Mr. Peabody is a business titan, inventor, scientist, gourmand, two-time Olympic medalist and genius...who also happens to be a dog. Using his most ingenious invention, the WABAC machine, Mr. Peabody and his adopted boy Sherman hurtle back in time to experience world-changing events first-hand and interact with some of the greatest characters of all time. But when Sherman breaks the rules of time travel, our two heroes find themselves in a race to repair history and save the future, while Mr. Peabody may face his biggest challenge yet - being a parent.

the 40 year old virgin_2005.opis_neo:
Prijaznega fanta, ki še nikoli ni "šel do konca", prijatelji zbadajo in pritiskajo nanj da bo za vedno ostal devičnik. Nato spozna mater samohranilko.

Andy Stitzer se približuje štiridesetim in je zadovoljen s svojim življenjem, moti ga le dejstvo, da je še vedno devičnik. Ko med igro pokra novico izvejo njegovi prijatelji, se odločijo, da mu bodo pomagali to spremeniti, a izbirajo precej nenavadne načine. Morda pa se Andyju le nasmehne sreča, ko spozna mamo samohranilko Trish.
the 40 year old virgin_2005.opis_omdb: Deleted scenes from 'The 40 Year Old Virgin'.

comic sans_2018.opis_neo:
Alan se po razhodu z dekletom odpravi na otok Vis, kjer se znajde razpet med ekscentričnim očetom, še enim nekdanjim dekletom in njenim zaročencem.

Po tem, ko je zaman skušal zakrpati odnos z dekletom, se uspešni grafični oblikovalec Alan Despot odpravi na otok Vis. Znajde se razpet med svojim ekscentričnim očetom, še enim nekdanjim dekletom in njenim zaročencem.
comic sans_2018.opis_omdb: A young and successful copywriter Alan Despot, after trying in vain to renew a broken relationship with his girlfriend, goes to the island of Vis and finds himself torn between his eccentric father, another ex-girlfriend and her fiancé. New situations and circumstances help Alan to view his own life from a new perspective.

the final_2010.opis_neo: Skupina srednješolskih odpadnikov se z mučenjem maščuje vzornim sošolcem.
the final_2010.opis_omdb: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

mavka. lisova pisnya_2023.opis_neo:
Mavka mora izbirati med ljubeznijo in dolžnostjo, da zaščiti Srce gozda.

Mavka, duša gozda, se sooči z nemogočo izbiro med ljubeznijo in svojo dolžnostjo zaščitnice gozda, ko se zaljubi v človeka - nadarjenega mladega glasbenika Lucasa. Prostrani gozdovi že od nekdaj nosijo nešteto skrivnosti in ugank. So dom čudovitim mitološkim bitjem, ki prebivajo med starodavnimi drevesi in zvesto varujejo svoje kraljestvo. Med njimi je tudi Mavka - duša gozda in njegova novoizbrana zaščitnica. Njeno primarno poslanstvo je zaščiti gozd in njegovo nedotakljivo \"Srce\" pred kakršnokoli agresijo ali vdori, predvsem s strani ljudi.
mavka. lisova pisnya_2023.reziser: Oleh Malamuzh, Oleksandra Ruban, Yevheniy Yermak
mavka. lisova pisnya_2023.opis_omdb: Mavka - a soul of the Forest - faces an impossible choice between love and her duty as guardian to the Heart of the Forest, when she falls in love with a human - the talented young musician Lukash. Our story is about the magical power of love. That kind of love that enables human nature to find the magic within and reveals abilities and qualities that empower a person to reach beyond possible and to hold against evil and human vice.

free in deed_2015.opis_neo: Ko pripelje mati samohranilka svojega mladega sina v cerkev, da bi ga tam ozdravili, se je osamljeni evangeličanski duhovnik prisiljen soočiti z na videz neozdravljivo otrokovo boleznijo ter s svojimi lastnimi demoni. Več, ko moli, bolj se zdi, da mu stvari uhajajo iz rok ... Umeščena v prepoznavni svet ameriških uličnih ljudskih cerkev, je zgodba posneta po resničnih dogodkih. Film prikazuje poskuse osamljenega človeka, da bi naredil čudež.
free in deed_2015.opis_omdb: Set in the distinctive world of storefront churches, based on actual events, Free in Deed depicts one man's attempts to perform a miracle. When a single mother brings her young son to church for healing, this lonely Pentecostal minister is forced to confront the seemingly incurable illness of the child and his own demons as well. The more he prays, the more things seem to spiral out of his control.

savva. serdtse voina_2015.naslov_sl: Simon: Mali bojevnik z velikim srcem
savva. serdtse voina_2015.opis_neo:
To je napeta zgodba o skrbi za naše bližnje, o pravem prijateljstvu, odraščanju in o srčnem zaupanju v svoje sanje.

''Simon: mali bojevnik z velikim srcem'' je zgodba o pomembni življenjski poti desetletnega dečka. Deček Simon pomaga osvoboditi svojo mamo in sovaščane pred uročenimi hijenami.

V poskusu bega pred hijenami pa se Simon znajde v čarobnem svetu, o katerem je do zdaj slišal samo pripovedke. Tu spozna belega volka, smešno majhno rožnato bitje in še veliko novih prijateljev, ki mu pomagajo osvoboditi vas pred napadalnimi hijenami.
savva. serdtse voina_2015.opis_omdb: An international animation project that is coming out in Russian and English languages. It is a fairytale about a grand life journey of a 10-year-old boy Savva devoted to help his Mom and fellow village people to break free from the vicious hyenas. Trying to escape from hyenas Savva finds himself in a magical world he had only heard stories of. That is where he meets the white wolf Angee, a hilarious tiny pink creature Puffy, a strange looking semi-baron FAFL and his passenger, as well as Nanty, Shaman's charming daughter. New friends help Savva through his journey to the Magician that lives on a mountain and, as legend has it, might help Savva free his village from the angry hyenas. However, each of them have their own reasons to see the magician that some of them keep only to themselves. On their way to the Magician the friends will face multiple dangers, pleasant and unpleasant surprises, discover terrifying secrets and even have a battle with a monkey army, led by the cruel and treacherous Mom JoZee - a three-headed monkey queen. "SAVVA-Heart of the Warrior" is a story about a big dream, true friendship and growing strong at heart to overcome difficulties together. It is an exciting and bright animated fairytale.

after death_2023.opis_neo:
„Po smrti“ temelji na resničnih srečanjih s smrtjo in raziskuje posmrtno življenje z avtorji knjižnih uspešnic, medicinskimi strokovnjaki, znanstveniki in preživelimi, ki osvetljujejo tisto, kar nas čaka.

Film predstavi izkušnje več oseb, ki so preživele bližnje srečanje s smrtjo, ter vsebuje analizo dogodkov s strani avtorjev in znanstvenikov, ko skušajo ugotoviti, kaj se dogaja po smrti.
after death_2023.opis_omdb: Based on real near-death experiences, After Death explores the afterlife with the guidance of New York Times bestselling authors, medical experts, scientists, and survivors that shed a light on what awaits us.

mile 22_2018.opis_neo:
Elitni ameriški agent in skrivna vojaška enota poskušajo iz Indonezije pretihotapiti skrivnostnega policista z izredno občutljivimi informacijami.

James Silva je operativec najbolj cenjene in najmanj razumljene enote CIE. Ob pomoči tajnega moštva komandosov mora zavarovati in dostaviti na varno moškega, ki poseduje izredno občutljive informacije, ki bi v napačnih rokah ogrozile številna življenja. Zaveda se, da bodo potrebna velika žrtvovanja, če želi zahtevno misijo pripeljati do konca.
mile 22_2018.opis_omdb: In a visceral modern thriller from the director of Lone Survivor, Mark Wahlberg stars as James Silva, an operative of the CIA's most highly-prized and least-understood unit. Aided by a top-secret tactical command team, Silva must retrieve and transport an asset who holds life-threatening information to Mile 22 for extraction before the enemy closes in.

rare object_2023.opis_neo:
Mlada ženska poskuša na novo zgraditi svoje življenje, ko se zaposli v starinarnici.

Film pripoveduje zgodbo o mladi ženski, ki želi znova zgraditi svoje življenje, ko se zaposli v starinarnici. Dobri duši, lastnika trgovine, ji vrneta zaupanje v življenje, dokler tisti iz njene travmatične preteklosti ne pridejo znova na plan.
rare object_2023.opis_omdb: A young woman seeks to rebuild her life when she takes work at an antique store. She regains her confidence from the kind souls who own the shop, until faces from her traumatic past start to surface.

horns_2013.opis_neo:
Po skrivnostni dekletovi smrti se mlad moški prebudi z nenavadnimi rogovi, ki mu poganjajo iz čela.

Mladeniču Igu po dekletovi smrti začnejo rasti rogovi. V majhnem mestu kjer živi, ga to še dodatno stigmatizira in spremeni v glavnega osumljenca za dekletovo smrt. Nesrečni Ig mora uporabiti super-sposobnosti, ki so mu jih dali rogovi, da bi čim prej našel pravega morilca.
horns_2013.opis_omdb: After Iggy's long-time girlfriend is murdered and the whole town agrees he is the killer, he awakens one morning with horns and the townspeople soon confess their sins. Once knowing the sins of the people, he is facing the true killer of his beloved girlfriend.

metroland_1997.opis_neo:
Chris se zaradi nenadne pojave najboljšega prijatelja Tonija po 10 letih, prisiljen soočiti s svojo preteklostjo, življenjem in zakonom z Marion.

Chris (Christian Bale) in Toni (Lee Ross) sta skupaj odrasla v predmestju Londona v začetku 60-ih. V obdobju divjih fantov sta sanjali o džezovskih klubih in pariških bulvarjih. Ujeta v 'Metrolandu', na končni postaji londonske podzemne Metropolitan linije, ostajata najboljša prijatelja. A pred koncem 60-ih oba odideta iz Londona. Toni je odšel v Afriko, Chris pa je delal v Parizu in živel z Annnick (Elsa Zylberstein), svobodomiselno mlado Francozinjo, ki uteleša svobodo, ki si jo je želel kot mlad fant. Nato pa spozna Marion (Emily Watson), mlado Angležinjo. Zaljubi se vanjo in vrne v London in k predmestnemu življenju. Devet let pozneje potrka pri njem Toni in pričaka ga poročen moški z otrokom. Toni ne more verjeti, da je zavrgel življenje, o katerem je sanjal in mu skuša pokazati, da je premlad za zakon in obveznosti ter da mora živeti svoje sanje.
metroland_1997.opis_omdb: After ten years absence Toni, Chris's best friend, suddenly reappears in London to bring chaos and doubt into Chris's calm, tranquil, slightly boring, predictable life. Chris starts to remember his carefree youth as a photographer in Paris when he lived with and enjoyed a torrid affair with Annick. It was also in Paris that he first met and fell in love with Marion. The temptations and pressure exerted on Chris by Toni to return to their former carefree life of sex, drugs and rock'n'roll soon starts to have an impact on Chris's marriage. He starts to question his values, his lifestyle choices and his relationship with Marion and even suspects her of starting an affair with Toni whom she dislikes! Eventually circumstances come to a head and Chris is forced to decide whether to follow Toni back to the hedonistic, irresponsible life of his youth or face the harsh realities of the present and stay with Marion.

submarine_2010.opis_neo:
15-letni Oliver je zaljubljen v temnolaso lepotico Yordano, ki tudi počasi opaža Oliverja.

Petnajstletni Oliver (Craig Roberts) je zacopan v temnolaso sošolko Jordano (Yasmin Paige), ki ga je, kot kaže, naposled le opazila. Mu pa zato doma ne gre najbolje: skrbi ga za starša, saj je oče (Noah Taylor) padel v depresijo, mama (Sally Hawkins) pa se po vsem sodeč spogleduje z novim sosedom Grahamom (Paddy Considine), ki je dejansko njena nekdanja ljubezen. In tako si Oliver zada dva cilja: izgubiti nedolžnost pred naslednjim rojstnim dnem in pogasiti iskro med mamo in njenim bivšim …
submarine_2010.opis_omdb: Precocious Oliver struggles with being popular in school but when a dark-haired beauty takes interest in him, he's determined to become the best boyfriend in the world.
