Meanwhile, his parents' already rocky relationship is threatened when his mother's ex-boyfriend moves in next door. Oliver makes some unorthodox plans to ensure that his parents stay together and that Jordana still likes him.

the infiltrator_2016.opis_neo:
Resnična zgodba, posneta po knjigi Mazurja, ki se je vtihotapil v kolumbijske mamilarske združbe.

Posneto po avtobiografiji zveznega agenta Roberta Mazura, ki se je v osemdesetih infiltriral v narkokartel Pabla Escobarja, kjer je pet let preživel na tajni nalogi med vodilnimi tihotapci mamil v Kolumbiji. Omogočil je uveljavitev 85 obtožnic proti narko-šefom in podkupljenim bankirjem, ki so prali denar za Escobarjev kartel.
the infiltrator_2016.opis_omdb: During the 1980s, U.S. Customs Service special agent Robert Mazur uses his undercover alias "Bob Musella" to become a pivotal player for drug lords cleaning their dirty cash. Later, he infiltrates the world's largest cartel, and helps expose the money-laundering organization of drug lord Pablo Escobar and take down the Bank of Credit and Commerce International, which had secretly taken illegal ownership of First American Bank shares in Washington, D.C. He survives the deception and has a long and productive career.

knight of cups_2015.opis_neo:
Pisatelj se razvaja v Los Angelesu in Las Vegasu. Poda se na pustolovščino s šestimi ženskami, da bi našel ljubezen.

Pred davnimi časi je kralj z Vzhoda v Egipt poslal sina, da poišče dragocen biser. Ko je kraljevič prispel tja, so mu natočili polno čašo. Izpil jo je, pozabil, da je kraljev sin, pozabil na biser in padel v globok sen ... Pisatelj, ki uživa v vsem, kar ponujata Los Angeles in Las Vegas, se skozi pustolovščino s šestimi ženskami poda na iskanje ljubezni in samega sebe.
knight of cups_2015.opis_omdb: Rick is a screenwriter living in Los Angeles, California. While he's successful in his career, his life feels empty. Haunted by the death of one brother and the dire circumstances of the other, he finds temporary solace in the Hollywood excess that defines his existence. Women provide a distraction to the daily pain he must endure, and every encounter that comes his way brings him closer to finding his place in the world. The film is divided into eight chapters (each named after a tarot card, except for the final chapter Freedom), plus a prologue, each loosely based around the central character's relationship with somebody in his life..

wick is pain_2025.opis_neo:
'Wick je bolečina' je neverjetna resnična zgodba za franšizo Johna Wicka s Keanujem Reevesom.

»Wick je bolečina« je neverjetna resnična zgodba o franšizi Johna Wicka s Keanu Reevesom v glavni vlogi. Kar se je začelo kot neodvisni film, je kljub oviram, tudi finančnim, hitro postalo svetovni fenomen, ki je na novo definiral akcijski žanr in dobil še tri megauspešna nadaljevanja. Sodelujejo Keanu Reeves, režiser Chad Stahelski ter razširjena igralska zasedba in ekipa v zakulisju franšize, vredne milijardo dolarjev.
wick is pain_2025.opis_omdb: The never-before-seen footage and story behind the John Wick (2014) phenomenon, from independent film to billion-dollar franchise.

my little pony: the movie - dubbed_2017.naslov_orig: My Little Pony: The Movie - dubbed
my little pony: the movie - dubbed_2017.opis_neo:
Ko temačne sile ogrozijo njihov dom, se mali poniji odpravijo poiskat pomoč v junaški akciji, ki jih bo prvič odpeljala onstran meja njihove dežele.

Prihodnost Equesterije je v nevarnosti, ko jih Nevihtni kralj napade z namenom, da ukrade ponijem čarovnijo. V še nikoli prej povedani pustolovščini se poniji odpravijo poiskat pomoč v junaški akciji, ki jih bo prvič odpeljala onstran meja njihovega domovanja, prek čarobnih gora in morskih svetov. Srečali bodo nove prijatelje, s katerimi bodo skupaj skušali rešiti svoj dom.
my little pony: the movie - dubbed_2017.opis_omdb: After a dark force conquers Canterlot, the Mane 6 - Twilight Sparkle, Applejack, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy, and Rarity - embark on an unforgettable journey beyond Equestria where they meet new friends and exciting challenges on a quest to use the magic of friendship to save their homeland.

the way_2010.opis_neo:
Žalujoči oče se poda na romanje po Franciji v počastitev pokojnega sina in najde samega sebe.

Martin Sheen je Tom, ameriški zdravnik, ki pride v St. Jean Pied de Port v Franciji po ostanke svojega sina, ki je umrl v neurju v Pirinejih na začetku romanja po Caminu de Santiagu, znanem kot Jakobova pot. V globoki žalosti in želji, da bi razumel svojega sina, se Tom odloči za romanje po zgodovinski poti, za sabo pa pusti udobno življenje v Kaliforniji.
the way_2010.opis_omdb: "The Way" is a powerful and inspirational story about family, friends and the challenges we face while navigating this ever-changing and complicated world. Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to St. Jean Pied de Port, France to collect the remains of his adult son (played by Emilio Estevez), killed in the Pyrenees in a storm while walking the Camino de Santiago, also known as The Way of Saint James. Rather than return home, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage to honor his son's desire to finish the journey. What Tom doesn't plan on is the profound impact the journey will have on him and his "California Bubble Life". Inexperienced as a trekker, Tom soon discovers that he will not be alone on this journey. On his journey, Tom meets other pilgrims from around the world, each with their own issues and looking for greater meaning in their lives: a Dutchman (Yorick van Wageningen), a Canadian (Deborah Kara Unger) and an Irish writer (James Nesbitt), who is suffering from a bout of writer's block. From the unexpected and, often times, amusing experiences along the way, this unlikely quartet of misfits creates an everlasting bond and Tom begins to learn what it means to be a citizen of the world again. Through Tom's unresolved relationship with his son, he discovers the difference between "the life we live and the life we choose".

le dîner de cons_1998.opis_neo:
Premožni založnik Pierre Brochanat s svojimi prijatelji vsako sredo organizira skupno večerjo.

Tije prijatelji vsak teden pripravljajo večerjo, na kateri pripelje vsak največjega bedaka, kar ga najdejo. Nato se šalijo za njihov račun in izberejo največjega bedaka.
le dîner de cons_1998.opis_omdb: To amuse themselves at a weekly dinner, a few well-heeled folk each bring a dimwit along who is to talk about his pastime. Each member seeks to introduce a champion dumbbell. Pierre, an avid participant of the game, runs into one problem after another that devilishly compromises his secrets, turning the tables on him and his objective, which diverges as the movie progresses. Firstly, wishing to be certain he has selected a winner, he invited his guest, Mr. Pignon, to meet him at home before setting off; but night of all nights, Pierre has put his back out and it is questionable whether he can manage to get to the dinner. The blundering Mr. Pignon will continually spring forward to help relieve Pierre of his troubles, which have drastically compounded, pointing in the direction of friends, taxes and women, and Pierre's dimwit Pignon accordingly will prove his substance to the end.

the radleys_2024.opis_neo: Radleyjevi so običajna družina, ki pa ima temačno skrivnost. So abstinentski vampirji. Kot da ni že dovolj hudo, da si najstnik, najstnike v družini po navadi prevzame krvi željni nagon, ki razkrije srhljivo resnico in odpre vrata članu širše družine, da znova vstopi in izkorenini njihov nekoč popolni košček predmestja.
the radleys_2024.opis_omdb: A seemingly ordinary family actually has a dark secret: they are vampires. They choose not to drink blood despite their natural cravings, but their truth is revealed one day.

kompromat_2022.opis_neo:
Francoski diplomat mora v Sibiriji pobegniti pred zaroto FSB.

Mathieuja, člana francoskega inštituta v Irkutsku, čez noč aretirajo ruske oblasti. Zaprt in obtožen spolne zlorabe lastne hčerke spozna, da je žrtev kompromata. S pomočjo FSB je nekdo sestavil primer, da bi ga obtožil. Dokazovanje njegove nedolžnosti je nemogoče: edina rešitev je pobeg.
kompromat_2022.opis_omdb: Based on incredible true events, Jérome Salle's gripping new espionage thriller depicts the remarkable story of a French public servant who unwittingly finds himself in conflict with one of the modern era's most powerful and dangerous forces: Russia's FSB. Gilles Lellouche stars as Mathieu, a gregarious and dedicated diplomat who accepts a posting to Irkutsk as the head of Siberia's Alliance Francaise. He hopes the change will be good for his family and struggling marriage, but before long Mathieu's staging of cultural events and support of artistic expression sees him fall afoul of local authorities. Accused of a terrible crime, he soon realises someone has fabricated a case with Russia's Federal Security Service - he has been framed. Arrested, imprisoned and isolated, Mathieu has nowhere to turn. Defending himself is impossible, the French authorities are helpless - it seems he has no choice: to try and escape.

endzeit_2018.opis_neo:
Minili sta dve leti, odkar je epidemija okužila vsa nemška mesta razen dveh. Vivi in Eva pobegneta iz skupnosti v Weimarju, ki se spopada s težavami.

Oboževalci grozljiv bodo prišli na svoj račun, saj prihaja prvorazredna grozljivka o zombijih, po kateri se boste dodobra zamislili. Od izbruha epidemije zombijskega virusa, ki je okužil vse, sta minili dve leti. Epidemija je prizanesla samo dvema nemškima mestoma. Vivi in Eva bežita iz predzadnje skupnosti v Weimaru proti zadnjemu varnemu pribežališču - Jeni.
endzeit_2018.opis_omdb: It has been two years since a zombie virus epidemic infected all but two German cities. Vivi and Eva flee the struggling community in Weimar for the one other safe-haven: Jena.

evidence_2012.opis_neo:
Detektiva Reese in Burquez sta zadolžena za raziskavo krutega umora petih ljudi na zapuščeni bencinski črpalki v puščavi.

Detektiva Reese in Burquez sta zadolžena za raziskavo krutega umora petih ljudi na zapuščeni bencinski črpalki v puščavi. Pri preiskavi krutega zločina si lahko pomagata samo s posnetki iz videokamer in mobilnih telefonov žrtev. 

Kmalu odkrijeta, da so bile žrtve z avtobusom namenjene v Las Vegas, ko je prišlo do prometne nesreče, po kateri je skrivnostni morilec umoril enega za drugim. Bosta detektiva uspela odkriti krivca, preden bo znova udaril?
evidence_2012.opis_omdb: Ryan makes a documentary on his friend, Brett, and his first time camping, until a mysterious figure in the woods starts hunting them.

taxi 4_2007.opis_neo:
Najhitrejši marsejski taksist mora znova priskočiti na pomoč svojemu nerodnemu policijskemu prijatelju v lovu na nevarnega pobeglega zapornika.

Nesrečni in nerodni očarljivi policist iz Marseilla, Émilien Coutant-Kerbalec, mora pomagati "hujšemu od Clouseaja" načelniku Gibertu, ki varuje belgijskega kriminalca, ki je nevaren kot Hannibal Lector. Émilienov kul prijatelj, taksist Daniel Morales, sprva pristane le na to, da bo pazil na prijatelja, medtem ko je Émilienova soproga Petra daleč na tajni nalogi. Toda Belgijec kmalu pobegne in prijatelji med lovom nanj naletijo na bančni rop in vilo mamilarskega lorda, kjer nastane pravi kaos.
taxi 4_2007.opis_omdb: Unlucky, clumsy, charming Marseille PD detective Émilien Coutant-Kerbalec must assist worse-than-Clouseau commissioner Gibert guarding a Belgian criminal reputed as dangerous as - and caged like Hannibal Lector. Émilien's cool friend, taxi driver Daniel Morales, initially only agrees to babysit both their buddy-sons, as Émilien's wife Petra is away on top-secret mission. But soon the Belgian escapes, and while chasing him the mates stumble on a bank robbery and a drug king's palatial villa, where the grand finale reeks havoc.

mafia mamma_2023.opis_neo:
Zelo hitro se bo morala Kristin naučiti prav vsega, če bo želela, da jo sprejmejo kot mafijsko šefico in da bi postala ''mama mafija''.

Ameriška mama podeduje dedkov mafijski imperij v Italiji. Kot nova vodja družinskega podjetja pod vodstvom njegovega konziliarja na zabaven način kljubuje pričakovanjem vseh.
mafia mamma_2023.opis_omdb: An American mom inherits her grandfather's mafia empire in Italy. Guided by the firm's consigliere, she hilariously defies everyone's expectations as the new head of the family business.

rampart_2011.opis_neo:
Dava Browna (Harrelson), zadnjega samosvojega policaja losangeleške policije, so posnele ulične kamere, kako nasilno obračunava z osumljencem.

Dava Browna (Harrelson), zadnjega samosvojega policaja losangeleške policije, so posnele ulične kamere, kako nasilno obračunava z osumljencem, zato se znova znajde sredi škandala, ki bo pomenil konec časov, ko je bil s svojim ravnanjem nad zakonom. Dave postane primer policijske korupcije in tarča morilcev policajev, ki hočejo maščevanje. Nič ni tako, kot se zdi, ko se Dave spušča v podzemlje Los Angelesa, da bi uveljavil svojo pravico.
rampart_2011.opis_omdb: Dave Brown is a Los Angeles police officer who works out of the Rampart Division. Dave is misogynistic, racist, brutally violent, egotistical and a womanizer, although he defends himself against many of these accusations as he says that his hate is equal opportunity. However unlawful, he uses intimidation and brutal force to defend his ideals. The most notorious of his actions is purportedly murdering a suspected serial date rapist, which is why he has been given the nickname "Date Rape Dave". He lives with two of his ex-wives - sisters Barbara and Catherine - in an effort to keep family together, namely his two daughters, Helen and Margaret, who each have a different sister as their mother. Dave still maintains a sexual relationship with both sisters - whenever the mood suits any of them - while he openly has other sexual relationships. His life is put under a microscope after he is caught on video brutally beating a person with who he got into an automobile crash. This situation is made all the more difficult for the police department because of the Rampart scandal. This microscope shows a further potentially scandalous incident involving Dave and a grocery store hold-up. Although he secretly has his defenders within the police department highers-up, Dave, who is unrepentant regarding his actions, has to figure out who he can and cannot trust among his colleagues and new associates as he goes about his business and tries to protect his ideals from being taken away by these scandals.

#no_filter_2022.opis_neo:
Anna, najboljša vplivnica na svoji srednji šoli, se trudi uravnotežiti svoje resnične in virtualne sledilce, kar povzroča zabrisano mejo med obema.

Kot vplivnica v svoji srednji šoli Anna še vedno odkriva prednosti in pomanjkljivosti svojega statusa. Ko je sama doma, se odloči pridobiti čim več sledilcev, toda ko se zabriše meja med resničnim in iluzijo, se noč obarva krvavo.
#no_filter_2022.opis_omdb: Anna, the top social influencer at her high school, struggles to balance her real and virtual followers, causing a blurred line between the two.

gallows hill_2013.opis_neo:
V Bogoti v Kolumbiji se je ameriški vdovec David Reynolds s svojo zaročenko Lauren in hčerko Jill pripravljen vrniti v Ameriko.

V Bogoti v Kolumbiji se je ameriški vdovec David Reynolds s svojo zaročenko Lauren in hčerko Jill pripravljen vrniti v Ameriko, da bi se poročil po smrti žene Marcele. Toda Jill pozabi svoj potni list v hiši tete Gine, zato potuje v avtu skupaj z Gino in svojim fantom Ramonom v mesto, kjer živi Gina. Odpravijo se po bližnjici , ko jih ustavi Morales in jih opozori na poplavljeno pot in na nevarnost, če bodo nadaljevali po njej, toda Gina se vseeno odloči iti po tej poti. Doživijo nesrečo. Pot se odločijo nadaljevati peš in naletijo na stari hotel, zaprt od leta 1978. Lastnik Filipe jih nejevoljno spusti noter. Jill sliši jok in najdejo Ano Marijo v lesenem zaboju.
gallows hill_2013.opis_omdb: When an all-American college student gets bitten by a vampire, he stumbles upon a coven of old world vampires, finds an unexpected romance, and uncovers the twisted history of an age-old bloody business.

maigret_2022.opis_neo:
Filmska priredba slavne kriminalke Georgesa Simenona o detektivu pariške policije Maigretu, z legendarnim Gerardom Depardieujem v glavni vlogi.

Filmska priredba slavne kriminalke Georgesa Simenona z detektivom pariške policije Maigretom, z legendarnim Gerardom Depardieujem v glavni vlogi. Simenonov privlačni retro slog nas z nostalgijo spominja na še eno priljubljeno slavno avtorico staromodnih kriminalk - Agatho Christie. Na pariškem trgu najdejo umorjeno mlado dekle, oblečeno v večerno obleko. Detektiv Maigret skuša ugotoviti, kdo je, nato pa odkriti, kaj se je dejansko zgodilo.
maigret_2022.opis_omdb: In Paris, a young girl is found dead in a Parisian square, wearing an evening dress. Commissioner Maigret will try to identify her and then understand what happened to the victim.

vice_2015.opis_neo:
Bruce Willis kot Jualian Michaels igra v tem znanstveno fantazijskem trilerju o vrhunskem letovišču, Pregrehi.

Julian je vodja vrhunskega letovišča v katerem ni pravil in omejitev, obiskovalci pa imajo priložnost izkusiti svoje najbolj nore sanje, s pomočjo robotov, ki so videti kot ljudje. Ko se eden izmed ženskih robotov začne zavedati sebe in pobegne, se znajde sredi ognja med Julianovimi likvidatorji in policijo, ki želi zapreti Pregreho.
vice_2015.opis_omdb: Julian Michaels (Bruce Willis) has designed the ultimate resort: VICE, where anything goes and the customers can play out their wildest fantasies with artificial inhabitants who look, think and feel like humans. When an artificial (Ambyr Childers) becomes self-aware and escapes, she finds herself caught in the crossfire between Julian's mercenaries and a cop (Thomas Jane) who is hell-bent on shutting down Vice, and stopping the violence once and for all.

dark skies_2013.opis_neo:
Producenti filmov Paranormal, Insidious in Sinister predstavljajo nadnaravno srhljivko o mladi družini iz predmestja.

Daniel in Lacy Barrett sta priča vse hujšemu zaporedju zaskrbljujočih dogodkov, zaradi česar začne njuna sicer varna in mirna družina pokati po šivih. Kmalu postane jasno, da so Barettovi na muhi strašanske smrtonosne sile, zato Daniel in Lacy zadeve vzameta v svoje roke, da zaščitita družino in razrešita skrivnost, ki jih je obsedla.
dark skies_2013.opis_omdb: The Barrett family-mother Lacy, father Daniel, older son Jesse, and younger son Sammy-reside on a quiet suburban street in an unnamed American city. Daniel is currently unemployed, placing the burden of supporting the family on Lacy, who works as a real estate agent. Their two sons enjoy a happy relationship and communicate with each other from their beds via walk-talkie. A number of strange occurrences befall the family. During the night, the contents of the kitchen are rearranged in bizarre configurations. The house alarm is set off when it detects that all entry points were breached simultaneously. Sammy suffers a fit while playing soccer and Lacy is shocked when hundreds of birds suddenly crash into the house. One night, Lacy is awakened by a sound from Sammy's room. When she goes to check on him, through the darkness she sees a figure standing over his bed. She turns on the light to find an empty room. Sammy is found walking away from the house but cannot remember leaving. Lacy, Daniel and Jesse each suffer catatonic episodes and regain consciousness with no memory of their experiences.

100% wolf_2020.opis_neo:
Freddy se na svoj 13. rojstni dan namesto v volkodlaka spremeni v pudlja. Zdaj želi svojemu tropu dokazati, da je v svojem bistvu še vedno volk.

Zgodba 100% Volk v ospredje postavi Freddyja, dediča ponosne družinske linije volkodlakov. Prepričan, da bo postal najbolj strašen volkodlak vseh časov, je Freddy šokiran, ko se na njegov 14. rojstni dan, po njegovem prvem “boju”, spremeni v divjega…pudlja. Freddy ima čas do naslednje polne lune, da starešinam tropa dokaže, da ima pravo volčje srce, sicer tvega, da ga bodo za vedno izgnali iz tropa. Premagati mora svojo roza in pouhasto zunanjost, da dokaže, da je še vedno 100-odstotni volk.
100% wolf_2020.opis_omdb: 100% Wolf centers on Freddy Lupin, heir to a proud family line of werewolves. Positive he'll become the most fearsome werewolf ever, Freddy is in for a shock when his first "warfing" goes awry, turning him into a ferocious - poodle.

suspect zero_2004.opis_neo:
Serijski morilec lovi druge serijske morilce, ob tem pa eden od agentov FBI-ja sumi, da se za samooklicanim delivcem pravice skriva več, kot se zdi.

Ker se agent FBI Thomas Mackelway med aretacijo surovo znese nad serijskim morilcem Raymondom Starkyjem, je Starkey zdaj svoboden, Mackelway pa degradiran. Prvi dan v svoji novi službi Mackelway preiskuje umor, za katerega se izkaže, da je prvi od treh navidezno nepovezanih umorov. Ena od žrtev je tudi njegov sovražnik Raymond Starkey.
suspect zero_2004.opis_omdb: When Dallas FBI Agent Thomas Mackelway violates serial killer Raymond Starkey's civil rights during an unorthodox arrest, Starkey goes free and Mackelway is demoted to a remote branch of the agency in Albuquerque. His first day on the job, Mackelway investigates the murder of traveling salesman Harold Speck, which turns out to be the first of three seemingly random killings. Perhaps they are not random at all. The last to die is Mackelway's nemesis, Raymond Starkey. The assignment consumes him, his past mistakes haunt him, and his head throbs constantly as he tries to find the link between the victims that will lead him to their killer while the case becomes increasingly gruesome and patently personal. This does not go unnoticed by his unflappable partner Fran Kulok, who knows of Mackelway's past and the demons that afflict him. Like Mackelway, she becomes drawn into the labyrinth of chilling clues, all of which point to the enigmatic Benjamin O'Ryan. O'Ryan clearly has a connection to the murders, a connection he flaunts. Quite possibly, he may also harbor a sinister link to Mackelway.

secuestrados_2010.opis_neo:
Jaime in Marta se s hčerko Isabel preselita v novo razkošno hišo.

Jaime in Marta se s hčerko Isabel preselita v novo razkošno hišo. Starša preživljata težko obdobje, a se odločita svojemu zakonu dati še eno priložnost. Prvi večer v novi hiši vanjo vlomijo trije zamaskirani moški. Njihov cilj je v enem večeru izvleči iz žrtev čim več denarja.
secuestrados_2010.opis_omdb: Jaime, his wife Marta and their teenage daughter Isa move to a dream house in Madrid and they plan a family dinner to celebrate. Out of the blue, three violent hooded thieves break in their house and hold the Marta and Isa hostage while their leader goes to the bank with Jaime to withdraw money from the family bank accounts in a tragic night of terror.

bling_2016.opis_neo:
Ko zlobnež Oskar z uničenjem grozi celotnemu mestu, njegova usoda leži v rokah nerodnega izumitelja Sama in njegovih robotkov.

Sam je mladi izumitelj, ki se najraje ukvarja z malimi robotki. Ko zlobnež Oskar preti z uničenjem celotnega mesta, usoda prebivalcev leži v rokah nerodnega izumitelja in njegovih treh robotkov. 
V futurističnem svetu se poleg reševanja mesta, Sam sooča tudi z vprašanjem pomembnih vrednot, kot sta ljubezen in prijateljstvo.
bling_2016.opis_omdb: Lowly theme park mechanic Sam dreams about his childhood sweetheart Sue. With the misguided belief that only a bling ring can win the girl of his dreams, Sam plans the most perfect night to propose to his one true love. But when supervillain Oscar shows up with an evil scheme involving a ring of his own, Sam's plans are thrown into utter disarray. After mistaking each other's rings for their own, Sam teams up with his robot superheroes to track down his engagement ring and save the city... learning that it's not about the size of the bling, but the size of your heart.

upstream color_2013.opis_neo:
Identiteta postane iluzija, a vendar nas sili v včasih nepredstavljiva dejanja in nam lahko uniči življenje, nam in našim bližnjim.

Moški in ženska, ki ju vleče drug k drugemu, vpletena v življenjski krog večnega organizma. Identiteta postane iluzija, a vendar nas sili v včasih nepredstavljiva dejanja in nam lahko uniči življenje, nam in našim bližnjim.
upstream color_2013.opis_omdb: Kris is attacked one night, and hypnotized, using a grub with hypnotic properties, administered by a thief. She follows the thief's instructions to give him everything, even taking out loans. After the worms are extracted, she wakes up to find her life ruined. She's lost her job, her finances are destroyed. Years later, she meets Jeff whom she may have a lot in common with.

kingsman: the secret service_2014.opis_neo:
Tajna vohunska organizacija v svoj program urjenja sprejme težavnega, a obetavnega mladeniča, medtem ko svetu grozi nori genij s smrtonosnim načrtom.

Oče petletnega Eggsyja med tajno vojaško vajo izgubi življenje. Sedemnajst let pozneje mladega prestopnika Eggsyja aretirajo, iz zapora pa ga reši Harry Hart, uglajen vohun, ki svoje življenje dolguje prav Eggsyjevemu očetu. Mladenič začne program za treniranje vohunov ravno v času, ko pokvarjeni tehnološki genij grozi, da bo uničil svet.

kong: skull island_2017.opis_neo:
Raznolika ekipa znanstvenikov, vojakov in pustolovcev se poda na raziskovalno odpravo na mitičen in še neraziskan otok v Tihem oceanu.

Po vietnamski vojni skupina znanstvenikov raziskuje neznani otok v Tihem oceanu in se poda na območje mogočnega Konga, kjer se mora boriti, da bi ubežala prvinskemu raju.
kong: skull island_2017.opis_omdb: A washed up monster chaser convinces the U.S. Government to fund a trip to an unexplored island in the South Pacific. Under the guise of geological research, the team travels to "Skull Island". Upon arrival, the group discover that their mission may be complicated by the wildlife which inhabits the island. The beautiful vistas and deadly creatures create a visually stunning experience that is sure to keep your attention.

deep blue sea_1999.opis_neo:
Znanstvenica Susan McAlester je tik pred zgodovinskim odkritjem.

V tajnem laboratoriju pod morsko gladino znanstveniki raziskujejo možganske bolezni. V bližini so zaprti morski psi z zelo razvitimi možgani, ki so jih ustvarili z biološkim inženiringom. Nevarni morski psi pobegnejo iz tanka in za znanstvenike se začne pekel, iz katerega se bodo težko rešili.
deep blue sea_1999.opis_omdb: A businessman sinks $200 million into a special project to help fight Alzheimer's disease. As part of this project, medical biologist Susan McAlester rather naughtily figures out a way to genetically enlarge shark brains, so that disease-battling enzymes can be harvested. However, the shark subjects become super smart and decide they don't much like being cooped up in pens and being stabbed with hypodermics, so they figure a way to break out and make for the open sea...

the equalizer 2_2018.opis_neo:
Robert McCall, ki neusmiljeno sodi izkoriščanim in zatiranim, se po umoru svojega dolgoletnega dekleta poda na maščevalski pohod po vsem svetu.

Denzel Washington se vrača kot Robert McCall, upokojeni marinec in vohun pri Obveščevalni agenciji ministrstva za obrambo. Ko nekdo umori njegovo nekdanjo šefinjo Susan (Melissa Leo), se Pravičnik še enkrat odpravi na maščevalni pohod.
the equalizer 2_2018.opis_omdb: Director Antoine Fuqua reunites with Denzel Washington in this sequel to 2014's The Equalizer. Washington resumes his role as Robert McCall: a retired CIA Black Ops operative who now works as a Lyft driver and moonlights as a vigilante. When his long-time friend is murdered he embarks on a relentless, globe-trotting quest for vengeance.

her aussie romance_2026.opis_neo: Nesproščena potopiska se nauči živeti na polno, ko na najnovejšem potovanju po deželi tam spodaj sreča flegmatičnega nogometaša.
her aussie romance_2026.opis_omdb: Georgie lives a hectic life as a travel writer, constantly moving between cities with 24-hour stopovers. Now her editor wants her to take on a bigger, longer assignment: a full week in Melbourne, Australia, to write a major feature article. Full of plans, Georgie travels there, but when she arrives at the airport, no one shows up to pick her up. Eventually, Zach appears - having been asked to step in at the last minute. On the way to the hotel, he shows her a few unexpected places, and on a whim Georgie persuades Zach to be her guide for the entire week. The week gives Georgie not only a different perspective on Melbourne, but also a reason to reflect on her own life.

man of the house_2005.opis_neo:
Teksaški ranger mora zaščititi skupino navijačic, ki so bile priče umora.

Tommy Lee Jones bo postal trener navijaške skupine.
man of the house_2005.opis_omdb: When a key informant against a notorious crime boss is assassinated, the only witnesses to his murder are five lively cheerleaders from the University of Texas: Barb, Anne, Evie, Heather, and Teresa. With the girls' lives in danger until the authorities discover the killer, the hard-headed Texas Ranger, Roland Sharp, has to go undercover and move in with them at a secret safe house, as the mysterious murderer is still at large. However, to effectively protect the teenage quintet of eyewitnesses, Sharp must first lay down the ground rules for a harmonious, and above all, safe coexistence. Will the man of the house succeed in his mission?
